Over the set of admissible parameter values the average impact of volatility on the target is zero. Endogenous selection, reflecting termination of firms that run out of cash, leads to a positive average impact of volatility on the target level of cash, consistent with empirical findings.
papers.zh_title: 财务约束企业的预防性储蓄
papers.zh_abstract: 对于无法筹集外部资金的企业而言，手头现金充当了预防性储蓄。我们在存在持续性现金流的情况下，推导出了手头现金目标水平的闭式解。与传统观点相反，现金流波动的均值保持型增加可能会降低这一目标水平。在可接受的参数值集合内，波动性对目标水平的平均影响为零。反映现金耗尽企业终止的内生选择，导致波动性对现金目标水平的平均正向影响，这与实证结果一致。

papers.title: How Do Employers Use Compensation History?: Evidence From a Field Experiment
papers.authors: Moshe A. Barach, John J. Horton
papers.abstract: We report the results of a field experiment in which treated employers could not observe the compensation history of their job applicants. Treated employers responded by evaluating more applicants, and evaluating those applicants more intensively. They also responded by changing what kind of workers they evaluated: treated employers evaluated workers with 5% lower past average wages and hired workers with 13% lower past average wages. Conditional upon bargaining, workers hired by treated employers struck better wage bargains for themselves.
papers.zh_title: 雇主如何使用薪酬历史？来自实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了一项实地实验的结果，在该实验中，受处理的雇主无法观察到其求职者的薪酬历史。受处理的雇主通过评估更多求职者，并更深入地评估这些求职者来做出回应。他们还通过改变他们评估的工人类型来做出回应：受处理的雇主评估了过去平均工资低5%的工人，并雇用了过去平均工资低13%的工人。在讨价还价的情况下，受处理雇主雇用的工人为自己争取到了更好的工资协议。

papers.title: College Access and Adult Health
papers.authors: Benjamin W. Cowan, Nathan Tefft
papers.abstract: We investigate the relationship between college openings, college attainment, and health behaviors and outcomes later in life. Though a large prior literature attempts to isolate the causal effect of education on health via instrumental variables (IV), most studies use instruments that affect schooling behavior in childhood or adolescence, i.e. before the college enrollment decision. Our paper examines whether an increase in 2 and 4-year institutions per capita (“college accessibility”) in a state contributes to higher college attainment and better health later in life. Using 1980-2015 Census and American Community Survey data, we find consistent evidence that accessibility of public 2-year institutions positively affects schooling attainment and subsequent employment and earnings levels among whites but not among people of color. We then examine how public 2-year accessibility affects twenty health behaviors and outcomes in adulthood by employing restricted-use 1984-2015 National Health Interview Survey data. Only self-reported health is significantly affected by college accessibility among all (white) individuals. Among older men, however, college accessibility has a protective effect on several additional outcomes, including smoking behavior, exercise, the probability of a stroke or heart attack, and mortality.
papers.zh_title: 大学入学机会与成年健康
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大学开设、大学教育程度与晚年健康行为和结果之间的关系。尽管大量先前文献试图通过工具变量（IV）来隔离教育对健康的因果效应，但大多数研究使用的工具变量会影响儿童或青少年时期（即大学入学决策之前）的学校教育行为。本文考察了一个州内人均两年制和四年制院校数量的增加（“大学可及性”）是否有助于提高大学教育程度并改善晚年健康。利用1980-2015年人口普查和美国社区调查数据，我们发现一致证据表明，公立两年制院校的可及性对白人的教育程度以及随后的就业和收入水平有积极影响，但对有色人种没有影响。然后，我们通过使用受限使用的1984-2015年全国健康访谈调查数据，考察公立两年制院校的可及性如何影响成年期的二十种健康行为和结果。在所有（白人）个体中，只有自评健康受到大学可及性的显著影响。然而，在老年男性中，大学可及性对若干其他结果具有保护作用，包括吸烟行为、锻炼、中风或心脏病发作的概率以及死亡率。

papers.title: Target Date Funds and Portfolio Choice in 401(k) Plans
papers.authors: Olivia S. Mitchell, Stephen Utkus
papers.abstract: Target date funds in corporate retirement plans grew from $5B in 2000 to $734B in 2018, partly because federal regulation sanctioned these as default investments in automatic enrollment plans. We show that adopters delegated pension investment decisions to fund managers selected by plan sponsors. Including these funds in retirement saving menus raised equity shares, boosted bond exposures, curtailed cash/company stock holdings, and reduced idiosyncratic risk. The adoption of low-cost target date funds may enhance retirement wealth by as much as 50 percent over a 30-year horizon.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS；JEL：D12, D14, D91, G5, G51, J32
papers.zh_title: 目标日期基金与401(k)计划中的投资组合选择
papers.zh_abstract: 企业退休计划中的目标日期基金从2000年的50亿美元增长到2018年的7340亿美元，部分原因是联邦法规批准这些基金作为自动注册计划中的默认投资。我们表明，采用者将养老金投资决策委托给由计划发起人选择的基金经理。将这些基金纳入退休储蓄菜单提高了股票配置比例，增加了债券敞口，减少了现金/公司股票持有量，并降低了特质风险。采用低成本的目标日期基金可能在30年的时间范围内将退休财富提高多达50%。

papers.title: A Unified Perspective on Efficiency, Redistribution, and Public Policy
papers.authors: Louis Kaplow
papers.abstract: Specialized theoretical and empirical research should in principle be embedded in a unified framework that identifies the relevant interactions among different phenomena, enables an appropriate matching of policy instruments to objectives, and grounds normative analysis in individuals’ utilities and a social welfare function. This article advances an approach that both provides integration across many dimensions and contexts and also identifies which tasks may be undertaken separately and how such analysis should be conducted so as to be consistent with the underlying framework. It employs the distribution-neutral methodology and welfare analysis developed in Kaplow (2008a) and related work, offering applications to income taxation, commodity taxation, tax expenditures, externalities, public goods, capital income and wealth taxation, social security and retirement savings, estate and gift taxation, and transfer programs. It also explores welfare criteria and examines how their consideration enables the normative analysis of the taxation of families, heterogeneous preferences, and tax administration and enforcement.
papers.zh_title: 效率、再分配与公共政策的统一视角
papers.zh_abstract: 专门的理论和实证研究原则上应嵌入一个统一的框架中，该框架识别不同现象之间的相关相互作用，使政策工具与目标适当匹配，并将规范分析建立在个人效用和社会福利函数的基础上。本文提出了一种方法，该方法既提供了跨多个维度和背景的整合，又识别了哪些任务可以分开进行，以及应如何进行分析以使其与基础框架保持一致。它采用了Kaplow（2008a）及相关工作中发展的分配中性方法论和福利分析，并应用于所得税、商品税、税收支出、外部性、公共品、资本收入和财富税、社会保障和退休储蓄、遗产和赠与税以及转移支付项目。它还探讨了福利标准，并考察了对其的考虑如何能够实现对家庭税收、异质性偏好以及税收征管和执行的规范分析。

papers.title: Inequality, Information Failures, and Air Pollution
papers.authors: Catherine Hausman, Samuel Stolper
papers.abstract: Research spanning several disciplines has repeatedly documented disproportionate pollution exposure in low-income communities and communities of color. Among the various proposed causes of this pattern, those that have received the most attention are income inequality, discrimination, and ﬁrm costs (of inputs and regulatory compliance). We argue that an additional channel – information – is likely to play an important role in generating disparities in pollution exposure. We present multiple reasons for a tendency to underestimate pollution burdens. Using a model of housing choice, we then derive conditions under which “hidden” pollution leads to an inequality – even when all households face the same lack of information. This inequality arises when households sort according to known pollution and other disamenities, which we show are positively correlated with hidden pollution. To help bridge the gap between environmental justice and economics, we discuss the relationship between hidden information and three diﬀerent distributional measures: exposure to pollution; exposure to hidden pollution; and welfare loss due to hidden pollution.
papers.zh_title: 不平等、信息失灵与空气污染
papers.zh_abstract: 跨越多个学科的研究反复记录了低收入社区和有色人种社区承受着不成比例的污染暴露。在提出的各种原因中，受到最多关注的是收入不平等、歧视和企业成本（包括投入成本和合规成本）。我们认为，另一个渠道——信息——可能在产生污染暴露差异中扮演重要角色。我们提出了多种理由说明存在低估污染负担的倾向。通过使用一个住房选择模型，我们推导出“隐藏”污染导致不平等的条件——即使所有家庭面临相同的信息缺失。当家庭根据已知污染和其他不便利因素进行排序时，这种不平等就会出现，而我们表明这些因素与隐藏污染正相关。为了帮助弥合环境正义与经济学之间的差距，我们讨论了隐藏信息与三种不同分配度量之间的关系：污染暴露、隐藏污染暴露以及因隐藏污染导致的福利损失。

papers.title: Unpacking Skill Bias: Automation and New Tasks
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: The standard approach to modeling inequality, building on Tinbergen's seminal work, assumes factor-augmenting technologies and technological change biased in favor of skilled workers. Though this approach has been successful in conceptualizing and documenting the race between technology and education, it is restrictive in a number of crucial respects. First, it predicts that technological improvements should increase the real wages of all workers. Second, it requires sizable productivity growth to account for realistic changes in relative wages. Third, it is silent on changes in job and task composition. We extend this framework by modeling the allocation of tasks to factors and allowing richer forms of technological changes in particular, automation that displaces workers from tasks they used to perform, and the creation of new tasks that reinstate workers into the production process. We show that factor prices depend on the set of tasks that factors perform, and that automation: (i) powerfully impacts inequality; (ii) can reduce real wages; and (iii) can generate realistic changes in inequality with small changes in productivity. New tasks, on the other hand, can increase or reduce inequality depending on whether it is skilled or unskilled workers that have a comparative advantage in these new activities. Using industry-level estimates of displacement driven by automation and reinstatement due to new tasks, we show that displacement is associated with significant increases in industry demand for skills both before 1987 and after 1987, while reinstatement reduced the demand for skills before 1987, but generated higher demand for skills after 1987. The combined effects of displacement and reinstatement after 1987 explain a significant part of the shift towards greater demand for skills in the US economy.
papers.zh_title: 解析技能偏向：自动化与新任务
papers.zh_abstract: 基于Tinbergen开创性工作的不平等建模标准方法，假设了要素增强型技术和偏向于高技能工人的技术变革。尽管这种方法在概念化和记录技术与教育之间的竞赛方面是成功的，但在几个关键方面具有局限性。首先，它预测技术进步应提高所有工人的实际工资。其次，它需要可观的生产率增长来解释实际相对工资的变化。第三，它对工作和任务构成的变化保持沉默。我们通过将任务分配给要素的建模以及允许更丰富的技术变革形式——特别是将工人从他们过去执行的任务中替代出来的自动化，以及将工人重新纳入生产过程的新任务的创造——来扩展这一框架。我们表明要素价格取决于要素执行的任务集，并且自动化：（i）强烈影响不平等；（ii）可能降低实际工资；（iii）能够以较小的生产率变化产生现实的不平等变化。另一方面，新任务可以增加或减少不平等，这取决于高技能还是低技能工人在这些新活动中具有比较优势。利用由自动化驱动的替代和由新任务导致的重新安置的行业层面估计，我们表明替代与1987年前后行业对技能需求的显著增加相关，而重新安置在1987年前降低了对技能的需求，但在1987年后产生了更高的技能需求。1987年后替代和重新安置的综合效应解释了美国经济中对技能需求增加的大部分转变。

papers.title: Structural Increases in Skill Demand after the Great Recession
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, David J. Deming
papers.abstract: In this paper we use detailed job vacancy data to estimate changes in skill demand in the years since the Great Recession. The share of job vacancies requiring a bachelor’s degree increased by more than 60 percent between 2007 and 2019, with faster growth in professional occupations and high-wage cities. Since the labor market was becoming tighter over this period, cyclical “upskilling” is unlikely to explain our findings.
papers.zh_title: 大衰退后技能需求的结构性增长
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用详细的职位空缺数据来估计大衰退后几年技能需求的变化。2007年至2019年间，要求学士学位的职位空缺比例增加了超过60%，在专业职业和高工资城市中增长更快。由于在此期间劳动力市场日益紧张，周期性“技能提升”不太可能解释我们的发现。

papers.title: Demand Shocks, Procurement Policies, and the Nature of Medical Innovation: Evidence from Wartime Prosthetic Device Patents
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Parker Rogers
papers.abstract: We analyze wartime prosthetic device patents to investigate how procurement policy affects the cost, quality, and quantity of medical innovation. Analyzing whether inventions emphasize cost and/or quality requires generating new data. We do this by first hand-coding the economic traits emphasized in 1,200 patent documents. We then train a machine learning algorithm and apply the trained models to a century's worth of medical and mechanical patents that form our analysis sample. In our analysis of these new data, we find that the relatively stingy, fixed-price contracts of the Civil War era led inventors to focus broadly on reducing costs, while the less cost-conscious procurement contracts of World War I did not. We provide a conceptual framework that highlights the economic forces that drive this key finding. We also find that inventors emphasized dimensions of product quality (e.g., a prosthetic's appearance or comfort) that aligned with differences in buyers' preferences across wars. Finally, we find that the Civil War and World War I procurement shocks led to substantial increases in the quantity of prosthetic device patenting relative to patenting in other medical and mechanical technology classes. We conclude that procurement environments can significantly shape the scientific problems with which inventors engage, including the choice to innovate on quality or cost.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, DAE, EH, IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H57, I1, O31
papers.zh_title: 需求冲击、采购政策与医疗创新的本质：来自战时假肢专利的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析战时假肢专利，以研究采购政策如何影响医疗创新的成本、质量和数量。分析发明是否强调成本和/或质量需要生成新数据。我们通过首先手动编码1200份专利文件中强调的经济特征来实现这一点。然后，我们训练一个机器学习算法，并将训练好的模型应用于构成我们分析样本的一个世纪以来的医疗和机械专利。在对这些新数据的分析中，我们发现，内战时期相对吝啬的固定价格合同导致发明者广泛关注降低成本，而第一次世界大战时期成本意识较弱的采购合同则没有。我们提供了一个概念框架，强调驱动这一关键发现的经济力量。我们还发现，发明者强调的产品质量维度（例如假肢的外观或舒适度）与不同战争期间买家偏好的差异相一致。最后，我们发现，内战和第一次世界大战的采购冲击导致假肢专利数量相对于其他医疗和机械技术类别的专利数量大幅增加。我们得出结论，采购环境可以显著塑造发明者参与的科学问题，包括选择在质量还是成本上进行创新。

papers.title: Finance and Children’s Academic Performance
papers.authors: Qing Hu, Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Mingzhu Tai
papers.abstract: What is the impact of regulatory reforms that enhance credit market efficiency on children’s human capital? Using a parent-child panel dataset, we find that such reforms reduced children’s academic performance in low-income families. Consistent with the view that financial development entices low-income parents to substitute out of childrearing and into employment with adverse effects on children’s education, we find that among low-income families, regulatory reforms: increased mother’s employment hours, reduced parental supervision and parent-child discussions about school and college, and had bigger adverse effects when mothers were not already working full-time and grandparents were not living with the child.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, CH, ED, LS；JEL：G28, I2, J2
papers.zh_title: 金融与儿童学业表现
papers.zh_abstract: 旨在提升信贷市场效率的监管改革对儿童人力资本有何影响？利用一项亲子面板数据集，我们发现此类改革降低了低收入家庭儿童的学业表现。与金融发展诱使低收入父母减少育儿投入、转而增加就业从而对子女教育产生负面影响的观点一致，我们发现在低收入家庭中，监管改革：增加了母亲的就业时间，减少了父母监督以及关于学校和大学的亲子讨论，并且当母亲尚未全职工作且祖父母不与孩子同住时，负面影响更大。

papers.title: The cost of being too patient
papers.authors: Paola Giuliano, Paola Sapienza
papers.abstract: We study the cost of being too patient on happiness. We find that the relationship between patience and various measures of subjective well-being is hump-shaped: it exists an optimal amount of patience that maximizes happiness. Beyond this optimal level, higher levels of patience have a negative impact on well-being.
papers.zh_title: 过于耐心的代价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了过于耐心对幸福感的代价。我们发现耐心与各种主观幸福感指标之间的关系呈驼峰形：存在一个最优耐心水平能最大化幸福感。超过这一最优水平后，更高的耐心水平对幸福感产生负面影响。

papers.title: States Taking the Reins? Employment Verification Requirements and Local Labor Market Outcomes
papers.authors: Shalise Ayromloo, Benjamin Feigenberg, Darren Lubotsky
papers.abstract: We estimate the impact of state-level “E-Verify” legislation that mandates employment eligibility verification for private-sector workers. We document declines in formal sector employment and employment turnover after mandate passage, with effects concentrated among those likeliest to be work-ineligible. Using newly available data, we show that larger firms are far more likely to comply with mandates. Heterogeneity in adherence leads to substantial within-state employment spillovers from larger to smaller firms, as well as a reduction in the number of large firms. We find no evidence that work-ineligible populations relocate or that native-born workers’ labor market outcomes improve in response to mandates.
papers.zh_title: 各州接手？就业资格验证要求与地方劳动力市场结果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了州级“E-Verify”立法（要求对私营部门员工进行就业资格验证）的影响。我们记录了强制要求通过后正规部门就业和就业流动性的下降，其影响集中在最可能无工作资格的人群中。利用新获得的数据，我们表明大公司更有可能遵守强制要求。遵守程度的异质性导致州内就业从大公司向小公司显著溢出，以及大公司数量的减少。我们没有发现无工作资格人群迁移或本土出生工人的劳动力市场结果因强制要求而改善的证据。

papers.title: The Polarization of Reality
papers.authors: Alberto F. Alesina, Armando Miano, Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: Americans are polarized not only in their views on policy issues and attitudes towards government and society, but also in their perceptions of the same factual reality. We conceptualize how to think about the “polarization of reality” and review recent papers that show that Republicans and Democrats view the same reality through a different lens. Perhaps, as a result, they hold different views about policies and what should be done to address economic and social issues. We also show that providing information leads to different reassessments of reality and different responses along the policy support margin, depending on one's political leaning.
papers.meta: Programs：PE, POL；JEL：D71, D72, H41, J15, P16, P35
papers.zh_title: 现实的极化
papers.zh_abstract: 美国人不仅在政策问题观点以及对政府与社会的态度上存在极化，而且在对相同事实现实的认知上也存在极化。我们概念化了如何思考“现实的极化”，并回顾了近期论文，这些论文表明共和党人和民主党人通过不同视角看待同一现实。或许，因此他们对政策以及应如何解决经济和社会问题持有不同观点。我们还表明，提供信息会导致对现实的不同重新评估以及政策支持方面的不同反应，这取决于个人的政治倾向。

papers.title: Caught between Cultures: Unintended Consequences of Improving Opportunity for Immigrant Girls
papers.authors: Gordon B. Dahl, Cristina Felfe, Paul Frijters, Helmut Rainer
papers.abstract: What happens when immigrant girls are given increased opportunities to integrate into the workplace and society, but their parents value more traditional cultural outcomes? Building on Akerlof and Kranton’s identity framework (2000), we construct a simple game-theoretic model which shows how expanding opportunities for immigrant girls can have the unintended consequence of reducing their well-being, since identity-concerned parents will constrain their daughter’s choices. The model can explain the otherwise puzzling findings from a reform which granted automatic birthright citizenship to eligible immigrant children born in Germany after January 1, 2000. Using survey data we collected in 57 schools in Germany and comparing those born in the months before versus after the reform, we find that birthright citizenship lowers measures of life satisfaction and self-esteem for immigrant girls. This is especially true for Muslims, where traditional cultural identity is salient. Birthright citizenship results in disillusionment where immigrant Muslim girls believe their chances of achieving their educational goals are lower and the perceived odds of having to forgo a career for family rise. Consistent with the model, immigrant Muslim parents invest less in their daughters’ schooling and have a lower probability of speaking German with their daughters if they are born after the reform. We further find that immigrant Muslim girls granted birthright citizenship are less likely to self-identify as German, are more socially isolated, and are less likely to believe foreigners can have a good life in Germany. In contrast, immigrant boys experience, if anything, an improvement in well-being and little effect on other outcomes. Taken together, the findings point towards immigrant girls being pushed by parents to conform to a role within traditional culture, whereas boys are allowed to take advantage of the opportunities that come with citizenship. Alternative models can explain some of the findings in isolation, while our identity model is consistent with all of the findings simultaneously.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J15, J16, Z1
papers.zh_title: 夹在文化之间：改善移民女孩机会的意外后果
papers.zh_abstract: 当移民女孩获得更多融入职场和社会的机会，但其父母更看重传统文化结果时，会发生什么？基于Akerlof和Kranton的身份认同框架（2000），我们构建了一个简单的博弈论模型，该模型表明扩大移民女孩的机会可能产生降低其福祉的意外后果，因为关注身份认同的父母会限制女儿的选择。该模型可以解释一项改革中原本令人困惑的发现：该改革赋予2000年1月1日后在德国出生的符合条件的移民儿童自动出生公民权。利用我们在德国57所学校收集的调查数据，比较改革前后几个月出生的儿童，我们发现出生公民权降低了移民女孩的生活满意度和自尊心测量值。这在穆斯林群体中尤其明显，因为其传统文化身份认同突出。出生公民权导致幻灭感，移民穆斯林女孩认为实现教育目标的机会更低，并且感知到因家庭而放弃职业的可能性上升。与模型一致，如果女儿在改革后出生，移民穆斯林父母对女儿学校教育的投资更少，与女儿说德语的概率也更低。我们进一步发现，获得出生公民权的移民穆斯林女孩更不可能自我认同为德国人，更孤立，并且更不相信外国人在德国能过上好生活。相比之下，移民男孩的福祉反而有所改善，其他结果影响甚微。综合来看，这些发现表明移民女孩被父母推向遵循传统文化中的角色，而男孩则被允许利用公民身份带来的机会。替代模型可以孤立地解释部分发现，而我们的身份认同模型同时与所有发现一致。

papers.title: The Allocation of Decision Authority to Human and Artificial Intelligence
papers.authors: Susan C. Athey, Kevin A. Bryan, Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: The allocation of decision authority by a principal to either a human agent or an artificial intelligence (AI) is examined. The principal trades off an AI’s more aligned choice with the need to motivate the human agent to expend effort in learning choice payoffs. When agent effort is desired, it is shown that the principal is more likely to give that agent decision authority, reduce investment in AI reliability and adopt an AI that may be biased. Organizational design considerations are likely to impact on how AI’s are trained.
papers.zh_title: 决策权在人类与人工智能之间的分配
papers.zh_abstract: 研究了委托人将决策权分配给人类代理人或人工智能（AI）的问题。委托人在AI更一致的选择与激励人类代理人付出努力以学习选择收益的需求之间进行权衡。当需要代理人付出努力时，研究表明委托人更可能将决策权授予该代理人，减少对AI可靠性的投资，并采用可能存在偏差的AI。组织设计考量可能会影响AI的训练方式。

papers.title: In Praise of Confidence Intervals
papers.authors: David Romer
papers.abstract: Most empirical papers in economics focus on two aspects of their results: whether the estimates are statistically significantly different from zero and the interpretation of the point estimates. This focus obscures important information about the implications of the results for economically interesting hypotheses about values of the parameters other than zero, and in some cases, about the strength of the evidence against values of zero. This limitation can be overcome by reporting confidence intervals for papers’ main estimates and discussing their economic interpretation.
papers.zh_title: 赞颂置信区间
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学中的大多数实证论文关注其结果的两个方面：估计值是否在统计上显著异于零，以及对点估计值的解释。这种关注掩盖了关于结果对参数非零值的经济学有趣假设含义的重要信息，并且在某些情况下，也掩盖了关于证据反对零值强度的信息。这一局限性可以通过报告论文主要估计值的置信区间并讨论其经济学解释来克服。

papers.title: Monetary Policy and Sovereign Risk in Emerging Economies (NK-Default)
papers.authors: Cristina Arellano, Yan Bai, Gabriel P. Mihalache
papers.abstract: This paper develops a New Keynesian model with sovereign default risk. Inflation is set by forward-looking firms, monetary policy is an interest rate rule, and the fiscal government borrows externally, long-term, with an option to default. In this framework, default risk creates inflation pressures through an expectations channel, and tight monetary policy disincentivizes fiscal overborrowing. The model sheds light on temporary inflation events in emerging-market data: short-lived spikes in inflation, spreads, and domestic policy rates. As spreads rise, firms increase their prices in expectation of higher future inflation and low consumption during default. Monetary policy tightens, which reduces inflation and helps bring spreads down by disciplining government borrowing. These monetary-fiscal interactions imply that delivering the flexible prices allocation may not be optimal for monetary policy.
papers.zh_title: 新兴经济体的货币政策与主权风险（NK-违约）
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个包含主权违约风险的新凯恩斯主义模型。通胀由前瞻性企业设定，货币政策遵循利率规则，而财政政府以长期方式外部借款，并拥有违约选择权。在此框架下，违约风险通过预期渠道产生通胀压力，而紧缩的货币政策抑制了财政过度借贷。该模型揭示了新兴市场数据中的暂时性通胀事件：通胀、利差和国内政策利率的短暂飙升。当利差上升时，企业预期未来通胀上升和违约期间消费低迷，从而提高价格。货币政策收紧，通过约束政府借贷来降低通胀并帮助压低利差。这些货币-财政互动意味着，实现灵活价格配置可能并非货币政策的最优选择。

papers.title: Time Spent Exercising and Obesity: An Application of Lewbel’s Instrumental Variables Method
papers.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, Joshua C. Pinkston, Jay Stewart
papers.abstract: This paper examines the role physical activity plays in determining body mass using data from the American Time Use Survey. Our work is the first to address the measurement error that arises when time use during a single day—rather than average daily time use over an extended period—is used as an explanatory variable. We show that failing to account for day-to-day variation in activities results in the effects of time use on a typical day being understated. Furthermore, we account for the possibility that physical activity and body mass are jointly determined by implementing Lewbel’s instrumental variables estimator that exploits first-stage heteroskedasticity rather than traditional exclusion restrictions. Our results suggest that, on average, physical activity reduces body mass by less than would be predicted by simple calorie expenditure-to-weight formulas, implying compensatory behavior such as increased caloric intake.
papers.zh_title: 运动时间与肥胖：Lewbel工具变量方法的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用美国时间使用调查数据，考察体育活动在决定体重指数中的作用。我们的研究首次解决了将单日时间使用（而非长期平均每日时间使用）作为解释变量时产生的测量误差问题。我们证明，未能考虑活动在每日间的变化会导致时间使用对典型日的影响被低估。此外，我们通过实施Lewbel的工具变量估计量来考虑体育活动和体重指数可能共同决定的问题，该估计量利用第一阶段异方差性而非传统的排除限制。我们的结果表明，平均而言，体育活动对体重指数的降低幅度小于简单卡路里消耗与体重公式所预测的幅度，这意味着存在补偿行为，例如增加卡路里摄入量。

papers.title: Cross-Country Trends in Affective Polarization
papers.authors: Levi Boxell, Matthew Gentzkow, Jesse M. Shapiro
papers.abstract: We measure trends in affective polarization in twelve OECD countries over the past four decades. According to our baseline estimates, the US experienced the largest increase in polarization over this period. Five countries experienced a smaller increase in polarization. Six countries experienced a decrease in polarization. We relate trends in polarization to trends in potential explanatory factors.
papers.zh_title: 情感极化的跨国趋势
papers.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了过去四十年间十二个OECD国家情感极化的趋势。根据我们的基准估计，美国在此期间经历了最大的极化增长。五个国家的极化增长幅度较小。六个国家的极化程度有所下降。我们将极化趋势与潜在解释因素的趋势联系起来。

papers.title: The Consumption Effects of the Disposition to Sell Winners and Hold Losers
papers.authors: Benjamin Loos, Steffen Meyer, Michaela Pagel
papers.abstract: We use individual-level data on all security trades, holdings, spending, and income from an online retail bank. We study the effects of an exogenous change in the displayed purchase prices of the mutual funds in individuals’ portfolios. We find that individuals are more likely to sell what we call fictitious winners, i.e., funds that are winners under the newly displayed purchase price but are losers under the actual purchase price. We also document that individual consumption increases in response to realizing fictitious capital gains. We thus document a causal link among purchase prices, trades, and consumption using observational data and find that the trading and consumption results are more prevalent for less-informed investors. We thereby document a marginal propensity to consume out of (confused) capital gains, which is informative about the literature on consumption out of stock market wealth.
papers.zh_title: 出售赢家并持有输家倾向的消费效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自一家在线零售银行的所有证券交易、持仓、支出和收入的个人层面数据。我们研究了个体投资组合中共同基金显示购买价格的外生变化所带来的影响。我们发现，个体更有可能出售我们所谓的“虚构赢家”，即在新显示的购买价格下是赢家但在实际购买价格下是输家的基金。我们还记录到，个体消费因实现虚构资本收益而增加。因此，我们利用观测数据记录了购买价格、交易和消费之间的因果联系，并发现交易和消费结果在信息较少的投资者中更为普遍。由此，我们记录了（困惑的）资本收益的边际消费倾向，这为关于股票市场财富消费的文献提供了信息。

papers.title: Trust in Risk Sharing: A Double-Edged Sword
papers.authors: Harold L. Cole, Dirk Krueger, George J. Mailath, Yena Park
papers.abstract: We analyze efficient risk-sharing arrangements when the value from deviating is determined endogenously by another risk sharing arrangement. Coalitions form to insure against idiosyncratic income risk. Self-enforcing contracts for both the original coalition and any coalition formed (joined) after deviations rely on a belief in future cooperation which we term “trust”. We treat the contracting conditions of original and deviation coalitions symmetrically and show that higher trust tightens incentive constraints since it facilitates the formation of deviating coalitions. As a consequence, although trust facilitates the initial formation of coalitions, the extent of risk sharing in successfully formed coalitions is declining in the extent of trust and efficient allocations might feature resource burning or utility burning: trust is indeed a double-edged sword.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, PE, POL；JEL：D15, D16, E20
papers.zh_title: 风险分担中的信任：一把双刃剑
papers.zh_abstract: 当偏离的价值由另一个风险分担安排内生决定时，我们分析有效的风险分担安排。联盟形成以抵御异质性收入风险。原始联盟以及偏离后形成（加入）的任何联盟的自执行合同都依赖于对未来合作的信念，我们称之为“信任”。我们对称地处理原始联盟和偏离联盟的合同条件，并表明更高的信任会收紧激励约束，因为它促进了偏离联盟的形成。因此，尽管信任促进了联盟的初始形成，但成功形成的联盟中风险分担的程度随信任程度的提高而下降，且有效配置可能涉及资源燃烧或效用燃烧：信任确实是一把双刃剑。

papers.title: The Long-Run Effects of Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Òscar Jordà, Sanjay R. Singh, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: We document that the real effects of monetary shocks last for over a decade. Our approach relies on (1) identification of exogenous and non-systematic monetary shocks using the trilemma of international finance; (2) merged data from two new international historical cross-country databases; and (3) econometric methods robust to long-horizon inconsistent estimates. Notably, the capital stock and total factor productivity (TFP) exhibit greater hysteresis than labor. When we allow for asymmetry, we find these effects with tightening shocks, but not with loosening shocks. When extending the horizon of the responses reported in several recent studies that use alternative monetary shocks, we find similarly persistent real effects, thus supporting our main findings.\n
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E01, E30, E32, E44, E47, E51, F33, F42, F44
papers.zh_title: 货币政策的长期效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了货币冲击的实际效应持续超过十年。我们的方法依赖于：（1）利用国际金融三难困境识别外生和非系统性的货币冲击；（2）合并来自两个新的国际历史跨国数据库的数据；（3）对长期不一致估计具有稳健性的计量经济学方法。值得注意的是，资本存量和全要素生产率表现出比劳动力更强的滞后性。当我们允许不对称性时，我们发现这些效应存在于紧缩性冲击中，但不存在于宽松性冲击中。当将最近几项使用替代性货币冲击的研究所报告的反应的期限延长时，我们发现了同样持久的实际效应，从而支持了我们的主要发现。

papers.title: Product Innovation, Product Diversification, and Firm Growth: Evidence from Japan’s Early Industrialization
papers.authors: Serguey Braguinsky, Atsushi Ohyama, Tetsuji Okazaki, Chad Syverson
papers.abstract: We explore how firms grow by adding products. In contrast to most earlier work on the topic, our conceptual and empirical framework allows for separate treatment of product innovation (vertical differentiation) and diversification (horizontal differentiation). The market context is Japan’s cotton spinning industry at the turn of the last century. We find that introducing innovative products outside of the previously feasible set involves removing the “supply-side constraint” by investing in new types of machines and technologies. This process involves a high degree of uncertainty, however, so firms that take steps in this direction tend to first introduce innovative products on experimental basis. We show that conducting such experiments is a key to firm growth. It not only provides opportunities to capture the market in high-end vertically differentiated products when successful, but also facilitates horizontal differentiation of the firm’s products within its previous technical capabilities. In long-term outcomes over 20 years, the right tail of the firm size distribution becomes dominated by firms that were able to expand in both directions: moving first into technologically challenging vertically differentiated products, and then later applying their newly acquired high-end technical competence to horizontal expansion of their product portfolios.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：D2, L1, N6, N8, O3
papers.zh_title: 产品创新、产品多样化与企业成长：来自日本早期工业化的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨企业如何通过增加产品来实现成长。与大多数早期关于该主题的研究相比，我们的概念和实证框架允许分别处理产品创新（纵向差异化）和多样化（横向差异化）。市场背景是上世纪初日本的棉纺工业。我们发现，在先前可行的集合之外引入创新产品需要投资于新型机器和技术以消除“供给方约束”。然而，这一过程涉及高度不确定性，因此朝此方向迈进的企 业倾向于首先以实验性基础引入创新产品。我们表明，进行此类实验是企业成长的关键。它不仅提供了在成功时占领高端纵向差异化产品市场的机会，而且促进了企业在其先前技术能力范围内的产品横向差异化。在超过20年的长期结果中，企业规模分布的右尾由那些能够在两个方向扩张的企业主导：首先进入技术挑战性高的纵向差异化产品，然后将其新获得的高端技术能力应用于产品组合的横向扩展。

papers.title: Associative Memory and Belief Formation
papers.authors: Benjamin Enke, Frederik Schwerter, Florian Zimmermann
papers.abstract: Information is often embedded in memorable contexts, which may cue the asymmetric recall of similar past news through associative memory. We design a theory-driven experiment, in which participants observe signals about hypothetical companies. Here, identical signal realizations are communicated with identical contexts: stories and images. Because participants asymmetrically remember those past signals that get cued by the current context, beliefs systematically overreact. This overreaction depends in predictable ways on the signal history; the correlation between signals and contexts; and the scope for forgetting and associative memory. We quantify these results by structurally estimating a model of associative recall.
papers.zh_title: 联想记忆与信念形成
papers.zh_abstract: 信息通常嵌入在令人难忘的语境中，这些语境可能通过联想记忆提示对类似过去新闻的不对称回忆。我们设计了一个理论驱动的实验，参与者观察关于假设公司的信号。在这里，相同的信号实现通过相同的语境（故事和图像）进行传达。由于参与者不对称地记住那些被当前语境提示的过去信号，信念系统性地过度反应。这种过度反应以可预测的方式取决于信号历史、信号与语境之间的相关性，以及遗忘和联想记忆的范围。我们通过结构性地估计一个联想回忆模型来量化这些结果。

papers.title: Private Money Production without Banks
papers.authors: Gary B. Gorton
papers.abstract: I test the Dang, Gorton, and Holmström (2018) (DGH) theory that the optimal design of private money is debt backed by debt. I do this in the context of English inland bills of exchange (where all parties to the bill were in England), which were used as a medium of exchange during the Industrial Revolution in the north of England in the eighteenth and first half of the nineteenth centuries. These bills circulated via indorsements, committing each indorser’s personal wealth to back the bill. A sample of bills from the period 1762-1850 is studied to determine how frequently they changed hands (liquidity/velocity) and to determine how their credibility was established. Some bills were backed by banks and others by the joint liability of indorsers only. I test the DGH theory by asking: Were bank-backed bills more liquid than the joint liability-backed bills?
papers.zh_title: 无银行的私人货币生产
papers.zh_abstract: 我检验了Dang、Gorton和Holmström（2018）的理论，即私人货币的最优设计是以债务为抵押的债务。我在英国国内汇票（所有汇票当事方均在英格兰）的背景下进行检验，这些汇票在18世纪和19世纪上半叶英格兰北部的工业革命期间被用作交换媒介。这些汇票通过背书流通，每个背书人的个人财富都承诺支持该汇票。研究了一个1762-1850年期间的汇票样本，以确定它们易手的频率（流动性/流通速度）以及其可信度是如何建立的。一些汇票由银行支持，另一些仅由背书人的连带责任支持。我通过询问以下问题来检验DGH理论：银行支持的汇票是否比连带责任支持的汇票更具流动性？

papers.title: The Economic Consequences of Being Denied an Abortion
papers.authors: Sarah Miller, Laura R. Wherry, Diana Greene Foster
papers.abstract: This paper evaluates the economic consequences of being denied an abortion due to gestational limits. We link credit report data to the Turnaway Study, the first study to collect high-quality, longitudinal data on women receiving or being denied a wanted abortion in the United States. We compare financial outcomes over a ten-year period for women who had pregnancies just above and below a gestational age limit allowing for a wanted abortion. Outcome trajectories are similar for the two groups of women prior to the abortion encounter. Following the encounter, women who were denied an abortion experience a large increase in financial distress that is sustained for several years. There is also some evidence of a short-term reduction in credit access, but no change in measures of borrowing. Our results highlight important financial and economic consequences of restrictions on abortion access.
papers.zh_title: 被拒绝堕胎的经济后果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了因孕周限制而被拒绝堕胎的经济后果。我们将信用报告数据与“Turnaway研究”相关联，这是首个在美国收集接受或拒绝想要堕胎的女性高质量纵向数据的研究。我们比较了孕周刚好超过和低于允许堕胎年龄限制的女性的十年财务结果。在堕胎遭遇之前，两组女性的结果轨迹相似。遭遇之后，被拒绝堕胎的女性经历了财务困境的大幅增加，这种困境持续数年。还有一些证据表明信贷获取短期减少，但借贷指标没有变化。我们的结果凸显了堕胎限制的重要财务和经济后果。

papers.title: Microentrepreneurship in Developing Countries
papers.authors: Seema Jayachandran
papers.abstract: This article reviews the recent literature in economics on small-scale entrepreneurship ("microentrepreneurship") in low-income countries. Major themes in the literature include the determinants and consequences of joining the formal sector; the impacts of access to credit and other financial services; the impacts of business training; barriers to hiring; and the distinction between self-employment by necessity and self-employment as a calling. The article devotes special attention to unique issues that arise with female entrepreneurship.
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家的微型创业
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了近期关于低收入国家小规模创业（“微型创业”）的经济学文献。文献中的主要主题包括：进入正规部门的决定因素和后果；获得信贷和其他金融服务的影响；商业培训的影响；雇佣障碍；以及必要性自雇与作为使命的自雇之间的区别。本文特别关注女性创业中出现的独特问题。

papers.title: Workplace Knowledge Flows
papers.authors: Jason Sandvik, Richard Saouma, Nathan Seegert, Christopher T. Stanton
papers.abstract: What prevents the spread of information among coworkers, and which management practices facilitate workplace knowledge flows? We conducted a field experiment in a sales company, addressing these questions with three active treatments. (1) Encouraging workers to talk about their sales techniques with a randomly chosen partner during short meetings substantially lifted average sales revenue during and after the experiment. The largest gains occurred for those matched with high-performing coworkers. (2) Worker-pairs given incentives to increase joint output increased sales during the experiment but not afterward. (3) Worker-pairs given both treatments had little improvement above the meetings treatment alone. Managerial interventions providing structured opportunities for workers to initiate conversations with peers resulted in knowledge exchange; incentives based on joint output gains were neither necessary nor sufficient for knowledge transmission.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：J24, L23, M12, M5, M52, M53, M54
papers.zh_title: 工作场所知识流动
papers.zh_abstract: 什么阻碍了同事之间的信息传播，哪些管理实践促进了工作场所的知识流动？我们在一家销售公司进行了一项实地实验，通过三种积极处理来解决这些问题。（1）鼓励工人在简短会议期间与随机选择的伙伴谈论他们的销售技巧，在实验期间和之后显著提升了平均销售收入。与高绩效同事配对的人获得了最大的收益。（2）给予激励以增加联合产出的工人对在实验期间增加了销售额，但之后没有。（3）同时接受两种处理的工人对，其改善程度仅略高于仅接受会议处理。提供结构化机会让工人与同伴发起对话的管理干预促进了知识交流；基于联合产出收益的激励既不是知识传递的必要条件，也不是充分条件。

papers.title: What Caused Racial Disparities in Particulate Exposure to Fall? New Evidence from the Clean Air Act and Satellite-Based Measures of Air Quality
papers.authors: Janet Currie, John Voorheis, Reed Walker
papers.abstract: Racial differences in exposure to ambient air pollution have declined significantly in the United States over the past 20 years. This project links administrative Census microdata to newly available, spatially continuous high resolution measures of ambient particulate pollution (PM2.5) to examine the underlying causes and consequences of differences in Black-White pollution exposures. We begin by decomposing differences in pollution exposure into components explained by observable population characteristics (e.g., income) versus those that remain unexplained. We then use quantile regression methods to show that a significant portion of the “unexplained” convergence in Black-White pollution exposure can be attributed to differential impacts of the Clean Air Act (CAA) in African American and non-Hispanic White communities. Areas with larger Black populations saw greater CAA-related declines in PM2.5 exposure. We show that the CAA has been the single largest contributor to racial convergence in PM2.5 pollution exposure in the U.S. since 2000 accounting for over 60 percent of the reduction.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H4, I14, J18, Q5, Q53
papers.zh_title: 是什么导致了颗粒物暴露的种族差异下降？来自《清洁空气法》和基于卫星的空气污染测量的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 过去20年中，美国不同种族在环境空气污染暴露方面的差异显著下降。本项目将行政人口普查微观数据与新获得的、空间连续的高分辨率环境颗粒物污染（PM2.5）测量数据联系起来，研究黑人与白人污染暴露差异的根本原因和后果。我们首先将污染暴露差异分解为可观察人口特征（如收入）解释的部分与仍无法解释的部分。然后，我们使用分位数回归方法表明，黑人与白人污染暴露中“无法解释”的趋同很大一部分可归因于《清洁空气法》在非裔美国人和非西班牙裔白人社区的不同影响。黑人人口较多的地区，与《清洁空气法》相关的PM2.5暴露下降幅度更大。我们表明，自2000年以来，《清洁空气法》是美国PM2.5污染暴露种族趋同的最大单一贡献因素，占减少量的60%以上。

papers.title: Growth, Automation and the Long Run Share of Labor
papers.authors: Debraj Ray, Dilip Mookherjee
papers.abstract: We provide an argument for long-term automation and decline in the labor income share, driven by capital accumulation rather than technical progress or rising markups. We emphasize a fundamental asymmetry across physical and human capital. An individual can indefinitely replicate her claims on the former, but — after a point — her human endowment cannot be cloned and rescaled in the same way. Then ongoing capital accumulation gives rise to progressive automation, and the share of labor income converges to zero. The displacement of human labor is gradual, and real wages could rise indefinitely. The results extend to endogenous technical change.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PR；JEL：D33, E25, J24, J31, O33
papers.zh_title: 增长、自动化与劳动长期份额
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个长期自动化和劳动收入份额下降的论点，其驱动力是资本积累而非技术进步或加价上升。我们强调了物质资本和人力资本之间的根本不对称性。个人可以无限复制其对前者的索取权，但——在某个点之后——其人力禀赋无法以相同方式克隆和重新缩放。那么，持续的资本积累导致渐进式自动化，劳动收入份额趋近于零。人类劳动的替代是渐进的，实际工资可能无限上升。结果扩展到内生技术变革。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Strategies for the Federal Reserve
papers.authors: Lars E.O. Svensson
papers.abstract: The general monetary policy strategy of “forecast targeting” allows the Federal Reserve to respond flexibly to all relevant information in achieving its dual mandate of maximum employment and price stability. In contrast, a simple “instrument” rule such as a Taylor-type rule restricts the Federal Reserve to only respond in a rigid way to the partial information of current inflation and output. Forecast targeting can be used for any of the more specific strategies of annual-inflation targeting, price-level targeting, temporary price-level targeting, average-inflation targeting, and nominal-GDP targeting. These specific strategies are examined and evaluated according to how well they may fulfill the dual mandate, considering the possibilities of a binding effective lower bound for the federal funds rate and a flatter Phillips curve. Nominal-GPD targeting means that GDP and the GDP deflator are considered perfect substitutes. It therefore does not treat maximum employment and price stability as separate and independent targets. In addition, data on GDP and the GDP deflator have longer reporting lags and are subject to substantial ex post revisions. The latter will require both retrospective and prospective revisions of the target path, with large communication difficulties. Average-inflation targeting has good prospects of handling the problems of a binding effective lower bound and a flatter Phillips curve. As a permanently applied strategy, it would also have good possibilities of becoming understood by and credible with markets and the general public.
papers.zh_title: 美联储的货币政策策略
papers.zh_abstract: “预测目标”的一般货币政策策略允许美联储灵活应对所有相关信息，以实现其充分就业和价格稳定的双重使命。相比之下，像泰勒型规则这样的简单“工具”规则限制美联储只能以僵化方式对当前通胀和产出的部分信息做出反应。预测目标可用于任何更具体的策略，如年度通胀目标、价格水平目标、临时价格水平目标、平均通胀目标和名义GDP目标。这些具体策略根据它们可能如何实现双重使命进行评估，考虑到联邦基金利率有效下限约束和更平坦的菲利普斯曲线的可能性。名义GDP目标意味着GDP和GDP平减指数被视为完全替代品。因此，它不将充分就业和价格稳定视为独立的目标。此外，GDP和GDP平减指数的数据报告滞后时间更长，并且会进行大量事后修正。后者将需要对目标路径进行回顾性和前瞻性修正，带来巨大的沟通困难。平均通胀目标在处理有效下限约束和更平坦菲利普斯曲线问题方面具有良好的前景。作为一种永久性策略，它也有可能被市场和公众理解并赢得信任。

papers.title: Execution Risk and Arbitrage Opportunities in the Foreign Exchange Markets
papers.authors: Takatoshi Ito, Kenta Yamada, Misako Takayasu, Hideki Takayasu
papers.abstract: With the high-frequency data of firm quotes in the transaction platform of foreign exchanges, arbitrage profit opportunities—in the forms of a negative bid-ask spread of a currency pair and triangular transactions involving three currency pairs—can be detected to emerge and disappear in the matter of seconds. The frequency and duration of such arbitrage opportunities have declined over time, most likely due to the emergence of algorithmic trading. When a human trader detects such an arbitrage opportunity and places orders for multiple transactions—two in negative spreads and three in triangular arbitrage—there is no guarantee all of those orders are fulfilled in a fraction of one second. Thus, the arbitrageur has to consider execution risk, when he/she/it detects the emergence of such an opportunity. The novelty of this paper is to show that those arbitrage opportunities were exploitable and executable, before the mid-2000s, even considering the transactions costs and execution risk. After many algorithmic computers were allowed to be connected directly to the EBS transaction platform in the mid-2000s, the frequency of free lunch cases has declined and probabilities of successful executions of all legs for arbitrage declined. We calculate the change in the expected profit of an attempt to execute necessary transactions to reap benefits from arbitrage opportunity.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：F31, G12, G14, G15, G23, G24
papers.zh_title: 外汇市场中的执行风险与套利机会
papers.zh_abstract: 利用外汇交易平台中公司报价的高频数据，可以检测到套利利润机会——表现为货币对负买卖价差和涉及三个货币对的三角交易——在几秒钟内出现和消失。此类套利机会的频率和持续时间随着时间的推移而下降，很可能是由于算法交易的出现。当人类交易者检测到这样的套利机会并下达多个交易订单时——两个在负价差中，三个在三角套利中——并不能保证所有这些订单在不到一秒的时间内都能成交。因此，套利者在检测到这种机会出现时必须考虑执行风险。本文的新颖之处在于表明，在2000年代中期之前，即使考虑了交易成本和执行风险，这些套利机会也是可利用和可执行的。在2000年代中期，许多算法计算机被允许直接连接到EBS交易平台后，免费午餐案例的频率下降，套利所有环节成功执行的概率也下降了。我们计算了尝试执行必要交易以从套利机会中获利的预期利润的变化。

papers.title: Extending the Race between Education and Technology
papers.authors: David Autor, Claudia Goldin, Lawrence F. Katz
papers.abstract: The race between education and technology provides a canonical framework that does an excellent job of explaining U.S. wage structure changes across the twentieth century. The framework involves secular increases in the demand for more-educated workers from skill-biased technological change, combined with variations in the supply of skills from changes in educational access. We expand the analysis backwards and forwards. The framework helps explain rising skill differentials in the nineteenth and twenty-first centuries, but needs to be augmented to illuminate the recent convexification of education returns and implied slowdown in the growth of the relative demand for college workers. Increased educational wage differentials explain 75 percent of the rise of U.S. wage inequality from 1980 to 2000 as compared to 38 percent for 2000 to 2017.
papers.zh_title: 扩展教育与技术之间的竞赛
papers.zh_abstract: 教育与技术之间的竞赛提供了一个经典框架，该框架出色地解释了整个二十世纪美国工资结构的变化。该框架涉及技能偏向型技术变革对高学历工人需求的长期增长，以及教育机会变化带来的技能供给变化。我们将分析向前和向后扩展。该框架有助于解释十九世纪和二十一世纪技能差异的扩大，但需要加以扩展以阐明近期教育回报的凸化以及大学工人相对需求增长的放缓。教育工资差异的增加解释了1980年至2000年美国工资不平等上升的75%，而2000年至2017年这一比例为38%。

papers.title: Dynamic Taxation
papers.authors: Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: This paper reviews recent advances in the study of dynamic taxation, considering three main approaches: the dynamic Mirrlees, the parametric Ramsey, and the sufficient statistics approaches. In the first approach, agents' heterogeneous abilities to earn income are private information and evolve stochastically over time. Dynamic taxes are not ex ante restricted and are set for redistribution and insurance considerations. Capital is taxed only in order to improve incentives to work. Human capital is optimally subsidized if it reduces post-tax inequality and risk on balance. The Ramsey approach specifies ex ante restricted tax instruments and adopts quantitative methods, which allows it to consider more complex and realistic economies. Capital taxes are optimal when age-dependent labor income taxes are not possible. The newer and tractable sufficient statistics approach derives robust tax formulas that depend on estimable elasticities and features of the income distributions. It simplifies the transitional dynamics thanks to a newly defined criterion, the “utility-based steady state approach” that prevents the government from exploiting sluggish responses in the short-run. Capital taxes are here based on the standard equity-efficiency trade-off.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, PE；JEL：H2, H21, H23, H24, H25
papers.zh_title: 动态税收
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了动态税收研究的最新进展，考虑了三种主要方法：动态Mirrlees方法、参数化Ramsey方法和充分统计量方法。在第一种方法中，代理人赚取收入的异质性能力是私人信息，并随时间随机演变。动态税收在事前不受限制，并出于再分配和保险考虑而设定。资本征税仅仅是为了改善工作激励。如果人力资本在平衡状态下减少税后不平等和风险，则对其进行最优补贴。Ramsey方法指定了事前受限的税收工具并采用定量方法，这使其能够考虑更复杂和现实的经济体。当无法实施与年龄相关的劳动所得税时，资本税是最优的。较新且易于处理的充分统计量方法推导出稳健的税收公式，这些公式依赖于可估计的弹性和收入分布特征。它通过一个新定义的标准——“基于效用的稳态方法”——简化了过渡动态，该方法防止政府在短期内利用缓慢的反应。这里的资本税基于标准的公平-效率权衡。

papers.title: Ask and You Shall Receive? Gender Differences in Regrades in College
papers.authors: Cher Hsuehhsiang Li, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: Using administrative data from a large 4-year public university, we show that male students are 18.6 percent more likely than female students to receive favorable grade changes initiated by instructors. These gender differences cannot be explained by observable characteristics of the students, instructors, and the classes. To understand the mechanisms underlying these gendered outcomes, we conduct surveys of students and instructors, which reveal that regrade requests are prevalent, and that male students are more likely than female students to ask for regrades on the intensive margin. Finally, we corroborate the gender differences in regrade requests in an incentivized controlled experiment where participants receive noisy signals of their performance, and where they can ask for regrades: we find that males have a higher willingness to pay (WTP) to ask for regrades. Because students' payoff depends on their final grade and the cost of regrades, male students' higher propensity to ask for regrades makes them financially better off only when the cost is low. Males are more likely than females to become financially worse off when the regrade cost is high. Almost half of the gender difference in the WTP is due to gender differences in confidence, uncertainty in beliefs about ability, and the Big Five personality traits.
papers.zh_title: 有求必应？大学改分中的性别差异
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一所大型四年制公立大学的行政数据，我们表明，男性学生获得由教师发起的有利成绩更改的可能性比女性学生高18.6%。这些性别差异无法用学生、教师和班级的可观测特征来解释。为了理解这些性别化结果背后的机制，我们对学生和教师进行了调查，结果显示改分请求很普遍，并且男性学生在集约边际上比女性学生更有可能提出改分请求。最后，我们在一个有激励的对照实验中证实了改分请求中的性别差异，在该实验中，参与者收到其表现的有噪声信号，并且他们可以请求改分：我们发现男性有更高的支付意愿（WTP）来请求改分。由于学生的报酬取决于他们的最终成绩和改分成本，男性学生更高的改分请求倾向只有在成本较低时才会使他们的财务状况更好。当改分成本较高时，男性比女性更有可能在财务上变得更糟。WTP中近一半的性别差异是由于性别在信心、能力信念的不确定性以及大五人格特质方面的差异。

papers.title: The Past and Future of Econ 101: The John R. Commons Award Lecture
papers.authors: N. Gregory Mankiw
papers.abstract: The introductory economics course, often called Econ 101, is where most economists get their start and where many students receive their only exposure to the field. This essay discusses the course’s evolution. It first looks back at how economics was taught at Harvard in the 19th century, based on a textbook by Professor Francis Bowen. It then looks ahead at how the introductory course may change as pedagogical tools improve, as society confronts new challenges, and as the field accumulates new knowledge.
papers.zh_title: 经济学101的过去与未来：约翰·R·康芒斯奖演讲
papers.zh_abstract: 入门经济学课程（常被称为经济学101）是大多数经济学家起步的地方，也是许多学生唯一接触该领域的途径。本文讨论了这门课程的演变。首先回顾了19世纪哈佛大学如何教授经济学，依据是弗朗西斯·鲍恩教授的教科书。然后展望了入门课程可能如何随着教学工具的改进、社会面临新挑战以及该领域积累新知识而发生变化。

papers.title: Leverage and Asset Prices: An Experiment.
papers.authors: Marco Cipriani, Ana Fostel, Daniel Houser
papers.abstract: We develop a model of leverage that is amenable to laboratory implementation and gather experimental data. We compare two identical economies: in one economy, agents cannot borrow; in the other, they can leverage a risky asset to issue debt. Leverage increases asset prices in the laboratory. This increase is significant and quantitatively close to what theory predicts. Moreover, also as theory suggests, leverage allows gains from trade to be realized in the laboratory. Finally, the mechanism generating the price increase in the lab is due to the asset role as collateral, and different from what we would observe with a simple credit line or bigger cash endowments.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：A10, C90, D52, D53, G10
papers.zh_title: 杠杆与资产价格：一项实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个适用于实验室实施的杠杆模型，并收集了实验数据。我们比较了两个相同的经济体：在一个经济体中，代理人不能借贷；在另一个经济体中，他们可以用风险资产作为杠杆来发行债务。杠杆在实验室中提高了资产价格。这种提高是显著的，并且在数量上接近理论预测。此外，正如理论所暗示的，杠杆使得在实验室中实现贸易收益成为可能。最后，实验室中价格上升的机制源于资产作为抵押品的作用，这与我们通过简单信贷额度或更大现金 endowment 所观察到的情况不同。

papers.title: Should the Government be Paying Investment Fees on $3 Trillion of Tax-Deferred Retirement Assets?
papers.authors: Mattia Landoni, Stephen P. Zeldes
papers.abstract: Under standard assumptions, both individuals and the government are indifferent between traditional tax-deferred retirement accounts and “front-loaded” (Roth) accounts. When we add investment fees to this benchmark, individuals are still indifferent but the government is not. We estimate that tax deferral increases demand for asset management services by $3 trillion, causing the government to pay $20.7 billion in corresponding annual fees. In a general equilibrium model with asset management services as differentiated products, we examine the incidence and welfare implications of the added demand. Tax deferral in our model produces a larger asset management industry, higher taxes, and lower social welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D14, G11, G23, G28, G51, H21, J26, J32
papers.zh_title: 政府是否应为3万亿美元税收递延退休资产支付投资费用？
papers.zh_abstract: 在标准假设下，个人和政府对于传统的税收递延退休账户和“前端加载”（罗斯）账户都无差异。当我们将投资费用加入这一基准时，个人仍然无差异，但政府则不然。我们估计，税收递延使资产管理服务需求增加了3万亿美元，导致政府支付相应的年度费用207亿美元。在一个将资产管理服务视为差异化产品的一般均衡模型中，我们考察了额外需求的归宿和福利影响。在我们的模型中，税收递延导致了更大的资产管理行业、更高的税收和更低的社会福利。

papers.title: Linguistic Traits and Human Capital Formation
papers.authors: Oded Galor, Ömer Özak, Assaf Sarid
papers.abstract: This research establishes the influence of linguistic traits on human behavior. Exploiting variations in the languages spoken by children of migrants with identical ancestral countries of origin, the analysis indicates that the presence of periphrastic future tense, and its association with long-term orientation has a significant positive impact on educational attainment, whereas the presence of sex-based grammatical gender, and its association with gender bias, has a significant adverse impact on female educational attainment.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EFG；JEL：D91, I25, J16, J24, Z13
papers.zh_title: 语言特征与人力资本形成
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究确立了语言特征对人类行为的影响。利用来自相同原籍国的移民子女所使用语言的差异，分析表明，迂回将来时的存在及其与长期导向的关联，对教育成就具有显著的正向影响；而基于性别的语法性别的存在及其与性别偏见的关联，对女性教育成就具有显著的负面影响。

papers.title: Factor Market Failures and the Adoption of Irrigation in Rwanda
papers.authors: Maria Jones, Florence Kondylis, John Loeser, Jeremy Magruder
papers.abstract: We examine constraints to adoption of new technologies in the context of hillside irrigation schemes in Rwanda. We leverage a plot-level spatial regression discontinuity design to produce 3 key results. First, irrigation enables dry season horticultural production, which boosts on-farm cash profits by 70%. Second, adoption is constrained: access to irrigation causes farmers to substitute labor and inputs away from their other plots. Eliminating this substitution would increase adoption by at least 21%. Third, this substitution is largest for smaller households and wealthier households. This result can be explained by labor market failures in a standard agricultural household model.
papers.zh_title: 要素市场失灵与卢旺达灌溉技术的采用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了卢旺达山坡灌溉计划背景下采用新技术的制约因素。我们利用地块层面的空间断点回归设计得出了三个关键结果。首先，灌溉使得旱季园艺生产成为可能，从而将农场现金利润提高了70%。其次，采用受到制约：获得灌溉导致农民从其他地块转移劳动力和投入。消除这种替代将使采用率至少提高21%。第三，这种替代在较小的家庭和较富裕的家庭中最为显著。这一结果可以用标准农业家庭模型中的劳动力市场失灵来解释。

papers.title: Do Elections Make You Sick?
papers.authors: Hung-Hao Chang, Chad Meyerhoefer
papers.abstract: Anecdotal reports and small-scale studies suggest that elections are stressful, and might lead to a deterioration in voters’ mental well-being. Nonetheless, researchers have yet to establish whether elections actually make people sick, and if so, why. By applying a regression discontinuity design to administrative health care claims from Taiwan, we determine that elections increased health care use and expense only during legally specified campaign periods by as much as 19%. Overall, the treatment cost of illness caused by elections exceeded publicly reported levels of campaign expenditure, and accounted for 2% of total national health care costs during the campaign period.
papers.zh_title: 选举会让你生病吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 轶事报道和小规模研究表明，选举是有压力的，并可能导致选民心理健康状况恶化。尽管如此，研究人员尚未确定选举是否真的让人们生病，如果是，原因何在。通过将断点回归设计应用于台湾的行政医疗保健索赔数据，我们确定选举仅在法律规定的竞选期间内使医疗保健使用和费用增加了高达19%。总体而言，由选举引起的疾病治疗成本超过了公开报告的竞选支出水平，并在竞选期间占全国医疗保健总成本的2%。

papers.title: The Employment Effects of the Social Security Earnings Test
papers.authors: Alexander M. Gelber, Damon Jones, Daniel W. Sacks, Jae Song
papers.abstract: We investigate the impact of the Social Security Annual Earnings Test (AET) on the employment decisions of older Americans. The AET reduces Social Security benefits by one dollar for every two dollars earned above the exempt amount. Using a differences-in-differences design, we find that the employment rate of those predicted to become subject to the AET decreases substantially relative to those not predicted to become subject to it. The point estimates suggest that the AET reduces the employment rate of Americans aged 63-64 by at least 1.2 percentage points.
papers.zh_title: 社会保障收入测试的就业效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了社会保障年度收入测试（AET）对美国老年人就业决策的影响。AET规定，收入超过免税额每两美元，社会保障福利减少一美元。使用双重差分设计，我们发现，相对于预计不受AET约束的人群，预计受AET约束的人群的就业率大幅下降。点估计表明，AET使63-64岁美国人的就业率至少降低了1.2个百分点。

papers.title: Regional Monetary Policies and the Great Depression
papers.authors: Pooyan Amir-Ahmadi, Gustavo S. Cortes, Marc D. Weidenmier
papers.abstract: We compile a new monthly database for each Federal Reserve district between 1923-33 to analyze the national and regional nature of the monetary transmission mechanism around the Great Depression. We employ sign-identified structural VARs and narrative sign restrictions informed by uncontroversial theory and the historical record. Our findings demonstrate that there was significant heterogeneity in regional monetary policy as well as its dynamic effects on real economic activity. Prices in the 12 Fed districts were generally more responsive to contractionary regional monetary policy than national monetary policy shocks. The district reserve banks played a key role in the great contraction.
papers.zh_title: 区域货币政策与大萧条
papers.zh_abstract: 我们编制了1923-33年间每个联邦储备区的新月度数据库，以分析大萧条前后货币传导机制的国家和区域性质。我们采用了符号识别的结构向量自回归模型，并依据无争议理论和历史记录，运用了叙事符号约束。我们的研究结果表明，区域货币政策及其对实际经济活动的动态影响存在显著的异质性。12个联邦储备区的价格通常对紧缩性区域货币政策的反应比国家货币政策冲击更为敏感。区储备银行在大收缩中发挥了关键作用。

papers.title: Changing Stability in U.S. Employment Relationships: A Tale of Two Tails
papers.authors: Raven Molloy, Christopher Smith, Abigail K. Wozniak
papers.abstract: We confront two seemingly-contradictory observations about the US labor market: the rate at which workers change employers has declined since the 1980s, yet there is a commonly expressed view that long-term employment relationships are more difficult to attain. We reconcile these observations by examining how the distribution of employment tenure has changed in aggregate and for various demographic groups. We show that the fraction of workers with short tenure (less than a year) has been falling since the 1980s, consistent with the decline in job changing. Meanwhile, the fraction of workers with long tenure (20 years or more) has been rising modestly owing to an increase in long tenure for women and the ageing of the population. Long tenure has declined markedly among older men; this trend may have spurred popular perceptions that long-term employment is less common than in the past. The decline in long-tenure for men appears due to an increase in mid-career separations that reduce the likelihood of reaching long-tenure, rather than an increase in late-career separations. Nevertheless, survey evidence indicates that these changes in employment relationships are not associated with heightened concerns about job insecurity or decreases in job satisfaction as reported by workers. The decline in short-tenure is widespread, associated with fewer workers cycling among briefly-held jobs, and coincides with an increase in perceived job security among short tenure workers.
papers.zh_title: 美国雇佣关系稳定性的变化：两个尾部的故事
papers.zh_abstract: 我们针对美国劳动力市场两个看似矛盾的观察进行了分析：自20世纪80年代以来，工人更换雇主的比率有所下降，但普遍观点认为长期雇佣关系更难实现。我们通过考察雇佣任期分布的整体变化以及不同人口群体的变化来调和这些观察。我们发现，自20世纪80年代以来，短期任期（不足一年）的工人比例一直在下降，这与工作变动减少的趋势一致。与此同时，由于女性长期任期的增加和人口老龄化，长期任期（20年及以上）的工人比例略有上升。在老年男性中，长期任期显著下降；这一趋势可能助长了公众认为长期就业不如过去普遍的认知。男性长期任期的下降似乎是由于职业生涯中期离职的增加降低了达到长期任期的可能性，而非职业生涯晚期离职的增加。尽管如此，调查证据表明，这些雇佣关系的变化并未导致工人对工作不安全的担忧加剧或工作满意度下降。短期任期的下降是普遍现象，与在短期工作中循环的工人减少有关，并且与短期任期工人感知到的工作安全感增加同时发生。

papers.title: Information and Social Norms: Experimental Evidence on the Labor Market Aspirations of Saudi Women
papers.authors: Monira Essa Aloud, Sara Al-Rashood, Ina Ganguli, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: How important are social norms, information gaps and family constraints in explaining the low rates of female labor force participation (FLFP) in conservative societies? To answer this question, we conducted a field experiment embedded in a survey of female university students at a large public university in Saudi Arabia. We randomly provided one subset of individuals with information on the labor market and aspirations of their female peers (T1), while another subset was provided with this information along with a prime that made their parents more salient (T2). We find that expectations of working among those in the Control group are quite high, yet students underestimate the expected labor force attachment of their female peers. We show that social information matters: relative to the Control group, expectations about own labor force participation are significantly higher in the T1 group, which is driven primarily by receiving information about their peers’ aspirations. We show that T2, as intended, causes students to report a higher importance of parents’ approval of their choices. However, we do not find that the impact of information is counteracted by evoking parental expectations: impacts for the T2 group on labor market expectations are not smaller than those for T1 group. However, T2 does lead to higher expectations of working in Education and the Public sectors - sectors that are more socially acceptable for women, suggesting that parental expectations their daughters’ labor market aspirations but partly shape them.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：D80, D83, J10, J20, Z10
papers.zh_title: 信息与社会规范：沙特女性劳动力市场抱负的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 社会规范、信息差距和家庭约束在解释保守社会中女性劳动力参与率低的问题上有多重要？为了回答这个问题，我们在沙特阿拉伯一所大型公立大学对女大学生进行了一项嵌入调查的实地实验。我们随机向一组个体提供关于其女性同龄人劳动力市场和抱负的信息（T1），而另一组则除了获得这些信息外，还接受了一个使其父母更突出的启动提示（T2）。我们发现，对照组中个体的工作期望相当高，但学生们低估了其女性同龄人的预期劳动力市场依附度。我们表明社会信息很重要：相对于对照组，T1组中关于自身劳动力参与率的期望显著更高，这主要是由于收到了关于同龄人抱负的信息。我们表明，T2按预期导致学生报告父母对其选择认可的重要性更高。然而，我们发现信息的影响并未因唤起父母期望而被抵消：T2组对劳动力市场期望的影响并不小于T1组。但是，T2确实导致了对教育和公共部门工作期望的提高——这些部门对女性来说在社会上更可接受，这表明父母的期望并未削弱其女儿的劳动力市场抱负，而是部分塑造了它们。

papers.title: Cigarette Taxes and Smoking Among Sexual Minority Adults
papers.authors: Christopher Carpenter, Dario Sansone
papers.abstract: We provide the first quasi-experimental evidence on the relationship between cigarette taxes and sexual minority adult smoking by studying individuals in same-sex households (a large share of whom are in same-sex romantic relationships) from the 1996-2018 Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System. We find that cigarette taxes significantly reduced smoking among men and women in same-sex households, and the effects we find for men in same-sex households are significantly larger than the associated effects for men in different-sex households (the vast majority of whom are heterosexual married/partnered men). This result suggests that the sizable disparities in adult smoking rates between heterosexual and sexual minority men would have been even larger in the absence of stricter tobacco control policy. In line with previous research indicating that cigarette taxes have ‘lost their bite’, we find no significant relationship between cigarette taxes and sexual minority smoking in more recent years.
papers.zh_title: 香烟税与性少数成年人的吸烟行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究1996-2018年行为风险因素监测系统中同性家庭中的个体（其中很大一部分处于同性恋爱关系中），首次提供了关于香烟税与性少数成年人吸烟之间关系的准实验证据。我们发现，香烟税显著减少了同性家庭中男性和女性的吸烟行为，并且我们发现对同性家庭中男性的影响显著大于对异性家庭中男性的相应影响（后者绝大多数是异性恋已婚/同居男性）。这一结果表明，如果没有更严格的烟草控制政策，异性恋和性少数男性之间在成年吸烟率上的显著差异本会更大。与先前表明香烟税已“失去效力”的研究一致，我们发现近年来香烟税与性少数吸烟行为之间没有显著关系。

papers.title: Effects of the Minimum Wage on Child Health
papers.authors: George Wehby, Robert Kaestner, Wei Lyu, Dhaval M. Dave
papers.abstract: Effects of the minimum wage on labor market outcomes have been extensively debated and analyzed. Less studied, however, are other consequences of the minimum wage that stem from changes in a household’s income and labor supply. We examine the effects of the minimum wage on child health. To obtain estimates, we use data from the National Survey of Children’s Health in conjunction with a difference-in-differences research design. We find that an increase in the minimum wage throughout childhood is associated with a significant improvement in child health. A particularly interesting finding is that much of the benefits of a higher minimum wage are associated with the period between birth and age five.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I1, I14, I28, J20, J3
papers.zh_title: 最低工资对儿童健康的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 最低工资对劳动力市场结果的影响已被广泛讨论和分析。然而，对最低工资因家庭收入和劳动力供给变化而产生的其他后果的研究较少。我们考察了最低工资对儿童健康的影响。为了获得估计值，我们使用了全国儿童健康调查的数据，并结合了双重差分研究设计。我们发现，整个童年时期最低工资的提高与儿童健康的显著改善相关。一个特别有趣的发现是，较高最低工资的大部分益处与从出生到五岁这一时期相关。

papers.title: The State of Mental Health Among the Elderly Chinese
papers.authors: Yi Chen, Hanming Fang
papers.abstract: China introduced its stringent family planning policies from the early 1970s, known as the "Later, Longer, Fewer" policies, and followed it with the One-Child Policy from 1979. The number of children born to Chinese parents significantly decreased from 5.7 in late 1960s to 2.5 in 1988. In Chen and Fang (2019), we show that family planning policies have drastically different effects on elderly parents' physical and mental well-beings. Whereas parents more exposed to the family planning policies consume more and enjoy slightly better physical health status, they report more severe depression symptoms. In this paper, we present a more complete picture of the difference in mental health among residents in rural and urban areas, between males and females, between different education groups, between those with one child and those with more than one children, and between widowed and non-widowed. We highlight the role of family support (from children and spouse) for the mental health status among the elderly Chinese.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, PE；JEL：H31, I15, I18, J13
papers.zh_title: 中国老年人心理健康状况
papers.zh_abstract: 中国从20世纪70年代初开始实施严格的计划生育政策，即“晚、稀、少”政策，随后在1979年实施了独生子女政策。中国父母生育的子女数量从20世纪60年代末的5.7个显著下降到1988年的2.5个。在Chen和Fang（2019）的研究中，我们表明计划生育政策对老年父母的身心健康产生了截然不同的影响。受计划生育政策影响更大的父母消费更多，身体健康状况略好，但他们报告了更严重的抑郁症状。在本文中，我们更全面地展示了农村和城市居民、男性和女性、不同教育群体、独生子女和多子女父母、丧偶和非丧偶者之间心理健康的差异。我们强调了家庭支持（来自子女和配偶）对中国老年人心理健康状况的作用。

papers.title: Optimal Bank Regulation In the Presence of Credit and Run-Risk
papers.authors: Anil K. Kashyap, Dimitrios P. Tsomocos, Alexandros P. Vardoulakis
papers.abstract: We modify the Diamond and Dybvig (1983) model so that, besides offering liquidity services to depositors, banks also raise equity funding, make loans that are risky, and can invest in safe, liquid assets. The bank and its borrowers are subject to limited liability. When profitable, banks monitor borrowers to ensure that they repay loans. Depositors may choose to run based on conjectures about the available resources for people withdrawing early and beliefs about banks’ monitoring. We model the run decision by solving a novel global game. We find that banks opt for a more deposit-intensive capital structure than a social planner would choose. The privately chosen asset portfolio can be more or less lending-intensive, while the level of lending can also be higher or lower depending on a planner’s preferences between liquidity provision and credit extension. To correct these three distortions, a package of three regulations is warranted.
papers.zh_title: 存在信贷风险和挤兑风险时的最优银行监管
papers.zh_abstract: 我们修改了Diamond和Dybvig（1983）的模型，使得银行除了向储户提供流动性服务外，还可以筹集股权资金、发放有风险的贷款，并投资于安全的流动资产。银行及其借款人承担有限责任。当有利可图时，银行会监督借款人以确保其偿还贷款。储户可能会根据对提前取款者可用资源的推测以及对银行监督行为的信念而选择挤兑。我们通过求解一个新颖的全局博弈来建模挤兑决策。我们发现，银行选择的资本结构比社会计划者选择的更偏向存款密集型。私人选择的资产组合可能更偏向贷款或更不偏向贷款，而贷款水平也可能更高或更低，这取决于计划者在流动性提供和信贷扩张之间的偏好。为了纠正这三种扭曲，需要一揽子三项监管措施。

papers.title: Academic Engagement, Commercialization, and Scholarship: Empirical Evidence from Agricultural and Life Scientists at U.S. Land-grant Universities
papers.authors: Bradford L. Barham, Jeremy D. Foltz, Ana Paula Melo
papers.abstract: This article examines the involvement of agricultural and life science faculty at U.S. land grant universities in two types of university-industry relations: academic engagement (sponsored research, industry collaborations, and presentations), academic commercialization (patenting, licensing, and start-ups) and traditional academic scholarship. It exploits large-scale, random sample cross-section surveys of nearly 1,500 scientists at the original 52 Land Grant Universities in 2005 and 2015. We fill a knowledge gap regarding the prevalence, coincidence, intensity, importance and factors shaping faculty involvement in university-industry relations (UIR). After several decades of promotion and emphasis on UIR activities participation in them has plateaued and is stable at a fairly high level. Academic engagement is far more prevalent (at 76% of faculty) and important than is academic commercialization (at 19% of faculty). Academic engagement generates 15-20 times the research funds than academic commercialization does, but both continue to be dwarfed by public funding. We find evidence of synergies between UIR activities and academic scholarship. We also explore how individual, institutional, and university-level factors help explain faculty UIR participation. We find differences across academic disciplines and highlight the role that faculty attitudes toward science and commercial activity shape involvement in UIR. Significant differences also stem from university level effects and may be contingent on culture, history, location, and quality of science.
papers.zh_title: 学术参与、商业化与学术研究：来自美国赠地大学农业与生命科学家的实证证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了美国赠地大学农业与生命科学系教师参与两种类型的大学-产业关系的情况：学术参与（资助研究、产业合作和报告）、学术商业化（专利、许可和初创企业）以及传统的学术研究。它利用了2005年和2015年对最初52所赠地大学近1500名科学家进行的大规模随机抽样横截面调查。我们填补了关于教师参与大学-产业关系的普遍性、重合性、强度、重要性以及影响因素的知识空白。经过几十年的推广和强调，大学-产业关系活动的参与率已趋于平稳，并稳定在相当高的水平。学术参与（占教师的76%）远比学术商业化（占教师的19%）更为普遍和重要。学术参与产生的研究资金是学术商业化的15-20倍，但两者仍远不及公共资金。我们发现了大学-产业关系活动与学术研究之间存在协同效应的证据。我们还探讨了个人、机构和大学层面的因素如何解释教师的大学-产业关系参与。我们发现了不同学科之间的差异，并强调了教师对科学和商业活动的态度在塑造大学-产业关系参与中的作用。显著的差异也源于大学层面的影响，并可能取决于文化、历史、地理位置和科学质量。

papers.title: Looking Back at 50 Years of the Clean Air Act
papers.authors: Joseph E. Aldy, Maximilian Auffhammer, Maureen Cropper, Arthur Fraas, Richard Morgenstern
papers.abstract: We synthesize and review retrospective analyses of federal air quality regulations to examine the contributions of the Clean Air Act to the vast air quality improvements seen since 1970. Geographic heterogeneity in stringency affects emissions, public health, compliance costs, and employment. Cap-and-trade has delivered greater emission reductions at lower cost than conventional mandates, yet has fallen short of textbook ideals. Market power also influenced the CAA’s benefits and costs. New benefit categories have been identified ex post, but specific technology requirements have not yet been rigorously evaluated. Comparisons of aggregate benefits and costs of the CAA are beyond present capabilities.
papers.zh_title: 回顾《清洁空气法》50年
papers.zh_abstract: 我们综合并回顾了对联邦空气质量法规的回顾性分析，以考察《清洁空气法》自1970年以来对空气质量大幅改善的贡献。严格程度的地理异质性影响着排放、公共健康、合规成本和就业。总量控制与交易制度以比传统指令更低的成本实现了更大的减排，但仍未达到教科书式的理想状态。市场力量也影响了《清洁空气法》的收益和成本。事后发现了新的收益类别，但具体的技术要求尚未得到严格评估。对《清洁空气法》总收益和总成本的比较超出了当前的能力范围。

papers.title: The Aggregate Consequences of Default Risk: Evidence from Firm-level Data
papers.authors: Timothy J. Besley, Isabelle A. Roland, John Van Reenen
papers.abstract: This paper studies the implications of perceived default risk for aggregate output and productivity. Using a model of credit contracts with moral hazard, we show that a firm’s probability of default is a sufficient statistic for capital allocation. The theoretical framework suggests an aggregate measure of the impact of credit market frictions based on firm-level probabilities of default which can be applied using data on firm-level employment and default risk. We obtain direct estimates of firm-level default probabilities using Standard and Poor’s PD Model to capture the expectations that lenders were forming based on their historical information sets. We implement the method on the UK, an economy that was strongly exposed to the global financial crisis and where we can match default probabilities to administrative data on the population of 1.5 million firms per year. As expected, we find a strong correlation between default risk and a firm’s future performance. We estimate that credit frictions (i) cause an output loss of around 28% per year on average; (ii) are much larger for firms with under 250 employees and (iii) that losses are overwhelmingly due to a lower overall capital stock rather than a misallocation of credit across firms with heterogeneous productivity. Further, we find that these losses accounted for over half of the productivity fall between 2008 and 2009, and persisted for smaller (although not larger) firms
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：D24, E32, L11, O47
papers.zh_title: 违约风险的总体后果：来自企业层面数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了感知违约风险对总产出和生产率的影响。通过使用一个带有道德风险的信贷合同模型，我们表明企业的违约概率是资本配置的充分统计量。该理论框架提出了一个基于企业层面违约概率的信贷市场摩擦影响的总体度量，该度量可以利用企业层面就业和违约风险的数据来应用。我们使用标准普尔PD模型直接估计企业层面的违约概率，以捕捉贷款人基于其历史信息集所形成的预期。我们在英国实施该方法，该国经济深受全球金融危机影响，并且我们能够将违约概率与每年150万家企业的行政数据相匹配。正如预期，我们发现违约风险与企业未来表现之间存在强相关性。我们估计信贷摩擦（i）平均每年导致约28%的产出损失；（ii）对员工少于250人的企业影响更大；（iii）损失主要源于较低的总体资本存量，而非信贷在具有异质性生产率的企业间的错配。此外，我们发现这些损失占2008年至2009年间生产率下降的一半以上，并且对较小企业（尽管不是较大企业）的影响持续存在。

papers.title: Professional Interactions and Hiring Decisions: Evidence from the Federal Judiciary
papers.authors: Marco Battaglini, Jorgen M. Harris, Eleonora Patacchini
papers.abstract: We examine the effect of hearing cases alongside female judicial colleagues on the probability that a federal judge hires a female law clerk. Federal judges are assigned to cases and to judicial panels at random and have few limitations on their choices of law clerks: these two features make the federal court system a unique environment in which to study the effect of professional interactions and beliefs in organizations. We constructed a unique dataset by aggregating federal case records from 2007-2017 to collect information on federal judicial panels, and by merging this data with judicial hiring information from the Judicial Yellow Book, a directory of federal judges and clerks. We find that a one standard deviation increase in the fraction of co-panelists who are female increases a judge’s likelihood of hiring a female clerk by 4 percentage points. This finding suggests that increases in the diversity of the upper rungs of a profession can shift attitudes in a way that creates opportunities at the entry level of a profession.
papers.zh_title: 专业互动与招聘决策：来自联邦司法系统的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了与女性司法同事共同审理案件对联邦法官雇佣女性法律助理概率的影响。联邦法官被随机分配案件和司法小组，且在选择法律助理方面几乎没有限制：这两个特点使联邦法院系统成为研究组织中专业互动和信念影响的独特环境。我们通过汇总2007-2017年的联邦案件记录构建了一个独特数据集，以收集联邦司法小组的信息，并将这些数据与《司法黄页》（一份联邦法官和助理名录）中的司法招聘信息合并。我们发现，合议庭中女性比例每增加一个标准差，法官雇佣女性助理的可能性就会提高4个百分点。这一发现表明，职业高层多样性的增加可以改变态度，从而在职业入门层面创造机会。

papers.title: Is the Cure Worse than the Disease? Unintended Effects of Payment Reform in a Quantity-based Transfer Program
papers.authors: Katherine Meckel
papers.abstract: Quantity vouchers are used in redistributive programs to shield participants from price variation and alter their consumption patterns. However, because participants are insensitive to prices, vendors of program goods are incentivized to price discriminate between program and non-program customers. I study these trade-offs in the context of a reform to reduce price discrimination in the Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC), which provides a quantity voucher for nutritious foods to low-income mothers and children. The reform caused vendors to drop out, reducing program take-up. In addition, smaller vendors increased prices charged to non-WIC shoppers by 6.4%.
papers.zh_title: 治疗比疾病更糟糕吗？基于数量转移支付项目中支付改革的意外效应
papers.zh_abstract: 数量券被用于再分配项目，以保护参与者免受价格波动影响并改变其消费模式。然而，由于参与者对价格不敏感，项目商品的供应商有动机在项目客户和非项目客户之间进行价格歧视。我在妇女、婴儿和儿童补充营养计划（WIC）的背景下研究了这些权衡，该计划为低收入母亲和儿童提供营养食品的数量券，而改革旨在减少价格歧视。改革导致供应商退出，降低了项目参与率。此外，较小的供应商对非WIC购物者的价格提高了6.4%。

papers.title: The Effects of E-Cigarette Taxes on E-Cigarette Prices and Tobacco Product Sales: Evidence from Retail Panel Data
papers.authors: Chad D. Cotti, Charles J. Courtemanche, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Erik T. Nesson, Michael F. Pesko, Nathan Tefft
papers.abstract: We estimate the effect of e-cigarette tax rates on e-cigarette prices, e-cigarette sales, and sales of other tobacco products using NielsenIQ Retail Scanner data from 2013 to 2019. We find that 90% of e-cigarette taxes are passed on to consumer retail prices. We then estimate reduced form and instrumental variables regressions to examine the effects of e-cigarette and cigarette taxes and prices on sales. We calculate an e-cigarette own-price elasticity of -2.2 and particularly large elasticity of demand for flavored e-cigarettes. Further, we document a cigarette own-price elasticity of -0.4 and positive cross-price elasticities of demand between e-cigarettes and cigarettes, suggesting economic substitution.
papers.zh_title: 电子烟税对电子烟价格和烟草产品销售的影响：来自零售面板数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2013年至2019年的NielsenIQ零售扫描数据，估计了电子烟税率对电子烟价格、电子烟销售以及其他烟草产品销售的影响。我们发现，90%的电子烟税被转嫁到消费者零售价格上。然后，我们估计了简化形式和工具变量回归，以检验电子烟和卷烟税率及价格对销售的影响。我们计算出电子烟的自价格弹性为-2.2，其中调味电子烟的需求弹性尤其大。此外，我们记录了卷烟的自价格弹性为-0.4，以及电子烟和卷烟之间的正交叉价格弹性，这表明存在经济替代关系。

papers.title: Why is Unemployment so Countercyclical?
papers.authors: Lawrence J. Christiano, Martin S. Eichenbaum, Mathias Trabandt
papers.abstract: We argue that wage inertia plays a pivotal role in allowing empirically plausible variants of the standard search and matching model to account for the large countercyclical response of unemployment to shocks.
papers.zh_title: 为什么失业如此反周期？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，工资惯性在使标准搜索匹配模型的经验合理变体能够解释失业对冲击的大幅反周期反应方面发挥了关键作用。

papers.title: Hours and Wages
papers.authors: Alexander Bick, Adam Blandin, Richard Rogerson
papers.abstract: We document two robust features of the cross-sectional distribution of usual weekly hours and hourly wages. First, usual weekly hours are heavily concentrated around 40 hours, while at the same time a substantial share of total hours come from individuals who work more than 50 hours. Second, mean hourly wages are non-monotonic across the usual hours distribution, with a peak at 50 hours. We develop and estimate a model of labor supply to account for these features. The novel feature of our model is that earnings are non-linear in hours, with the extent of nonlinearity varying over the hours distribution. Our estimates imply significant wage penalties for individuals that deviate from 40 hours in either direction, leading to a large mass of individuals that work 40 hours and are not very responsive to shocks. This has important implications for the role of labor supply as a mechanism for self-insurance in a standard heterogeneous agent-incomplete markets model and for empirical strategies designed to estimate labor supply parameters.
papers.zh_title: 工时与工资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了通常每周工时和小时工资的横截面分布的两个稳健特征。首先，通常每周工时高度集中在40小时左右，同时总工时的很大一部分来自工作超过50小时的个体。其次，平均小时工资在通常工时分布上呈现非单调性，在50小时处达到峰值。我们开发并估计了一个劳动供给模型来解释这些特征。我们模型的新颖之处在于，收入在工时上是非线性的，且非线性程度随工时分布而变化。我们的估计表明，偏离40小时（无论方向如何）的个体会面临显著的工资惩罚，导致大量个体工作40小时且对冲击反应不敏感。这对劳动供给作为标准异质性代理人-不完全市场模型中自我保险机制的作用，以及用于估计劳动供给参数的实证策略具有重要意义。

papers.title: Risk Premium Shocks Can Create Inefficient Recessions
papers.authors: Sebastian Di Tella, Robert E. Hall
papers.abstract: We develop an equilibrium theory of business cycles driven by spikes in risk premiums that depress business demand for capital and labor. Aggregate shocks increase firms’ uninsurable idiosyncratic risk and raise risk premiums.
