We show that risk shocks can create quantitatively realistic recessions, with contractions in employment, consumption, and investment. Business cycles are inefficient—output and employment fall too much during recessions, compared to the constrained-efficient allocation, and consumption should rise. Optimal policy involves stimulating employment and consumption during recessions.
papers.zh_title: 风险溢价冲击可能导致低效衰退
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个由风险溢价飙升驱动的商业周期均衡理论，这种飙升抑制了企业对资本和劳动力的需求。总体冲击增加了企业不可分散的异质性风险，并提高了风险溢价。我们表明，风险冲击可以产生数量上逼真的衰退，伴随就业、消费和投资的收缩。商业周期是低效的——与受约束的有效配置相比，衰退期间产出和就业下降过多，而消费本应上升。最优政策涉及在衰退期间刺激就业和消费。

papers.title: Structural Reforms and Elections: Evidence from a World-Wide New Dataset
papers.authors: Alberto F. Alesina, Davide Furceri, Jonathan D. Ostry, Chris Papageorgiou, Dennis P. Quinn
papers.abstract: We assemble two unique databases. One is on reforms in domestic finance, external finance, trade, product markets and labor markets, which covers 90 advanced and developing economies from 1973 to 2014. The other is on electoral results and timing of elections. In the 66 democracies considered in the paper, we show that liberalizing reforms engender benefits for the economy, but they materialize only gradually over time. Partly because of this delayed effect, and possibly because voters are impatient or do not anticipate future benefits, liberalizing reforms are costly to incumbents when implemented close to elections. We also find that the electoral effects depend on the state of the economy at the time of reform: reforms are penalized during contractions; liberalizing reforms undertaken in expansions are often rewarded. Voters seem to attribute current economic conditions to the reforms without fully internalizing the delay that it takes for reforms to bear fruit.
papers.meta: Programs：POL；JEL：D72, J65, L43, L51, O43, O47, P16
papers.zh_title: 结构改革与选举：来自全球新数据集的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们整理了两个独特数据库。一个涉及国内金融、外部金融、贸易、产品市场和劳动力市场的改革，覆盖1973年至2014年的90个发达和发展中经济体。另一个涉及选举结果和选举时间。在本文考虑的66个民主国家中，我们表明自由化改革为经济带来好处，但这些好处是随时间逐渐实现的。部分由于这种延迟效应，并且可能因为选民缺乏耐心或未预期到未来收益，当改革在临近选举时实施，对现任者来说代价高昂。我们还发现，选举效应取决于改革时的经济状况：在经济收缩期间，改革会受到惩罚；而在扩张期间进行的自由化改革通常会得到奖励。选民似乎将当前经济状况归因于改革，而没有充分内化改革产生效果所需的延迟。

papers.title: The Wage Penalty of Regional Accents
papers.authors: Jeffrey Grogger, Andreas Steinmayr, Joachim Winter
papers.abstract: Previous work has documented that speaking one’s native language with an accent distinct from the mainstream is associated with lower wages. In this study, we seek to estimate the causal effect of speaking with a distinctive regional accent, disentangling the effect of the accent from that of omitted variables. We collected data on workers’ speech in Germany, a country with wide variation in regional dialects. We use a variety of strategies in estimation, including an instrumental variables strategy in which the instruments are based on research findings from the linguistics of accent acquisition. All of our estimators show that speaking with a distinctive regional accent reduces wages by an amount that is comparable to the gender wage gap. We also find that workers with distinctive regional accents tend to sort away from occupations that demand high levels of face-to-face contact, consistent with various occupational sorting models.
papers.zh_title: 地区口音的工资惩罚
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究已表明，用与主流口音不同的口音说母语与较低的工资相关。在本研究中，我们试图估计说独特地区口音的因果效应，将口音的影响与遗漏变量的影响区分开来。我们收集了德国工人的语音数据，该国地区方言差异很大。我们在估计中使用了多种策略，包括一种工具变量策略，其中工具基于口音习得语言学的研究发现。我们所有的估计量都表明，说独特的地区口音会使工资降低，其幅度与性别工资差距相当。我们还发现，具有独特地区口音的工人倾向于远离需要高频率面对面接触的职业，这与各种职业分类模型一致。

papers.title: Efficiency Versus Equity in the Provision of In-Kind Benefits: Evidence from Cost Containment in the California WIC Program
papers.authors: Katherine Meckel, Maya Rossin-Slater, Lindsey M. Uniat
papers.abstract: In many U.S. public programs, the government contracts with private firms to deliver in-kind benefits to recipients. These public-private partnerships generate agency problems that could drive up costs and lower program efficiency, but cost containment regulations may discourage firm participation and reduce access among eligible households. We examine these trade-offs in the context of California’s Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC), which provides vouchers to low-income pregnant women and children under five to obtain free food packages from private vendors, and has complex rules about eligible products. We use variation from a 2012 cost containment reform, which resulted in a 55 percent drop in the number of small vendors, and examine how local access to small vendors affects WIC take-up among pregnant women. We find that within-ZIP-code access to small vendors raises the likelihood of WIC take-up among first-time mothers, and that this effect is stronger for foreign-born than U.S.-born women and exists even for mothers who also have access to a larger WIC vendor. Our findings suggest that small vendors are uniquely effective at lowering barriers to take-up among subgroups of women with high program learning costs, and that cost containment reforms, which frequently target these vendors, may have unintended consequences of inequitably reducing program access.
papers.zh_title: 实物福利供给中的效率与公平：来自加州WIC项目成本控制的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国许多公共项目中，政府与私营企业签订合同，向受益人提供实物福利。这些公私合作伙伴关系会产生代理问题，可能推高成本并降低项目效率，但成本控制法规可能会抑制企业参与，并减少符合条件的家庭的获取机会。我们以加州妇女、婴儿和儿童特殊补充营养计划（WIC）为背景研究这些权衡。该计划向低收入孕妇和五岁以下儿童提供代金券，以便从私营供应商处获得免费食品包，并对合格产品有复杂的规定。我们利用2012年成本控制改革带来的变化（该改革导致小型供应商数量下降55%），考察当地小型供应商的可及性如何影响孕妇的WIC参与率。我们发现，在同一邮政编码区域内，小型供应商的可及性提高了初产妇参与WIC的可能性，并且这种效应在外籍出生的女性中比在美国出生的女性中更强，即使母亲也能接触到更大的WIC供应商，这种效应依然存在。我们的研究结果表明，小型供应商在降低具有高项目学习成本的女性亚群体的参与障碍方面具有独特效果，而经常针对这些供应商的成本控制改革可能会产生意想不到的后果，即不公平地减少项目获取机会。

papers.title: Do Cash Windfalls Affect Wages? Evidence from R&D Grants to Small Firms
papers.authors: Sabrina T. Howell, J. David Brown
papers.abstract: This paper examines how employee earnings at small firms respond to a cash flow shock in the form of a government R&D grant. We use ranking data on applicant firms, which we link to IRS W2 earnings and other U.S. Census Bureau datasets. In a regression discontinuity design, we find that the grant increases average earnings with a rent-sharing elasticity of 0.07 (0.21) at the employee (firm) level. The beneficiaries are incumbent employees who were present at the firm before the award. Among incumbent employees, the effect increases with worker tenure. The grant also leads to higher employment and revenue, but productivity growth cannot fully explain the immediate effect on earnings. Instead, the data and a grantee survey are consistent with a backloaded wage contract channel, in which employees of financially constrained firms initially accept relatively low wages and are paid more when cash is available.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：G32, G35, J31, J41
papers.zh_title: 现金意外之财会影响工资吗？来自小企业研发资助的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了小企业员工的收入如何响应以政府研发资助形式出现的现金流冲击。我们使用申请企业的排名数据，并将其与美国国税局W2收入数据及其他美国人口普查局数据集相关联。在断点回归设计中，我们发现，资助提高了平均收入，员工层面的租金分享弹性为0.07，企业层面为0.21。受益者是资助前已在企业任职的在职员工。在职员工中，效应随工作年限增加而增强。资助还导致就业和收入增加，但生产率增长无法完全解释对收入的即时影响。相反，数据和受资助者调查与一种后置工资合同渠道一致，即财务受限企业的员工最初接受相对较低的工资，并在现金可用时获得更多报酬。

papers.title: Forecasting the Results of Experiments: Piloting an Elicitation Strategy
papers.authors: Stefano DellaVigna, Nicholas Otis, Eva Vivalt
papers.abstract: Forecasts of experimental results can clarify the interpretation of research results, mitigate publication bias, and improve experimental designs. We collect forecasts of the results of three Registered Reports preliminarily accepted to the Journal of Development Economics, randomly varying four features: (1) small versus large reference values; (2) whether predictions are in raw units or standard deviations; (3) text-entry versus slider responses; and (4) small versus large slider bounds. Forecasts are generally robust to elicitation features, though wider slider bounds are associated with higher forecasts throughout the forecast distribution. We make preliminary recommendations on how many forecasts should be gathered.
papers.zh_title: 预测实验结果：试点一种启发策略
papers.zh_abstract: 对实验结果的预测可以澄清研究结果的解释，减轻发表偏倚，并改进实验设计。我们收集了初步被《发展经济学杂志》接受的三份注册报告的预测结果，随机变化四个特征：（1）小参考值与大参考值；（2）预测以原始单位还是标准差表示；（3）文本输入与滑块响应；（4）小滑块边界与大滑块边界。预测通常对启发特征具有稳健性，尽管更宽的滑块边界与整个预测分布中更高的预测值相关。我们就应收集多少预测提出了初步建议。

papers.title: Technology and Big Data Are Changing Economics: Mining Text to Track Methods
papers.authors: Janet Currie, Henrik Kleven, Esmée Zwiers
papers.abstract: The last 40 years have seen huge innovations in computing technology and data availability. Data derived from millions of administrative records or by using (as we do) new methods of data generation such as text mining are now common. New data often requires new methods, which in turn can inspire new data collection. If history is any guide, some methods will stick and others will prove to be a flash in the pan. However, the larger trends towards demanding greater credibility and transparency from researchers in applied economics and a “collage” approach to assembling evidence will likely continue.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, ED, EEE, EH, IO, ITI, LS, PE, POL；JEL：A0, B0, C0, H0, I0, J0, L0
papers.zh_title: 技术与大数据正在改变经济学：通过文本挖掘追踪方法
papers.zh_abstract: 过去40年，计算技术和数据可用性经历了巨大创新。源自数百万行政记录的数据，或通过使用（如我们所做的）文本挖掘等新数据生成方法获得的数据，现已普遍。新数据通常需要新方法，而新方法反过来又能激发新数据收集。如果以史为鉴，一些方法将留存，而另一些则会被证明是昙花一现。然而，要求应用经济学研究人员提高可信度和透明度，以及采用“拼贴”方法汇集证据的大趋势，很可能会持续下去。

papers.title: Exporting Uncertainty: The Impact of Brexit on Corporate America
papers.authors: Murillo Campello, Gustavo S. Cortes, Fabricio d'Almeida, Gaurav Kankanhalli
papers.abstract: We show that the 2016 Brexit Referendum had multi-faceted consequences for corporate America, shaping employment, investment, divestitures, R&D, and savings. The unexpected vote outcome led US firms to cut jobs and investment within US borders. Using establishment-level data, we document that these effects were modulated by the reversibility of capital and labor. American-based job destruction was particularly pronounced in industries with less skilled and more unionized workers. UK-exposed firms with less redeployable capital and high input-offshoring dependence cut investment the most. Data on the near-universe of US establishments also point to measurable, negative effects on establishment turnover (openings and closings). Our results demonstrate how foreign-born political uncertainty is transmitted across international borders, shaping domestic capital formation and labor allocation.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F23, G15, G31
papers.zh_title: 输出不确定性：英国脱欧对美国企业的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，2016年英国脱欧公投对美国企业产生了多方面的影响，塑造了就业、投资、资产剥离、研发和储蓄。意外的投票结果导致美国企业在美国境内削减工作岗位和投资。利用企业层面的数据，我们记录了这些效应受到资本和劳动力可逆性的调节。美国本土的就业破坏在技能较低和工会化程度较高的行业中尤为明显。受英国脱欧影响的企业中，那些资本可重新部署性较低且投入外包依赖度高的企业，投资削减幅度最大。近乎涵盖所有美国企业的数据也表明，对企业更替（开业和关闭）存在可衡量的负面效应。我们的结果展示了源自外国的政治不确定性如何通过国际边界传导，影响国内资本形成和劳动力配置。

papers.title: Interaction of the Labor Market and the Health Insurance System: Employer-Sponsored, Individual, and Public Insurance
papers.authors: Naoki Aizawa, Chao Fu
papers.abstract: The U.S. health insurance system for working-age households is characterized not only by its heavy dependence on the labor market but also by the segregation of risk pools across its three components: employer-sponsored health insurance (ESHI), individual health insurance exchange (HIX), and Medicaid. To assess the potential efficiency loss associated with this risk pool segregation, we develop and estimate an equilibrium model of labor and health insurance markets, with rich heterogeneity across local markets, households, and firms. We estimate the model exploiting variations across states and policy environments before and after the Affordable Care Act. We use the estimated model to implement counterfactual policies that cross-subsidize between ESHI and HIX, which include pure risk pooling between the two markets as a special case. We find that such policies would benefit most households, improve average household welfare, and decrease government expenditure. Furthermore, the welfare gains are larger if the cross subsidization is interacted with Medicaid expansion.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场与健康保险体系的互动：雇主提供、个人和公共保险
papers.zh_abstract: 美国劳动年龄家庭的健康保险体系不仅以对劳动力市场的高度依赖为特征，还因其三个组成部分——雇主提供的健康保险（ESHI）、个人健康保险交易所（HIX）和医疗补助——之间的风险池隔离而著称。为了评估这种风险池隔离可能带来的效率损失，我们开发并估计了一个劳动力和健康保险市场的均衡模型，该模型考虑了地方市场、家庭和企业之间的丰富异质性。我们利用各州以及《平价医疗法案》实施前后政策环境的差异来估计模型。我们利用估计的模型实施在ESHI和HIX之间进行交叉补贴的反事实政策，其中包括两个市场之间纯风险池化的特例。我们发现，此类政策将使大多数家庭受益，提高平均家庭福利，并减少政府支出。此外，如果交叉补贴与医疗补助扩展相结合，福利收益会更大。

papers.title: Economic Incentives Surrounding Fertility: Evidence from Alaska's Permanent Fund Dividend
papers.authors: Nishant Yonzan, Laxman Timilsina, Inas Rashad Kelly
papers.abstract: Starting in 1982, the Alaska Permanent Fund Dividend allows each full-time resident in Alaska, including infants born in the qualifying year, to receive a sizable dividend. This dividend, which represents a form of a Universal Basic Income on a small scale, could alter incentives surrounding fertility. Using synthetic control and difference-in-differences models to account for confounding factors and unobserved heterogeneity, we model the effect of income on fertility by exploiting this income shock around 1982 using Natality files from Vital Statistics and abortion data from the Centers for Disease Control, merged with data from the Census on various state characteristics. Primary results suggest that the dividend increased fertility and reduced the spacing between births, particularly for females in the 20-44 year age group. Our results suggest that policies aimed at increasing income should consider fertility consequences and their implications for economic growth.
papers.zh_title: 围绕生育的经济激励：来自阿拉斯加永久基金分红的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 从1982年开始，阿拉斯加永久基金分红允许阿拉斯加每位全职居民（包括在合格年份出生的婴儿）获得可观的分红。这种分红代表了一种小规模的全民基本收入形式，可能会改变围绕生育的激励。我们使用合成控制和双重差分模型来解释混杂因素和未观测到的异质性，利用1982年前后这一收入冲击，结合来自生命统计的出生档案和疾病控制中心的堕胎数据，并与人口普查中各州的各种特征数据合并，来模拟收入对生育的影响。主要结果表明，分红提高了生育率并缩短了生育间隔，特别是对于20-44岁年龄组的女性。我们的结果表明，旨在增加收入的政策应考虑生育后果及其对经济增长的影响。

papers.title: Misallocation or Mismeasurement?
papers.authors: Mark Bils, Peter J. Klenow, Cian Ruane
papers.abstract: The ratio of revenue to inputs differs greatly across plants within countries such as the U.S. and India. Such gaps may reflect misallocation which hinders aggregate productivity. But differences in measured average products need not reflect differences in true marginal products. We propose a way to estimate the gaps in true marginal products in the presence of measurement error. Our method exploits how revenue growth is less sensitive to input growth when a plant’s average products are overstated by measurement error. For Indian manufacturing from 1985-2013, our correction lowers potential gains from reallocation by 20%. For the U.S. the effect is even more dramatic, reducing potential gains by 60% and eliminating 2/3 of a severe downward trend in allocative efficiency over 1978-2013.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, PR；JEL：O14, O41, O47, O51, O53
papers.zh_title: 错配还是测量误差？
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国和印度等国家内部，工厂的收入与投入之比差异巨大。这种差距可能反映了阻碍总体生产率的错配。但测得的平均产品差异不一定反映真实边际产品的差异。我们提出了一种在存在测量误差的情况下估计真实边际产品差距的方法。我们的方法利用了当工厂的平均产品被测量误差高估时，收入增长对投入增长的敏感性较低这一特点。对于1985-2013年的印度制造业，我们的修正将重新配置的潜在收益降低了20%。对于美国，效果更为显著，将潜在收益降低了60%，并消除了1978-2013年间配置效率严重下降趋势的三分之二。

papers.title: Countercyclical Capital Buffers: A Cautionary Tale
papers.authors: Christoffer Koch, Gary Richardson, Patrick Van Horn
papers.abstract: Countercyclical capital buffers (CCyBs) are an old idea recently resurrected. CCyBs compel banks at the core of financial systems to accumulate capital during expansions so that they are better able to sustain operations during downturns. To gauge the potential impact of modern CCyBs, we compare the behavior of large and highly-connected commercial banks during booms before the Great Depression and Great Recession. Before the former, core banks did not expect bailouts and were subject to regulations that incentivized capital accumulation during booms. Before the later, core banks expected bailouts and kept capital levels close to regulatory minima. Our analysis indicates that the pre-Depression regulatory regime induced money-center banks to build capital buffers between 3% and 5% of total assets during economic expansions, which is up to double the maximum modern CCyB. These buffers enabled those banks to continue operations without government assistance during severe crises. This historical analogy indicates that modern countercyclical buffers may achieve their immediate goals of protecting core banks during crises but raises questions about whether they will contribute to overall financial stability.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE；JEL：E02, E42, G01, G2, G21, G3, N1
papers.zh_title: 逆周期资本缓冲：一个警示故事
papers.zh_abstract: 逆周期资本缓冲（CCyBs）是一个近期被重新提出的古老理念。CCyBs迫使金融体系核心的银行在经济扩张期间积累资本，以便它们在经济衰退期间能够更好地维持运营。为了评估现代CCyBs的潜在影响，我们比较了大萧条和大衰退之前繁荣时期大型且高度关联的商业银行的行为。在大萧条之前，核心银行不期望获得救助，并受到激励其在繁荣期间积累资本的监管。在大衰退之前，核心银行期望获得救助，并将资本水平维持在接近监管最低限度的水平。我们的分析表明，大萧条前的监管体制促使货币中心银行在经济扩张期间建立了相当于总资产3%至5%的资本缓冲，这一比例是现代CCyB最高水平的两倍。这些缓冲使这些银行能够在严重危机期间无需政府援助而继续运营。这一历史类比表明，现代逆周期缓冲可能实现其在危机期间保护核心银行的直接目标，但引发了关于它们是否有助于整体金融稳定的疑问。

papers.title: A Century of the American Woman Voter: Sex Gaps in Political Participation, Preferences, and Partisanship Since Women’s Enfranchisement
papers.authors: Elizabeth U. Cascio, Na’ama Shenhav
papers.abstract: This year marks the centennial of the Nineteenth Amendment, which provided American women a constitutional guarantee to the franchise. We assemble data from a variety of sources to document and explore trends in women’s political participation, issue preferences, and partisanship since that time. We show that in the early years following enfranchisement, women voted at much lower rates than men and held distinct issue preferences, despite splitting their votes across parties similarly to men. But by the dawn of the 21st century, women not only voted more than men, but also voted differently, systematically favoring the Democratic party. We find that the rise in women’s relative voter turnout largely reflects cross-cohort changes in voter participation and coincided with increasing rates of high school completion. By contrast, women’s relative shift toward the Democratic party permeates all cohorts and appears to owe more to changes in how parties have defined themselves than to changes in issue preferences. The findings suggest that a confluence of factors have led to the unique place women currently occupy in the American electorate, one where they are arguably capable of exerting more political influence than ever before.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, POL；JEL：I0, J16, K16, N32
papers.zh_title: 美国女性选民的一个世纪：自女性获得选举权以来政治参与、偏好和党派倾向的性别差距
papers.zh_abstract: 今年是第十九条修正案颁布一百周年，该修正案为美国女性提供了宪法保障的选举权。我们整理了来自多种来源的数据，以记录和探讨自那时以来女性政治参与、议题偏好和党派倾向的趋势。我们表明，在获得选举权后的早期，女性投票率远低于男性，并且持有独特的议题偏好，尽管她们在政党投票上与男性相似。但到21世纪初，女性不仅投票率超过男性，而且投票方式也不同，系统性地倾向于民主党。我们发现，女性相对投票率的上升在很大程度上反映了投票参与中的跨代际变化，并与高中毕业率的提高相吻合。相比之下，女性向民主党的相对转变渗透到所有代际，并且似乎更多地归因于政党自我定义方式的变化，而非议题偏好的变化。研究结果表明，多种因素的汇合导致了女性目前在美国选民中的独特地位，在这种地位上，她们可以说能够施加比以往任何时候都更大的政治影响力。

papers.title: Factor Timing
papers.authors: Valentin Haddad, Serhiy Kozak, Shrihari Santosh
papers.abstract: The optimal factor timing portfolio is equivalent to the stochastic discount factor. We propose and implement a method to characterize both empirically. Our approach imposes restrictions on the dynamics of expected returns which lead to an economically plausible SDF. Market-neutral equity factors are strongly and robustly predictable. Exploiting this predictability leads to substantial improvement in portfolio performance relative to static factor investing. The variance of the corresponding SDF is larger, more variable over time, and exhibits different cyclical behavior than estimates ignoring this fact. These results pose new challenges for theories that aim to match the cross-section of stock returns.
papers.zh_title: 因子择时
papers.zh_abstract: 最优因子择时投资组合等价于随机贴现因子。我们提出并实施了一种方法来同时描述这两者的特征。我们的方法对预期收益的动态施加了限制，从而产生了一个经济上合理的SDF。市场中性权益因子具有强烈且稳健的可预测性。利用这种可预测性，相对于静态因子投资，投资组合表现得到了显著改善。相应SDF的方差更大，随时间变化更剧烈，并且表现出与忽略这一事实的估计不同的周期性行为。这些结果为旨在匹配股票收益横截面的理论提出了新的挑战。

papers.title: Did Mutual Fund Return Persistence Persist?
papers.authors: James J. Choi, Kevin Zhao
papers.abstract: A seminal study of persistence in mutual fund performance is Carhart (1997), who found that U.S. equity mutual funds’ past-year returns positively predict their raw excess return and one-factor alpha over the next year. Based on these results, an investor may believe that she can earn higher returns by buying mutual funds with high past-year returns. We are able to replicate Carhart’s results in his 1963-1993 sample period, but we find that significant performance persistence does not exist in the 1994-2018 period. Even during the 1963-1993 period, performance persistence weakened in later years. The disappearance of significant performance persistence is due to lower returns to favorable styles, as well as less favorable style tilts and increased style-adjusted underperformance by past winning funds.
papers.zh_title: 共同基金收益的持续性是否持续存在？
papers.zh_abstract: 关于共同基金业绩持续性的开创性研究是Carhart（1997），他发现美国股票共同基金过去一年的收益正向预测其未来一年的原始超额收益和单因子alpha。基于这些结果，投资者可能相信她可以通过购买过去一年收益高的共同基金来获得更高的回报。我们能够在Carhart的1963-1993年样本期内复制他的结果，但我们发现在1994-2018年期间，显著的业绩持续性并不存在。即使在1963-1993年期间，业绩持续性在后期也有所减弱。显著业绩持续性的消失是由于有利风格的回报降低，以及过去获胜基金的风格倾斜变得不那么有利和风格调整后的表现不佳加剧。

papers.title: College Attainment, Income Inequality, and Economic Security: A Simulation Exercise
papers.authors: Brad Hershbein, Melissa Schettini Kearney, Luke W. Pardue
papers.abstract: We conduct an empirical simulation exercise that gauges the plausible impact of increased rates of college attainment on a variety of measures of income inequality and economic insecurity. Using two different methodological approaches—a distributional approach and a causal parameter approach—we find that increased rates of bachelor’s and associate degree attainment would meaningfully increase economic security for lower-income individuals, reduce poverty and near-poverty, and shrink gaps between the 90th and lower percentiles of the earnings distribution. However, increases in college attainment would not significantly reduce inequality at the very top of the distribution.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：I24, I26, I30, J21, J24, J31
papers.zh_title: 大学学历获得、收入不平等与经济安全：一项模拟练习
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项实证模拟练习，评估提高大学学历获得率对各种收入不平等和经济不安全指标的可能影响。使用两种不同的方法论——分布法和因果参数法——我们发现，提高学士和副学士学位的获得率将显著增加低收入个体的经济安全，减少贫困和接近贫困的状况，并缩小收入分布第90百分位数与较低百分位数之间的差距。然而，大学学历获得的增加不会显著减少收入分布最顶端的极端不平等。

papers.title: The Economic Consequences of Increasing Sleep Among the Urban Poor
papers.authors: Pedro Bessone, Gautam Rao, Frank Schilbach, Heather Schofield, Mattie Toma
papers.abstract: The urban poor in developing countries face challenging living environments, which may interfere with good sleep. Using actigraphy to measure sleep objectively, we find that low-income adults in Chennai, India sleep only 5.5 hours per night on average despite spending 8 hours in bed. Their sleep is highly interrupted, with sleep efficiency—sleep per time in bed—comparable to those with disorders such as sleep apnea or insomnia. A randomized three-week treatment providing information, encouragement, and improvements to home sleep environments increased sleep duration by 27 minutes per night by inducing more time in bed. Contrary to expert predictions and a large body of sleep research, increased nighttime sleep had no detectable effects on cognition, productivity, decision-making, or well-being, and led to small decreases in labor supply. In contrast, short afternoon naps at the workplace improved an overall index of outcomes by 0.12 standard deviations, with significant increases in productivity, psychological well-being, and cognition, but a decrease in work time.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS；JEL：C93, D9, I1, I12, I15, O1, O12, O18
papers.zh_title: 增加城市贫困人口睡眠的经济后果
papers.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的城市贫困人口面临充满挑战的生活环境，这可能会干扰良好的睡眠。通过使用体动记录仪客观测量睡眠，我们发现印度金奈的低收入成年人尽管在床上度过8小时，但平均每晚仅睡5.5小时。他们的睡眠高度中断，睡眠效率（即卧床时间中的实际睡眠时间）与患有睡眠呼吸暂停或失眠等疾病的人相当。一项为期三周的随机干预提供了信息、鼓励以及对家庭睡眠环境的改善，通过促使人们增加卧床时间，使每晚睡眠时长增加了27分钟。与专家预测和大量睡眠研究相反，增加夜间睡眠对认知、生产力、决策或幸福感没有可检测到的影响，并导致劳动力供给小幅下降。相比之下，工作场所的短暂午间小睡使结果总体指数提高了0.12个标准差，生产力、心理健康和认知能力显著提高，但工作时间有所减少。

papers.title: A Fiscal Theory of Monetary Policy with Partially-Repaid Long-Term Debt
papers.authors: John H. Cochrane
papers.abstract: I construct a simple model with sticky prices and interest rate targets, closed by fiscal theory of the price level with long-term debt and fiscal and monetary policy rules. Fiscal surpluses rise following deficits, to repay accumulated debt, but surpluses do not respond to all values of unexpected inflation and deflation. This specification avoids common puzzles and produces reasonable responses to fiscal and monetary policy shocks. It allows an easy translation of any new-Keynesian model, and it allows one to study a whole sample with active fiscal policy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E3, E31, E32, E4, E5, E6, E62, E63
papers.zh_title: 带有部分偿还长期债务的货币政策的财政理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我构建了一个具有粘性价格和利率目标的简单模型，该模型通过包含长期债务以及财政和货币政策规则的物价水平财政理论来闭合。财政盈余在赤字之后增加，以偿还累积的债务，但盈余并不对所有意外通胀和通缩的值做出反应。这种设定避免了常见的难题，并对财政和货币政策冲击产生了合理的反应。它允许对任何新凯恩斯模型进行简单转换，并允许在积极财政政策下研究整个样本。

papers.title: Identity Verification Standards in Welfare Programs: Experimental Evidence from India
papers.authors: Karthik Muralidharan, Paul Niehaus, Sandip Sukhtankar
papers.abstract: We evaluate reforms that integrated more stringent, biometric ID requirements into India’s largest social protection program, using large-scale randomized and natural experiments. Corruption fell but with substantial costs to legitimate beneﬁciaries, 1.5-2 million of whom lost access to beneﬁts at some point during the reforms. Adverse eﬀects appear to have been driven primarily by decisions about the way the transition was managed, illustrating both the risks of rapid reforms, and how the impacts of promising new technologies can be highly sensitive to the protocols governing their use.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D73, H53, O30, Q18
papers.zh_title: 福利项目中的身份验证标准：来自印度的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用大规模随机和自然实验，评估了将更严格、基于生物识别的身份识别要求整合到印度最大的社会保障项目中的改革。腐败有所减少，但合法受益人付出了巨大代价，其中150万至200万人在改革期间的某个时间点失去了福利获取权。不利影响似乎主要是由过渡管理方式决策所驱动的，这既说明了快速改革的风险，也说明了有前景的新技术的影响如何高度依赖于管理其使用的协议。

papers.title: Neighborhood-Based Information Costs
papers.authors: Benjamin M. Hébert, Michael Woodford
papers.abstract: We derive a new cost of information in rational inattention problems, the neighborhood-based cost functions, starting from the observation that many settings involve exogenous states with a topological structure. These cost functions are uniformly posterior-separable and capture notions of perceptual distance. This second property ensures that neighborhood-based costs, unlike mutual information, make accurate predictions about behavior in perceptual experiments. We compare the implications of our neighborhood-based cost functions with those of the mutual information in a series of applications: perceptual judgments; the general environment of binary choice; regime-change games; and linear-quadratic-Gaussian settings.
papers.zh_title: 基于邻域的信息成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从理性疏忽问题中推导出一种新的信息成本，即基于邻域的成本函数，其出发点是观察到许多设定涉及具有拓扑结构的外生状态。这些成本函数是均匀后验可分的，并捕捉了感知距离的概念。这第二个性质确保了基于邻域的成本（与互信息不同）能在感知实验中做出关于行为的准确预测。我们在一系列应用中比较了基于邻域的成本函数与互信息的含义：感知判断；一般二元选择环境；政权更迭博弈；以及线性二次高斯设定。

papers.title: Ethnic Attrition, Assimilation, and the Measured Health Outcomes of Mexican Americans
papers.authors: Francisca M. Antman, Brian Duncan, Stephen J. Trejo
papers.abstract: The literature on immigrant assimilation and intergenerational progress has sometimes reached surprising conclusions, such as the puzzle of immigrant advantage which finds that Hispanic immigrants sometimes have better health than U.S.-born Hispanics. While numerous studies have attempted to explain these patterns, almost all studies rely on subjective measures of ethnic self-identification to identify immigrants’ descendants. This can lead to bias due to “ethnic attrition,” which occurs whenever a U.S.-born descendant of a Hispanic immigrant fails to self-identify as Hispanic. In this paper, we exploit information on parents’ and grandparents’ place of birth to show that Mexican ethnic attrition, operating through intermarriage, is sizable and selective on health, making subsequent generations of Mexican immigrants appear less healthy than they actually are. Consequently, conventional estimates of health disparities between Mexican Americans and non-Hispanic whites as well as those between Mexican Americans and recent Mexican immigrants have been significantly overstated.
papers.zh_title: 民族流失、同化与墨西哥裔美国人的测量健康结果
papers.zh_abstract: 关于移民同化和代际进步的文献有时会得出令人惊讶的结论，例如移民优势之谜，该谜题发现西班牙裔移民有时比美国出生的西班牙裔人更健康。尽管许多研究试图解释这些模式，但几乎所有研究都依赖主观的民族自我认同指标来识别移民的后代。这可能导致因“民族流失”而产生的偏差，即每当美国出生的西班牙裔移民后代未能自我认同为西班牙裔时就会发生。在本文中，我们利用父母和祖父母出生地的信息表明，通过通婚起作用的墨西哥民族流失规模可观且对健康具有选择性，这使得后续几代墨西哥移民看起来比实际更不健康。因此，关于墨西哥裔美国人与非西班牙裔白人之间，以及墨西哥裔美国人与近期墨西哥移民之间健康差异的传统估计被显著夸大了。

papers.title: Gains from Trade: Does Sectoral Heterogeneity Matter?
papers.authors: Rahul Giri, Kei-Mu Yi, Hakan Yilmazkuday
papers.abstract: This paper assesses the quantitative importance of including sectoral heterogeneity in computing the gains from trade. Our framework draws from Caliendo and Parro (2015) and has sectoral heterogeneity along five dimensions, including the elasticity of trade to trade costs. We estimate the sectoral trade elasticity with the Simonovska and Waugh (2014) simulated method of moments estimator and micro price data. Our estimates range from 2.97 to 8.94. Our benchmark model is calibrated to 21 OECD countries and 20 sectors. We remove one or two sources of sectoral heterogeneity at a time, and compare the gains from trade to the benchmark model. We also compare an aggregate model with a single elasticity to the benchmark model. Our main result from these counterfactual exercises is that sectoral heterogeneity does not always lead to an increase in the gains from trade, which is consistent with the theory.
papers.zh_title: 贸易收益：部门异质性重要吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了在计算贸易收益时纳入部门异质性的定量重要性。我们的框架借鉴了Caliendo和Parro（2015）的研究，并在五个维度上引入了部门异质性，包括贸易成本对贸易的弹性。我们使用Simonovska和Waugh（2014）的模拟矩估计方法和微观价格数据来估计部门贸易弹性。我们的估计值范围从2.97到8.94。我们的基准模型校准了21个OECD国家和20个部门。我们每次移除一个或两个部门异质性来源，并将贸易收益与基准模型进行比较。我们还将具有单一弹性的加总模型与基准模型进行比较。这些反事实实验的主要结果是，部门异质性并不总是导致贸易收益的增加，这与理论一致。

papers.title: Inflation and the Price of Real Assets
papers.authors: Matteo Leombroni, Monika Piazzesi, Martin Schneider, Ciaran Rogers
papers.abstract: In the 1970s, U.S. asset markets witnessed (i) a 25% dip in the ratio of aggregate household wealth relative to GDP and (ii) negative comovement of house and stock prices that drove a 20% portfolio shift out of equity into real estate. This study uses an overlapping generations model with uninsurable nominal risk to quantify the role of structural change in these events. We attribute the dip in wealth to the entry of baby boomers into asset markets, and to the erosion of bond portfolios by surprise inflation, both of which lowered the overall propensity to save. We also show that the Great Inflation led to a portfolio shift by making housing more attractive than equity. Disagreement about inflation across age groups matters for the size of tax effects, the volume of nominal credit, and the price of housing as collateral.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG；JEL：E1, E2, E3, E44, G1, G11, G12, G5
papers.zh_title: 通货膨胀与实物资产价格
papers.zh_abstract: 在20世纪70年代，美国资产市场经历了（i）家庭总财富与GDP之比下降25%，以及（ii）房屋和股票价格的负向联动，导致投资组合从股票向房地产转移了20%。本研究使用一个包含不可保险名义风险的世代交叠模型，来量化结构性变化在这些事件中的作用。我们将财富下降归因于婴儿潮一代进入资产市场，以及意外通货膨胀侵蚀了债券投资组合，这两者都降低了总体储蓄倾向。我们还表明，大通胀通过使住房比股票更具吸引力，导致了投资组合的转移。不同年龄组之间对通货膨胀的分歧，对税收效应的大小、名义信贷的规模以及住房作为抵押品的价格都有重要影响。

papers.title: Technological Innovation and Discrimination in Household Finance
papers.authors: Adair Morse, Karen Pence
papers.abstract: Technology has changed how discrimination manifests itself in financial services. Replacing human discretion with algorithms in decision-making roles reduces taste-based discrimination, and new modeling techniques have expanded access to financial services to households who were previously excluded from these markets. However, algorithms can exhibit bias from human involvement in the development process, and their opacity and complexity can facilitate statistical discrimination inconsistent with antidiscrimination laws in several aspects of financial services provision, including advertising, pricing, and credit-risk assessment. In this chapter, we provide a new amalgamation and analysis of these developments, identifying five gateways whereby technology induces discrimination to creep into financial services. We also consider how these technological changes in finance intersect with existing discrimination and data privacy laws, leading to our contribution of four frontlines of regulation. Our analysis concludes that the net effect of innovation in technological finance on discrimination is ambiguous and depends on the future choices made by policymakers, the courts, and firms.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE；JEL：G2, G21, G28, G5, K2, K38, O33
papers.zh_title: 技术创新与家庭金融中的歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 技术改变了歧视在金融服务中的表现形式。在决策角色中用算法取代人类判断，减少了基于偏好的歧视，而新的建模技术扩大了此前被排除在这些市场之外的家庭获得金融服务的机会。然而，算法可能因人类参与开发过程而表现出偏见，并且其不透明性和复杂性可能在金融服务的多个方面（包括广告、定价和信用风险评估）促进与反歧视法律不一致的统计歧视。在本章中，我们对这些发展进行了新的整合与分析，识别出技术导致歧视渗入金融服务的五个途径。我们还考虑了金融领域的这些技术变革如何与现有的歧视和数据隐私法律相交织，从而提出了四个监管前沿。我们的分析得出结论，技术金融创新对歧视的净效应是不确定的，取决于政策制定者、法院和公司未来的选择。

papers.title: Competing with Robots: Firm-Level Evidence from France
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Claire LeLarge, Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: Using several sources, we construct a data set of robot purchases by French manufacturing firms and study the firm-level implications of robot adoption. Out of 55,390 firms in our sample, 598 have adopted robots between 2010 and 2015, but these firms account for 20% of manufacturing employment and value added. Consistent with theory, robot adopters experience significant declines in labor share and the share of production workers in employment, and increases in value added and productivity. They expand their overall employment as well. However, this expansion comes at the expense of their competitors (as automation reduces their relative costs). We show that the overall impact of robot adoption on industry employment is negative. We further document that the impact of robots on overall labor share is greater than their firm-level effects because robot adopters are larger and grow faster than their competitors.
papers.zh_title: 与机器人竞争：来自法国的企业层面证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用多个来源，我们构建了一个法国制造业企业购买机器人的数据集，并研究了机器人采用的企业层面影响。在我们的样本中，55,390家企业中有598家在2010年至2015年间采用了机器人，但这些企业占制造业就业和增加值的20%。与理论一致，机器人采用者的劳动份额和就业中生产工人的份额显著下降，而增加值和生产率则有所提高。它们的总体就业也扩大了。然而，这种扩张是以牺牲其竞争对手为代价的（因为自动化降低了它们的相对成本）。我们表明，机器人采用对行业就业的总体影响是负面的。我们进一步证明，机器人对总体劳动份额的影响大于其企业层面的效应，因为机器人采用者比其竞争对手规模更大且增长更快。

papers.title: The Effects of Prize Structures on Innovative Performance
papers.authors: Joshua Graff Zivin, Elizabeth Lyons
papers.abstract: Successful innovation is essential for the survival and growth of organizations but how best to incentivize innovation is poorly understood. We compare how two common incentive schemes affect innovative performance in a field experiment run in partnership with a large life sciences company. We find that a winner-takes-all compensation scheme generates significantly more novel innovation relative to a compensation scheme that offers the same total compensation, but shared across the ten best innovations. Moreover, we find that the elasticity of creativity with respect to compensation schemes is much larger for teams than individual innovators.
papers.zh_title: 奖金结构对创新绩效的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 成功的创新对于组织的生存和增长至关重要，但如何最好地激励创新却知之甚少。我们在一家大型生命科学公司合作的现场实验中，比较了两种常见的激励方案如何影响创新绩效。我们发现，与提供相同总报酬但分配给前十名最佳创新的报酬方案相比，赢家通吃的报酬方案能产生显著更多的新颖创新。此外，我们发现，对于团队创新者而言，创造力对报酬方案的弹性远大于个人创新者。

papers.title: Simplifying and Improving the Performance of Risk Adjustment Systems
papers.authors: Thomas G. McGuire, Anna L. Zink, Sherri Rose
papers.abstract: Risk-adjustment systems used to pay health plans in individual health insurance markets have evolved towards better “fit” of payments to plan spending, at the individual and group levels, generally achieved by adding variables used for risk adjustment. Adding variables demands further plan and provider-supplied data. Some data called for in the more complex systems may be easily manipulated by providers, leading to unintended “upcoding” or to unnecessary service utilization. While these drawbacks are recognized, they are hard to quantify and are difficult to balance against the concrete, measurable improvements in fit that may be attained by adding variables to the formula. This paper takes a different approach to improving the performance of health plan payment systems. Using the HHS-HHC V0519 model of plan payment in the Marketplaces as a starting point, we constrain fit at the individual and group level to be as good or better than the current payment model while reducing the number of variables called for in the model. Opportunities for simplification are created by the introduction of three elements in design of plan payment: reinsurance (based on high spending or plan losses), constrained regressions, and powerful machine learning methods for variable selection. We first drop all variables relying on drug claims. Further major reductions in the number of diagnostic-based risk adjustors are possible using machine learning integrated with our constrained regressions. The fit performance of our simpler alternatives is as good or better than the current HHS-HHC V0519 formula.
papers.zh_title: 简化并改进风险调整系统的绩效
papers.zh_abstract: 用于支付个人健康保险市场中健康计划的风险调整系统，已朝着在个人和群体层面更好地“拟合”支付与计划支出的方向发展，这通常通过增加用于风险调整的变量来实现。增加变量需要计划和提供者提供更多数据。在更复杂的系统中要求的一些数据可能容易被提供者操纵，导致无意的“向上编码”或不必要的服务利用。虽然这些缺点已被认识到，但它们难以量化，并且难以与通过向公式中添加变量可能获得的具体、可衡量的拟合改进相平衡。本文采用了一种不同的方法来改进健康计划支付系统的绩效。以市场中的HHS-HHC V0519计划支付模型为起点，我们在减少模型所需变量数量的同时，将个人和群体层面的拟合约束为与当前支付模型一样好或更好。通过引入计划支付设计中的三个要素，创造了简化的机会：再保险（基于高支出或计划损失）、约束回归以及用于变量选择的强大机器学习方法。我们首先删除所有依赖药品索赔的变量。通过将机器学习与我们的约束回归相结合，可以进一步大幅减少基于诊断的风险调整因子的数量。我们更简单替代方案的拟合绩效与当前的HHS-HHC V0519公式一样好或更好。

papers.title: Physician Health Management Skills and Patient Outcomes
papers.authors: Emilia Simeonova, Niels Skipper, Peter R. Thingholm
papers.abstract: A host of different factors affect health and longevity, ranging from genetic endowments to public policy. Physicians have a substantial influence on patients’ health and health-related costs, but we know little about the extent of this influence beyond clinical decisions such as adequate diagnosis and treatment. This paper demonstrates that the health management styles of primary care physicians significantly affect the health outcomes of their patients. Using data on the population of statin users in Denmark and matching patients to their primary care physicians, we show that the physician’s ability to facilitate adherence with prescription medications has significant positive effects on patient outcomes and health costs even after controlling for observable and unobservable patient characteristics. Policy interventions aimed at improving this aspect of physicians’ health management styles have important implications for patient outcomes and health care costs.
papers.zh_title: 医生的健康管理技能与患者结果
papers.zh_abstract: 影响健康和寿命的因素多种多样，从基因禀赋到公共政策。医生对患者的健康和健康相关成本有重大影响，但除了充分诊断和治疗等临床决策之外，我们对这种影响的程度知之甚少。本文证明，初级保健医生的健康管理风格显著影响其患者的健康结果。利用丹麦他汀类药物使用者的总体数据，并将患者与其初级保健医生进行匹配，我们表明，即使在控制了可观察和不可观察的患者特征之后，医生促进患者遵守处方药物的能力对患者结果和健康成本也有显著的积极影响。旨在改善医生健康管理风格这一方面的政策干预，对患者结果和医疗保健成本具有重要影响。

papers.title: Correlation Neglect in Student-to-School Matching
papers.authors: Alex Rees-Jones, Ran Shorrer, Chloe J. Tergiman
papers.abstract: We present results from experiments containing incentivized school-choice scenarios. In these scenarios, we vary whether schools’ assessments of students are based on a common priority (inducing correlation in admissions decisions) or are based on independent assessments (eliminating correlation in admissions decisions). The quality of students’ application strategies declines in the presence of correlated admissions: application strategies become substantially more aggressive and fail to include attractive “safety” options. We provide a battery of tests suggesting that this phenomenon is at least partially driven by correlation neglect, and we discuss implications for the design and deployment of student-to-school matching mechanisms.
papers.zh_title: 学生-学校匹配中的相关性忽视
papers.zh_abstract: 我们展示了包含激励性择校情景的实验结果。在这些情景中，我们改变了学校对学生评估的依据：是基于共同优先级（导致录取决策中的相关性）还是基于独立评估（消除录取决策中的相关性）。在存在相关录取的情况下，学生申请策略的质量会下降：申请策略变得明显更具攻击性，并且未能包含有吸引力的“安全”选项。我们提供了一系列检验，表明这种现象至少部分是由相关性忽视驱动的，并讨论了这对学生-学校匹配机制的设计和部署的启示。

papers.title: The Allocation of Authority in Organizations: A Field Experiment with Bureaucrats
papers.authors: Oriana Bandiera, Michael Carlos Best, Adnan Qadir Khan, Andrea Prat
papers.abstract: We design a field experiment to study how the allocation of authority between frontline procurement officers and their monitors affects performance both directly and through the response to incentives. In collaboration with the government of Punjab, Pakistan, we shift authority from monitors to procurement officers and introduce financial incentives in a sample of 600 procurement officers in 26 districts. We find that autonomy alone reduces prices by 9% without reducing quality and that the effect is stronger when the monitor tends to delay approvals for purchases until the end of the fiscal year. In contrast, the effect of performance pay is muted, except when agents face a monitor who does not delay approvals. Time use data reveal agents’ responses vary along the same margin: autonomy increases the time devoted to procurement and this leads to lower prices only when monitors cause delays. By contrast, incentives work when monitors do not cause delays. The results illustrate that organizational design and anti-corruption policies must balance agency issues at different levels of the hierarchy.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D02, D04, D2, D23, D73, H1, H11, H57, H83, M42, M48, M52, O1, O12, O2, O23, O38, O53, P16
papers.zh_title: 组织中的权力分配：一项针对官僚的实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们设计了一项实地实验，研究一线采购官员与其监督者之间的权力分配如何直接影响绩效，以及如何通过激励响应间接影响绩效。我们与巴基斯坦旁遮普省政府合作，在26个地区的600名采购官员样本中，将权力从监督者转移给采购官员，并引入财务激励。我们发现，仅自主权一项就能在不降低质量的情况下将价格降低9%，并且当监督者倾向于将采购审批延迟到财政年度末时，这种效应更强。相比之下，绩效薪酬的效果较弱，除非代理人面对的是不延迟审批的监督者。时间使用数据显示，代理人的反应在同一维度上有所不同：自主权增加了用于采购的时间，而这仅在监督者造成延迟时才导致价格降低。相反，当监督者不造成延迟时，激励措施才有效。这些结果表明，组织设计和反腐败政策必须平衡不同层级中的代理问题。

papers.title: Not Playing Favorites: An Experiment on Parental Fairness Preferences
papers.authors: James Berry, Rebecca Dizon-Ross, Maulik Jagnani
papers.abstract: We conduct a lab-in-the-field experiment to identify parents' preferences for investing in their children. The experiment exogenously varied the short-run returns to educational investments to identify how much parents care about maximizing total household earnings, minimizing cross-sibling inequality in "outcomes" (child-level earnings), and minimizing cross-sibling inequality in "inputs" (child-level investments). We show that while parents place some weight on maximizing earnings, they also display a strong preference for equality in inputs, forgoing roughly 40% of their potential earnings or 90% of a day’s wage to equalize inputs. We find no evidence that parents care about equalizing outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 不偏不倚：一项关于父母公平偏好的实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项实验室实地实验，以识别父母在投资子女方面的偏好。该实验外生地改变了教育投资的短期回报，以确定父母在多大程度上关心最大化家庭总收入、最小化兄弟姐妹间“结果”（子女层面的收入）的不平等，以及最小化兄弟姐妹间“投入”（子女层面的投资）的不平等。我们发现，虽然父母在一定程度上重视收入最大化，但他们也表现出对投入平等的强烈偏好，愿意放弃大约40%的潜在收入或一天工资的90%来实现投入平等。我们没有发现证据表明父母关心结果平等化。

papers.title: Globotics and Development: When Manufacturing is Jobless and Services are Tradable
papers.authors: Richard Baldwin, Rikard Forslid
papers.abstract: Globalization and robotics (globotics) are transforming the world economy at an explosive pace. While much of the literature has focused on rich nations, the changes are quite likely to affect developing nations in important ways. The premise of the paper - which should be regarded as a thought-piece - is based on an extreme thought experiment. What does development look like when digitech has rendered manufacturing jobless and many services freely traded? Our conclusion is that the service-led development path may become the norm rather than the exception; think India, not China. Since success in the service sector is based on quite different factors than success in manufacturing, development strategies and mindsets may have to change. This is an optimistic conclusion since it suggests that developing nations can directly export the source of their comparative advantage - low-cost labor - without having first to make goods with that labor.
papers.zh_title: 全球机器人与发展：当制造业无就业且服务业可贸易时
papers.zh_abstract: 全球化和机器人技术（全球机器人）正以爆炸性的速度改变世界经济。虽然大部分文献关注富裕国家，但这些变化很可能以重要方式影响发展中国家。本文的前提——应被视为一篇思想性文章——基于一个极端的思维实验。当数字技术使制造业无就业且许多服务可自由贸易时，发展会是什么样子？我们的结论是，服务主导的发展路径可能成为常态而非例外；想想印度，而不是中国。由于服务业的成功基于与制造业截然不同的因素，发展战略和思维方式可能必须改变。这是一个乐观的结论，因为它表明发展中国家可以直接出口其比较优势的来源——低成本劳动力——而无需先用这些劳动力制造商品。

papers.title: Decentralized Targeting of Agricultural Credit Programs: Private versus Political Intermediaries
papers.authors: Pushkar Maitra, Sandip Mitra, Dilip Mookherjee, Sujata Visaria
papers.abstract: We compare two different methods of appointing a local commission agent as an intermediary for a credit program. In the Trader-Agent Intermediated Lending Scheme (TRAIL), the agent was a randomly selected established private trader, while in the Gram Panchayat-Agent Intermediated-Lending Scheme (GRAIL), he was randomly chosen from nominations by the elected village council. More TRAIL loans were taken up, but repayment rates were similar, and TRAIL loans had larger average impacts on borrowers' farm incomes. The majority of this difference in impacts is due to differences in treatment effects conditional on farmer productivity, rather than differences in borrower selection patterns. The findings can be explained by a model where TRAIL agents increased their middleman profits by helping more able treated borrowers reduce their unit costs and increase output. In contrast, for political reasons GRAIL agents monitored the less able treated borrowers and reduced their default risk.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：H42, I38, O13, O16, O17
papers.zh_title: 农业信贷项目的分散化目标定位：私人中介与政治中介的比较
papers.zh_abstract: 我们比较了两种任命当地佣金代理人作为信贷项目中介的不同方法。在“贸易商-代理中介贷款计划”（TRAIL）中，代理人是随机选择的、已建立的私人贸易商；而在“村务委员会-代理中介贷款计划”（GRAIL）中，代理人是从当选村务委员会提名的候选人中随机选择的。TRAIL贷款被更多地采用，但还款率相似，且TRAIL贷款对借款人农业收入的平均影响更大。这种影响差异的大部分是由于在给定农民生产率条件下的处理效应差异，而非借款人选择模式的差异。这些发现可以通过一个模型来解释：在该模型中，TRAIL代理人通过帮助更有能力的处理组借款人降低单位成本并增加产出，从而增加了他们的中间商利润。相比之下，出于政治原因，GRAIL代理人监督了能力较弱的处理组借款人，并降低了他们的违约风险。

papers.title: The Demand for Interns
papers.authors: David A. Jaeger, John M. Nunley, Alan Seals, Eric J. Wilbrandt
papers.abstract: We describe the demand for interns in the U.S. using ads from an internship-specific website. We find that internships are more likely to be paid when more closely associated with a specific occupation, when the local labor market has lower unemployment, and when the local and federal minimum wage are the same. A résumé audit study with more than 11,500 applications reveals that employers are more likely to respond positively when internship applicants have previous internship experience. Employers are also less likely to respond to applicants with black-sounding names and when the applicant is more distant from the firm.
papers.zh_title: 实习生需求
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个专门针对实习的网站上的广告来描述美国对实习生的需求。我们发现，当实习与特定职业关联更紧密、当地劳动力市场失业率更低、以及当地最低工资与联邦最低工资相同时，实习更有可能是有薪的。一项涉及超过11,500份申请的简历审计研究表明，当实习申请人有先前实习经验时，雇主更有可能做出积极回应。雇主也不太可能回应名字听起来像黑人的申请人，以及当申请人距离公司较远时。

papers.title: Not All School Shootings are the Same and the Differences Matter
papers.authors: Phillip B. Levine, Robin McKnight
papers.abstract: This paper examines student exposure to school shootings in the United States since the 1999 shooting at Columbine High School. We analyze shootings that occurred during school hours on a school day and resulted in a death. These shootings are likely to be uniformly reported and have a greater potential to cause harm – either directly or indirectly – to enrolled students. We measure the number and characteristics of children who were exposed to them, along with measures of the economic and social environment in which these shootings occur. We distinguish between indiscriminate shootings, suicides, personal attacks and crime-related shootings. The primary finding of our analysis is the importance of separating these types of shootings. Indiscriminate shootings and suicides more commonly affect white students, schools in more rural locations, and those in locations where incomes are higher. The opposite geographic and socioeconomic patterns are apparent for personal attacks and crime-related shootings. Analyses that ignore these distinctions or focus on a particular type may provide a misleading impression of the nature of school shootings. Policy discussions regarding approaches to reducing school shootings should take these distinctions into account.
papers.zh_title: 并非所有校园枪击案都相同，差异至关重要
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了自1999年科伦拜恩高中枪击事件以来，美国学生暴露于校园枪击案的情况。我们分析了发生在上学日上课时间并导致死亡的枪击事件。这些枪击事件很可能被统一报道，并且对在校学生造成直接或间接伤害的可能性更大。我们衡量了暴露于这些事件中的儿童的数量和特征，以及这些枪击事件发生的经济和社会环境指标。我们区分了无差别枪击、自杀、人身攻击和与犯罪相关的枪击。我们分析的主要发现是区分这些类型枪击事件的重要性。无差别枪击和自杀更常影响白人学生、位于更偏远地区的学校以及收入较高地区的学校。对于人身攻击和与犯罪相关的枪击，则呈现出相反的地理和社会经济模式。忽视这些区别或只关注特定类型的分析可能会对校园枪击的性质产生误导性印象。关于减少校园枪击方法的政策讨论应考虑这些区别。

papers.title: Are Large Deficits and Debt Dangerous?
papers.authors: Michael J. Boskin
papers.abstract: The Traditional View (TV) of large deficits and debt is they have large economic costs, save in a recession and early recovery, because they crowd out investment and lower future income, and taken to extremes, can cause inflation and even a financial crisis. The TV has been challenged, most fundamentally in Olivier Blanchard’s 2019 AEA Presidential Address, an elegant extension of Peter Diamond’s OLG model to account for risk in an expected utility framework. He concludes they may have no fiscal cost and increase welfare. I present evidence of looming large deficit and debt/GDP increases and their effects on recovery from recession, interest rates and long-run growth. I discuss several substantive issues with the “no fiscal cost” view that limit its applicability, including accounting neither for the effect of increasing debt on interest rates and growth nor the pre-existing primary deficit, debt and their projected evolution; disputable readings of the data; strong assumptions and parameter values driving the results; and a political economy of deficits and debt likely to lead to even larger debt ratios. Acknowledging uncertainties, the evidence still suggests that large increases in the debt ratio could lead to much higher taxes, lower future incomes and intergenerational inequity.
papers.zh_title: 巨额赤字和债务危险吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 关于巨额赤字和债务的传统观点是，它们具有巨大的经济成本，除了在经济衰退和早期复苏期间，因为它们会挤出投资并降低未来收入，并且在极端情况下可能导致通货膨胀甚至金融危机。传统观点受到了挑战，最根本的是在Olivier Blanchard 2019年美国经济学会主席演讲中，这是对Peter Diamond世代交叠模型的一个优雅扩展，在期望效用框架中考虑了风险。他得出结论，它们可能没有财政成本并增加福利。我提供了即将出现的巨额赤字和债务/GDP比率上升的证据，以及它们对经济衰退复苏、利率和长期增长的影响。我讨论了“无财政成本”观点的几个实质性问题，这些限制了其适用性，包括未考虑债务增加对利率和增长的影响，也未考虑已有的基本赤字、债务及其预期演变；对数据的解读存在争议；驱动结果的强假设和参数值；以及赤字和债务的政治经济学可能导致更高的债务比率。承认不确定性，证据仍然表明，债务比率的大幅上升可能导致更高的税收、更低的未来收入和代际不公平。

papers.title: Immigration Lottery Design: Engineered and Coincidental Consequences of H-1B Reforms
papers.authors: Parag A. Pathak, Alex Rees-Jones, Tayfun Sönmez
papers.abstract: The H-1B Visa Reform Act of 2004 dictates an annual allocation of 85,000 visas with 20,000 reserved for advanced-degree applicants. We represent the main requirements of this legislation as formal axioms and characterize visa allocation rules consistent with the axioms. Despite the precise number reserved, we show that the range of implementations satisfying these axioms can change the allocation of advanced-degree visas by as much as 14,000 in an average year. Of all rules satisfying these axioms, the 2019 rule imposed by executive order is most favorable to advanced-degree holders. However, two earlier modifications resulted in larger changes, potentially unintentionally.
papers.zh_title: 移民抽签设计：H-1B改革的工程性与偶然性后果
papers.zh_abstract: 2004年的《H-1B签证改革法案》规定每年分配85,000个签证，其中20,000个预留给高级学位申请人。我们将该立法的主要要求表示为形式化公理，并刻画了符合这些公理的签证分配规则。尽管预留了精确的数字，我们表明，满足这些公理的实施范围在平均每年可将高级学位签证的分配改变多达14,000个。在所有满足这些公理的规则中，2019年通过行政命令实施的规则对高级学位持有者最为有利。然而，两次更早的修改导致了更大的变化，这可能是无意的。

papers.title: When and How to Use Public-Private Partnerships in Infrastructure: Lessons From the International Experience
papers.authors: Eduardo Engel, Ronald D. Fischer, Alexander Galetovic
papers.abstract: Public-private partnerships (PPPs) have emerged as a new organizational form to provide public infrastructure over the last 30 years. Governments find them attractive because PPPs can be used to avoid fiscal check-and-balances and increase spending. At the same time, PPPs can lead to important efficiency gains, especially for transportation infrastructure. These gains include better maintenance, reduced bureaucratic costs, and filtering white elephants. For these gains to materialize, it is necessary to deal with the governance of PPPs, which is more demanding than for the public provision of infrastructure. The governance can be improved by the use of contracts with appropriate risk allocation and by avoiding opportunistic renegotiations, which have been pervasive. The good news is that, based on the experience with PPPs over the last three decades, we have learnt how to address these challenges.
papers.zh_title: 何时以及如何使用公私合作伙伴关系提供基础设施：来自国际经验的经验教训
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去30年中，公私合作伙伴关系已成为提供公共基础设施的一种新的组织形式。政府发现它们具有吸引力，因为PPP可用于规避财政制衡并增加支出。同时，PPP可以带来重要的效率提升，尤其是对于交通基础设施。这些提升包括更好的维护、降低官僚成本以及过滤白象项目。为了实现这些收益，有必要处理PPP的治理问题，这比公共提供基础设施的要求更高。通过使用具有适当风险分配的合同以及避免普遍存在的机会主义重新谈判，可以改善治理。好消息是，基于过去三十年PPP的经验，我们已经学会了如何应对这些挑战。

papers.title: Estimating Dynamic Games of Oligopolistic Competition: An Experimental Investigation
papers.authors: Tobias Salz, Emanuel Vespa
papers.abstract: We evaluate dynamic oligopoly estimators with laboratory data. Using a stylized en-try/exit game, we estimate structural parameters under the assumption that the data are generated by a Markov-perfect equilibrium (MPE) and use the estimates to predict counterfactual behavior. The concern is that if the Markov assumption was violated one would mispredict counterfactual outcomes. The experimental method allows us to compare predicted behavior for counterfactuals to true counterfactuals implemented as treatments. Our main finding is that counterfactual prediction errors due to collusion are in most cases only modest in size.
papers.zh_title: 寡头竞争动态博弈的估计：一项实验研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用实验室数据评估动态寡头估计量。通过一个简化的进入/退出博弈，我们在假设数据由马尔可夫完美均衡（MPE）生成的前提下估计结构参数，并利用这些估计预测反事实行为。担忧在于，如果马尔可夫假设被违反，反事实结果将被错误预测。实验方法使我们能够将反事实的预测行为与作为处理实施的真实反事实进行比较。我们的主要发现是，在大多数情况下，由合谋导致的反事实预测误差规模仅属适度。

papers.title: Long-run Trends in the U.S. SES-Achievement Gap
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Jacob D. Light, Paul E. Peterson, Laura M. Talpey, Ludger Woessmann
papers.abstract: Rising inequality in the United States has raised concerns about potentially widening gaps in educational achievement by socio-economic status (SES). Using assessments from LTT-NAEP, Main-NAEP, TIMSS, and PISA that are psychometrically linked over time, we trace trends in SES gaps in achievement for U.S. student cohorts born between 1961 and 2001. Gaps in math, reading, and science achievement between the top and bottom quartiles of the SES distribution have closed by 0.05 standard deviations per decade over this period. The findings are consistent across alternative measures of SES and subsets of available tests and hold in more recent periods. At the current pace of closure, the achievement gap would not be eliminated until the second half of the 22nd Century.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I2, J62
papers.zh_title: 美国社会经济地位-成就差距的长期趋势
papers.zh_abstract: 美国日益加剧的不平等引发了人们对社会经济地位（SES）造成的教育成就差距可能扩大的担忧。利用心理测量学上随时间关联的LTT-NAEP、Main-NAEP、TIMSS和PISA评估数据，我们追踪了1961年至2001年间出生的美国学生群体在成就上的SES差距趋势。在此期间，SES分布顶部和底部四分位数之间在数学、阅读和科学成就上的差距每十年缩小了0.05个标准差。这一发现与SES的替代衡量指标和可用测试子集的结果一致，并且在近期仍然成立。按照目前的缩小速度，成就差距要到22世纪下半叶才能消除。

papers.title: Were Jews in Interwar Poland More Educated?
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Hanna Halaburda
papers.abstract: In the context of interwar Poland, we find that Jews tended to be more literate than non Jews, but show that this finding is driven by a composition effect. In particular, most Jews lived in cities and most non-Jews lived in rural areas, and people in cities were more educated than people in villages regardless of their religion. The case of interwar Poland illustrates that the Jewish relative education advantage depends on the historical and institutional contexts.
papers.zh_title: 两次世界大战期间的波兰犹太人是否受教育程度更高？
papers.zh_abstract: 在两次世界大战期间波兰的背景下，我们发现犹太人往往比非犹太人识字率更高，但表明这一发现是由构成效应驱动的。具体而言，大多数犹太人居住在城市，而大多数非犹太人居住在农村地区，无论其宗教信仰如何，城市居民的教育程度都高于乡村居民。两次世界大战期间波兰的案例说明，犹太人的相对教育优势取决于历史和制度背景。

papers.title: The Corporate Finance of Multinational Firms
papers.authors: Isil Erel, Yeejin Jang, Michael S. Weisbach
papers.abstract: An increasing fraction of firms worldwide operate in multiple countries. We study the costs and benefits of being multinational in firms’ corporate financial decisions and survey the related academic evidence. We document that, among U.S. publicly traded firms, the prevalence of multinationals is approximately the same as domestic firms, using classification schemes relying on both income-based and a sales-based metrics. Outside the U.S., the fraction is lower but has been growing. Multinational firms are exposed to additional risks beyond those facing domestic firms coming from political factors and exchange rates. However, they are likely to benefit from diversification of cash flows and flexibility in capital sources. We show that multinational firms, indeed, have a better access to foreign capital markets and a lower cost of debt than otherwise identical domestic firms, but the evidence on the cost of equity is mixed.
papers.zh_title: 跨国公司的公司金融
papers.zh_abstract: 全球越来越多的公司在多个国家运营。我们研究了跨国公司在其公司财务决策中的成本与收益，并综述了相关学术证据。我们记录到，在美国上市公司中，使用基于收入和基于销售额的分类标准，跨国公司的普遍程度与国内公司大致相同。在美国以外，这一比例较低但一直在增长。跨国公司面临超出国内公司所面临的额外风险，这些风险来自政治因素和汇率。然而，它们可能受益于现金流多样化和资本来源的灵活性。我们表明，跨国公司确实比其他方面相同的国内公司拥有更好的外国资本市场准入和更低的债务成本，但关于股权成本的证据则好坏参半。

papers.title: Partial Identification and Inference for Dynamic Models and Counterfactuals
papers.authors: Myrto Kalouptsidi, Yuichi Kitamura, Lucas Lima, Eduardo A. Souza-Rodrigues
papers.abstract: We provide a general framework for investigating partial identification of structural dynamic discrete choice models and their counterfactuals, along with uniformly valid inference procedures. In doing so, we derive sharp bounds for the model parameters, counterfactual behavior, and low-dimensional outcomes of interest, such as the average welfare effects of hypothetical policy interventions. We char- acterize the properties of the sets analytically and show that when the target outcome of interest is a scalar, its identified set is an interval whose endpoints can be calculated by solving well-behaved constrained optimization problems via standard algorithms. We obtain a uniformly valid inference pro- cedure by an appropriate application of subsampling. To illustrate the performance and computational feasibility of the method, we consider both a Monte Carlo study of firm entry/exit, and an empirical model of export decisions applied to plant-level data from Colombian manufacturing industries. In these applications, we demonstrate how the identified sets shrink as we incorporate alternative model restrictions, providing intuition regarding the source and strength of identification.
papers.zh_title: 动态模型与反事实的部分识别与推断
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个通用框架，用于研究结构动态离散选择模型及其反事实的部分识别，以及一致有效的推断程序。在此过程中，我们推导出模型参数、反事实行为以及感兴趣的低维结果（例如假设政策干预的平均福利效应）的尖锐边界。我们分析性地刻画了这些集合的性质，并表明当感兴趣的目标结果是标量时，其识别集是一个区间，其端点可以通过标准算法求解良好约束的优化问题来计算。我们通过适当应用子抽样获得一致有效的推断程序。为了说明该方法的性能和计算可行性，我们考虑了企业进入/退出的蒙特卡洛研究，以及一个应用于哥伦比亚制造业工厂层面数据的出口决策实证模型。在这些应用中，我们展示了随着纳入替代模型约束，识别集如何收缩，从而提供了关于识别来源和强度的直觉。

papers.title: Why Is the Euro Punching Below Its Weight?
papers.authors: Ethan Ilzetzki, Carmen M. Reinhart, Kenneth S. Rogoff
papers.abstract: On the twentieth anniversary of its inception, the euro has yet to expand its role as an international currency. We document this fact with a wide range of indicators including its role as an anchor or reference in exchange rate arrangements—which we argue is a portmanteau measure—and as a currency for the denomination of trade and assets. On all these dimensions, the euro comprises a far smaller share than that of the US dollar. Furthermore, that share has been roughly constant since 1999. By some measures, the euro plays no larger a role than the Deutschemark and French franc that it replaced. We explore the reasons for this underperformance. While the leading anchor currency may have a natural monopoly, a number of additional factors have limited the euro’s reach, including lack of financial center, limited geopolitical reach, and US and Chinese dominance in technology research. Most important, in our view, is the comparatively scarce supply of (safe) euro-denominated assets, which we document. The European Central Bank’ lack of policy clarity may have also played a role. We show that the euro era can be divided into a “Bundesbank-plus” period and a “Whatever it Takes” period. The first shows a smooth transition from the European Exchange Rate Mechanism and continued to stabilize German inflation. The second period is characterised by an expanding ECB arsenal of credit facilities to European banks and sovereigns
papers.zh_title: 为什么欧元的表现低于其应有水平？
papers.zh_abstract: 在其诞生二十周年之际，欧元尚未扩大其作为国际货币的作用。我们通过一系列指标记录了这一事实，包括其在汇率安排中作为锚定或参考的作用——我们认为这是一个综合衡量指标——以及作为贸易和资产计价货币的作用。在所有维度上，欧元的份额都远低于美元。此外，自1999年以来，这一份额大致保持不变。根据某些衡量标准，欧元的作用并不比它所取代的德国马克和法国法郎更大。我们探讨了这种表现不佳的原因。虽然领先的锚定货币可能具有自然垄断地位，但许多额外因素限制了欧元的覆盖范围，包括缺乏金融中心、有限的地缘政治影响力以及美国和中国在技术研究中的主导地位。我们认为，最重要的是（安全）欧元计价资产的相对稀缺供应，我们对此进行了记录。欧洲央行缺乏政策清晰度也可能起到了一定作用。我们表明，欧元时代可以分为“德国央行+”时期和“不惜一切代价”时期。第一个时期显示了从欧洲汇率机制的平稳过渡，并继续稳定了德国的通货膨胀。第二个时期的特点是欧洲央行向欧洲银行和主权国家提供的信贷便利工具不断扩展。

papers.title: School Effects on Socio-emotional Development, School-Based Arrests, and Educational Attainment
papers.authors: C. Kirabo Jackson, Shanette C. Porter, John Q. Easton, Alyssa Blanchard, Sebastián Kiguel
papers.abstract: Using value-added models, we find that high schools impact students’ self-reported socioemotional development (SED) by enhancing social well-being and promoting hard work. Conditional on schools’ test score impacts, schools that improve SED reduce school-based arrests, and increase high-school completion, college-going, and college persistence. Schools that improve social well-being have larger effects on attendance and behavioral infractions in high school, while those that promote hard work have larger effects on GPA. Importantly, school SED value-added is more predictive of school impacts on longer-run outcomes than school test-score value-added. As such, for the longer-run outcomes, using both SED and test score value-added more than doubles the variance of the explained school effect relative to using test score value-added alone. Results suggest that adolescence can be a formative period for socioemotional growth, high-school impacts on SED can be captured using self-report surveys, and SED can be fostered by schools to improve longer-run outcomes. These findings are robust to tests for plausible forms of selection.
papers.zh_title: 学校对社会情感发展、校内逮捕和教育成就的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 使用增值模型，我们发现高中通过增强社会福祉和促进勤奋工作来影响学生自我报告的社会情感发展（SED）。在控制学校的考试成绩影响后，改善SED的学校减少了校内逮捕，并提高了高中毕业率、大学入学率和大学持续就读率。改善社会福祉的学校对高中阶段的出勤率和行为违规有更大的影响，而促进勤奋工作的学校对GPA有更大的影响。重要的是，学校SED增值比学校考试成绩增值更能预测学校对长期结果的影响。因此，对于长期结果，同时使用SED和考试成绩增值所解释的学校效应方差是仅使用考试成绩增值的两倍以上。结果表明，青春期可以成为社会情感成长的形成期，高中对SED的影响可以通过自我报告调查来捕捉，并且学校可以培养SED以改善长期结果。这些发现对于合理形式的选择性检验是稳健的。

papers.title: Effects of Scaling Up Private School Choice Programs on Public School Students
papers.authors: David N. Figlio, Cassandra M.D. Hart, Krzysztof Karbownik
papers.abstract: Using a rich dataset that merges student-level school records with birth records, and a student fixed effect design, we explore how the massive scale-up of a Florida private school choice program affected public school students’ outcomes. Expansion of the program produced modestly larger benefits for students attending public schools that had a larger initial degree of private school options, measured prior to the introduction of the voucher program. These benefits include higher standardized test scores and lower absenteeism and suspension rates. Effects are particularly pronounced for lower-income students, but results are positive for more affluent students as well.
papers.zh_title: 扩大私立学校选择项目对公立学校学生的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一个将学生层面的学校记录与出生记录相结合、并采用学生固定效应设计的丰富数据集，我们探讨了佛罗里达州一个私立学校选择项目的大规模推广如何影响公立学校学生的结果。该项目的扩展为那些在引入代金券项目之前初始私立学校选择程度较大（以该指标衡量）的公立学校的学生带来了适度更大的益处。这些益处包括更高的标准化考试成绩以及更低的缺勤率和停学率。对于低收入学生，影响尤为显著，但对较富裕的学生也有积极结果。

papers.title: Social Groups and the Effectiveness of Protests
papers.authors: Marco Battaglini, Rebecca B. Morton, Eleonora Patacchini
papers.abstract: We present an informational theory of public protests, according to which public protests allow citizens to aggregate privately dispersed information and signal it to the policy maker. The model predicts that information sharing of signals within social groups can facilitate information aggregation when the social groups are sufficiently large even when it is not predicted with individual signals. We use experiments in the laboratory and on Amazon Mechanical Turk to test these predictions. We find that information sharing in social groups significantly affects citizens' protest decisions and as a consequence mitigates the effects of high conflict, leading to greater efficiency in policy makers' choices. Our experiments highlight that social media can play an important role in protests beyond simply a way in which citizens can coordinate their actions; and indeed that the information aggregation and the coordination motives behind public protests are intimately connected and cannot be conceptually separated.
papers.zh_title: 社会群体与抗议的有效性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个关于公众抗议的信息理论，根据该理论，公众抗议允许公民汇总私下分散的信息，并将其信号传递给政策制定者。该模型预测，当社会群体足够大时，群体内部的信息共享可以促进信息汇总，即使个体信号无法实现这一点。我们通过实验室实验和亚马逊土耳其机器人实验来检验这些预测。我们发现，社会群体中的信息共享显著影响公民的抗议决策，并因此缓解了高度冲突的影响，从而提高了政策制定者选择的效率。我们的实验强调，社交媒体在抗议中可能发挥重要作用，而不仅仅是公民协调行动的一种方式；事实上，公众抗议背后的信息汇总和协调动机是紧密相连的，在概念上无法分离。

papers.title: The Limits of onetary Economics: On Money as a Latent Medium of Exchange
papers.authors: Ricardo Lagos, Shengxing Zhang
papers.abstract: We formulate a generalization of the traditional medium-of-exchange function of money in contexts where there is imperfect competition in the intermediation of credit, settlement, or payment services used to conduct transactions. We ﬁnd that the option to settle transactions with money strengthens the stance of sellers of goods and services vis-à-vis intermediaries, and show this mechanism is operative even for sellers who never exercise the option to sell for cash. These latent money demand considerations imply that in general, in contrast to current conventional wisdom in policy-oriented research in monetary economics, monetary policy remains eﬀective through medium-of-exchange transmission channels—even in highly developed credit economies where the share of monetary transactions is negligible.
papers.zh_title: 货币经济学的局限：论货币作为潜在交换媒介
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在信贷、结算或支付服务中介存在不完全竞争的交易环境中，对货币的传统交换媒介功能进行了概括。我们发现，用货币结算交易的选择增强了商品和服务卖方相对于中介机构的地位，并表明即使对于从未行使过现金销售选择权的卖方，这一机制也起作用。这些潜在的货币需求考虑意味着，总体而言，与当前货币政策导向研究中货币经济学的传统观点相反，货币政策通过交换媒介传导渠道仍然有效——即使在货币交易份额微不足道的高度发达的信用经济中也是如此。

papers.title: Can Investors Time Their Exposure to Private Equity?
papers.authors: Gregory Brown, Robert S. Harris, Wendy Hu, Tim Jenkinson, Steven N. Kaplan, David T. Robinson
papers.abstract: Private equity performance, both for buyouts and venture capital, has been highly cyclical: periods of high fundraising have been followed by periods of low performance. Despite this seemingly predictable variation, we find modest gains, at best, to pursuing realistic, investable strategies that time capital commitments to private equity. This occurs, in part, because investors can only time their commitments to funds; they cannot time when commitments are called or when investments are exited. There is a high degree of time-series correlation in net cash flows even across commitment strategies that allocate capital in a very different manner over time.
papers.zh_title: 投资者能否把握私募股权投资的时机？
papers.zh_abstract: 私募股权（包括收购和风险投资）的业绩具有高度周期性：高募资期之后往往伴随着低业绩期。尽管存在这种看似可预测的波动，我们发现，追求现实且可投资的策略来把握私募股权资本承诺的时机，最多只能带来适度的收益。这在一定程度上是因为投资者只能把握对基金的承诺时机；他们无法把握资本被调用或投资退出的时机。即使在不同时期以截然不同的方式配置资本的承诺策略之间，净现金流也存在高度的时间序列相关性。

papers.title: Historical Natural Experiments: Bridging Economics and Economic History
papers.authors: Davide Cantoni, Noam Yuchtman
papers.abstract: The analysis of historical natural experiments has profoundly impacted economics research across fields. We trace the development and increasing application of the methodology, both from the perspective of economic historians and from the perspective of economists in other subdisciplines. We argue that the historical natural experiment represents a methodological bridge between economic history and other fields: historians are able to use the cutting edge identification strategies emphasized by applied microeconomists; economists across subfields are able to scour history for useful identifying variation; development and growth economists are able to trace the historical roots of contemporary outcomes. Differences in fields suggest differences in scholars' aims of studying historical natural experiments. We propose a taxonomy of three primary motives that reflect priorities in different fields: historians aim to understand causal processes within specific settings. Economists across fields aim to identify "clean" historical events (in whatever context) to test hypotheses of theoretical interest or estimate causal parameters. And, growth and development economists aim to identify past variation that can be causally linked to contemporary outcomes of interest. We summarize important contributions made by research in each category. Finally, we close with a brief discussion of challenges facing each category of work.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS, POL；JEL：B00, N00, N01, N10, O10
papers.zh_title: 历史自然实验：连接经济学与经济史
papers.zh_abstract: 历史自然实验的分析深刻影响了经济学各领域的研究。我们追溯了该方法的发展及其日益广泛的应用，既从经济史学家的角度，也从其他子学科经济学家的角度。我们认为，历史自然实验代表了经济史与其他领域之间的方法论桥梁：历史学家能够利用应用微观经济学家强调的前沿识别策略；各领域的经济学家能够从历史中寻找有用的识别变异；发展经济学家和增长经济学家能够追溯当代结果的历史根源。领域的差异表明学者研究历史自然实验的目的不同。我们提出了一个分类法，包含反映不同领域优先级的三种主要动机：历史学家旨在理解特定背景下的因果过程。各领域的经济学家旨在识别“干净的”历史事件（无论何种背景），以检验理论感兴趣的假设或估计因果参数。增长和发展经济学家旨在识别能够与感兴趣的当代结果建立因果联系的过去变异。我们总结了每一类研究的重要贡献。最后，我们简要讨论了每类工作面临的挑战。

papers.title: Central Bank Digital Currency: Central Banking For All?
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Daniel Sanches, Linda Schilling, Harald Uhlig
papers.abstract: The introduction of a central bank digital currency (CBDC) allows the central bank to engage in large-scale intermediation by competing with private financial intermediaries for deposits. Yet, since a central bank is not an investment expert, it cannot invest in long-term projects itself, but relies on investment banks to do so. We derive an equivalence result that shows that absent a banking panic, the set of allocations achieved with private financial intermediation will also be achieved with a CBDC. During a panic, however, we show that the rigidity of the central bank's contract with the investment banks has the capacity to deter runs. Thus, the central bank is more stable than the commercial banking sector. Depositors internalize this feature ex-ante, and the central bank arises as a deposit monopolist, attracting all deposits away from the commercial banking sector. This monopoly might endangered maturity transformation.
papers.zh_title: 央行数字货币：面向所有人的中央银行？
papers.zh_abstract: 引入央行数字货币允许中央银行通过与私人金融中介机构竞争存款来从事大规模中介活动。然而，由于中央银行并非投资专家，它本身无法投资于长期项目，而是依赖投资银行来这样做。我们推导出一个等价性结果，表明在没有银行恐慌的情况下，通过私人金融中介实现的配置集合也将通过央行数字货币实现。然而，在恐慌期间，我们表明中央银行与投资银行合同的刚性有能力阻止挤兑。因此，中央银行比商业银行部门更稳定。存款人事前内化了这一特征，中央银行成为存款垄断者，从商业银行部门吸引所有存款。这种垄断可能危及期限转换。

papers.title: Stagnation and Scientific Incentives
papers.authors: Jay Bhattacharya, Mikko Packalen
papers.abstract: New ideas no longer fuel economic growth the way they once did. A popular explanation for stagnation is that good ideas are harder to find, rendering slowdown inevitable. We present a simple model of the lifecycle of scientific ideas that points to changes in scientist incentives as the cause of scientific stagnation. Over the last five decades, citations have become the dominant way to evaluate scientific contributions and scientists. This emphasis on citations in the measurement of scientific productivity shifted scientist rewards and behavior on the margin toward incremental science and away from exploratory projects that are more likely to fail, but which are the fuel for future breakthroughs. As attention given to new ideas decreased, science stagnated. We also explore ways to broaden how scientific productivity is measured and rewarded, involving both academic search engines such as Google Scholar measuring which contributions explore newer ideas and university administrators and funding agencies utilizing these new metrics in research evaluation. We demonstrate empirically that measures of novelty are correlated with but distinct from measures of scientific impact, which suggests that if also novelty metrics were utilized in scientist evaluation, scientists might pursue more innovative, riskier, projects.
papers.zh_title: 停滞与科学激励
papers.zh_abstract: 新思想不再像过去那样推动经济增长。对停滞的一种流行解释是，好想法更难找到，使得放缓不可避免。我们提出了一个科学思想生命周期的简单模型，指出科学家激励的变化是科学停滞的原因。在过去的五十年里，引用已成为评估科学贡献和科学家的主要方式。这种在衡量科学生产力时对引用的强调，在边际上改变了科学家的奖励和行为，使其转向渐进式科学，远离那些更可能失败但却是未来突破动力的探索性项目。随着对新思想的关注减少，科学停滞了。我们还探讨了如何拓宽衡量和奖励科学生产力的方式，涉及学术搜索引擎（如谷歌学术）衡量哪些贡献探索了更新颖的思想，以及大学管理人员和资助机构在研究评估中利用这些新指标。我们实证表明，新颖性度量与科学影响力度量相关但不同，这表明如果在科学家评估中也使用新颖性指标，科学家可能会追求更具创新性、风险更高的项目。

papers.title: Drug Firms' Payments and Physicians' Prescribing Behavior in Medicare Part D
papers.authors: Colleen Carey, Ethan M.J. Lieber, Sarah Miller
papers.abstract: In a pervasive but controversial practice, drug firms frequently make monetary or in-kind payments to physicians in the course of promoting prescription drugs. We use a federal database on the universe of such payments between 2013 and 2015 linked to prescribing behavior in Medicare Part D. We account for the targeting of payments with fixed effects for each physician-drug combination. In an event study, we show that physicians increase prescribing of drugs for which they receive payments in the months just after payment receipt, with no evidence of differential trends between paid and unpaid physicians prior to the payment. Next, we examine five case studies of major drugs going off patent. Physicians receiving payments from the firms experiencing the patent expiry transition their patients just as quickly to generics as physicians who do not receive such payments. In addition, using hand-collected efficacy data on three major therapeutic classes, we show that drug quality is largely unaffected by the receipt of payments.
papers.zh_title: 药品公司支付与医生在医疗保险D部分的处方行为
papers.zh_abstract: 在一个普遍但有争议的实践中，药品公司在推广处方药时经常向医生进行金钱或实物支付。我们使用一个联邦数据库，该数据库包含2013年至2015年间此类支付的全部记录，并与医疗保险D部分的处方行为相关联。我们通过每个医生-药物组合的固定效应来解释支付的目标定位。在一项事件研究中，我们表明，医生在收到支付后的几个月内，会增加对其收到支付的药物的处方量，而在支付之前，受支付和未受支付的医生之间没有差异趋势的证据。接下来，我们考察了五种主要药物专利到期的案例研究。经历专利到期的公司向医生支付款项，这些医生将患者转向仿制药的速度与未收到此类支付的医生一样快。此外，利用手工收集的三个主要治疗类别的疗效数据，我们表明药物质量基本上不受收到支付的影响。

papers.title: An Exploration of Trend-Cycle Decomposition Methodologies in Simulated Data
papers.authors: Robert J. Hodrick
papers.abstract: This paper uses simulations to explore the properties of the HP filter of Hodrick and Prescott (1997), the BK filter of Baxter and King (1999), and the H filter of Hamilton (2018) that are designed to decompose a univariate time series into trend and cyclical components. Each simulated time series approximates the natural logarithms of U.S. Real GDP, and they are a random walk, an ARIMA model, two unobserved components models, and models with slowly changing nonstationary stochastic trends and definitive cyclical components. In basic time series, the H filter dominates the HP and BK filters in more closely characterizing the underlying framework, but in more complex models, the reverse is true.
papers.zh_title: 模拟数据中趋势-周期分解方法的探索
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用模拟来探索Hodrick和Prescott（1997）的HP滤波器、Baxter和King（1999）的BK滤波器以及Hamilton（2018）的H滤波器的性质，这些滤波器旨在将单变量时间序列分解为趋势和周期成分。每个模拟时间序列近似于美国实际GDP的自然对数，它们分别是随机游走、ARIMA模型、两个不可观测成分模型，以及具有缓慢变化的非平稳随机趋势和明确周期成分的模型。在基本时间序列中，H滤波器在更准确地刻画基础框架方面优于HP和BK滤波器，但在更复杂的模型中，情况则相反。

papers.title: Effect of Prescription Opioids and Prescription Opioid Control Policies on Infant Health
papers.authors: Engy Ziedan, Robert Kaestner
papers.abstract: Prescription opioid use among women of reproductive age and pregnant women is relatively common. In this article, we examine whether state opioid control policies affected prescription opioid use and, in turn, infant health and maternal behaviors. We conduct several types of analyses including reduced form analyses of the effect of state policies on infant health and maternal behaviors, and instrumental variables analyses of the effects of prescription opioid use on infant health and maternal behaviors. Results from our analysis suggest that reductions in prescription opioid use because of state prescription opioid control policies have improved infant health modestly at the population level with larger implied effects at the individual level.
papers.zh_title: 处方阿片类药物及处方阿片类药物管控政策对婴儿健康的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 育龄女性和孕妇使用处方阿片类药物的情况相对普遍。本文考察了各州阿片类药物管控政策是否影响了处方阿片类药物的使用，进而影响了婴儿健康和母亲行为。我们进行了多种类型的分析，包括州政策对婴儿健康和母亲行为影响的简化形式分析，以及处方阿片类药物使用对婴儿健康和母亲行为影响的工具变量分析。分析结果表明，由于各州处方阿片类药物管控政策导致的处方阿片类药物使用减少，在人口层面上适度改善了婴儿健康，而在个体层面上则暗示了更大的影响。

papers.title: The Determinants of Income Segregation and Intergenerational Mobility: Using Test Scores to Measure Undermatching
papers.authors: Raj Chetty, John N. Friedman, Emmanuel Saez, Nicholas Turner, Danny Yagan
papers.abstract: We analyze how changes in the allocation of students to colleges would affect segregation by parental income across colleges and intergenerational mobility in the United States. We do so by linking data from tax records on parents' incomes and students' earnings outcomes for each college to data on students' SAT and ACT scores. We find that equalizing application, admission, and matriculation rates across parental income groups conditional on test scores would reduce segregation substantially, primarily by increasing the representation of middle-class students at more selective colleges. However, it would have little impact on the fraction of low-income students at elite private colleges because there are relatively few students from low-income families with sufficiently high SAT/ACT scores.
