Differences in parental income distributions across colleges could be eliminated by giving low and middle-income students a sliding-scale preference in the application and admissions process similar to that implicitly given to legacy students at elite private colleges. Assuming that 80% of observational differences in students' earnings conditional on test scores, race, and parental income are due to colleges' causal effects — a strong assumption, but one consistent with prior work — such changes could reduce intergenerational income persistence among college students by about 25%. We conclude that changing how students are allocated to colleges could substantially reduce segregation and increase intergenerational mobility, even without changing colleges' educational programs.
papers.zh_title: 收入隔离与代际流动的决定因素：利用考试成绩衡量匹配不足
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了学生大学分配方式的变化将如何影响美国大学间按父母收入划分的隔离程度以及代际流动性。为此，我们将来自税务记录的每所大学学生父母收入和学生收入结果的数据，与学生的SAT和ACT成绩数据进行了关联。我们发现，在控制考试成绩的条件下，使不同父母收入群体的申请、录取和入学率均等化，将大幅减少隔离，这主要通过增加中产阶级学生在更具选择性的大学中的代表性来实现。然而，这对精英私立大学中低收入学生的比例影响甚微，因为来自低收入家庭且拥有足够高SAT/ACT分数的学生相对较少。大学间父母收入分布的差异可以通过在申请和录取过程中给予中低收入学生类似于精英私立大学隐性给予校友子女的滑动比例偏好来消除。假设学生收入结果中80%的观测差异（在控制考试成绩、种族和父母收入后）归因于大学的因果效应——这是一个强有力的假设，但与先前研究一致——那么此类变化可使大学生中的代际收入持续性降低约25%。我们得出结论，即使不改变大学的教育项目，改变学生进入大学的分配方式也能大幅减少隔离并增加代际流动性。

papers.title: Media Competition and News Diets
papers.authors: Charles Angelucci, Julia Cagé, Michael Sinkinson
papers.abstract: Technological innovations in content delivery, such as the advent of broadcast television or of the Internet, threaten local newspapers’ ability to bundle their original local content with third-party content such as wire national news. We examine how the entry of television – with its initial focus on national news – affected local newspapers as well as consumer news diets in the United States. We develop a model of local media and show that entry of national television news could reduce the provision of local news. We construct a novel dataset of U.S. newspapers’ economic performance and content choices from 1944 to 1964 and exploit quasi-random variation in the rollout of television to show that this new technology was a negative shock in both the readership and advertising markets for newspapers. Newspapers responded by providing less content, particularly local news. We tie this change towards increasingly nationalized news diets to a decrease in split-ticket voting across Congressional and Presidential elections.
papers.zh_title: 媒体竞争与新闻消费结构
papers.zh_abstract: 内容分发方面的技术创新，例如广播电视或互联网的出现，威胁到地方报纸将其原创本地内容与第三方内容（如通讯社全国新闻）捆绑销售的能力。我们研究了电视的进入（最初侧重于全国新闻）如何影响美国的地方报纸以及消费者的新闻消费结构。我们建立了一个地方媒体模型，并表明全国电视新闻的进入可能会减少地方新闻的提供。我们构建了一个1944年至1964年美国报纸经济表现和内容选择的新数据集，并利用电视推广中的准随机变化来表明，这种新技术对报纸的读者市场和广告市场都造成了负面冲击。报纸的回应是提供更少的内容，尤其是地方新闻。我们将这种向日益全国化新闻消费结构的转变与国会和总统选举中分裂选票的减少联系起来。

papers.title: Votes For Women: An Economic Perspective on Women’s Enfranchisement
papers.authors: Carolyn Moehling, Melissa A. Thomasson
papers.abstract: The ratification of the Nineteenth Amendment in 1920 officially granted voting rights to women across the United States. However, many states extended full or partial suffrage to women before the federal amendment. In this paper, we discuss the history of women's enfranchisement using an economic lens. We examine the demand-side, discussing the rise of the women's movement and its alliances with other social movements, and describe how suffragists put pressure on legislators. On the supply side, we draw from theoretical models of suffrage extension to explain why men shared the right to vote with women. Finally, we review empirical studies that attempt to distinguish between competing explanations. We find that no single theory can explain women's suffrage in the US, and note that while the Nineteenth Amendment extended the franchise to women, state-level barriers to voting limited the ability of black women to exercise that right until the Voting Rights Act of 1965.
papers.zh_title: 女性投票权：女性选举权的经济学视角
papers.zh_abstract: 1920年批准的第十九修正案正式赋予美国女性投票权。然而，在联邦修正案之前，许多州已向女性授予了全部或部分选举权。本文从经济学视角探讨女性选举权的历史。我们考察需求侧，讨论女性运动的兴起及其与其他社会运动的联盟，并描述女权主义者如何向立法者施压。在供给侧，我们借鉴选举权扩展的理论模型来解释为何男性与女性分享投票权。最后，我们回顾了试图区分竞争性解释的实证研究。我们发现，没有单一理论能够解释美国的女性选举权，并指出尽管第十九修正案将选举权扩展至女性，但州级投票障碍限制了黑人女性行使该权利的能力，直到1965年《投票权法案》的通过。

papers.title: Cigarette Taxes and Teen Marijuana Use
papers.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: The spillover effect of cigarette taxes on youth marijuana use has been the subject of intense public debate. Opponents of cigarette taxes warn that tax hikes will cause youths to substitute toward marijuana. On the other hand, public health experts often claim that because tobacco is a “gateway” drug, higher cigarette taxes will deter youth marijuana use. Using data from the National and State Youth Risk Behavior Surveys (YRBS) for the period 1991-2017, we explore the relationship between state excise taxes on cigarettes and teen marijuana use. In general, our results fail to support either of the above hypotheses. Rather, we find little evidence to suggest that teen marijuana use is sensitive to changes in the state cigarette tax. This null result holds for the sample period where cigarette taxes are observed to have the largest effect on teen cigarette use and across a number of demographic groups in the data. Finally, we find preliminary evidence that the recent adoption of state e-cigarette taxes is associated with a reduction in youth marijuana use.
papers.zh_title: 香烟税与青少年大麻使用
papers.zh_abstract: 香烟税对青少年大麻使用的溢出效应一直是公众激烈辩论的主题。香烟税的反对者警告说，增税会导致青少年转向大麻。另一方面，公共卫生专家经常声称，由于烟草是一种“入门”毒品，更高的香烟税将阻止青少年使用大麻。利用1991-2017年期间全国和州级青少年风险行为调查的数据，我们探讨了州级香烟消费税与青少年大麻使用之间的关系。总体而言，我们的结果未能支持上述任何一种假设。相反，我们几乎没有发现证据表明青少年大麻使用对州香烟税的变化敏感。这一零结果在观察到香烟税对青少年吸烟影响最大的样本期内以及数据中的多个人口群体中均成立。最后，我们初步发现，近期州级电子烟税的采用与青少年大麻使用的减少有关。

papers.title: Drinking and Driving
papers.authors: Frank A. Sloan
papers.abstract: Driving while intoxicated causes many traffic accidents and deaths. Two decisions are closely related, whether to engage in heavy drinking, and to drive, conditional on heavy drinking. This paper reviews the extensive literature on heavy drinking, addiction, and driving after heavy drinking. Relevant public policies involve a combination of deterrence, incapacitation, and treatment. While there is empirical support for the rational addiction model applied to heavy drinking, some attributes of drinker-drivers differ from others (e.g., impulsivity in domains other than alcohol consumption, hyperbolic discounting). Policies most effective in reducing drinking and driving are alcohol excise taxes, minimum drinking age and zero tolerance laws for underage persons, dram shop and social host liability, and criminal sanctions overall. Empirical studies have not determined which specific criminal sanctions are most effective. A major impediment to criminal sanctions as a deterrent is that the probability of being stopped/arrested when driving while intoxicated is extremely low, < 0.01 to 0.02 at most, further reduced by probability of conviction/sentencing following stop/arrest far below 1. Incarceration lengths tend to be too short to incapacitate people from drinking and driving. Alcohol treatment’s effectiveness is limited by low treatment rates among persons for whom treatment is appropriate.
papers.zh_title: 酒后驾驶
papers.zh_abstract: 酒后驾驶导致许多交通事故和死亡。两个密切相关的决策是：是否进行重度饮酒，以及在重度饮酒后是否驾驶。本文回顾了关于重度饮酒、成瘾以及酒后驾驶的广泛文献。相关的公共政策涉及威慑、限制能力和治疗的组合。虽然理性成瘾模型应用于重度饮酒得到了实证支持，但饮酒驾驶者的一些属性与其他人群不同（例如，在酒精消费以外的领域存在冲动性、双曲线贴现）。在减少酒后驾驶方面最有效的政策是酒精消费税、最低饮酒年龄和针对未成年人的零容忍法律、酒类销售场所和社会招待责任，以及整体刑事制裁。实证研究尚未确定哪些具体的刑事制裁最为有效。刑事制裁作为威慑的一个主要障碍是，酒后驾驶时被拦截/逮捕的概率极低，最多低于0.01至0.02，并且由于拦截/逮捕后的定罪/判刑概率远低于1，这一概率进一步降低。监禁期限往往过短，无法有效限制人们酒后驾驶。酒精治疗的有效性受到适合治疗人群低治疗率的限制。

papers.title: Forward Guidance and Household Expectations
papers.authors: Olivier Coibion, Dimitris Georgarakos, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: We compare the causal effects of forward guidance communication about future interest rates on households’ expectations of inflation, mortgage rates, and unemployment to the effects of communication about future inflation in a randomized controlled trial using more than 25,000 U.S. individuals in the Nielsen Homescan panel. We elicit individuals’ expectations and then provide 22 different forms of information regarding past, current and/or future inflation and interest rates. Information treatments about current and next year’s interest rates have a strong effect on household expectations but treatments beyond one year do not have any additional impact on forecasts. Exogenous variation in inflation expectations transmits into other expectations. The richness of our survey allows us to better understand how individuals form expectations about macroeconomic variables jointly and the non-response to long-run forward guidance is consistent with models in which agents have constrained capacity to collect and process information.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：C83, D84, E31
papers.zh_title: 前瞻指引与家庭预期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一项随机对照试验中，利用Nielsen Homescan面板中超过25,000名美国个体，比较了关于未来利率的前瞻指引沟通与关于未来通胀的沟通对家庭通胀、抵押贷款利率和失业预期的因果效应。我们引出个体的预期，然后提供22种关于过去、当前和/或未来通胀及利率的不同信息形式。关于当前和明年利率的信息处理对家庭预期有强烈影响，但超过一年的处理对预测没有任何额外影响。通胀预期的外生变化会传导至其他预期。我们调查的丰富性使我们能够更好地理解个体如何共同形成对宏观经济变量的预期，以及对长期前瞻指引的无反应与代理人收集和处理信息能力受限的模型一致。

papers.title: Anti-Bullying Laws and Suicidal Behaviors among Teenagers
papers.authors: Daniel I. Rees, Joseph J. Sabia, Gokhan Kumpas
papers.abstract: The CDC reports that the association between bullying and suicides among teenagers has generated “concern, even panic,” but polices aimed at combatting bullying have received little attention from researchers. Using a difference-in-differences estimation strategy, we find that state-level anti-bullying laws (ABLs) reduce bullying victimization, depression and suicidal ideation, with the largest estimated effects for female teenagers and teenagers who identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, or questioning. In addition, ABLs are associated with a 13-16 percent reduction in the suicide rate of female 14- through 18-year-olds. Event-study analyses and falsification tests provide evidence that these estimates can be interpreted causally.
papers.zh_title: 反欺凌法与青少年自杀行为
papers.zh_abstract: 美国疾病控制与预防中心报告称，欺凌与青少年自杀之间的关联已引发“担忧，甚至恐慌”，但旨在打击欺凌的政策很少受到研究者的关注。使用双重差分估计策略，我们发现州级反欺凌法减少了欺凌受害、抑郁和自杀意念，对女性青少年以及自认为是女同性恋、男同性恋、双性恋或性取向不确定的青少年估计效应最大。此外，反欺凌法与14至18岁女性青少年自杀率降低13-16%相关。事件研究分析和安慰剂检验提供了证据，表明这些估计可以解释为因果关系。

papers.title: Digitization and Pre-Purchase Information: The Causal and Welfare Impacts of Reviews and Crowd Ratings
papers.authors: Imke C. Reimers, Joel Waldfogel
papers.abstract: Digitization has led to product proliferation, straining traditional institutions for product discovery; but digitization has also spawned crowd-based rating systems. We compare the relative impacts of professional critics and crowd-based Amazon star ratings on consumer welfare in book publishing. We assemble data on daily Amazon sales ranks, star ratings, and prices for thousands of books in 2018, along with information on their professional reviews in several major outlets. Using various fixed effects and discontinuity-based empirical strategies, we estimate that a New York Times review raises estimated sales by 78 percent during the first five days following a review; and the elasticity of sales with respect to an Amazon star is about 0.75. We use these causal estimates to calibrate structural models of demand for measuring the welfare impact of pre-purchase information in a way that respects the distinction between ex ante and ex post utility. The aggregate effect of star ratings on consumer surplus is roughly 15 times the effect of traditional review outlets. Crowd-based information now accounts for the vast majority of pre-purchase information, but the absolute effects of professional reviews have not declined over time.
papers.zh_title: 数字化与购买前信息：评论和大众评级的因果及福利影响
papers.zh_abstract: 数字化导致了产品激增，给传统的产品发现机制带来了压力；但数字化也催生了基于大众的评级系统。我们比较了专业评论家和基于大众的亚马逊星级评分对图书出版中消费者福利的相对影响。我们收集了2018年数千本书的每日亚马逊销售排名、星级评分和价格数据，以及它们在几个主要媒体上的专业评论信息。使用各种固定效应和基于断点的实证策略，我们估计《纽约时报》的评论在评论发布后的前五天内使估计销售额增加78%；而销售对亚马逊星级的弹性约为0.75。我们利用这些因果估计来校准需求的结构模型，以衡量购买前信息对福利的影响，同时尊重事前和事后效用之间的区别。星级评分对消费者剩余的总影响大约是传统评论渠道影响的15倍。基于大众的信息现在占购买前信息的绝大部分，但专业评论的绝对影响并未随时间下降。

papers.title: Advance Market Commitments: Insights from Theory and Experience
papers.authors: Michael Kremer, Jonathan D. Levin, Christopher M. Snyder
papers.abstract: Ten years ago, donors committed $1.5 billion to a pilot Advance Market Commitment (AMC) to help purchase pneumococcal vaccine for low-income countries. The AMC aimed to encourage the development of such vaccines, ensure distribution to children in low-income countries, and pilot the AMC mechanism for possible future use. Three vaccines have been developed and more than 150 million children immunized, saving an estimated 700,000 lives. This paper reviews the economic logic behind AMCs, the experience with the pilot, and key issues for future AMCs.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, IO, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：I15, L65, O38
papers.zh_title: 预先市场承诺：来自理论与经验的见解
papers.zh_abstract: 十年前，捐助者承诺投入15亿美元用于一项试点预先市场承诺，以帮助为低收入国家购买肺炎球菌疫苗。该预先市场承诺旨在鼓励此类疫苗的开发，确保向低收入国家儿童分发疫苗，并为未来可能的使用试点预先市场承诺机制。已有三种疫苗被开发出来，超过1.5亿儿童接种了疫苗，估计挽救了70万人的生命。本文回顾了预先市场承诺背后的经济逻辑、试点的经验以及未来预先市场承诺的关键问题。

papers.title: Does Race Matter for Police Use of Force? Evidence from 911 Calls
papers.authors: Mark Hoekstra, CarlyWill Sloan
papers.abstract: While there is much concern about the role of race in police use of force, identifying causal effects is difficult. This is in part because of selection, and in part because researchers often observe only interactions that end in use of force, necessitating nontrivial benchmarking assumptions. This paper addresses these problems by using data on officers dispatched to over 2 million 911 calls in two cities, neither of which allows for discretion in the dispatch process. Using a location-by-time fixed effects approach that isolates the random variation in officer race, we show white officers use force 60 percent more than black officers, and use gun force twice as often. To examine how civilian race affects use of force, we compare how white officers increase use of force as they are dispatched to more minority neighborhoods, compared to minority officers. Perhaps most strikingly, we show that while white and black officers use gun force at similar rates in white and racially mixed neighborhoods, white officers are five times as likely to use gun force in predominantly black neighborhoods. Similarly, white officers increase use of any force much more than minority officers when dispatched to more minority neighborhoods. Consequently, difference-in-differences estimates from individual officer fixed effect models indicate black (Hispanic) civilians are 30 - 60 (75 - 120) percent more likely to experience any use of force, and five times as likely to experience gun use of force, compared to if white officers scaled up force similarly to minority officers. These findings highlight race as an important determinant of police use of force, including and especially lethal force.
papers.zh_title: 种族对警察使用武力有影响吗？来自911电话的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管人们非常关注种族在警察使用武力中的作用，但识别因果效应是困难的。这部分是由于选择性问题，部分是由于研究者通常只观察到以使用武力告终的互动，这需要非平凡的基准假设。本文通过使用两个城市超过200万个911电话中派遣警员的数据来解决这些问题，这两个城市的派遣过程都不允许自由裁量权。使用地点-时间固定效应方法，该方法隔离了警员种族的随机变异，我们显示白人警员使用武力的频率比黑人警员高60%，使用枪支武力的频率高一倍。为了考察平民种族如何影响武力使用，我们比较了白人警员在派遣到更多少数族裔社区时武力使用的增加情况，与少数族裔警员相比。也许最引人注目的是，我们显示，虽然白人警员和黑人警员在白人和种族混合社区使用枪支武力的比率相似，但在以黑人为主的社区，白人警员使用枪支武力的可能性是前者的五倍。同样，当派遣到更多少数族裔社区时，白人警员使用任何武力的增加幅度远大于少数族裔警员。因此，来自个体警员固定效应模型的双重差分估计表明，与少数族裔警员以类似方式增加武力相比，黑人（西班牙裔）平民经历任何武力使用的可能性高出30-60%（75-120%），经历枪支武力使用的可能性高出五倍。这些发现突显了种族是警察使用武力的重要决定因素，包括尤其是致命武力。

papers.title: Beyond Basis Basics: Liquidity Demand and Deviations from the Law of One Price
papers.authors: Todd M. Hazelkorn, Tobias J. Moskowitz, Kaushik Vasudevan
papers.abstract: We argue that deviations from the law of one price between futures and spot prices, known as bases, capture important information about liquidity demand for equity market exposure in global equity index futures markets. We show that bases (1) co-move with dealer and investor futures positions, (2) are contemporaneously positively correlated with spot and futures markets with the same sign, and (3) negatively predict futures and spot market returns with the same sign. These findings are uniquely consistent with our liquidity demand model and distinct from other explanations for bases, such as arbitrage opportunities or intermediary balance sheet costs. We show persistent supply-demand imbalances for equity index exposure reflected in bases, where compensation for meeting liquidity demand for that exposure is large (5-6% annual premium).
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：F3, F31, F65, G1, G13, G15, G2, G23
papers.zh_title: 超越基差基础：流动性需求与一价定律的偏离
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，期货与现货价格之间的一价定律偏离（即基差）捕捉了全球股指期货市场中股票市场敞口流动性需求的重要信息。我们证明基差：(1) 与交易商和投资者的期货头寸共同变动；(2) 与现货和期货市场同期正相关且符号一致；(3) 负向预测期货和现货市场回报且符号一致。这些发现与我们的流动性需求模型唯一一致，并区别于其他对基差的解释，例如套利机会或中介资产负债表成本。我们显示，基差反映了对股指敞口的持续供需失衡，其中满足该敞口流动性需求的补偿是巨大的（年化溢价5-6%）。

papers.title: Confirmatory Bias in Health Decisions: Evidence from the MMR-Autism Controversy
papers.authors: Mengcen Qian, Shin-Yi Chou, Ernest K. Lai
papers.abstract: Since Wakefield et al. (1998), the public was exposed to mixed information surrounding the claim that measles-mumps-rubella vaccine causes autism. A persistent trend to delay the vaccination during 1998–2011 in the US was driven by children of college-educated mothers, suggesting that these mothers held biases against the vaccine influenced by the early unfounded claim. Consistent with confirmatory bias, exposures to negative information about the vaccine strengthened their biases more than exposures to positive information attenuated them. Positive online information, however, had strong impacts on vaccination decisions, suggesting that online dissemination of vaccine-safety information may help tackle the sticky misinformation.
papers.zh_title: 健康决策中的确认偏误：来自MMR-自闭症争议的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 自Wakefield等人（1998年）以来，公众接触到了关于麻疹-腮腺炎-风疹疫苗导致自闭症这一说法的混杂信息。1998年至2011年间，美国延迟接种疫苗的持续趋势主要由受过大学教育的母亲的孩子驱动，这表明这些母亲受到了早期无根据说法的影响，对疫苗持有偏见。与确认偏误一致，接触疫苗的负面信息强化了她们的偏见，其程度超过了正面信息削弱偏见的效果。然而，正面的在线信息对接种决策产生了强烈影响，这表明在线传播疫苗安全信息可能有助于应对顽固的错误信息。

papers.title: Information Acquisition, Efficiency, and Non-Fundamental Volatility
papers.authors: Benjamin M. Hébert, Jennifer La'O
papers.abstract: We analyze non-fundamental volatility and efficiency in large games featuring strategic interaction and endogenous information acquisition. We adopt the rational inattention approach to information acquisition but generalize to a large class of information costs. Agents can learn about exogenous states as well as endogenous aggregate actions. We study how properties of information costs relate to properties of equilibria. We provide necessary and sufficient conditions to guarantee zero non-fundamental volatility in equilibrium and another set of necessary and sufficient conditions to guarantee constrained efficient equilibria. Mutual information, the cost typically assumed in rational inattention models, precludes non-fundamental volatility and imposes efficiency.
papers.zh_title: 信息获取、效率与非基本面波动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了具有战略互动和内生化信息获取的大型博弈中的非基本面波动和效率。我们采用理性疏忽方法进行信息获取，但将其推广到一大类信息成本。代理人可以学习外生状态以及内生的总体行动。我们研究信息成本的性质如何与均衡的性质相关联。我们提供了保证均衡中非基本面波动为零的充分必要条件，以及另一组保证约束有效均衡的充分必要条件。互信息（理性疏忽模型中通常假设的成本）排除了非基本面波动并施加了效率。

papers.title: A Method to Construct Geographical Crosswalks with an Application to US Counties since 1790
papers.authors: Fabian Eckert, Andrés Gvirtz, Jack Liang, Michael Peters
papers.abstract: Empirical researchers often have to map data provided for a "reporting" spatial unit, say counties in 1900, to a "reference" one, say, counties in 2010. We discuss a general method to create such crosswalks: computing the share of the area of each reporting unit nested in a given reference unit. Using these shares, data can be re-aggregated from the reporting to the reference units. We apply the method to construct a crosswalk for US county-level data since 1790 to present-day counties or commuting zones. We also provide the code to generate other crosswalks given maps of reporting and reference units.
papers.zh_title: 一种构建地理交叉对照表的方法：以1790年以来美国县级数据为例
papers.zh_abstract: 实证研究人员经常需要将按“报告”空间单元（例如1900年的县）提供的数据映射到“参考”空间单元（例如2010年的县）。我们讨论了一种创建此类交叉对照表的通用方法：计算每个报告单元嵌套在给定参考单元中的面积份额。利用这些份额，数据可以从报告单元重新汇总到参考单元。我们将该方法应用于构建自1790年以来美国县级数据到现今县或通勤区的交叉对照表。我们还提供了代码，以便在给定报告和参考单元地图的情况下生成其他交叉对照表。

papers.title: Medicaid Physician Fees and Access to Care among Children with Special Health Care Needs
papers.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Sandra Decker, Jason U. Huh
papers.abstract: The objective of this study is to use data from the National Survey of Children with Special Health Care Needs (NS-CSHCN) to test whether Medicaid physician fees are correlated with access to health services and adequacy of insurance coverage among CSHCN. We use a difference-in-differences method, comparing the effects of Medicaid physician fees on outcomes of publicly-insured children in states that raised fees vs. in states that did not. We also consider a triple difference specification using privately-insured children as the comparison group. Our findings indicate that raising the Medicaid primary care fee level close to at least 90 percent of the Medicare level reduces the likelihood that publicly-insured CSHCN lack a usual source of care in a doctor’s office by about 15 percent. Fee increases are also associated with improved access to specialty doctor care, and large improvements in caregivers’ satisfaction with the adequacy of health insurance coverage, among publicly-insured CSHCN. Results for some other access measures, such as global measures of having difficulties and delays accessing services, were mixed.
papers.zh_title: 医疗补助医生费用与特殊医疗需求儿童的医疗可及性
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究的目的是利用全国特殊医疗需求儿童调查数据，检验医疗补助医生费用是否与特殊医疗需求儿童获得医疗服务的可及性及保险覆盖的充分性相关。我们采用双重差分方法，比较提高医生费用的州与未提高的州中公共保险儿童的结果。我们还使用私人保险儿童作为对照组，采用三重差分设定。我们的发现表明，将医疗补助初级保健费用水平提高到至少接近医疗保险水平的90%，可将公共保险特殊医疗需求儿童缺乏医生办公室常规护理来源的可能性降低约15%。费用增加还与公共保险特殊医疗需求儿童获得专科医生护理的可及性改善，以及护理人员对健康保险覆盖充分性满意度的显著提高相关。对于其他一些可及性指标，例如获得服务困难和延迟的总体指标，结果则不一。

papers.title: Uncertainty Shocks and Business Cycle Research
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Pablo A. Guerrón-Quintana
papers.abstract: We review the literature on uncertainty shocks and business cycle research. First, we motivate the study of uncertainty shocks by documenting the presence of time-variation in the volatility of macroeconomic time series. Second, we enumerate the mechanisms that researchers have postulated to link uncertainty shocks and business cycles. Third, we outline how we can specify uncertainty shocks. Fourth, we postulate a real business cycle model augmented with financial frictions and uncertainty shocks. Fifth, we use the model to illustrate our previous discussions and to show how uncertainty shocks can be expansionary.
papers.zh_title: 不确定性冲击与商业周期研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于不确定性冲击与商业周期研究的文献。首先，我们通过记录宏观经济时间序列波动性的时变性来激励对不确定性冲击的研究。其次，我们列举了研究者提出的将不确定性冲击与商业周期联系起来的机制。第三，我们概述了如何设定不确定性冲击。第四，我们提出了一个用金融摩擦和不确定性冲击增强的真实商业周期模型。第五，我们使用该模型来说明我们之前的讨论，并展示不确定性冲击如何具有扩张性。

papers.title: Early Childhood Care and Cognitive Development
papers.authors: Juan Chaparro, Aaron Sojourner, Matthew J. Wiswall
papers.abstract: This paper combines multiple sources of information on early childhood development in a unified model for analysis of a wide range of early childhood policy interventions. We develop a model of child care in which households decide both the quantities and qualities of maternal and non-maternal care along with maternal labor supply. The model introduces a novel parenting-effort channel, whereby child care subsidies that permit less parenting may enable better parenting. To estimate the model, we combine observational data with experimental data from the Infant Health and Development Program (IHDP) which randomly assigned free child care when the child was 1 and 2 years old. We estimate a cognitive skill production function and household preferences, giving insight into mechanisms driving the ex post heterogeneous effects of the IHDP intervention, accounting for alternative care substitutes available to the control group and spillovers of the child care offer across the household's decisions. We also estimate ex ante effects of counterfactual policies such as an offer of lower-quality care, requiring a co-pay for subsidized care, raising the maternal wage offer, or a cash transfer. Finally, we use the model to rationalize existing evidence from outside the US on the effects of universal child care programs.
papers.zh_title: 早期儿童照护与认知发展
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将关于早期儿童发展的多种信息来源整合到一个统一模型中，用于分析广泛的早期儿童政策干预。我们构建了一个儿童照护模型，其中家庭同时决定母亲照护与非母亲照护的数量和质量，以及母亲的劳动供给。该模型引入了一个新颖的育儿努力渠道，即允许减少育儿时间的儿童照护补贴，反而可能促成更好的育儿质量。为估计该模型，我们将观察数据与来自“婴儿健康与发展项目”（IHDP）的实验数据相结合，该项目在儿童1岁和2岁时随机提供免费儿童照护。我们估计了认知技能生产函数和家庭偏好，从而深入理解驱动IHDP干预事后异质性效应的机制，并考虑了对照组可获得的替代照护选择以及儿童照护提供对家庭决策的溢出效应。我们还估计了反事实政策的事前效应，例如提供低质量照护、要求对补贴照护进行共付、提高母亲工资或提供现金转移。最后，我们利用该模型来解释美国以外关于普及儿童照护项目效果的现有证据。

papers.title: Prices and Federal Policies in Opioid Markets
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Consumer theory is extended to incorporate deviations from the law of one price that are common in markets for prescription and illicitly-manufactured opioids. The extension helps to resolve “puzzling” findings in the literature, such as race and age gaps in mortality rates and a failure of increases in the full price of Rx opioids to reduce opioid fatalities. The theory also identifies characteristics of public policies that are essential for predicting consumer behavior and thereby population life expectancy. Most surprising is that, with heroin and fentanyl relatively cheap of late, any Rx opioid policy could – and likely does – have the opposite total-consumption effect after 2013 than it would before, especially when the more expensive Rx opioid products are differentially affected. The theoretical framework also guides assembly of a dataset of federal opioid policies and assessment of the role of technological change and law enforcement in illicit markets.
papers.zh_title: 阿片类药物市场的价格与联邦政策
papers.zh_abstract: 消费者理论被扩展，以纳入处方阿片类药物和非法制造阿片类药物市场中常见的一价定律偏离。这一扩展有助于解决文献中的“令人费解”的发现，例如死亡率中的种族和年龄差距，以及处方阿片类药物全价上涨未能减少阿片类药物致死人数。该理论还识别了预测消费者行为从而预测人口预期寿命所必需的公共政策特征。最令人惊讶的是，鉴于海洛因和芬太尼近期相对便宜，任何处方阿片类药物政策在2013年之后可能（而且很可能确实）产生与之前相反的总消费效应，尤其是当更昂贵的处方阿片类药物产品受到差异化影响时。该理论框架还指导了联邦阿片类药物政策数据集的构建，以及对非法市场中技术变革和执法作用的评估。

papers.title: Intended and Unintended Effects of Banning Menthol Cigarettes
papers.authors: Christopher Carpenter, Hai V. Nguyen
papers.abstract: Bans on menthol cigarettes have been recommended by the World Health Organization, adopted throughout the European Union, and proposed by the United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA), primarily due to concerns that menthol cigarettes enable youth smoking. Yet there is almost no direct evidence on their effects using real-world policy variation. We provide the first comprehensive evaluation of this policy by studying Canada where seven provinces banned menthol cigarettes prior to a nationwide menthol ban in 2018. Using provincial sales data, we show that menthol cigarette sales fell to zero immediately after menthol bans, with no meaningful effect on non-menthol sales. Survey data confirm that provincial menthol bans significantly reduced menthol cigarette smoking among both youths and adults. We also find strong evidence of substitution, however: provincial menthol bans significantly increased non-menthol cigarette smoking among youths, resulting in no overall net change in youth smoking rates. We also document evidence of evasion: provincial menthol bans shifted smokers’ cigarette purchases away from grocery stores and gas stations to First Nations reserves (where the menthol bans do not bind). Our results demonstrate the importance of accounting for substitution and evasion responses in the design of stricter tobacco regulations.
papers.zh_title: 禁止薄荷醇香烟的预期与非预期效应
papers.zh_abstract: 世界卫生组织已建议禁止薄荷醇香烟，欧盟已全面采纳，美国食品药品监督管理局也已提出此建议，主要原因是担心薄荷醇香烟助长青少年吸烟。然而，利用现实世界政策变化获得的直接证据几乎为零。我们通过研究加拿大（在2018年全国性薄荷醇禁令之前，已有七个省份实施了禁令）来提供对这一政策的首次全面评估。利用省级销售数据，我们显示薄荷醇禁令后薄荷醇香烟销量立即降至零，而对非薄荷醇香烟销量没有显著影响。调查数据证实，省级薄荷醇禁令显著减少了青少年和成年人的薄荷醇香烟吸食。然而，我们也发现了强烈的替代证据：省级薄荷醇禁令显著增加了青少年的非薄荷醇香烟吸食，导致青少年吸烟率总体净变化为零。我们还记录了规避行为的证据：省级薄荷醇禁令将吸烟者的香烟购买从杂货店和加油站转移到了原住民保留地（薄荷醇禁令在那里不适用）。我们的结果证明了在设计更严格的烟草法规时考虑替代和规避反应的重要性。

papers.title: Human Capital as Engine of Growth – The Role of Knowledge Transfers in Promoting Balanced Growth Within and Across Countries
papers.authors: Isaac Ehrlich, Yun Pei
papers.abstract: Unlike physical capital, human capital has both embodied and disembodied dimensions. It can be perceived of as skill and acquired knowledge, but also as knowledge spillover effects between overlapping generations and across different skill groups within and across countries. We illustrate the roles these characteristics play in the process of economic development; the relation between income growth and income and fertility distributions; and the relevance of human capital in determining the skill distribution of immigrants in a balanced-growth global equilibrium setting. In all three illustrations, knowledge spillover effects play a key role. The analysis offers new insights for understanding the decline in fertility below population replacement rate in many developed countries; the evolution of income and fertility distributions across developing and developed countries; and the often asymmetric effects that endogenous immigration flows and their skill composition exert on the long-term net benefits from immigration to natives in source and destination countries.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, EH, ITI, PR；JEL：F22, F43, J11, J24, O15
papers.zh_title: 人力资本作为增长引擎——知识转移在促进国家内部和国家间平衡增长中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 与物质资本不同，人力资本具有体现性和非体现性两个维度。它既可以被视为技能和习得知识，也可以被视为代际之间以及国家内部和国家间不同技能群体之间的知识溢出效应。我们阐述了这些特征在经济发展过程中的作用；收入增长与收入和生育率分布之间的关系；以及在平衡增长的全球均衡环境中，人力资本在决定移民技能分布方面的相关性。在所有三个阐述中，知识溢出效应都发挥着关键作用。该分析为理解许多发达国家生育率降至人口更替水平以下、发展中国家和发达国家之间收入和生育率分布的演变，以及内生移民流动及其技能构成对来源国和目的地国本土居民长期净收益的通常不对称影响，提供了新的见解。

papers.title: Trust and Saving in Financial Institutions by the Poor
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Paul Gertler, Camila Navajas Ahumada
papers.abstract: We randomly assigned beneficiaries of a conditional cash transfer program in Peru to attend a 3 hour training session designed to build their trust in financial institutions. We find that the intervention: (a) increased trust in banks, but had no effect on financial literacy, and (b) increased savings over a ten month period. The increase in savings represents a 1.4 percentage point increase in the savings rate out of the cash transfer deposits, and a 0.4 percentage point increase in the savings rate out of household income.
papers.zh_title: 贫困人群对金融机构的信任与储蓄
papers.zh_abstract: 我们随机分配秘鲁有条件现金转移项目的受益者参加一个为期3小时的培训课程，该课程旨在建立他们对金融机构的信任。我们发现该干预措施：（a）增加了对银行的信任，但对金融素养没有影响，以及（b）在十个月期间增加了储蓄。储蓄的增加意味着现金转移存款的储蓄率提高了1.4个百分点，家庭收入的储蓄率提高了0.4个百分点。

papers.title: What Determines Consumer Financial Distress? Place- and Person-Based Factors
papers.authors: Benjamin J. Keys, Neale Mahoney, Hanbin Yang
papers.abstract: We use credit report data to study consumer financial distress in America. We show there are large, persistent disparities in financial distress across regions. To understand these patterns, we conduct a “movers” analysis. For collections and default, there is only weak convergence following a move, suggesting these types of distress are not primarily caused by place-based factors (e.g., local economic conditions and state laws) but instead reflect person-based characteristics (e.g., financial literacy and risk preferences). In contrast, for personal bankruptcy, we find a sizable place-based effect, which is consistent with anecdotal evidence on how local legal factors influence personal bankruptcy.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LS, PE；JEL：G5, G51, K35
papers.zh_title: 什么决定了消费者财务困境？——基于地点和基于个人的因素
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用信用报告数据研究美国消费者的财务困境。我们显示不同地区之间存在巨大且持续的财务困境差异。为了理解这些模式，我们进行了一项“迁移者”分析。对于催收和违约，迁移后仅出现微弱的趋同，这表明这些类型的困境并非主要由基于地点的因素（例如，当地经济状况和州法律）引起，而是反映了基于个人的特征（例如，金融素养和风险偏好）。相比之下，对于个人破产，我们发现了相当大的基于地点的效应，这与关于当地法律因素如何影响个人破产的轶事证据一致。

papers.title: Does Information About Climate Risk Affect Property Values?
papers.authors: Miyuki Hino, Marshall Burke
papers.abstract: Floods and other climate hazards pose a widespread and growing threat to housing and infrastructure around the world. By incorporating climate risk into asset prices, markets can discourage excessive development in hazardous areas. However, the extent to which markets actually price these risks remains poorly understood. Here we measure the effect of information about flood risk on residential property values in the United States. Using multiple empirical approaches and two decades of sales data covering the universe of homes in the US, we find little evidence that housing markets fully price information about flood risk in aggregate. However, the price penalty for flood risk is larger for commercial buyers and in states where sellers must disclose information about flood risk to potential buyers, suggesting that policies to improve risk communication could influence market outcomes. Our findings indicate that floodplain homes in the US are currently overvalued by a total of $34B, raising concerns about the stability of real estate markets as climate risks become more salient and severe.
papers.zh_title: 关于气候风险的信息会影响房产价值吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 洪水和其他气候灾害对世界各地的住房和基础设施构成了广泛且日益严重的威胁。通过将气候风险纳入资产价格，市场可以阻止在危险区域的过度开发。然而，市场实际定价这些风险的程度仍然知之甚少。在此，我们衡量了关于洪水风险的信息对美国住宅房产价值的影响。使用多种实证方法和涵盖美国所有房屋的二十年销售数据，我们发现几乎没有证据表明住房市场在总体上完全定价了关于洪水风险的信息。然而，对于商业买家以及卖方必须向潜在买家披露洪水风险信息的州，洪水风险的价格惩罚更大，这表明改善风险沟通的政策可能会影响市场结果。我们的研究结果表明，美国洪泛区房屋目前被高估了总计340亿美元，这引发了人们对随着气候风险变得更加显著和严重，房地产市场稳定性的担忧。

papers.title: Network-Based Hiring: Local Benefits; Global Costs
papers.authors: Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Melanie Morten, Alessandra Peter
papers.abstract: Entrepreneurs, particularly in the developing world, often hire from their networks: friends, family, and resulting referrals. Network hiring has two benefits, documented extensively in the empirical literature: entrepreneurs know more about the ability of their network (and indeed they are often positively selected), and network members may be less likely to engage in moral hazard. We study theoretically how network hiring affects the size and composition (i.e., whether to hire friends or strangers) of the firm. Our primary result is that network hiring, while locally beneficial, can be globally inefficient. Because of the existence of a network, entrepreneurs set inefficiently low wages, firms are weakly too small, rely too much on networks for hiring, and resulting welfare losses increase in the quality of the network. Further, if entrepreneurs are uncertain about the true quality of the external labor market, the economy may become stuck in an information poverty trap where forward-looking entrepreneurs or even entrepreneurs in a market with social learning never learn the correct distribution of stranger ability, exacerbating welfare losses. We show that the poverty trap can worsen when network referrals are of higher quality.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D83, D86, J46, L14, O1
papers.zh_title: 基于网络的招聘：局部收益；全局成本
papers.zh_abstract: 企业家，尤其是在发展中国家，通常从他们的网络中招聘：朋友、家人以及由此产生的推荐。网络招聘有两个在实证文献中得到广泛记录的好处：企业家更了解其网络成员的能力（事实上，他们通常是被正向选择的），并且网络成员可能不太容易发生道德风险。我们从理论上研究了网络招聘如何影响企业的规模和构成（即，是招聘朋友还是陌生人）。我们的主要结果是，网络招聘虽然局部有益，但可能全局无效率。由于网络的存在，企业家设定的工资过低，企业规模过小，过度依赖网络进行招聘，由此产生的福利损失随着网络质量的提高而增加。此外，如果企业家对外部劳动力市场的真实质量不确定，经济可能会陷入信息贫困陷阱，即使是前瞻性的企业家，或者处于具有社会学习的市场中的企业家，也永远无法了解陌生人能力的正确分布，从而加剧福利损失。我们表明，当网络推荐的质量更高时，贫困陷阱可能会恶化。

papers.title: Housing Discrimination and the Toxics Exposure Gap in the United States: Evidence from the Rental Market
papers.authors: Peter Christensen, Ignacio Sarmiento-Barbieri, Christopher Timmins
papers.abstract: Local pollution exposures disproportionately impact minority households, but the root causes remain unclear. This study conducts a correspondence experiment on a major online housing platform to test whether housing discrimination constrains minority access to housing options in markets with significant sources of airborne chemical toxics. We find that renters with African American or Hispanic/LatinX names are 41% less likely than renters with White names to receive responses for properties in low-exposure locations. We find no evidence of discriminatory constraints in high-exposure locations, indicating that discrimination increases relative access to housing choices at elevated exposure risk.
papers.zh_title: 美国住房歧视与有毒物质暴露差距：来自租赁市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 局部污染暴露对少数族裔家庭的影响尤为严重，但其根本原因尚不明确。本研究在一个主要在线住房平台上进行通信实验，以检验住房歧视是否限制了少数族裔在存在显著空气化学有毒物质来源的市场中获得住房选择。我们发现，与非裔美国人或西班牙裔/拉丁裔名字的租房者相比，白人名字的租房者在低暴露地点获得房产回复的可能性高出41%。在高暴露地点，我们没有发现歧视性限制的证据，这表明歧视增加了在暴露风险较高的情况下获得住房选择的相对机会。

papers.title: The Electric Vehicle Transition and the Economics of Banning Gasoline Vehicles
papers.authors: Stephen P. Holland, Erin T. Mansur, Andrew J. Yates
papers.abstract: Electric vehicles have a unique potential to transform personal transportation. We analyze the transition to electric vehicles with a dynamic model that captures the falling costs of producing electric vehicles, the decreasing pollution from electricity generation, the increasing substitutability of electric for gasoline vehicles, and the durability of the vehicle stock. Due to the external costs from pollution, inefficiencies under business as usual result from the mix of vehicles as well as the transition timing, the severity of which depends on substitutability. We calibrate the model to the US market and find the magnitude of the inefficiency is rather modest: less than 5 percent of total external costs. The optimal purchase subsidy for electric vehicles and the optimal ban on the production of gasoline vehicles both give about the same efficiency improvement, but the latter leads to a sharp increase in gasoline vehicle production just before the ban. Phasing out gasoline vehicles with a bankable production quota reduces deadweight loss substantially more than the other policies, but may lead to a very large deadweight loss if set incorrectly.
papers.zh_title: 电动汽车转型与禁止汽油车的经济学分析
papers.zh_abstract: 电动汽车在改变个人交通方式方面具有独特潜力。我们通过一个动态模型分析向电动汽车的转型，该模型捕捉了电动汽车生产成本下降、发电污染减少、电动汽车对汽油车替代性增强以及车辆存量的耐用性。由于污染的外部成本，在常规经营模式下，效率低下源于车辆组合以及转型时机，其严重程度取决于替代性。我们将模型校准到美国市场，发现效率低下的程度相当温和：不到总外部成本的5%。电动汽车的最优购买补贴和汽油车生产的最优禁令都带来了大致相同的效率提升，但后者导致禁令前汽油车产量急剧增加。通过可交易的产量配额逐步淘汰汽油车，其无谓损失减少幅度远大于其他政策，但如果设置不当，可能导致非常大的无谓损失。

papers.title: Utilization-Adjusted TFP Across Countries: Measurement and Implications for International Comovement
papers.authors: Zhen Huo, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
papers.abstract: This paper develops estimates of TFP growth adjusted for movements in unobserved factor utilization for a panel of 29 countries and up to 37 years. When factor utilization changes are unobserved, the commonly used Solow residual mismeasures actual changes in TFP. We use a general equilibrium dynamic multi-country multi-sector model to derive a production function estimating equation that corrects for unobserved factor usage. We compare the properties of utilization-adjusted TFP series to the standard Solow residual, and quantify the roles of both TFP and utilization for international business cycle comovement. Utilization-adjusted TFP is virtually uncorrelated across countries, and does not generate much GDP comovement through its propagation. Shocks to factor utilization can more successfully account for international co-movement.
papers.zh_title: 跨国调整利用率的全要素生产率：测量及其对国际联动的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文为29个国家（时间跨度长达37年）的面板数据，开发了经未观测到的要素利用率变动调整后的全要素生产率增长估计。当要素利用率变化未被观测到时，常用的索洛残差会错误衡量全要素生产率的实际变化。我们使用一个一般均衡动态多国多部门模型，推导出一个生产函数估计方程，该方程纠正了未观测到的要素使用情况。我们将调整利用率后的全要素生产率序列与标准索洛残差进行比较，并量化全要素生产率和利用率在国际商业周期联动中的作用。调整利用率后的全要素生产率在国家间几乎不相关，并且通过其传导不会产生显著的GDP联动。要素利用率冲击能更成功地解释国际联动。

papers.title: Dynamic Banking and the Value of Deposits
papers.authors: Patrick Bolton, Ye Li, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
papers.abstract: We propose a theory of banking in which banks cannot perfectly control deposit flows. Facing uninsurable loan and deposit shocks, banks dynamically manage lending, wholesale funding, deposits, and equity. Deposits create value by lowering funding costs. However, when the bank is undercapitalized and at risk of breaching leverage requirements, the marginal value of deposits can turn negative as deposit inflows, by raising leverage, increase the likelihood of costly equity issuance. Banks’ inability to fully control leverage distinguishes them from non-depository intermediaries. Our model suggests a re-evaluation of leverage regulations and offers new perspectives on banking in a low interest-rate environment.
papers.zh_title: 动态银行业务与存款价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个银行理论，其中银行无法完全控制存款流动。面对不可保险的贷款和存款冲击，银行动态管理贷款、批发融资、存款和股权。存款通过降低融资成本创造价值。然而，当银行资本不足且面临违反杠杆要求的风险时，存款的边际价值可能转为负值，因为存款流入通过提高杠杆，增加了昂贵股权发行的可能性。银行无法完全控制杠杆，这使其区别于非存款中介机构。我们的模型建议重新评估杠杆监管，并为低利率环境下的银行业提供新视角。

papers.title: A New Mechanism to Alleviate the Crises of Confidence in Science-With An Application to the Public Goods Game
papers.authors: Luigi Butera, Philip J. Grossman, Daniel Houser, John A. List, Marie-Claire Villeval
papers.abstract: Creation of empirical knowledge in economics has taken a dramatic turn in the past few decades. One feature of the new research landscape is the nature and extent to which scholars generate data. Today, in nearly every field the experimental approach plays an increasingly crucial role in testing theories and informing organizational decisions. Whereas there is much to appreciate about this revolution, recently a credibility crisis has taken hold across the social sciences, arguing that an important component of Fischer (1935)'s tripod has not been fully embraced: replication. Indeed, while the importance of replications is not debatable scientifically, current incentives are not sufficient to encourage replications from the individual researcher's perspective. We analyze a novel mechanism that promotes replications by leveraging mutually beneficial gains between scholars and editors. We develop a model capturing the trade-offs involved in seeking independent replications before submission of a paper to journals. We demonstrate the operation of this method via an investigation of the effects of Knightian uncertainty on cooperation rates in public goods games, a pervasive and yet largely unexplored feature in the literature.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：A11, C18, C92, C93, D82
papers.zh_title: 缓解科学信任危机的新机制——以公共品博弈为例
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学中经验知识的创造在过去几十年发生了戏剧性转变。新研究格局的一个特征是学者生成数据的性质和程度。如今，几乎在每个领域，实验方法在检验理论和指导组织决策方面都发挥着越来越关键的作用。尽管这场革命有很多值得赞赏之处，但最近社会科学领域出现了一场可信度危机，认为费希尔（1935）三脚架的一个重要组成部分尚未被完全接受：复制。事实上，虽然复制的重要性在科学上无可争议，但从个体研究者的角度来看，当前的激励不足以鼓励复制。我们分析了一种新机制，该机制通过利用学者和编辑之间的互利共赢来促进复制。我们开发了一个模型，捕捉在向期刊提交论文之前寻求独立复制所涉及的权衡。我们通过研究奈特不确定性对公共品博弈中合作率的影响来展示该方法的运作，这是文献中一个普遍但很大程度上未被探索的特征。

papers.title: Markups, Labor Market Inequality and the Nature of Work
papers.authors: Greg Kaplan, Piotr Zoch
papers.abstract: We demonstrate the importance of distinguishing between the traditional use of labor for production, versus alternative uses of labor for overhead, marketing and other expansionary activities, for studying the distribution of both factor income and labor income. We use our framework to assess the impact of changes in markups on the overall labor share and on labor income inequality across occupations. We identify the production and expansionary content of different occupations from the co-movement of occupational income shares with markup-induced changes in the labor share. We find that around one-fifth of US labor income compensates expansionary activities, and that occupations with larger expansionary content have experienced the fastest wage and employment growth since 1980. Our framework can rationalize a counter-cyclical labor share in the presence of sticky prices and can be used to study the distributional effects of demand shocks, monetary policy and secular changes in competition.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ME；JEL：D2, D3, D4, E3, E5, J2, L1
papers.zh_title: 加成率、劳动力市场不平等与工作性质
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明了区分劳动的传统生产用途与劳动在管理费用、营销和其他扩张活动中的替代用途，对于研究要素收入和劳动收入的分配至关重要。我们利用我们的框架评估加成率变化对总体劳动份额以及跨职业劳动收入不平等的影响。我们根据职业收入份额与加成率引起的劳动份额变化的共同变动，识别不同职业的生产和扩张内容。我们发现，美国劳动收入中约五分之一用于补偿扩张活动，并且自1980年以来，扩张内容较大的职业经历了最快的工资和就业增长。我们的框架可以在存在价格粘性的情况下合理化反周期的劳动份额，并可用于研究需求冲击、货币政策和竞争长期变化对分配的影响。

papers.title: The Secured Credit Premium and the Issuance of Secured Debt
papers.authors: Efraim Benmelech, Nitish Kumar, Raghuram Rajan
papers.abstract: Credit spreads for secured debt are lower than for unsecured debt, especially when a firm’s credit quality deteriorates, the economy slows, or average credit spreads widen. Yet investment grade firms tend to be reluctant to issue secured debt at all times. In contrast, we find that for firms that are rated below-investment grade, the likelihood of secured debt issuance increases as firm’s credit quality deteriorates, the economy slows, or average credit spreads widen. This differential pattern of issue behavior is consistent with highly rated firms seeing unencumbered collateral as a form of insurance, to be used only in extremis.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E44, E51, G21, G23, G33
papers.zh_title: 担保债务溢价与担保债务发行
papers.zh_abstract: 担保债务的信用利差低于无担保债务，尤其是在公司信用质量恶化、经济放缓或平均信用利差扩大时。然而，投资级公司往往在任何时候都不愿发行担保债务。相反，我们发现，对于评级低于投资级的公司，随着公司信用质量恶化、经济放缓或平均信用利差扩大，发行担保债务的可能性增加。这种发行行为的差异模式与高评级公司将未抵押的抵押品视为一种保险形式，仅在极端情况下使用是一致的。

papers.title: Global Macro-Financial Cycles and Spillovers
papers.authors: Jongrim Ha, M. Ayhan Kose, Christopher Otrok, Eswar S. Prasad
papers.abstract: We develop a new dynamic factor model that allows us to jointly characterize global macroeconomic and financial cycles and the spillovers between them. The model decomposes macroeconomic cycles into the part driven by global and country-specific macro factors and the part driven by spillovers from financial variables. We consider cycles in macroeconomic aggregates (output, consumption, and investment) and financial variables (equity and house prices, and interest rates). We find that the global macro factor plays a major role in explaining G-7 business cycles, but there are also spillovers from equity and house price shocks onto macroeconomic aggregates. These spillovers operate mainly through the global macro factor rather than the country-specific macro factors (i.e., these spillovers affect business cycles in all G-7 economies) and are stronger in the period leading up to and following the global financial crisis. We find little evidence of spillovers from macroeconomic cycles to financial cycles.
papers.zh_title: 全球宏观金融周期与溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个新的动态因子模型，使我们能够共同刻画全球宏观经济和金融周期以及它们之间的溢出效应。该模型将宏观经济周期分解为由全球和国家特定宏观因子驱动的部分，以及由金融变量溢出驱动的部分。我们考虑宏观经济总量（产出、消费和投资）和金融变量（股票和房价以及利率）的周期。我们发现，全球宏观因子在解释七国集团商业周期中起着主要作用，但也存在股票和房价冲击对宏观经济总量的溢出效应。这些溢出效应主要通过全球宏观因子而非国家特定宏观因子运作（即这些溢出效应影响所有七国集团经济体的商业周期），并且在全球金融危机前后时期更为强烈。我们几乎没有发现宏观经济周期向金融周期溢出的证据。

papers.title: Uncovered Interest Parity, Forward Guidance, and the Exchange Rate
papers.authors: Jordi Galí
papers.abstract: Under uncovered interest parity (UIP), the size of the effect on the real exchange rate of an anticipated change in real interest rate differentials is invariant to the horizon at which the change is expected. Empirical evidence using US, euro area and UK data points to a substantial deviation from that invariance prediction: expectations of interest rate differentials in the near (distant) future are shown to have much larger (smaller) effects on the real exchange rate than is implied by UIP. Some possible explanations are discussed.
papers.zh_title: 未抛补利率平价、前瞻指引与汇率
papers.zh_abstract: 根据未抛补利率平价（UIP），实际利率差预期变化对实际汇率的影响大小，与预期变化发生的期限无关。使用美国、欧元区和英国数据的实证证据表明，该不变性预测存在显著偏离：近期（远期）利率差预期对实际汇率的影响远大于（小于）UIP所隐含的程度。本文讨论了一些可能的解释。

papers.title: Monetary Policy and Bubbles in a New Keynesian Model with Overlapping Generations
papers.authors: Jordi Galí
papers.abstract: I analyze an extension of the New Keynesian model that features overlapping generations of finitely-lived agents and (stochastic) transitions to inactivity. In contrast with the standard model, the proposed framework allows for the existence of rational expectations equilibria with asset price bubbles. I study the conditions under which bubble-driven fluctuations may emerge and the type of monetary policy rules that may prevent them. I conclude by discussing some of the model's welfare implications.
papers.zh_title: 具有世代交叠的新凯恩斯模型中的货币政策与泡沫
papers.zh_abstract: 我分析了一个新凯恩斯模型的扩展版本，该模型包含有限生命代理人的世代交叠以及（随机的）非活跃状态转换。与标准模型相比，所提出的框架允许存在具有资产价格泡沫的理性预期均衡。我研究了泡沫驱动波动可能出现的条件，以及可能防止此类波动的货币政策规则类型。最后，我讨论了该模型的一些福利含义。

papers.title: Random-Coefficients Logit Demand Estimation with Zero-Valued Market Shares
papers.authors: Jean-Pierre H. Dubé, Ali Hortaçsu, Joonhwi Joo
papers.abstract: Although typically overlooked, many purchase datasets exhibit a high incidence of products with zero sales. We propose a new estimator for the Random-Coefficients Logit demand system for purchase datasets with zero-valued market shares. The identification of the demand parameters is based on a pairwise-differencing approach that constructs moment conditions based on differences in demand between pairs of products. The corresponding estimator corrects non-parametrically for the potential selection of the incidence of zeros on unobserved aspects of demand. The estimator also corrects for the potential endogeneity of marketing variables both in demand and in the selection propensities. Monte Carlo simulations show that our proposed estimator provides reliable small-sample inference both with and without selection-on- unobservables. In an empirical case study, the proposed estimator not only generates different demand estimates than approaches that ignore selection in the incidence of zero shares, it also generates better out-of-sample fit of observed retail contribution margins.
papers.zh_title: 零市场份额下的随机系数Logit需求估计
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管通常被忽视，许多购买数据集显示出产品零销售的高发生率。我们针对具有零市场份额的购买数据集，提出了一种新的随机系数Logit需求系统估计量。需求参数的识别基于一种成对差分方法，该方法根据产品对之间的需求差异构建矩条件。相应的估计量以非参数方式校正了零发生率在需求未观测方面可能存在的选择偏差。该估计量还校正了营销变量在需求和选择倾向性中可能存在的内生性。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，我们提出的估计量在存在和不存在未观测因素选择的情况下，都能提供可靠的小样本推断。在一个实证案例研究中，所提出的估计量不仅产生了与忽略零份额发生率选择的方法不同的需求估计，而且在样本外对观测到的零售贡献利润率的拟合效果更好。

papers.title: Intertemporal Price Discrimination in Sequential Quantity-Price Games
papers.authors: James D. Dana Jr., Kevin R. Williams
papers.abstract: This paper develops an oligopoly model in which firms first choose capacity and then compete in prices in a series of advance-purchase markets. We show that when the elasticity of demand falls across periods, strong competitive forces prevent firms from utilizing intertemporal price discrimination. We then enrich the model by allowing firms to use inventory controls, or sales limits assigned to individual prices. We show that competing firms can profitably use inventory controls. Thus, although typically viewed as a tool to manage demand uncertainty, we show that inventory controls can also facilitate price discrimination in oligopoly.
papers.zh_title: 序贯数量-价格博弈中的跨期价格歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个寡头垄断模型，其中企业首先选择产能，然后在一系列预售市场中展开价格竞争。我们表明，当需求弹性随时间下降时，强大的竞争力量阻止了企业利用跨期价格歧视。然后，我们通过允许企业使用库存控制（即分配给单个价格的销售限额）来丰富模型。我们表明，竞争企业可以有利可图地使用库存控制。因此，尽管库存控制通常被视为管理需求不确定性的工具，但我们表明，它在寡头垄断中也能促进价格歧视。

papers.title: The Financial Center Leverage Cycle: Does it Spread Around the World?
papers.authors: Graciela L. Kaminsky, Leandro Medina, Shiyi Wang
papers.abstract: With a novel database, we examine the evolution of capital flows to the periphery since the collapse of the Bretton Woods System in the early 1970s. We decompose capital flows into global, regional, and idiosyncratic factors. In contrast to previous findings, which mostly use data from the 2000s, we find that booms and busts in capital flows are mainly explained by regional factors and not the global factor. We then ask, what drives these regional factors. Is it the leverage cycle in the financial center? What triggers the leverage cycle in the financial center? Is it a change in global investors’ risk appetite? Or, is it a change in the demand for capital in the periphery? We link leverage in the financial center to regional capital flows and the cost of borrowing in international capital markets to answer these questions. Our estimations indicate that regional capital flows are driven by supply shocks. Interestingly, we find that the leverage in the financial center has a time-varying behavior, with a movement away from lending to the emerging periphery in the 1970s to the 1990s towards lending to the advanced periphery in the 2000s.
papers.zh_title: 金融中心杠杆周期：它是否在全球蔓延？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一个新颖的数据库，我们考察了自20世纪70年代初布雷顿森林体系崩溃以来资本流向外围经济体的演变。我们将资本流动分解为全球因素、区域因素和特质因素。与先前主要使用2000年代数据的发现相反，我们发现资本流动的繁荣与衰退主要由区域因素而非全球因素解释。然后我们追问，是什么驱动了这些区域因素？是金融中心的杠杆周期吗？是什么触发了金融中心的杠杆周期？是全球投资者风险偏好的变化，还是外围经济体资本需求的变化？我们将金融中心的杠杆与区域资本流动以及国际资本市场的借贷成本联系起来，以回答这些问题。我们的估计表明，区域资本流动是由供给冲击驱动的。有趣的是，我们发现金融中心的杠杆具有时变行为，从20世纪70年代至90年代向新兴外围经济体的贷款，转向了21世纪向发达外围经济体的贷款。

papers.title: The Collateral Channel of Monetary Policy: Evidence from China
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Yongqin Wang, Xian Wu
papers.abstract: Collateral-based monetary policy tools have been used extensively by major central banks. Lack of proper policy counterfactuals, however, makes it difficult to empirically identify their causal effects on the financial market and the real economy. We exploit a quasi-natural experiment in China, where dual-listed bonds are traded in two mostly segmented markets: the interbank market regulated by the Central Bank, and the exchange market regulated by the securities regulator. During a policy shift in our study period, China's Central Bank included a class of previously ineligible bonds in the interbank market to become eligible collateral for financial institutions to borrow money from its Medium-Term Lending Facility (MLF). This policy shift allows us to implement a triple-difference strategy to estimate the causal impact of the collateral-based unconventional monetary policy. We find that in the secondary market the policy reduced the spreads of the newly collateralizable bonds in the treatment market (the interbank market) by 42-62 basis points. We also find that there is a pass-through effect from the secondary market to the primary market: the spreads of the treated bonds newly issued in the interbank market were reduced by 54 basis points.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E52, E58, G12
papers.zh_title: 货币政策的抵押品渠道：来自中国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 基于抵押品的货币政策工具已被各大央行广泛使用。然而，缺乏适当的政策反事实，使得难以通过实证识别其对金融市场和实体经济的因果效应。我们利用中国的一个准自然实验，其中双重上市债券在两个基本分割的市场交易：由中央银行监管的银行间市场，以及由证券监管机构监管的交易所市场。在我们研究期间的一次政策转变中，中国央行将一类此前在银行间市场不合格的债券纳入合格抵押品范围，允许金融机构从中期借贷便利（MLF）借款。这一政策转变使我们能够采用三重差分策略来估计基于抵押品的非常规货币政策的因果影响。我们发现，在二级市场，该政策使处理市场（银行间市场）中新成为合格抵押品的债券的利差降低了42-62个基点。我们还发现存在从二级市场到一级市场的传导效应：在银行间市场新发行的处理债券的利差降低了54个基点。

papers.title: 21st Century Macro
papers.authors: Narayana R. Kocherlakota
papers.abstract: In the 21st century, many key macroeconomic variables in the developed world have been persistently low, including inflation, output, growth, interest rates (both real and nominal), and labor share. I consider a class of standard representative agent rational expectations models in which fundamentals are deterministic and constant over time. I show that for any level of nominal frictions (no matter how small) and for any monetary policy rule (regardless of how active), there is a large set of stochastic equilibria that exhibit permanently low inflation, low output, low labor share, and low nominal interest rates. If the Phillips curve is sufficiently flat, then these equilibria also exhibit low growth and real interest rates.
papers.zh_title: 21世纪宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 在21世纪，发达世界的许多关键宏观经济变量持续低迷，包括通胀、产出、增长、利率（实际和名义）以及劳动份额。我考虑了一类标准的代表性代理人理性预期模型，其中基本面是确定性的且随时间恒定。我表明，对于任何名义摩擦程度（无论多小）和任何货币政策规则（无论多积极），都存在一个大的随机均衡集合，这些均衡表现出持续的低通胀、低产出、低劳动份额和低名义利率。如果菲利普斯曲线足够平坦，那么这些均衡还表现出低增长和低实际利率。

papers.title: How do U.S. Visa Policies Affect Unauthorized Immigration?
papers.authors: Brian K. Kovak, Rebecca Lessem
papers.abstract: We examine how increasing the number of visas available to potential migrants would affect unauthorized immigration from Mexico to the U.S. Current U.S. policy bans people who are deported from receiving legal status for a period of time. This policy aims to serve as an additional deterrent to unauthorized immigration, but may be ineffective given that most potential Mexican migrants have an extremely low probability of ever being able to legally move to the U.S. We develop a dynamic discrete location choice model, which we estimate using data from the Mexican Migration Project, and consider various counterfactual policies that vary the intensity of enforcement and access to work visas. We find that legal entry bans for deported individuals are ineffective at current rates of legal immigration, but that increased legalization rates would amplify the deterrent effects of deportation. We also show that a temporary work visa program would yield similar deterrent effects as an increase in permanent legalization without resulting in very large increases in the total stock of migrants residing in the U.S. These findings have important implications for structuring future immigration reforms.
papers.zh_title: 美国签证政策如何影响非法移民？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了增加潜在移民可获得的签证数量将如何影响从墨西哥到美国的非法移民。美国现行政策禁止被驱逐出境的人在一段时间内获得合法身份。该政策旨在作为对非法移民的额外威慑，但可能无效，因为大多数潜在的墨西哥移民能够合法移居美国的概率极低。我们开发了一个动态离散区位选择模型，并使用墨西哥移民项目的数据进行估计，然后考虑了各种改变执法力度和工作签证获取途径的反事实政策。我们发现，在当前的合法移民率下，对被驱逐者的入境禁令无效，但提高合法化率会放大驱逐的威慑效果。我们还表明，临时工作签证计划会产生与增加永久合法化类似的威慑效果，而不会导致居住在美国的移民总存量大幅增加。这些发现对未来移民改革的结构设计具有重要意义。

papers.title: Take the Q Train: Value Capture of Public Infrastructure Projects
papers.authors: Arpit Gupta, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh, Constantine Kontokosta
papers.abstract: Transit infrastructure is a critical asset for economic activity yet costly to build in dense urban environments. We measure the benefit of the Second Avenue Subway extension in New York City, the most expensive urban transit infrastructure project in recent memory, by analyzing local real estate prices which capitalize the benefits of transit spillovers. We find 8% price increases, creating $6 billion in new property value. Using cell phone ping data, we document substantial reductions in commuting time especially among subway users, offering a plausible mechanism for the price gains. The increase in prices reflects both higher rents and lower risk. Infrastructure improvements lower the riskiness of real estate investments. Only 30% of the private value created by the subway is captured through higher property tax revenue, and is insufficient to cover the cost of the subway. Targeted property tax increases may help governments capture more of the value created, and serve as a useful funding tool.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, PE；JEL：G10, G18, G5, R3, R38, R41, R42
papers.zh_title: 乘坐Q线：公共交通基础设施项目的价值捕获
papers.zh_abstract: 交通基础设施是经济活动的重要资产，但在密集的城市环境中建设成本高昂。我们通过分析当地房地产价格（这些价格资本化了交通溢出效应的收益）来衡量纽约市第二大道地铁延伸线的效益，这是近期最昂贵的城市交通基础设施项目。我们发现房价上涨了8%，创造了60亿美元的新房产价值。利用手机定位数据，我们记录了通勤时间的大幅减少，尤其是地铁用户，这为价格上涨提供了一个合理的机制。价格上涨既反映了更高的租金，也反映了更低的风险。基础设施改善降低了房地产投资的风险。地铁创造的私人价值中，只有30%通过更高的房产税收入被捕获，不足以覆盖地铁的成本。有针对性的房产税增加可能有助于政府捕获更多创造的价值，并作为一种有用的融资工具。

papers.title: Across-Country Wage Compression in Multinationals
papers.authors: Jonas Hjort, Xuan Li, Heather Sarsons
papers.abstract: Many employers link wages at establishments outside of the home region to the level at headquarters. We show this using new data on 1,200 multinationals’ establishments across the world and linked employee-level data on their establishments in Brazil. Headquarters wage changes arising from minimum wage and exchange rate shocks are partially transmitted to workers employed in the same position abroad. Wage change transmission appears to be direct and results from firm-wide wage-setting procedures rather than associated technology or employment changes. “Anchored” wage-setting is somewhat associated with particular characteristics of the job×employer×headquarter-establishment country-pair.
papers.zh_title: 跨国公司的跨国工资压缩
papers.zh_abstract: 许多雇主将总部以外分支机构的工资与总部水平挂钩。我们利用全球1200家跨国公司分支机构的新数据以及其在巴西分支机构的关联员工层面数据证明了这一点。由最低工资和汇率冲击引起的总部工资变化会部分传导给在国外同一职位工作的员工。工资变化的传导似乎是直接的，并且源于公司范围内的工资制定程序，而非相关的技术或就业变化。“锚定”工资制定在一定程度上与特定工作×雇主×总部-分支机构国家对的特定特征相关。

papers.title: Does Student Loan Forgiveness Drive Disability Application?
papers.authors: Philip Armour, Melanie A. Zaber
papers.abstract: Student loan debt in the US exceeds $1.3 trillion, and unlike credit card and medical debt, typically cannot be discharged through bankruptcy. Moreover, this debt has been increasing: the share of borrowers leaving school with more than $50,000 of federal student debt increased from 2 percent in 1992 to 17 percent in 2014. However, federal student loan debt discharge is available for disabled individuals through the Department of Education's Total and Permanent Disability Discharge (TPDD) mechanism through certification of a total and permanent disability. In July 2013, the TPDD expanded to include receipt of Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) or Supplemental Security Income (SSI) as an eligible category for discharge, provided medical improvement was not expected. Using data from the Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP) matched to SSI and SSDI applications, we find that SSDI and SSI application rates increased among respondents with student loans relative to rates among those without student loans. Our estimates suggest the policy change raised the probability of applying for SSDI or SSI in a given quarter among student loan-holders by 50% (baseline rate per quarter is approximately 0.3%), generally increasing SSI and SSDI awards. However, these induced award recipients were unlikely to receive the disability designation necessary to obtain student loan discharge. Given that the geographic distributions of student loan indebtedness and historical SSDI/SSI program participation differ, there are strong implications for both the size and location of SSDI and SSI beneficiaries. Furthermore, these findings highlight the importance of learning from policy changes in programs that interact with SSDI and SSI to better understand the drivers of disability program participation.
papers.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D14, H52, H81, I22, I38, J14
papers.zh_title: 学生贷款减免是否会推动残疾申请？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的学生贷款债务超过1.3万亿美元，与信用卡和医疗债务不同，通常不能通过破产免除。此外，这种债务一直在增加：离校时联邦学生债务超过5万美元的借款人比例从1992年的2%增加到2014年的17%。然而，残疾个人可以通过教育部的完全和永久性残疾解除机制，在证明完全和永久性残疾后获得联邦学生贷款债务的免除。2013年7月，TPDD扩大到包括领取社会保障残疾保险或补充保障收入作为符合条件的免除类别，前提是预计不会出现医疗改善。利用与SSI和SSDI申请相匹配的收入与项目参与调查数据，我们发现，与没有学生贷款的受访者相比，有学生贷款的受访者的SSDI和SSI申请率有所上升。我们的估计表明，这项政策变化使学生贷款持有者在特定季度申请SSDI或SSI的概率提高了50%（每季度基线率约为0.3%），总体上增加了SSI和SSDI的授予。然而，这些被诱导的福利领取者不太可能获得获得学生贷款免除所需的残疾认定。鉴于学生贷款负债的地理分布与历史SSDI/SSI项目参与率不同，这对SSDI和SSI受益人的规模和地点都有重要影响。此外，这些发现强调了从与SSDI和SSI相互作用的项目政策变化中学习的重要性，以更好地理解残疾项目参与的驱动因素。

papers.title: Between Firm Changes in Earnings Inequality: The Dominant Role of Industry Effects
papers.authors: John C. Haltiwanger, James R. Spletzer
papers.abstract: We find that most of the rising between firm earnings inequality that dominates the overall increase in inequality in the U.S. is accounted for by industry effects. These industry effects stem from rising inter-industry earnings differentials and not from changing distribution of employment across industries. We also find the rising inter-industry earnings differentials are almost completely accounted for by occupation effects. These results link together the key findings from separate components of the recent literature: one focuses on firm effects and the other on occupation effects. The link via industry effects challenges conventional wisdom.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J24, J31, L22
papers.zh_title: 企业间收入不平等的变化：行业效应的主导作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现，在美国总体不平等加剧中占主导地位的、不断上升的企业间收入不平等，大部分是由行业效应造成的。这些行业效应源于不断上升的行业间收入差异，而非就业在行业间分布的变化。我们还发现，不断上升的行业间收入差异几乎完全由职业效应解释。这些结果将近期文献中不同组成部分的关键发现联系起来：一个关注企业效应，另一个关注职业效应。通过行业效应建立的这种联系挑战了传统观点。

papers.title: The Role of Heterogeneous Risk Preferences, Discount Rates, and Earnings Expectations in College Major Choice
papers.authors: Arpita Patnaik, Joanna Venator, Matthew Wiswall, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: In this paper, we estimate a rich model of college major choice using a panel of experimentally-derived data. Our estimation strategy combines two types of data: data on self-reported beliefs about future earnings from potential human capital decisions and survey-based measures of risk and time preferences. We show how to use these data to identify a general life-cycle model, allowing for rich patterns of heterogeneous beliefs and preferences. Our data allow us to separate perceptions about the degree of risk or perceptions about the current versus future payoffs for a choice from the individual's preference for risk and patience. Comparing our estimates of the general model to estimates of models which ignore heterogeneity in risk and time preferences, we find that these restricted models are likely to overstate the importance of earnings to major choice. Additionally, we show that while men are less risk averse and patient than women, gender differences in expectations about own-earnings, risk aversion, and patience cannot explain gender gaps in major choice.
papers.zh_title: 异质性风险偏好、贴现率和收入预期在大学专业选择中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用一组通过实验得出的面板数据估计了一个丰富的大学专业选择模型。我们的估计策略结合了两种类型的数据：关于潜在人力资本决策未来收入的自报信念数据，以及基于调查的风险和时间偏好度量。我们展示了如何利用这些数据来识别一个一般生命周期模型，允许丰富的异质性信念和偏好模式。我们的数据使我们能够将个人对风险或当前与未来回报的感知，与个人的风险偏好和耐心分离开来。将我们对一般模型的估计与忽略风险和时间偏好异质性的模型估计进行比较，我们发现这些受限模型可能夸大了收入对专业选择的重要性。此外，我们表明，虽然男性比女性更不厌恶风险且更缺乏耐心，但男性和女性在自身收入预期、风险厌恶和耐心方面的差异无法解释专业选择中的性别差距。

papers.title: Can Low Retirement Savings Be Rationalized?
papers.authors: Jason S. Scott, John B. Shoven, Sita N. Slavov, John G. Watson
papers.abstract: Simple presentations of the life cycle model often suggest a constant level of real consumption in retirement. Similarly, financial planners commonly suggest that people save for retirement in such a way as to enable them to maintain a level retirement standard of living equal to their standard of living while working. However, constant consumption with age is only optimal under the precise and unlikely condition that the subjective rate of time preference is equal to the real interest rate. Most people exhibit a positive rate of pure time preference and additionally discount the future by both mortality and morbidity risks. In comparison, the real interest rate is roughly zero percent and the term structure of interest rates suggests that this condition is likely to persist. These considerations suggest that optimal consumption in the life cycle model declines with age. This finding has major implications for optimal retirement saving. For instance, we find that for many, perhaps most, people in the bottom half of the lifetime earnings distribution, it is optimal to spend out their retirement wealth well before death and to live on Social Security alone after that. Very low earners may find it optimal to not engage in retirement saving at all.
papers.zh_title: 低退休储蓄能否被合理化？
papers.zh_abstract: 生命周期模型的简单表述通常建议退休后实际消费水平保持不变。同样，理财规划师通常建议人们为退休储蓄，以便能够维持与工作时相同水平的退休生活标准。然而，消费随年龄保持不变只有在主观时间偏好率等于实际利率这一精确且不太可能的条件下才是最优的。大多数人表现出正的时间偏好率，并且还会因死亡率和发病率风险而对未来进行额外贴现。相比之下，实际利率大约为零，利率期限结构表明这种情况可能持续。这些考虑表明，生命周期模型中的最优消费随年龄增长而下降。这一发现对最优退休储蓄具有重大影响。例如，我们发现，对于许多（也许是大多数）处于终生收入分配下半部分的人来说，最优选择是在去世前花光退休财富，之后仅靠社会保障生活。收入非常低的人可能会发现完全不进行退休储蓄是最优的。

papers.title: The Cost of Convenience: Ridehailing and Traffic Fatalities
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, Yael Hochberg, Hanyi Yi
papers.abstract: We examine the effect of the introduction of ridehailing in U.S. cities on fatal traffic accidents. The arrival of ridehailing is associated with an increase of approximately 3% in the number of fatalities and fatal accidents, for both vehicle occupants and pedestrians. The effects persist when controlling for proxies for smartphone adoption patterns. Consistent with ridehailing increasing congestion and road usage, we find that introduction is associated with an increase in arterial vehicle miles traveled, excess gas consumption, and annual hours of delay in traffic. On the extensive margin, ridehailing’s arrival is also associated with an increase in new car registrations. These effects are higher in cities with prior higher use of public transportation and carpools, consistent with a substitution effect, and in larger cities. These effects persist over time. Back-of-the-envelope estimates of the annual cost in human lives range from $5.33B to $13.24B.
papers.zh_title: 便利的代价：网约车与交通死亡事故
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国城市引入网约车对致命交通事故的影响。网约车的出现与死亡人数和致命事故数量（包括车辆乘员和行人）增加约3%相关。在控制智能手机采用模式的代理变量后，这些影响仍然存在。与网约车增加拥堵和道路使用一致，我们发现网约车的引入与主干道车辆行驶里程增加、额外汽油消耗以及交通延误年小时数增加相关。在广泛边际上，网约车的出现也与新车注册量增加相关。这些影响在之前公共交通和拼车使用率较高的城市以及较大的城市中更高，这与替代效应一致。这些影响随时间持续存在。粗略估计的年度人类生命成本范围在53.3亿美元到132.4亿美元之间。

papers.title: Searching for STARs: Work Experience as a Job Market Signal for Workers without Bachelor's Degrees
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Tomas G. Castagnino, Erica L. Groshen, Papia Debroy, Byron Auguste, Shad Ahmed, Fernando Garcia Diaz, Cristian Bonavida
papers.abstract: The demand for a skilled workforce is increasing even faster than the supply of workers with college degrees – the result: rising wage inequality by education levels, and firms facing a skills gap. While it is often assumed that increasing the number of college graduates is required to fill this gap, this paper explores the extent to which workers without BA college degrees can help fill this gap. To find workers without BA degrees who are potentially skilled through alternative routes (STARs), we use data on the skill requirements of jobs to compute the “skill distance” between a worker’s current occupation and higher wage occupations with similar skill requirements in their local labor market. Based on our calculations, of the 16 million non-college educated workers with skills for high-wage work (> twice median earnings), 11 million whom we term “Rising STARs” are currently employed in middle-to low-wage work. We propose a general taxonomy for STARs to identify potential job transitions to higher wage work within their current earnings category and across earnings categories.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：E24, I24, J11, J24, O15
papers.zh_title: 寻找STARs：工作经验作为无学士学位工人的就业市场信号
papers.zh_abstract: 对技能劳动力的需求增长甚至快于拥有大学学位的工人供给——其结果是：按教育水平划分的工资不平等加剧，以及企业面临技能缺口。虽然通常认为需要增加大学毕业生数量来填补这一缺口，但本文探讨了没有学士学位的工人在多大程度上可以帮助填补这一缺口。为了寻找可能通过替代途径获得技能的无学士学位工人（STARs），我们使用关于工作技能要求的数据，计算工人当前职业与其当地劳动力市场中具有类似技能要求的高薪职业之间的“技能距离”。根据我们的计算，在1600万拥有高薪工作（>中位收入的两倍）技能的非大学教育工人中，有1100万我们称之为“上升中的STARs”目前从事中低薪工作。我们提出了一个STARs的通用分类法，以识别在当前收入类别内和跨收入类别向更高薪工作的潜在职业转换。

papers.title: The International Market for Corporate Control
papers.authors: Anusha Chari
papers.abstract: This paper documents a set of stylized facts about recent trends in cross-border M&A (CBMA) activity around the world. The facts focus on key features of CBMA such as (i) the magnitude; (ii) how it varies across industries and locations; (iii) how it compares to levels of greenfield FDI over time; (iv) horizontal (market access) versus vertical (integrating supply chains) transactions; (v) the mode of financing; (vi) diversifying transactions versus those in the same industry; (vii) patterns of control acquisition; and (viii) strategic versus financially motivated transactions. The paper also examines whether the nature of cross-border M&A activity differs across developed and emerging markets. Next, it considers the incentives for firms to buy firms in other countries and to sell divisions to foreign buyers and examines the evidence about post-acquisition outcomes. The paper concludes with a discussion of policy challenges that confront governments as they weigh the balance of national security concerns against a desire to increase foreign investment in their economies.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F2, F23, F3, G34
papers.zh_title: 公司控制权的国际市场
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了全球跨境并购活动近期趋势的一系列典型事实。这些事实聚焦于跨境并购的关键特征，包括：(i) 规模；(ii) 在不同行业和地区的差异；(iii) 与同期绿地外商直接投资的比较；(iv) 横向（市场准入）与纵向（整合供应链）交易；(v) 融资方式；(vi) 多元化交易与同行业交易；(vii) 控制权收购模式；以及 (viii) 战略驱动交易与财务驱动交易。本文还考察了跨境并购活动的性质在发达市场和新兴市场之间是否存在差异。接着，本文探讨了企业收购其他国家企业以及向外国买家出售部门的动机，并检验了关于收购后结果的证据。最后，本文讨论了政府在权衡国家安全关切与增加经济中外商投资意愿时所面临的政策挑战。

papers.title: How Developmental Neuroscience Can Help Address the Problem of Child Poverty
papers.authors: Seth Pollak, Barbara L. Wolfe
papers.abstract: Nearly 1 in 5 children in the United States lives in a household whose income is below the official federal poverty line, and more than 40% of children live in poor or near-poor households. Research on the effects of poverty on children’s development has been a focus of study for many decades and is now increasing as we accumulate more evidence about the implications of poverty. The American Academy of Pediatrics recently added “Poverty and Child Health” to its Agenda for Children to recognize what has now been established as broad and enduring effects of poverty on child development. A recent addition to the field has been the application of neuroscience-based methods. Various techniques including neuroimaging, neuroendocrinology, cognitive psychophysiology, and epigenetics are beginning to document ways in which early experiences of living in poverty affect infant brain development. We discuss whether there are truly worthwhile reasons for adding neuroscience and related biological methods to study child poverty. And how might these perspectives help guide developmentally-based and targeted interventions and policies for these children and their families.
papers.zh_title: 发展神经科学如何帮助解决儿童贫困问题
papers.zh_abstract: 美国近五分之一的儿童生活在收入低于联邦官方贫困线的家庭中，超过40%的儿童生活在贫困或接近贫困的家庭中。关于贫困对儿童发展影响的研究已成为数十年的研究焦点，并且随着我们积累更多关于贫困影响的证据，这一研究正在增加。美国儿科学会最近将“贫困与儿童健康”纳入其儿童议程，以承认贫困对儿童发展已确立的广泛而持久的影响。该领域的一个新进展是应用基于神经科学的方法。包括神经影像学、神经内分泌学、认知心理生理学和表观遗传学在内的各种技术，正开始记录早期贫困生活经历影响婴儿大脑发育的方式。我们讨论了是否有真正值得的理由将神经科学及相关生物学方法添加到儿童贫困研究中。以及这些视角如何帮助指导针对这些儿童及其家庭的、基于发展的、有针对性的干预措施和政策。

papers.title: Administrative Discretion in Scientific Funding: Evidence from a Prestigious Postdoctoral Training Program
papers.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Misty L. Heggeness
papers.abstract: The scientific community is engaged in an active debate on the value of its peer-review system. Does peer review actually serve the role we envision for it—that of helping government agencies predict what ideas have the best chance of contributing to scientific advancement? Many federal agencies use a two-step review process that includes programmatic discretion in selecting awards. This process allows us to determine whether success in a future independent scientific-research career is more accurately predicted by peer-review recommendations or discretion by program staff and institute leaders. Using data from a prestigious training program at the National Institute of Health (NIH), the Ruth L. Kirschstein National Research Service Award (NRSA), we provide evidence on the efficacy of peer review. We find that, despite all current claims to the contrary, the existing peer-review system works as intended. It more closely predicts high-quality science and future research independence than discretion. We discover also that regression discontinuity, the econometric method typically used to examine the effect of scientific funding, does not fit many scientific-funding models and should only be used with caution when studying federal awards for science.
papers.zh_title: 科学资助中的行政自由裁量权：来自一项著名博士后培训项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 科学界正在就其同行评审系统的价值进行积极辩论。同行评审是否真的发挥了我们设想的作用——即帮助政府机构预测哪些想法最有可能促进科学进步？许多联邦机构采用两步评审流程，其中包括在遴选资助项目时的项目自由裁量权。这一流程使我们能够确定，未来独立科研生涯的成功是由同行评审建议更准确预测，还是由项目官员和机构负责人的自由裁量权更准确预测。利用美国国立卫生研究院一项著名培训项目——Ruth L. Kirschstein国家研究服务奖的数据，我们提供了关于同行评审有效性的证据。我们发现，尽管当前有相反的说法，但现有的同行评审系统按预期运作。与自由裁量权相比，它更准确地预测了高质量科学和未来的研究独立性。我们还发现，断点回归——通常用于检验科学资助效果的计量经济学方法——并不适用于许多科学资助模型，在研究联邦科学奖项时应谨慎使用。

papers.title: Happiness and the Quality of Government
papers.authors: John F. Helliwell, Haifang Huang, Shun Wang
papers.abstract: This chapter uses happiness data to assess the quality of government. Our happiness data are drawn from the Gallup World Poll, starting in 2005 and extending to 2017 or 2018. In our analysis of the panel of more than 150 countries and generally over 1,500 national-level observations, we show that government delivery quality is significantly correlated with national happiness, but democratic quality is not. We also analyze other quality of government indicators. Confidence in government is correlated with happiness, however forms of democracy and government spending seem not. We further discuss three channels (including peace and conflict, trust, and inequality) whereby quality of government and happiness are linked. We finally summarize what has been learned about how government policies could be formed to improve citizens’ happiness.
papers.zh_title: 幸福感与政府质量
papers.zh_abstract: 本章利用幸福感数据来评估政府质量。我们的幸福感数据来自盖洛普世界民意调查，起始于2005年，延伸至2017年或2018年。在我们对涵盖150多个国家、通常超过1500个国家级观测值的面板数据分析中，我们表明政府交付质量与国家幸福感显著相关，但民主质量则不然。我们还分析了其他政府质量指标。对政府的信心与幸福感相关，然而民主形式和政府支出似乎无关。我们进一步讨论了政府质量与幸福感相联系的三个渠道（包括和平与冲突、信任以及不平等）。最后，我们总结了关于如何制定政府政策以改善公民幸福感方面的已有认识。

papers.title: Urbanization and its Discontents
papers.authors: Edward L. Glaeser
papers.abstract: American cities have experienced a remarkable renaissance over the past 40 years, but in recent years, cities have experienced considerable discontent. Anger about high housing prices and gentrification has led to protests. The urban wage premium appears to have disappeared for less skilled workers. The cities of the developing world are growing particularly rapidly, but in those places, the downsides of density are acute. In this essay, I review the causes of urban discontent and present a unified explanation for this unhappiness. Urban resurgence represents private sector success, and the public sector typically only catches up to urban change with a considerable lag. Moreover, as urban machines have been replaced by governments that are more accountable to empowered residents, urban governments do more to protect insiders and less to enable growth. The power of insiders can be seen in the regulatory limits on new construction and new businesses, the slow pace of school reform and the unwillingness to embrace congestion pricing.
papers.zh_title: 城市化及其不满
papers.zh_abstract: 美国城市在过去40年经历了显著的复兴，但近年来，城市也经历了相当大的不满。对高房价和绅士化的愤怒导致了抗议活动。城市工资溢价似乎对技能较低的工人消失了。发展中国家的城市增长尤为迅速，但在这些地方，密度的负面影响十分严重。在这篇文章中，我回顾了城市不满的原因，并为这种不满提出了一个统一的解释。城市复兴代表了私营部门的成功，而公共部门通常只有在相当长的滞后之后才能赶上城市变化。此外，随着城市机器被对有权居民更负责的政府所取代，城市政府更多地保护内部人，而较少促进增长。内部人的权力体现在对新建筑和新业务的监管限制、学校改革的缓慢步伐以及不愿接受拥堵定价上。

papers.title: Rising Bank Concentration
papers.authors: Dean Corbae, Pablo D'Erasmo
papers.abstract: Concentration of insured deposit funding among the top four commercial banks in the U.S. has risen from 15% in 1984 to 44% in 2018, a roughly three-fold increase. Regulation has often been attributed as a factor in that increase. The Riegle-Neal Interstate Banking and Branching Efficiency Act of 1994 removed many of the restrictions on opening bank branches across state lines. We interpret the Riegle-Neal act as lowering the cost of expanding a bank's funding base. In this paper, we build an industry equilibrium model in which banks endogenously climb a funding base ladder. Rising concentration occurs along a transition path between two steady states after branching costs decline.
