papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, ME；JEL：E44, G21, L11, L13
papers.zh_title: 银行集中度上升
papers.zh_abstract: 美国前四大商业银行的受保存款资金集中度从1984年的15%上升到2018年的44%，大约增长了三倍。监管常被认为是这一增长的一个因素。1994年的《里格尔-尼尔州际银行及分行效率法案》取消了许多关于跨州开设银行分行的限制。我们将《里格尔-尼尔法案》解释为降低了扩大银行资金基础的成本。在本文中，我们构建了一个行业均衡模型，其中银行内生地攀登资金基础阶梯。在分行成本下降后，集中度上升发生在两个稳态之间的过渡路径上。

papers.title: Gender Roles and the Gender Expectations Gap
papers.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Ulrike Malmendier, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: Expectations about macro-finance variables, such as inflation, vary significantly across genders, even within the same household. We conjecture that traditional gender roles expose women and men to different economic signals in their daily lives, which in turn produce systematic variation in expectations. Using unique data on the contributions of men and women to household grocery chores, their resulting exposure to price signals, and their inflation expectations, we show that the gender expectations gap is tightly linked to participation in grocery shopping. We also document a gender gap in other economic expectations and discuss how it might affect economic choices.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：C90, D14, D84, E31, E52, G11
papers.zh_title: 性别角色与性别预期差距
papers.zh_abstract: 对宏观金融变量（如通货膨胀）的预期在性别之间存在显著差异，即使在同一个家庭内部也是如此。我们推测，传统的性别角色使女性和男性在日常生活中接触到不同的经济信号，这进而产生了系统性的预期差异。利用关于男性和女性在家庭杂货采购中的贡献、由此产生的对价格信号的暴露以及他们的通胀预期的独特数据，我们表明性别预期差距与参与杂货购物密切相关。我们还记录了其他经济预期中的性别差距，并讨论了它可能如何影响经济选择。

papers.title: Education and Health Over the Life Cycle
papers.authors: Robert Kaestner, Cuiping Schiman, Jason M. Ward
papers.abstract: There is little theoretical and empirical research on the effects of education on health over the life cycle. In this article, we extend the Grossman (1972) model of the demand for health and use the extended model to analyze the effect of education on health at different ages. The main conclusion from our model is that it is unlikely that the relationship between education and health will be constant over the life cycle and that education is likely to have little effect on health at younger ages when there is little depreciation of the health stock. We also present an extensive empirical analysis documenting the association between education and health over the life cycle. Results of our analysis suggest that in terms of mortality, education has little effect until age 60, but then lowers the hazard rate of death. For measures of morbidity, education has an effect at most ages between 45 to 60, but after age 60 has apparently little effect most likely due to selective mortality. In addition, most of the apparent beneficial effect of education stems from obtaining a high school degree or more. It is the health and mortality of lowest education group—those with less than a high school degree—that diverges from the health and mortality of other education groups. Finally, we find that the educational differences in health have become larger for more recent birth cohorts.
papers.zh_title: 生命周期中的教育与健康
papers.zh_abstract: 关于教育对生命周期健康影响的理论和实证研究很少。在本文中，我们扩展了Grossman（1972）的健康需求模型，并使用扩展模型分析了教育在不同年龄对健康的影响。我们模型的主要结论是，教育与健康之间的关系不太可能在生命周期中保持不变，并且在健康存量折旧很少的较年轻年龄，教育可能对健康影响甚微。我们还进行了广泛的实证分析，记录了教育与健康在生命周期中的关联。我们的分析结果表明，就死亡率而言，教育在60岁之前几乎没有影响，但之后会降低死亡风险率。就发病率指标而言，教育在45至60岁之间的大多数年龄有影响，但在60岁之后显然影响甚微，这很可能是由于选择性死亡率。此外，教育的大部分明显有益效果源于获得高中或以上学历。正是最低教育群体（那些未获得高中学历的人）的健康和死亡率与其他教育群体的健康和死亡率存在差异。最后，我们发现，对于较近期的出生队列，教育在健康方面的差异变得更大。

papers.title: The Effect of Open-Air Waste Burning on Infant Health: Evidence from Government Failure in Lebanon
papers.authors: Pierre Mouganie, Ruba Ajeeb, Mark Hoekstra
papers.abstract: An estimated 40 percent of the world's garbage is burned in open-air fires, which are responsible for as much as half of the global emissions of some pollutants. However, there is little evidence on the health consequences of open-air waste burning. In this paper, we estimate the effect of in utero exposure to open-air waste burning on birth outcomes. We do so by examining the consequences of the Lebanese garbage crisis of 2015, which led to an abrupt, unanticipated increase in waste burning in residential neighborhoods in Beirut and Mount Lebanon. To identify effects, we exploit variation in exposure across neighborhoods before and after the crisis. Results indicate exposure had large impacts on birth outcomes; in utero exposure to at least one open-air waste burn increased premature births by 4 percentage points (50%) and low birth weight by 5 to 8 percentage points (80 - 120%). Given previous research documenting the long-run effects of prenatal shocks on adult health, human capital, and labor market outcomes, this suggests open-air waste burning imposes significant costs on populations worldwide.
papers.zh_title: 露天垃圾焚烧对婴儿健康的影响：来自黎巴嫩政府失灵的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 据估计，全球40%的垃圾通过露天焚烧处理，这导致某些污染物的全球排放量中高达一半来自此类焚烧。然而，关于露天垃圾焚烧对健康影响的证据很少。本文估算了子宫内暴露于露天垃圾焚烧对出生结局的影响。我们通过考察2015年黎巴嫩垃圾危机的影响来实现这一目标，该危机导致贝鲁特和黎巴嫩山住宅区露天垃圾焚烧突然且意外地增加。为了识别效应，我们利用了危机前后不同社区暴露程度的变化。结果表明，暴露对出生结局有重大影响；子宫内至少经历一次露天垃圾焚烧会使早产率增加4个百分点（50%），低出生体重率增加5至8个百分点（80%至120%）。鉴于先前研究记录了产前冲击对成人健康、人力资本和劳动力市场结果的长期影响，这表明露天垃圾焚烧给全球人口带来了显著成本。

papers.title: Language Training and Refugees' Integration
papers.authors: Jacob Nielsen Arendt, Iben Bolvig, Mette Foged, Linea Hasager, Giovanni Peri
papers.abstract: We evaluate a Danish reform focused on improving Danish language training for those granted refugee status on or after January 1, 1999. Using a Regression Discontinuity Design we find a significant, permanent, positive effect on earnings. This effect emerged after completion of language classes and was accompanied by additional schooling and higher probability of working in communication-intensive jobs, suggesting that language training, rather than other minor aspects of the reform, produced it. We also find evidence of higher completion rates of lower secondary school and lower probability of crime for male children with both parents exposed to the reform.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：E64, I30, J18, J24, J60
papers.zh_title: 语言培训与难民融入
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一项丹麦改革，该改革旨在改善1999年1月1日或之后获得难民身份者的丹麦语培训。使用断点回归设计，我们发现改革对收入产生了显著且持久的正向效应。这一效应在语言课程完成后显现，并伴随着额外的教育机会以及从事沟通密集型工作概率的提高，这表明语言培训（而非改革的其他次要方面）是产生该效应的原因。我们还发现，对于父母双方都受到改革影响的男性儿童，其初中毕业率更高，犯罪概率更低。

papers.title: Robustly Optimal Monetary Policy in a New Keynesian Model with Housing
papers.authors: Klaus Adam, Michael Woodford
papers.abstract: We analytically characterize optimal monetary policy for an augmented New Keynesian model with a housing sector. With rational private sector expectations about housing prices and inflation, optimal monetary policy can be characterized by a standard “target criterion” in terms of inflation and the output gap, that makes no reference to housing prices. If instead the policymaker is concerned with potential departures of private sector expectations from rational ones, and seeks a policy that is robust against such possible departures, then the optimal target criterion will also depend on housing prices. For empirically realistic cases, robustness requires the central bank to “lean against” housing prices, i.e., to adopt a stance that is projected to undershoot (overshoot) its normal targets for inflation and the output gap following unexpected housing price increases (decreases). Notably, robustly optimal policy does not require that the central bank distinguish between “fundamental” and “non-fundamental” movements in housing prices.
papers.zh_title: 包含住房部门的新凯恩斯模型中的稳健最优货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们解析性地刻画了包含住房部门的扩展新凯恩斯模型中的最优货币政策。在私人部门对房价和通胀具有理性预期的情况下，最优货币政策可以用一个关于通胀和产出缺口的标准“目标准则”来表征，该准则不涉及房价。然而，如果政策制定者担心私人部门预期可能偏离理性预期，并寻求一种能够抵御此类可能偏离的稳健政策，那么最优目标准则也将依赖于房价。对于经验上现实的情形，稳健性要求中央银行“逆风”干预房价，即在意外房价上涨（下跌）后，采取预计会低于（高于）其通胀和产出缺口正常目标的政策立场。值得注意的是，稳健最优政策并不要求中央银行区分房价的“基本面”和“非基本面”变动。

papers.title: Mandated Sick Pay: Coverage, Utilization, and Crowding-In
papers.authors: Johanna Catherine Maclean, Stefan Pichler, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
papers.abstract: Using the National Compensation Survey from 2009 to 2022 and difference-in-differences methods, we find that state-level sick pay mandates are effective in broadening access for U.S. workers. Increases in coverage reach 30ppt from a 63% baseline five years post-mandate. Mandates have more bite in jobs with low pre-mandate coverage. Further, mandates reduce inequality in access to paid sick leave substantially, both across and within firms. Covid-19 reinforced existing positive trends in coverage and take-up. Sick leave use increases linearly, whereas costs plateau after five years. Finally, we find crowding-in of non-mandated benefits which we label “job upscaling” by firms to differentiate jobs and attract labor.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I13, I18, J22, J28, J32
papers.zh_title: 法定病假工资：覆盖率、使用率与挤入效应
papers.zh_abstract: 利用2009年至2022年的全国薪酬调查数据和双重差分方法，我们发现州级病假工资强制令在扩大美国工人获取病假工资方面是有效的。在强制令实施五年后，覆盖率从63%的基线水平增加了30个百分点。强制令在强制前覆盖率较低的工作中效果更显著。此外，强制令显著减少了获取带薪病假的不平等，无论是在企业间还是企业内部。新冠疫情强化了覆盖率和使用率已有的积极趋势。带薪病假的使用呈线性增长，而成本在五年后趋于稳定。最后，我们发现了非强制福利的“挤入效应”，我们将其称为企业为差异化岗位和吸引劳动力而进行的“工作升级”。

papers.title: When a Master Dies: Speculation and Asset Float
papers.authors: Julien Pénasse, Luc Renneboog, José A. Scheinkman
papers.abstract: The death of an artist constitutes a negative supply shock to his future production; in finance terms, this supply shock reduces the artist's float. Intuition may thus suggest that this supply shock reduces the future auction volume of the artist. However, if collectors have fluctuating heterogeneous beliefs, since they cannot sell short, prices overweigh optimists' beliefs and have a speculative component. If collectors have limited capacity to bear risk, an increase in float may decrease subsequent turnover and prices (Hong et al. 2006). Symmetrically, a negative supply shock leads to an augmentation of prices and turnover. We find strong support for this prediction in the data on art auctions that we examine.
papers.zh_title: 大师离世：投机与资产流通量
papers.zh_abstract: 艺术家的去世对其未来创作构成负向供给冲击；用金融术语来说，这种供给冲击减少了艺术家的流通量。直觉上，这可能意味着该供给冲击会降低艺术家未来的拍卖成交量。然而，如果收藏家具有波动的异质信念，并且由于无法卖空，价格会过度反映乐观者的信念并包含投机成分。如果收藏家承担风险的能力有限，流通量的增加可能会降低随后的换手率和价格（Hong et al. 2006）。对称地，负向供给冲击会导致价格和换手率的上升。我们在所考察的艺术品拍卖数据中找到了支持这一预测的有力证据。

papers.title: A Quantitative Analysis of Distortions in Managerial Forecasts
papers.authors: Yueran Ma, Tiziano Ropele, David Sraer, David Thesmar
papers.abstract: This paper quantifies the economic costs of distortions in managerial forecasts. We match a unique managerial survey run by the Bank of Italy with administrative data on firm balance sheets and income statements. The resulting dataset allows us to observe a long panel of managerial forecast errors for a sample of firms representative of the Italian economy. We show that managerial forecast errors are positively and significantly autocorrelated. This persistence in forecast error is consistent with managerial underreaction to new information. To quantify the economic significance of this forecasting bias, we estimate a dynamic equilibrium model with heterogeneous firms and distorted expectations. The estimated model matches not only the persistence of forecast errors, but the empirical link between investment and managerial forecasts. Relative to a counterfactual with rational expectations, we find that managers exhibit large forecasting biases, which lead to significant distortions in firm-level investment. These distortions, however, imply limited loss in firm value. In general equilibrium, the estimated model leads to negligible aggregate efficiency losses from distorted forecasts.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E03, E22, E7, E70, E71, G02, G3, G31
papers.zh_title: 管理层预测扭曲的量化分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文量化了管理层预测扭曲的经济成本。我们将意大利银行进行的一项独特的管理层调查与关于企业资产负债表和损益表的行政数据相匹配。由此产生的数据集使我们能够观察到代表意大利经济的企业样本中管理层预测误差的长面板数据。我们表明，管理层预测误差存在正向且显著的自相关。这种预测误差的持续性与管理层对新信息反应不足是一致的。为了量化这种预测偏差的经济显著性，我们估计了一个包含异质性企业和扭曲预期的动态均衡模型。估计的模型不仅匹配了预测误差的持续性，还匹配了投资与管理层预测之间的经验联系。与理性预期的反事实相比，我们发现管理层表现出较大的预测偏差，这导致了企业层面投资的显著扭曲。然而，这些扭曲对企业价值的损失有限。在一般均衡中，估计的模型表明，由扭曲预测导致的总体效率损失可以忽略不计。

papers.title: Convex Supply Curves
papers.authors: Christoph Boehm, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
papers.abstract: We provide evidence that industries' supply curves are convex. To guide our empirical analysis, we develop a putty-clay model in which capacity constraints at the plant level generate convex supply curves at the industry level. The model's key insight is that an industry's capacity utilization rate is a sufficient statistic for the slope of its supply curve. Using data on capacity utilization and three different instruments, we estimate the supply curve and find robust evidence for convexity. Supply curves are essentially flat at low levels of capacity utilization but increasing at higher levels. Further, industries with low initial capacity utilization rates expand production twice as much after demand shocks as industries that produce close to their capacity limit. The nonlinearity we identify has a number of macroeconomic implications, including that responses to shocks are state-dependent, that the Phillips curve is convex, and that the welfare costs of business cycles are larger than in Lucas (1987).
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E22, E32, E52, E62, F44
papers.zh_title: 凸性供给曲线
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了行业供给曲线是凸性的证据。为了指导我们的实证分析，我们开发了一个“油灰-粘土”模型，在该模型中，工厂层面的产能约束产生了行业层面的凸性供给曲线。该模型的关键见解是，行业的产能利用率是其供给曲线斜率的充分统计量。利用产能利用率数据和三种不同的工具变量，我们估计了供给曲线，并发现了支持凸性的稳健证据。供给曲线在低产能利用率水平下基本平坦，但在较高水平下则呈上升趋势。此外，初始产能利用率较低的行业在需求冲击后，其产量扩张幅度是接近产能极限行业的两倍。我们识别出的这种非线性具有若干宏观经济含义，包括：对冲击的反应是状态依赖的，菲利普斯曲线是凸性的，以及经济周期的福利成本大于Lucas（1987）的估计。

papers.title: Market Fragmentation
papers.authors: Daniel Chen, Darrell Duffie
papers.abstract: We model a simple market setting in which fragmentation of trade of the same asset across multiple exchanges improves allocative efficiency. Fragmentation reduces the inhibiting effect of price-impact avoidance on order submission. Although fragmentation reduces market depth on each exchange, it also isolates cross-exchange price impacts, leading to more aggressive overall order submission and better rebalancing of unwanted positions across traders. Fragmentation also has implications for the extent to which prices reveal traders’ private information. While a given exchange price is less informative in more fragmented markets, all exchange prices taken together are more informative.
papers.zh_title: 市场碎片化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个简单的市场模型，在该模型中，同一资产在多个交易所进行碎片化交易可以提高配置效率。碎片化减少了避免价格冲击对订单提交的抑制作用。尽管碎片化降低了每个交易所的市场深度，但它也隔离了跨交易所的价格冲击，从而导致整体订单提交更加激进，并更好地在交易者之间重新平衡非意愿头寸。碎片化还对价格揭示交易者私人信息的程度产生影响。虽然单个交易所的价格在更碎片化的市场中信息含量更低，但所有交易所价格的总和却更具信息含量。

papers.title: The Structure of Multinational Firms' International Activities
papers.authors: Ronald B. Davies, James R. Markusen
papers.abstract: The structure of a multinational firm, that is how its affiliates relate to one another, is critical for understanding where multinationals locate, how policy affects them, and their resilience to localized shocks. Here, we review the two main structures: horizontal investments which replicate activities across borders, and vertical investments which fragment activities across countries. In addition, we use data (primarily from the US) to examine which of these structures seems to dominate the data. This includes a novel use of measures of global value-chain positioning of a country's industries. In each case, the data suggests a dominant role for horizontal investment. We conclude with a discussion of the challenge that intangibles play in multinational data and point towards potentially fertile areas for future research.
papers.zh_title: 跨国企业国际活动的结构
papers.zh_abstract: 跨国企业的结构，即其子公司之间的相互关系，对于理解跨国公司的区位选择、政策如何影响它们以及它们对局部冲击的抵御能力至关重要。在此，我们回顾两种主要结构：横向投资，即跨国复制活动；以及纵向投资，即跨国分散活动。此外，我们利用数据（主要来自美国）来检验这些结构中哪一种似乎在数据中占主导地位。这包括对一国产业全球价值链定位指标的新颖运用。在每种情况下，数据都表明横向投资起着主导作用。最后，我们讨论了无形资产在跨国数据中带来的挑战，并指出了未来研究可能富有成果的领域。

papers.title: Online Estimation of DSGE Models
papers.authors: Michael D. Cai, Marco Del Negro, Edward P. Herbst, Ethan Matlin, Reca Sarfati, Frank Schorfheide
papers.abstract: This paper illustrates the usefulness of sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) methods in approximating DSGE model posterior distributions. We show how the tempering schedule can be chosen adaptively, document the accuracy and runtime benefits of generalized data tempering for “online” estimation (that is, re-estimating a model as new data become available), and provide examples of multimodal posteriors that are well captured by SMC methods. We then use the online estimation of the DSGE model to compute pseudo-out-of-sample density forecasts and study the sensitivity of the predictive performance to changes in the prior distribution. We find that making priors less informative (compared to the benchmark priors used in the literature) by increasing the prior variance does not lead to a deterioration of forecast accuracy.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C11, C32, C53, E32, E37, E52
papers.zh_title: DSGE模型的在线估计
papers.zh_abstract: 本文阐述了序贯蒙特卡洛方法在近似DSGE模型后验分布方面的实用性。我们展示了如何自适应地选择退火计划，记录了广义数据退火在“在线”估计（即随着新数据的出现重新估计模型）中的准确性和运行时间优势，并提供了SMC方法能够很好捕捉的多峰后验分布示例。然后，我们利用DSGE模型的在线估计来计算伪样本外密度预测，并研究预测性能对先验分布变化的敏感性。我们发现，与文献中使用的基准先验相比，通过增加先验方差使先验信息减少，并不会导致预测准确性的下降。

papers.title: Terrorist Attacks, Cultural Incidents and the Vote for Radical Parties: Analyzing Text from Twitter
papers.authors: Francesco Giavazzi, Felix Iglhaut, Giacomo Lemoli, Gaia Rubera
papers.abstract: We study the role of perceived threats from other cultures induced by terrorist attacks and by a criminal event on public discourse and voters’ support for radical right parties. We first develop a rule which allocates Twitter users in Germany to electoral districts and then use a machine learning method to compute measures of textual similarity between the tweets they produce and tweets by accounts of the main German parties. Using the dates of the exogenous events we estimate constituency-level shifts in similarity to party language. We find that following these events Twitter text becomes on average more similar to that of the main radical right party, AfD, while the opposite happens for other parties. Regressing estimated shifts in similarity on changes in vote shares between federal elections we find a significant association. Our results point to the role of perceived threats from other cultures on the success of nationalist parties.
papers.zh_title: 恐怖袭击、文化事件与激进政党投票：基于Twitter文本分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由恐怖袭击和犯罪事件引发的对其他文化的感知威胁，对公共话语以及选民对极右翼政党支持的影响。我们首先制定了一个规则，将德国Twitter用户分配到选区，然后使用机器学习方法计算他们发布的推文与德国主要政党账户推文之间的文本相似度度量。利用外生事件的发生日期，我们估计了选区层面与政党语言相似度的变化。我们发现，在这些事件发生后，Twitter文本平均而言变得更类似于主要极右翼政党AfD的文本，而其他政党则出现相反情况。将估计的相似度变化与联邦选举间投票份额的变化进行回归，我们发现存在显著关联。我们的结果指出了感知到的其他文化威胁对民族主义政党成功的作用。

papers.title: A Model of Scientific Communication
papers.authors: Isaiah Andrews, Jesse M. Shapiro
papers.abstract: We propose a positive model of empirical science in which an analyst makes a report to an audience after observing some data. Agents in the audience may differ in their beliefs or objectives, and may therefore update or act differently following a given report. We contrast the proposed model with a classical model of statistics in which the report directly determines the payoff. We identify settings in which the predictions of the proposed model differ from those of the classical model, and seem to better match practice.
papers.zh_title: 科学传播模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个实证科学的实证模型，其中分析人员在观察一些数据后向受众提交报告。受众中的个体可能在信念或目标上存在差异，因此可能会根据给定的报告进行不同的更新或采取不同的行动。我们将所提出的模型与一个经典的统计学模型进行对比，在经典模型中，报告直接决定收益。我们确定了所提出模型的预测与经典模型预测不同的情境，并且这些情境似乎更符合实践。

papers.title: Risks to Human Capital
papers.authors: Mehran Ebrahimian, Jessica Wachter
papers.abstract: What is the connection between financing constraints and the equity premium? To answer this question, we build a model with inalienable human capital, in which investors finance individuals who can potentially become skilled. Though investment in skill is always optimal, it does not take place in some states of the world, due to moral hazard. In other states of the world, individuals acquire skill; however outside investors and individuals inefficiently share risk. We show that this simple moral hazard problem and the resultant financing friction leads to a realistic equity premium, a low riskfree rate, and severe negative consequences for distribution of wealth and for welfare. When investment fails to take place, the economy enters an endogenous disaster state. We show that the possibility of these disaster states distorts risk prices, even under calibrations in which they never occur in equilibrium.
papers.zh_title: 人力资本风险
papers.zh_abstract: 融资约束与股权溢价之间有何联系？为了回答这个问题，我们构建了一个包含不可转让人力资本的模型，其中投资者为可能成为技能型人才的个体提供融资。尽管投资于技能总是最优的，但由于道德风险，在某些世界状态下这种投资不会发生。在其他世界状态下，个体获得技能；然而，外部投资者和个体之间无法有效分担风险。我们表明，这种简单的道德风险问题以及由此产生的融资摩擦，导致了现实的股权溢价、低无风险利率，并对财富分配和福利产生了严重的负面影响。当投资未能发生时，经济会进入一个内生的灾难状态。我们表明，即使在校准中这些灾难状态在均衡中从未发生，它们发生的可能性也会扭曲风险价格。

papers.title: The Effects of Professor Gender on the Post-Graduation Outcomes of Female Students
papers.authors: Hani Mansour, Daniel I. Rees, Bryson M. Rintala, Nathan N. Wozny
papers.abstract: Although women earn approximately 50 percent of science, technology, engineering and math (STEM) bachelor’s degrees, more than 70 percent of scientists and engineers are men. We explore a potential determinant of this STEM gender gap using newly collected data on the career trajectories of United States Air Force Academy students. Specifically, we examine the effects of being assigned female math and science professors on occupation choice and postgraduate education. We find that, among high-ability female students, being assigned a female professor leads to substantial increases in the probability of working in a STEM occupation and the probability of receiving a STEM master’s degree.
papers.zh_title: 教授性别对女学生毕业后结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管女性获得了大约50%的科学、技术、工程和数学学士学位，但超过70%的科学家和工程师是男性。我们利用新收集的美国空军学院学生职业轨迹数据，探讨了STEM性别差距的一个潜在决定因素。具体而言，我们研究了被分配女性数学和科学教授对职业选择及研究生教育的影响。我们发现，在高能力女学生中，被分配女性教授会显著增加其在STEM职业工作的概率以及获得STEM硕士学位的概率。

papers.title: Winners and Losers? The Effect of Gaining and Losing Access to Selective Colleges on Education and Labor Market Outcomes
papers.authors: Sandra E. Black, Jeffrey T. Denning, Jesse Rothstein
papers.abstract: Selective college admissions are fundamentally a question of tradeoffs: Given capacity, admitting one student means rejecting another. Research to date has generally estimated average effects of college selectivity, and has been unable to distinguish between the effects on students gaining access and on those losing access under alternative admissions policies. We use the introduction of the Top Ten Percent rule and administrative data from the State of Texas to estimate the effect of access to a selective college on student graduation and earnings outcomes. We estimate separate effects on two groups of students. The first--highly ranked students at schools which previously sent few students to the flagship university--gain access due to the policy; the second--students outside the top tier at traditional “feeder” high schools--tend to lose access. We find that students in the first group see increases in college enrollment and graduation with some evidence of positive earnings gains 7-9 years after college. In contrast, students in the second group attend less selective colleges but do not see declines in overall college enrollment, graduation, or earnings. The Top Ten Percent rule, introduced for equity reasons, thus also seems to have improved efficiency.
papers.zh_title: 赢家与输家？获得与失去选择性大学入学机会对教育和劳动力市场结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 选择性大学招生本质上是一个权衡问题：在容量给定的情况下，录取一名学生意味着拒绝另一名学生。迄今为止的研究通常估计了大学选择性的平均效应，并且无法区分对在替代招生政策下获得入学机会的学生和失去入学机会的学生的影响。我们利用德克萨斯州“前10%规则”的引入和行政数据，来估计进入选择性大学对学生毕业和收入结果的影响。我们分别估计了对两组学生的影响。第一组——来自以前很少向旗舰大学输送学生的学校的高排名学生——因该政策而获得入学机会；第二组——来自传统“生源”高中非顶尖层级的学生——往往失去入学机会。我们发现，第一组学生的大学入学率和毕业率有所提高，并有证据表明在大学毕业7-9年后收入有所增加。相比之下，第二组学生进入了选择性较低的大学，但在整体大学入学率、毕业率或收入方面并未出现下降。因此，出于公平原因而引入的“前10%规则”似乎也提高了效率。

papers.title: Capital Flows, Real Estate, and Local Cycles: Evidence from German Cities, Banks, and Firms
papers.authors: Peter Bednarek, Daniel Marcel te Kaat, Chang Ma, Alessandro Rebucci
papers.abstract: We study how an aggregate bank flow shock impacts German cities' GDP growth depending on the state of their local real estate markets. Identification exploits a policy framework assigning refugees to cities on a quasi-random basis and variation in non-developable area for the construction of a measure of exposure to local real estate market tightness. We estimate that the German cities most exposed to real estate market pressure grew 2.5-5.0 percentage points more than the least exposed ones, cumulatively, during the 2009-2014 period. Bank flow shocks shift credit to firms with more collateral. More collateral also leads firms to hire and invest more in response to these shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：D22, D53, E22, E3, E44, F3, G01, G15, G21, R3
papers.zh_title: 资本流动、房地产与地方周期：来自德国城市、银行和企业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了总体银行资本流动冲击如何根据当地房地产市场的状况影响德国城市的GDP增长。识别策略利用了将难民准随机分配到城市的政策框架，以及用于构建当地房地产市场紧张程度暴露度度量的不可开发区域的变化。我们估计，在2009-2014年期间，受房地产市场压力影响最大的德国城市，其累计增长率比受影响最小的城市高出2.5-5.0个百分点。银行资本流动冲击将信贷转向拥有更多抵押品的企业。更多的抵押品也促使企业针对这些冲击增加招聘和投资。

papers.title: Black-Friendly Businesses in Cities During the Civil Rights Era
papers.authors: Maggie E.C. Jones, Trevon D. Logan, David Rosé, Lisa D. Cook
papers.abstract: Quantitative analysis of Black business districts and evidence on the magnitude of social change leading up to the passage of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, in particular as it relates to the accessibility of public accommodations, is limited. We combine newly digitized data on the precise geocoded location of nearly 6,000 Green Book establishments—public accommodations that were friendly towards African American clientele—across major urban areas with existing and new sources of data on social change to understand the dynamics of Black-friendly businesses within cities during the middle of the twentieth century. In doing so, we document a new set of facts. First, we show that the location and growth of Green Book establishments responded to economic forces. Second, we show that there was a large increase in the number of Green Book establishments in cities between 1939 and 1955. Third, for Green Book establishments located in cities for which the Home Owner’s Loan Corporation (HOLC) drew residential security maps, the vast majority (nearly 70 percent) were located in the lowest-grade, redlined neighborhoods. And finally, we show that 1950s urban renewal projects were related to the contraction of non-discriminatory businesses. Collectively, these facts suggest that more research on Black-owned and Black-friendly businesses is needed to fully understand the economics of urban change in the twentieth century.
papers.zh_title: 民权时代城市中的黑人友好型企业
papers.zh_abstract: 关于黑人商业区的定量分析以及导致1964年《民权法案》通过的社会变革规模（特别是与公共场所可及性相关的方面）的证据十分有限。我们将新近数字化的近6000家《绿皮书》场所（即对非洲裔美国顾客友好的公共场所）在大城市区域内的精确地理编码位置数据，与关于社会变革的现有及新数据源相结合，以理解20世纪中期城市内部黑人友好型企业的动态。在此过程中，我们记录了一系列新的事实。首先，我们表明《绿皮书》场所的位置和增长对经济力量做出了反应。其次，我们表明在1939年至1955年间，城市中《绿皮书》场所的数量大幅增加。第三，对于位于房主贷款公司（HOLC）绘制了住宅安全地图的城市中的《绿皮书》场所，绝大多数（近70%）位于评级最低的红线区。最后，我们表明20世纪50年代的城市更新项目与非歧视性企业的收缩有关。总体而言，这些事实表明，需要更多关于黑人拥有和黑人友好型企业的研究，才能充分理解20世纪城市变革的经济学。

papers.title: The Long-lasting Effects of Living under Communism on Attitudes towards Financial Markets
papers.authors: Christine Laudenbach, Ulrike Malmendier, Alexandra Niessen-Ruenzi
papers.abstract: We analyze the long-term effects of living under communism and its anticapitalist doctrine on households’ financial investment decisions and attitudes towards financial markets. Utilizing comprehensive German brokerage data and bank data, we show that, decades after Reunification, East Germans still invest significantly less in the stock market than West Germans. Consistent with communist friends-and-foes propaganda, East Germans are more likely to hold stocks of companies from communist countries (China, Russia, Vietnam) and of state-owned companies, and are unlikely to invest in American companies and the financial industry. Effects are stronger for individuals exposed to positive “emotional tagging,” e.g., those living in celebrated showcase cities. Effects reverse for individuals with negative experiences, e.g., environmental pollution, religious oppression, or lack of (Western) TV entertainment. Election years trigger further divergence of East and West Germans. We provide evidence of negative welfare consequences due to less diversified portfolios, higher-fee products, and lower risk-adjusted returns.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CF, POL；JEL：D03, D14, D83, D84, E21, G11
papers.zh_title: 共产主义生活经历对金融市场态度的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了生活在共产主义及其反资本主义教义下对家庭金融投资决策和金融市场态度的长期影响。利用全面的德国经纪数据和银行数据，我们表明，在统一数十年后，东德人投资股市的规模仍显著低于西德人。与共产主义的“朋友与敌人”宣传一致，东德人更倾向于持有来自共产主义国家（中国、俄罗斯、越南）的公司股票以及国有企业的股票，而不太可能投资于美国公司和金融业。这种效应在受到积极“情感标签”影响的个体中更强，例如那些生活在备受赞誉的示范城市中的人。而对于有负面经历（如环境污染、宗教压迫或缺乏西方电视娱乐）的个体，这种效应则发生逆转。选举年份会进一步加剧东德人和西德人的分化。我们提供了证据，表明由于投资组合多元化不足、选择费用更高的产品以及风险调整后收益较低，这导致了负面的福利后果。

papers.title: Perceived Precautionary Savings Motives: Evidence from FinTech
papers.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Thomas Rauter, Christoph K. Scheuch, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: We study the spending response of first-time borrowers to an overdraft facility and elicit their preferences, beliefs, and motives through a FinTech application. Users increase their spending permanently, lower their savings rate, and reallocate spending from non-discretionary to discretionary goods. Interestingly, liquid users react more than others but do not tap into negative deposits. The credit line acts as a form of insurance. These results are not fully consistent with models of financial constraints, buffer stock models, or present-bias preferences. We label this channel perceived precautionary savings motives: Liquid users behave as if they faced strong precautionary savings motives even though no observables, including elicited preferences and beliefs, suggest they should.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D14, E21, E51, G21, G51
papers.zh_title: 感知的预防性储蓄动机：来自金融科技的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了首次借款者对透支服务的支出反应，并通过金融科技应用程序获取了他们的偏好、信念和动机。用户永久性地增加了支出，降低了储蓄率，并将支出从非 discretionary 商品重新分配至 discretionary 商品。有趣的是，流动性充裕的用户反应比其他用户更大，但并未动用负存款。信用额度起到了一种保险形式的作用。这些结果并不完全符合金融约束模型、缓冲库存模型或现时偏差偏好的预测。我们将这一渠道称为感知的预防性储蓄动机：流动性充裕的用户表现得好像他们面临着强烈的预防性储蓄动机，尽管没有任何可观测因素（包括所获取的偏好和信念）表明他们应该如此。

papers.title: A Model of Cryptocurrencies
papers.authors: Michael Sockin, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: We model a cryptocurrency as membership in a decentralized digital platform developed to facilitate transactions between users of certain goods or services. The rigidity induced by the cryptocurrency price having to clear membership demand with supply of token by speculators, especially with strong complementarity in membership demand, can lead to market breakdown. While user optimism mitigates the market fragility by increasing user participation, speculator sentiment exacerbates it by crowding users out. Informational frictions attenuate the risk of breakdown by dampening price volatility and platform performance. Furthermore, the users' anticipation of losses from strategic attacks by miners exacerbates the market fragility.
papers.zh_title: 加密货币模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将加密货币建模为去中心化数字平台的会员资格，该平台旨在促进特定商品或服务用户之间的交易。加密货币价格必须使会员需求与投机者的代币供给相平衡，这种刚性，尤其是在会员需求存在强互补性的情况下，可能导致市场崩溃。虽然用户乐观情绪通过增加用户参与来缓解市场脆弱性，但投机者情绪通过挤出用户而加剧了市场脆弱性。信息摩擦通过抑制价格波动和平台表现来降低崩溃风险。此外，用户对来自矿工策略性攻击的损失预期加剧了市场脆弱性。

papers.title: Issuance Overpricing of China’s Corporate Debt Securities
papers.authors: Yi Ding, Wei Xiong, Jinfan Zhang
papers.abstract: We document issuance overpricing of corporate debt securities in China, which contrasts with underpricing of equity and debt securities in Western countries. The phenomenon in China is robust across subsamples of issuances with different credit ratings, maturities, issuer types, and issuing history, reflecting the distinct institutional environment and issuance process in China’s market for corporate debt securities. The average overpricing dropped from 7.44 basis points to 2.41 basis points after the government prohibited underwriters from using rebates in issuances in October 2017. By analyzing overpricing before and after the rebate ban and across different issuers and underwriters, we uncover two channels for underwriters, who compete for future underwriting business, to drive up overpricing: rebates and self-purchases.
papers.zh_title: 中国公司信用债的发行溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了中国公司信用债的发行溢价现象，这与西方国家股权和债务证券的折价发行形成对比。中国的这一现象在不同信用评级、期限、发行人类型和发行历史的分样本中均稳健存在，反映了中国公司信用债市场独特的制度环境和发行流程。在2017年10月政府禁止承销商在发行中使用返点后，平均溢价从7.44个基点下降至2.41个基点。通过分析返点禁令前后以及不同发行人和承销商之间的溢价情况，我们揭示了承销商（为争夺未来承销业务而竞争）推高溢价的两种渠道：返点和自购。

papers.title: Contingent Linear Financial Networks
papers.authors: Bomin Jiang, Roberto Rigobon, Munther A. Dahleh
papers.abstract: In this paper, we develop a methodology to estimate hidden linear networks when only an aggregate outcome is observed. The aggregate observable variable is a linear mixture of the different networks and it is assumed that each network corresponds to the transmission mechanism of different shocks. We implement the methodology to estimate financial networks among US financial institutions. Credit Default Swap rates are the observable variable and we show that more than one network is needed to understand the dynamic behavior exhibited in the data.
papers.zh_title: 或有线性金融网络
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们开发了一种方法，用于在仅观察到总体结果时估计隐藏的线性网络。可观测的总体变量是不同网络的线性混合，并且假设每个网络对应于不同冲击的传导机制。我们应用该方法来估计美国金融机构之间的金融网络。信用违约互换利率是可观测变量，我们表明需要不止一个网络才能理解数据中呈现的动态行为。

papers.title: Fiscal Federalism and the Budget Impacts of the Affordable Care Act's Medicaid Expansion
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Benjamin D. Sommers
papers.abstract: Medicaid’s federal-state matching system of financing is the nation’s largest example of fiscal federalism. Using generous federal subsidies, the Affordable Care Act incentivized states to expand Medicaid, which became a state option in the aftermath of a 2012 Supreme Court ruling. As of early 2020, 14 states had not yet expanded, with concerns over state budgetary effects described as a key barrier. We use an event-study approach to analyze state budget data from 2010-2018 and assess the effects of state Medicaid expansion decisions. We find that Medicaid expansion increased total spending in expansion states by 6% to 9%, compared to non-expansion states. By source of funds, federal spending via the states increased by 10% in the first year of Medicaid expansion, rising to 27% in 2018. Changes in spending from state funding were modest and non-significant, with less than a 1% change from baseline annually in the most recent years, 2017 and 2018. Meanwhile, we find no evidence that increased Medicaid spending from expansion produced any reductions in spending on education, corrections, transportation, or public assistance. Changes in Medicaid spending tracked closely with the baseline pre-ACA (2013) uninsured rate in each states, with expansion leading to roughly $2680 in added annual spending per uninsured adult. As a result, we estimate states that didn’t expand Medicaid passed up $43 billion in federally-subsidized program funds in 2018. Finally, state projections in the aggregate were reasonably accurate, with expansion states projecting average Medicaid spending from 2014-2018 within 2 percent of the actual amounts, and in fact overestimating Medicaid spending in most years.
papers.zh_title: 财政联邦主义与《平价医疗法案》医疗补助扩展的预算影响
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗补助的联邦-州匹配融资体系是美国财政联邦主义的最大范例。通过慷慨的联邦补贴，《平价医疗法案》激励各州扩大医疗补助范围，但在2012年最高法院裁决后，这成为各州的选择。截至2020年初，仍有14个州未进行扩展，其中对州预算影响的担忧被描述为一个关键障碍。我们采用事件研究方法分析2010年至2018年的州预算数据，评估各州医疗补助扩展决策的影响。我们发现，与非扩展州相比，医疗补助扩展使扩展州的总支出增加了6%至9%。按资金来源划分，在医疗补助扩展的第一年，通过各州支出的联邦资金增加了10%，到2018年上升至27%。来自州资金的支出变化幅度较小且不显著，在最近的2017年和2018年，每年相对于基线的变化不到1%。同时，我们没有发现证据表明，因扩展而增加的医疗补助支出导致了教育、矫正、交通或公共援助支出的减少。医疗补助支出的变化与各州在ACA实施前（2013年）的基线未参保率密切相关，扩展导致每位未参保成年人每年增加约2680美元的支出。因此，我们估计，未扩展医疗补助的州在2018年放弃了430亿美元的联邦补贴项目资金。最后，各州的总体预测相当准确，扩展州预测的2014年至2018年平均医疗补助支出与实际金额相差在2%以内，并且在大多数年份实际上高估了医疗补助支出。

papers.title: Reasonable Doubt: Experimental Detection of Job-Level Employment Discrimination
papers.authors: Patrick M. Kline, Christopher R. Walters
papers.abstract: This paper develops methods for detecting discrimination by individual employers using correspondence experiments that send fictitious resumes to real job openings. We establish identification of higher moments of the distribution of job-level callback rates as a function of the number of resumes sent to each job and propose shape-constrained estimators of these moments. Applying our methods to three experimental datasets, we find striking job-level heterogeneity in the extent to which callback probabilities differ by race or sex. Estimates of higher moments reveal that while most jobs barely discriminate, a few discriminate heavily. These moment estimates are then used to bound the share of jobs that discriminate and the posterior probability that each individual job is engaged in discrimination. In a recent experiment manipulating racially distinctive names, we find that at least 85% of jobs that contact both of two white applications and neither of two black applications are engaged in discrimination. To assess the potential value of our methods for regulators, we consider the accuracy of decision rules for investigating suspicious callback behavior in various experimental designs under a simple two-type model that rationalizes the experimental data. Though we estimate that only 17% of employers discriminate on the basis of race, we find that an experiment sending 10 applications to each job would enable detection of 7-10% of discriminatory jobs while yielding Type I error rates below 0.2%. A minimax decision rule acknowledging partial identification of the distribution of callback rates yields only slightly fewer investigations than a Bayes decision rule based on the two-type model. These findings suggest illegal labor market discrimination can be reliably monitored with relatively small modifications to existing correspondence designs.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C14, C44, C9, J7, J71, K31, K42
papers.zh_title: 合理怀疑：职位层面就业歧视的实验检测
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了通过向真实职位空缺发送虚构简历的通信实验来检测单个雇主歧视的方法。我们建立了职位层面回调率分布高阶矩的识别条件，并提出了这些矩的形状约束估计量。将我们的方法应用于三个实验数据集，我们发现，在种族或性别方面回调概率差异的程度存在显著的职位层面异质性。高阶矩的估计显示，虽然大多数职位几乎不存在歧视，但少数职位存在严重歧视。这些矩估计随后被用于界定存在歧视的职位比例，以及每个单个职位参与歧视的后验概率。在最近一个操纵种族特征姓名的实验中，我们发现，在联系了两名白人申请者但未联系任何一名黑人申请者的职位中，至少有85%存在歧视。为了评估我们的方法对监管机构的潜在价值，我们考虑在一个能够合理化实验数据的简单双类型模型下，各种实验设计中用于调查可疑回调行为的决策规则的准确性。尽管我们估计只有17%的雇主存在基于种族的歧视，但我们发现，一个向每个职位发送10份申请的实验，能够检测出7%至10%的歧视性职位，同时将第一类错误率控制在0.2%以下。一个承认回调率分布部分识别的极小化极大决策规则，其调查数量仅略少于基于双类型模型的贝叶斯决策规则。这些发现表明，通过对现有通信设计进行相对较小的修改，可以可靠地监测非法的劳动力市场歧视。

papers.title: Immigration and Worker-Firm Matching
papers.authors: Gianluca Orefice, Giovanni Peri
papers.abstract: The process of matching between firms and workers is an important mechanism in determining the distribution of wages. In a labor market characterised by large dispersion of workers' productivity and worker-firm complementarity, high quality firms have strong incentives to screen for the quality of workers. This process will increase the positive quality association of firm-worker matches known as positive assortative matching (PAM). Immigration in a local labor market, by increasing the variance of workers abilities, may drive stronger PAM between firms and workers. Using French matched employer-employee (DADS) data over the period 1995-2005 we document that positive supply-driven changes of immigrant workers in a district increased the strength of PAM. We then show that this association is consistent with causality, is quantitatively significant, and is associated with higher average productivity and firm profits, but also with higher wage dispersion. We also show that the increased degree of positive assortative matching is mainly reached by high-productive firms "losing" lower quality workers and "attracting" higher quality workers.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F22, J24, L25
papers.zh_title: 移民与工人-企业匹配
papers.zh_abstract: 企业与工人之间的匹配过程是决定工资分布的重要机制。在工人生产力高度分散且存在工人-企业互补性的劳动力市场中，高质量企业有强烈动机筛选工人质量。这一过程将增强企业与工人之间正向的质量关联，即正向分类匹配（PAM）。本地劳动力市场的移民通过增加工人能力的方差，可能推动企业与工人之间更强的PAM。利用1995-2005年法国匹配的雇主-雇员（DADS）数据，我们记录了某地区移民工人的正向供给驱动变化增强了PAM的强度。随后，我们表明这种关联与因果关系一致，在数量上显著，并与更高的平均生产率和企业利润相关，但也与更高的工资分散度相关。我们还表明，正向分类匹配程度的提高主要通过高生产率企业“失去”低质量工人并“吸引”高质量工人来实现。

papers.title: Contagion of Fear
papers.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Gary Richardson
papers.abstract: The Great Depression is infamous for banking panics, which were a symptomatic of a phenomenon that scholars have labeled a contagion of fear. Using geocoded, microdata on bank distress, we develop metrics that illuminate the incidence of these events and how banks that remained in operation after panics responded. We show that between 1929-32 banking panics reduced lending by 13%, relative to its 1929 value, and the money multiplier and money supply by 36%. The banking panics, in other words, caused about 41% of the decline in bank lending and about nine-tenths of the decline in the money multiplier during the Great Depression.
papers.zh_title: 恐惧的传染
papers.zh_abstract: 大萧条因银行恐慌而臭名昭著，这些恐慌是学者们称为“恐惧传染”现象的症状。利用地理编码的银行困境微观数据，我们开发了衡量这些事件发生率以及恐慌后仍在运营的银行如何应对的指标。我们表明，在1929年至1932年间，银行恐慌使贷款相对于1929年水平减少了13%，并使货币乘数和货币供应量减少了36%。换句话说，银行恐慌导致了大萧条期间银行贷款下降的约41%以及货币乘数下降的约十分之九。

papers.title: Wandering Astray: Teenagers' Choices of Schooling and Crime
papers.authors: Chao Fu, Nicolás Grau, Jorge Rivera
papers.abstract: We build and estimate a dynamic model of teenagers' choices of schooling and crime, incorporating four factors that may contribute to the different routes taken by different teenagers: heterogeneous endowments, unequal opportunities, uncertainties about one's own ability, and contemporaneous shocks. We estimate the model using administrative panel data from Chile that link school records with juvenile criminal records. Counterfactual policy experiments suggest that, for teenagers with disadvantaged backgrounds, interventions that combine mild improvement in their schooling opportunities with free tuition (by adding 22 USD per enrollee-year to the existing voucher) would lead to an 11% decrease in the fraction of those ever arrested by age 18 and a 17% increase in the fraction of those consistently enrolled throughout primary and secondary education.
papers.zh_title: 误入歧途：青少年的上学与犯罪选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建并估计了一个关于青少年上学与犯罪选择的动态模型，纳入了可能导致不同青少年走上不同道路的四个因素：异质性禀赋、不平等机会、对自身能力的不确定性以及同期冲击。我们利用智利的行政面板数据（将学校记录与青少年犯罪记录相关联）来估计该模型。反事实政策实验表明，对于背景不利的青少年，将适度改善其上学机会与免费学费相结合的干预措施（在现有代金券基础上为每位入学学生每年增加22美元），将使18岁前曾被逮捕的青少年比例降低11%，并使在小学和中学教育期间持续入学的比例提高17%。

papers.title: Popular Economic Narratives Advancing the Longest U.S. Economic Expansion 2009-2019
papers.authors: Robert J. Shiller
papers.abstract: The U.S. economic expansion since 2009 is the longest on record since 1854, according to the National Bureau of Economic Research Business Cycle Dating Committee. This paper seeks to understand this phenomenon better by looking at the time paths of popular narratives over this interval, of stories that people have been telling that offer clues into their economic behavior. Six constellations of narratives are studied, identified by keywords “Great Depression,” “secular stagnation,” “sustainability,” “housing bubble,” “strong economy,” and “save more.”
papers.zh_title: 推动2009-2019年美国最长经济扩张的流行经济叙事
papers.zh_abstract: 根据美国国家经济研究局商业周期测定委员会的数据，自2009年以来的美国经济扩张是自1854年以来有记录以来最长的一次。本文试图通过考察这一时期流行叙事的时间路径来更好地理解这一现象，这些叙事是人们讲述的故事，为他们的经济行为提供了线索。研究了六组叙事群，分别由关键词“大萧条”、“长期停滞”、“可持续性”、“房地产泡沫”、“强劲经济”和“增加储蓄”来识别。

papers.title: Measuring the Cost of Regulation: A Text-Based Approach
papers.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Harry Mamaysky, Ruoke Yang
papers.abstract: We derive a measure of firm-level regulatory exposure from the text of corporate earnings calls. We use this measure to study the effect of regulation on companies’ growth, leverage, profitability, and equity returns. Higher regulatory exposure results in slower sales and asset growth, lower leverage, reduced profitability, but higher post-call equity returns. These effects are mitigated for larger firms. Our findings suggest that both compliance risk and physical operational cost are consequences of increased regulation, but the magnitude of the effects of compliance risk are larger. The topical context of regulation is important for future firm-level outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, LE, POL；JEL：G18, G38, K2, L51
papers.zh_title: 衡量监管成本：一种基于文本的方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从企业财报电话会议的文本中推导出一个衡量企业层面监管暴露度的指标。我们使用该指标来研究监管对公司增长、杠杆率、盈利能力和股票回报的影响。更高的监管暴露度导致销售和资产增长放缓、杠杆率降低、盈利能力下降，但电话会议后的股票回报更高。这些影响对于大公司而言有所缓解。我们的发现表明，合规风险和实际运营成本都是监管加强的后果，但合规风险的影响幅度更大。监管的主题背景对于未来的企业层面结果很重要。

papers.title: Redrawing the Map of Global Capital Flows: The Role of Cross-Border Financing and Tax Havens
papers.authors: Antonio Coppola, Matteo Maggiori, Brent Neiman, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: Global firms finance themselves through foreign subsidiaries, often shell companies in tax havens, which obscures their true economic location in official statistics. We associate the universe of traded securities issued by firms in tax havens with their issuer's ultimate parent and restate bilateral investment positions to better reflect the financial linkages connecting countries around the world. Portfolio investment from developed countries to firms in large emerging markets is dramatically larger than previously thought. The national accounts of the United States, for example, understate the U.S. position in Chinese firms by nearly 600 billion dollars, while China's official net creditor position to the rest of the world is overstated by about 50 percent. Further, we demonstrate how offshore issuance in tax havens affects our understanding of the currency composition of external portfolio liabilities and the nature of foreign direct investment. Finally, we provide additional restatements of bilateral investment positions, including one based the geographic distribution of sales.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, LE, ME, PE；JEL：E0, F0, G0
papers.zh_title: 重绘全球资本流动地图：跨境融资与避税天堂的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 全球企业通过外国子公司（通常是避税天堂的空壳公司）进行融资，这掩盖了它们在官方统计中的真实经济所在地。我们将避税天堂企业发行的所有交易证券与其发行人的最终母公司关联起来，并重新表述双边投资头寸，以更好地反映连接世界各国的金融联系。从发达国家到大型新兴市场企业的组合投资规模比之前认为的要大得多。例如，美国的国民账户将美国在中国企业的头寸低估了近6000亿美元，而中国对世界其他地区的官方净债权头寸则被高估了约50%。此外，我们展示了避税天堂的离岸发行如何影响我们对外部组合负债的货币构成以及外国直接投资性质的理解。最后，我们提供了双边投资头寸的额外重新表述，包括基于销售地理分布的表述。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Globalization: Offshoring and Reorganization
papers.authors: Andrew B. Bernard, Teresa C. Fort, Valerie Smeets, Frederic Warzynski
papers.abstract: This paper exploits a unique offshoring survey to show that firms continue domestic production of the same goods they offshore to low-wage countries. This shift towards “produced-good imports” coincides with a reallocation of labor from physical production to innovation and technology occupations, and an increase in domestically-produced varieties' unit values. These responses suggest an additional, firm-level benefit of trade liberalization: the opportunity to offshore production of low-quality varieties, thereby freeing up domestic resources for the development, production, and marketing of higher-quality varieties. Firms’ reactions also motivate a new offshoring measure – produced- good imports – that is readily observed in most firm-level datasets.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F14, F16, F23, F61, L23, L25
papers.zh_title: 异质性全球化：离岸外包与重组
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一项独特的离岸外包调查表明，企业继续在国内生产它们离岸外包到低工资国家的相同商品。这种向“生产商品进口”的转变与劳动力从体力生产向创新和技术职业的重新分配，以及国内生产品种单位价值的增加同时发生。这些反应表明了贸易自由化的另一个企业层面收益：将低质量品种的生产离岸外包的机会，从而释放国内资源用于开发、生产和营销更高质量的品种。企业的反应也激发了一个新的离岸外包衡量指标——生产商品进口——这在大多数企业层面数据集中很容易观察到。

papers.title: Do Consumers Distinguish Fixed Cost from Variable Cost? “Schmeduling" in Two-Part Tariffs in Energy
papers.authors: Koichiro Ito, Shuang Zhang
papers.abstract: A central assumption in economics is that consumers properly distinguish fixed cost from variable cost. This assumption is fundamental to various economic theories, including optimal taxation, redistribution, and price discrimination. Using a quasi-experiment in heating price reform in China, we find empirical evidence that is inconsistent with this conventional assumption and more consistent with the “schmeduling” model in Liebman and Zeckhauser (2004). As we demonstrate the policy implications for two-part energy tariffs, this consumer behavior makes fixed cost directly relevant to the perceived relative prices of goods, and therefore alters the welfare implications of price, tax, and subsidy designs.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, IO；JEL：L38, L51, L97, O1, O38, O44, Q4, Q41, Q5, Q53, Q56
papers.zh_title: 消费者能区分固定成本与可变成本吗？能源两部制电价中的“Schmeduling”
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学中的一个核心假设是消费者能够正确区分固定成本与可变成本。这一假设是各种经济理论的基础，包括最优税收、再分配和价格歧视。利用中国供暖价格改革中的一项准实验，我们发现了与这一传统假设不一致、而与Liebman和Zeckhauser（2004）的“schmeduling”模型更为一致的实证证据。当我们展示其对两部制能源电价的政策含义时，这种消费者行为使得固定成本直接与感知的商品相对价格相关，从而改变了价格、税收和补贴设计的福利含义。

papers.title: The Shadow Margins of Labor Market Slack
papers.authors: R. Jason Faberman, Andreas I. Mueller, Ayşegül Şahin, Giorgio Topa
papers.abstract: We use a mix of new and existing data to develop the Aggregate Hours Gap (AHG), a novel measure of labor market underutilization. Our measure differentiates individuals by detailed categories of labor market participation and uses data on their desired work hours as a measure of their potential labor supply. We show that desired hours vary widely by demographics and detailed labor force status, and that the gap between desired and actual work hours is strongly positively correlated with reported search effort. The Aggregate Hours Gap suggests a more sluggish labor market recovery since the Great Recession than either the official unemployment rate or alternative measures of labor market underutilization. Modest amounts of underutilization among the part-time employed and a substantial degree of underutilization among those out of the labor force account for the disparity. The Aggregate Hours Gap also does well in accounting for wage movements over our sample period.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场松弛的影子边际
papers.zh_abstract: 我们结合新数据和现有数据，开发了总工时缺口（AHG），这是一种衡量劳动力利用不足的新指标。我们的指标按详细的劳动力参与类别区分个体，并使用他们期望工作小时的数据作为潜在劳动力供给的衡量标准。我们发现，期望工时因人口统计特征和详细的劳动力状态而异，且期望工时与实际工时之间的差距与报告的工作搜寻努力呈强正相关。总工时缺口表明，自大衰退以来，劳动力市场复苏比官方失业率或其他劳动力利用不足的替代指标所显示的要更为缓慢。兼职就业者中适度的利用不足以及劳动力队伍外人群中显著的利用不足解释了这种差异。总工时缺口在我们样本期内对工资变动的解释也表现良好。

papers.title: Capital Flow Waves—or Ripples? Extreme Capital Flow Movements Since the Crisis
papers.authors: Kristin J. Forbes, Francis E. Warnock
papers.abstract: Has the occurrence of “extreme capital flow movements”—episodes of sudden surges, stops, flight and retrenchment—changed since the Global Financial Crisis (GFC)? This paper addresses this question by updating and building on the dataset and methodology introduced in Forbes and Warnock (2012) to calculate the occurrence of sharp capital flow movements by foreigners and domestics into and out of individual countries. The results suggest that the occurrence of these extreme capital flow movements has not increased since the GFC. The drivers of these episodes, however, appear to have changed since the GFC. Extreme capital flow movements are less correlated with changes in global risk, and are more difficult to explain with basic global, regional and domestic variables. What used to be large global “waves” in international capital flows have more recently become idiosyncratic “ripples”.
papers.zh_title: 资本流动浪潮——还是涟漪？危机以来的极端资本流动变动
papers.zh_abstract: 自全球金融危机以来，“极端资本流动变动”——即突然激增、骤停、外逃和回撤等事件——的发生是否发生了变化？本文通过更新并基于Forbes和Warnock（2012）的数据集和方法论来回答这个问题，计算外国人和国内居民进出各国的剧烈资本流动的发生情况。结果表明，自全球金融危机以来，这些极端资本流动变动的发生并未增加。然而，这些事件的驱动因素似乎自全球金融危机以来发生了变化。极端资本流动变动与全球风险变化的相关性减弱，且更难以用基本的全球、区域和国内变量来解释。过去国际资本流动中巨大的全球“浪潮”，在近期已转变为独特的“涟漪”。

papers.title: Unpacking Household Engel Curves
papers.authors: Philippe De Vreyer, Sylvie Lambert, Martin Ravallion
papers.abstract: The classic Working-Leser household Engel curve is unpacked to reveal individual budget allocations across commodities as a function of both individual and household total spending. Two main findings emerge on calibrating our model to an unusual sub-household dataset for Senegal. First, for all except education spending, our results are consistent with the separable structures found in two-stage bargaining and collective models of the household. Second, there are large biases in standard household Engel-curve estimates when compared to consistently aggregated sub-household estimates, though in differing degrees and directions depending on the type of commodity. The main source of bias is a household effect on sub-household spending behavior, though this is partially offset by a bias due to intra-household inequality, which emerges as a confounder in aggregating to the household level.
papers.zh_title: 解析家庭恩格尔曲线
papers.zh_abstract: 经典的Working-Leser家庭恩格尔曲线被解析，以揭示个人在商品间的预算分配，该分配是个人和家庭总支出的函数。在将我们的模型校准到塞内加尔一个不寻常的子家庭数据集时，出现了两个主要发现。首先，除教育支出外，我们的结果与家庭两阶段议价和集体模型中发现的可分离结构一致。其次，与一致加总的子家庭估计相比，标准家庭恩格尔曲线估计存在较大偏差，尽管偏差的程度和方向因商品类型而异。偏差的主要来源是家庭对子家庭支出行为的影响，但这部分被家庭内不平等导致的偏差所抵消，后者在加总到家庭层面时成为一个混杂因素。

papers.title: A Method to Estimate Discrete Choice Models that is Robust to Consumer Search
papers.authors: Jason Abaluck, Giovanni Compiani
papers.abstract: We state a sufficient condition under which choice data alone suffices to identify consumer preferences when choices are not fully informed. Suppose that: (i) the data generating process is a search model in which the attribute hidden to consumers is observed by the econometrician; (ii) if a consumer searches good j, she also searches goods which are better than j in terms of the non-hidden component of utility; and (iii) consumers choose the good that maximizes overall utility among searched goods. Canonical models will be biased: the value of the hidden attribute will be understated because consumers will be unresponsive to variation in the attribute for goods that they do not search. Under the conditions above and additional mild restrictions, an alternative method of recovering preferences using cross derivatives of choice probabilities succeeds regardless of the search protocol and is thus robust to whether consumers are informed. The approach nests several standard models, including full information. Our methods suggest natural tests for full information and can be used to forecast how consumers will respond to additional information. We verify in a lab experiment that our approach succeeds in recovering preferences when consumers engage in costly search.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, ED, EH, IO, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C5, C8, C9, D0, D6, D8
papers.zh_title: 一种对消费者搜寻具有稳健性的离散选择模型估计方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们陈述了一个充分条件，在该条件下，当选择并非完全知情时，仅凭选择数据就足以识别消费者偏好。假设：（i）数据生成过程是一个搜寻模型，其中对消费者隐藏的属性被计量经济学家观察到；（ii）如果消费者搜寻商品j，她也会搜寻在效用的非隐藏成分方面优于j的商品；（iii）消费者在搜寻到的商品中选择最大化总效用的商品。经典模型将存在偏差：隐藏属性的价值会被低估，因为消费者对未搜寻商品中该属性的变化没有反应。在上述条件和额外的温和限制下，一种利用选择概率交叉导数来恢复偏好的替代方法无论搜寻协议如何都能成功，因此对消费者是否知情具有稳健性。该方法包含了几种标准模型，包括完全信息模型。我们的方法为完全信息提供了自然的检验，并可用于预测消费者如何应对额外信息。我们通过一个实验室实验验证了，当消费者进行有成本搜寻时，我们的方法能够成功恢复偏好。

papers.title: The Weak State Trap
papers.authors: Leopoldo Fergusson, Carlos A. Molina, James A. Robinson
papers.abstract: Development outcomes come in ‘clusters’ that seem difficult to exit. Using original data from Colombia, we present evidence of the interconnection between two critical political components: state weakness and clientelism. State weakness creates the right environment for clientelism to flourish. Clientelism sets in place a structure of incentives for politicians and citizens that is detrimental to building state capacity. We show that vote buying, as a measure of clientelism, and tax evasion, as a measure of state weakness, are highly correlated at the micro level. We also report evidence that both practices are widely accepted in society, a result consistent with a deeply entrenched relationship of mutually reinforcing influences. Finally, we propose a set of mechanisms that underlie the hypothesis that a weak state and widespread clientelism are part of a political equilibrium with multiple feedback loops. Our results suggest that state weakness is a trap that is likely hard to exit.
papers.zh_title: 弱国家陷阱
papers.zh_abstract: 发展结果呈现出似乎难以摆脱的“集群”特征。利用来自哥伦比亚的原始数据，我们提供了国家软弱和庇护主义这两个关键政治组成部分相互关联的证据。国家软弱为庇护主义的繁荣创造了合适的环境。庇护主义则为政治家和公民建立了一套不利于国家能力建设的激励结构。我们表明，作为庇护主义衡量指标的贿选，与作为国家软弱衡量指标的逃税，在微观层面高度相关。我们还报告了证据，表明这两种做法在社会中被广泛接受，这一结果与根深蒂固的相互强化影响关系一致。最后，我们提出了一套机制，支撑了弱国家和普遍庇护主义是带有多个反馈循环的政治均衡一部分的假设。我们的结果表明，国家软弱是一个可能难以摆脱的陷阱。

papers.title: The Risk of Caution: Evidence from an R&D Experiment
papers.authors: Richard Carson, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Jordan Louviere, Sally Sadoff, Jeffrey G. Shrader Jr
papers.abstract: Innovation is important for firm performance and broader economic growth. But breakthrough innovations necessarily require greater risk-taking than more incremental approaches. To understand how managers respond to uncertainty when making research and development decisions, we conducted three experiments with master’s degree students in a program focused on the intersection of business and technology. Study participants were asked to choose whether to fund hypothetical research projects using a process that mirrors real-world research and development funding decisions. The experiments provided financial rewards that disproportionately encouraged the choice of higher-risk projects. Despite these incentives, most participants chose lower-risk projects at the expense of projects more likely to generate a large payoff. We also elicited participants’ personal risk preferences and found that decision-makers who are more tolerant of risk were more likely to fund breakthrough projects. The results suggest that the risk preferences of managers in charge of research investments may have an oversized effect on the rate of breakthrough innovation and the profitability of firms.
papers.zh_title: 谨慎的风险：来自研发实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 创新对企业绩效和更广泛的经济增长至关重要。但突破性创新必然需要比渐进式方法承担更大的风险。为了理解管理者在做出研发决策时如何应对不确定性，我们与一个专注于商业与技术交叉领域的硕士项目学生进行了三项实验。研究参与者被要求使用模拟现实世界研发资金决策的过程，选择是否资助假设的研究项目。这些实验提供了财务奖励，不成比例地鼓励选择高风险项目。尽管有这些激励，大多数参与者选择了低风险项目，而牺牲了更可能产生高回报的项目。我们还获取了参与者的个人风险偏好，发现对风险容忍度更高的决策者更有可能资助突破性项目。结果表明，负责研究投资的管理者的风险偏好可能对突破性创新的速度和公司盈利能力产生过大影响。

papers.title: Rebates in the Pharmaceutical Industry: Evidence from Medicines Sold in Retail Pharmacies in the U.S.
papers.authors: Pragya Kakani, Michael Chernew, Amitabh Chandra
papers.abstract: Rising list prices are often used to illustrate the burden of prescription drug spending, but payers routinely negotiate rebates from manufacturers that generate differences between list and net prices. List prices are easily available and affect patient cost-sharing, but net prices are confidential and affect innovation incentives. We use novel data on medicines sold in a retail setting to quantify rebate growth, the sensitivity of pharmaceutical price indices to list versus net prices, and contribution of net price growth to revenue growth. From 2012 to 2017, we find average rebates increased from 32% to 48%, owing entirely to growth in rebate-levels over a product lifetime rather than shifts towards high rebate products. Annual inflation of list prices was 12% while that of net prices was 3%, implying that financial rewards to manufacturers per unit sold have not grown proportionally to list prices. This pattern is mirrored in 19 of the 20 top drug classes by revenue including insulins, where list and net price inflation were 16% and 2% annually respectively. Finally, we find price growth explains 76% of revenue growth when measured by list prices but 31% of revenue growth when measured by net prices. Moreover, new product entry is the most important factor affecting pharmaceutical revenue growth. These findings provide a cautionary note on using list prices for policy analysis.
papers.zh_title: 制药行业的返利：来自美国零售药店销售药品的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 不断上涨的标价常被用来说明处方药支出的负担，但支付方通常会与制造商协商返利，这导致标价和净价之间存在差异。标价容易获取并影响患者自付费用，但净价是保密的并影响创新激励。我们使用关于零售环境中销售药品的新数据来量化返利增长、药品价格指数对标价与净价的敏感性，以及净价增长对收入增长的贡献。从2012年到2017年，我们发现平均返利从32%增加到48%，这完全归因于产品生命周期内返利水平的增长，而非向高返利产品的转变。标价的年通胀率为12%，而净价的年通胀率为3%，这意味着制造商每单位销售的财务回报并未与标价成比例增长。这一模式在按收入排名的前20大药品类别中的19个中得到了体现，包括胰岛素，其标价和净价年通胀率分别为16%和2%。最后，我们发现，当以标价衡量时，价格增长解释了76%的收入增长，但当以净价衡量时，仅解释了31%的收入增长。此外，新产品进入是影响制药收入增长的最重要因素。这些发现为在政策分析中使用标价提供了警示。

papers.title: The Macroeconomics of Epidemics
papers.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
papers.abstract: We extend the canonical epidemiology model to study the interaction between economic decisions and epidemics. Our model implies that people cut back on consumption and work to reduce the chances of being infected. These decisions reduce the severity of the epidemic but exacerbate the size of the associated recession. The competitive equilibrium is not socially optimal because infected people do not fully internalize the effect of their economic decisions on the spread of the virus. In our benchmark model, the best simple containment policy increases the severity of the recession but saves roughly half a million lives in the United States.
papers.zh_title: 流行病宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们扩展了经典流行病学模型，以研究经济决策与流行病之间的相互作用。我们的模型意味着，人们会减少消费和工作以降低被感染的机会。这些决策减轻了流行病的严重程度，但加剧了相关经济衰退的规模。竞争均衡并非社会最优，因为感染者没有完全内化其经济决策对病毒传播的影响。在我们的基准模型中，最佳简单遏制政策加剧了衰退的严重程度，但在美国挽救了大约50万人的生命。

papers.title: What Do We Learn From Cross-Regional Empirical Estimates in Macroeconomics?
papers.authors: Adam Guren, Alisdair McKay, Emi Nakamura, Jón Steinsson
papers.abstract: Recent empirical work uses variation across cities or regions to identify the effects of economic shocks of interest to macroeconomists. The interpretation of such estimates is complicated by the fact that they reflect both partial equilibrium and local general equilibrium effects of the shocks. We propose an approach for recovering estimates of partial equilibrium effects from these cross-regional empirical estimates. The basic idea is to divide the cross-regional estimate by an estimate of the local fiscal multiplier, which measures the strength of local general equilibrium amplification. We apply this approach to recent estimates of housing wealth effects based on city-level variation, and derive conditions under which the adjustment is exact. We then evaluate its accuracy in a richer general equilibrium model of consumption and housing. The paper also reconciles the positive cross-sectional correlation between house price growth and construction with the notion that cities with larger price volatility have lower housing supply elasticities using a model in which housing supply elasticities are more dispersed in the long run than in the short run.
papers.zh_title: 我们从宏观经济学的跨区域实证估计中学到了什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 最近的实证工作利用城市或地区间的差异来识别宏观经济学家感兴趣的经济冲击的影响。对这些估计的解释因它们同时反映了冲击的部分均衡和局部一般均衡效应而变得复杂。我们提出了一种方法，从这些跨区域实证估计中恢复部分均衡效应的估计值。基本思想是将跨区域估计值除以局部财政乘数的估计值，后者衡量了局部一般均衡放大的强度。我们将此方法应用于基于城市层面差异的住房财富效应的最新估计，并推导出调整精确成立的条件。然后，我们在一个更丰富的消费和住房一般均衡模型中评估其准确性。本文还通过一个模型，其中住房供给弹性在长期比短期更分散，调和了房价增长与建设之间的正向横截面相关性与价格波动较大的城市具有较低住房供给弹性的观点。

papers.title: Early Childhood Education and Life-cycle Health
papers.authors: Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman
papers.abstract: This paper forecasts the life-cycle treatment effects on health of a high-quality early childhood program. Our predictions combine microsimulation using non-experimental data with experimental data from a midlife long-term follow-up. The follow-up incorporated a full epidemiological exam. The program mainly benefits males and significantly reduces the prevalence of heart disease, stroke, cancer, and mortality across the life-cycle. For men, we estimate an average reduction of 3.8 disability-adjusted years (DALYs). The reduction in DALYs is relatively small for women. The gain in quality-adjusted life years (QALYs) is almost enough to offset all of the costs associated with program implementation for males and half of program costs for women.
papers.zh_title: 早期儿童教育与生命周期健康
papers.zh_abstract: 本文预测了一个高质量早期儿童项目对健康的生命周期处理效应。我们的预测结合了使用非实验数据的微观模拟和来自中年长期跟踪的实验数据。该跟踪包含了一次完整的流行病学检查。该项目主要惠及男性，并显著降低了整个生命周期中心脏病、中风、癌症的患病率和死亡率。对于男性，我们估计平均减少了3.8个残疾调整生命年。对于女性，残疾调整生命年的减少相对较小。质量调整生命年的增加几乎足以抵消男性项目实施的所有成本，以及女性项目成本的一半。

papers.title: Medical Spending, Bequests, and Asset Dynamics Around the Time of Death
papers.authors: John Bailey Jones, Mariacristina De Nardi, Eric French, Rory McGee, Rachel Rodgers
papers.abstract: Using data from the Health and Retirement Survey, we document the changes in assets that occur before a person's death. Applying an event study approach, we find that during the 6 years preceding their deaths, the assets of single decedents decline, relative to those of similar single survivors, by an additional $20,000 on average. Over the same time span, the assets of couples who lose a spouse fall, relative to those of similar surviving couples, by an additional $90,000 on average. Households experiencing a death also incur higher out-of-pocket medical spending and other end-of-life expenses. This elevated spending is sufficient to explain (in accounting terms) the asset declines observed for singles but falls short of explaining the declines observed for couples. Bequests from the dying spouse to non-spousal heirs such as children are more than sufficient to explain the remainder.
papers.zh_title: 死亡前后的医疗支出、遗产与资产动态
papers.zh_abstract: 利用健康与退休调查的数据，我们记录了个人死亡前发生的资产变化。应用事件研究方法，我们发现，在死亡前的6年间，单身逝者的资产相对于类似的单身幸存者平均额外减少了约20,000美元。在同一时间段内，失去配偶的夫妇的资产相对于类似的幸存夫妇平均额外减少了约90,000美元。经历死亡的家庭还承担了更高的自付医疗支出和其他临终费用。这种增加的支出足以（在会计意义上）解释单身者观察到的资产下降，但不足以解释夫妇观察到的下降。从逝者配偶到非配偶继承人（如子女）的遗产足以解释剩余部分。

papers.title: Gross Worker Flows and Fluctuations in the Aggregate Labor Market
papers.authors: Per Krusell, Toshihiko Mukoyama, Richard Rogerson, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: We build a three-state general equilibrium model of the aggregate labor market that features both standard labor supply forces and labor market frictions. Our model matches key features of the cyclical properties of employment, unemployment, and nonparticipation as well as those of gross worker flows across these three labor market states. Our key finding is that shocks to labor market frictions play a dominant role in accounting for labor market fluctuations. This is in contrast to the focus of the traditional RBC literature, which emphasized how employment fluctuations arise as a consequence of labor supply responses to price changes induced by TFP shocks.
papers.zh_title: 总劳动力市场中的总工人流动与波动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含标准劳动力供给力量和劳动力市场摩擦的总劳动力市场三状态一般均衡模型。我们的模型匹配了就业、失业和非参与以及这三个劳动力市场状态之间总工人流动的周期性特征的关键特征。我们的主要发现是，劳动力市场摩擦冲击在解释劳动力市场波动中起着主导作用。这与传统RBC文献的焦点形成对比，后者强调就业波动是如何作为对TFP冲击引起的价格变化的劳动力供给反应的结果而产生的。

papers.title: Comparing Alternative China and US Arrangements with CPTPP
papers.authors: Chunding Li, Xin Lin, John Whalley
papers.abstract: This paper builds a 29-country numerical general equilibrium model with inside money and trade cost to simulate and compare the effects of China and the US taking part in the Comprehensive and Progressive Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP), which is a high standard mega regional trade agreement. Comparison results show that China will benefit CPTPP member countries more than the US on trade, GDP, and manufacturing employment. China’s entering the CPTPP can also benefit most non-member countries on GDP and manufacturing employment. By joining, the US will benefit the whole world more, as the US economic scale is larger than that of China. Our simulation results reveal that China will be more welcomed to the CPTPP by member countries.
papers.zh_title: 中国和美国与CPTPP的替代安排比较
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个包含内部货币和贸易成本的29国数值一般均衡模型，以模拟和比较中国和美国加入《全面与进步跨太平洋伙伴关系协定》（CPTPP）的效果，该协定是一个高标准的大型区域贸易协定。比较结果表明，在贸易、GDP和制造业就业方面，中国比美国更能使CPTPP成员国受益。中国加入CPTPP也可以在GDP和制造业就业方面使大多数非成员国受益。通过加入，美国将使整个世界受益更多，因为美国的经济规模大于中国。我们的模拟结果显示，中国将更受CPTPP成员国的欢迎。

papers.title: Understanding Cross-country Differences in Health Status and Expenditures
papers.authors: Raquel Fonseca, François Langot, Pierre-Carl Michaud, Thepthida Sopraseuth
papers.abstract: Using a general equilibrium heterogeneous agent model featuring health production, we quantify the contribution of health price in explaining cross-country differences in health expenditures and health status. Considering other country-specific explanatory factors, U.S. health prices are estimated to be 33% higher than those of European countries. This price differential explains more than 60% of the difference in health expenditures and more than half of the difference in health status between Europe and the U.S. Despite its large impact at the aggregate level, these price differences increase the lifetime cost of living of Americans by two percentage points.
papers.zh_title: 理解健康状况与医疗支出的跨国差异
papers.zh_abstract: 通过一个包含健康生产的一般均衡异质性主体模型，我们量化了健康价格在解释跨国医疗支出与健康状况差异中的贡献。在考虑其他国别特定解释因素后，美国健康价格估计比欧洲国家高出33%。这一价格差异解释了欧美之间医疗支出差异的60%以上，以及健康状况差异的一半以上。尽管在总体层面影响巨大，但这些价格差异使美国人的终身生活成本增加了两个百分点。

papers.title: Same-Sex Couples and the Marital Surplus: The Importance of the Legal Environment
papers.authors: Daniel S. Hamermesh, Scott Delhommer
papers.abstract: Same-sex couples’ marital surplus, their excess total income over that predicted by their work times and predicted wages, increases little as the duration of their relationship lengthens. When/where same-sex marriage is legal, it rises sharply as duration increases. The availability of legal domestic partnership or civil union has no effect on the surplus. The likelihood of home ownership conditional on demographic characteristics also increases with partnerships’ duration only when/where same-sex marriage is legal. These results, based on data from the American Community Survey 2013-17, support the notion that greater legal protection enhances partners’ incentives to invest in their relationship.
papers.zh_title: 同性伴侣与婚姻剩余：法律环境的重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 同性伴侣的婚姻剩余——即其总收入超过基于工作时间与预测工资所预期水平的部分——随着关系持续时间的延长而增长甚微。当同性婚姻合法时，该剩余随持续时间延长而急剧上升。合法同居伴侣或民事结合的可得性对剩余没有影响。基于人口特征的住房拥有概率也仅在同性婚姻合法时随伴侣关系持续时间增加而上升。这些基于2013-17年美国社区调查数据的结果支持了更强法律保护能增强伴侣关系投资激励的观点。

papers.title: Harry Johnson’s “Case for Flexible Exchange Rates” – 50 Years Later
papers.authors: Maurice Obstfeld
papers.abstract: Fifty years ago, Harry G. Johnson published “The Case for Flexible Exchange Rates, 1969,” its title echoing Milton Friedman’s classic essay of the early 1950s. Though somewhat forgotten today, Johnson’s reprise was an important element in the late 1960s debate over the future of the international monetary system. The present paper has three objectives. The first is to lay out the historical context in which Johnson’s “Case” was written and read. The second is to examine Johnson’s main points and see how they stand up to nearly five decades of experience with floating exchange rates since the end of the Bretton Woods system. The third is to review the most recent academic critiques of exchange-rate flexibility and ask how fatal they are to Johnson’s basic argument. I conclude that the essential case for exchange rate flexibility still stands strong.
papers.zh_title: 哈里·约翰逊的“浮动汇率案例”——50年后
papers.zh_abstract: 五十年前，哈里·G·约翰逊发表了《浮动汇率案例，1969》，其标题呼应了米尔顿·弗里德曼1950年代初的经典文章。尽管如今有些被遗忘，约翰逊的这篇重述在1960年代末关于国际货币体系未来的辩论中是一个重要元素。本文有三个目标。第一是阐述约翰逊《案例》写作与阅读时的历史背景。第二是审视约翰逊的主要观点，并考察它们在布雷顿森林体系终结后近五十年的浮动汇率经验中是否依然成立。第三是回顾学术界对汇率灵活性的最新批评，并评估它们对约翰逊基本论点的致命程度。我得出结论：汇率灵活性的基本案例依然稳固。

papers.title: Market Design, Human Behavior, and Management
papers.authors: Yan Chen, Peter Cramton, John A. List, Axel Ockenfels
papers.abstract: We review past research and discuss future directions on how the vibrant research areas of market design and behavioral economics have influenced and will continue to impact the science and practice of management in both the private and public sectors. Using examples from various auction markets, reputation and feedback systems in online markets, matching markets in education, and labor markets, we demonstrate that combining market design theory, behavioral insights, and experimental methods can lead to fruitful implementation of superior market designs in practice.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS；JEL：C91, C93, D4, D47, D9
papers.zh_title: 市场设计、人类行为与管理
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了过去的研究，并讨论了市场设计和行为经济学这两个活跃研究领域如何影响并将继续影响私营和公共部门管理的科学与实践的未来方向。通过来自各种拍卖市场、在线市场的声誉与反馈系统、教育匹配市场以及劳动力市场的例子，我们证明了将市场设计理论、行为洞察和实验方法相结合，可以在实践中实现更优市场设计的富有成效的实施。

papers.title: FRED-QD: A Quarterly Database for Macroeconomic Research
papers.authors: Michael McCracken, Serena Ng
papers.abstract: In this paper we present and describe a large quarterly frequency, macroeconomic database. The data provided are closely modeled to that used in Stock and Watson (2012a). As in our previous work on FRED-MD, our goal is simply to provide a publicly available source of macroeconomic “big data” that is updated in real time using the FRED database. We show that factors extracted from this data set exhibit similar behavior to those extracted from the original Stock and Watson data set. The dominant factors are shown to be insensitive to outliers, but outliers do affect the relative influence of the series as indicated by leverage scores. We then investigate the role unit root tests play in the choice of transformation codes with an emphasis on identifying instances in which the unit root-based codes differ from those already used in the literature. Finally, we show that factors extracted from our data set are useful for forecasting a range of macroeconomic series and that the choice of transformation codes can contribute substantially to the accuracy of these forecasts.
papers.zh_title: FRED-QD：一个用于宏观经济研究的季度数据库
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们介绍并描述了一个大型季度频率宏观经济数据库。所提供的数据与Stock和Watson（2012a）中使用的数据紧密相似。正如我们之前关于FRED-MD的工作一样，我们的目标仅仅是提供一个使用FRED数据库实时更新的、公开可用的宏观经济“大数据”来源。我们表明，从该数据集中提取的因子表现出与从原始Stock和Watson数据集中提取的因子相似的行为。主导因子对异常值不敏感，但异常值确实会影响序列的相对影响，如杠杆分数所示。然后，我们研究了单位根检验在转换代码选择中的作用，重点识别了基于单位根的代码与文献中已使用的代码不同的情况。最后，我们表明，从我们的数据集中提取的因子对于预测一系列宏观经济序列是有用的，并且转换代码的选择可以对这些预测的准确性产生显著贡献。

papers.title: Out of the Woodwork: Enrollment Spillovers in the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment
papers.authors: Adam Sacarny, Katherine Baicker, Amy Finkelstein
papers.abstract: We analyze the impact of expanded adult Medicaid eligibility on the Medicaid enrollment of already-eligible children. To do so, we exploit the 2008 Oregon Medicaid lottery, in which some low-income uninsured adults were randomly selected for the chance to apply for Medicaid. Children in these households were eligible for Medicaid irrespective of whether the household won the lottery. We estimate statistically significant but transitory impacts of adult lottery selection on children’s Medicaid enrollment: for every 9 adults who enroll in Medicaid due to the lottery, one additional child also enrolls at the same time. Our results shed light on the existence, magnitude, and nature of so-called “woodwork effects”.
papers.zh_title: 从暗处涌现：俄勒冈健康保险实验中的参保溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了扩大成人医疗补助资格对已有资格儿童医疗补助参保的影响。为此，我们利用了2008年俄勒冈医疗补助抽签，其中一些低收入无保险成年人被随机选中获得申请医疗补助的机会。这些家庭中的儿童无论家庭是否中签都有资格获得医疗补助。我们估计了成人中签对儿童医疗补助参保的统计显著但暂时的影响：每9名因抽签而参保医疗补助的成年人中，就有1名儿童同时额外参保。我们的结果揭示了所谓的“木工效应”的存在、程度和性质。

papers.title: German Long-Term Health Insurance: Theory Meets Evidence
papers.authors: Juan Pablo Atal, Hanming Fang, Martin Karlsson, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
papers.abstract: German long-term health insurance (GLTHI) represents the largest market for private long-term health insurance contracts in the world. We show that GLTHI’s contract design coincides with the optimal dynamic contract for individuals with constant lifetime income profiles. After estimating the key ingredients of a life-cycle model, we find that, under a variety of assumptions, GLTHI achieves welfare that is at most 4% lower than for the optimal contract. Relative to the gains of replacing short-term contracts with either long-term contract, this welfare gap is smallest when reclassification risk is high.
papers.zh_title: 德国长期健康保险：理论与证据的相遇
papers.zh_abstract: 德国长期健康保险（GLTHI）是世界上最大的私人长期健康保险合同市场。我们表明，GLTHI的合同设计与具有恒定终身收入曲线的个人的最优动态合同一致。在估计了生命周期模型的关键要素后，我们发现，在各种假设下，GLTHI实现的福利最多比最优合同低4%。相对于用任何一种长期合同替代短期合同所带来的收益，当重分类风险高时，这一福利差距最小。

papers.title: Chain Restaurant Calorie Posting Laws, Obesity, and Consumer Welfare
papers.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, David E. Frisvold, David Jimenez-Gomez, Mariétou Ouayogodé, Michael Price
papers.abstract: The 2010 Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act (ACA) introduced a mandate requiring chain restaurants to post calorie counts on menus and menu boards. This paper investigates whether and why calorie posting laws work. To do so, we develop a model of calories consumed that highlights two potential channels through which mandates influence choice and outlines an empirical strategy to disentangle these alternatives. We test the predictions of our model using data from the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System to compare changes in body mass index (BMI), obesity, and consumer well-being in locations that implemented calorie-posting laws between 2008 and 2011 to those in neighboring locations without such laws. We find that calorie mandates lead to a small but statistically significant reduction in average BMI of 0.2 kg/m² (1.5 pounds) and reductions in self-reported measures of life satisfaction. Quantile regressions provide evidence that reductions in BMI and life satisfaction are concentrated among those with healthy weight. Viewed in its totality, the pattern of results is consistent with an economic model in which calorie labels influence consumers both by providing information and by imposing a welfare-reducing moral cost on unhealthy eating.
papers.zh_title: 连锁餐厅卡路里标示法、肥胖与消费者福利
papers.zh_abstract: 2010年《患者保护与平价医疗法案》（ACA）引入了一项强制要求，规定连锁餐厅必须在菜单和菜单板上标示卡路里数量。本文研究了卡路里标示法是否有效以及为何有效。为此，我们建立了一个卡路里消费模型，突出了强制要求影响选择的两个潜在渠道，并概述了区分这些替代方案的实证策略。我们使用行为风险因素监测系统的数据，比较了2008年至2011年间实施卡路里标示法的地区与没有此类法律的邻近地区在身体质量指数（BMI）、肥胖和消费者福祉方面的变化，从而检验了模型的预测。我们发现，卡路里强制要求导致平均BMI小幅但统计显著地降低了0.2 kg/m²（1.5磅），并降低了自我报告的生活满意度指标。分位数回归提供的证据表明，BMI和生活满意度的降低集中在体重健康的人群中。总体来看，这一结果模式与一个经济模型一致，在该模型中，卡路里标签既通过提供信息影响消费者，也通过对不健康饮食施加降低福利的道德成本来影响消费者。

papers.title: Migration Costs and Observational Returns to Migration in the Developing World
papers.authors: David Lagakos, Samuel Marshall, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak, Corey Vernot, Michael E. Waugh
papers.abstract: Recent studies find that observational returns to rural-urban migration are near zero in three developing countries. We revisit this result using panel tracking surveys from six countries, finding higher returns on average. We then interpret these returns in a multi-region Roy model with heterogeneity in migration costs. In the model, the observational return to migration confounds the urban premium and the individual benefits of migrants, and is not directly informative about the welfare gain from lowering migration costs. Patterns of regional heterogeneity in returns, and a comparison of experimental to observational returns, are consistent with the model’s predictions.
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家的迁移成本与迁移的观测回报
papers.zh_abstract: 近期研究发现，在三个发展中国家，农村到城市迁移的观测回报率接近于零。我们利用来自六个国家的面板追踪调查数据重新审视这一结果，发现平均回报率更高。随后，我们在一个包含迁移成本异质性的多区域Roy模型中解释这些回报。在该模型中，迁移的观测回报混淆了城市溢价与迁移者的个体收益，并不能直接反映降低迁移成本所带来的福利改善。回报的区域异质性模式，以及实验回报与观测回报的比较，均与模型的预测一致。

papers.title: What Will Be the Economic Impact of COVID-19 in the US? Rough Estimates of Disease Scenarios
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson
papers.abstract: This note is intended to introduce economists to a simple SIR model of the progression of COVID-19 in the United States over the next 12-18 months.
