An SIR model is a Markov model of the spread of an epidemic in a population in which the total population is divided into categories of being susceptible to the disease (S), actively infected with the disease (I), and recovered (or dead) and no longer contagious (R). How an epidemic plays out over time is determined by the transition rates between these three states. This model allows for quantitative statements regarding the tradeoff between the severity and timing of suppression of the disease through social distancing and the progression of the disease in the population. Example applications of the model are provided. Special attention is given to the question of if and when the fraction of active infections in the population exceeds 1% (at which point the health system is forecast to be severely challenged) and 10% (which may result in severe staffing shortages for key financial and economic infrastructure) as well as the cumulative burden of the disease over an 18 month horizon.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19对美国经济的影响将是什么？基于疾病情景的粗略估计
papers.zh_abstract: 本文旨在向经济学家介绍一个简单的SIR模型，用于模拟未来12至18个月内COVID-19在美国的传播进程。SIR模型是一个马尔可夫模型，描述流行病在人群中的传播，其中总人口被分为易感人群（S）、活跃感染人群（I）以及康复（或死亡）且不再具有传染性的人群（R）。流行病随时间如何发展，取决于这三个状态之间的转换率。该模型能够对通过社交距离抑制疾病的严重程度与时机，以及疾病在人群中的传播进程之间的权衡，进行定量分析。本文提供了该模型的应用示例。特别关注以下问题：活跃感染人口比例何时以及是否超过1%（届时预计医疗系统将面临严峻挑战）和10%（可能导致关键金融和经济基础设施出现严重人员短缺），以及18个月时间跨度内疾病的累积负担。

papers.title: The Coronavirus and the Great Influenza Pandemic: Lessons from the “Spanish Flu” for the Coronavirus’s Potential Effects on Mortality and Economic Activity
papers.authors: Robert J. Barro, José F. Ursúa, Joanna Weng
papers.abstract: Mortality and economic contraction during the 1918-1920 Great Influenza Pandemic provide plausible upper bounds for outcomes under the coronavirus (COVID-19). Data for 48 countries imply flu-related deaths in 1918-1920 of 40 million, 2.1 percent of world population, implying 150 million deaths when applied to current population. Regressions with annual information on flu deaths 1918-1920 and war deaths during WWI imply flu-generated economic declines for GDP and consumption in the typical country of 6 and 8 percent, respectively. There is also some evidence that higher flu death rates decreased realized real returns on stocks and, especially, on short-term government bills.
papers.zh_title: 冠状病毒与1918年大流感：从“西班牙流感”看冠状病毒对死亡率和经济活动的潜在影响
papers.zh_abstract: 1918-1920年大流感期间的死亡率和经济收缩，为冠状病毒（COVID-19）可能造成的结果提供了合理的上限。来自48个国家的数据显示，1918-1920年流感相关死亡人数为4000万，占世界人口的2.1%，若按当前人口计算，则相当于1.5亿人死亡。利用1918-1920年流感死亡人数和第一次世界大战期间战争死亡人数的年度信息进行的回归分析表明，在典型国家，流感导致的GDP和消费经济下降幅度分别为6%和8%。还有一些证据表明，较高的流感死亡率降低了股票，尤其是短期政府债券的实际实现回报率。

papers.title: International Transactions: Real Trade and Factor Flows between 1700 and 1870
papers.authors: Wolfgang Keller, Markus Lampe, Carol H. Shiue
papers.abstract: This paper describes broad regional and temporal trends in the evolution of international trade and international factor flows between 1700 and 1870, including key differences in trade costs across space and time. We find trade links in Western Europe and the European colonies of North America intensified at the same time these regions experienced the initial industrial revolution and the spread of industrialization, which led to sustained economic growth. At the same time, global differences in specialization and income emerged. To understand the contribution of global market forces, as well as colonialism to these differences, the chapter lays out theoretical reasons for links between trade and economic growth and examines related historical arguments and evidence. We conclude that trade contributed to global divergence, but the magnitude and mechanisms through which trade affected global welfare lies not so much in the direct impact of trade and specialization, but in multiplier effects emerging from the interactions of trade with other factors that affect economic development.
papers.zh_title: 国际交易：1700年至1870年间的实际贸易与要素流动
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了1700年至1870年间国际贸易和国际要素流动演变的广泛区域与时间趋势，包括贸易成本在空间和时间上的关键差异。我们发现，西欧和北美欧洲殖民地的贸易联系在同一时期加强，这些地区经历了最初的工业革命和工业化的扩散，从而导致了持续的经济增长。与此同时，全球范围内的专业化和收入差异也随之出现。为了理解全球市场力量以及殖民主义对这些差异的贡献，本章阐述了贸易与经济增长之间联系的理论原因，并考察了相关的历史论点和证据。我们得出结论，贸易促进了全球分化，但贸易影响全球福利的幅度和机制，与其说在于贸易和专业化的直接影响，不如说在于贸易与其他影响经济发展的因素相互作用所产生的乘数效应。

papers.title: Can Mentoring Help Female Assistant Professors in Economics? An Evaluation by Randomized Trial
papers.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Janet Currie, Francine D. Blau, Rachel Croson
papers.abstract: Women continue to be underrepresented in academic ranks in the economics profession. The Committee on the Status of Women in the Economics Profession of the American Economics Association established the CeMENT mentoring workshop to support women in research careers. The program was designed as a randomized controlled trial. This study evaluates differences between the treatment and control groups in career outcomes. Results indicate that relative to women in the control group, treated women are more likely to stay in academia and more likely to have received tenure in an institution ranked in the top 30 or 50 in economics in the world.\n
papers.zh_title: 导师制能否帮助经济学领域的女性助理教授？一项随机试验的评估
papers.zh_abstract: 在经济学界，女性在学术职位中的代表性仍然不足。美国经济学会经济学界女性地位委员会设立了CeMENT导师制研讨会，以支持女性从事研究职业。该项目被设计为一项随机对照试验。本研究评估了处理组和对照组在职业成果上的差异。结果表明，与对照组中的女性相比，接受处理的女性更有可能留在学术界，并且更有可能在全球经济学排名前30或前50的机构中获得终身教职。

papers.title: Occupational Skill Premia around the World: New Data, Patterns and Drivers
papers.authors: David Kunst, Richard B. Freeman, Remco Oostendorp
papers.abstract: Firms hire workers to undertake tasks and activities associated with particular occupations, which makes occupations a fundamental unit in economic analyses of the labor market. Using a unique dataset on pay in identically defined occupations in developing and advanced countries, we find that in most countries occupational skill premia narrowed substantially from the 1950s to the 1980s, then widened through the 2000s, creating a U-shaped pattern of change. The narrowing was due in part to the huge worldwide increase in the supply of educated workers. The subsequent widening was due in part to the weakening of trade unions and a shift in demand to more skilled workers associated with rising trade. The data indicate that supply, demand, and institutional forces are all drivers of occupational skill premia, ruling out simple single factor explanations of change. The paper concludes with a call for improving the collection of occupational wage data to understand future changes in the world of work.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：F1, I2, J2, J3, J5, O3
papers.zh_title: 全球职业技能溢价：新数据、模式与驱动因素
papers.zh_abstract: 企业雇佣工人来执行与特定职业相关的任务和活动，这使得职业成为劳动力市场经济分析的基本单位。利用发展中国家和发达国家中定义相同的职业薪酬的独特数据集，我们发现，在大多数国家，职业技能溢价从1950年代到1980年代大幅收窄，随后在2000年代再次扩大，形成了U型变化模式。收窄的部分原因是全球范围内受教育工人供给的巨大增长。随后的扩大部分是由于工会力量的削弱，以及与贸易增长相关的对技能工人需求的转变。数据表明，供给、需求和制度力量都是职业技能溢价的驱动因素，排除了单一因素解释变化的可能性。本文最后呼吁改进职业工资数据的收集，以理解未来工作世界的变化。

papers.title: Expectations, reference points, and compliance with COVID-19 social distancing measures
papers.authors: Guglielmo Briscese, Nicola Lacetera, Mario Macis, Mirco Tonin
papers.abstract: We surveyed representative samples of Italian residents at three critical points in the COVID-19 pandemic, to test whether and how intentions to comply with social-isolation restrictions respond to the duration of their possible extension. Individuals reported being more likely to reduce, and less likely to increase, their self-isolation effort if negatively surprised by a given hypothetical extension (i.e., if the extension is longer than what they expected), whereas positive surprises had no impact. These results are consistent with reference-dependent preferences, with individual expectations serving as a reference point, and loss aversion. Our findings indicate that public authorities should carefully manage expectations about policy measures and account for behavioral reactions to deviations from previous announcements.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：C42, D91, H12, H41, I12
papers.zh_title: 预期、参照点与COVID-19社交距离措施的遵从度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在COVID-19大流行的三个关键时间点对意大利居民的代表性样本进行了调查，以检验遵守社交隔离限制的意愿如何对其可能延长的持续时间做出反应。个体报告称，如果给定的假设延长（即延长时间超出其预期）令其感到负面意外，则他们更可能减少、而非增加自我隔离的努力，而正面意外则没有影响。这些结果与参照依赖偏好（以个体预期作为参照点）和损失厌恶相一致。我们的发现表明，公共当局应谨慎管理对政策措施的预期，并考虑对先前公告偏差的行为反应。

papers.title: A Fisherian Approach to Financial Crises: Lessons from the Sudden Stops Literature
papers.authors: Javier Bianchi, Enrique G. Mendoza
papers.abstract: Sudden Stops are financial crises defined by a large, sudden current-account reversal. They occur in both advanced and emerging economies and result in deep recessions, collapsing asset prices, and real exchange-rate depreciations. They are preceded by economic expansions, current-account deficits, credit booms, and appreciated asset prices and real exchange rates. Fisherian models (i.e. models with credit constraints linked to market prices) explain these stylized facts as an outcome of Irving Fisher's debt-deflation mechanism. On the normative side, these models feature a pecuniary externality that provides a foundation for macroprudential policy (MPP). We review the stylized facts of Sudden Stops, the evidence on MPP use and effectiveness, and the findings of the literature on Fisherian models. Quantitatively, Fisherian amplification is strong and optimal MPP reduces sharply the size and frequency of crises, but it is also complex and potentially time-inconsistent, and simple MPP rules are less effective. We also provide a new MPP analysis incorporating investment. Using a constant debt-tax policy, we construct a crisis probability-output frontier showing that there is a tradeoff between financial stability and long-run output (i.e., reducing the probability of crises reduces long-run output).
papers.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：E3, E37, E44, F41, G01, G18
papers.zh_title: 金融危机的费雪方法：来自突然停止文献的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 突然停止是指由大规模、突然的经常账户逆转所定义的金融危机。它们既发生在发达经济体也发生在新兴经济体，并导致深度衰退、资产价格崩溃和实际汇率贬值。它们之前伴随着经济扩张、经常账户赤字、信贷繁荣以及资产价格和实际汇率升值。费雪模型（即与市场价格相关的信贷约束模型）将这些典型事实解释为欧文·费雪债务通缩机制的结果。在规范方面，这些模型具有一种货币外部性，为宏观审慎政策提供了基础。我们回顾了突然停止的典型事实、宏观审慎政策使用和有效性的证据，以及费雪模型文献的发现。定量来看，费雪放大效应很强，最优宏观审慎政策大幅降低了危机的规模和频率，但它也很复杂且可能具有时间不一致性，而简单的宏观审慎政策规则效果较差。我们还提供了一个包含投资的新宏观审慎政策分析。使用恒定债务税政策，我们构建了一个危机概率-产出前沿，表明金融稳定与长期产出之间存在权衡（即降低危机概率会减少长期产出）。

papers.title: The Gender Gap in Housing Returns
papers.authors: Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Kelly Shue
papers.abstract: Housing wealth represents the dominant form of savings for American households. Using detailed data on housing transactions across the United States since 1991, we find that single men earn 1.5 percentage points higher unlevered returns per year on housing relative to single women. The gender gap grows significantly larger after accounting for mortgage borrowing: men earn 7.9 percentage points higher levered returns per year relative to women. Approximately 45% of the gap in housing returns can be explained by gender differences in the location and timing of transactions. The remaining gap arises primarily from gender differences in execution prices: data on repeat sales reveal that women buy the same property for approximately 2% more and sell for 2% less. Women experience worse execution prices because of differences in the choice of initial list price and negotiated discount relative to the list price. Gender differences in upgrade and maintenance rates, and preferences for housing characteristics and listing agents appear to be less important factors. Overall, the gender gap in housing returns is economically large and can explain 30% of the gender gap in wealth accumulation at retirement.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, LS；JEL：D14, D31, G4, G51, J16, R2
papers.zh_title: 住房回报的性别差距
papers.zh_abstract: 住房财富是美国家庭储蓄的主要形式。利用1991年以来美国各地住房交易的详细数据，我们发现单身男性每年在住房上的无杠杆回报率比单身女性高出1.5个百分点。在考虑抵押贷款借款后，性别差距显著扩大：男性每年获得的杠杆回报率比女性高出7.9个百分点。大约45%的住房回报差距可以由交易地点和时间的性别差异解释。剩余的差距主要源于执行价格的性别差异：重复销售数据显示，女性购买同一房产的价格大约高出2%，而卖出价格低2%。女性之所以获得更差的执行价格，是因为在初始挂牌价格的选择以及相对于挂牌价格的议价折扣方面存在差异。升级和维护率、对住房特征和挂牌代理商的偏好等方面的性别差异似乎是不太重要的因素。总体而言，住房回报的性别差距在经济上很大，可以解释退休时财富积累性别差距的30%。

papers.title: On the Representativeness of Voter Turnout
papers.authors: Louis Kaplow, Scott Duke Kominers
papers.abstract: In prominent voting models, expected pivotality drives voters’ turnout decisions and hence determines voting outcomes. In practice, many individuals turn out for reasons unrelated to pivotality, and their votes overwhelm the forces analyzed in pivotality-based models. Accordingly, we examine a model of large-N elections at the opposite end of the spectrum, where pivotality effects vanish and turnout is driven entirely by individuals’ direct costs and benefits from the act of voting itself. Under certain conditions, the level of turnout is irrelevant to representativeness—and thus to outcomes. Under others, “anything is possible:” for any distribution of underlying preferences, any other distribution of preferences in the turnout set—and thus any voting outcome—can arise. We characterize particular skews in terms of representativeness and offer limiting results. These results sharpen and in some respects redirect applied work examining voter turnout, with an emphasis on underlying determinants of representativeness.
papers.zh_title: 论选民投票率的代表性
papers.zh_abstract: 在著名的投票模型中，预期的关键性驱动选民的投票决策，从而决定投票结果。在实践中，许多人出于与关键性无关的原因投票，他们的选票压倒了基于关键性模型所分析的力量。因此，我们考察了一个大N选举模型，该模型处于光谱的另一端，其中关键性效应消失，投票完全由个体投票行为本身的直接成本和收益驱动。在某些条件下，投票率水平与代表性无关，从而也与结果无关。在其他条件下，“一切皆有可能”：对于任何潜在偏好分布，投票集中任何其他偏好分布（从而任何投票结果）都可能出现。我们根据代表性描述了特定的偏差，并提供了极限结果。这些结果使考察投票率的应用研究更加精确，并在某些方面重新调整了方向，重点强调了代表性的潜在决定因素。

papers.title: The Economics of Nicotine Consumption
papers.authors: Dean R. Lillard
papers.abstract: The development of nicotine replacement therapies and e-cigarettes emphasize and highlight that, in tobacco demand, nicotine is one of, if not, the primary object people want. This chapter presents a simple model of utility maximization that focuses specifically on nicotine as the object of interest. It yields a derived demand for a nicotine delivery technology and predictions researchers can use to account for patterns in consumption over the life-cycle of individuals and the market as a whole. The model is informed by available evidence about the neurological effects of nicotine and differences in the relative efficiency and associated physical costs of nicotine delivery devices, and genetic differences across individuals that partly explains variation in nicotine consumption. The analysis highlights that one of the key theoretical objects of interest is the price per unit of nicotine delivered to the brain. The limited empirical literature on e-cigarettes does not measure that price. All told, economists have much to offer in modeling and empirically studying demand for the new nicotine delivery products. In addition, a range of studies could look back, reconfigure prices and measured consumption, to better explain patterns in historical time-series data on consumption and substitution across different nicotine delivery devices.
papers.zh_title: 尼古丁消费经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 尼古丁替代疗法和电子烟的发展强调并凸显了，在烟草需求中，尼古丁是人们想要的主要对象（如果不是唯一对象）。本章提出了一个简单的效用最大化模型，专门将尼古丁作为关注对象。它产生了对尼古丁输送技术的派生需求，以及研究者可用于解释个体生命周期和整个市场消费模式的预测。该模型基于关于尼古丁神经效应的现有证据、尼古丁输送设备相对效率和相关物理成本的差异，以及部分解释尼古丁消费变异的个体间遗传差异。分析强调，关键的理论对象之一是每单位输送到大脑的尼古丁价格。关于电子烟的有限实证文献并未衡量该价格。总而言之，经济学家在建模和实证研究新型尼古丁输送产品的需求方面大有可为。此外，一系列研究可以回顾过去，重新配置价格和测量消费，以更好地解释历史时间序列数据中不同尼古丁输送设备消费和替代的模式。

papers.title: Taming the Bias Zoo
papers.authors: Hongqi Liu, Cameron Peng, Wei A. Xiong, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: The success of the behavioral economics literature has led to a new challenge—a large number of behavioral biases offering observationally similar predictions for a targeted anomaly in financial markets. To tame the bias zoo, we propose a new approach of combining subjective survey responses with observational data; this approach has the advantage of being robust to question-specific biases introduced through surveys. We illustrate this approach by administering a nationwide survey of Chinese retail investors to elicit their trading motives. In cross-sectional regressions of respondents’ actual turnover on survey-based measures of trading motives, perceived information advantage and gambling preference dominate other motives, even though they are not the most prevalent biases simply based on survey responses.
papers.zh_title: 驯服偏差动物园
papers.zh_abstract: 行为经济学文献的成功带来了一个新的挑战——大量行为偏差为金融市场中的特定异常提供了观察上相似的预测。为了驯服偏差动物园，我们提出了一种将主观调查回应与观测数据相结合的新方法；这种方法具有对通过调查引入的特定问题偏差稳健的优点。我们通过实施一项针对中国散户投资者的全国性调查来引出其交易动机，以此说明这种方法。在受访者实际换手率对基于调查的交易动机指标的横截面回归中，感知信息优势和赌博偏好主导了其他动机，尽管它们并非仅基于调查回应的最普遍偏差。

papers.title: Do College Applicants Respond to Changes in Sticker Prices Even When They Don't Matter?
papers.authors: Phillip B. Levine, Jennifer Ma, Lauren C. Russell
papers.abstract: Do students respond to sticker prices or actual prices when applying to college? These costs differ for students eligible for financial aid. Students who do not understand this may not apply to some colleges because of the perceived high cost. We test for this form of “sticker shock” using College Board data on SAT scores sends, as a proxy for applications, to state flagship institutions for students entering college in 2006–2013. Some public flagships guarantee financial aid will meet full financial need. Sticker price increases at those schools would not affect the actual cost after factoring in financial aid and should not affect decisions for those eligible for aid. We exploit the large and variable increases in sticker prices at public flagships during the financial crisis generated from state budget shortfalls. We also control for local labor market conditions to abstract from the recession’s impact on individual educational decisions. We find evidence of sticker shock — students unaffected by virtue of institutional aid policies still apply less often. Using data from the National Student Clearinghouse, we also find that price increases at public flagships reduce enrollment of high achieving students, regardless of financial aid status, who often choose private colleges instead.
papers.zh_title: 大学申请者会对即使无关紧要的标价变化做出反应吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 学生在申请大学时是对标价还是实际价格做出反应？对于有资格获得经济援助的学生来说，这些成本是不同的。不理解这一点的学生可能因为感知到的高成本而不申请某些大学。我们利用大学理事会关于SAT成绩发送的数据（作为申请的代理变量）来检验这种“标价冲击”形式，研究对象是2006-2013年入学的州立旗舰大学学生。一些公立旗舰大学保证经济援助将满足全部经济需求。这些学校的标价上涨不会影响考虑经济援助后的实际成本，因此不应影响有资格获得援助的学生的决策。我们利用了金融危机期间因州预算短缺导致的公立旗舰大学标价的大幅且多变上涨。我们还控制了当地劳动力市场状况，以抽象掉经济衰退对个人教育决策的影响。我们发现标价冲击的证据——因机构援助政策而不受影响的学生仍然较少申请。利用国家学生信息中心的数据，我们还发现公立旗舰大学的价格上涨减少了高成就学生的入学率，无论其经济援助状况如何，这些学生通常转而选择私立大学。

papers.title: The Incubator of Human Capital: The NBER and the Rise of the Human Capital Paradigm
papers.authors: Claudia Goldin, Lawrence F. Katz
papers.abstract: The human capital construct is deep in the bones of economics and finds reference by many classical economists, even if they did not use the phrase. The term “human capital,” seldom mentioned in economics before the 1950s, increased in usage starting in the 1960s. By the early 2000s, about 20% of all books concerned with economics mentioned the phrase human capital. In the early 1980s, about 15% of NBER working papers referenced human capital whereas just 6% of all economics articles did. Today the figure for the NBER exceeds 25% and is 20% among all economics articles. The concept of human capital is part of almost every field of economics. The NBER played an outsized role in the rise of the concept of human capital mainly because of its emphasis on empiricism. We explore how the NBER was an incubator of human capital research and the ways human capital theory transformed and broadened its research agenda.
papers.zh_title: 人力资本的孵化器：NBER与人力资本范式的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 人力资本概念深深植根于经济学中，许多古典经济学家都曾提及，即使他们没有使用这个短语。“人力资本”一词在20世纪50年代之前的经济学中很少被提及，从20世纪60年代开始使用频率增加。到21世纪初，大约20%的经济学相关书籍提到了人力资本这一短语。在20世纪80年代初，大约15%的NBER工作论文引用了人力资本，而所有经济学文章中只有6%这样做。如今，NBER的这一数字超过25%，在所有经济学文章中为20%。人力资本概念几乎存在于经济学的每个领域。NBER在人力资本概念的兴起中发挥了超常作用，主要是因为其对经验主义的强调。我们探讨了NBER如何成为人力资本研究的孵化器，以及人力资本理论如何转变并拓宽了其研究议程。

papers.title: Banking Crises without Panics
papers.authors: Matthew Baron, Emil Verner, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: We examine historical banking crises through the lens of bank equity declines, which cover a broad sample of episodes of banking distress both with and without banking panics. To do this, we construct a new dataset on bank equity returns and narrative information on banking panics for 46 countries over the period 1870-2016. We find that even in the absence of panics, large bank equity declines are associated with substantial credit contractions and output gaps. While panics can be an important amplification mechanism, our results indicate that panics are not necessary for banking crises to have severe economic consequences. Furthermore, panics tend to be preceded by large bank equity declines, suggesting that panics are the result, rather than the cause, of earlier bank losses. We also use bank equity returns to uncover a number of forgotten historical banking crises and to create a banking crisis chronology that distinguishes between bank equity losses and panics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：G01, G21
papers.zh_title: 无恐慌的银行业危机
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过银行股本下降的视角审视历史上的银行业危机，这涵盖了一个广泛的银行业困境样本，既包括伴有银行业恐慌的案例，也包括没有恐慌的案例。为此，我们构建了一个新的数据集，包含1870年至2016年间46个国家的银行股本回报率以及关于银行业恐慌的叙述性信息。我们发现，即使在没有恐慌的情况下，银行股本的大幅下降也与显著的信贷收缩和产出缺口相关。虽然恐慌可能是一种重要的放大机制，但我们的结果表明，恐慌并非银行业危机产生严重后果的必要条件。此外，恐慌往往发生在银行股本大幅下降之后，这表明恐慌是早期银行损失的结果，而非原因。我们还利用银行股本回报率揭示了许多被遗忘的历史银行业危机，并创建了一个区分银行股本损失与恐慌的银行业危机年表。

papers.title: Learning about the Neighborhood
papers.authors: Zhenyu Gao, Michael Sockin, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: We develop a model to analyze information aggregation and learning in housing markets. In the presence of pervasive informational frictions, housing prices serve as important signals to households and capital producers about the economic strength of a neighborhood. Our model provides a novel mechanism for amplification through learning in which noise from the housing market can propagate to the local economy, distorting not only migration into the neighborhood, but also the supply of capital and labor. We provide consistent evidence of our model implications for housing price volatility and new construction using data from the recent U.S. housing cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E22, E44, G1, R3, R31
papers.zh_title: 了解社区
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个模型来分析住房市场中的信息聚合与学习。在普遍存在信息摩擦的情况下，住房价格成为家庭和资本生产者了解社区经济实力的重要信号。我们的模型通过学习提供了一种新的放大机制，其中来自住房市场的噪音可以传播到当地经济，不仅扭曲了向社区的迁移，还扭曲了资本和劳动力的供给。我们利用近期美国住房周期的数据，为模型关于房价波动和新建筑的含义提供了一致的证据。

papers.title: Human Mobility Restrictions and the Spread of the Novel Coronavirus (2019-nCoV) in China
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Long Wang, Yang Yang
papers.abstract: We quantify the causal impact of human mobility restrictions, particularly the lockdown of the city of Wuhan on January 23, 2020, on the containment and delay of the spread of the Novel Coronavirus (2019-nCoV). We employ a set of difference-in-differences (DID) estimations to disentangle the lockdown effect on human mobility reductions from other confounding effects including panic effect, virus effect, and the Spring Festival effect. We find that the lockdown of Wuhan reduced inflow into Wuhan by 76.64%, outflows from Wuhan by 56.35%, and within-Wuhan movements by 54.15%. We also estimate the dynamic effects of up to 22 lagged population inflows from Wuhan and other Hubei cities, the epicenter of the 2019-nCoV outbreak, on the destination cities' new infection cases. We find, using simulations with these estimates, that the lockdown of the city of Wuhan on January 23, 2020 contributed significantly to reducing the total infection cases outside of Wuhan, even with the social distancing measures later imposed by other cities. We find that the COVID-19 cases would be 64.81% higher in the 347 Chinese cities outside Hubei province, and 52.64% higher in the 16 non-Wuhan cities inside Hubei, in the counterfactual world in which the city of Wuhan were not locked down from January 23, 2020. We also find that there were substantial undocumented infection cases in the early days of the 2019-nCoV outbreak in Wuhan and other cities of Hubei province, but over time, the gap between the officially reported cases and our estimated “actual” cases narrows significantly. We also find evidence that enhanced social distancing policies in the 63 Chinese cities outside Hubei province are effective in reducing the impact of population inflows from the epicenter cities in Hubei province on the spread of 2019-nCoV virus in the destination cities elsewhere.
papers.zh_title: 人员流动限制与新型冠状病毒（2019-nCoV）在中国的传播
papers.zh_abstract: 我们量化了人员流动限制，特别是2020年1月23日武汉市封城，对遏制和延缓新型冠状病毒（2019-nCoV）传播的因果影响。我们采用一组双重差分（DID）估计，将封城对人员流动减少的影响与其他混杂效应（包括恐慌效应、病毒效应和春节效应）区分开来。我们发现，武汉封城使流入武汉的人口减少76.64%，流出武汉的人口减少56.35%，武汉市内流动减少54.15%。我们还估计了来自武汉和湖北省其他城市（2019-nCoV疫情中心）的滞后人口流入对目的地城市新增感染病例的动态影响，滞后期长达22期。我们发现，利用这些估计进行模拟，即使其他城市后来实施了社交距离措施，2020年1月23日武汉市封城也显著减少了武汉市以外的总感染病例。我们发现，在反事实情景下，即武汉市未从2020年1月23日起封城，湖北省外347个中国城市的COVID-19病例将增加64.81%，湖北省内非武汉的16个城市的病例将增加52.64%。我们还发现，在2019-nCoV疫情早期，武汉和湖北省其他城市存在大量未记录的感染病例，但随着时间的推移，官方报告病例与我们估计的“实际”病例之间的差距显著缩小。我们还发现证据表明，湖北省外63个中国城市加强的社交距离政策有效减少了来自湖北省疫情中心城市的人口流入对目的地城市2019-nCoV病毒传播的影响。

papers.title: The Political-Economy Trilemma
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Hiro Ito
papers.abstract: This paper investigates Rodrik’s political-economy trilemma: policy makers face a trade-off of choosing two out of three policy goals or governance styles, namely, (hyper-) globalization, national sovereignty, and democracy. We develop a set of indexes that measure the extent of attainment of the three factors for 139 countries in the period of 1975-2016. Using these indexes, we examine the validity of the hypothesis of the political-economy trilemma by testing whether the three trilemma variables are linearly related. We find that, for industrialized countries, there is a linear relationship between globalization and national sovereignty (i.e., a dilemma), and that for developing countries, all three indexes are linearly correlated (i.e., a trilemma). We also investigate whether and how three political-economic factors affect the degree of political and financial stability. The results indicate that more democratic industrialized countries tend to experience more political instability while developing countries tend to be able to stabilize their politics if they are more democratic. The lower level of national sovereignty an industrialized country attains, the more stable its political situation tends to be, while a higher level of sovereignty helps a developing country to stabilize its politics. Globalization brings about political stability for both groups of countries. Furthermore, more globalized countries, whether industrial or developing, tend to experience more financial stability. Future data will allow us to test the possibility of regime changes associated with the post-2016 dynamics.
papers.zh_title: 政治经济三难困境
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了罗德里克的政治经济三难困境：政策制定者面临在三个政策目标或治理风格中选择两个的权衡，即（超）全球化、国家主权和民主。我们开发了一套指数，用于衡量1975年至2016年间139个国家在这三个因素上的实现程度。利用这些指数，我们通过检验三个三难变量是否线性相关，来考察政治经济三难困境假设的有效性。我们发现，对于工业化国家，全球化与国家主权之间存在线性关系（即两难困境），而对于发展中国家，所有三个指数都线性相关（即三难困境）。我们还研究了这三个政治经济因素是否以及如何影响政治和金融稳定程度。结果表明，更民主的工业化国家往往经历更多的政治不稳定，而发展中国家如果更民主，则往往能够稳定其政治。工业化国家实现的国家主权水平越低，其政治局势往往越稳定，而更高的主权水平有助于发展中国家稳定其政治。全球化给两组国家都带来了政治稳定。此外，无论是工业化国家还是发展中国家，更全球化的国家往往经历更多的金融稳定。未来的数据将使我们能够检验与2016年后动态相关的政权更迭可能性。

papers.title: The Dynamic Efficiency in Resource Allocation: Evidence from Vehicle License Lotteries in Beijing
papers.authors: Youming Liu, Shanjun Li, Caixia Shen
papers.abstract: The efficiency of resource allocation is often analyzed in static frameworks with a focus on the cross-sectional heterogeneity in the willingness to pay among users. When the resource is durable in nature, the temporal heterogeneity could be important in assessing the efficiency properties of different allocation mechanisms. This paper uses a dynamic model to empirically quantify the efficiency outcome of using lotteries to allocate scarce resources among forward-looking consumers. In the context of the lottery policy for vehicle licenses in Beijing, our analysis shows that lotteries significantly affect intertemporal decisions in that households participate in lotteries at least four years earlier on average than they would be in a counterfactual environment of no quantity constraint. The welfare loss due to temporal heterogeneity and resulting changes in participation decisions accounts for over half of the total welfare loss from the lottery policy. The analysis highlights the importance of taking dynamic efficiency into account in designing resource allocation mechanisms.
papers.zh_title: 资源配置的动态效率：来自北京车牌摇号的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 资源配置的效率通常在使用者支付意愿的横截面异质性框架下进行静态分析。当资源具有耐用性时，时间异质性对于评估不同分配机制的效率特性可能很重要。本文使用动态模型，实证量化了在具有前瞻性的消费者中通过摇号分配稀缺资源的效率结果。在北京车牌摇号政策的背景下，我们的分析表明，摇号显著影响了跨期决策，即家庭参与摇号的平均时间比在无数量限制的反事实环境下至少提前了四年。由时间异质性及由此导致的参与决策变化造成的福利损失，占摇号政策总福利损失的一半以上。该分析强调了在设计资源配置机制时考虑动态效率的重要性。

papers.title: Which Banks are (Over) Levered? Insights from Shadow Banks and Uninsured Leverage
papers.authors: Erica Jiang, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
papers.abstract: We examine why banks maintain such high financial leverage, with debt financing accounting for about 90% of banks’ assets. To answer this question, we use uniquely assembled data on capital structure decisions of shadow banks that on the asset side conduct very similar business to banks. The shadow bank data provides us with a window into “free market” financing choices of financial intermediaries that unlike banks are lightly regulated and do not have access to insured deposit funding. We demonstrate that shadow banks employ twice the amount of equity capital compared to equivalent banks, with the most significant disparity observed between smaller and mid-size banks. Uninsured leverage, defined as uninsured debt funding to assets, increases with size for both banks and shadow banks while cost of debt declines with size. We rationalize these facts within a calibrated quantitative equilibrium model of intermediation. Our analysis reveals that the primary driver of high leverage among smaller and mid-size banks is their access to insured deposit funding. In the absence of deposit insurance, these banks would maintain a capitalization level at least 25% higher in relative terms than observed in the data. Conversely, deposit insurance plays a comparatively minor role in influencing the financial leverage of the largest banks, where the predominant factor is their capacity to generate money-like deposits. These results suggest a significant scope for the increase of capitalization of smaller and mid-size banks to align their capital structures with their private market counterparts. The aggregate consequences of such increase would be limited, because of reallocation of lending activity from smaller to large banks and to shadow banks.
papers.zh_title: 哪些银行（过度）杠杆化？来自影子银行和无保险杠杆的见解
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了为什么银行保持如此高的财务杠杆，债务融资约占银行资产的90%。为了回答这个问题，我们使用了影子银行资本结构决策的独特汇编数据，这些影子银行在资产方面与银行开展非常相似的业务。影子银行数据为我们提供了一个了解金融中介机构“自由市场”融资选择的窗口，这些中介机构与银行不同，受到轻度监管且无法获得受保险的存款融资。我们证明，与同等银行相比，影子银行使用的股权资本是其两倍，最显著的差异出现在中小型银行之间。无保险杠杆（定义为无保险债务融资与资产之比）随着银行和影子银行规模的扩大而增加，而债务成本随着规模的扩大而下降。我们在一个校准的定量均衡中介模型内对这些事实进行了合理化解释。我们的分析表明，中小型银行高杠杆的主要驱动因素是它们能够获得受保险的存款融资。在没有存款保险的情况下，这些银行的资本化水平将比数据中观察到的相对高出至少25%。相反，存款保险对最大银行财务杠杆的影响相对较小，其主要影响因素是它们创造类似货币存款的能力。这些结果表明，中小型银行有显著的空间提高资本化水平，使其资本结构与私人市场同行保持一致。这种提高的总体后果将是有限的，因为贷款活动会从中小型银行重新分配给大型银行和影子银行。

papers.title: Data Gaps and the Policy Response to the Novel Coronavirus
papers.authors: James H. Stock
papers.abstract: This note lays out the basic Susceptible-Infected-Recovered (SIR) epidemiological model of contagion, with a target audience of economists who want a framework for understanding the effects of social distancing and containment policies on the evolution of contagion and interactions with the economy. A key parameter, the asymptomatic rate (the fraction of the infected that are not tested under current guidelines), is not well estimated in the literature because tests for the coronavirus have been targeted at the sick and vulnerable, however it could be estimated by random sampling of the population. In this simple model, different policies that yield the same transmission rate β have the same health outcomes but can have very different economic costs. Thus, one way to frame the economics of shutdown policy is as finding the most efficient policies to achieve a given β, then determining the path of β that trades off the economic cost against the cost of excess lives lost by overwhelming the health care system.
papers.zh_title: 数据缺口与对新型冠状病毒的政策应对
papers.zh_abstract: 本文阐述了基本的易感-感染-康复（SIR）流行病学传染模型，目标受众是希望理解社交距离和遏制政策对传染演变及与经济互动影响的经济学家。一个关键参数，即无症状率（在当前指南下未接受检测的感染者比例），在文献中并未得到很好的估计，因为针对冠状病毒的检测主要针对病人和脆弱人群，但可以通过对人群进行随机抽样来估计。在这个简单模型中，产生相同传播率β的不同政策具有相同的健康结果，但可能具有非常不同的经济成本。因此，构建停工政策经济学的一种方式是，找到实现给定β的最有效政策，然后确定β的路径，以权衡经济成本与因医疗系统不堪重负而导致的超额生命损失成本。

papers.title: An SEIR Infectious Disease Model with Testing and Conditional Quarantine
papers.authors: David W. Berger, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Simon Mongey
papers.abstract: We extend the baseline Susceptible-Exposed-Infectious-Recovered (SEIR) infectious disease epidemiology model to understand the role of testing and case-dependent quarantine. Our model nests the SEIR model. During a period of asymptomatic infection, testing can reveal infection that otherwise would only be revealed later when symptoms develop. Along with those displaying symptoms, such individuals are deemed known positive cases. Quarantine policy is case-dependent in that it can depend on whether a case is unknown, known positive, known negative, or recovered. Testing therefore makes possible the identification and quarantine of infected individuals and release of non-infected individuals. We fix a quarantine technology—a parameter determining the differential rate of transmission in quarantine—and compare simple testing and quarantine policies. We start with a baseline quarantine-only policy that replicates the rate at which individuals are entering quarantine in the US in March, 2020. We show that the total deaths that occur under this policy can occur under looser quarantine measures and a substantial increase in random testing of asymptomatic individuals. Testing at a higher rate in conjunction with targeted quarantine policies can (i) dampen the economic impact of the coronavirus and (ii) reduce peak symptomatic infections—relevant for hospital capacity constraints. Our model can be plugged into richer quantitative extensions of the SEIR model of the kind currently being used to forecast the effects of public health and economic policies.
papers.zh_title: 具有检测和条件隔离的SEIR传染病模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们扩展了基础的易感-暴露-感染-康复（SEIR）传染病流行病学模型，以理解检测和基于病例的隔离的作用。我们的模型嵌套了SEIR模型。在无症状感染期间，检测可以揭示感染，否则这些感染只有在后来出现症状时才会被发现。与那些表现出症状的人一起，这些个体被视为已知阳性病例。隔离政策是基于病例的，因为它可以取决于病例是未知、已知阳性、已知阴性还是已康复。因此，检测使得识别和隔离感染者以及释放非感染者成为可能。我们固定一种隔离技术——一个决定隔离中传播差异率的参数——并比较简单的检测和隔离政策。我们从一项基线仅隔离政策开始，该政策复制了2020年3月美国个体进入隔离的比率。我们表明，在该政策下发生的总死亡人数，可以在更宽松的隔离措施和对无症状个体进行大幅增加的随机检测下发生。结合有针对性的隔离政策，以更高频率进行检测可以（i）减轻冠状病毒的经济影响，以及（ii）减少症状性感染峰值——这与医院容量限制相关。我们的模型可以嵌入到当前用于预测公共卫生和经济政策效果的SEIR模型更丰富的定量扩展中。

papers.title: The Effect of Privacy Regulation on the Data Industry: Empirical Evidence from GDPR
papers.authors: Guy Aridor, Yeon-Koo Che, Tobias Salz
papers.abstract: Utilizing a novel dataset from an online travel intermediary, we study the effects of EU’s General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). The opt-in requirement of GDPR resulted in 12.5% drop in the intermediary-observed consumers, but the remaining consumers are trackable for a longer period of time. Our findings imply that privacy conscious consumers exert privacy externalities on opt-in consumers, making them more predictable. Consistent with this finding, the average value of the remaining consumers to advertisers has increased, offsetting some of the losses from consumer opt-outs.
papers.zh_title: 隐私监管对数据行业的影响：来自GDPR的经验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一家在线旅游中介的新数据集，我们研究了欧盟《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）的影响。GDPR的选择加入要求导致该中介可观测的消费者数量下降了12.5%，但剩余消费者的可追踪时间更长。我们的发现表明，注重隐私的消费者对选择加入的消费者施加了隐私外部性，使其更可预测。与这一发现一致，剩余消费者对广告商的平均价值有所增加，部分抵消了消费者选择退出带来的损失。

papers.title: Externalities in International Tax Enforcement: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: Thomas R. Tørsløv, Ludvig S. Wier, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: We show that the fiscal authorities of high-tax countries can lack the incentives to combat profit shifting to tax havens. Instead, they have incentives to focus their enforcement efforts on relocating profits booked by multinationals in other high-tax countries, crowding out the enforcement on transactions that shift profits to tax havens, and reducing the global tax payments of multinational companies. This incentive problem can help explain why profit shifting to low-tax countries persists despite its tax revenue cost for high-tax countries. The predictions of our model are motivated and supported by the analysis of two new datasets: the universe of transfer price corrections conducted by the Danish tax authority, and new cross-country data on international tax enforcement. Both of these datasets shows that that tax authorities in high-tax countries focus their transfer pricing enforcement effort on correcting transactions with other high-tax countries rather than transactions involving tax havens.
papers.zh_title: 国际税收执法中的外部性：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，高税率国家的财政当局可能缺乏打击向避税天堂转移利润的激励。相反，他们有动机将执法重点放在纠正跨国公司从其他高税率国家转移的利润上，从而挤出了对向避税天堂转移利润交易的执法，并减少了跨国公司的全球纳税额。这种激励问题有助于解释为何向低税率国家转移利润的行为持续存在，尽管这给高税率国家带来了税收收入损失。我们模型预测的动机和支撑来自对两个新数据集的分析：丹麦税务机关进行的全部转让定价调整数据，以及新的跨国国际税收执法数据。这两个数据集均显示，高税率国家的税务机关将其转让定价执法努力集中在纠正与其他高税率国家的交易上，而非涉及避税天堂的交易。

papers.title: An Analytic Framework For Interpreting Investment Regressions In The Presence Of Financial Constraints
papers.authors: Andrew B. Abel, Stavros Panageas
papers.abstract: A financial constraint that prevents access to external funds induces non-classical measurement error in average q as a proxy for unobservable marginal q. Unlike classical measurement error, this measurement error biases upward the coefficient on average q in a univariate regression of investment on average q. In a multiple regression of investment on average q and cash flow, the coefficient on cash flow is positive. The positive cash-flow coefficient indicates the presence of a financial constraint, but it does not indicate a shortage of liquidity to fund current investment. In addition, the coefficient on average q is biased downward.
papers.zh_title: 存在融资约束时解释投资回归的分析框架
papers.zh_abstract: 阻止获取外部资金的融资约束会在平均q作为不可观测的边际q的代理变量时引入非经典测量误差。与经典测量误差不同，这种测量误差在投资对平均q的单变量回归中会使平均q的系数向上偏误。在投资对平均q和现金流的多重回归中，现金流的系数为正。正的现金流系数表明存在融资约束，但并不表示缺乏为当前投资提供资金的流动性。此外，平均q的系数向下偏误。

papers.title: The Virus of Fear: The Political Impact of Ebola in the U.S.
papers.authors: Filipe R. Campante, Emilio Depetris-Chauvin, Ruben Durante
papers.abstract: We study how fear can affect the behavior of voters and politicians by looking at the Ebola scare that hit the U.S. a month before the 2014 midterm elections. Exploiting the timing and location of the four cases diagnosed in the U.S., we show that heightened concern about Ebola, as measured by online activity, led to a lower vote share for the Democrats in congressional and gubernatorial elections, as well as lower turnout, despite no evidence of a general anti-incumbent effect (including on President Obama's approval ratings). We then show that politicians responded to the Ebola scare by mentioning the disease in connection with immigration and terrorism in newsletters and campaign ads. This response came only from Republicans, especially those facing competitive races, suggesting a strategic use of the issue in conjunction with topics perceived as favorable to them. Survey evidence suggests that voters responded with increasingly conservative attitudes on immigration but not on other ideologically-charged issues. Taken together, our findings indicate that emotional reactions associated with fear can have a strong electoral impact, that politicians perceive and act strategically in response to this, and that the process is mediated by issues that can be plausibly associated with the specific fear-triggering factor.
papers.zh_title: 恐惧病毒：埃博拉在美国的政治影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究2014年中期选举前一个月袭击美国的埃博拉恐慌，探讨恐惧如何影响选民和政客的行为。利用美国确诊的四例病例的时间和地点，我们表明，以在线活动衡量的对埃博拉担忧的加剧，导致民主党在国会和州长选举中的得票率下降，以及投票率降低，尽管没有证据表明存在普遍的反在位效应（包括对奥巴马总统支持率的影响）。然后我们表明，政客们通过在新通讯和竞选广告中将该疾病与移民和恐怖主义联系起来，对埃博拉恐慌做出了回应。这种回应仅来自共和党人，尤其是那些面临激烈竞争的共和党人，这表明他们策略性地利用该议题，将其与他们认为对自己有利的话题相结合。调查证据表明，选民在移民问题上表现出日益保守的态度，但在其他意识形态色彩浓厚的问题上则不然。综合来看，我们的发现表明，与恐惧相关的情绪反应可能产生强大的选举影响，政客们会感知到这一点并做出策略性回应，而这一过程通过那些可能与特定恐惧触发因素合理关联的议题来中介。

papers.title: The Effects of State Scope of Practice Laws on the Labor Supply of Advanced Practice Registered Nurses
papers.authors: Sara Markowitz, E. Kathleen Adams
papers.abstract: This paper studies the effects of changes in states’ scope of practice laws (SOP) for advanced practice registered nurses (APRNs) on individual labor supply decisions. Restrictive SOP impose costs and other barriers to practice that may affect these decisions. Using survey data on APRNs, we analyze employment in nursing, work hours, part-time work status, multiple job holding, self-employment, wages, and migration. Results show that the level of SOP restrictions are not strong determinants of many labor market decisions, with a few exceptions. We find that hours worked and self-employment both increase when nurses practice in regulatory environments that are free from physician oversight requirements.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I1, J01, K0
papers.zh_title: 州执业范围法律对高级执业注册护士劳动力供给的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了州对高级执业注册护士（APRNs）的执业范围法律（SOP）变化对个人劳动力供给决策的影响。限制性SOP施加了成本和其他执业障碍，可能影响这些决策。利用APRNs的调查数据，我们分析了护理行业的就业、工作时间、兼职工作状态、多重工作持有、自雇、工资和迁移。结果显示，除少数例外，SOP限制水平并非许多劳动力市场决策的强决定因素。我们发现，当护士在没有医生监督要求的监管环境中执业时，工作时间和自雇均有所增加。

papers.title: Off to a Good Start: The NBER and the Measurement of National Income
papers.authors: Hugh Rockoff
papers.abstract: The creation of the National Bureau of Economic Research was a response to the bitter controversies over the distribution of income that roiled the United States during the Progressive Era. Thanks to Malcolm Rorty, a business economist, and Nahum I. Stone, an independent socialist economist, a “Committee on the Distribution of Income” was created; what might be considered the first name of the Bureau. Funding was secured, the Bureau was chartered in 1920, and Wesley Mitchell was appointed the director of research. The Bureau’s first publication, Income in the United States, its Amount and Distribution was widely hailed as a major contribution. Further estimates of national income and its distribution for the 1920s were made by Willford King and Lillian Epstein. The Great Depression led to legislation requiring federal government estimates. Simon Kuznets was seconded from the Bureau to the Commerce Department where he led the team that produced the first federal estimates and established the unit for producing updates. The early investigators at the Bureau proved to be masters of combining sources of data to produce credible estimates. The result was estimates that still underlie our understanding of the growth and fluctuations of the American Economy.
papers.zh_title: 良好开端：NBER与国民收入核算
papers.zh_abstract: 国家经济研究局的创建是对进步时代美国因收入分配问题引发的激烈争议的回应。得益于商业经济学家马尔科姆·罗蒂和独立社会主义经济学家纳胡姆·I·斯通，一个“收入分配委员会”得以成立；这可以被视为该局最初的名称。资金得到保障，该局于1920年获得特许，韦斯利·米切尔被任命为研究主任。该局的第一份出版物《美国的收入：其数量与分配》被广泛誉为一项重大贡献。威尔福德·金和莉莲·爱泼斯坦对20世纪20年代的国民收入及其分配进行了进一步估算。大萧条导致了要求联邦政府进行估算的立法。西蒙·库兹涅茨从该局借调到商务部，领导了制作首批联邦估算的团队，并建立了负责后续更新的部门。该局的早期研究者们被证明是善于结合数据来源以产生可信估算的大师。其结果是我们至今仍赖以理解美国经济增长与波动的估算基础。

papers.title: The Economics of the Fed Put
papers.authors: Anna Cieslak, Annette Vissing-Jorgensen
papers.abstract: Since the mid-1990s, low stock returns predict accommodating policy by the Federal Reserve. This fact emerges because, over this period, negative stock returns comove with downgrades to the Fed’s growth expectations. Textual analysis of the FOMC documents reveals that policymakers pay attention to the stock market, and their negative stock-market mentions predict federal funds rate cuts. The primary mechanism why policymakers find the stock market informative is via its effect on consumption, with a smaller role for the market viewed as predicting the economy.
papers.zh_title: 美联储看跌期权的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 自20世纪90年代中期以来，低股票回报预示着美联储将采取宽松政策。这一现象的出现是因为在此期间，负的股票回报与美联储增长预期的下调共同变动。对联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）文件的文本分析显示，政策制定者关注股票市场，而他们对股票市场的负面提及预示着联邦基金利率的下调。政策制定者认为股票市场具有信息价值的主要机制是通过其对消费的影响，而市场作为经济预测指标的作用较小。

papers.title: Self-Citation, Cumulative Advantage, and Gender Inequality in Science
papers.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Freda B. Lynn
papers.abstract: In science, self-citation is often interpreted as an act of self-promotion that (artificially) boosts the visibility of one’s prior work in the short term, which could then inflate professional authority in the long term. Recently, in light of research on the gender gap in self-promotion, two, large-scale studies of publications examine if women self-cite less than men. But they arrive at conflicting conclusions; one concludes yes whereas the other, no. We join the debate with an original study of 36 cohorts of life scientists (1970–2005) followed through 2015 (or death or retirement). We track not only the rate of self-citation per unit of past productivity, but also the likelihood of self-citing intellectually distant material and the rate of return on self-citations with respect to a host of major career outcomes, including grants, future citations, and job changes. With comprehensive, longitudinal data, we find no evidence whatsoever of a gender gap in self-citation practices or returns. Men may very well be more aggressive self-promoters than women, but this dynamic does not manifest in our sample with respect to self-citation practices. Implications of our null findings are discussed, particularly with respect to gender inequality in scientific careers more broadly.
papers.zh_title: 自引、累积优势与科学领域的性别不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 在科学界，自引通常被解释为一种自我推销行为，短期内（人为地）提升自己先前工作的可见度，进而可能长期膨胀专业权威。最近，鉴于关于自我推销性别差距的研究，两项大规模的出版物研究考察了女性是否比男性自引更少。但它们得出了相互矛盾的结论：一项结论为是，而另一项则否。我们通过一项对36个生命科学家队列（1970-2005年）的原创研究加入这场辩论，这些队列被追踪至2015年（或死亡或退休）。我们不仅追踪了每单位过去生产力的自引率，还追踪了自引智力上遥远材料的可能性，以及自引在包括资助、未来引用和职位变动等一系列主要职业成果上的回报率。利用全面的纵向数据，我们未发现任何关于自引实践或回报存在性别差距的证据。男性可能确实比女性更积极地自我推销，但这种动态在我们的样本中并未体现在自引实践上。我们讨论了零结果的含义，特别是关于更广泛科学职业中的性别不平等。

papers.title: The Rise of For-Profit Experimental Medicine
papers.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Ariel Fishman
papers.abstract: Beginning around 1990, academic medical centers have ceased to be the primary locus of industry-sponsored clinical trial activity. Instead, clinical trials have increasingly been conducted in private practices and for-profit, dedicated study sites. We examine the underlying causes of this startling evolution. On the demand side, the greater availability of non-academic investigators has enabled pharmaceutical firms to better match physicians' skills with specific projects. On the supply side, we argue that the growth of managed care health insurance has contributed to a rise in the number of non-academic physicians performing clinical research. We find evidence consistent with these claims using a unique data set containing information about 85,919 site contracts for 7,735 clinical trials between 1991 and 2003. Furthermore, we examine the gap in prevailing prices for comparable procedures conducted for clinical trials versus conventional medical care, and conclude that the effect of managed care on entry is consistent with non-academic physicians “inducing demand” so as to resist downward pressures on their income.
papers.zh_title: 营利性实验医学的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 大约从1990年开始，学术医疗中心已不再是行业资助临床试验活动的主要场所。相反，临床试验越来越多地在私人诊所和营利性专门研究机构中进行。我们考察了这一惊人演变的根本原因。在需求方面，非学术研究人员的更多可用性使制药公司能够更好地将医生的技能与特定项目相匹配。在供给方面，我们认为管理式医疗健康保险的增长促进了从事临床研究的非学术医生数量的增加。我们使用一个独特的数据集（包含1991年至2003年间7735项临床试验的85919份机构合同信息）发现了与这些说法一致的证据。此外，我们考察了临床试验与常规医疗中可比程序现行价格的差距，并得出结论：管理式医疗对进入的影响与非学术医生“诱导需求”以抵抗其收入下行压力是一致的。

papers.title: Paying Outsourced Labor: Direct Evidence from Linked Temp Agency-Worker-Client Data
papers.authors: Andres Drenik, Simon Jäger, Miguel Pascuel Plotkin, Benjamin Schoefer
papers.abstract: We estimate how much firms differentiate pay premia between regular and outsourced workers. We study temp agency work arrangements where pay setting has previously escaped measurement because existing datasets do not report links between user firms (the workplaces where temp workers perform their labor) and temp agencies (their formal employers). We overcome this measurement challenge by leveraging unique administrative data from Argentina with such links. We estimate that temp agency workers receive 49% of the workplace-specific pay premia earned by regular workers in user firms: the midpoint between the benchmark for insiders (one) and the competitive spot-labor market benchmark (zero).
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LE, LS, PR；JEL：J31, J53, K31, L24, M52, M54
papers.zh_title: 支付外包劳动力：来自关联临时工中介-工人-客户数据的直接证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了企业在正式员工和外包工人之间区分工资溢价的幅度。我们研究临时工中介工作安排，其中工资设定此前无法测量，因为现有数据集未报告用户企业（临时工执行劳动的工作场所）与临时工中介（其正式雇主）之间的关联。我们通过利用阿根廷具有此类关联的独特行政数据克服了这一测量挑战。我们估计，临时工中介工人获得的用户企业特定工资溢价是正式工人所获工资溢价的49%：介于内部人基准（1）和竞争性现货劳动力市场基准（0）的中点。

papers.title: Measuring Welfare and Inequality with Incomplete Price Information
papers.authors: David Atkin, Benjamin Faber, Thibault Fally, Marco Gonzalez-Navarro
papers.abstract: We propose and implement a new approach that allows us to estimate income-specific changes in household welfare in contexts where well-measured prices are not available for important subsets of consumption. Using rich but widely available expenditure survey microdata, we show that we can recover income-specific equivalent and compensating variations as long as preferences fall within the broad quasi-separable class (Gorman 1970; 1976). Our approach is flexible enough to allow for non-parametric estimation at each point of the income distribution. We implement this approach to estimate inflation and welfare changes in rural India between 1987 and 2000, and to revisit the impacts of India’s trade reforms. Our estimates reveal that lower rates of inflation for the rich erased the real income convergence documented by the existing literature that uses the subset of consumption with well-measured prices to calculate inflation.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI；JEL：D12, E31, F63, O12
papers.zh_title: 在不完全价格信息下衡量福利与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出并实施了一种新方法，使我们能够在重要消费子集缺乏良好测量价格的情况下，估计家庭福利的收入特定变化。利用丰富但广泛可得的支出调查微观数据，我们表明，只要偏好属于广义准可分类别（Gorman 1970; 1976），我们就可以恢复收入特定的等价变化和补偿变化。我们的方法足够灵活，允许在收入分布的每个点进行非参数估计。我们实施这一方法，估计了1987年至2000年间印度农村的通货膨胀和福利变化，并重新审视了印度贸易改革的影响。我们的估计揭示，富人较低的通货膨胀率抹去了现有文献所记录的实际收入趋同，这些文献使用具有良好测量价格的消费子集来计算通货膨胀。

papers.title: Scientific Grant Funding
papers.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Danielle Li
papers.abstract: This chapter provides an overview of grant funding as an innovation policy tool aimed at both practitioners and science policy scholars. We first discuss how grants relate to other contractual mechanisms such as patents, prizes, or procurement contracts, and argue that, among these, grants are likely to be the most effective way of supporting early-stage, exploratory science. Next, we provide a brief history of the modern scientific grant and discuss the current state of knowledge regarding several key elements of the design of grant programs: the choice of program scope, the design of peer review, as well as approaches for creating incentives for risk-taking and translation for grant recipients. We argue that, in making these choices, policy-makers might consider adopting a portfolio-based mindset that seeks a diversity of approaches, while accepting that high failure rates for individual projects is in fact part of an effective grant-making program. Finally, increased rigor in the evaluation of grant programs is likely to raise the quality of funded proposals. In particular, randomized controlled trials and other quasi-experimental techniques might enable policy makers to communicate and enhance the impact that these programs have on discovery and innovation, thereby creating a stronger justification for their expansion or continued existence.
papers.zh_title: 科学资助拨款
papers.zh_abstract: 本章概述了作为创新政策工具的资助拨款，面向实践者和科学政策学者。我们首先讨论拨款如何与其他合同机制（如专利、奖项或采购合同）相关联，并认为在这些机制中，拨款可能是支持早期探索性科学的最有效方式。接下来，我们简要介绍了现代科学拨款的历史，并讨论了关于拨款计划设计几个关键要素的当前知识状况：计划范围的选择、同行评审的设计，以及为拨款接受者创造冒险和转化激励的方法。我们认为，在做出这些选择时，政策制定者可能会考虑采用基于投资组合的思维方式，寻求方法的多样性，同时接受单个项目的高失败率实际上是有效拨款计划的一部分。最后，提高拨款计划评估的严谨性可能会提高资助提案的质量。特别是，随机对照试验和其他准实验技术可能使政策制定者能够传达并增强这些计划对发现和创新的影响，从而为其扩展或持续存在提供更强有力的理由。

papers.title: The Mid-Life Dip in Well-Being: Economists (Who Find It) Versus Psychologists (Who Don't)!
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Carol L. Graham
papers.abstract: A number of studies – including our own – find a mid-life dip in well-being. We review a psychology literature that claims that the evidence of a U-shape is "overblown" and if there is such a decline it is "trivial". We find remarkably strong and consistent evidence across countries and US states that statistically significant U-shapes exist with and without socio-economic controls. The US is somewhat of an outlier with evidence of an early uptick in the raw data with some variables – but not in others – that disappears when controls are included. We show that two of the studies cited by psychologists suggesting there are no U-shapes are in error; we use their data and find the opposite. The effects of the mid-life dip are comparable to major life events like losing a spouse, losing a job or getting cancer. They are clearly not inconsequential.
papers.zh_title: 中年幸福感低谷：经济学家（发现它）与心理学家（不发现它）！
papers.zh_abstract: 多项研究——包括我们自己的——发现中年幸福感存在低谷。我们回顾了心理学文献，这些文献声称U形曲线的证据被“夸大”，如果存在这种下降，那也是“微不足道的”。我们发现，跨国家和美国各州存在显著且一致的证据，表明无论是否包含社会经济控制变量，统计上显著的U形曲线都存在。美国在某种程度上是一个异常值，在某些变量（但非其他变量）的原始数据中显示出早期上升的证据，当加入控制变量后，这种上升消失。我们表明，心理学家引用的两项表明不存在U形曲线的研究存在错误；我们使用他们的数据并发现了相反的结果。中年低谷的影响与重大生活事件（如失去配偶、失业或患癌）相当。它们显然并非无关紧要。

papers.title: Bank Stress Testing: Public Interest or Regulatory Capture?
papers.authors: Thomas Ian Schneider, Philip E. Strahan, Jun Yang
papers.abstract: We test whether measures of potential influence on regulators affect stress test outcomes. The large trading banks – those most plausibly ‘Too big to Fail’ – face the toughest tests. In contrast, we find no evidence that either political or regulatory connections affect the tests. Stress tests have a greater effect on the value of large trading banks’ portfolios; the large trading banks respond by making more conservative capital plans; and, despite their more conservative capital plans, the large trading banks still fail their tests more frequently than other banks. These results are consistent with a public-interest view of regulation, not regulatory capture.
papers.zh_title: 银行压力测试：公共利益还是监管俘获？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们检验了对监管者潜在影响力的衡量指标是否影响压力测试结果。大型交易银行——那些最可能“大而不能倒”的银行——面临最严格的测试。相反，我们没有发现政治或监管关系影响测试的证据。压力测试对大型交易银行投资组合价值的影响更大；大型交易银行通过制定更保守的资本计划来应对；尽管其资本计划更为保守，但大型交易银行仍比其他银行更频繁地未能通过测试。这些结果与监管的公共利益观点一致，而非监管俘获。

papers.title: Innovation and Entrepreneurship in Housing
papers.authors: Edward Kung
papers.abstract: In this chapter, I discuss innovation and entrepreneurship in residential real estate and construction (housing). Based on R&D spending and patent statistics, housing does not appear to be a very innovative sector. But in the last two decades, there has been a significant increase in the amount of investment going to real estate technology companies. I discuss the companies and technologies which have drawn the most attention from investors. I then review the literature on two major innovation trends in housing: the growth of the internet as a tool for housing search, and the development of home-sharing platforms which allow homeowners to use their homes as short-term rentals. These innovations have likely increased the efficiency of housing markets, leading to higher quality matches between buyers and sellers, and more efficient utilization of space. However, the effects are hard to measure due to the difficulty of separating quality changes from price changes. In comparison to residential real estate, there appears to have been less recent innovation in residential construction. In many areas, residential construction is artificially constrained by local land use policies, and estimates from the literature suggest that relaxing these constraints could increase economic growth significantly. Finally, I discuss anti-competitive practices in real estate which may hinder entrepreneurship and the adoption of new innovations, and I discuss how innovation and entrepreneurship in other sectors may affect the housing market.
papers.zh_title: 住房领域的创新与创业
papers.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我讨论了住宅房地产和建筑（住房）领域的创新与创业。基于研发支出和专利统计，住房似乎不是一个非常创新的部门。但在过去二十年中，投入房地产科技公司的投资额显著增加。我讨论了最受投资者关注的公司和技术。然后，我回顾了关于住房领域两大创新趋势的文献：互联网作为住房搜索工具的增长，以及允许房主将其房屋用作短期租赁的房屋共享平台的发展。这些创新可能提高了住房市场的效率，导致买卖双方之间更高质量的匹配，以及空间更有效的利用。然而，由于难以将质量变化与价格变化分开，其影响难以衡量。与住宅房地产相比，住宅建筑领域近期的创新似乎较少。在许多地区，住宅建筑受到地方土地使用政策的人为限制，文献中的估计表明，放松这些限制可能显著促进经济增长。最后，我讨论了房地产中可能阻碍创业和新创新采用的反竞争做法，并探讨了其他部门的创新与创业如何影响住房市场。

papers.title: Copyright and Creativity. Evidence from Italian Opera During the Napoleonic Age
papers.authors: Michela Giorcelli, Petra Moser
papers.abstract: This paper exploits exogenous variation in the adoption of copyrights – as a result of the timing of Napoléon’s military victories in Italy – to examine the effects of copyrights on creativity. To measure changes in creative output we compare changes in the creation of new operas across states with and without copyrights. Difference-in-differences analyses show that basic copyrights increased both the number and the quality of operas, measured by their popularity and durability. Notably, there is no evidence of comparable benefits for extensions in copyright lengths. Complementary analyses for other types of musical compositions confirm the main results.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LE, PR；JEL：K0, N23, O3, O34
papers.zh_title: 版权与创造力：拿破仑时代意大利歌剧的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用版权采用的 exogenous 变化——由于拿破仑在意大利军事胜利的时间——来考察版权对创造力的影响。为了衡量创造性产出的变化，我们比较了有版权和没有版权的各州之间新歌剧创作的变化。双重差分分析表明，基本版权增加了歌剧的数量和质量，以其流行度和持久性衡量。值得注意的是，没有证据表明版权期限的延长带来了类似的益处。对其他类型音乐作品的补充分析证实了主要结果。

papers.title: Government Incentives for Entrepreneurship
papers.authors: Josh Lerner
papers.abstract: In the dozen years since the Global Financial Crisis, there has been a surge of interest on the part of governments in promoting entrepreneurial activity, largely by providing financing. This essay explores these policies, focusing on financial incentives to entrepreneurs and the intermediaries who fund them. The motivation for these efforts is clear: the well-documented relationships between economic growth, innovation, entrepreneurship and venture capital. Yet despite good intentions, many of these public initiatives have ended in disappointment. I argue that these failures have not simply been a matter of bad luck. Instead, the unfortunate outcomes have reflected the fundamental structural issues that make it difficult for governments to launch sustained successful efforts to promote entrepreneurship over sustained periods. I highlight several critical challenges, and outline two principles that might render these efforts more effective.
papers.zh_title: 政府创业激励政策
papers.zh_abstract: 自全球金融危机以来的十多年间，各国政府通过提供融资等方式促进创业活动的兴趣激增。本文探讨了这些政策，重点关注对创业者及其资助中介的财政激励。这些努力的动机显而易见：经济增长、创新、创业和风险投资之间已有充分证据的关系。然而，尽管初衷良好，许多此类公共举措最终令人失望。我认为这些失败并非仅仅是运气不佳。相反，这些不幸的结果反映了根本性的结构性问题，使得政府难以在长期内持续成功地推动创业。我强调了几个关键挑战，并概述了两条可能使这些努力更有效的原则。

papers.title: Inference for Ranks with Applications to Mobility across Neighborhoods and Academic Achievement across Countries
papers.authors: Magne Mogstad, Joseph P. Romano, Azeem Shaikh, Daniel Wilhelm
papers.abstract: It is often desired to rank diﬀerent populations according to the value of some feature of each population. For example, it may be desired to rank neighborhoods according to some measure of intergenerational mobility or countries according to some measure of academic achievement. These rankings are invariably computed using estimates rather than the true values of these features. As a result, there may be considerable uncertainty concerning the rank of each population. In this paper, we consider the problem of accounting for such uncertainty by constructing conﬁdence sets for the rank of each population. We consider both the problem of constructing marginal conﬁdence sets for the rank of a particular population as well as simultaneous conﬁdence sets for the ranks of all populations. We show how to construct such conﬁdence sets under weak assumptions. An important feature of all of our constructions is that they remain computationally feasible even when the number of populations is very large. We apply our theoretical results to re-examine the rankings of both neighborhoods in the United States in terms of intergenerational mobility and developed countries in terms of academic achievement. The conclusions about which countries do best and worst at reading, math, and science are fairly robust to accounting for uncertainty. The conﬁdence sets for the ranking of the 50 most populous commuting zones by measures of mobility are also found to be small. These rankings, however, become much less informative if one includes all commuting zones, if one considers neighborhoods at a more granular level (counties, Census tracts), or if one uses movers across areas to address concerns about selection.
papers.zh_title: 基于排名的推断：跨社区流动性与跨国学业成就的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 人们常常希望根据每个群体的某些特征值对不同的群体进行排名。例如，可能希望根据某种代际流动性指标对社区进行排名，或根据某种学业成就指标对国家进行排名。这些排名总是使用这些特征的估计值而非真实值来计算。因此，每个群体的排名可能存在相当大的不确定性。在本文中，我们考虑通过为每个群体的排名构建置信集来解决这种不确定性的问题。我们既考虑了为特定群体的排名构建边际置信集的问题，也考虑了为所有群体的排名构建联合置信集的问题。我们展示了如何在弱假设下构建这样的置信集。我们所有构建方法的一个重要特点是，即使群体数量非常大，它们在计算上仍然可行。我们将我们的理论结果应用于重新审视美国社区在代际流动性方面的排名以及发达国家在学业成就方面的排名。关于哪些国家在阅读、数学和科学方面表现最好和最差的结论，在考虑不确定性后相当稳健。按流动性指标对50个人口最多的通勤区进行排名的置信集也被发现很小。然而，如果包括所有通勤区，或者考虑更细粒度的社区（县、人口普查区），或者使用跨区域迁移者来解决选择性问题，这些排名就会变得信息量大大降低。

papers.title: Aggregate and Firm-Level Stock Returns During Pandemics, in Real Time
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Anusha Chari, Andrew N. Greenland, Peter K. Schott
papers.abstract: We show that unexpected changes in the trajectory of COVID-19 infections predict US stock returns, in real time. Parameter estimates indicate that an unanticipated doubling (halving) of projected infections forecasts next-day decreases (increases) in aggregate US market value of 4 to 11 percent, indicating that equity markets may begin to rebound even as infections continue to rise, if the trajectory of the disease becomes less severe than initially anticipated. Using the same variation in unanticipated projected cases, we find that COVID-19-related losses in market value at the firm level rise with capital intensity and leverage, and are deeper in industries more conducive to disease transmission. These relationships provide important insight into current record job losses. Measuring US states' drops in market value as the employment weighted average declines of the industries they produce, we find that states with milder drops in market value exhibit larger initial jobless claims per worker. This initially counter-intuitive result suggests that investors value the relative ease with which labor versus capital costs can be shed as revenues decline.\n
papers.zh_title: 大流行期间的总量和公司层面股票回报：实时视角
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，COVID-19感染轨迹的意外变化可以实时预测美国股票回报。参数估计表明，预期感染人数的意外翻倍（减半）预示着美国整体市场价值次日下降（上升）4%至11%，这表明即使感染人数继续上升，如果疾病轨迹变得比最初预期的温和，股票市场也可能开始反弹。利用相同的意外预期病例变化，我们发现公司层面因COVID-19导致的市场价值损失随着资本密集度和杠杆率而上升，并且在更有利于疾病传播的行业中更深。这些关系为当前创纪录的失业提供了重要见解。通过衡量美国各州市场价值下降（作为其生产行业的就业加权平均下降），我们发现市场价值下降较温和的州，每位工人的初始失业救济申请数量更大。这个最初反直觉的结果表明，投资者看重的是，当收入下降时，劳动力成本相对于资本成本更容易被削减。

papers.title: How Does Household Spending Respond to an Epidemic? Consumption During the 2020 COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, R.A. Farrokhnia, Steffen Meyer, Michaela Pagel, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: We explore how household consumption responds to epidemics, utilizing transaction-level household financial data to investigate the impact of the COVID-19 virus. As the number of cases grew, households began to radically alter their typical spending across a number of major categories. Initially spending increased sharply, particularly in retail, credit card spending and food items. This was followed by a sharp decrease in overall spending. Households responded most strongly in states with shelter-in-place orders in place by March 29th. We explore heterogeneity across partisan affiliation, demographics and income. Greater levels of social distancing are associated with drops in spending, particularly in restaurants and retail.
papers.zh_title: 家庭支出如何应对流行病？2020年COVID-19大流行期间的消费
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用交易层面的家庭财务数据，探讨家庭消费如何应对流行病，以调查COVID-19病毒的影响。随着病例数量的增加，家庭开始在许多主要类别中彻底改变其典型支出。最初支出急剧增加，特别是在零售、信用卡支出和食品项目上。随后是总体支出的急剧下降。在截至3月29日已实施居家令的州，家庭反应最为强烈。我们探讨了党派归属、人口统计特征和收入之间的异质性。更大程度的社会疏离与支出下降相关，尤其是在餐馆和零售领域。

papers.title: How Many Jobs Can be Done at Home?
papers.authors: Jonathan I. Dingel, Brent Neiman
papers.abstract: Evaluating the economic impact of "social distancing" measures taken to arrest the spread of COVID-19 raises a fundamental question about the modern economy: how many jobs can be performed at home? We classify the feasibility of working at home for all occupations and merge this classification with occupational employment counts. We find that 37 percent of jobs in the United States can be performed entirely at home, with significant variation across cities and industries. These jobs typically pay more than jobs that cannot be done at home and account for 46 percent of all US wages. Applying our occupational classification to 85 other countries reveals that lower-income economies have a lower share of jobs that can be done at home.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：D24, J22, J61, O30, R12, R32
papers.zh_title: 有多少工作可以在家完成？
papers.zh_abstract: 评估为遏制COVID-19传播而采取的“社交距离”措施的经济影响，引发了一个关于现代经济的基本问题：有多少工作可以在家完成？我们对所有职业在家工作的可行性进行了分类，并将此分类与职业就业人数相结合。我们发现，美国37%的工作可以完全在家完成，不同城市和行业之间存在显著差异。这些工作的薪酬通常高于无法在家完成的工作，并占美国所有工资总额的46%。将我们的职业分类应用于其他85个国家，结果显示，低收入经济体中可在家完成的工作比例较低。

papers.title: The Impact of COVID-19 on Gender Equality
papers.authors: Titan Alon, Matthias Doepke, Jane Olmstead-Rumsey, Michèle Tertilt
papers.abstract: The economic downturn caused by the current COVID-19 outbreak has substantial implications for gender equality, both during the downturn and the subsequent recovery. Compared to “regular” recessions, which affect men’s employment more severely than women’s employment, the employment drop related to social distancing measures has a large impact on sectors with high female employment shares. In addition, closures of schools and daycare centers have massively increased child care needs, which has a particularly large impact on working mothers. The effects of the crisis on working mothers are likely to be persistent, due to high returns to experience in the labor market. Beyond the immediate crisis, there are opposing forces which may ultimately promote gender equality in the labor market. First, businesses are rapidly adopting flexible work arrangements, which are likely to persist. Second, there are also many fathers who now have to take primary responsibility for child care, which may erode social norms that currently lead to a lopsided distribution of the division of labor in house work and child care.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19对性别平等的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 当前COVID-19疫情引发的经济衰退，在衰退期间及随后的复苏过程中，都对性别平等产生了重大影响。与“常规”衰退（对男性就业的影响比女性更严重）相比，与社交距离措施相关的就业下降对女性就业份额高的行业影响巨大。此外，学校和日托中心的关闭极大地增加了儿童保育需求，这对在职母亲的影响尤为显著。由于劳动力市场经验的回报率很高，危机对在职母亲的影响可能持续存在。在危机之外，存在一些可能最终促进劳动力市场性别平等的相反力量。首先，企业正在迅速采用灵活的工作安排，这些安排可能会持续下去。其次，现在许多父亲不得不承担起儿童保育的主要责任，这可能会侵蚀当前导致家务劳动和儿童保育分工不平衡的社会规范。

papers.title: Polarization and Public Health: Partisan Differences in Social Distancing during the Coronavirus Pandemic
papers.authors: Hunt Allcott, Levi Boxell, Jacob C. Conway, Matthew Gentzkow, Michael Thaler, David Y. Yang
papers.abstract: We study partisan differences in Americans’ response to the COVID-19 pandemic. Political leaders and media outlets on the right and left have sent divergent messages about the severity of the crisis, which could impact the extent to which Republicans and Democrats engage in social distancing and other efforts to reduce disease transmission. We develop a simple model of a pandemic response with heterogeneous agents that clarifies the causes and consequences of heterogeneous responses. We use location data from a large sample of smartphones to show that areas with more Republicans engaged in less social distancing, controlling for other factors including public policies, population density, and local COVID cases and deaths. We then present new survey evidence of significant gaps at the individual level between Republicans and Democrats in self-reported social distancing, beliefs about personal COVID risk, and beliefs about the future severity of the pandemic.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, I12, I18
papers.zh_title: 极化与公共卫生：冠状病毒大流行期间社交距离的党派差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国人对COVID-19疫情反应的党派差异。右翼和左翼的政治领导人和媒体机构对危机的严重性发出了不同的信息，这可能影响共和党人和民主党人参与社交距离和其他减少疾病传播努力的程度。我们建立了一个具有异质性主体的疫情应对简单模型，阐明了异质性反应的原因和后果。我们使用来自大量智能手机样本的位置数据表明，在控制其他因素（包括公共政策、人口密度以及当地COVID病例和死亡人数）的情况下，共和党人比例更高的地区社交距离程度更低。然后，我们提出了新的调查证据，显示在个人层面，共和党人和民主党人在自我报告的社交距离、对个人COVID风险的信念以及对疫情未来严重性的信念方面存在显著差距。

papers.title: The Unprecedented Stock Market Impact of COVID-19
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Kyle J. Kost, Marco C. Sammon, Tasaneeya Viratyosin
papers.abstract: No previous infectious disease outbreak, including the Spanish Flu, has impacted the stock market as forcefully as the COVID-19 pandemic. In fact, previous pandemics left only mild traces on the U.S. stock market. We use text-based methods to develop these points with respect to large daily stock market moves back to 1900 and with respect to overall stock market volatility back to 1985. We also evaluate potential explanations for the unprecedented stock market reaction to the COVID-19 pandemic. The evidence we amass suggests that government restrictions on commercial activity and voluntary social distancing, operating with powerful effects in a service-oriented economy, are the main reasons the U.S. stock market reacted so much more forcefully to COVID-19 than to previous pandemics in 1918-19, 1957-58 and 1968.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19前所未有的股市影响
papers.zh_abstract: 以往任何传染病疫情，包括西班牙流感，都没有像COVID-19大流行那样对股市产生如此强烈的影响。事实上，以往的疫情只在美国股市留下了轻微的痕迹。我们使用基于文本的方法，针对1900年以来股市的大幅日波动以及1985年以来的整体股市波动率，阐述了这些观点。我们还评估了对COVID-19大流行导致股市出现前所未有的反应的可能解释。我们收集的证据表明，政府对商业活动的限制和自愿的社交距离，在一个以服务为导向的经济中发挥着强大的作用，是美国股市对COVID-19的反应比以往1918-19年、1957-58年和1968年疫情强烈得多的主要原因。

papers.title: Quitting in Protest: Presidential Policymaking and Civil Service Response
papers.authors: Charles Cameron, John M. de Figueiredo
papers.abstract: We formally model the impact of presidential policymaking on the willingness of bureaucrats to exert effort and stay in the government. In the model, centralized policy initiative by the president demotivates policy-oriented bureaucrats and can impel them to quit rather than implicate themselves in presidentially imposed policies they dislike. Those most likely to quit are a range of moderate bureaucrats. More extreme bureaucrats may be willing to wait out an incumbent president in the hope of shaping future policy. As control of the White House alternates between ideologically opposed extreme presidents, policy-minded moderates depart from bureaucratic agencies leaving only policy extremists or poorly performing "slackers." The consequences for policy making are substantial. Despite these adverse consequences, presidents have strong incentives to engage in centralized policymaking.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：H11, H83, J45, K00
papers.zh_title: 以辞职抗议：总统决策与公务员回应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们正式建模分析了总统决策对公务员努力意愿和留任政府意愿的影响。在该模型中，总统的集中政策倡议会削弱以政策为导向的公务员的积极性，并可能促使他们辞职，而不是卷入他们不喜欢的总统强加的政策中。最有可能辞职的是一系列温和派公务员。更极端的公务员可能愿意等待现任总统下台，以期塑造未来的政策。当白宫控制权在意识形态对立的极端总统之间交替时，以政策为导向的温和派会离开官僚机构，只留下政策极端分子或表现不佳的“懒散者”。这对政策制定的影响是巨大的。尽管存在这些不利后果，总统仍有强烈的动机进行集中决策。

papers.title: The Murder-Suicide of the Rentier: Population Aging and the Risk Premium
papers.authors: Joseph Kopecky, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: Population aging has been linked to global declines in real interest rates. A similar trend is seen for equity risk premia, which are on the rise. An existing literature can explain part of the declining trend in safe rates using demographics, but has no mechanism to speak to trends in relative returns on different assets. We calibrate a heterogeneous agent life-cycle model with equity markets and aggregate risk, and we show that aging demographics can simultaneously account for both the majority of a downward trend in the risk free rate, while also increasing the return premium attached to risky assets. This is because the life-cycle savings dynamics that have been well documented exert less pressure on risky assets as older households shift away from risk. Under reasonable calibrations we find declines in the safe rate that are considerably larger than most existing estimates between the years 1990 and 2017. We are also able to account for most of the rise in the equity risk premium. Projecting forward to 2050 we show that persistent demographic forces will continue push the risk free rate further into negative territory, while the equity risk premium remains elevated.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E21, E43, G11, J11
papers.zh_title: 食利者的谋杀式自杀：人口老龄化与风险溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 人口老龄化与全球实际利率的下降有关。股票风险溢价也呈现出类似的趋势，但方向相反，即正在上升。现有文献可以用人口统计学解释安全利率下降趋势的一部分，但无法解释不同资产相对回报率的趋势。我们校准了一个包含股票市场和总体风险的异质性主体生命周期模型，并表明老龄化的人口结构可以同时解释无风险利率下降趋势的大部分，同时增加风险资产的回报溢价。这是因为，随着老年家庭远离风险，已有充分记录的生命周期储蓄动态对风险资产施加的压力较小。在合理的校准下，我们发现1990年至2017年间安全利率的下降幅度远大于大多数现有估计。我们还能够解释股票风险溢价上升的大部分原因。展望2050年，我们表明持续的人口力量将继续推动无风险利率进一步进入负值区域，而股票风险溢价仍将居高不下。

papers.title: Is the Social Safety Net a Long-Term Investment? Large-Scale Evidence from the Food Stamps Program
papers.authors: Martha J. Bailey, Hilary W. Hoynes, Maya Rossin-Slater, Reed Walker
papers.abstract: We use novel, large-scale data on 43 million Americans from the 2000 Census and the 2001 to 2013 American Communities Survey linked to the Social Security Administration’s NUMIDENT to study how a policy-driven increase in economic resources for families affects children’s long-term outcomes. Using variation from the county-level roll-out of the Food Stamps program between 1961 and 1975, we find that children with access to greater economic resources before age five experience an increase of 6 percent of a standard deviation in their adult human capital, 3 percent of a standard deviation in their adult economic self-sufficiency, 8 percent of a standard deviation in the quality of their adult neighborhoods, 0.4 percentage-point increase in longevity, and a 0.5 percentage-point decrease in likelihood of being incarcerated. Based on these estimates, we conclude that Food Stamps’ transfer of resources to families is a highly cost-effective investment into young children, yielding a marginal value of public funds of approximately 56.
papers.zh_title: 社会安全网是长期投资吗？来自食品券计划的大规模证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自2000年人口普查和2001年至2013年美国社区调查的4300万美国人的新颖大规模数据，并与社会保障局的NUMIDENT数据库相关联，研究政策驱动的家庭经济资源增加如何影响儿童的长期结果。利用1961年至1975年间县级食品券计划推广的差异，我们发现，五岁前获得更多经济资源的儿童，其成年后人力资本提高6%个标准差，成年经济自给自足能力提高3%个标准差，成年社区质量提高8%个标准差，寿命增加0.4个百分点，被监禁的可能性降低0.5个百分点。基于这些估计，我们得出结论，食品券向家庭转移资源是一项对幼儿极具成本效益的投资，其公共资金的边际价值约为56。

papers.title: The Saving Glut of the Rich
papers.authors: Atif R. Mian, Ludwig Straub, Amir Sufi
papers.abstract: This paper develops a new unveiling methodology to trace distributional household saving through the financial system and applies it to tax records from 1963 to 2019. Since the 1980s, saving by the top 1% has surged, creating a saving glut of the rich comparable in scale to the global saving glut and equally influential in driving the demand for safe assets. Unveiling the financial sector reveals that this glut financed much of the rise in middle-class borrowing before 2008 and the expansion of federal debt thereafter. Our framework helps illustrate how rising inequality reshapes financial intermediation and debt dynamics.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D31, E21, E44, G51
papers.zh_title: 富人的储蓄过剩
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种新的揭示方法，用于追踪家庭储蓄在金融体系中的分布情况，并将其应用于1963年至2019年的税收记录。自20世纪80年代以来，顶层1%人群的储蓄激增，形成了与全球储蓄过剩规模相当且对安全资产需求影响同样巨大的富人储蓄过剩。揭示金融部门后发现，这种过剩为2008年前中产阶级借贷的增长以及此后联邦债务的扩张提供了大部分资金。我们的框架有助于说明日益加剧的不平等如何重塑金融中介和债务动态。

papers.title: Indebted Demand
papers.authors: Atif R. Mian, Ludwig Straub, Amir Sufi
papers.abstract: We propose a theory of indebted demand, capturing the idea that large debt burdens by households and governments lower aggregate demand, and thus natural interest rates. At the core of the theory is the simple yet under-appreciated observation that borrowers and savers differ in their marginal propensities to save out of permanent income. Embedding this insight in a two-agent overlapping-generations model, we find that recent trends in income inequality and financial liberalization lead to indebted household demand, pushing down natural interest rates. Moreover, popular expansionary policies—such as accommodative monetary policy and deficit spending—generate a debt-financed short-run boom at the expense of indebted demand in the future. When demand is sufficiently indebted, the economy gets stuck in a debt-driven liquidity trap, or debt trap. Escaping a debt trap requires consideration of less standard macroeconomic policies, such as those focused on redistribution or those reducing the structural sources of high inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D31, E21, E32, E43, E44, E52, E62, G51
papers.zh_title: 负债需求
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种负债需求理论，旨在捕捉家庭和政府巨额债务负担会降低总需求，从而降低自然利率这一观点。该理论的核心是一个简单但未被充分认识的观察：借款人和储蓄者在永久收入的边际储蓄倾向方面存在差异。将这一见解嵌入一个两主体世代交叠模型中，我们发现，近期的收入不平等和金融自由化趋势导致了家庭负债需求，从而压低了自然利率。此外，流行的扩张性政策——如宽松的货币政策和赤字支出——会产生债务融资的短期繁荣，但代价是未来的负债需求。当需求负债过高时，经济会陷入债务驱动的流动性陷阱，即债务陷阱。摆脱债务陷阱需要考虑非标准的宏观经济政策，例如那些侧重于再分配或减少高不平等结构性根源的政策。

papers.title: Decomposing the Fiscal Multiplier
papers.authors: James S. Cloyne, Òscar Jordà, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: The fiscal “multiplier” seeks to measure how many additional dollars of output are gained or lost for each dollar of fiscal expansion or contraction. In practice, the multiplier at any point in time depends on the monetary policy response and existing conditions in the economy. Using the IMF fiscal consolidations dataset for identification and a new decomposition-based approach, we show how to quantify the importance of these monetary-fiscal interactions. In the data, the fiscal multiplier varies considerably with monetary policy: it can be as small as zero, or as large as 2, depending on the monetary offset. More generally, we show how to decompose the typical macro impulse response function by extending local projections to carry out the well-known Kitagawa-Blinder-Oaxaca decomposition. This provides a convenient way to evaluate the effects of policy, state-dependence, time-variation, and the balance conditions for identification.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C54, C99, E32, E62, H20, H5, N10
papers.zh_title: 分解财政乘数
