papers.zh_abstract: 财政“乘数”旨在衡量每增加或减少一美元财政支出，产出相应增加或减少多少美元。在实践中，任何时点的乘数都取决于货币政策反应和经济的现有状况。利用国际货币基金组织的财政整顿数据集进行识别，并采用一种新的基于分解的方法，我们展示了如何量化这些货币-财政相互作用的重要性。在数据中，财政乘数随货币政策变化显著：根据货币抵消的程度，它可以小至零，或大至2。更一般地，我们通过扩展局部投影法来执行著名的Kitagawa-Blinder-Oaxaca分解，从而展示了如何分解典型的宏观脉冲响应函数。这提供了一种便捷的方法来评估政策效应、状态依赖性、时变性以及识别的平衡条件。

papers.title: Social Insurance and Public Assistance in the Twentieth-Century United States: 2019 Presidential Address for the Economic History Association
papers.authors: Price V. Fishback
papers.abstract: The growth of American governments in the twentieth century included large increases in funds for social insurance and public assistance. Social insurance has increased far more than public assistance, so “rise in the social insurance state” is a far better description of the century than “rise in the welfare state.” The United States has increased total spending in these areas as much or more as have European countries, but the U.S. spending has relied less heavily on government programs. The U.S. really has 51 different social welfare systems, and I develop estimates of these benefits across time and place and compare them to the poverty line, manufacturing earnings and benefits, state per capita incomes in the US, as well as GDP per capita in countries throughout the world.
papers.zh_title: 二十世纪美国的社会保险与公共援助：2019年经济史协会主席演讲
papers.zh_abstract: 二十世纪美国政府的扩张包括用于社会保险和公共援助资金的大幅增加。社会保险的增长远大于公共援助，因此“社会保险国家的兴起”比“福利国家的兴起”更能描述这个世纪。美国在这些领域的总支出与欧洲国家一样多甚至更多，但美国的支出对政府项目的依赖程度较低。美国实际上有51种不同的社会福利体系，我们估算了这些福利在不同时间和地点的水平，并将其与贫困线、制造业收入和福利、美国各州人均收入以及世界各国的人均GDP进行了比较。

papers.title: The Rise of American Minimum Wages, 1912-1968
papers.authors: Price V. Fishback, Andrew Seltzer
papers.abstract: We describe the economic history of the rise of the American minimum wage between 1910 and 1968. Each new FLSA amendment led to a new peak in the real purchasing power of the national minimum. Exemptions to the FLSA were progressively closed and the share of workers covered finally increased from about 50 percent of the private sector workforce in 1937, to 77 percent of the private sector and 40 percent of the public sector workforce in 1966. By the late 1970s coverage was nearly complete, with only the smallest employers exempted. We describe the political economic history of the minimum wage laws, as well as the debates among economists. Another key feature is a renewed emphasis on the roles played by the states in passing the original minimum wage laws for women. The states filled some of the gaps in coverage left by the FLSA after 1938 and set higher minimum rates for women in some sectors in the 1940s and 1950s than the FLSA set for men and women in interstate commerce. Since 1981 a rising number of states have set general minimum wages that substantially exceed the national minimum.
papers.zh_title: 美国最低工资的兴起，1912-1968
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了1910年至1968年间美国最低工资兴起的经济史。每次新的《公平劳动标准法》修正案都导致全国最低工资实际购买力达到新的峰值。对《公平劳动标准法》的豁免被逐步取消，受覆盖工人比例最终从1937年约占私营部门劳动力的50%，增加到1966年占私营部门劳动力的77%和公共部门劳动力的40%。到20世纪70年代末，覆盖范围几乎完整，只有最小的雇主被豁免。我们描述了最低工资法的政治经济史，以及经济学家之间的辩论。另一个关键特征是重新强调了各州在通过最初的女性最低工资法中所扮演的角色。各州填补了1938年后《公平劳动标准法》留下的一些覆盖空白，并在20世纪40年代和50年代为某些行业的女性设定了比《公平劳动标准法》为州际商业中的男性和女性设定的更高的最低工资率。自1981年以来，越来越多的州设定了大幅超过全国最低工资的通用最低工资。

papers.title: Discrimination, Migration, and Economic Outcomes: Evidence from World War I
papers.authors: Andreas Ferrara, Price V. Fishback
papers.abstract: Are the costs of discrimination mainly borne by the targeted group or by society? This paper examines both individual and aggregate costs of ethnic discrimination. Studying Germans living in the U.S. during World War I, an event that abruptly downgraded their previously high social standing, we propose a novel measure of local anti-German sentiment based on war casualties. We show that Germans disproportionally fled counties with high casualty rates and that those counties saw more anti-German slurs reported in newspapers. German movers had worse occupational outcomes after the war but also the discriminating communities paid a substantial cost. Counties with larger outflows of Germans, who pre-war tended to be well-trained manufacturing workers, saw a drop in average annual manufacturing wages of 1-7% which persisted until 1940. Thus, for discriminating communities, a few years of intense anti-German sentiment were reflected in worse economic outcomes that lasted for more than a decade.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：J15, J61, J71, N32, N42
papers.zh_title: 歧视、移民与经济结果：来自第一次世界大战的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 歧视的成本主要由目标群体承担还是由社会承担？本文考察了种族歧视的个人成本和总体成本。以第一次世界大战期间居住在美国的德国人为研究对象，这一事件突然降低了他们先前较高的社会地位，我们基于战争伤亡提出了一种新的当地反德情绪衡量指标。我们表明，德国人不成比例地逃离了伤亡率高的县，并且这些县在报纸上出现了更多反德诽谤报道。战后，迁移的德国人职业结果更差，但歧视性社区也付出了巨大代价。德国人（战前往往是训练有素的制造业工人）外流较多的县，其制造业平均年工资下降了1-7%，并持续到1940年。因此，对于歧视性社区而言，几年的强烈反德情绪反映在持续十多年更糟糕的经济结果上。

papers.title: Estimating Macroeconomic Models of Financial Crises: An Endogenous Regime-Switching Approach
papers.authors: Gianluca Benigno, Andrew Foerster, Christopher Otrok, Alessandro Rebucci
papers.abstract: We estimate a workhorse DSGE model with an occasionally binding borrowing constraint. First, we propose a new specification of the occasionally binding constraint, where the transition between the unconstrained and constrained states is a stochastic function of the leverage level and the constraint multiplier. This specification maps into an endogenous regime-switching model. Second, we develop a general perturbation method for the solution of such a model. Third, we estimate the model with Bayesian methods to fit Mexico's business cycle and financial crisis history since 1981. The estimated model fits the data well, identifying three crisis episodes of varying duration and intensity: the Debt Crisis in the early-1980s, the Peso Crisis in the mid-1990s, and the Global Financial Crisis in the late-2000s. The crisis episodes generated by the estimated model display sluggish and long-lasting build-up and stagnation phases driven by plausible combinations of shocks. Different sets of shocks explain different variables over the business cycle and the three historical episodes of sudden stops identified.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C11, E30, F41, G01
papers.zh_title: 估计金融危机宏观经济模型：一种内生体制转换方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个具有偶尔有约束力的借贷约束的标准动态随机一般均衡模型。首先，我们提出了一个偶尔有约束力约束的新规范，其中无约束状态和有约束状态之间的转换是杠杆水平和约束乘数的随机函数。这种规范映射到一个内生体制转换模型。其次，我们开发了一种通用的摄动方法来解决此类模型。第三，我们使用贝叶斯方法估计该模型，以拟合自1981年以来墨西哥的商业周期和金融危机历史。估计模型很好地拟合了数据，识别了三个不同持续时间和强度的危机事件：20世纪80年代初的债务危机、20世纪90年代中期的比索危机和21世纪后期的全球金融危机。估计模型产生的危机事件显示出缓慢且持久的积累和停滞阶段，这些阶段由合理的冲击组合驱动。不同的冲击组合解释了商业周期以及所识别的三个历史性突然停止事件中不同变量的变化。

papers.title: Longer-run Economic Consequences of Pandemics
papers.authors: Òscar Jordà, Sanjay R. Singh, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: What are the medium- to long-term effects of pandemics? How do they differ from other economic disasters? We study major pandemics using the rates of return on assets stretching back to the 14th century. Significant macroeconomic after-effects of pandemics persist for about decades, with real rates of return substantially depressed, in stark contrast to what happens after wars. Our findings are consistent with the neoclassical growth model: capital is destroyed in wars, but not in pandemics; pandemics instead may induce relative labor scarcity and/or a shift to greater precautionary savings.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, F41, N10, N30, N40
papers.zh_title: 大流行的长期经济后果
papers.zh_abstract: 大流行的中长期影响是什么？它们与其他经济灾难有何不同？我们利用可追溯到14世纪的资产回报率来研究重大大流行。大流行的显著宏观经济后遗症持续约数十年，实际回报率大幅下降，这与战争后的情况形成鲜明对比。我们的发现与新古典增长模型一致：战争摧毁资本，但大流行不会；大流行反而可能导致相对劳动力稀缺和/或转向更高的预防性储蓄。

papers.title: Changes in Assortative Matching and Inequality in Income: Evidence for the UK
papers.authors: Pierre-André Chiappori, Monica Costa Dias, Sam Crossman, Costas Meghir
papers.abstract: The extent to which like-with like marry is important for inequality as well as for the outcomes of children that result from the union. In this paper we present evidence on changes in assortative mating and its implications for household inequality in the UK. Our approach contrasts with others in the literature in that it is consistent with an underlying model of the marriage market. We argue that a key advantage of this approach is that it creates a direct connection between changes in assortativeness in marriage and changes in the value of marriage for the various possible matches by education group. Our empirical results do not show a clear direction in the change in assortativeness in the UK, between the birth cohorts of 1945-54 and 1965-74. We find that changes in assortativeness pushed income inequality up slightly, but that the strong changes in education attainment across the two cohorts contributed to scale down inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：H31, I24, I3, J1, J11, J12
papers.zh_title: 英国同质婚配与收入不平等的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 同类人结婚的程度对不平等以及由此产生的子女结果都很重要。在本文中，我们提供了英国同质婚配变化及其对家庭不平等影响的证据。我们的方法与文献中的其他方法不同，因为它与婚姻市场的潜在模型一致。我们认为，这种方法的一个关键优势是，它在婚姻同质性的变化与按教育群体划分的各种可能匹配的婚姻价值变化之间建立了直接联系。我们的实证结果并未显示，在1945-54年和1965-74年出生队列之间，英国同质婚配的变化有明确方向。我们发现，同质婚配的变化略微推高了收入不平等，但两个队列之间教育程度的强烈变化有助于缩小不平等。

papers.title: Changes in Assortative Matching: Theory and Evidence for the US
papers.authors: Pierre-André Chiappori, Monica Costa Dias, Costas Meghir
papers.abstract: The extent to which like-with like marry is particularly important for inequality as well as for the outcomes of children that result from the union. In this paper we discuss approaches to the measurement of changes in assortative mating. We derive two key conditions that a well-defined measure should satisfy. We argue that changes in assortativeness should be interpreted through a structural model of the marriage market; in particular, a crucial issue is how they relate to variations in the economic surplus generated by marriage. We propose a very general criterion of increase in assortativeness, and show that almost all indices used in the literature are implied by our criterion with one notable exception, that moreover violates one of our conditions. Finally, we use our approach to evaluate the evolution of assortative matching in the US over the last decades, and conclude that assortative matching has increased, particularly at the top of the education distribution.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：J01, J11, J12
papers.zh_title: 同质婚配的变化：美国理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 同类相配的程度对不平等以及由此产生的子女结果尤为重要。本文讨论了衡量婚配匹配度变化的方法。我们推导出一个良好定义的衡量标准应满足的两个关键条件。我们认为，婚配匹配度的变化应通过婚姻市场的结构模型来解释；特别地，一个关键问题是这些变化如何与婚姻产生的经济剩余变化相关联。我们提出了一个非常普遍的匹配度增加标准，并表明文献中使用的几乎所有指标都隐含在我们的标准中，但有一个显著的例外，该例外还违反了我们的一个条件。最后，我们利用我们的方法评估了过去几十年美国同质婚配的演变，并得出结论认为同质婚配有所增加，尤其是在教育分布的顶端。

papers.title: Culture and Gender Allocation of Tasks: Source Country Characteristics and the Division of Non-market Work among US Immigrants
papers.authors: Francine D. Blau, Lawrence Kahn, Matthew L. Comey, Amanda R. Eng, Pamela A. Meyerhofer, Alexander Willén
papers.abstract: There is a well-known gender difference in time allocation within the household, which has important implications for gender differences in labor market outcomes. We ask how malleable this gender difference in time allocation is to culture. In particular, we ask if US immigrants allocate tasks differently depending upon the characteristics of the source countries from which they emigrated. Using data from the 2003-2017 waves of the American Time Use Survey (ATUS), we find that first-generation immigrants, both women and men, from source countries with more gender equality (as measured by the World Economic Forum’s Global Gender Gap Index) allocate tasks more equally, while those from less gender equal source countries allocate tasks more traditionally. These results are robust to controls for immigration cohort, years since migration, and other own and spouse characteristics. There is also some indication of an effect of parent source country gender equality for second-generation immigrants, particularly for second-generation men with children. Our findings suggest that broader cultural factors do influence the gender division of labor in the household.
papers.zh_title: 文化与性别任务分配：来源国特征与美国移民中非市场工作的分工
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭内部时间分配存在众所周知的性别差异，这对劳动力市场结果的性别差异具有重要影响。我们探究这种时间分配的性别差异在多大程度上受文化影响。具体而言，我们研究美国移民是否根据其移出国的特征而不同地分配任务。利用2003-2017年美国时间使用调查（ATUS）的数据，我们发现，来自性别更平等来源国（以世界经济论坛全球性别差距指数衡量）的第一代移民，无论男女，都更平等地分配任务，而来自性别较不平等来源国的移民则更传统地分配任务。这些结果在控制了移民群体、移民年限以及其他自身和配偶特征后仍然稳健。也有迹象表明，父母来源国的性别平等对第二代移民有影响，尤其是有孩子的第二代男性。我们的研究结果表明，更广泛的文化因素确实会影响家庭内部的性别分工。

papers.title: How Political Insiders Lose Out When International Aid Underperforms: Evidence from a Participatory Development Experiment in Ghana
papers.authors: Kate Baldwin, Dean Karlan, Christopher R. Udry, Ernest Appiah
papers.abstract: Participatory development is designed to mitigate problems of political bias in pre-existing local government but also interacts with it in complex ways. Using a five-year randomized controlled study in 97 clusters of villages (194 villages) in Ghana, we analyze the effects of a major participatory development program on participation in, leadership of and investment by preexisting political institutions, and on households’ overall socioeconomic well-being. Applying theoretical insights on political participation and redistributive politics, we consider the possibility of both cross-institutional mobilization and displacement, and heterogeneous effects by partisanship. We find the government and its political supporters acted with high expectations for the participatory approach: treatment led to increased participation in local governance and reallocation of resources. But the results did not meet expectations, resulting in a worsening of socioeconomic wellbeing in treatment versus control villages for government supporters. This demonstrates international aid’s complex distributional consequences.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：H4, H7, O12, O17, O19
papers.zh_title: 当国际援助表现不佳时，政治内部人士如何受损：来自加纳参与式发展实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 参与式发展旨在缓解现有地方政府中政治偏袒的问题，但也与之以复杂的方式相互作用。通过在加纳97个村庄群（194个村庄）进行的一项为期五年的随机对照研究，我们分析了一个大型参与式发展项目对现有政治机构的参与、领导、投资以及家庭整体社会经济福祉的影响。运用关于政治参与和再分配政治的理论见解，我们考虑了跨机构动员和替代的可能性，以及按党派归属划分的异质性效应。我们发现政府及其政治支持者对参与式方法抱有很高期望：处理导致了地方治理参与度的提高和资源的重新分配。但结果未达到预期，导致政府支持者在处理村与对照村相比社会经济福祉恶化。这展示了国际援助复杂的分配后果。

papers.title: The Brazilian Bombshell? The Long-Term Impact of the 1918 Influenza Pandemic the South American Way
papers.authors: Amanda Guimbeau, Nidhiya Menon, Aldo Musacchio
papers.abstract: We analyze the repercussions of the 1918 Influenza Pandemic on demographic measures, human capital formation, and productivity markers in the state of Sao Paulo, Brazil's financial center and the most populous city in South America today. Leveraging temporal and spatial variation in district-level estimates of influenza-related deaths for the period 1917-1920 combined with a unique database on socio-economic, health and productivity outcomes constructed from historical and contemporary documents for all districts in Sao Paulo, we find that the 1918 Influenza pandemic had significant negative impacts on infant mortality and sex ratios at birth in 1920 (the short-run). We find robust evidence of persistent effects on health, educational attainment and productivity more than twenty years later. Our study highlights the importance of documenting the legacy of historical shocks in understanding the development trajectories of countries over time.
papers.zh_title: 巴西炸弹？1918年流感大流行的南美式长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了1918年流感大流行对巴西圣保罗州（巴西金融中心，也是当今南美洲人口最多的城市）的人口指标、人力资本形成和生产力标志的影响。利用1917-1920年期间地区层面流感相关死亡估计的时空变化，并结合根据圣保罗所有地区的历史和当代文献构建的社会经济、健康和生产力结果的独特数据库，我们发现1918年流感大流行对1920年（短期）的婴儿死亡率和出生性别比产生了显著的负面影响。我们发现了二十多年后对健康、教育程度和生产力的持续影响的稳健证据。我们的研究强调了记录历史冲击的遗产对于理解各国随时间发展轨迹的重要性。

papers.title: The Unintended Consequences of NGO-Provided Aid on Government Services in Uganda
papers.authors: Erika Deserranno, Aisha Nansamba, Nancy Qian
papers.abstract: This paper studies the impact of the entry of a large foreign NGO which provides basic health services on the government’s capacity to provide similar services in rural Uganda. In villages with a government health worker at baseline, the NGO hires the government worker in half of the villages it enters. Where “poaching” occurs, overall healthcare and infant mortality worsen. In villages where the NGO hires a second worker who is not the government worker, health outcomes improve. In villages with no government health worker at baseline, NGO entry improves healthcare and health outcomes, but increases the closure of village schools, the other public good that relies on skilled labor, and reduces school attendance. Our results support the concern that NGOs can have unintended adverse effects on government services in contexts where skilled labor is scarce.
papers.zh_title: 非政府组织提供的援助对乌干达政府服务的意外后果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一家提供基本医疗服务的大型外国非政府组织进入乌干达农村地区对政府提供类似服务能力的影响。在基线时拥有政府卫生工作者的村庄中，该非政府组织在其进入的一半村庄中雇佣了该政府工作者。在发生“挖角”的地方，整体医疗保健和婴儿死亡率恶化。在非政府组织雇佣了非政府工作者的第二名工人的村庄，健康结果得到改善。在基线时没有政府卫生工作者的村庄，非政府组织的进入改善了医疗保健和健康结果，但增加了村庄学校（另一种依赖熟练劳动力的公共品）的关闭，并降低了入学率。我们的结果支持了这样一种担忧：在熟练劳动力稀缺的环境中，非政府组织可能对政府服务产生意想不到的不利影响。

papers.title: Where Has All the Data Gone?
papers.authors: Maryam Farboodi, Adrien Matray, Laura Veldkamp, Venky Venkateswaran
papers.abstract: As financial technology improves and data becomes more abundant, do market prices reflect this data growth? While recent studies documented rises in the information content of prices, we show that, across asset types, there is data divergence. Large, growth stock prices increasingly reflect information about future firm earnings. This is the rise reflected in the previous studies. But over the same time period, the information content of small and value firm prices was flat or declining. Our structural estimation allows us to disentangle these informational trends from changing asset characteristics. These facts pose a new puzzle: Amidst the explosion of data processing, why has this data informed only the prices of a subset of firms, instead of benefiting the market as a whole? Our structural model offers a potential answer: Large growth firms' data grew in value, as big firms got bigger and growth magnified the effect of these changes in size.
papers.zh_title: 数据都去哪儿了？
papers.zh_abstract: 随着金融技术的改进和数据变得更加丰富，市场价格是否反映了这种数据增长？虽然最近的研究记录了价格信息含量的上升，但我们表明，在资产类型中，存在数据分化。大型成长股的价格越来越多地反映未来公司收益的信息。这是先前研究中反映的上升趋势。但在同一时期，小型和价值型公司价格的信息含量持平或下降。我们的结构估计使我们能够将这些信息趋势与不断变化的资产特征区分开来。这些事实提出了一个新的难题：在数据处理爆炸式增长的情况下，为什么这些数据只告知了一部分公司的价格，而不是惠及整个市场？我们的结构模型提供了一个可能的答案：大型成长型公司的数据价值增长，因为大公司变得更大，而增长放大了这些规模变化的影响。

papers.title: The Economic Impact of a High National Minimum Wage: Evidence from the 1966 Fair Labor Standards Act
papers.authors: Martha J. Bailey, John DiNardo, Bryan A. Stuart
papers.abstract: This paper examines the short and longer-term economic effects of the 1966 Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA) which increased the national minimum wage to its highest level of the 20th Century and extended coverage to an additional 9.1 million workers. Exploiting differences in the “bite” of the minimum wage due to regional variation in the standard of living and industry composition, this paper finds that the 1966 FLSA increased wages dramatically but reduced aggregate employment only modestly. However, the disemployment effects were significantly larger among African-American men, forty percent of whom earned below the new minimum wage in 1966.
papers.zh_title: 高国家最低工资的经济影响：来自1966年《公平劳动标准法》的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了1966年《公平劳动标准法》（FLSA）的短期和长期经济影响，该法案将国家最低工资提高到20世纪的最高水平，并将覆盖范围扩大到额外的910万工人。利用因地区生活水平和行业构成差异导致的最低工资“冲击”程度的不同，本文发现1966年FLSA大幅提高了工资，但仅适度减少了总就业。然而，非裔美国男性的就业减少效应显著更大，其中40%的人在1966年的收入低于新的最低工资。

papers.title: Public Information is an Incentive for Politicians: Experimental Evidence from Delhi Elections
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Nils T. Enevoldsen, Rohini Pande, Michael Walton
papers.abstract: In 2010, we informed a random set of Delhi councilors, some ineligible for re-election in their current ward, that a newspaper would report on their performance shortly prior to the 2012 city elections. Using slum dwellers' spending preferences, we created a councilor-specific index of pro-poor spending. Treated councilors increased pro-poor spending in high-slum wards. Cross-cutting experiments suggest that the public nature of report cards, not access to information on public services per se, incentivized councilors. Data on party ticket allocation and electoral outcomes shows that, in low-information situations, credible public disclosures of politician achievements matters to both parties and voters.
papers.zh_title: 公共信息是对政治家的激励：来自德里选举的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 2010年，我们告知一组随机选取的德里市议员（其中一些人在其现任选区没有连任资格），一家报纸将在2012年市政选举前不久报道他们的表现。利用贫民窟居民的支出偏好，我们创建了一个针对市议员的亲贫支出指数。受到干预的市议员在高贫民窟选区增加了亲贫支出。交叉实验表明，激励市议员的是报告卡的公开性质，而非获取公共服务信息本身。关于政党选票分配和选举结果的数据显示，在信息匮乏的情况下，政治家成就的可靠公开披露对政党和选民都很重要。

papers.title: Productivity Dispersion and Persistence Among the World's Most Numerous Firms
papers.authors: Casey C. Maue, Marshall Burke, Kyle J. Emerick
papers.abstract: A vast firm productivity literature finds that otherwise similar firms differ widely in their productivity and that these differences persist through time, with important implications for the broader macroeconomy. These stylized facts derive largely from studies of manufacturing firms in wealthy countries, and thus have unknown relevance for the world's most common firm type, the smallholder farm. We use detailed micro data from over 12,000 smallholder farms and nearly 100,000 agricultural plots across four countries in Africa to study the size, source, and persistence of productivity dispersion among smallholder farmers. Applying standard regression-based approaches to measuring productivity residuals, we find much larger dispersion but less persistence than benchmark estimates from manufacturing. We then show, using a novel framework that combines physical output measurement, estimates from satellites, and machine learning, that about half of this discrepancy can be accounted for by measurement error in output. After correcting for measurement error, productivity differences across firms and over time in our smallholder agricultural setting closely match benchmark estimates for non-agricultural firms. These results question some common implications of observed dispersion, such as the importance of misallocation of factors of production.
papers.zh_title: 全球数量最多企业的生产率离散性与持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 大量关于企业生产率的研究发现，看似相似的企业在生产率上存在巨大差异，且这些差异会持续存在，对宏观经济具有重要影响。这些典型事实主要源于对富裕国家制造业企业的研究，因此对全球最常见的企业类型——小农户——的相关性尚不明确。我们利用来自非洲四国超过12,000个小农户和近100,000个农业地块的详细微观数据，研究小农户生产率离散性的规模、来源和持续性。采用基于回归的标准方法测量生产率残差，我们发现与制造业的基准估计相比，离散性更大但持续性更弱。随后，我们展示了一个结合物理产出测量、卫星估计和机器学习的新框架，约一半的差异可由产出测量误差解释。在纠正测量误差后，我们的小农户农业环境中企业间和跨时期的生产率差异与非农业企业的基准估计高度吻合。这些结果对观察到的离散性的一些常见含义（如生产要素错配的重要性）提出了质疑。

papers.title: The Economics of Tobacco Regulation: A Comprehensive Review
papers.authors: Philip DeCicca, Donald S. Kenkel, Michael F. Lovenheim
papers.abstract: Tobacco regulation has been a major component of health policy in the developed world since the UK’s Royal College of Physicians’ and the U.S. Surgeon General’s reports in the 1960s. Such regulation, which has intensified in the past two decades, includes cigarette taxation, place-based smoking bans in areas ranging from bars and restaurants to workplaces, and regulations designed to make tobacco products less desirable. More recently, the availability of alternative products, most notably e-cigarettes, has increased dramatically, and these products are just starting to be regulated. Despite an extensive body of research on tobacco regulations, there remains substantial debate regarding their effectiveness, and ultimately, their impact on economic welfare. We provide the first comprehensive review of the state of research in the economics of tobacco regulation in two decades.
papers.zh_title: 烟草监管经济学：全面综述
papers.zh_abstract: 自20世纪60年代英国皇家内科医学院和美国卫生局局长的报告以来，烟草监管一直是发达国家卫生政策的重要组成部分。这种监管在过去二十年中不断加强，包括卷烟税、基于场所的禁烟令（范围从酒吧和餐厅到工作场所），以及旨在降低烟草产品吸引力的法规。最近，替代产品（尤其是电子烟）的可获得性大幅增加，这些产品刚刚开始受到监管。尽管关于烟草监管的研究广泛，但其有效性以及对经济福利的最终影响仍存在重大争议。我们提供了二十年来烟草监管经济学研究状况的首次全面综述。

papers.title: Rational Heuristics? Expectations and Behaviors in Evolving Economies with Heterogeneous Interacting Agents
papers.authors: Giovanni Dosi, Mauro Napoletano, Andrea Roventini, Joseph E. Stiglitz, Tania Treibich
papers.abstract: We analyze the individual and macroeconomic impacts of heterogeneous expectations and action rules within an agent-based model populated by heterogeneous, interacting firms. Agents have to cope with a complex evolving economy characterized by deep uncertainty resulting from technical change, imperfect information, coordination hurdles and structural breaks. In these circumstances, we find that neither individual nor macroeconomic dynamics improve when agents replace myopic expectations with less naïve learning rules. Our results suggest that fast and frugal robust heuristics may not be a second-best option but rather “rational” responses in complex and changing macroeconomic environments.
papers.zh_title: 理性启发式？异质性互动主体演化经济中的预期与行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个由异质性、互动企业组成的基于主体的模型中，分析了异质性预期和行动规则对个体及宏观经济的影响。主体必须应对一个复杂的演化经济，其特征是由技术变革、不完全信息、协调障碍和结构性断裂导致的深度不确定性。在这些情况下，我们发现当主体用不那么天真的学习规则取代短视预期时，个体和宏观经济动态均未改善。我们的结果表明，快速而节俭的稳健启发式可能不是次优选择，而是在复杂且变化的宏观经济环境中的“理性”反应。

papers.title: Environmental Preferences and Technological Choices: Is Market Competition Clean or Dirty?
papers.authors: Philippe Aghion, Roland Bénabou, Ralf Martin, Alexandra Roulet
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the joint effect of consumers' environmental concerns and product-market competition on firms' decisions whether to innovate “clean” or “dirty”. We first develop a step-by-step innovation model to capture the basic intuition that socially responsible consumers induce firms to escape competition by pursuing greener innovations. To test and quantify the theory, we bring together patent data, survey data on environmental values, and competition measures. Using a panel of 8,562 firms from the automobile sector that patented in 42 countries between 1998 and 2012, we indeed find that greater exposure to environmental attitudes has a significant positive effect on the probability for a firm to innovate in the clean direction, and all the more so the higher the degree of product market competition. Results suggest that the combination of historically realistic increases in prosocial attitudes and product market competition can have the same effect on green innovation as major increase in fuel prices.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IO, PE, POL；JEL：D21, D22, D62, D64, H23, O3, O31
papers.zh_title: 环境偏好与技术选择：市场竞争是清洁还是肮脏？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了消费者的环境关注与产品市场竞争对企业决定创新“清洁”还是“肮脏”的联合效应。我们首先开发了一个逐步创新模型，以捕捉基本直觉：具有社会责任感的消费者促使企业通过追求更绿色的创新来逃避竞争。为了检验和量化这一理论，我们整合了专利数据、环境价值观调查数据和竞争度量指标。利用1998年至2012年间在42个国家申请专利的汽车行业8,562家企业的面板数据，我们确实发现，对环境态度的更大暴露对企业向清洁方向创新的概率有显著正向影响，并且产品市场竞争程度越高，这种影响越强。结果表明，历史上现实增长的亲社会态度与产品市场竞争的结合，可以对绿色创新产生与燃料价格大幅上涨相同的效果。

papers.title: What Explains the Gender Gap in Wealth? Evidence from Administrative Data
papers.authors: Jaanika Meriküll, Merike Kukk, Tairi Rõõm
papers.abstract: This paper studies the gender gap in net wealth. We use administrative data on wealth that are linked to the Estonian Household Finance and Consumption Survey, which provides individual-level wealth data for all household types. We find that the unconditional gender gap in mean wealth is 45% and that it is caused by large wealth disparities in the upper end of the wealth distribution. The structure of assets owned by men is more diversified than that for women. Men own more business assets and vehicles, while women own more deposits. The gender gaps in these asset components cannot be explained by observable characteristics. For partner-headed households the raw gender gaps across deciles are mostly in favour of men, and more strongly so for married couples, indicating that resources are not entirely pooled within households. For single-member households the raw gaps across quantiles are partially in favour of women. Accounting for observable characteristics renders the unexplained parts of the gaps mostly insignificant for all household types.
papers.zh_title: 什么解释了财富中的性别差距？来自行政数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了净财富中的性别差距。我们使用了与爱沙尼亚家庭金融与消费调查相关联的行政财富数据，该调查提供了所有家庭类型的个人层面财富数据。我们发现，平均财富的无条件性别差距为45%，这是由财富分布上端的巨大财富差异造成的。男性拥有的资产结构比女性更多元化。男性拥有更多的商业资产和车辆，而女性拥有更多的存款。这些资产组成部分的性别差距无法由可观察特征解释。对于有伴侣的家庭，各十分位数的原始性别差距大多有利于男性，已婚夫妇中更为明显，表明资源并未完全在家庭内共享。对于单身家庭，各分位数的原始差距部分有利于女性。考虑可观察特征后，所有家庭类型中差距的未解释部分大多变得不显著。

papers.title: Pareto-Improving Carbon-Risk Taxation
papers.authors: Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Felix Kubler, Andrey Polbin, Simon Scheidegger
papers.abstract: Anthropogenic climate change produces two conceptually distinct negative economic externalities. The first is an expected path of climate damage. The second, which is this paper's focus, is an expected path of economic risk. To isolate the climate-risk problem, we consider mean-zero, symmetric shocks in our 12-period, overlapping generations model. These shocks impact dirty energy usage (carbon emissions), the relationship between carbon concentration and temperature, and the connection between temperature and damages. Our model exhibits a de minimis climate problem absent its shocks. But due to non-linearities, symmetric shocks deliver negatively skewed impacts, including the potential for climate disasters. As we show, Pareto-improving carbon taxation can dramatically lower climate risk, in general, and disaster risk, in particular. The associated climate-risk tax, which is focused exclusively on limiting climate risk, can be as large or larger than the carbon average-damage tax, which is focused exclusively on limiting average damage.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IFM, LS, PE；JEL：F0, F20, H0, H2, H3, J20
papers.zh_title: 帕累托改进的碳风险税
papers.zh_abstract: 人为气候变化产生两种概念上不同的负经济外部性。第一种是预期的气候损害路径。第二种是本文关注的焦点：预期的经济风险路径。为了隔离气候风险问题，我们在12期世代交叠模型中考虑了均值为零的对称冲击。这些冲击影响肮脏能源使用（碳排放）、碳浓度与温度之间的关系，以及温度与损害之间的联系。我们的模型在没有冲击的情况下表现出极小的气候问题。但由于非线性，对称冲击会产生负偏态影响，包括气候灾难的可能性。正如我们所展示的，帕累托改进的碳税可以显著降低气候风险，特别是灾难风险。相关的气候风险税专注于限制气候风险，其规模可能等于或大于专注于限制平均损害的碳平均损害税。

papers.title: Macroeconomic Implications of COVID-19: Can Negative Supply Shocks Cause Demand Shortages?
papers.authors: Veronica Guerrieri, Guido Lorenzoni, Ludwig Straub, Iván Werning
papers.abstract: We present a theory of Keynesian supply shocks: supply shocks that trigger changes in aggregate demand larger than the shocks themselves. We argue that the economic shocks associated to the COVID-19 epidemic—shutdowns, layoffs, and firm exits—may have this feature. In one-sector economies supply shocks are never Keynesian. We show that this is a general result that extend to economies with incomplete markets and liquidity constrained consumers. In economies with multiple sectors Keynesian supply shocks are possible, under some conditions. A 50% shock that hits all sectors is not the same as a 100% shock that hits half the economy. Incomplete markets make the conditions for Keynesian supply shocks more likely to be met. Firm exit and job destruction can amplify the initial effect, aggravating the recession. We discuss the effects of various policies. Standard fiscal stimulus can be less effective than usual because the fact that some sectors are shut down mutes the Keynesian multiplier feedback. Monetary policy, as long as it is unimpeded by the zero lower bound, can have magnified effects, by preventing firm exits. Turning to optimal policy, closing down contact-intensive sectors and providing full insurance payments to affected workers can achieve the first-best allocation, despite the lower per-dollar potency of fiscal policy.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19的宏观经济影响：负供给冲击能否导致需求短缺？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种凯恩斯主义供给冲击理论：即引发总需求变化大于冲击本身的供给冲击。我们认为，与COVID-19疫情相关的经济冲击——停工、裁员和企业退出——可能具有这一特征。在单部门经济中，供给冲击从来不是凯恩斯主义的。我们证明，这是一个普遍结果，可扩展到具有不完全市场和流动性约束消费者的经济。在具有多个部门的经济中，凯恩斯主义供给冲击在某些条件下是可能的。冲击所有部门的50%冲击与冲击一半经济的100%冲击不同。不完全市场使凯恩斯主义供给冲击的条件更可能满足。企业退出和就业破坏会放大初始效应，加剧衰退。我们讨论了各种政策的效果。标准财政刺激可能不如平时有效，因为某些部门关闭会抑制凯恩斯乘数反馈。只要不受零下限阻碍，货币政策可以通过防止企业退出产生放大效应。关于最优政策，关闭接触密集型部门并向受影响工人提供全额保险支付可以实现最优配置，尽管财政政策的每美元效力较低。

papers.title: The Coronavirus Epidemic Curve is Already Flattening in New York City
papers.authors: Jeffrey E. Harris
papers.abstract: New York City has been rightly characterized as the epicenter of the coronavirus pandemic in the United States. Just one month after the first cases of coronavirus infection were reported in the city, the burden of infected individuals with serious complications of COVID-19 has already outstripped the capacity of many of the city’s hospitals. As in the case of most pandemics, scientists and public officials don’t have complete, accurate, real-time data on the path of new infections. Despite these data inadequacies, there already appears to be sufficient evidence to conclude that the curve in New York City is indeed flattening. The purpose of this report is to set forth the evidence for – and against – this preliminary but potentially important conclusion. Having examined the evidence, we then inquire: if the curve is indeed flattening, do we know what caused to it to level off?
papers.zh_title: 纽约市冠状病毒流行曲线已在趋平
papers.zh_abstract: 纽约市被恰当地描述为美国冠状病毒大流行的中心。在该市报告首例冠状病毒感染病例仅一个月后，出现COVID-19严重并发症的感染者负担已超过该市许多医院的承载能力。与大多数大流行一样，科学家和公职人员没有关于新感染路径的完整、准确、实时数据。尽管存在这些数据不足，但已有足够证据表明纽约市的曲线确实在趋平。本报告的目的是阐述支持——和反对——这一初步但可能重要结论的证据。在审查证据后，我们接着探究：如果曲线确实在趋平，我们是否知道是什么导致了它趋于平稳？

papers.title: The Geographic Spread of COVID-19 Correlates with the Structure of Social Networks as Measured by Facebook
papers.authors: Theresa Kuchler, Dominic Russel, Johannes Stroebel
papers.abstract: We use aggregated data from Facebook to show that COVID-19 was more likely to spread between regions with stronger social network connections. Areas with more social ties to two early COVID-19 “hotspots” (Westchester County, NY, in the U.S. and Lodi province in Italy) generally had more confirmed COVID-19 cases as of the end of March. These relationships hold after controlling for geographic distance to the hotspots as well as for the income and population densities of the regions. As the pandemic progressed in the U.S., a county's social proximity to recent COVID- 19 cases predicts future outbreaks over and above physical proximity. These results suggest data from online social networks can be useful to epidemiologists and others hoping to forecast the spread of communicable diseases such as COVID-19.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, EH, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：I0, R0
papers.zh_title: COVID-19的地理传播与Facebook衡量的社交网络结构相关
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用Facebook的聚合数据表明，COVID-19更可能在社交网络联系更强的地区之间传播。与两个早期COVID-19“热点”地区（美国纽约州威斯特彻斯特县和意大利洛迪省）有更多社会联系的地区，截至3月底通常有更多确诊的COVID-19病例。这些关系在控制了与热点地区的地理距离以及地区的收入和人口密度后仍然成立。随着疫情在美国的发展，一个县与近期COVID-19病例的社会邻近性，在物理邻近性之外，预测了未来的疫情爆发。这些结果表明，来自在线社交网络的数据对流行病学家和其他希望预测COVID-19等传染病传播的人可能有用。

papers.title: How Are Small Businesses Adjusting to COVID-19? Early Evidence from a Survey
papers.authors: Alexander W. Bartik, Marianne Bertrand, Zoë B. Cullen, Edward L. Glaeser, Michael Luca, Christopher T. Stanton
papers.abstract: In addition to its impact on public health, COVID-19 has had a major impact on the economy. To shed light on how COVID-19 is affecting small businesses – and on the likely impact of the recent stimulus bill, we conducted a survey of more than 5,800 small businesses. Several main themes emerge from the results. First, mass layoffs and closures have already occurred. In our sample, 43 percent of businesses are temporarily closed, and businesses have – on average – reduced their employee counts by 40 percent relative to January. Second, consistent with previous literature, we find that many small businesses are financially fragile. For example, the median business has more than $10,000 in monthly expenses and less than one month of cash on hand. Third, businesses have widely varying beliefs about the likely duration of COVID related disruptions. Fourth, the majority of businesses planned to seek funding through the CARES act. However, many anticipated problems with accessing the aid, such as bureaucratic hassles and difficulties establishing eligibility.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：E65, I12, L20
papers.zh_title: 小企业如何应对COVID-19？来自一项调查的早期证据
papers.zh_abstract: 除了对公共卫生的影响外，COVID-19还对经济产生了重大影响。为了阐明COVID-19如何影响小企业——以及近期刺激法案的可能影响，我们对超过5800家小企业进行了一项调查。结果中浮现出几个主要主题。首先，大规模裁员和关闭已经发生。在我们的样本中，43%的企业暂时关闭，企业平均员工人数相对于1月份减少了40%。其次，与以往文献一致，我们发现许多小企业财务脆弱。例如，中位数企业每月支出超过10,000美元，手头现金不足一个月。第三，企业对COVID相关中断可能持续的时间看法差异很大。第四，大多数企业计划通过CARES法案寻求资金。然而，许多人预见到获取援助方面的问题，例如官僚麻烦和确定资格方面的困难。

papers.title: The Evolving Consequences of OxyContin Reformulation on Drug Overdoses
papers.authors: David Powell, Rosalie Liccardo Pacula
papers.abstract: Recent evidence suggests that the short-term transition of the opioid crisis from prescription opioids to heroin can be attributed to the reformulation of OxyContin, which substantially reduced access to abusable prescription opioids. In this paper, we find that over a longer time horizon, reformulation stimulated illicit drug markets to grow and evolve. We compare overdose trajectories in areas more exposed to reformulation, defined as states with higher rates of non-medical OxyContin use before reformulation, to less exposed areas. More exposed areas experienced disproportionate increases in fatal overdoses involving synthetic opioids (fentanyl) and non-opioid substances like cocaine, suggesting that these new epidemics are related to the same factors driving the rise in heroin deaths. Instead of just short-term substitution from prescription opioid to heroin overdoses, the transition to illicit markets spurred by reformulation led to growth in the overall overdose rate to unprecedented levels.
papers.zh_title: 奥施康定配方改革对药物过量后果的演变影响
papers.zh_abstract: 近期证据表明，阿片类药物危机从处方阿片类药物向海洛因的短期转变可归因于奥施康定的配方改革，该改革大幅减少了可滥用的处方阿片类药物。在本文中，我们发现，在更长的时间范围内，配方改革刺激了非法药物市场的增长和演变。我们将配方改革暴露程度较高的地区（定义为改革前非医疗奥施康定使用率较高的州）与暴露程度较低的地区进行比较，比较其药物过量致死轨迹。暴露程度较高的地区涉及合成阿片类药物（芬太尼）和可卡因等非阿片类物质的致命过量事件不成比例地增加，这表明这些新的流行病与推动海洛因死亡人数上升的相同因素有关。配方改革引发的向非法市场的转变，并非仅仅是处方阿片类药物过量向海洛因过量的短期替代，而是导致总体药物过量率增长至前所未有的水平。

papers.title: COVID-19 and The Macroeconomic Effects of Costly Disasters
papers.authors: Sydney C. Ludvigson, Sai Ma, Serena Ng
papers.abstract: The outbreak of COVID-19 has significantly disrupted the economy. This paper attempts to quantify the macroeconomic impact of costly and deadly disasters in recent US history, and to translate these estimates into an analysis of the likely impact of COVID-19. A costly disaster series is constructed over the sample 1980:1-2020:04 and the dynamic impact of a disaster shock on economic activity and on uncertainty is studied using a VAR. While past natural disasters are local in nature and come and go quickly, COVID-19 is a global, multi-period event. We therefore study the dynamic responses to a sequence of large disaster shocks. Even in a fairly conservative case where COVID-19 is a 5-month shock with its magnitude calibrated by the cost of March 2020 Coronavirus relief packages, the shock is forecast to lead to a cumulative loss in industrial production of 20% and in service sector employment of nearly 39% or 55 million jobs over the next 12 months. For each month that a shock of a given magnitude is prolonged from the base case, heightened macro uncertainty persists for another month.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, EH, ME, PE, POL；JEL：E17, I0, I3
papers.zh_title: COVID-19与高成本灾难的宏观经济效应
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19的爆发严重扰乱了经济。本文试图量化美国近代史上高成本且致命灾难的宏观经济影响，并将这些估计转化为对COVID-19可能影响的分析。我们构建了1980年1月至2020年4月期间的高成本灾难序列，并使用VAR模型研究灾难冲击对经济活动和经济不确定性的动态影响。虽然过去的自然灾害具有局部性且来去迅速，但COVID-19是一个全球性的、多时期的事件。因此，我们研究一系列大规模灾难冲击的动态响应。即使在相当保守的情况下，即COVID-19是一个为期5个月的冲击，其规模根据2020年3月冠状病毒救助计划的成本进行校准，该冲击预计将导致未来12个月内工业产值累计损失20%，服务业就业累计损失近39%或5500万个工作岗位。对于给定规模的冲击，每从基准情况延长一个月，宏观不确定性就会持续增加一个月。

papers.title: The Wealth Decumulation Behavior of the Retired Elderly in Italy: The Importance of Bequest Motives and Precautionary Saving
papers.authors: Luigi Ventura, Charles Yuji Horioka
papers.abstract: In this paper, we analyze the wealth accumulation and saving behavior of the retired elderly in Italy using micro data from the “Survey of Italian Households’ Income and Wealth,” a panel survey of households conducted every two years by the Bank of Italy. We find that, on average, the retired elderly in Italy are decumulating their wealth (dissaving) but that their wealth decumulation rates are much slower than expected. Moreover, we also find that more than 40 percent of the retired elderly in Italy are continuing to accumulate wealth and that more than 80 percent are doing positive amounts of saving. Thus, the Wealth Decumulation Puzzle (the tendency of the retired elderly to decumulate their wealth more slowly than expected) appears to apply in the case of Italy, as it does in most other countries, before as well as after the Global Financial Crisis. Moreover, our regression analysis of the determinants of the wealth accumulation and saving behavior of the retired elderly in Italy suggests that the lower than expected wealth decumulation rates and dissaving of the retired elderly in Italy is due largely to intergenerational transfers (bequests and inter vivos transfers) and saving for precautionary purposes, especially the former.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D12, D14, D15, D64, E21, J14
papers.zh_title: 意大利退休老年人的财富消耗行为：遗赠动机和预防性储蓄的重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们使用意大利银行每两年进行一次的家庭面板调查“意大利家庭收入与财富调查”的微观数据，分析了意大利退休老年人的财富积累和储蓄行为。我们发现，平均而言，意大利的退休老年人正在消耗财富（负储蓄），但其财富消耗率远低于预期。此外，我们还发现，超过40%的意大利退休老年人仍在继续积累财富，超过80%的人正在进行正储蓄。因此，财富消耗之谜（退休老年人消耗财富的速度慢于预期的趋势）似乎适用于意大利的情况，与全球金融危机前后的大多数其他国家一样。此外，我们对意大利退休老年人财富积累和储蓄行为决定因素的回归分析表明，意大利退休老年人财富消耗率和负储蓄低于预期，主要是由于代际转移（遗赠和生前转移）以及预防性储蓄，尤其是前者。

papers.title: Risk Sharing Externalities
papers.authors: Luigi Bocola, Guido Lorenzoni
papers.abstract: Financial crises typically arise because firms and financial institutions choose balance sheets that expose them to aggregate risk. We propose a theory to explain these risk exposures. We study a financial accelerator model where entrepreneurs can issue state-contingent claims to consumers. Even though entrepreneurs could use these contingent claims to hedge negative shocks, we show that they tend not to do so. This is because it is costly to buy insurance against these shocks as consumers are also harmed by them. This effect is self-reinforcing, as the fact that entrepreneurs are unhedged amplifies the negative effects of shocks on consumers’ incomes. We show that this feedback can be quantitatively important and lead to inefficiently high risk exposure for entrepreneurs.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E44, G01, G11
papers.zh_title: 风险分担的外部性
papers.zh_abstract: 金融危机通常源于企业和金融机构选择使其资产负债表暴露于总体风险之下。我们提出一个理论来解释这些风险暴露。我们研究了一个金融加速器模型，其中企业家可以向消费者发行状态依存索取权。尽管企业家可以使用这些状态依存索取权来对冲负面冲击，但我们表明他们倾向于不这样做。这是因为购买针对这些冲击的保险成本高昂，因为消费者也受到这些冲击的损害。这种效应是自我强化的，因为企业家未对冲的事实放大了冲击对消费者收入的负面影响。我们表明，这种反馈在数量上可能很重要，并导致企业家面临低效率的高风险暴露。

papers.title: Optimal Mitigation Policies in a Pandemic: Social Distancing and Working from Home
papers.authors: Callum J. Jones, Thomas Philippon, Venky Venkateswaran
papers.abstract: We study the response of an economy to an unexpected epidemic. Households mitigate the spread of the disease by reducing consumption, reducing hours worked, and working from home. Working from home is subject to learning-by-doing and the capacity of the health care system is limited. A social planner worries about two externalities, an infection externality and a healthcare congestion externality. Private agents’ mitigation incentives are too weak and suﬀer from a fatalism bias with respect to future infection rates. The planner implements front-loaded mitigation policies and encourages working from home immediately. In our calibration, assuming a CFR of 1% and an initial infection rate of 0.1%, private mitigation reduces the cumulative death rate from 2.5% of the initially susceptible population to about 1.75%. The planner optimally imposes a drastic suppression policy and reduces the death rate to 0.15% at the cost of an initial drop in consumption of around 25%.
papers.zh_title: 大流行病中的最优缓解政策：社交距离与居家办公
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究经济对意外流行病的反应。家庭通过减少消费、减少工作时间和居家办公来缓解疾病的传播。居家办公受到干中学的影响，且医疗系统的容量有限。社会规划者关注两种外部性：感染外部性和医疗保健拥挤外部性。私人主体的缓解激励过弱，并且对未来感染率存在宿命论偏差。规划者实施前置的缓解政策，并鼓励立即居家办公。在我们的校准中，假设病死率为1%，初始感染率为0.1%，私人缓解措施将初始易感人群的累计死亡率从2.5%降低到约1.75%。规划者最优地实施严厉的抑制政策，将死亡率降低到0.15%，代价是消费初始下降约25%。

papers.title: COVID-Induced Economic Uncertainty
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Stephen J. Terry
papers.abstract: Assessing the economic impact of the COVID-19 pandemic is essential for policymakers, but challenging because the crisis has unfolded with extreme speed. We identify three indicators – stock market volatility, newspaper-based economic uncertainty, and subjective uncertainty in business expectation surveys – that provide real-time forward-looking uncertainty measures. We use these indicators to document and quantify the enormous increase in economic uncertainty in the past several weeks. We also illustrate how these forward-looking measures can be used to assess the macroeconomic impact of the COVID-19 crisis. Specifically, we feed COVID-induced first-moment and uncertainty shocks into an estimated model of disaster effects developed by Baker, Bloom and Terry (2020). Our illustrative exercise implies a year-on-year contraction in U.S. real GDP of nearly 11 percent as of 2020 Q4, with a 90 percent confidence interval extending to a nearly 20 percent contraction. The exercise says that about half of the forecasted output contraction reflects a negative effect of COVID-induced uncertainty.
papers.zh_title: COVID引发的经济不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 评估COVID-19大流行病的经济影响对政策制定者至关重要，但由于危机以极快的速度展开，这具有挑战性。我们确定了三个指标——股市波动率、基于报纸的经济不确定性以及商业预期调查中的主观不确定性——它们提供了实时的前瞻性不确定性度量。我们使用这些指标来记录和量化过去几周经济不确定性的巨大增长。我们还说明了如何利用这些前瞻性指标来评估COVID-19危机的宏观经济影响。具体来说，我们将COVID引发的第一矩冲击和不确定性冲击输入到Baker、Bloom和Terry（2020）开发的灾难效应估计模型中。我们的说明性练习表明，截至2020年第四季度，美国实际GDP同比收缩近11%，90%置信区间延伸至近20%的收缩。该练习表明，预测产出收缩中约一半反映了COVID引发的不确定性的负面影响。

papers.title: Social Distancing, Internet Access and Inequality
papers.authors: Lesley Chiou, Catherine Tucker
papers.abstract: This paper measures the role of the diffusion of high-speed Internet on an individual's ability to self-isolate during a global pandemic. We use data that tracks 20 million mobile devices and their movements across physical locations, and whether the mobile devices leave their homes that day. We show that while income is correlated with differences in the ability to stay at home, the unequal diffusion of high-speed Internet in homes across regions drives much of this observed income effect. We examine compliance with state-level directives to avoid leaving your home. Devices in regions with either high-income or high-speed Internet are less likely to leave their homes after such a directive. However, the combination of having both high income and high-speed Internet appears to be the biggest driver of propensity to stay at home. Our results suggest that the digital divide---or the fact that income and home Internet access are correlated---appears to explain much inequality we observe in people's ability to self-isolate.
papers.zh_title: 社交距离、互联网接入与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本文衡量了高速互联网普及在全球大流行期间对个人自我隔离能力的作用。我们使用了追踪2000万移动设备及其在物理位置间移动的数据，以及移动设备当天是否离开家。我们表明，虽然收入与居家能力的差异相关，但各地区家庭高速互联网普及的不平等在很大程度上驱动了这种观察到的收入效应。我们考察了对州级避免离家指令的遵守情况。在收入高或高速互联网普及的地区，设备在收到此类指令后离开家的可能性较小。然而，同时拥有高收入和高速互联网似乎是居家倾向的最大驱动因素。我们的结果表明，数字鸿沟——即收入与家庭互联网接入相关的事实——似乎解释了我们在人们自我隔离能力中观察到的许多不平等。

papers.title: A Simple Planning Problem for COVID-19 Lockdown
papers.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David Argente, Francesco Lippi
papers.abstract: We study the optimal lockdown policy for a planner who wants to control the fatalities of a pandemic while minimizing the output costs of the lockdown. We use the SIR epidemiology model and a linear economy to formalize the planner's dynamic control problem. The optimal policy depends on the fraction of infected and susceptible in the population. We parametrize the model using data on the COVID19 pandemic and the economic breadth of the lockdown. The quantitative analysis identifies the features that shape the intensity and duration of the optimal lockdown policy. Our baseline parametrization is conditional on a 1% of infected agents at the outbreak, no cure for the disease, and the possibility of testing. The optimal policy prescribes a severe lockdown beginning two weeks after the outbreak, covers 60% of the population after a month, and is gradually withdrawn covering 20% of the population after 3 months. The intensity of the lockdown depends on the gradient of the fatality rate as a function of the infected, and on the assumed value of a statistical life. The absence of testing increases the economic costs of the lockdown, and shortens the duration of the optimal lockdown which ends more abruptly. Welfare under the optimal policy with testing is higher, equivalent to a one-time payment of 2% of GDP.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19封锁的一个简单规划问题
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个规划者的最优封锁政策，该规划者希望在控制大流行病致死率的同时，最小化封锁的产出成本。我们使用SIR流行病学模型和线性经济来形式化规划者的动态控制问题。最优政策取决于人口中感染者和易感者的比例。我们使用COVID-19大流行病的数据和封锁的经济广度来参数化模型。定量分析识别了塑造最优封锁政策强度和持续时间的特征。我们的基线参数化基于爆发时1%的感染者、无疾病治愈方法以及检测的可能性。最优政策规定在爆发两周后开始严厉封锁，一个月后覆盖60%的人口，并在三个月后逐步退出，覆盖20%的人口。封锁的强度取决于作为感染者函数的致死率梯度，以及统计生命价值的假设。缺乏检测会增加封锁的经济成本，并缩短最优封锁的持续时间，使其更突然地结束。有检测的最优政策下的福利更高，相当于一次性支付GDP的2%。

papers.title: Rising Burdens of Proofs and The Grand Bargain of Workers’ Compensation Laws
papers.authors: Andy Yuan, Price V. Fishback
papers.abstract: Nearly every state has amended workers’ compensation laws in the last two decades and the national averages of cash and medical benefits paid per covered worker have declined. As a result, writers have suggested that the states might be cutting back on workers’ compensation benefits. We show that measures of the statutory benefits have been rising over time, a trend that work against the declining trend in average payouts per covered worker. A decline in accident rates at the national level has contributed to the decline in payouts. We then investigate the impact of specific state laws related to burdens of proof and limits on medical coverage after developing an annual panel data set for all states between 1997 and 2016. The results show that state laws that ban liberal construction of the rules and apportion benefits based on pre-existing conditions contribute to sharp declines in the states where they are enacted.
papers.zh_title: 举证责任上升与工伤赔偿法的“大妥协”
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，几乎所有州都修订了工伤赔偿法，而每位受保工人获得的现金和医疗福利的全国平均水平却有所下降。因此，有作者认为各州可能正在削减工伤赔偿福利。我们表明，法定福利的衡量指标随时间推移而上升，这一趋势与每位受保工人平均赔付额的下降趋势相反。全国范围内事故率的下降对赔付额的下降有所贡献。随后，在编制了1997年至2016年所有州的年度面板数据后，我们研究了与举证责任和医疗覆盖限制相关的特定州法律的影响。结果表明，禁止对规则进行自由解释以及根据已有状况分配福利的州法律，在其颁布的州导致了赔付额的急剧下降。

papers.title: Every Day is Earth Day: Evidence on the Long-term Impact of Environmental Activism
papers.authors: Daniel M. Hungerman, Vivek S. Moorthy
papers.abstract: We explore the importance of activism in the context of Earth Day. We use variation in weather to study the long-term effects of the original Earth Day on attitudes, environmental outcomes, and children's health. Unusually bad weather in a community on April 22, 1970, is associated 10 to 20 years later with weaker support for the environment, particularly among those who were school-aged in 1970. Bad weather on Earth Day is also associated with higher levels of carbon monoxide in the air and greater risk of congenital abnormalities in infants born in the following decades. These results indicate a long-lasting and localized effect of Earth Day, and show that there can be benefits to voluntary activity that would be impossible to identify until years after the volunteering occurs.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, PE；JEL：H4, I1, Q10, Z10
papers.zh_title: 每天都是地球日：环境行动主义长期影响的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在地球日的背景下探讨了行动主义的重要性。我们利用天气变化来研究最初的地球日对态度、环境结果和儿童健康的长期影响。1970年4月22日某个社区异常恶劣的天气，与10到20年后对环境支持度的减弱相关，尤其是在1970年处于学龄的人群中。地球日的恶劣天气还与空气中一氧化碳水平升高以及随后几十年出生的婴儿先天性异常风险增加相关。这些结果表明地球日具有持久且局部的影响，并表明自愿活动可能带来在活动发生多年后才能识别的益处。

papers.title: Effects of the Affordable Care Act Dependent Coverage Mandate on Health Insurance Coverage for Individuals in Same-Sex Couples
papers.authors: Christopher S. Carpenter, Gilbert Gonzales Jr., Tara McKay, Dario Sansone
papers.abstract: A large body of research documents that the 2010 dependent coverage mandate of the Affordable Care Act was responsible for significantly increasing health insurance coverage among young adults. No prior research has examined whether sexual minority young adults also benefitted from the dependent coverage mandate, despite previous studies showing lower health insurance coverage among sexual minorities and the fact that their higher likelihood of strained relationships with their parents might predict a lower ability to use parental coverage. Our estimates from the American Community Surveys using difference-in-differences and event study models show that men in same-sex couples age 21-25 were significantly more likely to have any health insurance after 2010 compared to the associated change for slightly older 27 to 31-year-old men in same-sex couples. This increase is concentrated among employer-sponsored insurance, and it is robust to permutations of time periods and age groups. Effects for women in same-sex couples and men in different-sex couples are smaller than the associated effects for men in same-sex couples. These findings confirm the broad effects of expanded dependent coverage and suggest that eliminating the federal dependent mandate could reduce health insurance coverage among young adult sexual minorities in same-sex couples.
papers.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》受抚养人覆盖强制条款对同性伴侣中个人健康保险覆盖的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 大量研究文献表明，2010年《平价医疗法案》的受抚养人覆盖强制条款显著提高了年轻人的健康保险覆盖率。尽管先前的研究显示性少数群体的健康保险覆盖率较低，且他们与父母关系紧张的可能性更高，这可能预示着他们利用父母保险的能力较低，但此前没有研究考察性少数年轻人是否也从受抚养人覆盖强制条款中受益。我们使用美国社区调查的数据，通过双重差分和事件研究模型进行的估计显示，与年龄稍大的27至31岁同性伴侣男性相比，21至25岁同性伴侣男性在2010年后拥有任何健康保险的可能性显著增加。这一增长主要集中在雇主提供的保险中，并且对时间段和年龄组的排列具有稳健性。对同性伴侣女性和异性伴侣男性的影响小于对同性伴侣男性的相应影响。这些发现证实了扩大受抚养人覆盖的广泛影响，并表明取消联邦受抚养人强制条款可能会降低同性伴侣中年轻性少数群体的健康保险覆盖率。

papers.title: News that Takes Your Breath Away: Risk Perceptions During an Outbreak of Vaping-related Lung Injuries
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Daniel L. Dench, Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Hua Wang
papers.abstract: We study the impact of new information on people’s perceptions of the risks of e-cigarettes. In September 2019 the U.S. experienced an outbreak of e-cigarette, or vaping, associated lung injuries (EVALI). The EVALI outbreak created an information shock, which was followed by additional new information in a later CDC recommendation. We use data on consumer risk perceptions from two sets of surveys conducted before (using HINTS survey data) and during the EVALI outbreak (using Google Survey data). The empirical model examines changes in risk perceptions during the early crisis period when the CDC was warning consumers that they should avoid all vaping products and during a later period when the message was refined and focused on a much narrower set of illegal vaping products that contain THC (the main psychoactive compound in marijuana). Our econometric results suggest that the immediate impact of the first information shock was to increase the fraction of respondents who perceived e-cigarettes as more harmful than smoking by about 16 percentage points. As the outbreak subsided and the CDC recommendation changed to emphasize the role of THC e-cigarette products, e-cigarette risk perceptions were partially revised downwards. Additional econometric results show that different demographic groups reacted somewhat differently to the information shock. In particular, we find that groups who had higher risk perceptions showed a weaker response to the first information shock but were more likely to later revise their risk perceptions downwards. We conclude the paper by discussing the public policy issues that stem from having risk perceptions of e-cigarettes relative to combustible cigarettes remain at these elevated levels where a substantial portion of consumers believe that e-cigarettes are more harmful than cigarettes.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：D8, H0, I1, K0
papers.zh_title: 令人窒息的新闻：电子烟相关肺损伤爆发期间的风险认知
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究新信息对人们对电子烟风险认知的影响。2019年9月，美国爆发了电子烟或 vaping 相关肺损伤（EVALI）。EVALI 爆发造成了一次信息冲击，随后美国疾病控制与预防中心（CDC）的一项建议又带来了额外的新信息。我们使用了在 EVALI 爆发前（使用 HINTS 调查数据）和爆发期间（使用 Google 调查数据）进行的两组调查中关于消费者风险认知的数据。实证模型考察了早期危机期间（当时 CDC 警告消费者应避免所有 vaping 产品）以及后期（信息被细化并聚焦于范围更窄的含有 THC（大麻中的主要精神活性化合物）的非法 vaping 产品）风险认知的变化。我们的计量经济学结果表明，第一次信息冲击的直接影响是，认为电子烟比吸烟更有害的受访者比例增加了约16个百分点。随着疫情消退以及 CDC 建议转向强调 THC 电子烟产品的作用，电子烟的风险认知被部分下调。额外的计量经济学结果表明，不同人口群体对信息冲击的反应略有不同。特别是，我们发现风险认知较高的群体对第一次信息冲击的反应较弱，但更有可能在之后下调其风险认知。在论文结尾，我们讨论了由于电子烟相对于可燃香烟的风险认知持续处于较高水平（相当一部分消费者认为电子烟比香烟更有害）而产生的公共政策问题。

papers.title: The Impact of Benefit Generosity on Workers’ Compensation Claims: Evidence and Implications
papers.authors: Marika Cabral, Marcus Dillender
papers.abstract: Leveraging unique administrative data and a sharp increase in benefit generosity in a difference-indifferences research design, we estimate the impact of workers’ compensation wage replacement benefits on individual behavior and program costs. We find that increased benefit generosity leads to longer income benefit durations and increased medical spending. Responses along these two margins are equally important drivers of increased program costs, collectively increasing program costs 1.4 times the mechanical increase in costs. Using these estimates and an estimate of the consumption drop among injured workers, our welfare calibrations suggest that a marginal increase in benefit generosity would not improve welfare.
papers.zh_title: 福利慷慨程度对工伤赔偿索赔的影响：证据与启示
papers.zh_abstract: 利用独特的行政数据和双重差分研究设计中福利慷慨程度的急剧增加，我们估计了工伤赔偿工资替代福利对个人行为和项目成本的影响。我们发现，福利慷慨程度的提高导致收入福利持续时间延长和医疗支出增加。这两个方面的反应是项目成本增加同等重要的驱动因素，共同使项目成本增加了机械性成本增长的1.4倍。利用这些估计以及对受伤工人消费下降的估计，我们的福利校准表明，福利慷慨程度的边际增加不会改善福利。

papers.title: Relief Rally: Senators As Feckless As the Rest of Us at Stock Picking
papers.authors: William Belmont, Bruce Sacerdote, Ranjan Sehgal, Ian Van Hoek
papers.abstract: We examine the stock trading behavior and returns of U.S. senators from 2012-March 2020. Stocks purchased by senators on average slightly underperform stocks in the same industry and size (market cap) categories by 11 basis points, 28 basis points and 17 basis points at the 1, 3, and 6-month time horizons. Stocks sold by senators underperform slightly for the first three months and then outperform slightly (a statistically insignificant 14 basis points) at the one year mark. We find no evidence that senators have industry specific stock picking ability related to their committee assignments. Neither Republican nor Democratic senators are skilled at picking stocks to buy, while stocks sold by Republican senators underperform by 50 basis points over three months. Stocks sold following the January 24th COVID-19 briefing do underperform the market by a statistically significant 9 percent while stocks purchased during this period underperform by 3 percent. Our findings contrast somewhat with recent news reports and studies of pre-STOCK Act (2012) returns, though are consistent with Eggers and Hainmueller (2013).
papers.zh_title: 救济性反弹：参议员在选股方面和我们一样无能
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了2012年至2020年3月期间美国参议员的股票交易行为和回报。参议员购买的股票在1个月、3个月和6个月的时间范围内，平均而言，其表现略逊于同行业和同规模（市值）类别的股票，分别低11个基点、28个基点和17个基点。参议员卖出的股票在前三个月表现略差，然后在一年期时表现略好（统计上不显著的14个基点）。我们没有发现证据表明参议员具有与其委员会职务相关的特定行业选股能力。共和党和民主党参议员在购买股票方面都不擅长，而共和党参议员卖出的股票在三个月内表现落后50个基点。在1月24日的新冠疫情简报会后卖出的股票，其表现确实落后市场9个百分点（统计上显著），而在此期间购买的股票表现落后3个百分点。我们的发现与近期的新闻报道和《股票法案》（2012年）之前回报率的研究有些不同，但与 Eggers 和 Hainmueller（2013）的研究一致。

papers.title: The Implications of Heterogeneity and Inequality for Asset Pricing
papers.authors: Stavros Panageas
papers.abstract: Does heterogeneity matter for asset pricing and in particular for risk premiums? Starting with an irrelevance result, I classify the literature into two groups of papers taking different routes to link investor heterogeneity and risk premiums. The first group contains models of investors who differ in terms of their preferences, beliefs, or access to markets. Despite their differences, these models have similar implications, and can be analyzed in a unified way. The second group of papers consists of models where investors experience uninsurable income shocks. The goal of this survey is to provide one unified framework to better understand this large literature, and especially to reconcile several of the seemingly inconsistent results found in some seminal papers.
papers.zh_title: 异质性与不平等对资产定价的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 异质性对资产定价，特别是对风险溢价是否重要？从一个无关性结果出发，我将文献分为两组，它们采取不同的路径来连接投资者异质性和风险溢价。第一组包含投资者在偏好、信念或市场准入方面存在差异的模型。尽管存在差异，这些模型具有相似的含义，并且可以以统一的方式进行分析。第二组论文包含投资者经历不可保险收入冲击的模型。本综述的目标是提供一个统一的框架，以更好地理解这一庞大的文献，特别是调和一些开创性论文中发现的看似不一致的结果。

papers.title: Should Germany Have Built a New Wall? Macroeconomic Lessons from the 2015-18 Refugee Wave
papers.authors: Christopher Busch, Dirk Krueger, Alexander Ludwig, Irina Popova, Zainab Iftikhar
papers.abstract: In 2015-2016 Germany experienced a wave of predominantly low-skilled refugee immigration. We evaluate its macroeconomic and distributional effects using a quantitative overlapping generations model calibrated using German micro data to replicate education and productivity differentials between foreign born and native workers. Workers are modelled as imperfect substitutes in aggregate production leading to endogenous wage differentials. We simulate the dynamic effects of this refugee wave, with specific focus on the welfare impact on low skilled natives. Our results indicate that the small losses this group suffers can be compensated by welfare gains of other parts of the native population.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E20, F22, H55
papers.zh_title: 德国本应修建新墙吗？2015-2018年难民潮的宏观经济学教训
papers.zh_abstract: 在2015-2016年，德国经历了一波以低技能为主的难民移民潮。我们使用一个量化的世代交叠模型来评估其宏观经济学和分配效应，该模型使用德国微观数据进行校准，以复制外国出生工人与本地工人之间的教育和生产率差异。工人在总生产中建模为不完全替代品，导致内生工资差异。我们模拟了这波难民潮的动态效应，特别关注对低技能本地人的福利影响。我们的结果表明，该群体遭受的小幅损失可以被本地人口其他部分的福利收益所补偿。

papers.title: Beyond Cobb-Douglas: Flexibly Estimating Matching Functions with Unobserved Matching Efficiency
papers.authors: Fabian Lange, Theodore Papageorgiou
papers.abstract: Exploiting results from the literature on non-parametric identification, we make three methodological contributions to the empirical literature estimating the matching function, commonly used to map unemployment and vacancies into hires. First, we show how to non-parametrically identify the matching function. Second, we estimate the matching function allowing for unobserved matching efficacy, without imposing the usual independence assumption between matching efficiency and search on either side of the labor market. Third, we allow for multiple types of jobseekers and consider an “augmented” Beveridge curve that includes them. Our estimated elasticity of hires with respect to vacancies is procyclical and varies between 0.15 and 0.3. This is substantially lower than common estimates suggesting that a significant bias stems from the commonly-used independence assumption. Moreover, variation in match efficiency accounts for much of the decline in hires during the Great Recession.
papers.zh_title: 超越柯布-道格拉斯：灵活估计具有未观测匹配效率的匹配函数
papers.zh_abstract: 利用非参数识别文献的结果，我们对估计匹配函数的实证文献做出了三项方法论贡献，该函数通常用于将失业和职位空缺映射为招聘人数。首先，我们展示了如何非参数地识别匹配函数。其次，我们在允许未观测匹配效率的情况下估计匹配函数，而不强加通常的假设，即匹配效率与劳动力市场双方的搜寻行为相互独立。第三，我们允许多种类型的求职者，并考虑一条包含这些求职者的“扩展”贝弗里奇曲线。我们估计的招聘人数相对于职位空缺的弹性是顺周期的，并在0.15到0.3之间变化。这远低于常见的估计值，表明常用的独立性假设导致了显著的偏差。此外，匹配效率的变化在很大程度上解释了大衰退期间招聘人数的下降。

papers.title: Firm-Level Exposure to Epidemic Diseases: COVID-19, SARS, and H1N1
papers.authors: Tarek Alexander Hassan, Stephan Hollander, Laurence van Lent, Markus Schwedeler, Ahmed Tahoun
papers.abstract: We construct text-based measures of the primary concerns listed firms associated with the spread of COVID-19 and other epidemic diseases. We identify which firms perceive to lose or gain from a given epidemic and textually decompose the epidemic's effect on the firm's demand and supply. We find that the effects of COVID-19 manifest as a simultaneous shock to demand and supply, with both shocks affecting firms' market valuations in equal measure on average. By contrast, demand-related impacts appear more important in accounting for the observed collapse in firm-level investment during the COVID-19 crisis.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, EH, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E0, E6, F0, G12, I0
papers.zh_title: 企业层面的流行病暴露：COVID-19、SARS和H1N1
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了基于文本的指标，用以衡量上市公司与COVID-19及其他流行病传播相关的主要担忧。我们识别出哪些企业认为在特定流行病中会受损或受益，并通过文本分解流行病对企业需求和供给的影响。我们发现，COVID-19的影响表现为对需求和供给的同时冲击，平均而言，这两种冲击对企业市场估值的影响程度相当。相比之下，与需求相关的影响在解释COVID-19危机期间观察到的企业投资崩溃方面显得更为重要。

papers.title: Understanding “Wage Theft”: Evasion and Avoidance Responses to Minimum Wage Increases
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Michael R. Strain
papers.abstract: A holistic assessment of the labor market effects of minimum wage regulation requires understanding employer compliance. We investigate how minimum wage increases and the strength of enforcement regimes affect the prevalence of subminimum wage payment. Using the Current Population Survey (CPS), we find strong evidence that higher minimum wages lead to a greater prevalence of subminimum wage payment. We estimate that increases in measured underpayment following minimum wage increases average between 14 and 22 percent of realized wage gains. Furthermore, we provide evidence that these estimates are unlikely to be driven by measurement error in the CPS’s wage data, which are self-reported. Taken together, we interpret these findings as evidence that minimum wage noncompliance is an important reality in the low-wage labor market. We find some evidence that enforcement regimes mediate both baseline rates of subminimum wage payment and the response of subminimum wage payment to increases in minimum wages.
papers.zh_title: 理解“工资盗窃”：对最低工资上涨的规避和逃避反应
papers.zh_abstract: 对最低工资监管的劳动力市场效应进行全面评估需要理解雇主的合规情况。我们研究了最低工资上涨和执法力度如何影响低于最低工资支付的发生率。利用当前人口调查（CPS），我们发现有强有力的证据表明，更高的最低工资导致低于最低工资支付的发生率更高。我们估计，在最低工资上涨后，测得的少付工资的增加平均占已实现工资增长的14%到22%。此外，我们提供的证据表明，这些估计不太可能由CPS工资数据（自我报告）中的测量误差驱动。综合来看，我们将这些发现解释为最低工资违规是低工资劳动力市场一个重要现实的证据。我们发现一些证据表明，执法力度既调节了低于最低工资支付的基准发生率，也调节了低于最低工资支付对最低工资上涨的反应。

papers.title: Do Investors Care about Carbon Risk?
papers.authors: Patrick Bolton, Marcin Kacperczyk
papers.abstract: This paper explores whether carbon emissions affect the cross-section of U.S. stock returns. We find that stocks of firms with higher total CO2 emissions (and changes in emissions) earn higher returns, after controlling for size, book-to-market, momentum, and other factors that predict returns. We cannot explain this carbon premium through differences in unexpected profitability or other known risk factors. We also find that institutional investors implement exclusionary screening based on direct emission intensity in a few salient industries. Overall, our results are consistent with an interpretation that investors are already demanding compensation for their exposure to carbon emission risk.
papers.zh_title: 投资者关心碳风险吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了碳排放是否影响美国股票回报的横截面。我们发现，在控制了规模、账面市值比、动量和其他预测回报的因素后，总二氧化碳排放量（以及排放变化）较高的公司股票获得更高的回报。我们无法通过意外盈利能力或其他已知风险因素的差异来解释这种碳溢价。我们还发现，机构投资者在少数几个显著行业中基于直接排放强度实施排除性筛选。总体而言，我们的结果与投资者已经要求对其碳排放风险暴露进行补偿的解释一致。

papers.title: Diminishing Marginal Returns to Computer-Assisted Learning
papers.authors: Eric Bettinger, Robert W. Fairlie, Anastasia Kapuza, Elena Kardanova, Prashant Loyalka, Andrey Zakharov
papers.abstract: The previous expansion of EdTech as a substitute for traditional learning around the world, the recent full-scale substitution due to COVID-19, and potential future shifts to blended approaches suggest that it is imperative to understand input substitutability between in-person and online learning. We explore input substitutability in education by employing a novel randomized controlled trial that varies dosage of computer-assisted learning (CAL) as a substitute for traditional learning through homework. Moving from zero to a low level of CAL, we find positive substitutability of CAL for traditional learning. Moving from a lower to a higher level of CAL, substitutability changes and is either neutral or even negative. The estimates suggest that a blended approach of CAL and traditional learning is optimal. The findings have direct implications for the rapidly expanding use of educational technology worldwide prior to, during and after the pandemic.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：F63, I25
papers.zh_title: 计算机辅助学习的边际收益递减
papers.zh_abstract: 此前教育科技作为传统学习替代品在全球的扩张、近期因COVID-19导致的全面替代，以及未来可能向混合方法的转变，都表明理解面对面学习和在线学习之间的投入替代性至关重要。我们通过一项新颖的随机对照试验来探索教育中的投入替代性，该试验通过家庭作业改变计算机辅助学习（CAL）作为传统学习替代品的剂量。从零CAL移动到低水平CAL，我们发现CAL对传统学习具有正向替代性。从较低水平CAL移动到较高水平CAL，替代性发生变化，变为中性甚至负向。估计表明，CAL和传统学习的混合方法是最优的。这些发现对全球在大流行之前、期间和之后迅速扩大的教育技术使用具有直接启示。

papers.title: Presence and Persistence of Poverty in U.S. Tax Data
papers.authors: Jeff Larrimore, Jacob Mortenson, David Splinter
papers.abstract: This paper presents new estimates of the level and persistence of poverty among U.S. households since the Great Recession. We build annual household data files using U.S. income tax filings between 2007 and 2018. These data allow us to track individuals over time and measure how tax policies affect poverty trends. Using an after-tax household income measure, we estimate that while roughly 1 in 10 people are in poverty in any given year, over 4 in 10 people spent at least one year in poverty between 2007 and 2018. This implies substantial mobility in and out of poverty—for example, 41 percent of those in poverty in 2007 were out of poverty in the following year. Others spend multiple years in poverty or escape poverty only to fall back into it. Of those in poverty in 2007, one-third were in poverty for at least half of the years through 2018.
papers.zh_title: 美国税收数据中贫困的存在与持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了自大衰退以来美国家庭贫困水平和持续性的新估计。我们利用2007年至2018年间美国所得税申报表构建了年度家庭数据文件。这些数据使我们能够随时间追踪个人，并衡量税收政策如何影响贫困趋势。使用税后家庭收入指标，我们估计，虽然任何给定年份大约有十分之一的人处于贫困状态，但在2007年至2018年间，超过十分之四的人至少有一年处于贫困状态。这意味着贫困状态存在显著的流动性——例如，2007年贫困人口中有41%在次年摆脱了贫困。其他人则多年处于贫困状态，或者摆脱贫困后又重新陷入贫困。在2007年贫困人口中，三分之一的人在截至2018年的一半以上年份中处于贫困状态。

papers.title: How Deadly Is COVID-19? Understanding The Difficulties With Estimation Of Its Fatality Rate
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson
papers.abstract: To understand how best to combat COVID-19, we must understand how deadly is the disease. There is a substantial debate in the epidemiological lit- erature as to whether the fatality rate is 1% or 0.1% or somewhere in between. In this note, I use an SIR model to examine why it is difficult to estimate the fatality rate from the disease and how long we might have to wait to resolve this question absent a large-scale randomized testing program. I focus on un- certainty over the joint distribution of the fatality rate and the initial number of active cases at the start of the epidemic around January 15, 2020. I show how the model with a high initial number of active cases and a low fatality rate gives the same predictions for the evolution of the number of deaths in the early stages of the pandemic as the same model with a low initial number of active cases and a high fatality rate. The problem of distinguishing these two parameterizations of the model becomes more severe in the presence of effective mitigation measures. As discussed by many, this uncertainty could be resolved now with large-scale randomized testing.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19有多致命？理解其病死率估计的困难
papers.zh_abstract: 为了理解如何最好地抗击COVID-19，我们必须了解这种疾病有多致命。流行病学文献中对于病死率是1%、0.1%还是介于两者之间存在重大争论。在本说明中，我使用SIR模型来检验为什么难以估计该疾病的病死率，以及在没有大规模随机检测计划的情况下，我们需要等待多久才能解决这个问题。我重点关注病死率和2020年1月15日左右疫情开始时活跃病例初始数量的联合分布的不确定性。我展示了，在疫情早期阶段，具有高初始活跃病例数和低病死率的模型与具有低初始活跃病例数和高病死率的模型，对死亡人数演变的预测相同。在存在有效缓解措施的情况下，区分这两种模型参数化的问题变得更加严重。正如许多人讨论的那样，这种不确定性现在可以通过大规模随机检测来解决。

papers.title: Technological Innovation and Labor Income Risk
papers.authors: Leonid Kogan, Dimitris Papanikolaou, Lawrence D. W. Schmidt, Jae Song
papers.abstract: Using administrative data from the United States, we document novel stylized facts regarding technological innovation and the riskiness of labor income. Higher rates of industry innovation are associated with significant increases in labor earnings for top workers. Decomposing this result, we find that own firm innovation is associated with a modest increase in the mean, but also variance, of worker earnings growth. Innovation by competing firms is related to lower, and more negatively skewed, future earnings. We construct a structural model featuring creative destruction and displacement of human capital that replicates these patterns. In the model, higher rates of innovation by competing firms increases the likelihood that both the worker and the incumbent producer are displaced. By contrast, a higher rate of innovation by the worker's own firm increases profits, but is a mixed blessing for workers, as it increases odds that the skilled worker is no longer a good match to the new technology. Estimating the parameters of the model using indirect inference, we find significant welfare losses and hedging demand against innovation shocks. Consistent with our model, we find that these left tail effects are more pronounced for process improvements, novel innovations, and are concentrated in movers rather than continuing workers.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E24, G10, G12
papers.zh_title: 技术创新与劳动收入风险
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国行政数据，我们记录了关于技术创新与劳动收入风险性的新颖典型事实。较高的行业创新率与顶尖工人的劳动收入显著增加相关。分解这一结果，我们发现，自身企业的创新与工人收入增长的均值适度增加相关，但也与方差增大相关。竞争对手企业的创新则与未来收入降低且更负偏态相关。我们构建了一个包含创造性破坏和人力资本替代的结构模型，该模型复制了这些模式。在该模型中，竞争对手企业更高的创新率增加了工人和现有生产者被替代的可能性。相比之下，工人自身企业更高的创新率增加了利润，但对工人而言是福祸相依，因为它增加了熟练工人不再适应新技术的可能性。通过间接推断法估计模型参数，我们发现显著的福利损失和对创新冲击的对冲需求。与我们的模型一致，我们发现这些左尾效应在流程改进、新颖创新中更为显著，并且集中在流动工人而非继续留任的工人身上。

papers.title: Reversing Reserves
papers.authors: Parag A. Pathak, Alex Rees-Jones, Tayfun Sönmez
papers.abstract: Affirmative action policies are often implemented through reserve systems. In this study, we demonstrate that reserve systems face widespread misunderstanding by the public. This misunderstanding can lead individuals to support policies that ineffectively pursue their interests. To establish these claims, we present 1,013 participants in the Understanding America Study with choices between pairs of reserve systems. Participants are members of the group receiving affirmative action and are financially incentivized to choose the system that maximizes their chance of admission. Using this data, we apply a novel approach to identifying the rate of uptake of different decision rules used by participants. We find that participants rarely use a fully optimal decision rule. In contrast, we find that many choices—40% in our primary estimates—are rationalized by a nearly correct decision rule, with errors driven solely by failing to appreciate the importance of processing order. Failing to account for processing order causes individuals to fail to distinguish between two policies that achieve different degrees of affirmative action: policies that provide non-binding minimum guarantees of the number of spaces allocated and policies that provide spaces over-and-above what would be allocated absent a reserve. Confusion about the importance of processing order helps to explain otherwise surprising decisions made in field applications of reserve systems. We discuss implications for managers and policy makers who are trying to implement reserve systems and who are accountable to the public.
papers.zh_title: 逆转配额制
papers.zh_abstract: 平权行动政策通常通过配额制度实施。在本研究中，我们证明配额制度面临公众的广泛误解。这种误解可能导致个人支持那些无法有效追求其利益的政策。为确立这些论断，我们向“理解美国研究”中的1013名参与者展示了多对配额制度之间的选择。参与者是接受平权行动的群体成员，并受到经济激励，以选择最大化其录取机会的制度。利用这些数据，我们应用一种新颖的方法来识别参与者使用的不同决策规则的采纳率。我们发现参与者很少使用完全最优的决策规则。相比之下，我们发现许多选择——在我们的主要估计中占40%——可以通过一个近乎正确的决策规则来合理化，其错误仅源于未能认识到处理顺序的重要性。未能考虑处理顺序导致个人无法区分两种实现不同程度平权行动的政策：提供非约束性最低名额保障的政策，以及提供超出无配额时分配名额的政策。对处理顺序重要性的混淆有助于解释在配额制度实地应用中出现的令人惊讶的决策。我们讨论了对试图实施配额制度并对公众负责的管理者和政策制定者的启示。

papers.title: Disasters Everywhere: The Costs of Business Cycles Reconsidered
papers.authors: Òscar Jordà, Moritz Schularick, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: Business cycles are costlier and stabilization policies could be more beneficial than widely thought. This paper introduces a new test to show that all business cycles are asymmetric and resemble “mini-disasters.” By this we mean that growth is pervasively fat-tailed and non-Gaussian. Using long-run historical data, we show empirically that this is true for advanced economies since 1870. Focusing on peacetime eras, we develop a tractable local projection framework to estimate consumption growth paths for normal and financial-crisis recessions. Introducing random coefficient local projections (RCLP) we get an easy and transparent mapping from the estimates to a calibrated simulation model with disasters of variable severity. Simulations show that substantial welfare costs arise not just from the large rare disasters, but also from the smaller but more frequent mini-disasters in every cycle. On average, and in post-WW2 data, even with low risk aversion, households would sacrifice about 15 percent of consumption to avoid such cyclical fluctuations.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E13, E21, E22, E32
papers.zh_title: 无处不在的灾难：重新审视经济周期的成本
papers.zh_abstract: 经济周期的成本比普遍认为的更高，稳定政策可能比广泛认为的更有益。本文引入一项新检验，表明所有经济周期都是非对称的，类似于“微型灾难”。我们意指增长普遍具有厚尾特征且非高斯分布。利用长期历史数据，我们实证表明自1870年以来发达经济体确实如此。聚焦和平时期，我们开发了一个易处理的局部投影框架，用于估计正常衰退和金融危机衰退的消费增长路径。引入随机系数局部投影法，我们能够从估计结果到校准模拟模型（包含可变严重程度的灾难）实现简单透明的映射。模拟显示，巨大的福利成本不仅来自罕见的大灾难，也来自每个周期中更小但更频繁的微型灾难。平均而言，在二战后数据中，即使风险厌恶程度较低，家庭也愿意牺牲约15%的消费来避免此类周期性波动。

papers.title: Expanding and Diversifying the Pool of Undergraduates who Study Economics: Insights from a New Introductory Course at Harvard
papers.authors: Amanda Bayer, Gregory Bruich, Raj Chetty, Andrew Housiaux
papers.abstract: There is widespread concern that economics does not attract as broad or diverse a pool of talent as it could. For example, less than one-third of undergraduates who receive degrees in economics are women, significantly lower than in math or statistics. This article presents a case study of a new introductory undergraduate course at Harvard, “Using Big Data to Solve Economic and Social Problems,” that enrolled 400 students, achieved nearly a 50-50 gender balance, and was among the highest-rated courses in the college. We first summarize the course’s content and pedagogical approach. We then illustrate how this approach differs from that taken in traditional courses by showing how canonical topics – income inequality, tax incidence, and adverse selection – are taught differently. Then, drawing upon students’ comments and prior research on effective teaching practices, we identify elements of the course’s approach that appear to underlie its success: connecting the material to students’ own experiences; teaching skills that have social and career value; and engaging students in scientific investigation of real-world problems. We conclude by discussing how these ideas for improving instruction in economics could be applied in other courses and tested empirically in future research.
papers.zh_title: 扩大和多样化学习经济学的本科生群体：来自哈佛大学一门新入门课程的经验
papers.zh_abstract: 人们普遍担忧经济学未能吸引尽可能广泛或多样化的人才库。例如，获得经济学学位的本科生中女性不到三分之一，显著低于数学或统计学。本文介绍了哈佛大学一门新的本科入门课程“利用大数据解决经济和社会问题”的案例研究，该课程招收了400名学生，实现了近50-50的性别平衡，并且是学院中评分最高的课程之一。我们首先总结了课程的内容和教学方法。然后，我们通过展示如何以不同方式教授经典主题——收入不平等、税收归宿和逆向选择——来说明这种方法与传统课程方法的差异。接着，借鉴学生的评论和先前关于有效教学实践的研究，我们确定了该课程方法中似乎构成其成功基础的要素：将材料与学生自身经历联系起来；教授具有社会和职业价值的技能；以及让学生参与对现实世界问题的科学探究。最后，我们讨论了如何将这些改进经济学教学的思路应用于其他课程，并在未来的研究中通过实证检验。
