papers.title: International Trade and Social Connectedness
papers.authors: Michael Bailey, Abhinav Gupta, Sebastian Hillenbrand, Theresa Kuchler, Robert J. Richmond, Johannes Stroebel
papers.abstract: We use anonymized data from Facebook to construct a new measure of the pairwise social connectedness between 180 countries and 332 European regions. We find that two countries trade more with each other when they are more socially connected and when they share social connections with a similar set of other countries. The social connections that determine trade in each product are those between the regions where the product is produced in the exporting country and those where it is used in the importing country. Once we control for social connectedness, the estimated effect of geographic distance on trade declines substantially, and the effect of country borders disappears. Our findings suggest that social connectedness increases trade by reducing information asymmetries and by providing a substitute for both trust and formal mechanisms of contract enforcement. We also present evidence against omitted variables and reverse causality as alternative explanations for the observed relationships between social connectedness and trade flows.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, PE, POL, PR；JEL：F1, F6, G0
papers.zh_title: 国际贸易与社会关联性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自Facebook的匿名数据，构建了一个衡量180个国家和332个欧洲地区之间成对社会关联性的新指标。我们发现，两个国家之间的社会关联性越强，并且它们与一组相似的其他国家共享社会联系时，它们之间的贸易量就越大。决定每种产品贸易的社会联系是出口国生产该产品的地区与进口国使用该产品的地区之间的联系。一旦我们控制了社会关联性，地理距离对贸易的估计影响显著下降，而国家边界的影响则消失。我们的发现表明，社会关联性通过减少信息不对称以及提供信任和正式合同执行机制的替代品来增加贸易。我们还提供了证据，反对遗漏变量和反向因果关系作为观察到的社会关联性与贸易流量之间关系的替代解释。

papers.title: The Labor Market Returns to Advanced Degrees
papers.authors: Joseph G. Altonji, Ling Zhong
papers.abstract: We estimate the labor market return to an MBA, a JD, and master’s in engineering, nursing, education, psychology and social work, and thirteen other graduate degrees. To control for heterogeneity in preferences and ability, we use fixed effects for combinations of field-specific undergraduate and graduate degrees obtained by the last time we observe an individual. Basically, we compare earnings before the graduate degree to earnings after the degree. We find large differences across graduate fields in earnings effects, and more moderate differences in internal rates of return that account for program length and tuition. The returns often depend on the undergraduate major. The contribution of occupational upgrading to the earnings gain varies across degrees. Finally, simple regression-based estimates of returns to graduate fields are often highly misleading.
papers.zh_title: 高级学位的劳动力市场回报
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了MBA、法学博士、工程学、护理学、教育学、心理学和社会工作硕士以及其他十三个研究生学位的劳动力市场回报。为控制偏好和能力异质性，我们使用了个体在最后一次观察时获得的特定领域本科和研究生学位组合的固定效应。基本上，我们比较了研究生学位前的收入与学位后的收入。我们发现不同研究生领域在收入效应上存在巨大差异，而在考虑项目时长和学费的内部收益率上差异较为温和。回报通常取决于本科专业。职业升级对收入增长的贡献因学位而异。最后，基于简单回归的研究生领域回报估计往往具有高度误导性。

papers.title: Why Are Corporate Payouts So High in the 2000s?
papers.authors: Kathleen Kahle, René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: The average annual inflation-adjusted amount paid out through dividends and repurchases by public industrial firms is more than three times larger from 2000 to 2019 than from 1971 to 1999. We find that an increase in aggregate corporate income accounts for 37% of the increase in aggregate annual payouts and an increase in the payout rate accounts for 63%. Firms have higher payout rates in the 2000s not only because they are older, larger, and have more free cash flow, but also because they pay out more of their free cash flow. Though firms spend less on capital expenditures in the 2000s than before, capital expenditures decrease similarly for the firms with payouts and for firms without.
papers.zh_title: 为什么2000年代的企业派息如此之高？
papers.zh_abstract: 从2000年到2019年，上市工业企业通过股息和回购支付的平均年通胀调整金额是1971年至1999年的三倍多。我们发现，企业总收入的增加占年度总派息增长的37%，而派息率的增加占63%。2000年代企业派息率更高，不仅因为它们更成熟、规模更大、自由现金流更多，还因为它们将更多的自由现金流用于派息。尽管2000年代企业在资本支出上的支出少于以往，但有派息的企业和无派息的企业在资本支出上的减少幅度相似。

papers.title: Is Fish Brain Food or Brain Poison? Sea Surface Temperature, Methyl-mercury and Child Cognitive Development
papers.authors: Mark R. Rosenzweig, Rafael J. Santos Villagran
papers.abstract: We exploit variation in the composition of local fish catches around the time of birth using administrative and census data on adult cognitive test scores, schooling attainment, and occupation among coastal populations in Colombia to estimate the causal effects of early-life consumption of methylmercury (MeHg) and DHA, elements contained in fish, on cognitive development. Using an IV strategy based on an equilibrium model of fish supply that exploits time-series variation in oceanic SST anomalies on both coasts of Colombia from 1950 to 2014 as instruments, we find that net of cohort and municipality fixed effects increases in high-(low-)MeHg fish catches around a cohort’s birth negatively (positively) affect the cohort’s verbal and math test scores upon exiting high school and their likelihood of continuing their schooling, while increasing (decreasing) the likelihood the cohort is disproportionally represented in manual-labor occupations.
papers.zh_title: 鱼是健脑食品还是脑毒药？海面温度、甲基汞与儿童认知发展
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用哥伦比亚沿海人口在出生时当地渔获物组成的差异，结合成人认知测试分数、教育程度和职业的行政及普查数据，来估计生命早期摄入鱼类中所含甲基汞和DHA对认知发展的因果效应。我们采用基于鱼类供应均衡模型的工具变量策略，利用1950年至2014年哥伦比亚两岸海洋海面温度异常的时序变化作为工具变量。在控制队列和城市固定效应后，我们发现，队列出生时高（低）甲基汞鱼类渔获量的增加，对该队列高中毕业时的语言和数学测试分数以及继续接受教育的可能性产生负面（正面）影响，同时增加（减少）该队列在体力劳动职业中比例过高的可能性。

papers.title: The Value of Urgency: Evidence from Real-Time Congestion Pricing
papers.authors: Antonio Bento, Kevin Roth, Andrew R. Waxman
papers.abstract: Taking advantage of repeated appearances of drivers in Los Angeles’s ExpressLanes under varied traffic conditions, we uncover the distribution of individuals’ preferences for time savings in a novel application of a hedonic pricing model. In this setting, we introduce the concept of the value of urgency, defined by a component of willingness to pay to enter tolled lanes to avoid a congested alternative route. The value of urgency does not scale in the amount of time saved, reflecting discrete penalties for late arrival. We show that this value accounts for 87% of total willingness to pay to use the ExpressLanes, while the contributions to WTP from other widely used valuation measures, such as the values of time and reliability, are negligible. We suggest that quality-of-service pricing that varies in real time and removes uncertainty over travel times creates new markets for individuals to avoid lateness and reveal their preferences for urgency.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：D47, D61, D62, H23, L51, L91, Q58, R41
papers.zh_title: 紧迫性的价值：来自实时拥堵定价的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用洛杉矶快速车道司机在不同交通状况下反复出现的情况，我们在一项享乐定价模型的新应用中揭示了个体对时间节省偏好的分布。在此背景下，我们引入了紧迫性价值的概念，该价值由个体为避免拥堵替代路线而进入收费车道的支付意愿的一个组成部分来定义。紧迫性价值并不随节省的时间量而缩放，而是反映了对迟到的离散惩罚。我们表明，该价值占使用快速车道总支付意愿的87%，而其他广泛使用的估值指标（如时间价值和可靠性价值）对支付意愿的贡献可以忽略不计。我们建议，实时变化并消除出行时间不确定性的服务质量定价，为个体避免迟到并揭示其紧迫性偏好创造了新市场。

papers.title: Labor Market Polarization and The Great Urban Divergence
papers.authors: Donald R. Davis, Eric Mengus, Tomasz K. Michalski
papers.abstract: Labor market polarization is among the most important features in recent decades of advanced country labor markets. Yet key spatial aspects of this phenomenon remain under-explored. We develop four key facts that document the universality of polarization, a city-size difference in the shock magnitudes, a skew in the types of middle-paid jobs lost, and the role of polarization in the great urban divergence. Existing theories cannot account for these facts. Hence we develop a parsimonious theoretical account that does so by integrating elements from the literatures on labor market polarization and systems of cities with heterogeneous labor in spatial equilibrium.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场极化与大城市分化
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动力市场极化是近几十年来发达国家劳动力市场最重要的特征之一。然而，这一现象的关键空间方面仍未得到充分探索。我们提出了四个关键事实，记录了极化的普遍性、冲击幅度在城市规模上的差异、所流失的中等收入工作类型的偏向性，以及极化在大城市分化中的作用。现有理论无法解释这些事实。因此，我们通过整合劳动力市场极化和城市体系（在空间均衡中具有异质性劳动力）这两个领域的文献要素，发展了一个简洁的理论解释。

papers.title: U.S. Economic Activity During the Early Weeks of the SARS-Cov-2 Outbreak
papers.authors: Daniel Lewis, Karel Mertens, James H. Stock
papers.abstract: This paper describes a weekly economic index (WEI) developed to track the rapid economic developments associated with the response to the novel Coronavirus in the United States. The WEI shows a strong and sudden decline in economic activity starting in the week ending March 21, 2020. In the most recent week ending March 28, the WEI indicates economic activity has fallen further to -6.19% scaled to 4 quarter growth in GDP.
papers.zh_title: SARS-CoV-2疫情爆发最初几周的美国经济活动
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了一个为追踪美国应对新型冠状病毒相关的快速经济动态而开发的每周经济指数（WEI）。WEI显示，经济活动从截至2020年3月21日的那一周开始出现强劲而突然的下降。在最近截至3月28日的一周，WEI表明经济活动进一步下降至-6.19%（按GDP的四个季度增长率进行缩放）。

papers.title: Isolating the “Tech” from EdTech: Experimental Evidence on Computer Assisted Learning in China
papers.authors: Yue Ma, Robert W. Fairlie, Prashant Loyalka, Scott Rozelle
papers.abstract: EdTech which includes online education, computer assisted learning (CAL), and remote instruction was expanding rapidly even before the current full-scale substitution for in-person learning at all levels of education around the world because of the coronavirus pandemic. Studies of CAL interventions have consistently found large positive effects, bolstering arguments for the widespread use of EdTech. However CAL programs, often held after school, provide not only computer-based instruction, but often additional non-technology based inputs such as more time on learning and instructional support by facilitators. In this paper, we develop a theoretical model to carefully explore the possible channels by which CAL programs might affect academic outcomes among schoolchildren. We isolate and test the technology-based effects of CAL and additional parameters from the theoretical model, by designing a novel multi-treatment field experiment with more than four thousand schoolchildren in rural China. Although we find evidence of positive overall CAL program effects on academic outcomes, when we isolate the technology-based effect of CAL (over and above traditional pencil-and-paper learning) we generally find small to null effects. Our empirical results suggest that, at times, the “Tech” in EdTech may have relatively small effects on academic outcomes, which has important implications for the continued, rapid expansion of technologies such as CAL throughout the world.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I21, I25
papers.zh_title: 将“技术”从教育技术中分离出来：中国计算机辅助学习的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 教育技术（包括在线教育、计算机辅助学习（CAL）和远程教学）在因新冠疫情导致全球各级教育全面替代面对面学习之前就已经在迅速扩张。对CAL干预措施的研究一致发现了较大的积极效应，这支持了广泛使用教育技术的论点。然而，CAL项目通常在课后进行，不仅提供基于计算机的教学，还经常提供额外的非技术性投入，例如更多的学习时间和辅导员的指导支持。在本文中，我们开发了一个理论模型，以仔细探索CAL项目可能影响学龄儿童学业成绩的渠道。我们通过设计一项针对中国农村四千多名学龄儿童的新型多处理现场实验，分离并测试了CAL的技术效应以及理论模型中的其他参数。尽管我们发现了CAL项目对学业成绩有积极总体效应的证据，但当我们分离出CAL的技术效应（相对于传统的纸笔学习）时，我们通常发现效应很小甚至为零。我们的实证结果表明，有时教育技术中的“技术”对学业成绩的影响可能相对较小，这对CAL等技术在全球范围内的持续快速扩张具有重要意义。

papers.title: Demographic Determinants of Testing Incidence and COVID-19 Infections in New York City Neighborhoods
papers.authors: George J. Borjas
papers.abstract: New York City is the hot spot of the COVID-19 pandemic in the United States. This paper merges information on the number of tests and the number of infections at the New York City zip code level with demographic and socioeconomic information from the decennial census and the American Community Surveys. People residing in poor or immigrant neighborhoods were less likely to be tested; but the likelihood that a test was positive was larger in those neighborhoods, as well as in neighborhoods with larger households or predominantly black populations. The rate of infection in the population depends on both the frequency of tests and on the fraction of positive tests among those tested. The non-randomness in testing across New York City neighborhoods indicates that the observed correlation between the rate of infection and the socioeconomic characteristics of a community tells an incomplete story of how the pandemic evolved in a congested urban setting.
papers.zh_title: 纽约市社区检测发生率和COVID-19感染的人口决定因素
papers.zh_abstract: 纽约市是美国COVID-19大流行的热点地区。本文将纽约市邮政编码层面的检测次数和感染人数信息与十年一次的人口普查和美国社区调查中的人口和社会经济信息相结合。居住在贫困或移民社区的人接受检测的可能性较低；但在这些社区，以及家庭规模较大或黑人人口占多数的社区，检测呈阳性的可能性更大。人口中的感染率既取决于检测频率，也取决于受检者中阳性检测的比例。纽约市各社区检测的非随机性表明，观察到的感染率与社区社会经济特征之间的相关性，只讲述了疫情在拥挤的城市环境中如何演变的不完整故事。

papers.title: Leaving No Ethical Value Behind: Triage Protocol Design for Pandemic Rationing
papers.authors: Parag A. Pathak, Tayfun Sönmez, M. Utku Unver, M. Bumin Yenmez
papers.abstract: Rationing of medical resources is a critical issue in the COVID-19 pandemic. Most existing triage protocols are based on a priority point system, in which a formula specifies the order in which the supply of a resource, such as a ventilator, is to be rationed for patients. A priority point system generates an identical priority ranking specifying claims on all units. Triage protocols in some states (e.g. Michigan) prioritize frontline health workers giving heavier weight to the ethical principle of instrumental value. Others (e.g. New York) do not, reasoning that if frontline workers obtain high enough priority, there is a risk that they obtain all units and none remain for the general community. This debate is pressing given substantial COVID-19 health risks for frontline workers. In this paper, we analyze the consequences of rationing medical resources through a reserve system. In a reserve system, resources are placed into multiple categories. Priorities guiding allocation of units can reflect different ethical values between these categories. A reserve system provides additional flexibility over a priority point system because it does not dictate a single priority order for the allocation of all units. It offers a middle-ground approach that balances competing objectives, such as in the medical worker debate. This flexibility requires attention to implementation, especially the processing order of reserve categories. We describe our model of a reserve system, characterize its potential outcomes, and examine distributional implications of particular reserve systems. We also discuss several practical considerations with triage protocol design.
papers.zh_title: 不抛弃任何伦理价值：大流行配给的分类协议设计
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗资源的配给是COVID-19大流行中的一个关键问题。大多数现有的分类协议基于优先级积分系统，其中公式规定了呼吸机等资源供应分配给患者的顺序。优先级积分系统会产生一个相同的优先级排序，指定对所有单位的索取权。一些州（例如密歇根州）的分类协议优先考虑一线卫生工作者，给予工具性价值这一伦理原则更大的权重。其他州（例如纽约州）则不这样做，理由是如果一线工作者获得足够高的优先级，他们可能会获得所有单位，而普通社区则一无所有。鉴于一线工作者面临巨大的COVID-19健康风险，这场辩论十分紧迫。在本文中，我们分析了通过储备系统配给医疗资源的后果。在储备系统中，资源被分为多个类别。指导单位分配的优先级可以在这些类别之间反映不同的伦理价值。储备系统比优先级积分系统提供了额外的灵活性，因为它不规定所有单位分配的单一优先级顺序。它提供了一种平衡竞争目标（例如在医务工作者辩论中）的中间立场方法。这种灵活性需要注意实施，特别是储备类别的处理顺序。我们描述了我们的储备系统模型，刻画了其潜在结果，并考察了特定储备系统的分配影响。我们还讨论了分类协议设计中的几个实际考虑因素。

papers.title: Can the Unemployed Borrow? Implications for Public Insurance
papers.authors: J. Carter Braxton, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Gordon M. Phillips
papers.abstract: We show that unemployed individuals maintain significant access to credit. Following job loss, the unconstrained borrow, while the constrained default and delever. Both defaulters and borrowers are using credit to smooth consumption. We quantitatively show that long-term credit relationships and credit-registries allow the unemployed to partially offset income losses using credit. We estimate the model and find that the optimal provision of public insurance is unambiguously lower with greater credit access. Using a utilitarian welfare criterion, the optimal steady-state policy is to lower the replacement rate of public insurance from the current US policy of 41.2% to 38.3%. Moreover, lowering the replacement rate to 38.3% yields welfare gains to the majority of workers along the transition path.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ME, POL；JEL：D14, E21, E24, G51, J64
papers.zh_title: 失业者能借贷吗？对公共保险的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，失业者仍然保持着显著的信贷获取渠道。在失业后，不受约束者会借贷，而受约束者则会违约并去杠杆化。违约者和借贷者都在利用信贷来平滑消费。我们定量地表明，长期信贷关系和信用登记机构允许失业者利用信贷部分抵消收入损失。我们估计了模型，发现随着信贷获取渠道的增加，公共保险的最优提供水平明确降低。使用功利主义福利标准，最优稳态政策是将公共保险的替代率从当前美国政策的41.2%降低到38.3%。此外，将替代率降低到38.3%会在转型路径上为大多数工人带来福利收益。

papers.title: Portfolio Choice with Sustainable Spending: A Model of Reaching for Yield
papers.authors: John Y. Campbell, Roman Sigalov
papers.abstract: We show that reaching for yield -- a tendency to take more risk when the real interest rate declines while the risk premium remains constant -- results from imposing a sustainable spending constraint on an otherwise standard infinitely lived investor with power utility. When the interest rate is initially low, reaching for yield intensifies. The sustainable spending constraint also affects the response of risktaking to a change in the risk premium, which can even change sign. In a variant of the model where the sustainable spending constraint is formulated in nominal terms, low inflation also encourages risktaking.
papers.zh_title: 可持续支出下的投资组合选择：一个追逐收益的模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，追逐收益——即在实际利率下降而风险溢价保持不变时倾向于承担更多风险——源于对一个原本标准的、具有幂效用函数的无限期投资者施加可持续支出约束。当利率最初较低时，追逐收益会加剧。可持续支出约束也会影响风险承担对风险溢价变化的反应，这种反应甚至可能改变符号。在可持续支出约束以名义形式表述的模型变体中，低通胀也会鼓励风险承担。

papers.title: On Vickrey’s Income Averaging
papers.authors: Stefan Steinerberger, Aleh Tsyvinski
papers.abstract: We consider a small set of axioms for income averaging – recursivity, continuity, and the boundary condition for the present. These properties yield a unique averaging function that is the density of the reflected Brownian motion with a drift started at the current income and moving over the past incomes. When averaging is done over the short past, the weighting function is asymptotically converging to a Gaussian. When averaging is done over the long horizon, the weighing function converges to the exponential distribution. For all intermediate averaging scales, we derive an explicit solution that interpolates between the two.
papers.zh_title: 论维克里的收入平均化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑了一组关于收入平均化的小型公理——递归性、连续性以及当前的边界条件。这些性质产生了一个唯一的平均化函数，该函数是带漂移的反射布朗运动的密度，从当前收入开始并回溯过去收入。当平均化在短期过去进行时，权重函数渐近收敛于高斯分布。当平均化在长期范围内进行时，权重函数收敛于指数分布。对于所有中间平均化尺度，我们推导出一个在两者之间插值的显式解。

papers.title: Estimating the COVID-19 Infection Rate: Anatomy of an Inference Problem
papers.authors: Charles F. Manski, Francesca Molinari
papers.abstract: As a consequence of missing data on tests for infection and imperfect accuracy of tests, reported rates of population infection by the SARS CoV-2 virus are lower than actual rates of infection. Hence, reported rates of severe illness conditional on infection are higher than actual rates. Understanding the time path of the COVID-19 pandemic has been hampered by the absence of bounds on infection rates that are credible and informative. This paper explains the logical problem of bounding these rates and reports illustrative findings, using data from Illinois, New York, and Italy. We combine the data with assumptions on the infection rate in the untested population and on the accuracy of the tests that appear credible in the current context. We find that the infection rate might be substantially higher than reported. We also find that the infection fatality rate in Italy is substantially lower than reported.
papers.zh_title: 估计COVID-19感染率：一个推断问题的剖析
papers.zh_abstract: 由于感染检测数据缺失以及检测准确度不完美，报告的SARS CoV-2病毒人群感染率低于实际感染率。因此，报告的条件于感染的严重疾病发生率高于实际发生率。理解COVID-19大流行的时间路径一直受到缺乏可信且信息丰富的感染率界限的阻碍。本文解释了界定这些比率的逻辑问题，并报告了使用伊利诺伊州、纽约州和意大利数据的说明性发现。我们将数据与关于未检测人群感染率以及检测准确度的假设相结合，这些假设在当前背景下似乎是可信的。我们发现感染率可能远高于报告值。我们还发现意大利的感染致死率远低于报告值。

papers.title: The US Equity Valuation Premium, Globalization, and Climate Change Risks
papers.authors: Craig Doidge, G. Andrew Karolyi, René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: In the 2000s, US firms have higher valuations than comparable non-US firms listed only outside the US but not non-US firms cross-listed in the US. Though one would expect this US valuation premium to fall over time because of globalization, it widens for firms in developed markets by 36% and falls for firms in emerging markets by 20% after the global financial crisis of 2007-2008. This evolution is explained in part by the decreased valuation of brown firms in other developed countries relative to the US. Other potential explanations are explored and rejected.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：F21, F65, G10, G15, G34
papers.zh_title: 美国股权估值溢价、全球化与气候变化风险
papers.zh_abstract: 在2000年代，美国公司的估值高于仅在境外上市的可比非美国公司，但不高于在美国交叉上市的非美国公司。尽管由于全球化，人们预期这一美国估值溢价会随时间下降，但在2007-2008年全球金融危机后，发达市场公司的溢价扩大了36%，而新兴市场公司的溢价下降了20%。这种演变部分可由其他发达国家相对于美国的棕色公司估值下降来解释。其他可能的解释已被探讨并排除。

papers.title: The Subways Seeded the Massive Coronavirus Epidemic in New York City
papers.authors: Jeffrey E. Harris
papers.abstract: New York City’s multipronged subway system was a major disseminator – if not the principal transmission vehicle – of coronavirus infection during the initial takeoff of the massive epidemic that became evident throughout the city during March 2020. The near shutoff of subway ridership in Manhattan – down by over 90 percent at the end of March – correlates strongly with the substantial increase in the doubling time of new cases in this borough. Subway lines with the largest drop in ridership during the second and third weeks of March had the lowest subsequent rates of infection in the zip codes traversed by their routes. Maps of subway station turnstile entries, superimposed upon zip code-level maps of reported coronavirus incidence, are strongly consistent with subway-facilitated disease propagation. Reciprocal seeding of infection appears to be the best explanation for the emergence of a single hotspot in Midtown West in Manhattan.
papers.zh_title: 地铁播下了纽约市大规模冠状病毒疫情的种子
papers.zh_abstract: 纽约市的多管齐下地铁系统是2020年3月全市范围内显现的大规模疫情初期爆发期间冠状病毒感染的主要传播者——如果不是主要传播媒介的话。曼哈顿地铁乘客量近乎关闭——3月底下降超过90%——与该行政区新增病例倍增时间的大幅增加密切相关。在3月第二和第三周乘客量下降最大的地铁线路，其路线经过的邮政编码区域后续感染率最低。地铁站闸机入口地图叠加在报告的冠状病毒发病率邮政编码级别地图上，与地铁促进疾病传播的结论高度一致。感染的相互播撒似乎是解释曼哈顿中城西部单一热点出现的最佳解释。

papers.title: Economic Policy Incentives to Preserve Lives and Livelihoods
papers.authors: Roberto Chang, Andrés Velasco
papers.abstract: The Covid-19 pandemic has motivated a myriad of studies and proposals on how economic policy should respond to this colossal shock. But in this debate it is seldom recognized that the health shock is not entirely exogenous. Its magnitude and dynamics themselves depend on economic policies, and the explicit or implicit incentives those policies provide. To illuminate the feedback loops between medical and economic factors we develop a minimal economic model of pandemics. In the model, as in reality, individual decisions to comply (or not) with virus-related public health directives depend on economic variables and incentives, which themselves respond to current economic policy and expectations of future policies. The analysis yields several practical lessons: because policies affect the speed of virus transmission via incentives, public health measures and economic policies can complement each other, reducing the cost of attaining desired social goals; expectations of expansionary macroeconomic policies during the recovery phase can help reduce the speed of infection, and hence the size of the health shock; the credibility of announced policies is key to rule out both self-fulfilling pessimistic expectations and time inconsistency problems. The analysis also yields a critique of the current use of SIR models for policy evaluation, in the spirit of Lucas (1983).
papers.zh_title: 保护生命与生计的经济政策激励
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情催生了大量关于经济政策应如何应对这一巨大冲击的研究与建议。但在这场辩论中，很少有人认识到健康冲击并非完全外生。其规模与动态本身取决于经济政策，以及这些政策所提供的显性或隐性激励。为了阐明医疗因素与经济因素之间的反馈循环，我们构建了一个简约的流行病经济模型。在该模型中，如同现实一样，个人遵守（或不遵守）与病毒相关的公共卫生指令的决定取决于经济变量和激励，而这些变量和激励本身又受到当前经济政策及对未来政策预期的影响。分析得出了若干实践启示：由于政策通过激励影响病毒传播速度，公共卫生措施与经济政策可以相互补充，从而降低实现预期社会目标的成本；对复苏阶段扩张性宏观经济政策的预期有助于降低感染速度，进而减小健康冲击的规模；已宣布政策的可信度对于排除自我实现的悲观预期和时间不一致性问题至关重要。分析还基于卢卡斯（1983）的精神，对当前使用SIR模型进行政策评估的做法提出了批评。

papers.title: Covid-19: Testing Inequality in New York City
papers.authors: Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Ken Teoh, Martín Uribe
papers.abstract: Motivated by reports in the media suggesting unequal access to Covid-19 testing across incomes, we analyze zip-code level data on the number of Covid-19 tests, test results, and income per capita in New York City. We find that the number of tests administered is evenly distributed across income levels. In particular, the test distribution across income levels is significantly more egalitarian than the distribution of income itself: The ten percent of the city's population living in the richest zip codes received 11 percent of the Covid-19 tests and 29 percent of the city's income. The ten percent of the city's population living in the poorest zip codes received 10 percent of the tests but only 4 percent of the city's income. At the same time, we find significant disparity in the fraction of tests that come back negative for the Covid-19 disease across income levels: moving from the poorest zip codes to the richest zip codes is associated with an increase in the fraction of negative Covid-19 test results from 38 to 65 percent.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情：纽约市检测中的不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 受媒体报道中关于不同收入群体获得新冠检测机会不均等的启发，我们分析了纽约市按邮政编码划分的新冠检测数量、检测结果以及人均收入数据。我们发现，检测数量在不同收入水平之间分布均匀。特别是，检测在不同收入水平之间的分布比收入本身的分布要平等得多：居住在收入最高邮政编码区的城市人口占10%，他们接受了11%的新冠检测，却获得了城市29%的收入；居住在收入最低邮政编码区的城市人口占10%，他们接受了10%的检测，但仅获得城市4%的收入。与此同时，我们发现不同收入水平之间新冠检测阴性结果的比例存在显著差异：从最贫困的邮政编码区到最富裕的邮政编码区，新冠检测阴性结果的比例从38%上升到65%。

papers.title: Lock-downs, Loneliness and Life Satisfaction
papers.authors: Daniel S. Hamermesh
papers.abstract: Using the 2012-13 American Time Use Survey, I find that both who people spend time with and how they spend it affect their happiness, adjusted for numerous demographic and economic variables. Satisfaction among married individuals increases most with additional time spent with spouse. Among singles, satisfaction decreases most as more time is spent alone. Assuming that lock-downs constrain married people to spend time solely with their spouses, simulations show that their happiness may have been increased compared to before the lock-downs; but sufficiently large losses of work time and income reverse this inference. Simulations demonstrate clearly that, assuming lock-downs impose solitude on singles, their happiness was reduced, reductions that are made more severe by income and work losses.
papers.zh_title: 封锁、孤独感与生活满意度
papers.zh_abstract: 利用2012-2013年美国时间使用调查数据，我发现，在调整了众多人口统计和经济变量后，人们与谁共度时光以及如何度过时光都会影响他们的幸福感。已婚人士的满意度随着与配偶共度额外时间的增加而提升最多。在单身人士中，随着独处时间的增加，满意度下降最多。假设封锁迫使已婚人士只能与配偶共度时光，模拟显示，与封锁前相比，他们的幸福感可能有所提升；但工作时间和收入的足够大损失会逆转这一推论。模拟清楚地表明，假设封锁迫使单身人士独处，他们的幸福感会降低，而收入和工作的损失会使这种降低更加严重。

papers.title: Labor Markets During the COVID-19 Crisis: A Preliminary View
papers.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: We use a repeated large-scale survey of households in the Nielsen Homescan panel to characterize how labor markets are being affected by the covid-19 pandemic. We document several facts. First, job loss has been significantly larger than implied by new unemployment claims: we estimate 20 million lost jobs by April 6th, far more than jobs lost over the entire Great Recession. Second, many of those losing jobs are not actively looking to find new ones. As a result, we estimate the rise in the unemployment rate over the corresponding period to be surprisingly small, only about 2 percentage points. Third, participation in the labor force has declined by 7 percentage points, an unparalleled fall that dwarfs the three percentage point cumulative decline that occurred from 2008 to 2016.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, EFG, LS, ME；JEL：C83, D84, E31, J21, J26
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情危机期间的劳动力市场：初步观察
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用尼尔森家庭扫描面板中重复进行的大规模家庭调查，来描述劳动力市场如何受到新冠疫情的影响。我们记录了若干事实。首先，失业规模远大于新增失业救济申请所暗示的数字：我们估计截至4月6日已有2000万个工作岗位流失，远超大衰退期间失去的工作岗位总数。其次，许多失业者并未积极寻找新工作。因此，我们估计同期失业率的上升幅度出奇地小，仅约2个百分点。第三，劳动力参与率下降了7个百分点，这是一次无与伦比的下降，使2008年至2016年累计下降的3个百分点相形见绌。

papers.title: Market Structure and Product Assortment: Evidence from a Natural Experiment in Liquor Licensure
papers.authors: Gastón Illanes, Sarah Moshary
papers.abstract: We examine how market structure, measured as the number of firms, affects prices, quantities, product assortment, and consumer surplus. Our analysis exploits Washington’s deregulation of spirit sales, which generated exogenous variation in market structure across the state. Consistent with the uniform pricing literature, we find no effect of increased competition on prices. Rather, we document an expansion of product assortment, which in turn increases purchasing. Using a discrete-choice demand model, we estimate that wider assortments increase consumer surplus by $3.20/month when moving from monopoly to duopoly. However, the likelihood that a household engages in heavy drinking, as defined by the CDC, increases by 5.6 percentage points, raising concerns about social welfare.
papers.zh_title: 市场结构与产品组合：来自酒类许可证自然实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了市场结构（以企业数量衡量）如何影响价格、数量、产品组合和消费者剩余。我们的分析利用了华盛顿州对烈酒销售放松管制这一事件，该事件在全州范围内产生了市场结构的外生变化。与统一定价文献一致，我们发现竞争加剧对价格没有影响。相反，我们记录了产品组合的扩张，这反过来又增加了购买量。利用离散选择需求模型，我们估计，从垄断转向双头垄断时，更广泛的产品组合使消费者剩余每月增加3.20美元。然而，根据美国疾病控制与预防中心的定义，家庭参与重度饮酒的可能性增加了5.6个百分点，这引发了关于社会福利的担忧。

papers.title: Innovative Growth Accounting
papers.authors: Peter J. Klenow, Huiyu Li
papers.abstract: Recent work highlights a falling entry rate of new firms and a rising market share of large firms in the United States. To understand how these changing firm demographics have affected growth, we decompose productivity growth into the firms doing the innovating. We trace how much each firm innovates by the rate at which it opens and closes plants, the market share of those plants, and how fast its surviving plants grow. Using data on all nonfarm businesses from 1982–2013, we find that new and young firms (ages 0 to 5 years) account for almost one-half of growth – three times their share of employment. Large established firms contribute only one-tenth of growth despite representing one-fourth of employment. Older firms do explain most of the speedup and slowdown during the middle of our sample. Finally, most growth takes the form of incumbents improving their own products, as opposed to creative destruction or new varieties.
papers.zh_title: 创新增长核算
papers.zh_abstract: 近期研究突显了美国新企业进入率下降和大型企业市场份额上升的趋势。为了理解这些变化的企业人口结构如何影响增长，我们将生产率增长分解到进行创新的企业层面。我们通过企业开设和关闭工厂的速率、这些工厂的市场份额以及其存活工厂的增长速度来追踪每家企业的创新程度。利用1982年至2013年所有非农企业的数据，我们发现新企业和年轻企业（成立0至5年）几乎占增长的一半——是其就业份额的三倍。大型成熟企业仅贡献了增长的十分之一，尽管它们占就业的四分之一。年长企业确实解释了样本中期大部分的增长加速和减速。最后，大多数增长表现为在位企业改进自身产品，而非创造性破坏或新品种。

papers.title: Advances in Using Vector Autoregressions to Estimate Structural Magnitudes
papers.authors: Christiane Baumeister, James D. Hamilton
papers.abstract: This paper surveys recent advances in drawing structural conclusions from vector autoregressions, providing a unified perspective on the role of prior knowledge. We describe the traditional approach to identification as a claim to have exact prior information about the structural model and propose Bayesian inference as a way to acknowledge that prior information is imperfect or subject to error. We raise concerns from both a frequentist and a Bayesian perspective about the way that results are typically reported for VARs that are set-identified using sign and other restrictions. We call attention to a common but previously unrecognized error in estimating structural elasticities and show how to correctly estimate elasticities even in the case when one only knows the effects of a single structural shock.
papers.zh_title: 利用向量自回归估计结构性参数的最新进展
papers.zh_abstract: 本文综述了从向量自回归中得出结构性结论的最新进展，并提供了关于先验知识作用的统一视角。我们将传统的识别方法描述为声称拥有关于结构模型的精确先验信息，并提出贝叶斯推断作为一种承认先验信息不完美或存在误差的方式。我们从频率学派和贝叶斯学派的角度，对通常使用符号约束和其他约束进行集合识别的VAR模型的结果报告方式提出了担忧。我们指出了在估计结构性弹性时一个常见但此前未被认识到的错误，并展示了即使在只知道单一结构性冲击效应的情况下，如何正确估计弹性。

papers.title: An Alternative Explanation for the “Fed Information Effect”
papers.authors: Michael D. Bauer, Eric T. Swanson
papers.abstract: High-frequency changes in interest rates around FOMC announcements are a standard method of measuring monetary policy shocks. However, some recent studies have documented puzzling effects of these shocks on private-sector forecasts of GDP, unemployment, or inflation that are opposite in sign to what standard macroeconomic models would predict. This evidence has been viewed as supportive of a “Fed information effect” channel of monetary policy, whereby an FOMC tightening (easing) communicates that the economy is stronger (weaker) than the public had expected. We show that these empirical results are also consistent with a “Fed response to news” channel, in which incoming, publicly available economic news causes both the Fed to change monetary policy and the private sector to revise its forecasts. We provide substantial new evidence that distinguishes between these two channels and strongly favors the latter; for example, (i) regressions that include the previously omitted public economic news, (ii) a new survey that we conduct of Blue Chip forecasters, and (iii) high-frequency financial market responses to FOMC announcements all indicate that the Fed and private sector are simply responding to the same public news, and that there is little if any role for a “Fed information effect”.
papers.zh_title: 对“美联储信息效应”的另一种解释
papers.zh_abstract: 联邦公开市场委员会公告前后利率的高频变化是衡量货币政策冲击的标准方法。然而，近期一些研究记录了这些冲击对私营部门关于GDP、失业率或通胀预测的令人费解的影响，其符号与标准宏观经济模型的预测相反。这一证据被视为支持货币政策“美联储信息效应”渠道，即联邦公开市场委员会收紧（放松）政策传递出经济比公众预期更强劲（更疲弱）的信号。我们表明，这些实证结果也与“美联储对新闻的反应”渠道一致，在该渠道中，新发布的公开经济新闻既导致美联储改变货币政策，也导致私营部门修正其预测。我们提供了大量新证据来区分这两个渠道，并强烈支持后者；例如：（i）包含先前遗漏的公共经济新闻的回归分析，（ii）我们对蓝筹股预测者进行的一项新调查，以及（iii）联邦公开市场委员会公告的高频金融市场反应，均表明美联储和私营部门只是对相同的公共新闻做出反应，而“美联储信息效应”几乎没有发挥任何作用。

papers.title: Disputes in International Investment and Trade
papers.authors: Ralph Ossa, Robert W. Staiger, Alan O. Sykes
papers.abstract: International investment agreements employ dispute settlement procedures that differ markedly from their counterparts in trade agreements along three key dimensions: standing (i.e., the right to file grievances), the nature of the remedy, and the remedial period. In the state-to-state dispute settlement procedures of a typical trade agreement, only governments have standing, while private investors also have standing in the investor-state dispute settlement procedures employed by investment agreements. Trade agreements typically employ tariff retaliation as the remedy for violation of the agreement, while the award of cash damages is the norm in investment disputes. And trade agreements typically provide for only prospective remedies covering harm done subsequent to a ruling, while the damages awarded in investment disputes routinely cover past as well as future harms. We develop parallel models of trade agreements and investment agreements and employ them to study these differences. We argue that the differences can be understood as arising from the fundamentally different problems that trade and investment agreements are designed to solve.
papers.zh_title: 国际投资与贸易争端
papers.zh_abstract: 国际投资协定采用的争端解决程序与贸易协定中的对应程序在三个关键维度上存在显著差异：诉讼资格（即提出申诉的权利）、救济的性质以及救济期限。在典型贸易协定的国家间争端解决程序中，只有政府拥有诉讼资格，而投资协定采用的投资者与国家间争端解决程序则赋予私人投资者诉讼资格。贸易协定通常采用关税报复作为违反协定的救济措施，而现金损害赔偿则是投资争端中的常规做法。此外，贸易协定通常仅提供预期救济，涵盖裁决后造成的损害，而投资争端中裁定的损害赔偿通常涵盖过去和未来的损害。我们构建了贸易协定和投资协定的平行模型，并利用它们来研究这些差异。我们认为，这些差异可以理解为源于贸易和投资协定旨在解决的根本不同问题。

papers.title: The Roots of Agricultural Innovation: Patent Evidence of Knowledge Spillovers
papers.authors: Matthew S. Clancy, Paul Heisey, Yongjie Ji, GianCarlo Moschini
papers.abstract: This chapter investigates the extent to which agricultural innovations draw on ideas originating outside of agriculture. We identify a large set of US patents for agricultural technologies granted between 1976 and 2018. To measure knowledge spillovers to these patents, we rely on three proxies: patent citations to other patents, patent citations to the scientific literature, and a novel text analysis to identify and track new ideas in the patent text. We find that more than half of knowledge flows originate outside of agriculture. The majority of these knowledge inflows, however, still originate in domains that are close to agriculture.
papers.zh_title: 农业创新的根源：知识溢出的专利证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本章研究了农业创新在多大程度上借鉴了农业领域之外的思想。我们识别了1976年至2018年间授予的大量美国农业技术专利。为了衡量这些专利的知识溢出，我们依赖三个代理指标：专利对其他专利的引用、专利对科学文献的引用，以及一种新颖的文本分析方法，用于识别和追踪专利文本中的新思想。我们发现，超过一半的知识流动源自农业领域之外。然而，这些知识流入的大部分仍然源于与农业相近的领域。

papers.title: Spending Less After (Seemingly) Bad News
papers.authors: Mark Garmaise, Yaron Levi, Hanno Lustig
papers.abstract: Using high-frequency spending data, we show that household consumption displays excess sensitivity to salient macro-economic news, even when the news is not real. When the announced local unemployment rate reaches a 12-month maximum, local news coverage of unemployment increases and local consumers reduce their discretionary spending by 2% relative to consumers in areas with the same macro-economic fundamentals. The consumption of low-income households displays greater excess sensitivity to salience. The decrease in spending is not reversed in subsequent months; instead, negative news persistently reduces future spending for two to four months. Households in treated areas act as if they are more financially constrained than those in untreated areas with the same fundamentals.
papers.zh_title: 在（看似）坏消息后减少支出
papers.zh_abstract: 利用高频支出数据，我们表明家庭消费对显著的宏观经济新闻表现出过度敏感性，即使这些新闻并非真实。当公布的当地失业率达到12个月最高点时，当地对失业的新闻报道增加，当地消费者的可自由支配支出相对于具有相同宏观经济基本面的地区的消费者减少了2%。低收入家庭的消费对显著性表现出更大的过度敏感性。支出的减少在随后的月份中并未逆转；相反，负面新闻持续性地减少未来两到四个月的支出。处理组地区的家庭表现得比具有相同基本面的未处理组地区的家庭更受财务约束。

papers.title: Covid-19 Infection Externalities: Trading Off Lives vs. Livelihoods
papers.authors: Zachary A. Bethune, Anton Korinek
papers.abstract: We analyze the externalities that arise when social and economic interactions transmit infectious diseases such as COVID-19. Individually rational agents do not internalize that they impose infection externalities upon others when the disease is transmitted. In an SIR model calibrated to capture the main features of COVID-19 in the US economy, we show that private agents perceive the cost an additional infection to be around $80k whereas the social cost including infection externalities is more than three times higher, around $286k. This misvaluation has stark implications for how society ultimately overcomes the disease: for a population of individually rational agents, the precautionary behavior by the susceptible flattens the curve of infections, but the disease is not overcome until herd immunity is acquired. The resulting economic cost is high; an initial sharp decline in aggregate output followed by a slow recovery over several years. By contrast, the socially optimal approach in our model focuses public policy measures on the infected in order to contain the disease and quickly eradicate it, which produces a much milder recession. If targeting the infected is impossible, the optimal policy in our model is still to aggressively contain and eliminate the disease, and the social cost of an extra infection rises to $586k.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, EH, IFM, PE；JEL：E1, E65, H12, H23, I18
papers.zh_title: COVID-19感染外部性：生命与生计的权衡
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了当社会和经济互动传播传染病（如COVID-19）时产生的外部性。当疾病传播时，个体理性代理人没有内化他们强加给其他人的感染外部性。在一个校准以捕捉美国经济中COVID-19主要特征的SIR模型中，我们表明私人代理人认为额外感染的成本约为8万美元，而包括感染外部性在内的社会成本则高出三倍多，约为28.6万美元。这种错误估值对社会最终如何战胜疾病具有显著影响：对于个体理性代理人群体，易感者的预防行为使感染曲线趋平，但疾病直到获得群体免疫才被克服。由此产生的经济成本很高；总产出最初急剧下降，随后是持续数年的缓慢复苏。相比之下，我们模型中的社会最优方法将公共政策措施集中于感染者，以控制疾病并迅速根除它，这会产生温和得多的衰退。如果无法针对感染者，我们模型中的最优政策仍然是积极控制和消除疾病，此时额外感染的社会成本上升至58.6万美元。

papers.title: Risk Perception Through the Lens of Politics in the Time of the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, Yael Hochberg
papers.abstract: Even when, objectively speaking, death is on the line, partisan bias still colors beliefs about facts. We show that a higher share of Trump voters in a county is associated with lower perceptions of risk during the COVID-19 pandemic. As Trump voter share rises, individuals search less for information on the virus, and engage in less social distancing behavior, as measured by smartphone location patterns. These patterns persist in the face of state-level mandates to close schools and businesses or to “stay home,” and reverse only when conservative politicians are exposed and the White House releases federal social distancing guidelines.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19大流行时期通过政治视角的风险感知
papers.zh_abstract: 即使客观上说，死亡迫在眉睫，党派偏见仍然会影响对事实的信念。我们表明，一个县中特朗普选民比例越高，在COVID-19大流行期间对风险的感知就越低。随着特朗普选民比例上升，个人搜索病毒信息的次数减少，并且根据智能手机定位模式衡量，参与社交疏离行为的程度也降低。这些模式在州级关闭学校和企业或“居家令”的强制要求下依然存在，并且只有在保守派政治家被曝光以及白宫发布联邦社交疏离指南后才发生逆转。

papers.title: Policy Implications of Models of the Spread of Coronavirus: Perspectives and Opportunities for Economists
papers.authors: Christopher Avery, William Bossert, Adam Clark, Glenn Ellison, Sara Fisher Ellison
papers.abstract: This paper provides a critical review of models of the spread of the coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) epidemic that have been influential in recent policy decisions. There is tremendous opportunity for social scientists to advance the relevant literature as new and better data becomes available to bolster economic outcomes and save lives.
papers.zh_title: 冠状病毒传播模型的政策含义：经济学家的视角与机遇
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对近期影响政策决策的冠状病毒（SARS-CoV-2）流行病传播模型进行了批判性评述。随着新的、更好的数据变得可用，以加强经济成果并拯救生命，社会科学家有巨大的机会来推进相关文献。

papers.title: No Line Left Behind: Assortative Matching Inside the Firm
papers.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, Vittorio Bassi, Anant Nyshadham, Jorge A. Tamayo
papers.abstract: How do firms pair workers with managers, and which constraints affect the allocation of labor within the firm? We characterize the sorting pattern of managers to workers in a large readymade garment manufacturer in India, and then explore potential drivers of the observed allocation. Workers in this firm are organized into production lines, each supervised by a manager. We exploit the high degree of worker mobility across lines, together with worker-level productivity data, to estimate the sorting of workers to managers. We find negative assortative matching (NAM) -that is, better managers tend to match with worse workers, and vice versa. This stands in contrast to our estimates of the production technology, which reveal that if the firm were to positively sort, productivity would increase by 1 to 4 percent across the six factories in our data. Coupling these findings with a survey of managers and with data on multinational brands and the orders they place, we document that NAM arises, at least in part, because the value of buyer relationships imposes minimum productivity constraints on each production line. Our results emphasize that suppliers to the global market, when they are beholden to a small set of powerful buyers, may be driven to allocate managerial skill to service these relationships, even at the expense of productivity.
papers.zh_title: 不让任何生产线掉队：公司内部的分类匹配
papers.zh_abstract: 企业如何将工人与管理者配对，以及哪些约束影响了公司内部的劳动力配置？我们描述了印度一家大型成衣制造商中管理者与工人的分类匹配模式，然后探讨了观察到的配置的潜在驱动因素。这家公司的工人被组织成生产线，每条生产线由一名管理者监督。我们利用工人跨生产线的高度流动性，以及工人层面的生产率数据，来估计工人与管理者之间的匹配。我们发现负向分类匹配——即更好的管理者倾向于与更差的工人匹配，反之亦然。这与我们对生产技术的估计形成对比，后者揭示，如果公司进行正向分类，我们数据中六个工厂的生产率将提高1%到4%。将这些发现与对管理者的调查以及跨国品牌及其订单数据相结合，我们记录了负向分类匹配的产生，至少部分是因为买方关系的价值对每条生产线施加了最低生产率约束。我们的结果强调，全球市场的供应商，当他们受制于一小部分强大的买方时，可能会被迫分配管理技能来服务于这些关系，即使以牺牲生产率为代价。

papers.title: Countervailing Market Power and Hospital Competition
papers.authors: Eric Barrette, Gautam Gowrisankaran, Robert Town
papers.abstract: While economic theories indicate that market power by downstream ﬁrms can potentially counteract market power upstream, antitrust policy is opaque about whether to incorporate countervailing market power in merger analyses. We use detailed national claims data from the healthcare sector to evaluate whether countervailing insurer power does indeed limit hospitals’ exercise of market power. We estimate willingness-to-pay models to evaluate hospital market power across analysis areas. We ﬁnd that countervailing market power is important: a typical hospital merger would raise hospital prices 4.3% at the 25th percentile of insurer concentration but only 0.97% at the 75th percentile of insurer concentration.
papers.zh_title: 抵消市场力量与医院竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 虽然经济理论表明下游企业的市场力量可能潜在地抵消上游的市场力量，但反垄断政策对于是否在合并分析中纳入抵消市场力量并不明确。我们利用来自医疗保健部门的详细国家索赔数据来评估抵消的保险公司力量是否确实限制了医院行使市场力量。我们估计了支付意愿模型，以评估跨分析区域的医院市场力量。我们发现抵消市场力量很重要：在保险公司集中度的第25百分位，一次典型的医院合并将使医院价格提高4.3%，但在保险公司集中度的第75百分位，仅提高0.97%。

papers.title: Shotgun Wedding: Fiscal and Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Marco Bassetto, Thomas J. Sargent
papers.abstract: This paper describes interactions between monetary and fiscal policies that affect equilibrium price levels and interest rates by critically surveying theories about (a) optimal anticipated inflation, (b) optimal unanticipated inflation, and (c) conditions that secure a "nominal anchor'' in the sense of a unique price level path. We contrast incomplete theories whose inputs are budget-feasible sequences of government issued bonds and money with complete theories whose inputs are bond-money strategies described as sequences of functions that map time t histories into time t government actions. We cite historical episodes that confirm the theoretical insight that lines of authority between a Treasury and a Central Bank can be ambiguous, obscure, and fragile.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E52, E61, E62, E63
papers.zh_title: 强制联姻：财政与货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过批判性评述关于（a）最优预期通胀、（b）最优非预期通胀以及（c）确保“名义锚”（即唯一价格水平路径）的条件等理论，描述了影响均衡价格水平和利率的货币与财政政策之间的相互作用。我们将输入为政府发行的债券和货币的预算可行序列的不完整理论，与输入为债券-货币策略（描述为将时间t历史映射到时间t政府行动的函数序列）的完整理论进行了对比。我们引用了历史事件，证实了以下理论洞见：财政部与中央银行之间的权力界限可能模糊、不明确且脆弱。

papers.title: What’s up with the Phillips Curve?
papers.authors: Marco Del Negro, Michele Lenza, Giorgio E. Primiceri, Andrea Tambalotti
papers.abstract: The business cycle is alive and well, and real variables respond to it more or less as they always did. Witness the Great Recession. Inflation, in contrast, has gone quiescent. This paper studies the sources of this disconnect using VARs and an estimated DSGE model. It finds that the disconnect is due primarily to the muted reaction of inflation to cost pressures, regardless of how they are measured—a flat aggregate supply curve. A shift in policy towards more forceful inflation stabilization also appears to have played some role by reducing the impact of demand shocks on the real economy. The evidence rules out stories centered around changes in the structure of the labor market or in how we should measure its tightness.
papers.zh_title: 菲利普斯曲线怎么了？
papers.zh_abstract: 商业周期依然活跃，实际变量对其的反应或多或少与以往相同。大衰退就是明证。相比之下，通胀已趋于平静。本文利用VAR模型和估计的DSGE模型研究这种脱节的根源。研究发现，这种脱节主要源于通胀对成本压力的反应迟钝，无论成本压力如何衡量——即总供给曲线平坦。政策转向更积极的通胀稳定似乎也起到了一定作用，因为它减少了需求冲击对实体经济的影响。证据排除了围绕劳动力市场结构变化或我们应如何衡量其紧张程度的故事。

papers.title: Some Unpleasant Markup Arithmetic: Production Function Elasticities and their Estimation from Production Data
papers.authors: Steve Bond, Arshia Hashemi, Greg Kaplan, Piotr Zoch
papers.abstract: The ratio estimator of a firm's markup is the ratio of the output elasticity of a variable input to that input's cost share in revenue. This note raises issues that concern identification and estimation of markups using the ratio estimator. Concerning identification: (i) if the revenue elasticity is used in place of the output elasticity, then the estimand underlying the ratio estimator does not contain any information about the markup; (ii) if any part of the input bundle is either used to influence demand, or is neither fully fixed nor fully flexible, then the estimand underlying the ratio estimator is not equal to the markup. Concerning estimation: (i) even with data on output quantities, it is challenging to obtain consistent estimates of output elasticities when firms have market power; (ii) without data on output quantities, as is typically the case, it is not possible to obtain consistent estimates of output elasticities when firms have market power and markups are heterogeneous. These issues cast doubt over whether anything useful can be learned about heterogeneity or trends in markups, from recent attempts to apply the ratio estimator in settings without output quantity data.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D2, D4, L1, L4
papers.zh_title: 一些令人不快的加成定价算术：生产函数弹性及其从生产数据中的估计
papers.zh_abstract: 企业加成定价的比率估计量是可变投入的产出弹性与该投入在收入中的成本份额之比。本文提出了关于使用比率估计量识别和估计加成定价的问题。关于识别：（i）如果使用收入弹性代替产出弹性，那么比率估计量背后的估计目标不包含任何关于加成定价的信息；（ii）如果投入组合的任何部分要么用于影响需求，要么既非完全固定也非完全灵活，那么比率估计量背后的估计目标不等于加成定价。关于估计：（i）即使有产出数量数据，当企业拥有市场势力时，获得产出弹性的一致估计也具有挑战性；（ii）在没有产出数量数据的情况下（这是典型情况），当企业拥有市场势力且加成定价具有异质性时，不可能获得产出弹性的一致估计。这些问题使人们对近期在缺乏产出数量数据的情况下应用比率估计量能否了解加成定价的异质性或趋势产生了怀疑。

papers.title: Energy Markets and Global Economic Conditions
papers.authors: Christiane Baumeister, Dimitris Korobilis, Thomas K. Lee
papers.abstract: This paper evaluates alternative indicators of global economic activity and other market fundamentals in terms of their usefulness for forecasting real oil prices and global petroleum consumption. We find that world industrial production is one of the most useful indicators that has been proposed in the literature. However, by combining measures from a number of different sources we can do even better. Our analysis results in a new index of global economic conditions and new measures for assessing future tightness of energy demand and expected oil price pressures.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C11, C32, C52, Q41, Q47
papers.zh_title: 能源市场与全球经济状况
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了不同的全球经济活动指标和其他市场基本面指标在预测实际石油价格和全球石油消费方面的有用性。我们发现，世界工业生产是文献中提出的最有用的指标之一。然而，通过结合来自多个不同来源的衡量指标，我们可以做得更好。我们的分析得出一个新的全球经济状况指数，以及用于评估未来能源需求紧张程度和预期油价压力的新衡量指标。

papers.title: Optimal Regulation of E-cigarettes: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: Hunt Allcott, Charlie Rafkin
papers.abstract: There is an active debate about how to regulate electronic cigarettes, due to uncertainty about their health effects and whether they are primarily a quit aid or a gateway drug for combustible cigarettes. We model optimal e-cigarette regulation and estimate key parameters. Using tax changes and scanner data, we estimate relatively elastic demand. A demographic shift-share identification strategy suggests limited substitution between e-cigarettes and cigarettes. We field a new survey of public health experts, who report that vaping is more harmful than previously believed. In our model’s average Monte Carlo simulation, these results imply that optimal e-cigarette taxes are higher than recent norms. However, e-cigarette subsidies may be optimal if vaping is a stronger substitute for smoking and is safer than our experts report, or if consumers overestimate the health harms from vaping.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：D12, D18, D61, H21, H23, I12, I18
papers.zh_title: 电子烟的最优监管：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 关于如何监管电子烟存在激烈争论，原因在于其健康影响的不确定性，以及它主要是可燃香烟的戒烟辅助工具还是入门毒品。我们构建了最优电子烟监管模型并估计了关键参数。利用税收变化和扫描数据，我们估计出相对有弹性的需求。一种人口统计学的份额转移识别策略表明，电子烟和香烟之间的替代性有限。我们进行了一项新的公共卫生专家调查，他们报告称电子烟比之前认为的危害更大。在我们的模型平均蒙特卡洛模拟中，这些结果表明最优电子烟税率高于近期常态。然而，如果电子烟是吸烟的更强替代品且比我们的专家报告的安全，或者如果消费者高估了电子烟的健康危害，那么电子烟补贴可能是最优的。

papers.title: Measuring Racial Discrimination in Bail Decisions
papers.authors: David Arnold, Will S. Dobbie, Peter Hull
papers.abstract: We develop new quasi-experimental tools to measure disparate impact, regardless of its source, in the context of bail decisions. We show that omitted variables bias in pretrial release rate comparisons can be purged by using the quasi-random assignment of judges to estimate average pretrial misconduct risk by race. We find that two-thirds of the release rate disparity between white and Black defendants in New York City is due to the disparate impact of release decisions. We then develop a hierarchical marginal treatment effect model to study the drivers of disparate impact, finding evidence of both racial bias and statistical discrimination.
papers.zh_title: 衡量保释决定中的种族歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了新的准实验工具来衡量保释决定背景下的差异性影响，无论其来源如何。我们表明，通过利用法官的准随机分配来估计按种族划分的平均审前不当行为风险，可以消除审前释放率比较中的遗漏变量偏差。我们发现，纽约市白人和黑人被告之间释放率差异的三分之二归因于释放决定的差异性影响。然后，我们开发了一个分层边际处理效应模型来研究差异性影响的驱动因素，发现了种族偏见和统计歧视的证据。

papers.title: Ageing-Driven Migration and Redistribution: Comparing Policy Regimes
papers.authors: Assaf Razin, Alexander Horst Schwemmer
papers.abstract: Life cycle and insurance-type considerations dominate redistribution policy. Wage and fiscal prospects of ageing dominate migration policy. The paper compares distinct policy regimes, directed at migration and redistribution issues. Migration quotas, provision of social benefits, labor income taxation, and capital income taxation, are all endogenously determined in a policy-optimizing framework. The analysis makes a three-way comparison: free-migration regime vs. restricted-migration regime, welfare-state regime vs. no-migration-quota, no-redistribution regime, and low-income-majority regime vs. high-income-majority regime.
papers.zh_title: 老龄化驱动的移民与再分配：比较政策体制
papers.zh_abstract: 生命周期和保险类型的考虑主导着再分配政策。工资和财政前景的老龄化主导着移民政策。本文比较了针对移民和再分配问题的不同政策体制。移民配额、社会福利提供、劳动收入税和资本收入税，都在一个政策优化框架内内生决定。分析进行了三向比较：自由移民体制 vs. 限制移民体制，福利国家体制 vs. 无移民配额、无再分配体制，以及低收入多数体制 vs. 高收入多数体制。

papers.title: Sticky Capital Controls
papers.authors: Miguel Acosta-Henao, Laura Alfaro, Andrés Fernández
papers.abstract: We build a new dataset using textual analysis, from which we document a set of stylized facts regarding the use of capital controls, along their intensive and extensive margins for 21 emerging markets, with a focus on priced-based controls. We document that capital controls are “sticky”; that is, changes do not occur frequently, and when they do, they remain in place for a long time. Overall, price-based capital controls have not been used systematically across countries or time, and there has been considerable heterogeneity across countries in terms of the intensity with which they have been used. We then present a model of capital controls relying on pecuniary externalities augmented by including an (S; s) cost of implementing such policies and illustrate how this friction goes a long way toward bringing the model closer to the data. When the extended model is calibrated for each of the countries in the new dataset, we find that the size of these costs is large, thus substantially reducing the welfare-enhancing effects of capital controls compared with the frictionless Ramsey benchmark. We conclude with a discussion of the structural interpretations of such costs, which calls for a richer set of policy constraints when considering the use of capital controls in models of pecuniary externalities.
papers.zh_title: 粘性资本管制
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用文本分析构建了一个新的数据集，从中记录了21个新兴市场在资本管制使用方面的一系列典型事实，包括其集约边际和广延边际，重点关注基于价格的管制。我们记录到资本管制是“粘性的”；也就是说，变化不频繁发生，而且一旦发生，会持续很长时间。总体而言，基于价格的资本管制并未在各国或各时期被系统性地使用，各国在使用强度上存在相当大的异质性。然后，我们提出了一个依赖于货币外部性的资本管制模型，并通过加入实施此类政策的（S；s）成本来扩展该模型，并说明这种摩擦如何大大有助于使模型更接近数据。当扩展模型针对新数据集中的每个国家进行校准后，我们发现这些成本的规模很大，从而与无摩擦的拉姆齐基准相比，大大降低了资本管制的福利提升效应。最后，我们讨论了这些成本的结构性解释，这要求在考虑货币外部性模型中使用资本管制时，考虑更丰富的政策约束集。

papers.title: Distributing Personal Income: Trends Over Time
papers.authors: Dennis Fixler, Marina Gindelsky, David Johnson
papers.abstract: This paper constructs a distribution of Personal Income for the United States (2007-2016) to investigate the relationship between inequality and macroeconomic growth. We extend a perspective first presented in Fixler and Johnson (2014) and further developed in Fixler et al. (2017) and Fixler, Gindelsky, and Johnson (2018, 2019) to develop a national account-based measure using a decade of publicly available survey, tax, and administrative data. By using (equivalized) households as the base unit of analysis and focusing on a more inclusive definition of income than most inequality studies (i.e., including health, transfers, and financial assets), we improve on existing economic measures of inequality in a meaningful way and bridge the gap between micro data and macro statistics. We produce a wide set of inequality results over the period, drawing a comparison with other studies (including Auten and Splinter (2019) and Piketty, Saez, and Zucman (2018)).
papers.zh_title: 个人收入分配：随时间变化的趋势
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了美国个人收入分配（2007-2016年），以研究不平等与宏观经济增长之间的关系。我们扩展了Fixler和Johnson（2014）首次提出、并在Fixler等人（2017）以及Fixler、Gindelsky和Johnson（2018, 2019）中进一步发展的视角，利用十年间公开可得的调查、税收和行政数据，开发了一种基于国民账户的衡量指标。通过使用（等值化后的）家庭作为基本分析单位，并关注比大多数不平等研究更具包容性的收入定义（即包括健康、转移支付和金融资产），我们以有意义的方式改进了现有的经济不平等衡量指标，并弥合了微观数据与宏观统计之间的差距。我们生成了该时期一系列广泛的不平等结果，并与其他研究（包括Auten和Splinter（2019）以及Piketty、Saez和Zucman（2018））进行了比较。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Stabilization of Tariff Shocks: What is the Optimal Monetary Response?
papers.authors: Paul R. Bergin, Giancarlo Corsetti
papers.abstract: In the wake of Brexit and Trump trade war, central banks face the need to reconsider the role of monetary policy in managing the inflationary-recessionary effects of hikes in tariffs. Using a New Keynesian model enriched with global value chains and firm dynamics, we show that the optimal monetary response is expansionary. It supports activity and producer prices at the expense of aggravating short-run headline inflation---contrary to the prescription of the standard Taylor rule. This holds all the more when the home currency is dominant in pricing of international trade.
papers.zh_title: 关税冲击的宏观经济稳定：最优货币政策应对是什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 在英国脱欧和特朗普贸易战之后，中央银行面临重新考虑货币政策在管理关税上调带来的通胀-衰退效应中作用的必要性。利用一个融入了全球价值链和企业动态的新凯恩斯主义模型，我们表明最优货币政策应对是扩张性的。它支持经济活动和生产商价格，但代价是加剧短期总体通胀——这与标准泰勒规则的处方相反。当本币在国际贸易定价中占主导地位时，这一点尤其成立。

papers.title: Do People Have a Bias for Low-Deductible Insurance?
papers.authors: Howard Kunreuther, Mark Pauly
papers.abstract: Do consumers show a strong bias toward low deductible insurance plans, as many field studies imply? This paper reports on a controlled experiment intended to see whether subjects have a predisposition toward such plans and whether that preference is consistent when their default plan and premiums are changed. Subjects were presented with a scenario where they had to make a decision on whether to purchase a plan with a low deductible (LD) or high deductible (HD) when faced with an illness having a specified probability and cost. Participants had to choose between these plans in two rounds with the identical risk of an illness and specified premiums. If their default option was an LD plan in Round 1, then it was an HD plan in Round 2. The experiment did not show a strong bias toward low deductible health plans. Only slightly more than half of the respondents chose an LD plan even when it was optimal for them to do so. When faced with a default option that was switched in Round 2, 58% of the respondents chose the same plan as they did in Round 1, implying that some but not all subjects resisted the default option in their decision process. Subject choices were correlated with their responses to questions about risk aversion and a desire for peace of mind.
papers.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：C90, C91, D03, D12, D3, D81, G22, I11, I18
papers.zh_title: 人们是否偏好低免赔额保险？
papers.zh_abstract: 消费者是否像许多实地研究所暗示的那样，表现出对低免赔额保险计划的强烈偏好？本文报告了一项受控实验，旨在考察受试者是否对此类计划有先入为主的偏好，以及当他们的默认计划和保费发生变化时，这种偏好是否一致。受试者被置于一个场景中，他们必须决定在面临具有特定概率和成本的疾病时，是购买低免赔额（LD）计划还是高免赔额（HD）计划。参与者在两轮中需要在相同的疾病风险和指定保费下在这些计划之间做出选择。如果他们在第一轮的默认选项是LD计划，那么第二轮中默认选项就是HD计划。实验并未显示出对低免赔额健康计划的强烈偏好。即使选择LD计划对他们来说是最优的，也只有略多于一半的受访者选择了LD计划。当面临第二轮中默认选项被切换的情况时，58%的受访者选择了与第一轮相同的计划，这意味着部分（而非全部）受试者在决策过程中抵制了默认选项。受试者的选择与他们关于风险规避和追求安心的问题的回答相关。

papers.title: In Praise of Moderation: Suggestions for the Scope and Use of Pre-Analysis Plans for RCTs in Economics
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Esther Duflo, Amy Finkelstein, Lawrence F. Katz, Benjamin A. Olken, Anja Sautmann
papers.abstract: Pre-Analysis Plans (PAPs) for randomized evaluations are becoming increasingly common in Economics, but their definition remains unclear and their practical applications therefore vary widely. Based on our collective experiences as researchers and editors, we articulate a set of principles for the ex-ante scope and ex-post use of PAPs. We argue that the key benefits of a PAP can usually be realized by completing the registration fields in the AEA RCT Registry. Specific cases where more detail may be warranted include when subgroup analysis is expected to be particularly important, or a party to the study has a vested interest. However, a strong norm for more detailed pre-specification can be detrimental to knowledge creation when implementing field experiments in the real world. An ex-post requirement of strict adherence to pre-specified plans, or the discounting of non-pre-specified work, may mean that some experiments do not take place, or that interesting observations and new theories are not explored and reported. Rather, we recommend that the final research paper be written and judged as a distinct object from the “results of the PAP”; to emphasize this distinction, researchers could consider producing a short, publicly available report (the “populated PAP”) that populates the PAP to the extent possible and briefly discusses any barriers to doing so.
papers.zh_title: 适度之赞：经济学随机对照试验预分析计划的范围与使用建议
papers.zh_abstract: 随机评估的预分析计划（PAP）在经济学中正变得越来越普遍，但其定义仍不明确，因此实际应用差异很大。基于我们作为研究人员和编辑的集体经验，我们阐述了一套关于PAP事前范围和事后使用的原则。我们认为，PAP的主要好处通常可以通过完成AEA RCT注册表中的注册字段来实现。可能需要更详细说明的具体情况包括：当亚组分析预计特别重要时，或者研究的某一方有既得利益时。然而，在现实世界中实施实地实验时，对更详细预先规范的强烈规范可能不利于知识创造。事后要求严格遵守预先指定的计划，或贬低非预先指定的工作，可能意味着一些实验无法进行，或者有趣的观察和新理论得不到探索和报告。相反，我们建议将最终的研究论文作为与“PAP结果”不同的对象来撰写和评判；为了强调这种区别，研究人员可以考虑制作一份简短的、公开可用的报告（“填充后的PAP”），该报告尽可能填充PAP，并简要讨论任何阻碍这样做的因素。

papers.title: Did California’s Shelter-in-Place Order Work? Early Coronavirus-Related Public Health Effects
papers.authors: Andrew I. Friedson, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia, Dhaval Dave
papers.abstract: On March 19, 2020, California Governor Gavin Newsom issued Executive Order N-33-20 2020, which required all residents of the state of California to shelter in place for all but essential activities such as grocery shopping, retrieving prescriptions from a pharmacy, or caring for relatives. This shelter-in-place order (SIPO), the first such statewide order issued in the United States, was designed to reduce COVID-19 cases and mortality. While the White House Task Force on the Coronavirus has credited the State of California for taking early action to prevent a statewide COVID-19 outbreak, no study has examined its impact. This study is the first to estimate the effect of SIPO adoption on health. Using daily state-level coronavirus data and a synthetic control research design, we find that California’s statewide SIPO reduced COVID-19 cases by 125.5 to 219.7 per 100,000 population by April 20, one month following the order. We further find that California’s SIPO led to as many as 1,661 fewer COVID-19 deaths during this period. Back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest that there were about 400 job losses per life saved during this short-run post-treatment period.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I18
papers.zh_title: 加利福尼亚州的居家令有效吗？早期的冠状病毒相关公共卫生效应
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年3月19日，加利福尼亚州州长加文·纽瑟姆发布了N-33-20 2020号行政命令，要求该州所有居民除购买食品杂货、从药房取药或照顾亲属等必要活动外，均需居家。这项居家令（SIPO）是美国首个此类全州范围的命令，旨在减少COVID-19病例和死亡率。尽管白宫冠状病毒工作组称赞加利福尼亚州采取了早期行动以防止全州范围内的COVID-19疫情爆发，但尚无研究检验其影响。本研究首次估计了SIPO采纳对健康的影响。利用每日州级冠状病毒数据和合成控制研究设计，我们发现，加利福尼亚州的州级SIPO在命令发布一个月后的4月20日，使每10万人口的COVID-19病例减少了125.5至219.7例。我们进一步发现，在此期间，加利福尼亚州的SIPO导致COVID-19死亡人数减少了多达1661人。粗略计算表明，在这一短期后处理期间，每挽救一条生命大约损失了400个工作岗位。

papers.title: Three Prongs for Prudent Climate Policy
papers.authors: Joseph E. Aldy, Richard J. Zeckhauser
papers.abstract: For three decades, advocates for climate change policy have simultaneously emphasized the urgency of taking ambitious actions to mitigate greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and provided false reassurances of the feasibility of doing so. The policy prescription has relied almost exclusively on a single approach: reduce emissions of carbon dioxide (CO2) and other GHGs. Since 1990, global CO2 emissions have increased 60 percent, atmospheric CO2 concentrations have raced past 400 parts per million, and temperatures increased at an accelerating rate. The one-prong strategy has not worked. After reviewing emission mitigation’s poor performance and low-probability of delivering on long-term climate goals, we evaluate a three-pronged strategy for mitigating climate change risks: adding adaptation and amelioration – through solar radiation management (SRM) – to the emission mitigation approach. We identify SRM’s potential, at dramatically lower cost than emission mitigation, to play a key role in offsetting warming. We address the moral hazard reservation held by environmental advocates – that SRM would diminish emission mitigation incentives – and posit that SRM deployment might even serve as an “awful action alert” that galvanizes more ambitious emission mitigation. We conclude by assessing the value of an iterative act-learn-act policy framework that engages all three prongs for limiting climate change damages.
papers.zh_title: 审慎气候政策的三个方向
papers.zh_abstract: 三十年来，气候变化政策的倡导者同时强调了采取雄心勃勃的行动以减少温室气体（GHG）排放的紧迫性，并对其可行性提供了虚假的保证。政策处方几乎完全依赖于单一方法：减少二氧化碳（CO2）和其他GHG的排放。自1990年以来，全球CO2排放量增加了60%，大气CO2浓度已超过百万分之400，气温以加速的速度上升。单一方向战略未能奏效。在回顾了减排的糟糕表现及其实现长期气候目标的低概率之后，我们评估了一种减轻气候变化风险的三方向战略：在减排方法的基础上增加适应和改善——通过太阳辐射管理（SRM）。我们指出了SRM在抵消变暖方面的潜力，其成本远低于减排。我们解决了环保倡导者持有的道德风险保留意见——即SRM会削弱减排激励——并假设SRM部署甚至可能作为一种“可怕行动警报”，激发更雄心勃勃的减排。最后，我们评估了一个迭代的“行动-学习-行动”政策框架的价值，该框架利用所有三个方向来限制气候变化损害。

papers.title: Generalized Robustness and Dynamic Pessimism
papers.authors: Pascal J. Maenhout, Andrea Vedolin, Hao Xing
papers.abstract: This paper develops a theory of dynamic pessimism and its impact on asset prices. Notions of time-varying pessimism arise endogenously in our setting as a consequence of agents’ concern for model misspecification. We generalize the robust control approach of Hansen and Sargent (2001) by replacing relative entropy as a measure of discrepancy between models by the more general family of Cressie-Read discrepancies. As a consequence, the decision-maker’s distorted beliefs appear as an endogenous state variable driving risk aversion, portfolio decisions, and equilibrium asset prices. Using survey data, we estimate time-varying pessimism and find that such a proxy features a strong business cycle component. We then show that using our measure of pessimism helps match salient features in equity markets such as excess volatility and high equity premium.
papers.zh_title: 广义稳健性与动态悲观主义
papers.zh_abstract: 本文发展了一种动态悲观主义理论及其对资产价格的影响。在我们的设定中，时变悲观主义的概念内生地产生，作为代理人担心模型误设的结果。我们推广了Hansen和Sargent（2001）的稳健控制方法，用更一般的Cressie-Read差异族替代相对熵作为模型间差异的度量。因此，决策者的扭曲信念作为一个内生状态变量出现，驱动风险厌恶、投资组合决策和均衡资产价格。利用调查数据，我们估计了时变悲观主义，并发现这种代理变量具有显著的商业周期成分。然后，我们表明，使用我们的悲观主义度量有助于匹配股票市场中的显著特征，如过度波动和高股权溢价。

papers.title: Asian American Discrimination in Harvard Admissions
papers.authors: Peter Arcidiacono, Josh Kinsler, Tyler Ransom
papers.abstract: Detecting racial discrimination using observational data is challenging because of the presence of unobservables that may be correlated with race. Using data made public in the SFFA v. Harvard case, we estimate discrimination in a setting where this concern is mitigated. Namely, we show that there is a substantial penalty against Asian Americans in admissions with limited scope for omitted variables to overturn the result. This is because (i) Asian Americans are substantially stronger than whites on the observables associated with admissions and (ii) the richness of the data yields a model that predicts admissions extremely well. Our preferred model shows that Asian Americans would be admitted at a rate 19% higher absent this penalty. Controlling for one of the primary channels through which Asian American applicants are discriminated against--the personal rating--cuts the Asian American penalty by less than half, still leaving a substantial penalty.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I23, I24, J15
papers.zh_title: 亚裔美国人在哈佛招生中受到的歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 利用观察数据检测种族歧视具有挑战性，因为可能存在与种族相关的不可观测因素。我们利用SFFA诉哈佛案中公开的数据，在一个缓解了该问题的情境下估计歧视程度。具体而言，我们发现亚裔美国人在招生中受到显著的不利对待，且遗漏变量推翻这一结果的可能性有限。这是因为：(i) 在与招生相关的可观测指标上，亚裔美国人明显强于白人；(ii) 数据的丰富性使得模型对招生的预测能力极强。我们的首选模型显示，若无此不利对待，亚裔美国人的录取率将高出19%。控制亚裔申请人受歧视的主要渠道之一——个人评分——仅将亚裔的不利对待削减不到一半，仍留下显著的不利影响。

papers.title: Original Sin and the Great Depression
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Christopher M. Meissner
papers.abstract: Was foreign currency denominated debt a determinant of exchange rate and monetary policy during the Great Depression? Policy makers of the day thought so. High-frequency bond price data show depreciation was associated with elevated risk premia on public debt. We also show that foreign currency debt was a determinant of exchange rate policy during the Great Depression. The gold standard heightened exposure to global shocks and prolonged the Great Depression. Why then did countries hesitate to jettison the monetary technology? Multiple factors have been identified in the literature ranging from economic and political considerations to social preferences for monetary stability. We find that foreign currency debt and trade patterns, both shaped by history and geography, had a significant impact on these choices and hence on economic stability. The effect is likely to be about half as large as the output gap in determining exchange rate policy.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：F31, F34, N10, N2
papers.zh_title: 原罪与大萧条
papers.zh_abstract: 外币计价债务是否是大萧条期间汇率和货币政策的一个决定因素？当时的政策制定者认为如此。高频债券价格数据显示，货币贬值与公共债务风险溢价上升相关。我们还表明，外币债务是大萧条期间汇率政策的一个决定因素。金本位制加剧了对全球冲击的暴露，并延长了大萧条。那么，各国为何迟迟不愿放弃这一货币技术？文献中已识别出多种因素，从经济和政治考量到对货币稳定的社会偏好。我们发现，由历史和地理共同塑造的外币债务和贸易模式对这些选择以及经济稳定性产生了显著影响。在决定汇率政策方面，其影响可能约为产出缺口的一半。

papers.title: Mitigating Disaster Risks in the Age of Climate Change
papers.authors: Harrison Hong, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
papers.abstract: Emissions abatement alone cannot address the consequences of global warming for weather disasters. We model how society adapts to manage disaster risks to capital stock. Optimal adaptation—a mix of form-level efforts and public spending—varies as society learns about the adverse consequences of global warming for disaster arrivals. Taxes on capital are needed alongside those on carbon to achieve the first best. We apply our model to country-level control of flooding from tropical cyclones. Learning rationalizes empirical findings, including the responses of Tobin's q, equity risk premium, and risk-free rate to disaster arrivals. Adaptation is more valuable under learning than a counterfactual no-learning environment. Learning alters social-cost-of-carbon projections due to the interaction of uncertainty resolution and endogenous adaptive response.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：E21, E22, E23, G12, G28, G52, H23, H41
papers.zh_title: 气候变化时代减轻灾害风险
papers.zh_abstract: 仅靠减排无法应对全球变暖对天气灾害的后果。我们模拟了社会如何通过适应来管理资本存量的灾害风险。最优适应——一种企业层面努力与公共支出的组合——会随着社会对全球变暖导致灾害发生频率增加的不利后果的学习而发生变化。为实现最优结果，除了对碳征税外，还需要对资本征税。我们将模型应用于国家层面控制热带气旋引发的洪水。学习过程为实证发现提供了合理解释，包括托宾q、股权风险溢价和无风险利率对灾害发生的反应。在学习环境下，适应的价值高于反事实的无学习环境。由于不确定性解决与内生适应反应之间的相互作用，学习改变了碳的社会成本预测。

papers.title: Should the U.S. Government Issue Floating Rate Notes?
papers.authors: Jonathan S. Hartley, Urban Jermann
papers.abstract: Since January 2014 the U.S. Treasury has been issuing floating rate notes (FRNs). We estimate that the U.S. FRNs have been paying excess interest between 5 and 39 basis points above the implied cost for other Treasury securities. We find a strong positive relation between our estimated excess spreads on FRNs and the subsequent realized excess returns of FRNs over related T-bill investment strategies. With more than 300 billion dollars of FRNs outstanding, the yearly excess borrowing costs are estimated to be several hundreds of millions of dollars. To rationalize this finding, we examine the role of FRNs from the perspective of optimal government debt management to smooth taxes. In the model, bills can be cheaper to issue than FRNs, and the payoffs for FRNs are perfectly correlated with future short rates. FRNs can be used to manage the refinancing risk from rolling over short-term debt. We derive conditions under which the issuance of FRNs can optimally be positive.
papers.zh_title: 美国政府是否应发行浮动利率票据？
papers.zh_abstract: 自2014年1月以来，美国财政部一直在发行浮动利率票据（FRN）。我们估计，美国FRN支付的超额利息比隐含的其他国债成本高出5至39个基点。我们发现，我们估计的FRN超额利差与随后FRN相对于相关国库券投资策略的超额实现收益之间存在强正相关关系。由于未偿FRN超过3000亿美元，估计每年的超额借贷成本达数亿美元。为解释这一发现，我们从最优政府债务管理以平滑税收的角度考察了FRN的作用。在模型中，国库券的发行成本可能低于FRN，且FRN的收益与未来短期利率完全相关。FRN可用于管理短期债务展期的再融资风险。我们推导了FRN发行量可以最优为正的条件。

papers.title: The Long and Short (Run) of Trade Elasticities
papers.authors: Christoph E. Boehm, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
papers.abstract: We propose a novel approach to estimate the trade elasticity at various horizons. When countries change Most Favored Nation (MFN) tariffs, partners that trade on MFN terms experience plausibly exogenous tariff changes. The differential effects on imports from these countries relative to a control group – countries not subject to the MFN tariff scheme – can be used to identify the trade elasticity. We build a panel dataset combining information on product-level tariffs and trade flows covering 1995-2018, and estimate the trade elasticity at short and long horizons using local projections (Jordà, 2005). Our main findings are that the elasticity of tariff-exclusive trade flows in the year following the exogenous tariff change is about −0.76, and the long-run elasticity ranges from −1.75 to −2.25. Our long-run estimates are smaller than typical in the literature, and it takes 7-10 years to converge to the long run, implying that (i) the welfare gains from trade are high and (ii) there are substantial convexities in the costs of adjusting export participation.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F0, F1, F14, F4
papers.zh_title: 贸易弹性的长期与短期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法来估计不同时间跨度的贸易弹性。当各国改变最惠国（MFN）关税时，以MFN条款进行贸易的伙伴国面临看似外生的关税变化。这些国家相对于对照组（不受MFN关税方案约束的国家）的进口差异效应可用于识别贸易弹性。我们构建了一个结合产品层面关税和贸易流信息的面板数据集，覆盖1995-2018年，并使用局部投影法（Jordà, 2005）估计短期和长期的贸易弹性。我们的主要发现是，在外生关税变化后的第一年，不含关税的贸易流弹性约为-0.76，长期弹性在-1.75至-2.25之间。我们的长期估计值小于文献中的典型值，且需要7-10年才能收敛到长期水平，这意味着：(i) 贸易福利收益较高，(ii) 调整出口参与的成本存在显著凸性。

papers.title: Sequential Lifting of COVID-19 Interventions with Population Heterogeneity
papers.authors: Adriano A. Rampini
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes a sequential approach to lifting interventions in the COVID-19 pandemic taking heterogeneity in the population into account. The population is heterogeneous in terms of the consequences of infection (need for hospitalization and critical care, and mortality) and in terms of labor force participation. Splitting the population in two groups by age, a less affected younger group that is more likely to work, and a more affected older group less likely to work, and lifting interventions sequentially (for the younger group first and the older group later on) can substantially reduce mortality, demands on the health care system, and the economic cost of interventions.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, PE；JEL：E32, E44, E65, H12, I10, I18
papers.zh_title: 考虑人口异质性的COVID-19干预措施逐步解除
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了在考虑人口异质性的情况下，逐步解除COVID-19大流行干预措施的方法。人口在感染后果（需要住院和重症监护以及死亡率）和劳动力参与方面存在异质性。按年龄将人口分为两组：受影响较小且更可能工作的年轻组，以及受影响较大且不太可能工作的年长组。逐步解除干预措施（先针对年轻组，后针对年长组）可以显著降低死亡率、医疗系统负担以及干预措施的经济成本。

papers.title: Pandemic Lockdown: The Role of Government Commitment
papers.authors: Christian A. Moser, Pierre Yared
papers.abstract: This paper studies lockdown policy in a dynamic economy without government commitment. Lockdown imposes a cap on labor supply, which improves health prospects at the cost of economic output. A government would like to commit to the extent of future lockdowns in order to guarantee an economic outlook that supports efficient levels of investment into intermediate inputs. However, such a commitment is not credible since investments are sunk at the time when the government chooses a lockdown. As a result, lockdown under lack of commitment deviates from the optimal policy. Rules that limit a government’s lockdown discretion can improve social welfare, even in the presence of noncontractible information. Quantitatively, lack of commitment causes lockdown to be significantly more severe than is socially optimal. The output loss due to lack of commitment is greater for higher social discount rates, higher values of life, higher disease transmission rates, higher intermediate input shares, and longer vaccine arrival times.
papers.zh_title: 大流行封锁：政府承诺的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在没有政府承诺的动态经济中的封锁政策。封锁对劳动力供给施加了上限，这改善了健康前景，但以经济产出为代价。政府希望承诺未来的封锁程度，以保证支持中间投入品有效投资水平的经济前景。然而，这种承诺并不可信，因为当政府选择封锁时，投资已经沉没。因此，缺乏承诺下的封锁偏离了最优政策。限制政府封锁自由裁量权的规则可以改善社会福利，即使存在不可合同化的信息。定量分析表明，缺乏承诺导致封锁显著比社会最优水平更严厉。缺乏承诺造成的产出损失在社会贴现率更高、生命价值更高、疾病传播率更高、中间投入份额更高以及疫苗到达时间更长的情况下更大。

papers.title: Labor Demand in the time of COVID-19: Evidence from vacancy postings and UI claims
papers.authors: Eliza Forsythe, Lisa B. Kahn, Fabian Lange, David G. Wiczer
papers.abstract: We use job vacancy data collected in real time by Burning Glass Technologies, as well as unemployment insurance (UI) initial claims and the more traditional Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) employment data to study the impact of COVID-19 on the labor market. Our job vacancy data allow us to track the economy at disaggregated geography and by detailed occupation and industry. We find that job vacancies collapsed in the second half of March. By late April, they had fallen by over 40%. To a first approximation, this collapse was broad based, hitting all U.S. states, regardless of the timing of stay-at-home policies. UI claims and BLS employment data also largely match these patterns. Nearly all industries and occupations saw contraction in postings and spikes in UI claims, with little difference depending on whether they are deemed essential and whether they have work-from-home capability. Essential retail, the "front line" job most in-demand during the current crisis, took a much smaller hit, while leisure and hospitality services and non-essential retail saw the biggest collapses. This set of facts suggests the economic collapse was not caused solely by the stay-at-home orders, and is therefore unlikely to be undone simply by lifting them.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19时期的劳动力需求：来自职位空缺发布和失业保险申领的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用Burning Glass Technologies实时收集的职位空缺数据，以及失业保险（UI）初次申领数据和更传统的劳工统计局（BLS）就业数据，研究COVID-19对劳动力市场的影响。我们的职位空缺数据使我们能够按细分地理区域以及详细职业和行业追踪经济状况。我们发现，职位空缺在3月下半月急剧下降。到4月下旬，已下降超过40%。初步来看，这种下降是广泛的，波及所有美国州，无论居家令实施时间如何。UI申领和BLS就业数据也大致符合这些模式。几乎所有行业和职业都出现职位发布收缩和UI申领激增，无论它们是否被视为必要行业以及是否具备远程办公能力，差异很小。必要零售业——当前危机中最急需的“一线”工作——受到的冲击要小得多，而休闲和酒店服务业以及非必要零售业则遭受了最大幅度的崩溃。这一系列事实表明，经济崩溃并非仅由居家令导致，因此不太可能仅通过解除居家令而逆转。

papers.title: Economic Activity and the Value of Medical Innovation during a Pandemic
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: The “shutdown” economy of April 2020 is compared to a normally functioning economy both in terms of market and nonmarket activities. Three novel methods and data indicate that the shutdown puts market production 25-28 percent below normal in the short run. At an annual rate, the shutdown is costing $7 trillion, or about $15,000 per household per quarter. Employment already fell 28 million by early April 2020. These costs indicate, among other things, the value of innovation in both health and general business sectors that can accelerate the time when normal activity resumes.
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间的经济活动与医疗创新的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将2020年4月的“封锁”经济与正常运转的经济在市场和非市场活动方面进行了比较。三种新颖的方法和数据表明，封锁在短期内使市场产出比正常水平低25%至28%。按年率计算，封锁造成的损失为7万亿美元，即每户每季度约15000美元。截至2020年4月初，就业人数已减少2800万。这些成本表明，在健康领域和一般商业领域，能够加速恢复正常活动时间的创新具有价值。

papers.title: Internal and External Effects of Social Distancing in a Pandemic
papers.authors: Maryam Farboodi, Gregor Jarosch, Robert Shimer
