papers.abstract: We develop a quantitative framework for exploring how individuals trade off the utility benefit of social activity against the internal and external health risks that come with social interactions during a pandemic. We calibrate the model to external targets and then compare its predictions with daily data on social activity, fatalities, and the estimated effective reproduction number R(t) from the COVID-19 pandemic in March-June 2020. While the laissez- faire equilibrium is consistent with much of the decline in social activity that we observed in US data, optimal policy further imposes immediate and highly persistent social distancing. Notably, neither equilibrium nor optimal social distancing is extremely restrictive, in the sense that the effective reproduction number never falls far below 1. The expected cost of COVID-19 in the US is substantial, $12,700 in the laissez-faire equilibrium and $8,100 per person under an optimal policy. Optimal policy generates this large welfare gain by shifting the composition of costs from fatalities to persistent social distancing.
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间社交距离的内部和外部效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个定量框架，用于探索个体如何在疫情期间权衡社交活动的效用收益与社交互动带来的内部和外部健康风险。我们将模型校准到外部目标，然后将其预测与2020年3月至6月COVID-19疫情期间社交活动、死亡人数和估计有效再生数R(t)的每日数据进行比较。虽然自由放任均衡与美国数据中观察到的社交活动下降大部分一致，但最优政策进一步施加了立即且高度持久的社交距离。值得注意的是，均衡和最优社交距离都不是极端限制性的，因为有效再生数从未远低于1。美国COVID-19的预期成本是巨大的，在自由放任均衡下为12700美元，在最优政策下为每人8100美元。最优政策通过将成本构成从死亡人数转向持久的社交距离，产生了这一巨大的福利收益。

papers.title: Corporate Taxes and Retail Prices
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, Stephen Teng Sun, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: Higher corporate taxes must result in lower payments to shareholders, lower wages, or higher product prices. We study the impact of corporate taxes on barcode-level product prices using linked survey and administrative data. Our empirical strategy exploits the dichotomy between the location of production and the location of sales, providing estimates free from confounding local demand shocks. We find significant effects of corporate taxes on prices with a net-of-tax elasticity of 0.24. We find null effects on prices for firms subject to personal income taxes or to full sales apportionment. Approximately half of corporate tax incidence falls on consumers, suggesting that models used by policymakers may significantly underestimate the incidence of corporate taxes on consumers. Pass-through is larger for products purchased by high-income households, higher priced goods, and in less competitive markets.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：G38, H22, H25
papers.zh_title: 公司税与零售价格
papers.zh_abstract: 更高的公司税必然导致股东支付减少、工资降低或产品价格上涨。我们利用关联的调查和行政数据，研究公司税对条形码级别产品价格的影响。我们的实证策略利用了生产地点和销售地点之间的二分法，提供了不受混杂的本地需求冲击影响的估计。我们发现公司税对价格有显著影响，税后弹性为0.24。对于缴纳个人所得税或完全按销售额分摊的公司，我们发现对价格没有影响。大约一半的公司税负担落在消费者身上，这表明政策制定者使用的模型可能严重低估了公司税对消费者的负担。对于高收入家庭购买的产品、价格较高的商品以及在竞争程度较低的市场中，转嫁效应更大。

papers.title: Financial Education Affects Financial Knowledge and Downstream Behaviors
papers.authors: Tim Kaiser, Annamaria Lusardi, Lukas Menkhoff, Carly J. Urban
papers.abstract: We study the rapidly growing literature on the causal effects of financial education programs in a meta-analysis of 76 randomized experiments with a total sample size of over 160,000 individuals. The evidence shows that financial education programs have, on average, positive causal treatment effects on financial knowledge and downstream financial behaviors. Treatment effects are economically meaningful in size, similar to those realized by educational interventions in other domains, and are at least three times as large as the average effect documented in earlier work. These results are robust to the method used, restricting the sample to papers published in top economics journals, including only studies with adequate power, and accounting for publication selection bias in the literature. We conclude with a discussion of the cost-effectiveness of financial education interventions.
papers.zh_title: 金融教育影响金融知识和后续行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一项包含76个随机实验、总样本量超过16万人的元分析中，研究了关于金融教育项目因果效应的快速增长文献。证据表明，金融教育项目平均对金融知识和后续金融行为产生了正向因果处理效应。处理效应在经济意义上显著，与其他领域教育干预的效果相似，并且至少是早期研究记录的平均效应的三倍。这些结果对使用的方法、将样本限制在顶级经济学期刊发表的论文、仅包括具有足够统计效力的研究以及考虑文献中的发表选择偏差都是稳健的。我们最后讨论了金融教育干预的成本效益。

papers.title: Loan Types and the Bank Lending Channel
papers.authors: Victoria Ivashina, Luc Laeven, Enrique Moral-Benito
papers.abstract: Using credit-registry data for Spain and Peru, we document that four main types of commercial credit—asset-based loans, cash-flow loans, trade finance and leasing—are easily identifiable and represent the bulk of corporate credit. We show that credit dynamics and bank lending channels vary across these loan types. Moreover, aggregate credit supply shocks previously identified in the literature appear to be driven by individual loan types. The effects of monetary policy and the effects of the financial crisis propagating through banks’ balance sheets are primarily driven by cash-flow loans, whereas asset-based credit is mostly insensitive to these types of effects.
papers.zh_title: 贷款类型与银行信贷渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 利用西班牙和秘鲁的信贷登记数据，我们记录了四种主要的商业信贷类型——资产抵押贷款、现金流贷款、贸易融资和租赁——易于识别且构成了企业信贷的大部分。我们表明，信贷动态和银行信贷渠道因这些贷款类型而异。此外，先前文献中识别的总体信贷供给冲击似乎是由个别贷款类型驱动的。货币政策的影响以及通过银行资产负债表传播的金融危机影响主要由现金流贷款驱动，而资产抵押信贷对这些类型的影响大多不敏感。

papers.title: Corporate Immunity to the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Wenzhi Ding, Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Wensi Xie
papers.abstract: Using data on over 6,000 firms across 56 economies during the first quarter of 2020, we evaluate the connection between corporate characteristics and stock price reactions to COVID-19 cases. We find that the pandemic-induced drop in stock prices was milder among firms with (a) stronger pre-2020 finances (more cash, less debt, and larger profits), (b) less exposure to COVID-19 through global supply chains and customer locations, (c) more CSR activities, and (d) less entrenched executives. Furthermore, the stock prices of firms with greater hedge fund ownership performed worse, and those of firms with larger non-financial corporate ownership performed better. We believe ours is the first paper to assess international, cross-firm stock price reactions to COVID-19 as functions of these pre-shock corporate characteristics.
papers.zh_title: 企业对COVID-19疫情的免疫力
papers.zh_abstract: 利用2020年第一季度56个经济体超过6000家企业的数据，我们评估了企业特征与股票价格对COVID-19病例反应之间的关联。我们发现，在以下企业中，疫情导致的股价下跌较为温和：(a) 2020年前财务状况更强（现金更多、债务更少、利润更大）；(b) 通过全球供应链和客户地点对COVID-19的暴露较少；(c) 企业社会责任活动更多；(d) 高管权力不那么根深蒂固。此外，对冲基金持股比例较高的企业股价表现更差，而非金融企业持股比例较高的企业股价表现更好。我们相信，我们是第一篇评估国际跨企业股票价格对COVID-19反应作为这些冲击前企业特征函数的论文。

papers.title: Information and the Persistence of the Gender Wage Gap: Early Evidence from California's Salary History Ban
papers.authors: Benjamin Hansen, Drew McNichols
papers.abstract: Aiming to reduce the gender wage gap, several states and cities have recently adopted legislation that prohibits employers from asking about previously earned salaries. The advocates of these salary history bans (SHBs) have suggested pay history perpetuates past discrimination. We study the early net impact of the first state-wide SHBs. Using both difference-in-difference and synthetic control approaches, we find the gender earnings ratio increased by 1 percent in states with SHBs. We find these population wide increases are driven by an increase of the gender earnings ratio for households with all children over 5 years old, by workers over 35, and are principally driven by those who have recently switched jobs.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LE, LS；JEL：J16, J3, J31, J42, J48, J58, J7, K0
papers.zh_title: 信息与性别工资差距的持续性：加州薪资历史禁令的早期证据
papers.zh_abstract: 为了缩小性别工资差距，几个州和城市最近通过了禁止雇主询问先前薪资的立法。这些薪资历史禁令的支持者认为，薪资历史会延续过去的歧视。我们研究了首批州级薪资历史禁令的早期净影响。使用双重差分和合成控制方法，我们发现实施薪资历史禁令的州中，性别收入比率提高了1%。我们发现这些总体增长是由所有子女年龄超过5岁的家庭、35岁以上工人的性别收入比率提高驱动的，并且主要由最近换工作的人推动。

papers.title: Persistence Despite Revolutions
papers.authors: Alberto F. Alesina, Marlon Seror, David Y. Yang, Yang You, Weihong Zeng
papers.abstract: Can efforts to eradicate inequality in wealth and education eliminate intergenerational persistence of socioeconomic status? The Chinese Communist Revolution and Cultural Revolution aimed to do exactly that. Using newly digitized archival records and contemporary census and household survey data, we show that the revolutions were effective in homogenizing the population economically in the short run. However, the pattern of inequality that characterized the pre-revolution generation re-emerges today. Almost half a century after the revolutions, individuals whose grandparents belonged to the pre-revolution elite earn 16 percent more income and have completed more than 11 percent additional years of schooling than those from non-elite households. We find evidence that human capital (such as knowledge, skills, and values) has been transmitted within the families, and the social capital embodied in kinship networks has survived the revolutions. These channels allow the pre-revolution elite to rebound after the revolutions, and their socioeconomic status persists despite one of the most aggressive attempts to eliminate differences in the population.
papers.zh_title: 革命后的持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 消除财富和教育不平等的努力能否消除社会经济地位的代际传递？中国共产党革命和文化大革命正是旨在实现这一目标。利用新数字化的档案记录以及当代人口普查和家庭调查数据，我们表明这些革命在短期内有效地实现了人口的经济同质化。然而，革命前一代特征的不平等模式如今重新出现。革命后近半个世纪，祖父母属于革命前精英阶层的个人比来自非精英家庭的个人收入高出16%，受教育年限多出11%以上。我们发现有证据表明，人力资本（如知识、技能和价值观）在家庭内部传递，而体现在亲属网络中的社会资本在革命中幸存下来。这些渠道使得革命前精英在革命后得以反弹，尽管经历了最激进的消除人口差异的尝试之一，他们的社会经济地位仍然持续存在。

papers.title: Does the US Tax Code Favor Automation?
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Andrea Manera, Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: We argue that the US tax system is biased against labor and in favor of capital and has become more so in recent years. As a consequence, it has promoted inefficiently high levels of automation. Moving from the US tax system in the 2010s to optimal taxation of capital and labor would raise employment by 4.02% and the labor share by 0.78 percentage points, and restore the optimal level of automation. If moving to optimal taxes is infeasible, more modest reforms can still increase employment by 1.14–1.96%, but in this case efficiency can be increased by imposing an additional automation tax to reduce the equilibrium level of automation. This is because marginal automated tasks do not bring much productivity gains but displace workers, reducing employment below its socially optimal level. We additionally show that reducing labor taxes or combining lower capital taxes with automation taxes can increase employment much more than the uniform reductions in capital taxes enacted between 2000 and 2018.
papers.zh_title: 美国税法是否偏向自动化？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为美国税收体系偏向资本而非劳动，且近年来这种偏向性有所加剧。其后果是导致了低效的高水平自动化。若将2010年代的美国税收体系转向资本与劳动的最优税收，就业率将提升4.02%，劳动收入份额将提高0.78个百分点，并恢复最优自动化水平。若无法实现最优税收，更温和的改革仍可使就业增长1.14%至1.96%，但此时需额外征收自动化税以降低均衡自动化水平，从而提高效率。这是因为边际自动化任务并未带来显著生产率提升，反而替代工人，使就业低于社会最优水平。我们还发现，降低劳动税或将降低资本税与自动化税相结合，比2000年至2018年间实施的统一降低资本税更能大幅提升就业。

papers.title: A Sticky-Price View of Hoarding
papers.authors: Christopher Hansman, Harrison Hong, Áureo de Paula, Vishal Singh
papers.abstract: We show that sticky prices exacerbate household hoarding of storable goods. When stores are slow to adjust prices following a cost shock, households have an incentive to stockpile just as in a typical retail sale. This incentive is present even in the absence of traditional panic or precautionary motives for hoarding. Using detailed US supermarket scanner data covering the 2008 global rice crisis—a shock triggered by an Indian rice export ban—we find that household hoarding anticipated retail price adjustments. We construct forecast tests relating the cross-section of product or store-level price adjustments to the expectations implied by consumer purchases. Bias and efficiency tests reject panic/precautionary motives in favor of a sticky-price view.
papers.zh_title: 囤积行为的价格粘性视角
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明价格粘性会加剧家庭对可储存商品的囤积。当商店在成本冲击后缓慢调整价格时，家庭有动机囤积商品，这与典型的零售促销行为类似。即使缺乏传统的恐慌或预防性囤积动机，这种激励依然存在。利用涵盖2008年全球大米危机（由印度大米出口禁令引发的冲击）的美国超市扫描数据，我们发现家庭囤积行为预期到了零售价格调整。我们构建了预测检验，将产品或商店层面的价格调整横截面与消费者购买所隐含的预期联系起来。偏差检验和效率检验否定了恐慌/预防性动机，支持了价格粘性观点。

papers.title: It Takes a Village: The Economics of Parenting with Neighborhood and Peer Effects
papers.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Matthias Doepke, Giuseppe Sorrenti, Fabrizio Zilibotti
papers.abstract: As children reach adolescence, peer interactions become increasingly central to their development, whereas the direct influence of parents wanes. Nevertheless, parents may continue to exert leverage by shaping their children's peer groups. We study interactions of parenting style and peer effects in a model where children's skill accumulation depends on both parental inputs and peers, and where parents can affect the peer group by restricting who their children can interact with. We estimate the model and show that it can capture empirical patterns regarding the interaction of peer characteristics, parental behavior, and skill accumulation among US high school students. We use the estimated model for policy simulations. We find that interventions (e.g., busing) that move children to a more favorable neighborhood have large effects but lose impact when they are scaled up because parents' equilibrium responses push against successful integration with the new peer group.
papers.zh_title: 养育一个孩子需举全村之力：邻里与同伴效应下的育儿经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 随着儿童进入青春期，同伴互动对其发展日益重要，而父母的直接影响逐渐减弱。然而，父母仍可通过塑造子女的同伴群体来施加影响。我们研究了一个模型中育儿方式与同伴效应的相互作用，其中儿童技能积累取决于父母投入和同伴，且父母可通过限制子女的交往对象来影响同伴群体。我们估计了该模型，并证明它能捕捉美国高中生中同伴特征、父母行为与技能积累相互作用的经验模式。我们利用估计模型进行政策模拟。研究发现，将儿童迁移至更有利社区（如校车计划）的干预措施效果显著，但大规模实施时效果减弱，因为父母的均衡反应阻碍了与新同伴群体的成功融合。

papers.title: Non-Pharmaceutical Interventions and Mortality in U.S. Cities during the Great Influenza Pandemic, 1918-1919
papers.authors: Robert J. Barro
papers.abstract: A key issue for the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic is whether non-pharmaceutical public-health interventions (NPIs) retard death rates. Good information about these effects comes from flu-related excess deaths in large U.S. cities during the second wave of the Great Influenza Pandemic, September 1918-February 1919. NPIs, as measured by an extension of Markel, et al. (2007), are in three categories: school closings, prohibitions on public gatherings, and quarantine/isolation. Although an increase in NPIs flattened the curve in the sense of reducing the ratio of peak to average death rates, the estimated effect on overall deaths is small and statistically insignificant. One possibility is that the NPIs were not more successful in curtailing overall mortality because the average duration of each type of NPI was only around one month. Another possibility is that NPIs mainly delay deaths rather than eliminating them.
papers.zh_title: 1918-1919年大流感期间美国城市的非药物干预与死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: 当前COVID-19疫情的一个关键问题是，非药物公共卫生干预措施（NPI）能否降低死亡率。关于这些效应的可靠信息来自1918年9月至1919年2月大流感第二波期间美国大城市的流感相关超额死亡数据。根据Markel等人（2007）的扩展衡量，NPI分为三类：关闭学校、禁止公共集会以及隔离/检疫。尽管NPI的增加在降低峰值与平均死亡率之比的意义上使曲线趋平，但对总死亡率的估计影响较小且统计上不显著。一种可能性是，NPI未能更成功地遏制总死亡率，是因为每类NPI的平均持续时间仅约一个月。另一种可能性是，NPI主要延迟死亡而非消除死亡。

papers.title: Elusive Safety: The New Geography of Capital Flows and Risk
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Ester Faia, Ruth A. Judson, Tim Schmidt-Eisenlohr
papers.abstract: A confidential dataset with industry-level disaggregation of U.S. cross-border claims and liabilities, shows U.S. securities to be increasingly intermediated by tax-haven-financial-centers (THFC) and less regulated funds. These securities are risky, in intangible-intensive sectors, requiring higher Sharpe ratios; while the foreign-official sector mainly holds Treasuries. Facts on private securities are rationalized through a model where firms with heterogeneous default probabilities, and funded by global intermediaries, endogenously locate affiliates in THFCs. A decline in the cost of funds or in THFC's taxes/regulation, raises profits and firms' incentives to enter THFCs. Firms appear elusively safe, intermediaries reduce monitoring incentives and debt risk increases.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F2, F3, F4, G15
papers.zh_title: 难以捉摸的安全：资本流动与风险的新地理格局
papers.zh_abstract: 一份包含美国跨境债权与负债行业细分数据的机密数据集显示，美国证券越来越多地通过避税天堂金融中心（THFC）和监管较少的基金进行中介。这些证券风险较高，集中于无形资产密集型行业，需要更高的夏普比率；而外国官方部门主要持有美国国债。关于私人证券的事实通过一个模型得到合理化解释，该模型中，具有异质性违约概率的企业由全球中介机构融资，并内生地在THFC设立附属机构。资金成本或THFC税收/监管的下降会提高利润和企业进入THFC的动机。企业看似安全，中介机构减少监督激励，债务风险随之增加。

papers.title: Macroeconomic Dynamics and Reallocation in an Epidemic: Evaluating the “Swedish Solution”
papers.authors: Dirk Krueger, Harald Uhlig, Taojun Xie
papers.abstract: In this paper, we argue that endogenous shifts in private consumption behavior across sectors of the economy can act as a potent mitigation mechanism during an epidemic or when the economy is re-opened after a temporary lockdown. We introduce a SIR epidemiological model into a neoclassical production economy in which goods are distinguished by the degree to which they can be consumed at home rather than in a social, possibly contagious context. We demonstrate that within the model the “Swedish solution” of letting the epidemic play out without government intervention and allowing agents to shift their consumption behavior towards relatively safe sectors can lead to substantial mitigation of the economic and human costs of the COVID-19 crisis. We estimate the model on Swedish health data and then show that compared to a model in which sectors are assumed to be homogeneous in their infection risk, as in Eichenbaum, Rebelo, and Trabandt (2020), endogenous sectoral reallocation avoids more than 2/3 of the decline in aggregate output and consumption, and at the same time induces a dynamics of weekly death that accords very well with the matching and of the number of deaths within one year. Our analysis implies case fatality rates below 0.2 percent and a limit of less than 800 deaths per million for Sweden. We also characterize the allocation a social planner would choose that can dictate sectoral consumption patterns and demonstrate that the laissez-faire outcome with sectoral reallocation, while mitigating the economic and health crisis, still implies suboptimally many deaths and too massive a decline in economic activity.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, EH, ITI, LS, PE；JEL：E20, E30, E52
papers.zh_title: 疫情中的宏观经济动态与再配置：评估“瑞典方案”
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们认为，疫情期间或经济在临时封锁后重新开放时，私人消费行为在经济各部门间的内生转变可以作为一种有效的缓解机制。我们将SIR流行病学模型引入新古典生产经济，其中商品根据其在家消费而非在可能具有传染性的社交场合消费的程度进行区分。我们证明，在该模型中，让疫情在没有政府干预的情况下自然发展，并允许代理人将消费行为转向相对安全的部门，这种“瑞典方案”可以显著缓解COVID-19危机的经济和人员成本。我们利用瑞典健康数据估计模型，然后证明，与Eichenbaum、Rebelo和Trabandt（2020）中假设各部门感染风险同质的模型相比，内生部门再配置避免了总产出和消费下降的三分之二以上，同时引发的每周死亡动态与一年内死亡人数的匹配非常吻合。我们的分析表明，瑞典的病例死亡率低于0.2%，每百万人死亡人数上限低于800人。我们还刻画了社会计划者可能选择的、能够指导部门消费模式的配置，并证明，尽管部门再配置下的自由放任结果缓解了经济和健康危机，但仍意味着次优的过多死亡和经济活动过于剧烈的下降。

papers.title: Health versus Wealth: On the Distributional Effects of Controlling a Pandemic
papers.authors: Andrew Glover, Jonathan Heathcote, Dirk Krueger, José-Víctor Ríos-Rull
papers.abstract: To slow the spread of the COVID-19 virus, many countries shut down parts of the economy. Older individuals have the most to gain from slowing virus diffusion. Younger workers in sectors that are shuttered have most to lose. We build a model in which economic activity and disease progression are jointly determined. Individuals differ by age (young, retired), by sector (basic, luxury), and by health status. Disease transmission occurs in the workplace, through consumption, at home, and in hospitals. We study the optimal economic mitigation policy for a government that can redistribute through taxes and transfers, but where taxation distorts labor supply. We show that shutdowns are optimally milder in 2020 when taxes are distortionary, and when the government does not have access to debt. A harder but shorter shutdown is preferred when vaccines become available in the first half of 2021.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：E20, E30
papers.zh_title: 健康与财富：论控制疫情的收入分配效应
papers.zh_abstract: 为减缓COVID-19病毒的传播，许多国家关闭了部分经济部门。老年人从减缓病毒传播中获益最多。被关闭部门的年轻工人损失最大。我们构建了一个经济活动与疾病进展共同决定的模型。个体按年龄（年轻、退休）、部门（基础、奢侈品）和健康状况区分。疾病传播发生在工作场所、消费过程中、家庭内和医院中。我们研究了一个能够通过税收和转移支付进行再分配、但税收会扭曲劳动供给的政府的最优经济缓解政策。我们证明，当税收具有扭曲性且政府无法举债时，2020年的封锁最优程度更为温和。当疫苗在2021年上半年可用时，更严厉但更短的封锁更受青睐。

papers.title: Income Segregation: Up or Down, and for Whom?
papers.authors: John R. Logan, Andrew Foster, Hongwei Xu, Wenquan Zhang
papers.abstract: Reports of rising income segregation have been brought into question by the observation that post-2000 estimates are upwardly biased due to a reduction in the sample sizes on which they are based. Recent studies have offered estimates of this “sample-count” bias using public data. We show here that there are two substantial sources of systematic bias in estimating segregation levels: bias associated with sample size and bias associated with using weighted sample data. We rely on new correction methods using the original census sample data for individual households to provide more accurate estimates. Family income segregation rose markedly in the 1980s but only selectively after 1990. For some categories of families, segregation declined after 1990. There has been an upward trend for families with children, but not specifically for families with children in the upper or lower 10% of the income distribution. Separate analyses by race/ethnicity show that segregation was not generally higher among blacks and Hispanics than among white families, and evidence of segregation trends for these separate groups is mixed. Trends vary for specific combinations of race/ethnicity, presence of children, and location in the income distribution, offering new challenges for understanding the underlying processes of change.
papers.zh_title: 收入隔离：上升还是下降，对谁而言？
papers.zh_abstract: 关于收入隔离上升的报告因以下观察而受到质疑：2000年后的估计值因所依据的样本量减少而存在向上偏差。近期研究利用公开数据提供了这种“样本计数”偏差的估计。我们在此表明，估计隔离水平存在两个主要的系统性偏差来源：与样本量相关的偏差和与使用加权样本数据相关的偏差。我们依赖使用原始人口普查样本数据（针对个体家庭）的新校正方法，以提供更准确的估计。家庭收入隔离在1980年代显著上升，但1990年后仅选择性上升。对于某些家庭类别，1990年后隔离程度有所下降。有子女家庭的隔离呈上升趋势，但并非特指收入分布中处于上10%或下10%的有子女家庭。按种族/族裔分别分析显示，黑人和西班牙裔家庭的隔离程度通常并不高于白人家庭，且这些群体隔离趋势的证据不一。不同种族/族裔、是否有子女以及收入分布位置的特定组合，其趋势各不相同，这为理解变化背后的过程带来了新的挑战。

papers.title: A Model of Endogenous Risk Intolerance and LSAPs: Asset Prices and Aggregate Demand in a “Covid-19” Shock
papers.authors: Ricardo J. Caballero, Alp Simsek
papers.abstract: In this paper we: (i) provide a model of the endogenous risk intolerance and severe asset price and aggregate demand contractions following an adverse real (non-financial) shock; and (ii) demonstrate the effectiveness of Large Scale Asset Purchases (LSAPs) in addressing these contractions. The key mechanism stems from heterogeneous risk tolerance: as a recessionary shock hits the economy and brings down asset prices, risk-tolerant agents’ wealth share declines and their leverage rises endogenously. This reduces the market’s risk tolerance and generates downward pressure on asset prices and aggregate demand. When monetary policy is unconstrained, it can offset the decline in risk tolerance with an interest rate cut that boosts the market’s Sharpe ratio. However, if the interest rate policy is constrained, new contractionary feedbacks arise: recessionary shocks lead to further asset price and output drops, which feed the risk-o¤ episode and trigger a downward loop. In this context, LSAPs improve asset prices and aggregate demand by transferring risk to the government’s balance sheet, which reduces the market’s required Sharpe ratio and reverses the contractionary feedbacks. Quantitatively, we show that aggregate shocks and LSAPs have large impacts on asset prices when the model is calibrated to fit the inelastic demand for aggregate assets uncovered in recent literature. We also show that heterogeneity in risk tolerance explains part of the demand inelasticity in normal times, and further reduces the elasticity after a recessionary shock. The Covid-19 shock and the large response by all major central banks provide a vivid illustration of the environment we seek to capture.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E00, E12, E21, E22, E30, E40, G00, G01, G11
papers.zh_title: 内生风险厌恶与大规模资产购买模型：新冠疫情冲击下的资产价格与总需求
papers.zh_abstract: 本文中我们：(i) 构建了一个模型，用以解释在不利的实际（非金融）冲击之后，内生性风险厌恶以及资产价格和总需求的严重收缩；(ii) 论证了大规模资产购买（LSAPs）在应对这些收缩方面的有效性。关键机制源于异质性风险容忍度：当衰退冲击冲击经济并压低资产价格时，风险容忍型代理人的财富份额下降，其杠杆率内生性上升。这降低了市场的风险容忍度，并对资产价格和总需求产生下行压力。当货币政策不受约束时，它可以通过降息来提升市场的夏普比率，从而抵消风险容忍度的下降。然而，如果利率政策受到约束，新的收缩性反馈就会出现：衰退冲击导致资产价格和产出进一步下降，这反过来又加剧了风险事件，并触发下行循环。在此背景下，大规模资产购买通过将风险转移至政府资产负债表来改善资产价格和总需求，这降低了市场所需的夏普比率，并逆转了收缩性反馈。在定量分析中，我们表明，当模型校准以匹配近期文献中揭示的总资产无弹性需求时，总体冲击和大规模资产购买对资产价格具有巨大影响。我们还表明，风险容忍度的异质性解释了正常时期部分需求缺乏弹性的原因，并在衰退冲击后进一步降低了弹性。新冠疫情冲击以及所有主要央行的巨大应对措施，生动地说明了我们试图捕捉的环境。

papers.title: Demographic Perspectives on Mortality of Covid-19 and Other Epidemics
papers.authors: Joshua R. Goldstein, Ronald D. Lee
papers.abstract: What would a hypothetical one million US deaths in the Covid-19 epidemic mean for mortality of individuals at the population level? To put estimates of Covid-19 mortality into perspective, we estimate age-specific mortality for an epidemic claiming for illustrative purposes one million US lives, with results scalable over a broad range of deaths. We calculate the impact on period life expectancy (down 3 years) and remaining life-years (12.3 years per death), which for one million deaths can be valued at six to 10 trillion dollars. The age-patterns of Covid-19 mortality observed in other countries are remarkably similar and exhibit the typical rate of increase by age of normal mortality. The scenario of one million Covid-19 deaths is similar in scale to the decades-long HIV/AIDS and opioid-overdose epidemics but considerably smaller than the Spanish Flu of 1918. Unlike HIV/AIDS and opioid epidemics, the Covid-19 deaths will be concentrated in months rather than spread out over decades.
papers.zh_title: 从人口学视角看新冠疫情及其他流行病的死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: 假设新冠疫情在美国导致一百万人死亡，这对人口层面的个体死亡率意味着什么？为了将新冠疫情死亡率的估计值置于背景中，我们估算了假设性流行病（为说明目的假设导致一百万美国人死亡）的年龄别死亡率，其结果可在广泛的死亡人数范围内进行缩放。我们计算了对时期预期寿命（下降3年）和剩余生命年数（每例死亡12.3年）的影响，对于一百万例死亡，其价值可估值为6至10万亿美元。在其他国家观察到的新冠疫情死亡率的年龄模式非常相似，并表现出与正常死亡率随年龄增长而增加的典型速率。一百万例新冠死亡的情景在规模上与持续数十年的艾滋病毒/艾滋病和阿片类药物过量流行病相似，但远小于1918年的西班牙流感。与艾滋病毒/艾滋病和阿片类药物流行病不同，新冠死亡将集中在数月内，而非分散在数十年间。

papers.title: Which Retail Outlets Generate the Most Physical Interactions?
papers.authors: Avi Goldfarb, Catherine Tucker
papers.abstract: This paper seeks to answer the simple question of what category of retail outlets generates the most physical interactions in the regular course of life. In this way, we aim to bring a marketing perspective to discussions about which businesses may be most risky from the standpoint of spreading contagious disease. We use detailed data from people's mobile devices prior to the implementation of social distancing measures in the United States. With this data, we examine a number of potential indicators of risk of contagion: The absolute number of visits and visitors, how many of the visits are generated by the same people, the median average distance traveled by the visitor to the retailer, and the number of customers from Canada and Mexico. We find that retailers with a single outlet tend to attract relatively few visitors, fewer one-off visitors, and have fewer international customers. For retailers that have multiple stores the patterns are non-linear. Retailers that have such a large number of stores that they are ubiquitous, tend to exhibit fewer visits and visitors and attract customers from a smaller distance. However, retailers that have a large enough footprint to be well known, but not large enough to be ubiquitous tend to attract a large number of visitors who make one-off visits, travel a long distance, and are disproportionately international.
papers.zh_title: 哪些零售门店产生的物理互动最多？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文旨在回答一个简单问题：在日常生活中，哪类零售门店产生的物理互动最多？通过这种方式，我们旨在从营销视角为关于哪些企业从传播传染病的角度来看可能风险最大的讨论提供信息。我们使用了美国实施社交距离措施之前人们移动设备的详细数据。利用这些数据，我们考察了若干潜在的传染风险指标：访问次数和访客的绝对数量、其中有多少访问是由同一人产生的、访客到零售商的中位平均旅行距离，以及来自加拿大和墨西哥的顾客数量。我们发现，拥有单一门店的零售商往往吸引相对较少的访客、较少的一次性访客，并且国际顾客也较少。对于拥有多家门店的零售商，其模式是非线性的。那些门店数量众多以至于无处不在的零售商，往往表现出较少的访问次数和访客，并吸引来自较近距离的顾客。然而，那些足迹足够大以至于广为人知，但尚未大到无处不在的零售商，往往吸引大量访客，这些访客进行一次性访问，旅行距离较远，并且国际顾客比例过高。

papers.title: Bilateral Information Disclosure in Adverse Selection Markets with Nonexclusive Competition
papers.authors: Joseph E. Stiglitz, Jungyoll Yun, Andrew Kosenko
papers.abstract: We study insurance markets with nonexclusive contracts, introducing bilateral endogenous information disclosure about insurance sales and purchases by firms and consumers. We show that a competitive equilibrium exists under remarkably mild conditions, and characterize the unique equilibrium outcome. With two types of consumers the outcome consists of a pooling contract which maximizes the well-being of the low risk type (along the zero profit pooling line) plus a supplemental (undisclosed and nonexclusive) contract that brings the high risk type to full insurance (at his own odds). We show that this outcome is extremely robust and constrained Pareto efficient. Consumer disclosure and asymmetric equilibrium information flows are critical in supporting the equilibrium.
papers.zh_title: 非排他性竞争下逆向选择市场中的双边信息披露
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了具有非排他性合同的保险市场，引入了企业和消费者关于保险销售和购买的双边内生信息披露。我们表明，在非常温和的条件下存在竞争均衡，并刻画了唯一的均衡结果。在两类消费者的情况下，结果包括一个使低风险类型福利最大化的混合合同（沿着零利润混合线），以及一个补充性的（未披露且非排他性的）合同，该合同使高风险类型获得完全保险（按其自身概率）。我们表明，这一结果极其稳健且是受约束的帕累托有效。消费者披露和不对称的均衡信息流对于支持该均衡至关重要。

papers.title: Immigration Policy Levers for US Innovation and Startups
papers.authors: Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr
papers.abstract: Immigrants account for about a quarter of US invention and entrepreneurship despite a policy environment that is not well suited for these purposes. This chapter reviews the US immigration policy environment that governs how skilled migrants move to America for employment-based purposes. We discuss points of strain in the current system and potential policy reforms that would likely increase the rate of innovation and the number of startups due to immigrants in the country. Key areas include adjustments to the allocation of permanent residency visas, adjustments to the H-1B visa program, and the creation of an immigrant startup visa.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：F22, F23, J15, J44, J61, L26, M13, O31, O32, O33
papers.zh_title: 促进美国创新与初创企业的移民政策杠杆
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管政策环境并不完全适合这些目的，但移民仍约占美国发明和创业的四分之一。本章回顾了管理技术移民如何因就业目的移居美国的美国移民政策环境。我们讨论了当前系统中的压力点，以及可能因移民在美国而提高创新率和初创企业数量的潜在政策改革。关键领域包括调整永久居留签证的分配、调整H-1B签证计划，以及创建移民初创企业签证。

papers.title: Voluntary and Mandatory Social Distancing: Evidence on COVID-19 Exposure Rates from Chinese Provinces and Selected Countries
papers.authors: Alexander Chudik, M. Hashem Pesaran, Alessandro Rebucci
papers.abstract: This paper considers a modification of the standard Susceptible-Infected-Recovered (SIR) model of epidemic that allows for different degrees of compulsory as well as voluntary social distancing. It is shown that the fraction of population that self-isolates varies with the perceived probability of contracting the disease. Implications of social distancing both on the epidemic and recession curves are investigated and their trade off is simulated under a number of different social distancing and economic participation scenarios. We show that mandating social distancing is very effective at flattening the epidemic curve, but is costly in terms of employment loss. However, if targeted towards individuals most likely to spread the infection, the employment loss can be somewhat reduced. We also show that voluntary self-isolation driven by individual’s perceived risk of becoming infected kicks in only towards the peak of the epidemic and has little or no impact on flattening the epidemic curve. Using available statistics and correcting for measurement errors, we estimate the rate of exposure to COVID-19 for 21 Chinese provinces and a selected number of countries. The exposure rates are generally small, but vary considerably between Hubei and other Chinese provinces as well as across countries. Strikingly, the exposure rate in Hubei province is around 40 times larger than the rates for other Chinese provinces, with the exposure rates for some European countries being 3-5 times larger than Hubei (the epicenter of the epidemic). The paper also provides country-specific estimates of the recovery rate, showing it to be about 21 days (a week longer than the 14 days typically assumed), and relatively homogeneous across Chinese provinces and for a selected number of countries.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IFM, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C40, D0, E7, F60, I12
papers.zh_title: 自愿与强制社交距离：来自中国各省份及若干国家的COVID-19暴露率证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考虑对标准易感-感染-康复（SIR）流行病模型进行修改，以允许不同程度的强制以及自愿社交距离。研究表明，自我隔离的人口比例随感知到的患病概率而变化。我们研究了社交距离对流行病曲线和衰退曲线的影响，并在多种不同的社交距离和经济参与情景下模拟了它们的权衡。我们表明，强制社交距离在拉平流行病曲线方面非常有效，但代价是就业损失。然而，如果针对最可能传播感染的个体，就业损失可以有所减少。我们还表明，由个体感知到的感染风险驱动的自愿自我隔离仅在流行病高峰期附近才开始起作用，并且对拉平流行病曲线几乎没有影响。利用现有统计数据并修正测量误差，我们估算了中国21个省份和若干选定国家的COVID-19暴露率。暴露率普遍较低，但在湖北省与其他中国省份之间以及各国之间存在显著差异。引人注目的是，湖北省的暴露率大约是中国其他省份的40倍，而一些欧洲国家的暴露率是湖北省（疫情中心）的3-5倍。本文还提供了国家特定的康复率估计，显示约为21天（比通常假设的14天长一周），并且在中国各省份和若干选定国家中相对同质。

papers.title: Managing Intelligence: Skilled Experts and AI in Markets for Complex Products
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Benjamin R. Handel, Samuel H. Kina, Jonathan T. Kolstad
papers.abstract: In numerous high stakes markets skilled experts play a key role in facilitating consumer choice of complex products. New artificial intelligence (AI) technologies are increasingly being used to augment expert decisions. We study the role of technology and expertise in the market for health insurance, where consumer choices are widely known to be sub-optimal. Our analysis leverages the large-scale implementation of an AI-based decision support tool in a private Medicare exchange where consumers are randomized to skilled agents over time. We find that, prior to AI-based technology, skilled experts in this market exhibit the same type of inconsistent behavior found in previous studies of individual choices, costing consumers $1260 on average. The addition of AI-based decision support improves outcomes by $278 on average and substantially reduces heterogeneity in broker performance. Experts efficiently synthesize private information, incorporating AI-based recommendations along dimensions that are well suited to AI (e.g. total expected patient costs), but overruling AI-based recommendations along dimensions for which humans are better suited (e.g. specifics of doctor networks). As a result, switching plans, an ex-post measure of plan satisfaction, is meaningfully lower for agents making AI-based recommendations. While AI is a complement to skill on average, we find that it is a substitute across the skill distribution; lower quality agents provide better recommendations with AI than the top agents did without it. Overall productivity rises, with the introduction of decision support associated with a 21% reduction in call time for enrollment.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE；JEL：I13, J24, L15
papers.zh_title: 管理智慧：复杂产品市场中的熟练专家与人工智能
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多高风险市场中，熟练专家在促进消费者选择复杂产品方面发挥着关键作用。新的人工智能技术正越来越多地被用于增强专家决策。我们研究了技术和专业知识在健康保险市场中的作用，该市场中消费者的选择被广泛认为是次优的。我们的分析利用了在一个私人医疗保险交易所中大规模实施基于人工智能的决策支持工具的情况，在该交易所中，消费者随时间被随机分配给熟练的代理人。我们发现，在基于人工智能的技术出现之前，该市场中的熟练专家表现出与先前关于个体选择的研究中发现的相同类型的不一致行为，平均使消费者损失1260美元。基于人工智能的决策支持的加入平均改善了278美元的结果，并显著减少了经纪人表现的异质性。专家有效地综合了私人信息，在适合人工智能的维度（例如，患者预期总成本）上采纳基于人工智能的建议，但在人类更擅长的维度（例如，医生网络的具体细节）上否决基于人工智能的建议。因此，对于做出基于人工智能建议的代理人来说，换保计划（一种事后衡量计划满意度的指标）显著更低。虽然平均而言人工智能是对技能的补充，但我们发现它在技能分布中是一种替代品；质量较低的代理人使用人工智能提供的建议比顶级代理人没有人工智能时提供的建议更好。总体生产率提高，决策支持的引入与通话时间减少21%相关。

papers.title: Evidence on Job Search Models from a Survey of Unemployed Workers in Germany
papers.authors: Stefano DellaVigna, Jörg Heining, Johannes F. Schmieder, Simon Trenkle
papers.abstract: The job finding rate of Unemployment Insurance (UI) recipients declines in the initial months of unemployment and then exhibits a spike at the benefit exhaustion point. A range of theoretical explanations have been proposed, but those are hard to disentangle using data on job finding alone. To better understand the underlying mechanisms, we conducted a large text-message-based survey of unemployed workers in Germany. We surveyed 6,349 UI recipients twice a week for 4 months about their job search effort. The panel structure allows us to observe how search effort evolves within individuals over the unemployment spell. We provide three key facts: 1) search effort is flat early on in the UI spell, 2) search effort exhibits an increase up to UI exhaustion and a decrease thereafter, 3) UI recipients do not appear to time job start dates to coincide with the UI exhaustion point. A standard search model with unobserved heterogeneity struggles to explain the second fact, and a model of storable offers is not consistent with the third fact. The patterns are well captured by a model of reference-dependent job search or by a model with duration dependence in search cost.
papers.zh_title: 来自德国失业工人调查的求职模型证据
papers.zh_abstract: 失业保险领取者的工作发现率在失业的最初几个月下降，然后在福利耗尽点出现一个峰值。已经提出了一系列理论解释，但仅使用工作发现数据很难厘清这些解释。为了更好地理解潜在机制，我们对德国的失业工人进行了一项基于短信的大规模调查。我们在4个月内每周两次对6349名失业保险领取者进行关于其求职努力的调查。面板结构使我们能够观察个体在失业期间内求职努力的演变。我们提供了三个关键事实：1) 在失业保险期的早期，求职努力是平稳的；2) 求职努力在失业保险耗尽前增加，之后减少；3) 失业保险领取者似乎不会将工作开始日期安排在与失业保险耗尽点重合的时间。一个具有未观测异质性的标准搜索模型难以解释第二个事实，而一个可存储工作机会的模型与第三个事实不一致。这些模式可以被一个参考依赖的求职模型或一个搜索成本具有持续时间依赖性的模型很好地捕捉。

papers.title: Price Discovery and Liquidity Recovery: Forex Market Reactions to Macro Announcements
papers.authors: Masahiro Yamada, Takatoshi Ito
papers.abstract: We examine whether the forex market quality, measured by the speed of price discovery and liquidity recovery after macro statistics announcements, has improved using the EBS high-frequency data for 20 years. Considering the recent rise of computer-based trading, a popular conjecture is that the market quality has improved. Our empirical analysis, however, suggests that an improving trend is only observed in price discovery. Moreover, two measures are negatively correlated because an increasing number of traders improves liquidity but slows down price discovery. Theoretically, the latter finding implies that “fast” traders have a poor interpretation of how the news will impact prices.
papers.zh_title: 价格发现与流动性恢复：外汇市场对宏观公告的反应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用EBS高频数据，研究了20年来宏观统计数据公告后外汇市场质量（以价格发现速度和流动性恢复速度衡量）是否有所改善。鉴于近年来计算机化交易的兴起，一个普遍的猜想是市场质量已经提高。然而，我们的实证分析表明，改善趋势仅在价格发现方面被观察到。此外，这两个指标呈负相关，因为交易者数量的增加改善了流动性，但减缓了价格发现。从理论上讲，后一个发现意味着“快速”交易者对新闻将如何影响价格的理解较差。

papers.title: Saving for Multiple Financial Needs: Evidence from Lockboxes and Mobile Money in Malawi
papers.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Valentina Brailovskaya, Jonathan Robinson
papers.abstract: We test whether the provision of multiple labeled savings accounts affects savings and downstream outcomes in an experiment with 761 microentrepreneurs in urban Malawi. Treatment respondents received one or multiple savings accounts, in the form of lockboxes or mobile money. We find that while providing additional boxes increased savings by 40%, technical issues marred the efficacy of a second mobile money account. Both types of accounts had impacts on downstream outcomes, including farming decisions and credit extended to customers. We do not detect differential downstream effects by the number of accounts.
papers.zh_title: 为多种财务需求储蓄：来自马拉维锁箱和移动货币的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在马拉维城市地区对761名微型企业家进行了一项实验，测试提供多个标记储蓄账户是否会影响储蓄和下游结果。处理组受访者获得一个或多个储蓄账户，形式为锁箱或移动货币。我们发现，虽然提供额外的锁箱使储蓄增加了40%，但技术问题损害了第二个移动货币账户的有效性。两种类型的账户都对下游结果产生了影响，包括农业决策和向客户提供的信贷。我们没有检测到账户数量对下游结果的差异化影响。

papers.title: Big G
papers.authors: Lydia Cox, Gernot Müller, Ernesto Pastén, Raphael Schoenle, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: Big G typically refers to aggregate government spending on a homogeneous good. In this paper, we open up this construct by analyzing the entire universe of procurement contracts of the US government and establish five facts. First, government spending is granular, that is, it is concentrated in relatively few firms and sectors. Second, relative to private expenditures its composition is biased. Third, procurement contracts are short-lived. Fourth, idiosyncratic variation dominates the fluctuation of spending. Last, government spending is concentrated in sectors with relatively sticky prices. Accounting for these facts within a stylized New Keynesian model offers new insights into the fiscal transmission mechanism: fiscal shocks hardly impact inflation, little crowding out of private expenditure exists, and the multiplier tends to be larger compared to a one-sector benchmark aligning the model with the empirical evidence.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME, PE, POL；JEL：E32, E62
papers.zh_title: 大G
papers.zh_abstract: 大G通常指政府在同质商品上的总支出。在本文中，我们通过分析美国政府所有采购合同的全貌来打开这一概念，并确立了五个事实。第一，政府支出是颗粒化的，即集中在相对较少的公司和行业。第二，相对于私人支出，其构成存在偏差。第三，采购合同是短期的。第四，特质性波动主导了支出的波动。最后，政府支出集中在价格相对粘性的行业。在一个标准的新凯恩斯主义模型中考虑这些事实，为财政传导机制提供了新的见解：财政冲击几乎不影响通胀，对私人支出的挤出很小，并且与使模型与经验证据一致的单部门基准相比，乘数往往更大。

papers.title: Beyond Reading, Writing, and Arithmetic: The Role of Teachers and Schools in Reporting Child Maltreatment
papers.authors: Maria D. Fitzpatrick, Cassandra Benson, Samuel R. Bondurant
papers.abstract: Nearly 4 in 10 children report experiencing maltreatment by adulthood. Early detection mitigates maltreatment’s negative effects. Yet factors that drive early detection remain understudied. We examine one possible source of early detection: educators in school settings. Administrative data on reports of child maltreatment across the U.S. over a 14-year period allows us to use two different regression discontinuity methods, one based on school-entry laws and one on school calendars. Both methods show education professionals are reporting cases that would have been missed otherwise. These findings suggest that improved training and support of educators may improve society's ability to help children and families.
papers.zh_title: 超越阅读、写作和算术：教师和学校在报告儿童虐待中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 近十分之四的儿童报告在成年之前经历过虐待。早期发现可以减轻虐待的负面影响。然而，推动早期发现的因素仍未得到充分研究。我们考察了早期发现的一个可能来源：学校环境中的教育工作者。覆盖美国14年期间的儿童虐待报告行政数据使我们能够使用两种不同的断点回归方法，一种基于入学法律，另一种基于学校日历。两种方法都表明，教育专业人员正在报告那些原本会被遗漏的案件。这些发现表明，改善对教育工作者的培训和支持可能会提高社会帮助儿童和家庭的能力。

papers.title: Hometown Ties and the Quality of Government Monitoring: Evidence from Rotation of Chinese Auditors
papers.authors: Jian Chu, Raymond Fisman, Songtao Tan, Yongxiang Wang
papers.abstract: Audits are a standard mechanism for reducing corruption in government investments. The quality of audits themselves, however, may be affected by relationships between auditor and target. We study whether provincial chief auditors in China show greater leniency in evaluating prefecture governments in their hometowns. In city-fixed-effect specifications – in which the role of shared background is identified from auditor turnover – we show that hometown auditors find 38 percent less in questionable monies. This hometown effect is similar throughout the auditor’s tenure, and is diminished for audits ordered by the provincial Organizations Department as a result of the departure of top city officials. We argue that our findings are most readily explained by leniency toward local officials rather than an endogenous response to concerns of better enforcement by hometown auditors. We complement these city-level findings with firm-level analyses of earnings manipulation by state-owned enterprises via real activity manipulation (a standard measure from the accounting literature), which we show is higher under hometown auditors.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D73, G3, H83, M42
papers.zh_title: 家乡情结与政府监管质量：来自中国审计师轮换的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 审计是减少政府投资腐败的标准机制。然而，审计本身的质量可能受到审计师与审计对象之间关系的影响。我们研究了中国省级审计长在评估其家乡地级市政府时是否表现出更大的宽容。在城市固定效应设定中——通过审计师轮换识别共同背景的作用——我们表明，家乡审计师发现的可疑资金减少了38%。这种家乡效应在审计师的整个任期内相似，并且对于因市级主要官员离任而由省级组织部下令进行的审计，该效应会减弱。我们认为，我们的发现最容易用对地方官员的宽容来解释，而不是对家乡审计师执法更严格的担忧的内生反应。我们通过国有企业通过真实活动操纵（会计文献中的标准衡量指标）进行的盈余操纵的企业层面分析来补充这些城市层面的发现，我们表明在审计师为家乡人时，这种操纵更高。

papers.title: Endogenous Education and Long-Run Factor Shares
papers.authors: Gene M. Grossman, Elhanan Helpman, Ezra Oberfield, Thomas Sampson
papers.abstract: We study the determinants of factor shares in a neoclassical environment with capital- skill complementarity and endogenous education. When more physical capital raises the marginal product of skills relative to that of raw labor, an increase in a broad measure of embodied human capital raises the capital share in national income for any given rental rate. When education is chosen optimally, a dynamic equilibrium is characterized by an inverse relationship between the level of human capital and both the rental rate on capital and the difference between the interest rate and the growth rate of wages. As a consequence, estimates of the elasticity of substitution that fail to account for levels of human capital will be biased upward. We develop a model with overlapping generations, ongoing increases in educational attainment, and technology-driven neoclassical growth, and show that for a class of production functions with capital-skill complementarity, a balanced growth path exists and is characterized by an inverse relationship between the rates of capital- and labor-augmenting technological progress and the capital share in national income.
papers.zh_title: 内生教育与长期要素份额
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在具有资本-技能互补性和内生教育的新古典环境中研究要素份额的决定因素。当更多的物质资本提高技能相对于原始劳动的边际产品时，广义体现型人力资本的增加会提高国民收入中的资本份额，无论租金率如何。当教育被最优选择时，动态均衡的特征是人力资本水平与资本租金率以及利率与工资增长率之差之间存在反向关系。因此，未能考虑人力资本水平的替代弹性估计将存在向上偏差。我们建立了一个具有代际重叠、教育程度持续提高和技术驱动的新古典增长的模型，并表明对于一类具有资本-技能互补性的生产函数，存在一条平衡增长路径，其特征是资本增进型和劳动增进型技术进步率与国民收入中的资本份额之间存在反向关系。

papers.title: Good-Bye Original Sin, Hello Risk On-Off, Financial Fragility, and Crises?
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Yothin Jinjarak, Donghyun Park, Huanhuan Zheng
papers.abstract: We analyze the sovereign bond issuance data of eight major emerging markets (EMs) - Brazil, China, India, Indonesia, Mexico, Russia, South Africa and Turkey from 1970 to 2018. Our analysis suggests that (i) EM local currency bonds tend to be smaller in size, shorter in maturity, or lower in coupon rate than foreign currency bonds; (ii) EMs are more likely to issue local-currency sovereign bonds if their currencies appreciated before the global financial crisis of 2008 (GFC); (iii) inflation-targeting monetary policy increases the likelihood of issuing local-currency debt before GFC but not after; and (iv) EMs that offer higher sovereign yields are more likely to issue local-currency bonds after GFC. Future data will allow us to test and identify structural changes associated with the COVID-19 pandemic and its aftermath.
papers.zh_title: 告别原罪，迎来风险偏好切换、金融脆弱性与危机？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了八个主要新兴市场——巴西、中国、印度、印度尼西亚、墨西哥、俄罗斯、南非和土耳其——从1970年到2018年的主权债券发行数据。我们的分析表明：（i）新兴市场本币债券往往比外币债券规模更小、期限更短或票面利率更低；（ii）如果新兴市场货币在2008年全球金融危机前升值，它们更有可能发行本币主权债券；（iii）通胀目标制货币政策在金融危机前增加了发行本币债务的可能性，但在金融危机后则不然；（iv）在金融危机后，提供更高主权收益率的新兴市场更有可能发行本币债券。未来的数据将使我们能够检验和识别与COVID-19大流行及其后果相关的结构性变化。

papers.title: Variation in Performance of Commonly Used Statistical Methods for Estimating Effectiveness of State-Level Opioid Policies on Opioid-Related Mortality
papers.authors: Beth Ann Griffin, Megan S. Schuler, Elizabeth A. Stuart, Stephen Patrick, Elizabeth McNeer, Rosanna Smart, David Powell, Bradley Stein, Terry Schell, Rosalie Liccardo Pacula
papers.abstract: Over the last two decades, there has been a surge of opioid-related overdose deaths resulting in a myriad of state policy responses. Researchers have evaluated the effectiveness of such policies using a wide-range of statistical models, each of which requires multiple design choices that can influence the accuracy and precision of the estimated policy effects. This simulation study used real-world data to compare model performance across a range of important statistical constructs to better understand which methods are appropriate for measuring the impacts of state-level opioid policies on opioid-related mortality. Our findings show that many commonly-used methods have very low statistical power to detect a significant policy effect (< 10%) when the policy effect size is small yet impactful (e.g., 5% reduction in opioid mortality). Many methods yielded high rates of Type I error, raising concerns of spurious conclusions about policy effectiveness. Finally, model performance was reduced when policy effectiveness had incremental, rather than instantaneous, onset. These findings highlight the limitations of existing statistical methods under scenarios that are likely to affect real-world policy studies. Given the necessity of identifying and implementing effective opioid-related policies, researchers and policymakers should be mindful of evaluation study statistical design.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：C1, C12, C15, C18, C22, C23, C4, C52, C54, H0, H51, H7, I18, I28, K32
papers.zh_title: 常用统计方法在评估州级阿片类药物政策对阿片类药物相关死亡率有效性方面的表现差异
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，阿片类药物过量死亡人数激增，引发了各州一系列政策回应。研究人员使用各种统计模型评估了这些政策的有效性，每个模型都需要多种设计选择，这些选择会影响估计政策效应的准确性和精确度。本模拟研究使用真实世界数据，在一系列重要的统计结构上比较模型表现，以更好地了解哪些方法适用于衡量州级阿片类药物政策对阿片类药物相关死亡率的影响。我们的研究结果表明，当政策效应规模较小但影响重大（例如，阿片类药物死亡率降低5%）时，许多常用方法检测显著政策效应的统计功效非常低（<10%）。许多方法产生了高I类错误率，引发了对政策有效性得出虚假结论的担忧。最后，当政策有效性是渐进式而非即时式开始时，模型表现会降低。这些发现突显了在可能影响现实世界政策研究的情景下现有统计方法的局限性。鉴于识别和实施有效的阿片类药物相关政策的必要性，研究人员和政策制定者应注意评估研究的统计设计。

papers.title: Estimating the Fraction of Unreported Infections in Epidemics with a Known Epicenter: an Application to COVID-19
papers.authors: Ali Hortaçsu, Jiarui Liu, Timothy Schwieg
papers.abstract: We develop an analytically tractable method to estimate the fraction of unreported infections in epidemics with a known epicenter and estimate the number of unreported COVID-19 infections in the US during the first half of March 2020. Our method utilizes the covariation in initial reported infections across US regions and the number of travelers to these regions from the epicenter, along with the results of an early randomized testing study in Iceland. Using our estimates of the number of unreported infections, which are substantially larger than the number of reported infections, we also provide estimates for the infection fatality rate using data on reported COVID-19 fatalities from U.S. counties.
papers.zh_title: 估计已知疫情中心流行病中未报告感染的比例：以COVID-19为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种解析上易于处理的方法，用于估计已知疫情中心流行病中未报告感染的比例，并估算了2020年3月上半月美国未报告的COVID-19感染人数。我们的方法利用了美国各地区初始报告感染人数与来自疫情中心的旅行者数量之间的协变关系，以及冰岛早期随机检测研究的结果。利用我们对未报告感染人数的估计（这些估计值显著大于报告感染人数），我们还利用美国各县报告的COVID-19死亡数据，提供了感染致死率的估计值。

papers.title: Tracking Public and Private Responses to the COVID-19 Epidemic: Evidence from State and Local Government Actions
papers.authors: Sumedha Gupta, Thuy D. Nguyen, Felipe Lozano Rojas, Shyam Raman, Byungkyu Lee, Ana Bento, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: This paper examines the determinants of social distancing during the COVID-19 epidemic. We classify state and local government actions, and we study multiple proxies for social distancing based on data from smart devices. Mobility fell substantially in all states, even ones that have not adopted major distancing mandates. There is little evidence, for example, that stay-at-home mandates induced distancing. In contrast, early and information-focused actions have had bigger effects. Event studies show that first case announcements, emergency declarations, and school closures reduced mobility by 1-5% after 5 days and 7-45% after 20 days. Between March 1 and April 11, average time spent at home grew from 9.1 hours to 13.9 hours. We find, for example, that without state emergency declarations, event study estimates imply that hours at home would have been 11.3 hours in April, suggesting that 55% of the growth comes from emergency declarations and 45% comes from secular (non-policy) trends. State and local government actions induced changes in mobility on top of a large response across all states to the prevailing knowledge of public health risks. Early state policies conveyed information about the epidemic, suggesting that even the policy response mainly operates through a voluntary channel.
papers.zh_title: 追踪公共与私人对COVID-19疫情的应对：来自州及地方政府行动的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了COVID-19疫情期间社会距离的决定因素。我们对州和地方政府的行动进行了分类，并基于智能设备数据研究了社会距离的多个代理指标。所有州的流动性都大幅下降，即使是那些未采取重大距离限制措施的州也是如此。例如，几乎没有证据表明居家令导致了距离行为。相比之下，早期和以信息为重点的行动产生了更大的影响。事件研究显示，首次病例公告、紧急状态声明和学校关闭在5天后使流动性降低了1-5%，在20天后降低了7-45%。从3月1日到4月11日，平均居家时间从9.1小时增加到13.9小时。例如，我们发现，如果没有州紧急状态声明，事件研究估计表明4月份的居家时间将为11.3小时，这表明55%的增长来自紧急状态声明，45%来自长期（非政策）趋势。在所有州对已知公共卫生风险做出大规模响应的基础上，州和地方政府的行动进一步引发了流动性的变化。早期的州政策传达了关于疫情的信息，这表明即使是政策响应也主要通过自愿渠道发挥作用。

papers.title: Optimal Targeted Lockdowns in a Multi-Group SIR Model
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Victor Chernozhukov, Iván Werning, Michael D. Whinston
papers.abstract: We study targeted lockdowns in a multi-group SIR model where infection, hospitalization and fatality rates vary between groups—in particular between the “young”, “the middle-aged” and the “old”. Our model enables a tractable quantitative analysis of optimal policy. For baseline parameter values for the COVID-19 pandemic applied to the US, we find that optimal policies differentially targeting risk/age groups significantly outperform optimal uniform policies and most of the gains can be realized by having stricter lockdown policies on the oldest group. Intuitively, a strict and long lockdown for the most vulnerable group both reduces infections and enables less strict lockdowns for the lower-risk groups. We also study the impacts of group distancing, testing and contract tracing, the matching technology and the expected arrival time of a vaccine on optimal policies. Overall, targeted policies that are combined with measures that reduce interactions between groups and increase testing and isolation of the infected can minimize both economic losses and deaths in our model.
papers.zh_title: 多群体SIR模型中的最优针对性封锁
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个多群体SIR模型中研究针对性封锁，其中感染率、住院率和死亡率在不同群体之间存在差异——特别是在“年轻人”、“中年人”和“老年人”之间。我们的模型能够对最优政策进行易于处理的定量分析。对于应用于美国的COVID-19大流行的基准参数值，我们发现，针对风险/年龄组进行差异化处理的最优政策显著优于统一的政策，并且大部分收益可以通过对最年长群体实施更严格的封锁政策来实现。直观地说，对最脆弱群体实施严格且长期的封锁既能减少感染，也能对低风险群体实施不那么严格的封锁。我们还研究了群体隔离、检测和接触者追踪、匹配技术以及疫苗预期到达时间对最优政策的影响。总体而言，在我们的模型中，结合减少群体间互动措施以及加强检测和隔离感染者的针对性政策，可以最大限度地减少经济损失和死亡。

papers.title: Early Life Shocks, Market Adjustments, and Black-White Inequality
papers.authors: Karen Clay, Ethan J. Schmick
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the long run impacts of an early life agricultural shock on Black and White sons in the U.S. South. The boll weevil, one of the most destructive agricultural pests in American history, decreased cotton production and resulted in substantial changes to the Southern economy. The impact of this shock on children who were born before and after its arrival is not a priori obvious; it could be positive or negative depending on whether children born after the shock experienced better or worse early life conditions. To examine the empirical effects of this shock on Black and White fathers and sons, the analysis makes use of cross-census links from the Census Tree (Buckles et al., 2023) and race-specific difference-in-differences and triple difference empirical strategies. We find the arrival of the boll weevil benefited Black sons in the long run, as reflected in two 1940 measures of income – wages and imputed income – and did not harm White sons. These differential gains decreased inequality. We provide empirical and historical evidence on a range of mechanisms through which early life conditions may have improved for Black sons relative to White sons.
papers.zh_title: 早期生活冲击、市场调整与黑人与白人之间的不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国南部早期农业冲击对黑人和白人儿子的长期影响。棉铃象甲是美国历史上最具破坏性的农业害虫之一，它的出现减少了棉花产量，并导致南方经济发生重大变化。这种冲击对冲击到来前后出生的儿童的影响并非先验明确；它可能是积极的，也可能是消极的，取决于冲击后出生的儿童是否经历了更好或更差的早期生活条件。为了考察这种冲击对黑人和白人父亲及儿子的实证影响，分析利用了来自Census Tree的跨人口普查链接以及针对种族的双重差分和三重差分实证策略。我们发现，棉铃象甲的到来在长期内使黑人儿子受益，这反映在1940年的两项收入指标——工资和推算收入——上，并且没有伤害白人儿子。这些差异化的收益减少了不平等。我们提供了一系列机制的经验和历史证据，通过这些机制，黑人儿子的早期生活条件相对于白人儿子可能得到了改善。

papers.title: Inequality of Fear and Self-Quarantine: Is There a Trade-off between GDP and Public Health?
papers.authors: Sangmin Aum, Sang Yoon (Tim) Lee, Yongseok Shin
papers.abstract: We construct a quantitative model of an economy hit by an epidemic. People differ by age and skill, and choose occupations and whether to commute to work or work from home, to maximize their income and minimize their fear of infection. Occupations differ by wage, infection risk, and the productivity loss when working from home. By setting the model parameters to replicate the progression of COVID-19 in South Korea and the United Kingdom, we obtain three key results. First, government-imposed lock-downs may not present a clear trade-off between GDP and public health, as commonly believed, even though its immediate effect is to reduce GDP and infections by forcing people to work from home. A premature lifting of the lock-down raises GDP temporarily, but infections rise over the next months to a level at which many people choose to work from home, where they are less productive, driven by the fear of infection. A longer lock-down eventually mitigates the GDP loss as well as flattens the infection curve. Second, if the UK had adopted South Korean policies, its GDP loss and infections would have been substantially smaller both in the short and the long run. This is not because Korea implemented policies sooner, but because aggressive testing and tracking more effectively reduce infections and disrupt the economy less than a blanket lock-down. Finally, low-skill workers and self-employed lose the most from the epidemic and also from the government policies. However, the policy of issuing “visas” to those who have antibodies will disproportionately benefit the low-skilled, by relieving them of the fear of infection and also by allowing them to get back to work.
papers.zh_title: 恐惧与自我隔离的不平等：GDP与公共卫生之间存在权衡吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个受流行病冲击的经济体的定量模型。人们按年龄和技能划分，选择职业以及是否通勤上班或在家工作，以最大化他们的收入并最小化他们对感染的恐惧。不同职业的工资、感染风险以及在家工作时的生产力损失各不相同。通过设定模型参数以复制COVID-19在韩国和英国的传播过程，我们得到了三个关键结果。首先，政府实施的封锁可能并不像普遍认为的那样，在GDP和公共卫生之间存在明确的权衡，尽管其直接效果是通过迫使人们在家工作来减少GDP和感染。过早解除封锁会暂时提高GDP，但在接下来的几个月里，感染会上升到这样一个水平：出于对感染的恐惧，许多人选择在家工作，而他们在家的生产力较低。更长时间的封锁最终会减轻GDP损失，同时也能拉平感染曲线。其次，如果英国采用了韩国的政策，其GDP损失和感染在短期和长期内都会小得多。这不是因为韩国更早实施政策，而是因为积极的检测和追踪比全面封锁更有效地减少感染，并且对经济的破坏更小。最后，低技能工人和个体经营者从流行病以及政府政策中损失最大。然而，向拥有抗体的人发放“签证”的政策将不成比例地使低技能者受益，既减轻了他们对感染的恐惧，也允许他们重返工作岗位。

papers.title: Health vs. Wealth? Public Health Policies and the Economy During Covid-19
papers.authors: Zhixian Lin, Christopher M. Meissner
papers.abstract: We study the impact of non-pharmaceutical policy interventions (NPIs) like “stay-at-home” orders on the spread of infectious disease. Local policies have little impact on the economy nor on local public health. Stay-at-home is only weakly associated with slower growth of Covid-19 cases. Reductions in observed “mobility” are not associated with slower growth of Covid-19 cases. Stay-at-home is associated with lower workplace and more residential activity, but common shocks matter much more. Moreover, job losses have been no higher in US states that implemented stay-at-home during the Covid-19 pandemic than in states that did not have stay-at-home. All of these results demonstrate that the Covid-19 pandemic is a common economic and public health shock. They also show that policy spillovers and behavioral responses are important. The tradeoff between the economy and public health in a pandemic depends strongly on what is happening elsewhere. This underscores the importance of coordinated economic and public health responses.
papers.zh_title: 健康还是财富？COVID-19期间的公共卫生政策与经济
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了非药物政策干预措施（如“居家令”）对传染病传播的影响。地方政策对经济或当地公共卫生几乎没有影响。居家令与COVID-19病例增长放缓之间仅存在微弱关联。观察到的“流动性”减少与COVID-19病例增长放缓无关。居家令与工作场所活动减少和住宅活动增加相关，但共同冲击的影响要大得多。此外，在COVID-19大流行期间实施居家令的美国各州，其失业率并不高于未实施居家令的州。所有这些结果表明，COVID-19大流行是一种共同的经济和公共卫生冲击。它们也表明，政策溢出效应和行为反应很重要。在大流行中，经济与公共卫生之间的权衡在很大程度上取决于其他地方的情况。这凸显了协调经济和公共卫生应对措施的重要性。

papers.title: Office Visits Preventing Emergency Room Visits: Evidence From the Flint Water Switch
papers.authors: Shooshan Danagoulian, Daniel S. Grossman, David Slusky
papers.abstract: Emergency department visits are costly to providers and to patients. We use the Flint water crisis to test if an increase in office visits reduced avoidable emergency room visits. In September 2015, the city of Flint issued a lead advisory to its residents, alerting them of increased lead levels in their drinking water, resulting from the switch in water source from Lake Huron to the Flint River. Using Medicaid claims for 2013-2016, we find that this information shock increased the share of enrollees who had lead tests performed by 1.7 percentage points. Additionally, it increased office visits immediately following the information shock and led to a reduction of 4.9 preventable, non-emergent, and primary-care-treatable emergency room visits per 1000 eligible children (8.2%). This decrease is present in shifts from emergency room visits to office visits across several common conditions. Our analysis suggest that children were more likely to receive care from the same clinic following lead tests and that establishing care reduced the likelihood parents would take their children to emergency rooms for conditions treatable in an office setting. Our results are potentially applicable to any situation in which individuals are induced to seek more care in an office visit setting.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：H75, I12, I18, J13, Q53, Q58
papers.zh_title: 门诊就诊预防急诊就诊：来自弗林特水源切换的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 急诊就诊对医疗服务提供者和患者而言成本高昂。我们利用弗林特水危机来检验门诊就诊的增加是否减少了可避免的急诊就诊。2015年9月，弗林特市向其居民发布了铅警告，提醒他们饮用水中的铅含量升高，这是由于水源从休伦湖切换到弗林特河所致。利用2013-2016年的医疗补助索赔数据，我们发现这一信息冲击使接受铅检测的参保者比例增加了1.7个百分点。此外，信息冲击后门诊就诊立即增加，并导致每1000名符合条件的儿童中可预防、非紧急且初级保健可治疗的急诊就诊减少了4.9次（8.2%）。这种减少体现在几种常见疾病从急诊就诊向门诊就诊的转变中。我们的分析表明，儿童在铅检测后更有可能从同一诊所获得护理，而建立护理关系降低了家长因可在门诊治疗的疾病而带孩子去急诊的可能性。我们的结果可能适用于任何促使个人在门诊环境中寻求更多护理的情况。

papers.title: Income, Liquidity, and the Consumption Response to the 2020 Economic Stimulus Payments
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, R. A. Farrokhnia, Steffen Meyer, Michaela Pagel, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: The 2020 CARES Act directed large cash payments to households. We analyze house-holds’ spending responses using high-frequency transaction data from a Fintech non-profit, exploring heterogeneity by income levels, recent income declines, and liquidity as well as linked survey responses about economic expectations. Households respond rapidly to the re-ceipt of stimulus payments, with spending increasing by $0.25-$0.40 per dollar of stimulus during the first weeks. Households with lower incomes, greater income drops, and lower lev-els of liquidity display stronger responses highlighting the importance of targeting. Liquidity plays the most important role, with no significant spending response for households with large checking account balances. Households that expect employment losses and benefit cuts dis-play weaker responses to the stimulus. Relative to the effects of previous economic stimulus programs in 2001 and 2008, we see faster effects, smaller increases in durables spending, larger increases in spending on food, and substantial increases in payments like rents, mortgages, and credit cards reflecting a short-term debt overhang. We formally show that these differences can make direct payments less effective in stimulating aggregate consumption.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, EH, PE；JEL：D14, E21, G51
papers.zh_title: 收入、流动性与2020年经济刺激支付的消费反应
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年《CARES法案》向家庭发放了大额现金支付。我们利用一家金融科技非营利组织的高频交易数据分析家庭的支出反应，探讨了按收入水平、近期收入下降和流动性划分的异质性，以及关于经济预期的关联调查回应。家庭在收到刺激支付后迅速做出反应，最初几周内每美元刺激支出增加0.25-0.40美元。收入较低、收入下降幅度较大和流动性水平较低的家庭表现出更强的反应，凸显了精准施策的重要性。流动性起着最重要的作用，对于支票账户余额较高的家庭，没有显著的支出反应。预期失业和福利削减的家庭对刺激的反应较弱。与2001年和2008年之前经济刺激计划的效果相比，我们看到效果更快，耐用品支出增长较小，食品支出增长较大，以及租金、抵押贷款和信用卡等支付大幅增加，反映了短期债务积压。我们正式表明，这些差异可能使直接支付在刺激总消费方面效果较差。

papers.title: Employer Policies and the Immigrant-Native Earnings Gap
papers.authors: Benoit Dostie, Jiang Li, David Card, Daniel Parent
papers.abstract: We use longitudinal data from the income tax system to study the impacts of firms’ employment and wage-setting policies on the level and change in immigrant-native wage differences in Canada. We focus on immigrants who arrived in the early 2000s, distinguishing between those with and without a college degree from two broad groups of countries – the U.S., the U.K. and Northern Europe, and the rest of the world. Consistent with a growing literature based on the two-way fixed effects model of Abowd, Kramarz, and Margolis (1999), we find that firm-specific wage premiums explain a significant share of earnings inequality in Canada and contribute to the average earnings gap between immigrants and natives. In the decade after receiving permanent status, earnings of immigrants rise relative to those of natives. Compositional effects due to selective outmigration and changing participation play no role in this gain. About one-sixth is attributable to movements up the job ladder to employers that offer higher pay premiums for all groups, with particularly large gains for immigrants from the “rest of the world” countries.
papers.zh_title: 雇主政策与移民-本地人收入差距
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用所得税系统的纵向数据研究企业的就业和工资制定政策对加拿大移民与本地人工资差异水平和变化的影响。我们关注21世纪初抵达的移民，区分了来自两大国家群体（美国、英国和北欧，以及世界其他地区）的拥有和未拥有大学学位的移民。与基于Abowd、Kramarz和Margolis（1999）双向固定效应模型的日益增长的文献一致，我们发现企业特定的工资溢价解释了加拿大收入不平等的重要部分，并导致了移民与本地人之间的平均收入差距。在获得永久身份后的十年里，移民的收入相对于本地人有所上升。选择性向外迁移和参与率变化带来的构成效应在这一增长中没有作用。大约六分之一的增长归因于向提供更高工资溢价（对所有群体）的雇主晋升，其中来自“世界其他地区”国家的移民收益尤其大。

papers.title: Did the Paycheck Protection Program Hit the Target?
papers.authors: João Granja, Christos Makridis, Constantine Yannelis, Eric Zwick
papers.abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive assessment of financial intermediation and the economic effects of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), a large and novel small business support program that was part of the initial policy response to the COVID-19 pandemic in the US. We use loan-level microdata for all PPP loans and high-frequency administrative employment data to present three main findings. First, banks played an important role in mediating program targeting, which helps explain why some funds initially flowed to regions that were less adversely affected by the pandemic. Second, we exploit regional heterogeneity in lending relationships and individual firm-loan matched data to study the role of banks in explaining the employment effects of the PPP. We find the short- and medium-term employment effects of the program were small compared to the program’s size. Third, many firms used the loans to make non-payroll fixed payments and build up savings buffers, which can account for small employment effects and likely reflects precautionary motives in the face of heightened uncertainty. Limited targeting in terms of who was eligible likely also led to many inframarginal firms receiving funds and to a low correlation between regional PPP funding and shock severity. Our findings illustrate how business liquidity support programs affect firm behavior and local economic activity, and how policy trans-mission depends on the agents delegated to deploy it.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E6, E62, G2, G21, G28, G38, H25, H32, H81, I38
papers.zh_title: 薪资保护计划是否命中目标？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对薪资保护计划（PPP）的金融中介和经济效应进行了全面评估，该计划是美国应对COVID-19大流行初期政策中一项大规模且新颖的小企业支持计划。我们利用所有PPP贷款的贷款级微观数据和高频行政就业数据，提出了三个主要发现。首先，银行在调节计划目标方面发挥了重要作用，这有助于解释为何部分资金最初流向了受大流行影响较小的地区。其次，我们利用借贷关系的区域异质性和个体企业-贷款匹配数据，研究银行在解释PPP就业效应中的作用。我们发现，与计划规模相比，该计划的短期和中期就业效应较小。第三，许多企业利用贷款进行非工资的固定支付并建立储蓄缓冲，这可以解释较小的就业效应，并可能反映了面对高度不确定性时的预防性动机。在资格方面的有限针对性也可能导致许多边际内企业获得资金，并导致区域PPP资金与冲击严重性之间的低相关性。我们的发现说明了企业流动性支持计划如何影响企业行为和当地经济活动，以及政策传导如何取决于被授权部署它的代理人。

papers.title: A New Method for Estimating Teacher Value-Added
papers.authors: Michael Gilraine, Jiaying Gu, Robert McMillan
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a new methodology for estimating teacher value-added. Rather than imposing a normality assumption on unobserved teacher quality (as in the standard empirical Bayes approach), our nonparametric estimator permits the underlying distribution to be estimated directly and in a computationally feasible way. The resulting estimates fit the unobserved distribution very well regardless of the form it takes, as we show in Monte Carlo simulations. Implementing the nonparametric approach in practice using two separate large-scale administrative data sets, we find the estimated teacher value-added distributions depart from normality and differ from each other. To draw out the policy implications of our method, we first consider a widely-discussed policy to release teachers at the bottom of the value-added distribution, comparing predicted test score gains under our nonparametric approach with those using parametric empirical Bayes. Here the parametric method predicts similar policy gains in one data set while overestimating those in the other by a substantial margin. We also show the predicted gains from teacher retention policies can be underestimated significantly based on the parametric method. In general, the results highlight the benefit of our nonparametric empirical Bayes approach, given that the unobserved distribution of value-added is likely to be context-specific.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：C14, H75, I21, J24, J45
papers.zh_title: 一种估计教师增值的新方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种估计教师增值的新方法。我们的非参数估计量不假设未观测到的教师质量服从正态分布（如标准经验贝叶斯方法那样），而是允许直接以计算上可行的方式估计潜在分布。正如我们在蒙特卡洛模拟中所示，无论分布形式如何，由此产生的估计都能很好地拟合未观测到的分布。使用两个独立的大规模行政数据集实际应用非参数方法，我们发现估计的教师增值分布偏离正态分布，并且彼此不同。为了阐明我们方法的政策含义，我们首先考虑一项广泛讨论的政策——解雇增值分布底部的教师，比较了非参数方法与参数经验贝叶斯方法下预测的考试成绩增益。在这里，参数方法在一个数据集中预测了类似的政策增益，但在另一个数据集中则大幅高估了这些增益。我们还表明，基于参数方法，教师留任政策的预测增益可能被显著低估。总体而言，结果凸显了我们非参数经验贝叶斯方法的优势，因为未观测到的增值分布很可能是情境特定的。

papers.title: Expected Profits and The Scientific Novelty of Innovation
papers.authors: David Dranove, Craig Garthwaite, Manuel I. Hermosilla
papers.abstract: Innovation policy involves trading off monopoly output and pricing in the short run in exchange for incentives for firms to develop new products in the future. While existing research demonstrates that expected profits fuel R&D investments, little is known about the novelty of the projects funded by these investments. Relying on data that describe the scientific approaches used by a large sample of experimental drug projects, we expand on this literature by examining the scientific novelty of pharmaceutical R&D investments following the creation of the Medicare Part D program. We find little evidence that the positive demand shock implied by this program prompted firms to undertake scientifically novel R&D activity, as measured by whether the specific scientific approach had been used before. However, we find some evidence that firms invested in products involving novel combinations of scientific approaches. These estimates can inform economists and policymakers assessing the tradeoffs associated with marginal changes in commercial returns from newly developed pharmaceutical products.
papers.zh_title: 预期利润与创新的科学新颖性
papers.zh_abstract: 创新政策涉及在短期内权衡垄断产出和定价，以换取激励企业未来开发新产品的动力。虽然现有研究表明预期利润推动了研发投资，但对于这些投资资助的项目的新颖性知之甚少。利用描述大量实验性药物项目所使用科学方法的数据，我们通过考察医疗保险D部分计划创建后制药研发投资的科学新颖性，扩展了这一文献。我们发现，几乎没有证据表明该计划带来的正向需求冲击促使企业从事科学新颖的研发活动，这是根据特定科学方法是否曾被使用来衡量的。然而，我们确实发现一些证据表明，企业投资于涉及科学方法新颖组合的产品。这些估计可以为评估新开发药品商业回报边际变化相关权衡的经济学家和政策制定者提供信息。

papers.title: Measuring the Perceived Liquidity of the Corporate Bond Market
papers.authors: Sergey Chernenko, Adi Sunderam
papers.abstract: We propose a novel measure of bond market liquidity that does not depend on transaction data: the strength of the cross-sectional relationship between mutual fund cash holdings and fund flow volatility. Our measure captures how liquid funds perceive their portfolio holdings to be at a given point in time. The perceived liquidity of speculative grade and Rule 144A bonds is significantly lower than investment grade bonds in the cross section and deteriorated significantly following the 2008-9 financial crisis. Our measure can be applied in settings where either transaction data are not available or transactions are rare, including the markets for asset-backed securities, syndicated loans, and municipal bonds.
papers.zh_title: 衡量公司债券市场的感知流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种不依赖交易数据的债券市场流动性新衡量指标：共同基金现金持有量与基金流量波动性之间的横截面关系强度。我们的指标捕捉了基金在特定时间点对其投资组合持有量的感知流动性。在横截面上，投机级和144A规则债券的感知流动性显著低于投资级债券，并在2008-9年金融危机后显著恶化。我们的指标可应用于交易数据不可用或交易稀少的环境，包括资产支持证券、银团贷款和市政债券市场。

papers.title: When Do Shelter-in-Place Orders Fight COVID-19 Best? Policy Heterogeneity Across States and Adoption Time
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Shelter in place orders (SIPOs) require residents to remain home for all but essential activities such as purchasing food or medicine, caring for others, exercise, or traveling for employment deemed essential. Between March 19 and April 20, 2020, 40 states and the District of Columbia adopted SIPOs. This study explores the impact of SIPOs on health, with particular attention to heterogeneity in their impacts. First, using daily state-level social distancing data from SafeGraph and a difference-in-differences approach, we document that adoption of a SIPO was associated with a 5 to 10 percent increase in the rate at which state residents remained in their homes full-time. Then, using daily state-level coronavirus case data collected by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, we find that approximately three weeks following the adoption of a SIPO, cumulative COVID-19 cases fell by 44 percent. Event-study analyses confirm common COVID-19 case trends in the week prior to SIPO adoption and show that SIPO-induced case reductions grew larger over time. However, this average effect masks important heterogeneity across states — early adopters and high population density states appear to reap larger benefits from their SIPOs. Finally, we find that statewide SIPOs were associated with a reduction in coronavirus-related deaths, but estimated mortality effects were imprecisely estimated.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H75, I18
papers.zh_title: 居家令何时能最好地抗击COVID-19？各州政策异质性与采纳时间
papers.zh_abstract: 居家令要求居民除购买食品或药品、照顾他人、锻炼或从事被视为必要的就业等基本活动外，留在家中。2020年3月19日至4月20日期间，40个州和哥伦比亚特区采纳了居家令。本研究探讨了居家令对健康的影响，特别关注其影响的异质性。首先，利用SafeGraph的每日州级社交距离数据和双重差分方法，我们记录了采纳居家令与州居民全天候留在家中比例增加5%至10%相关。然后，利用疾病控制与预防中心收集的每日州级冠状病毒病例数据，我们发现采纳居家令约三周后，累计COVID-19病例下降了44%。事件研究分析证实了在采纳居家令前一周COVID-19病例趋势相似，并显示居家令导致的病例减少随时间推移而增大。然而，这一平均效应掩盖了各州之间的重要异质性——早期采纳者和人口密度高的州似乎从其居家令中获益更大。最后，我们发现全州范围的居家令与冠状病毒相关死亡减少相关，但估计的死亡率效应并不精确。

papers.title: Dropouts Need Not Apply? The Minimum Wage and Skill Upgrading
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Lisa B. Kahn, Jonathan Meer
papers.abstract: We explore whether minimum wage increases result in substitution from lower-skilled to slightly higher-skilled labor. Using 2011-2016 American Community Survey data (ACS), we show that workers employed in low-wage occupations are older and more likely to have a high school diploma following recent statutory minimum wage increases. To better understand the role of firms, we examine the Burning Glass vacancy data. We find increases in a high school diploma requirement following minimum wage hikes, consistent with our ACS evidence on stocks of employed workers. We see substantial adjustments to requirements both within and across firms.
papers.zh_title: 辍学者不予录用？最低工资与技能升级
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨最低工资上涨是否会导致从低技能劳动力向略高技能劳动力的替代。利用2011-2016年美国社区调查数据，我们发现在近期法定最低工资上调后，低工资职业的从业者年龄更大，且更可能拥有高中文凭。为了更好地理解企业的作用，我们分析了Burning Glass职位空缺数据。我们发现最低工资上调后，高中文凭要求有所提高，这与我们对在职员工存量的ACS证据一致。我们观察到企业内部和企业之间对任职要求进行了大幅调整。

papers.title: Do Differences in School Quality Generate Heterogeneity in the Causal Returns to Education?
papers.authors: Philip DeCicca, Harry Krashinsky
papers.abstract: Estimating the returns to education remains an active area of research amongst applied economists. Most studies that estimate the causal return to education exploit changes in schooling and/or labor laws to generate exogenous differences in education. An implicit assumption is that more time in school may translate into greater earnings potential. None of these studies, however, explicitly consider the quality of schooling to which impacted students are exposed. To extend this literature, we examine the interaction between school quality and policy-induced returns to schooling, using temporally-available school quality measures from Card and Krueger (1992). We find that additional compulsory schooling, via either schooling or labor laws, increases earnings only if educational inputs are of sufficiently high quality. In particular, we find a consistent role for teacher quality, as measured by relative teacher pay across states, in generating consistently positive returns to compulsory schooling.
papers.zh_title: 学校质量差异是否会导致教育因果回报的异质性？
papers.zh_abstract: 估算教育回报率仍是应用经济学家活跃的研究领域。大多数估算教育因果回报的研究利用学校法和/或劳动法的变化来产生教育的外生差异。一个隐含的假设是，更多的在校时间可能会转化为更高的收入潜力。然而，这些研究都没有明确考虑受影响学生所接受的学校教育质量。为了扩展这一文献，我们利用Card和Krueger（1992）中按时间可得的学校质量指标，考察了学校质量与政策诱导的教育回报之间的相互作用。我们发现，只有当教育投入质量足够高时，额外的义务教育（通过学校法或劳动法）才能提高收入。具体而言，我们发现教师质量（以各州相对教师薪酬衡量）在产生持续正向的义务教育回报方面具有一致的作用。

papers.title: Dissecting Mechanisms of Financial Crises: Intermediation and Sentiment
papers.authors: Arvind Krishnamurthy, Wenhao Li
papers.abstract: We develop a model of financial crises with both a financial amplification mechanism, via frictional intermediation, and a role for sentiment, via time-varying beliefs about an illiquidity state. The model accounts for the entire crisis cycle, matching data on the frothy pre-crisis behavior of asset markets and credit, the sharp transition to a crisis where asset values fall, disintermediation occurs and output falls, and the slow post-crisis recovery in output. Both the intermediation and belief mechanism are essential to match the crisis cycle. However, modeling the belief variation via either a Bayesian or diagnostic model can match the broad patterns.
papers.zh_title: 解析金融危机的机制：中介与情绪
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个金融危机模型，该模型既包含通过摩擦性中介实现的金融放大机制，也包含通过关于非流动性状态时变信念的情绪作用。该模型解释了整个危机周期，与资产市场和信贷在危机前的泡沫行为、资产价值下跌、去中介化和产出下降的危机急剧转变，以及危机后产出的缓慢复苏等数据相匹配。中介机制和信念机制对于匹配危机周期都至关重要。然而，通过贝叶斯模型或诊断模型对信念变化进行建模，都可以匹配总体模式。

papers.title: Personalized Pricing and the Value of Time: Evidence from Auctioned Cab Rides
papers.authors: Nicholas Buchholz, Laura Doval, Jakub Kastl, Filip Matějka, Tobias Salz

papers.title: Ambiguous Pollution Response to COVID-19 in China
papers.authors: Douglas Almond, Xinming Du, Shuang Zhang
papers.abstract: Reductions in ambient pollution have been taken as an indisputable "silver lining" to the COVID-19 Pandemic. Indeed, worldwide economic contraction induced by COVID-19 lockdowns should generate global air quality improvements ceteris paribus, including to China's notoriously-poor air quality. We analyze China's official pollution monitor data and account for the large, recurrent improvement in air quality following Lunar New Year (LNY), which essentially coincided with lock-downs in 2020. With the important exception of NO2, China's air quality improvements in 2020 are smaller than we should expect near the pandemic's epicenter: Hubei province. Compared with LNY improvements experienced in 2018 and 2019 in Hubei, we see smaller improvements in SO2 while ozone concentrations increased in both relative and absolute terms (roughly doubling). Similar patterns are found for the six provinces neighboring Hubei. We conclude that COVID-19 had ambiguous impacts on China's pollution, with evidence of relative deterioration in air quality near the Pandemic's epicenter.
papers.zh_title: 中国COVID-19污染响应的模糊性
