papers.zh_abstract: 环境污染物减少被视为COVID-19大流行一个无可争议的“一线希望”。确实，COVID-19封锁导致的世界经济收缩，在其他条件不变的情况下，应会带来全球空气质量改善，包括中国臭名昭著的恶劣空气质量。我们分析了中国的官方污染监测数据，并考虑了农历新年后空气质量的显著、周期性改善，而2020年的农历新年基本上与封锁同时发生。除了NO2这一重要例外，2020年中国空气质量的改善幅度小于我们在疫情中心——湖北省——附近的预期。与2018年和2019年湖北省农历新年期间的改善相比，我们看到SO2的改善幅度较小，而臭氧浓度在相对和绝对意义上均有所增加（大约翻倍）。在湖北省周边的六个省份也发现了类似模式。我们得出结论，COVID-19对中国污染的影响是模糊的，有证据表明疫情中心附近的空气质量相对恶化。

papers.title: Which Workers Bear the Burden of Social Distancing?
papers.authors: Simon Mongey, Laura Pilossoph, Alex Weinberg
papers.abstract: Using data from O∗NET, we construct two measures of an occupation’s potential exposure to social distancing measures: (i) the ability to conduct that job from home and (ii) the degree of physical proximity to others the job requires. After validating these measures with comparable measures from ATUS as well as realized work-from-home rates during the pandemic, we employ the measures to study the characteristics of workers in these types of jobs. Our results show that workers in low-work-from-home and high-physical-proximity jobs are more economically vulnerable across various measures constructed from the CPS and PSID: they are less educated, of lower income, have fewer liquid assets relative to income, and are more likely renters. Consistent with the idea that high physical proximity or low work-from-home occupations were more exposed to the Coronavirus shock, we show that the types of workers predicted to be employed in them experienced greater declines in employment during the pandemic. We conclude by comparing the aggregate employment losses in these occupations to their employment losses in the 2008 recession, and ﬁnd evidence that these occupations were disproportionately exposed to the pandemic shock, and not just comprised of more cyclically sensitive workers.
papers.zh_title: 哪些工人承担了社交距离的负担？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用O*NET的数据，我们构建了衡量职业在社交距离措施下潜在暴露程度的两项指标：（i）在家完成该工作的能力，以及（ii）该工作所需与他人身体接近的程度。在用美国时间使用调查的可比指标以及大流行期间实现的居家工作率验证这些指标后，我们利用这些指标来研究从事这些类型工作的工人的特征。我们的结果表明，根据当前人口调查和收入动态面板研究构建的各种指标，低居家工作率和高身体接近度工作的工人在经济上更脆弱：他们受教育程度较低、收入较低、流动资产相对于收入较少，并且更可能是租房者。与高身体接近度或低居家工作率的职业更容易受到冠状病毒冲击的观点一致，我们表明，预计从事这些职业的工人在大流行期间经历了更大的就业下降。最后，我们将这些职业的总就业损失与2008年衰退期间的就业损失进行比较，发现证据表明这些职业不成比例地暴露于大流行冲击，而不仅仅是包含更多周期性敏感的工人。

papers.title: Interest Rate Uncertainty as a Policy Tool
papers.authors: Fabio Ghironi, G. Kemal Ozhan
papers.abstract: We study an unconventional policy tool–interest rate uncertainty–that may be used to discourage inefficient capital inflows and to adjust the composition of external accounts between short-term securities and foreign direct investment (FDI). Identified interest rate volatility shocks in several emerging markets cause a decline in GDP growth, increase in inflation, an improvement in the current account, and a depreciation in real exchange rate. Using a calibrated open-economy New Keynesian model, we introduce an interest rate uncertainty policy rule that adjusts the volatility of emerging market economy interest rate shocks in response to drivers of capital flows. The uncertainty policy discourages short-term inflows through portfolio risk and consumption smoothing channels. A markup channel combined with exchange rate depreciation generates FDI inflows. The transmission of uncertainty via markups is influenced by the extent of exchange rate pass-through. The uncertainty policy may be welfare improving if designed against uncertainty shocks that drive capital flows. However, it may be welfare reducing against level shocks that drive capital inflows. We further investigate new channels under different scenarios, including various assumptions about currency of export invoicing, varying degrees of risk aversion, interaction with different types of Taylor rules, and effective-lower-bound in the rest of the world.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E32, F21, F32, F38, G15
papers.zh_title: 利率不确定性作为政策工具
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种非常规政策工具——利率不确定性——它可用于阻止低效的资本流入，并调整外部账户在短期证券和外国直接投资之间的构成。在几个新兴市场中，已识别的利率波动冲击导致GDP增长下降、通胀上升、经常账户改善以及实际汇率贬值。利用校准后的开放经济新凯恩斯模型，我们引入了一项利率不确定性政策规则，该规则根据资本流动驱动因素调整新兴市场经济体利率冲击的波动性。不确定性政策通过投资组合风险和消费平滑渠道阻止短期流入。加价渠道与汇率贬值相结合，产生了外国直接投资流入。通过加价传导不确定性的程度受到汇率传递程度的影响。如果针对驱动资本流动的不确定性冲击进行设计，不确定性政策可能改善福利。然而，针对驱动资本流入的水平冲击，它可能降低福利。我们进一步研究了不同情景下的新渠道，包括关于出口计价货币的各种假设、不同程度的风险厌恶、与不同类型泰勒规则的相互作用，以及世界其他地区的有效下限。

papers.title: Steering Incentives of Platforms: Evidence from the Telecommunications Industry
papers.authors: Brian McManus, Aviv Nevo, Zachary Nolan, Jonathan W. Williams
papers.abstract: We study the trade-offs faced by Internet Service Providers (ISPs) that serve as platforms through which consumers access both television and internet services. As online streaming video improves, these providers may respond by attempting to steer consumers away from streaming video toward their own TV services, or by attempting to capture surplus from this improved internet content. We augment the standard mixed bundling model to demonstrate the trade-offs the ISP faces when dealing with streaming video, and we show how these trade-offs change with the pricing options available to the ISP. Next, we use unique household-level panel data and the introduction of usage-based pricing (UBP) in a subset of markets to measure consumers' responses and to evaluate quantitatively the ISP's trade-offs. We find that the introduction of UBP led consumers to upgrade their internet service plans and lower overall internet usage. Our findings suggest that while steering consumers towards TV services is possible, it is likely costly for the ISP and therefore unlikely to be profitable. This is especially true if the ISP can offer rich pricing menus that allow it to capture some of the surplus generated by a better internet service. The results suggest that policies like UBP can increase ISPs' incentive to maintain open access to new internet content.
papers.zh_title: 平台的引导激励：来自电信行业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了互联网服务提供商所面临的权衡，这些提供商是消费者访问电视和互联网服务的平台。随着在线流媒体视频的改进，这些提供商可能会通过尝试引导消费者远离流媒体视频转向其自有电视服务，或通过尝试从改进的互联网内容中获取剩余价值来做出反应。我们扩展了标准的混合捆绑模型，以展示互联网服务提供商在处理流媒体视频时所面临的权衡，并展示了这些权衡如何随着互联网服务提供商可用的定价选项而变化。接下来，我们利用独特的家庭层面面板数据以及部分市场引入基于使用量的定价，来衡量消费者的反应并定量评估互联网服务提供商的权衡。我们发现，基于使用量的定价的引入导致消费者升级其互联网服务计划并降低整体互联网使用量。我们的研究结果表明，虽然引导消费者转向电视服务是可能的，但这对于互联网服务提供商来说可能成本高昂，因此不太可能盈利。特别是如果互联网服务提供商能够提供丰富的定价菜单，使其能够捕获由更好的互联网服务产生的部分剩余价值，情况更是如此。结果表明，像基于使用量的定价这样的政策可以增加互联网服务提供商维持对新互联网内容开放接入的激励。

papers.title: Global Behaviors and Perceptions at the Onset of the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Thiemo R. Fetzer, Marc Witte, Lukas Hensel, Jon Jachimowicz, Johannes Haushofer, Andriy Ivchenko, Stefano Caria, Elena Reutskaja, Christopher P. Roth, Stefano Fiorin, Margarita Gómez, Gordon Kraft-Todd, Friedrich M. Götz, Erez Yoeli
papers.abstract: We conducted a large-scale survey covering 58 countries and over 100,000 respondents between late March and early April 2020 to study beliefs and attitudes towards citizens’ and governments’ responses to the COVID-19 pandemic. Most respondents reacted strongly to the crisis: they report engaging in social distancing and hygiene behaviors, and believe that strong policy measures, such as shop closures and curfews, are necessary. They also believe that their government and their country’s citizens are not doing enough and underestimate the degree to which others in their country support strong behavioral and policy responses to the pandemic. The perception of a weak government and public response is associated with higher levels of worries and depression. Using both cross-country panel data and an event-study, we additionally show that strong government reactions correct misperceptions, and reduce worries and depression. Our findings highlight that policy-makers not only need to consider how their decisions affect the spread of COVID-19, but also how such choices influence the mental health of their population.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, PE, POL；JEL：I12, I31, I38
papers.zh_title: COVID-19大流行初期的全球行为与认知
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在2020年3月底至4月初进行了一项大规模调查，覆盖58个国家、超过10万名受访者，旨在研究公民与政府对COVID-19大流行反应的信念与态度。大多数受访者对危机反应强烈：他们报告采取了社交疏离和卫生行为，并认为关闭商店和宵禁等强力政策措施是必要的。他们还认为本国政府和公民做得不够，并低估了本国其他人对强力行为和政策应对大流行的支持程度。对政府与公众反应薄弱的认知与更高程度的担忧和抑郁相关。利用跨国面板数据和事件研究法，我们进一步表明，强有力的政府反应能够纠正错误认知，并减少担忧和抑郁。我们的发现强调，政策制定者不仅需要考虑其决策如何影响COVID-19的传播，还需考虑这些选择如何影响民众的心理健康。

papers.title: Electricity and Firm Productivity: A General-Equilibrium Approach
papers.authors: Stephie Fried, David Lagakos
papers.abstract: The lack of reliable electricity in the developing world is widely viewed by policymakers as a major constraint on firm productivity. Yet most empirical studies find modest short-run effects of power outages on firm performance. This paper builds a dynamic macroeconomic model to study the long-run general equilibrium effects of power outages on productivity. The model captures the key features of how firms acquire electricity in the developing world, in particular the rationing of grid electricity and the possibility of self-generated electricity at higher cost. Power outages lower productivity in the model by creating idle resources, by depressing the scale of incumbent firms and by reducing entry of new firms. Consistent with the empirical literature, the model predicts that the short-run partial-equilibrium effects of eliminating outages are small. However, the long-run general-equilibrium effects are many times larger, supporting the view that eliminating outages is an important development objective.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG；JEL：E13, E23, O11, O41, Q43
papers.zh_title: 电力与企业生产率：一般均衡方法
papers.zh_abstract: 发展中国家电力供应不可靠被政策制定者广泛视为企业生产率的主要制约因素。然而，大多数实证研究发现停电对企业绩效的短期影响较小。本文构建了一个动态宏观经济模型，研究停电对生产率的长期一般均衡效应。该模型捕捉了发展中国家企业获取电力的关键特征，特别是电网电力的配给以及以更高成本自行发电的可能性。模型中，停电通过造成资源闲置、抑制现有企业规模以及减少新企业进入来降低生产率。与实证文献一致，该模型预测消除停电的短期局部均衡效应较小。然而，长期一般均衡效应要大得多，这支持了消除停电是一项重要发展目标的观点。

papers.title: Economics of Research and Innovation in Agriculture
papers.authors: Petra Moser
papers.abstract: Feeding the world’s growing population is one of the most critical policy challenges for the 21st century. With tightening constraints on water, arable land, and other natural resources, agricultural innovation is quickly becoming the most promising path meet the nutrient needs for future generations. At the same time, the increasing variability in the world’s climate intensifies the need for developing new crops that can tolerate extreme weather. Despite the urgency of this task, there is an active discussion on the returns to public and private spending in agricultural R&D, and many of the world’s wealthier countries have scaled back their share of GDP devoted to agricultural R&D. Dwindling public support leaves universities, which, historically, have been a major source of agricultural innovation, increasingly dependent on funding from industry, with uncertain effects on agricultural research. All of these factors create an urgent need for systematic empirical evidence on the forces that drive research and innovation in agriculture. This book aims to provides such evidence through economic analyses of the sources of agricultural innovation, the challenges of measuring productivity, the role of universities and their interactions with industry, and emerging mechanisms to fund agricultural R&D.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, PR；JEL：N5, O3, O32, O33, Q16, Q18, Q24, Q25, Q54, Q55
papers.zh_title: 农业研究与创新的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 养活全球不断增长的人口是21世纪最关键的政策挑战之一。随着水资源、可耕地和其他自然资源的约束日益收紧，农业创新正迅速成为满足未来几代人营养需求的最有希望的途径。与此同时，全球气候日益多变，加剧了开发能够耐受极端天气的新作物的需求。尽管这项任务紧迫，但关于公共和私人农业研发支出回报的讨论十分活跃，许多较富裕国家已削减了农业研发支出占GDP的比重。公共支持的减少使大学——历史上一直是农业创新的主要来源——越来越依赖行业资助，这对农业研究产生了不确定的影响。所有这些因素都迫切需要系统性的实证证据，以揭示推动农业研究与创新的力量。本书旨在通过经济分析提供此类证据，涵盖农业创新的来源、衡量生产率的挑战、大学的作用及其与行业的互动，以及资助农业研发的新兴机制。

papers.title: Incentivizing Behavioral Change: The Role of Time Preferences
papers.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Rebecca Dizon-Ross, Ariel D. Zucker
papers.abstract: How should the design of incentives vary with agent time preferences? We develop two predictions. First, “bundling” the payment function over time – specifically by making the payment for future effort increase in current effort – is more effective if individuals are impatient over effort. Second, increasing the frequency of payment is more effective if individuals are impatient over payment. We test the efficacy of time-bundling and payment frequency, and their interactions with impatience, using a randomized evaluation of an incentive program for exercise among diabetics in India. Consistent with our theoretical predictions, bundling payments over time meaningfully increases effort among the impatient relative to the patient. In contrast, increasing payment frequency has limited efficacy, suggesting limited impatience over payments. On average, incentives increase daily steps by 1,266 (13 minutes of brisk walking) and improve health.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D9, I12, I15
papers.zh_title: 激励行为改变：时间偏好的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 激励设计应如何随代理人时间偏好而变化？我们提出两个预测。首先，如果个体对努力缺乏耐心，那么将支付函数在时间上“捆绑”——特别是使未来努力的支付随当前努力增加而增加——会更有效。其次，如果个体对支付缺乏耐心，那么增加支付频率会更有效。我们利用印度糖尿病患者运动激励计划的随机评估，检验了时间捆绑和支付频率及其与缺乏耐心的交互作用的有效性。与我们的理论预测一致，相对于有耐心的个体，时间捆绑支付显著增加了缺乏耐心个体的努力。相比之下，增加支付频率效果有限，表明对支付缺乏耐心的情况有限。平均而言，激励措施使每日步数增加了1266步（相当于13分钟快走），并改善了健康状况。

papers.title: Is the Supply of Charitable Donations Fixed? Evidence from Deadly Tornadoes
papers.authors: Tatyana Deryugina, Benjamin M. Marx
papers.abstract: Do new societal needs increase charitable giving or simply reallocate a fixed supply of donations? We study this question using IRS datasets and the natural experiment of deadly tornadoes. Among ZIP Codes located more than 20 miles away from a tornado's path, donations by households increase by over $1 million per tornado fatality. We find no negative effects on charities located in these ZIP Codes, with a bootstrapped confidence interval that rejects substitution rates above 16 percent. The results imply that giving to one cause need not come at the expense of another.
papers.zh_title: 慈善捐赠的供给是固定的吗？来自致命龙卷风的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 新的社会需求是增加了慈善捐赠，还是仅仅重新分配了固定的捐赠供给？我们利用国税局数据集和致命龙卷风的自然实验来研究这一问题。在距离龙卷风路径超过20英里的邮政编码区，每起龙卷风死亡事件使家庭捐赠增加超过100万美元。我们未发现对这些邮政编码区内的慈善机构有负面影响，自助法置信区间拒绝了超过16%的替代率。结果表明，对某一事业的捐赠未必以牺牲另一事业为代价。

papers.title: Trade Credit and the Transmission of Unconventional Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Manuel Adelino, Miguel A. Ferreira, Mariassunta Giannetti, Pedro Pires
papers.abstract: We show that trade credit in production networks is important for the transmission of unconventional monetary policy. We find that firms with bonds eligible for purchase under the European Central Bank’s Corporate Sector Purchase Program act as financial intermediaries and extend more trade credit to their customers. The increase in trade credit flows is more pronounced from core countries to periphery countries and towards financially constrained customers. Customers increase investment and employment in response to the additional financing, while suppliers with eligible bonds increase their customer base, potentially favoring upstream industry concentration. Our findings suggest that the trade credit channel of monetary policy produces heterogeneous effects on regions, industries, and firms.
papers.zh_title: 商业信用与非常规货币政策的传导
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，生产网络中的商业信用对非常规货币政策的传导至关重要。我们发现，其债券符合欧洲央行企业部门购买计划购买条件的公司充当金融中介，并向其客户提供更多商业信用。商业信用流量的增加在核心国家向边缘国家以及向财务受限的客户中更为显著。客户利用额外融资增加投资和就业，而拥有合格债券的供应商则扩大了客户基础，这可能有利于上游行业集中。我们的发现表明，货币政策的商业信用渠道对地区、行业和企业产生异质性影响。

papers.title: Generosity Across the Income and Wealth Distributions
papers.authors: Jonathan Meer, Benjamin A. Priday
papers.abstract: Despite widespread interest, there is little systematic evidence on the relationship between income, wealth, and charitable giving. We use the Panel Study of Income Dynamics to provide descriptive statistics on this relationship. We find that, irrespective of specifica­tion, donative behavior increases with greater resources.
papers.zh_title: 收入与财富分布中的慷慨程度
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管人们普遍关注，但关于收入、财富与慈善捐赠之间关系的系统性证据很少。我们利用收入动态面板研究提供了这一关系的描述性统计。我们发现，无论采用何种设定，捐赠行为都随资源增加而增加。

papers.title: Immigration, Innovation, and Growth
papers.authors: Konrad B. Burchardi, Thomas Chaney, Tarek Alexander Hassan, Lisa Tarquinio, Stephen J. Terry
papers.abstract: We show a causal impact of immigration on innovation and growth in US counties. To identify the causal impact of immigration, we use 130 years of detailed data on migrations from foreign countries to US counties to isolate quasi-random variation in the ancestry composition of US counties; interacting this plausibly exogenous variation in ancestry composition with the recent inflows of migrants from different origins, we predict the total number of migrants flowing into each US county in recent decades. We show immigration has a positive causal impact on innovation, measured as patenting of local firms, and on economic growth, measured as real income growth for native workers. We interpret those results through the lens of a quantitative model of endogenous growth and migrations. A structural estimation of this model targeting the well identified causal impact of migration on innovation suggests the large inflow of foreign migrants into the US since 1965 may have contributed to an additional 8% growth in innovation and 5% growth in wages.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IFM, POL, PR；JEL：J61, O31, O40
papers.zh_title: 移民、创新与增长
papers.zh_abstract: 我们展示了移民对美国各县创新与增长的因果影响。为识别移民的因果影响，我们利用130年来从外国到美国各县的详细迁移数据，以分离美国各县祖先构成的准随机变异；将这种看似外生的祖先构成变异与近期来自不同原籍地的移民流入交互作用，我们预测了最近几十年流入每个美国县的移民总数。我们发现，移民对创新（以当地企业的专利衡量）和经济增长（以本地工人的实际收入增长衡量）具有正向因果影响。我们通过一个内生增长与迁移的定量模型来解读这些结果。针对已识别的移民对创新的因果影响进行该模型的结构估计表明，自1965年以来大量外国移民流入美国可能贡献了额外的8%创新增长和5%工资增长。

papers.title: Optimal Bailouts and the Doom Loop with a Financial Network
papers.authors: Agostino Capponi, Felix C. Corell, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: Banks usually hold large amounts of domestic debt which makes them vulnerable to their own sovereign's default risk. At the same time, governments often resort to costly bailouts when their banking sector is in trouble. We investigate how the network structure and the distribution of ownership of sovereign debt within the banking sector jointly affect the optimal bailout policy under this “doom loop”. We argue that rescuing banks with high domestic sovereign exposure is optimal if these banks are sufficiently central, even though that requires larger bailout expenditures than rescuing otherwise identical low-exposure banks. Our model illustrates how the “doom loop” exacerbates the “too interconnected to fail” problem.
papers.zh_title: 最优救助与金融网络中的“厄运循环”
papers.zh_abstract: 银行通常持有大量国内债务，这使得它们容易受到本国主权违约风险的影响。同时，当银行业陷入困境时，政府往往采取代价高昂的救助措施。我们研究了网络结构以及银行业内主权债务所有权分布如何共同影响这种“厄运循环”下的最优救助政策。我们认为，如果持有高国内主权风险敞口的银行在金融网络中具有足够中心性，那么救助这些银行是最优的，尽管这需要比救助其他条件相同但低风险敞口的银行更大的救助支出。我们的模型说明了“厄运循环”如何加剧“过于互联而不能倒”的问题。

papers.title: Religion, Education, and the State
papers.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Masyhur Hilmy, Benjamin Marx
papers.abstract: This paper explores how state and religious providers of education compete during the nation building process. Using novel administrative data, we characterize the evolution of Indonesia’s Islamic education system and religious school choice after the introduction of mass public primary schooling in the 1970s. Funded through informal taxation, Islamic schools competed with the state by entering in the same markets. While primary enrollment shifted towards state schools, religious education increased overall as Islamic schools absorbed growing demand for secondary education. In the short run, electoral support for the secular regime weakened in markets with greater public school construction. Over the long run, Islamic schools established at this juncture are more differentiated in terms of religious curriculum, and cohorts exposed to mass public schooling as children are more invested in religion than in the national identity. Our findings offer a new perspective on the political economy of education reforms and the emergence of parallel systems of public goods provision.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H52, I25, N45, P16, Z12
papers.zh_title: 宗教、教育与国家
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了在国家建设过程中，国家与宗教教育提供者如何竞争。利用新颖的行政数据，我们描述了20世纪70年代大规模公立小学教育引入后，印度尼西亚伊斯兰教育体系和宗教学校选择的演变。通过非正式税收资助，伊斯兰学校通过进入相同市场与国家竞争。虽然小学入学率转向公立学校，但宗教教育总体增加，因为伊斯兰学校吸收了日益增长的中学教育需求。短期内，在公立学校建设更多的市场中，对世俗政权的选举支持减弱。长期来看，在这一时期建立的伊斯兰学校在宗教课程方面更加差异化，而童年时期接触大规模公立教育的群体在宗教方面的投入多于国家认同。我们的发现为教育改革的政治经济学以及公共物品提供平行体系的出现提供了新视角。

papers.title: Geographic Mobility in America: Evidence from Cell Phone Data
papers.authors: M. Keith Chen, Devin G. Pope
papers.abstract: Traveling beyond the immediate surroundings of one’s residence can lead to greater exposure to new ideas and information, jobs, and greater transmission of disease. In this paper, we document the geographic mobility of individuals in the U.S., and how this mobility varies across U.S. cities, regions, and income classes. Using geolocation data for ~1.7 million smartphone users over a 10-month period, we compute different measures of mobility, including the total distance traveled, the median daily distance traveled, the maximum distance traveled from one’s home, and the number of unique haunts visited. We find large differences across cities and income groups. For example, people in New York travel 38% fewer total kilometers and visit 14% fewer block-sized areas than people in Atlanta. And, individuals in the bottom income quartile travel 12% less overall and visit 13% fewer total locations than the top income quartile.
papers.zh_title: 美国的地理流动性：来自手机数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 出行超出个人住所的周边范围，可以带来更多接触新思想、信息和工作的机会，但也增加了疾病传播的风险。在本文中，我们记录了美国个人的地理流动性，以及这种流动性如何在美国城市、地区和收入阶层之间变化。利用约170万智能手机用户在10个月内的地理定位数据，我们计算了不同的流动性指标，包括总出行距离、每日中位出行距离、离家最远出行距离以及访问的独特地点数量。我们发现城市和收入群体之间存在巨大差异。例如，纽约人比亚特兰大人总出行距离少38%，访问的街区规模区域少14%。此外，收入最低四分位的人比收入最高四分位的人总出行距离少12%，访问的总地点数量少13%。

papers.title: Team Players: How Social Skills Improve Group Performance
papers.authors: Ben Weidmann, David J. Deming
papers.abstract: Most jobs require teamwork. Are some people good team players? In this paper we design and test a new method for identifying individual contributions to group performance. We randomly assign people to multiple teams and predict team performance based on previously assessed individual skills. Some people consistently cause their group to exceed its predicted performance. We call these individuals “team players”. Team players score significantly higher on a well-established measure of social intelligence, but do not differ across a variety of other dimensions, including IQ, personality, education and gender. Social skills – defined as a single latent factor that combines social intelligence scores with the team player effect – improve group performance about as much as IQ. We find suggestive evidence that team players increase effort among teammates.
papers.zh_title: 团队合作者：社交技能如何提升团队绩效
papers.zh_abstract: 大多数工作需要团队合作。有些人是否是优秀的团队合作者？在本文中，我们设计并测试了一种识别个人对团队绩效贡献的新方法。我们将人员随机分配到多个团队，并根据先前评估的个人技能预测团队绩效。有些人始终使其团队超越预测绩效。我们称这些人为“团队合作者”。团队合作者在成熟的社交智力测量中得分显著更高，但在包括智商、人格、教育和性别在内的其他多种维度上没有差异。社交技能——定义为结合社交智力得分与团队合作者效应的单一潜在因素——对团队绩效的提升程度与智商相当。我们发现有提示性证据表明，团队合作者能提高队友的努力程度。

papers.title: Does Economics Make You Sexist?
papers.authors: Valentina A. Paredes, M. Daniele Paserman, Francisco Pino
papers.abstract: Recent research has highlighted unequal treatment for women in academic economics along several different dimensions, including promotion, hiring, credit for co-authorship, and standards for publication in professional journals. Can the source of these differences lie in biases against women that are pervasive in the discipline, even among students in the earliest stages of their training? In this paper, we provide evidence on the importance of explicit and implicit biases against women among students in economics relative to other fields. We conducted a large scale survey among undergraduate students in Chilean universities, among both entering first-year students and students in years 2 and above. On a wide battery of measures, economics students are more biased than students in other fields. Economics students are somewhat more biased already upon entry, before exposure to any economics classes. The gap is more pronounced among students in years 2 and above, in particular for male students. We also find an increase in bias in a sample of students that we follow longitudinally. Differences in political ideology explain essentially all the gap at entry, but none of the increase in the gap with exposure. Exposure to female students and faculty attenuates some of the bias.
papers.zh_title: 经济学是否让人变得性别歧视？
papers.zh_abstract: 近期研究强调了学术经济学界在多个不同维度上对女性的不平等对待，包括晋升、招聘、合著署名以及专业期刊发表标准。这些差异的根源是否在于该学科中普遍存在的对女性的偏见，甚至存在于处于培训早期阶段的学生中？在本文中，我们提供了经济学学生相对于其他领域学生中显性和隐性性别偏见重要性的证据。我们在智利大学本科生中进行了一项大规模调查，对象包括刚入学的一年级学生以及二年级及以上的学生。在一系列广泛的测量指标上，经济学学生比其他领域的学生偏见更强。经济学学生在入学时，即在接触任何经济学课程之前，就已经表现出稍强的偏见。这种差距在二年级及以上的学生中更为明显，尤其是男性学生。我们还在一个纵向跟踪的学生样本中发现了偏见的增加。政治意识形态的差异基本上解释了入学时的全部差距，但无法解释随着课程接触而增加的差距。接触女学生和女教师会减弱部分偏见。

papers.title: Inequality and the Safety Net Throughout the Income Distribution, 1929-1940
papers.authors: James J. Feigenbaum, Price V. Fishback, Keoka Grayson
papers.abstract: We explored two measures of inequality that described the full income distribution in cities. One measure is an income gini based on family incomes in 1929 for 33 cities and in 1933 for up to 48 cities in 1933 were spread throughout the country. We also estimated gini coefficients that made use of contract rents for renters and implicit rents for home owners for up to 955 cities throughout the country. We were able to expand to all counties when looking at a top-end inequality measure, the number of taxpayers per family. All three measures varied substantially across the country. We show the correlations between the various measures and also estimate the relationship between the measures and various relief programs developed by governments at all levels during the period.
papers.zh_title: 1929-1940年收入分配中的不平等与安全网
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了两种描述城市完整收入分配的不平等指标。一种指标是基于1929年33个城市和1933年最多48个城市的家庭收入计算出的收入基尼系数，这些城市分布在全国各地。我们还利用最多955个城市中租房者的合同租金和房主的隐含租金估算了基尼系数。在考察一项顶端不平等指标（即每家庭纳税人数量）时，我们能够将范围扩大到所有县。所有三项指标在全国各地差异显著。我们展示了各指标之间的相关性，并估计了这些指标与这一时期各级政府制定的各种救济计划之间的关系。

papers.title: The Environmental Bias of Trade Policy
papers.authors: Joseph S. Shapiro
papers.abstract: This paper describes a new fact, then analyzes its causes and consequences: in most countries, import tariffs and non-tariff barriers are substantially lower on dirty than on clean industries, where an industry's “dirtiness” is defined as its carbon dioxide (CO2) emissions per dollar of output. This difference in trade policy creates a global implicit subsidy to CO2 emissions in internationally traded goods and so contributes to climate change. This global implicit subsidy to CO2 emissions totals several hundred billion dollars annually. The greater protection of downstream industries, which are relatively clean, substantially accounts for this pattern. The downstream pattern can be explained by theories where industries lobby for low tariffs on their inputs but final consumers are poorly organized. A quantitative general equilibrium model suggests that if countries applied similar trade policies to clean and dirty goods, global CO2 emissions would decrease and global real income would change little.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IFM, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：F13, F18, F6, H23, Q50, Q56
papers.zh_title: 贸易政策的环境偏见
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了一个新事实，然后分析了其原因和后果：在大多数国家，对肮脏行业的进口关税和非关税壁垒显著低于对清洁行业的，其中行业的“肮脏程度”以其每单位产出的二氧化碳排放量定义。贸易政策上的这种差异为国际贸易商品中的二氧化碳排放创造了全球性隐性补贴，从而加剧了气候变化。这种全球性二氧化碳排放隐性补贴总额每年达数千亿美元。对相对清洁的下游行业提供更大保护，在很大程度上解释了这种模式。下游模式可以用以下理论解释：行业游说要求对其投入品征收低关税，而最终消费者组织性较差。一个定量的一般均衡模型表明，如果各国对清洁和肮脏商品实施类似的贸易政策，全球二氧化碳排放量将减少，而全球实际收入变化不大。

papers.title: Paying It Backward and Forward: Expanding Access to Convalescent Plasma Therapy Through Market Design
papers.authors: Scott Duke Kominers, Parag A. Pathak, Tayfun Sönmez, M. Utku Ünver
papers.abstract: COVID-19 convalescent plasma (CCP) therapy is currently a leading treatment for COVID-19. At present, there is a shortage of CCP relative to demand. We develop and analyze a model of centralized CCP allocation that incorporates both donation and distribution. In order to increase CCP supply, we introduce a mechanism that utilizes two incentive schemes, respectively based on principles of “paying it backward” and “paying it forward.” Under the first scheme, CCP donors obtain treatment vouchers that can be transferred to patients of their choosing. Under the latter scheme, patients obtain priority for CCP therapy in exchange for a future pledge to donate CCP if possible. We show that in steady-state, both principles generally increase overall treatment rates for all patients—not just those who are voucher-prioritized or pledged to donate. Our results also hold under certain conditions if a fraction of CCP is reserved for patients who participate in clinical trials. Finally, we examine the implications of pooling blood types on the efficiency and equity of CCP distribution.
papers.zh_title: 向后支付与向前支付：通过市场设计扩大恢复期血浆疗法的可及性
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19恢复期血浆疗法是目前治疗COVID-19的主要方法之一。目前，恢复期血浆相对于需求存在短缺。我们开发并分析了一个集中化恢复期血浆分配的模型，该模型同时考虑了捐赠和分配。为了增加恢复期血浆的供应，我们引入了一种机制，该机制利用两种激励方案，分别基于“向后支付”和“向前支付”原则。在第一种方案下，恢复期血浆捐赠者获得治疗凭证，这些凭证可以转让给他们选择的患者。在后一种方案下，患者通过承诺未来在可能的情况下捐赠恢复期血浆，来获得恢复期血浆治疗的优先权。我们表明，在稳态下，这两种原则通常都会提高所有患者的总体治疗率——而不仅仅是那些拥有凭证优先权或承诺捐赠的患者。如果一部分恢复期血浆被预留给参与临床试验的患者，我们的结果在特定条件下仍然成立。最后，我们研究了混合血型对恢复期血浆分配效率和公平性的影响。

papers.title: The Use of Group-Level Approaches to Environmental and Natural Resource Policy
papers.authors: Matthew Kotchen, Kathleen Segerson
papers.abstract: Policies to address environmental and natural resource management are often implemented at the group level. The defining feature of such policies is that penalties or rewards are based on group rather than individual performance, or rights are allocated to a group rather than to individuals. This article discusses how group-level policies have been applied and studied across a variety of contexts in the literature on environmental and natural resource management. The aim is to identify common theoretical and empirical insights and lessons learned about the design and implementation of these instruments. A general finding is that group-level policies are most likely to be effective when rewards and/or penalties are designed to provide strong incentives for groups to meet targets in a cost-effective way. Moreover, to the extent that this requires coordination within the group, the effectiveness of policies will depend on whether the group has or can create its own institutions or mechanisms to facilitate and enforce that coordination.
papers.zh_title: 环境与自然资源政策中群体层面方法的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 解决环境和自然资源管理问题的政策通常是在群体层面实施的。这类政策的定义性特征是，惩罚或奖励基于群体而非个人表现，或者权利被分配给群体而非个人。本文讨论了群体层面政策如何在环境和自然资源管理文献中的各种背景下被应用和研究。目的是识别关于这些工具设计和实施的共同理论和实证见解及经验教训。一个总体发现是，当奖励和/或惩罚旨在为群体以成本有效的方式实现目标提供强有力的激励时，群体层面政策最有可能有效。此外，就这需要群体内部协调而言，政策的有效性将取决于该群体是否拥有或能够创建自己的机构或机制来促进和执行这种协调。

papers.title: The Cost of the Covid-19 Crisis: Lockdowns, Macroeconomic Expectations, and Consumer Spending
papers.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: We study how the differential timing of local lockdowns due to COVID-19 causally affects households’ spending and macroeconomic expectations at the local level using several waves of a customized survey with more than 10,000 respondents. About 50% of survey participants report income and wealth losses due to the corona virus, with the average losses being $5,293 and $33,482 respectively. Aggregate consumer spending dropped by 31 log percentage points with the largest drops in travel and clothing. We find that households living in counties that went into lockdown earlier expect the unemployment rate over the next twelve months to be 13 percentage points higher and continue to expect higher unemployment at horizons of three to five years. They also expect lower future inflation, report higher uncertainty, expect lower mortgage rates for up to 10 years, and have moved out of foreign stocks into liquid forms of savings. The imposition of lockdowns can account for much of the decline in employment in recent months as well as declines in consumer spending. While lockdowns have pronounced effects on local economic conditions and households’ expectations, they have little impact on approval ratings of Congress, the Fed, or the Treasury but lead to declines in the approval of the President.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, EFG, EH, LS, ME, PE, POL；JEL：C83, D84, E31, J26
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情危机的代价：封锁、宏观经济预期与消费者支出
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项包含超过10,000名受访者的多轮定制调查，研究了因新冠疫情导致的各地封锁时间差异如何因果性地影响地方层面的家庭支出和宏观经济预期。约50%的调查参与者报告因新冠病毒遭受了收入和财富损失，平均损失分别为5,293美元和33,482美元。总消费者支出下降了31个对数百分点，其中旅行和服装支出降幅最大。我们发现，居住在较早进入封锁状态的县的家庭，预计未来十二个月的失业率会高出13个百分点，并且在三到五年的更长时期内仍预期失业率更高。他们还预期未来通胀率更低，报告了更高的不确定性，预期未来长达十年的抵押贷款利率更低，并且已将资金从外国股票转向流动性储蓄形式。封锁的实施可以解释近几个月就业以及消费者支出的大部分下降。虽然封锁对地方经济状况和家庭预期有显著影响，但对国会、美联储或财政部的支持率影响甚微，但会导致总统支持率下降。

papers.title: Entry vs. Rents: Aggregation with Economies of Scale
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Emmanuel Farhi
papers.abstract: We characterize the response of aggregate output to micro shocks in disaggregated economies with entry, non-constant returns to scale, input-output linkages, and distortions. We decompose output changes into technical and allocative eﬃciency components, and show that the latter depends on changes in rents and quasi-rents across markets. We use this to characterize the social costs of distortions and show the importance of accounting for entry both qualitatively and quantitatively. As an example, we show that the eﬃciency losses caused by markups in the US rise from around 20% of GDP to around 40% once we account for the entry margin. Our base-line is sensitive not only to the presence of entry, but also to the specifics of how entry is modeled, in ways that our social-costs-of-distortions formulas clarify. Entry can substantively alter the economy’s response to shocks even if variable profits and fixed costs are small as a share of GDP.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, E1, E3, O0, O11, O21, O25, O3, O4, O41
papers.zh_title: 进入与租金：具有规模经济的加总
papers.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了在存在进入、非恒定规模报酬、投入产出关联和扭曲的分散化经济中，总产出对微观冲击的响应。我们将产出变化分解为技术效率和配置效率组成部分，并表明后者取决于跨市场的租金和准租金变化。我们利用这一点来刻画扭曲的社会成本，并表明在定性和定量上考虑进入因素的重要性。例如，我们表明，一旦我们考虑进入边际，美国由加价造成的效率损失从约占GDP的20%上升到约40%。我们的基准结果不仅对是否存在进入敏感，而且对进入建模的具体方式也敏感，我们的社会成本扭曲公式阐明了这一点。即使可变利润和固定成本占GDP的份额很小，进入也能实质性地改变经济对冲击的响应。

papers.title: The Darwinian Returns to Scale
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Emmanuel Farhi, Kunal Sangani
papers.abstract: How does an increase in market size, say due to globalization, affect welfare? We study this question using a model with monopolistic competition, heterogeneous markups, and fixed costs. We characterize changes in welfare and decompose changes in allocative efficiency into three different effects: (1) reallocations across firms with heterogeneous price elasticities due to intensifying competition, (2) reallocations due to the exit of marginally profitable firms, and (3) reallocations due to changes in firms’ markups. Whereas the second and third effects have ambiguous implications for welfare, the first effect, which we call the Darwinian effect, always increases welfare regardless of the shape of demand curves. We non-parametrically calibrate demand curves with data from Belgian manufacturing firms and quantify our results. We find that mild increasing returns at the micro level can catalyze large increasing returns at the macro level. Between 70–90% of increasing returns to scale come from improvements in how a larger market allocates resources. The lion’s share of these gains are due to the Darwinian effect, which increases the aggregate markup and concentrates sales and employment in high-markup firms. This has implications for policy: an entry subsidy, which harnesses Darwinian reallocations, can improve welfare even when there is more entry than in the first-best.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, E1, E23, O24, O4, O41
papers.zh_title: 达尔文式的规模回报
papers.zh_abstract: 市场规模的扩大（例如由全球化引起）如何影响福利？我们使用一个包含垄断竞争、异质性加成和固定成本的模型来研究这一问题。我们刻画了福利的变化，并将配置效率的变化分解为三种不同的效应：（1）由于竞争加剧，在具有不同价格弹性的企业之间进行的重新配置；（2）由于边际利润企业退出而导致的重新配置；（3）由于企业加成变化而导致的重新配置。第二和第三种效应对福利的影响是模糊的，而第一种效应（我们称之为达尔文效应）无论需求曲线的形状如何，总是能提高福利。我们利用比利时制造业企业的数据，以非参数方式校准了需求曲线，并量化了我们的结果。我们发现，微观层面温和的规模报酬递增可以催化宏观层面巨大的规模报酬递增。规模报酬递增的70%至90%来自于更大市场如何改善资源配置。这些收益的绝大部分归因于达尔文效应，该效应提高了总体加成，并将销售和就业集中在高加成企业。这对政策有启示：即使存在比最优状态更多的进入，利用达尔文式重新配置的进入补贴也能改善福利。

papers.title: Paid sick-leave and physical mobility: Evidence from the United States during a pandemic
papers.authors: Martin Andersen, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Michael F. Pesko, Kosali I. Simon
papers.abstract: We study the effects of a massive temporary U.S. paid sick leave (PSL) mandate that became effective April 1st, 2020 on self-quarantining, proxied by physical mobility behaviors gleaned from cellular devices. Such behaviors are critical for containment of infectious diseases. The national PSL policy was implemented in response to the COVID-19 global pandemic and mandated two weeks of fully compensated paid leave. We study the impact of this policy using difference-in-differences methods, leveraging pre-policy county-level differences in the share of ‘nonessential’ workers likely eligible for paid sick leave benefits. We find robust evidence that the policy increased the average number of hours at home and reduced the share of the individuals likely at work. Comparing the county with the lowest to highest policy exposure, we find that the average hours per day not at home, and at work decreased by 8.9% and 6.9% post-policy.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LE, LS；JEL：H0, I1, J0, K0
papers.zh_title: 带薪病假与身体流动性：来自美国大流行期间的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国一项大规模临时带薪病假（PSL）强制令（于2020年4月1日生效）对自我隔离的影响，以从蜂窝设备获取的身体流动性行为作为代理指标。这种行为对于传染病的控制至关重要。这项全国性的带薪病假政策是为了应对COVID-19全球大流行而实施的，规定了两周的全薪带薪休假。我们使用双重差分方法研究该政策的影响，利用政策实施前县级层面可能符合带薪病假福利资格的“非必要”工人比例的差异。我们发现强有力的证据表明，该政策增加了平均居家小时数，并减少了可能在工作中的个体比例。比较政策暴露程度最低和最高的县，我们发现政策实施后，平均每天不在家和工作的小时数分别下降了8.9%和6.9%。

papers.title: COVID-19 Is Also a Reallocation Shock
papers.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
papers.abstract: Drawing on firm-level expectations at a one-year forecast horizon in the Survey of Business Uncertainty (SBU), we construct novel, forward-looking reallocation measures for jobs and sales. These measures rise sharply after February 2020, reaching rates in April that are 2.4 (3.9) times the pre-COVID average for jobs (sales). We also draw on special questions in the April SBU to quantify the near-term impact of the COVID-19 shock on business staffing. We find 3 new hires for every 10 layoffs caused by the shock and estimate that 42 percent of recent layoffs will result in permanent job loss. Our survey evidence aligns well with anecdotal evidence of large pandemic-induced demand increases at some firms, with contemporaneous evidence on gross business formation, and with a sharp pandemic-induced rise in equity return dispersion across firms. After developing the evidence, we consider implications of our evidence for the economic outlook and for policy responses to the pandemic. Unemployment benefit levels that exceed worker earnings, policies that subsidize employee retention, occupational licensing restrictions, and regulatory barriers to business formation will impede reallocation responses to the COVID-19 shock.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D22, D84, E24, H12, H25, J21, J62, J63, J65
papers.zh_title: COVID-19也是一次重新配置冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 利用商业不确定性调查（SBU）中一年预测期内的企业层面预期，我们构建了关于就业和销售的新型前瞻性重新配置指标。这些指标在2020年2月后急剧上升，到4月份，就业和销售的重新配置率分别达到COVID-19前平均水平的2.4倍和3.9倍。我们还利用4月份SBU中的特殊问题来量化COVID-19冲击对商业人员配置的近期影响。我们发现，冲击导致的每10次裁员对应3次新招聘，并估计42%的近期裁员将导致永久性失业。我们的调查证据与关于大流行导致某些企业需求大幅增加的轶事证据、关于企业成立总量的同期证据以及大流行导致的企业间股票收益离散度急剧上升的证据高度吻合。在提出证据后，我们考虑了这些证据对经济前景和政策应对大流行的启示。超过工人收入的失业救济金水平、补贴员工留任的政策、职业许可限制以及企业成立的监管障碍，都将阻碍对COVID-19冲击的重新配置反应。

papers.title: What Keeps Stablecoins Stable?
papers.authors: Richard K. Lyons, Ganesh Viswanath-Natraj
papers.abstract: We take this question to be isomorphic to, "What Keeps Fixed Exchange Rates Fixed?" and address it with analysis familiar in exchange-rate economics. Stablecoins solve the volatility problem by pegging to a national currency, typically the US dollar, and are used as vehicles for exchanging national currencies into non-stable cryptocurrencies, with some stablecoins having a ratio of trading volume to outstanding supply exceeding one daily. Using a rich dataset of signed trades and order books on multiple exchanges, we examine how peg-sustaining arbitrage stabilizes the price of the largest stablecoin, Tether. We find that stablecoin issuance, the closest analogue to central-bank intervention, plays only a limited role in stabilization, pointing instead to stabilizing forces on the demand side. Following Tether's introduction to the Ethereum blockchain in 2019, we find increased investor access to arbitrage trades, and a decline in arbitrage spreads from 70 to 30 basis points. We also pin down which fundamentals drive the two-sided distribution of peg-price deviations: Premiums are due to stablecoins' role as a safe haven, exhibiting, for example, premiums greater than 100 basis points during the COVID-19 crisis of March 2020; discounts derive from liquidity effects and collateral concerns.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E02, E4, E5, F3, F4, G12, G14, G15, G2, O16, O33
papers.zh_title: 是什么让稳定币保持稳定？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为这个问题与“是什么让固定汇率保持固定？”是同构的，并用汇率经济学中熟悉的分析来回答它。稳定币通过锚定一种国家货币（通常是美元）来解决波动性问题，并被用作将国家货币兑换成非稳定加密货币的工具，一些稳定币的交易量与流通供应量之比每天超过1。利用多个交易所的已签署交易和订单簿的丰富数据集，我们研究了维持锚定的套利如何稳定最大稳定币Tether的价格。我们发现，稳定币发行（最接近央行干预的类比）在稳定中只起有限作用，反而指出了需求侧的稳定力量。在2019年Tether引入以太坊区块链后，我们发现投资者进行套利交易的机会增加，套利价差从70个基点下降到30个基点。我们还确定了哪些基本面因素驱动了锚定价格偏差的双侧分布：溢价源于稳定币作为避险资产的作用，例如在2020年3月的COVID-19危机期间溢价超过100个基点；折价则源于流动性效应和抵押品担忧。

papers.title: Expected Health Effects of Reduced Air Pollution from COVID-19 Social Distancing
papers.authors: Steve Cicala, Stephen P. Holland, Erin T. Mansur, Nicholas Z. Muller, Andrew J. Yates
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic resulted in stay-at-home policies and other social distancing behaviors in the United States in spring of 2020. This paper examines the impact that these actions had on emissions and expected health effects through reduced personal vehicle travel and electricity consumption. Using daily cell phone mobility data for each U.S. county, we find that vehicle travel dropped about 40% by mid-April across the nation. States that imposed stay-at-home policies before March 28 decreased travel slightly more than other states, but travel in all states decreased significantly. Using data on hourly electricity consumption by electricity region (e.g., balancing authority), we find that electricity consumption fell about six percent on average by mid-April with substantial heterogeneity. Given these decreases in travel and electricity use, we estimate the county-level expected improvements in air quality, and therefore expected declines in mortality. Overall, we estimate that, for a month of social distancing, the expected premature deaths due to air pollution from personal vehicle travel and electricity consumption declined by approximately 360 deaths, or about 25% of the baseline 1500 deaths. In addition, we estimate that CO2 emissions from these sources fell by 46 million metric tons (a reduction of approximately 19%) over the same time frame.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19社交距离措施减少空气污染的预期健康影响
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行导致美国在2020年春季实施了居家政策和其他社交距离行为。本文研究了这些行动通过减少个人车辆出行和电力消耗对排放和预期健康影响产生的影响。利用美国每个县的每日手机流动性数据，我们发现到4月中旬，全国范围内的车辆出行下降了约40%。在3月28日之前实施居家政策的州，其出行减少幅度略大于其他州，但所有州的出行都显著减少。利用电力区域（例如平衡机构）的每小时电力消耗数据，我们发现到4月中旬，平均电力消耗下降了约6%，且存在显著的异质性。鉴于出行和电力使用的这些减少，我们估算了县级预期的空气质量改善，从而预期死亡率下降。总体而言，我们估计，在一个月的社交距离期间，因个人车辆出行和电力消耗导致的空气污染预期过早死亡人数减少了约360人，约占基线1500人死亡人数的25%。此外，我们估计，在同一时期内，这些来源的二氧化碳排放量减少了4600万公吨（减少了约19%）。

papers.title: Social Interactions in Pandemics: Fear, Altruism, and Reciprocity
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Ester Faia, Nora Lamersdorf, Farzad Saidi
papers.abstract: Social interactions and social preferences play a central role in public health domains. In the face of a pandemic, individuals adjust their behavior, whereas in SIR models infection rates are typically exogenous. City-level data across countries suggest that mobility falls in response to fear, proxied by Google searches. Incorporating experimentally validated measures of social preferences at the regional level, we find that stringency measures matter less when individuals are more patient, altruistic, or exhibit less negative reciprocity. To account for these findings, we extend homogeneous and networked SIR models by endogenizing agents' social-activity intensity and incorporating social preferences. Our quantitative predictions markedly differ from those of the naïve SIR network model. We derive the planner's problem, and show that neglecting agents' endogenous response leads to misguided policy decisions of various non-pharmaceutical interventions. Any further mobility restrictions, beyond agents' restraint, result from aggregate externalities which are curtailed by social preferences.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IFM；JEL：D62, D64, D85, D91, I10
papers.zh_title: 大流行中的社会互动：恐惧、利他主义和互惠
papers.zh_abstract: 社会互动和社会偏好在公共卫生领域发挥着核心作用。面对大流行，个体会调整其行为，而在SIR模型中，感染率通常是外生的。跨国城市层面的数据表明，流动性会因恐惧（以谷歌搜索为代理指标）而下降。结合在区域层面经过实验验证的社会偏好指标，我们发现当个体更有耐心、更利他或表现出较少的消极互惠时，严格措施的重要性会降低。为了解释这些发现，我们通过内生化个体的社会活动强度并纳入社会偏好，扩展了同质和网络化的SIR模型。我们的定量预测与朴素SIR网络模型的预测显著不同。我们推导了规划者的问题，并表明忽视个体的内生反应会导致对各种非药物干预措施的政策决策产生误导。任何超出个体自我约束的进一步流动性限制，都是由社会偏好所抑制的总体外部性造成的。

papers.title: Trade and Welfare (Across Local Labor Markets)
papers.authors: Ryan Kim, Jonathan Vogel, Moises Yi
papers.abstract: What are the welfare implications of trade shocks? Theoretically, we provide a sufficient statistic that measures changes in welfare (to a first-order approximation) for the set of workers who start within a region, taking into account adjustment in frictional unemployment, labor force participation, the sectors to which workers apply for jobs, and the regions in which workers choose to live. Our theory is flexible; for instance, it allows for arbitrary heterogeneity in worker productivity and non-pecuniary returns (amenities) across unemployment, labor force non-participation, sectors, and regions. Empirically, we apply these insights to measure changes in welfare between 2000-2007 across workers who start in different commuting zones (CZs) in the U.S. in the year 2000. Finally, we identify the differential impact across CZs of a particular trade shock: granting China permanent normal trade relations.
papers.zh_title: 贸易与福利（跨地方劳动力市场）
papers.zh_abstract: 贸易冲击的福利含义是什么？在理论上，我们提供了一个充分统计量，用于衡量从一个地区开始的工人群体的福利变化（一阶近似），同时考虑了摩擦性失业、劳动力参与率、工人申请工作的部门以及工人选择居住的地区的调整。我们的理论是灵活的；例如，它允许在失业、劳动力非参与、部门和地区之间，工人生产率和非金钱回报（便利设施）存在任意异质性。在实证上，我们应用这些见解来衡量2000年至2007年间，从2000年美国不同通勤区（CZ）开始的工人之间的福利变化。最后，我们识别了一个特定贸易冲击（给予中国永久正常贸易关系地位）在不同通勤区之间的差异化影响。

papers.title: Determinants of Disparities in Covid-19 Job Losses
papers.authors: Laura Montenovo, Xuan Jiang, Felipe Lozano Rojas, Ian M. Schmutte, Kosali I. Simon, Bruce A. Weinberg, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: We make several contributions to understanding the socio-demographic divide in early labor market responses to the U.S. COVID-19 epidemic and its policies, benchmarked against two previous recessions. First, monthly Current Population Survey (CPS) data show greater declines in employment in April and May 2020 (relative to February) for Hispanics, younger workers, and those with high school degrees and some college. Between April and May, all the demographic subgroups considered regained some employment. Re-employment in May was broadly proportional to the employment drop that occurred through April, except for Blacks who experienced a smaller rebound. Further, we show that compared to the 2001 recession and the Great Recession, employment losses in the early COVID-19 recession were smaller for groups with very low or very high (vs. medium) education. Second, we show that job loss was larger in occupations that require more interpersonal contact and that cannot be performed remotely. Third, we find pre-COVID-19 sorting of workers into occupations and industries along demographic lines can explain a sizeable portion of the gender, race, and ethnic gaps in new unemployment. For example, while women did suffer more job losses than men, their disproportionate pre-epidemic sorting into remote work compatible occupations shielded women from what would have been even larger employment losses during the epidemic. However, there remain substantial gaps in employment losses across groups that cannot be explained by socio-economic differences. We find some larger gaps in labor market impacts when we consider the “employed but absent from work” measure present in the CPS, in addition to the more traditional employment and unemployment measures. We conclude with a discussion of policy lessons and future research needs implied by the disparities in early labor market losses from the COVID-19 crisis.
papers.zh_title: Covid-19失业差异的决定因素
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对理解美国COVID-19疫情及其政策在早期劳动力市场反应中的社会人口学差异做出了若干贡献，并以两次之前的衰退作为基准。首先，月度当前人口调查（CPS）数据显示，2020年4月和5月（相对于2月），西班牙裔、年轻工人以及拥有高中学历和部分大学学历的工人就业下降幅度更大。在4月至5月期间，所有考虑的人口亚组都恢复了一些就业。5月份的再就业与截至4月份的就业下降幅度大致成比例，但黑人除外，他们的反弹较小。此外，我们表明，与2001年衰退和大衰退相比，早期COVID-19衰退中，教育水平极低或极高（相对于中等）的群体的就业损失较小。其次，我们表明，在需要更多人际接触且无法远程完成的职业中，失业更大。第三，我们发现，COVID-19之前工人按人口特征在职业和行业中的分类，可以解释新失业中性别、种族和民族差距的相当大一部分。例如，虽然女性确实比男性遭受更多的失业，但她们在疫情前不成比例地分类到可远程工作的职业中，这保护了女性，使其免于在疫情期间遭受更大的就业损失。然而，不同群体之间仍然存在无法用社会经济差异解释的就业损失差距。当我们考虑CPS中存在的“有工作但缺勤”指标以及更传统的就业和失业指标时，我们发现劳动力市场影响的一些更大差距。最后，我们讨论了COVID-19危机早期劳动力市场损失差异所暗示的政策教训和未来研究需求。

papers.title: The First Weeks of the Coronavirus Crisis: Who Got Hit, When and Why? Evidence from Norway
papers.authors: Annette Alstadsæter, Bernt Bratsberg, Gaute Eielsen, Wojciech Kopczuk, Simen Markussen, Oddbjorn Raaum, Knut Røed
papers.abstract: Using real-time register data we document the magnitude, dynamics and socio-economic characteristics of the crisis-induced temporary and permanent layoffs in Norway. We find evidence that the effects of social distancing measures quickly spread to industries that were not directly affected by policy. Close to 90% of layoffs are temporary, although this classification may change as the crisis progresses. Still, there is suggestive evidence of immediate stress on a subset of firms that manifests itself in permanent rather than temporary layoffs. We find that the shock had a strong socio-economic gradient, hit a financially vulnerable population, and parents with younger children, and was driven by layoffs in smaller, less productive, and financially weaker firms. Consequently though, the rise in unemployment likely overstates the loss of output associated with the layoffs by about a third.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情危机的最初几周：谁受到了冲击、何时以及为何？来自挪威的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用实时登记数据，我们记录了挪威由危机引发的临时性和永久性裁员的范围、动态及社会经济特征。我们发现证据表明，社交距离措施的影响迅速蔓延至未受政策直接影响的行业。近90%的裁员是临时性的，尽管随着危机的发展，这一分类可能会发生变化。然而，有迹象表明，部分企业立即面临压力，表现为永久性而非临时性裁员。我们发现，此次冲击具有强烈的社会经济梯度，冲击了财务脆弱的群体以及有年幼子女的父母，并且是由规模较小、生产率较低且财务实力较弱的企业裁员所驱动。因此，失业率的上升可能高估了与裁员相关的产出损失约三分之一。

papers.title: Does Biology Drive Child Penalties? Evidence from Biological and Adoptive Families
papers.authors: Henrik Kleven, Camille Landais, Jakob Egholt Søgaard
papers.abstract: This paper investigates if the impact of children on the labor market outcomes of women relative to men — child penalties — can be explained by the biological links between mother and child. We estimate child penalties in biological and adoptive families using event studies around the arrival of children and almost forty years of adoption data from Denmark. Short-run child penalties are slightly larger for biological mothers than for adoptive mothers, but their long-run child penalties are virtually identical and precisely estimated. This suggests that biology is not a key driver of child-related gender gaps.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：J13, J16, J22
papers.zh_title: 生物学因素是否驱动了育儿惩罚？来自亲生家庭和收养家庭的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究子女对女性相对于男性劳动力市场结果的影响——即育儿惩罚——是否可以通过母亲与子女之间的生物学联系来解释。我们利用丹麦近四十年的收养数据，围绕子女出生进行事件研究，估计了亲生家庭和收养家庭中的育儿惩罚。短期育儿惩罚在亲生母亲中略大于收养母亲，但她们的长期育儿惩罚几乎相同且估计精确。这表明生物学因素并非与子女相关的性别差距的关键驱动因素。

papers.title: International Equity and Debt Flows: Composition, Crisis, and Controls
papers.authors: Chang Ma, Shang-Jin Wei
papers.abstract: Standard models of capital flows to emerging market economies focus on debt flows and a pecuniary externality. However, by offering better risk sharing, international equity flows can render such externality unimportant, yet many economies fail to attract equity investment in a large quantity. We propose a theory of endogenous composition of capital flows that highlights two asymmetries. In our model, poor institutional quality leads to an inefficiently low share of equity financing as well as an inefficiently high volume of total inflows. Somewhat surprisingly, a social planner would often impose taxes on both equity and debt inflows. Our story differs in important ways from an alternative narrative focusing on collateral constraint.
papers.zh_title: 国际股权与债务流动：构成、危机与管制
papers.zh_abstract: 关于新兴市场经济体资本流动的标准模型侧重于债务流动和货币外部性。然而，通过提供更好的风险分担，国际股权流动可能使这种外部性变得不重要，但许多经济体未能吸引大量股权投资。我们提出了一种资本流动内生构成的理论，强调了两种不对称性。在我们的模型中，制度质量低下导致股权融资份额过低且总流入量过高。有些出人意料的是，社会规划者通常会对股权和债务流入都征税。我们的故事与侧重于抵押品约束的另一种叙事在重要方面有所不同。

papers.title: Estimating and Simulating a SIRD Model of COVID-19 for Many Countries, States, and Cities
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Charles I. Jones
papers.abstract: We use data on deaths in New York City, Madrid, Stockholm, and other world cities as well as in various U.S. states and various countries and regions to estimate a standard epidemiological model of COVID-19. We allow for a time-varying contact rate in order to capture behavioral and policy-induced changes associated with social distancing. We simulate the model forward to consider possible futures for various countries, states, and cities, including the potential impact of herd immunity on re-opening. Our current baselinemortality rate (IFR) is assumed to be 1.0% but we recognize there is substantial uncertainty about this number. Our model fits the death data equally well with alternative mortality rates of 0.5% or 1.2%, so this parameter is unidentified in our data. However, its value matters enormously for the extent to which various places can relax social distancing without spurring a resurgence of deaths.
papers.zh_title: 估计和模拟多个国家、州和城市的COVID-19 SIRD模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用纽约市、马德里、斯德哥尔摩及其他世界城市以及美国各州和多个国家及地区的死亡数据，估计了一个标准的COVID-19流行病学模型。我们允许接触率随时间变化，以捕捉与社交距离相关的行为和政策诱导变化。我们向前模拟模型，以考虑各个国家、州和城市的可能未来，包括群体免疫对重新开放的潜在影响。我们当前的基线死亡率（IFR）假设为1.0%，但我们认识到这个数字存在很大的不确定性。我们的模型在替代死亡率0.5%或1.2%的情况下同样能很好地拟合死亡数据，因此该参数在我们的数据中无法识别。然而，其值对于各地在多大程度上可以放松社交距离而不引发死亡病例反弹至关重要。

papers.title: Is the Cure Worse than the Problem Itself? Immediate Labor Market Effects of COVID-19 Case Rates and School Closures in the U.S.
papers.authors: Felipe Lozano Rojas, Xuan Jiang, Laura Montenovo, Kosali I. Simon, Bruce A. Weinberg, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: The relationship between population health and measures of economic well-being and economic activity is a long standing topic in health economics (Preston, 1975; Cutler, Deaton, and Lleras-Muney, 2006; Ruhm, 2000). The conceptual issues in analyzing the complicated link between health and economic well-being are central to understanding the implications of the COVID-19 epidemic in the United States The public health shock of the epidemic has direct economic impacts, but the mitigation policies governments are using to control the spread of the virus may also damage economic activity. We estimate how state job market conditions respond to state COVID-19 infections and school closures, which are the earliest of the major mitigation policies. Mitigation policies and local epidemiological conditions explain some of the variation in unemployment patterns. However, the historically unprecedented increase in new UI claims during the weeks of March 15-21 and March 22-28 was largely across-the-board and occurred in all states. This suggests most of the economic disruption was driven by the health shock itself. Put differently, it appears that the labor market slowdown was due primarily to a nationwide response to evolving epidemiological conditions and that individual state policies and own epidemiologic situations have had a comparatively modest effect.
papers.zh_title: 治疗比问题本身更糟糕吗？美国COVID-19病例率和学校关闭的即时劳动力市场效应
papers.zh_abstract: 人口健康与经济福祉和经济活动衡量指标之间的关系是健康经济学中的一个长期主题（Preston, 1975; Cutler, Deaton, and Lleras-Muney, 2006; Ruhm, 2000）。分析健康与经济福祉之间复杂联系的概念性问题，对于理解美国COVID-19疫情的影响至关重要。疫情带来的公共卫生冲击具有直接的经济影响，但政府为控制病毒传播而采取的缓解政策也可能损害经济活动。我们估计各州就业市场状况如何响应各州的COVID-19感染和学校关闭——这是最早的主要缓解政策之一。缓解政策和地方流行病学状况解释了失业模式的部分变化。然而，在3月15日至21日和3月22日至28日这两周内，新增失业保险申请出现了历史性的普遍增长，且发生在所有州。这表明大部分经济混乱是由健康冲击本身驱动的。换句话说，劳动力市场放缓似乎主要是由于全国范围内对不断变化的流行病学状况的反应，而各州的具体政策和自身的流行病学状况影响相对较小。

papers.title: Does Information Disclosure Improve Consumer Knowledge? Evidence from a Randomized Experiment of Restaurant Menu Calorie Labels
papers.authors: John Cawley, Alex M. Susskind, Barton Willage
papers.abstract: The United States, in 2018, implemented a nationwide requirement that chain restaurants disclose calorie information on their menus and menu boards. This law was motivated by concern that consumers underestimate the number of calories in restaurant food, but it remains unclear the extent to which this information disclosure affects consumer knowledge. This paper fills that gap by estimating the impact of information disclosure on consumer knowledge through a randomized controlled field experiment of calorie labels on the menus of a full-service restaurant. The results indicate that information disclosure significantly reduces the extent to which consumers underestimate the number of calories in restaurant food; the labels improve the accuracy of consumers’ post-meal estimates of the number of calories they ordered by 4.0 percent and reduces by 28.9% the probability of underestimating the calories in one’s meal by 50% or more, both of which are statistically significant. However, even after information disclosure, there remains considerable error in consumer beliefs about the calorie content of the restaurant food they ordered. Even among the treatment group who received calorie labels, the average absolute value of percent error in their report is 34.2%.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EH, LE, PE；JEL：D8, D83, H0, I1, I12, I14, I18, I24, K2, Q18
papers.zh_title: 信息披露能改善消费者知识吗？来自餐厅菜单卡路里标签随机实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国于2018年实施了一项全国性要求，规定连锁餐厅在其菜单和菜单板上披露卡路里信息。这项法律是出于对消费者低估餐厅食品卡路里数量的担忧，但尚不清楚这种信息披露在多大程度上影响消费者的知识。本文通过在一家全方位服务餐厅的菜单上进行卡路里标签的随机对照现场实验，填补了这一空白，估计了信息披露对消费者知识的影响。结果表明，信息披露显著降低了消费者低估餐厅食品卡路里数量的程度；标签使消费者餐后对订购卡路里数量的估计准确度提高了4.0%，并将低估餐食卡路里50%或以上的概率降低了28.9%，两者均具有统计显著性。然而，即使在信息披露之后，消费者对其订购的餐厅食品卡路里含量的认知仍然存在相当大的误差。即使在收到卡路里标签的处理组中，其报告的平均绝对百分比误差为34.2%。

papers.title: The Effects of Need-Based Financial Aid on Employment and Earnings: Experimental Evidence from the Fund for Wisconsin Scholars
papers.authors: Deven E. Carlson, Alex Schmidt, Sarah Souders, Barbara L. Wolfe
papers.abstract: In this paper, we leverage the random assignment of a need-based financial aid grant offer—the Fund for Wisconsin Scholars (FFWS) grant—and several sets of administrative records to provide experimental evidence on the effects of the grant offer on students’ in-state employment and earnings. For students in four-year universities, our results demonstrate significant employment reductions in the two years immediately following the aid offer as well as in the sixth, seventh, and eighth after receiving the randomized grant offer. We also find the aid offer to reduce these students’ in-state earnings throughout the full eight-year period we study. However, we show that the aid offer increases student grade point average, suggesting that the employment and earnings reductions during students’ in-college years are attributable to a reallocation of time and effort away from employment and toward coursework. For students’ post-college years, we provide suggestive evidence that the reductions are attributable to a combination of two mechanisms: 1) Reduced loan debt offering greater financial flexibility when selecting among employment options, and 2) Offer-induced outstate migration. We find little evidence that the FFWS grant offer affects the labor market outcomes of students in two-year institutions, although the effects for students in technical colleges are significantly more positive than the effects for students in two-year colleges in the University of Wisconsin System.
papers.zh_title: 基于需求的财政援助对就业和收入的影响：来自威斯康星学者基金的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用基于需求的财政援助助学金——威斯康星学者基金（FFWS）助学金——的随机分配以及多套行政记录，提供了关于助学金提供对学生州内就业和收入影响的实验证据。对于四年制大学的学生，我们的结果显示，在获得助学金后的最初两年以及获得随机助学金后的第六、第七和第八年，就业显著减少。我们还发现，助学金提供在我们研究的整个八年期间减少了这些学生的州内收入。然而，我们表明助学金提供提高了学生的平均绩点，这表明学生在大学期间的就业和收入减少可归因于时间和精力从就业向课程学习的重新分配。对于学生毕业后的年份，我们提供了暗示性证据，表明这些减少归因于两种机制的结合：1）减少的贷款债务提供了在选择就业选项时更大的财务灵活性，以及2）助学金引发的州外迁移。我们几乎没有发现FFWS助学金提供影响两年制院校学生劳动力市场结果的证据，尽管对技术学院学生的影响显著比对威斯康星大学系统内两年制学院学生的影响更为积极。

papers.title: Covid-19, Shelter-In Place Strategies and Tipping
papers.authors: Zhihan Cui, Geoffrey Heal, Howard Kunreuther
papers.abstract: Social distancing via shelter-in-place strategies has emerged as the most effective way to combat Covid-19. In the United States, choices about such policies are made by individual states. Here we show that the policy choice made by one state influences the incentives that other states face to adopt similar policies: they can be viewed as strategic complements in a supermodular game. If they satisfy the condition of uniform strict increasing differences then following Heal and Kunreuther ([6]) we show that if enough states engage in social distancing, they will tip others to do the same and thus shift the Nash equilibrium with respect to the number of states engaging in social distancing.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19、居家策略与临界点
papers.zh_abstract: 通过居家策略进行社交距离已成为对抗COVID-19最有效的方式。在美国，此类政策的选择由各州自行决定。在此我们表明，一个州做出的政策选择会影响其他州采取类似政策的激励：它们可以被视为超模博弈中的战略互补品。如果它们满足严格递增差异的一致条件，那么按照Heal和Kunreuther（[6]）的研究，我们证明，如果有足够多的州采取社交距离措施，它们将促使其他州也这样做，从而改变关于采取社交距离措施州数量的纳什均衡。

papers.title: The Wealth of Generations, With Special Attention to the Millennials
papers.authors: William G. Gale, Hilary Gelfond, Jason J. Fichtner, Benjamin H. Harris
papers.abstract: We examine household wealth across birth cohorts and over time using data from the Survey of Consumer Finances. We show that although the Great Recession reduced wealth in every age group, longer-term trends indicate that the wealth of older age groups has increased while the wealth of younger age groups has declined. A substantial share of these changes, in both directions, can be explained by changes in household demographic and economic characteristics. As for the millennial generation, their median wealth in 2016 was lower than the wealth of any similarly aged cohort between 1989 and 2007. Millennials will have several advantages in wealth accumulation relative to previous generations, such as more education and longer working lives, but also several disadvantages, including weak prospects for economic growth and delays in home purchase and marriage. The millennial generation contains a significantly higher percentage of minorities than previous generations. We estimate that minority households have tended to accumulate less wealth than whites in the past, controlling for household characteristics, and the difference appears to be growing over time for Blacks relative to whites. These results apply to the period before the COVID-19 pandemic and are best interpreted as addressing generational wealth patterns through 2016 and providing a pre-COVID benchmark against which future studies can be compared.
papers.zh_title: 代际财富：聚焦千禧一代
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用消费者金融调查数据，考察了不同出生队列和随时间变化的家庭财富状况。研究表明，尽管大衰退减少了每个年龄组的财富，但长期趋势显示，老年组的财富有所增加，而年轻组的财富则有所下降。这些变化（无论是增加还是减少）中，有很大一部分可以通过家庭人口统计和经济特征的变化来解释。至于千禧一代，他们2016年的财富中位数低于1989年至2007年间任何同龄队列的财富水平。与前几代人相比，千禧一代在财富积累方面将拥有若干优势，例如更高的教育水平和更长的工作年限，但也面临若干劣势，包括经济增长前景疲软以及购房和结婚的延迟。千禧一代中少数族裔的比例显著高于前几代人。我们估计，过去少数族裔家庭的财富积累往往少于白人家庭，在控制家庭特征后，这种差异对于黑人相对于白人而言似乎随着时间的推移而扩大。这些结果适用于COVID-19大流行之前的时期，最好将其理解为探讨截至2016年的代际财富模式，并提供一个COVID前的基准，以便未来研究进行比较。

papers.title: The Macroeconomics of Automation: Data, Theory, and Policy Analysis
papers.authors: Nir Jaimovich, Itay Saporta-Eksten, Henry E. Siu, Yaniv Yedid-Levi
papers.abstract: During the last four decades, the U.S. has experienced a fall in the employment in middle-wage, "routine-task-intensive," occupations. We analyze the characteristics of those who used to be employed in such occupations and show that this type of individual is nowadays more likely to be out of the labor force or working in low-paying occupations. Based on these findings, we develop a quantitative, general equilibrium model, with heterogeneous agents, labor force participation, occupational choice, and investment in physical and automation capital. We first use the model to evaluate the distributional consequences of automation. We find heterogeneity in its impact across different occupations, leading to a significant polarization in welfare. We then use this framework as a laboratory to evaluate various public policies such as retraining, and explicitly redistributive policies that transfer resources from those who benefit from automation to those who bear the brunt of its costs. We assess the tradeoffs between the aggregate impact and welfare distributional consequences of such policies.
papers.zh_title: 自动化的宏观经济学：数据、理论与政策分析
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去四十年中，美国中等工资、“常规任务密集型”职业的就业率有所下降。我们分析了曾受雇于此类职业的个体的特征，并表明这类个体如今更有可能退出劳动力市场或从事低薪职业。基于这些发现，我们构建了一个包含异质性主体、劳动力参与、职业选择以及实物资本和自动化资本投资的定量一般均衡模型。我们首先利用该模型评估自动化的分配效应。我们发现其影响在不同职业之间存在异质性，导致福利显著极化。然后，我们将该框架用作实验室，评估各种公共政策，例如再培训政策，以及明确的再分配政策（即将资源从自动化受益者转移给承担其成本主要冲击的人群）。我们评估了这些政策在总体影响和福利分配后果之间的权衡。

papers.title: COVID-19 and the Welfare Effects of Reducing Contagion
papers.authors: Robert S. Pindyck
papers.abstract: I use a simple SIR model, augmented to include deaths, to elucidate how pandemic progression is affected by the control of contagion, and examine the key trade-offs that underlie policy design. I illustrate how the cost of reducing the "reproduction number" R0 depends on how it changes the infection rate, the total and incremental number of deaths, the duration of the pandemic, and the possibility and impact of a second wave. Reducing R0 reduces the number of deaths, but extends the duration (and hence economic cost) of the pandemic, and it increases the fraction of the population still susceptible at the end, raising the possibility of a second wave. The benefit of reducing R0 is largely lives saved, and the incremental number of lives saved rises as R0 is reduced. But using a VSL estimate to value those lives is problematic.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, EH, PE, PR；JEL：C02, H12, I10
papers.zh_title: COVID-19与降低传染的福利效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我使用一个简单的SIR模型（并扩展纳入死亡因素），阐明大流行的进程如何受到传染控制的影响，并审视政策设计背后的关键权衡。我阐述了降低“基本再生数”R0的成本如何取决于它如何改变感染率、总死亡人数和增量死亡人数、大流行的持续时间，以及第二波疫情的可能性和影响。降低R0会减少死亡人数，但会延长疫情持续时间（从而增加经济成本），并且会增加疫情结束时仍易感的人口比例，从而提高了第二波疫情的可能性。降低R0的收益主要是挽救生命，并且随着R0的降低，挽救的增量生命数量会增加。但使用统计生命价值（VSL）估算来评估这些生命价值是有问题的。

papers.title: The Value of Health Insurance during a Crisis: Effects of Medicaid Implementation on Pandemic Influenza Mortality
papers.authors: Karen Clay, Joshua A. Lewis, Edson R. Severnini, Xiao Wang
papers.abstract: This paper studies how better access to public health insurance affects infant mortality during pandemics. Our analysis combines cross-state variation in mandated eligibility for Medicaid with two influenza pandemics – the 1957-58 “Asian Flu” Pandemic and the 1968-69 “Hong Kong Flu” Pandemic – that arrived shortly before and after the program's introduction. Exploiting heterogeneity in the underlying severity of these two shocks across counties, we find no relationship between Medicaid eligibility and pandemic infant mortality during the 1957-58 outbreak. In contrast during the 1968-1969 pandemic, which occurred after Medicaid implementation, we find that better access to insurance in high-eligibility states substantially reduced infant mortality. The reductions in pandemic infant mortality are too large to be attributable solely to new Medicaid recipients, suggesting that the expansion in health insurance coverage mitigated disease transmission among the broader population.
papers.zh_title: 危机期间健康保险的价值：医疗补助实施对大流行流感死亡率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在大流行期间，改善公共健康保险的可及性如何影响婴儿死亡率。我们的分析结合了各州在医疗补助强制资格方面的差异，以及两次流感大流行——即在该计划引入前后不久发生的1957-58年“亚洲流感”大流行和1968-69年“香港流感”大流行。利用这两个冲击在各县潜在严重程度的异质性，我们发现，在1957-58年疫情爆发期间，医疗补助资格与大流行婴儿死亡率之间没有关系。相比之下，在1968-69年大流行期间（发生在医疗补助实施之后），我们发现，在资格较高的州，更好的保险可及性显著降低了婴儿死亡率。大流行婴儿死亡率的降低幅度太大，不能仅仅归因于新的医疗补助受助人，这表明健康保险覆盖范围的扩大减轻了疾病在更广泛人群中的传播。

papers.title: A Note on Long-Run Persistence of Public Health Outcomes in Pandemics
papers.authors: Peter Zhixian Lin, Christopher M. Meissner
papers.abstract: Covid-19 is the single largest threat to global public health since the Spanish Influenza pandemic of 1918-20. Was the world better prepared in 2020 than it was in 1918? After a century of public health and basic science research, pandemic response and mortality outcomes should be better than in 1918-20. We ask whether mortality from historical pandemics has any predictive content for mortality in the ongoing Covid-19 pandemic. We find a strong persistence in public health performance in the early days of the Covid-19 pandemic. Places that performed poorly in terms of mortality in 1918 were more likely to have higher mortality today. This is true across countries and across a sample of US cities. Experience with SARS is associated with lower mortality today. Distrust of expert advice, lack of cooperation at many levels, over-confidence, and health care supply shortages have likely promoted higher mortality today as in the past.
papers.zh_title: 关于大流行中公共卫生结果长期持续性的注记
papers.zh_abstract: Covid-19是自1918-20年西班牙流感大流行以来对全球公共卫生的最大单一威胁。2020年的世界是否比1918年准备得更充分？经过一个世纪的公共卫生和基础科学研究，大流行应对和死亡率结果应该比1918-20年更好。我们询问历史大流行的死亡率是否对正在进行的Covid-19大流行的死亡率具有任何预测能力。我们发现，在Covid-19大流行初期，公共卫生表现存在很强的持续性。那些在1918年死亡率表现不佳的地方，如今更有可能出现更高的死亡率。这一结论在跨国样本和美国城市样本中均成立。经历过SARS疫情的地方，如今的死亡率较低。对专家建议的不信任、多个层面的合作缺失、过度自信以及医疗保健供应短缺，很可能像过去一样导致了如今更高的死亡率。

papers.title: Transfers vs Credit Policy: Macroeconomic Policy Trade-offs during Covid-19
papers.authors: Saki Bigio, Mengbo Zhang, Eduardo Zilberman
papers.abstract: The Covid-19 crisis has lead to a reduction in the demand and supply of sectors that produce goods that need social interaction to be produced or consumed. We interpret the Covid-19 shock as a shock that reduces utility stemming from “social” goods in a two-sector economy with incomplete markets. We compare the advantages of lump-sum transfers versus a credit policy. For the same path of government debt, transfers are preferable when debt limits are tight, whereas credit policy is preferable when they are slack. A credit policy has the advantage of targeting fiscal resources toward agents that matter most for stabilizing demand. We illustrate this result with a calibrated model. We discuss various shortcomings and possible extensions to the model.
papers.zh_title: 转移支付与信贷政策：Covid-19期间的宏观经济政策权衡
papers.zh_abstract: Covid-19危机导致那些生产或消费需要社交互动的商品的部门的需求和供给减少。我们将Covid-19冲击解释为在一个具有不完全市场的两部门经济中，降低来自“社交”商品效用的冲击。我们比较了一次性转移支付与信贷政策的优势。在相同的政府债务路径下，当债务限额紧张时，转移支付更优；而当债务限额宽松时，信贷政策更优。信贷政策的优势在于能够将财政资源有针对性地分配给对稳定需求最为重要的主体。我们通过一个校准模型说明了这一结果。我们讨论了该模型的各种缺陷和可能的扩展方向。

papers.title: The Effect of Changes in Alcohol Tax Differentials on Alcohol Consumption
papers.authors: Markus Gehrsitz, Henry Saffer, Michael Grossman
papers.abstract: We show that tax-induced increases in alcohol prices can lead to substantial substitution and avoidance behavior that limits reductions in alcohol consumption. Causal estimates are derived from a natural experiment in Illinois where spirits and wine taxes were raised sharply and unexpectedly in 2009. Beer taxes were increased by only a trivial amount. We construct representative and consistent measures of alcohol prices and sales from scanner data collected for hundreds of products in several thousand stores across the US. Using several differences-in-differences models, we show that alcohol excise taxes are instantly over-shifted by a factor of up to 1.5. Consumers react by switching to less expensive products and increase purchases of low-tax alcoholic beverages, thus all but offsetting any moderate, tax-induced reductions in total ethanol consumption. Our study highlights the importance of tax-induced substitution, the implications of differential tax increases by beverage group and the impacts on public health of alternative types of tax hikes whose main aims are to increase revenue.
papers.zh_title: 酒精税差异变化对酒精消费的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，税收引起的酒精价格上涨可能导致大量的替代和规避行为，从而限制了酒精消费的减少。因果估计源自伊利诺伊州的一项自然实验，该州在2009年突然且大幅提高了烈酒和葡萄酒的税收。啤酒税仅增加了微不足道的数额。我们利用从美国数千家商店收集的数百种产品的扫描数据，构建了具有代表性且一致的酒精价格和销售量指标。通过使用多种双重差分模型，我们表明酒精消费税会立即被过度转嫁，转嫁系数高达1.5。消费者的反应是转向更便宜的产品，并增加对低税酒精饮料的购买，从而几乎完全抵消了税收引起的适度总乙醇消费减少。我们的研究强调了税收引致替代的重要性、按饮料类别实施差异化增税的影响，以及以增加收入为主要目标的其他类型增税对公共健康的影响。

papers.title: The Fiscal Theory of Price Level with a Bubble
papers.authors: Markus K. Brunnermeier, Sebastian A. Merkel, Yuliy Sannikov
papers.abstract: This paper incorporates a bubble term in the standard Fiscal Theory of the Price Level equation to explain why countries with persistently negative primary surpluses can have a positively valued currency and low inflation. It also provides two illustrative models with closed-form solutions in which the return on government bonds is below the economy’s growth rate. The government can “mine” the bubble by perpetually rolling over its debt. Despite the bubble, the price level remains determined provided government policy credibly promises primary surpluses off-equilibrium. Sufficient “fiscal space” ensures that the bubble term is attached to government bonds rather than other assets, like crypto assets. The analysis provides a new perspective on debt sustainability analysis.
papers.zh_title: 包含泡沫的价格水平财政理论
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将泡沫项纳入标准的价格水平财政理论方程中，以解释为何持续存在负基本盈余的国家可以拥有正值的货币价值和低通胀。本文还提供了两个具有闭式解的说明性模型，其中政府债券的回报率低于经济的增长率。政府可以通过永久性地滚动其债务来“开采”泡沫。尽管存在泡沫，但只要政府政策可信地承诺在非均衡状态下实现基本盈余，价格水平仍然是确定的。足够的“财政空间”确保泡沫项附着于政府债券而非其他资产（如加密资产）。该分析为债务可持续性分析提供了一个新的视角。

papers.title: Debt and Taxes in Eight U.S. Wars and Two Insurrections
papers.authors: George J. Hall, Thomas J. Sargent
papers.abstract: From decompositions of U.S. federal fiscal accounts from 1790 to 1988, we describe differences and patterns in how expenditure surges were financed during 8 wars between 1812 and 1975. We also study two insurrections. We use two benchmark theories of optimal taxation and borrowing to frame a narrative of how government decision makers reasoned and learned about how to manage a common set of forces that bedeviled them during all of the wars, forces that included interest rate risks, unknown durations of expenditure surges, government creditors' debt dilution fears, and temptations to use changes in units of account and inflation to restructure debts. Ex post real rates of return on government securities are a big part of our story.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG；JEL：E52, E62, H56, N41, N42
papers.zh_title: 美国八场战争与两次叛乱中的债务与税收
papers.zh_abstract: 通过对1790年至1988年美国联邦财政账户的分解，我们描述了1812年至1975年间八场战争中支出激增融资方式的差异与模式。我们还研究了两场叛乱。我们运用最优税收与借贷的两种基准理论，构建了一个叙事框架，阐述政府决策者如何推理并学习管理一系列在所有战争中都困扰他们的共同因素，这些因素包括利率风险、支出激增的未知持续时间、政府债权人对于债务稀释的担忧，以及利用记账单位变更和通货膨胀来重组债务的诱惑。政府证券的事后实际回报率是我们故事的重要组成部分。

papers.title: The Effect of the U.S.-China Trade War on U.S. Investment
papers.authors: Mary Amiti, Sang Hoon Kong, David Weinstein
papers.abstract: We develop a new method of quantifying the impact of policy announcements on investment rates that makes use of stock market data. By estimating the effect of U.S.-China tariff announcements on aggregate returns and the differential returns of firms exposed to China, we identify their effect on treated and untreated firms. We show theoretically and empirically that estimates of policy-induced stock-market declines imply lower returns to capital, which lowers investment rates. We estimate that the tariff actions through 2018 and 2019 will lower the investment growth rate of listed U.S. companies by 1.9 percentage points by the end of 2020.
papers.zh_title: 中美贸易战对美国投资的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新方法，利用股票市场数据量化政策公告对投资率的影响。通过估计中美关税公告对总体回报率以及受中国影响企业差异化回报率的影响，我们识别了这些公告对受处理企业和未受处理企业的作用。我们从理论和实证上表明，政策引发的股市下跌估计值意味着资本回报率下降，从而降低了投资率。我们估计，截至2018年和2019年的关税行动将使美国上市公司的投资增长率在2020年底前下降1.9个百分点。

papers.title: The Macroprudential Role of Stock Markets
papers.authors: Kyriakos T. Chousakos, Gary B. Gorton, Guillermo Ordoñez
papers.abstract: A financial crisis is an event of sudden information acquisition about the collateral backing short-term debt in credit markets. When investors see a financial crisis coming, however, they react by more intensively acquiring information about firms in stock markets, revealing those that are weaker, which as a consequence end up cut off from credit. This cleansing effect of stock markets’ information on credit markets’ composition discourage information acquisition about the collateral of the firms remaining in credit markets, slowing down credit growth and potentially preventing a crisis. Production of information in stock markets, then, acts as a macroprudential tool in the economy.
papers.zh_title: 股票市场的宏观审慎作用
papers.zh_abstract: 金融危机是信贷市场中关于短期债务抵押品的信息突然获取事件。然而，当投资者预见到金融危机来临时，他们的反应是在股票市场中更密集地获取企业信息，从而揭示出那些较弱的企业，这些企业最终因此被切断信贷来源。股票市场信息对信贷市场构成的这种“净化效应”，会抑制对仍留在信贷市场中的企业抵押品的信息获取，从而减缓信贷增长，并可能阻止危机的发生。因此，股票市场中的信息生产在经济中起到了宏观审慎工具的作用。

papers.title: Monetary and Fiscal Policies in Times of Large Debt: Unity is Strength
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Renato Faccini, Leonardo Melosi
papers.abstract: The COVID pandemic found policymakers facing constraints on their ability to react to an exceptionally large negative shock. The current low interest rate environment limits the tools the central bank can use to stabilize the economy, while the large public debt curtails the efficacy of fiscal interventions by inducing expectations of costly fiscal adjustments. Against this background, we study the implications of a coordinated fiscal and monetary strategy aiming at creating a controlled rise of inflation to wear away a targeted fraction of debt. Under this coordinated strategy, the fiscal authority introduces an emergency budget with no provisions on how it will be balanced, while the monetary authority tolerates a temporary increase in inflation to accommodate the emergency budget. In our model the coordinated strategy enhances the efficacy of the fiscal stimulus planned in response to the COVID pandemic and allows the Federal Reserve to correct a prolonged period of below-target inflation. The strategy results in only moderate levels of inflation by separating long-run fiscal sustainability from a short-run policy intervention.
papers.zh_title: 高债务时期的货币与财政政策：团结就是力量
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情使政策制定者面临应对异常巨大负面冲击的能力限制。当前的低利率环境限制了央行可用于稳定经济的工具，而庞大的公共债务则通过引发对昂贵财政调整的预期，削弱了财政干预的效果。在此背景下，我们研究了一种协调的财政与货币策略的含义，该策略旨在制造可控的通胀上升，以侵蚀目标比例的债务。在这种协调策略下，财政当局引入一项紧急预算，但不规定如何平衡该预算，而货币当局则容忍通胀暂时上升以适应紧急预算。在我们的模型中，这种协调策略增强了为应对新冠疫情而计划的财政刺激的有效性，并允许美联储纠正长期低于目标的通胀。通过将长期财政可持续性与短期政策干预分开，该策略仅导致温和的通胀水平。

papers.title: An Economic Approach to Regulating Algorithms
papers.authors: Ashesh Rambachan, Jon Kleinberg, Sendhil Mullainathan, Jens Ludwig
