papers.abstract: Venture capitalists suggest that incumbent internet platforms create a kill zone around themselves, where any competing entrant is acquired quickly. Consequently, financing new startups becomes unprofitable. We construct a simple model that rationalizes the existence of a kill zone. The price at which an acquisition is done depends on the number of customers the entrant platform can attract if it remains independent, which in turn depends on the number of apps that have adapted to the platform. The prospect of a quick acquisition by the incumbent platform, however, reduces the app designers’ benefits from adaptation, making it harder for a technological superior entrant to acquire customers. This reduces the stand-alone price of the new entrant, decreasing the price at which they will be acquired, and thus reducing the incentives of VCs to finance their entry. We discuss the policy implications of this model.
papers.zh_title: 杀伐地带
papers.zh_abstract: 风险投资家认为，现有互联网平台会在自身周围创造一个“杀伐地带”，任何竞争性进入者都会被迅速收购。因此，为新创企业融资变得无利可图。我们构建了一个简单的模型，使“杀伐地带”的存在合理化。收购价格取决于进入平台若保持独立所能吸引的客户数量，而这又取决于已适配该平台的应用数量。然而，被现有平台快速收购的前景降低了应用设计者从适配中获得的收益，使得技术更优的进入者更难获取客户。这降低了新进入者的独立估值，从而压低了其被收购的价格，进而削弱了风险投资为其进入提供资金的激励。我们讨论了该模型的政策含义。

papers.title: Innovation and Entrepreneurship in the Energy Sector
papers.authors: David Popp, Jacquelyn Pless, Ivan Haščič, Nick Johnstone
papers.abstract: Historically, innovation in the energy sector proceeded slowly and entrepreneurial start-up firms played a relatively minor role. We argue that this may be changing. Energy markets are going through a period of profound structural change. The rise of hydrofracturing lowered fossil fuel prices so much that natural gas is now the primary fuel for electricity generation in the US. Renewable energy technologies also experienced significant cost and performance improvements. However, integrating intermittent resources creates additional grid management challenges, requiring further innovation. This chapter documents the evolving roles of innovation and entrepreneurship in the energy sector. First, we provide an overview of the energy industry, highlighting that many new energy technologies are smaller, modular, and increasingly rely on innovation in other fast-moving high-tech sectors. We then conduct two descriptive data analyses that document a sharp decline in both clean energy patenting and start-up activity from about 2010 onwards. We discuss potential explanations and provide some evidence that while innovation in existing technologies may simply have been successful, continued innovation will be needed in enabling technologies that are more likely to depend on progress in other sectors.
papers.zh_title: 能源领域的创新与创业
papers.zh_abstract: 历史上，能源领域的创新进展缓慢，创业型初创企业扮演的角色相对次要。我们认为这种情况可能正在改变。能源市场正经历一场深刻的结构性变革。水力压裂技术的兴起大幅降低了化石燃料价格，以至于天然气现已成为美国发电的主要燃料。可再生能源技术也经历了显著的成本降低和性能提升。然而，整合间歇性资源带来了额外的电网管理挑战，需要进一步的创新。本章记录了能源领域创新与创业角色的演变。首先，我们概述了能源行业，强调许多新能源技术更小型化、模块化，并且日益依赖于其他快速发展的高科技领域的创新。随后，我们进行了两项描述性数据分析，记录了从2010年左右开始，清洁能源专利活动和初创企业活动均急剧下降。我们讨论了潜在的解释，并提供了一些证据表明，虽然现有技术的创新可能只是取得了成功，但在使能技术方面仍需持续创新，而这些技术更可能依赖于其他领域的进步。

papers.title: Measuring Real Consumption and CPI Bias under Lockdown Conditions
papers.authors: W. Erwin Diewert, Kevin J. Fox
papers.abstract: Millions of goods and services are now unavailable in many countries due to the current coronavirus pandemic, dramatically impacting on the construction of key economic statistics used for informing policy. This situation is unprecedented; hence methods to address it have not previously been developed. Current advice to national statistical offices from the IMF, Eurostat and the UN is shown to result in downward bias in the CPI and upward bias in real consumption. We conclude that the only way to produce a meaningful CPI within the lockdown period is through establishing a continuous consumer expenditure survey.
papers.zh_title: 封锁条件下衡量实际消费与CPI偏差
papers.zh_abstract: 由于当前的新冠疫情，许多国家数以百万计的商品和服务现已无法获得，这极大地影响了用于制定政策的关键经济统计数据的编制。这种情况是前所未有的，因此此前尚未开发出应对方法。本文表明，目前国际货币基金组织、欧盟统计局和联合国向各国统计机构提供的建议会导致消费者价格指数（CPI）出现向下偏差，而实际消费出现向上偏差。我们得出结论，在封锁期内编制有意义的CPI的唯一方法是建立持续的消费者支出调查。

papers.title: Panel Forecasts of Country-Level Covid-19 Infections
papers.authors: Laura Liu, Hyungsik Roger Moon, Frank Schorfheide
papers.abstract: We use dynamic panel data models to generate density forecasts for daily Covid-19 infections for a panel of countries/regions. At the core of our model is a specification that assumes that the growth rate of active infections can be represented by autoregressive fluctuations around a downward sloping deterministic trend function with a break. Our fully Bayesian approach allows us to flexibly estimate the cross-sectional distribution of heterogeneous coefficients and then implicitly use this distribution as prior to construct Bayes forecasts for the individual time series. According to our model, there is a lot of uncertainty about the evolution of infection rates, due to parameter uncertainty and the realization of future shocks. We find that over a one-week horizon the empirical coverage frequency of our interval forecasts is close to the nominal credible level. Weekly forecasts from our model are published at https://laurayuliu.com/covid19-panel-forecast/.
papers.zh_title: 国家层面新冠肺炎感染的面板预测
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用动态面板数据模型，为一组国家/地区的每日新冠肺炎感染人数生成密度预测。我们模型的核心是一个设定，假设活跃感染增长率可以表示为围绕一个带有断点的向下倾斜确定性趋势函数的自回归波动。我们的全贝叶斯方法使我们能够灵活地估计异质性系数的横截面分布，然后隐含地使用该分布作为先验，为各个时间序列构建贝叶斯预测。根据我们的模型，由于参数不确定性和未来冲击的实现，感染率的演变存在很大的不确定性。我们发现，在一周的预测期内，我们区间预测的经验覆盖频率接近名义可信水平。我们模型的每周预测发布在 https://laurayuliu.com/covid19-panel-forecast/。

papers.title: A Unifying Approach to Measuring Climate Change Impacts and Adaptation
papers.authors: Antonio Bento, Noah S. Miller, Mehreen Mookerjee, Edson R. Severnini
papers.abstract: We develop a unifying approach to estimating climate impacts and adaptation, and apply it to study the impact of climate change on local air pollution. Economic agents are usually constrained when responding to daily weather shocks, but may adjust to long-run climatic changes. By simultaneously exploiting variation in weather and climate, we identify both the short- and long-run impacts on economic outcomes, and measure adaptation directly as the difference between those responses. As a result, we identify adaptation without making extrapolations of weather responses over time or space, and overcome omitted variable bias concerns in prior approaches.
papers.zh_title: 衡量气候变化影响与适应的统一方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种统一的方法来估计气候影响和适应，并将其应用于研究气候变化对当地空气污染的影响。经济主体通常在应对日常天气冲击时受到约束，但可能会适应长期的气候变化。通过同时利用天气和气候的变化，我们识别了其对经济结果的短期和长期影响，并直接衡量适应，即这些响应之间的差异。因此，我们无需对天气响应进行时间或空间上的外推即可识别适应，并克服了先前方法中遗漏变量偏差的问题。

papers.title: The Impacts of COVID-19 on Minority Unemployment: First Evidence from April 2020 CPS Microdata
papers.authors: Robert W. Fairlie, Kenneth Couch, Huanan Xu
papers.abstract: COVID-19 abruptly impacted the labor market with the unemployment rate jumping to 14.7 percent less than two months after state governments began adopting social distancing measures. Unemployment of this magnitude has not been seen since the Great Depression. This paper provides the first study of how the pandemic impacted minority unemployment using CPS microdata through April 2020. African-Americans experienced an increase in unemployment to 16.6 percent, less than anticipated based on previous recessions. In contrast, Latinx, with an unemployment rate of 18.2 percent, were disproportionately hard hit by COVID-19. Adjusting for concerns of the BLS regarding misclassification of unemployment, we create an upper-bound measure of the national unemployment rate of 26.5 percent, which is higher than the peak observed in the Great Depression. The April 2020 upper-bound unemployment rates are an alarming 31.8 percent for blacks and 31.4 percent for Latinx. Difference-in-difference estimates suggest that blacks were, at most, only slightly disproportionately impacted by COVID-19. Non-linear decomposition estimates indicate that a slightly favorable industry distribution partly protected them from being hit harder by COVID-19. The most impacted group are Latinx. Difference-in-difference estimates unequivocally indicate that Latinx were disproportionately impacted by COVID-19. An unfavorable occupational distribution and lower skills contributed to why Latinx experienced much higher unemployment rates than whites. These findings of early impacts of COVID-19 on unemployment raise important concerns about long-term economic effects for minorities.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19对少数族裔失业的影响：来自2020年4月当前人口调查微观数据的初步证据
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19突然冲击了劳动力市场，在州政府开始采取社交距离措施后不到两个月，失业率飙升至14.7%。自大萧条以来，从未见过如此规模的失业。本文利用截至2020年4月的当前人口调查（CPS）微观数据，首次研究了疫情如何影响少数族裔失业。非裔美国人的失业率上升至16.6%，低于基于以往经济衰退的预期。相比之下，拉丁裔的失业率为18.2%，受到COVID-19的严重打击。考虑到美国劳工统计局（BLS）对失业错误分类的担忧，我们创建了全国失业率的上限衡量指标为26.5%，高于大萧条期间观察到的峰值。2020年4月，非裔美国人的上限失业率高达31.8%，拉丁裔为31.4%。双重差分估计表明，非裔美国人最多只受到COVID-19的轻微不成比例影响。非线性分解估计表明，略微有利的行业分布部分保护了他们免受COVID-19更严重的打击。受影响最大的群体是拉丁裔。双重差分估计明确表明，拉丁裔受到COVID-19的不成比例影响。不利的职业分布和较低的技能是导致拉丁裔失业率远高于白人的原因。这些关于COVID-19对失业早期影响的发现，引发了对少数族裔长期经济影响的重要担忧。

papers.title: Fatalism, Beliefs, and Behaviors During the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Jesper Akesson, Sam Ashworth-Hayes, Robert Hahn, Robert D. Metcalfe, Itzhak Rasooly
papers.abstract: Little is known about how people’s beliefs concerning the Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) influence their behavior. To shed light on this, we conduct an online experiment (n = 3,610) with US and UK residents. Participants are randomly allocated to a control group or to one of two treatment groups. The treatment groups are shown upperor lower-bound expert estimates of the infectiousness of the virus. We present three main empirical findings. First, individuals dramatically overestimate the dangerousness and infectiousness of COVID-19 relative to expert opinion. Second, providing people with expert information partially corrects their beliefs about the virus. Third, the more infectious people believe that COVID-19 is, the less willing they are to take protective measures, a finding we dub the “fatalism effect”. We develop a formal model that can explain the fatalism effect and discuss its implications for optimal policy during the pandemic.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间的宿命论、信念与行为
papers.zh_abstract: 关于人们对2019冠状病毒病（COVID-19）的信念如何影响其行为，目前知之甚少。为了阐明这一点，我们对美国和英国居民进行了一项在线实验（n = 3,610）。参与者被随机分配到对照组或两个处理组之一。处理组被展示专家对病毒传染性的上限或下限估计。我们提出三个主要的实证发现。首先，相对于专家意见，个体严重高估了COVID-19的危险性和传染性。其次，向人们提供专家信息可以部分纠正他们对病毒的信念。第三，人们认为COVID-19的传染性越强，他们就越不愿意采取保护措施，我们将这一发现称为“宿命论效应”。我们开发了一个形式化模型来解释宿命论效应，并讨论了其对疫情期间最优政策的启示。

papers.title: Reopening Scenarios
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Emmanuel Farhi, Michael J. Mina, James H. Stock
papers.abstract: We use a five-age epidemiological model, combined with 66-sector economic accounting, to address a variety of questions concerning the economic reopening. We calibrate/estimate the model using contact survey data and data on weekly historical individual actions and non-pharmaceutical interventions in the weeks ending March 8 – May 16, 2020. Going forward, we model a decision-maker (governor) as following reopening guidelines like those proposed by the White House and the CDC. The sectoral accounting, combined with information on personal proximity and ability to work from home by sector, make it possible to construct a GDP-to-Risk index of which sectors provide the greatest increment in GDP per marginal increase in R0. Through simulations, we find that: a strong economic reopening is possible; a “smart” reopening, preferencing some sectors over others, makes only modest improvements over a broad reopening; and all this hinges on retaining strong restrictions on non-work social contacts. If non-work contacts – going to bars, shopping without social distancing and masks, large group gatherings, etc. – return only half-way to the pre-COVID-19 baseline, the current decline in deaths reverses leading to a second wave of business closures.
papers.zh_title: 重启情景
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个五年龄组流行病学模型，结合66个部门的经济核算，来解决关于经济重启的各种问题。我们利用接触调查数据以及截至2020年3月8日至5月16日这几周的每周历史个人行为和非药物干预数据，对模型进行校准/估计。展望未来，我们将决策者（州长）建模为遵循白宫和疾病控制与预防中心（CDC）提出的重启指南。部门核算，结合各部门的个人接触程度和居家办公能力信息，使得构建一个GDP-风险指数成为可能，该指数衡量哪些部门在每单位R0边际增加中贡献了最大的GDP增量。通过模拟，我们发现：强劲的经济重启是可能的；“智能”重启，即优先考虑某些部门而非其他部门，相对于广泛重启仅带来适度改善；而这一切都取决于对非工作社交接触保持严格限制。如果非工作接触——去酒吧、不保持社交距离和不戴口罩购物、大型团体聚会等——仅恢复到COVID-19前基线水平的一半，当前死亡人数的下降趋势就会逆转，导致第二波企业关闭。

papers.title: The Adverse Effect of the COVID-19 Labor Market Shock on Immigrant Employment
papers.authors: George J. Borjas, Hugh Cassidy
papers.abstract: Employment rates in the United States fell dramatically between February 2020 and April 2020 as the repercussions of the COVID-19 pandemic reverberated through the labor market. This paper uses data from the CPS Basic Monthly Files to document that the employment decline was particularly severe for immigrants. Historically, immigrant men were more likely to be employed than native men. The COVID-related labor market disruptions eliminated the immigrant employment advantage. By April 2020, immigrant men had lower employment rates than native men. Part of the relative increase in the immigrant rate of job loss arises because immigrants were less likely to work in jobs that could be performed remotely and suffered disparate employment consequences as the lockdown permitted workers with more “remotable” skills to continue their work from home. Undocumented men were particularly hard hit by the pandemic, with their rate of job loss far exceeding the rate of job loss of legal immigrants.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19劳动力市场冲击对移民就业的不利影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年2月至4月期间，随着COVID-19疫情的影响波及劳动力市场，美国的就业率大幅下降。本文利用当前人口调查月度基础文件的数据，记录了移民就业下降尤为严重的情况。历史上，移民男性的就业率高于本土男性。与疫情相关的劳动力市场中断消除了移民的就业优势。到2020年4月，移民男性的就业率低于本土男性。移民失业率相对上升的部分原因在于，移民从事可远程完成工作的可能性较低，并且随着封锁措施允许拥有更多“可远程”技能的员工继续在家工作，他们遭受了不同的就业后果。无证移民男性受疫情冲击尤为严重，其失业率远超合法移民的失业率。

papers.title: Sufficient Statistics Revisited
papers.authors: Henrik Kleven
papers.abstract: This paper reviews and generalizes the sufficient statistics approach to policy evaluation. The idea of the approach is that the welfare effect of policy changes can be expressed in terms estimable reduced-form elasticities, allowing for policy evaluation without estimating the structural primitives of fully specified models. The approach relies on three assumptions: that policy changes are small, that government policy is the only source of market imperfection, and that a set of high-level restrictions on the environment and on preferences can be used to reduce the number of elasticities to be estimated. We generalize the approach in all three dimensions. It is possible to develop transparent sufficient statistics formulas under very general conditions, but the estimation requirements increase greatly. Starting from such general formulas elucidates that feasible empirical implementations are in fact structural approaches.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：D01, D04, D1, D6, H0, H2, H3, J08, J2, J38
papers.zh_title: 充分统计量再探
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾并推广了政策评估的充分统计量方法。该方法的核心思想是，政策变化的福利效应可以用可估计的简化形式弹性来表示，从而无需估计完全指定模型的结构性基础即可进行政策评估。该方法依赖于三个假设：政策变化是微小的、政府政策是市场不完善的唯一来源、以及一组关于环境和偏好的高层次限制可用于减少需要估计的弹性数量。我们从所有三个维度推广了该方法。在非常一般的条件下，可以推导出透明的充分统计量公式，但估计要求大大增加。从这样的一般公式出发，阐明了可行的实证实施实际上就是结构性方法。

papers.title: Human Capital Investment in the Presence of Child Labor
papers.authors: Natalie Bau, Martin Rotemberg, Manisha Shah, Bryce Steinberg
papers.abstract: Policies that improve human capital in early life are a promising tool for altering the lifelong trajectories of disadvantaged children. However, in many low-income countries, children and their parents face trade-offs between schooling and productive work. If there are positive returns to human capital in child labor, then children who receive more of some types of early life investments, such as those that improve health or nutrition, may attend less school. Exploiting early life rainfall shocks in India as a source of exogenous variation in early life investment, we show that child labor attenuates the positive effects of early life investment and increased early life investment increases school dropout in districts with high child labor. This lower investment in education has persistent long-term consequences in adulthood, resulting in lower household consumption. We show that our results are robust to instrumenting for child labor prevalence using local crop mix. Reductions in educational investment in response to positive early life shocks appear to reduce overall welfare in high-child labor districts.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：I2, J1, O12
papers.zh_title: 存在童工情况下的人力资本投资
papers.zh_abstract: 改善儿童早期人力资本的政策是改变弱势儿童终身轨迹的有前景工具。然而，在许多低收入国家，儿童及其父母面临上学与生产性工作之间的权衡。如果童工中的人力资本存在正回报，那么接受更多某些类型早期投资（如改善健康或营养的投资）的儿童可能上学更少。利用印度早期降雨冲击作为早期投资的外生变异来源，我们表明童工削弱了早期投资的积极效应，并且在童工率高的地区，早期投资的增加反而提高了辍学率。这种教育投资的减少在成年期产生了持续的长期后果，导致家庭消费降低。我们证明，使用当地作物组合作为童工流行率的工具变量，结果依然稳健。在童工率高的地区，对积极早期冲击的教育投资减少似乎降低了整体福利。

papers.title: Persistent Effects of Violent Media Content
papers.authors: Jason M. Lindo, Isaac D. Swensen, Glen R. Waddell
papers.abstract: We document the immediate and long-term effects of violent media. Specifically, we evaluate the effects of The Ultimate Fighter, a hit TV show that features fighters competing in violent mixed martial arts and which brought Ultimate Fighting Championship into the mainstream. We estimate the effect of early exposure to this show using panel data from police agencies across the United States and a strategy that uses network ratings prior to the show's premier as an instrumental variable. We show that early exposure significantly reduced crime: these effects are particularly evident for assault, began in the month the show premiered, and persisted for many years. These estimates do not reflect systematic differences across geographic areas in their trends in crime rates prior to 2005. To complement our main results, we also investigate the effects of "UFC Main Events," which air in bars and on Pay-Per-View. This analysis additionally suggests reductions in violence caused by viewership.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H0, K42, L82, L83
papers.zh_title: 暴力媒体内容的持续影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了暴力媒体的即时和长期影响。具体而言，我们评估了《终极斗士》的效果，这是一档热门电视节目，以选手参加暴力综合格斗为特色，并将终极格斗锦标赛带入主流。我们利用美国各地警察机构的面板数据，以及以节目首播前网络收视率作为工具变量的策略，估计了早期接触该节目的影响。我们表明，早期接触显著减少了犯罪：这些影响在袭击案件中尤为明显，始于节目首播当月，并持续多年。这些估计并不反映2005年之前各地区犯罪率趋势的系统性差异。为补充主要结果，我们还调查了在酒吧和按次付费频道播出的“UFC主赛”的影响。这一分析进一步表明，观看节目导致了暴力行为的减少。

papers.title: DEglobalizaion and Social Safety Nets in Post-Covid-19 Era: Textbook Macroeconomic Analysis
papers.authors: Assaf Razin, Efraim Sadka, Alexander Horst Schwemmer
papers.abstract: Globalization is expected to be reversed, at least partially, in the post pandemic era. The Great Financial Recession of 2008–10 marked a historic turning point in the direction of weakening the degree of global economic integration. Now, in the post-pandemic era, policymakers appear poised to take deliberate steps to reinforce the movement toward de-globalization. At the same time, safety nets are expected to be strengthened. In this paper, we develop a model, with which we analyze central macroeconomic interactions between globalization and safety nets. We put together stylized elements of trade globalization, financial globalization, international tax competition, immigration, and welfare state, all in a two-skill, two-period stylized model, where policy (taxes and social benefits) is determined through majority voting.
papers.zh_title: 后疫情时代的去全球化与社会安全网：教科书式宏观经济分析
papers.zh_abstract: 预计在后疫情时代，全球化将至少部分逆转。2008-10年的金融危机标志着全球经济一体化程度减弱方向上的历史转折点。如今，在后疫情时代，政策制定者似乎准备采取审慎措施，以加强去全球化趋势。与此同时，安全网预计将得到加强。在本文中，我们构建了一个模型，用以分析全球化与社会安全网之间的核心宏观经济互动。我们在一个两技能、两时期的简化模型中，整合了贸易全球化、金融全球化、国际税收竞争、移民和福利国家的典型要素，其中政策（税收和社会福利）通过多数投票决定。

papers.title: The Seeds of Ideology: Historical Immigration and Political Preferences in the United States
papers.authors: Paola Giuliano, Marco Tabellini
papers.abstract: We test the relationship between historical immigration to the United States and political ideology today. We hypothesize that European immigrants brought with them their preferences for the welfare state, and that this had a long-lasting effect on the political ideology of US born individuals. Our analysis proceeds in three steps. First, we document that the historical presence of European immigrants is associated with a more liberal political ideology and with stronger preferences for redistribution among US born individuals today. Next, we show that this correlation is not driven by the characteristics of the counties where immigrants settled or other specific, socioeconomic immigrants’ traits. Finally, we conjecture and provide evidence that immigrants brought with them their preferences for the welfare state from their countries of origin. Consistent with the hypothesis that immigration left its footprint on American ideology via cultural transmission from immigrants to natives, we show that our results are stronger when inter-group contact between natives and immigrants, measured with either intermarriage or residential integration, was higher. Our findings also indicate that immigrants influenced American political ideology during one of the largest episodes of redistribution in US history — the New Deal – and that such effects persisted after the initial shock.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, POL；JEL：D64, D72, H2, J15, N32, Z1
papers.zh_title: 意识形态的种子：美国历史上的移民与政治偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 我们检验了美国历史上的移民与当今政治意识形态之间的关系。我们假设欧洲移民带来了他们对福利国家的偏好，并且这对美国出生个体的政治意识形态产生了长期影响。我们的分析分三步进行。首先，我们记录了欧洲移民的历史存在与当今美国出生个体中更自由的政治意识形态以及对再分配的更强偏好之间的关联。其次，我们表明这种相关性并非由移民定居的县的特征或其他特定的社会经济移民特征所驱动。最后，我们推测并提供证据表明，移民从原籍国带来了他们对福利国家的偏好。与移民通过文化传播将意识形态印记留给本土居民的假设一致，我们表明，当本土居民与移民之间的群体间接触（以通婚或居住融合衡量）更高时，我们的结果更强。我们的发现还表明，移民在美国历史上最大的再分配事件之一——新政期间影响了美国政治意识形态，并且这种影响在初始冲击后持续存在。

papers.title: The Persuasive Effect of Fox News: Non-Compliance with Social Distancing During the Covid-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Andrey Simonov, Szymon K. Sacher, Jean-Pierre H. Dubé, Shirsho Biswas
papers.abstract: We test for and measure the effects of cable news in the US on regional differences in compliance with recommendations by health experts to practice social distancing during the early stages of the COVID-19 pandemic. We use a quasi-experimental design to estimate the causal effect of Fox News viewership on stay-at-home behavior by using only the incremental local viewership due to the quasi-random assignment of channel positions in a local cable line-up. We find that a 10% increase in Fox News cable viewership (approximately 0:13 higher viewer rating points) leads to a 1.3 percentage point reduction in the propensity to stay at home. We find a persuasion rate of Fox News on non-compliance with stay-at-home behavior during the crisis of about 5:7% - 28:4% across our various social distancing metrics.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, POL；JEL：D72, I12, I18, L82
papers.zh_title: 福克斯新闻的说服效应：COVID-19疫情期间不遵守社交距离的行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们检验并衡量了美国有线电视新闻对COVID-19疫情早期阶段各地区遵守卫生专家社交距离建议程度差异的影响。我们采用准实验设计，利用当地有线电视节目表中频道位置的准随机分配所导致的福克斯新闻本地收视率增量，来估计福克斯新闻收视率对居家行为的因果效应。我们发现，福克斯新闻有线电视收视率每增加10%（约0.13个收视率点），居家倾向降低1.3个百分点。我们计算出，在危机期间，福克斯新闻对不遵守居家行为的不服从说服率，在我们各种社交距离指标中约为5.7%至28.4%。

papers.title: Mobility Zones
papers.authors: Ferdinando Monte
papers.abstract: This short note constructs Mobility Zones to facilitate the discussion on the geographic extent of individual mobility restrictions to control the spread of Covid-19. Mobility Zones are disjoint sets of counties where a given level of individual mobility directly or indirectly connects all counties within each set. I compute Mobility Zones for the United States and each state using smartphone-based mobility data between counties. The average area and population of Mobility Zones have slightly grown at the onset of the epidemic and have sharply shrunk afterward. Pre-Covid-19 Mobility Zones may be useful in calibrating quantitative studies of targeted restriction policies, or for policymakers deciding on the adoption of specific mobility measures. Two examples suggest the use of Mobility Zones to inform within-state differences and cross-state coordination in mobility restriction policies.
papers.zh_title: 流动区域
papers.zh_abstract: 这篇短评构建了流动区域，以促进关于控制COVID-19传播的个人流动限制地理范围的讨论。流动区域是不相交的县集合，其中给定水平的个人流动性直接或间接连接每个集合内的所有县。我利用县际智能手机流动性数据，为美国和各州计算了流动区域。流动区域的平均面积和人口在疫情初期略有增长，之后急剧缩小。COVID-19之前的流动区域可能有助于校准针对限制政策的定量研究，或为政策制定者决定采用特定流动措施提供参考。两个例子表明，流动区域可用于指导州内差异和跨州协调的流动限制政策。

papers.title: Impacts of State Reopening Policy on Human Mobility
papers.authors: Thuy D. Nguyen, Sumedha Gupta, Martin Andersen, Ana Bento, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: This study quantifies the effect of state reopening policies on daily mobility, travel, and mixing behavior during the COVID-19 pandemic. We harness cell device signal data to examine the effects of the timing and pace of reopening plans in different states. We quantify the increase in mobility patterns during the reopening phase by a broad range of cell-device-based metrics. Soon (four days) after reopening, we observe a 6% to 8% mobility increase. In addition, we find that temperature and precipitation are strongly associated with increased mobility across counties. The mobility measures that reflect visits to a greater variety of locations responds the most to reopening policies, while total time in vs. outside the house remains unchanged. The largest increases in mobility occur in states that were late adopters of closure measures, suggesting that closure policies may have represented more of a binding constraint in those states. Together, these four observations provide an assessment of the extent to which people in the U.S. are resuming movement and physical proximity as the COVID-19 pandemic continues.
papers.zh_title: 州重新开放政策对人口流动性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究量化了COVID-19疫情期间州重新开放政策对日常流动性、出行和混合行为的影响。我们利用手机设备信号数据，考察不同州重新开放计划的时间和节奏所产生的影响。通过一系列基于手机设备的指标，我们量化了重新开放阶段流动性模式的增加。在重新开放后不久（四天内），我们观察到流动性增加了6%至8%。此外，我们发现温度和降水量与各县流动性的增加密切相关。反映访问更多种类地点的流动性指标对重新开放政策的反应最为显著，而在室内与室外总时间保持不变。流动性增长最大的州是那些较晚采取封锁措施的州，这表明封锁政策在这些州可能代表了更具约束性的限制。综合这四项观察结果，我们评估了在COVID-19疫情持续期间，美国人恢复出行和身体接近程度的程度。

papers.title: Why Has the US Economy Recovered So Consistently from Every Recession in the Past 70 Years?
papers.authors: Robert E. Hall, Marianna Kudlyak
papers.abstract: A remarkable fact about the historical US business cycle is that, after unemployment reached its peak in a recession, and a recovery begins, the annual reduction in the unemployment rate is stable at around one tenth of the current level of unemployment. We document this fact in a companion paper, Hall and Kudlyak (2020a). Here, we consider explanations for the surprising consistency of recoveries. We show that the evolution of the labor market from recession to recovery involves more than the direct effect of persistent unemployment of job-losers from the recession shock -- unemployment during the recovery is above normal for people who did not lose jobs during the recession. We explore models of the labor market's self-recovery that imply gradual working off of unemployment following a recession shock. We emphasize the feedback from high unemployment to the forces driving job creation. These models also explain why the recovery of market-wide unemployment is so much slower than the rate at which individual unemployed workers find new jobs. The reasons include the fact that the path that individual job-losers follow back to stable employment often includes several brief interim jobs.
papers.zh_title: 为什么美国经济在过去70年中每次衰退后都能如此一致地复苏？
papers.zh_abstract: 关于美国历史商业周期的一个显著事实是，在失业率于衰退中达到峰值并开始复苏后，失业率的年降幅稳定在当前失业水平的大约十分之一。我们在配套论文Hall and Kudlyak (2020a)中记录了这一事实。在此，我们探讨复苏惊人一致性的解释。我们表明，从衰退到复苏的劳动力市场演变不仅涉及衰退冲击中失业者持续失业的直接影响——复苏期间的失业率对于在衰退期间未失业的人群也高于正常水平。我们探索劳动力市场自我恢复的模型，这些模型暗示衰退冲击后失业会逐渐消除。我们强调高失业率对推动就业创造力量的反馈作用。这些模型也解释了为什么整个市场的失业率恢复速度远慢于个体失业工人找到新工作的速度。原因包括个体失业者回归稳定就业的路径通常包含几个短暂的临时工作。

papers.title: Three Myths about Federal Regulation
papers.authors: Patrick A. McLaughlin, Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Despite evidence to the contrary, three common myths persist about federal regulations. The first myth is that many regulations concern the environment, but in fact only a small minority of regulations are environmental. The second myth is that most regulations contain quantitative estimates of costs or benefits. However, these quantitative estimates appear rarely in published rules, contradicting the impression given by executive orders and Office of Management and Budget guidance, which require cost-benefit analysis (CBA) and clearly articulate sound economic principles for conducting CBA. Environmental rules have relatively higher-quality CBAs, at least by the low standards of other federal rules. The third myth, which is particularly relevant to the historic regulations promulgated during the COVID-19 pandemic, is the misperception that regulatory costs are primarily clerical, rather than opportunity or resource costs. If technocrats have triumphed in the regulatory arena, their victory has not been earned by the merits of their analysis.
papers.zh_title: 关于联邦监管的三个迷思
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管有相反证据，关于联邦监管的三个常见迷思仍然存在。第一个迷思是许多监管涉及环境，但实际上只有少数监管是环境相关的。第二个迷思是大多数监管包含成本或收益的定量估计。然而，这些定量估计在已发布的规则中很少出现，这与要求成本效益分析（CBA）并明确阐述进行CBA的合理经济原则的行政命令和管理与预算办公室指导相矛盾。环境规则具有相对较高质量的CBA，至少按其他联邦规则的低标准来看如此。第三个迷思，尤其与COVID-19疫情期间颁布的历史性监管相关，是错误认为监管成本主要是文书成本，而非机会成本或资源成本。如果技术官僚在监管领域取得了胜利，他们的胜利并非因其分析的价值而赢得。

papers.title: The Hammer and the Scalpel: On the Economics of Indiscriminate versus Targeted Isolation Policies during Pandemics
papers.authors: Varadarajan V. Chari, Rishabh Kirpalani, Christopher Phelan
papers.abstract: We develop a simple dynamic economic model of epidemic transmission designed to be consistent with widely used SIR biological models of the transmission of epidemics, while incorporating economic benefits and costs as well. Our main finding is that targeted testing and isolation policies deliver large welfare gains relative to optimal policies when these tools are not used. Specifically, we find that when testing and isolation are not used, optimal policy delivers a welfare gain equivalent to a 0.6% permanent increase in consumption relative to no intervention. The welfare gain arises because under the optimal policy, the planner engineers a sharp recession that reduces aggregate output by about 40% for about 3 months. This sharp contraction in economic activity reduces the rate of transmission and reduces cumulative deaths by about 0.1%. When testing policies are used, optimal policy delivers a welfare gain equivalent to a 3% permanent increase in consumption. The associated recession is milder in that aggregate output declines by about 15% and cumulative deaths are reduced by .3%. Much of this welfare gain comes from isolating infected individuals. When individuals who are suspected to be infected are isolated without any testing, optimal policy delivers a welfare gain equivalent to a 2% increase in permanent consumption.
papers.zh_title: 锤子与手术刀：论大流行期间无差别与针对性隔离政策的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简单的流行病传播动态经济模型，旨在与广泛使用的流行病传播SIR生物模型保持一致，同时纳入经济收益和成本。我们的主要发现是，当不使用这些工具时，与最优政策相比，有针对性的检测和隔离政策能带来巨大的福利收益。具体来说，我们发现当不使用检测和隔离时，最优政策带来的福利收益相当于永久性消费增加0.6%，相对于不干预。福利收益的产生是因为在最优政策下，规划者设计了一场急剧的衰退，使总产出在大约3个月内减少约40%。这种经济活动的急剧收缩降低了传播率，并使累计死亡人数减少约0.1%。当使用检测政策时，最优政策带来的福利收益相当于永久性消费增加3%。相关的衰退较为温和，总产出下降约15%，累计死亡人数减少0.3%。这一福利收益的大部分来自隔离感染者。当疑似感染者未经检测就被隔离时，最优政策带来的福利收益相当于永久性消费增加2%。

papers.title: The Term Structure of Covered Interest Rate Parity Violations
papers.authors: Patrick Augustin, Mikhail Chernov, Lukas Schmid, Dongho Song
papers.abstract: We quantify the impact of risk-based and non-risk-based intermediary constraints (IC) on the term structure of CIP violations. Using a stochastic discount factor (SDF) inferred from interest rate swaps, we value currency derivatives. The wedge between model-implied and observed derivative prices reflects the impact of non-risk-based IC because our SDF incorporates risk-based IC. There is no wedge at short horizons, while the wedge accounts for 40% of long-term CIP violations. Consistent with IC theory, the wedge correlates with the shadow cost of intermediary capital, and the SDF-implied interest rate is a weighted average of collateralized and uncollateralized interest rates.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：C01, E43, E44, G12, H60
papers.zh_title: 覆盖利率平价违反的期限结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们量化了基于风险和非基于风险的中介约束（IC）对CIP违反期限结构的影响。使用从利率互换推断出的随机贴现因子（SDF），我们对货币衍生品进行估值。模型隐含衍生品价格与观察到的衍生品价格之间的楔子反映了非基于风险IC的影响，因为我们的SDF包含了基于风险的IC。在短期期限上不存在楔子，而楔子占长期CIP违反的40%。与IC理论一致，楔子与中介资本的影子成本相关，且SDF隐含利率是抵押和无抵押利率的加权平均值。

papers.title: Spatial Misallocation in Chinese Housing and Land Markets
papers.authors: Yongheng Deng, Yang Tang, Ping Wang, Jing Wu
papers.abstract: Housing and land prices in China have experienced dramatic hikes over the past decade or two. Moreover, housing and land prices have also become more dispersed across Chinese cities. This paper intends to explore how housing and land market frictions may affect not only the aggregate but also the spatial distribution of housing and land prices and hence the extent of spatial misallocation. We first document the spatial variations of housing and land market frictions. In particular, larger tier-1 cities receive less housing and land subsidies, compared to tier-2 and tier-3 cities, whereas land frictions have been mitigated over time. We then embed both types of market frictions into a dynamic competitive spatial equilibrium framework featured with endogenous rural-urban migration. The calibrated model can reasonably mimic the price hikes in the data. Our counterfactual analysis reveals that, in a frictionless economy, the levels of housing and land prices would both be higher; while the housing price hike would slow down, the land price would grow more rapidly. Moreover, the housing price would not be slow down unless housing frictions can be largely mitigated.
papers.zh_title: 中国住房和土地市场中的空间错配
papers.zh_abstract: 过去一二十年间，中国住房和土地价格经历了急剧上涨。此外，住房和土地价格在中国城市间的分散程度也有所增加。本文旨在探讨住房和土地市场摩擦如何不仅影响住房和土地价格的总体水平，还影响其空间分布，进而影响空间错配的程度。我们首先记录了住房和土地市场摩擦的空间差异。特别是，与二线和三线城市相比，较大的一线城市获得的住房和土地补贴较少，而土地摩擦随时间推移已有所缓解。然后，我们将这两种市场摩擦嵌入一个以城乡内生迁移为特征的动态竞争性空间均衡框架中。校准后的模型能够合理模拟数据中的价格上涨。我们的反事实分析表明，在无摩擦经济中，住房和土地价格水平都会更高；而住房价格上涨速度会放缓，土地价格则会增长更快。此外，除非住房摩擦得到大幅缓解，否则住房价格不会放缓。

papers.title: Were Urban Cowboys Enough to Control COVID-19? Local Shelter-in-Place Orders and Coronavirus Case Growth
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Joseph J. Sabia, Samuel Safford
papers.abstract: One of the most common policy prescriptions to reduce the spread of COVID-19 has been to legally enforce social distancing through state or local shelter-in-place orders (SIPOs). This paper is the first to explore the comparative effectiveness of early county-level SIPOs versus later statewide mandates in curbing COVID-19 growth. We exploit the unique laboratory of Texas, a state in which the early adoption of local SIPOs by densely populated counties covered almost two-thirds of the state’s population prior to Texas’s adoption of a statewide SIPO on April 2, 2020. Using an event study framework, we document that countywide SIPO adoption is associated with a 14 percent increase in the percent of residents who remain at home full-time, a social distancing effect that is largest in urbanized and densely populated counties. Then, we find that in early adopting counties, COVID-19 case growth fell by 19 to 26 percentage points two-and-a-half weeks following adoption of a SIPO, a result robust to controls for county-level heterogeneity in outbreak timing, coronavirus testing, and border SIPO policies. This effect is driven nearly entirely by highly urbanized and densely populated counties. We find that approximately 90 percent of the curbed growth in COVID-19 cases in Texas came from the early adoption of SIPOs by urbanized counties, suggesting that the later statewide shelter-in-place mandate yielded relatively few health benefits.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H75, I18, R0
papers.zh_title: 城市牛仔足以控制COVID-19吗？地方居家令与冠状病毒病例增长
papers.zh_abstract: 减少COVID-19传播最常见的政策处方之一是通过州或地方居家令（SIPO）依法强制实施社交距离。本文首次探讨了早期县级居家令与后期全州强制令在遏制COVID-19增长方面的相对有效性。我们利用了德克萨斯州这一独特实验室，该州人口密集县早期采用的地方居家令在2020年4月2日德克萨斯州采用全州居家令之前覆盖了该州近三分之二的人口。使用事件研究框架，我们记录了全县居家令的采用与全职居家居民比例增加14%相关，这一社交距离效应在城市化且人口密集的县最为显著。然后，我们发现，在早期采用居家令的县，采用居家令后两周半，COVID-19病例增长率下降了19至26个百分点，这一结果在控制县级疫情爆发时间、冠状病毒检测和边境居家令政策的异质性后依然稳健。这一效应几乎完全由高度城市化和人口密集的县驱动。我们发现，德克萨斯州COVID-19病例增长受抑制的约90%来自城市化县早期采用居家令，这表明后来的全州居家令强制令带来的健康益处相对较少。

papers.title: The Macroeconomics of a Pandemic: A Minimalist Model
papers.authors: Luis Felipe Céspedes, Roberto Chang, Andrés Velasco
papers.abstract: We build a minimalist model of the macroeconomics of a pandemic, with two essential components. The first is productivity-related: if the virus forces firms to shed labor beyond a certain threshold, productivity suffers. The second component is a credit market imperfection: because lenders cannot be sure a borrower will repay, they only lend against collateral. Expected productivity determines collateral value; in turn, collateral value can limit borrowing and productivity. As a result, adverse shocks have large magnification effects, in an unemployment and asset price deflation doom loop. There may be multiple equilibria, so that pessimistic expectations can push the economy to a bad equilibrium with limited borrowing and low employment and productivity. The model helps identify policies to fight the effects of the pandemic. Traditional expansionary fiscal policy has no beneficial effects, while cutting interest rates has a limited effect if the initial real interest rate is low. By contrast, several unconventional policies, including wage subsidies, helicopter drops of liquid assets, equity injections, and loan guarantees, can keep the economy in a full-employment, high-productivity equilibrium. Such policies can be fiscally expensive, so their implementation is feasible only with ample fiscal space or emergency financing from abroad.
papers.zh_title: 大流行的宏观经济学：一个极简模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个大流行宏观经济学的极简模型，包含两个基本组成部分。第一个与生产率相关：如果病毒迫使企业解雇劳动力超过一定阈值，生产率就会受损。第二个组成部分是信贷市场不完善：因为贷款人无法确定借款人是否会偿还，他们只以抵押品为条件放贷。预期生产率决定抵押品价值；反过来，抵押品价值可能限制借贷和生产率。结果，不利冲击具有巨大的放大效应，形成失业和资产价格通缩的厄运循环。可能存在多重均衡，因此悲观预期可能将经济推向借贷有限、就业和生产率低下的坏均衡。该模型有助于确定对抗大流行影响的政策。传统扩张性财政政策没有有益效果，而如果初始实际利率较低，降息效果有限。相比之下，几种非常规政策，包括工资补贴、直升机撒钱注入流动资产、股权注入和贷款担保，可以使经济保持在充分就业、高生产率的均衡中。此类政策可能在财政上代价高昂，因此其实施只有在拥有充足财政空间或来自国外的紧急融资时才可行。

papers.title: Necessary Evidence For A Risk Factor’s Relevance
papers.authors: Alexander M. Chinco, Samuel M. Hartzmark, Abigail B. Sussman
papers.abstract: Textbook finance theory assumes that investors strategically try to insure themselves against bad future states of the world when forming portfolios. This is a testable assumption, surveys are ideally suited to test it, and we develop a framework for doing so. Our framework combines survey experiments with field data to test this assumption as it pertains to any candidate risk factor. We study consumption growth to demonstrate the approach. While participants strategically respond to changes in the mean and volatility of stock returns when forming their portfolios, there is no evidence that investors view this canonical risk factor as relevant.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：D81, D91, E21, G11, G12, G4
papers.zh_title: 风险因子相关性的必要证据
papers.zh_abstract: 教科书金融理论假设投资者在构建投资组合时，会策略性地试图为未来不利的世界状态提供保障。这是一个可检验的假设，调查非常适合检验它，我们为此开发了一个框架。我们的框架将调查实验与实地数据相结合，以检验这一假设，该假设适用于任何候选风险因子。我们通过研究消费增长来演示该方法。虽然参与者在构建投资组合时会策略性地应对股票收益均值和波动率的变化，但没有证据表明投资者认为这一经典风险因子具有相关性。

papers.title: Bounding the Predictive Values of COVID-19 Antibody Tests
papers.authors: Charles F. Manski
papers.abstract: COVID-19 antibody tests have imperfect accuracy. There has been lack of clarity on the meaning of reported rates of false positives and false negatives. For risk assessment and clinical decision making, the rates of interest are the positive and negative predictive values of a test. Positive predictive value (PPV) is the chance that a person who tests positive has been infected. Negative predictive value (NPV) is the chance that someone who tests negative has not been infected. The medical literature regularly reports different statistics, sensitivity and specificity. Sensitivity is the chance that an infected person receives a positive test result. Specificity is the chance that a non-infected person receives a negative result. Knowledge of sensitivity and specificity permits one to predict the test result given a person’s true infection status. These predictions are not directly relevant to risk assessment or clinical decisions, where one knows a test result and wants to predict whether a person has been infected. Given estimates of sensitivity and specificity, PPV and NPV can be derived if one knows the prevalence of the disease, the rate of illness in the population. There is considerable uncertainty about the prevalence of COVID-19. This paper addresses the problem of inference on the PPV and NPV of COVID-19 antibody tests given estimates of sensitivity and specificity and credible bounds on prevalence. I explain the methodological problem, show how to estimate bounds on PPV and NPV, and apply the findings to some tests authorized by the FDA.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19抗体检测预测值的界限确定
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19抗体检测的准确性并非完美。关于报告的假阳性和假阴性率的含义一直缺乏清晰性。对于风险评估和临床决策，人们关注的是检测的阳性预测值和阴性预测值。阳性预测值是指检测呈阳性的人实际被感染的概率。阴性预测值是指检测呈阴性的人实际未被感染的概率。医学文献通常报告不同的统计量，即敏感性和特异性。敏感性是指感染者获得阳性检测结果的概率。特异性是指未感染者获得阴性结果的概率。了解敏感性和特异性，可以根据一个人的真实感染状态预测检测结果。这些预测与风险评估或临床决策并不直接相关，因为在临床决策中，人们已知检测结果，并希望预测一个人是否被感染。在已知敏感性和特异性估计值的情况下，如果知道疾病的患病率（即人群中的发病率），就可以推导出阳性预测值和阴性预测值。COVID-19的患病率存在相当大的不确定性。本文探讨了在给定敏感性和特异性估计值以及患病率的可信界限下，对COVID-19抗体检测的阳性预测值和阴性预测值进行推断的问题。我解释了方法论问题，展示了如何估计阳性预测值和阴性预测值的界限，并将研究结果应用于一些经FDA授权的检测。

papers.title: Deputization
papers.authors: Bruce I. Carlin, Tarik Umar, Hanyi Yi
papers.abstract: A policy of deputization asks agents to monitor others without providing explicit incentives. It is often used to prevent dangerous activities. To calibrate whether and why it works, we study recent laws that deputized financial professionals to help fight elder financial abuse. We show deputization led to a 4%-6% decrease in suspected cases and a 4.5% drop in personal bankruptcies. Women, minorities, and unmarried people benefited more. Effectiveness operated through higher community-mindedness and deeper social connections. Egoistic incentives, legal concerns, publicity, and religiosity were less important. This suggests that regulators can rely on social networks to solve tough problems.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CF, LE, PE, POL；JEL：G28, H31, K23
papers.zh_title: 授权代理
papers.zh_abstract: 授权代理政策要求代理人监督他人，而不提供明确的激励措施。它通常用于预防危险活动。为了校准其是否有效以及为何有效，我们研究了近期授权金融专业人士协助打击老年人金融虐待的法律。我们发现，授权代理导致疑似案件减少4%-6%，个人破产率下降4.5%。女性、少数族裔和未婚人士受益更多。其有效性通过更高的社区意识和更深的社会联系发挥作用。利己激励、法律顾虑、宣传和宗教信仰的重要性较低。这表明监管机构可以依赖社会网络来解决棘手问题。

papers.title: Global Supply Chains in the Pandemic
papers.authors: Barthélémy Bonadio, Zhen Huo, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
papers.abstract: We study the role of global supply chains in the impact of the Covid-19 pandemic on GDP growth using a multi-sector quantitative framework implemented on 64 countries. We discipline the labor supply shock across sectors and countries using the fraction of work in the sector that can be done from home, interacted with the stringency with which countries imposed lockdown measures. One quarter of the total model-implied real GDP decline is due to transmission through global supply chains. However, “renationalization” of global supply chains does not in general make countries more resilient to pandemic-induced contractions in labor supply. This is because eliminating reliance on foreign inputs increases reliance on the domestic inputs, which are also disrupted due to nationwide lockdowns. In fact, trade can insulate a country imposing a stringent lockdown from the pandemic-shock, as its foreign inputs are less disrupted than its domestic ones. Finally, unilateral lifting of the lockdowns in the largest economies can contribute as much as 2.5%to GDP growth in some of their smaller trade partners.
papers.zh_title: 疫情中的全球供应链
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个基于64个国家的多部门量化框架，研究了全球供应链在COVID-19疫情对GDP增长影响中的作用。我们使用部门工作中可居家完成的比例，与国家实施封锁措施的严格程度进行交互，来约束跨部门和跨国家的劳动力供给冲击。模型隐含的实际GDP下降总额中，有四分之一是由于通过全球供应链的传导所致。然而，全球供应链的“再国有化”通常并不会使各国对疫情引发的劳动力供给收缩更具韧性。这是因为消除对外国投入的依赖会增加对国内投入的依赖，而国内投入也因全国性封锁而受到干扰。事实上，贸易可以使实施严格封锁的国家免受疫情冲击的影响，因为其外国投入受到的干扰小于国内投入。最后，最大经济体的单方面解除封锁，可以为其一些较小贸易伙伴的GDP增长贡献高达2.5%。

papers.title: Voluntary Regulation: Evidence from Medicare Payment Reform
papers.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Yunan Ji, Neale Mahoney
papers.abstract: Government programs are often offered on an optional basis to market participants. We explore the economics of such voluntary regulation in the context of a Medicare payment reform, in which one medical provider receives a single, predetermined payment for a sequence of related healthcare services, instead of separate service-specific payments. This “bundled payment” program was originally implemented as a 5-year randomized trial, with mandatory participation by hospitals assigned to the new payment model, but after two years participation was unexpectedly made voluntary for half of these hospitals. Using detailed claim-level data, we document that voluntary participation is more likely for hospitals who can increase revenue without changing behavior (“selection on levels”) and for hospitals that had large changes in behavior when participation was mandatory (“selection on slopes”). To assess outcomes under counterfactual regimes, we estimate a simple model of responsiveness to and selection into the program. We find that the current voluntary regime generates inefficient transfers to hospitals and reduces social welfare compared to the status quo, but that alternative (feasible) designs could substantially reduce these inefficient transfers. Our analysis highlights key design elements to consider under voluntary regulation.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE；JEL：H51, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 自愿监管：来自医疗保险支付改革的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 政府项目通常以可选方式提供给市场参与者。我们在医疗保险支付改革的背景下探讨这种自愿监管的经济学，其中医疗服务提供者为一组相关的医疗服务获得单一的、预先确定的支付，而不是针对每项服务的单独支付。这种“捆绑支付”项目最初作为一项为期5年的随机试验实施，被分配到新支付模式的医院必须参与，但两年后，其中一半医院的参与意外地变为自愿。利用详细的索赔层面数据，我们记录了自愿参与更可能发生在那些无需改变行为就能增加收入的医院（“水平选择”）以及那些在强制参与时行为发生巨大变化的医院（“斜率选择”）。为了评估反事实制度下的结果，我们估计了一个关于对项目的响应性和选择性的简单模型。我们发现，与现状相比，当前的自愿制度产生了向医院的无效率转移并降低了社会福利，但替代性的（可行的）设计可以大幅减少这些无效率转移。我们的分析强调了在自愿监管下需要考虑的关键设计要素。

papers.title: Tokenomics: Dynamic Adoption and Valuation
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Ye Li, Neng Wang
papers.abstract: We develop a dynamic asset-pricing model of cryptocurrencies/tokens that allow users to conduct peer-to-peer transactions on digital platforms. The equilibrium value of tokens is determined by aggregating heterogeneous users' transactional demand rather than discounting cashflows as in standard valuation models. Endogenous platform adoption builds upon user network externality and exhibits an S-curve — it starts slow, becomes volatile, and eventually tapers off. Introducing tokens lowers users' transaction costs on the platform by allowing users to capitalize on platform growth. The resulting intertemporal feedback between user adoption and token price accelerates adoption and dampens user-base volatility.
papers.zh_title: 代币经济学：动态采用与估值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个加密货币/代币的动态资产定价模型，这些代币允许用户在数字平台上进行点对点交易。代币的均衡价值是通过汇总异质性用户的交易需求来确定的，而不是像标准估值模型那样对现金流进行贴现。内生平台采用基于用户网络外部性，并呈现S曲线——起步缓慢，变得波动，最终趋于平稳。引入代币通过允许用户利用平台增长来降低用户在平台上的交易成本。由此产生的用户采用与代币价格之间的跨期反馈加速了采用，并抑制了用户基础的波动性。

papers.title: When is Debt Odious? A Theory of Repression and Growth Traps
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Raghuram Rajan, Jack Shim
papers.abstract: How is a developing country affected by its odious government’s ability to borrow in international markets? We examine the dynamics of a country’s growth, consumption, and sovereign debt, assuming that the government is myopic and wants to maximize short-term, socially unproductive, spending. Interestingly, access to external borrowing can extend the government’s effective horizon; the government’s ability to borrow hinges on its convincing investors they will be repaid, which gives it a stake in the future. The lengthening of the government’s effective horizon can incentivize it to tax less, resulting in higher steady-state household consumption than if it could not borrow. However, in a developing country that saves little, the government may engage in more repressive policies to enhance its debt capacity, which only ensures that successor governments repress as well. This leads to a “growth trap” where household steady-state consumption is lower than if the government had no access to debt. We characterize circumstances in which odious government leads to odious debt and those in which it does not, and discuss policies that might ameliorate the welfare of the citizenry.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, LE, PE；JEL：F3, G28, H2, H3, H6
papers.zh_title: 何时债务是恶债？一种关于压制与增长陷阱的理论
papers.zh_abstract: 一个发展中国家的恶政政府在国际市场上借款的能力如何影响该国？我们考察了一个国家的增长、消费和主权债务的动态，假设政府是短视的，并希望最大化短期的、对社会无生产力的支出。有趣的是，外部借款的渠道可以延长政府的有效视野；政府借款的能力取决于它能否让投资者相信他们会得到偿还，这使政府与未来利益相关。政府有效视野的延长可以激励其减少征税，从而导致比无法借款时更高的稳态家庭消费。然而，在一个储蓄很少的发展中国家，政府可能会采取更具压制性的政策来增强其债务能力，这只会确保继任政府也进行压制。这导致了一种“增长陷阱”，即家庭稳态消费低于政府无法获得债务时的水平。我们描述了恶政政府导致恶债的情形以及不导致恶债的情形，并讨论了可能改善公民福利的政策。

papers.title: The Cost of Privacy: Welfare Effects of the Disclosure of COVID-19 Cases
papers.authors: David O. Argente, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Munseob Lee
papers.abstract: South Korea publicly disclosed detailed location information of individuals that tested positive for COVID-19. We quantify the effect of public disclosure on the transmission of the virus and economic losses in Seoul. The change in commuting patterns due to public disclosure lowers the number of cases by 200 thousand and the number of deaths by 7.7 thousand in Seoul over two years. Compared to a city-wide lock-down that results in the same number of cases over two years as the disclosure scenario, the economic cost of such a lockdown is almost four times higher.
papers.zh_title: 隐私的成本：COVID-19病例披露的福利效应
papers.zh_abstract: 韩国公开披露了COVID-19检测呈阳性个体的详细位置信息。我们量化了公开披露对病毒传播和首尔经济损失的影响。由于公开披露导致的通勤模式变化，在两年内使首尔的病例数减少了20万，死亡人数减少了7700人。与导致两年内病例数与披露情景相同的全市封锁相比，这种封锁的经济成本几乎高出四倍。

papers.title: Global Comparatives Statics in General Equilibrium: Model Building from Theoretical Foundations
papers.authors: James R. Markusen
papers.abstract: International trade economists made seminal contributions to general equilibrium theory, moving away from an emphasis on existence of equilibrium to algebraic formulations which enabled us to characterize key relationships between parameters and variables, such as that between tariffs and domestic factor prices and welfare. But the analysis remained limited in value for policy evaluation: the analysis was local, it provided only qualitative results, it was limited to very small models, and strictly interior solutions had to be assumed. The contribution of this paper is pedagogic and methodological, providing a primer for those wishing to do or teach general-equilibrium counterfactuals on (for example) structural models. I show how the tools from early local comparative statics analyses can be generalized via the use of Shepard’s lemma, duality, complementarity and the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker theorem into a global, quantitative analysis of large changes in high-dimension models which also allows for regime changes and corner solutions. I then show how the resulting non-linear complementarity problem directly translates into a numerical model using GAMS (general algebraic modeling system).
papers.zh_title: 一般均衡中的全局比较静态分析：从理论基础构建模型
papers.zh_abstract: 国际贸易经济学家对一般均衡理论做出了开创性贡献，从强调均衡存在性转向代数公式化，使我们能够刻画参数与变量之间的关键关系，例如关税与国内要素价格及福利之间的关系。但该分析在政策评估方面的价值仍然有限：分析是局部的，仅提供定性结果，局限于非常小的模型，并且必须假设严格的内点解。本文的贡献在于教学和方法论层面，为那些希望（例如）在结构模型上进行或教授一般均衡反事实分析的人提供入门指南。我展示了如何通过使用谢泼德引理、对偶性、互补性和卡鲁什-库恩-塔克定理，将早期局部比较静态分析的工具推广为高维模型中大规模变化的全局定量分析，该分析还允许制度变化和角点解。然后，我展示了由此产生的非线性互补问题如何直接转化为使用GAMS（通用代数建模系统）的数值模型。

papers.title: Implications of Stochastic Transmission Rates for Managing Pandemic Risks
papers.authors: Harrison Hong, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
papers.abstract: We develop a model of pandemic risk management and ﬁrm valuation. We introduce aggregate transmission shocks into an epidemic model and link valuations to infections via an asset-pricing framework with vaccines. Infections lower earnings growth but ﬁrms can mitigate damages. We estimate a large reproduction number R0 and transmission volatility for COVID-19. Using these estimates, we assess the accuracy of deterministic approximations based on R0. Our model generates predictions consistent with data: unexpected infection resurgence, non-monotonic mitigation policies, and higher price-to-earnings ratios during a pandemic. Valuations would be signiﬁcantly lower absent mitigation and a high vaccine arrival rate.
papers.zh_title: 随机传播率对管理大流行风险的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个大流行风险管理和企业估值模型。我们将总体传播冲击引入流行病模型，并通过一个包含疫苗的资产定价框架将估值与感染联系起来。感染会降低盈利增长，但企业可以减轻损害。我们估计了COVID-19的高基本再生数R0和传播波动性。利用这些估计，我们评估了基于R0的确定性近似的准确性。我们的模型产生了与数据一致的预测：意外的感染复燃、非单调的缓解政策以及大流行期间更高的市盈率。如果没有缓解措施和高疫苗到达率，估值将显著降低。

papers.title: The Long-Term Cognitive and Schooling Effects of Childhood Vaccinations in China
papers.authors: Hamid R. Oskorouchi, Alfonso Sousa-Poza, David E. Bloom
papers.abstract: By exploiting rich retrospective data on childhood immunization, socioeconomics, and health status in China (the China Health and Retirement Longitudinal Study), we assess the long-term effects of childhood vaccination on cognitive and educational outcomes in that country. To do so, we apply various techniques (e.g., propensity score and coarsened exact matching and correlated random effects) to different sets of conditioning variables and subsamples to estimate the average treatment on the treated effect of childhood vaccination. Our results confirm that vaccinations before the age of 15 have long-term positive and economically meaningful effects on nonhealth outcomes such as education and cognitive skills. These effects are relatively strong, with vaccinated individuals enjoying about one more year of schooling and performing substantially better later in life on several cognitive tests.
papers.zh_title: 中国儿童疫苗接种的长期认知和教育效应
papers.zh_abstract: 通过利用中国关于儿童免疫、社会经济状况和健康状态的丰富回顾性数据（中国健康与养老追踪调查），我们评估了该国儿童疫苗接种对认知和教育结果的长期影响。为此，我们应用了多种技术（例如，倾向得分匹配、粗略精确匹配和相关随机效应）到不同的条件变量集和子样本中，以估计儿童疫苗接种对受处理者的平均处理效应。我们的结果证实，15岁之前的疫苗接种对教育和认知技能等非健康结果具有长期积极且在经济上显著的影响。这些影响相对较强，接种疫苗的个体平均多享受约一年的教育，并在晚年多项认知测试中表现显著更好。

papers.title: US Unemployment Insurance Replacement Rates During the Pandemic
papers.authors: Peter Ganong, Pascal J. Noel, Joseph S. Vavra
papers.abstract: We use micro data on earnings together with the details of each state’s unemployment insurance (UI) system to compute the distribution of UI benefits after the uniform $600 Federal Pandemic Unemployment Compensation (FPUC) supplement implemented by the CARES Act. We find that between April and July 2020, 76% of workers eligible for regular Unemployment Compensation have statutory replacement rates above 100%, meaning that they are eligible for benefits which exceed lost wages. The median statutory replacement rate is 145%. We also compute comprehensive replacement rates, which account for employer provided non-wage compensation and differential tax treatment of labor income and UI. 69% of UI-eligible unemployed have comprehensive replacement rates above 100% and the median comprehensive replacement rate is 134%. The presence of the FPUC has important implications for the incidence of the recession and reverses income patterns which would have otherwise arisen across income levels, occupations, and industries.
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间的美国失业保险替代率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用个人收入的微观数据以及各州失业保险系统的细节，计算了在《CARES法案》实施的统一600美元联邦大流行失业补偿补充金之后失业保险福利的分布。我们发现，在2020年4月至7月期间，76%有资格获得常规失业补偿的工人的法定替代率超过100%，这意味着他们有资格获得超过损失的工资的福利。中位法定替代率为145%。我们还计算了综合替代率，该替代率考虑了雇主提供的非工资补偿以及劳动收入和失业保险的差别税收待遇。69%有资格领取失业保险的失业者综合替代率超过100%，中位综合替代率为134%。联邦大流行失业补偿的存在对经济衰退的影响分布具有重要意义，并逆转了原本会在不同收入水平、职业和行业之间出现的收入模式。

papers.title: The Economics of Urban Density
papers.authors: Gilles Duranton, Diego Puga
papers.abstract: Urban density boosts productivity and innovation, improves access to goods and services, reduces typical travel distances, encourages energy-efficient construction and transport, and facilitates sharing scarce amenities. However, density is also synonymous with crowding, makes living and moving in cities more costly, and concentrates exposure to pollution and disease. We explore the appropriate measurement of density and describe how it is both a cause and a consequence of the evolution of cities. We then discuss whether and how policy should target density and why the trade-off between its pros and cons is unhappily resolved by market and political forces.
papers.zh_title: 城市密度的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 城市密度能提高生产力和创新，改善商品和服务的获取，减少典型出行距离，鼓励节能建筑和交通，并促进共享稀缺便利设施。然而，密度也等同于拥挤，使在城市生活和出行成本更高，并集中了污染和疾病的暴露风险。我们探讨了密度的适当衡量方法，并描述了它如何既是城市演变的原因也是其结果。然后，我们讨论了政策是否以及如何应以密度为目标，以及为什么其利弊之间的权衡被市场和政治力量不幸地解决。

papers.title: Cyclical Lending Standards: A Structural Analysis
papers.authors: Kaiji Chen, Patrick C. Higgins, Tao Zha
papers.abstract: Lending standards are a direct measure of credit conditions. We use the micro data merged from three separate sources to construct this measure and document that an uncertain macroeconomic outlook, rather than banks' balance sheet positions, was an important reason that a majority of banks tightened bank lending standards during the Great Recession. Our extensive data analysis disciplines how we introduce credit frictions in the banking sector into a macroeconomic model. The model estimation reveals that an exogenous shock to credit supply drives cyclical lending standards and accounts for a significant portion of fluctuations in bank loans and aggregate output.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C51, C81, C82, E32, E44, G21
papers.zh_title: 周期性贷款标准：一项结构性分析
papers.zh_abstract: 贷款标准是信贷条件的直接衡量指标。我们使用来自三个不同来源合并的微观数据来构建这一指标，并记录到，在大衰退期间，不确定的宏观经济前景（而非银行的资产负债表状况）是大多数银行收紧银行贷款标准的重要原因。我们广泛的数据分析约束了我们将银行部门的信贷摩擦引入宏观经济模型的方式。模型估计揭示，对信贷供给的外生冲击驱动了周期性贷款标准，并解释了银行贷款和总产出波动的很大一部分。

papers.title: In Search of Distress Risk in Emerging Markets
papers.authors: Gonzalo Asis, Anusha Chari, Adam Haas
papers.abstract: This paper employs a novel multi-country dataset of corporate defaults to develop a model of distress risk specific to emerging markets. The data suggest that global financial variables such as US interest rates and shifts in global liquidity and risk aversion have significant predictive power for forecasting corporate distress risk in emerging markets. We document a positive distress risk premium in emerging market equities and show that the impact of a global "risk-off" environment on default risk is greater for firms whose returns are more sensitive to a composite global factor.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：F3, G12, G15, G33
papers.zh_title: 寻找新兴市场的困境风险
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个新颖的多国企业违约数据集，开发了一个特定于新兴市场的困境风险模型。数据表明，全球金融变量，如美国利率以及全球流动性和风险偏好的变化，对预测新兴市场的企业困境风险具有显著的预测能力。我们记录了新兴市场股票中正的困境风险溢价，并表明，对于其收益对综合全球因素更敏感的公司，全球“避险”环境对违约风险的影响更大。

papers.title: Financing Vaccines for Global Health Security
papers.authors: Jonathan T. Vu, Benjamin K. Kaplan, Shomesh Chaudhuri, Monique K. Mansoura, Andrew W. Lo
papers.abstract: Recent outbreaks of infectious pathogens such as Zika, Ebola, and COVID-19 have underscored the need for the dependable availability of vaccines against emerging infectious diseases (EIDs). The cost and risk of R&D programs and uniquely unpredictable demand for EID vaccines have discouraged vaccine developers, and government and nonprofit agencies have been unable to provide timely or sufficient incentives for their development and sustained supply. We analyze the economic returns of a portfolio of EID vaccine assets, and find that under realistic financing assumptions, the expected returns are significantly negative, implying that the private sector is unlikely to address this need without public-sector intervention. We have sized the financing deficit for this portfolio and analyze several potential solutions, including price increases, enhanced public-private partnerships, and subscription models through which individuals would pay annual fees to obtain access to a portfolio of vaccines in the event of an outbreak.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EH；JEL：G11, G12, G31, G32, G38, H12, H41, H51, I11, I18, L11, L52, Q54
papers.zh_title: 为全球卫生安全融资疫苗
papers.zh_abstract: 近期寨卡、埃博拉和COVID-19等传染性病原体的爆发，凸显了对针对新兴传染病的疫苗可靠供应的需求。研发项目的成本和风险，以及新兴传染病疫苗独特不可预测的需求，阻碍了疫苗开发商，而政府和非营利机构未能为其开发和持续供应提供及时或充分的激励。我们分析了一个新兴传染病疫苗资产组合的经济回报，发现在现实的融资假设下，预期回报显著为负，这意味着私营部门在没有公共部门干预的情况下不太可能满足这一需求。我们估算了该投资组合的融资缺口，并分析了几个潜在的解决方案，包括提价、加强公私合作伙伴关系，以及个人通过支付年费以获得在疫情爆发时获取疫苗组合的订阅模式。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Actions, Beliefs, Constraints and Risk Tolerance During the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Ying Fan, A. Yeşim Orhun, Dana Turjeman
papers.abstract: During a pandemic, an individual's choices can determine outcomes not only for the individual but also for the entire community. Beliefs, constraints and preferences may shape behavior. This paper documents demographic differences in behaviors, beliefs, constraints and risk preferences across gender, income and political affiliation lines during the new coronavirus disease (COVID-19) pandemic. Our main analyses are based on data from an original nationally representative survey covering 5,500 adult respondents in the U.S. We find substantial gaps in behaviors and beliefs across gender, income and partisanship lines; in constraints across income levels; and in risk tolerance among men and women. Based on location data from a large sample of smartphones, we also document significant differences in mobility across demographics, which are consistent with our findings based on the survey data.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D81, D84, D91, H41, I12, I18
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间的异质性行为、信念、约束与风险承受力
papers.zh_abstract: 在疫情期间，个人的选择不仅决定自身结果，也影响整个社区。信念、约束和偏好可能塑造行为。本文记录了新冠疫情期间，不同性别、收入和党派群体在行为、信念、约束和风险偏好方面的人口统计学差异。我们的主要分析基于一项覆盖美国5500名成年受访者的全国代表性原始调查数据。我们发现，不同性别、收入和党派群体在行为和信念上存在显著差距；不同收入水平在约束上存在差距；男性和女性在风险承受力上存在差距。基于大量智能手机样本的位置数据，我们还记录了不同人口群体在流动性上的显著差异，这与我们基于调查数据的发现一致。

papers.title: Collateralized Marriage
papers.authors: Jeanne Lafortune, Corinne Low
papers.abstract: We study the role of wealth in the marriage contract by developing a model of the household where investments in public goods can be made at the cost of future earnings. If couples cannot commit ex ante to a suﬃciently equal post-divorce allocation, specialization and public good creation will be sub-optimal. However, accumulating joint assets, which the marriage contract speciﬁes are to be divided in the case of divorce, can reduce this problem by oﬀering insurance to the lower earning partner. Our model demonstrates that access to this “collateralized” version of the contract will lead to more household specialization, more public goods, and a higher value of marriage. To test the model’s predictions, we use homeownership as a proxy for access to joint savings technology, since homes are particularly likely to be divided in a way that favors the lower earning partner. We use idiosyncratic variation in housing prices at the time of marriage and an instrumental variables strategy to show that quasi-exogenous variation in homeownership access leads to greater specialization. We then show that as policies made marriage and non-marital fertility more similar in other ways, wealth has become a more important determinant of who marries. Our model and empirical results suggest wealthy individuals can access a more advantageous marriage contract, which has important policy implications.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：D13, D14, D31, J12, J22, J24
papers.zh_title: 抵押婚姻
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个家庭模型来研究财富在婚姻契约中的作用，在该模型中，公共品投资可能以牺牲未来收入为代价。如果夫妻无法事前承诺足够平等的离婚后分配，那么专业化和公共品创造将无法达到最优。然而，积累婚姻契约规定在离婚时需分割的共同资产，可以通过为低收入伴侣提供保险来缓解这一问题。我们的模型表明，获得这种“抵押”形式的契约将导致更多的家庭专业化、更多的公共品以及更高的婚姻价值。为了检验模型的预测，我们使用住房所有权作为获得共同储蓄技术的代理变量，因为住房尤其可能以有利于低收入伴侣的方式进行分割。我们利用结婚时房价的特异性波动和工具变量策略，证明住房所有权获取的准外生变化导致了更大的专业化。然后我们表明，随着政策使婚姻和非婚生育在其他方面更加相似，财富已成为决定谁结婚的更重要因素。我们的模型和实证结果表明，富人可以获取更有利的婚姻契约，这具有重要的政策含义。

papers.title: Housing Search Frictions: Evidence from Detailed Search Data and a Field Experiment
papers.authors: Peter Bergman, Eric W. Chan, Adam Kapor
papers.abstract: We randomized school quality information onto the listings of a nationwide housing website for low-income families. We use this variation and data on families' search and location choices to estimate a model of housing search and neighborhood choice that incorporates imperfect information and potentially biased beliefs. We find that imperfect information and biased beliefs cause families to live in neighborhoods with lower-performing, more segregated schools. Families underestimate school quality conditional on neighborhood characteristics. If we had ignored this information problem, we would have estimated that families value school quality relative to their commute downtown by half that of the truth.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, IO, PE；JEL：I0, I21, I24, I3, R0, R21, R31
papers.zh_title: 住房搜索摩擦：来自详细搜索数据和实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个面向低收入家庭的全国性住房网站房源信息中随机加入了学校质量信息。我们利用这一变化以及家庭搜索和选址决策的数据，估计了一个包含不完全信息和潜在有偏信念的住房搜索与社区选择模型。我们发现，不完全信息和有偏信念导致家庭居住在拥有表现更差、更隔离学校的社区。家庭在给定社区特征的情况下低估了学校质量。如果我们忽略这一信息问题，我们估计的家庭对学校质量的重视程度（相对于通勤至市中心）将只有真实值的一半。

papers.title: Corporate Hiring under COVID-19: Labor Market Concentration, Downskilling, and Income Inequality
papers.authors: Murillo Campello, Gaurav Kankanhalli, Pradeep Muthukrishnan
papers.abstract: Big data on job-vacancy postings reveal several dimensions of the impact of COVID-19 on the U.S. job market. Firms have cut back on postings for high-skill jobs more than for low-skill jobs, with small firms nearly halting their new hiring altogether. New-hiring cuts and downskilling are most pronounced in local labor markets lacking depth (where employment is concentrated within a few firms), in low-income areas, and in areas with greater income inequality. Cuts are deeper in industries where workers are more unionized and in the non-tradable sector. Access to finance modulates corporate hiring, with credit-constrained firms curtailing their job postings the most. Our study shows how the early-2020 global pandemic is shaping the dynamics of hiring, identifying the firms, jobs, places, industries, and labor markets most affected by it. Our results point to important challenges to the scale and speed of a recovery.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19下的企业招聘：劳动力市场集中度、技能降级与收入不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 基于职位空缺发布的大数据揭示了COVID-19对美国就业市场影响的多个维度。企业削减高技能岗位招聘的幅度大于低技能岗位，小企业几乎完全停止了新招聘。新招聘削减和技能降级在缺乏深度的本地劳动力市场（即就业集中在少数几家企业）、低收入地区以及收入不平等程度更高的地区最为显著。在工会化程度更高的行业和非贸易部门，招聘削减更为严重。融资渠道调节着企业招聘，信贷受限的企业职位发布削减最多。我们的研究展示了2020年初的全球大流行如何塑造招聘动态，识别出受影响最严重的企业、岗位、地区、行业和劳动力市场。我们的结果指出了复苏规模和速度面临的重大挑战。

papers.title: Can the Covid Bailouts Save the Economy?
papers.authors: Vadim Elenev, Tim Landvoigt, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: The covid-19 crisis has led to a sharp deterioration in firm and bank balance sheets. The government has responded with a massive intervention in corporate credit markets. We study equilibrium dynamics of macroeconomic quantities and prices, and how they are affected by government policy. The interventions prevent a much deeper crisis by reducing corporate bankruptcies by about half and short-circuiting the doom loop between corporate and financial sector fragility. The additional fiscal cost is zero since program spending replaces what would otherwise have been spent on intermediary bailouts. The model predicts rising interest rates on government debt and slow debt pay-down. We analyze an alternative intervention that targets aid to firms at risk of bankruptcy. While this policy prevents more bankruptcies and has lower fiscal cost, it only enjoys marginally higher welfare. Finally, we study longer-run consequences for firm leverage and intermediary health when pandemics become the new normal.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E3, E4, E44, E6, G1
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情救助能否拯救经济？
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情危机导致企业和银行资产负债表急剧恶化。政府以大规模干预企业信贷市场作为回应。我们研究了宏观经济总量和价格的均衡动态，以及政府政策如何影响它们。这些干预措施通过将企业破产减少约一半并阻断企业与金融部门脆弱性之间的厄运循环，防止了更严重的危机。额外的财政成本为零，因为项目支出取代了原本用于中介救助的支出。该模型预测政府债务利率上升且债务偿还缓慢。我们分析了一种针对濒临破产企业的替代干预措施。虽然这一政策能防止更多破产且财政成本更低，但它仅带来边际上更高的福利。最后，我们研究了大流行成为新常态时对企业杠杆和中介机构健康的长期影响。

papers.title: Innovation, Growth and Structural Change in American Agriculture
papers.authors: Julian M. Alston, Philip G. Pardey
papers.abstract: U.S. agriculture was transformed during the 20th century by waves of innovation with mechanical, biological, chemical, and information technologies. Compared with a few decades ago, today’s agriculture is much less labor intensive and farms are much larger and more specialized, supplying a much-evolved market for farm products. Over recent decades, the global landscape for agricultural R&D has shifted away from farms, away from the public sector toward the private sector, and away from the United States towards agriculturally important middle-income countries, especially China, India and Brazil. U.S. investments in agricultural R&D are stalling even though meta-evidence shows that past U.S. investments in agricultural R&D have yielded very favorable returns: median reported benefit-cost ratios in the range of 12:1. Sustained U.S. investment and innovation will be required to preserve past productivity gains in the face of climate change, coevolving pests and diseases, and changing technological regulations—let alone increase productivity. Great potential exists for innovation in crop and livestock genetics and digital farming technologies to generate new products and production processes, but innovators are facing increasingly strong headwinds from social and political forces that seek to dictate technology choices.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, PR；JEL：O13, O3, O4, O51, Q16, Q28, Q52
papers.zh_title: 美国农业的创新、增长与结构变迁
papers.zh_abstract: 20世纪，美国农业经历了机械、生物、化学和信息技术创新浪潮的变革。与几十年前相比，今天的农业劳动密集度大大降低，农场规模更大、更专业化，服务于一个高度演变的农产品市场。近几十年来，全球农业研发格局已从农场转移，从公共部门转向私营部门，并从美国转向农业重要的中等收入国家，特别是中国、印度和巴西。尽管元证据表明美国过去的农业研发投资已产生非常可观的回报（报告的中位效益成本比约为12:1），但美国的农业研发投资正在停滞。面对气候变化、共同进化的病虫害以及不断变化的技术法规，要保持过去的生产率增长——更不用说提高生产率——需要持续的美国投资和创新。在作物和牲畜遗传学以及数字农业技术方面，创新具有巨大潜力，可以创造新产品和生产流程，但创新者正面临来自试图左右技术选择的社会和政治力量日益强大的阻力。

papers.title: Do Environmental Markets Cause Environmental Injustice? Evidence from California's Carbon Market
papers.authors: Danae Hernandez-Cortes, Kyle C. Meng
papers.abstract: Market-based environmental policies are widely adopted on the basis of allocative efficiency. However, there is growing concern that market-induced spatial reallocation of pollution could widen existing pollution concentration gaps between disadvantaged and other communities. We examine how this \\environmental justice" (EJ) gap changed following the 2013 introduction of California's carbon market, the world's second largest and the most subjected to EJ critiques. We estimate that the program lowered GHG, PM2:5, PM10, and NOx emissions by 3-9% annually between 2012-2017 for sample industrial facilities regulated only by the carbon market. Using a pollution dispersal model to characterize resulting spatial changes in pollution concentrations, we find the program caused EJ gaps in PM2:5, PM10, and NOx from these facilities to narrow by 6-10% annually. We demonstrate that explicit modeling of pollution dispersal is critical for detecting these results.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, PE；JEL：H4, I14, Q5, Q51, Q52, Q53, Q54
papers.zh_title: 环境市场会导致环境不公正吗？来自加州碳市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 基于市场的环境政策因其配置效率而被广泛采用。然而，人们日益担心市场诱导的污染空间重新分配可能扩大弱势社区与其他社区之间现有的污染浓度差距。我们研究了2013年引入加州碳市场（全球第二大且受环境正义批评最多的碳市场）后，这一“环境正义”差距如何变化。我们估计，在2012-2017年间，对于仅受碳市场监管的样本工业设施，该计划每年使温室气体、PM2.5、PM10和氮氧化物排放量降低3-9%。利用污染扩散模型描述由此产生的污染浓度空间变化，我们发现该计划使这些设施造成的PM2.5、PM10和氮氧化物环境正义差距每年缩小6-10%。我们证明，明确建模污染扩散对于检测这些结果至关重要。

papers.title: Cigarette Taxes and Smoking in the Long Run
papers.authors: Andrew I. Friedson, Daniel I. Rees
papers.abstract: Researchers have focused on the contemporaneous relationship between cigarette taxes and smoking, while the longer-run effects of cigarette taxes have received little attention. Using individual-level panel data from 1970-2017, we estimate the effects of cigarette taxes experienced as a teenager on smoking later in life. We find that a one-dollar increase in the cigarette tax experienced between the ages of 12 and 17 is associated with substantial reductions in smoking participation and intensity among adults in their 20s through mid-60s. Among first-time mothers, it is associated with a reduction in the likelihood of smoking the year of giving birth.
papers.zh_title: 香烟税与长期吸烟行为
papers.zh_abstract: 研究者们一直关注香烟税与吸烟之间的同期关系，而香烟税的长期效应却很少受到关注。利用1970-2017年的个体层面面板数据，我们估算了青少年时期经历的香烟税对日后生活吸烟行为的影响。我们发现，在12至17岁期间经历的香烟税每增加1美元，与20多岁至60多岁成年人吸烟参与率和强度的显著降低相关。对于初为人母的女性，这与分娩当年吸烟可能性的降低相关。

papers.title: Patents, Innovation, and Development
papers.authors: Bronwyn H. Hall
papers.abstract: I survey some recent research on the role of patents in encouraging innovation and growth in developing economies, beginning with a brief history of international patent systems and facts about the current use of patents around the world. I discuss research on the implications of patents for international technology transfer and domestic innovation. This is followed by a review of recent work by myself and co-authors on regional patent systems, the impact of patents on firm performance, and the impact on pharmaceutical patenting and domestic innovation. The conclusion suggests that patents may be relatively unimportant in development, even for middle income countries.
papers.zh_title: 专利、创新与发展
papers.zh_abstract: 我调查了一些关于专利在鼓励发展中经济体创新和增长方面作用的最新研究，首先简要回顾了国际专利制度的历史以及当前全球专利使用情况的事实。我讨论了关于专利对国际技术转让和国内创新影响的研究。随后回顾了我和合著者近期关于区域专利制度、专利对企业绩效的影响以及专利对药品专利和国内创新影响的工作。结论表明，专利在发展过程中可能相对不重要，即使对中等收入国家也是如此。

papers.title: Modeling the Impacts of Agricultural Support Policies on Emissions from Agriculture
papers.authors: David Laborde, Abdullah Mamun, Will Martin, Valeria Piñeiro, Rob Vos
papers.abstract: To understand the impacts of support programs on global emissions, this paper considers the impacts of domestic subsidies, price distortions at the border, and investments in emission-reducing technologies on global greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions from agriculture. In a step towards a full evaluation of the impacts, it uses a counterfactual global model scenario showing how much emissions from agricultural production would change if agricultural support were abolished worldwide. The analysis indicates that, without subsidies paid directly to farmers, output of some emission-intensive activities and agricultural emissions would be smaller. Without agricultural trade protection, however, emissions would be higher. This is partly because protection reduces global demand more than it increases global agricultural supply, and partly because some countries that currently tax agriculture have high emission intensities. Policies that directly reduce emission intensities yield much larger reductions in emissions than those that reduce emission intensities by increasing overall productivity because overall productivity growth creates a rebound effect by reducing product prices and expanding output. A key challenge is designing policy reforms that effectively reduce emissions without jeopardizing other key goals such as improving nutrition and reducing poverty. This analysis is an important building block towards a full understanding the impacts of reforms to agricultural support on mitigation of greenhouse gas emissions and adaptation to climate change. That full analysis is being undertaken in current work incorporating land use changes and examining the impacts of specific reforms on mitigation, resilience and economic outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：F1, F13, F18, O13, O24, O44, Q01, Q17, Q18, Q2, Q28, Q5, Q55, Q58
papers.zh_title: 模拟农业支持政策对农业排放的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 为了理解支持计划对全球排放的影响，本文考虑了国内补贴、边境价格扭曲以及减排技术投资对全球农业温室气体排放的影响。作为全面评估影响的一步，它使用了一个反事实的全球模型情景，展示了如果全球取消农业支持，农业生产排放将如何变化。分析表明，如果没有直接支付给农民的补贴，一些排放密集型活动的产出和农业排放将会减少。然而，如果没有农业贸易保护，排放将会更高。这部分是因为保护措施减少全球需求的程度大于其增加全球农业供给的程度，部分是因为一些目前对农业征税的国家具有高排放强度。直接降低排放强度的政策比通过提高整体生产率来降低排放强度的政策能带来更大的减排效果，因为整体生产率增长通过降低产品价格和扩大产出产生了反弹效应。一个关键挑战是设计有效的政策改革，在不损害改善营养和减少贫困等其他关键目标的情况下减少排放。这项分析是全面理解农业支持改革对温室气体减排和气候变化适应影响的重要基石。该全面分析正在当前工作中进行，纳入了土地利用变化，并考察了具体改革对减排、韧性和经济结果的影响。

papers.title: Urbanization in the Developing World: Too Early or Too Slow?
papers.authors: J. Vernon Henderson, Matthew A. Turner
papers.abstract: We describe patterns of urbanization in the developing world and the extent to which they differ from the developed world. We consider the extent to which urbanization in the developing world can be explained by conventional models of spatial equilibrium. Despite their relative poverty, developing world cities are relatively highly productive, and often provide good access to safe water, improved sanitation, schooling and inoculations. In some parts of the world, they are home to a surprisingly small number of factory workers and a surprisingly large number of farmers. Developing world cities seem to do less well at protecting their residents from lifestyle diseases and crime, their female residents from domestic violence and their children from illness. In thinking about these facts, we note that one strand of the literature focused on structural transformation has suggested that urbanization in the developing is occurring `too early’, while another strand argues that urbanization is occurring `too slow’ to be consistent with conventional models of spatial equilibrium. Despite many differences between developing and developed world cities, our new results combined with those in the literature suggest that models of spatial equilibrium can be adapted to be a useful guide to understanding the process of urbanization in the developing world.
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家的城市化：太早还是太慢？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了发展中国家的城市化模式及其与发达国家的差异程度。我们考虑了空间均衡的传统模型能在多大程度上解释发展中国家的城市化。尽管相对贫困，发展中国家城市的生产率相对较高，并且通常能提供良好的安全用水、改善的卫生设施、学校教育和疫苗接种。在世界某些地区，这些城市中工厂工人的数量出奇地少，而农民的数量出奇地多。发展中国家城市在保护居民免受生活方式疾病和犯罪侵害、保护女性居民免受家庭暴力以及保护儿童免受疾病侵害方面似乎做得较差。在思考这些事实时，我们注意到，专注于结构转型的一支文献认为发展中国家的城市化发生得“太早”，而另一支文献则认为城市化发生得“太慢”，与传统的空间均衡模型不一致。尽管发展中国家和发达国家城市之间存在许多差异，但我们结合文献得出的新结果表明，空间均衡模型可以经过调整，成为理解发展中国家城市化过程的有用指南。

papers.title: Can the World’s Poor Protect Themselves from the New Coronavirus?
papers.authors: Caitlin S. Brown, Martin Ravallion, Dominique van de Walle
papers.abstract: We propose an index of the adequacy of home environments for protection (HEP) from COVID-19, and we compare our index across developing countries using data for one million sampled households from the latest Demographic and Health Surveys. We find that prevailing WHO recommendations for protection posit unrealistic home environments. 90% of households have inadequate HEP by one or more dimensions considered. 40% do not have a formal health-care facility within 5km. A strong wealth effect is indicated within and between countries. Only 6% of the poorest 40% have an adequate HEP, and the proportion is virtually zero in sub-Saharan Africa.
papers.zh_title: 世界上的穷人能保护自己免受新冠病毒侵害吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个家庭环境防护充分性指数，用于评估对新冠病毒的防护能力，并利用来自最新人口与健康调查的一百万抽样家庭数据，在发展中国家之间比较该指数。我们发现，世界卫生组织现行的防护建议设定了不切实际的家庭环境。90%的家庭在考虑的一个或多个维度上家庭环境防护不足。40%的家庭在5公里范围内没有正规的医疗保健设施。国家内部和国家之间显示出强烈的财富效应。在最贫困的40%人口中，只有6%拥有足够的家庭环境防护，而在撒哈拉以南非洲，这一比例几乎为零。

papers.title: Foreign Exchange Order Flow as a Risk Factor
papers.authors: Craig Burnside, Mario Cerrato, Zhekai Zhang
