papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个资产需求体系，用于分析全球各国国际投资组合持有与流动、汇率以及资产价格之间的均衡关系。我们引入了一个嵌套Logit资产需求模型，并为此开发了一种新的工具变量识别策略。按年份和发行国平均计算，短期债务的需求弹性为27.9，长期债务为3.2，股票为1.2。这些需求弹性是国际宏观模型的经验目标，这些模型通过引入无弹性需求来解决国际金融领域长期存在的难题。我们利用估计出的需求体系，将汇率和资产价格的变动分解为投资组合流动和资产需求变化，用于解释欧洲主权债务危机等经济事件，并估算美国资产的便利收益率。以年化预期收益为单位，美元的便利收益率为1.41%，美国长期债务为2.71%，美国股票为0.50%。

papers.title: Searching for Approval
papers.authors: Sumit Agarwal, John Grigsby, Ali Hortaçsu, Gregor Matvos, Amit Seru, Vincent Yao
papers.abstract: We study the interaction of search and application approval in credit markets. We combine a unique dataset, which details search behavior for a large sample of mortgage borrowers, with loan application and rejection decisions. Our data reveal substantial dispersion in mortgage rates and search intensity, conditional on observables. However, in contrast to predictions of standard search models, we find a novel non-monotonic relationship between search and realized prices: borrowers, who search a lot, obtain more expensive mortgages than borrowers' with less frequent search. The evidence suggests that this occurs because lenders screen borrowers' creditworthiness, rejecting unworthy borrowers, which differentiates consumer credit markets from other search markets. Based on these insights, we build a model that combines search and screening in presence of asymmetric information. Risky borrowers internalize the probability that their application is rejected, and behave as if they had higher search costs. The model rationalizes the relationship between search, interest rates, defaults, and application rejections, and highlights the tight link between credit standards and pricing. We estimate the parameters of the model and study several counterfactuals. The model suggests that “overpayment” may be a poor proxy for consumer unsophistication since it partly represents rational search in presence of rejections. Moreover, the development of improved screening technologies from AI and big data (i.e., fintech lending) could endogenously lead to more severe adverse selection in credit markets. Finally, place based policies, such as the Community Reinvestment Act, may affect equilibrium prices through endogenous search responses rather than increased credit risk.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO；JEL：G21, G5, G51, G53, L00
papers.zh_title: 寻求批准
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了信贷市场中搜索与申请审批之间的相互作用。我们将一个独特的数据集（详细记录了大量抵押贷款借款人的搜索行为）与贷款申请和拒绝决策相结合。我们的数据揭示了在可观测变量条件下，抵押贷款利率和搜索强度存在显著离散性。然而，与标准搜索模型的预测相反，我们发现搜索与实际价格之间存在一种新颖的非单调关系：搜索次数多的借款人获得的抵押贷款比搜索次数少的借款人更昂贵。证据表明，这是因为贷款人筛选借款人的信用状况，拒绝不合格的借款人，这使得消费信贷市场区别于其他搜索市场。基于这些见解，我们构建了一个在信息不对称条件下结合搜索与筛选的模型。高风险借款人内化其申请被拒绝的概率，表现得好像他们具有更高的搜索成本。该模型合理化了搜索、利率、违约和申请拒绝之间的关系，并强调了信贷标准与定价之间的紧密联系。我们估计了模型参数并研究了若干反事实情景。模型表明，“超额支付”可能不是消费者不成熟的良好代理变量，因为它部分代表了存在拒绝情况下的理性搜索。此外，人工智能和大数据（即金融科技贷款）带来的筛选技术改进，可能会内生地导致信贷市场中更严重的逆向选择。最后，基于地点的政策，如《社区再投资法案》，可能通过内生的搜索反应而非增加的信用风险来影响均衡价格。

papers.title: Trading Off Consumption and COVID-19 Deaths
papers.authors: Robert E. Hall, Charles I. Jones, Peter J. Klenow
papers.abstract: This note develops a framework for thinking about the following question: What is the maximum amount of consumption that a utilitarian welfare function would be willing to trade off to avoid the deaths associated with the pandemic? The answer depends crucially on the mortality rate associated with the coronavirus. If the mortality rate averages 0.81%, taken from the Imperial College London study, our answer is 41% of one year's consumption. If the mortality rate instead averages 0.44% across age groups, our answer is 28%.
papers.zh_title: 权衡消费与COVID-19死亡
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个框架，用于思考以下问题：功利主义社会福利函数愿意牺牲多少最大消费量，以避免与大流行相关的死亡？答案关键取决于新冠病毒的死亡率。如果死亡率平均为0.81%（取自伦敦帝国理工学院的研究），我们的答案是年消费量的41%。如果死亡率按年龄组平均为0.44%，我们的答案是28%。

papers.title: An Event Study of COVID-19 Central Bank Quantitative Easing in Advanced and Emerging Economies
papers.authors: Jonathan S. Hartley, Alessandro Rebucci, Daniel Jiménez
papers.abstract: This paper conducts an event study of 30 quantitative easing (QE) announcements made by 21 central banks on daily government bond yields and bilateral US dollar exchange rates in March and April 2020, in the midst of the global financial turmoil triggered by the COVID-19 outbreak. The chapter also investigates the transmission of innovations to long-term interest rates in a standard GVAR model estimated with quarterly pre-COVID-19 data. The authors find that QE has not lost effectiveness in advanced economies and that its international transmission is consistent with the working of long-run uncovered interest rate parity and a large dollar shortage shock during the COVID-19 period. In emerging markets, the QE impact on bond yields is much stronger and its transmission to exchange rates is qualitatively different than in advanced economies. The GVAR evidence that the authors report illustrates the Fed’s pivotal role in the global transmission of long-term interest rate shocks, but also the ample scope for country-specific interventions to affect local financial market conditions, even after controlling for common factors and spillovers from other countries. The GVAR evidence also shows that QE interventions can have sizable real effects on output driven by a very persistent impact on long-term interest rates.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E52, E58, F42, G14, I28
papers.zh_title: COVID-19时期发达与新兴经济体央行量化宽松的事件研究
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对2020年3月和4月（即COVID-19疫情引发的全球金融动荡期间）21家央行发布的30次量化宽松公告进行了事件研究，考察其对每日政府债券收益率和美元双边汇率的影响。本章还利用COVID-19前的季度数据，在一个标准全球向量自回归模型中研究了长期利率创新的传导机制。作者发现，量化宽松在发达经济体中并未失效，其国际传导与长期无抛补利率平价的作用以及COVID-19期间大规模美元短缺冲击相一致。在新兴市场，量化宽松对债券收益率的影响更强，且其对汇率的传导在性质上与发达经济体不同。作者报告的全球向量自回归证据表明，美联储在全球长期利率冲击传导中发挥关键作用，但即使在控制了共同因素和其他国家的溢出效应后，各国特定干预措施仍有很大空间影响本地金融市场状况。全球向量自回归证据还显示，量化宽松干预措施可以通过对长期利率的持续影响，对产出产生显著的实际效应。

papers.title: Concentration and Agglomeration of IT Innovation and Entrepreneurship: Evidence from Patenting
papers.authors: Chris Forman, Avi Goldfarb
papers.abstract: Information technology (IT) matters to prosperity. The top patenters are increasingly IT companies. We use data on US patents to document four trends in IT patenting. First, firm-level concentration in IT patenting is increasing over time. Second, geographic concentration in IT patenting is increasing over time. Third, most technology classes experienced a decline in new patenters from 1980 to 2000. This was not true of new IT patents. Since 2000, the trend in new IT patenters looks like other classes and is declining over time. Fourth, there is increased geographic concentration of new IT patenters. We do not identify the reasons behind these trends nor whether they are related to overall changes in industry concentration, agglomeration, or prosperity.
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：L22, L26, M13, M15, O31, O32, O33, O34, R12
papers.zh_title: IT创新与创业的集中与集聚：来自专利的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 信息技术对繁荣至关重要。顶级专利持有者越来越多地是IT公司。我们利用美国专利数据记录了IT专利的四个趋势。第一，IT专利的企业层面集中度随时间推移而上升。第二，IT专利的地理集中度随时间推移而上升。第三，从1980年到2000年，大多数技术类别的新专利持有者数量下降。但新的IT专利并非如此。自2000年以来，新IT专利持有者的趋势与其他类别相似，并随时间推移而下降。第四，新IT专利持有者的地理集中度有所提高。我们没有确定这些趋势背后的原因，也没有确定它们是否与行业集中度、集聚或繁荣的总体变化相关。

papers.title: Party On: The Labor Market Returns to Social Networks in Adolescence
papers.authors: Adriana Lleras-Muney, Matthew Miller, Shuyang Sheng, Veronica T. Sovero
papers.abstract: We investigate the returns to adolescent friendships on earnings in adulthood using data from the National Longitudinal Study of Adolescent to Adult Health. Because both education and friendships are jointly determined in adolescence, OLS estimates of their returns are likely biased. We implement a novel procedure to obtain bounds on the causal returns to friendships: we assume that the returns to schooling range from 5 to 15% (based on prior literature), and instrument for friendships using similarity in age among peers. Having one more friend in adolescence increases earnings between 7 and 14%, substantially more than OLS estimates would suggest.
papers.zh_title: 派对继续：青少年时期社交网络的劳动力市场回报
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用全国青少年至成人健康纵向研究的数据，调查了青少年时期友谊对成年后收入的回报。由于教育和友谊在青少年时期是共同决定的，因此对它们回报的普通最小二乘估计可能存在偏误。我们实施了一种新颖的程序来获得友谊因果回报的边界：我们假设教育回报率在5%到15%之间（基于先前文献），并利用同龄人之间的年龄相似性作为友谊的工具变量。青少年时期每多一个朋友，收入会增加7%到14%，这远高于普通最小二乘估计所暗示的水平。

papers.title: Sibling Correlation in Educational Attainment: A Test of Genetic Nurture
papers.authors: John Cawley, Euna Han, Jiyoon Kim, Edward C. Norton
papers.abstract: The educational attainment of siblings is highly correlated. We test for a specific type of peer effect between siblings in educational attainment: genetic nurture. Specifically, we test whether a person’s educational attainment is correlated with their sibling’s polygenic score (PGS) for educational attainment, controlling for their own PGS for educational attainment. Models estimated using genetic data in the National Longitudinal Survey of Adolescent to Adult Health (Add Health) yield strong evidence of such genetic nurture between siblings, and this result is robust to alternative measures of educational attainment and different measures of polygenic score.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：D1, D13, I2, I21, I23, I24, J13
papers.zh_title: 教育成就的同胞相关性：基因培育的检验
papers.zh_abstract: 兄弟姐妹的教育成就是高度相关的。我们检验了兄弟姐妹之间在教育成就方面的一种特定同伴效应：基因培育。具体来说，我们检验了一个人的教育成就是否与其兄弟姐妹的教育成就多基因评分相关，同时控制了自己的教育成就多基因评分。使用全国青少年至成人健康纵向研究中的遗传数据估计的模型，提供了兄弟姐妹之间存在这种基因培育的有力证据，并且这一结果对于教育成就的替代测量和多基因评分的不同测量方法都是稳健的。

papers.title: Estimating and Forecasting Disease Scenarios for COVID-19 with an SIR Model
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Karen Kopecky, Tao Zha
papers.abstract: This paper presents a procedure for estimating and forecasting disease scenarios for COVID-19 using a structural SIR model of the pandemic. Our procedure combines the flexibility of noteworthy reduced-form approaches for estimating the progression of the COVID-19 pandemic to date with the benefits of a simple SIR structural model for interpreting these estimates and constructing forecast and counterfactual scenarios. We present forecast scenarios for a devastating second wave of the pandemic as well as for a long and slow continuation of current levels of infections and daily deaths. In our counterfactual scenarios, we find that there is no clear answer to the question of whether earlier mitigation measures would have reduced the long run cumulative death toll from this disease. In some cases, we find that it would have, but in other cases, we find the opposite — earlier mitigation would have led to a higher long-run death toll.
papers.zh_title: 使用SIR模型估计和预测COVID-19的疾病情景
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种使用大流行结构性SIR模型来估计和预测COVID-19疾病情景的程序。我们的程序结合了值得注意的简化形式方法在估计COVID-19大流行至今进展方面的灵活性，以及简单SIR结构模型在解释这些估计并构建预测和反事实情景方面的优势。我们展示了大流行毁灭性第二波以及当前感染和每日死亡水平长期缓慢持续这两种情景的预测。在我们的反事实情景中，我们发现对于“更早的缓解措施是否会减少该疾病的长期累计死亡人数”这一问题，没有明确的答案。在某些情况下，我们发现它会减少，但在其他情况下，我们发现相反的情况——更早的缓解措施会导致更高的长期死亡人数。

papers.title: Cities and Smoking
papers.authors: Michael Darden
papers.abstract: In 1956, 52% of urban men and 42% of rural men smoked cigarettes. By 2010, the disparity had flipped: 24.7% of urban men and 30.6% of rural men smoked. Smoking remains the greatest preventable cause of mortality in the United States, and understanding the underlying causes of place-specific differences in behavior is crucial for policy aimed at reducing regional inequality. Using geocoded data from the National Longitudinal Survey of Youth, I estimate a dynamic model that captures smoking behavior, location decisions, and education over thirty years. Simulation of the estimated model demonstrates that selection on permanent unobserved variables that are correlated with smoking cessation, both in native populations and in those who migrate between rural and urban areas, explains 62.8$\\%$ of the urban/rural smoking disparity. Alternatively, differential tobacco control policies explain only 7.3% of the urban/rural smoking disparity, which suggests that equalizing cigarette taxes across regions may fail to bridge gaps in behavior and health. This paper emphasizes that rural smoking disparities are largely driven by who selects into rural communities.
papers.zh_title: 城市与吸烟
papers.zh_abstract: 1956年，52%的城市男性和42%的农村男性吸烟。到2010年，这一差距发生了逆转：24.7%的城市男性和30.6%的农村男性吸烟。吸烟仍然是美国可预防死亡的最大原因，理解行为在地区间差异的根本原因对于旨在减少区域不平等的政策至关重要。利用全国青年纵向调查的地理编码数据，我估计了一个动态模型，该模型捕捉了三十年的吸烟行为、地点决策和教育情况。对估计模型的模拟表明，与戒烟相关的永久性未观测变量的选择效应——无论是在本地人口中还是在城乡迁移者中——解释了城乡吸烟差距的62.8%。相比之下，差异化的烟草控制政策仅解释了城乡吸烟差距的7.3%，这表明跨地区统一香烟税可能无法弥合行为和健康方面的差距。本文强调，农村吸烟差距在很大程度上是由选择进入农村社区的人群所驱动的。

papers.title: Temperature, Disease, and Death in London: Analyzing Weekly Data for the Century from 1866-1965
papers.authors: W. Walker Hanlon, Casper Worm Hansen, Jake W. Kantor
papers.abstract: Using weekly mortality data for London spanning 1866-1965, we analyze the changing relationship between temperature and mortality as the city developed. Our results show that both warm and cold weeks were associated with elevated mortality in the late 19th-century, but heat effects, due mainly to infant deaths from digestive diseases, largely disappeared after WWI. The resulting change in the temperature-mortality relationship meant that thousands of heat-related deaths–equal to 0.8-1.3 percent of all deaths–were averted. Our findings also indicate that a series of hot years in the 1890s substantially changed the timing of the infant mortality decline in London.
papers.zh_title: 温度、疾病与伦敦死亡：分析1866-1965年一个世纪的周度数据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用伦敦1866年至1965年的周度死亡率数据，我们分析了随着城市发展，温度与死亡率之间关系的变化。我们的结果表明，在19世纪末，温暖周和寒冷周都与死亡率升高相关，但主要由婴儿消化系统疾病死亡导致的热效应在第一次世界大战后基本消失。温度-死亡率关系的这种变化意味着数千例与热相关的死亡——占所有死亡的0.8%至1.3%——得以避免。我们的发现还表明，1890年代一系列炎热的年份显著改变了伦敦婴儿死亡率下降的时间节点。

papers.title: The Great Disconnect: The Decoupling of Wage and Price Inflation in Japan
papers.authors: Takeo Hoshi, Anil K Kashyap
papers.abstract: We take some well-known observations about the structure of the Japanese labor market and add new evidence about how it has evolved to study inflation in Japan. Our key finding is that labor market dynamics shifted after 1998 so that correlations between labor market tightness and wages weakened noticeably. This change was accompanied in a break in the relationship between wages and prices, so wage inflation has become a much less important determinant of price inflation.
papers.zh_title: 大脱节：日本工资通胀与价格通胀的解耦
papers.zh_abstract: 我们采用一些关于日本劳动力市场结构的众所周知观察，并添加关于其如何演变的新证据来研究日本的通胀。我们的关键发现是，1998年之后劳动力市场动态发生了变化，使得劳动力市场紧张程度与工资之间的相关性显著减弱。这一变化伴随着工资与价格关系的断裂，因此工资通胀已成为价格通胀的一个远不那么重要的决定因素。

papers.title: Why Didn't the College Premium Rise Everywhere? Employment Protection and On-the-Job Investment in Skills
papers.authors: Matthias Doepke, Ruben Gaetani
papers.abstract: Why has the college wage premium risen rapidly in the United States since the 1980s, but not in European economies such as Germany? We argue that differences in employment protection can account for much of the gap. We develop a model where firms and workers make relationship-specific investments in skill accumulation. The incentive to invest is stronger when employment protection creates an expectation of long-lasting matches. We argue that changes in the economic environment have reduced relationship-specific investment for less-educated workers in the United States, but not for better-protected workers in Germany.
papers.zh_title: 为什么大学溢价并非处处上升？就业保护与在职技能投资
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么自1980年代以来，美国的大学工资溢价迅速上升，而在德国等欧洲经济体却没有？我们认为，就业保护的差异可以解释这一差距的很大一部分。我们构建了一个模型，其中企业和工人对技能积累进行关系专用性投资。当就业保护创造了长期匹配的预期时，投资的激励更强。我们认为，经济环境的变化减少了美国受教育程度较低工人的关系专用性投资，但对于德国受到更好保护的工人则不然。

papers.title: Working Remotely and the Supply-side Impact of Covid-19
papers.authors: Dimitris Papanikolaou, Lawrence D.W. Schmidt
papers.abstract: We analyze the supply-side disruptions associated with Covid-19 across firms and workers. To do so, we exploit differences in the ability of workers across industries to work remotely using data from the American Time Use Survey (ATUS). We find that sectors in which a higher fraction of the workforce is not able to work remotely experienced significantly greater declines in employment, significantly more reductions in expected revenue growth, worse stock market performance, and higher expected likelihood of default. In terms of individual employment outcomes, lower-paid workers, especially female workers with young children, were significantly more affected by these disruptions. Last, we combine these ex-ante heterogeneous industry exposures with daily financial market data to create a stock return portfolio that most closely replicate the supply-side disruptions resulting from the pandemic.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E23, G10, J00
papers.zh_title: 远程工作与新冠疫情的供给侧影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了新冠疫情在企业与工人层面带来的供给侧中断。为此，我们利用美国时间使用调查（ATUS）的数据，考察各行业工人远程工作能力的差异。我们发现，劳动力中无法远程工作比例较高的行业，经历了显著更大的就业下降、预期收入增长更大幅度的减少、更差的股市表现以及更高的预期违约可能性。在个人就业结果方面，收入较低的工人，尤其是有年幼子女的女性工人，受到这些中断的影响显著更大。最后，我们将这些事前异质性的行业暴露度与每日金融市场数据相结合，构建了一个最能复制疫情导致的供给侧中断的股票回报投资组合。

papers.title: Understanding Spatial Variation in COVID-19 across the United States
papers.authors: Klaus Desmet, Romain Wacziarg
papers.abstract: We analyze the correlates of COVID-19 cases and deaths across US counties. We consider a wide range of correlates - population density, public transportation, age structure, nursing home residents, connectedness to source countries, etc. - finding that these variables are important predictors of variation in disease severity. Many of the effects are persistent - even increasing - through time. We also show that there are fewer deaths and cases in counties where Donald Trump received a high share of the vote in 2016, partly explaining the emerging political divide over lockdown and reopening policies, but that this correlation is reversed when controlling for shares of minority groups. The patterns we identify are meant to improve our understanding of the drivers of the spread of COVID-19, with an eye toward helping policymakers design responses that are sensitive to the specificities of different locations.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：I18, R1
papers.zh_title: 理解美国COVID-19的空间差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了美国各县COVID-19病例和死亡的相关因素。我们考虑了一系列广泛的相关因素——人口密度、公共交通、年龄结构、养老院居民、与源国家的联系等——发现这些变量是疾病严重程度差异的重要预测因子。许多效应是持续的，甚至随时间增强。我们还表明，在唐纳德·特朗普2016年获得高投票份额的县，死亡和病例较少，这在一定程度上解释了围绕封锁和重新开放政策出现的政治分歧，但在控制少数群体比例后，这种相关性发生了逆转。我们识别的模式旨在增进对COVID-19传播驱动因素的理解，以期帮助政策制定者设计对不同地点具体情况敏感的对策。

papers.title: Taxes and the Revaluation of Household Wealth
papers.authors: Edward N. Wolff
papers.abstract: Tax deferred assets (TDAs) such as 401(k)s cannot be directly valued with other assets such as homes and stocks because TDAs carry a substantial deferred tax liability on withdrawal. I also net out implicit taxes on accrued capital gains and compare pre-tax and post-tax wealth. The empirical analysis covers 1983-2016 based on the Survey of Consumer Finances for conventional net worth, NW, and augmented wealth, AW, the sum of NW, pension wealth PW, and Social Security wealth SSW. Like TDAs, defined benefit pension and Social Security benefits are taxed on receipt. Netting out implicit taxes lowered PW by 24% in 2016. It also devalued SSW by 14%, NW by 5%, and AW by 8% but the reduction was lower in the 1980s. Subtracting implicit taxes lowered PW and SSW inequality but had no appreciable impact on NW or AW inequality. I also consider the bequest value BV of wealth, including death benefits. While TDAs are still subject to income tax at withdrawal, other assets are valued on a step-up in basis. BV was considerably greater than NW but BV inequality notably lower. When estimated estate taxes due on death are subtracted, BV was substantially lowered and its inequality sharply reduced.
papers.zh_title: 税收与家庭财富的重新估值
papers.zh_abstract: 税收递延资产（TDA），如401(k)计划，不能与房屋和股票等其他资产直接估值，因为TDA在提取时带有大量递延税负。我还扣除了已实现资本收益的隐含税收，并比较了税前和税后财富。实证分析基于1983年至2016年的消费者金融调查数据，涵盖传统净值（NW）和扩增财富（AW），后者是NW、养老金财富（PW）和社会保障财富（SSW）的总和。与TDA类似，固定收益养老金和社会保障福利在领取时需纳税。扣除隐含税收后，2016年PW降低了24%。这也使SSW贬值14%，NW贬值5%，AW贬值8%，但在1980年代降幅较低。减去隐含税收降低了PW和SSW的不平等，但对NW或AW的不平等没有显著影响。我还考虑了财富的遗赠价值（BV），包括死亡抚恤金。虽然TDA在提取时仍需缴纳所得税，但其他资产按成本基础递增估值。BV远大于NW，但BV的不平等显著较低。当扣除估计的死亡时应缴遗产税后，BV大幅降低，其不平等性也急剧下降。

papers.title: Belief Elicitation: Limiting Truth Telling with Information on Incentives
papers.authors: David Danz, Lise Vesterlund, Alistair J. Wilson
papers.abstract: Belief elicitation is central to inference on economic decision making. The recently introduced Binarized Scoring Rule (BSR) is heralded for its robustness to individuals holding risk averse preferences and for its superior performance when eliciting beliefs. Consequently, the BSR has become the state-of-the-art mechanism. We study truth telling under the BSR and examine whether information on the offered incentives improves reports about a known objective prior. We find that transparent information on incentives gives rise to error rates in excess of 40 percent, and that only 15 percent of participants consistently report the truth. False reports are conservative and appear to result from a biased perception of the BSR incentives. While attempts to debias are somewhat successful, the highest degree of truth telling occurs when information on quantitative incentives is withheld. Consistent with incentives driving false reports, we find that slow release of information decreases truth telling. Perversely, our results suggest that information on the BSR incentives substantially distorts reported beliefs.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C91, D82
papers.zh_title: 信念诱导：用激励信息限制说真话
papers.zh_abstract: 信念诱导是推断经济决策的核心。最近引入的二元评分规则（BSR）因其对个体风险厌恶偏好的稳健性以及在诱导信念时的优越表现而备受推崇。因此，BSR已成为最先进的机制。我们研究BSR下的说真话行为，并考察关于所提供激励的信息是否改善了关于已知客观先验的报告。我们发现，关于激励的透明信息导致错误率超过40%，且只有15%的参与者始终报告真相。虚假报告是保守的，似乎源于对BSR激励的偏见感知。虽然去偏尝试取得了一定成功，但最高程度的说真话发生在隐瞒定量激励信息时。与激励驱动虚假报告一致，我们发现信息的缓慢释放降低了说真话率。反常的是，我们的结果表明，关于BSR激励的信息显著扭曲了报告信念。

papers.title: Holiday, Just One Day Out of Life: Birth Timing and Post-natal Outcomes
papers.authors: Mireille Jacobson, Maria Kogelnik, Heather Royer
papers.abstract: Fewer births occur on major US holidays than would otherwise be expected. We use California data to study the nature and health implications of this birth date manipulation. We document 18% fewer births on the day of and just after a holiday. Cesarean sections account for roughly half of the decline. Using insights from the tax bunching and test score manipulation literature, we show that “missing” holiday births are displaced to a window of time 11 days before the holiday through 16 days after the holiday. Delivery type does not change over this window, consistent with a pure retiming of births rather than an increase in the use of procedures such as cesarean sections. Despite the change in timing, we find little evidence of any adverse health consequences for babies born around a holiday. Even among high-risk pregnancies, which are more likely to be retimed, we find a minimal impact of holiday-related birth timing manipulation on infant health. Finally, while some of the retiming seems to be driven by patients’ preferences, provider incentives appear to play a crucial role in holiday-related birth retiming. At Kaiser Permanente hospitals, where systemwide financial incentives discourage providers from electively timing births, the dip in births on holidays is less than for hospitals overall. This suggests that holiday retiming occurs more frequently among providers who face less of a disincentive to electively schedule births.
papers.zh_title: 假日，生命中的一天：出生时机与产后结果
papers.zh_abstract: 美国主要假日的出生人数低于预期。我们利用加利福尼亚州的数据研究这种出生日期操纵的性质及其健康影响。我们记录到，假日当天及之后一天的出生人数减少了18%。剖腹产约占下降的一半。借鉴税收聚集和考试成绩操纵文献的见解，我们表明，“缺失”的假日出生被重新安排到假日前后共27天的时间窗口内（假日前的11天至假日后的16天）。在此窗口期内，分娩类型没有变化，这与出生时间的纯粹重新安排一致，而非剖腹产等手术使用增加。尽管时机改变，我们几乎没有发现假日前后出生的婴儿有任何不良健康后果的证据。即使在更可能被重新安排的高危妊娠中，我们也发现与假日相关的出生时机操纵对婴儿健康的影响极小。最后，虽然部分重新安排似乎由患者偏好驱动，但提供者的激励在假日相关的出生重新安排中似乎起着关键作用。在凯撒医疗集团医院，由于全系统财务激励措施阻止提供者选择性安排分娩时间，假日出生人数的下降幅度小于整体医院。这表明，在面临较少阻止选择性安排分娩的激励的提供者中，假日重新安排发生得更频繁。

papers.title: Imperfect Competition and Rents in Labor and Product Markets: The Case of the Construction Industry
papers.authors: Kory Kroft, Yao Luo, Magne Mogstad, Bradley Setzler
papers.abstract: Existing work on imperfect competition typically focuses on either the labor market or the product market in isolation. In contrast, we analyze imperfect competition in both markets jointly, showing theoretically and empirically that focusing on one market in isolation may result in a limited or misleading picture of the degree and impacts of market power. Our empirical setting is the US construction industry. We develop, identify and estimate a model where construction firms imperfectly compete with one another for workers in the labor market and for projects in both the private market and the government market, where government projects are procured through auctions. Our analyses combine the universe of business and worker tax records with newly collected records from government procurement auctions. We use the estimated model to quantify the markdown of wages and the markup of prices, to show that the impacts of an increase in market power in one market are attenuated by the existence of market power in the other market, and to quantify the rents, rent-sharing, and incidence of procurements in the US construction industry.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE；JEL：D44, J31, J42, L11
papers.zh_title: 劳动与产品市场的不完全竞争与租金：以建筑业为例
papers.zh_abstract: 现有关于不完全竞争的研究通常孤立地关注劳动力市场或产品市场。相比之下，我们联合分析两个市场的不完全竞争，从理论和实证上表明，孤立地关注一个市场可能导致对市场势力程度和影响的有限或误导性认识。我们的实证背景是美国建筑业。我们开发、识别并估计了一个模型，其中建筑公司在劳动力市场上为工人进行不完全竞争，在私人市场和政府市场（政府项目通过拍卖采购）上为项目进行不完全竞争。我们的分析结合了所有企业和工人税务记录以及新收集的政府采购拍卖记录。我们利用估计的模型量化工资的压价和价格的加价，表明一个市场市场势力的增加会被另一个市场市场势力的存在所削弱，并量化美国建筑业中的租金、租金分享和采购的归宿。

papers.title: Policing the Police: The Impact of "Pattern-or-Practice" Investigations on Crime
papers.authors: Tanaya Devi, Roland G. Fryer Jr
papers.abstract: This paper provides the first empirical examination of the impact of federal and state "Pattern-or-Practice" investigations on crime and policing. For investigations that were not preceded by "viral" incidents of deadly force, investigations, on average, led to a statistically significant reduction in homicides and total crime. In stark contrast, all investigations that were preceded by "viral" incidents of deadly force have led to a large and statistically significant increase in homicides and total crime. We estimate that these investigations caused almost 900 excess homicides and almost 34,000 excess felonies. The leading hypothesis for why these investigations increase homicides and total crime is an abrupt change in the quantity of policing activity. In Chicago, the number of police-civilian interactions decreased by almost 90% in the month after the investigation was announced. In Riverside CA, interactions decreased 54%. In St. Louis, self-initiated police activities declined by 46%. Other theories we test such as changes in community trust or the aggressiveness of consent decrees associated with investigations -- all contradict the data in important ways.
papers.zh_title: 监管警察：“模式或实践”调查对犯罪的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文首次实证检验了联邦和州级“模式或实践”调查对犯罪和警务的影响。对于未事先发生“病毒式传播”致命武力事件的调查，平均而言，调查导致凶杀案和总犯罪率在统计上显著下降。与此形成鲜明对比的是，所有事先发生“病毒式传播”致命武力事件的调查都导致凶杀案和总犯罪率大幅且统计上显著上升。我们估计，这些调查造成了近900起额外凶杀案和近34,000起额外重罪。关于这些调查为何增加凶杀案和总犯罪率的主要假设是警务活动数量的急剧变化。在芝加哥，调查宣布后的一个月内，警察与平民的互动次数减少了近90%。在加利福尼亚州里弗赛德，互动减少了54%。在圣路易斯，警察主动发起的活动减少了46%。我们测试的其他理论，如社区信任的变化或与调查相关的同意令的严厉程度，都在重要方面与数据相矛盾。

papers.title: Reserve Accumulation, Macroeconomic Stabilization, and Sovereign Risk
papers.authors: Javier Bianchi, César Sosa-Padilla
papers.abstract: In the past three decades, governments in emerging markets have accumulated large amounts of international reserves, especially those with fixed exchange rates. This paper proposes a theory of reserve accumulation that can account for these facts. Using a model of endogenous sovereign default with nominal rigidities, we argue that the interaction between sovereign risk and aggregate demand amplification generates a macroeconomic-stabilization hedging role for international reserves. We show that issuing debt to purchase reserves during good times allows the government to stabilize aggregate demand when sovereign spreads rise and rolling over the debt becomes more expensive. We provide empirical evidence consistent with the model's predictions.
papers.zh_title: 储备积累、宏观经济稳定与主权风险
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去三十年中，新兴市场政府积累了大量的国际储备，尤其是那些实行固定汇率制的国家。本文提出了一种能够解释这些事实的储备积累理论。利用一个包含名义刚性的内生主权违约模型，我们认为主权风险与总需求放大之间的相互作用为国际储备产生了宏观经济稳定的对冲作用。我们表明，在经济景气时期发行债务以购买储备，使政府能够在主权利差上升且债务展期成本更高时稳定总需求。我们提供了与模型预测一致的实证证据。

papers.title: Are the Effects of Adoption and Termination of Shelter-in-Place Orders Symmetric? Evidence from a Natural Experiment
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Policymakers have explicitly linked sustained reductions in COVID-19 case growth to reopening policies, including the lifting of shelter-in-place orders (SIPOs). This “hardwired” policy endogeneity creates challenges in isolating the causal effect of lifting a statewide SIPO on COVID-19. To overcome simultaneity bias, we exploit a unique natural experiment generated by the Wisconsin Supreme Court when it abolished Wisconsin’s “Safer at Home” order on separation-of-powers grounds. We capitalize on this sudden, dramatic, and largely unanticipated termination of a statewide SIPO to estimate its effect on social distancing and COVID-19 case growth. First, using anonymized smartphone data from SafeGraph Inc. and a synthetic control design, we find that SIPO termination had little impact on social distancing. Then, using data on COVID-19 case and mortality rates, we find no evidence that the Wisconsin Supreme Court decision impacted COVID-19 growth up to a month following the repeal. We conclude that the impacts of SIPOs are likely not symmetric across enactment and lifting of orders, and this asymmetry sheds new light on the potential mechanisms underlying the effectiveness of these orders.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I18
papers.zh_title: 居家令的颁布与终止效应是否对称？来自自然实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 政策制定者明确将COVID-19病例增长的持续下降与重新开放政策（包括解除居家令）联系起来。这种“硬连线”的政策内生性给隔离全州居家令对COVID-19的因果效应带来了挑战。为了克服同时性偏差，我们利用了威斯康星州最高法院以分权原则废除该州“居家更安全”令所产生的独特自然实验。我们利用这一突然、剧烈且基本未预料到的全州居家令终止，来估计其对社交距离和COVID-19病例增长的影响。首先，使用SafeGraph Inc.的匿名智能手机数据和合成控制设计，我们发现居家令终止对社交距离几乎没有影响。然后，利用COVID-19病例和死亡率数据，我们没有发现证据表明威斯康星州最高法院的裁决在废除令后一个月内影响了COVID-19的增长。我们得出结论，居家令的影响在颁布和解除之间可能不对称，这种不对称性为这些命令有效性的潜在机制提供了新的见解。

papers.title: The Employment Impact of Green Fiscal Push: Evidence from the American Recovery Act
papers.authors: David Popp, Francesco Vona, Giovanni Marin, Ziqiao Chen
papers.abstract: We evaluate the employment effect of the green part of the largest fiscal stimulus in recent history, the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act (ARRA). Each $1 million of green ARRA created 15 new jobs that emerged especially in the post-ARRA period (2013-2017). We find little evidence of significant short-run employment gains. Green ARRA creates more jobs in commuting zones with a greater prevalence of pre-existing green skills. Nearly half of the jobs created by green ARRA investments were in construction or waste management. Nearly all new jobs created are manual labor positions. Nonetheless, manual labor wages did not increase.
papers.zh_title: 绿色财政刺激的就业影响：来自《美国复苏与再投资法案》的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了近期历史上最大规模财政刺激计划——《美国复苏与再投资法案》——中绿色部分的就业效应。每100万美元的绿色ARRA创造了15个新工作岗位，这些岗位尤其出现在后ARRA时期（2013-2017年）。我们几乎没有发现短期就业显著增长的证据。绿色ARRA在预先存在更多绿色技能的通勤区创造了更多就业机会。绿色ARRA投资创造的近一半工作岗位属于建筑或废物管理行业。几乎所有新创造的工作都是体力劳动岗位。尽管如此，体力劳动工资并未上涨。

papers.title: Civic Capital and Social Distancing during the Covid-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, Efraim Benmelech, Yael V. Hochberg, Paola Sapienza, Luigi Zingales
papers.abstract: The success of non-pharmaceutical interventions to contain pandemics often depends greatly upon voluntary compliance with government guidelines. What explains variation in voluntary compliance? Using mobile phone and survey data, we show that during the early phases of COVID-19, voluntary social distancing was higher when individuals exhibit a higher sense of civic duty. This is true for U.S. individuals, U.S. counties, and European regions. We also show that after U.S. states began re-opening, social distancing remained more prevalent in high civic capital counties. Our evidence points to the importance of civic capital in designing public policy responses to pandemics.
papers.zh_title: 公民资本与COVID-19疫情期间的社交距离
papers.zh_abstract: 非药物干预措施控制疫情的成功往往在很大程度上取决于公众对政府指导方针的自愿遵守。是什么解释了自愿遵守的差异？利用手机和调查数据，我们表明，在COVID-19早期阶段，当个人表现出更强的公民责任感时，自愿社交距离更高。这对于美国个人、美国县和欧洲地区都是如此。我们还表明，在美国各州开始重新开放后，高公民资本县的社交距离仍然更为普遍。我们的证据指出了公民资本在设计应对疫情的公共政策中的重要性。

papers.title: Broad Bracketing for Low Probability Events
papers.authors: Shereen J. Chaudhry, Michael Hand, Howard Kunreuther
papers.abstract: Individuals tend to underprepare for rare, catastrophic events because of biases in risk perception. A simple form of broad bracketing—presenting the cumulative probability of loss over a longer time horizon—has the potential to alleviate these barriers to risk perception and increase protective actions such as purchasing flood insurance. However, it is an open question whether broad bracketing effects last over time: There is evidence that descriptive probability information is ignored when decisions are made from “experience” (repeatedly and in the face of feedback), which describes many protective decisions. Across six incentive-compatible experiments with high stakes, we find that the broad bracketing effect does not disappear or change size when decisions are made from experience. We also advance our understanding of the mechanisms underlying broad bracketing, finding that, while cumulative probability size is a strong driver of the effect, this is dampened for larger brackets which lead people to be less sensitive to probability size.
papers.zh_title: 低概率事件的宽框架化
papers.zh_abstract: 由于风险认知偏差，个人往往对罕见的灾难性事件准备不足。一种简单的宽框架化形式——呈现更长时间范围内的累积损失概率——有可能缓解这些风险认知障碍，并增加购买洪水保险等保护性行动。然而，宽框架化效应是否随时间持续仍是一个悬而未决的问题：有证据表明，当决策基于“经验”（反复进行并面对反馈）时，描述性概率信息会被忽略，而这描述了许多保护性决策。在六个激励相容的高风险实验中，我们发现，当决策基于经验时，宽框架化效应不会消失或改变大小。我们还推进了对宽框架化机制的理解，发现虽然累积概率大小是该效应的强大驱动因素，但对于更大的框架，这种效应会被削弱，因为更大的框架使人们对概率大小不那么敏感。

papers.title: Gender Differences in Negotiation: Evidence from Real Estate Transactions
papers.authors: Steffen Andersen, Julie Marx, Kasper Meisner Nielsen, Lise Vesterlund
papers.abstract: We investigate negotiations over real estate and find that men secure better prices than women when negotiating to buy and sell property. However, the gender difference declines substantially when improving controls for the property’s value; and is eliminated when controlling for unobserved heterogeneity in a sample of repeated sales. Rather than evidence of gender differences in negotiation, the initial difference in prices is evidence that men and women demand different properties. Consistently we find no gender difference in the sales price secured for property inherited from a deceased parent. Provided appropriate controls men and women fare equally well when negotiating over real estate. Our study demonstrates that inference on gender differences in negotiation relies critically on controlling for the value of the negotiated item.
papers.zh_title: 谈判中的性别差异：来自房地产交易的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了房地产交易中的谈判，发现男性在买卖房产时能获得比女性更有利的价格。然而，在更好地控制房产价值后，这一性别差异显著缩小；在重复销售样本中控制未观测到的异质性后，该差异完全消失。最初的价格差异并非谈判中性别差异的证据，而是表明男性和女性需求不同的房产。与此一致，我们发现继承自已故父母的房产在销售价格上不存在性别差异。在适当的控制条件下，男性和女性在房地产谈判中表现同样出色。我们的研究表明，关于谈判中性别差异的推断关键取决于对谈判物品价值的控制。

papers.title: No Firm is an Island? How Industry Conditions Shape Firms' Aggregate Expectations
papers.authors: Philippe Andrade, Olivier Coibion, Erwan Gautier, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
papers.abstract: We study how firms’ expectations and actions are affected by both aggregate and industry-specific conditions using a survey of French manufacturing firms. We document two novel features. First, the adjustment of firms’ expectations is more rapid after industry-specific shocks than aggregate shocks. This is consistent with rational inattention models which predict that firms should pay more attention to industry variation than aggregate conditions. Second, in response to industry shocks that have no aggregate effects, firms’ aggregate expectations respond. This is consistent with “island” models in which firms use the specific prices they observe to make inferences about broader aggregate conditions. We also study how these results vary across industries.
papers.zh_title: 没有企业是孤岛？行业状况如何塑造企业的总体预期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项针对法国制造业企业的调查，研究了企业预期和行动如何同时受到总体状况和行业特定状况的影响。我们记录了两个新特征。第一，企业对行业特定冲击的预期调整比总体冲击更快。这与理性疏忽模型一致，该模型预测企业应更关注行业变化而非总体状况。第二，对于没有总体效应的行业冲击，企业的总体预期也会做出反应。这与“岛屿”模型一致，在该模型中，企业利用其观察到的特定价格来推断更广泛的总体状况。我们还研究了这些结果在不同行业间的差异。

papers.title: Weak Credit Covenants
papers.authors: Victoria Ivashina, Boris Vallee
papers.abstract: Using novel data on 1,240 credit agreements, we investigate sources of contractual complexity in the leveraged loan market. While negative covenants are widespread, carve-out and deductible clauses that weaken them are as frequent. We propose simple measures of contractual weakness, which uniquely explain the market-wide price reaction that followed the 2017 J.Crew restructuring, a high profile use of such contractual elements. Leveraged buyouts have significantly weaker loan agreements, and a larger non-bank funding of a loan is conducive to weaker contractual terms. Weak covenants translate to modestly higher issuance spreads. Overall, our findings are consistent with sophisticated borrowers catering to a reaching-for-yield phenomenon by exploiting contractual complexity.
papers.zh_title: 弱信贷契约
papers.zh_abstract: 利用1240份信贷协议的新数据，我们研究了杠杆贷款市场中合同复杂性的来源。虽然负面契约广泛存在，但削弱它们的例外和扣除条款也同样常见。我们提出了合同弱度的简单衡量指标，这些指标独特地解释了2017年J.Crew重组（一次高调使用此类合同要素的事件）后市场范围的价格反应。杠杆收购的贷款协议显著更弱，而贷款中更大的非银行融资比例则有利于更弱的合同条款。弱契约转化为略高的发行利差。总体而言，我们的发现与老练的借款人通过利用合同复杂性来迎合追逐收益现象是一致的。

papers.title: Short-run Effects of COVID-19 on U.S. Worker Transitions
papers.authors: Benjamin W. Cowan
papers.abstract: I use Current Population Survey Data from February and April 2020 to examine how individual workers have transitioned between labor-market states and which workers have been hurt most by the COVID-19 pandemic. I find not only large effects on workers becoming unemployed but also a decline in labor-force participation, an increase in absence from one’s job, and a decrease in hours worked. Generally, more vulnerable populations—racial and ethnic minorities, those born outside the U.S., women with children, the least educated, and workers with a disability—have experienced the largest declines in the likelihood of (full-time) work and work hours.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19对美国工人流动的短期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我利用2020年2月和4月的当前人口调查数据，研究了个体工人如何在劳动力市场状态之间转换，以及哪些工人受COVID-19疫情冲击最大。我不仅发现疫情对工人失业有巨大影响，还发现劳动力参与率下降、缺勤增加以及工作时间减少。总体而言，更脆弱的群体——种族和族裔少数群体、美国以外出生者、有孩子的女性、受教育程度最低者以及残疾工人——在（全职）工作可能性和工作小时数方面经历了最大幅度的下降。

papers.title: Does Poverty Change Labor Supply? Evidence from Multiple Income Effects and 115,579 Bags
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Dean Karlan, Hannah Trachtman, Christopher R. Udry
papers.abstract: The income elasticity of labor supply is a central parameter of many economic models. We test the response of labor supply to exogenous changes in income using data from a randomized evaluation of a multi-faceted grant program in northern Ghana combined with a researcher-implemented bag-making operation. We find a non-negative "income effect" on labor supply. We argue that simple models with either labor or capital market frictions cannot explain the results, whereas a model that allows for positive physiological or psychological productivity effects from higher income fits with our findings.
papers.zh_title: 贫困会改变劳动力供给吗？来自多重收入效应和115,579个袋子的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动力供给的收入弹性是许多经济模型的核心参数。我们利用加纳北部一项多层面赠款项目的随机评估数据，结合研究者实施的制袋操作，检验了劳动力供给对外生收入变化的反应。我们发现劳动力供给存在非负的“收入效应”。我们认为，仅包含劳动力或资本市场摩擦的简单模型无法解释这一结果，而允许更高收入带来正向生理或心理生产力效应的模型则与我们的发现相符。

papers.title: Monetary Policy with Opinionated Markets
papers.authors: Ricardo J. Caballero, Alp Simsek
papers.abstract: We build a model in which the Fed and the market disagree about future aggregate demand. The market anticipates monetary policy “mistakes,” which affect current demand and induce the Fed to partially accommodate the market’s view. The Fed expects to implement its view gradually. Announcements that reveal an unexpected change in the Fed’s belief provide a microfoundation for monetary policy shocks. Tantrum shocks arise when the market misinterprets the Fed’s belief and overreacts to its announcement. Uncertainty about tantrums motivates further gradualism and communication. Finally, disagreements affect the market’s expected inflation and induce a policy trade-off similar to “cost-push” shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E00, E12, E21, E32, E43, E44, G11, G12
papers.zh_title: 存在有主见市场的货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个模型，其中美联储和市场对未来总需求的看法存在分歧。市场预期货币政策会出现“错误”，这会影响当前需求，并促使美联储部分迎合市场的观点。美联储预期将逐步实施其观点。揭示美联储信念意外变化的公告为货币政策冲击提供了微观基础。当市场误解美联储的信念并对其公告反应过度时，就会产生“发脾气”冲击。对“发脾气”的不确定性进一步促使政策渐进主义和加强沟通。最后，分歧会影响市场的预期通胀，并引发类似于“成本推动”冲击的政策权衡。

papers.title: My Professor Cares: Experimental Evidence on the Role of Faculty Engagement
papers.authors: Scott E. Carrell, Michal Kurlaender
papers.abstract: Despite a growing body of literature that instructors “matter” in higher education, there is virtually no evidence about how their actions influence student outcomes. We provide experimental evidence on the impact of specific faculty behaviors aimed at increasing student success. We test the effect of professor feedback on student success in higher education classrooms though a "light-touch" randomized intervention. We present results from a small pilot in an introductory-level microeconomics course at a comprehensive research university, and the scale-up conducted in over 43 classrooms and nearly 4,000 students at a large broad-access university. The intervention consisted of several strategically-timed E-mails to students from the professor indicating keys to success in the class, the students’ current standing in the course, and a reminder of when the professor is available. Results from the pilot show that students in the treatment group scored higher on exams, homework assignments, and final course grade. Results from the scaled-up experiment are more mixed—we find significant positive effects on student perceptions of the professor and course for all students. However, we only find positive achievement effects for our target population, first year students from underrepresented minority groups. Finally, we replicated the pilot to test the robustness of these results and again find positive effects on student achievement. We conclude that in certain settings and with some students, targeted feedback from professors can lead to meaningful gains in achievement.
papers.zh_title: 我的教授在乎：关于教师参与作用的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管越来越多的文献表明高等教育中的“教师很重要”，但几乎没有证据表明他们的行为如何影响学生成果。我们提供了关于旨在提高学生成功的特定教师行为影响的实验证据。我们通过一项“轻触式”随机干预，测试了教授反馈对高等教育课堂学生成功的影响。我们展示了一项在综合性研究型大学入门级微观经济学课程中进行的小规模试点结果，以及在大型宽准入大学超过43个课堂和近4000名学生中进行的扩大实验的结果。干预措施包括教授在战略时机向学生发送几封电子邮件，指出课堂成功的关键、学生当前在课程中的表现，并提醒教授的可咨询时间。试点结果显示，处理组学生在考试、家庭作业和最终课程成绩上得分更高。扩大实验的结果则更为复杂——我们发现对所有学生的教授和课程感知有显著正向影响。然而，我们仅在我们的目标人群——来自代表性不足少数群体的第一年学生——中发现了正向的学业成就效应。最后，我们重复了试点以检验这些结果的稳健性，并再次发现对学生学业成就的正向效应。我们得出结论，在某些环境和针对某些学生时，教授的有针对性反馈可以带来有意义的学业成就提升。

papers.title: Program Recertification Costs: Evidence from SNAP
papers.authors: Tatiana Homonoff, Jason Somerville
papers.abstract: Recipients of means-tested program benefits must periodically document continued eligibility through a recertification process. We find evidence that the administrative burden associated with SNAP recertification leads to decreases in program participation. Cases assigned to later recertification interview dates, which leave less time to reschedule missed interviews, are over 20 percent less likely to recertify than cases assigned to interviews earlier in the month. Cases that fail recertification due to later assignments lose an average of $600 in benefits in the following year. These losses are highly skewed: many cases quickly re-enroll, while one quarter remain off SNAP for over a year post-recertification.
papers.zh_title: 项目重新认证成本：来自SNAP的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 经济状况调查项目福利的领取者必须通过重新认证过程定期证明其持续符合资格。我们发现，与SNAP重新认证相关的行政负担导致项目参与率下降。被分配到较晚重新认证面试日期的案例（这导致重新安排错过面试的时间更少），其重新认证的可能性比分配到当月较早面试日期的案例低20%以上。因较晚分配而未能重新认证的案例，在接下来一年平均损失600美元的福利。这些损失高度偏斜：许多案例很快重新注册，而四分之一的人在重新认证后一年多仍处于SNAP项目之外。

papers.title: Predicting Social Tipping and Norm Change in Controlled Experiments
papers.authors: James Andreoni, Nikos Nikiforakis, Simon Siegenthaler
papers.abstract: The ability to predict when societies will replace one social norm for another can have significant implications for welfare, especially when norms are detrimental. A popular theory poses that the pressure to conform to social norms creates tipping thresholds which, once passed, propel societies toward an alternative state. Predicting when societies will reach a tipping threshold, however, has been a major challenge due to the lack of experimental data for evaluating competing models. We present evidence from a large-scale lab experiment designed to test the theoretical predictions of a threshold model for social tipping. In our setting, societal preferences change gradually, forcing individuals to weigh the benefit from deviating from the norm against the cost from not conforming to the behavior of others. We show that the model predicts accurately social tipping and norm change in 96% of experimental societies. Strikingly, when individuals determine the cost for non-conformity themselves, they set it too high, causing the persistence of detrimental norms. We also show that instigators of change tend to be more risk tolerant and to dislike conformity more. Our findings demonstrate the value of threshold models for understanding social tipping in a broad range of social settings and designing policies to promote welfare.
papers.zh_title: 预测受控实验中的社会临界点与规范变迁
papers.zh_abstract: 预测社会何时会用一种社会规范取代另一种社会规范的能力可能对福利产生重大影响，尤其是在规范有害的情况下。一种流行的理论认为，遵循社会规范的压力会形成临界阈值，一旦超过该阈值，就会推动社会走向另一种状态。然而，由于缺乏用于评估竞争模型的实验数据，预测社会何时会达到临界阈值一直是一项重大挑战。我们展示了一项大规模实验室实验的证据，该实验旨在检验社会临界点阈值模型的理论预测。在我们的设定中，社会偏好逐渐变化，迫使个体权衡偏离规范带来的收益与不遵从他人行为所付出的成本。我们表明，该模型在96%的实验社会中准确预测了社会临界点和规范变迁。引人注目的是，当个体自行决定不遵从的成本时，他们设定的成本过高，导致有害规范的持续存在。我们还表明，变革的发起者往往更愿意承担风险，并且更不喜欢从众。我们的研究结果证明了阈值模型在理解广泛社会背景下的社会临界点以及设计促进福利的政策方面的价值。

papers.title: The Impact of Covid-19 on Small Business Owners: Evidence of Early-Stage Losses from the April 2020 Current Population Survey
papers.authors: Robert W. Fairlie
papers.abstract: Social distancing restrictions and demand shifts from COVID-19 are expected to shutter many small businesses, but there is very little early evidence on impacts. This paper provides the first analysis of impacts of the pandemic on the number of active small businesses in the United States using nationally representative data from the April 2020 CPS – the first month fully capturing early effects from the pandemic. The number of active business owners in the United States plummeted by 3.3 million or 22 percent over the crucial two-month window from February to April 2020. The drop in business owners was the largest on record, and losses were felt across nearly all industries and even for incorporated businesses. African-American businesses were hit especially hard experiencing a 41 percent drop. Latinx business owners fell by 32 percent, and Asian business owners dropped by 26 percent. Simulations indicate that industry compositions partly placed these groups at a higher risk of losses. Immigrant business owners experienced substantial losses of 36 percent. Female-owned businesses were also disproportionately hit by 25 percent. These findings of early-stage losses to small businesses have important policy implications and may portend longer-term ramifications for job losses and economic inequality.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情对小企业主的影响：来自2020年4月当前人口调查的早期损失证据
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情导致的社交距离限制和需求变化预计将使许多小企业倒闭，但关于其影响的早期证据非常少。本文首次利用2020年4月当前人口调查（CPS）——该月是首次完全捕捉疫情早期影响的月份——的全国代表性数据，分析了疫情对美国活跃小企业数量的影响。在2020年2月至4月这两个关键月份内，美国活跃企业主的数量骤减了330万，即下降了22%。企业主数量的下降是有记录以来最大的，且损失几乎遍及所有行业，甚至包括注册企业。非裔美国人企业受到的打击尤其严重，下降了41%。拉丁裔企业主减少了32%，亚裔企业主下降了26%。模拟表明，行业构成在一定程度上使这些群体面临更高的损失风险。移民企业主遭受了36%的显著损失。女性拥有的企业也受到了不成比例的打击，下降了25%。这些关于小企业早期损失的发现具有重要的政策含义，并可能预示着失业和经济不平等的长期后果。

papers.title: Imperfect Macroeconomic Expectations: Evidence and Theory
papers.authors: George-Marios Angeletos, Zhen Huo, Karthik A. Sastry
papers.abstract: We document a new fact about expectations: in response to the main shocks driving the business cycle, expectations underreact initially but overshoot later on. We show how previous, seemingly conflicting, evidence can be understood as different facets of this fact. We finally explain what the cumulated evidence means for macroeconomic theory. There is little support for theories emphasizing underextrapolation or two close cousins of it, cognitive discounting and level-K thinking. Instead, the evidence favors the combination of dispersed, noisy information and over-extrapolation.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E03, E3, E7, G02
papers.zh_title: 不完美的宏观经济预期：证据与理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了一个关于预期的新事实：在应对驱动经济周期的主要冲击时，预期最初反应不足，但随后会过度反应。我们展示了先前看似矛盾的证据如何可以被理解为这一事实的不同侧面。最后，我们解释了累积的证据对宏观经济理论意味着什么。几乎没有证据支持强调外推不足或其两个近亲——认知贴现和K级思维——的理论。相反，证据支持分散的、有噪声的信息与过度外推的结合。

papers.title: Revenue at Risk in Coal-Reliant Counties
papers.authors: Adele Morris, Noah Kaufman, Siddhi Doshi
papers.abstract: This paper examines the implications of a carbon-constrained future on coal-reliant county governments in the United States. We review modeling projections of coal production under reference and climate policy scenarios and argue that some state and local governments face important revenue risks. Complex systems of revenue and intergovernmental transfers, along with insufficiently-detailed budget data, make it difficult to parse out just how exposed jurisdictions are to the coal industry. A look at three illustrative counties shows that coal-related revenue may fund a third or more of their budgets. When the results of regression analysis of 27 coal-reliant counties are extrapolated outside the sample to the demise of the industry, they suggest these counties could lose on average about 20 percent of their revenue. This does not account for the potential downward spiral of other revenues as the collapse of the dominant industry erodes the tax base. Coal-dependent communities have issued a variety of outstanding bonds that will mature in a time frame in which climate policy is likely. Our review of illustrative bonds indicates that municipalities have not appropriately characterized their coal-related risks. Ratings agencies are only now beginning to document the hazardous exposure of some local governments to the coal industry. Climate policies can be combined with investments in coal-dependent communities to support their financial health. A logical source of funding for such investments would be the revenues from a price on carbon dioxide emissions, a necessary element of any cost-effective strategy for addressing the risks of climate change. We discuss how a small fraction of revenue from a federal carbon price in the United States could fund billions of dollars in annual investments in the economic development of coal-dependent communities and direct assistance to coal industry workers.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：H2, H7, H71, H74, H83, Q32, Q4, Q48, Q5, Q52, Q54, Q58, R11
papers.zh_title: 依赖煤炭县的收入风险
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了碳约束未来对美国依赖煤炭的县级政府的影响。我们回顾了在参考情景和气候政策情景下煤炭生产的模型预测，并认为一些州和地方政府面临重大的收入风险。复杂的收入和政府间转移支付体系，加上不够详细的预算数据，使得难以厘清各辖区对煤炭行业的依赖程度。对三个示例县的考察显示，煤炭相关收入可能为其预算的三分之一或更多提供资金。当对27个依赖煤炭县的回归分析结果外推到样本之外的行业消亡情景时，表明这些县平均可能损失约20%的收入。这还没有考虑到随着主导产业的崩溃侵蚀税基，其他收入可能出现的螺旋式下降。依赖煤炭的社区已经发行了各种未偿债券，这些债券将在气候政策可能出台的时间框架内到期。我们对示例债券的审查表明，市政当局并未恰当描述其与煤炭相关的风险。评级机构直到现在才开始记录一些地方政府对煤炭行业的危险敞口。气候政策可以与对依赖煤炭社区的投资相结合，以支持其财务健康。此类投资的合理资金来源是对二氧化碳排放征收的价格收入，这是任何应对气候变化风险的成本有效战略的必要组成部分。我们讨论了美国联邦碳价格的一小部分收入如何能够为依赖煤炭社区的经济发展和直接援助煤炭行业工人的年度投资提供数十亿美元的资金。

papers.title: Medicaid Expansion and the Mental Health of College Students
papers.authors: Benjamin W. Cowan, Zhuang Hao
papers.abstract: Reported mental health problems have risen dramatically among U.S. college students over time, as has treatment for these problems. An open question is how healthcare access affects diagnosis of mental illness and treatments such as prescription psychotropic medication use. We examine the effect of state-level Medicaid expansion following the 2014 implementation of the Affordable Care Act on the diagnosis of mental health conditions and psychotropic prescription drug use of a national sample of college students. We find that students from disadvantaged backgrounds are more likely to report being on public insurance after 2014 in expansion states relative to non-expansion states, while more advantaged students do not see this increase. Both diagnosis of common mental health conditions and psychotropic drug use increase following expansion for disadvantaged students relative to advantaged ones, which translates into an elimination of the pre-treatment gap in these outcomes by family background in expansion states. However, these changes are not associated with short-term improvements in measures of mental health status or academic outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 医疗补助扩展与大学生的心理健康
papers.zh_abstract: 随着时间的推移，美国大学生报告的心理健康问题以及对此类问题的治疗都急剧增加。一个悬而未决的问题是，医疗保健的可及性如何影响精神疾病的诊断以及处方精神药物使用等治疗。我们考察了2014年实施《平价医疗法案》后，州级医疗补助扩展对全国大学生样本中精神健康状况诊断和精神药物处方使用的影响。我们发现，在扩展州相对于非扩展州，2014年后来自弱势背景的学生更有可能报告拥有公共保险，而优势背景的学生则没有出现这种增长。对于弱势学生相对于优势学生而言，常见精神健康状况的诊断和精神药物使用在扩展后均有所增加，这转化为在扩展州消除了这些结果中按家庭背景划分的预处理差距。然而，这些变化并未与心理健康状况或学业成果指标的短期改善相关联。

papers.title: A Liberalization Spillover: From Equities to Loans
papers.authors: Xin Liu, Shang-Jin Wei, Yifan Zhou
papers.abstract: The opening of equity markets to foreign investment appears to generate an enormously large positive growth effect (see Bekaert, Harvey, and Lundblad, 2005) in spite of a relatively small role of such markets for financing investment in most economies. We propose a possible spillover channel from equity market opening to lower costs of bank loans, which helps to explain this puzzle. From analyzing bank loan data associated with China’s introduction of the Qualified Foreign Institutional Investors (QFII) program, we find significant support for this channel. Furthermore, we show that a reduction in the risk premium is an important mechanism.
papers.zh_title: 自由化的溢出效应：从股票到贷款
papers.zh_abstract: 股票市场对外国投资的开放似乎产生了巨大的正向增长效应（参见Bekaert, Harvey, and Lundblad, 2005），尽管此类市场在大多数经济体中对投资融资的作用相对较小。我们提出了一个从股票市场开放到降低银行贷款成本的潜在溢出渠道，这有助于解释这个谜题。通过分析与中国引入合格境外机构投资者（QFII）计划相关的银行贷款数据，我们发现了支持这一渠道的重要证据。此外，我们表明风险溢价的降低是一个重要机制。

papers.title: What We Know and Don't Know about Climate Change, and Implications for Policy
papers.authors: Robert S. Pindyck
papers.abstract: There is a lot we know about climate change, but there is also a lot we don't know. Even if we knew how much CO2 will be emitted over the coming decades, we wouldn't know how much temperatures will rise as a result. And even if we could predict the extent of warming that will occur, we can say very little about its impact. I explain that we face considerable uncertainty over climate change and its impact, why there is so much uncertainty, and why we will continue to face uncertainty in the near future. I also explain the policy implications of climate change uncertainty. First, the uncertainty (particularly over the possibility of a catastrophic climate outcome) creates insurance value, which pushes us to earlier and stronger actions to reduce CO2 emissions. Second, uncertainty interacts with two kinds of irreversibilities. First, CO2 remains in the atmosphere for centuries, making the environmental damage from CO2 emissions irreversible, pushing us to earlier and stronger actions. Second, reducing CO2 emissions requires sunk costs, i.e., irreversible expenditures, which pushes us away from earlier actions. Both irreversibilities are inherent in climate policy, but the net effect is ambiguous.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, PE, POL；JEL：D81, Q5, Q54
papers.zh_title: 我们对气候变化的已知与未知及其政策含义
papers.zh_abstract: 关于气候变化，我们了解很多，但也有许多未知之处。即使我们知道未来几十年将排放多少二氧化碳，我们也不知道气温会因此上升多少。即使我们能预测将发生的变暖程度，我们也几乎无法说明其影响。我解释了我们面临的气候变化及其影响方面的巨大不确定性，为什么存在如此多的不确定性，以及为什么我们在不久的将来将继续面临不确定性。我还解释了气候变化不确定性的政策含义。首先，不确定性（特别是关于灾难性气候结果的可能性）创造了保险价值，这促使我们更早、更有力地采取行动减少二氧化碳排放。其次，不确定性与两种不可逆性相互作用。第一，二氧化碳在大气中停留数百年，使得二氧化碳排放的环境损害不可逆转，这促使我们更早、更有力地采取行动。第二，减少二氧化碳排放需要沉没成本，即不可逆的支出，这促使我们避免过早行动。这两种不可逆性在气候政策中都是固有的，但净效应是不明确的。

papers.title: Plants in Space
papers.authors: Ezra Oberfield, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg, Pierre-Daniel Sarte, Nicholas Trachter
papers.abstract: We study the number, size, and location of a firm's plants. The firm's decision balances the benefit of delivering goods and services to customers using multiple plants with the cost of setting up and managing these plants, and the potential for cannibalization that arises as their number increases. Modeling the decisions of heterogeneous firms in an economy with a vast number of widely distinct locations is complex because it involves a large combinatorial problem. Using insights from discrete geometry, we study a tractable limit case of this problem in which these forces operate at a local level. Our analysis delivers clear predictions on sorting across space. Productive firms place more plants in dense locations that exhibit high rents compared with less productive firms, and place fewer plants in markets with low density and low rents. Controlling for the number of plants, productive firms also operate larger plants than those operated by less productive firms in locations where both are present. We present evidence consistent with these and several other predictions using U.S. establishment-level panel data.
papers.zh_title: 空间中的工厂
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究一家公司工厂的数量、规模和位置。公司的决策平衡了使用多个工厂向客户交付商品和服务的收益与建立和管理这些工厂的成本，以及随着工厂数量增加而产生的潜在蚕食效应。在一个拥有大量截然不同地点的经济体中，对异质性企业决策进行建模是复杂的，因为它涉及一个大型组合问题。利用离散几何学的见解，我们研究了这个问题的一个易于处理的极限情况，其中这些力量在局部层面运作。我们的分析提供了关于空间分选的清晰预测。与生产率较低的企业相比，生产率高的企业在租金高的人口密集地区布局更多工厂，而在人口密度低、租金低的市场布局更少工厂。在控制工厂数量的情况下，在两者都存在的地区，生产率高的企业运营的工厂也比生产率低的企业运营的工厂更大。我们利用美国企业层面的面板数据提供了与这些预测以及其他几个预测一致的证据。

papers.title: The Long-Run Effects of School Racial Diversity on Political Identity
papers.authors: Stephen B. Billings, Eric Chyn, Kareem Haggag
papers.abstract: How do early-life experiences shape political identity? In this paper, we study how a shock to the social lives of youth affected their party affiliation in adulthood. Specifically, we examine the end of race-based busing in Charlotte-Mecklenburg schools (CMS), an event that led to large changes in school racial composition. Using linked administrative data, we compare party affiliation for students who had lived on opposite sides of newly drawn school boundaries. We find that a 10-percentage point increase in the share of minorities in a student's assigned school decreased their likelihood of registering as a Republican by 8.8 percent. Consistent with the contact hypothesis, this impact is entirely driven by white students (a 12 percent decrease). This effect size is roughly 16 percent of the correlation between parents and their children's party affiliations. Finally, consistent with this change reflecting underlying partisan identity, we find no significant effect on voter registration likelihood. Together these results suggest that schools in childhood play an important role in shaping partisanship.
papers.zh_title: 学校种族多样性对政治认同的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 早期生活经历如何塑造政治认同？本文研究了青少年社会生活的冲击如何影响其成年后的政党归属。具体而言，我们考察了夏洛特-梅克伦堡学校（CMS）基于种族的校车接送制度的终结，这一事件导致了学校种族构成的巨大变化。利用关联的行政数据，我们比较了居住在新划分学区边界两侧学生的政党归属。我们发现，学生被分配学校中少数族裔比例每增加10个百分点，其注册为共和党人的可能性降低8.8%。与接触假说一致，这种影响完全由白人学生驱动（降低12%）。这一效应规模大约相当于父母与子女政党归属之间相关性的16%。最后，与这种变化反映潜在党派认同一致，我们发现对选民登记可能性没有显著影响。这些结果共同表明，童年时期的学校在塑造党派认同方面发挥着重要作用。

papers.title: Reciprocity versus Reelection
papers.authors: Prateik Dalmia, Allan Drazen, Erkut Y. Ozbay
papers.abstract: We study how reelection concerns affect reciprocity by elected leaders to the voters who elected them. If showing kindness to past voters reduces the chances of reelection, will an elected leader reduce or eliminate such intrinsic reciprocity? We present a signalling model of candidate behavior, where we show that candidates may limit intrinsic reciprocity to past voters to signal congruence with voters important for reelection, and selfish candidates may mimic reciprocal behavior for instrumental purposes. We then present an experiment that tests these ideas in the laboratory and finds support for the model. Both candidates and voters behave as the signalling model predicts. Our key finding is that the desire to be reelected may limit intrinsic reciprocity of an elected leader to the voters who put her in office, but does not eliminate it entirely.
papers.zh_title: 互惠与连任
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究连任关切如何影响当选领导人对选举他们的选民的互惠行为。如果对过去选民表现出善意会降低连任机会，当选领导人是否会减少或消除这种内在的互惠？我们提出了一个候选人行为的信号模型，在该模型中，我们表明候选人可能会限制对过去选民的内在互惠，以向对连任重要的选民发出信号表明其一致性，而自私的候选人可能会出于工具性目的模仿互惠行为。然后，我们进行了一项实验，在实验室中检验这些想法，并找到了支持该模型的证据。候选人和选民的行为都符合信号模型的预测。我们的关键发现是，连任的愿望可能会限制当选领导人对使其上任的选民的内在互惠，但不会完全消除它。

papers.title: Search Frictions and Efficiency in Decentralized Transportation Markets
papers.authors: Giulia Brancaccio, Myrto Kalouptsidi, Theodore Papageorgiou, Nicola Rosaia
papers.abstract: In this paper we explore efficiency and optimal policy in decentralized transportation markets that suffer from search frictions, such as taxicabs, trucks and bulk shipping. We illustrate the impact of two externalities: the well-known thin/thick market externalities and what we call pooling externalities. We characterize analytically the conditions for efficiency, show how they translate into efficient pricing rules, as well as derive the optimal taxes for the case where the planner is not able to set prices. We use our theoretical results to explore welfare loss and optimal policy in dry bulk shipping. We find that the constrained efficient allocation achieves 6% welfare gains, while the first-best allocation corresponding to the frictionless world, achieves 14% welfare gains. This suggests that policy can achieve substantial gains, even if it does not alleviate search frictions, e.g. through a centralizing platform. Finally, we demonstrate that simple policies designed to mimic the optimal taxes perform well.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI；JEL：F1, L0, L91, R4, R48
papers.zh_title: 分散化运输市场中的搜索摩擦与效率
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们探讨了遭受搜索摩擦的分散化运输市场（如出租车、卡车和散货航运）中的效率与最优政策。我们阐述了两种外部性的影响：众所周知的薄/厚市场外部性以及我们所谓的汇集外部性。我们分析性地刻画了效率的条件，展示了它们如何转化为有效的定价规则，并推导出在规划者无法设定价格情况下的最优税收。我们利用理论结果探讨了干散货航运中的福利损失和最优政策。我们发现，受约束的有效配置实现了6%的福利收益，而与无摩擦世界相对应的最优配置则实现了14%的福利收益。这表明，即使政策不能通过集中平台等方式缓解搜索摩擦，也能实现可观的收益。最后，我们证明了旨在模仿最优税收的简单政策表现良好。

papers.title: Social Proximity to Capital: Implications for Investors and Firms
papers.authors: Theresa Kuchler, Yan Li, Lin Peng, Johannes Stroebel, Dexin Zhou
papers.abstract: We use social network data from Facebook to show that institutional investors are more likely to invest in firms from regions to which they have stronger social ties. This effect of social proximity on investment behavior is distinct from the effect of geographic proximity. Social connections have the largest influence on investments of small investors with concentrated holdings as well as on investments in firms with a low market capitalization and little analyst coverage. We also find that the response of investment decisions to social connectedness affects equilibrium capital market outcomes: firms in locations with stronger social ties to places with substantial institutional capital have higher institutional ownership, higher valuations, and higher liquidity. These effects of social proximity to capital on capital market outcomes are largest for small firms with little analyst coverage. We find no evidence that investors generate differential returns from investments in locations to which they are socially connected. Our results suggest that the social structure of regions affects firms' access to capital and contributes to geographic differences in economic outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PE；JEL：G2, G3, G4
papers.zh_title: 与资本的社会邻近性：对投资者和企业的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用Facebook的社交网络数据表明，机构投资者更有可能投资于他们与其有更强社会联系的地区的企业。这种社会邻近性对投资行为的影响不同于地理邻近性的影响。社会联系对持有集中头寸的小型投资者的投资以及市值低、分析师覆盖少的企业投资影响最大。我们还发现，投资决策对社会联系的反应会影响均衡资本市场结果：与拥有大量机构资本的地区有更强社会联系的地点所在的企业，具有更高的机构持股、更高的估值和更高的流动性。这种与资本的社会邻近性对资本市场结果的影响，对于分析师覆盖少的小型企业最为显著。我们没有发现证据表明投资者从他们社会联系地区的投资中获得差异化回报。我们的结果表明，地区的社会结构影响企业获得资本的渠道，并导致经济结果的地理差异。

papers.title: Experimental Evidence on Alternative Policies to Increase Learning at Scale
papers.authors: Annie Duflo, Jessica Kiessel, Adrienne Lucas
papers.abstract: We partnered with the Ghanaian government to test simultaneously four methods of increasing achievement in schools with low and heterogeneous student achievement| assistant led remedial pull-out lessons, assistant led remedial after school lessons, assistant led smaller class sizes, or teacher implemented partial day tracking. Despite implementation issues, the interventions increased student learning by about 0.1SD, about 0.4SD when adjusting for the imperfect implementation, with no effects on attendance, grade repetition, or drop-out. Test score increases were larger for girls and gains persisted after the program ended. Fidelity of implementation decreased over time for the assistants but increased for the teachers.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED；JEL：I21, I25, I28, J24, O15
papers.zh_title: 关于扩大规模提高学习的替代政策的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们与加纳政府合作，同时测试了四种提高学业成就低且异质性高的学校成绩的方法：助教主导的补习式抽离课程、助教主导的补习式课后课程、助教主导的缩小班级规模，或教师实施的半天分组教学。尽管存在实施问题，这些干预措施使学生的学习提高了约0.1个标准差，在调整不完美实施后约为0.4个标准差，对出勤率、留级或辍学没有影响。考试成绩的提高对女孩更大，并且收益在项目结束后持续存在。助教的实施保真度随时间下降，而教师的则上升。

papers.title: The Food Problem and the Aggregate Productivity Consequences of Climate Change
papers.authors: Ishan B. Nath
papers.abstract: This paper integrates local temperature treatment effects and a quantitative macroeconomic model to evaluate the impact of climate change on sectoral reallocation and aggregate productivity. First, I use firm-level data from a wide range of countries to estimate the effect of temperature on productivity in manufacturing and services. Estimates suggest that extreme heat reduces non-agricultural productivity, but less so than in agriculture, implying that hot countries could adapt to climate change by importing food and shifting labor toward manufacturing. Second, I embed my estimates in an open-economy model of structural transformation covering 158 countries to investigate this possibility. Simulations suggest that subsistence food requirements drive agricultural specialization more than comparative advantage, however, such that climate change perversely pulls labor into agriculture where its productivity suffers most and reallocation exacerbates the global decline in GDP. The productivity effects of climate change reduce welfare by 1.5-2.7% overall and 6-10% for the poorest quartile. Trade reduces the welfare costs of climate change by only 7.4% under existing policy, but by 31% overall and 68% for the global poor in a counterfactual scenario that assigns all countries the 90th percentile level of trade openness.
papers.zh_title: 粮食问题与气候变化对总体生产率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文整合了局部温度处理效应和一个定量宏观经济模型，以评估气候变化对部门再配置和总体生产率的影响。首先，我使用来自多个国家的企业层面数据来估计温度对制造业和服务业生产率的影响。估计结果表明，极端高温会降低非农业生产率，但程度低于农业，这意味着炎热国家可以通过进口粮食和将劳动力转向制造业来适应气候变化。其次，我将估计结果嵌入一个涵盖158个国家的结构转型开放经济模型中，以研究这种可能性。模拟结果表明，生存性粮食需求比比较优势更能驱动农业专业化，然而，气候变化反而将劳动力拉入农业，而农业的生产率受其影响最大，这种再配置加剧了全球GDP的下降。气候变化的生产率效应使总体福利降低1.5-2.7%，对最贫困的四分之一人口降低6-10%。在现有政策下，贸易仅将气候变化的福利成本降低7.4%，但在一个将所有国家都赋予第90百分位贸易开放度的反事实情景中，总体降低31%，对全球贫困人口降低68%。

papers.title: Founder-CEO Compensation and Selection into Venture Capital-Backed Entrepreneurship
papers.authors: Michael Ewens, Ramana Nanda, Christopher T. Stanton
papers.abstract: We show theoretically that a critical determinant of the attractiveness of VC-backed entrepreneurship for high-earning potential founders is the expected time to develop a startup's initial product. This is because founder-CEOs' cash compensation in- creases substantially after product development, alleviating the non-diversifiable risk that founders face at startup birth. Consistent with the model's predictions of where the supply of entrepreneurial talent is likely to be most constrained, we find that technological shocks differentially altering the expected time to product across industries can explain changes in both the rate of entry and characteristics of individuals selecting into VC-backed entrepreneurship.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：G24, G3, G32, J24, J3
papers.zh_title: 创始人CEO薪酬与风险资本支持型创业的筛选
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从理论上证明，对于具有高收入潜力的创始人而言，风险资本支持型创业吸引力的一个关键决定因素是开发初创企业初始产品的预期时间。这是因为创始人CEO的现金薪酬在产品开发后大幅增加，从而缓解了创始人在初创企业诞生时面临的不可分散风险。与模型关于创业人才供给最可能受到约束的预测一致，我们发现，跨行业差异性地改变预期产品开发时间的技术冲击，可以解释进入率的变化以及选择进入风险资本支持型创业的个体特征的变化。

papers.title: Wall Street vs. Main Street QE
papers.authors: Eric R. Sims, Jing Cynthia Wu
papers.abstract: The Federal Reserve has reacted swiftly to the COVID-19 pandemic. It has resuscitated many of its programs from the last crisis by lending to the financial sector, which we refer to as “Wall Street QE.” The Fed is now proposing to also lend directly to, and purchase debt directly from, non-financial firms, which we label “Main Street QE.” Our paper develops a new framework to compare and contrast these different policies. In a situation in which financial intermediary balance sheets are impaired, such as the Great Recession, Main Street and Wall Street QE are perfect substitutes and both stimulate aggregate demand. In contrast, for situations like the one we are now facing due to COVID-19, where the production sector is facing significant cash flow shortages, Wall Street QE becomes almost completely ineffective, whereas Main Street QE can be highly stimulative.
papers.zh_title: 华尔街量化宽松与主街量化宽松
papers.zh_abstract: 美联储对COVID-19疫情做出了迅速反应。它通过向金融部门放贷，重振了上次危机中的许多项目，我们称之为“华尔街量化宽松”。美联储现在提议也直接向非金融企业放贷并直接购买其债务，我们称之为“主街量化宽松”。本文开发了一个新框架来比较和对比这些不同的政策。在金融中介资产负债表受损的情况下，例如大衰退，主街量化宽松和华尔街量化宽松是完全替代品，都能刺激总需求。相反，对于像我们现在因COVID-19而面临的情况，即生产部门面临严重的现金流短缺，华尔街量化宽松几乎完全失效，而主街量化宽松可能具有高度刺激性。

papers.title: Disparities in Vulnerability to Severe Complications from COVID-19 in the United States
papers.authors: Emily E. Wiemers, Scott Abrahams, Marwa AlFakhri, V. Joseph Hotz, Robert F. Schoeni, Judith A. Seltzer
papers.abstract: This paper provides the first nationally representative estimates of vulnerability to severe com-plications from COVID-19 overall and across race-ethnicity and socioeconomic status. We use the Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID) to examine the prevalence of specific health condi-tions associated with complications from COVID-19 and to calculate, for each individual, an index of the risk of severe complications from respiratory infections developed by DeCaprio et al. (2020). We show large disparities across race-ethnicity and socioeconomic status in the prev-alence of conditions which are associated with the risk of severe complications from COVID-19. Moreover, we show that these disparities emerge early in life, prior to age 65, leading to higher vulnerability to such complications. While vulnerability is highest among older adults regardless of their race-ethnicity or socioeconomic status, our results suggest particular attention should also be given to the risk of adverse outcomes in midlife for non-Hispanic Blacks, adults with a high school degree or less, and low-income Americans.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LE；JEL：I1, I14, I24, J1, J11, J14
papers.zh_title: 美国COVID-19严重并发症脆弱性的差异
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了首个全国性代表性估计，涵盖总体以及按种族-民族和社会经济地位划分的COVID-19严重并发症脆弱性。我们利用收入动态面板研究（PSID）来考察与COVID-19并发症相关的特定健康状况的流行率，并为每个个体计算由DeCaprio等人（2020）开发的呼吸道感染严重并发症风险指数。我们展示了在种族-民族和社会经济地位方面，与COVID-19严重并发症风险相关的健康状况流行率存在巨大差异。此外，我们表明这些差异在生命早期（65岁之前）就已出现，导致对这些并发症的脆弱性更高。尽管无论种族-民族或社会经济地位如何，老年人的脆弱性最高，但我们的结果表明，也应特别关注非西班牙裔黑人、高中及以下学历的成年人以及低收入美国人在中年时期出现不良结果的风险。

papers.title: Statistical Decision Properties of Imprecise Trials Assessing COVID-19 Drugs
papers.authors: Charles F. Manski, Aleksey Tetenov
papers.abstract: As the COVID-19 pandemic progresses, researchers are reporting findings of randomized trials comparing standard care with care augmented by experimental drugs. The trials have small sample sizes, so estimates of treatment effects are imprecise. Seeing imprecision, clinicians reading research articles may find it difficult to decide when to treat patients with experimental drugs. Whatever decision criterion one uses, there is always some probability that random variation in trial outcomes will lead to prescribing sub-optimal treatments. A conventional practice when comparing standard care and an innovation is to choose the innovation only if the estimated treatment effect is positive and statistically significant. This practice defers to standard care as the status quo. To evaluate decision criteria, we use the concept of near optimality, which jointly considers the probability and magnitude of decision errors. An appealing decision criterion from this perspective is the empirical success rule, which chooses the treatment with the highest observed average patient outcome in the trial. Considering the design of recent and ongoing COVID-19 trials, we show that the empirical success rule yields treatment results that are much closer to optimal than those generated by prevailing decision criteria based on hypothesis tests.
papers.zh_title: 评估COVID-19药物的不精确试验的统计决策特性
papers.zh_abstract: 随着COVID-19大流行的发展，研究人员正在报告比较标准护理与实验药物增强护理的随机试验结果。这些试验样本量较小，因此治疗效果估计不精确。看到不精确性，阅读研究文章的临床医生可能难以决定何时用实验药物治疗患者。无论使用何种决策标准，试验结果的随机变异总有一定概率导致处方次优治疗。在比较标准护理和创新时，传统做法是仅在估计的治疗效果为正且统计显著时选择创新。这种做法将标准护理视为现状。为了评估决策标准，我们使用了近最优性的概念，该概念同时考虑了决策错误的概率和幅度。从这个角度来看，一个吸引人的决策标准是经验成功规则，它选择试验中观察到的平均患者结果最高的治疗。考虑到近期和正在进行的COVID-19试验的设计，我们表明，经验成功规则产生的治疗结果比基于假设检验的现行决策标准更接近最优。

papers.title: Socio-Demographic Factors Associated with Self-Protecting Behavior during the Covid-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Nicholas W. Papageorge, Matthew V. Zahn, Michèle Belot, Eline van den Broek-Altenburg, Syngjoo Choi, Julian C. Jamison, Egon Tripodi
papers.abstract: Disease spread is in part a function of individual behavior. We examine the factors predicting individual behavior during the Covid-19 pandemic in the United States using novel data collected by Belot et al. (2020). Among other factors, we show that people with lower income, less flexible work arrangements (e.g., an inability to tele-work) and lack of outside space at home are less likely to engage in behaviors, such as social distancing, that limit the spread of disease. We also find evidence that region, gender and beliefs predict behavior. Broadly, our findings align with typical relationships between health and socio-economic status. Moreover, they suggest that the burden of measures designed to stem the pandemic are unevenly distributed across socio-demographic groups in ways that affect behavior and thus potentially the spread of illness. Policies that assume otherwise are unlikely to be effective or sustainable.
papers.zh_title: 与COVID-19疫情期间自我保护行为相关的社会人口因素
papers.zh_abstract: 疾病传播在一定程度上是个人行为的函数。我们利用Belot等人（2020）收集的新数据，考察了美国COVID-19疫情期间预测个人行为的因素。除其他因素外，我们表明，收入较低、工作安排灵活性较差（例如无法远程工作）以及家中缺乏户外空间的人，更不可能采取诸如社交距离等限制疾病传播的行为。我们还发现，地区、性别和信念可以预测行为。总体而言，我们的发现与健康和社会经济地位之间的典型关系一致。此外，它们表明，旨在遏制疫情的措施的负担在社会人口群体中分布不均，这会影响行为，从而可能影响疾病传播。假设相反的政策不太可能有效或可持续。

papers.title: Can Greater Access to Education Be Inequitable? New Evidence from India’s Right to Education Act
papers.authors: Chirantan Chatterjee, Eric A. Hanushek, Shreekanth Mahendiran
papers.abstract: India moved to a constitutional guarantee of universal basic education with the Right to Education (RTE) Act in 2009 that called for full access of children aged 6-14 to free schooling. This paper considers the offsetting effects from induced expansion of private tutoring that limited gains in educational equity from RTE. We develop a unique database of registrations of new private educational institutions offering tutorial services by local district between 2001-2015. We estimate the causal impact of RTE on private supplemental education by comparing the growth of tutorial institutions in highly competitive educational markets to that in less competitive educational markets. We find a strong impact of RTE on the private tutoring market and show that this holds across alternative definitions of highly competitive districts and a variety of robustness checks, sensitivity analyses, and controls. Finally, we provide descriptive evidence that these private tutoring schools do increase the achievement (and competitiveness) of students able to afford them.
papers.zh_title: 扩大教育机会是否可能不公平？来自印度《受教育权法》的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 印度通过2009年的《受教育权法》实现了普及基础教育的宪法保障，要求6至14岁儿童完全获得免费学校教育。本文考虑了因私人补习扩张而产生的抵消效应，这种扩张限制了《受教育权法》在教育公平方面的收益。我们建立了一个独特的数据库，记录了2001年至2015年间各地区提供辅导服务的新私立教育机构的注册情况。我们通过比较高度竞争教育市场中辅导机构的增长与竞争较弱教育市场中的增长，来估计《受教育权法》对私人补充教育的因果影响。我们发现《受教育权法》对私人补习市场有强烈影响，并表明这在高度竞争地区的替代定义以及各种稳健性检验、敏感性分析和控制变量下均成立。最后，我们提供了描述性证据，表明这些私立补习学校确实提高了能够负担得起学费的学生的成绩（和竞争力）。

papers.title: Bank Heterogeneity and Financial Stability
papers.authors: Itay Goldstein, Alexandr Kopytov, Lin Shen, Haotian Xiang
papers.abstract: We study how heterogeneity in banks’ asset holdings affects fragility. In the model, banks face a risk of bank runs and have to liquidate long-term assets in a common market to repay runners. Liquidation prices are depressed when many banks sell their assets at the same time. When banks are homogeneous, their selling behaviors are synchronized, and bank runs are exacerbated. We show that differentiating banks to some extent enhances the stability of all banks, even those whose asset performance ends up being weaker. Our analyses provide new insights about the regulation of banking sector’s architecture and the design of government support during crises.
papers.zh_title: 银行异质性与金融稳定性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究银行资产持有的异质性如何影响脆弱性。在模型中，银行面临银行挤兑风险，必须在一个共同市场上清算长期资产以偿还挤兑者。当许多银行同时出售资产时，清算价格会被压低。当银行是同质的时，它们的出售行为是同步的，银行挤兑会加剧。我们表明，在一定程度上区分银行可以增强所有银行的稳定性，即使是那些最终资产表现较弱的银行。我们的分析为银行业架构的监管以及危机期间政府支持的设计提供了新的见解。

papers.title: America, Jump-started: World War II R&D and the Takeoff of the U.S. Innovation System
papers.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
papers.abstract: During World War II, the U.S. government's Office of Scientific Research and Development (OSRD) supported one of the largest public investments in applied R&D in U.S. history. Using data on all OSRD-funded invention, we show that this shock had a formative impact on the U.S. innovation system, catalyzing technology clusters across the country, with accompanying increases in high-tech entrepreneurship and employment. These effects persist until at least the 1970s, and appear to be driven by agglomerative forces and endogenous growth. In addition to creating technology clusters, wartime R&D permanently changed the trajectory of overall U.S. innovation in the direction of OSRD-funded technologies.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, PE, PR；JEL：H56, N42, N72, O31, O32, O33, O38, R11
papers.zh_title: 美国，跳跃式启动：二战研发与美国创新体系的腾飞
papers.zh_abstract: 在第二次世界大战期间，美国政府科学研究与发展办公室支持了美国历史上最大的公共应用研发投资之一。利用所有由科学研究与发展办公室资助的发明数据，我们表明这一冲击对美国创新体系产生了形成性影响，催化了全国各地的技术集群，并伴随着高科技创业和就业的增长。这些效应至少持续到20世纪70年代，并且似乎是由集聚力量和内生增长驱动的。除了创建技术集群外，战时研发还永久性地改变了美国整体创新的轨迹，使其朝着科学研究与发展办公室资助的技术方向发展。

papers.title: Socioeconomic Network Heterogeneity and Pandemic Policy Response
papers.authors: Mohammad Akbarpour, Cody Cook, Aude Marzuoli, Simon Mongey, Abhishek Nagaraj, Matteo Saccarola, Pietro Tebaldi, Shoshana Vasserman, Hanbin Yang
