papers.abstract: We develop a heterogeneous-agents network-based model to analyze alternative policies during a pandemic outbreak, accounting for health and economic trade-offs within the same empirical framework. We leverage a variety of data sources, including data on individuals' mobility and encounters across metropolitan areas, health records, and measures of the possibility to be productively working from home. This combination of data sources allows us to build a framework in which the severity of a disease outbreak varies across locations and industries, and across individuals who differ by age, occupation, and preexisting health conditions. \nWe use this framework to analyze the impact of different social distancing policies in the context of the COVID-19 outbreaks across US metropolitan areas. Our results highlight how outcomes vary across areas in relation to the underlying heterogeneity in population density, social network structures, population health, and employment characteristics. We find that policies by which individuals who can work from home continue to do so, or in which schools and firms alternate schedules across different groups of students and employees, can be effective in limiting the health and healthcare costs of the pandemic outbreak while also reducing employment losses.
papers.zh_title: 社会经济网络异质性与大流行政策应对
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个基于异质性主体网络模型，用于分析大流行爆发期间的不同政策选择，并在同一实证框架内权衡健康与经济。我们利用了多种数据来源，包括个人在大都市区域内的流动与接触数据、健康记录，以及在家有效工作的可能性指标。这些数据源的结合使我们能够构建一个框架，其中疾病爆发的严重程度因地点、行业以及年龄、职业和既有健康状况不同的个体而异。我们利用该框架，在美国各都市区COVID-19爆发的背景下，分析了不同社交距离政策的影响。我们的结果突显了结果如何因地区而异，这与人口密度、社交网络结构、人口健康和就业特征的潜在异质性相关。我们发现，那些允许可在家工作的人继续在家工作，或者学校和企业在不同学生和员工群体间交替安排的政策，能够有效限制大流行爆发的健康与医疗成本，同时减少就业损失。

papers.title: Implications of Heterogeneous SIR Models for Analyses of COVID-19
papers.authors: Glenn Ellison
papers.abstract: This paper provides a quick survey of results on the classic SIR model and variants allowing for heterogeneity in contact rates. It notes that calibrating the classic model to data generated by a heterogeneous model can lead to forecasts that are biased in several ways and to understatement of the forecast uncertainty. Among the biases are that we may underestimate how quickly herd immunity might be reached, underestimate differences across regions, and have biased estimates of the impact of endogenous and policy-driven social distancing.
papers.zh_title: 异质性SIR模型对COVID-19分析的含义
papers.zh_abstract: 本文快速综述了经典SIR模型及其允许接触率异质性的变体的结果。文章指出，将经典模型校准到由异质性模型生成的数据，可能导致预测在多个方面存在偏差，并低估预测的不确定性。这些偏差包括：我们可能低估群体免疫达到的速度，低估地区间的差异，以及对内生性和政策驱动的社交距离影响的估计存在偏差。

papers.title: Leaving the Enclave: Historical Evidence on Immigrant Mobility from the Industrial Removal Office
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Dylan Connor
papers.abstract: The Industrial Removal Office funded 39,000 Jewish households to leave enclave neighborhoods in New York City from 1900 to 1922. Compared to neighbors with the same baseline occupation, program participants earned 4 percent more ten years after relocation. These gains persisted to the next generation. Benefits increased with more years spent outside of an enclave. Participants were more likely to speak English and married spouses with less Jewish names. More Jewishly-identified men (as measured by own name) were more likely to return to the city. We contextualize these results with new national evidence on Jewish economic and cultural assimilation.
papers.zh_title: 离开飞地：来自工业迁移办公室的移民流动性历史证据
papers.zh_abstract: 从1900年到1922年，工业迁移办公室资助了39,000个犹太家庭离开纽约市的飞地社区。与基线职业相同的邻居相比，项目参与者在搬迁十年后收入高出4%。这些收益持续到了下一代。在飞地外度过的时间越长，收益越大。参与者更可能说英语，并与姓氏犹太特征较弱的配偶结婚。更具犹太身份认同的男性（以其自身姓名衡量）更可能返回城市。我们结合新的全国性犹太经济与文化同化证据，对这些结果进行了背景分析。

papers.title: The Micro and Macro Dynamics of Capital Flows
papers.authors: Felipe Saffie, Liliana Varela, Kei-Mu Yi
papers.abstract: We study empirically and theoretically the effects of international financial flows on resource allocation. Using the universe of firms in Hungary, we show that removing capital controls lowers firms’ cost of capital and increases household consumption, with the latter playing a dominant role. The consumption channel leads to reallocation of resources toward high expenditure elasticity activities—such as services—promoting both the expansion of incumbents and firm entry. A multi-sector heterogeneous firm model replicates these dynamics. Our model shows that non-homotheticity in consumption can quantitatively account for the reallocation of resources towards services and successfully replicates the dynamics of aggregate productivity following episodes of financial openness.
papers.zh_title: 资本流动的微观与宏观动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从实证和理论角度研究国际金融流动对资源配置的影响。利用匈牙利所有企业的数据，我们表明取消资本管制降低了企业的资本成本并增加了家庭消费，其中后者起主导作用。消费渠道导致资源向高支出弹性活动（如服务业）重新配置，促进了现有企业的扩张和新企业的进入。一个多部门异质性企业模型复制了这些动态。我们的模型表明，消费中的非位似性可以定量解释资源向服务业的重新配置，并成功复现了金融开放事件后总体生产率的动态变化。

papers.title: Global Capital and Local Assets: House Prices, Quantities, and Elasticities
papers.authors: Caitlin S. Gorback, Benjamin J. Keys
papers.abstract: Interconnected capital markets allow mobile global capital to flow into immobile local assets. This paper examines how foreign demand affects U.S. housing markets, and uses this demand shock to estimate local price elasticities of supply. Other countries introduced foreign-buyer taxes meant to deter Chinese housing investment beginning in 2011. We first show house prices grew 8 percentage points more in U.S. zipcodes with high foreign-born Chinese populations after 2011, subsequently reversing with the onset of the U.S.–China trade war. Second, we use international tax policy changes as a U.S. housing demand shock and estimate local house price and quantity elasticities with respect to international capital. We find that a 1% increase in instrumented foreign capital raises house prices at the zip code level by 0.27%, and housing supply by 0.004%. Finally, we use the two elasticities to construct new local house price elasticities of supply for the largest 100 CBSAs. These supply elasticities average 0.1 and vary between 0.02 and 0.7, suggesting that local housing markets are inelastic in the short run and exhibit substantial spatial heterogeneity.
papers.zh_title: 全球资本与本地资产：房价、数量与弹性
papers.zh_abstract: 相互关联的资本市场允许流动的全球资本流入不可移动的本地资产。本文考察了外国需求如何影响美国住房市场，并利用这一需求冲击来估计本地价格供给弹性。其他国家自2011年起引入了旨在抑制中国住房投资的外国买家税。我们首先发现，2011年后，在华裔外国出生人口比例高的美国邮政编码区，房价增长高出8个百分点，随后随着美中贸易战的爆发而逆转。其次，我们利用国际税收政策变化作为美国住房需求冲击，估计了本地房价和数量对国际资本的弹性。我们发现，工具化外国资本每增加1%，邮政编码层面的房价上涨0.27%，住房供给增加0.004%。最后，我们利用这两个弹性，为最大的100个核心统计区构建了新的本地房价供给弹性。这些供给弹性平均为0.1，介于0.02和0.7之间，表明本地住房市场在短期内缺乏弹性，并表现出显著的空间异质性。

papers.title: Incorporating Scenario Analysis into the Federal Reserve’s Policy Strategy and Communications
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Andrew T. Levin, Mickey D. Levy
papers.abstract: The U.S. economy currently faces a truly extraordinary degree of uncertainty as a consequence of the COVID-19 pandemic. In these circumstances, the Federal Reserve could begin highlighting alternative scenarios to illustrate key risks to the economic outlook, and such scenarios could inform the Fed’s policy strategy and public communications. In this paper, we present a set of illustrative scenarios, including a baseline scenario with a rapid but incomplete recovery this year (an upward-tilting checkmark), a benign scenario in which an effective cure or vaccine becomes available and facilitates a nearly complete recovery by mid-2021, and a severely adverse scenario involving persistently high unemployment and disinflationary pressures. Insights into these scenarios can be drawn from key historical episodes, including the Spanish flu, the Great Depression, the end of World War II, and the global financial crisis. We conclude by identifying key challenges that the Federal Reserve might face in adjusting its monetary policy and emergency credit facilities under each of these alternative scenarios.
papers.zh_title: 将情景分析纳入美联储的政策策略与沟通
papers.zh_abstract: 由于COVID-19大流行，美国经济目前面临真正非同寻常的高度不确定性。在这种情况下，美联储可以开始强调替代情景，以说明经济前景的关键风险，并且此类情景可以为美联储的政策策略和公共沟通提供信息。在本文中，我们提出了一组说明性情景，包括一个今年快速但不完全复苏的基线情景（向上倾斜的勾形）、一个有效疗法或疫苗可用并促进到2021年中期几乎完全复苏的良性情景，以及一个涉及持续高失业率和通缩压力的严重不利情景。对这些情景的洞察可以从关键历史事件中汲取，包括西班牙流感、大萧条、二战结束和全球金融危机。最后，我们指出了美联储在每种替代情景下调整其货币政策和紧急信贷工具时可能面临的关键挑战。

papers.title: How Much Should we Trust Estimates of Firm Effects and Worker Sorting?
papers.authors: Stéphane Bonhomme, Kerstin Holzheu, Thibaut Lamadon, Elena Manresa, Magne Mogstad, Bradley Setzler
papers.abstract: Many studies use matched employer-employee data to estimate a statistical model of earnings determination where log-earnings are expressed as the sum of worker effects, firm effects, covariates, and idiosyncratic error terms. Estimates based on this model have produced two influential yet controversial conclusions. First, firm effects typically explain around 20% of the variance of log-earnings, pointing to the importance of firm-specific wage-setting for earnings inequality. Second, the correlation between firm and worker effects is often small and sometimes negative, indicating little if any sorting of high-wage workers to high-paying firms. The objective of this paper is to assess the sensitivity of these conclusions to the biases that arise because of limited mobility of workers across firms. We use employer-employee data from the US and several European countries while taking advantage of both fixed-effects and random-effects methods for bias-correction. We find that limited mobility bias is severe and that bias-correction is important. Once one corrects for limited mobility bias, firm effects dispersion matters less for earnings inequality and worker sorting becomes always positive and typically strong.
papers.zh_title: 我们应在多大程度上相信企业效应与工人分类的估计？
papers.zh_abstract: 许多研究使用雇主-雇员匹配数据来估计一个收入决定的统计模型，其中对数收入表示为工人效应、企业效应、协变量和特质误差项之和。基于该模型的估计得出了两个有影响力但有争议的结论。首先，企业效应通常解释对数收入方差的约20%，表明企业特定工资设定对收入不平等的重要性。其次，企业效应与工人效应之间的相关性通常很小，有时甚至为负，表明高工资工人很少（如果有的话）流向高薪企业。本文旨在评估这些结论对因工人跨企业流动性有限而产生的偏差的敏感性。我们利用来自美国和几个欧洲国家的雇主-雇员数据，同时采用固定效应和随机效应方法进行偏差校正。我们发现有限流动性偏差严重，偏差校正很重要。一旦校正了有限流动性偏差，企业效应离散度对收入不平等的影响变小，工人分类始终为正且通常很强。

papers.title: Duration-Based Stock Valuation: Reassessing Stock Market Performance and Volatility
papers.authors: Jules H. van Binsbergen
papers.abstract: Using a panel of international government bond data, I construct fixed income portfolios that match the duration of the dividend strips of the corresponding local aggregate stock market index. I find that these bond portfolios have performed as well as -- if not better than -- their stock counterparts in the past half century while exhibiting similar (or even higher) levels of volatility. These results provide a novel perspective on both the equity risk premium and excess volatility puzzles (bubbles). I present several potential explanations, and discuss further the implications for macroeconomics, monetary economics, asset pricing, and corporate finance.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E2, E21, E4, G1, G11, G12, G15, G31, G32, G5, G52, O4
papers.zh_title: 基于久期的股票估值：重新评估股市表现与波动性
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一组国际政府债券数据，我构建了固定收益投资组合，其久期与相应本地股票市场指数的股息剥离久期相匹配。我发现，在过去半个世纪中，这些债券投资组合的表现与股票对应物相当（甚至更好），同时表现出相似（甚至更高）的波动水平。这些结果为股权风险溢价和过度波动之谜（泡沫）提供了新的视角。我提出了几种可能的解释，并进一步讨论了对宏观经济学、货币经济学、资产定价和公司金融的含义。

papers.title: Inequality, Fiscal Policy and COVID19 Restrictions in a Demand-Determined Economy
papers.authors: Alan J. Auerbach, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Daniel Murphy
papers.abstract: We evaluate the effects of inequality, fiscal policy, and COVID19 restrictions in a model of economic slack with potentially rigid capital operating costs. Inequality has large negative effects on output, while also diminishing the effects of demand-side fiscal stimulus. COVID restrictions can reduce current-period GDP by more than is directly associated with the restrictions themselves when rigid capital costs induce firm exit. Higher inequality is associated with larger restriction multipliers. The effectiveness of fiscal policies depends on inequality and the joint distribution of capital operating costs and firm revenues. Furthermore, COVID19 restrictions can cause future inflation, as households tilt their expenditure toward the future.
papers.zh_title: 不平等、财政政策与COVID-19限制措施在一个需求决定的经济体中的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个存在经济松弛且资本运营成本可能刚性的模型中，评估了不平等、财政政策和COVID-19限制措施的影响。不平等对产出有显著的负面效应，同时也会削弱需求侧财政刺激的效果。当刚性资本成本导致企业退出时，COVID-19限制措施对当期GDP的减少可能超过限制措施本身的直接关联效应。更高的不平等与更大的限制乘数相关。财政政策的有效性取决于不平等程度以及资本运营成本与企业收入的联合分布。此外，COVID-19限制措施可能导致未来通胀，因为家庭将支出向未来倾斜。

papers.title: Global Lessons from Climate Change Legislation and Litigation
papers.authors: Shaikh M. Eskander, Sam Fankhauser, Joana Setzer
papers.abstract: There is no country in the world that does not have at least one law or policy dealing with climate change. The most prolific countries have well over 20, and globally there are 1,800 such laws. Some of them are executive orders or policies issued by governments, others are legislative acts passed by parliament. The judiciary has been involved in 1,500 court cases that concern climate change (over 1,100 of which in the US). We use Climate Change Laws of the World (CCLW), a publicly accessible database, to analyze patterns and trends in climate change legislation and litigation over the past 30 years. The data reveal that global legislative activity peaked around 2009-14, well before the Paris Agreement. Accounting for effectiveness in implementation and the length of time laws have been in place, the UK and South Korea are the most comprehensive legislators among G20 countries and Spain within the OECD. Climate change legislation is less of a partisan issue than is commonly assumed: the number of climate laws passed by governments of the left, center and right is roughly proportional to their time in office. We also find that legislative activity decreases in times of economic difficulty. Where courts have got involved, judges outside the US have ruled in favor of enhanced climate protection in about half of the cases (US judges are more inclined to rule against climate protection).
papers.zh_title: 气候变化立法与诉讼的全球经验
papers.zh_abstract: 世界上每个国家都至少有一项应对气候变化的法律或政策。立法最活跃的国家拥有超过20项此类法律，全球共有1800项。其中一些是政府发布的行政命令或政策，另一些是议会通过的立法法案。司法机构已介入1500起与气候变化相关的法庭案件（其中超过1100起发生在美国）。我们利用公开数据库“世界气候变化法律”（CCLW），分析了过去30年气候变化立法与诉讼的模式和趋势。数据显示，全球立法活动在2009年至2014年左右达到顶峰，远早于《巴黎协定》。考虑到实施效果和法律生效时长，英国和韩国是G20国家中立法最全面的，西班牙则是OECD国家中最全面的。气候变化立法并不像通常认为的那样具有党派分歧：左翼、中间派和右翼政府通过的气候法律数量大致与其执政时间成正比。我们还发现，立法活动在经济困难时期会减少。在法院介入的案件中，美国以外的法官在大约一半的案件中支持加强气候保护（美国法官更倾向于反对气候保护）。

papers.title: Building Resilient Health Systems: Experimental Evidence from Sierra Leone and the 2014 Ebola Outbreak
papers.authors: Darin Christensen, Oeindrila Dube, Johannes Haushofer, Bilal Siddiqi, Maarten J. Voors
papers.abstract: Underuse of health systems and a lack of confidence in their quality contribute to high rates of mortality in the developing world. How individuals perceive health systems may be especially critical during epidemics, when they choose whether to cooperate with response efforts and frontline health workers. Can improving the perceived quality of healthcare promote community health and ultimately, help to contain epidemics? We leverage a field experiment to answer this question in the context of Sierra Leone and the 2014 West Africa Ebola crisis. Two years before the outbreak, we randomly assigned two accountability interventions to government-run health clinics – one focused on community monitoring and the other conferred non-financial awards to clinic staff. These interventions delivered immediate benefits under "normal" conditions. Even prior to the Ebola crisis, both interventions increased clinic utilization and satisfaction with healthcare, and community monitoring additionally improved child health, leading to 38 percent fewer deaths of children under five. Later, during the crisis, the interventions also increased reporting of Ebola cases by 62 percent, and significantly reduced Ebola-related deaths. Evidence on mechanisms suggests that the interventions improved confidence in the health system, encouraging patients to report Ebola symptoms and receive medical care. These results indicate that promoting accountability not only has the power to improve health systems during normal times, but can also make them more resilient to crises that emerge over the longer run.
papers.zh_title: 建设有韧性的卫生系统：来自塞拉利昂和2014年埃博拉疫情的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 卫生系统利用不足以及对其质量缺乏信心，是导致发展中国家高死亡率的原因之一。个人对卫生系统的看法在疫情期间可能尤为关键，因为他们需要决定是否配合应对工作并与一线卫生工作者合作。改善医疗服务的感知质量能否促进社区健康并最终帮助控制疫情？我们利用一项实地实验，在塞拉利昂和2014年西非埃博拉危机的背景下回答这个问题。疫情爆发前两年，我们对政府运营的诊所随机分配了两种问责干预措施——一种侧重于社区监督，另一种向诊所工作人员提供非金钱奖励。这些干预措施在“正常”条件下立即带来了好处。甚至在埃博拉危机之前，两种干预措施都提高了诊所利用率和医疗满意度，而社区监督还改善了儿童健康，使五岁以下儿童死亡率降低了38%。后来，在危机期间，这些干预措施还将埃博拉病例的报告率提高了62%，并显著减少了与埃博拉相关的死亡。关于机制的证据表明，这些干预措施增强了对卫生系统的信心，鼓励患者报告埃博拉症状并接受医疗护理。这些结果表明，促进问责制不仅能在正常时期改善卫生系统，还能使其在面对长期出现的危机时更具韧性。

papers.title: Tax Policy and Abnormal Investment Behavior
papers.authors: Qiping Xu, Eric Zwick
papers.abstract: This paper studies tax-minimizing investment, whereby firms tilt capital purchases toward fiscal year-end to reduce taxes. Between 1984 and 2016, average investment in fiscal Q4 exceeds the fiscal Q1 through Q3 average by 36%. Q4 spikes occur in the U.S. and internationally. We use this behavior to characterize the mechanisms through which taxes affect corporate investment behavior. Research designs using variation in firm tax positions from administrative data and tax policy changes confirm that tax minimization causes spikes. Spikes increase when firms face financial constraints or higher option values of waiting until fiscal year-end, and cumulative investment levels do not completely reverse after spikes. We develop an investmentmodel with tax asymmetries to rationalize these patterns. In themodel, both a depreciation motive—late-year investments face lower effective tax rates—and an option value motive—tax asymmetry implies time-varying opportunities to minimize taxes—are necessary to fit the data. We document and discuss implications of investment spikes for capital goods suppliers, lenders, and stimulus policy design.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PE；JEL：D21, D22, D92, G31, H25, H32
papers.zh_title: 税收政策与异常投资行为
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了旨在减少税收的投资行为，即企业将资本购买倾斜至财政年度末以降低税负。在1984年至2016年间，财政第四季度的平均投资比第一至第三季度的平均水平高出36%。第四季度的投资峰值在美国和国际上均有出现。我们利用这种行为来刻画税收影响企业投资行为的机制。利用行政数据中企业税收状况的变化以及税收政策变化的研究设计，证实了税收最小化导致了投资峰值。当企业面临财务约束或等待至财政年度末的期权价值更高时，投资峰值会增加，并且峰值后的累计投资水平不会完全逆转。我们开发了一个包含税收不对称性的投资模型来解释这些模式。在该模型中，折旧动机（年末投资面临较低的有效税率）和期权价值动机（税收不对称意味着存在随时间变化的税收最小化机会）对于拟合数据都是必要的。我们记录并讨论了投资峰值对资本品供应商、贷款机构和刺激政策设计的影响。

papers.title: Determinants of Small Business Reopening Decisions After COVID Restrictions Were Lifted
papers.authors: Dylan Balla-Elliott, Zoë B. Cullen, Edward L. Glaeser, Michael Luca, Christopher T. Stanton
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic led to dramatic economic disruptions, including government-imposed restrictions that required millions of American businesses to temporarily close. We present three main facts about business decisions to reopen at the end of the lockdown, using a nation-wide survey of thousands of small businesses. First, the plurality of firms reopened within days of the end of legal restrictions, suggesting that the lockdowns were generally binding for businesses - although a sizable minority delayed their reopening. Second, decisions to delay reopenings were not driven by public health concerns. Instead, businesses in high-proximity sectors planned to reopen more slowly because of expectations of stricter regulation rather than concerns about public health. Third, pessimistic demand projections played the primary role in explaining delays among firms that could legally reopen. Owners expected demand to be one-third lower than before the crisis throughout the pandemic. Using experimentally induced shocks to perceived demand, we find that a 10% decline in expected demand results in a 1.5 percentage point (8%) increase in the likelihood that firms expected to remain closed for at least one month after being legally able to open.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D22, E32, I15, L23
papers.zh_title: COVID-19限制解除后小企业重新开业决策的决定因素
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情导致了剧烈的经济混乱，包括政府实施的限制措施，要求数百万美国企业暂时关闭。我们利用一项覆盖数千家小企业的全国性调查，提出了关于封锁结束时企业重新开业决策的三个主要事实。首先，多数企业在法律限制结束后的几天内重新开业，这表明封锁对企业普遍具有约束力——尽管有相当一部分企业推迟了重新开业。其次，推迟重新开业的决策并非由公共卫生担忧驱动。相反，高接触性行业的企业计划更慢地重新开业，是因为预期到更严格的监管，而非对公共卫生的担忧。第三，悲观的需求预期在解释那些可以合法重新开业的企业为何延迟方面发挥了主要作用。在整个疫情期间，业主预计需求将比危机前低三分之一。利用实验诱导的感知需求冲击，我们发现预期需求下降10%会导致企业在合法开业后至少一个月内仍预期关闭的可能性增加1.5个百分点（8%）。

papers.title: To Pool or Not to Pool? Security Design in OTC Markets
papers.authors: Vincent Glode, Christian C. Opp, Ruslan Sverchkov
papers.abstract: We study security issuers' decision whether to pool assets when facing counterparties endowed with market power, as is common in over-the-counter markets. Unlike in competitive markets, pooling assets may be suboptimal in the presence of market power - both privately and socially - in particular, when the potential gains from trade are large. In these cases, pooling assets reduces the elasticity of trade volume in the relevant part of the payoff distribution, exacerbating inefficient rationing associated with the exercise of market power. Our results shed light on recently observed time-variation in the prevalence of pooling in financial markets.
papers.zh_title: 打包还是不打包？场外交易市场中的证券设计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了证券发行人在面对拥有市场势力的交易对手时（这在场外交易市场中很常见）是否决定打包资产。与竞争性市场不同，在市场势力存在的情况下，打包资产可能在私人和社会层面都是次优的——特别是当潜在贸易收益很大时。在这些情况下，打包资产会降低相关收益分配部分中交易量的弹性，从而加剧与行使市场势力相关的低效配给。我们的研究结果揭示了近期观察到的金融市场中打包行为流行程度随时间变化的现象。

papers.title: EMEs and COVID-19: Shutting Down in a World of Informal and Tiny Firms
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Oscar Becerra, Marcela Eslava
papers.abstract: Emerging economies are characterized by an extremely high prevalence of informality, small-firm employment and jobs not fit for working from home. These features factor into how the COVID-19 crisis has affected the economy. We develop a framework that, based on accounting identities and actual data, quantifies potential job and income losses during the crisis and recovery for economies with different economic organization structures. Our analysis incorporates differential exposure of jobs across categories of firm-size and formality status, as well as sectors and occupations. We account for the direct supply shock caused by lockdowns, the idiosyncratic demand shock suffered by sectors that rely on high contact with their costumers, the transmission of both shocks through IO linkages, and the overall aggregate demand effect derived from these shocks. Applying our framework to data for Colombia, which exhibits an employment distribution similar to that of other emerging market countries, in particular Latin America, we find that well over 50% of jobs are at risk in the initial stages of the crisis. Because informal jobs and those not fit for telework are at higher risk, this number goes down to 33% if the US employment distribution is imposed on the Colombian data. As the crisis deepens, the risk of unemployment grows. However, informality rebounds quickly in the recovery, an employment at risk is quickly reduced to 20% of the baseline, all concentrated in formal jobs. Our findings point to the importance of action to maintain formal matches from dissolving, given their scarcity and rebuilding difficulty, while protecting the poor and the informal via income transfers.
papers.zh_title: 新兴市场经济体与COVID-19：在一个充满非正规和小微企业的世界中实施封锁
papers.zh_abstract: 新兴经济体的特点是非正规就业、小企业就业以及不适合居家办公的工作岗位极其普遍。这些特征影响了COVID-19危机对经济的影响方式。我们开发了一个框架，基于会计恒等式和实际数据，量化了危机期间和复苏过程中不同经济组织结构经济体潜在的就业和收入损失。我们的分析考虑了不同企业规模类别和正规性状态，以及行业和职业中就业岗位的差异化风险敞口。我们考虑了封锁造成的直接供给冲击、依赖高客户接触度行业遭受的特异性需求冲击、这两种冲击通过投入产出关联的传导，以及这些冲击导致的总体需求效应。将我们的框架应用于哥伦比亚的数据（其就业分布与其他新兴市场国家，特别是拉丁美洲国家相似），我们发现危机初期超过50%的就业岗位面临风险。由于非正规就业和不适于远程办公的岗位风险更高，如果将美国就业分布应用于哥伦比亚数据，这一数字将降至33%。随着危机加深，失业风险增加。然而，非正规就业在复苏中迅速反弹，面临风险的就业岗位迅速降至基线的20%，且全部集中在正规就业岗位。我们的研究结果表明，鉴于正规就业岗位的稀缺性和重建难度，采取行动防止其解体至关重要，同时通过收入转移来保护穷人和非正规就业者。

papers.title: Gender Differences in COVID-19 Related Attitudes and Behavior: Evidence from a Panel Survey in Eight OECD Countries
papers.authors: Vincenzo Galasso, Vincent Pons, Paola Profeta, Michael Becher, Sylvain Brouard, Martial Foucault
papers.abstract: Using original data from two waves of a survey conducted in March and April 2020 in eight OECD countries (N = 21,649), we show that women are more likely to see COVID-19 as a very serious health problem, to agree with restraining public policy measures adopted in response to it, and to comply with them. Gender differences in attitudes and behavior are substantial in all countries, robust to controlling for a large set of sociodemographic, employment, psychological, and behavioral factors, and only partially mitigated for individuals who cohabit or have direct exposure to COVID-19. The results are not driven by differential social desirability bias. They carry important implications for the spread of the pandemic and may contribute to explain gender differences in vulnerability to it.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19相关态度与行为中的性别差异：来自八个OECD国家面板调查的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用2020年3月和4月在八个OECD国家进行的两轮调查的原始数据（N = 21,649），我们表明女性更倾向于将COVID-19视为一个非常严重的健康问题，更同意为应对疫情而采取的约束性公共政策措施，并更遵守这些措施。态度和行为上的性别差异在所有国家都很大，并且在对大量社会人口、就业、心理和行为因素进行控制后依然稳健，对于同居或直接接触COVID-19的个体，这些差异仅得到部分缓解。结果并非由差异化的社会期望偏差驱动。这些发现对疫情的传播具有重要影响，并可能有助于解释性别在疫情脆弱性上的差异。

papers.title: The Effect of Foreclosures on Homeowners, Tenants, and Landlords
papers.authors: Rebecca Diamond, Adam Guren, Rose Tan
papers.abstract: How costly is foreclosure? Estimates of the social cost of foreclosure typically focus on financial costs. Using random judge assignment instrumental variable (IV) and propensity score matching (PSM) approaches in Cook County, Illinois, we find evidence of significant non-pecuniary costs of foreclosure, particularly for foreclosed-upon homeowners. For all homeowners (IV and PSM), foreclosure causes housing instability, reduced homeownership, and financial distress. For marginal homeowners (IV) but not average homeowners (PSM), foreclosure also causes moves to worse neighborhoods and elevated divorce. We show that the difference between IV and PSM is due to treatment effect heterogeneity: marginal homeowners have more to lose than average homeowners. We find similar financial costs for landlords, although the non-financial effects we find for owners are absent. We find few negative effects for renters whose landlord forecloses. The contrast between our results for owners, renters, and landlords implies that the financial costs come from the financial loss while the non-financial costs for owners are due to a combination of eviction and financial loss rather than either individually. Our estimates imply that foreclosure is far more costly than current estimates imply, particularly for marginal cases that are most responsive to foreclosure mitigation policies, and that the costs are disproportionately borne by owners who lose their home.
papers.zh_title: 止赎对房主、租户和房东的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 止赎的成本有多高？对止赎社会成本的估计通常集中于财务成本。利用伊利诺伊州库克县的随机法官分配工具变量法和倾向得分匹配法，我们发现了止赎存在显著的非金钱成本，尤其是对于被止赎的房主而言。对于所有房主（工具变量法和倾向得分匹配法），止赎会导致住房不稳定、自有住房率下降和财务困境。对于边缘房主（工具变量法），而非普通房主（倾向得分匹配法），止赎还会导致搬迁至更差的社区以及离婚率上升。我们表明，工具变量法和倾向得分匹配法之间的差异源于处理效应的异质性：边缘房主比普通房主损失更大。我们发现房东的财务成本相似，尽管我们为房主发现的非财务效应在房东身上并不存在。我们发现对于房东被止赎的租户而言，几乎没有负面效应。我们的结果在房主、租户和房东之间的对比表明，财务成本源于经济损失，而房主的非财务成本则是驱逐和经济损失共同作用的结果，而非其中任何一个单独因素。我们的估计表明，止赎的成本远高于当前估计所暗示的水平，尤其是对于那些对止赎缓解政策反应最敏感的边缘案例，并且这些成本不成比例地由失去房屋的房主承担。

papers.title: Geographic and Socioeconomic Heterogeneity in the Benefits of Reducing Air Pollution in the United States
papers.authors: Tatyana Deryugina, Nolan H. Miller, David Molitor, Julian Reif
papers.abstract: Policies aimed at reducing the harmful effects of air pollution exposure typically focus on areas with high levels of pollution. However, if a population’s vulnerability to air pollution is imperfectly correlated with current pollution levels, then this approach to air quality regulation may not efficiently target pollution reduction efforts. We examine the geographic and socioeconomic determinants of vulnerability to dying from acute exposure to fine particulate matter (PM2.5) pollution. We find that there is substantial local and regional variability in the share of individuals who are vulnerable to pollution both at the county and ZIP code level. Vulnerability tends to be negatively related to health and socioeconomic status. Surprisingly, we find that vulnerability is also negatively related to an area’s average PM2.5 pollution level, suggesting that basing air quality regulation only on current pollution levels may fail to effectively target regions with the most to gain by reducing exposure.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：I14, Q53, Q56
papers.zh_title: 美国减少空气污染收益的地理和社会经济异质性
papers.zh_abstract: 旨在减少空气污染暴露有害影响的政策通常侧重于污染水平较高的地区。然而，如果人群对空气污染的脆弱性与当前污染水平并非完全相关，那么这种空气质量监管方法可能无法有效地针对减排努力。我们考察了因急性暴露于细颗粒物污染而死亡脆弱性的地理和社会经济决定因素。我们发现，在县和邮政编码层面，脆弱人群的比例存在显著的地方和区域差异。脆弱性往往与健康状况和社会经济地位呈负相关。令人惊讶的是，我们发现脆弱性也与一个地区的平均细颗粒物污染水平呈负相关，这表明仅基于当前污染水平的空气质量监管可能无法有效针对那些通过减少暴露获益最大的地区。

papers.title: The Impacts of a Prototypical Home Visiting Program on Child Skills
papers.authors: James J. Heckman, Bei Liu, Mai Lu, Jin Zhou
papers.abstract: This paper develops a new framework for estimating the causal impacts on child skills and the mechanisms producing these impacts using data from a randomized control study of a widely evaluated early-childhood home visiting program. We show the feasibility of replicating the program at scale. We report estimates from standard procedures for reporting treatment effects as unweighted averages item scores and compare them with estimates adjusting for item difficulties. Such adjustments produce more interpretable estimates. We go beyond treatment effects and estimate individual-specific latent skills, comparing treatment and control skills and their impacts on test scores.
papers.zh_title: 一个典型家访项目对儿童技能的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个被广泛评估的幼儿家访项目的随机对照研究数据，建立了一个新的框架来估计对儿童技能的因果影响以及产生这些影响的机制。我们展示了大规模复制该项目的可行性。我们报告了标准程序下将处理效应报告为项目分数未加权平均值的估计值，并将其与根据项目难度调整后的估计值进行比较。这种调整产生了更具可解释性的估计值。我们超越了处理效应，估计了特定个体的潜在技能，比较了处理组和对照组的技能及其对测试分数的影响。

papers.title: Corporate Bond Liquidity During the COVID-19 Crisis
papers.authors: Mahyar Kargar, Benjamin Lester, David Lindsay, Shuo Liu, Pierre-Olivier Weill, Diego Zúñiga
papers.abstract: We study liquidity conditions in the corporate bond market during the COVID-19 pandemic. We document that the cost of trading immediately via risky-principal trades increased dramatically at the height of the sell-off, forcing customers to shift towards slower, agency trades. Exploiting eligibility requirements, we show that the Federal Reserve’s corporate credit facilities had a positive effect on market liquidity. A structural estimation reveals that customers’ willingness to pay for immediacy increased by about 200 bps per dollar of transaction, but quickly subsided after the Fed announced its interventions. Dealers’ marginal cost also increased substantially, but did not fully subside.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E5, E58, E65, G0, G01, G12, G21, G23
papers.zh_title: COVID-19危机期间的公司债券流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了COVID-19大流行期间公司债券市场的流动性状况。我们记录了在抛售高峰期，通过风险本金交易立即交易的成本急剧上升，迫使客户转向更慢的代理交易。利用资格要求，我们表明美联储的公司信贷便利对市场流动性产生了积极影响。一项结构性估计显示，客户为即时性支付的意愿每美元交易增加了约200个基点，但在美联储宣布干预后迅速消退。交易商的边际成本也大幅增加，但并未完全消退。

papers.title: The search theory of OTC markets
papers.authors: Pierre-Olivier Weill
papers.abstract: I review the recent literature that applies search-and-matching theory to the study of Over-the-Counter (OTC) financial markets. I formulate and solve a simple model in order to illustrate the typical assumptions and economic forces at play in existing work. I then offer thematic tours of the literature and, in the process, discuss avenues for future research.
papers.zh_title: 场外交易市场的搜寻理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我回顾了近期将搜寻与匹配理论应用于场外金融市场研究的文献。我构建并求解了一个简单模型，以说明现有研究中典型的假设和经济力量。然后，我对文献进行了主题性梳理，并在此过程中讨论了未来研究的途径。

papers.title: Corporate Culture as a Theory of the Firm
papers.authors: Gary B. Gorton, Alexander K. Zentefis
papers.abstract: Markets and firms offer contrasting methods to arrange production. In markets, contracts govern the purchase of parts and services that compose production. In firms, the shared values, customs, and norms coming from a corporate culture govern employees’ joint development of those parts and services. We argue for this distinction as a theory of the firm. Firms exist because corporate culture at times is more efficient at carrying out production than detailed contracts. The firm’s boundary encircles the parts of production for which a manager optimally chooses corporate culture as the organizing device. The model can explain why some mergers and acquisitions fail, in a way consistent with empirical evidence, and why corporate cultures are hard to change.
papers.zh_title: 作为企业理论的企业文化
papers.zh_abstract: 市场和企业提供了组织生产的对比方法。在市场中，合同管理着构成生产的零部件和服务的采购。在企业中，来自企业文化的共享价值观、习俗和规范管理着员工对这些零部件和服务的联合开发。我们认为这种区别是一种企业理论。企业之所以存在，是因为企业文化有时比详细的合同更有效地进行生产。企业的边界围绕着生产的一部分，管理者为此最优地选择企业文化作为组织工具。该模型可以解释为什么一些并购会失败，这与经验证据一致，以及为什么企业文化难以改变。

papers.title: Inflation with Covid Consumption Baskets
papers.authors: Alberto Cavallo
papers.abstract: The Covid-19 Pandemic has led to changes in consumer expenditure patterns that can introduce significant bias in the measurement of inflation. I use data collected from credit and debit transactions in the US to update the official basket weights and estimate the impact on the Consumer Price Index (CPI). I find that the Covid inflation rate is higher than the official CPI in the US, for both headline and core indices. I also find similar results with Covid baskets in 10 out of 16 additional countries. The difference is significant and growing over time, as social-distancing rules and behaviors are making consumers spend relatively more on food and other categories with rising inflation, and relatively less on transportation and other categories experiencing significant deflation.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情消费篮子下的通货膨胀
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情导致了消费者支出模式的改变，这可能会给通货膨胀的衡量带来显著偏差。我利用从美国信用卡和借记卡交易中收集的数据来更新官方篮子权重，并估计对消费者价格指数的影响。我发现，无论是总体指数还是核心指数，美国的疫情通胀率都高于官方消费者价格指数。我还在另外16个国家中的10个国家中发现了类似的结果，即使用疫情篮子。这种差异显著且随时间推移而扩大，因为社交距离规则和行为使得消费者相对更多地支出于食品和其他通胀上升的类别，而相对更少地支出于交通和其他经历显著通缩的类别。

papers.title: Universal Basic Income: A Dynamic Assessment
papers.authors: Diego Daruich, Raquel Fernández
papers.abstract: Universal basic income (UBI) is an increasingly popular policy proposal but there is no evidence regarding its longer-term consequences. We study UBI in a general equilibrium model with imperfect capital markets, labor market shocks, and intergenerational linkages via skill formation and transfers. We find that UBI increases-welfare for older agents but has large-welfare losses for younger agents and future generations. A sizable share of the negative effects stem from the endogenous intergenerational linkages. Modeling automation as an increased probability of an “out-of-work” shock, the model provides insights on the changing welfare consequence of UBI in a riskier environment.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EFG, LS, POL；JEL：H24, H31, I38, J24
papers.zh_title: 全民基本收入：一项动态评估
papers.zh_abstract: 全民基本收入是一个日益流行的政策提议，但尚无关于其长期后果的证据。我们在一个具有不完善资本市场、劳动力市场冲击以及通过技能形成和代际转移产生代际联系的一般均衡模型中研究全民基本收入。我们发现，全民基本收入增加了老年代理人的福利，但对年轻代理人和未来世代造成了巨大的福利损失。负面效应的相当一部分源于内生的代际联系。将自动化建模为“失业”冲击概率的增加，该模型为在风险更高环境下全民基本收入福利后果的变化提供了见解。

papers.title: Global Trade and Margins of Productivity in Agriculture
papers.authors: Farid Farrokhi, Heitor S. Pellegrina
papers.abstract: We study the effects of globalization on agricultural productivity across countries. We develop a multi-country general equilibrium model that incorporates choices of crops and technologies in agricultural production at the micro-level of fields covering the surface of the earth. We estimate our model using field-level data on potential yields of crops under different technologies characterized by factor and input intensity. We evaluate the welfare and productivity gains from reductions in trade costs of agricultural outputs and inputs across countries between 1980 and 2015. In addition to gains from international crop specialization, we find notable gains from access to foreign agricultural inputs. This mechanism operates through a shift from traditional (labor-intensive) technologies to modern (input-intensive) ones.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, PR, TWP；JEL：F10, F14, F60, Q16, R14
papers.zh_title: 全球贸易与农业生产率边际
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了全球化对各国农业生产率的影响。我们构建了一个多国一般均衡模型，该模型在地球表面田地的微观层面纳入了农作物选择和生产技术选择。我们利用不同技术下（以要素和投入强度为特征）农作物潜在产量的田地级数据来估计模型。我们评估了1980年至2015年间各国农产品和投入品贸易成本降低所带来的福利和生产率提升。除了国际农作物专业化带来的收益外，我们发现获取外国农业投入品也带来了显著收益。这一机制通过从传统（劳动密集型）技术向现代（投入密集型）技术的转变而发挥作用。

papers.title: How and When to Use the Political Cycle to Identify Advertising Effects
papers.authors: Sarah Moshary, Bradley T. Shapiro, Jihong Song
papers.abstract: A central challenge in estimating the causal effect of TV advertising on demand is isolating quasi-random variation in advertising. Political advertising, which topped $14 billion in expenditures in 2016, has been proposed as a plausible source of such variation and thus a candidate for an instrumental variable. We provide a critical evaluation of how and where this instrument is valid and useful across categories. We characterize the conditions under which political cycles theoretically identify the causal effect of TV advertising on demand, highlight threats to the exclusion restriction and monotonicity condition, and suggest a specification to address the most serious concerns. We test the strength of the first stage category-by-category for 274 product categories. For most categories, weak-instrument robust inference is recommended, as first-stage F-statistics are less than 10 for 221 of 274 product categories in our benchmark specification. The largest first-stage F-statistics occur in categories that typically advertise locally, such as automobile dealerships and restaurants. Failure to use the suggested specification leads to results that suggest violations of exclusion and monotonicity in a significant number of categories. Finally, we conduct a case study of the auto industry. Despite a very strong first stage, the IV estimate for this category is imprecise.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, POL；JEL：C01, C26, C36, L0, L62, M3, M37
papers.zh_title: 如何以及何时利用政治周期识别广告效应
papers.zh_abstract: 估计电视广告对需求的因果效应的核心挑战在于隔离广告的准随机变化。政治广告（2016年支出超过140亿美元）被认为是这种变化的可能来源，因此可作为工具变量的候选。我们对该工具在不同类别中的有效性和实用性进行了批判性评估。我们描述了政治周期在理论上识别电视广告对需求因果效应的条件，强调了排他性约束和单调性条件面临的威胁，并提出了一个解决最严重问题的规范。我们对274个产品类别逐一检验了第一阶段的强度。对于大多数类别，建议使用弱工具变量稳健推断，因为在我们基准规范中，274个产品类别中有221个的第一阶段F统计量小于10。最大的第一阶段F统计量出现在通常进行本地广告的类别中，例如汽车经销商和餐馆。未能使用建议的规范会导致结果在大量类别中暗示违反排他性和单调性。最后，我们对汽车行业进行了案例研究。尽管第一阶段非常强，但该类别的IV估计并不精确。

papers.title: Old Age Risks, Consumption, and Insurance
papers.authors: Richard Blundell, Margherita Borella, Jeanne Commault, Mariacristina De Nardi
papers.abstract: In the U.S, after age 65, households face income and health risks and a large fraction of these risks are transitory. While consumption significantly responds to transitory income shocks, out-of-pocket medical expenses do not. In contrast, both consumption and out-of-pocket medical expenses respond to transitory health shocks. Thus, most U.S. elderly keep their out-of-pocket medical expenses close to a satiation point that varies with health. Consumption responds to health shocks mostly because adverse health shocks reduce the marginal utility of consumption. The effect of health on marginal utility changes the optimal transfers due to health shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：D1, D11, D12, D14, E2, E21, H2, H31, H51
papers.zh_title: 老年风险、消费与保险
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，65岁以后，家庭面临收入和健康风险，且这些风险中有很大一部分是暂时性的。虽然消费对暂时性收入冲击有显著反应，但自付医疗费用却没有。相比之下，消费和自付医疗费用都对暂时性健康冲击有反应。因此，大多数美国老年人将其自付医疗费用保持在接近一个随健康状况变化的饱和点。消费对健康冲击做出反应，主要是因为不利的健康冲击降低了消费的边际效用。健康对边际效用的影响改变了因健康冲击而产生的最优转移支付。

papers.title: Deciphering the Macroeconomic Effects of Internal Devaluations in a Monetary Union
papers.authors: Javier Andrés, Óscar Arce, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Samuel Hurtado
papers.abstract: We study the macroeconomic effects of internal devaluations undertaken by a periphery of countries belonging to a monetary union. We find that internal devaluations have large and positive output effects in the long run. Through an expectations channel, most of these effects carry over to the short run. Internal devaluations focused on goods markets reforms are generally more powerful in stimulating growth than reforms aimed at moderating wages, but the latter are less deflationary. For a monetary union with a periphery the size of the euro area's, the countries at the periphery benefit from internal devaluations even at the zero lower bound (ZLB) of the nominal interest rate. Nevertheless, when the ZLB binds, there is a case for a sequencing of reforms that prioritizes labor policies over goods markets reforms.
papers.zh_title: 解读货币联盟内部贬值的宏观经济效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了货币联盟中外围国家进行内部贬值的宏观经济效应。我们发现，内部贬值在长期内具有巨大且正向的产出效应。通过预期渠道，这些效应大部分会传导至短期。侧重于商品市场改革的内部贬值在刺激增长方面通常比旨在缓和工资的改革更有效，但后者通缩程度较低。对于一个外围国家规模与欧元区相当的货币联盟，即使在名义利率零下限（ZLB）下，外围国家也能从内部贬值中受益。然而，当ZLB具有约束力时，存在一种优先考虑劳动力政策而非商品市场改革的改革顺序安排。

papers.title: Information and the Acquisition of Social Network Connections
papers.authors: Toman Barsbai, Victoria Licuanan, Andreas Steinmayr, Erwin Tiongson, Dean Yang
papers.abstract: How do information interventions affect individual efforts to expand social networks? We study a randomized controlled trial of a program providing information on settling in the U.S. for new immigrants from the Philippines. Improved information leads new immigrants to acquire fewer new social network connections. Treated immigrants make 16-28 percent fewer new friends and acquaintances and are 65 percent less likely to receive support from organizations of fellow immigrants. The treatment has no effect on employment, wellbeing, or other outcomes. Consistent with a simple model, the treatment reduces social network links more in places likely to have lower costs of acquiring network links (those with more prior fellow immigrants). Information and social network links appear to be substitutes in this context: better-informed immigrants invest less in expanding their social networks upon arrival. Our results suggest that endogenous reductions in acquisition of social network connections can reduce the effectiveness of information interventions.
papers.zh_title: 信息与社会网络连接的获取
papers.zh_abstract: 信息干预如何影响个人扩大社交网络的努力？我们研究了一项为菲律宾新移民提供在美国定居信息的随机对照试验。改善的信息导致新移民获得更少的新社交网络连接。受干预的移民结交的新朋友和熟人数减少了16-28%，从移民同胞组织获得支持的可能性降低了65%。该干预对就业、幸福感或其他结果没有影响。与一个简单模型一致，该干预在可能具有较低网络连接获取成本的地方（即先前移民同胞较多的地方）减少了更多的社交网络连接。在这种情况下，信息和社交网络连接似乎是替代品：信息更充分的移民在抵达后对扩大社交网络的投资较少。我们的结果表明，社交网络连接获取的内生性减少可能会降低信息干预的有效性。

papers.title: The Rise of US Earnings Inequality: Does the Cycle Drive the Trend?
papers.authors: Jonathan Heathcote, Fabrizio Perri, Giovanni L. Violante
papers.abstract: We document that declining hours worked are the primary driver of widening inequality in the bottom half of the male labor earnings distribution in the United States over the past 52 years. This decline in hours is heavily concentrated in recessions: hours and earnings at the bottom fall sharply in recessions and do not fully recover in subsequent expansions. Motivated by this evidence, we build a structural model to explore the possibility that recessions cause persistent increases in inequality; that is, that the cycle drives the trend. The model features skill-biased technical change, which implies a trend decline in low-skill wages relative to the value of non-market activities. With this adverse trend in the background, recessions imply a potential double-whammy for low skilled men. This group is disproportionately likely to experience unemployment, which further reduces skills and potential earnings via a scarring effect. As unemployed low skilled men give up job search, recessions generate surges in non-participation. Because non-participation is highly persistent, earnings inequality remains elevated long after the recession ends.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E24, E32, J24, J31, J64, J65
papers.zh_title: 美国收入不平等加剧：周期驱动趋势吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了在过去52年中，工作时间减少是美国男性劳动收入分布下半部分不平等加剧的主要驱动因素。工作时间的减少高度集中在经济衰退期：底部群体的工作时间和收入在经济衰退中急剧下降，并在随后的扩张中未能完全恢复。受此证据启发，我们构建了一个结构模型来探讨经济衰退导致不平等持续加剧的可能性；即周期驱动趋势。该模型以技能偏向型技术变革为特征，这意味着低技能工资相对于非市场活动价值存在趋势性下降。在这种不利趋势的背景下，经济衰退对低技能男性意味着潜在的双重打击。该群体不成比例地经历失业，这通过疤痕效应进一步降低了技能和潜在收入。随着失业的低技能男性放弃求职，经济衰退导致非参与率激增。由于非参与具有高度持续性，收入不平等在经济衰退结束后很长时间内仍然居高不下。

papers.title: COVID-19 and Remote Work: An Early Look at US Data
papers.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, John J. Horton, Adam Ozimek, Daniel Rock, Garima Sharma, Hong-Yi TuYe
papers.abstract: We report the results of a nationally-representative sample of the US population during the COVID-19 pandemic. The survey ran in two waves from April 1-5, 2020 and May 2-8, 2020. Of those employed pre-COVID-19, we find that about half are now working from home, including 35.2% who report they were commuting and recently switched to working from home. In addition, 10.1% report being laid-off or furloughed since the start of COVID-19. There is a strong negative relationship between the fraction in a state still commuting to work and the fraction working from home. We find that the share of people switching to remote work can be predicted by the incidence of COVID-19 and that younger people were more likely to switch to remote work. Furthermore, states with a higher share of employment in information work including management, professional and related occupations were more likely to shift toward working from home and had fewer people laid off or furloughed. We find no substantial change in results between the two waves, suggesting that most changes to remote work manifested by early April.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR；JEL：I15, J21, L23, M15, M5
papers.zh_title: COVID-19与远程工作：美国数据的初步观察
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了COVID-19疫情期间美国全国代表性样本的调查结果。该调查分两轮进行，分别为2020年4月1日至5日和2020年5月2日至8日。在COVID-19前有工作的人中，我们发现约有一半现在在家工作，其中35.2%的人报告他们之前通勤，最近转为在家工作。此外，10.1%的人报告自COVID-19开始以来被解雇或暂时停职。各州仍在通勤上班的人口比例与在家工作的人口比例之间存在强烈的负相关关系。我们发现，转向远程工作的人口比例可以通过COVID-19的发病率来预测，并且年轻人更有可能转向远程工作。此外，在管理、专业及相关职业等信息工作就业份额较高的州，更倾向于转向在家工作，且被解雇或暂时停职的人数较少。我们发现两轮调查结果之间没有实质性变化，这表明大多数远程工作的变化在4月初就已显现。

papers.title: Do Youth Employment Programs Work? Evidence from the New Deal
papers.authors: Anna Aizer, Shari Eli, Adriana Lleras-Muney, Keyoung Lee
papers.abstract: We study the Civilian Conservation Corps (CCC) – the first and largest youth training program in the U.S. in operation between 1933 and 1942 – to provide the first comprehensive assessment of the short- and long-term effects of means-tested youth employment programs. We use digitized enrollee records from the CCC program in Colorado and New Mexico and matched these records to the 1940 Census, WWII enlistment records, Social Security Administration records, and death certificates. We find that enrollees who spent more time in CCC training grew taller, lived longer lives and had higher lifetime earnings as a result of their participation in the program. We also find modest increases in the educational attainment of the participants and increases in short term geographic mobility. In contrast, we find no evidence that their labor force participation or wages increased in the short run. To assess the internal and external validity of the results, we compare our estimates to those derived from a randomized evaluation of Job Corps, the modern version of the CCC, conducted in the 1990s. The RCT’s results show that our empirical strategy delivers estimates that are in line with the experimental estimates. Overall, we find significant long-term benefits in both longevity and earnings, suggesting short and medium-term evaluations underestimate the returns of training programs, as do those that fail to consider effects on longevity.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：J01, J08, J38, J68
papers.zh_title: 青年就业计划有效吗？来自新政的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了平民保护队（CCC）——美国在1933年至1942年间运营的第一个也是最大的青年培训计划——以提供对基于经济状况调查的青年就业计划的短期和长期影响的首次全面评估。我们使用了科罗拉多州和新墨西哥州CCC计划的数字化参与者记录，并将这些记录与1940年人口普查、二战征兵记录、社会保障管理局记录和死亡证明进行了匹配。我们发现，在CCC培训中花费更多时间的参与者因参与该计划而身高更高、寿命更长，并且终身收入更高。我们还发现参与者的教育程度略有提高，短期地理流动性增加。相比之下，我们没有发现证据表明他们的劳动力参与率或工资在短期内有所增加。为了评估结果的内部和外部有效性，我们将我们的估计与1990年代进行的对CCC现代版本——Job Corps的随机评估结果进行了比较。该随机对照试验的结果表明，我们的实证策略得出的估计与实验估计一致。总体而言，我们在寿命和收入方面都发现了显著的长期收益，这表明短期和中期评估低估了培训计划的回报，那些未能考虑对寿命影响的评估也是如此。

papers.title: Economic Uncertainty Before and During the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: David Altig, Scott R. Baker, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Scarlet Chen, Steven J. Davis, Julia Leather, Brent H. Meyer, Emil Mihaylov, Paul Mizen, Nicholas B. Parker, Thomas Renault, Pawel Smietanka, Greg Thwaites
papers.abstract: We consider several economic uncertainty indicators for the US and UK before and during the COVID-19 pandemic: implied stock market volatility, newspaper-based economic policy uncertainty, twitter chatter about economic uncertainty, subjective uncertainty about future business growth, and disagreement among professional forecasters about future GDP growth. Three results emerge. First, all indicators show huge uncertainty jumps in reaction to the pandemic and its economic fallout. Indeed, most indicators reach their highest values on record. Second, peak amplitudes differ greatly – from a rise of around 100% (relative to January 2020) in two-year implied volatility on the S&P 500 and subjective uncertainty around year-ahead sales for UK firms to a 20-fold rise in forecaster disagreement about UK growth. Third, time paths also differ: Implied volatility rose rapidly from late February, peaked in mid-March, and fell back by late March as stock prices began to recover. In contrast, broader measures of uncertainty peaked later and then plateaued, as job losses mounted, highlighting the difference in uncertainty measures between Wall Street and Main Street.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19大流行之前和期间的经济不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了COVID-19大流行之前和期间美国和英国的几个经济不确定性指标：隐含股票市场波动率、基于报纸的经济政策不确定性、关于经济不确定性的推特讨论、对未来业务增长的主观不确定性，以及专业预测者对未来GDP增长的分歧。出现了三个结果。首先，所有指标都显示出对疫情及其经济影响反应的巨大不确定性跳跃。事实上，大多数指标达到了有记录以来的最高值。其次，峰值幅度差异很大——从标普500指数两年期隐含波动率和英国企业对未来一年销售的主观不确定性上升约100%（相对于2020年1月），到预测者对英国增长的分歧上升20倍。第三，时间路径也不同：隐含波动率从2月下旬迅速上升，3月中旬达到峰值，然后在3月下旬随着股价开始回升而回落。相比之下，更广泛的不确定性指标峰值出现较晚，然后趋于平稳，因为失业人数增加，这凸显了华尔街和主街之间不确定性指标的差异。

papers.title: Misinformation During a Pandemic
papers.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Aakaash Rao, Christopher P. Roth, David H. Yanagizawa-Drott
papers.abstract: Media outlets often present diverging, even conﬂicting, perspectives on reality — not only informing, but potentially misinforming audiences. We study the extent to which misinformation broadcast on mass media at the early stages of the coronavirus pandemic inﬂuenced health outcomes. We ﬁrst document large diﬀerences in content between the two most popular cable news shows in the US, both on the same network, and in the adoption of preventative behaviors among viewers of these shows. Through both a selection-on-observables strategy and an instrumental variable approach, we ﬁnd that areas with greater exposure to the show downplaying the threat of COVID-19 experienced a greater number of cases and deaths. We assess magnitudes through an epidemiological model highlighting the role of externalities and provide evidence that contemporaneous information exposure is a key underlying mechanism.
papers.zh_title: 大流行期间的错误信息
papers.zh_abstract: 媒体机构经常呈现对现实的分歧甚至冲突的观点——不仅提供信息，还可能误导受众。我们研究了在冠状病毒大流行早期阶段，大众媒体传播的错误信息在多大程度上影响了健康结果。我们首先记录了美国同一网络的两个最受欢迎的有线新闻节目在内容上的巨大差异，以及这些节目观众在采取预防行为方面的差异。通过基于可观测变量的选择策略和工具变量方法，我们发现，对淡化COVID-19威胁的节目曝光度更高的地区，经历了更多的病例和死亡。我们通过一个强调外部性作用的流行病学模型评估了影响程度，并提供了证据表明同期信息暴露是一个关键的基础机制。

papers.title: Treasury Inconvenience Yields during the COVID-19 Crisis
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Stefan Nagel, Zhaogang Song
papers.abstract: In sharp contrast to most previous crisis episodes, the Treasury market experienced severe stress and illiquidity during the COVID-19 crisis, raising concerns that the safe-haven status of U.S. Treasuries may be eroding. We document large shifts in Treasury ownership and temporary accumulation of Treasury and reverse repo positions on dealer balance sheets during this period. We build a dynamic equilibrium asset pricing model in which dealers subject to regulatory balance sheet constraints intermediate demand/supply shocks from habitat agents and provide repo financing to levered investors. The model predicts that Treasury inconvenience yields, measured as the spread between Treasuries and overnight-index swap rates (OIS), as well as spreads between dealers’ reverse repo and repo rates, should be highly positive during the COVID-19 crisis, which are confirmed in the data. The same model framework, adapted to the institutional setting in 2007-2009, also helps explain the negative Treasury-OIS spread observed during the Great Recession.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, E5, G01, G21, G23
papers.zh_title: 新冠危机期间的国债不便收益率
papers.zh_abstract: 与以往大多数危机事件形成鲜明对比的是，美国国债市场在新冠危机期间经历了严重的压力和流动性不足，引发了对美国国债避险地位可能正在削弱的担忧。我们记录了这一时期国债所有权的巨大转变，以及交易商资产负债表上国债和逆回购头寸的暂时积累。我们构建了一个动态均衡资产定价模型，在该模型中，受监管资产负债表约束的交易商为来自栖息地代理人的需求/供给冲击提供中介，并向杠杆投资者提供回购融资。该模型预测，在新冠危机期间，国债的不便收益率（以国债与隔夜指数互换利率（OIS）之间的利差衡量）以及交易商逆回购与回购利率之间的利差应高度为正，这些预测在数据中得到了证实。同样的模型框架，经过调整以适应2007-2009年的制度环境，也有助于解释在大衰退期间观察到的负国债-OIS利差。

papers.title: Conservation Co-Benefits from Air Pollution Regulation: Evidence from Birds
papers.authors: Yuanning Liang, Ivan J. Rudik, Eric Zou, Alison Johnston, Amanda D. Rodewald, Catherine L. Kling
papers.abstract: Massive wildlife losses over the past 50 years have brought new urgency to identifying both the drivers of population decline and potential solutions. We provide the first large-scale evidence that air pollution, specifically ozone, is associated with declines in bird abundance in the United States. We show that an air pollution regulation limiting ozone precursors emissions has delivered substantial benefits to bird conservation. Our estimates imply that air quality improvements over the past four decades have stemmed the decline in bird populations, averting the loss of 1.5 billion birds, approximately 20 percent of current totals. Our results highlight that in addition to protecting human health, air pollution regulations have previously unrecognized and unquantified conservation co-benefits.
papers.zh_title: 空气污染监管的保护协同效益：来自鸟类的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 过去50年间大规模的野生动物损失，为识别种群下降的驱动因素和潜在解决方案带来了新的紧迫性。我们首次提供了大规模证据，表明空气污染（特别是臭氧）与美国鸟类数量的下降有关。我们证明，一项限制臭氧前体物排放的空气污染法规为鸟类保护带来了显著效益。我们的估算表明，过去四十年间的空气质量改善遏制了鸟类种群的下降，避免了15亿只鸟类的损失，约占当前总数的20%。我们的结果强调，除了保护人类健康外，空气污染法规还具有此前未被认识和量化的保护协同效益。

papers.title: Food, Fuel and the Domesday Economy
papers.authors: Juan Moreno-Cruz, M. Scott Taylor
papers.abstract: This paper develops a theory where access to food and fuel energy is critical to the location, number, and size of human settlements. By combining our theory with a simple Malthusian mechanism, we generate predictions for the distribution of economic activity and population across geographic space. We evaluate the model using data drawn from the very first census undertaken in the English language - the Domesday census - commissioned by William the Conqueror in 1086 A.D. Using G.I.S. data and techniques we find strong evidence that Malthusian forces determined the population size and the number of settlements in Domesday England.
papers.zh_title: 食物、燃料与末日审判书经济
papers.zh_abstract: 本文发展了一个理论，其中获取食物和燃料能源对于人类定居点的位置、数量和规模至关重要。通过将我们的理论与一个简单的马尔萨斯机制相结合，我们生成了关于经济活动和人口在地理空间上分布的预测。我们使用来自英语世界首次人口普查——即征服者威廉于公元1086年下令进行的《末日审判书》普查——的数据来评估该模型。利用地理信息系统（G.I.S.）数据和技术，我们发现了强有力的证据，表明马尔萨斯力量决定了末日审判书时期英格兰的人口规模和定居点数量。

papers.title: Nondogmatic Climate Policy
papers.authors: Niko Jaakkola, Antony Millner
papers.abstract: Disagreements about normative aspects of social time preferences have led to estimates of the Social Cost of Carbon (SCC) that differ by orders of magnitude. We investigate how disagreements about the SCC change if planners are non-dogmatic, i.e., they admit the possibility of a change in their normative views, and internalise the preferences of future selves. Although non-dogmatic planners may disagree about all the contentious aspects of social time preferences, disagreements about the SCC reduce dramatically. Admitting the possibility of a change in views once every 40 years results in a 4.6-fold reduction in the range of recommended SCCs.
papers.zh_title: 非教条式气候政策
papers.zh_abstract: 关于社会时间偏好规范性方面的分歧，导致了对碳社会成本（SCC）的估算相差数个数量级。我们研究了如果规划者是非教条式的，即他们承认其规范性观点可能发生改变，并内化未来自我的偏好，那么关于SCC的分歧将如何变化。尽管非教条式规划者可能在社会时间偏好的所有有争议方面存在分歧，但关于SCC的分歧会显著减少。承认每40年观点可能发生一次改变，会导致建议的SCC范围缩小4.6倍。

papers.title: Betting on the House: Subjective Expectations and Market Choices
papers.authors: Nicolas L. Bottan, Ricardo Perez-Truglia
papers.abstract: Home price expectations play a central role in macroeconomics and finance. However, there is little direct evidence on how home price expectations affect market choices. We provide the first causal evidence based on a large-scale, high-stakes, and naturally occurring field experiment in the United States. We mailed letters with information on trends in home prices to 57,910 homeowners who had listed their homes on the market. Collectively, these homes were worth $34 billion. We randomized the information contained in the mailing to create non-deceptive, exogenous variation in the subjects’ home price expectations. We then used rich administrative data to measure the effects of these information shocks on the subjects’ market choices. We found that, consistent with economic theory, higher home price expectations caused a reduction in the probability of selling the home. These effects were highly statistically significant, economically large in magnitude, and robust to a number of sharp checks. Our results indicated that market choices were highly elastic to expectations: a 1 percentage point increase in home price expectations caused a 2.63 percentage point reduction in the probability of selling the property within 12 weeks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：C81, C93, D83, D84, R31
papers.zh_title: 押注房产：主观预期与市场选择
papers.zh_abstract: 房价预期在宏观经济学和金融学中扮演着核心角色。然而，关于房价预期如何影响市场选择的直接证据很少。我们基于美国一项大规模、高 stakes 且自然发生的实地实验，提供了首个因果证据。我们向57,910名已在市场上挂牌出售房屋的房主邮寄了包含房价趋势信息的信件。这些房屋的总价值为340亿美元。我们对邮件中包含的信息进行了随机化处理，以在受试者的房价预期中创造非欺骗性的外生变异。然后，我们使用丰富的行政数据来衡量这些信息冲击对受试者市场选择的影响。我们发现，与经济理论一致，更高的房价预期导致出售房屋的概率降低。这些影响在统计上高度显著，经济规模巨大，并且对一系列严格的检验具有稳健性。我们的结果表明，市场选择对预期具有高度弹性：房价预期每增加1个百分点，在12周内出售房产的概率就会降低2.63个百分点。

papers.title: Financial Vulnerability and Risks to Growth in Emerging Markets
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Soumya Bhadury, Jay Surti
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a new financial vulnerability index for emerging market economies by exploiting key differences in their business cycles relative to those of advanced economies. Information on the domestic price of risk, cost of dollar hedging and market-based measures of bank vulnerability combine to generate indexes significantly more effective in capturing macro-financial vulnerability and stress compared to those based on information in trade and global factors. Our index significantly augments early warning surveillance capacity, as evidenced by out-of-sample forecasting gains around a majority of turning points in GDP growth, relative to distributed lag models that are augmented with information from macro-financial indexes that are custom-built to optimize such forecasts.
papers.zh_title: 新兴市场的金融脆弱性与增长风险
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过利用新兴市场经济体相对于发达经济体商业周期的关键差异，引入了一个新的金融脆弱性指数。国内风险价格、美元对冲成本以及基于市场的银行脆弱性衡量指标的信息相结合，生成的指数在捕捉宏观金融脆弱性和压力方面，显著优于基于贸易和全球因素信息的指数。我们的指数显著增强了早期预警监测能力，这通过围绕大多数GDP增长转折点的样本外预测增益得到证明，相比之下，那些为优化此类预测而定制构建的宏观金融指数所增强的分布滞后模型表现更差。

papers.title: Biases in Long-Horizon Predictive Regressions
papers.authors: Jacob Boudoukh, Ronen Israel, Matthew P. Richardson
papers.abstract: Analogous to Stambaugh (1999), this paper derives the small sample bias of estimators in J-horizon predictive regressions, providing a plug-in adjustment for these estimators. A number of surprising results emerge, including (i) a higher bias for overlapping than nonoverlapping regressions despite the greater number of observations, and (ii) particularly higher bias for an alternative long-horizon predictive regression commonly advocated for in the literature. For large J, the bias is linear in (J/T) with a slope that depends on the predictive variable’s persistence. The bias adjustment substantially reduces the existing magnitude of long-horizon estimates of predictability.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C01, C1, C22, C53, C58, G12, G17
papers.zh_title: 长 horizon 预测回归中的偏差
papers.zh_abstract: 类似于Stambaugh (1999)，本文推导了J-horizon预测回归中估计量的小样本偏差，并为这些估计量提供了一种插件调整方法。出现了一些令人惊讶的结果，包括：(i) 尽管重叠回归的观测值更多，但其偏差高于非重叠回归；(ii) 文献中常提倡的另一种长 horizon 预测回归的偏差尤其高。对于较大的J，偏差与(J/T)呈线性关系，其斜率取决于预测变量的持续性。偏差调整显著降低了现有长 horizon 可预测性估计的幅度。

papers.title: Salience and Taxation with Imperfect Competition
papers.authors: Kory Kroft, Jean-William P. Laliberté, René Leal-Vizcaíno, Matthew J. Notowidigdo
papers.abstract: This paper studies commodity taxation in a model featuring heterogeneous consumers, imperfect competition, and tax salience. We derive new formulas for the incidence and marginal excess burden of commodity taxation, and we find that tax salience and market structure interact when considering tax incidence but do not directly interact when considering the marginal excess burden. We estimate the necessary inputs to the formulas by combining Nielsen Retail Scanner data from grocery stores in the US with detailed sales tax data. We calibrate our new formulas and conclude that the incidence of sales taxes on consumers is increasing in tax salience, and the marginal excess burden of taxation is larger than standard formulas that ignore imperfect competition and tax salience.
papers.zh_title: 不完全竞争下的显著性与税收
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一个包含异质性消费者、不完全竞争和税收显著性的模型中的商品税。我们推导了商品税归宿和边际超额负担的新公式，并发现，在考虑税收归宿时，税收显著性和市场结构会相互作用，但在考虑边际超额负担时，它们并不直接相互作用。我们通过将美国杂货店的尼尔森零售扫描仪数据与详细的销售税数据相结合，估算了公式所需的必要输入。我们校准了新的公式，并得出结论：销售税对消费者的归宿随着税收显著性的增加而增加，并且税收的边际超额负担大于忽略不完全竞争和税收显著性的标准公式所得到的结果。

papers.title: Black Lives Matter Protests and Risk Avoidance: The Case of Civil Unrest During a Pandemic
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Joseph J. Sabia, Samuel Safford
papers.abstract: Sparked by the killing of George Floyd in police custody, the 2020 Black Lives Matter (BLM) protests brought a new wave of attention to the issue of inequality within criminal justice. However, some policymakers warned that such protests should be curtailed due to public health risks of infectious disease contagion. The current study finds that this epidemiological argument rests on an incorrect counterfactual that ignores economic incentives for risk-avoiding behaviors. We use newly collected data on BLM protests and anonymized cell phone data from SafeGraph, Inc. to estimate the impacts of BLM protests on (i) stay-at-home behavior, and (ii) foot-traffic to restaurants/bars, retail establishments, and business service locations. Event-study analyses provide strong evidence that net stay-at-home behavior increased following protest onset, consistent with the hypothesis that non-protesters shifted their activity in response to the perceived heightened risk of contagion and protest-related violence. Moreover, we find that the types of activities that were averted by BLM protests were potentially riskier for disease spread than outdoor civil rights protests: restaurant and bar-going and retail shopping. These risk-avoiding responses to protests, coupled with mask-wearing by protesters, explain why BLM protests did not reignite community-level COVID-19 growth. Together, our findings highlight the pitfalls of ignoring general equilibrium effects in assessing the net economic impacts of civil rights protests.
papers.zh_title: 黑人的命也是命抗议活动与风险规避：疫情期间社会动荡的案例
papers.zh_abstract: 由乔治·弗洛伊德在警方拘留期间被杀引发的2020年“黑人的命也是命”（BLM）抗议活动，为刑事司法中的不平等问题带来了新一轮关注。然而，一些政策制定者警告称，由于传染病传播的公共卫生风险，此类抗议活动应受到限制。本研究发现，这种流行病学论点建立在一个错误的反事实基础上，忽略了风险规避行为的经济激励。我们利用新收集的BLM抗议活动数据以及来自SafeGraph公司的匿名手机数据，估计了BLM抗议活动对（i）居家行为以及（ii）餐厅/酒吧、零售场所和商业服务地点客流量产生的影响。事件研究分析提供了强有力的证据，表明抗议活动开始后净居家行为有所增加，这与非抗议者因感知到更高的传染风险和抗议相关暴力风险而改变其活动的假设一致。此外，我们发现，BLM抗议活动所规避的活动类型（如外出就餐、逛酒吧和零售购物）在疾病传播方面可能比户外民权抗议活动风险更高。这些对抗议活动的风险规避反应，加上抗议者佩戴口罩，解释了为何BLM抗议活动并未重新引发社区层面的COVID-19增长。总之，我们的研究结果凸显了在评估民权抗议活动的净经济影响时忽视一般均衡效应的陷阱。

papers.title: Racial Disparity in COVID-19 Deaths: Seeking Economic Roots with Census data.
papers.authors: John McLaren
papers.abstract: This note seeks the socioeconomic roots of racial disparities in COVID-19 mortality, using county-level mortality, economic, and demographic data from 3,140 counties. For all minorities, the minority's population share is strongly correlated with total COVID-19 deaths. For Hispanic/Latino and Asian minorities those correlations are fragile, and largely disappear when we control for education, occupation, and commuting patterns. For African Americans and First Nations populations, the correlations are very robust. Surprisingly, for these two groups the racial disparity does not seem to be due to differences in income, poverty rates, education, occupational mix, or even access to healthcare insurance. A significant portion of the disparity can, however, be sourced to the use of public transit.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19死亡中的种族差异：利用人口普查数据探寻经济根源
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自3140个县的县级死亡率、经济和人口统计数据，探寻COVID-19死亡率中种族差异的社会经济根源。对于所有少数族裔而言，少数族裔人口比例与COVID-19总死亡人数密切相关。对于西班牙裔/拉丁裔和亚裔少数族裔，这些相关性较弱，并且在控制教育、职业和通勤模式后基本消失。对于非裔美国人和原住民群体，这些相关性非常稳健。令人惊讶的是，对于这两个群体，种族差异似乎并非由收入、贫困率、教育、职业构成甚至医疗保险获取方面的差异所致。然而，差异的很大一部分可以归因于公共交通的使用。

papers.title: Belief Distortions and Macroeconomic Fluctuations
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Sydney C. Ludvigson, Sai Ma
papers.abstract: This paper combines a data rich environment with a machine learning algorithm to provide new estimates of time-varying systematic expectational errors ("belief distortions") embedded in survey responses. We find that distortions are large even for professional forecasters, with all respondent-types over-weighting their own beliefs relative to publicly available information. Forecasts of inflation and GDP growth oscillate between optimism and pessimism by large margins, with biases in expectations evolving dynamically in response to cyclical shocks. The results suggest that artificial intelligence algorithms can be productively deployed to correct errors in human judgement and improve predictive accuracy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E03, E17, E7
papers.zh_title: 信念扭曲与宏观经济波动
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将丰富的数据环境与机器学习算法相结合，提供了嵌入在调查回应中的时变系统性预期误差（“信念扭曲”）的新估计。我们发现，即使是专业预测者，其扭曲也很大，所有受访者类型都相对于公开可用信息过度重视自身信念。对通胀和GDP增长的预测在乐观与悲观之间大幅摇摆，预期偏差随着周期性冲击动态演变。结果表明，人工智能算法可以有效地用于纠正人类判断中的错误并提高预测准确性。

papers.title: The Effect of Price on Firm Reputation
papers.authors: Michael Luca, Oren Reshef
papers.abstract: While a business's reputation can affect its pricing, prices can also affect its reputation. To explore the effect of prices on reputation, we investigate daily data on menu prices and online ratings from a large rating and ordering platform. We find that a price increase of 1% leads to a decrease of 3%-5% in the average rating. Consistent with this, the overall distribution of ratings for cheaper restaurants is similar to that of more expensive restaurants. Finally, these effects don't seem to be driven by consumer retaliation against price changes, but by changes in absolute price levels.
papers.zh_title: 价格对企业声誉的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 虽然企业的声誉会影响其定价，但价格也会影响其声誉。为了探究价格对声誉的影响，我们研究了来自一个大型评级和订购平台的菜单价格和在线评级的每日数据。我们发现，价格上涨1%会导致平均评级下降3%-5%。与此一致的是，较便宜餐厅的评级总体分布与较昂贵餐厅的评级分布相似。最后，这些影响似乎并非由消费者对价格变化的报复行为驱动，而是由绝对价格水平的变化驱动。

papers.title: From Imitation to Innovation: Where Is all that Chinese R&D Going?
papers.authors: Michael König, Zheng Michael Song, Kjetil Storesletten, Fabrizio Zilibotti
papers.abstract: We construct an endogenous growth model with random interactions where ﬁrms are subject to distortions. The TFP distribution evolves endogenously as ﬁrms seek to upgrade their technology over time either by innovating or by imitating other ﬁrms. We use the model to quantify the eﬀects of misallocation on TFP growth in emerging economies. We structurally estimate the stationary state of the dynamic model targeting moments of the empirical distribution of R&D and TFP growth in China during the period 2007–12. The estimated model ﬁts the Chinese data well. We compare the estimates with those obtained using data for Taiwan and perform counterfactuals to study the eﬀect of alternative policies. R&D misallocation has a large eﬀect on TFP growth.
papers.zh_title: 从模仿到创新：中国的研发投入都去了哪里？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个具有随机交互作用的内生增长模型，其中企业面临扭曲。全要素生产率（TFP）分布随着企业寻求随时间升级其技术（通过创新或模仿其他企业）而内生演化。我们利用该模型量化资源错配对新兴经济体TFP增长的影响。我们以2007-2012年间中国研发和TFP增长的经验分布矩为目标，对动态模型的稳态进行了结构性估计。估计模型很好地拟合了中国数据。我们将估计结果与使用台湾数据获得的结果进行比较，并进行反事实分析以研究替代政策的效果。研发资源错配对TFP增长有显著影响。

papers.title: The Economics of Sovereign Debt, Bailouts and the Eurozone Crisis
papers.authors: Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas, Philippe Martin, Todd E. Messer
papers.abstract: Despite a formal ‘no-bailout clause’, we estimate significant net present value transfers from the European Union to Cyprus, Greece, Ireland, Portugal and Spain, ranging from roughly 0.5% (Ireland) to 43% (Greece) of 2011 output during the recent Eurozone crisis. We propose a model to analyze and understand bailouts in a monetary union, and the large observed differences across countries. We characterize bailout size and likelihood as a function of the economic fundamentals (economic activity, debt-to-gdp ratio, default costs). Our model embeds a ‘Southern view’ of the crisis (transfers did not help) and a ‘Northern view’ (transfers weaken fiscal discipline). While a stronger no-bailout commitment reduces risk-shifting, it may not be optimal from the perspective of the creditor country, even ex-ante, if it increases the risk of immediate insolvency for high debt countries. Hence, the model provides a potential justification for the often decried policy of ‘kicking the can down the road’.
papers.zh_title: 主权债务、救助与欧元区危机的经济学分析
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管存在正式的“不救助条款”，我们估计在最近的欧元区危机期间，欧盟向塞浦路斯、希腊、爱尔兰、葡萄牙和西班牙提供了显著的净现值转移，范围从约占2011年产出的0.5%（爱尔兰）到43%（希腊）不等。我们提出了一个模型来分析和理解货币联盟中的救助行为以及各国之间观察到的巨大差异。我们将救助规模和可能性描述为经济基本面（经济活动、债务与GDP比率、违约成本）的函数。我们的模型包含了危机的“南方观点”（转移支付无济于事）和“北方观点”（转移支付削弱财政纪律）。虽然更强的不救助承诺减少了风险转移，但从债权国的角度来看，即使事前，如果它增加了高债务国立即破产的风险，也可能并非最优。因此，该模型为经常被批评的“踢皮球”政策提供了潜在的理由。

papers.title: Which Investors Matter for Equity Valuations and Expected Returns?
papers.authors: Ralph S. J. Koijen, Robert J. Richmond, Motohiro Yogo
papers.abstract: Based on an asset demand system, we develop a framework to quantify the impact of market trends and changes in regulation on asset prices, price informativeness, and the wealth distribution. Our leading applications are the transition from active to passive investment management and climate-induced shifts in asset demand. The transition from active to passive investment management had a large impact on equity prices but a small impact on price informativeness because capital did not flow from more to less informed investors on average. This finding is based on a new measure of investor-level informativeness that identifies which investors are more informed about future profitability. Climate-induced shifts in asset demand have a potentially large impact on equity prices and the wealth distribution, implying capital gains for passive investment advisors, pension funds, insurance companies, and private banking and capital losses for active investment advisors and hedge funds.
papers.zh_title: 哪些投资者对股票估值和预期回报至关重要？
papers.zh_abstract: 基于资产需求系统，我们开发了一个框架来量化市场趋势和监管变化对资产价格、价格信息含量以及财富分配的影响。我们的主要应用是从主动投资管理向被动投资管理的转变以及气候引发的资产需求变化。从主动投资管理向被动投资管理的转变对股票价格产生了巨大影响，但对价格信息含量的影响较小，因为平均而言，资本并未从信息更丰富的投资者流向信息较少的投资者。这一发现基于一种新的投资者层面信息含量衡量标准，该标准识别出哪些投资者对未来盈利能力更为了解。气候引发的资产需求变化可能对股票价格和财富分配产生巨大影响，这意味着被动投资顾问、养老基金、保险公司和私人银行业务将获得资本收益，而主动投资顾问和对冲基金将遭受资本损失。

papers.title: The Political Scar of Epidemics
papers.authors: Barry Eichengreen, Orkun Saka, Cevat Giray Aksoy
papers.abstract: Epidemic exposure in an individual’s “impressionable years” (ages 18 to 25) has a persistent negative effect on confidence in political institutions and leaders. This loss of trust is associated with epidemic-induced economic difficulties, such as lower income and unemployment later in life. It is observed for political institutions and leaders only and does not carry over to other institutions and individuals. A key exception is a strong negative effect on confidence in public health systems. This suggests that the distrust in political institutions and leaders is associated with the (in)effectiveness of a government’s healthcare-related response to epidemics. We show that the loss of political trust is largest for individuals who experienced epidemics under weak governments with low policymaking capacity, and confirm that weak governments in fact took longer to introduce policy interventions in response to COVID-19. We report evidence that the epidemic-induced loss of political trust discourages electoral participation in the long term.
papers.zh_title: 流行病的政治伤痕
papers.zh_abstract: 在个人“可塑性年龄”（18至25岁）期间经历流行病，会对其政治制度和领导人的信心产生持久的负面影响。这种信任的丧失与流行病引发的经济困难有关，例如晚年收入较低和失业。这种影响仅针对政治制度和领导人观察到，并未延伸至其他制度和个人。一个关键的例外是对公共卫生系统信心的强烈负面影响。这表明，对政治制度和领导人的不信任与政府应对流行病的医疗相关措施的（无）效性有关。我们表明，对于在政策制定能力薄弱的弱势政府下经历流行病的个人，其政治信任的丧失最大，并证实弱势政府在应对COVID-19时确实花了更长时间才引入政策干预。我们报告的证据表明，流行病引发的政治信任丧失会长期抑制选举参与。

papers.title: Economic Crisis, General Laws, and the Mid-Nineteenth-Century Transformation of American Political Economy
papers.authors: Naomi R. Lamoreaux, John Joseph Wallis
papers.abstract: Before the middle of the nineteenth century most laws enacted in the United States were special bills that granted favors to specific individuals, groups, or localities. This fundamentally inegalitarian system provided political elites with important tools that they could use to reward supporters, and as a result, they were only willing to modify it under very special circumstances. In the early 1840s, however, a major fiscal crisis forced a number of states to default on their bonded debt, unleashing a political earthquake that swept this system away. Starting with Indiana in 1851, states revised their constitutions to ban the most common types of special legislation and, at the same time, mandate that all laws be general in their application. These provisions dramatically changed the way government and the economy worked and interacted, giving rise to the modern regulatory state, interest-group politics, and a more dynamic form of capitalism.
papers.zh_title: 经济危机、一般法律与19世纪中叶美国政治经济转型
papers.zh_abstract: 在19世纪中叶之前，美国颁布的大多数法律都是向特定个人、群体或地方授予特权的特别法案。这种从根本上不平等制度为政治精英提供了奖励支持者的重要工具，因此他们只愿意在非常特殊的情况下修改它。然而，在19世纪40年代初，一场重大的财政危机迫使多个州对其债券债务违约，引发了一场政治地震，扫除了这一制度。从1851年印第安纳州开始，各州修订宪法，禁止最常见的特别立法类型，同时强制要求所有法律在适用上具有普遍性。这些条款极大地改变了政府与经济运作及互动的方式，催生了现代监管国家、利益集团政治以及更具活力的资本主义形式。

papers.title: Managing Households' Expectations with Unconventional Policies
papers.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Daniel Hoang, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: With a binding effective lower bound on interest rates and large government deficits, conventional policies are unviable and policymakers resort to unconventional policies, which target households' expectations directly. Using unique micro data and a difference-in-differences strategy, we assess the effectiveness of unconventional fiscal policy and forward guidance, both of which aim to stimulate consumption via raising households' inflation expectations. All households' inflation expectations and spending plans react to unconventional fiscal policy. Instead, households, contrary to experts, do not react to forward guidance. We argue that policies aiming to affect households directly are ineffective if (non-expert) households do not understand them.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D12, D84, D91, E21, E31, E52, E65
papers.zh_title: 通过非常规政策管理家庭预期
papers.zh_abstract: 在利率面临有效下限且政府赤字庞大的情况下，传统政策不可行，政策制定者转而采用直接针对家庭预期的非常规政策。利用独特的微观数据和双重差分策略，我们评估了非常规财政政策和前瞻性指引的有效性，这两者都旨在通过提高家庭的通胀预期来刺激消费。所有家庭的通胀预期和支出计划都对非常规财政政策做出反应。相反，与专家不同，家庭对前瞻性指引没有反应。我们认为，如果（非专家）家庭不理解这些政策，那么旨在直接影响家庭的政策是无效的。

papers.title: The Growth of Nations Revisited: Global Environmental Accounting from 1998 to 2018.
papers.authors: Aniruddh Mohan, Nicholas Z. Muller, Akshay Thyagarajan, Randall V. Martin, Melanie S. Hammer, Aaron van Donkelaar
papers.abstract: A persistent issue in environmental economics is whether growth is sustainable. Pollution is a key driver of sustainability, which we define as an economy exhibiting falling pollution damages at its balanced growth path. We deduct air pollution and carbon dioxide damages from the national accounts for 163 countries between 1998 and 2018. Global pollution intensity fell from 1998 to 2008, remaining flat thereafter. China highlights the importance of defining sustainability in terms of damages; between 2011 and 2018, physical measures of environmental quality improved, but monetary damage increased by 50 percent. Sustainability based on emissions ignores this rise in damage.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：E13, Q51, Q53, Q54, Q56
papers.zh_title: 国家增长再探：1998年至2018年的全球环境核算
papers.zh_abstract: 环境经济学中的一个持续问题是增长是否可持续。污染是可持续性的关键驱动因素，我们将可持续性定义为一个经济体在其平衡增长路径上表现出下降的污染损害。我们扣除了1998年至2018年间163个国家的国民账户中的空气污染和二氧化碳损害。全球污染强度从1998年到2008年下降，此后保持平稳。中国凸显了以损害来定义可持续性的重要性；在2011年至2018年间，环境质量的物理指标有所改善，但货币损害增加了50%。基于排放的可持续性忽视了这种损害的上升。

papers.title: What Accounts for the Rising Share of Women in the Top 1%?
papers.authors: Richard V. Burkhauser, Nicolas Hérault, Stephen P. Jenkins, Roger Wilkins
papers.abstract: The share of women in the top 1% of the UK’s income distribution has been growing over the last two decades (as in several other countries). Our first contribution is to account for this secular change using regressions of the probability of being in the top 1%, fitted separately for men and women, in order to contrast between the sexes the role of changes in characteristics and changes in returns to characteristics. We show that the rise of women in the top 1% is primarily accounted for by their greater increases (relative to men) in the number of years spent in full-time education. Although most top income analysis uses tax return data, we derive our findings taking advantage of the much more extensive information about personal characteristics that is available in survey data. Our use of survey data requires justification given survey under-coverage of top incomes. Providing this justification is our second contribution.
papers.zh_title: 是什么导致了女性在收入前1%群体中占比的上升？
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，英国收入分配前1%群体中女性的比例一直在增长（其他几个国家也是如此）。我们的第一个贡献是，通过分别对男性和女性拟合进入前1%概率的回归，来解释这种长期变化，以便对比性别之间特征变化和特征回报变化所起的作用。我们表明，女性在前1%群体中占比的上升，主要归因于她们（相对于男性）在全日制教育年限上的更大增长。尽管大多数高收入分析使用纳税申报数据，但我们利用调查数据中可获得的关于个人特征的更广泛信息得出了我们的发现。鉴于调查数据对高收入的覆盖不足，使用调查数据需要理由。提供这一理由是我们的第二个贡献。

papers.title: Predictable Financial Crises
papers.authors: Robin Greenwood, Samuel G. Hanson, Andrei Shleifer, Jakob Ahm Sørensen
papers.abstract: Using historical data on post-war financial crises around the world, we show that crises are substantially predictable. The combination of rapid credit and asset price growth over the prior three years, whether in the nonfinancial business or the household sector, is associated with about a 40% probability of entering a financial crisis within the next three years. This compares with a roughly 7% probability in normal times, when neither credit nor asset price growth has been elevated.
