Our evidence cuts against the view that financial crises are unpredictable “bolts from the sky” and points toward the Kindleberger-Minsky view that crises are the byproduct of predictable, boom-bust credit cycles. The predictability we document favors macro-financial policies that “lean against the wind” of credit market booms.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E44, E7, G01, G4
papers.zh_title: 可预测的金融危机
papers.zh_abstract: 利用全球战后金融危机的历史数据，我们表明金融危机在很大程度上是可预测的。无论发生在非金融企业部门还是家庭部门，过去三年内信贷和资产价格的快速增长组合，与未来三年内进入金融危机的概率约为40%相关。相比之下，在信贷和资产价格增长均未升高的正常时期，这一概率大约为7%。我们的证据反驳了金融危机是不可预测的“晴天霹雳”的观点，并支持金德尔伯格-明斯基的观点，即危机是可预测的繁荣-萧条信贷周期的副产品。我们所记录的可预测性，有利于采取“逆信贷市场繁荣之风而行”的宏观金融政策。

papers.title: Aggregate Effects from Public Works: Evidence from India
papers.authors: C. Justin Cook, Manisha Shah
papers.abstract: This paper explores the aggregate economic effects from India's National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (NREGS), which provides up to 100 days of labor to rural laborers at the mandated minimum wage. We examine the within-district change to night-time lights and banking deposits using the staggered program rollout for identification. We find consistent and robust evidence that NREGS increased aggregate economic output by 1-2% per capita measured by night-time lights. This effect, however, is not equal across districts. We observe no positive effect of the program in poorer districts, illuminating an important source of heterogeneity.
papers.zh_title: 公共工程的总体效应：来自印度的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了印度全国农村就业保障计划（NREGS）的总体经济效应，该计划为农村劳动者提供最多100天的按法定最低工资计算的劳动。我们利用该计划分阶段推出的特点进行识别，考察了地区内夜间灯光和银行存款的变化。我们发现一致且稳健的证据表明，以夜间灯光衡量，NREGS使人均总体经济产出增加了1-2%。然而，这种效应在各地区并不相等。我们在较贫困地区没有观察到该计划的积极效应，这揭示了一个重要的异质性来源。

papers.title: Measuring Labor-Force Participation and the Incidence and Duration of Unemployment
papers.authors: Hie Joo Ahn, James D. Hamilton
papers.abstract: The underlying data from which the U.S. unemployment rate, labor-force participation rate, and duration of unemployment are calculated contain numerous internal contradictions. This paper catalogs these inconsistencies and proposes a unified reconciliation. We find that the usual statistics understate the unemployment rate and the labor-force participation rate by about two percentage points on average and that the bias in the latter has increased over time. The BLS estimate of the average duration of unemployment substantially overstates the true duration of uninterrupted spells of unemployment and misrepresents what happened to average durations during the Great Recession and its recovery.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E32, J01, J64
papers.zh_title: 衡量劳动力参与率、失业发生率与失业持续时间
papers.zh_abstract: 用于计算美国失业率、劳动力参与率和失业持续时间的底层数据包含许多内部矛盾。本文对这些不一致之处进行了分类，并提出了统一的调和方案。我们发现，通常的统计数据平均低估了失业率和劳动力参与率约两个百分点，且后者中的偏差随时间推移而增大。美国劳工统计局的失业平均持续时间估计值，严重高估了未中断失业期的真实持续时间，并错误地描述了在大衰退及其复苏期间平均持续时间发生的情况。

papers.title: Social Distancing and Social Capital: Why U.S. Counties Respond Differently to COVID-19
papers.authors: Wenzhi Ding, Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Wensi Xie
papers.abstract: Since social distancing is the primary strategy for slowing the spread of many diseases, understanding why U.S. counties respond differently to COVID-19 is critical for designing effective public policies. Using daily data from about 45 million mobile phones to measure social distancing we examine how counties responded to both local COVID-19 cases and statewide shelter-in-place orders. We find that social distancing increases more in response to cases and official orders in counties where individuals historically (1) engaged less in community activities and (2) demonstrated greater willingness to incur individual costs to contribute to social objectives. Our work highlights the importance of these two features of social capital—community engagement and individual commitment to societal institutions—in formulating public health policies.
papers.zh_title: 社交距离与社会资本：为什么美国各县对COVID-19的反应不同
papers.zh_abstract: 由于社交距离是减缓许多疾病传播的主要策略，理解美国各县为何对COVID-19做出不同反应，对于设计有效的公共政策至关重要。利用来自约4500万部手机的日常数据来衡量社交距离，我们考察了各县如何应对本地COVID-19病例和全州范围内的居家令。我们发现，在那些历史上（1）较少参与社区活动且（2）表现出更愿意承担个人成本以贡献于社会目标的县，社交距离对病例和官方命令的反应增加更多。我们的工作强调了社会资本的这两个特征——社区参与和个人对社会制度的承诺——在制定公共卫生政策中的重要性。

papers.title: What Does and Does Not Correlate with COVID-19 Death Rates
papers.authors: Christopher R. Knittel, Bora Ozaltun
papers.abstract: We correlate county-level COVID-19 death rates with key variables using both linear regression and negative binomial mixed models, although we focus on linear regression models. We include four sets of variables: socio-economic variables, county-level health variables, modes of commuting, and climate and pollution patterns. Our analysis studies daily death rates from April 4, 2020 to May 27, 2020. We estimate correlation patterns both across states, as well as within states. For both models, we find higher shares of African American residents in the county are correlated with higher death rates. However, when we restrict ourselves to correlation patterns within a given state, the statistical significance of the correlation of death rates with the share of African Americans, while remaining positive, wanes. We find similar results for the share of elderly in the county. We find that higher amounts of commuting via public transportation, relative to telecommuting, is correlated with higher death rates. The correlation between driving into work, relative to telecommuting, and death rates is also positive across both models, but statistically significant only when we look across states and counties. We also find that a higher share of people not working, and thus not commuting either because they are elderly, children or unemployed, is correlated with higher death rates. Counties with higher home values, higher summer temperatures, and lower winter temperatures have higher death rates. Contrary to past work, we do not find a correlation between pollution and death rates. Also importantly, we do not find that death rates are correlated with obesity rates, ICU beds per capita, or poverty rates. Finally, our model that looks within states yields estimates of how a given state's death rate compares to other states after controlling for the variables included in our model; this may be interpreted as a measure of how states are doing relative to others. We find that death rates in the Northeast are substantially higher compared to other states, even when we control for the four sets of variables above. Death rates are also statistically significantly higher in Michigan, Louisiana, Iowa, Indiana, and Colorado. California's death rate is the lowest across all states.
papers.zh_title: 与COVID-19死亡率相关与不相关的因素
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用线性回归和负二项混合模型（但重点在线性回归模型）将县级COVID-19死亡率与关键变量进行关联分析。我们纳入四组变量：社会经济变量、县级健康变量、通勤方式以及气候与污染模式。我们的分析研究了2020年4月4日至2020年5月27日期间的每日死亡率。我们分别估计了跨州和州内的相关模式。对于两种模型，我们发现县内非裔美国居民比例较高与较高的死亡率相关。然而，当我们限定在特定州内的相关模式时，死亡率与非裔美国人比例的相关性在统计显著性上有所减弱，尽管仍保持正相关。我们对县内老年人比例也发现了类似结果。我们发现，与远程办公相比，通过公共交通通勤的比例较高与较高的死亡率相关。与远程办公相比，开车上班与死亡率的相关性在两种模型中也为正，但仅在跨州和跨县分析时具有统计显著性。我们还发现，不工作（因此也不通勤，无论是因年老、年幼或失业）的人口比例较高与较高的死亡率相关。房屋价值较高、夏季气温较高和冬季气温较低的县，死亡率也较高。与以往研究相反，我们没有发现污染与死亡率之间的相关性。同样重要的是，我们没有发现死亡率与肥胖率、人均ICU床位或贫困率相关。最后，我们关注州内差异的模型在控制了模型中的变量后，得出了特定州死亡率与其他州相比的估计值；这可以解释为衡量各州相对于其他州表现的一种指标。我们发现，即使控制了上述四组变量，东北部地区的死亡率也显著高于其他州。密歇根州、路易斯安那州、爱荷华州、印第安纳州和科罗拉多州的死亡率在统计上也显著更高。加利福尼亚州的死亡率在所有州中最低。

papers.title: Within-Job Wage Inequality: Performance Pay and Job Relatedness
papers.authors: Rongsheng Tang, Yang Tang, Ping Wang
papers.abstract: Over the past few decades, we find that about 80% of the widening residual wage inequality to be within jobs. We propose performance-pay incidence and job relatedness as two primary factors driving within-job inequality and embed them into a sorting equilibrium framework. We show that equilibrium sorting is positive assortative both within-job and across jobs. While performance-pay position amplifies within-job wage inequality through self-selection, the overall relationship between job relatedness and within-job wage inequality is found generally ambiguous. To quantify the role played by these factors, we calibrate the model to the US economy in 2000, where the model can account around 92% of the changes in within-job inequality among the highly educated from 1990 to 2000. Counterfactual analysis shows the contributions of performance-pay incidence and job relatedness are about 42% and 26%, respectively, both higher than that of job-specific productivity. While performance-pay incidence is particularly crucial for within-job wage dispersion in business/professional industry and professional occupation, job relatedness is the most important for mining/goods/construction industry and sales occupation.
papers.zh_title: 职业内工资不平等：绩效薪酬与工作关联性
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去几十年里，我们发现约80%的残差工资不平等扩大发生在职业内部。我们提出绩效薪酬发生率和职业关联性是驱动职业内不平等的两个主要因素，并将其嵌入一个分类均衡框架中。我们表明，均衡分类在职业内部和职业之间都是正选型匹配的。虽然绩效薪酬职位通过自我选择放大了职业内工资不平等，但职业关联性与职业内工资不平等之间的总体关系被发现通常是模糊的。为了量化这些因素的作用，我们根据2000年的美国经济对模型进行了校准，该模型可以解释1990年至2000年间高学历人群职业内不平等变化的约92%。反事实分析表明，绩效薪酬发生率和职业关联性的贡献分别约为42%和26%，两者均高于职业特定生产率的贡献。虽然绩效薪酬发生率对商业/专业行业和专业职业的职业内工资离散度尤为关键，但职业关联性对采矿/商品/建筑行业和销售职业最为重要。

papers.title: Dynamics of Markups, Concentration and Product Span
papers.authors: Elhanan Helpman, Benjamin C. Niswonger
papers.abstract: We develop a model with a finite number of multi-product firms that populate an industry together with a continuum of single product firms, and study the dynamics of this industry that arises from investments in the invention of new products. Consistent with the available evidence, the model predicts rising markups and concentration and a declining labor share. We then examine the dynamics of market shares and product spans in response to improvements in the technologies of the multi-product and single product firms, and the impact of these changes on the steady state distribution of market shares and product spans. Our model predicts the possibility of an inverted-U relationship between labor productivity and product span in the cross-section of firms, for which we provide suggestive evidence. It also predicts that rising entry costs of single-product firms may flatten the relationship between labor productivity and market shares of the large multi-product firms.
papers.zh_title: 加成率、集中度与产品跨度的动态变化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含有限数量多产品企业（与大量单一产品企业共同构成一个行业）的模型，并研究了由新产品发明投资所引发的该行业动态变化。与现有证据一致，该模型预测了加成率和集中度的上升以及劳动份额的下降。接着，我们考察了市场份额和产品跨度对多产品企业和单一产品企业技术进步的动态响应，以及这些变化对市场份额和产品跨度稳态分布的影响。我们的模型预测了企业横截面上劳动生产率与产品跨度之间可能存在倒U型关系，并为此提供了初步证据。该模型还预测，单一产品企业进入成本的上升可能会使大型多产品企业的劳动生产率与市场份额之间的关系趋于平缓。

papers.title: Principal Portfolios
papers.authors: Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud, Lasse H. Pedersen
papers.abstract: We propose a new asset-pricing framework in which all securities’ signals are used to predict each individual return. While the literature focuses on each security’s own-signal predictability, assuming an equal strength across securities, our framework is flexible and includes cross-predictability—leading to three main results. First, we derive the optimal strategy in closed form. It consists of eigenvectors of a “prediction matrix,” which we call “principal portfolios.” Second, we decompose the problem into alpha and beta, yielding optimal strategies with, respectively, zero and positive factor exposure. Third, we provide a new test of asset pricing models. Empirically, principal portfolios deliver significant out-of-sample alphas to standard factors in several data sets.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C1, C3, C58, C61, G11, G12, G14
papers.zh_title: 主成分投资组合
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个新的资产定价框架，其中所有证券的信号都被用来预测每个单独的收益率。虽然文献侧重于每个证券自身信号的可预测性，并假设各证券的预测强度相同，但我们的框架是灵活的，并包含了交叉可预测性——这带来了三个主要结果。首先，我们推导出最优策略的闭式解。该策略由“预测矩阵”的特征向量构成，我们称之为“主成分投资组合”。其次，我们将问题分解为alpha和beta，分别得到零因子敞口和正因子敞口的最优策略。第三，我们提供了一种新的资产定价模型检验方法。实证上，主成分投资组合在多个数据集中对标准因子产生了显著的样本外alpha。

papers.title: Coronavirus: Impact on Stock Prices and Growth Expectations
papers.authors: Niels J. Gormsen, Ralph S. J. Koijen
papers.abstract: We use data from the aggregate stock market and dividend futures to quantify how investors’ expectations about economic growth evolve across horizons in response to the coronavirus outbreak and subsequent policy responses until June 2020. Dividend futures, which are claims to dividends on the aggregate stock market in a particular year, can be used to directly compute a lower bound on growth expectations across maturities or to estimate expected growth using a forecasting model. We show how the actual forecast and the bound evolve over time. As of June 8, our forecast of annual growth in dividends is down 9% in the US and 14% in the EU compared to January 1, and our forecast of GDP growth is down by 2.0% in the US and 3.1% in the EU. The lower bound on the change in expected dividends is -18% in the US and -25% in the EU at the 2-year horizon. News about fiscal stimulus around March 24 boosts the stock market and long-term growth but did little to increase short-term growth expectations. Expected dividend growth has improved since April 1 in both the US and the EU. We conclude by developing and estimating a simple model of the crisis to understand the joint dynamics of short-term dividend futures, stock markets, and bond markets.
papers.zh_title: 冠状病毒：对股票价格和增长预期的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用股票市场总量和股息期货的数据，量化投资者对经济增长的预期如何在不同期限上因冠状病毒爆发及随后的政策应对（截至2020年6月）而演变。股息期货是对特定年份股票市场总量股息的索取权，可用于直接计算跨期限增长预期的下限，或使用预测模型估计预期增长。我们展示了实际预测和下限如何随时间演变。截至6月8日，与1月1日相比，我们对美国股息年增长率的预测下降了9%，欧盟下降了14%；我们对美国GDP增长的预测下降了2.0%，欧盟下降了3.1%。在2年期限上，预期股息变化的下限在美国为-18%，在欧盟为-25%。3月24日前后关于财政刺激的消息提振了股市和长期增长，但对短期增长预期的提升作用甚微。自4月1日以来，美国和欧盟的预期股息增长均有所改善。最后，我们通过构建和估计一个简单的危机模型来理解短期股息期货、股票市场和债券市场的联合动态。

papers.title: Gains from wage Flexibility and the Zero Lower Bound
papers.authors: Roberto M. Billi, Jordi Galí
papers.abstract: We analyze the welfare impact of greater wage flexibility in the presence of an occasionally binding zero lower bound (ZLB) constraint on the nominal interest rate. We show that the ZLB constraint generally amplifies the adverse effects of greater wage flexibility on welfare when the central bank follows a conventional Taylor rule. When demand shocks are the driving force, the ZLB implies that an increase in wage flexibility reduces welfare even under the optimal monetary policy with commitment.
papers.zh_title: 工资灵活性的收益与零下限
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在名义利率存在偶尔具有约束力的零下限（ZLB）约束时，提高工资灵活性对福利的影响。我们表明，当中央银行遵循传统的泰勒规则时，ZLB约束通常会放大提高工资灵活性对福利的不利影响。当需求冲击是驱动因素时，即使在有承诺的最优货币政策下，ZLB也意味着工资灵活性的提高会降低福利。

papers.title: Insider-Outsider Labor Markets, Hysteresis and Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Jordi Galí
papers.abstract: I develop a version of the New Keynesian model with insider-outsider labor markets and hysteresis that can account for the high persistence of European unemployment. I study the implications of that environment for the design of monetary policy. The optimal policy calls for strong emphasis on (un)employment stabilization which a standard interest rate rule fails to deliver, with the gap between the two increasing in the degree of hysteresis. Two simple targetiing rules are shown to approximate well the optimal policy. The properties of the model and effects of different policies are analyzed through the lens of the labor wedge and its components.
papers.zh_title: 内部人-外部人劳动力市场、滞后效应与货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我构建了一个具有内部人-外部人劳动力市场和滞后效应的新凯恩斯模型版本，该模型可以解释欧洲失业的高度持续性。我研究了这种环境对货币政策设计的影响。最优政策要求强烈关注（失业）就业稳定，而标准的利率规则无法实现这一点，两者之间的差距随着滞后程度的增加而扩大。两种简单的目标规则被证明能够很好地近似最优政策。该模型的性质以及不同政策的效果通过劳动楔子及其组成部分的视角进行分析。

papers.title: Does Policy Communication During Covid Work?
papers.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: Using a large-scale survey of U.S. households during the Covid-19 pandemic, we study how new information about fiscal and monetary policy responses to the crisis affects households’ expectations. We provide random subsets of participants in the Nielsen Homescan panel with different combinations of information about the severity of the pandemic, recent actions by the Federal Reserve, stimulus measures, as well as recommendations from health officials. This experiment allows us to assess to what extent these policy announcements alter the beliefs and spending plans of households. In short, they do not, contrary to the powerful effects they have in standard macroeconomic models.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间的政策沟通有效吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用新冠疫情期间对美国住户的大规模调查，我们研究了关于财政和货币政策应对危机的新信息如何影响住户的预期。我们向尼尔森家庭扫描面板中的随机子集参与者提供了关于疫情严重程度、美联储近期行动、刺激措施以及卫生官员建议的不同信息组合。这个实验使我们能够评估这些政策公告在多大程度上改变了住户的信念和支出计划。简而言之，它们没有改变，这与它们在标准宏观经济模型中所具有的强大效应相反。

papers.title: China’s Import Demand for Agricultural Products: The Impact of the Phase One Trade Agreement
papers.authors: Robert C. Feenstra, Chang Hong
papers.abstract: In December 2019, the United States and China reached a Phase One trade agreement, under which China committed to purchase more imports from the United States: $12.5 billion more agricultural imports in 2020 and $19.5 billion more in 2021, as compared to 2017. We show that the most efficient way for China to increase its imports from the United States is to mimic the effect of an import subsidy. If China’s agricultural imports did not otherwise grow from their 2017 values, then the subsidies would need to be 42% and 59% to meet the 2020 and 2021 targets, respectively. These effective subsidies mean that China would divert agricultural imports away from other countries. We find that this trade diversion is especially strong for Australia and Canada, followed by Brazil, Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand, and Vietnam.
papers.zh_title: 中国农产品进口需求：第一阶段贸易协议的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2019年12月，美国和中国达成第一阶段贸易协议，根据该协议，中国承诺增加从美国的进口：与2017年相比，2020年农产品进口增加125亿美元，2021年增加195亿美元。我们表明，中国增加从美国进口的最有效方式是模仿进口补贴的效果。如果中国的农产品进口没有从2017年的水平增长，那么补贴率需要分别达到42%和59%才能实现2020年和2021年的目标。这些有效补贴意味着中国将把农产品进口从其他国家转移过来。我们发现，这种贸易转移对澳大利亚和加拿大尤为明显，其次是巴西、印度尼西亚、马来西亚、泰国和越南。

papers.title: The Effectiveness of Life-Preserving Investments in Times of COVID-19
papers.authors: Jules H. van Binsbergen, Christian C. Opp
papers.abstract: We analyze the effectiveness of preventive investments aimed at increasing agents' life expectancy, with a focus on influenza and COVID-19 mitigation. Maximizing overall life expectancy requires allocating resources across hazards so as to equalize investments' marginal effectiveness. Based on estimates for the marginal effectiveness of influenza vaccines, we determine the level of COVID-19 mitigation investments that would imply such equalization. Given current projections for COVID-19 mitigation costs, our results suggest that wide-spread influenza vaccination would be an effective life-preserving investment.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19时期生命保护投资的有效性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了旨在提高个体预期寿命的预防性投资的有效性，重点关注流感和COVID-19的缓解措施。最大化总体预期寿命需要跨风险分配资源，以使投资的边际有效性相等。基于流感疫苗边际有效性的估计，我们确定了实现这种相等所需的COVID-19缓解投资水平。根据当前对COVID-19缓解成本的预测，我们的结果表明，广泛接种流感疫苗将是一项有效的生命保护投资。

papers.title: Default Options and Insurance Demand
papers.authors: Peter John Robinson, W.J. Wouter Botzen, Howard Kunreuther, Shereen J. Chaudhry
papers.abstract: Default options may provide a low-cost way of influencing behaviour without modifying incentives and constraining choices between alternatives. We study whether defaults can be used to increase insurance coverage against low-probability/high-impact risks, like floods, and whether past flood insurance purchases and flooding experience moderate the effect of defaults. Our study uses a naturally occurring difference in experience, comparing the surveyed flood insurance choices of 1,187 homeowners, half of whom are in the Netherlands, where flood insurance penetration rates are low and recent flooding caused minor losses, and the other half of whom are in the United Kingdom (UK), where the opposite is true. We find defaults are effective among homeowners with little to no flood-related experience: in the Netherlands defaults increase the likelihood of insuring by between 17 and 18 percentage points. Although there is no overall effect of defaults in the UK, defaults increase flood insurance coverage for risk averse individuals, and those who have no reported previous flood experience and have not purchased flood insurance. Anticipated regret about not having insurance coverage in the event of a flood, and perceptions about the insurance cost explain between 34 and 37 percent of the relationship between the default and flood insurance demand. We discuss policy implications of our findings.
papers.zh_title: 默认选项与保险需求
papers.zh_abstract: 默认选项可能提供一种低成本的方式来影响行为，而无需修改激励措施或限制替代方案之间的选择。我们研究默认选项是否可用于增加针对低概率/高影响风险（如洪水）的保险覆盖，以及过去的洪水保险购买经历和洪水经历是否会调节默认选项的效果。我们的研究利用自然存在的经验差异，比较了1187名房主的调查洪水保险选择，其中一半来自荷兰（洪水保险渗透率低，近期洪水造成轻微损失），另一半来自英国（情况相反）。我们发现，默认选项对几乎没有洪水相关经验的房主有效：在荷兰，默认选项使投保可能性增加17至18个百分点。尽管在英国默认选项没有总体效果，但对于风险规避型个体以及那些没有报告过洪水经历且未购买洪水保险的人，默认选项增加了洪水保险覆盖。对洪水发生时没有保险覆盖的预期遗憾以及对保险成本的感知，解释了默认选项与洪水保险需求之间关系的34%至37%。我们讨论了研究结果的政策含义。

papers.title: Reconsidering Returns
papers.authors: Samuel M. Hartzmark, David H. Solomon
papers.abstract: Investors' perception of performance is biased because the relevant measure, returns, is rarely displayed. Major indices ignore dividends thereby underreporting market performance. Newspapers are more pessimistic on ex-dividend days, consistent with mistaking the index for returns. Market betas should track returns, but track prices more than dividends, creating predictable returns. Mutual funds receive inflows for “beating the S&P 500,” price index based on net asset value (also not a return). Investors extrapolate market indices, not returns, when forming annual performance expectations. Displaying returns by default would ameliorate these issues, which arise despite high attention and agreement on the appropriate measure.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：G02, G11, G12, G14, N2, N21, N22
papers.zh_title: 重新审视回报率
papers.zh_abstract: 投资者对业绩的感知存在偏差，因为相关指标——回报率——很少被显示。主要指数忽略股息，从而低估了市场表现。报纸在除息日更为悲观，这与将指数误认为回报率一致。市场贝塔值应追踪回报率，但追踪价格多于股息，从而产生可预测的回报率。共同基金因“跑赢标普500指数”而获得资金流入，该指数是基于资产净值的价格指数（也不是回报率）。投资者在形成年度业绩预期时，会外推市场指数而非回报率。默认显示回报率将改善这些问题，尽管这些问题是在高度关注且对适当指标达成一致的情况下出现的。

papers.title: Political Power, Elite Control, and Long-Run Development: Evidence from Brazil
papers.authors: Claudio Ferraz, Frederico Finan, Monica Martinez-Bravo
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes how changes in the concentration of political power affect long-run development. We study Brazil’s military dictatorship whose rise to power dramatically altered the distribution of power of local political elites. We document that municipalities that were more politically concentrated prior to the dictatorship in the 1960s are relatively richer in 2000, despite being poorer initially. Our evidence suggests that this reversal of fortune was the result of the military’s policies aimed at undermining the power of traditional elites. These policies increased political competition locally, which ultimately led to better governance, more public goods, and higher income levels.
papers.zh_title: 政治权力、精英控制与长期发展：来自巴西的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了政治权力集中度的变化如何影响长期发展。我们研究了巴西的军事独裁政权，该政权的崛起极大地改变了地方政治精英的权力分配。我们记录到，在1960年代独裁统治之前政治集中度更高的市镇，尽管最初较为贫困，但在2000年却相对更富裕。我们的证据表明，这种命运逆转是军方旨在削弱传统精英权力的政策的结果。这些政策增加了地方政治竞争，最终带来了更好的治理、更多的公共品和更高的收入水平。

papers.title: Income-driven Labor Market Polarization
papers.authors: Diego A. Comin, Ana Danieli, Martí Mestieri
papers.abstract: We propose a mechanism for labor-market polarization based on the nonhomotheticity of demand that we call the income-driven channel. Our mechanism builds on a novel empirical fact: expenditure elasticities and production intensities in low- and high-skill occupations are positively correlated across sectors. Thus, as income grows, demand shifts towards expenditure-elastic sectors, and the relative demand for low- and high-skill occupations increases, causing labor-market polarization. A calibrated general-equilibrium model suggests this mechanism accounts for 90% and 35% of the increase in the wage-bill share of low- and high-skill occupations observed in the US during 1980-2016, and for 64% and 28% of the rise in the employment shares of low- and high-skill occupations. This mechanism is similarly important for the polarization of labor markets in Western Europe during 1980-2016, as well as in the US during earlier decades and, possibly, the near future.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：E21, E23, J23, J31
papers.zh_title: 收入驱动的劳动力市场极化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于需求非位似性的劳动力市场极化机制，称之为收入驱动渠道。该机制建立在一个新颖的实证事实之上：跨部门来看，低技能和高技能职业的支出弹性与生产密集度呈正相关。因此，随着收入增长，需求转向支出弹性高的部门，低技能和高技能职业的相对需求增加，导致劳动力市场极化。一个校准的一般均衡模型表明，这一机制解释了1980-2016年间美国低技能和高技能职业工资份额增长的90%和35%，以及就业份额增长的64%和28%。该机制对于1980-2016年西欧劳动力市场的极化，以及美国更早时期乃至可能近期的极化同样重要。

papers.title: The Performance of Hedge Fund Performance Fees
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Justin Birru, Andrea Rossi
papers.abstract: We study the long-run outcomes associated with hedge funds' compensation structure. Over a 22-year period, the aggregate effective incentive fee rate is 2.5 times the average contractual rate (i.e., around 50% instead of 20%). Overall, investors collected 36 cents for every dollar earned on their invested capital (over a risk-free hurdle rate and before adjusting for any risk). In the cross-section of funds, there is a substantial disconnect between lifetime performance and incentive fees earned. These poor outcomes stem from the asymmetry of the performance contract, investors' return-chasing behavior, and underwater fund closures.
papers.zh_title: 对冲基金业绩报酬的表现
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了对冲基金薪酬结构相关的长期结果。在22年的时间里，总有效激励费率是平均合同费率的2.5倍（即约50%而非20%）。总体而言，投资者每从投资资本中赚取一美元（超过无风险门槛利率且未进行任何风险调整），仅能收回36美分。在基金的横截面上，终身业绩与赚取的激励费之间存在显著脱节。这些糟糕的结果源于业绩合同的不对称性、投资者的追逐回报行为以及水下基金的关闭。

papers.title: Towards a Dynamic Disequilibrium Theory with Randomness
papers.authors: Martin M. Guzman, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: Most macroeconomic crises, such as the 2008 Global Financial Crisis, are associated with endogenous large changes in beliefs and understandings about the workings of the economy. Such downturns and crises are not consistent with the standard paradigm of a well-functioning competitive economy, and macroeconomic equilibrium models based on that paradigm have failed to predict the possibility of those downturns, to explain them, or even to design appropriate policy responses. The framework assumes there are no macroeconomic inconsistencies—all plans are realized, all budget constraints honored. \nIn this paper, we present a dynamic disequilibrium theory with randomness that is based on the premise that a better way to understand deep downturns is to think of the economy experiencing a constant evolution, marked by uncertainty, in which there is continual learning about the economic system. Our framework explains why macroeconomic inconsistencies may arise and investigates their consequences. We explain why decentralized market forces may be disequilibrating. We identify the crucial departures from the Arrow-Debreu assumptions and those underlying DSGE models, emphasizing the limitations in the assumption of equilibrium and the absence of a coherent theory of how it is attained, the incompleteness of markets and the non-stationarity of the stochastic processes describing the economy. We analyze the policy implications of this alternative theory, which typically differ markedly from those of the standard model: In particular, the consequences for the effectiveness of different monetary and fiscal policies, and the eventual need of debt restructuring policies to restore macroeconomic consistency.
papers.zh_title: 迈向带有随机性的动态非均衡理论
papers.zh_abstract: 大多数宏观经济危机，例如2008年全球金融危机，都与关于经济运作方式的信念和理解的內生性巨大变化相关。这种衰退和危机与运行良好的竞争性经济的标准范式不一致，基于该范式的宏观经济均衡模型未能预测这些衰退的可能性、解释它们，甚至未能设计出适当的政策应对。该框架假设不存在宏观经济不一致性——所有计划都得以实现，所有预算约束都得到遵守。在本文中，我们提出了一个带有随机性的动态非均衡理论，其前提是理解深度衰退的更好方式是将经济视为经历着以不确定性为标志的持续演化，其中存在对经济体系的持续学习。我们的框架解释了宏观经济不一致性为何可能出现，并研究了其后果。我们解释了为何分散化的市场力量可能具有非均衡性。我们识别了与阿罗-德布鲁假设以及DSGE模型基础假设的关键偏离，强调了均衡假设的局限性以及缺乏关于如何达到均衡的连贯理论、市场的不完全性以及描述经济的随机过程的非平稳性。我们分析了这一替代理论的政策含义，这些含义通常与标准模型显著不同：特别是对不同货币和财政政策有效性的影响，以及最终需要债务重组政策来恢复宏观经济一致性。

papers.title: Personal Wealth and Self-Employment
papers.authors: Aymeric Bellon, J. Anthony Cookson, Erik P. Gilje, Rawley Z. Heimer
papers.abstract: We examine how wealth windfalls affect self-employment decisions using data on cash payments from claims on Texas shale drilling to people throughout the United States. Individuals who receive large wealth shocks (greater than $50,000) have 51% higher self-employment rates. The increase in self-employment rates is driven by individuals who lengthen existing self-employment spells, and not by individuals who leave regular employment for self-employment. Moreover, the effect of wealth reverts for individuals whose payments run out. Rather than alleviating a financial constraint, our evidence suggests that unrestricted cash windfalls affect self-employment decisions primarily through self-employment’s non-pecuniary benefits.
papers.zh_title: 个人财富与自雇就业
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自德克萨斯州页岩钻探索赔的现金支付数据（覆盖全美各地个人），研究了财富意外收益如何影响自雇就业决策。获得大额财富冲击（超过5万美元）的个人，其自雇就业率高出51%。自雇就业率的上升是由延长现有自雇就业期的个人推动的，而非由离开正规就业转向自雇就业的个人推动。此外，对于支付到期的个人，财富效应会逆转。我们的证据表明，无限制的现金意外收益并非通过缓解财务约束，而主要是通过自雇就业的非金钱收益来影响自雇就业决策。

papers.title: Pandemic Shocks and Fiscal-Monetary Policies in the Eurozone: COVID-19 Dominance During January - June 2020
papers.authors: Yothin Jinjarak, Rashad Ahmed, Sameer Nair-Desai, Weining Xin, Joshua Aizenman
papers.abstract: We compare the importance of market factors against that of COVID-19 dynamics and policy responses in explaining Eurozone sovereign spreads. First, we estimate a multifactor model for changes in credit default swap (CDS) spreads over January 2014 - June 2019. Then, we apply a synthetic control-type procedure to extrapolate model-implied changes in the CDS. The factor model does very well over the rest of 2019 but breaks down during the pandemic, especially during March 2020 when there is a large divergence between the actual and model-implied CDS changes. We find that the March 2020 divergence is well accounted for by COVID-specific risks and associated policies, mortality outcomes, and policy announcements, rather than traditional determinants. Daily CDS widening ceased almost immediately after the ECB announced the PEPP, but the divergence between actual and model-implied changes persisted. This points to COVID-19 Dominance: widening spreads during the pandemic has led to unconventional monetary policies that primarily aim to mitigate short-run fears, temporarily pushing away concerns over fiscal risk.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, PE；JEL：F3, F34, F41, F45, H12, H5, H51
papers.zh_title: 欧元区的疫情冲击与财政货币政策：2020年1月至6月的COVID-19主导地位
papers.zh_abstract: 我们比较了市场因素与COVID-19动态及政策应对在解释欧元区主权利差方面的重要性。首先，我们估计了2014年1月至2019年6月期间信用违约互换（CDS）利差变化的多因子模型。然后，我们应用一种合成控制类型的程序来外推模型隐含的CDS变化。该因子模型在2019年剩余时间内表现良好，但在疫情期间崩溃，尤其是在2020年3月，实际CDS变化与模型隐含变化之间出现巨大分歧。我们发现，2020年3月的分歧很好地被COVID-19特定风险及相关政策、死亡率结果和政策公告所解释，而非传统决定因素。在欧洲央行宣布PEPP后，每日CDS利差扩大几乎立即停止，但实际变化与模型隐含变化之间的分歧持续存在。这指向了COVID-19主导地位：疫情期间利差扩大导致了非常规货币政策，这些政策主要旨在缓解短期恐慌，暂时推开了对财政风险的担忧。

papers.title: Why Retirement, Social Security, and Age Discrimination Policies Need to Consider the Intersectional Experiences of Older Women
papers.authors: Ian Burn, Patrick Button, Theodore F. Figinski, Joanne Song McLaughlin
papers.abstract: We provide an overview of research that indicates that older women face unique challenges and opportunities with respect to work, retirement, Social Security, and age discrimination law. We present estimates of poverty by age and sex, showing that poverty increases with age for women due to older women often outliving their spouses and becoming widowed. We discuss research that shows that women benefit more than men from working longer. We then note that older women face intersectional discrimination that can unfortunately be a barrier to older women working longer. We detail how older women often “fall between the cracks” of the Age Discrimination in Employment Act and Title VII of the Civil Rights Act and are thus not well protected against this intersectional discrimination. As a final example of how women face different circumstances, we summarize research on how older women were differentially negatively impacted by the elimination of Social Security’s Retirement Earnings.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H55, J14, J16, J7, K31
papers.zh_title: 为何退休、社会保障和年龄歧视政策需要考虑老年女性的交叉性经历
papers.zh_abstract: 我们概述了表明老年女性在工作、退休、社会保障和年龄歧视法律方面面临独特挑战和机遇的研究。我们按年龄和性别呈现了贫困率估计，显示由于老年女性通常比配偶活得更久并成为寡妇，女性的贫困率随年龄增长而上升。我们讨论了表明女性比男性更能从延长工作中受益的研究。然后我们指出，老年女性面临交叉性歧视，这不幸地可能成为她们延长工作的障碍。我们详细说明了老年女性如何常常“落入”《就业年龄歧视法》和《民权法案》第七章的“缝隙”中，因此未能得到针对这种交叉性歧视的良好保护。作为女性面临不同情况的最后一个例子，我们总结了关于老年女性如何因取消社会保障的退休收入测试而受到不同负面影响的的研究。

papers.title: Social Norms as a Barrier to Women's Employment in Developing Countries
papers.authors: Seema Jayachandran
papers.abstract: This article discusses cultural barriers to women's participation and success in the labor market in developing countries. I begin by describing how gender norms influence the relationship between economic development and female employment, as well as how gender norms vary substantially across societies at the same level of economic development. I then examine several specific gender-related social norms and how they constrain women's employment. I present examples of policies aimed at dismantling these cultural barriers to female employment and the impacts they have.
papers.zh_title: 社会规范作为发展中国家女性就业的障碍
papers.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了发展中国家女性参与劳动力市场并取得成功的文化障碍。我首先描述了性别规范如何影响经济发展与女性就业之间的关系，以及性别规范如何在经济发展水平相同的社会之间存在显著差异。然后，我考察了几个特定的性别相关社会规范及其如何限制女性就业。我列举了旨在消除这些女性就业文化障碍的政策实例及其产生的影响。

papers.title: Early Evidence on the Impact of COVID-19 and the Recession on Older Workers
papers.authors: Truc Thi Mai Bui, Patrick Button, Elyce G. Picciotti
papers.abstract: We summarize some of the early effects and discuss possible future effects of the COVID-19 pandemic and recession on the employment outcomes of older workers in the United States. We start by discussing what we know about how older workers faired in prior recessions in the United States and how COVID-19 and this recession may differ. We then estimate some early effects of the COVID-19 pandemic and recession on employment and unemployment rates by age group and sex using Current Population Survey data. We calculate employment and unemployment rates multiple ways to account for the complicated employment situation and possible errors in survey enumeration. We find that while previous recessions, in some ways, did not affect employment outcomes for older workers as much, this recession disproportionately affected older workers of ages 65 and older. For example, we find that unemployment rates in April 2020 increased to 15.43% for those ages 65 and older, compared to 12.99% for those ages 25-44. We also find that COVID-19 and the recession disproportionately affected women, where women have reached higher unemployment rates than men, which was consistent for all age groups and unemployment rate measures we used.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：I14, J14, J16, J26
papers.zh_title: COVID-19与经济衰退对老年工人影响的早期证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们总结了COVID-19大流行和经济衰退对美国老年工人就业结果的一些早期影响，并讨论了可能的未来影响。首先，我们探讨了美国老年工人在以往经济衰退中的表现，以及COVID-19和本次衰退可能的不同之处。接着，我们利用当前人口调查数据，按年龄组和性别估算了COVID-19大流行和经济衰退对就业率和失业率的一些早期影响。我们采用多种方式计算就业率和失业率，以应对复杂的就业状况和调查统计中可能存在的误差。我们发现，尽管以往的经济衰退在某些方面对老年工人的就业结果影响较小，但本次衰退对65岁及以上老年工人的影响尤为严重。例如，2020年4月，65岁及以上人群的失业率上升至15.43%，而25-44岁人群的失业率为12.99%。我们还发现，COVID-19和经济衰退对女性的影响尤为严重，女性的失业率高于男性，这一现象在我们使用的所有年龄组和失业率衡量指标中均保持一致。

papers.title: Reviving the Salter-Swan Small Open Economy Model
papers.authors: Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Martín Uribe
papers.abstract: This paper provides microfoundations to the Salter-Swan policy framework, a graphical apparatus designed to ascertain the exchange-rate and fiscal stance of a policymaker with internal and external economic targets. The environment is an infinite-horizon small open economy producing tradable and nontradable goods that takes world prices and world interest rates as given and is populated by optimizing households and firms. The economy is subject to terms-of-trade and interest-rate shocks. The internal target of the government is the unemployment rate and the external target is the current account. Downward nominal wage rigidity and financial frictions serve as the rationale for meaningful policy intervention.
papers.zh_title: 复兴Salter-Swan小型开放经济模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文为Salter-Swan政策框架提供了微观基础，该框架是一种图形化工具，旨在确定政策制定者在面对内部和外部经济目标时的汇率和财政立场。环境设定为一个无限期界的小型开放经济体，生产可贸易品和不可贸易品，接受世界价格和世界利率，并由优化行为的家庭和企业组成。该经济体面临贸易条件和利率冲击。政府的内部目标是失业率，外部目标是经常账户。名义工资向下刚性和金融摩擦为有意义的政策干预提供了理由。

papers.title: Measuring Infrastructure in BEA's National Economic Accounts
papers.authors: Jennifer Bennett, Robert Kornfeld, Daniel Sichel, David Wasshausen
papers.abstract: Infrastructure provides critical support for economic activity, and assessing its role requires reliable measures. This paper provides an overview of U.S. infrastructure data in the National Economic Accounts. After developing definitions of basic, social, and digital infrastructure, we assess trends in each of these categories and their components. Results are mixed depending on the category. Investment in some important types of basic infrastructure has barely or not kept up with depreciation and population growth in recent decades, while some other categories look better. We also show that the average age of most types of infrastructure in the U.S. has been rising, and the remaining service life has been falling. This paper also presents new prototype estimates of state-level investment in highways, highlighting the wide variation across states. In addition, we present new prototype data on maintenance expenditures for highways. In terms of future research, we believe that deprecation rates warrant additional attention given that current estimates are based on 40-year old research and are well below those used in Canada and other countries. We also believe that additional creative work on price indexes for infrastructure would be valuable. Finally, all of the data in this paper will be downloadable on the BEA website, and we hope that the analysis in this paper and the availability of data will spur additional research.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, PE, PR；JEL：E01, H4, H54, O4
papers.zh_title: 在BEA国民经济账户中衡量基础设施
papers.zh_abstract: 基础设施为经济活动提供关键支持，评估其作用需要可靠的衡量指标。本文概述了美国国民经济账户中的基础设施数据。在定义了基础、社会和数字基础设施后，我们评估了每个类别及其组成部分的趋势。结果因类别而异。近几十年来，某些重要类型的基础设施投资几乎未能跟上折旧和人口增长，而其他一些类别则表现较好。我们还发现，美国大多数类型基础设施的平均年龄在上升，剩余服务年限在下降。本文还提出了州级高速公路投资的新原型估算，突显了各州之间的巨大差异。此外，我们提供了高速公路维护支出的新原型数据。关于未来研究，我们认为折旧率值得更多关注，因为当前估算基于40年前的研究，且远低于加拿大等国使用的水平。我们还认为，在基础设施价格指数方面进行更多创造性工作将是有价值的。最后，本文中的所有数据都将在BEA网站上下载，我们希望本文的分析和数据的可用性能够促进进一步的研究。

papers.title: Pollution and Labor Market Search Externalities Over the Business Cycle
papers.authors: John Gibson, Garth Heutel
papers.abstract: We study the relationship between unemployment, environmental policy, and business cycles. We develop a dynamic stochastic general equilibrium real business cycle model that includes both a pollution externality and congestion externalities from labor market search frictions, which generate unemployment. We consider two policies to address the market failures: an emissions tax and a tax or subsidy on job creation. With both policies present, the efficient outcome can be achieved. When one policy is constrained or absent, we solve for the second best. The absence of a vacancy policy to address the congestion externalities substantially affects the value of the emissions tax, both in steady state and over the business cycle.
papers.zh_title: 经济周期中的污染与劳动力市场搜寻外部性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了失业、环境政策和经济周期之间的关系。我们构建了一个动态随机一般均衡真实商业周期模型，该模型同时包含污染外部性和由劳动力市场搜寻摩擦产生的拥挤外部性，后者导致失业。我们考虑两种政策来解决市场失灵：排放税和对职位创造的税收或补贴。当两种政策同时存在时，可以实现有效结果。当一种政策受到约束或缺失时，我们求解次优方案。缺乏解决拥挤外部性的职位政策会显著影响排放税的价值，无论是在稳态还是经济周期中。

papers.title: Long-Run Effects of Incentivizing Work After Childbirth
papers.authors: Elira Kuka, Na'ama Shenhav
papers.abstract: This paper identifies the impact of increasing post-childbirth work incentives on mothers’ long-run careers. We exploit variation in work incentives across mothers based on the timing of a first birth and eligibility for the 1993 expansion of the Earned Income Tax Credit. Ten to nineteen years after a first birth, single mothers who were exposed to the expansion immediately after birth (“early”), rather than 3–6 years later (“late”), have 0.62 more years of work experience and 4.2% higher earnings conditional on working. We show that higher earnings are primarily explained by improved wages due to greater work experience.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H20, H24, J16, J20, J22, J24
papers.zh_title: 产后激励工作的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文识别了增加产后工作激励对母亲长期职业生涯的影响。我们利用基于首次生育时间和1993年劳动所得税抵免扩大资格的母亲之间工作激励的差异。在首次生育后的十到十九年，产后立即受到扩大政策影响的单身母亲（“早期”），相比于3-6年后才受影响的（“晚期”），拥有多0.62年的工作经验，并且在有工作的情况下收入高出4.2%。我们表明，更高的收入主要归因于因更多工作经验而提高的工资。

papers.title: Is Attention Produced Optimally? Theory and Evidence from Experiments with Bandwidth Enhancements
papers.authors: Erin T. Bronchetti, Judd B. Kessler, Ellen B. Magenheim, Dmitry Taubinsky, Eric Zwick
papers.abstract: This paper investigates whether people optimally value tools that reduce attention costs. We call these tools bandwidth enhancements (BEs) and characterize how demand for BEs varies with the pecuniary incentives to be attentive, under the null hypothesis of correct perceptions and optimal choice. We examine if the optimality conditions are satisfied in three experiments. The first is a field experiment (n = 1373) with an online education platform, in which we randomize incentives to complete course modules and incentives to utilize a plan-making tool to complete the modules. In the second experiment (n = 2306), participants must complete a survey in the future. We randomize survey-completion incentives and how long participants must wait to complete the survey, and we elicit willingness to pay for reminders. The third experiment (n = 1465) involves a psychometric task in which participants must identify whether there are more correct or incorrect mathematical equations in an image. We vary incentives for accuracy, elicit willingness to pay to reduce task difficulty, and examine the impact of learning and feedback. In all experiments, demand for reducing attention costs increases as incentives for accurate task completion increase. However, in all experiments—and across all conditions—our tests imply that this increase in demand is too small relative to the null of correct perceptions. These results suggest that people may be uncertain or systematically biased about their attention cost functions, and that experience and feedback do not necessarily eliminate bias.
papers.zh_title: 注意力是否被最优生产？来自带宽增强实验的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究人们是否最优地重视降低注意力成本的工具。我们将这些工具称为带宽增强，并描述在正确感知和最优选择的零假设下，对带宽增强的需求如何随注意力的金钱激励而变化。我们检验了三个实验中的最优性条件。第一个是线上教育平台的现场实验（n=1373），我们随机分配完成课程模块的激励和使用计划制定工具完成模块的激励。在第二个实验（n=2306）中，参与者必须在未来完成一项调查。我们随机分配调查完成激励和参与者等待完成调查的时间，并引出对提醒的支付意愿。第三个实验（n=1465）涉及一项心理测量任务，参与者必须识别图像中正确或错误的数学方程哪个更多。我们改变准确性的激励，引出降低任务难度的支付意愿，并考察学习和反馈的影响。在所有实验中，随着任务准确完成激励的增加，对降低注意力成本的需求也随之增加。然而，在所有实验和所有条件下，我们的检验表明，相对于正确感知的零假设，这种需求增加太小。这些结果表明，人们可能对其注意力成本函数存在不确定性或系统性偏差，并且经验和反馈不一定能消除偏差。

papers.title: Do Bank Insiders Impede Equity Issuances?
papers.authors: Martin Goetz, Luc Laeven, Ross Levine
papers.abstract: We evaluate the role of insider ownership in shaping banks’ equity issuances in response to the global financial crisis. We construct a unique dataset on the ownership structure of U.S. banks and their equity issuances and discover that greater insider ownership leads to less equity issuances. Several tests are consistent with the view that bank insiders are reluctant to reduce their private benefits of control by diluting their ownership through equity issuances. Given the connection between bank equity and lending, the results stress that ownership structure can shape the resilience of banks—and hence the entire economy—to aggregate shocks.
papers.zh_title: 银行内部人是否阻碍股权发行？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了内部人所有权在塑造银行应对全球金融危机的股权发行中的作用。我们构建了一个关于美国银行所有权结构及其股权发行的独特数据集，发现更高的内部人所有权导致更少的股权发行。多项检验与以下观点一致：银行内部人不愿通过股权发行稀释其所有权，从而减少其控制权的私人收益。鉴于银行股权与贷款之间的联系，结果强调所有权结构可以塑造银行——进而整个经济——对总体冲击的韧性。

papers.title: Optimal Lockdown in a Commuting Network
papers.authors: Pablo Fajgelbaum, Amit Khandelwal, Wookun Kim, Cristiano Mantovani, Edouard Schaal
papers.abstract: We study optimal dynamic lockdowns against Covid-19 within a commuting network. Our framework integrates canonical spatial epidemiology and trade models, and is applied to cities with varying initial viral spread: Seoul, Daegu and NYC-Metro. Spatial lockdowns achieve substantially smaller income losses than uniform lockdowns. In NYM and Daegu—with large initial shocks—the optimal lockdown restricts inflows to central districts before gradual relaxation, while in Seoul it imposes low temporal but large spatial variation. Actual commuting reductions were too weak in central locations in Daegu and NYM, and too strong across Seoul.
papers.zh_title: 通勤网络中的最优封锁
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究通勤网络中针对COVID-19的最优动态封锁。我们的框架整合了经典空间流行病学和贸易模型，并应用于初始病毒传播程度不同的城市：首尔、大邱和纽约大都市区。空间封锁比统一封锁实现的收入损失小得多。在纽约大都市区和大邱——初始冲击较大——最优封锁在逐步放松前限制流入中心区域，而在首尔则施加较低的时间变化但较大的空间变化。大邱和纽约大都市区中心地点的实际通勤减少过于微弱，而首尔则过于强烈。

papers.title: Endogenous Quality Investments in the U.S. Hospital Market
papers.authors: Craig Garthwaite, Christopher Ody, Amanda Starc
papers.abstract: High and increasing hospital prices have led to calls for price regulation. If prices are high because of consolidation, regulating prices could enhance welfare. However, high prices could also reflect increased willingness to pay by privately insured consumers for clinical and non-clinical quality. If so, regulating prices could reduce quality. We present a model of strategic quality choice where hospitals make quality investments to increase private revenue. We confirm the model's predictions across numerous quality measures including patient satisfaction, hospital processes, risk adjusted mortality, the revealed preferences of current Medicare patients, technology adoption, physician quality, and ED wait times.
papers.zh_title: 美国医院市场中的内生质量投资
papers.zh_abstract: 高昂且不断上涨的医院价格引发了价格监管的呼声。如果价格高企源于市场整合，那么监管价格可以提升社会福利。然而，高价格也可能反映出私人保险患者对临床和非临床质量支付意愿的提高。如果是这样，监管价格可能会降低质量。我们提出了一个战略质量选择模型，其中医院通过质量投资来增加私人收入。我们通过多项质量指标验证了模型的预测，包括患者满意度、医院流程、风险调整后的死亡率、当前医疗保险患者的显示性偏好、技术采用、医生质量以及急诊等待时间。

papers.title: Scarring Body and Mind: The Long-Term Belief-Scarring Effects of COVID-19
papers.authors: Julian Kozlowski, Laura Veldkamp, Venky Venkateswaran
papers.abstract: The largest economic cost of the COVID-19 pandemic could arise from changes in behavior long after the immediate health crisis is resolved. A potential source of such a long-lived change is scarring of beliefs, a persistent change in the perceived probability of an extreme, negative shock in the future. We show how to quantify the extent of such belief changes and determine their impact on future economic outcomes. We find that the long-run costs for the U.S. economy from this channel is many times higher than the estimates of the short-run losses in output. This suggests that, even if a vaccine cures everyone in a year, the COVID-19 crisis will leave its mark on the US economy for many years to come.
papers.zh_title: 身心创伤：COVID-19的长期信念创伤效应
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情最大的经济成本可能源于在直接健康危机解决后长期持续的行为变化。这种长期变化的潜在来源之一是信念创伤，即对未来极端负面冲击感知概率的持久改变。我们展示了如何量化这种信念变化的程度，并确定其对未来经济结果的影响。我们发现，从这一渠道来看，美国经济的长期成本是短期产出损失估计值的数倍。这表明，即使疫苗在一年内治愈所有人，COVID-19危机也将在未来多年对美国经济留下印记。

papers.title: Portfolio Delegation and 401(k) Plan Participant Responses to COVID-19
papers.authors: David Blanchett, Michael S. Finke, Jonathan Reuter
papers.abstract: We analyze the behavior of 401(k) plan participants during the first quarter of 2020, when COVID-19 generated historic volatility, large negative returns, and significant unemployment. Only 2.1% of participants invested in TDFs made any changes to their portfolios, with even lower rates of change among those defaulted into robo-advised managed accounts, suggesting that delegation can decrease the likelihood of portfolio mistakes by less sophisticated participants. While 16.6% of non-delegated participants made portfolio changes, these changes were more likely among more sophisticated participants and appear not to have reduced participants’ quarterly returns. Consistent with liquidity constraints, however, withdrawals spike following job loss.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP；JEL：G11, G23, G41, G51, G53
papers.zh_title: 投资组合委托与401(k)计划参与者对COVID-19的应对
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了2020年第一季度401(k)计划参与者的行为，当时COVID-19引发了历史性的波动、巨大的负回报和显著的失业。只有2.1%投资于目标日期基金的参与者对其投资组合进行了任何调整，而那些默认加入机器人顾问管理账户的参与者调整率更低，这表明委托可以降低不太成熟参与者出现投资组合错误的可能性。尽管16.6%的非委托参与者进行了投资组合调整，但这些调整更可能发生在较成熟的参与者中，并且似乎并未降低参与者的季度回报。然而，与流动性约束一致，失业后提款激增。

papers.title: Parallel Inverse Aggregate Demand Curves in Discrete Choice Models
papers.authors: Kory Kroft, René Leal Vizcaíno, Matthew J. Notowidigdo, Ting Wang
papers.abstract: This paper highlights a previously-unnoticed property of commonly-used discrete choice models, which is that they feature parallel demand curves. Specifically, we show that in random utility models, inverse aggregate demand curves shift in parallel with respect to variety if and only if the random utility shocks follow the Gumbel distribution. Using results from Extreme Value Theory, we provide conditions for other distributions to generate parallel demands asymptotically, as the number of varieties increase. We establish these results in the benchmark case of symmetric products, illustrate them using numerical simulations and show that they hold in extended versions of the model with correlated tastes and asymmetric products. Lastly, we provide a “proof of concept” of parallel demands as an economic tool by showing how to use parallel demands to identify the change in consumer surplus from an exogenous change in product variety.
papers.zh_title: 离散选择模型中的平行逆总需求曲线
papers.zh_abstract: 本文强调了常用离散选择模型一个此前未被注意的性质，即它们具有平行需求曲线。具体来说，我们证明在随机效用模型中，当且仅当随机效用冲击服从Gumbel分布时，逆总需求曲线会随品种数量平行移动。利用极值理论的结果，我们提供了其他分布渐近产生平行需求的条件，随着品种数量增加。我们在对称产品的基准情形下建立了这些结果，通过数值模拟加以说明，并证明它们在具有相关偏好和非对称产品的扩展模型版本中成立。最后，我们提供了平行需求作为经济工具的“概念验证”，展示了如何利用平行需求来识别产品品种外生变化带来的消费者剩余变化。

papers.title: ‘Mechanization Takes Command’: Inanimate Power and Labor Productivity in Late Nineteenth Century American Manufacturing
papers.authors: Jeremy Atack, Robert A. Margo, Paul Rhode
papers.abstract: During the nineteenth century, the US manufacturing sector shifted away from the “hand labor” mode of production, characteristic of artisan shops, to the “machine labor” of the factory. This was the focus of an extremely detailed but extraordinarily complex study by the Commissioner of Labor published in 1899 that has until now defied systematic analysis. Here, we explore the overall productivity gains associated with these changes in production methods and the specific, causal role of inanimate power. Under the machine labor mode, the time necessary to complete production tasks declined by 85 percent, a remarkable gain in labor productivity. We also present OLS and IV estimates of the effects of using inanimate power, such as steam, at the production operation level Our IV is based on the gerunds describing the various production activities. Treating our IV estimates as causal, about one-third of the higher productivity of machine labor is attributed to greater use of inanimate power per se.
papers.zh_title: “机械化主宰一切”：19世纪末美国制造业中的非生命动力与劳动生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 在19世纪，美国制造业从工匠作坊特有的“手工劳动”生产模式转向工厂的“机器劳动”模式。这是劳工专员于1899年发表的一项极其详细但异常复杂研究的焦点，该研究至今未能进行系统分析。在此，我们探讨了与这些生产方式变化相关的整体生产率提升，以及非生命动力的具体因果作用。在机器劳动模式下，完成生产任务所需的时间下降了85%，这是劳动生产率的显著提升。我们还提供了在生产操作层面使用非生命动力（如蒸汽）效应的OLS和IV估计。我们的IV基于描述各种生产活动的动名词。将我们的IV估计视为因果关系，机器劳动更高生产率的大约三分之一归因于非生命动力本身更广泛的使用。

papers.title: Barbarians at the Store? Private Equity, Products, and Consumers
papers.authors: Cesare Fracassi, Alessandro Previtero, Albert W. Sheen
papers.abstract: We investigate the effects of private equity on product markets using price and sales data for an extensive number of consumer products. Following a buyout, target firms increase sales 50% more than matched control firms. Price increases—roughly 1% on existing products—do not drive this growth. The launch of new products and geographic expansion do. Competitors lose shelf space and marginally raise prices. Results for public vs. private targets, during and after the financial crisis, and in industries that vary in structure suggest private equity tailors strategies to the environment, eases financial constraints, and provides expertise to manage growth.
papers.zh_title: 门口的野蛮人？私募股权、产品与消费者
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用大量消费品的价格和销售数据，调查私募股权对产品市场的影响。在收购后，目标公司的销售额增长比匹配的对照组公司高出50%。现有产品的价格上涨约1%并非这一增长的主要驱动力。新产品的推出和地理扩张才是增长来源。竞争对手失去货架空间并小幅提价。对公共与私人目标公司、金融危机期间及之后以及结构各异的行业的结果表明，私募股权会根据环境调整策略，缓解财务约束，并提供管理增长的专业知识。

papers.title: The Macroeconomics of Sticky Prices with Generalized Hazard Functions
papers.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, Francesco Lippi, Aleksei Oskolkov
papers.abstract: We give a thorough analytic characterization of a large class of sticky-price models where the firm’s price setting behavior is described by a generalized hazard function. Such a function provides a tractable description of the firm’s price setting behavior and allows for a vast variety of empirical hazards to be fitted. This setup is microfounded by random menu costs as in Caballero and Engel (1993) or, alternatively, by information frictions as in Woodford (2009). We establish two main results. First, we show how to identify all the primitives of the model, including the distribution of the fundamental adjustment costs and the implied generalized hazard function, using the distribution of price changes or the distribution of spell durations. Second, we derive a sufficient statistic for the aggregate effect of a monetary shock: given an arbitrary generalized hazard function, the cumulative impulse response to a once-and-for-all monetary shock is given by the ratio of the kurtosis of the steady-state distribution of price changes over the frequency of price adjustment times six. We prove that Calvo’s model yields the upper bound and Golosov and Lucas’ model the lower bound on this measure within the class of random menu cost models.
papers.zh_title: 具有广义风险函数的粘性价格宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对一大类粘性价格模型进行了彻底的分析刻画，其中企业的定价行为由广义风险函数描述。该函数提供了企业定价行为的可处理描述，并允许拟合各种经验风险函数。这一设定基于Caballero和Engel（1993）的随机菜单成本，或者Woodford（2009）的信息摩擦。我们建立了两个主要结果。首先，我们展示了如何利用价格变化分布或持续时间分布来识别模型的所有基本要素，包括基本调整成本的分布和隐含的广义风险函数。其次，我们推导了货币冲击总体效应的充分统计量：给定任意广义风险函数，对一次性货币冲击的累积脉冲响应等于稳态价格变化分布的峰度除以价格调整频率再乘以六。我们证明，在随机菜单成本模型类别中，Calvo模型给出了该度量的上界，而Golosov和Lucas模型给出了下界。

papers.title: Do Interactions with Candidates Increase Voter Support and Participation? Experimental Evidence from Italy
papers.authors: Enrico Cantoni, Vincent Pons
papers.abstract: We test whether politicians can use direct contact to reconnect with citizens, increase turnout, and win votes. During the 2014 Italian municipal elections, we randomly assigned 26,000 voters to receive visits from city council candidates, canvassers supporting the candidates' list, or to a control group. While canvassers’ visits increased turnout by 1.8 percentage points, candidates’ had no impact on participation. Candidates increased their own vote share in the precincts they canvassed, but only at the expense of other candidates on the list. This suggests that their failure to mobilize nonvoters resulted from focusing on securing the preferences of active voters.
papers.zh_title: 与候选人的互动是否会增加选民支持和参与？来自意大利的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们检验了政治家是否可以通过直接接触来重新联系公民、提高投票率并赢得选票。在2014年意大利市政选举期间，我们将26,000名选民随机分配接受市议会候选人的拜访、支持候选人名单的拉票员的拜访，或作为对照组。虽然拉票员的拜访使投票率提高了1.8个百分点，但候选人的拜访对参与没有影响。候选人增加了他们拉票选区的自身得票率，但这仅以牺牲名单上其他候选人的利益为代价。这表明，他们未能动员非选民的原因在于专注于争取活跃选民的偏好。

papers.title: Fear, Lockdown, and Diversion: Comparing Drivers of Pandemic Economic Decline 2020
papers.authors: Austan Goolsbee, Chad Syverson
papers.abstract: The collapse of economic activity in 2020 from COVID-19 has been immense. An important question is how much of that resulted from government restrictions on activity versus people voluntarily choosing to stay home to avoid infection. This paper examines the drivers of the collapse using cellular phone records data on customer visits to more than 2.25 million individual businesses across 110 different industries. Comparing consumer behavior within the same commuting zones but across boundaries with different policy regimes suggests that legal shutdown orders account for only a modest share of the decline of economic activity (and that having county-level policy data is significantly more accurate than state-level data). While overall consumer traffic fell by 60 percentage points, legal restrictions explain only 7 of that. Individual choices were far more important and seem tied to fears of infection. Traffic started dropping before the legal orders were in place; was highly tied to the number of COVID deaths in the county; and showed a clear shift by consumers away from larger/busier stores toward smaller/less busy ones in the same industry. States repealing their shutdown orders saw identically modest recoveries--symmetric going down and coming back. The shutdown orders did, however, have significantly reallocate consumer activity away from “nonessential” to “essential” businesses and from restaurants and bars toward groceries and other food sellers.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, PE, POL, PR；JEL：E6, H7, L51
papers.zh_title: 恐惧、封锁与分流：比较2020年疫情经济衰退的驱动因素
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年新冠疫情导致的经济活动崩溃规模巨大。一个重要问题是，这种崩溃在多大程度上源于政府限制活动的措施，而非人们为避疫自愿居家。本文利用超过225万家个体企业（涵盖110个不同行业）的顾客访问手机记录数据，考察了经济崩溃的驱动因素。通过比较同一通勤区内、但跨越不同政策边界的消费者行为，发现法定封锁令仅能解释经济活动下降的一小部分（且县级政策数据比州级数据准确得多）。尽管整体消费者流量下降了60个百分点，但法律限制仅解释了其中7个百分点。个人选择远更为重要，且似乎与对感染的恐惧相关：流量在法律命令实施前就已开始下降；与县内新冠死亡人数高度相关；消费者明显从同行业中规模更大/更繁忙的商店转向规模更小/更不繁忙的商店。撤销封锁令的州经历了同样微弱的复苏——下降与回升呈对称性。然而，封锁令确实显著地将消费者活动从“非必要”企业重新分配至“必要”企业，并从餐馆和酒吧转向杂货店和其他食品销售商。

papers.title: The Economic Impacts of COVID-19: Evidence from a New Public Database Built Using Private Sector Data
papers.authors: Raj Chetty, John N. Friedman, Michael Stepner, The Opportunity Insights Team,
papers.abstract: We build a publicly available database that tracks economic activity in the U.S. at a granular level in real time using anonymized data from private companies. We report weekly statistics on consumer spending, business revenues, job postings, and employment rates disaggregated by county, sector, and income group. Using the publicly available data, we show how the COVID- 19 pandemic affected the economy by analyzing heterogeneity in its impacts across subgroups. High-income individuals reduced spending sharply in March 2020, particularly in sectors that require in-person interaction. This reduction in spending greatly reduced the revenues of small businesses in affluent, dense areas. Those businesses laid off many of their employees, leading to widespread job losses, especially among low-wage workers in such areas. High-wage workers experienced a “V-shaped” recession that lasted a few weeks, whereas low-wage workers experienced much larger, more persistent job losses. Even though consumer spending and job postings had recovered fully by December 2021, employment rates in low-wage jobs remained lower in areas that were initially hard hit, indicating that the job losses due to the demand shock led to a persistent reduction in labor supply. Building on this diagnostic analysis, we evaluate the impacts of fiscal stimulus policies designed to stem the downward spiral in economic activity. Cash stimulus payments led to sharp increases in spending early in the pandemic, but much smaller responses later in the pandemic, especially for high-income households. Real-time estimates of marginal propensities to consume provided better forecasts of the impacts of subsequent rounds of stimulus payments than historical estimates. Overall, our findings suggest that fiscal policies can stem secondary declines in consumer spending and job losses, but cannot restore full employment when the initial shock to consumer spending arises from health concerns. More broadly, our analysis demonstrates how public statistics constructed from private sector data can support many research and real-time policy analyses, providing a new tool for empirical macroeconomics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E0, H0, J0
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情的经济影响：基于私营部门数据构建的新公共数据库的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用私营公司的匿名数据，构建了一个公开可用的数据库，以精细粒度实时追踪美国经济活动。我们报告了按县、行业和收入群体分类的消费者支出、企业收入、职位发布和就业率的每周统计数据。利用这些公开数据，我们通过分析疫情对不同子群体影响的异质性，展示了新冠疫情如何影响经济。高收入个体在2020年3月大幅削减支出，尤其是在需要面对面互动的行业。这种支出削减极大地减少了富裕、密集地区小企业的收入。这些企业解雇了许多员工，导致广泛的失业，尤其是这些地区的低工资工人。高工资工人经历了一场持续数周的“V型”衰退，而低工资工人则经历了更大、更持久的失业。尽管到2021年12月消费者支出和职位发布已完全恢复，但最初受重创地区的低工资岗位就业率仍然较低，表明需求冲击导致的失业引发了劳动力供应的持续减少。基于这一诊断分析，我们评估了旨在阻止经济活动螺旋式下降的财政刺激政策的影响。现金刺激支付在疫情初期导致支出急剧增加，但在疫情后期反应小得多，尤其是对高收入家庭。与历史估计相比，边际消费倾向的实时估计能更好地预测后续几轮刺激支付的影响。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，财政政策可以阻止消费者支出和失业的二次下降，但当消费者支出的初始冲击源于健康担忧时，无法恢复充分就业。更广泛地说，我们的分析展示了由私营部门数据构建的公共统计数据如何支持众多研究和实时政策分析，为实证宏观经济学提供了一种新工具。

papers.title: Epidemics in the New Keynesian Model
papers.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
papers.abstract: This paper documents the behavior of key macro aggregates in the wake of the Covid epidemic. We show that a unique feature of the Covid recession is that the peak-to-trough decline is roughly the same for consumption, investment, and output. In contrast to the 2008 recession, there was only a short-lived rise in financial stress that quickly subsided. Finally, there was mild deflation between the peak and the trough of the Covid recession. We argue that a New Keynesian model that explicitly incorporates epidemic dynamics captures these qualitative features of the Covid recession. A key feature of the model is that Covid acts like a negative shock to the demand for consumption and the supply of labor.
papers.zh_title: 新凯恩斯模型中的流行病
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了新冠疫情后主要宏观总量的行为。我们表明，新冠衰退的一个独特特征是消费、投资和产出的峰谷下降幅度大致相同。与2008年衰退相比，金融压力仅短暂上升并迅速消退。最后，在新冠衰退的峰谷之间出现了温和的通缩。我们认为，明确纳入流行病动态的新凯恩斯模型捕捉了新冠衰退的这些定性特征。该模型的一个关键特征是，新冠如同对消费需求和劳动力供给的负面冲击。

papers.title: Informality, Consumption Taxes and Redistribution
papers.authors: Pierre Bachas, Lucie Gadenne, Anders Jensen
papers.abstract: Can taxes on consumption redistribute in developing countries? Contrary to consensus, we show that taxing consumption is progressive once we account for informal consumption. Using household expenditure surveys in 32 countries we proxy for informal consumption using the type of store where purchases occur. We find that the budget share spent in informal stores steeply declines with income, so that the effective tax rate of a broad consumption tax rises with income. Our findings imply that the widespread policy of exempting food from taxation cannot be justified on equity grounds in low-income-countries.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PE；JEL：E26, H21, H23, O12, O23
papers.zh_title: 非正规经济、消费税与再分配
papers.zh_abstract: 在发展中国家，消费税能否实现再分配？与共识相反，我们表明，一旦考虑非正规消费，对消费征税是累进的。利用32个国家的家庭支出调查，我们根据购买发生的商店类型来代理非正规消费。我们发现，在非正规商店的支出份额随收入急剧下降，因此广泛消费税的有效税率随收入上升。我们的发现意味着，在低收入国家，普遍存在的食品免税政策无法在公平性上得到合理证明。

papers.title: Revisiting the Hypothesis of High Discounts and High Unemployment
papers.authors: Paolo Martellini, Guido Menzio, Ludo Visschers
papers.abstract: We revisit the hypothesis that cyclical fluctuations in unemployment are caused by shocks to the discount rate. We use a rich search-theoretic model of the labor market in which the UE, EU and EE rates are all endogenous. Analytically, we show that an increase in the discount rate lowers the UE rate and, under some natural conditions, it lowers the EU rate. Quantitatively, we show that an increase in the discount rate from 4 to 10% generates a 3.5% decline in the UE rate and a 6% decline in the EU rate. The response of the unemployment rate is minuscule. These findings are at odds with the actual behavior of the US labor market over the business cycle, which features a negative comovement between the UE and EU rates and large unemployment fluctuations. We show that aggregate productivity shocks generate the correct comovement between the UE and EU rates, as well as large unemployment fluctuations.
papers.zh_title: 重新审视高贴现率与高失业率的假说
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了失业的周期性波动是由贴现率冲击引起的假说。我们使用一个丰富的劳动力市场搜索理论模型，其中UE率、EU率和EE率都是内生的。在分析上，我们表明贴现率上升会降低UE率，并且在某些自然条件下，会降低EU率。在数量上，我们表明贴现率从4%上升到10%会导致UE率下降3.5%，EU率下降6%。失业率的反应微乎其微。这些发现与美国劳动力市场在商业周期中的实际行为不符，后者表现为UE率和EU率之间的负相关以及巨大的失业波动。我们表明，总生产率冲击产生了UE率和EU率之间的正确相关性，以及巨大的失业波动。

papers.title: COVID-19 and the Demand for Online Food Shopping Services: Empirical Evidence from Taiwan
papers.authors: Hung-Hao Chang, Chad Meyerhoefer
papers.abstract: We investigate how the coronavirus pandemic affected the demand for online food shopping services using data from the largest agri-food e-commerce platform in Taiwan. We find that an additional confirmed case of COVID-19 increased sales by 5.7% and the number of customers by 4.9%. The demand for grains, fresh fruit and vegetables, and frozen foods increased the most, which benefited small farms over agribusinesses. Online food shopping was highly responsive to COVID-19 media coverage and online content. Because Taiwan did not impose a stay-at-home order, the demand for online food shopping may be similar in other countries after they lift mobility restrictions.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情与在线食品购物服务需求：来自台湾的经验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用台湾最大的农产品电商平台数据，调查了新冠疫情如何影响在线食品购物服务需求。我们发现，每增加一例新冠确诊病例，销售额增长5.7%，顾客数量增长4.9%。谷物、新鲜水果蔬菜和冷冻食品的需求增长最大，这使小农场比农业企业受益更多。在线食品购物对新冠媒体报道和在线内容高度敏感。由于台湾未实施居家令，其他国家在解除出行限制后，对在线食品购物的需求可能与此类似。

papers.title: Implications of the Covid-19 Pandemic for State Government Tax Revenues
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Stan Veuger
papers.abstract: We assess the Covid-19 pandemic’s implications for state government sales and income tax revenues. We estimate that the economic declines implied by recent forecasts from the Congressional Budget Office will lead to a shortfall of roughly $106 billion in states’ sales and income tax revenues for the 2021 fiscal year. This is equivalent to 0.5 percent of GDP and 11.5 percent of our pre-Covid sales and income tax projection. Additional tax shortfalls from the second quarter of 2020 may amount to roughly $42 billion. We discuss how these revenue declines fit into several pieces of the broader economic context. These include other revenues (e.g., university tuition and fees) that are also at risk, as well as assets (e.g., pension plan holdings) that are at risk. Further dimensions of context include support enacted through several pieces of federal legislation, as well as spending needs necessitated by the public health crisis itself.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情对州政府税收收入的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了新冠疫情对州政府销售税和所得税收入的影响。我们估计，根据国会预算办公室近期预测所隐含的经济下滑，将导致2021财年各州销售税和所得税收入缺口约1060亿美元。这相当于GDP的0.5%，占我们疫情前销售税和所得税预测的11.5%。2020年第二季度额外的税收缺口可能约为420亿美元。我们讨论了这些收入下降如何融入更广泛经济背景的几个方面。这些方面包括同样面临风险的其他收入（例如大学学费和杂费），以及面临风险的资产（例如养老金计划持有量）。背景的其他维度包括通过几项联邦立法提供的支持，以及公共卫生危机本身所必需的支出需求。

papers.title: Transatlantic Technologies: The Role of ICT in the Evolution of U.S. and European Productivity Growth
papers.authors: Robert J. Gordon, Hassan Sayed
papers.abstract: We examine the role of the ICT revolution in driving productivity growth behavior for the United States and an aggregate of ten Western European nations (the EU-10) from 1977 to 2015. We find that the standard growth accounting approach is deficient when it separates sources of growth between ICT capital deepening and TFP growth, because much of the effect of the ICT revolution was channeled through spillovers to TFP growth rather than being limited to the capital deepening pathway. Using industry-level data from EU KLEMS, we find that most of the 1995-2005 U.S. productivity growth revival was driven by ICT-intensive industries producing market services and computer hardware. In contrast the EU-10 experienced a 1995-2005 growth slowdown due to a paucity of ICT investment, a failure to capture the efficiency benefits of ICT, and performance shortfalls in specific industries including ICT production, finance-insurance, retail-wholesale, and agriculture. After 2005 both the U.S. and the EU-10 suffered a growth slowdown, indicating that the benefits of the ICT revolution were temporary rather than providing a new permanent era of faster productivity growth. This joint transatlantic post-2005 slowdown is consistent with the broader view that ongoing innovation has been less potent in boosting productivity growth compared to earlier decades of the postwar era.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, PR；JEL：E01, E24, O33, O47, O51, O52
papers.zh_title: 跨大西洋技术：ICT在美国和欧洲生产率增长演变中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了ICT革命在驱动1977年至2015年美国与十个西欧国家（EU-10）总体生产率增长行为中的作用。我们发现，当标准增长核算方法将增长来源分离为ICT资本深化和TFP增长时存在缺陷，因为ICT革命的许多效应是通过对TFP增长的溢出效应传导的，而非仅限于资本深化路径。利用EU KLEMS的行业层面数据，我们发现1995-2005年美国生产率增长复苏的大部分是由生产市场服务和计算机硬件的ICT密集型行业驱动的。相比之下，EU-10在1995-2005年经历了增长放缓，原因是ICT投资不足、未能获取ICT的效率收益，以及特定行业（包括ICT生产、金融保险、零售批发和农业）的表现不佳。2005年后，美国和EU-10都经历了增长放缓，表明ICT革命的收益是暂时的，而非提供了一个生产率更快增长的永久新纪元。这种跨大西洋共同的2005年后放缓，与更广泛的看法一致，即与战后时代早期几十年相比，持续的创新在提升生产率增长方面效果较弱。

papers.title: Local Polynomial Order in Regression Discontinuity Designs
papers.authors: Zhuan Pei, David S. Lee, David Card, Andrea Weber
papers.abstract: Treatment effect estimates in regression discontinuity (RD) designs are often sensitive to the choice of bandwidth and polynomial order, the two important ingredients of widely used local regression methods. While Imbens and Kalyanaraman (2012) and Calonico, Cattaneo and Titiunik (2014) provide guidance on bandwidth, the sensitivity to polynomial order still poses a conundrum to RD practitioners. It is understood in the econometric literature that applying the argument of bias reduction does not help resolve this conundrum, since it would always lead to preferring higher orders. We therefore extend the frameworks of Imbens and Kalyanaraman (2012) and Calonico, Cattaneo and Titiunik (2014) and use the asymptotic mean squared error of the local regression RD estimator as the criterion to guide polynomial order selection. We show in Monte Carlo simulations that the proposed order selection procedure performs well, particularly in large sample sizes typically found in empirical RD applications. This procedure extends easily to fuzzy regression discontinuity and regression kink designs.
papers.zh_title: 断点回归设计中的局部多项式阶数选择
papers.zh_abstract: 在断点回归（RD）设计中，处理效应估计通常对带宽和多项式阶数的选择非常敏感，而这两者是广泛使用的局部回归方法的关键组成部分。虽然Imbens和Kalyanaraman（2012）以及Calonico、Cattaneo和Titiunik（2014）为带宽选择提供了指导，但多项式阶数的敏感性仍然给RD实践者带来难题。计量经济学文献中普遍认为，应用偏差缩减的论点无助于解决这一难题，因为它总是倾向于选择更高阶的多项式。因此，我们扩展了Imbens和Kalyanaraman（2012）以及Calonico、Cattaneo和Titiunik（2014）的框架，使用局部回归RD估计量的渐近均方误差作为准则来指导多项式阶数的选择。我们在蒙特卡洛模拟中表明，所提出的阶数选择程序表现良好，特别是在实证RD应用中常见的较大样本量下。该程序可以轻松扩展到模糊断点回归和回归扭结设计。

papers.title: The Changing Risk and Burden of Wildfire in the US
papers.authors: Marshall Burke, Anne Driscoll, Jenny Xue, Sam Heft-Neal, Jennifer Burney, Michael Wara
papers.abstract: Recent dramatic and deadly increases in global wildfire activity have increased attention on the causes of wildfires, their consequences, and how risk from fire might be mitigated. Here we bring together data on the changing risk and societal burden of wildfire in the US. We estimate that nearly 50 million homes are currently in the wildland-urban interface in the US, a number increasing by 1 million houses every 3 years. Using a statistical model that links satellite-based fire and smoke data to pollution monitoring stations, we estimate that wildfires have accounted for up to 25% of PM₂․₅ in recent years across the US, and up to half in some Western regions. We then show that ambient exposure to smoke-based PM₂․₅ does not follow traditional socioeconomic exposure gradients. Finally, using stylized scenarios, we show that fuels management interventions have large but uncertain impacts on health outcomes, and that future health impacts from climate-change-induced wildfire smoke could approach projected overall increases in temperature-related mortality from climate change. We draw lessons for research and policy.
papers.zh_title: 美国野火风险与负担的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 近期全球野火活动的急剧增加和致命性提高，使得人们对野火的原因、后果以及如何减轻火灾风险的关注度上升。在此，我们汇集了关于美国野火风险变化和社会负担的数据。我们估计，目前美国有近5000万套住房位于荒野-城市交界区，且这一数字每三年增加100万套。通过使用一个将基于卫星的火灾和烟雾数据与污染监测站联系起来的统计模型，我们估计近年来野火占美国PM₂․₅的比例高达25%，在西部某些地区甚至达到一半。然后，我们表明，基于烟雾的PM₂․₅的环境暴露并不遵循传统的社会经济暴露梯度。最后，通过使用典型情景，我们表明燃料管理干预措施对健康结果有巨大但不确定的影响，并且由气候变化引起的野火烟雾的未来健康影响可能接近气候变化导致的温度相关死亡率预计总体增加。我们为研究和政策汲取了教训。

papers.title: What Jobs are Being Done at Home During the Covid-19 Crisis? Evidence from Firm-Level Surveys
papers.authors: Alexander W. Bartik, Zoe B. Cullen, Edward L. Glaeser, Michael Luca, Christopher T. Stanton
papers.abstract: The threat of COVID-19 has increased the health risks of going to an office or factory, leading more workers to do their jobs remotely. In this paper, we provide results from firm surveys on both small and large businesses on the prevalence and productivity of remote work, and expectations about the persistence of remote work once the COVID-19 crisis ends. We present four main findings. First, while overall levels of remote work are high, there is considerable variation across industries. The Dingel and Neiman (2020) measure of suitability for remote work does a remarkably good job of predicting the industry level patterns of remote work - highlighting the challenge of moving many industries to remote work. Second, remote work is much more common in industries with better educated and better paid workers. Third, in our larger survey, employers think that there has been less productivity loss from remote working in better educated and higher paid industries. Fourth, more than one-third of firms that had employees switch to remote work believe that remote work will remain more common at their company even after the COVID-19 crisis ends.
papers.zh_title: 新冠危机期间哪些工作正在家中完成？来自企业层面调查的证据
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19的威胁增加了去办公室或工厂的健康风险，导致更多员工远程工作。在本文中，我们提供了针对小型和大型企业的关于远程工作普及率和生产力，以及COVID-19危机结束后远程工作持续预期的调查结果。我们提出了四个主要发现。首先，虽然远程工作的总体水平很高，但各行业之间存在显著差异。Dingel和Neiman（2020）对远程工作适宜性的衡量指标在预测行业层面的远程工作模式方面表现出色——这凸显了将许多行业转向远程工作的挑战。其次，远程工作在受教育程度更高、薪酬更高的行业中更为普遍。第三，在我们的较大规模调查中，雇主认为在受教育程度更高、薪酬更高的行业中，远程工作的生产力损失较小。第四，超过三分之一的让员工转向远程工作的公司认为，即使在COVID-19危机结束后，远程工作在其公司仍将更加普遍。

papers.title: Tech Clusters
papers.authors: William R. Kerr, Frédéric Robert-Nicoud
papers.abstract: Tech clusters like Silicon Valley play a central role for modern innovation, business competitiveness, and economic performance. This paper reviews what constitutes a tech cluster, how they function internally, and the degree to which policy makers can purposefully foster them. We describe the growing influence of advanced technologies for businesses outside of traditional tech fields, the strains and backlash that tech clusters are experiencing, and emerging research questions for theory and empirical work.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：L26, M13, O30, O31, R11, R12
papers.zh_title: 科技集群
papers.zh_abstract: 像硅谷这样的科技集群对现代创新、企业竞争力和经济表现起着核心作用。本文回顾了科技集群的构成、其内部运作方式，以及政策制定者能够在多大程度上有意地培育它们。我们描述了先进技术对传统科技领域之外的企业日益增长的影响、科技集群正在经历的紧张和反弹，以及理论和实证研究方面出现的新研究问题。

papers.title: A Behavioral Explanation for the Puzzling Persistence of the Aggregate Real Exchange Rate
papers.authors: Mario J. Crucini, Mototsugu Shintani, Takayuki Tsuruga
papers.abstract: At the aggregate level, the evidence that deviations from purchasing power parity (PPP) are too persistent to be explained solely by nominal rigidities has long been a puzzle (Rogoff, 1996). Another puzzle from the micro price evidence of the law of one price (LOP), which is the basic building block of PPP, is that LOP deviations are less persistent than PPP deviations. To reconcile the empirical evidence, we adapt the model of behavioral inattention in Gabaix (2014, 2020) to a simple two-country sticky-price model. We propose a simple test of behavioral inattention and find strong evidence in its favor using micro price data from US and Canadian cities. Calibrating behavioral inattention with our estimates, we show that our model reconciles the two puzzles relating to the PPP and LOP. First, the PPP deviations are more than twice as persistent as PPP deviations explained only by sticky prices. Second, the LOP deviations decrease to less than two-thirds of the PPP deviations in the degree of persistence.
papers.zh_title: 对实际汇率总体水平令人费解的持续性的行为解释
papers.zh_abstract: 在总体层面上，购买力平价（PPP）偏离的持续性过强以至于无法仅用名义刚性来解释的证据长期以来一直是一个谜题（Rogoff, 1996）。来自一价定律（LOP）微观价格证据的另一个谜题是，LOP偏离的持续性低于PPP偏离。为了调和实证证据，我们将Gabaix（2014, 2020）中的行为不注意模型调整为一个简单的两国粘性价格模型。我们提出了一个行为不注意的简单检验，并使用美国和加拿大城市的微观价格数据发现了支持它的有力证据。用我们的估计校准行为不注意后，我们表明我们的模型调和了与PPP和LOP相关的两个谜题。首先，PPP偏离的持续性比仅由粘性价格解释的PPP偏离高出两倍以上。其次，在持续性程度上，LOP偏离降至PPP偏离的三分之二以下。

papers.title: Back to Business and (Re)employing Workers? Labor Market Activity During State COVID-19 Reopenings
papers.authors: Wei Cheng, Patrick Carlin, Joanna Carroll, Sumedha Gupta, Felipe Lozano Rojas, Laura Montenovo, Thuy D. Nguyen, Ian M. Schmutte, Olga Scrivner, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing, Bruce Weinberg
papers.abstract: In the early phases of the COVID-19 epidemic labor markets exhibited considerable churn, which we relate to three primary findings. First, reopening policies generated asymmetrically large increases in reemployment of those out of work, compared to modest decreases in job loss among those employed. Second, most people who were reemployed appear to have returned to their previous employers, but the rate of reemployment decreases with time since job loss. Lastly, the groups that had the highest unemployment rates in April also tended to have the lowest reemployment rates, potentially making churn harmful to people and groups with more and/or longer job losses. Taken together, these estimates suggest that employment relationships are durable in the short run, but raise concerns that employment gains requiring new employment matches may not be as rapid and may be particularly slow for hard-hit groups including Hispanic and Black workers, youngest and oldest workers, and women.
papers.zh_title: 重返商业与（重新）雇佣工人？各州COVID-19重新开放期间的劳动力市场活动
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情的早期阶段，劳动力市场表现出显著的流动性，我们将其与三个主要发现联系起来。首先，与就业者失业的适度减少相比，重新开放政策导致失业者重新就业的幅度不对称地大幅增加。其次，大多数重新就业的人似乎回到了他们以前的雇主那里，但重新就业率随着失业时间的推移而下降。最后，四月份失业率最高的群体往往重新就业率也最低，这可能使流动性对遭受更多和/或更长时间失业的个人和群体造成伤害。综合来看，这些估计表明雇佣关系在短期内是持久的，但引发了担忧，即需要新雇佣匹配的就业增长可能不会那么迅速，并且对于包括西班牙裔和黑人劳动者、最年轻和最年长劳动者以及女性在内的受重创群体可能尤其缓慢。

papers.title: Business in a Time of Spanish Influenza
papers.authors: Howard Bodenhorn
papers.abstract: Mandated shutdowns of nonessential businesses during the COVID-19 crisis brought into sharp relief the tradeoff between public health and a healthy economy. This paper documents the short-run effects of shutdowns during the Spanish flu pandemic of 1918, which provides a useful counterpoint to choices made in 2020. The 1918 closures were shorter and less sweeping, in part because the US was at war and the Wilson administration was unwilling to let public safety jeopardize the war’s prosecution. The result was widespread sickness, which pushed some businesses to shutdown voluntarily; others operated shorthanded. Using hand-coded, high-frequency data (mostly weekly) this study reports three principal results. First, retail sales declined during the three waves of the pandemic; manufacturing activity slowed, but by less than retail. Second, worker absenteeism due to either sickness or fear of contracting the flu reduced output in several key sectors and industries that were not ordered closed by as much as 10 to 20% in weeks of high excess mortality. Output declines were the result of labor-supply rather than demand shocks.
