And, third, mandated closures are not associated with increases in the number or aggregate dollar value of business failures, but the number and aggregate dollar value of business failures increased modestly in weeks of high excess mortality. The results highlight that the tradeoff between mandated closures and economic activity is not the only relevant tradeoff facing public health authorities. Economic activity also declines, sometimes sharply, during periods of unusually high influenza-related illness and excess mortality even absent mandated business closures.
papers.zh_title: 西班牙流感时期的商业活动
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19危机期间对非必要业务的强制关闭，凸显了公共卫生与健康经济之间的权衡。本文记录了1918年西班牙流感大流行期间关闭措施的短期影响，这为2020年的选择提供了有用的对比。1918年的关闭时间更短且范围更小，部分原因是美国当时处于战争状态，威尔逊政府不愿让公共安全危及战争的进行。结果是广泛的疾病，这迫使一些企业自愿关闭；其他企业则在人手不足的情况下运营。利用手工编码的高频数据（主要为周度数据），本研究报告了三个主要结果。首先，在大流行的三波浪潮中，零售额下降；制造业活动放缓，但幅度小于零售业。其次，因疾病或害怕感染流感导致的工人缺勤，在超额死亡率高的几周内，使几个未被下令关闭的关键部门和行业的产出减少了多达10%至20%。产出下降是劳动力供给冲击而非需求冲击的结果。第三，强制关闭与商业失败的数量或总美元价值增加无关，但在超额死亡率高的几周内，商业失败的数量和总美元价值略有增加。结果强调，强制关闭与经济活动之间的权衡并非公共卫生当局面临的唯一相关权衡。即使没有强制关闭业务，在流感相关疾病和超额死亡率异常高的时期，经济活动也会下降，有时甚至急剧下降。

papers.title: Older People are Less Pessimistic about the Health Risks of Covid-19
papers.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Katherine B. Coffman, Nicola Gennaioli, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: A central question for understanding behaviour during the Covid-19 pandemic, at both the individual and collective levels, is how people perceive the health and economic risks they face. We conducted a survey of over 1,500 Americans from May 6 – 13, 2020, to understand these risk perceptions. Here we report some preliminary results. Our most striking finding is that perceived personal health risks associated with Covid-19 fall sharply with age.
papers.zh_title: 老年人对Covid-19健康风险的悲观程度较低
papers.zh_abstract: 理解Covid-19大流行期间个人和集体层面行为的一个核心问题是，人们如何看待他们面临的健康和经济风险。我们在2020年5月6日至13日对超过1500名美国人进行了一项调查，以了解这些风险认知。在此我们报告一些初步结果。我们最显著的发现是，与Covid-19相关的个人健康风险认知随年龄增长而急剧下降。

papers.title: Competition Laws, Norms and Corporate Social Responsibility
papers.authors: Wenzhi Ding, Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Wensi Xie
papers.abstract: Theory offers differing perspectives and predictions about the impact of product market competition on corporate social responsibility (CSR). Using firm-level data on CSR from 2002 through 2015 and panel data on competition laws in 48 countries, we discover that intensifying competition induces firms to increase CSR activities. Analyses indicate that (a) intensifying competition spurs firms to invest more in CSR as a strategy for strengthening relationships with workers, suppliers, and customers and (b) the competition-CSR effect is stronger in economies where social norms prioritize CSR-type activities, e.g., treating others fairly, satisfying implicit agreements, protecting the environment, etc.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, IO；JEL：K21, L4, M14, Z13
papers.zh_title: 竞争法、规范与企业社会责任
papers.zh_abstract: 理论关于产品市场竞争对企业社会责任（CSR）的影响提供了不同的视角和预测。利用2002年至2015年企业层面的CSR数据以及48个国家竞争法的面板数据，我们发现竞争加剧促使企业增加CSR活动。分析表明：（a）竞争加剧激励企业更多地投资于CSR，作为加强与工人、供应商和客户关系的策略；（b）在社会规范优先考虑CSR类活动（例如公平对待他人、履行隐含协议、保护环境等）的经济体中，竞争-CSR效应更强。

papers.title: Venture Capital’s Role in Financing Innovation: What We Know and How Much We Still Need to Learn
papers.authors: Josh Lerner, Ramana Nanda
papers.abstract: Venture capital is associated with some of the most high-growth and influential firms in the world. Academics and practitioners have effectively articulated the strengths of the venture model. At the same time, venture capital financing also has real limitations in its ability to advance substantial technological change. Three issues are particularly concerning to us: 1) the very narrow band of technological innovations that fit the requirements of institutional venture capital investors; 2) the relatively small number of venture capital investors who hold, and shape the direction of, a substantial fraction of capital that is deployed into financing radical technological change; and 3) the relaxation in recent years of the intense emphasis on corporate governance by venture capital firms. While our ability to assess the social welfare impact of venture capital remains nascent, we hope that this article will stimulate discussion of and research into these questions.
papers.zh_title: 风险投资在创新融资中的作用：已知与仍需探索
papers.zh_abstract: 风险投资与世界上一些增长最快、最具影响力的企业相关联。学者和实践者已有效阐述了风险投资模式的优点。同时，风险投资融资在推动重大技术变革方面也存在实际局限性。我们特别关注三个问题：1）符合机构风险投资者要求的创新技术范围非常狭窄；2）持有并塑造用于资助激进技术变革的相当一部分资本方向的风险投资者数量相对较少；3）近年来风险投资公司对公司治理的强烈关注有所放松。尽管我们评估风险投资社会福利影响的能力仍处于初级阶段，但我们希望本文能激发对这些问题的讨论和研究。

papers.title: U.S. Banks and Global Liquidity
papers.authors: Ricardo Correa, Wenxin Du, Gordon Y. Liao
papers.abstract: We characterize how U.S. global systemically important banks (GSIBs) supply short-term dollar liquidity in repo and foreign exchange swap markets in the post-Global Financial Crisis regulatory environment and serve as the "lenders-of-second-to-last-resort". Using daily supervisory bank balance sheet information, we find that U.S. GSIBs modestly increase their dollar liquidity provision in response to dollar funding shortages, particularly at period-ends, when the U.S. Treasury General Account balance increases, and during the balance sheet taper of the Federal Reserve. The increase in the dollar liquidity provision is mainly financed by reducing excess reserve balances at the Federal Reserve. Intra-firm transfers between depository institutions and broker-dealer subsidiaries within the same bank holding company are crucial to this type of "reserve-draining" intermediation. Finally, we discuss factors that contributed to the repo spike in September 2019 and the subsequent response of U.S. GSIBs to recent policy interventions by the Federal Reserve.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, F3, G2
papers.zh_title: 美国银行与全球流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了在全球金融危机后的监管环境中，美国全球系统重要性银行（GSIBs）如何在回购和外汇掉期市场中提供短期美元流动性，并充当“倒数第二贷款人”。利用每日监管银行资产负债表信息，我们发现美国GSIBs在美元资金短缺时适度增加其美元流动性供给，特别是在期末、美国财政部一般账户余额增加以及美联储资产负债表缩减期间。美元流动性供给的增加主要通过减少在美联储的超额准备金余额来融资。同一银行控股公司内存款机构与经纪交易商子公司之间的公司内部转移对于这种“消耗准备金”的中介活动至关重要。最后，我们讨论了导致2019年9月回购利率飙升的因素，以及随后美国GSIBs对美联储近期政策干预的反应。

papers.title: Variation in Health Care Prices Across Public and Private Payers
papers.authors: Toren L. Fronsdal, Jay Bhattacharya, Suzanne Tamang
papers.abstract: We study a unique all-payer data set spanning 38 states to examine the differences in inpatient reimbursement rates paid by traditional Medicare (TM), Medicare Advantage (MA), Medicaid, and private (under-65) insurers, and the differences in negotiated rates across the 60 largest private insurers. After controlling for enrollee and hospital mix, we find that private insurers pay 37 percent more than TM, and MA pays 10 percent more than TM for the five most common inpatient diagnoses. The correlation in risk-adjusted payments by private insurers and by TM at the same hospital for the same diagnosis is only 0.10. There is significant variation in negotiated prices within and across private payers. Among the five largest US insurers, the most expensive insurer negotiates prices that are 5-26 percent higher than the mean price for the 20 most common inpatient diagnoses. Additionally, we find a 10 percent increase in insurer market share corresponds to a 7 percent decrease in inpatient negotiated prices and a 10 percent decrease in the standard deviation of prices. This finding suggests that increased insurer market power allows payers to negotiate prospective payment contracts – rather than the more common fee-for-service payments – thereby offloading financial risk to providers.
papers.zh_title: 公共与私人支付方之间的医疗价格差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个涵盖38个州的独特全支付方数据集，以考察传统医疗保险（TM）、医疗保险优势计划（MA）、医疗补助和私人（65岁以下）保险公司支付的住院报销率差异，以及60家最大私人保险公司之间协商费率的差异。在控制参保者和医院组合后，我们发现对于五种最常见的住院诊断，私人保险公司支付的费用比TM高37%，MA支付的费用比TM高10%。同一医院同一诊断的私人保险公司和TM的风险调整后支付相关性仅为0.10。私人支付方内部和之间存在显著的协商价格差异。在五家最大的美国保险公司中，最昂贵的保险公司为20种最常见住院诊断协商的价格比平均价格高5%至26%。此外，我们发现保险公司市场份额增加10%对应于住院协商价格下降7%和价格标准差下降10%。这一发现表明，增强的保险公司市场势力使支付方能够协商预期支付合同（而非更常见的按服务收费支付），从而将财务风险转移给提供者。

papers.title: Choosing Technology: An Entrepreneurial Strategy Approach
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans, Michael Kearney, Erin L. Scott, Scott Stern
papers.abstract: A central premise of research in the strategic management of innovation is that start-ups are able to leverage emerging technological trajectories as a source of competitive advantage. But, if the potential for a technology is given by the fundamental character of a given technological trajectory, then why does entrepreneurial strategy matter? Or, put another way, if the evolution of technology is largely shaped by the strategic choices entrepreneurs make, then why do technological trajectories exhibit systematic patterns such as the Technology S-curve? Taking a choice-based perspective, this paper illuminates the choices confronting a start-up choosing their technology by resolving the paradox of the Technology S-curve through a reformulation of the foundations of the Technology S-curve. Specifically, we reconceptualize the Technology S-curve not as a technological given but as an envelope of potential outcomes reflecting differing strategic choices by the entrepreneur in exploration versus exploitation. Taking this lens, we are able to clarify the role of technological uncertainty on start-up strategy, the impact of constraints on technological evolution, and how technology choice is shaped by the possibility of imitation. Our findings suggest that staged exploration may stall innovation as a result of the replacement effect, increasing the strategic importance of commitment.
papers.zh_title: 选择技术：一种创业战略方法
papers.zh_abstract: 创新战略管理研究的一个核心前提是，初创企业能够利用新兴技术轨迹作为竞争优势的来源。但是，如果技术的潜力由给定技术轨迹的基本特征决定，那么创业战略为何重要？或者换句话说，如果技术的演进很大程度上由企业家做出的战略选择塑造，那么技术轨迹为何会表现出诸如技术S曲线之类的系统性模式？本文采取基于选择的视角，通过重新阐述技术S曲线的基础来解决其悖论，从而阐明初创企业在选择技术时所面临的选择。具体而言，我们不再将技术S曲线视为技术给定，而是将其重新概念化为一个潜在结果的包络线，反映了企业家在探索与利用中不同的战略选择。通过这一视角，我们能够阐明技术不确定性对初创企业战略的作用、约束对技术演进的影响，以及技术选择如何受模仿可能性的塑造。我们的发现表明，由于替代效应，分阶段探索可能会阻碍创新，从而增加了承诺的战略重要性。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Impact of Europe’s Carbon Taxes
papers.authors: Gilbert E. Metcalf, James H. Stock
papers.abstract: Policy makers often express concern about the impact of carbon taxes on employment and GDP. Focusing on European countries that have implemented carbon taxes over the past 30 years, we estimate the macroeconomic impacts of these taxes on GDP and employment growth rates for various specifications and samples. Our point estimates suggest a zero to modest positive impact on GDP and total employment growth rates. More importantly, we find no robust evidence of a negative effect of the tax on employment or GDP growth. We examine evidence on whether the positive effects might stem from countries that used the carbon tax revenues to reduce other taxes; while the evidence is consistent with this view, it is inconclusive. We also consider the impact of the taxes on emission reductions and find a cumulative reduction on the order of 4 to 6 percent for a $40/ton CO2 tax covering 30% of emissions. We argue that reductions would likely be greater for a broad-based U.S. carbon tax since European carbon taxes do not include in the tax base those sectors with the lowest marginal costs of carbon pollution abatement.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, PE；JEL：E62, H23, Q43, Q54
papers.zh_title: 欧洲碳税的宏观经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 政策制定者经常表达对碳税对就业和GDP影响的担忧。聚焦于过去30年实施碳税的欧洲国家，我们针对各种设定和样本估算了这些碳税对GDP和就业增长率的宏观经济影响。我们的点估计表明，碳税对GDP和总就业增长率的影响为零到适度正向。更重要的是，我们没有发现碳税对就业或GDP增长产生负面影响的稳健证据。我们考察了积极影响是否可能源于那些将碳税收入用于减少其他税收的国家；虽然证据与此观点一致，但尚无定论。我们还考虑了碳税对减排的影响，发现对于覆盖30%排放量、每吨二氧化碳40美元的税收，累计减排量约为4%至6%。我们认为，对于基础广泛的美国碳税，减排量可能会更大，因为欧洲碳税的税基不包括那些碳污染减排边际成本最低的部门。

papers.title: The Effect of Managers on Systematic Risk
papers.authors: Antoinette Schoar, Kelvin Yeung, Luo Zuo
papers.abstract: Tracking the movement of top managers across firms, we document the importance of manager-specific fixed effects in explaining heterogeneity in firm exposures to systematic risk. In equilibrium, manager fixed effects on systematic risk are positively related with manager fixed effects on stock returns. These differences in systematic risk are partially explained by managers’ corporate strategies, such as their preferences for internal growth and financial conservatism. Managers’ early-career experiences of starting their first job in a recession also contribute to differential loadings on systematic risk. These effects are more pronounced when managers wield more influence, as in smaller firms and firms that do not have an independent board. Overall, our results suggest that managers play an important role in shaping a firm’s systematic risk.
papers.zh_title: 管理者对系统性风险的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 通过追踪高层管理者在企业间的流动，我们记录了管理者特定固定效应在解释企业系统性风险暴露异质性方面的重要性。在均衡状态下，管理者对系统性风险的固定效应与管理者对股票收益的固定效应呈正相关。这些系统性风险的差异部分可由管理者的公司战略解释，例如他们对内部增长和财务保守主义的偏好。管理者在职业生涯早期于经济衰退期开始第一份工作的经历也会导致系统性风险载荷的差异。当管理者拥有更大影响力时，例如在规模较小的企业和没有独立董事会的企业中，这些效应更为显著。总体而言，我们的结果表明管理者在塑造企业系统性风险方面发挥着重要作用。

papers.title: MPCs, MPEs and Multipliers: A Trilemma for New Keynesian Models
papers.authors: Adrien Auclert, Bence Bardóczy, Matthew Rognlie
papers.abstract: We show that New Keynesian models with frictionless labor supply face a challenge: given standard parameters, they cannot simultaneously match plausible estimates of marginal propensities to consume (MPCs), marginal propensities to earn (MPEs), and fiscal multipliers. A HANK model with sticky wages provides a solution to this trilemma.
papers.zh_title: 边际消费倾向、边际收入倾向与乘数：新凯恩斯模型的三难困境
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，具有无摩擦劳动力供给的新凯恩斯模型面临一个挑战：在标准参数下，它们无法同时匹配边际消费倾向、边际收入倾向和财政乘数的合理估计值。一个具有粘性工资的异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型为这一三难困境提供了解决方案。

papers.title: Can Payroll Tax Cuts Help Firms During Recessions?
papers.authors: Youssef Benzarti, Jarkko Harju
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the effect of payroll tax cuts on firm activity during economic downturns. We use two regional payroll tax cuts in Finland as well as the onset of the Great Recession to estimate the effect of the recession on firms treated by the payroll tax cuts compared to a similar control group. When implemented, prior to the Great Recession, we estimate that the payroll tax cuts had limited effects on firms located in the treated regions. However, when the recession starts, some of its negative effects were substantially hampered by the previously enacted payroll tax cuts in treated firms. These effects are exacerbated for men and low-skilled employees. We also find that sales and profits in treated firms respond differently in treated firms during the recession. This shows that payroll tax cuts can make firms more resilient during downturns.
papers.zh_title: 工资税减免能在经济衰退期间帮助企业吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计了经济衰退期间工资税减免对企业活动的影响。我们利用芬兰两次区域性工资税减免以及大衰退的爆发，来估计衰退对受工资税减免处理的企业与类似对照组企业相比的影响。在实施时，即大衰退之前，我们估计工资税减免对处理区域内的企业影响有限。然而，当衰退开始时，先前实施的工资税减免在一定程度上抑制了其对处理企业的部分负面影响。这些效应在男性和低技能员工中更为显著。我们还发现，在衰退期间，处理企业的销售额和利润表现出不同的反应。这表明工资税减免可以使企业在经济低迷时期更具韧性。

papers.title: Culture and Student Achievement: The Intertwined Roles of Patience and Risk-Taking
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Lavinia Kinne, Philipp Lergetporer, Ludger Woessmann
papers.abstract: Patience and risk-taking – two cultural traits that steer intertemporal decision-making – are fundamental to human capital investment decisions. To understand how they contribute to international differences in student achievement, we combine PISA tests with the Global Preference Survey. We find that opposing effects of patience (positive) and risk-taking (negative) together account for two-thirds of the cross-country variation in student achievement. In an identification strategy addressing unobserved residence-country features, we find similar results when assigning migrant students their country-of-origin cultural traits in models with residence-country fixed effects. Associations of culture with family and school inputs suggest that both may act as channels.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I21, Z10
papers.zh_title: 文化与学业成就：耐心与风险承担的相互交织作用
papers.zh_abstract: 耐心和风险承担——这两种引导跨期决策的文化特质——是人力资本投资决策的基础。为了理解它们如何导致学生学业成就的国际差异，我们将国际学生评估项目测试与全球偏好调查相结合。我们发现，耐心的正向效应和风险承担的负向效应共同解释了国家间学生学业成就变动的三分之二。在一种处理未观测到的居住国特征识别策略中，当我们在包含居住国固定效应的模型中赋予移民学生其原籍国的文化特质时，我们得到了类似的结果。文化与家庭和学校投入的关联表明，这两者都可能作为传导渠道发挥作用。

papers.title: Testing, Voluntary Social Distancing and the Spread of an Infection
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Ali Makhdoumi, Azarakhsh Malekian, Asuman Ozdaglar
papers.abstract: We study the effects of testing policy on voluntary social distancing and the spread of an infection. Agents decide their social activity level, which determines a social network over which the virus spreads. Testing enables the isolation of infected individuals, slowing down the infection. But greater testing also reduces voluntary social distancing or increases social activity, exacerbating the spread of the virus. We show that the effect of testing on infections is non-monotone. This non-monotonicity also implies that the optimal testing policy may leave some of the testing capacity of society unused.
papers.zh_title: 检测、自愿社交距离与感染传播
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了检测政策对自愿社交距离和感染传播的影响。个体决定其社交活动水平，这决定了一个病毒在其上传播的社交网络。检测能够隔离感染者，从而减缓感染。但更多的检测也减少了自愿社交距离或增加了社交活动，从而加剧了病毒的传播。我们表明检测对感染的影响是非单调的。这种非单调性也意味着最优检测政策可能会使社会的一部分检测能力闲置。

papers.title: Real-Time Real Economic Activity: Exiting the Great Recession and Entering the Pandemic Recession
papers.authors: Francis X. Diebold
papers.abstract: We study the real-time signals provided by the Aruoba-Diebold-Scotti Index of Business conditions (ADS) for tracking economic activity at high frequency. We start with exit from the Great Recession, comparing the evolution of real-time vintage beliefs to a "final" late-vintage chronology. We then consider entry into the Pandemic Recession, again tracking the evolution of real-time vintage beliefs. ADS swings widely as its underlying economic indicators swing widely, but the emerging ADS path as of this writing (late June) indicates a return to growth in May. The trajectory of the nascent recovery, however, is highly uncertain (particularly as COVID-19 spreads in the South and West) and could be revised or eliminated as new data arrive.
papers.zh_title: 实时真实经济活动：走出大衰退与进入疫情衰退
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了阿鲁巴-迪博尔德-斯科蒂商业状况指数在追踪高频经济活动时提供的实时信号。我们从走出大衰退开始，比较实时版本信念与“最终”晚期版本时间序列的演变。然后我们考虑进入疫情衰退，再次追踪实时版本信念的演变。随着其基础经济指标的剧烈波动，阿鲁巴-迪博尔德-斯科蒂商业状况指数也大幅波动，但截至撰写本文时（6月下旬）出现的阿鲁巴-迪博尔德-斯科蒂商业状况指数路径表明5月份恢复增长。然而，新复苏的轨迹高度不确定（尤其是在COVID-19在南部和西部传播的情况下），并可能随着新数据的到来而被修正或消除。

papers.title: Credit Booms, Financial Crises and Macroprudential Policy
papers.authors: Mark Gertler, Nobuhiro Kiyotaki, Andrea Prestipino
papers.abstract: We develop a model of banking crises which Is consistent with two important features of the data: First, banking crises are usually preceded by credit booms. Second, credit booms often do not result in a crisis. That is, there are "good" booms as well as "bad" booms in the language of Gorton and Ordonez (2019). We then consider how the optimal macroprudential policy weighs the benefits of preventing a crisis against the costs of stopping a good boom. We show that countercyclical capital buffers are a critical feature of a successful macropudential policy.
papers.zh_title: 信贷繁荣、金融危机与宏观审慎政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个银行危机模型，该模型与数据的两个重要特征一致：第一，银行危机通常以信贷繁荣为先导。第二，信贷繁荣通常不会导致危机。也就是说，用戈顿和奥多涅兹（2019）的话说，既有“好的”繁荣也有“坏的”繁荣。然后我们考虑最优宏观审慎政策如何权衡防止危机的收益与阻止好繁荣的成本。我们表明，逆周期资本缓冲是成功宏观审慎政策的一个关键特征。

papers.title: How the Other Half Died: Immigration and Mortality in US Cities
papers.authors: Philipp Ager, James J. Feigenbaum, Casper Worm Hansen, Hui Ren Tan
papers.abstract: Fears of immigrants as a threat to public health have a long and sordid history. At the turn of the 20th century, when millions of immigrants crowded into dense American cities, contemporaries blamed the high urban mortality penalty on the newest arrivals. Nativist sentiments eventually led to the implementation of restrictive quota acts in the 1920s, substantially curtailing immigration. We capture the "missing immigrants" induced by the quotas to estimate the effect of immigration on mortality. We find that cities with more missing immigrants experienced sharp declines in deaths from infectious diseases from the mid-1920s until the late 1930s. The blame for these negative mortality effects lies not with the immigrants, but on the living conditions they endured. We show that mortality declines were largest in cities where immigrants resided in the most crowded and squalid conditions and where public health resources were stretched the thinnest. Though immigrants did die from infectious diseases at higher rates than the US-born, the mortality decline we find is primarily driven by crowding not changes in population composition or contagion, as we show mortality improvements for both US- and foreign-born populations in more quota-affected cities.
papers.zh_title: 另一半人如何死去：移民与美国城市死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: 将移民视为公共卫生威胁的恐惧有着漫长而肮脏的历史。在20世纪之交，当数百万移民涌入拥挤的美国城市时，同时代人将高昂的城市死亡率惩罚归咎于新来者。本土主义情绪最终导致1920年代限制性配额法案的实施，大幅减少了移民。我们利用配额导致的“缺失移民”来估计移民对死亡率的影响。我们发现，从1920年代中期到1930年代后期，缺失移民较多的城市因传染病导致的死亡人数急剧下降。这些负面死亡率效应的责任不在于移民，而在于他们所忍受的生活条件。我们表明，在移民居住条件最拥挤、最肮脏以及公共卫生资源最紧张的城市，死亡率下降幅度最大。尽管移民确实比美国出生人口死于传染病的比率更高，但我们发现的死亡率下降主要由拥挤驱动，而非人口构成或传染性的变化，因为我们在受配额影响更大的城市中观察到美国出生和外国出生人口的死亡率均有改善。

papers.title: Property Rights without Transfer Rights: A Study of Indian Land Allotment
papers.authors: Christian Dippel, Dustin Frye, Bryan Leonard
papers.abstract: Governments often institute transferability restrictions over property rights to protect owners and communities, but these restrictions impose costs: lowering property values, limiting investment, and increasing transaction costs. We study the long-run impacts of transferability restrictions using a natural experiment affecting millions of acres of Native American reservation land, by comparing non-transferable allottedtrust plots with transferable fee-simple plots. We use satellite imagery to study differences in land use across tenure types by leveraging fine-grained fixed effects to compare immediate neighbors. We find that fee-simple plots are 13% more likely to be developed and have 35% more land in cultivation.
papers.zh_title: 无转让权的产权：印度土地分配研究
papers.zh_abstract: 政府经常对产权施加可转让性限制以保护所有者及社区，但这些限制会带来成本：降低财产价值、限制投资并增加交易成本。我们利用一项影响数百万英亩美洲原住民保留地土地的自然实验，通过比较不可转让的分配信托地块与可转让的完全私有地块，研究了可转让性限制的长期影响。我们利用卫星图像，通过精细的固定效应比较相邻地块，分析不同产权类型下的土地利用差异。研究发现，完全私有地块的开发可能性高出13%，且耕地面积多出35%。

papers.title: Labor Market Screening and the Design of Social Insurance: An Equilibrium Analysis of the Labor Market for the Disabled
papers.authors: Naoki Aizawa, Soojin Kim, Serena Rhee
papers.abstract: This paper studies how firms’ screening incentives in the labor market affect the optimal design of social insurance programs and quantitatively assesses the U.S. disability policies accounting for firms’ screening of the disabled. We develop an equilibrium search model where workers with different productivities have heterogeneous preferences over non-wage benefits and firms cannot offer an employment contract that explicitly depends on worker types. In this environment, firms may use contracts to screen out a certain type of workers, distorting employment rates and contracts in equilibrium. Therefore, the optimal structure of social insurance policies depends on firms’ screening incentives. We extend and structurally estimate this framework to quantitatively understand the inefficiencies arising from firms’ incentives to screen out disabled workers and examine the optimal joint design of disability insurance (DI) and various forms of firm subsidies. We find that hiring subsidies mitigate screening distortions; at the same time, they interact with DI by reducing the labor supply disincentives it generates. The optimal policy structure leads to a considerable welfare gain by simultaneously making firm subsidies and DI benefits more generous.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：E61, H21, H51, I18, J32
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场筛选与社会保险设计：残疾人劳动力市场的均衡分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了劳动力市场中企业的筛选激励如何影响社会保险计划的最优设计，并定量评估了考虑企业筛选残疾人的美国残疾人政策。我们构建了一个均衡搜索模型，其中不同生产率的工人对非工资福利具有异质性偏好，且企业无法提供明确依赖工人类型的雇佣合同。在此环境下，企业可能利用合同筛选出特定类型的工人，从而扭曲均衡中的就业率和合同。因此，社会保险政策的最优结构取决于企业的筛选激励。我们扩展并结构性地估计了这一框架，以定量理解企业筛选残疾人激励所产生的低效率，并考察了残疾人保险与各种形式企业补贴的最优联合设计。我们发现，雇佣补贴缓解了筛选扭曲；同时，它们通过减少残疾人保险产生的劳动供给抑制效应与之相互作用。最优政策结构通过同时提高企业补贴和残疾人保险福利，带来了显著的福利收益。

papers.title: The Microeconomics of Cryptocurrencies
papers.authors: Hanna Halaburda, Guillaume Haeringer, Joshua S. Gans, Neil Gandal
papers.abstract: Since its launch in 2009 much has been written about Bitcoin, cryptocurrencies and blockchains. While the discussions initially took place mostly on blogs and other popular media, we now are witnessing the emergence of a growing body of rigorous academic research on these topics. By the nature of the phenomenon analyzed, this research spans many academic disciplines including macroeconomics, law and economics and computer science. This survey focuses on the microeconomics of cryptocurrencies themselves. What drives their supply, demand, trading price and competition amongst them. This literature has been emerging over the past decade and the purpose of this paper is to summarize its main findings so as to establish a base upon which future research can be conducted.
papers.zh_title: 加密货币的微观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 自2009年推出以来，关于比特币、加密货币和区块链的著述已有很多。虽然讨论最初主要发生在博客和其他大众媒体上，但现在我们正目睹围绕这些主题的严谨学术研究日益增多。根据所分析现象的性质，这些研究跨越多个学科，包括宏观经济学、法律经济学和计算机科学。本综述聚焦于加密货币本身的微观经济学：是什么驱动了它们的供给、需求、交易价格以及它们之间的竞争。这一文献在过去十年中逐渐涌现，本文旨在总结其主要发现，以便为未来研究奠定基础。

papers.title: The Impressive Effects of Tutoring on PreK-12 Learning: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of the Experimental Evidence
papers.authors: Andre Nickow, Philip Oreopoulos, Vincent Quan
papers.abstract: Tutoring—defined here as one-on-one or small-group instructional programming by teachers, paraprofessionals, volunteers, or parents—is one of the most versatile and potentially transformative educational tools in use today. Within the past decade, dozens of preK-12 tutoring experiments have been conducted, varying widely in their approach, context, and cost. Our study represents the first systematic review and meta-analysis of these and earlier studies. We develop a framework for considering different types of programs to not only examine overall effects, but also explore how these effects vary by program characteristics and intervention context. We find that tutoring programs yield consistent and substantial positive impacts on learning outcomes, with an overall pooled effect size estimate of 0.37 SD. Effects are stronger, on average, for teacher and paraprofessional tutoring programs than for nonprofessional and parent tutoring. Effects also tend to be strongest among the earlier grades. While overall effects for reading and math interventions are similar, reading tutoring tends to yield higher effect sizes in earlier grades, while math tutoring tends to yield higher effect sizes in later grades. Tutoring programs conducted during school tend to have larger impacts than those conducted after school.
papers.zh_title: 辅导对学前至12年级学习的显著影响：实验证据的系统综述与元分析
papers.zh_abstract: 辅导——此处定义为由教师、辅助专业人员、志愿者或家长提供的一对一或小组教学——是当今使用中最具多功能性和潜在变革性的教育工具之一。在过去十年中，进行了数十项学前至12年级的辅导实验，这些实验在方法、背景和成本上差异很大。我们的研究是对这些及更早研究的首次系统综述和元分析。我们构建了一个考虑不同类型项目的框架，不仅考察总体效果，还探讨这些效果如何因项目特征和干预背景而异。我们发现，辅导项目对学习成果产生了一致且显著的积极影响，总体合并效应量估计为0.37个标准差。平均而言，教师和辅助专业人员的辅导项目效果强于非专业人员和家长辅导。效果在低年级中也往往最强。虽然阅读和数学干预的总体效果相似，但阅读辅导在低年级往往产生更高的效应量，而数学辅导在高年级往往产生更高的效应量。在校期间进行的辅导项目比课后进行的项目影响更大。

papers.title: Competition and Quality: Evidence from High-Speed Railways and Airlines
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Long Wang, Yang Yang
papers.abstract: The entry of High-Speed Railways (HSR) represents a disruptive competition to airlines, particularly for short- to medium-distance journeys. Utilizing a unique dataset that contains the details of all flights departing from Beijing to 113 domestic destinations in China since January 2009, we employ a difference-in-differences approach to examine the effects of HSR entry on the quality of service provided by airlines as proxied by their on-time performance, and to identify the channels through which competition leads to quality improvement. We document two main findings. First, the competition from the entry of HSR leads to significant reductions in the mean and variance of travel delays on the affected airline routes. Second, the reductions in departure delays--which are controlled mostly by airlines, and the duration of taxi-in time--which are controlled mostly by destination airports, are identified as the main sources of the improvement in the airlines' on-time performance.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, PE, PR；JEL：L1, L91, O18, R4
papers.zh_title: 竞争与质量：来自高铁和航空公司的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 高铁的进入对航空公司构成了颠覆性竞争，尤其是在中短途旅行方面。利用一个独特的数据集，该数据集包含自2009年1月以来从北京飞往中国113个国内目的地的所有航班的详细信息，我们采用双重差分法来检验高铁进入对航空公司服务质量（以准点率衡量）的影响，并识别竞争导致质量改善的渠道。我们记录了两个主要发现。首先，高铁进入带来的竞争导致受影响航线上的航班延误均值和方差显著降低。其次，主要由航空公司控制的起飞延误减少以及主要由目的地机场控制的滑入时间缩短，被确定为航空公司准点率改善的主要来源。

papers.title: Trade, Unemployment, and Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Matteo Cacciatore, Fabio Ghironi
papers.abstract: We study how trade linkages affect the conduct of monetary policy in a two-country model with heterogeneous firms, endogenous producer entry, and labor market frictions. We show that the ability of the model to replicate key empirical regularities following trade integration---synchronization of business cycles across trading partners and reallocation of market shares toward more productive firms---is central to understanding how trade costs affect monetary policy trade-offs. First, productivity gains through firm selection reduce the need of positive inflation to correct long-run distortions. As a result, lower trade costs reduce the optimal average inflation rate. Second, as stronger trade linkages increase business cycle synchronization, country-specific shocks have more global consequences. Thus, the optimal stabilization policy remains inward looking. By contrast, sub-optimal, inward-looking stabilization---for instance too narrow a focus on price stability---results in larger welfare costs when trade linkages are strong due to inefficient fluctuations in cross-country aggregate demand.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E24, E32, E52, F16, F41, J64
papers.zh_title: 贸易、失业与货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究在一个包含异质性企业、内生生产者进入和劳动力市场摩擦的两国模型中，贸易联系如何影响货币政策的实施。我们表明，模型在贸易一体化后复制关键经验规律的能力——即贸易伙伴间商业周期的同步化以及市场份额向更具生产力企业的重新配置——对于理解贸易成本如何影响货币政策权衡至关重要。首先，通过企业选择实现的生产率提升减少了对正通胀以纠正长期扭曲的需求。因此，较低的贸易成本降低了最优平均通胀率。其次，随着更强的贸易联系增加了商业周期同步性，特定国家的冲击会产生更全球性的后果。因此，最优稳定政策仍然是内向型的。相比之下，次优的内向型稳定——例如过于狭隘地关注价格稳定——在贸易联系紧密时，由于跨国总需求的无效率波动，会导致更大的福利成本。

papers.title: Rationing the Commons
papers.authors: Nicholas Ryan, Anant Sudarshan
papers.abstract: Common resources may be managed with inefficient policies for the sake of equity. We study how rationing the commons shapes the efficiency and equity of resource use, in the context of agricultural groundwater use in Rajasthan, India. We find that rationing binds on input use, such that farmers, despite trivial prices for water extraction, use roughly the socially optimal amount of water on average. The rationing regime is still grossly inefficient, because it misallocates water across farmers, lowering productivity. Pigouvian reform would increase agricultural surplus by 12% of household income, yet fall well short of a Pareto improvement over rationing.
papers.zh_title: 公共资源的配给
papers.zh_abstract: 公共资源可能为了公平而以低效政策进行管理。我们以印度拉贾斯坦邦的农业地下水使用为背景，研究了公共资源的配给如何塑造资源使用的效率与公平。我们发现，配给对投入品使用具有约束力，以至于尽管农民提取水的价格微不足道，但他们平均使用了大致社会最优的水量。然而，这种配给制度仍然极其低效，因为它导致水资源在农民之间的配置不当，降低了生产力。庇古式改革将使农业剩余增加相当于家庭收入的12%，但远未达到相对于配给的帕累托改进。

papers.title: Rational Sentiments and Economic Cycles
papers.authors: Maryam Farboodi, Péter Kondor
papers.abstract: We propose a rational model of endogenous cycles generated by the two-way interaction between credit market sentiments and real outcomes. Sentiments are high when most lenders optimally choose lax lending standards. This leads to low interest rates and high output growth, but also to the deterioration of future credit application quality. When the quality is sufficiently low, lenders endogenously switch to tight standards, i.e. sentiments become low. This implies high credit spreads and low output, but a gradual improvement in the quality of applications, which eventually triggers a shift back to lax lending standards and the cycle continues. The equilibrium cycle might feature a long boom, a lengthy recovery, or a double-dip recession. It is generically different from the optimal cycle as atomistic lenders ignore their effect on the composition of the pool of borrowers. Carefully chosen macro-prudential or countercyclical monetary policy often improves the decentralized equilibrium cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG；JEL：D82, E32, E44, G01, G10
papers.zh_title: 理性情绪与经济周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个由信贷市场情绪与实际结果之间的双向互动产生的内生周期理性模型。当大多数贷款人最优地选择宽松的贷款标准时，情绪高涨。这导致低利率和高产出增长，但也导致未来信贷申请质量的恶化。当质量足够低时，贷款人内生地转向紧缩标准，即情绪变得低落。这意味着高信贷利差和低产出，但申请质量逐渐改善，最终触发向宽松贷款标准的转变，周期继续。均衡周期可能表现为长期繁荣、漫长复苏或双底衰退。它通常不同于最优周期，因为原子式的贷款人忽视了他们对借款人构成的影响。精心选择的宏观审慎或逆周期货币政策通常能改善分散化的均衡周期。

papers.title: The Hidden Costs of Strategic Opacity
papers.authors: Ana Babus, Maryam Farboodi
papers.abstract: We explore a model in which banks strategically hold interconnected and opaque portfolios, despite increasing the likelihood they are subject to financial crises. In our framework, banks choose their degree of exposure to other banks to influence how investors can use their information. In equilibrium banks choose portfolios which are neither fully opaque, nor fully transparent. However, their portfolios are excessively interconnected to obfuscate investor information. Banks can create a degree of opacity that decreases welfare, and makes bank crises more likely. Our model is suggestive about the implications of asset securitization, as well as government bailouts.
papers.zh_title: 战略性不透明的隐性成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了一个模型，在该模型中，银行战略性地持有相互关联且不透明的投资组合，尽管这会增加其遭受金融危机的可能性。在我们的框架中，银行选择对其他银行的敞口程度，以影响投资者如何利用其信息。在均衡状态下，银行选择的投资组合既非完全不透明，也非完全透明。然而，它们的投资组合过度相互关联，以混淆投资者的信息。银行可以制造一定程度的不透明性，这会降低福利，并使银行危机更可能发生。我们的模型对资产证券化以及政府救助的影响具有启示意义。

papers.title: The Tax Cuts and Jobs Act: Which Firms Won? Which Lost?
papers.authors: Alexander F. Wagner, Richard J. Zeckhauser, Alexandre Ziegler
papers.abstract: The Tax Cut and Jobs Act (TCJA) slashed corporations’ median effective tax rates from 31.7% to 20.8%. Nevertheless, 15% of firms experienced an increase. One fifth of firms recorded nonrecurring tax costs or benefits exceeding 3% of total assets. Proxies that existing studies employ to assess the TCJA’s impacts account for just half of actual impacts. Stock prices impounded those proxies during the legislative process. Total impacts were impounded the following year, once firms published their financials. These results indicate that investors find it hard to predict even large and immediate changes to company cash flows due to unfamiliar events.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：G12, G14, H25, O24
papers.zh_title: 《减税与就业法案》：哪些公司赢了？哪些输了？
papers.zh_abstract: 《减税与就业法案》将企业的中位有效税率从31.7%大幅削减至20.8%。尽管如此，仍有15%的企业经历了税率上升。五分之一的公司记录了超过总资产3%的非经常性税收成本或收益。现有研究用于评估该法案影响的代理变量仅能解释实际影响的一半。股票价格在立法过程中吸收了这些代理变量。而总影响则在次年公司公布其财务报表后才被吸收。这些结果表明，投资者发现，由于不熟悉的事件，即使是公司现金流发生的巨大且即时的变化也难以预测。

papers.title: Home Prices, Fertility, and Early-Life Health Outcomes
papers.authors: N. Meltem Daysal, Michael F. Lovenheim, Nikolaj Siersbæk, David N. Wasser
papers.abstract: We estimate the effect of housing price changes on fertility and early-life child health in Denmark. Using rich population register data among women aged 20-44 who own a home, we find that for each 100,000 DKK increase in home prices (equivalent to $12,000), the likelihood of giving birth increases by 0.27 percentage points or 2.32%. These estimates are similar to findings from the US per dollar of home price change, which is surprising given the strong pro-natalist policies and generous government programs in Denmark. We also present the first estimates of the effect of home prices on infant health. Our findings indicate that housing price increases lead to better child health at birth in terms of low birth weight and prematurity, however most of these effects reflect changes in the composition of births. There is no evidence of an effect on health during the first five years of life. These findings are consistent with a lack of credit constraints among homeowner families and with both children and child health being normal goods that are similarly-valued in the US and Denmark.
papers.zh_title: 房价、生育率与早期健康结果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了丹麦房价变化对生育率和儿童早期健康的影响。利用20-44岁拥有住房的女性丰富的人口登记数据，我们发现，每增加10万丹麦克朗（约合1.2万美元）的房价，生育的可能性增加0.27个百分点，即2.32%。这些估计结果与美国每美元房价变化的影响相似，考虑到丹麦强有力的鼓励生育政策和慷慨的政府项目，这一结果令人惊讶。我们还首次估算了房价对婴儿健康的影响。我们的研究结果表明，房价上涨会带来更好的出生婴儿健康结果，表现为低出生体重和早产率的降低，然而这些影响大多反映了出生人口构成的变化。没有证据表明房价对生命前五年的健康有影响。这些发现与房主家庭缺乏信贷约束，以及儿童和儿童健康在美国和丹麦都被视为价值相似的正常商品这一观点是一致的。

papers.title: Class Rank and Long-Run Outcomes
papers.authors: Jeffrey T. Denning, Richard Murphy, Felix Weinhardt
papers.abstract: This paper considers an unavoidable feature of the school environment, class rank. What are the long-run effects of a student’s ordinal rank in elementary school? Using administrative data on all public-school students in Texas, we show that students with a higher third-grade academic rank, conditional on achievement and classroom fixed effects, have higher subsequent test scores, are more likely to take AP classes, graduate from high school, enroll in and graduate from college, and ultimately have higher earnings 19 years later. We also discuss the necessary assumptions for the identification of rank effects and propose new solutions to identification challenges. The paper concludes by exploring the tradeoff between higher quality schools and higher rank in the presence of these rank-based peer effects.
papers.zh_title: 班级排名与长期结果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考虑了学校环境中一个不可避免的特征：班级排名。学生在小学的序数排名会产生怎样的长期影响？利用德克萨斯州所有公立学校学生的行政数据，我们表明，在控制了成绩和班级固定效应后，三年级学术排名更高的学生，其后续考试成绩更高，更有可能参加大学先修课程、高中毕业、进入大学并大学毕业，最终在19年后获得更高的收入。我们还讨论了识别排名效应所需的必要假设，并提出了应对识别挑战的新解决方案。本文最后探讨了在存在这些基于排名的同伴效应的情况下，更高质量的学校与更高排名之间的权衡。

papers.title: Fixing Misallocation with Guidelines: Awareness vs. Adherence
papers.authors: Jason Abaluck, Leila Agha, David C. Chan Jr, Daniel Singer, Diana Zhu
papers.abstract: Expert decisions often deviate from evidence-based guidelines. If experts are unaware of guidelines, dissemination may improve outcomes. If experts are aware of guidelines but continue to deviate, promoting stricter adherence has ambiguous effects on outcomes depending on whether experts have information not in guidelines. We study guidelines for anticoagulant use to prevent strokes among atrial fibrillation patients. By text-mining physician notes, we identify when physicians start using guidelines. After mentioning guidelines, physicians become more guideline-concordant, but adherence remains far from perfect. To evaluate whether nonadherence reflects physicians’ superior information, we combine observational data on treatment choices with machine learning estimates of heterogeneous treatment effects from eight randomized trials. Most departures from guidelines are not justified by measurable treatment effect heterogeneity. Promoting stricter adherence to guidelines could prevent 24% more strokes, producing much larger gains than broader guideline awareness.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I11, I18, O33
papers.zh_title: 通过指南纠正资源错配：认知与遵从
papers.zh_abstract: 专家决策常常偏离循证指南。如果专家不了解指南，传播指南可能会改善结果。如果专家了解指南但仍继续偏离，那么根据专家是否拥有指南中未包含的信息，促进更严格的遵从对结果的影响是不确定的。我们研究了房颤患者预防中风时抗凝药物使用的指南。通过对医生笔记进行文本挖掘，我们识别出医生何时开始使用指南。在提及指南后，医生变得更加符合指南，但遵从程度仍远非完美。为了评估不遵从是否反映了医生的优越信息，我们将治疗选择的观察数据与来自八项随机试验的异质性治疗效应的机器学习估计相结合。大多数偏离指南的行为并不能通过可测量的治疗效应异质性来证明其合理性。促进更严格的指南遵从可以预防24%以上的中风，其收益远大于提高指南认知度所带来的收益。

papers.title: Technology Diffusion
papers.authors: Nancy Stokey
papers.abstract: The importance of new technologies derives from the fact that they spread across many different users and uses, as well as different geographic regions. The diffusion of technological improvements, across producers within a country and across international borders, is critical for long run growth. This paper looks at some evidence on adoption patterns in the U.S. for specific innovations, reviews some evidence on the diffusion of new technologies across international boundaries, and looks at two theoretical frameworks for studying the two types of evidence. One focuses on the dynamics of adoption costs, the other on input costs.
papers.zh_title: 技术扩散
papers.zh_abstract: 新技术的重要性源于它们会传播到许多不同的用户和用途，以及不同的地理区域。技术改进在一个国家内部的生产者之间以及跨越国际边界的扩散，对于长期增长至关重要。本文考察了美国特定创新采用模式的一些证据，回顾了新技术跨越国际边界扩散的一些证据，并研究了用于分析这两类证据的两个理论框架。一个侧重于采用成本的动态变化，另一个侧重于投入成本。

papers.title: Understanding 100 Years of the Evolution of Top Wealth Shares in the U.S.: What is the Role of Family Firms?
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Magnus Irie
papers.abstract: We use a simple random growth model to study the role of changing dynamics of family firms in shaping the evolution of top wealth shares in the United States over the course of the past century. Our model generates a time path for top wealth shares remarkably similar to those found by Saez and Zucman (2016) and Gomez (2019) when the volatility of idiosyncratic shocks to the value of family firms is similar to that found for public firms by Herskovic, Kelly, Lustig, and Van Nieuwerburgh (2016) over the past 100 years. We also show that consideration of family firms contributes not only to overall wealth inequality, but also to considerable upward and downward mobility of families within the distribution of wealth. We interpret our results as indicating that improving our understanding of the economics of the process by which families found new firms and then, eventually, diversify their wealth is central to improving our understanding of the distribution of great wealth and its evolution over time.
papers.zh_title: 理解美国过去一百年顶级财富份额的演变：家族企业的作用是什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个简单的随机增长模型来研究过去一个世纪中，家族企业动态变化在塑造美国顶级财富份额演变中的作用。当家族企业价值异质性冲击的波动性与Herskovic、Kelly、Lustig和Van Nieuwerburgh（2016）发现的过去100年上市公司波动性相似时，我们的模型生成的顶级财富份额时间路径与Saez和Zucman（2016）以及Gomez（2019）的发现惊人地相似。我们还表明，考虑家族企业不仅有助于解释整体财富不平等，还解释了财富分布中家庭显著的向上和向下流动性。我们将我们的结果解释为：提高我们对家庭创立新企业并最终分散财富这一过程的经济学的理解，对于提高我们对巨额财富分布及其随时间演变的理解至关重要。

papers.title: Optimal Monetary Policy in Production Networks
papers.authors: Jennifer La'O, Alireza Tahbaz-Salehi
papers.abstract: This paper studies the optimal conduct of monetary policy in a multi-sector economy in which firms buy and sell intermediate goods over a production network. We first provide a necessary and sufficient condition for the monetary policy’s ability to implement flexible-price equilibria in the presence of nominal rigidities and show that, generically, no monetary policy can implement the first-best allocation. We then characterize the constrained-efficient policy in terms of the economy’s production network and the extent and nature of nominal rigidities. Our characterization result yields general principles for the optimal conduct of monetary policy in the presence of input output linkages: it establishes that optimal policy stabilizes a price index with higher weights assigned to larger, stickier, and more upstream industries, as well as industries with less sticky upstream suppliers but stickier downstream customers. In a calibrated version of the model, we find that implementing the optimal policy can result in quantitatively meaningful welfare gains.
papers.zh_title: 生产网络中的最优货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在一个多部门经济中，企业通过生产网络买卖中间产品时的最优货币政策实施。我们首先给出了在存在名义刚性时，货币政策能够实现弹性价格均衡的一个必要充分条件，并表明，一般情况下，没有任何货币政策能够实现最优配置。然后，我们根据经济的生产网络以及名义刚性的程度和性质，刻画了约束有效政策。我们的刻画结果为存在投入产出关联时最优货币政策的实施提供了通用原则：它确立了最优政策应稳定一个价格指数，该指数对规模更大、价格更粘性、更处于上游的行业，以及上游供应商粘性较小但下游客户粘性较大的行业赋予更高的权重。在模型的校准版本中，我们发现实施最优政策可以带来数量上显著的福利收益。

papers.title: The Franchise, Policing, and Race: Evidence from Arrests Data and the Voting Rights Act
papers.authors: Giovanni Facchini, Brian G. Knight, Cecilia Testa
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the relationship between the franchise and law enforcement practices using evidence from the Voting Rights Act (VRA) of 1965. We find that, following the VRA, black arrest rates fell in counties that were both covered by the legislation and had a large number of newly enfranchised black voters. We uncover no corresponding patterns for white arrest rates. The reduction in black arrest rates is driven by less serious offenses, for which police might have more enforcement discretion. Importantly, our results are driven by arrests carried out by sheriffs - who are always elected. While there are no corresponding changes for municipal police chiefs in aggregate, we do find similar patterns in covered counties with elected rather than appointed chiefs. We also show that our findings cannot be rationalized by alternative explanations, such as differences in collective bargaining, changes in the underlying propensity to commit crimes, responses to changes in policing practices, and changes in the suppression of civil right protests. Taken together, these results document that voting rights, when combined with elected, rather than appointed, chief law enforcement officers, can lead to improved treatment of minority groups by police.
papers.zh_title: 选举权、警务与种族：来自逮捕数据与《投票权法案》的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1965年《投票权法案》的证据，研究了选举权与执法实践之间的关系。我们发现，在《投票权法案》实施后，同时受该法案覆盖且拥有大量新获得选举权的黑人选民的县，其黑人逮捕率有所下降。我们未发现白人逮捕率有相应的模式。黑人逮捕率的下降主要由较轻的罪行驱动，对于这些罪行，警察可能拥有更多的执法裁量权。重要的是，我们的结果是由警长执行的逮捕所驱动的——警长总是通过选举产生。虽然总体上市政警察局长没有相应的变化，但我们确实在那些由选举而非任命产生局长的覆盖县中发现了类似的模式。我们还表明，我们的发现无法用其他解释来合理化，例如集体谈判的差异、潜在犯罪倾向的变化、对警务实践变化的反应以及民权抗议镇压的变化。综合来看，这些结果证明，当投票权与选举而非任命的首席执法官员相结合时，可以导致警察改善对少数群体的待遇。

papers.title: The Impact of COVID-19 on Small Business Owners: The First Three Months after Social-Distancing Restrictions
papers.authors: Robert W. Fairlie
papers.abstract: Social distancing restrictions and health- and economic-driven demand shifts from COVID-19 are expected to shutter many small businesses and entrepreneurial ventures, but there is very little early evidence on impacts. This paper provides the first analysis of impacts of the pandemic on the number of active small businesses in the United States using nationally representative data from the April 2020 CPS – the first month fully capturing early effects. The number of active business owners in the United States plummeted by 3.3 million or 22 percent over the crucial two-month window from February to April 2020. The drop in active business owners was the largest on record, and losses to business activity were felt across nearly all industries. African-American businesses were hit especially hard experiencing a 41 percent drop in business activity. Latinx business owner activity fell by 32 percent, and Asian business owner activity dropped by 26 percent. Simulations indicate that industry compositions partly placed these groups at a higher risk of business activity losses. Immigrant business owners experienced substantial losses in business activity of 36 percent. Female business owners were also disproportionately affected (25 percent drop in business activity). Continuing the analysis in May and June, the number of active business owners remained low – down by 15 percent and 8 percent, respectively. The continued losses in May and June, and partial rebounds from April were felt across all demographic groups and most industries. These findings of early-stage losses to small business activity have important implications for policy, income losses, and future economic inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, PR；JEL：J0, J15, J16, L26
papers.zh_title: COVID-19对小企业主的影响：社交距离限制实施后的前三个月
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19导致的社交距离限制以及健康和经济驱动的需求转变预计将使许多小企业和创业企业倒闭，但关于其影响的早期证据非常少。本文利用2020年4月当前人口调查（CPS）——第一个完全捕捉早期影响的月份——的全国代表性数据，首次分析了疫情对美国活跃小企业数量的影响。在2020年2月至4月这两个关键月份内，美国活跃企业主的数量骤减了330万，即22%。活跃企业主的下降是有记录以来最大的，且几乎所有行业都感受到了商业活动的损失。非裔美国人企业受到的打击尤其严重，商业活动下降了41%。拉丁裔企业主的商业活动下降了32%，亚裔企业主的商业活动下降了26%。模拟表明，行业构成在一定程度上使这些群体面临更高的商业活动损失风险。移民企业主经历了36%的商业活动大幅损失。女性企业主也受到了不成比例的影响（商业活动下降25%）。继续分析5月和6月的数据，活跃企业主的数量仍然很低——分别下降了15%和8%。5月和6月的持续损失以及4月的部分反弹在所有人口群体和大多数行业中都能感受到。这些关于小企业活动早期损失的发现对政策、收入损失和未来的经济不平等具有重要影响。

papers.title: The Determinants of Fiscal and Monetary Policies During the Covid-19 Crisis
papers.authors: Efraim Benmelech, Nitzan Tzur-Ilan
papers.abstract: As countries around the world grapple with Covid-19, their economies are grinding to a halt. For the first time since the Great Depression both advanced economies and developing economies are in recession. Governments and central banks have responded to the pandemic and the economic crisis using both fiscal and monetary tools on a scale that the world has not witnessed before. This paper analyzes the determinants of fiscal and monetary policies during the Covid-19 crisis. We find that high-income countries announced larger fiscal policies than lower-income countries. We also find that a country’s credit rating is the most important determinant of its fiscal spending during the pandemic. High-income countries entered the crisis with historically low interest rates and as a result were more likely to use nonconventional monetary policy tools. These findings raise the concern that countries with poor credit histories – those with lower credit ratings and, in particular, lower-income countries – will not be able to deploy fiscal policy tools effectively during economic crises.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, E52, E62, E63, G01, G28
papers.zh_title: COVID-19危机期间财政与货币政策的决定因素
papers.zh_abstract: 随着世界各国应对COVID-19，其经济正陷入停滞。自大萧条以来，发达经济体和发展中经济体首次同时陷入衰退。各国政府和中央银行利用财政和货币政策工具应对疫情和经济危机，其规模是前所未有的。本文分析了COVID-19危机期间财政和货币政策的决定因素。我们发现，高收入国家宣布的财政政策规模大于低收入国家。我们还发现，一个国家的信用评级是其疫情期间财政支出的最重要决定因素。高收入国家在进入危机时利率处于历史低位，因此更有可能使用非常规货币政策工具。这些发现引发了一个担忧：信用记录不佳的国家——那些信用评级较低，特别是低收入国家——将无法在经济危机期间有效部署财政政策工具。

papers.title: Trade Wars, Currency Wars
papers.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Aurélien Eyquem
papers.abstract: For most of the post WWII period, until recently, trade protectionism followed a downward trend, and was formulated in multilateral or bilateral agreements between countries. Recently however, there hasbeen a sharp shift towards unilateral, discretionary trade policy focused on short term macroeconomic objectives, and as a consequence, the use of trade policy has become entangled with that of monetary policy. This paper explores the consequences of this shift within a standard DSGE open economy macroeconomic model. We find that a discretionary non-cooperative approach to trade policy can significantly worsen macroeconomic conditions. Moreover, the stance of monetary policy has major implications for the degree of protection in a non-cooperative equilibrium. In particular, cooperative determination of monetary policy implies an increase in both equilibrium tariffs and inflation, and a significant fall in welfare. By contrast, when the exchange rate is pegged by one country, equilibrium rates of protection are generally lower, but in this case, there are multiple asymmetric equilibria in tariff rates which benefit one country relative to another. We also explore the determination of non-cooperative tariffs in a situation where monetary policy is constrained by the zero lower bound on nominal interest rates.
papers.zh_title: 贸易战、货币战
papers.zh_abstract: 在二战后的大部分时期，直到最近，贸易保护主义一直呈下降趋势，并在国家间的多边或双边协议中制定。然而，最近出现了向以短期宏观经济目标为重点的单边、自由裁量贸易政策的急剧转变，其结果是贸易政策的使用与货币政策的使用纠缠在一起。本文在一个标准的DSGE开放经济宏观经济模型中探讨了这种转变的后果。我们发现，一种自由裁量的非合作贸易政策方法会显著恶化宏观经济状况。此外，货币政策的立场对非合作均衡中的保护程度有重大影响。特别是，货币政策的合作决定意味着均衡关税和通货膨胀率都会上升，并且福利会显著下降。相比之下，当汇率被一个国家盯住时，均衡保护率通常较低，但在这种情况下，存在多个不对称的关税税率均衡，这些均衡使一个国家相对于另一个国家受益。我们还探讨了在货币政策受到名义利率零下限约束的情况下，非合作关税的决定。

papers.title: Optimal Illiquidity
papers.authors: John Beshears, James J. Choi, Christopher Clayton, Christopher Harris, David Laibson, Brigitte C. Madrian
papers.abstract: We calculate the socially optimal level of illiquidity in an economy populated by households with taste shocks and present bias (Amador, Werning, and Angeletos 2006). The government chooses mandatory contributions to respective spending/savings accounts, each with a different pre-retirement withdrawal penalty. Penalties collected by the government are redistributed through the tax system. When naive households have heterogeneous present bias, the social optimum is well approximated by a three-account system: (i) a completely liquid account, (ii) a completely illiquid account, and (iii) an account with a ~10% early withdrawal penalty. In some ways this resembles the U.S. system, which includes completely liquid accounts, completely illiquid Social Security and 401(k)/IRA accounts with a 10% early withdrawal penalty. The social optimum is also well approximated by an even simpler two-account system—(i) a completely liquid account and (ii) a completely illiquid account—which is the most common retirement system in the world today.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D02, D14, G51, H21, H31, H55
papers.zh_title: 最优非流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们计算了一个由具有品味冲击和现时偏好的家庭组成的经济体中的社会最优非流动性水平（Amador, Werning, and Angeletos 2006）。政府选择对各自的支出/储蓄账户进行强制性缴款，每个账户都有不同的退休前提款罚金。政府收取的罚金通过税收系统进行再分配。当天真的家庭具有异质性的现时偏好时，社会最优可以很好地近似为一个三账户系统：(i) 一个完全流动的账户，(ii) 一个完全非流动的账户，以及 (iii) 一个具有约10%提前提款罚金的账户。在某些方面，这类似于美国的系统，该系统包括完全流动的账户、完全非流动的社会保障以及具有10%提前提款罚金的401(k)/IRA账户。社会最优也可以很好地近似为一个更简单的两账户系统——(i) 一个完全流动的账户和 (ii) 一个完全非流动的账户——这是当今世界上最常见的退休系统。

papers.title: Physician Characteristics and Patient Survival: Evidence from Physician Availability
papers.authors: Joseph J. Doyle Jr.
papers.abstract: Measuring physician quality is fundamental to understanding healthcare productivity, yet patient sorting can confound attempts to estimate the types of physicians that improve survival. This paper aims to overcome selection bias by exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in the mix of physicians available to treat patients when they are admitted to the hospital via the emergency department. One innovation is the construction of proxy measures for the types of physicians available using 100% Medicare claims data. Physician characteristics considered include specialty training, medical school quality rankings, sex, years of experience, and patient volume. The main finding is that when heart failure patients enter the hospital when more cardiologists are available, they are more likely to be treated directly by a cardiologist, have more invasive procedures, and survive over the following year.
papers.zh_title: 医生特征与患者生存率：来自医生可用性的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 衡量医生质量对于理解医疗生产力至关重要，然而患者的分流可能会混淆对改善生存率的医生类型的估计。本文旨在通过利用患者通过急诊科入院时可用的医生组合中看似外生的变化来克服选择偏差。一个创新之处是利用100%的医疗保险索赔数据构建医生类型的代理指标。考虑的医生特征包括专业培训、医学院质量排名、性别、经验年限和患者数量。主要发现是，当心力衰竭患者在更多心脏病专家可用的时间入院时，他们更有可能直接由心脏病专家治疗，接受更多侵入性手术，并在接下来的一年中存活下来。

papers.title: Group Testing in a Pandemic: The Role of Frequent Testing, Correlated Risk, and Machine Learning
papers.authors: Ned Augenblick, Jonathan T. Kolstad, Ziad Obermeyer, Ao Wang
papers.abstract: Group testing increases efficiency by pooling patient specimens and clearing the entire group with one negative test. Optimal grouping strategy is well studied in one-off testing scenarios with reasonably well-known prevalence rates and no correlations in risk. We discuss how the strategy changes in a pandemic environment with repeated testing, rapid local infection spread, and highly uncertain risk. First, repeated testing mechanically lowers prevalence at the time of the next test. This increases testing efficiency, such that increasing frequency by x times only increases expected tests by around √x rather than x. However, this calculation omits a further benefit of frequent testing: infected people are quickly removed from the population, which lowers prevalence and generates further eﬃciency. Accounting for this decline in intra-group spread, we show that increasing frequency can paradoxically reduce the total testing cost. Second, we show that group size and eﬃciency increases with intra-group risk correlation, which is expected in natural test groupings based on proximity. Third, because optimal groupings depend on uncertain risk and correlation, we show how better estimates from machine learning can drive large efficiency gains. We conclude that frequent group testing, aided by machine learning, is a promising and inexpensive surveillance strategy.
papers.zh_title: 大流行中的群体检测：频繁检测、相关风险与机器学习的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 群体检测通过汇集患者标本并用一次阴性测试清除整个群体来提高效率。在患病率已知且风险无相关性的单次检测场景中，最优分组策略已得到充分研究。我们讨论了在具有重复检测、快速局部感染传播和高度不确定风险的大流行环境中，策略如何变化。首先，重复检测机械地降低了下次检测时的患病率。这提高了检测效率，使得将频率提高x倍仅使预期检测次数增加约√x而不是x。然而，这种计算忽略了频繁检测的另一个好处：感染者被迅速从人群中移除，这降低了患病率并产生了进一步的效率。考虑到这种组内传播的下降，我们表明增加频率可能矛盾地降低总检测成本。其次，我们表明分组规模和效率随着组内风险相关性的增加而增加，这在基于邻近性的自然测试分组中是预期的。第三，由于最优分组取决于不确定的风险和相关性，我们展示了如何通过机器学习获得更好的估计来驱动巨大的效率提升。我们得出结论，在机器学习的辅助下，频繁的群体检测是一种有前景且廉价的监测策略。

papers.title: Private Precaution and Public Restrictions: What Drives Social Distancing and Industry Foot Traffic in the COVID-19 Era?
papers.authors: Christopher J. Cronin, William N. Evans
papers.abstract: We examine the role of state and local policies to encourage social distancing, including stay at home orders, public school closures, and restrictions on restaurants, entertainment, and large social gatherings. Outcomes come from cell phone records and include foot traffic in six industries (essential and nonessential retail, entertainment, hotel, restaurant, and business services) plus the fraction of cell phones that are home all day. Structural break models show mobility series at the national and state levels start to change dramatically in a short window from March 8-14, well before state or local restrictions of note are in place. In difference-in-difference models, declarations of state of emergency reduce foot traffic and increase social distancing. Stay at home restrictions explain a modest fraction of the change in behavior across outcomes. Industry-specific restrictions have large impacts. For example, restrictions on dining in restaurants reduce traffic in restaurants, hotels, and nonessential retail. Private, self-regulating behavior explains more than three-quarters of the decline in foot traffic in most industries. Restrictive regulation explains half the decline in foot traffic in essential retail and 75 percent of the increase in the fraction home all day. In this latter result, public school closings have a substantial effect.
papers.zh_title: 私人预防与公共限制：COVID-19时代什么驱动了社交距离和行业客流量？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了州和地方鼓励社交距离的政策作用，包括居家令、公立学校关闭以及对餐馆、娱乐和大型社交聚会的限制。结果来自手机记录，包括六个行业（必需品和非必需品零售、娱乐、酒店、餐饮和商业服务）的客流量，以及全天在家手机的比例。结构断点模型显示，国家和州层面的流动性序列在3月8日至14日的短窗口内开始发生显著变化，远在重要的州或地方限制实施之前。在双重差分模型中，宣布紧急状态减少了客流量并增加了社交距离。居家限制解释了行为变化中适度的一部分。行业特定限制有较大影响。例如，限制在餐馆就餐减少了餐馆、酒店和非必需品零售的客流量。私人自我调节行为解释了大多数行业客流量下降的四分之三以上。限制性法规解释了必需品零售客流量下降的一半，以及全天在家比例增加的75%。在后一个结果中，公立学校关闭有显著影响。

papers.title: The Impact of the WWI Agricultural Boom and Bust on Female Opportunity Cost and Fertility
papers.authors: Carl T. Kitchens, Luke P. Rodgers
papers.abstract: Using variation in crop prices induced by large swings in demand surrounding World War I, we examine the fertility response to crop revenue increases from 1910 to 1930. Our estimates from samples utilizing complete count decennial census microdata and newly collected county-level data from state health reports indicate that agricultural price increases reduced fertility, explaining about 9 percent of the overall decline in fertility over the period. The effect persists years after the collapse of the war boom. Importantly, we show that fertility declines were concentrated in women living on the farm and that fertility declined along both the intensive and extensive margins. Combined, the pattern of estimates is consistent with agricultural women experiencing an increase in the opportunity cost of their time.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS；JEL：J12, J13, N12, N5
papers.zh_title: 一战农业繁荣与萧条对女性机会成本和生育率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用第一次世界大战前后需求大幅波动引起的作物价格变化，我们考察了1910年至1930年间作物收入增加对生育率的反应。我们的估计基于使用完整计数十年一次人口普查微观数据和新收集的县级卫生报告数据，表明农产品价格上涨降低了生育率，解释了该时期生育率总体下降的约9%。这种影响在战争繁荣崩溃后持续多年。重要的是，我们表明生育率下降集中在生活在农场的女性中，并且生育率在集约边际和广延边际上均有所下降。综合来看，估计模式与农业女性时间机会成本增加的解释一致。

papers.title: The Real Effects of Modern Information Technologies: Evidence from the EDGAR Implementation
papers.authors: Itay Goldstein, Shijie Yang, Luo Zuo
papers.abstract: Using the implementation of the Electronic Data Gathering, Analysis, and Retrieval (EDGAR) system from 1993 to 1996 as a shock to information dissemination technologies, we examine how a significant reduction in disclosure processing costs affects the real economy. We find that the EDGAR implementation leads to an increase in corporate investment and that this effect is concentrated in value firms. We provide evidence that improved equity financing and enhanced managerial incentives are likely the underlying mechanisms. Specifically, the EDGAR implementation leads to an increase in a firm’s stock liquidity, a decrease in the cost of equity capital, and an increase in the level of equity financing. Consistent with the monitoring effect of broad information dissemination, the EDGAR implementation leads to an increase in a firm’s operating performance. Our findings suggest that it is important to consider information dissemination beyond information production when examining the real effects of corporate disclosures.
papers.zh_title: 现代信息技术的真实效应：来自EDGAR实施的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用1993年至1996年电子数据收集、分析和检索系统的实施作为信息传播技术的冲击，我们考察了披露处理成本显著降低如何影响实体经济。我们发现EDGAR实施导致企业投资增加，且这种效应集中在价值型公司。我们提供证据表明，改善股权融资和增强管理层激励可能是潜在机制。具体来说，EDGAR实施导致公司股票流动性增加、股权资本成本降低以及股权融资水平提高。与广泛信息传播的监督效应一致，EDGAR实施导致公司经营业绩提升。我们的发现表明，在考察公司披露的真实效应时，除了信息生产外，考虑信息传播也很重要。

papers.title: Identification and Estimation of Undetected COVID-19 Cases Using Testing Data from Iceland
papers.authors: Karl M. Aspelund, Michael C. Droste, James H. Stock, Christopher D. Walker
papers.abstract: In the early stages of the COVID-19 pandemic, international testing efforts tended to target individuals whose symptoms and/or jobs placed them at a high presumed risk of infection. Testing regimes of this sort potentially result in a high proportion of cases going undetected. Quantifying this parameter, which we refer to as the undetected rate, is an important contribution to the analysis of the early spread of the SARS-CoV-2 virus. We show that partial identification techniques can credibly deal with the data problems that common COVID-19 testing programs induce (i.e. excluding quarantined individuals from testing and low participation in random screening programs). We use public data from two Icelandic testing regimes during the first month of the outbreak and estimate an identified interval for the undetected rate. Our main approach estimates that the undetected rate was between 89% and 93% before the medical system broadened its eligibility criteria and between 80% and 90% after.
papers.zh_title: 利用冰岛检测数据识别和估计未检测到的COVID-19病例
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行早期阶段，国际检测工作往往针对症状和/或工作使其处于高假定感染风险的个体。这种检测制度可能导致大量病例未被检测到。量化这一参数（我们称之为未检测率）是对SARS-CoV-2病毒早期传播分析的重要贡献。我们表明，部分识别技术可以可信地处理常见COVID-19检测项目引起的数据问题（即排除隔离个体进行检测以及随机筛查项目参与率低）。我们使用冰岛两种检测制度在疫情爆发第一个月的公开数据，估计了未检测率的识别区间。我们的主要方法估计，在医疗系统扩大其资格标准之前，未检测率在89%至93%之间，之后在80%至90%之间。

papers.title: A Theory of Social Impact Bonds
papers.authors: Daniel L. Tortorice, David E. Bloom, Paige Kirby, John Regan
papers.abstract: Social impact bonds (SIBs) are an innovative financing mechanism for public goods. In a SIB, an investor provides capital to a service provider for a social intervention. The investor receives a return based on the outcome of the intervention relative to a predetermined benchmark. We describe the basic structure of a SIB and provide some descriptive statistics for these financial instruments. We then consider a formal model of SIBs and examine their ability to finance positive net present value projects that traditional debt finance cannot. We find that SIBs expand the set of implementable projects if governments are pessimistic (relative to the private sector) about the probability an intervention would succeed or if the government is particularly averse to paying costs associated with a project that does not generate offsetting benefits. As both these features are present in various public programs, we conclude that SIBs are a real innovation in public finance and should be considered for projects when traditional debt finance has been rejected.
papers.zh_title: 社会影响债券的理论
papers.zh_abstract: 社会影响债券（SIBs）是一种用于公共产品的创新融资机制。在SIB中，投资者为社会干预项目向服务提供者提供资本。投资者根据干预结果相对于预定基准的表现获得回报。我们描述了SIB的基本结构，并提供了这些金融工具的一些描述性统计。然后，我们考虑了一个SIB的形式化模型，并检验了它们为传统债务融资无法实现的正净现值项目提供资金的能力。我们发现，如果政府（相对于私营部门）对干预成功的概率持悲观态度，或者政府特别厌恶为那些无法产生抵消收益的项目支付成本，那么SIB会扩大可实施项目的范围。由于这两个特征在各种公共项目中都存在，我们得出结论，SIB是公共财政领域的一项真正创新，在传统债务融资被拒绝的项目中应考虑使用SIB。

papers.title: Why Does Globalization Fuel Populism? Economics, Culture, and the Rise of Right-wing Populism
papers.authors: Dani Rodrik
papers.abstract: There is compelling evidence that globalization shocks, often working through culture and identity, have played an important role in driving up support for populist movements, particularly of the right-wing kind. I start with an empirical analysis of the 2016 presidential election in the U.S. to show globalization-related attitudinal variables were important correlates of the switch to Trump. I then provide a conceptual framework that identifies four distinct channels through which globalization can stimulate populism, two each on the demand and supply sides of politics, respectively. I evaluate the empirical literature with the help of this framework, discussing trade, financial globalization, and immigration separately. I conclude the paper by discussing some apparently anomalous cases where populists have been against, rather than in favor of trade protection.
papers.zh_title: 全球化为何助长民粹主义？经济学、文化与右翼民粹主义的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 有令人信服的证据表明，全球化冲击——通常通过文化和身份认同发挥作用——在推动民粹主义运动（尤其是右翼民粹主义）的支持率上升方面发挥了重要作用。我首先对美国2016年总统选举进行实证分析，以表明与全球化相关的态度变量是转向支持特朗普的重要关联因素。然后，我提供了一个概念框架，识别出全球化刺激民粹主义的四个不同渠道，其中两个分别位于政治的需求侧和供给侧。我借助这一框架评估了实证文献，分别讨论了贸易、金融全球化和移民。最后，我通过讨论一些明显的反常案例来结束本文，在这些案例中，民粹主义者反对而非支持贸易保护。

papers.title: Measuring Employer-to-Employer Reallocation
papers.authors: Shigeru Fujita, Giuseppe Moscarini, Fabien Postel-Vinay
papers.abstract: We revisit measurement of Employer-to-Employer (EE) transitions, the main engine of labor market competition and employment reallocation, in the monthly Current Population Survey (CPS). We follow Fallick and Fleischman (2004) and exploit a key survey question introduced with the 1994 CPS redesign. We detect a sudden and sharp increase in the incidence of missing answers to this question starting in 2007, when the U.S. Census Bureau introduced a change in survey methodology, the Respondent Identification Policy (RIP). We show evidence of selection into answering the EE question by both observable and unobservable worker characteristics that correlate with EE mobility. We propose a selection model and a procedure to impute missing answers to the key survey question, thus EE transitions, after the introduction of the RIP. Our imputed aggregate EE series restores a close congruence with the business cycle, especially with the onset of the Great Recession, exhibits a much less dramatic drop in 2008-2009 and a full recovery by 2016, and eliminates the spurious appearance of declining EE dynamism in the US labor market after 2000. We also offer the first evidence of the (large and negative) impact of the COVID-19 crisis on EE reallocation.
papers.zh_title: 衡量雇主到雇主的重新配置
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了月度当前人口调查（CPS）中雇主到雇主（EE）转换的衡量问题，这是劳动力市场竞争和就业重新配置的主要引擎。我们遵循Fallick和Fleischman（2004）的方法，利用了1994年CPS重新设计时引入的一个关键调查问题。我们检测到，自2007年美国人口普查局引入调查方法变更——受访者身份识别政策（RIP）——以来，该问题缺失答案的发生率突然且急剧增加。我们展示了在回答EE问题时，存在基于与EE流动性相关的可观测和不可观测工人特征的选择性。我们提出了一个选择模型和一个程序，用于在RIP引入后对关键调查问题的缺失答案进行插补，从而估算EE转换。我们插补后的总体EE序列恢复了与商业周期的紧密一致性，尤其是在大衰退开始时，显示出2008-2009年下降幅度小得多，并在2016年完全恢复，消除了2000年后美国劳动力市场EE活力下降的虚假表象。我们还首次提供了COVID-19危机对EE重新配置（巨大且负面）影响的证据。

papers.title: High School Majors, Comparative (Dis)Advantage, and Future Earnings
papers.authors: Gordon Dahl, Dan-Olof Rooth, Anders Stenberg
papers.abstract: This paper studies whether specialized academic fields of study in secondary school (i.e., high school majors), which are common in many countries, affect earnings as an adult. Identification is challenging, because it requires not just quasi-random variation into majors, but also an accounting of individuals’ next-best alternatives. Our setting is Sweden, where at the end of ninth grade students rank fields of study and admission to oversubscribed fields is determined based on a student’s GPA. We use a regression discontinuity design which allows for different labor market returns for each combination of preferred versus next-best choice, together with nationwide register data for school cohorts from 1977-1991 linked to their earnings as adults. Our analysis yields several key results. First, Engineering, Natural Science, and Business yield higher earnings relative to most second-best choices, while Social Science and Humanities result in sizable drops, even relative to non-academic vocational programs. The magnitudes are often as large as the return to two years of additional education. Second, the return to completing a major varies substantially as a function of a student’s next-best alternative. Third, the pattern of returns for individuals with different first and second best choices is consistent with comparative advantage for many field choice combinations, while others exhibit comparative disadvantage or random sorting. Fourth, most of the differences in adult earnings can be attributed to differences in occupation, and to a lesser extent, college major. Taken together, these results highlight that the high school majors students choose at age 16, when they have limited information about their skills and the labor market, have sizable effects which persist into adulthood.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I26, J24, J31
papers.zh_title: 高中专业、比较（劣势）优势与未来收入
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中学阶段的专业化学术领域（即高中专业），这在许多国家很常见，是否会影响成年后的收入。识别具有挑战性，因为它不仅需要专业选择的准随机变化，还需要考虑个人的次优替代方案。我们的研究背景是瑞典，在九年级结束时，学生对学习领域进行排序，对超额申请领域的录取基于学生的平均绩点（GPA）。我们使用断点回归设计，该设计允许每个首选与次优选择组合具有不同的劳动力市场回报，并结合1977-1991年学校队列的全国性登记数据及其成年后的收入。我们的分析得出了几个关键结果。首先，相对于大多数次优选择，工程、自然科学和商业专业能带来更高的收入，而社会科学和人文学科则导致收入大幅下降，甚至相对于非学术性职业项目也是如此。其幅度通常与两年额外教育的回报相当。第二，完成一个专业的回报因学生的次优选择不同而有很大差异。第三，对于具有不同首选和次优选择的个体，其回报模式与许多专业选择组合的比较优势一致，而其他组合则表现出比较劣势或随机排序。第四，成年后收入的大部分差异可归因于职业差异，其次是大学专业差异。综合来看，这些结果突显了学生在16岁时（此时他们对自身技能和劳动力市场信息有限）选择的高中专业，会产生持续到成年的显著影响。

papers.title: The Incentive Effects of Cash Transfers to the Poor
papers.authors: Anna Aizer, Shari Eli, Adriana Lleras-Muney
papers.abstract: All redistributive and social insurance programs trade off the potential benefits of transfers with the disincentives these programs generate. We investigate this trade-off using newly collected lifetime data for 16,000 women who applied to the Mothers’ Pension Program, the first cash transfer program in the US. In the short-run cash transfers reduced geographic mobility and delayed marriage of recipients but did not affect who they married or where they moved to. In the long run transfers had no effect on work, marriage or fertility behaviors. They also did not improve the economic conditions of recipients or their longevity.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I14, I18, I32, I38, J16, N32
papers.zh_title: 现金转移对贫困人口的激励效应
papers.zh_abstract: 所有再分配和社会保险项目都在转移支付的潜在收益与这些项目产生的负激励之间进行权衡。我们利用新收集的16000名申请美国首个现金转移项目“母亲养老金计划”的女性终生数据来研究这种权衡。在短期内，现金转移减少了受助者的地理流动性并延迟了她们的婚姻，但并未影响她们与谁结婚或迁往何处。从长期来看，转移支付对受助者的工作、婚姻或生育行为没有影响。它们也没有改善受助者的经济状况或延长其寿命。

papers.title: Risk Aversion, Offsetting Community Effects, and COVID-19: Evidence from an Indoor Political Rally
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Drew McNichols, Connor Redpath, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) deems large indoor gatherings without social distancing the “highest risk” activity for COVID-19 contagion. On June 20, 2020, President Donald J. Trump held his first mass campaign rally following the US coronavirus outbreak at the indoor Bank of Oklahoma (BOK) arena. In the weeks following the event, numerous high-profile national news outlets reported that the Trump rally was “more than likely” the cause of a coronavirus surge in Tulsa county based on time series data. This study is the first to rigorously explore the impacts of this event on social distancing and COVID-19 spread. First, using data from SafeGraph Inc, we show that while non-resident visits to census block groups hosting the Trump event grew by approximately 25 percent, there was no decline in net stay-at-home behavior in Tulsa county, reflecting important offsetting behavioral effects. Then, using data on COVID-19 cases and deaths from the CDC and a synthetic control design, we find little evidence that COVID-19 grew more rapidly in Tulsa County, its border counties, or in the state of Oklahoma than each’s estimated counterfactual during the five-week post-treatment period we observe. Difference-in-differences estimates further provide no evidence that COVID-19 rates grew faster in counties that drew relatively larger shares of residents to the event. We conclude that offsetting risk-related behavioral responses to the rally — including voluntary closures of restaurants and bars in downtown Tulsa, increases in stay-at-home behavior, displacement of usual activities of weekend inflows, and smaller-than-expected crowd attendance — may be important mechanisms.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I1
papers.zh_title: 风险规避、抵消性社区效应与COVID-19：来自室内政治集会的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国疾病控制与预防中心（CDC）认为，没有社交距离的大型室内聚集是COVID-19传播的“最高风险”活动。2020年6月20日，唐纳德·J·特朗普总统在美国冠状病毒爆发后，在室内举行的俄克拉荷马银行（BOK）体育馆举行了首次大规模竞选集会。在活动后的几周内，众多知名全国性新闻媒体报道称，根据时间序列数据，特朗普集会“极有可能”是塔尔萨县冠状病毒激增的原因。本研究首次严格探讨了这一事件对社交距离和COVID-19传播的影响。首先，利用SafeGraph Inc的数据，我们表明，虽然前往举办特朗普活动的普查区块组的非居民访问量增长了约25%，但塔尔萨县的净居家行为并未下降，这反映了重要的抵消性行为效应。然后，利用CDC的COVID-19病例和死亡数据以及合成控制设计，我们发现几乎没有证据表明，在我们观察到的治疗后五周内，塔尔萨县、其周边县或俄克拉荷马州的COVID-19增长速度比各自的估计反事实更快。双重差分估计进一步没有提供证据表明，吸引相对较大比例居民参加活动的县的COVID-19发病率增长更快。我们得出结论，对集会的抵消性风险相关行为反应——包括塔尔萨市中心餐馆和酒吧的自愿关闭、居家行为的增加、周末流入人群的日常活动转移以及低于预期的集会出席人数——可能是重要的机制。

papers.title: Fiscal and Monetary Stabilization Policy at the Zero Lower Bound: Consequences of Limited Foresight
papers.authors: Michael Woodford, Yinxi Xie
papers.abstract: This paper reconsiders the degree to which macroeconomic stabilization is possible when the zero lower bound is a relevant constraint on the effectiveness of conventional monetary policy, under an assumption of bounded rationality. In particular, we reconsider the potential role of countercyclical fiscal transfers as a tool of stabilization policy. Because Ricardian Equivalence no longer holds when planning horizons are finite (even when relatively long), we find that fiscal transfers can be a powerful tool to reduce the contractionary impact of an increased financial wedge during a crisis, and can even make possible complete stabilization of both aggregate output and inflation under certain circumstances, despite the binding lower bound on interest rates. However, the power of such policies depends on the degree of monetary policy accommodation. We also show that a higher level of welfare is generally possible if both monetary and fiscal authorities commit themselves to history-dependent policies in the period after the financial disturbance that causes the lower bound to bind has dissipated. Hence forward guidance continues to play an important role in increasing the effectiveness of stabilization policy.
papers.zh_title: 零下限时的财政与货币稳定政策：有限前瞻的后果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在有限理性假设下，重新考虑了当零下限成为常规货币政策有效性的相关约束时，宏观经济稳定可能达到的程度。特别是，我们重新考虑了反周期财政转移作为稳定政策工具的潜在作用。由于当规划期限有限（即使相对较长）时，李嘉图等价不再成立，我们发现财政转移可以成为减少危机期间金融摩擦加剧带来的收缩性影响的有力工具，甚至在某些情况下，尽管利率受到下限约束，仍能实现总产出和通胀的完全稳定。然而，此类政策的效力取决于货币政策的宽松程度。我们还表明，如果货币和财政当局在导致下限约束的金融扰动消退后的时期内，承诺实施依赖于历史的政策，通常可以实现更高的福利水平。因此，前瞻指引在提高稳定政策有效性方面继续发挥着重要作用。

papers.title: Competitive Effects of Federal and State Opioid Restrictions: Evidence from the Controlled Substance Laws
papers.authors: Sumedha Gupta, Thuy D. Nguyen, Patricia R. Freeman, Kosali I. Simon
papers.abstract: A large concern in U.S. opioid policy is whether supply side controls are effective at reducing the quantity of opioids prescribed, without harmful substitution. An unstudied way that policy targeted a major opioid through the federal Controlled Substance Act (CSA) was the August 2014 scheduling of tramadol products, the second most popular opioid medication at the time. Twelve states implemented the identical policy prior to federal action, providing a unique opportunity to compare effectiveness of the same opioid policy at state versus federal levels. This is important because many recent opioid policy interventions have only taken the form of state actions, while federal policy has largely been advisory. Seven weeks after tramadol's scheduling, the leading opioid form on the market, hydrocodone combination products, was move to the more restricted level II (no refills allowed) from level III in the CSA, allowing us to test a new question in the opioid literature: competitive spillover effects from regulations targeting one drug. Using weekly prescription data spanning 2007-2017, this study finds that tightening prescribing restrictions on one opioid leads to decreases in its use, but also causes some increases in prescriptions of close competitors, leading to no statistically detectable short-run reduction in total opioid prescriptions.
papers.zh_title: 联邦与州阿片类药物限制的竞争效应：来自受控物质法的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国阿片类药物政策的一个重大关切是，供给侧控制措施能否有效减少处方阿片类药物的数量，同时避免有害的替代。联邦《受控物质法》（CSA）针对一种主要阿片类药物采取的一项未经研究的方式是，2014年8月将曲马多产品（当时第二受欢迎的阿片类药物）列入管制。有12个州在联邦行动之前实施了相同的政策，这提供了一个独特的机会来比较同一阿片类药物政策在州级与联邦层面的有效性。这一点很重要，因为许多最近的阿片类药物政策干预仅采取了州级行动的形式，而联邦政策主要是咨询性的。在曲马多被列入管制七周后，市场上主要的阿片类药物形式——氢可酮复方产品——从CSA的III级被移至更严格的II级（不允许续方），这使我们能够检验阿片类药物文献中的一个新问题：针对一种药物的监管产生的竞争性溢出效应。本研究利用2007-2017年的每周处方数据发现，收紧对一种阿片类药物的处方限制会导致其使用量下降，但也会导致一些密切竞争药物的处方增加，从而导致在短期内总阿片类药物处方量没有统计上可检测到的减少。

papers.title: How Much does COVID-19 Increase with Mobility? Evidence from New York and Four Other U.S. Cities
papers.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, Caitlin Gorback, Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: How effective are restrictions on mobility in limiting COVID-19 spread? Using zip code data across five U.S. cities, we estimate that total cases per capita decrease by 20% for every ten percentage point fall in mobility. Addressing endogeneity concerns, we instrument for travel by residential teleworkable and essential shares and find a 27% decline in cases per capita. Using panel data for NYC with week and zip code fixed effects, we estimate a decline of 17%. We find substantial spatial and temporal heterogeneity; east coast cities have stronger effects, with the largest for NYC in the pandemic’s early stages.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, ITI, LS, PE；JEL：H12, I12, J17, R41
papers.zh_title: 流动性增加在多大程度上加剧了COVID-19？来自纽约及其他四个美国城市的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 限制流动性在遏制COVID-19传播方面效果如何？利用美国五个城市的邮政编码数据，我们估计，流动性每下降十个百分点，人均总病例数减少20%。为解决内生性问题，我们使用住宅可远程办公比例和必需行业份额作为出行工具变量，发现人均病例数下降27%。利用纽约市的周度和邮政编码固定效应面板数据，我们估计下降幅度为17%。我们发现显著的时空异质性；东海岸城市效果更强，其中纽约市在疫情早期阶段效果最大。

papers.title: Social Security Reforms and the Changing Retirement Behavior in Germany
papers.authors: Axel H. Börsch-Supan, Johannes Rausch, Nicolas Goll
papers.abstract: As much like other industrialized countries, in recent decades the employment rate in Germany for those aged 55 to 69 had been declining first to considerably rise again afterwards.
