papers.abstract: The National Park Service and other agencies have argued that our recreation lands face a crisis of deferred maintenance. This paper evaluates two proposals for funding public lands, increasing gate fees and taxing recreational gear. It analyzes the joint welfare effects of such taxes and the services supported by the revenue. It shows that when the taxed goods and the public service are "weak complements," there is a simple sufficient statistic determining whether the joint effect increases welfare both for consumers and sellers: Namely, the demand for the taxed good increases. The paper illustrates these results with data for recreational services.
papers.zh_title: 为户外休闲融资
papers.zh_abstract: 国家公园管理局及其他机构认为，我们的休闲用地面临延期维护的危机。本文评估了两种公共土地融资方案：提高门票费和征收休闲装备税。它分析了此类税收与税收收入所支持的服务的联合福利效应。研究表明，当被征税商品与公共服务是“弱互补品”时，存在一个简单的充分统计量，用于判断联合效应是否同时提高消费者和卖家的福利：即被征税商品的需求增加。本文利用休闲服务数据说明了这些结果。

papers.title: Strategic Interactions in U.S. Monetary and Fiscal Policies
papers.authors: Xiaoshan Chen, Eric M. Leeper, Campbell B. Leith
papers.abstract: We estimate a model in which fiscal and monetary policy behavior arise from the optimizing behavior of distinct policy authorities, with potentially different welfare functions. Optimal time-consistent policy behavior fits U.S. time series at least as well as rules-based behavior. American policies often do not conform to the conventional mix of conservative monetary policy and debt-stabilizing fiscal policy. Even after the Volcker disinflation, policies did not achieve that conventional mix, as fiscal policy did not act to stabilize debt until the mid 1990s. A credible conservative central bank that follows a time-consistent fiscal policy leader would come close to mimicking the cooperative Ramsey policy. Had that strategic policy mix been in place, American might have avoided the Great Inflation. Enhancing cooperation between policy makers without an ability to commit may be detrimental to welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：E31, E32, E52, E61, E62, E63
papers.zh_title: 美国货币与财政政策中的战略互动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个模型，其中财政和货币政策行为源于不同政策当局的优化行为，且这些当局可能具有不同的福利函数。最优时间一致的政策行为与美国时间序列数据的拟合程度至少与基于规则的行为相当。美国的政策常常不符合传统的保守货币政策与债务稳定财政政策的组合。即使在沃尔克反通胀之后，政策也未实现这一传统组合，因为财政政策直到1990年代中期才开始稳定债务。一个遵循时间一致财政政策领导者的可信保守中央银行，将接近模仿合作的拉姆齐政策。如果当时采用了这种战略政策组合，美国或许可以避免大通胀。在没有承诺能力的情况下加强政策制定者之间的合作可能对福利有害。

papers.title: The Impact of State Tobacco Control Spending on High School Student Vaping
papers.authors: John A. Tauras, Megan C. Diaz, Barbara Schillo, Donna Vallone
papers.abstract: The rapid rise in e-cigarette use rates among high school students in the United States is a significant source of public policy concern for many states. This paper is the first study to examine the impact of state tobacco control spending on the demand for vaping products by high school students. The findings from this study provide strong evidence that funding for state tobacco control programs is associated with reduced vaping among youth and young adults in the US. These findings could help to inform decision making about how states should allocate scarce public resources.
papers.zh_title: 州烟草控制支出对高中生电子烟使用的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国高中生电子烟使用率的迅速上升是许多州公共政策关注的重要来源。本文是首项研究州烟草控制支出对高中生电子烟产品需求影响的研究。本研究的结果提供了强有力的证据，表明州烟草控制项目的资金与美国青少年和年轻人电子烟使用减少相关。这些发现有助于为各州如何分配稀缺公共资源的决策提供信息。

papers.title: How Do Restrictions on High-Skilled Immigration Affect Offshoring? Evidence from the H-1B Program
papers.authors: Britta Glennon
papers.abstract: Highly-skilled workers are not only a crucial and relatively scarce inputs into firms’ productive and innovative processes, but are also a critical resource determining competitive advantage. An increasingly high proportion of these workers in the US were born abroad and permitted to work on skilled worker visas. How do multinational firms respond when artificial constraints, namely policies restricting skilled immigration, are placed on their ability to hire scarce human capital? This paper combines visa microdata and comprehensive data on US multinational firm activity to demonstrate that firms respond to restrictions on H-1B immigration by increasing foreign affiliate employment at the intensive and extensive margins, particularly in China, India, and Canada. The most impacted jobs were R&D-intensive ones, but there is some evidence that non-R&D employment was also affected. The paper highlights a means by which firms can circumvent constraining policies and mitigate country-level risk, but it also suggests that, for the average MNC, this means is imperfect; for every visa rejection, they hire 0.4 employees abroad. The most globalized MNCs are the most likely to respond to these restrictions by offshoring, highlighting that firm capabilities—in the form of prior internationalization—shape the decision and ability to offshore in response to skilled immigration restrictions; indeed, these firms hire 0.9 employees abroad for every visa rejection. More broadly, the paper provides evidence of a push factor for internationalizing knowledge activity: artificial constraints on resources result in firms circumventing restrictive policies in ways that may not be anticipated by policy makers.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F16, F22, F23, J61, O3
papers.zh_title: 高技能移民限制如何影响离岸外包？来自H-1B项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 高技能工人不仅是企业生产和创新过程中关键且相对稀缺的投入，也是决定竞争优势的关键资源。在美国，这些工人中在国外出生并持技能工人签证工作的比例越来越高。当人为限制（即限制技能移民的政策）被施加于企业雇佣稀缺人力资本的能力时，跨国公司会如何应对？本文结合签证微观数据和美国跨国公司活动的综合数据，表明企业通过增加外国附属公司的雇佣（在集约边际和广延边际上）来应对H-1B移民限制，尤其是在中国、印度和加拿大。受影响最大的岗位是研发密集型岗位，但也有证据表明非研发就业也受到了影响。本文强调了一种企业规避限制性政策和减轻国家层面风险的方式，但也表明，对于普通跨国公司而言，这种方式并不完美；每拒绝一份签证，他们就在国外雇佣0.4名员工。最全球化的跨国公司最有可能通过离岸外包来应对这些限制，这突显了企业能力——以先前国际化形式——塑造了应对技能移民限制而进行离岸外包的决策和能力；事实上，这些公司每拒绝一份签证，就在国外雇佣0.9名员工。更广泛地说，本文提供了知识活动国际化的推动因素证据：对资源的人为限制导致企业以政策制定者可能未预料到的方式规避限制性政策。

papers.title: Kicking the Can Down the Road: Government Interventions in the European Banking Sector
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Lea Borchert, Maximilian Jager, Sascha Steffen
papers.abstract: We analyze the determinants and the long-run consequences of government interventions in the eurozone banking sector during the 2008/09 financial crisis. Using a novel and comprehensive dataset, we document that fiscally constrained governments “kicked the can down the road” by providing banks with guarantees instead of full-fledged recapitalizations. We adopt an econometric approach that addresses the endogeneity associated with governmental bailout decisions in identifying their consequences. We find that forbearance caused undercapitalized banks to shift their assets from loans to risky sovereign debt and engage in zombie lending, resulting in weaker credit supply, elevated risk in the banking sector, and, eventually, greater reliance on liquidity support from the European Central Bank.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ME, POL；JEL：E44, G21, G28, G32, G34
papers.zh_title: 踢皮球：欧洲银行业部门的政府干预
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了2008/09年金融危机期间欧元区银行业部门政府干预的决定因素和长期后果。利用一个新颖且全面的数据集，我们记录了财政受限的政府通过向银行提供担保而非全面资本重组来“踢皮球”。我们采用了一种计量经济学方法，在识别政府救助决策的后果时处理了相关的内生性问题。我们发现，宽容政策导致资本不足的银行将其资产从贷款转向风险主权债务，并从事僵尸贷款，从而导致信贷供给减弱、银行业部门风险上升，并最终更加依赖欧洲中央银行的流动性支持。

papers.title: Dynamic Oligopoly and Price Stickiness
papers.authors: Olivier Wang, Iván Werning
papers.abstract: How does market concentration affect the potency of monetary policy? The ubiquitous monopolistic-competition framework is silent on this issue. To tackle this question we build a model with heterogeneous oligopolistic sectors. In each sector, a finite number of firms play a Bertrand dynamic game with staggered price rigidity. Following an extensive Industrial Organization literature, we focus on Markov equilibria within each sector. Aggregating up, we study monetary shocks and provide a closed-form formula for the response of aggregate output, highlighting three measurable sufficient statistics: demand elasticities, market concentration, and markups. We calibrate our model to the empirical evidence on pass-through, and find that higher market concentration significantly amplifies the real effects of monetary policy. To separate the strategic effects of oligopoly from the effects this has on residual demand, we compare our model to one with monopolistic firms after modifying consumer preferences to ensure firms face comparable residual demands. Finally, the Phillips curve for our model displays inflation persistence and endogenous cost-push shocks.
papers.zh_title: 动态寡头垄断与价格粘性
papers.zh_abstract: 市场集中度如何影响货币政策的效力？普遍存在的垄断竞争框架对此问题保持沉默。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了一个包含异质性寡头垄断部门的模型。在每个部门中，有限数量的企业在交错价格刚性下进行伯特兰动态博弈。遵循产业组织领域的广泛文献，我们关注每个部门内的马尔可夫均衡。通过加总，我们研究货币冲击，并给出了总产出响应的闭式公式，突出了三个可测的充分统计量：需求弹性、市场集中度和加成率。我们将模型校准到关于传导的经验证据，发现更高的市场集中度显著放大了货币政策的实际效应。为了分离寡头垄断的战略效应及其对剩余需求的影响，我们将我们的模型与一个垄断企业模型进行比较，后者通过修改消费者偏好确保企业面临可比的剩余需求。最后，我们模型的菲利普斯曲线显示出通胀持续性和内生成本推动冲击。

papers.title: Non est Disputandum de Generalizability? A Glimpse into The External Validity Trial
papers.authors: John A. List
papers.abstract: While empirical economics has made important strides over the past half century, there is a recent attack that threatens the foundations of the empirical approach in economics: external validity. Certain dogmatic arguments are not new, yet in some circles the generalizability question is beyond dispute, rendering empirical work as a passive enterprise based on frivolity. Such arguments serve to caution even the staunchest empirical advocates from even starting an empirical inquiry in a novel setting. In its simplest form, questions of external validity revolve around whether the results of the received study can be generalized to different people, situations, stimuli, and time periods. This study clarifies and places the external validity crisis into perspective by taking a unique glimpse into the grandest of trials: The External Validity Trial. A key outcome of the proceedings is an Author Onus Probandi, which outlines four key areas that every study should report to address external validity. Such an evaluative approach properly rewards empirical advances and justly recognizes inherent empirical limitations.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, LE, PE；JEL：C01, C9, C91, C93, D9
papers.zh_title: 关于可推广性是否存在争议？外部有效性试验一瞥
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管实证经济学在过去半个世纪取得了重要进展，但近期出现了一种威胁经济学实证方法基础的攻击：外部有效性。某些教条式论点并非新鲜事物，但在某些圈子里，可推广性问题已无可争议，使得实证工作沦为基于轻浮的被动事业。这类论点甚至告诫最坚定的实证倡导者，不要在新环境中开始实证探究。简单来说，外部有效性问题围绕已接受研究的结果能否推广到不同人群、情境、刺激和时间段。本研究通过独特视角审视最宏大的试验——外部有效性试验，澄清并正确看待外部有效性危机。程序的一个关键结果是“作者举证责任”，它概述了每项研究应报告的四个关键领域，以解决外部有效性。这种评估方法恰当地奖励实证进展，并公正地承认固有的实证局限性。

papers.title: Relabeling, Retirement and Regret
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Ohto Kanninen, Terhi Ravaska
papers.abstract: Focal retirement ages are a central feature of Social Security programs around the world, and provide a potentially powerful tool for policy makers who are interested in reforming retirement systems to address the growing funding shortfalls. But these tools often come hand in hand with significant changes in the financial structure of Social Security that can have independent, and potentially deleterious, impacts on retirees. In this paper, we use a major reformulation of the retirement system in Finland, featuring a relabeling of retirement ages with modest and continuous changes in financial incentives allows us to separately estimate the impact of relabeling from financial incentives in driving retirement decisions. We find that relabeling is particularly powerful as a determinant of date of retirement. Both graphical evidence and estimated hazard models reveal an enormous change in retirement when individuals face a newly defined “normal retirement” age. We also present a new approach to assessing the welfare implications of induced earlier retirement: looking at the impact on return to work. We show that the marginal workers induced to retire by relabeling are much more likely to return to work over the next three years than is the typical worker. This suggests that there is a marginal increase in regret among those who respond to this change in retirement ages.
papers.zh_title: 重新标签、退休与后悔
papers.zh_abstract: 焦点退休年龄是全球社会保障项目的核心特征，为有意改革退休制度以应对日益增长的资金缺口的政策制定者提供了潜在有力工具。但这些工具往往伴随着社会保障财务结构的重大变化，这些变化可能对退休人员产生独立且潜在有害的影响。本文利用芬兰退休制度的重大改革，该改革以退休年龄的重新标签为特征，并伴有适度且连续的财务激励变化，使我们能够将重新标签的影响与财务激励对退休决策的影响分开估计。我们发现，重新标签作为退休日期的决定因素特别强大。图形证据和估计的风险模型都显示，当个人面临新定义的“正常退休”年龄时，退休行为发生了巨大变化。我们还提出了一种评估诱导提前退休福利影响的新方法：考察对重返工作的影响。我们表明，因重新标签而诱导退休的边际工人，在接下来三年内重返工作的可能性远高于典型工人。这表明，那些响应退休年龄变化的人中，后悔情绪有边际增加。

papers.title: Concentration Screens for Horizontal Mergers
papers.authors: Volker Nocke, Michael D. Whinston
papers.abstract: Concentration-based screens for horizontal mergers, such as those employed in the US DOJ and FTC Horizontal Merger Guidelines, play a central role in merger analysis. However, the basis for these screens, in both form and level, remains unclear. We show that there is both a theoretical and an empirical basis for focusing solely on the change in the Herfindahl index, and ignoring its level, in screening mergers for whether their unilateral effects will harm consumers. We also argue, again both theoretically and empirically, that the levels at which the presumptions currently are set may allow mergers to proceed that cause consumer harm.
papers.zh_title: 横向合并的集中度筛选
papers.zh_abstract: 基于集中度的横向合并筛选，例如美国司法部和联邦贸易委员会《横向合并指南》中采用的筛选，在合并分析中发挥着核心作用。然而，这些筛选在形式和水平上的依据仍不明确。我们表明，在筛选合并的单边效应是否会损害消费者时，仅关注赫芬达尔指数的变化而忽略其水平，既有理论基础也有实证基础。我们还从理论和实证两方面论证，当前设定推定水平可能允许那些会造成消费者损害的合并继续进行。

papers.title: Adaptive Control of COVID-19 Outbreaks in India: Local, Gradual, and Trigger-based Exit Paths from Lockdown
papers.authors: Anup Malani, Satej Soman, Sam Asher, Paul Novosad, Clement Imbert, Vaidehi Tandel, Anish Agarwal, Abdullah Alomar, Arnab Sarker, Devavrat Shah, Dennis Shen, Jonathan Gruber, Stuti Sachdeva, David Kaiser, Luis M.A. Bettencourt
papers.abstract: Managing the outbreak of COVID-19 in India constitutes an unprecedented health emergency in one of the largest and most diverse nations in the world. On May 4, 2020, India started the process of releasing its population from a national lockdown during which extreme social distancing was implemented. We describe and simulate an adaptive control approach to exit this situation, while maintaining the epidemic under control. Adaptive control is a flexible counter-cyclical policy approach, whereby different areas release from lockdown in potentially different gradual ways, dependent on the local progression of the dis- ease. Because of these features, adaptive control requires the ability to decrease or increase social distancing in response to observed and projected dynamics of the disease outbreak. We show via simulation of a stochastic Susceptible-Infected-Recovered (SIR) model and of a synthetic intervention (SI) model that adaptive control performs at least as well as immediate and full release from lockdown starting May 4 and as full release from lockdown after a month (i.e., after May 31). The key insight is that adaptive response provides the option to increase or decrease socioeconomic activity depending on how it affects disease progression and this freedom allows it to do at least as well as most other policy alternatives. We also discuss the central challenge to any nuanced release policy, including adaptive control, specifically learning how specific policies translate into changes in contact rates and thus COVID-19's reproductive rate in real time.
papers.zh_title: 印度COVID-19疫情的适应性控制：从封锁中逐步、局部且基于触发条件的退出路径
papers.zh_abstract: 管理印度COVID-19疫情构成了这个全球最大、最多元化国家之一前所未有的卫生紧急事件。2020年5月4日，印度开始解除全国封锁，此前实施了极端社交距离措施。我们描述并模拟了一种适应性控制方法来退出这种状态，同时保持疫情受控。适应性控制是一种灵活的反周期政策方法，不同地区根据当地疾病进展，以可能不同的渐进方式解除封锁。由于这些特点，适应性控制需要根据观察和预测的疾病爆发动态，具备减少或增加社交距离的能力。我们通过随机易感-感染-恢复模型和合成干预模型的模拟表明，适应性控制的表现至少与从5月4日开始立即全面解除封锁以及一个月后（即5月31日后）全面解除封锁一样好。关键见解是，适应性响应提供了根据疾病进展对经济活动的影响来增加或减少社会经济活动的选项，这种自由使其表现至少与大多数其他政策替代方案相当。我们还讨论了任何精细解除封锁政策（包括适应性控制）面临的核心挑战，特别是学习特定政策如何实时转化为接触率变化，从而影响COVID-19的再生率。

papers.title: Assessing the Age Specificity of Infection Fatality Rates for COVID-19: Systematic Review, Meta-analysis, & Public Policy Implications
papers.authors: Andrew T. Levin, William P. Hanage, Nana Owusu-Boaitey, Kensington B. Cochran, Seamus P. Walsh, Gideon Meyerowitz-Katz
papers.abstract: To assess age-specific infection fatality rates (IFRs) for COVID-19, we have conducted a systematic review of seroprevalence studies as well as countries with comprehensive tracing programs. Age-specific IFRs were computed using the prevalence data in conjunction with reported fatalities four weeks after the midpoint date of each study, reflecting typical lags in fatalities and reporting. Using metaregression procedures, we find a highly significant log-linear relationship between age and IFR for COVID-19. The estimated age-specific IFRs are very low for children and younger adults but increase progressively to 0.4% at age 55, 1.3% at age 65, 4.2% at age 75, and 14% at age 85. About 90% of the geographical variation in population IFR is explained by differences in age composition of the population and age-specific prevalence. These results indicate that COVID-19 is hazardous not only for the elderly but also for middle-aged adults. Moreover, the population IFR for COVID-19 should not be viewed as a fixed parameter but as intrinsically linked to the age-specific pattern of infections. Consequently, public health measures to protect vulnerable age groups could substantially decrease total deaths.
papers.zh_title: 评估COVID-19感染致死率的年龄特异性：系统综述、荟萃分析与公共政策启示
papers.zh_abstract: 为评估COVID-19的年龄特异性感染致死率，我们对血清阳性率研究以及拥有全面追踪计划的国家进行了系统综述。利用患病率数据，并结合每项研究中点日期四周后报告的死亡人数（考虑到死亡和报告中的典型滞后），计算了年龄特异性感染致死率。使用荟萃回归程序，我们发现年龄与COVID-19感染致死率之间存在高度显著的对数线性关系。估计的年龄特异性感染致死率对儿童和年轻成年人非常低，但逐渐增加：55岁时为0.4%，65岁时为1.3%，75岁时为4.2%，85岁时为14%。约90%的人口感染致死率地理差异可由人口年龄构成和年龄特异性患病率的差异解释。这些结果表明，COVID-19不仅对老年人，而且对中年成年人也构成危险。此外，COVID-19的人口感染致死率不应被视为一个固定参数，而是与感染的年龄特异性模式内在相关。因此，保护脆弱年龄组的公共卫生措施可以大幅减少总死亡人数。

papers.title: Quick Response Economic Stimulus: The Effect of Small-Value Digital Coupons on Spending
papers.authors: Jianwei Xing, Eric Zou, Zhentao Yin, Yong Wang, Zhenhua Li
papers.abstract: We study a new consumption stimulus model that leverages mobile payment platforms to dispense massive amounts of small-value, use-it-this-week-or-lose-it digital coupons. We evaluate the effects of one such program in a large Chinese city using novel data of mobile platform transactions of 1 million program participants. Exploiting participants’ rush to the first-come, first-served digital portal, we compare spending among those who won coupons to those who lost because of minor differences in the timing of their arrival at the portal. We find that coupons generate an immediate increase in weekly consumption among winners by $3 additional out-of-pocket spending for every $1 in government subsidy. Coupon-winning consumers practice intertemporal substitution by moving up purchases that would have been made months in the future. Analysis of business customer flows suggests that coupons distort consumption toward more expensive options, leading the program to disproportionately favor big firms that sell pricier goods and services. Relaxing coupons’ minimum spending requirements would alleviate such distributional concern without sacrificing consumer welfare. We conclude that the coupon model can be a useful addition to policy makers’ stimulus toolbox.
papers.zh_title: 快速响应经济刺激：小额数字优惠券对消费的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种新的消费刺激模式，该模式利用移动支付平台发放大量小额、本周有效、过期作废的数字优惠券。我们利用一个中国大城市此类项目的100万参与者的移动平台交易新数据，评估了其效果。利用参与者争先恐后涌向先到先得的数字门户这一情况，我们比较了那些因到达门户时间细微差异而赢得优惠券和失去优惠券的人之间的消费。我们发现，优惠券使赢家每周消费立即增加，每1元政府补贴带来3元额外自付支出。赢得优惠券的消费者通过将原本数月后才会进行的购买提前，实现了跨期替代。对商业客户流的分析表明，优惠券将消费扭曲至更昂贵的选择，导致该项目不成比例地有利于销售高价商品和服务的大公司。放宽优惠券的最低消费要求可以缓解这种分配担忧，同时不牺牲消费者福利。我们得出结论，优惠券模式可以成为政策制定者刺激工具箱中的有用补充。

papers.title: Bargaining over Taxes and Entitlements
papers.authors: Marina Azzimonti, Gabriel P. Mihalache, Laura Karpuska
papers.abstract: We analyze the welfare implications of introducing budget rules, composed by a tax code and an entitlement program, in a dynamic infinite horizon political-economy model featuring disagreement over the distribution of resources. Poor agents want expansive entitlement programs, whereas rich agents prefer a small government that imposes low taxes. Under budget rules, changes in the tax code and the generosity of entitlement programs require bipartisan support. We model these rules following the literature on legislative bargaining with endogenous status quo, and find that entitlement programs induce under-provision of public goods but also a smoother path for private consumption. Whether budget rules are welfare-improving depends critically on political turnover. When proposers alternate frequently, such rules benefit society because they reduce the volatility of private consumption. Outcomes under rules, however, can be worse than under discretion if the political power of a proposer is persistent enough. Even though the political equilibrium may be more efficient in such case, it can also be significantly less equitable, exacerbating the initial degree of income inequality. We also consider an institutional reform, where parties are allowed to vote on both, the introduction and generosity of the entitlement program and the tax code. Because such a reform must be Pareto improving (by design), policymakers may prefer to stay under discretion.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, PE, POL；JEL：C7, D6, E6, E62, H53
papers.zh_title: 税收与福利的谈判
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个动态无限期界政治经济学模型中分析了引入预算规则（由税法和福利计划组成）的福利含义，该模型以资源分配分歧为特征。贫困代理人希望扩大福利计划，而富裕代理人则偏好征收低税的小政府。在预算规则下，税法的变更和福利计划的慷慨程度需要两党支持。我们遵循关于内生现状的立法谈判文献来建模这些规则，发现福利计划导致公共物品供给不足，但也使私人消费路径更平滑。预算规则是否能改善福利关键取决于政治更替。当提议者频繁轮换时，此类规则对社会有利，因为它们减少了私人消费的波动性。然而，如果提议者的政治权力足够持久，规则下的结果可能比自由裁量权下的结果更差。尽管在这种情况下政治均衡可能更有效率，但也可能显著更不公平，加剧了初始的收入不平等程度。我们还考虑了一项制度改革，允许各方对福利计划的引入和慷慨程度以及税法进行投票。由于这种改革（按设计）必须是帕累托改进的，政策制定者可能更倾向于保持自由裁量权。

papers.title: RCTs to Scale: Comprehensive Evidence from Two Nudge Units
papers.authors: Stefano DellaVigna, Elizabeth Linos
papers.abstract: Nudge interventions have quickly expanded from academic studies to larger implementation in so-called Nudge Units in governments. This provides an opportunity to compare interventions in research studies, versus at scale. We assemble a unique data set of 126 RCTs covering over 23 million individuals, including all trials run by two of the largest Nudge Units in the United States. We compare these trials to a sample of nudge trials published in academic journals from two recent meta-analyses. In papers published in academic journals, the average impact of a nudge is very large – an 8.7 percentage point take-up effect, a 33.5% increase over the average control. In the Nudge Unit trials, the average impact is still sizable and highly statistically significant, but smaller at 1.4 percentage points, an 8.1% increase. We consider five potential channels for this gap: statistical power, selective publication, academic involvement, differences in trial features and in nudge features. Publication bias in the academic journals, exacerbated by low statistical power, can account for the full difference in effect sizes. Academic involvement does not account for the difference. Different features of the nudges, such as in-person versus letter-based communication, likely reflecting institutional constraints, can partially explain the different effect sizes. We conjecture that larger sample sizes and institutional constraints, which play an important role in our setting, are relevant in other at-scale implementations. Finally, we compare these results to the predictions of academics and practitioners. Most forecasters overestimate the impact for the Nudge Unit interventions, though nudge practitioners are almost perfectly calibrated.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D9, H53, I38
papers.zh_title: 大规模随机对照试验：来自两个助推单位的全面证据
papers.zh_abstract: 助推干预已迅速从学术研究扩展到政府所谓的“助推单位”中的更大规模实施。这提供了一个比较研究性干预与大规模实施效果的机会。我们整理了一个独特的126项随机对照试验数据集，覆盖超过2300万人，包括美国两个最大助推单位进行的所有试验。我们将这些试验与来自两项近期荟萃分析的学术期刊发表的助推试验样本进行比较。在学术期刊发表的论文中，助推的平均效果非常大——8.7个百分点的采纳效应，比对照组平均增加33.5%。在助推单位试验中，平均效果仍然可观且高度统计显著，但较小，为1.4个百分点，增加8.1%。我们考虑了造成这一差距的五个潜在渠道：统计功效、选择性发表、学术参与、试验特征差异和助推特征差异。学术期刊中的发表偏倚，加上低统计功效，可以完全解释效应量的差异。学术参与不能解释这一差异。助推的不同特征，例如面对面与基于信件的沟通，可能反映了制度约束，可以部分解释不同的效应量。我们推测，在我们的环境中发挥重要作用的更大样本量和制度约束，在其他大规模实施中也具有相关性。最后，我们将这些结果与学者和实践者的预测进行比较。大多数预测者高估了助推单位干预的影响，尽管助推实践者的预测几乎完美校准。

papers.title: Does Joining the S&P 500 Index Hurt Firms?
papers.authors: Benjamin Bennett, René M. Stulz, Zexi Wang
papers.abstract: We investigate the impact on firms of joining the S&P 500 index from 1997 to 2017. We find that the positive announcement effect on the stock price of index inclusion has disappeared and the long-run impact of index inclusion has become negative. Inclusion worsens stock price informativeness and some aspects of governance. Compensation, investment, and financial policies change with index inclusion. For instance, payout policies of firms joining the index become more similar to the policies of their index peers. ROA falls following inclusion. There is no evidence of an impact of inclusion on competition.
papers.meta: Programs：CF；JEL：G11, G14, G23, G31, G32, G35
papers.zh_title: 加入标普500指数会损害公司吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1997年至2017年加入标普500指数对公司的影响。我们发现，指数纳入对股价的正面公告效应已经消失，而指数纳入的长期影响已变为负面。纳入降低了股价信息含量和治理的某些方面。薪酬、投资和财务政策随指数纳入而改变。例如，加入指数公司的派息政策变得与其指数同行更加相似。纳入后资产回报率下降。没有证据表明纳入对竞争有影响。

papers.title: Racial and Ethnic Disparities in COVID-19: Evidence from Six Large Cities
papers.authors: Joseph A. Benitez, Charles J. Courtemanche, Aaron Yelowitz
papers.abstract: As of June 2020, the coronavirus pandemic has led to more than 2.3 million confirmed infections and 121 thousand fatalities in the United States, with starkly different incidence by race and ethnicity. Our study examines racial and ethnic disparities in confirmed COVID-19 cases across six diverse cities – Atlanta, Baltimore, Chicago, New York City, San Diego, and St. Louis – at the ZIP code level (covering 436 “neighborhoods” with a population of 17.7 million). Our analysis links these outcomes to six separate data sources to control for demographics; housing; socioeconomic status; occupation; transportation modes; health care access; long-run opportunity, as measured by income mobility and incarceration rates; human mobility; and underlying population health. We find that the proportions of black and Hispanic residents in a ZIP code are both positively and statistically significantly associated with COVID-19 cases per capita. The magnitudes are sizeable for both black and Hispanic, but even larger for Hispanic. Although some of these disparities can be explained by differences in long-run opportunity, human mobility, and demographics, most of the disparities remain unexplained even after including an extensive list of covariates related to possible mechanisms. For two cities – Chicago and New York – we also examine COVID-19 fatalities, finding that differences in confirmed COVID-19 cases explain the majority of the observed disparities in fatalities. In other words, the higher death toll of COVID-19 in predominantly black and Hispanic communities mostly reflects higher case rates, rather than higher fatality rates for confirmed cases.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19中的种族与民族差异：来自六大城市的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 截至2020年6月，新冠疫情已导致美国超过230万例确诊病例和12.1万例死亡，且不同种族和民族的发病率存在显著差异。本研究以邮政编码区为单位（覆盖436个“社区”，总人口1770万），考察了亚特兰大、巴尔的摩、芝加哥、纽约市、圣迭戈和圣路易斯这六个多元化城市中COVID-19确诊病例的种族与民族差异。我们的分析将这些结果与六个独立数据源相关联，以控制人口统计特征、住房状况、社会经济地位、职业、交通方式、医疗可及性、长期机会（以收入流动性和监禁率衡量）、人口流动性以及基础人口健康等因素。研究发现，邮政编码区中黑人和西班牙裔居民的比例均与人均COVID-19确诊病例数呈正向且统计上显著的相关性。黑人和西班牙裔群体的影响规模都相当大，但西班牙裔群体更大。尽管这些差异中的一部分可以通过长期机会、人口流动性和人口统计特征的差异来解释，但在纳入与可能机制相关的广泛协变量后，大部分差异仍然无法解释。对于芝加哥和纽约这两个城市，我们还考察了COVID-19死亡病例，发现确诊病例的差异解释了观察到的死亡差异的大部分。换言之，在黑人及西班牙裔占主导的社区中，COVID-19更高的死亡人数主要反映了更高的病例率，而非确诊病例更高的病死率。

papers.title: The Leveraging of Silicon Valley
papers.authors: Jesse Davis, Adair Morse, Xinxin Wang
papers.abstract: Early-stage firms utilize venture debt in one-third of financing rounds despite their general lack of cash flow and collateral. In our model, we show how venture debt aligns incentives within a firm. We derive a novel theoretical channel in which runway extension through debt increases firm value while potentially lowering closure. Consistent with the model's mechanism, we find that dilution predicts venture debt issuance. Empirically, treatment with venture debt lowers closure hazard by 1.6-4.4% and increases successful exits by 4.3-5.3%. Back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest $41B, or 9.4% of invested capital, remains productive due to venture debt.
papers.zh_title: 硅谷的杠杆化
papers.zh_abstract: 早期阶段的公司在三分之一的融资轮次中会使用风险债务，尽管它们普遍缺乏现金流和抵押品。在我们的模型中，我们展示了风险债务如何协调公司内部的激励。我们推导出一个新颖的理论渠道，即通过债务延长跑道可以增加公司价值，同时可能降低倒闭概率。与该模型的机制一致，我们发现稀释效应可以预测风险债务的发行。实证上，接受风险债务处理使倒闭风险降低1.6%至4.4%，并使成功退出的概率增加4.3%至5.3%。粗略估算表明，由于风险债务的存在，410亿美元（即投资资本的9.4%）仍保持生产力。

papers.title: Learning Epidemiology by Doing: The Empirical Implications of a Spatial-SIR Model with Behavioral Responses
papers.authors: Alberto Bisin, Andrea Moro
papers.abstract: We simulate a spatial behavioral model of the diffusion of an infection to understand the role of geographic characteristics: the number and distribution of outbreaks, population size, density, and agents’ movements. We show that several invariance properties of the SIR model concerning these variables do not hold when agents interact with neighbors in a (two dimensional) geographical space. Indeed, the spatial model’s local interactions generate matching frictions and local herd immunity effects, which play a fundamental role in the infection dynamics. We also show that geographical factors affect how behavioral responses affect the epidemics. We derive relevant implications for estimating the effects of the epidemics and policy interventions that use panel data from several geographical units.
papers.zh_title: 在实践中学习流行病学：一个包含行为反应的空间SIR模型的经验含义
papers.zh_abstract: 我们模拟了一个感染扩散的空间行为模型，以理解地理特征的作用：疫情爆发的数量和分布、人口规模、密度以及个体的移动。我们证明，当个体在（二维）地理空间中与邻居互动时，SIR模型关于这些变量的若干不变性不再成立。事实上，空间模型中的局部互动会产生匹配摩擦和局部群体免疫效应，这些在感染动态中起着根本性作用。我们还表明，地理因素会影响行为反应如何影响流行病。我们推导出对于使用多个地理单元的面板数据来估计流行病和政策干预效果的相关含义。

papers.title: Does the Commodity Super Cycle Matter?
papers.authors: Andrés Fernández, Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Martín Uribe
papers.abstract: This paper investigates empirically the role of the commodity price super cycle in explaining real activity in developed and emerging economies. The commodity price super cycle is defined as a common permanent component in real commodity prices. Estimates using quarterly and annual data from 1960 to 2018 indicate that world shocks that affect commodity prices and the world interest rate explain more than half of the variance of output growth on average across countries. However, the majority of this contribution, more than two thirds, stems from stationary world shocks. These results suggest that world disturbances that are responsible for low frequency movements in commodity prices play an important but not dominant role in driving fluctuations in aggregate activity at the country level.
papers.zh_title: 大宗商品超级周期重要吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文实证研究了大宗商品价格超级周期在解释发达经济体和新兴经济体实际经济活动中的作用。大宗商品价格超级周期被定义为实际大宗商品价格中的一个共同永久成分。使用1960年至2018年的季度和年度数据进行的估计表明，影响大宗商品价格和世界利率的世界冲击平均解释了各国产出增长方差的一半以上。然而，这一贡献的大部分（超过三分之二）源于平稳的世界冲击。这些结果表明，导致大宗商品价格低频波动的世界扰动在驱动国家层面总体经济活动波动中扮演着重要但非主导的角色。

papers.title: The Role of Assets In Place: Loss of Market Exclusivity and Investment
papers.authors: Matthew J. Higgins, Mathias J. Kronlund, Ji Min Park, Joshua Pollet
papers.abstract: We utilize a novel identification strategy to analyze the impact of assets in place on firms' decisions for future projects. We exploit the context in the pharmaceutical industry, where the loss of market exclusivity for a branded drug can be used to separate the impact of cash flows generated by a firm's current assets in place from the characteristics of its future investment opportunities. We first show that around the exclusivity losses in our sample of large drugs, the affected firms' profitability drop significantly. The timing of this profitability decrease was predetermined many years ago, and therefore, arguably independent of current investment opportunities. Nevertheless, we find that R&D spending drops by approximately 25% over two years following the loss of exclusivity. We also find that stock repurchases and cash balances decline significantly. Our findings do not support the predictions of traditional capital budgeting, but are more consistent with the pecking order theory. These results further point to a lack of long-term lifecycle management that could mitigate the effect of predictable negative shocks to cash flows.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：D92, G31, G32, G35, L65, O30
papers.zh_title: 现有资产的作用：市场独占权丧失与投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一种新颖的识别策略来分析现有资产对公司未来项目决策的影响。我们利用制药行业的背景，即品牌药市场独占权的丧失可以用来分离公司现有资产产生的现金流与其未来投资机会特征的影响。我们首先表明，在我们的大药企样本中，围绕独占权丧失事件，受影响公司的盈利能力显著下降。这种盈利能力下降的时间点是多年前预先确定的，因此可以说与当前的投资机会无关。尽管如此，我们发现，在独占权丧失后的两年内，研发支出下降了约25%。我们还发现，股票回购和现金余额显著下降。我们的发现不支持传统资本预算的预测，但更符合啄食顺序理论。这些结果进一步表明，缺乏能够减轻可预测的负面现金流冲击影响的长期生命周期管理。

papers.title: International Friends and Enemies
papers.authors: Benny Kleinman, Ernest Liu, Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: We examine whether as countries become more economically dependent on a trade partner, they realign politically towards that trade partner. We use network measures of economic exposure to foreign productivity growth derived from the class of trade models with a constant trade elasticity. We establish causality using two different sources of quasi-experimental variation: China’s emergence into the global economy and the reduction in the cost of air travel over time. In both cases, we find that increased economic friendship causes increased political friendship, and that our theory-based network measures dominate simpler measures of trading relationships between countries.
papers.zh_title: 国际朋友与敌人
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了当国家在经济上越来越依赖某个贸易伙伴时，它们是否会在政治上向该贸易伙伴靠拢。我们使用源自具有恒定贸易弹性的贸易模型类别的网络指标来衡量对外国生产率增长的经济暴露度。我们利用两种不同的准实验变异来源来建立因果关系：中国融入全球经济以及航空旅行成本随时间下降。在这两种情况下，我们发现经济友谊的增加会导致政治友谊的增加，并且我们基于理论的网络指标优于国家间贸易关系的简单衡量指标。

papers.title: The Ends of 27 Big Depressions
papers.authors: Martin Ellison, Sang Seok Lee, Kevin Hjortshøj O'Rourke
papers.abstract: How did countries recover from the Great Depression? In this paper we explore the argument that leaving the gold standard helped by boosting inflationary expectations and lowering real interest rates. We do so for a sample of 27 countries, using modern nowcasting methods and a new data set containing more than 230, 000 monthly and quarterly observations for over 1, 500 variables. In those cases where the departure from gold happened on clearly defined dates, it seems clear that inflationary expectations rose in the wake of departure. IV, diff-in-diff, and synthetic matching techniques suggest that the relationship is causal.
papers.zh_title: 27次大萧条的终结
papers.zh_abstract: 各国是如何从大萧条中复苏的？在本文中，我们探讨了这样一个论点：脱离金本位制通过提振通胀预期和降低实际利率来帮助复苏。我们针对27个国家的样本进行了研究，使用了现代即时预测方法以及一个新的数据集，该数据集包含超过1500个变量的23万多个月度及季度观测值。在那些脱离金本位制发生在明确界定日期的案例中，通胀预期似乎在脱离后明显上升。工具变量法、双重差分法和合成匹配法表明这种关系是因果性的。

papers.title: Why Do Borrowers Default on Mortgages?
papers.authors: Peter Ganong, Pascal J. Noel
papers.abstract: There are three prevailing theories of mortgage default: strategic default (driven by negative equity), cash-flow default (driven by negative life events), and double-trigger default (where both negative triggers are necessary). It has been difficult to test between these theories in part because negative life events are measured with error. We address this measurement error using a comparison group of borrowers with no strategic default motive. Our central finding is that only 6 percent of underwater defaults are caused exclusively by negative equity, an order of magnitude lower than previously thought. We then analyze the remaining defaults. We find that 70 percent are driven solely by negative life events (i.e., cash-flow defaults), while 24 percent are driven by the interaction between negative life events and negative equity (i.e., double-trigger defaults). Together, the results provide a full decomposition of the three theories underlying borrower default and suggest that negative life events play a central role.
papers.zh_title: 借款人为何拖欠抵押贷款？
papers.zh_abstract: 关于抵押贷款违约，存在三种主流理论：策略性违约（由负资产驱动）、现金流违约（由负面生活事件驱动）以及双重触发违约（两种负面触发因素均不可或缺）。检验这些理论一直很困难，部分原因在于负面生活事件的衡量存在误差。我们通过使用一组没有策略性违约动机的借款人作为对照组来解决这一测量误差问题。我们的核心发现是，仅有6%的负资产违约完全由负资产引起，这比之前认为的低了一个数量级。然后我们分析了剩余的违约。我们发现，70%的违约完全由负面生活事件驱动（即现金流违约），而24%的违约由负面生活事件与负资产的交互作用驱动（即双重触发违约）。综合来看，这些结果对借款人违约背后的三种理论进行了完整分解，并表明负面生活事件起着核心作用。

papers.title: How Do Prescription Drug Monitoring Programs Reduce Opioid Prescribing? The Role of Hassle Costs versus Information
papers.authors: Abby E. Alpert, Sarah E. Dykstra, Mireille Jacobson
papers.abstract: Past work demonstrates that mandated prescription drug monitoring programs (PDMPs) decrease opioid prescribing, but provides limited evidence on mechanisms. We analyze Kentucky’s landmark PDMP mandate to disentangle the role of information versus hassle costs. PDMP mandates are meant to affect prescribing through information provision but may also unintentionally affect prescribing through the hassle cost of required record checks. On net, we find that although information clearly affected prescribing, hassle costs explain the majority of the decline in prescribing from this program. Hassle costs, however, did not deter physicians from prescribing opioids to the patients who would benefit the most
papers.zh_title: 处方药监测计划如何减少阿片类药物处方？麻烦成本与信息的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 以往研究表明，强制性的处方药监测计划（PDMPs）减少了阿片类药物的处方，但关于其作用机制的证据有限。我们分析了肯塔基州具有里程碑意义的PDMP强制令，以厘清信息与麻烦成本各自的作用。PDMP强制令旨在通过信息提供影响处方行为，但也可能因要求进行记录核查的麻烦成本而无意中影响处方。总体而言，我们发现尽管信息确实影响了处方行为，但麻烦成本解释了该计划导致处方量下降的大部分原因。然而，麻烦成本并未阻止医生向最可能受益的患者开具阿片类药物。

papers.title: Social Protection amidst Social Upheaval: Examining the Impact of a Multi-Faceted Program for Ultra-Poor Households in Yemen
papers.authors: Lasse Brune, Dean Karlan, Sikandra Kurdi, Christopher R. Udry
papers.abstract: Social protection programs are needed more than ever during periods of social upheaval, but are also likely to be even harder to implement successfully. Furthermore, social upheaval makes measuring the impact of such policies all the more difficult. We study the impact of a multi-faceted social protection program, often referred to as a “graduation” model program, in Yemen during a period of civil unrest. We are unable to measure outcomes for four years, thus much remains unknown about what transpired in the intermediary time. After four years we find positive impacts on savings behavior and asset accumulation, albeit substantially less than the amount the household originally received.
papers.zh_title: 社会动荡中的社会保护：审视也门极端贫困家庭多层面计划的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在社会动荡时期，社会保护计划比以往任何时候都更需要，但也可能更难成功实施。此外，社会动荡使得衡量此类政策的影响更加困难。我们研究了也门在内乱期间实施的一项多层面社会保护计划（通常称为“毕业”模式计划）的影响。我们无法在四年内衡量结果，因此中间时期发生了什么仍有许多未知。四年后，我们发现对储蓄行为和资产积累产生了积极影响，尽管这些影响远低于家庭最初收到的金额。

papers.title: Using Tax Data to Better Capture Top Incomes in Official UK Income Inequality Statistics
papers.authors: Dominic Webber, Richard P. Tonkin, Martin Shine
papers.abstract: It is widely recognised that household surveys do not fully capture the incomes of the very richest individuals and households, particularly those among the so-called “top 1%”, for reasons including non-response and under-reporting. As a consequence, estimates based on survey data alone typically understate true levels of inequality.
papers.zh_title: 利用税收数据更好地捕捉英国官方收入不平等统计中的顶层收入
papers.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认识到，家庭调查未能完全捕捉最富裕个人和家庭的收入，尤其是那些所谓的“前1%”人群，原因包括无回应和低报。因此，仅基于调查数据的估计通常会低估真实的收入不平等水平。

papers.title: Age Discrimination across the Business Cycle
papers.authors: Gordon B. Dahl, Matthew M. Knepper
papers.abstract: We test whether age discrimination rises during recessions using two complementary analyses. Confidential EEOC microdata reveal that age-related firing and hiring charges rise by 3.3% and 1.6%, respectively, for each percentage point increase in a state-industry’s monthly unemployment. Though the opportunity cost of filing falls, the fraction of meritorious claims increases—a sufficient condition for rising discrimination under plausible assumptions. Second, we repurpose data from hiring correspondence studies conducted across different cities and time periods during the recovery from the Great Recession. Each percentage point increase in local unemployment reduces the callback rate for older versus younger women by 15%.
papers.zh_title: 经济周期中的年龄歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过两项互补分析来检验经济衰退期间年龄歧视是否加剧。保密的EEOC微观数据显示，州-行业月度失业率每上升一个百分点，与年龄相关的解雇和招聘指控分别增加3.3%和1.6%。尽管提出指控的机会成本下降，但有理有据的索赔比例上升——在合理假设下，这是歧视加剧的充分条件。其次，我们重新利用了经济大衰退复苏期间在不同城市和时间段进行的招聘对应研究数据。当地失业率每上升一个百分点，年长女性相对于年轻女性的回电率下降15%。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Paths of Industrialization
papers.authors: Federico Huneeus, Richard Rogerson
papers.abstract: Industrialization experiences differ substantially across countries. We use a benchmark model of structural change to shed light on the sources of this heterogeneity and, in particular, the phenomenon of premature deindustrialization. Our analysis leads to three key findings. First, benchmark models of structural change robustly generate hump-shaped patterns for the evolution of the industrial sector. Second, heterogeneous patterns of catch-up in sectoral productivities across countries can generate variation in industrialization experiences similar to those found in the data, including premature deindustrialization. Third, differences in the rate of agricultural productivity growth across economies can account for the majority of the variation in peak industrial employment shares.
papers.zh_title: 工业化的异质性路径
papers.zh_abstract: 各国的工业化经历存在显著差异。我们使用一个结构变迁的基准模型来阐明这种异质性的来源，特别是过早去工业化现象。我们的分析得出三个关键发现。首先，结构变迁的基准模型稳健地产生了工业部门演变的驼峰形模式。其次，各国部门生产率追赶模式的异质性可以产生与数据中相似的工业化经历差异，包括过早去工业化。第三，各经济体农业生产率增长率的差异可以解释工业就业峰值份额变化的大部分原因。

papers.title: Investing in Ex Ante Regulation: Evidence from Pharmaceutical Patent Examination
papers.authors: Michael D. Frakes, Melissa F. Wasserman
papers.abstract: We explore how the Patent Office may improve the quality of issued patents on “secondary” drug features by giving examiners more time to review drug-patent applications. Our findings suggest that current time allocations are causing examiners to issue low quality secondary patents on the margin. To assess the merits of expanding ex ante scrutiny of drug-patent applications at the agency, we set forth estimates of the various gains and losses associated with giving examiners more time, including reduced downstream litigation costs and added personnel expenses, along with both the static gains and dynamic innovation losses associated with earlier generic entry.
papers.zh_title: 投资于事前监管：来自药品专利审查的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了专利局如何通过给予审查员更多时间审查药品专利申请书，来提高针对药物“次要”特征所颁发专利的质量。我们的研究结果表明，当前的时间分配正导致审查员在边际上颁发低质量的次要专利。为了评估在机构层面扩大对药品专利申请进行事前审查的利弊，我们估算了给予审查员更多时间所带来的各种收益和损失，包括减少下游诉讼成本和增加人员开支，以及与更早的仿制药进入相关的静态收益和动态创新损失。

papers.title: Mortality Effects and Choice Across Private Health Insurance Plans
papers.authors: Jason Abaluck, Mauricio M. Caceres Bravo, Peter Hull, Amanda Starc
papers.abstract: Competition in health insurance markets may fail to improve health outcomes if consumers are not willing to pay for high quality plans. We document large differences in the mortality rates of Medicare Advantage (MA) plans within local markets. We then show that when high (low) mortality plans exit these markets, enrollees tend to switch to more typical plans and subsequently experience lower (higher) mortality. We develop a framework that uses this variation to estimate the relationship between observed mortality rates and causal mortality effects; we find a tight link. We then extend the framework to study other predictors of mortality effects and estimate consumer willingness to pay. Higher spending plans tend to reduce enrollee mortality, but existing quality ratings are uncorrelated with plan mortality effects. Consumers place little weight on mortality effects when choosing plans. Moving beneficiaries out of the bottom 5% of plans could save tens of thousands of elderly lives each year.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C26, I11, J14
papers.zh_title: 私人健康保险计划中的死亡率效应与选择
papers.zh_abstract: 如果消费者不愿意为高质量计划付费，健康保险市场的竞争可能无法改善健康结果。我们记录了当地市场中Medicare Advantage（MA）计划之间死亡率的巨大差异。然后我们表明，当高（低）死亡率计划退出这些市场时，参保者倾向于转向更典型的计划，随后经历更低（更高）的死亡率。我们开发了一个框架，利用这种变化来估计观察到的死亡率与因果死亡率效应之间的关系；我们发现两者之间存在紧密联系。然后我们扩展该框架以研究死亡率效应的其他预测因素，并估计消费者的支付意愿。支出较高的计划倾向于降低参保者死亡率，但现有的质量评级与计划的死亡率效应不相关。消费者在选择计划时很少考虑死亡率效应。将受益人从最差的5%计划中转移出来，每年可以挽救数万名老年人的生命。

papers.title: Conflicting Interests and the Effect of Fiduciary Duty — Evidence from Variable Annuities
papers.authors: Mark L. Egan, Shan Ge, Johnny Tang
papers.abstract: We examine the drivers of variable annuity sales and the impact of a proposed regulatory change. Variable annuities are popular retirement products with over $2 trillion in assets in the United States. Insurers typically pay brokers a commission for selling variable annuities that ranges from 0% to over 10% of investors’ premium payments. Brokers earn higher commissions for selling inferior annuities, in terms of higher expenses and more ex-post complaints. Our results indicate that variable annuity sales are roughly four times as sensitive to brokers’ financial interests as to investors’. To help limit conflicts of interest, the Department of Labor proposed a rule in 2016 that would hold brokers to a fiduciary standard when dealing with retirement accounts. We find that after the proposed fiduciary rule, sales of high-expense variable annuities fell by 52% as sales became more sensitive to expenses and insurers increased the relative availability of low-expense products. Based on our structural model estimates, investor welfare improved as a result of the fiduciary rule under conservative assumptions.
papers.zh_title: 利益冲突与受托责任的影响——来自可变年金的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了可变年金销售的驱动因素以及一项拟议监管变化的影响。可变年金是受欢迎的退休产品，在美国拥有超过2万亿美元的资产。保险公司通常向销售可变年金的经纪人支付佣金，佣金范围从投资者保费的0%到超过10%不等。经纪人通过销售劣质年金（表现为更高的费用和更多的事后投诉）赚取更高的佣金。我们的结果表明，可变年金销售对经纪人财务利益的敏感度大约是对投资者财务利益敏感度的四倍。为帮助限制利益冲突，劳工部在2016年提出了一项规则，要求经纪人在处理退休账户时遵守受托标准。我们发现，在拟议的受托规则之后，高费用可变年金的销售额下降了52%，因为销售对费用变得更加敏感，并且保险公司增加了低费用产品的相对供应量。基于我们的结构模型估计，在保守假设下，受托规则改善了投资者福利。

papers.title: How Much to Save? Decision Costs and Retirement Plan Participation
papers.authors: Jacob Goldin, Tatiana Homonoff, Richard W. Patterson, William L. Skimmyhorn
papers.abstract: Deciding how much to save for retirement can be complicated. Drawing on a field experiment conducted with the Department of Defense, we study whether such complexity depresses participation in an employer-sponsored retirement saving plan. We find that simplifying one dimension of the enrollment decision, by highlighting a potential rate at which non-participants might contribute, increases participation in the plan. Similar communications that did not include a highlighted rate yield smaller effects. The results highlight how reducing complexity on the intensive margin of a decision (how much to contribute) can affect extensive margin behavior (whether to contribute at all) in a setting of policy interest.
papers.zh_title: 储蓄多少？决策成本与退休计划参与
papers.zh_abstract: 决定为退休储蓄多少可能很复杂。我们利用与国防部合作开展的一项实地实验，研究这种复杂性是否会抑制员工参与雇主赞助的退休储蓄计划。我们发现，通过突出显示非参与者可能缴纳的潜在费率来简化注册决策的一个维度，可以提高计划的参与率。未包含突出显示费率的类似沟通产生的效果较小。这些结果凸显了在政策关注的背景下，减少决策集约边际（缴纳多少）上的复杂性如何能够影响广延边际行为（是否缴纳）。

papers.title: Do Unemployment Insurance Benefits Improve Match and Employer Quality? Evidence from Recent U.S. Recessions
papers.authors: Ammar Farooq, Adriana D. Kugler, Umberto Muratori
papers.abstract: Unemployment Insurance (UI) benefits have a moral hazard effect and a liquidity effect, with both generating increases in unemployment spells but the latter increasing wages due to the ability to find better matches or better jobs. Previous papers, however, find mixed evidence on the impact of UI on wages. In this paper, we re-examine the effect of UI on wages in the U.S. and present novel evidence using LEHD data to examine the channels through which UI increases earnings, including: (1) the quality of the match, (2) positive sorting of employers and employees, and (3) the quality of the employer. We find that the increased UI generosity in the U.S. increased wages by both increasing the quality of the match as well as the quality of the job obtained after the unemployment spell, though there is less evidence of improved sorting. Consistent with improvements in match and employer quality, we also find that the likelihood of remaining on the job increases with UI generosity. Consistent with a liquidity effect on search, we also find that the effects on the quality of the match are larger for those who are more likely to be liquidity constrained, including women, minorities, and the less-educated.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：C55, E24, H23, J21, J31, J64, J65
papers.zh_title: 失业保险金能否提高匹配质量和雇主质量？来自近期美国经济衰退的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 失业保险金具有道德风险效应和流动性效应，两者都会导致失业期延长，但后者由于能够找到更好的匹配或更好的工作而提高工资。然而，以往的论文关于失业保险金对工资影响的证据不一。在本文中，我们重新审视了失业保险金对美国工资的影响，并利用LEHD数据提供了新的证据，以考察失业保险金提高收入的渠道，包括：(1) 匹配质量，(2) 雇主与员工的正向分类，以及(3) 雇主质量。我们发现，美国失业保险金慷慨度的提高通过提高匹配质量以及失业期后获得的工作质量来提高工资，尽管改善分类的证据较少。与匹配质量和雇主质量的改善一致，我们还发现，随着失业保险金慷慨度的提高，留在工作岗位上的可能性也会增加。与流动性对搜索的影响一致，我们还发现，对于那些更可能面临流动性约束的人群，包括女性、少数族裔和受教育程度较低者，对匹配质量的影响更大。

papers.title: Out of Sight No More? The Effect of Fee Disclosures on 401(k) Investment Allocations
papers.authors: Mathias Kronlund, Veronika K. Pool, Clemens Sialm, Irina Stefanescu
papers.abstract: We examine the effects of a 2012 regulatory reform that mandated fee and performance disclosures for the investment options in 401(k) plans. We show that participants became significantly more attentive to expense ratios and short-term performance after the reform. The disclosure effects are stronger among plans with large average contributions per participant and weaker for plans with many investment options. Additionally, these results are not driven by secular changes in investor behavior or sponsor-initiated changes to the investment menus. Our findings suggest that providing salient fee and performance information can mitigate participants' inertia in retirement plans.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, LE, PE；JEL：G11, G18, G23, G28, G41, G51, H31, H55
papers.zh_title: 不再被忽视？费用披露对401(k)投资配置的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2012年一项监管改革的影响，该改革强制要求披露401(k)计划中投资选项的费用和业绩。我们显示，改革后，参与者对费用比率和短期业绩的关注度显著提高。披露效应在每位参与者平均缴款额较大的计划中更强，而在投资选项较多的计划中较弱。此外，这些结果并非由投资者行为的长期变化或发起人主导的投资菜单变化所驱动。我们的发现表明，提供显著的费用和业绩信息可以减轻参与者在退休计划中的惰性。

papers.title: Experienced Segregation
papers.authors: Susan Athey, Billy A. Ferguson, Matthew Gentzkow, Tobias Schmidt
papers.abstract: We estimate a measure of segregation, experienced isolation, that captures individuals’ exposure to diverse others in the places they visit over the course of their days. Using Global Positioning System (GPS) data collected from smartphones, we measure experienced isolation by race. We find that the isolation individuals experience is substantially lower than standard residential isolation measures would suggest, but that experienced and residential isolation are highly correlated across cities. Experienced isolation is lower relative to residential isolation in denser, wealthier, more educated cities with high levels of public transit use, and is also negatively correlated with income mobility.
papers.zh_title: 经历中的隔离
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了一个隔离指标——经历中的孤立，该指标捕捉了个体在一天中访问的地点接触不同人群的程度。利用从智能手机收集的全球定位系统数据，我们按种族测量了经历中的孤立。我们发现，个体经历中的孤立程度远低于标准居住隔离指标所显示的水平，但经历中的孤立与居住隔离在城市间高度相关。在人口密度更高、更富裕、受教育程度更高、公共交通使用率高的城市，经历中的孤立相对于居住隔离更低，并且与收入流动性呈负相关。

papers.title: The Drug Crisis and the Living Arrangements of Children
papers.authors: Kasey Buckles, William N. Evans, Ethan M.J. Lieber
papers.abstract: We examine the impact of the drug crisis that has unfolded over the last three decades in the United States on children’s living arrangements and environments. Because the current living arrangement could be a result of events that occurred at any point in a child’s life, we measure children’s exposure to the crisis with the cumulative drug-related mortality of likely parents. A potential omitted variables bias complicates the analysis, as the factors that may have led parents to abuse drugs could also have altered the living arrangements of their children. Within a 2SLS framework, we instrument for the cumulative mortality of likely parents with a child’s years of exposure to a non-triplicate prescription pad environment. Previous work by Alpert et al. (2019) demonstrates that pharmaceutical advertising was much more extensive in non-triplicate states and fostered the development of the drug crisis. Our results indicate that OLS and 2SLS estimates are nearly identical and the crisis increased both the fraction of children living away from a parent and in a household headed by a grandparent. We estimate that if drug abuse had remained at 1996 levels, 1.5 million fewer children aged 0-16 would have lived away from a parent in 2015.
papers.zh_title: 毒品危机与儿童居住安排
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国过去三十年来不断加剧的毒品危机对儿童居住安排和环境的影响。由于当前的居住安排可能是儿童生命中任何时间点发生的事件的结果，我们通过潜在父母的累积毒品相关死亡率来衡量儿童接触危机的程度。潜在遗漏变量偏差使分析复杂化，因为可能导致父母滥用毒品的因素也可能改变了他们子女的居住安排。在2SLS框架内，我们使用儿童暴露于非三联处方垫环境的年数作为潜在父母累积死亡率的工具变量。Alpert等人（2019）先前的研究表明，在非三联州，药品广告更为广泛，并促进了毒品危机的发展。我们的结果表明，OLS和2SLS估计几乎相同，并且危机增加了儿童不与父母同住以及由祖父母担任户主的比例。我们估计，如果药物滥用保持在1996年的水平，那么2010年0-16岁儿童中不与父母同住的人数将减少150万。

papers.title: The Economic Consequences of R̂ = 1: Towards a Workable Behavioural Epidemiological Model of Pandemics
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper reviews the literature on incorporating behavioural elements into epidemiological models of pandemics. While modelling behaviour by forward-looking rational agents can provide some insight into the time paths of pandemics, the non-stationary nature of Susceptible-Infected-Removed (SIR) models of viral spread makes characterisation of resulting equilibria difficult. Here I posit a shortcut that can be deployed to allow for a tractable equilibrium model of pandemics with intuitive comparative statics and also a clear prediction that effective reproduction numbers (that is, R) will tend towards 1 in equilibrium. This motivates taking R̂=1 as an equilibrium starting point for analyses of pandemics with behavioural agents. The implications of this for the analysis of widespread testing, tracing, isolation and mask-use is discussed.
papers.zh_title: R̂=1的经济后果：迈向可行的流行病行为流行病学模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了将行为因素纳入流行病学模型的相关文献。虽然通过前瞻性理性主体的行为建模可以为流行病的时间路径提供一些见解，但病毒传播的易感-感染-移除（SIR）模型的非平稳性使得对由此产生的均衡进行刻画变得困难。在此，我提出一种捷径，可用于构建一个易于处理的流行病均衡模型，该模型具有直观的比较静态分析，并且明确预测有效再生数（即R）在均衡中趋向于1。这促使将R̂=1作为分析具有行为主体的流行病的均衡起点。本文讨论了这一点对广泛检测、追踪、隔离和口罩使用分析的影响。

papers.title: Persuasion on Networks
papers.authors: Georgy Egorov, Konstantin Sonin
papers.abstract: We analyze persuasion in a model in which each receiver can buy a direct access to the sender's signal or rely on her network connections to get it. For the sender, a higher bias increases the impact per direct receiver, yet diminishes the willingness of agents to receive information. Contrary to naive intuition, the optimal propaganda might target peripheral, rather than centrally-located agents, and is at its maximum levels when the probability that information flows between agents is close to zero or one, but not in-between. The impact of network density depends on this probability as well.
papers.zh_title: 网络上的说服
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个模型中的说服，其中每个接收者可以购买直接访问发送者信号的权限，或者依赖其网络连接来获取信号。对于发送者而言，更高的偏见增加了每个直接接收者的影响，但降低了代理人接收信息的意愿。与直觉相反，最优宣传可能针对外围而非中心位置的代理人，并且当信息在代理人之间流动的概率接近零或一时达到最大水平，而非介于两者之间。网络密度的影响也取决于这一概率。

papers.title: Self-Harming Trade Policy? Protectionism and Production Networks
papers.authors: Alessandro Barattieri, Matteo Cacciatore
papers.abstract: Using monthly data on temporary trade barriers (TTBs), we estimate the dynamic employment effects of protectionism through vertical production linkages. First, exploiting procedural details of TTBs and high-frequency data, we identify movements in protectionism exogenous to economic fundamentals. We then use input-output tables to construct measures of protectionism affecting downstream producers. Finally, we estimate panel local projections using the identified trade-policy shocks. Protectionism has small and insignificant beneficial effects in protected industries. In contrast, the effects in downstream industries are negative, sizable, and significant. The employment decline follows an increase in intermediate-inputs and final goods prices.
papers.zh_title: 自残性贸易政策？保护主义与生产网络
papers.zh_abstract: 利用临时贸易壁垒（TTBs）的月度数据，我们通过垂直生产联系估计了保护主义的动态就业效应。首先，利用TTB的程序细节和高频数据，我们识别出外生于经济基本面的保护主义变动。然后，我们使用投入产出表构建影响下游生产者的保护主义衡量指标。最后，我们利用识别出的贸易政策冲击估计面板局部投影。保护主义在受保护行业中具有微小且不显著的有利效应。相比之下，对下游行业的影响是负面的、显著的且规模较大。就业下降伴随着中间投入品和最终商品价格的上涨。

papers.title: Small Business Survival Capabilities and Policy Effectiveness: Evidence from Oakland
papers.authors: Robert P. Bartlett III, Adair Morse
papers.abstract: Using unique City of Oakland data during COVID-19, we document that small business survival capabilities vary by firm size as a function of revenue resiliency, labor flexibility, and committed costs. Nonemployer businesses rely on low cost structures to survive 73% declines in own-store foot traffic. Microbusinesses (1-to-5 employees) depend on 14% greater revenue resiliency. Enterprises (6-to-50 employees) have twice-as-much labor flexibility, but face 11%-to-22% higher residual closure risk from committed costs. Finally, inconsistent with the spirit of Chetty-Friedman-Hendren-Sterner (2020) and Granja-Makridis-Yannelis-Zwick (2020), PPP application success increased medium-run survival probability by 20.5%, but only for microbusinesses, arguing for size-targeting of policies.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, ME, PR；JEL：E61, G38, H32, J65, L26
papers.zh_title: 小企业生存能力与政策有效性：来自奥克兰的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用COVID-19期间奥克兰市的独特数据，我们记录了小企业生存能力因企业规模而异，表现为收入韧性、劳动力灵活性和固定成本的函数。无雇员企业依赖低成本结构来应对自身店铺客流量73%的下降。微型企业（1-5名员工）依赖于14%更高的收入韧性。企业（6-50名员工）拥有两倍的劳动力灵活性，但面临因固定成本导致的11%至22%更高的残余关闭风险。最后，与Chetty-Friedman-Hendren-Sterner（2020）和Granja-Makridis-Yannelis-Zwick（2020）的精神不一致的是，PPP申请成功将中期生存概率提高了20.5%，但仅对微型企业有效，这支持了政策应针对企业规模进行定位。

papers.title: Window Dressing in the Public Sector: A Case Study of China’s Compulsory Education Promotion Program
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Chang Liu, Li-An Zhou
papers.abstract: We examine window dressing phenomenon in the public sector by studying the strategic responses of Chinese local officials to the compulsory education promotion program launched by the central government in the 1990s. According to this program, the Chinese counties should receive inspections on whether the compulsory educational targets were achieved on pre-scheduled time by provincial governments; and failing to pass the inspection would have severe negative career consequences for the county leaders. We find that county-level educational expenditures saw a sustained increase before the inspection, but a sharp drop immediately after the inspection. Local officials who were more likely to be inspected within their tenures window-dressed more aggressively. As a result, middle school enrollment rates declined significantly after the inspection, and rural girls bore the blunt of the decline in school enrollment.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D73, H11, H41, P26
papers.zh_title: 公共部门的粉饰门面：中国义务教育促进计划的案例研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究中国地方官员对1990年代中央政府发起的义务教育促进计划的策略性反应，考察了公共部门的粉饰门面现象。根据该计划，中国各县应接受省级政府关于义务教育目标是否按预定时间实现的检查；未能通过检查将对县级领导产生严重的负面职业后果。我们发现，县级教育支出在检查前持续增加，但在检查后立即急剧下降。在其任期内更有可能接受检查的地方官员粉饰门面更为积极。结果，检查后中学入学率显著下降，农村女孩在入学率下降中首当其冲。

papers.title: Understanding the German Criticism of the Target System and the Role of Central Bank capital
papers.authors: Roberto Perotti
papers.abstract: Criticism of the Target system by a group of central European scholars has become a widespread argument against the policies of the European Central Bank and even the integrity of the monetary union, and even standard fare in the media and in the political debate in Germany. Most academics and practitioners that have participated in the debate have been dismissive of the German preoccupations. In this paper, I first try and clarify the many remaining misunderstandings about the workings and implications of the Target system. I propose a unified, systematic and simple approach to the study of the workings of the Target system in response to different shocks and in comparison with different alternative regimes. I then argue that the German criticism of the Target system is not so unfounded after all, and should be taken seriously, both on theoretical grounds and for its political implications.
papers.zh_title: 理解德国对Target系统的批评及中央银行资本的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 一群中欧学者对Target系统的批评已成为反对欧洲央行政策甚至货币联盟完整性的广泛论点，并在德国媒体和政治辩论中成为常见话题。参与辩论的大多数学者和从业者一直对德国的担忧不屑一顾。在本文中，我首先试图澄清关于Target系统运作和影响的许多剩余误解。我提出一个统一、系统且简单的方法来研究Target系统在不同冲击下的运作，并与不同替代制度进行比较。然后，我认为德国对Target系统的批评并非毫无根据，无论是从理论角度还是其政治影响来看，都应认真对待。

papers.title: Do State Earned Income Tax Credits Increase Participation in the Federal EITC?
papers.authors: David Neumark, Katherine E. Williams
papers.abstract: In recent years, many states and some local governments implemented or expanded their own supplemental Earned Income Tax Credits (EITCs). The expansion of state EITCs may have stemmed in large part from wanting to provide a more generous program than the federal program, because state EITCs increase transfer payments to low-income recipients who qualify. However, state and local governments can also benefit from maximizing participation of their constituents in the federal EITC, and there are several reasons why state or local EITCs could increase participation in the federal EITC program. We find some evidence suggesting that state EITCs may increase federal EITC program participation among low-skilled single filers with children.
papers.zh_title: 州劳动所得税抵免是否增加了联邦EITC的参与？
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，许多州和一些地方政府实施或扩大了自己的补充劳动所得税抵免（EITC）。州EITC的扩张在很大程度上可能源于希望提供比联邦计划更慷慨的计划，因为州EITC增加了对符合条件的低收入受助人的转移支付。然而，州和地方政府也可以从最大化其选民参与联邦EITC中受益，并且有几个原因表明州或地方EITC可以增加联邦EITC计划的参与。我们发现一些证据表明，州EITC可能增加了有子女的低技能单身申报者参与联邦EITC计划的比例。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Consequences of Infrastructure Investment
papers.authors: Valerie A. Ramey
papers.abstract: Can greater investment in infrastructure raise U.S. long-run output? Are infrastructure projects a good short-run stimulus to the economy? This paper uses insights from the macroeconomics literature to address these questions. I begin by analyzing the effects of government investment in both a stylized neoclassical model and a medium-scale New Keynesian model, highlighting the economic mechanisms that govern the strength of the short-run and long-run impacts. The analysis confirms earlier findings that the implementation delays inherent in infrastructure projects reduce short-run multipliers in most cases. In contrast, long-run multipliers can be sizable when government capital is productive. Moreover, these multipliers are greater if the economy starts from a point below the socially optimal amount of public capital. Turning to empirical estimation, I use the theoretical model to explain the econometric challenges to estimating the elasticity of output to public infrastructure. Using both artificial data generated by simulations of the model and extensions of existing empirical work, I demonstrate how both general equilibrium effects and optimal choice of public capital are likely to impart upward biases to output elasticity estimates. Finally, I review and extend some empirical estimates of the short-run effects, focusing on infrastructure spending in the ARRA.
papers.zh_title: 基础设施投资的宏观经济后果
papers.zh_abstract: 增加基础设施投资能否提高美国的长期产出？基础设施项目能否成为良好的短期经济刺激手段？本文利用宏观经济学文献的见解来探讨这些问题。我首先在一个简化的新古典模型和一个中等规模的新凯恩斯模型中分析政府投资的影响，重点阐述决定短期和长期影响强度的经济机制。分析证实了早期发现：在大多数情况下，基础设施项目固有的实施延迟会降低短期乘数。相比之下，当政府资本具有生产力时，长期乘数可能相当可观。此外，如果经济从低于社会最优公共资本存量的起点开始，这些乘数会更大。转向实证估计时，我利用理论模型来解释估计产出对公共基础设施弹性所面临的计量经济学挑战。通过使用模型模拟生成的人工数据以及对现有实证工作的扩展，我展示了一般均衡效应和公共资本的最优选择如何可能使产出弹性估计产生向上偏差。最后，我回顾并扩展了一些关于短期影响的实证估计，重点关注《美国复苏与再投资法案》中的基础设施支出。

papers.title: Information Frictions and Access to the Paycheck Protection Program
papers.authors: Christopher Neilson, John Eric Humphries, Gabriel Ulyssea
papers.abstract: The Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) extended 669 billion dollars of forgivable loans in an unprecedented effort to support small businesses affected by the COVID-19 crisis. This paper provides evidence that information frictions and the “first-come, first-served” design of the PPP program skewed its resources towards larger firms and may have permanently reduced its effectiveness. Using new daily survey data on small businesses in the U.S., we show that the smallest businesses were less aware of the PPP and less likely to apply. If they did apply, the smallest businesses applied later, faced longer processing times, and were less likely to have their application approved. These frictions may have mattered, as businesses that received aid report fewer layoffs, higher employment, and improved expectations about the future.
papers.zh_title: 信息摩擦与薪资保护计划的获取
papers.zh_abstract: 薪资保护计划（PPP）发放了6690亿美元的可豁免贷款，这是一项前所未有的努力，旨在支持受COVID-19危机影响的小企业。本文提供的证据表明，信息摩擦和PPP计划的“先到先得”设计使其资源向规模较大的企业倾斜，并可能永久性地降低了其有效性。利用关于美国小企业的新每日调查数据，我们显示，最小规模的企业对PPP的了解较少，申请的可能性也更低。即使它们申请了，最小规模的企业申请时间也更晚，面临更长的处理时间，并且其申请获批的可能性也更低。这些摩擦可能至关重要，因为获得援助的企业报告称裁员更少、就业更高，并且对未来的预期有所改善。

papers.title: When Should Public Programs be Privately Administered? Theory and Evidence from the Paycheck Protection Program
papers.authors: Alexander W. Bartik, Zoe B. Cullen, Edward L. Glaeser, Michael Luca, Christopher T. Stanton, Adi Sunderam
papers.abstract: What happens when public resources are allocated by private companies whose objectives may be imperfectly aligned with policy goals? We study this question in the context of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), which relied on private banks to disburse aid to small businesses rapidly. Our model shows that delegation is optimal when delay is sufficiently costly, variation across firms in the impact of funds is small, and the alignment between public and private objectives is high. We use novel firm-level survey data that contains information on banking relationships to measure heterogeneity in the impact of PPP and to assess whether banks targeted loans to high-impact firms. Banks did target loans to their most valuable pre-existing customers. However, using an instrumental variables approach that exploits variation in banks’ loan processing speeds, we find that treatment effect heterogeneity is sufficiently moderate, delay is sufficiently costly, and bank and social objectives are sufficiently aligned that delegation was likely superior to delaying loans to improve targeting.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D22, G01, G2, L26, M13
papers.zh_title: 公共项目何时应由私人管理？来自薪资保护计划的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 当公共资源由目标可能与政策目标不完全一致的私营公司分配时，会发生什么？我们在薪资保护计划（PPP）的背景下研究这个问题，该计划依赖私营银行快速向小企业发放援助。我们的模型表明，当延迟成本足够高、资金影响在企业间的差异较小，以及公共目标与私人目标之间的契合度较高时，委托是最优的。我们利用包含银行关系信息的新型企业层面调查数据，来衡量PPP影响的异质性，并评估银行是否将贷款瞄准了高影响企业。银行确实将贷款瞄准了其最有价值的现有客户。然而，利用基于银行贷款处理速度差异的工具变量方法，我们发现处理效应异质性足够温和、延迟成本足够高，且银行目标与社会目标足够一致，以至于委托可能优于为了改善目标定位而延迟贷款。

papers.title: Efficient Redistribution
papers.authors: Corina Boar, Virgiliu Midrigan
papers.abstract: What are the most eﬃcient means of redistribution in an unequal economy? We answer this question by characterizing the optimal shape of non-linear income and wealth taxes in a dynamic general equilibrium model with uninsurable idiosyncratic risk. Our analysis reproduces the distribution of income and wealth in the United States and explicitly takes into account the long-lived transition dynamics after policy reforms. We ﬁnd that a uniform ﬂat tax on capital and labor income combined with a lump-sum transfer is nearly optimal. Though allowing for increasing marginal income and wealth taxes raises welfare, the incremental gains are small due to strong behavioral and general equilibrium eﬀects. This result is robust to changing household preferences, the distribution of ability, the planner’s preference for redistribution, as well as to explicitly modeling private business ownership and the ensuing heterogeneity in rates of return.
papers.zh_title: 高效再分配
papers.zh_abstract: 在一个不平等经济中，最有效的再分配手段是什么？我们通过在一个具有不可保险异质性风险的动态一般均衡模型中刻画非线性所得税和财富税的最优形状来回答这个问题。我们的分析再现了美国的收入和财富分布，并明确考虑了政策改革后的长期过渡动态。我们发现，对资本和劳动收入征收统一的单一税，并结合一次性转移支付，几乎是次优的。尽管允许递增的边际所得税和财富税能提高福利，但由于强烈的行为效应和一般均衡效应，增量收益很小。这一结果对于改变家庭偏好、能力分布、规划者对再分配的偏好，以及明确建模私营企业所有权及其导致的回报率异质性，都是稳健的。

papers.title: Effects of State COVID-19 Closure Policy on NON-COVID-19 Health Care Utilization
papers.authors: Engy Ziedan, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: The U.S. health care system has experienced great pressure since early March 2020 as it pivoted to providing necessary care for COVID-19 patients. But there are signs that non-COVID-19 care use declined during this time period. We examine near real time data from a nationwide electronic healthcare records system that covers over 35 million patients to provide new evidence of how non-COVID-19 acute care and preventive/primary care have been affected during the epidemic. \nUsing event study and difference-in-difference models we find that state closure policies (stay-at-home or non-essential business closures) are associated with large declines in ambulatory visits, with effects differing by type of care. State closure policies reduced overall outpatient visits by about 15-16 percent within two weeks. Outpatient visits for health check-ups and well care experience very large declines during the epidemic, with substantial effects from state closure policies. In contrast, mental health outpatient visits declined less than other care, and appear less affected by state closure policies. We find substitution to telehealth modalities may have played an important role in mitigating the decline in mental health care utilization. \nAggregate trends in outpatient visits show a 40% decline after the first week of March 2020, only a portion of which is attributed to state policy. A rebound starts around mid April that does not appear to be explained by state reopening policy. Despite this rebound, care visits still remain below the pre-epidemic levels in most cases.
papers.zh_title: 州COVID-19关闭政策对非COVID-19医疗保健利用的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 自2020年3月初以来，美国医疗保健系统承受了巨大压力，因为它转向为COVID-19患者提供必要的护理。但有迹象表明，在此期间非COVID-19护理的使用有所下降。我们检查了覆盖超过3500万患者的全国性电子医疗记录系统的近实时数据，以提供关于非COVID-19急性护理和预防/初级护理在疫情期间如何受到影响的新证据。利用事件研究和双重差分模型，我们发现州关闭政策（居家令或非必要企业关闭）与门诊就诊量的大幅下降相关，其影响因护理类型而异。州关闭政策在两周内使总体门诊就诊量减少了约15-16%。疫情期间，健康检查和保健护理的门诊就诊量出现非常大幅度的下降，州关闭政策产生了实质性影响。相比之下，心理健康门诊就诊量的下降幅度小于其他护理，并且似乎受州关闭政策的影响较小。我们发现，转向远程医疗模式可能在缓解心理健康护理利用下降方面发挥了重要作用。门诊就诊量的总体趋势显示，在2020年3月第一周后下降了40%，其中只有一部分归因于州政策。大约在4月中旬开始出现反弹，但这似乎并非由州重新开放政策所解释。尽管出现反弹，但在大多数情况下，护理就诊量仍低于疫情前水平。

papers.title: Immigration and Violent Crime: Evidence from the Colombia-Venezuela Border
papers.authors: Brian G. Knight, Ana Tribin
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the link between violent crime and immigration using data from Colombian municipalities during the recent episode of immigration from Venezuela. The key finding is that, following the closing and then re-opening of the border in 2016, which precipitated a massive immigration wave, homicides in Colombia increased in areas close to the border with Venezuela. Using information on the nationality of the victim, we find that this increase was driven by homicides involving Venezuelan victims, with no evidence of a statistically significant increase in homicides in which Colombians were victimized. Thus, in contrast to xenophobic fears that migrants might victimize natives, it was migrants, rather than natives, who faced risks associated with immigration. Using arrests data, there is no corresponding increase in arrests for homicides in these areas. Taken together, these results suggest that the increase in homicides close to the border documented here are driven by crimes against migrants and have occurred without a corresponding increase in arrests, suggesting that some of these crimes have gone unsolved.
papers.zh_title: 移民与暴力犯罪：来自哥伦比亚-委内瑞拉边境的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用哥伦比亚市镇在近期委内瑞拉移民潮期间的数据，调查了暴力犯罪与移民之间的联系。关键发现是，在2016年边境关闭然后重新开放，从而引发大规模移民浪潮之后，哥伦比亚靠近委内瑞拉边境地区的凶杀案有所增加。利用受害者国籍信息，我们发现这一增长是由涉及委内瑞拉受害者的凶杀案驱动的，没有证据表明涉及哥伦比亚受害者的凶杀案有统计上显著的增加。因此，与移民可能伤害本地人的仇外恐惧相反，面临移民相关风险的是移民而非本地人。利用逮捕数据，这些地区的凶杀案逮捕人数并未相应增加。综合来看，这些结果表明，本文记录的边境附近凶杀案增加是由针对移民的犯罪驱动的，并且是在逮捕人数没有相应增加的情况下发生的，这表明其中一些犯罪尚未侦破。

papers.title: Local Access to Mental Healthcare and Crime
papers.authors: Monica Deza, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Keisha T. Solomon
papers.abstract: We estimate the effect of local access to office-based mental healthcare on crime. We leverage variation in the number of mental healthcare offices within a county over the period 1999 to 2014 in a two-way fixed-effects model. We find that increases in the number of mental healthcare offices modestly reduce crime. In particular, ten additional offices in a county reduces crime by 1.7 crimes per 10,000 residents. These findings suggest an unintended benefit from expanding the office-based mental healthcare workforce: reductions in crime.
papers.zh_title: 本地心理健康医疗服务可及性与犯罪
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了本地基于办公室的心理健康医疗服务可及性对犯罪的影响。我们利用1999年至2014年间一个县内心理健康医疗办公室数量的变化，采用双向固定效应模型进行分析。我们发现，心理健康医疗办公室数量的增加会适度减少犯罪。具体而言，一个县内增加十个办公室，每万名居民中的犯罪数量减少1.7起。这些发现表明，扩大基于办公室的心理健康医疗队伍会带来一个意想不到的好处：减少犯罪。

papers.title: Intergenerational and Sibling Spillovers in High School Majors
papers.authors: Gordon B. Dahl, Dan-Olof Rooth, Anders Stenberg
papers.abstract: This paper estimates family spillovers in high school major choice in Sweden, where admission to oversubscribed majors is determined based on GPA. Using a regression discontinuity design, we find large sibling and intergenerational spillovers that depend on the gender mix of a dyad. Same-gender siblings copy one another, while younger brothers recoil from older sister’s choices. Fathers and mothers influence sons, but not their daughters, except when a mother majors in the male-dominated program of Engineering. Back of the envelope calculations reveal these within family spillovers have sizable implications for the gender composition of majors.
papers.zh_title: 高中专业选择中的代际和兄弟姐妹溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计了瑞典高中专业选择中的家庭溢出效应，其中超额申请专业的录取基于平均绩点决定。利用断点回归设计，我们发现存在显著的兄弟姐妹和代际溢出效应，且这些效应取决于二人组合的性别构成。同性别的兄弟姐妹会相互模仿，而弟弟则会回避姐姐的选择。父亲和母亲影响儿子，但不影响女儿，除非母亲主修男性主导的工程项目。粗略计算表明，这些家庭内部的溢出效应对专业的性别构成具有显著影响。

papers.title: Initial Impacts of the Pandemic on Consumer Behavior: Evidence from Linked Income, Spending, and Savings Data
papers.authors: Natalie Bachas, Peter Ganong, Pascal J. Noel, Joseph S. Vavra, Arlene Wong, Diana Farrell, Fiona E. Greig
papers.abstract: We use U.S. household-level bank account data to investigate the heterogeneous effects of the pandemic on spending and savings. Households across the income distribution all cut spending from March to early April. Since mid April, spending has rebounded most rapidly for low-income households. We find large increases in liquid asset balances for households throughout the income distribution. However, lower-income households contribute disproportionately to the aggregate increase in balances, relative to their pre-pandemic shares. Taken together, our results suggest that spending declines in the initial months of the recession were primarily caused by direct effects of the pandemic, rather than resulting from labor market disruptions. The sizable growth in liquid assets we observe for low-income households suggests that stimulus and insurance programs during this period likely played an important role in limiting the effects of labor market disruptions on spending.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E21, E6, E62, H31
papers.zh_title: 疫情对消费者行为的初步影响：来自收入、支出和储蓄关联数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国家庭层面的银行账户数据，研究疫情对支出和储蓄的异质性影响。不同收入水平的家庭在3月至4月初均削减了支出。自4月中旬以来，低收入家庭的支出反弹最为迅速。我们发现，各收入水平家庭的流动资产余额均大幅增加。然而，与疫情前所占份额相比，低收入家庭对总余额增长的贡献不成比例地更大。综合来看，我们的结果表明，衰退最初几个月的支出下降主要是由疫情的直接影响造成的，而非劳动力市场中断所致。我们观察到的低收入家庭流动资产显著增长表明，此期间的刺激和保险计划可能在限制劳动力市场中断对支出的影响方面发挥了重要作用。

papers.title: The Impact of Social Security on Pension Claiming and Retirement: Active vs. Passive Decisions
papers.authors: Rafael Lalive, Arvind Magesan, Stefan Staubli
papers.abstract: We exploit a unique Swiss reform to identify the importance of passivity, claiming social security benefits at the Full Retirement Age (FRA). Sharp discontinuities generated by the reform reveal that raising the FRA while imposing small early claiming penalties significantly delays pension claiming and retirement, but imposing large penalties and holding the FRA fixed does not. The nature of the reform allows us to identify that between 47 and 69% of individuals are passive, while imposing additional structure point identifies the fraction at 67%. An original survey of Swiss pensioners reveals that reference-dependent preferences is the main source of passivity.
papers.zh_title: 社会保障对养老金申领和退休的影响：主动决策与被动决策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用瑞士一项独特的改革来识别被动性（即在正常退休年龄申领社会保障福利）的重要性。改革产生的急剧不连续性表明，提高正常退休年龄同时施加较小的提前申领惩罚，会显著延迟养老金申领和退休，但施加较大惩罚并保持正常退休年龄不变则不会。改革的性质使我们能够识别出47%至69%的个体是被动的，而施加额外结构则精确地将这一比例确定为67%。一项针对瑞士养老金领取者的原始调查显示，参照依赖偏好是被动性的主要来源。

papers.title: A Quantity-Driven Theory of Term Premia and Exchange Rates
papers.authors: Robin Greenwood, Samuel G. Hanson, Jeremy C. Stein, Adi Sunderam
papers.abstract: We develop a model in which specialized bond investors must absorb shocks to the supply and demand for long-term bonds in two currencies. Since long-term bonds and foreign exchange are both exposed to unexpected movements in short-term interest rates, a shift in the supply of long-term bonds in one currency influences the foreign exchange rate between the two currencies, as well as bond term premia in both currencies. Our model matches several important empirical patterns, including the co-movement between exchange rates and term premia, as well as the finding that central banks' quantitative easing policies impact exchange rates. An extension of our model sheds light on the persistent deviations from covered interest rate parity that have emerged since 2008.
papers.zh_title: 期限溢价和汇率的数量驱动理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个模型，其中专业债券投资者必须吸收两种货币长期债券供需的冲击。由于长期债券和外汇都面临短期利率意外变动的风险，一种货币长期债券供给的变化会影响两种货币之间的汇率，以及两种货币的债券期限溢价。我们的模型匹配了几个重要的实证模式，包括汇率与期限溢价之间的共同变动，以及中央银行量化宽松政策影响汇率的发现。我们模型的扩展揭示了自2008年以来出现的持续违反抛补利率平价的现象。

papers.title: Rule of Law in Labor Relations, 1898-1940
papers.authors: Price V. Fishback
papers.abstract: The paper examines changes in labor regulation between 1898 and 1940 in the context of issues related to rule of law in two areas. 1) Many see the 1905 Lochner Supreme Court decision on men’s hours laws as the beginning of 30 years in which labor regulation was stymied by the doctrine of “freedom of contract.” Seeing close votes and substantial turnover of judges on the Supreme Court, the de facto situation was more complex as some states maintained their laws or passed new ones. 2) Labor disputes led to some of the greatest threats to rule of law. To limit descents into violence, states passed arbitration laws, pro-union laws, and anti-union laws. Uncertainty about the rules led to a sharp rise in strikes and violence after World War I and again when Congress and the states sought to establish the rules for collective bargaining between 1932 and 1937. A panel analysis of the impact of state laws in bituminous coal mining from 1902 to 1941 shows that the arbitration and pro-union laws were associated with less violence during periods of uncertainty. During several periods state pro-union laws were associated with more strikes and state anti-union laws with fewer strikes.
