papers.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：H77, J08, J52, J88, K31, N31, N32
papers.zh_title: 劳动关系中的法治，1898-1940
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了1898年至1940年间劳动法规的变化，涉及两个领域的法治相关问题。1) 许多人将1905年最高法院关于男性工时法的“洛克纳”判决视为“契约自由”原则阻碍劳动法规的30年开端。鉴于最高法院法官的接近投票和大量更替，实际情况更为复杂，因为一些州维持了其法律或通过了新法律。2) 劳资纠纷导致了法治面临的一些最大威胁。为限制暴力升级，各州通过了仲裁法、亲工会法和反工会法。规则的不确定性导致第一次世界大战后以及1932年至1937年间国会和各州试图确立集体谈判规则时，罢工和暴力事件急剧增加。对1902年至1941年烟煤开采业州级法律影响的面板分析表明，在不确定时期，仲裁法和亲工会法与较少的暴力相关。在几个时期，州亲工会法与更多罢工相关，而州反工会法则与更少罢工相关。

papers.title: Measuring the labor market at the onset of the COVID-19 crisis
papers.authors: Alexander W. Bartik, Marianne Bertrand, Feng Lin, Jesse Rothstein, Matt Unrath
papers.abstract: We use traditional and non-traditional data to measure the collapse and partial recovery of the U.S. labor market from March to early July, contrast this downturn to previous recessions, and provide preliminary evidence on the effects of the policy response. For hourly workers at both small and large businesses, nearly all of the decline in employment occurred between March 14 and 28. It was driven by low-wage services, particularly the retail and leisure and hospitality sectors. A large share of the job losses in small businesses reflected firms that closed entirely, though many subsequently reopened. Firms that were already unhealthy were more likely to close and less likely to reopen, and disadvantaged workers were more likely to be laid off and less likely to return. Most laid off workers expected to be recalled, and this was predictive of rehiring. Shelter-in-place orders drove only a small share of job losses. Last, states that received more small business loans from the Paycheck Protection Program and states with more generous unemployment insurance benefits had milder declines and faster recoveries. We find no evidence that high UI replacement rates drove job losses or slowed rehiring.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19危机初期的劳动力市场测量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用传统和非传统数据来衡量美国劳动力市场从3月到7月初的崩溃和部分复苏，将此次衰退与之前的衰退进行对比，并提供政策应对效果的初步证据。对于小型和大型企业的时薪工人而言，几乎所有的就业下降都发生在3月14日至28日之间。这主要是由低工资服务业推动的，特别是零售业以及休闲和酒店业。小企业失业的很大一部分反映了完全关闭的企业，尽管许多后来重新开业。原本就不健康的企业更有可能关闭且不太可能重新开业，而弱势工人更有可能被解雇且不太可能返回。大多数被解雇的工人期望被召回，这预示着重新雇佣。居家令仅导致了很小一部分失业。最后，获得更多薪资保护计划小企业贷款的州以及提供更慷慨失业保险福利的州，经历了更温和的下降和更快的复苏。我们没有发现证据表明高失业保险替代率导致了失业或减缓了重新雇佣。

papers.title: Collaborating During Coronavirus: The Impact of COVID-19 on the Nature of Work
papers.authors: Evan DeFilippis, Stephen Michael Impink, Madison Singell, Jeffrey T. Polzer, Raffaella Sadun
papers.abstract: We explore the impact of COVID-19 on employee's digital communication patterns through an event study of lockdowns in 16 large metropolitan areas in North America, Europe and the Middle East. Using de- identified, aggregated meeting and email meta-data from 3,143,270 users, we find, compared to pre- pandemic levels, increases in the number of meetings per person (+12.9 percent) and the number of attendees per meeting (+13.5 percent), but decreases in the average length of meetings (-20.1 percent). Collectively, the net effect is that people spent less time in meetings per day (-11.5 percent) in the post- lockdown period. We also find significant and durable increases in length of the average workday (+8.2 percent, or +48.5 minutes), along with short-term increases in email activity. These findings provide insight from a novel dataset into how the nature of work has changed for a large sample of knowledge workers. We discuss these changes in light of the ongoing challenges faced by organizations and workers struggling to adapt and perform in the face of a global pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间的协作：COVID-19对工作性质的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过对北美、欧洲和中东16个大都市区封锁的事件研究，探讨了COVID-19对员工数字沟通模式的影响。利用来自3,143,270名用户的去标识化、汇总的会议和电子邮件元数据，我们发现，与疫情前水平相比，每人会议数量（+12.9%）和每次会议参会人数（+13.5%）有所增加，但会议平均时长（-20.1%）有所下降。总体而言，净效应是人们在封锁后时期每天花在会议上的时间减少了（-11.5%）。我们还发现平均工作日时长显著且持久地增加（+8.2%，即+48.5分钟），以及电子邮件活动的短期增加。这些发现从一个新颖的数据集提供了关于大量知识工作者工作性质如何变化的见解。我们结合组织和工人在全球疫情中努力适应和表现所面临的持续挑战，讨论了这些变化。

papers.title: Twenty Year Economic Impacts of Deworming
papers.authors: Joan Hamory, Edward Miguel, Michael W. Walker, Michael Kremer, Sarah J. Baird
papers.abstract: This study exploits a randomized school health intervention that provided deworming treatment to Kenyan children and utilizes longitudinal data to estimate impacts on economic outcomes up to 20 years later. The effective respondent tracking rate was 84%. Individuals who received 2 to 3 additional years of childhood deworming experience an increase of 14% in consumption expenditure, 13% in hourly earnings, 9% in non-agricultural work hours, and are 9% more likely to live in urban areas. Most effects are concentrated among males and older individuals. Given deworming's low cost, a conservative annualized social internal rate of return estimate is 37%.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, LS；JEL：I15, J24, O15
papers.zh_title: 驱虫治疗的二十年经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究利用一项随机学校健康干预措施，该措施为肯尼亚儿童提供驱虫治疗，并利用纵向数据估计长达20年后对经济结果的影响。有效的受访者追踪率为84%。接受2至3年额外儿童期驱虫治疗的个体，其消费支出增加14%，小时收入增加13%，非农业工作时间增加9%，并且居住在城市地区的可能性增加9%。大多数影响集中在男性和年龄较大的个体中。鉴于驱虫治疗成本低廉，保守估计的年化社会内部收益率为37%。

papers.title: A Dynamic Theory of Lending Standards
papers.authors: Michael J. Fishman, Jonathan A. Parker, Ludwig Straub
papers.abstract: We analyze a dynamic credit market where banks choose lending standards, modeled as costly effort to screen out bad borrowers. Tighter standards worsen the borrower pool, increasing banks’ incentives to employ tight standards in the future. This dynamic complementarity in lending standards can amplify and prolong downturns, decreasing lending and increasing credit spreads. Because lending standards have negative externalities, the market can converge to a steady state with inefficiently tight lending standards. We discuss the role of optimal policy to avoid this outcome as well as the impact of balance sheet costs on lending standards.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D82, E51, G21
papers.zh_title: 贷款标准的动态理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个动态信贷市场，其中银行选择贷款标准，建模为筛选出不良借款人的成本性努力。更严格的标准会恶化借款人池，增加银行未来采用严格标准的激励。这种贷款标准中的动态互补性可以放大和延长经济低迷，减少贷款并增加信用利差。由于贷款标准具有负外部性，市场可能收敛到一个贷款标准过于严格的无效率稳态。我们讨论了避免这种结果的最优政策的作用，以及资产负债表成本对贷款标准的影响。

papers.title: At What Level Should One Cluster Standard Errors in Paired and Small-Strata Experiments?
papers.authors: Clément de Chaisemartin, Jaime Ramirez-Cuellar
papers.abstract: In clustered paired experiments, randomization units, say villages, are matched into pairs, and one unit of each pair is randomly assigned to treatment. To estimate the treatment effect, researchers often regress their outcome on the treatment and pair fixed effects, clustering standard errors at the unit-of-randomization level. We show that the variance estimator in this regression may be severely downward biased: under constant treatment effect, its expectation equals 1/2 of the true variance. Instead, researchers should cluster at the pair level. Using simulations, we show that those results extend to clustered stratified experiments with few units per strata.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EH, LS, TWP；JEL：C01, C21
papers.zh_title: 配对和小分层实验中标准误应在哪一层级聚类？
papers.zh_abstract: 在聚类配对实验中，随机化单位（例如村庄）被匹配成对，每对中的一个单位被随机分配接受处理。为了估计处理效应，研究者通常将结果变量对处理变量和配对固定效应进行回归，并在随机化单位层级对标准误进行聚类。我们证明，该回归中的方差估计量可能存在严重的向下偏误：在恒定处理效应下，其期望值仅为真实方差的一半。相反，研究者应在配对层级进行聚类。通过模拟，我们表明这些结果也适用于每层内单位数较少的聚类分层实验。

papers.title: Nursing Home Staff Networks and COVID-19
papers.authors: M. Keith Chen, Judith A. Chevalier, Elisa F. Long
papers.abstract: Nursing homes and other long-term care facilities account for a disproportionate share of COVID-19 cases and fatalities worldwide. Outbreaks in U.S. nursing homes have persisted despite nationwide visitor restrictions beginning in mid-March. An early report issued by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention identiﬁed staﬀ members working in multiple nursing homes as a likely source of spread from the Life Care Center in Kirkland, Washington to other skilled nursing facilities. The full extent of staﬀ connections between nursing homes—and the role these connections serve in spreading a highly contagious respiratory infection—is currently unknown given the lack of centralized data on cross-facility employment. We perform the ﬁrst large-scale analysis of nursing home connections via shared staﬀ and contractors using device-level geolocation data from 50 million smartphones, and ﬁnd that 5.1 percent of smartphone users who visit a nursing home for at least one hour also visit another facility during our 11-week study period—even after visitor restrictions were imposed. We construct network measures of connectedness and estimate that nursing homes, on average, share connections with 7 other facilities. Controlling for demographic and other factors, a home’s staﬀ-network connections and its centrality within the greater network strongly predict COVID-19 cases. Traditional federal regulatory metrics of nursing home quality are unimportant in predicting outbreaks, consistent with recent research. Multivariate regressions comparing demographically and geographically similar nursing homes suggest that 49 percent of COVID cases among nursing home residents are attributable to staﬀ movement between facilities.
papers.zh_title: 养老院员工网络与COVID-19
papers.zh_abstract: 养老院和其他长期护理设施在全球COVID-19病例和死亡中占比过高。尽管美国从3月中旬开始实施全国性的访客限制，但养老院的疫情爆发持续存在。美国疾病控制与预防中心发布的一份早期报告指出，在多家养老院工作的员工可能是病毒从华盛顿州柯克兰的生命护理中心传播到其他专业护理机构的来源。由于缺乏跨设施就业的集中数据，养老院之间员工联系的全面程度——以及这些联系在传播高传染性呼吸道感染中的作用——目前尚不清楚。我们利用5000万部智能手机的设备级地理定位数据，首次对通过共享员工和承包商形成的养老院联系进行了大规模分析，发现即使在实施访客限制后，在我们11周的研究期间内，访问一家养老院至少一小时的智能手机用户中，有5.1%也访问了另一家设施。我们构建了连通性的网络指标，并估计养老院平均与7家其他设施共享联系。在控制人口统计和其他因素后，一家养老院的员工网络联系及其在更大网络中的中心性强烈预测了COVID-19病例。传统的联邦监管养老院质量指标在预测疫情爆发方面并不重要，这与近期研究一致。对人口统计和地理位置相似的养老院进行多元回归分析表明，养老院居民中49%的COVID-19病例可归因于员工在设施间的流动。

papers.title: Regulatory Arbitrage in Teacher Hiring and Retention: Evidence from Massachusetts Charter Schools
papers.authors: Jesse M. Bruhn, Scott A. Imberman, Marcus A. Winters
papers.abstract: We study personnel flexibility in charter schools by exploring how teacher retention varies with teacher and school quality in Massachusetts. Charters are more likely to lose their highest and lowest value-added teachers. Low performers tend to exit public education, while high performers tend to switch to traditional public schools. To rationalize these findings, we propose a model in which educators with high fixed-costs use charter schools to explore teaching careers before obtaining licenses required for higher paying public sector jobs. The model suggests charter schools create positive externalities for traditional public schools by increasing the average quality of available teachers.
papers.zh_title: 教师招聘与留任中的监管套利：来自马萨诸塞州特许学校的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过探索马萨诸塞州教师留任率如何随教师和学校质量变化，来研究特许学校的人员灵活性。特许学校更有可能流失其增值最高和最低的教师。表现不佳的教师倾向于退出公立教育，而表现优异的教师则倾向于转到传统公立学校。为了合理化这些发现，我们提出了一个模型，其中具有高固定成本的教育工作者利用特许学校探索教学生涯，然后获得更高薪酬的公共部门工作所需的执照。该模型表明，特许学校通过提高可用教师的平均质量，为传统公立学校创造了正外部性。

papers.title: Challenges of Change: An Experiment Promoting Women to Managerial Roles in the Bangladeshi Garment Sector
papers.authors: Rocco Macchiavello, Andreas Menzel, Atonu Rabbani, Christopher Woodruff
papers.abstract: Women remain disadvantaged in access to management positions around the world. We conduct a field experiment with 24 large garment factories in Bangladesh to test for inefficient representation of women among line supervisors. We identify the marginal female and male candidates for supervisory positions and randomly assign them to manage production lines. Three sets of results emerge: (i) extensive diagnostic testing at baseline reveal few skill differences between marginal female and male supervisor candidates; (ii) initially, marginal female candidates have lower productivity and evaluations from sub-ordinate workers, though after four to six months, these gaps disappear; and (iii) the share of the female candidates retained as line supervisor after the trial is significantly higher than the share of female supervisors in the factories at baseline. This suggests that factories previously promoted fewer women than would have been optimal. Additional surveys and a lab-in-the-field experiment suggest that the initially worse performance stems from negative beliefs of workers about the abilities of female supervisors.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PR；JEL：J16, J71, M51, M54, O14, O15
papers.zh_title: 变革的挑战：促进孟加拉国服装行业女性担任管理职位的实验
papers.zh_abstract: 在全球范围内，女性在获得管理职位方面仍然处于不利地位。我们在孟加拉国的24家大型服装厂进行了一项实地实验，以检验生产线主管中女性代表性不足的低效现象。我们识别出主管职位的边缘女性和男性候选人，并随机分配他们管理生产线。三组结果显现：（i）基线时的广泛诊断测试显示，边缘女性和男性主管候选人之间的技能差异很小；（ii）最初，边缘女性候选人的生产力和来自下属工人的评价较低，但四到六个月后，这些差距消失；（iii）试验后留任为生产线主管的女性候选人比例显著高于工厂基线时女性主管的比例。这表明工厂之前提拔的女性人数少于最优水平。额外的调查和一项实验室实地实验表明，最初较差的表现源于工人对女性主管能力的负面信念。

papers.title: Startups, Unicorns, and the Local Inflow of Inventors
papers.authors: Benjamin Balsmeier, Lee Fleming, Matt Marx, Seungryul Ryan Shin
papers.abstract: We provide evidence that the arrival of technical human capital improves regional entrepreneurship, both by increasing firm entry and reducing failure. The results also indicate negative externalities upon low-tech and competing industries: the arrival of inventors in a county shifts the locus of venture capital investment away from low-tech startups to high-tech startups and moreover towards new ventures in the same sector as those inventors’ skills. Identification is provided by a shift-share instrument combining the spatial distribution of surnames in the 1940 U.S. Census with thousands of surname-specific shifts based on modern inventor mobility.
papers.zh_title: 初创企业、独角兽企业与发明家的本地流入
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，技术人力资本的到来改善了区域创业活动，既通过增加企业进入，也通过减少企业失败。结果还表明，对低技术和竞争性行业存在负外部性：发明家进入一个县，会将风险资本投资的焦点从低技术初创企业转向高技术初创企业，并且进一步转向与这些发明家技能相同行业的新企业。识别方法是通过一个结合1940年美国人口普查中姓氏空间分布与基于现代发明家流动性的数千个特定姓氏变化的份额转移工具变量提供的。

papers.title: COVID-19 Prevention and Air Pollution in the Absence of a Lockdown
papers.authors: Hung-Hao Chang, Chad Meyerhoefer, Feng-An Yang
papers.abstract: Recent studies demonstrate that air quality improved during the coronavirus pandemic due to the imposition of social lockdowns. We investigate the impact of COVID-19 on air pollution in the two largest cities in Taiwan, which were not subject to economic or mobility restrictions. Using a generalized difference-in-differences approach and real-time data on air quality and transportation, we estimate that levels of sulfur dioxide, nitrogen dioxide and particulate matter increased 5 - 12 percent relative to 2017 - 2019. We demonstrate that this counterintuitive finding is likely due to a shift in preferences for mode of transport away from public transportation and towards personal automobiles. Similar COVID-19 prevention behaviors in regions or countries emerging from lockdowns could likewise result in an increase in air pollution.
papers.zh_title: 无封锁情况下的COVID-19预防与空气污染
papers.zh_abstract: 近期研究表明，由于实施社会封锁，冠状病毒大流行期间空气质量有所改善。我们调查了COVID-19对台湾两个最大城市空气污染的影响，这些城市未受到经济或出行限制。使用广义双重差分方法和空气质量与交通的实时数据，我们估计二氧化硫、二氧化氮和颗粒物的水平相对于2017-2019年增加了5%至12%。我们证明，这一反直觉的发现很可能是由于出行方式偏好从公共交通转向私家车所致。在解除封锁的地区或国家，类似的COVID-19预防行为同样可能导致空气污染增加。

papers.title: Co-Benefits and Regulatory Impact Analysis: Theory and Evidence from Federal Air Quality Regulations
papers.authors: Joseph E. Aldy, Matthew Kotchen, Mary F. Evans, Meredith Fowlie, Arik Levinson, Karen Palmer
papers.abstract: This paper considers the treatment of co-benefits in benefit-cost analysis of federal air quality regulations. Using a comprehensive data set on all major Clean Air Act rules issued by the Environmental Protection Agency over the period 1997-2019, we show that (1) co-benefits make up a significant share of the monetized benefits; (2) among the categories of co-benefits, those associated with reductions in fine particulate matter are the most significant; and (3) co-benefits have been pivotal to the quantified net benefit calculation in exactly half of cases. Motivated by these trends, we develop a simple conceptual framework that illustrates a critical point: co-benefits are simply a semantic category of benefits that should be included in benefit-cost analyses. We also address common concerns about whether the inclusion of co-benefits is problematic because of alternative regulatory approaches that may be more cost-effective and the possibility for double counting.
papers.zh_title: 协同效益与监管影响分析：来自联邦空气质量法规的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了联邦空气质量法规成本效益分析中协同效益的处理方式。利用1997-2019年间美国环境保护署发布的所有主要《清洁空气法》规则的全面数据集，我们表明：（1）协同效益在货币化效益中占显著份额；（2）在协同效益类别中，与细颗粒物减少相关的效益最为显著；（3）在恰好一半的案例中，协同效益对量化的净效益计算起到了关键作用。受这些趋势的启发，我们开发了一个简单的概念框架，阐明了一个关键点：协同效益仅仅是效益的一个语义类别，应纳入成本效益分析。我们还回应了关于纳入协同效益是否因可能存在更具成本效益的替代监管方法以及重复计算的可能性而产生问题的常见担忧。

papers.title: Designing Disability Insurance Reforms: Tightening Eligibility Rules or Reducing Benefits
papers.authors: Andreas Haller, Stefan Staubli, Josef Zweimüller
papers.abstract: We study the welfare effects of disability insurance (DI) and derive social-optimality conditions for the two main DI policy parameters: (i) DI eligibility rules and (ii) DI benefits. Causal evidence from two DI reforms in Austria generate fiscal multipliers (total over mechanical cost reductions) of 2.0-2.5 for stricter DI eligibility rules and of 1.3-1.4 for lower DI benefits. Stricter DI eligibility rules generate lower income losses (earnings + transfers), particularly at the lower end of the income distribution. Our analysis suggests that the welfare cost of rolling back the Austrian DI program is lower through tightening eligibility rules than through lowering benefits. Applying our framework to the US DI system suggests that both loosening eligibility rules, and increasing benefits, would be welfare increasing.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H53, H55, J14, J21, J65
papers.zh_title: 设计残疾保险改革：收紧资格规则还是降低福利
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究残疾保险的福利效应，并推导出两个主要DI政策参数的社会最优条件：（i）DI资格规则和（ii）DI福利。来自奥地利两项DI改革的因果证据显示，更严格的DI资格规则的财政乘数（总效应相对于机械成本减少）为2.0-2.5，而降低DI福利的财政乘数为1.3-1.4。更严格的DI资格规则导致更低的收入损失（收入+转移支付），特别是在收入分布的较低端。我们的分析表明，通过收紧资格规则来缩减奥地利DI项目的福利成本低于通过降低福利。将我们的框架应用于美国DI系统表明，放宽资格规则和增加福利都将提高福利。

papers.title: The Risk of Being a Fallen Angel and the Corporate Dash for Cash in the Midst of COVID
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Sascha Steffen
papers.abstract: Data on firm-loan-level daily credit line drawdowns in the United States expose a corporate “dash for cash” induced by the COVID-19 pandemic. In the first phase of the crisis, which was characterized by extreme precaution and heightened aggregate risk, all firms drew down bank credit lines and raised cash levels. In the second phase, which followed the adoption of stabilization policies, only the highest-rated firms switched to capital markets to raise cash. Consistent with the risk of becoming a fallen angel, the lowest-quality BBB-rated firms behaved more similarly to non-investment grade firms. The observed corporate behavior reveals the significant impact of credit risk on corporate cash holdings.
papers.zh_title: 沦为堕落天使的风险与COVID-19期间企业的现金争夺战
papers.zh_abstract: 基于美国企业-贷款层面每日信贷额度提取的数据，揭示了COVID-19疫情引发的企业“现金争夺战”。在危机第一阶段，其特征是极端的预防行为和加剧的总体风险，所有企业都提取银行信贷额度并提高现金水平。在第二阶段，即稳定政策实施之后，只有最高评级的企业转向资本市场筹集现金。与沦为堕落天使的风险一致，质量最低的BBB级企业表现得更像非投资级企业。观察到的企业行为揭示了信用风险对企业现金持有的显著影响。

papers.title: Randomization in the Tropics Revisited: a Theme and Eleven Variations
papers.authors: Angus Deaton
papers.abstract: Randomized controlled trials have been used in economics for 50 years, and intensively in economic development for more than 20. There has been a great deal of useful work, but RCTs have no unique advantages or disadvantages over other empirical methods in economics. They do not simplify inference, nor can an RCT establish causality. Many of the difficulties were recognized and explored in economics 30 years ago, but are sometimes forgotten. I review some of the most relevant issues here. The most troubling questions concern ethics, especially when very poor people are experimented on. Finding out what works, even if such a thing is possible, is in itself a deeply inadequate basis for policy
papers.zh_title: 热带地区随机化再审视：一个主题与十一种变体
papers.zh_abstract: 随机对照试验在经济学中已使用50年，在经济发展领域密集使用超过20年。已有大量有价值的工作，但RCT相对于经济学中的其他实证方法并无独特优势或劣势。它们不能简化推断，也无法确立因果关系。许多困难在30年前的经济学中已被认识和探讨，但有时被遗忘。本文回顾了一些最相关的问题。最令人不安的问题涉及伦理，尤其是在对非常贫困的人群进行实验时。发现什么有效，即使这是可能的，其本身作为政策基础也远远不够。

papers.title: Valuing the Global Mortality Consequences of Climate Change Accounting for Adaptation Costs and Benefits
papers.authors: Tamma A. Carleton, Amir Jina, Michael T. Delgado, Michael Greenstone, Trevor Houser, Solomon M. Hsiang, Andrew Hultgren, Robert E. Kopp, Kelly E. McCusker, Ishan B. Nath, James Rising, Ashwin Rode, Hee Kwon Seo, Arvid Viaene, Jiacan Yuan, Alice Tianbo Zhang
papers.abstract: Using 40 countries’ subnational data, we estimate age-specific mortality-temperature relationships and extrapolate them to countries without data today and into a future with climate change. We uncover a U-shaped relationship where extreme cold and hot temperatures increase mortality rates, especially for the elderly. Critically, this relationship is flattened by both higher incomes and adaptation to local climate. Using a revealed preference approach to recover unobserved adaptation costs, we estimate that the mean global increase in mortality risk due to climate change, accounting for adaptation benefits and costs, is valued at roughly 3.2% of global GDP in 2100 under a high emissions scenario. Notably, today’s cold locations are projected to benefit, while today’s poor and hot locations have large projected damages. Finally, our central estimates indicate that the release of an additional ton of CO2 today will cause mortality-related damages of $36.6 under a high emissions scenario, with an interquartile range accounting for both econometric and climate uncertainty of [-$7.8, $73.0]. These empirically grounded estimates exceed the previous literature’s estimates by an order of magnitude.
papers.zh_title: 考虑适应成本与收益的气候变化全球死亡率后果评估
papers.zh_abstract: 利用40个国家的次国家级数据，我们估计了特定年龄的死亡率-温度关系，并将其外推至当前无数据的国家以及未来气候变化情景。我们发现了一种U型关系，即极端寒冷和炎热温度会增加死亡率，尤其是对老年人而言。关键的是，这种关系因更高的收入和适应当地气候而变得平缓。通过使用显示性偏好方法恢复未观测到的适应成本，我们估计，在高排放情景下，到2100年，考虑适应收益和成本后，气候变化导致的全球平均死亡率风险增加价值约为全球GDP的3.2%。值得注意的是，当前寒冷地区预计将受益，而当前贫困和炎热地区则面临巨大的预计损失。最后，我们的中心估计表明，在高排放情景下，今天每多释放一吨二氧化碳将导致与死亡率相关的损失36.6美元，其四分位距（涵盖计量经济学和气候不确定性）为[-7.8美元, 73.0美元]。这些基于实证的估计值比以往文献的估计值高出一个数量级。

papers.title: The $100 Million Nudge: Increasing Tax Compliance of Businesses and the Self-Employed using a Natural Field Experiment
papers.authors: Justin E. Holz, John A. List, Alejandro Zentner, Marvin Cardoza, Joaquin Zentner
papers.abstract: This paper uses a natural field experiment to examine the effectiveness of specific nudges on tax compliance amongst firms and the self-employed in the Dominican Republic. In collaboration with the Dominican Republic’s tax authority, we designed messages for more than 28,000 self-employed workers and over 56,000 firms. Leveraging administrative tax data, we find evidence that our nudges (increasing the salience of prison sentences or public disclosure of tax evaders) have large effects on increasing tax compliance, primarily working through the channel of decreasing claimed tax exemptions. Interestingly, we find that firms are more impacted than the self-employed, and that firm size is critically linked to nudge effectiveness: larger firms are considerably more influenced by nudges than smaller firms. We find this latter result noteworthy given the paucity of evidence showing significant behavioral impacts of nudges amongst the largest players in a market. Overall, our messages increased tax revenue by $193 million (roughly 0.23% of the Dominican Republic’s GDP in 2018), with over $100 million constituting income that the government would not have received without our field experimental nudges.
papers.zh_title: 一亿美元的助推：通过自然实地实验提升企业和自雇人士的税收合规性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用自然实地实验，研究了特定助推措施对多米尼加共和国企业和自雇人士税收合规性的有效性。我们与多米尼加共和国税务机关合作，为超过28,000名自雇工人和56,000多家企业设计了信息提示。借助行政税收数据，我们发现这些助推措施（提高监禁刑罚或公开曝光逃税者的显著性）对提升税收合规性产生了显著效果，主要通过减少申报的税收豁免这一渠道发挥作用。有趣的是，我们发现企业比自雇人士受到的影响更大，并且企业规模与助推效果密切相关：大型企业比小型企业更显著地受到助推的影响。鉴于缺乏证据表明助推对市场中最大参与者有显著行为影响，我们认为后一个结果值得关注。总体而言，我们的信息提示增加了1.93亿美元的税收收入（约占2018年多米尼加共和国GDP的0.23%），其中超过1亿美元是如果没有我们的实地实验助推，政府本不会收到的收入。

papers.title: Valuing Long-Term Property Rights with Anticipated Political Regime Shifts
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Maggie Rong Hu, Zhenping Wang, Vincent Yao
papers.abstract: We identify exposure to political risk by exploiting a unique variation around land lease extension protection after 2047 in Hong Kong's housing market due to historical arrangements under the “One Country, Two Systems” design. Relative to properties that have been promised an extension protection, those with legally unprotected leases granted by the current government are sold at a substantial discount of around 8%, and those with colonial leases suffer an additional discount of about 8%. Incorporating estimated structural parameters that suggest an additional 20% ground rent after 2047, our model matches these empirical discounts well across long-term lease horizons. We find that the discount increases as time approaches 2047 and is higher in areas where residents feel more pessimistic about the city's future.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, LE, POL；JEL：G11, G12, G18, K25, N25, O53, P26, R30
papers.zh_title: 在预期政治体制转变下评估长期产权价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过利用香港住房市场中因“一国两制”设计下的历史安排而导致的2047年后土地租约延期保护的特殊差异，识别了政治风险暴露。与已承诺延期保护的房产相比，由现政府授予的、法律上未受保护的租约房产以约8%的显著折扣出售，而殖民租约房产则额外遭受约8%的折扣。结合估计的结构参数（表明2047年后地租增加20%），我们的模型在长期租约期限内很好地匹配了这些经验折扣。我们发现，随着时间接近2047年，折扣增加，并且在居民对城市未来感到更悲观的地区，折扣更高。

papers.title: Reconciling Trends in U.S. Male Earnings Volatility: Results from a Four Data Set Project
papers.authors: Robert A. Moffitt
papers.abstract: There is a large literature on earnings and income volatility in labor economics, household finance, and macroeconomics. One strand of that literature has studied whether individual earnings volatility has risen or fallen in the U.S. over the last several decades. There are strong disagreements in the empirical literature on this important question, with some studies showing upward trends, some downward trends, and some flat trends. Some studies have suggested that the differences are the result of using flawed survey data instead of more accurate administrative data. This paper provides an overview of a project attempting to reconcile these findings with four different data sets and six different data series--three survey and three administrative data series, including two which match survey respondent data to their administrative data. Using common specifications, measures of volatility, and other treatments of the data, the papers show almost uniformly a lack of any significant long-term trend in male earnings volatility over the last 30 years. Moreover, the survey and the administrative data almost entirely agree on that long-term stability when the comparison is done properly. Several possible explanations for the differing finds in past work are suggested by the papers. The stability of earnings volatility raises many questions for future research on trends in the U.S. labor market.
papers.zh_title: 调和美国男性收入波动趋势：来自四个数据集项目的结果
papers.zh_abstract: 在劳动经济学、家庭金融和宏观经济学中，关于收入和收入波动性的文献众多。其中一支文献研究了美国过去几十年中个人收入波动性是上升还是下降。在这个重要问题上，实证文献存在严重分歧，一些研究显示上升趋势，一些显示下降趋势，还有一些显示平稳趋势。一些研究认为，这些差异源于使用有缺陷的调查数据而非更准确的行政数据。本文概述了一个项目，试图用四个不同的数据集和六个不同的数据序列（三个调查数据序列和三个行政数据序列，包括两个将调查受访者数据与其行政数据匹配的序列）来调和这些发现。使用共同的规格、波动性度量和其他数据处理方式，这些论文几乎一致显示，在过去30年中，男性收入波动性缺乏任何显著的长期趋势。此外，当进行适当比较时，调查数据和行政数据在长期稳定性上几乎完全一致。这些论文提出了过去研究中不同发现的几种可能解释。收入波动性的稳定性为未来关于美国劳动力市场趋势的研究提出了许多问题。

papers.title: The Missing Inflation Puzzle: The Role of the Wage-Price Pass-Through
papers.authors: Sebastian Heise, Fatih Karahan, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: Price inflation in the U.S. has been sluggish and slow to pick up in the last two decades. We show that this missing inflation can be traced to a growing disconnect between unemployment and core goods inflation. We exploit rich industry-level data to show that weakening pass-through from wages to prices in the goods-producing sector is an important source of the slow inflation pick-up in the last two decades. We set up a theoretical framework where markups and pass-through are a function of firms' market shares and show that increased import competition and rising market concentration reduce pass-through from wages to prices. We then use industry-level data and find strong support for these two channels consistent with the implications of our model.
papers.zh_title: 缺失的通胀之谜：工资-价格传导的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的价格通胀在过去二十年中一直低迷且难以回升。我们表明，这种缺失的通胀可以追溯到失业与核心商品通胀之间日益脱节的关系。我们利用丰富的行业层面数据来证明，商品生产部门中工资向价格传导的减弱是过去二十年通胀缓慢回升的重要来源。我们建立了一个理论框架，其中加价和传导是企业市场份额的函数，并表明进口竞争加剧和市场集中度上升会降低工资向价格的传导。然后，我们使用行业层面数据，发现了支持这两个渠道的有力证据，这与我们模型的含义一致。

papers.title: Informational Barriers to Market Access: Experimental Evidence from Liberian Firms
papers.authors: Jonas Hjort, Golvine de Rochambeau, Vinayak Iyer, Fei Ao
papers.abstract: Evidence suggests that many firms in lower-income countries stagnate because they cannot access growth-conducive markets. We hypothesize that overlooked informational barriers distort market access, excluding productive but “information-poor” suppliers. To investigate, we gave a random subset of medium-sized Liberian firms vouchers for a week-long program targeting equal-opportunity access to the input purchases of government, companies, and other organizations—a market that makes up upwards of 80 percent of global GDP. The program exclusively teaches “sellership”: how to navigate large buyers’ complex, formal sourcing procedures. Firms that participate win three times as many formal contracts a year later. The impact is heterogeneous: informational sales barriers bind for about a quarter of Liberian firms. Three years post-training, these firms continue to win desirable contracts, are more likely to operate, and employ more workers. We use a simple model of managers’ time-constraints to illustrate a possible explanation for why informational market access barriers can persist and generate poverty-trap-like dynamics among firms, even absent credit constraints. Our results help rationalize common demand-side policies in public procurement that nonetheless appear to scratch at the surface of a bigger distortion.
papers.zh_title: 市场准入的信息障碍：来自利比里亚企业的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 有证据表明，许多低收入国家的企业因无法进入促进增长的市场而停滞不前。我们假设，被忽视的信息障碍扭曲了市场准入，排除了有生产力但“信息贫乏”的供应商。为了调查这一点，我们向随机抽取的利比里亚中型企业提供了为期一周的培训券，该培训旨在促进平等机会地进入政府、公司和其他组织的采购市场——这个市场占全球GDP的80%以上。该培训专门教授“销售技巧”：如何应对大型买家复杂、正式的采购程序。参与的企业一年后赢得的正式合同数量是原来的三倍。影响是异质性的：信息销售障碍制约了约四分之一的利比里亚企业。培训三年后，这些企业继续赢得理想的合同，更有可能持续运营，并雇佣更多工人。我们使用一个简单的管理者时间约束模型，来说明为什么信息市场准入障碍可能持续存在并在企业中产生类似贫困陷阱的动态，即使没有信贷约束。我们的结果有助于解释公共采购中常见的需求侧政策，这些政策似乎只是触及了更大扭曲的表面。

papers.title: The Effect of Mentoring on School Attendance and Academic Outcomes: A Randomized Evaluation of the Check & Connect Program
papers.authors: Jonathan Guryan, Sandra Christenson, Ashley Cureton, Ijun Lai, Jens Ludwig, Catherine Schwarz, Emma Shirey, Mary Clair Turner
papers.abstract: In response to budget problems, many urban school systems reduced resources for getting students to come to school, like truancy officers. Chicago, for instance, went from 150 truancy officers down to, in 1991, a total of zero. Is that a good idea? We explore here the effects of increased support by a pro-social adult, or “social capital,” delivered through a structured student monitoring and mentoring program called Check & Connect (C&C). We carried out a large-scale randomized controlled trial with C&C in partnership with the Chicago Public Schools (CPS) to students in grades 1-8. Program participation decreased absences in grades 5-7 by 4.2 days, or 22.9 percent, but with no detectable effects on students in grades 1-4. We also did not find statistically significant effects on learning outcomes such as test scores or GPA, or any detectable spillovers to other students within the schools where the program was administered. The modest impacts per dollar spent, compared to previous evidence on either low-cost "nudges" or relatively intensive, higher-cost interventions, raise the possibility that, for very disadvantaged students, there may be decreasing but then increasing returns to program intensity for the problem of student disengagement.
papers.zh_title: 辅导对学生出勤和学业成果的影响：Check & Connect项目的随机评估
papers.zh_abstract: 为了应对预算问题，许多城市学校系统减少了用于让学生上学的资源，例如逃学官员。例如，芝加哥从150名逃学官员减少到1991年的零。这是个好主意吗？我们在此探讨通过一个名为Check & Connect（C&C）的结构化学生监测和辅导项目，由亲社会成年人提供的增强支持（或“社会资本”）的效果。我们与芝加哥公立学校（CPS）合作，对1-8年级的学生进行了一项大规模的C&C随机对照试验。项目参与使5-7年级学生的缺勤减少了4.2天，即22.9%，但对1-4年级学生没有检测到显著影响。我们也没有发现对学习成绩（如考试成绩或GPA）有统计上显著的影响，或者对项目所在学校内其他学生有任何可检测的溢出效应。与先前关于低成本“助推”或相对密集、高成本干预的证据相比，每美元支出的影响适中，这提出了一个可能性：对于非常弱势的学生，针对学生脱离问题，项目强度可能存在递减但随后递增的回报。

papers.title: This Time It's Different: The Role of Women's Employment in a Pandemic Recession
papers.authors: Titan Alon, Matthias Doepke, Jane Olmstead-Rumsey, Michèle Tertilt
papers.abstract: In recent US recessions, employment losses have been much larger for men than for women. Yet, in the current recession caused by the Covid-19 pandemic, the opposite is true: unemployment is higher among women. In this paper, we analyze the causes and consequences of this phenomenon. We argue that women have experienced sharp employment losses both because their employment is concentrated in heavily affected sectors such as restaurants, and due to increased childcare needs caused by school and daycare closures, preventing many women from working. We analyze the repercussions of this trend using a quantitative macroeconomic model featuring heterogeneity in gender, marital status, childcare needs, and human capital. Our quantitative analysis suggests that a pandemic recession will i) feature a strong transmission from employment to aggregate demand due to diminished within-household insurance; ii) result in a widening of the gender wage gap throughout the recovery; and iii) contribute to a weakening of the gender norms that currently produce a lopsided distribution of the division of labor in home work and childcare.
papers.zh_title: 这次不同：女性就业在大流行衰退中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 在近期的美国经济衰退中，男性的就业损失远大于女性。然而，在由新冠疫情引发的当前衰退中，情况正好相反：女性的失业率更高。在本文中，我们分析了这一现象的原因和后果。我们认为，女性经历了严重的就业损失，既因为她们的就业集中在受严重影响行业（如餐馆），也因为学校和日托中心关闭导致育儿需求增加，使许多女性无法工作。我们使用一个定量宏观经济模型分析这一趋势的影响，该模型具有性别、婚姻状况、育儿需求和人力资本的异质性。我们的定量分析表明，大流行衰退将i）由于家庭内部保险减少，呈现出从就业到总需求的强传导；ii）导致整个复苏过程中性别工资差距扩大；以及iii）有助于削弱当前导致家务劳动和育儿分工不平衡的性别规范。

papers.title: Does FinTech Substitute for Banks? Evidence from the Paycheck Protection Program
papers.authors: Isil Erel, Jack Liebersohn
papers.abstract: New technology promises to expand the supply of ﬁnancial services to small businesses poorly served by the banking system. Does it succeed? We study the response of FinTech to ﬁnancial services demand created by the introduction of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP). We ﬁnd that FinTech is disproportionately used in ZIP codes with fewer bank branches, lower incomes, and a larger minority share of the population, as well as in industries with little ex ante small-business lending. FinTech’s role in PPP provision is also greater in counties where the economic eﬀects of the COVID-19 pandemic were more severe. We estimate that more PPP provision by traditional banks causes statistically signiﬁcant but economically small substitution away from FinTechs, implying that FinTech mostly expands the overall supply of ﬁnancial services, rather than redistributing it.
papers.meta: Programs：CF；JEL：G00, G01, G2, G21, G23, G28, H12, H2, H3
papers.zh_title: 金融科技是否替代了银行？来自薪资保护计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 新技术承诺扩大对银行系统服务不足的小企业的金融服务供应。它成功了吗？我们研究了金融科技对薪资保护计划（PPP）引入所创造的金融服务需求的反应。我们发现，金融科技在银行分支机构较少、收入较低、少数族裔人口比例较大的邮政编码区，以及在事前小企业贷款很少的行业中，被不成比例地使用。金融科技在PPP提供中的作用在新冠疫情经济影响更严重的县也更大。我们估计，传统银行提供更多PPP会导致金融科技的使用出现统计上显著但经济上微小的替代，这意味着金融科技主要扩大了金融服务的总体供应，而不是重新分配它。

papers.title: Taking It to the Limit: Effects of Increased Student Loan Availability on Attainment, Earnings, and Financial Well-Being
papers.authors: Sandra E. Black, Jeffrey T. Denning, Lisa J. Dettling, Sarena Goodman, Lesley J. Turner
papers.abstract: Growing reliance on student loans and repayment difficulties have raised concerns of a student debt crisis in the United States, but little is known about the effects of student borrowing on human capital and long‐run financial well‐being. We use variation induced by recent expansions in federal loan limits combined with administrative datasets to identify the effects of increased access to student loans on credit‐constrained students’ educational attainment, earnings, debt, and loan repayment. Increased student loan availability raises student debt and improves degree completion, later‐life earnings, and student loan repayment while having no effect on homeownership or other types of debt.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：D14, H52, H81, I21, I22, I23, I26, I28, J24
papers.zh_title: 极限挑战：增加学生贷款可获得性对学业成就、收入及财务福祉的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国对学生贷款的日益依赖以及还款困难引发了关于学生债务危机的担忧，但学生借贷对人力资本和长期财务福祉的影响尚不明确。我们利用近期联邦贷款限额扩大带来的变化，结合行政数据集，识别增加学生贷款可获得性对信贷受限学生教育成就、收入、债务和贷款偿还的影响。增加学生贷款可获得性提高了学生债务，改善了学位完成率、后期收入和学生贷款偿还情况，同时对住房拥有率或其他类型债务没有影响。

papers.title: Staggered Price Indexation
papers.authors: Martín Uribe
papers.abstract: Empirical studies using micro data find that about two thirds of all product prices do not change in a given quarter. This evidence has been interpreted as indicating the absence of price indexation. Further, models of staggered price setting without indexation interpret all price changes as optimal. However, the empirical evidence is mute with regard to whether price changes are optimal or not. To reconcile the possibility of price indexation with the micro evidence on the frequency of price changes, I modify the Calvo sticky price model by allowing each period a fraction of randomly picked prices to change optimally, another fraction of randomly picked prices to change due to indexation, and the remaining prices to be constant. The paper presents five main findings: (1) with staggered price indexation the Phillips curve includes a state variable that carries information about all past inflation rates; (2) as the degree of staggered price indexation increases, the Phillips curve becomes flatter; (3) staggered indexation dampens the short-run effect of monetary policy on inflation and amplifies its effect on output; (4) fixing the probability of a price change to 33% per quarter (in accordance with the empirical evidence), a small-scale new-Keynesian model estimated on U.S. data yields a probability of indexation of 19% per quarter (and therefore a probability of an optimal price change of 14% per quarter); and (5) according to the estimated model, staggered indexation explains more than half of the observed persistence of inflation in the United States.
papers.zh_title: 交错价格指数化
papers.zh_abstract: 使用微观数据的实证研究发现，在给定季度内，约三分之二的产品价格没有变化。这一证据被解释为表明不存在价格指数化。此外，没有指数化的交错价格设定模型将所有价格变化解释为最优调整。然而，实证证据并未说明价格变化是否最优。为了调和价格指数化的可能性与价格变化频率的微观证据，我修改了卡尔沃粘性价格模型，允许每个时期随机选取的一部分价格进行最优调整，另一部分随机选取的价格因指数化而变动，其余价格保持不变。本文提出五个主要发现：（1）在交错价格指数化下，菲利普斯曲线包含一个携带所有历史通胀率信息的状态变量；（2）随着交错价格指数化程度的提高，菲利普斯曲线变得更加平坦；（3）交错指数化减弱了货币政策对通胀的短期影响，并放大了其对产出的影响；（4）将每季度价格变化概率固定为33%（与实证证据一致），基于美国数据估计的小规模新凯恩斯模型得出每季度指数化概率为19%（因此每季度最优价格变化概率为14%）；（5）根据估计模型，交错指数化解释了美国通胀持续性的半数以上。

papers.title: Dust Bowl Migrants: Identifying an Archetype
papers.authors: Richard Hornbeck
papers.abstract: The 1930's American Dust Bowl created archetypal "Dust Bowl migrants," refugees from environmental collapse and economic upheaval. I examine this archetype, comparing migration from more-eroded counties and less-eroded counties to distinguish Dust Bowl migrants from other migrants in this era. Migrants from more-eroded counties were more "negatively selected," in years of education, than other migrants who were "positively selected." These Dust Bowl migrants struggled economically, especially in California. Despite migrants' struggles, however, I estimate strikingly modest impacts of the Dust Bowl on average incomes that contrast with its enduring impacts on agricultural land.
papers.zh_title: 沙尘暴移民：识别一个原型
papers.zh_abstract: 20世纪30年代的美国沙尘暴创造了典型的“沙尘暴移民”，即环境崩溃和经济动荡的难民。我考察了这一原型，通过比较来自侵蚀更严重县和侵蚀较轻县的移民，以区分沙尘暴移民与同时期的其他移民。来自侵蚀更严重县的移民在教育年限方面比其他“正向选择”的移民更具“负向选择”特征。这些沙尘暴移民在经济上挣扎，尤其是在加利福尼亚州。然而，尽管移民面临困境，我估计沙尘暴对平均收入的冲击出奇地温和，这与它对农业用地的持久影响形成对比。

papers.title: Book-to-Market, Mispricing, and the Cross-Section of Corporate Bond Returns
papers.authors: Söhnke M. Bartram, Mark Grinblatt, Yoshio Nozawa
papers.abstract: Methodological insights generating comprehensive transaction-based bond datasets reveal that corporate bonds’ book-to-market ratios predict returns from prices transacted days after signal observation. Senior bonds (even investment-grade) with the 20% highest ratios outperform the 20% lowest by 3%–4% annually after non-parametrically controlling for numerous liquidity, default, microstructure, and priced-risk attributes: yield-to-maturity, structural model equity hedges, bid-ask-spread, duration/maturity, credit spread/rating, past returns, coupon, size, age, and industry. Spreads for all-bond samples are larger. An efficient bond market would not exhibit the observed decay in the ratio’s predictive efficacy with implementation delays, smaller yield-to-maturity spreads, or similar-sized spreads across differing liquidity/de-fault bond-types.
papers.zh_title: 账面市值比、错误定价与公司债券收益的横截面
papers.zh_abstract: 生成基于交易的全面债券数据集的方法论见解表明，公司债券的账面市值比能够预测信号观察后数天交易价格所反映的收益。在非参数控制众多流动性、违约、微观结构和定价风险属性（如到期收益率、结构性模型股权对冲、买卖价差、久期/期限、信用利差/评级、历史收益、票息、规模、年龄和行业）后，账面市值比最高20%的优先债券（甚至投资级）每年比最低20%的债券表现高出3%-4%。全债券样本的利差更大。一个有效的债券市场不会表现出该比率预测效能在实施延迟、较小的到期收益率利差或不同流动性/违约债券类型间相似规模利差下的衰减。

papers.title: To What Extent Are Tariffs Offset By Exchange Rates?
papers.authors: Olivier Jeanne, Jeongwon Son
papers.abstract: In theory, we should expect tariffs to be partially offset by a currency appreciation in the tariff-imposing country or by a depreciation in the country on which the tariff is imposed. We find, based on a calibrated model, that the tariffs imposed by the US in 2018-19 should not have had a large impact on the dollar but may have significantly depreciated the renminbi. This prediction is consistent with a high-frequency event analysis looking at the impact of tariff-related news on the dollar and the renminbi. We find that tariffs explained at most one fifth of the dollar effective appreciation but around two thirds of the renminbi effective depreciation observed in 2018-19.
papers.zh_title: 关税在多大程度上被汇率抵消？
papers.zh_abstract: 理论上，我们预期关税会被征收关税国家的货币升值或被征收关税国家的货币贬值部分抵消。基于一个校准模型，我们发现美国在2018-19年征收的关税不应大幅影响美元，但可能显著使人民币贬值。这一预测与高频事件分析结果一致，该分析考察了关税相关新闻对美元和人民币的影响。我们发现，关税最多解释了2018-19年观察到的美元有效升值的五分之一，但解释了人民币有效贬值的大约三分之二。

papers.title: Data Privacy and Temptation
papers.authors: Zhuang Liu, Michael Sockin, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: This paper derives a preference for data privacy from consumers' temptation utility. This approach facilitates a welfare analysis of different data privacy regulations, such as the GDPR enacted by the European Union and the CCPA enacted by the state of California, when a fraction of the consumers may succumb to targeted advertising of temptation goods. While sharing consumer data with firms improves firms' matching efficiency of normal consumption goods, it also exposes weak-willed consumers to temptation goods. Despite that the GDPR and the CCPA give each consumer the choice to opt in or out of data sharing, these regulations may not provide sufficient protection for severely tempted consumers because of a negative externality in which the opt-in decision of some consumers reduces the anonymity of those who opt out. Our analysis also shows that the default choices instituted by the GDPR and the CCPA can lead to sharply different outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LE；JEL：D03, D62, M15
papers.zh_title: 数据隐私与诱惑
papers.zh_abstract: 本文从消费者的诱惑效用中推导出对数据隐私的偏好。这种方法有助于分析不同数据隐私法规（如欧盟颁布的GDPR和加利福尼亚州颁布的CCPA）的福利效应，当部分消费者可能屈服于诱惑商品的定向广告时。虽然与公司共享消费者数据提高了公司对正常消费品的匹配效率，但也使意志薄弱的消费者暴露于诱惑商品。尽管GDPR和CCPA赋予每个消费者选择加入或退出数据共享的权利，但这些法规可能无法为严重受诱惑的消费者提供充分保护，因为存在一种负外部性：一些消费者的选择加入行为降低了那些选择退出者的匿名性。我们的分析还表明，GDPR和CCPA设立的默认选择可能导致截然不同的结果。

papers.title: Trade Flows and Fiscal Multipliers
papers.authors: Matteo Cacciatore, Nora Traum
papers.abstract: We present novel insights on the role of international trade following unanticipated government spending and income tax changes in a flexible exchange rate environment. In a simple two-country, two-good model, we show analytically that fiscal multipliers can be larger in economies more open to trade, even when fiscal expansions imply a trade deficit. Cross-country comovement can be positive or negative. Three factors determine how trade linkages affect fiscal multipliers: the relative import share of public and private goods, how the government finances its budget, and the currency invoicing of exports. A Bayesian prior-predictive analysis shows a quantitative international business-cycle model bears the same predictions. Estimating the model on Canadian and U.S. data, we find support for larger multipliers relative to a counterfactually closed economy and positive cross-country spillovers.
papers.zh_title: 贸易流量与财政乘数
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了在灵活汇率环境下，政府支出和所得税意外变化后国际贸易作用的新见解。在一个简单的两国、两商品模型中，我们分析表明，即使财政扩张导致贸易逆差，更开放经济体的财政乘数也可能更大。跨国联动可以是正向或负向的。三个因素决定了贸易联系如何影响财政乘数：公共和私人商品的相对进口份额、政府如何为其预算融资以及出口的货币计价。贝叶斯先验预测分析表明，一个量化的国际商业周期模型具有相同的预测。基于加拿大和美国数据估计该模型，我们发现相对于反事实的封闭经济，存在更大的乘数以及正向的跨国溢出效应。

papers.title: Who Voted for Trump? Populism and Social Capital
papers.authors: Paola Giuliano, Romain Wacziarg
papers.abstract: We argue that low levels of social capital are conducive to the electoral success of populist movements. Using a variety of data sources for the 2016 US Presidential election at the county and individual levels, we show that social capital, measured either by the density of memberships in civic, religious and sports organizations or by generalized trust, is significantly negatively correlated with the vote share and favorability rating of Donald Trump around the time of the election.
papers.zh_title: 谁投票给了特朗普？民粹主义与社会资本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，低水平的社会资本有利于民粹主义运动的选举成功。利用2016年美国总统选举的县级和个体层面多种数据来源，我们表明，社会资本（无论是通过公民、宗教和体育组织的成员密度还是普遍信任来衡量）与选举前后唐纳德·特朗普的得票率和好感度显著负相关。

papers.title: Learning from Deregulation: The Asymmetric Impact of Lockdown and Reopening on Risky Behavior During COVID-19
papers.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, Ginger Zhe Jin, Benjamin T. Leyden, Michael Luca
papers.abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, states issued and then rescinded stay-at-home orders that restricted mobility. We develop a model of learning by deregulation, which predicts that lifting stay-at-home orders can signal that going out has become safer. Using restaurant activity data, we find that the implementation of stay-at-home orders initially had a limited impact, but that activity rose quickly after states’ reopenings. The results suggest that consumers inferred from reopening that it was safer to eat out. The rational, but mistaken inference that occurs in our model may explain why a sharp rise of COVID-19 cases followed reopening in some states.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D8, I18, K0
papers.zh_title: 从放松管制中学习：COVID-19期间封锁与重启对风险行为的不对称影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情期间，各州发布并随后撤销了限制人员流动的居家令。我们构建了一个“从放松管制中学习”的模型，该模型预测，解除居家令可能传递出外出已变得更安全的信号。利用餐厅活动数据，我们发现居家令的实施最初影响有限，但在各州重启后，活动迅速增加。结果表明，消费者从重启中推断出外出就餐更安全。我们模型中出现的这种理性但错误的推断，或许可以解释为何某些州在重启后出现了COVID-19病例的急剧增加。

papers.title: Assessing the Quality of Illegal Copies and its Impact on Revenues and Distribution
papers.authors: Anthony Koschmann, Yi Qian
papers.abstract: Conventional wisdom holds that illegal copies cannibalize legitimate sales, even though previous research has found mixed effects, with illegal copies acting as both a substitute and a complement. The impact of the quality of illegal copies on the legal market remains unclear. Building on product uncertainty and production quality, we propose that higher quality copies benefit (hurt) sales when product uncertainty is higher (lower), during product launch (post-launch). Using motion picture and online piracy data, we estimate piracy quality by applying a latent item response theory (IRT) model based on keyword signals in the illegal copies. An interdependent system jointly estimates movie screens, revenues, downloads, and available illegal copies with piracy quality in both the launch and post-launch periods. We find that at launch, when less information is known about a movie, higher quality illegal copies demonstrate a positive sampling effect on revenues. In the post-launch period, however, higher quality illegal copies exhibit a negative substitution effect on revenues. The findings suggest producers can alleviate product uncertainty through higher quality samples at product launch while diluting piracy quality post-launch.
papers.zh_title: 评估非法复制品的质量及其对收入和分销的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 传统观点认为非法复制品会蚕食合法销售，尽管先前研究发现其效果不一，非法复制品既可能作为替代品也可能作为互补品。非法复制品质量对合法市场的影响仍不明确。基于产品不确定性和生产质量，我们提出：当产品不确定性较高（较低）时，更高质量的复制品在发布期（发布后）会促进（损害）销售。利用电影和在线盗版数据，我们通过应用基于非法复制品中关键词信号的潜在项目反应理论模型来估计盗版质量。一个相互依赖的系统联合估计了电影上映场次、收入、下载量以及发布期和发布后期间包含盗版质量的可用非法复制品数量。我们发现，在发布期，当关于电影的信息较少时，更高质量的非法复制品对收入表现出正向的抽样效应。然而，在发布后期间，更高质量的非法复制品对收入表现出负向的替代效应。研究结果表明，生产商可以在产品发布时通过更高质量的样本来缓解产品不确定性，同时在发布后稀释盗版质量。

papers.title: How Global is Your Mutual Fund? International Diversification from Multinationals
papers.authors: Irem Demirci, Miguel A. Ferreira, Pedro Matos, Clemens Sialm
papers.abstract: We show that mutual funds worldwide provide substantial international exposure through their domestic holdings of multinationals. An average domestic fund's international exposure increases by 32 percentage points when we consider international corporate diversification. We find that funds with higher indirect international exposure perform better in both the cross section and the time series. This outperformance is more pronounced among small fund families, and funds that invest in small stocks, growth stocks, and less developed capital markets. Our findings support the hypothesis that international diversification from multinationals reduces the transaction and information costs of investing abroad and captures fund manager skill.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：F23, G11, G15, G23
papers.zh_title: 你的共同基金有多全球化？来自跨国公司的国际多元化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，全球共同基金通过其持有的国内跨国公司股份提供了实质性的国际敞口。当我们考虑国际公司多元化时，一只普通国内基金的国际敞口增加了32个百分点。我们发现，在横截面和时间序列中，具有更高间接国际敞口的基金表现更好。这种优异表现在小基金家族、以及投资于小盘股、成长股和欠发达资本市场的基金中更为显著。我们的发现支持了以下假设：来自跨国公司的国际多元化降低了海外投资的交易和信息成本，并捕捉了基金经理的技能。

papers.title: Domestic Price Dollarization in Emerging Economies
papers.authors: Andres Drenik, Diego Perez
papers.abstract: This paper studies the dollarization of prices in retail markets of emerging economies. We develop a model of the firm’s optimal currency choice in retail markets in inflationary economies. We derive theoretical predictions regarding the optimality of dollar pricing, and test them using data from the largest e-trade platform in Latin America. Across countries, price dollarization is positively correlated with asset dollarization and inflation, and negatively correlated with exchange rate volatility. At the micro level, larger sellers are more likely to price in dollars, and more tradeable goods are more likely to be posted in dollars. We then show that prices are sticky, and hence the currency of prices determines the short-run reaction of both prices and quantities to a nominal exchange rate shock.
papers.zh_title: 新兴经济体的国内价格美元化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了新兴经济体零售市场中价格的美元化。我们构建了一个关于企业在通胀经济体零售市场中最优货币选择的模型。我们推导出关于美元定价最优性的理论预测，并使用来自拉丁美洲最大电子交易平台的数据对其进行检验。跨国来看，价格美元化与资产美元化和通胀正相关，与汇率波动负相关。在微观层面，较大的卖家更可能以美元定价，且更可贸易的商品更可能以美元标价。然后我们表明价格是粘性的，因此定价货币决定了名义汇率冲击下价格和数量的短期反应。

papers.title: The Pass-Through of Uncertainty Shocks to Households
papers.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Amir Kermani, Rodney Ramcharan, Vincent Yao, Edison Yu
papers.abstract: Using new employer-employee matched data, this paper investigates the impact of uncertainty, as measured by idiosyncratic stock market volatility, on individual outcomes. We find that firms provide at best partial insurance to their workers. An increase in firm-level uncertainty is associated with a decline in total compensation, especially in variable pay. In turn, individuals reduce their durable goods consumption in response to these uncertainty shocks. These shocks also lead to greater financial fragility among lower-income earners. We also construct a new county-level uncertainty shock and find that local uncertainty shocks reduce county level durable consumption.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D12, D14, E21, G5, G51
papers.zh_title: 不确定性冲击向家庭的传导
papers.zh_abstract: 利用新的雇主-雇员匹配数据，本文研究了以个股波动率衡量的不确定性对个人结果的影响。我们发现，企业最多为其员工提供部分保险。企业层面不确定性的增加与总薪酬的下降相关，尤其是可变薪酬。相应地，个人会因这些不确定性冲击而减少耐用消费品支出。这些冲击还导致低收入者面临更大的财务脆弱性。我们还构建了一个新的县级不确定性冲击，并发现当地的不确定性冲击会减少县级耐用消费。

papers.title: College Majors
papers.authors: Arpita Patnaik, Matthew J. Wiswall, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: This article reviews the recent literature on the determinants of college major choices. We first highlight long-term trends and persistent differences in college major choices by gender, race, and family background. We then review the existing research in six key areas: expected earnings and ability sorting, learning, subjective expectations, non-pecuniary considerations, peer and family effects, and supply side factors. We examine and compare the various approaches employed by previous research and highlight key areas for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：D81, D84, I21, I23, J10
papers.zh_title: 大学专业
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了近期关于大学专业选择决定因素的文献。我们首先强调了大学专业选择在性别、种族和家庭背景方面的长期趋势和持续差异。然后，我们回顾了六个关键领域的现有研究：预期收入与能力分类、学习、主观预期、非金钱因素、同伴与家庭效应以及供给侧因素。我们审视并比较了先前研究采用的各种方法，并指出了未来研究的关键领域。

papers.title: Quid Pro Quo, Knowledge Spillover, and Industrial Quality Upgrading: Evidence from the Chinese Auto Industry
papers.authors: Jie Bai, Panle Jia Barwick, Shengmao Cao, Shanjun Li
papers.abstract: This paper studies the impact of FDI via quid pro quo (technology for market access) in facilitating knowledge spillover and quality upgrades. Our context is the Chinese automobile industry, where foreign automakers are required to set up joint ventures (the quid) with domestic automakers in return for market access (the quo). Our identification strategy exploits a unique dataset of detailed vehicle quality measures and relies on within-product variation across quality dimensions. We show that affiliated domestic automakers tend to adopt the quality strengths of their joint venture partners, consistent with learning and knowledge spillover. We rule out alternative explanations, such as endogenous joint venture formation, geographic proximity, overlapping customer bases, brand image association, and patent transfers. Additional analysis shows that worker flows and supplier networks mediate knowledge spillover. Finally, using an equilibrium model for the auto industry, we show that knowledge spillover due to ownership affiliation, in additional to any industry-wide knowledge spillover, improved the quality of affiliated domestic models by 3.8-12.7% and raised their profits by 1.0-3.5% between 2007 and 2014.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：F23, O14, O25
papers.zh_title: 交换条件、知识溢出与产业质量升级：来自中国汽车产业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了通过交换条件（以技术换市场）的外国直接投资在促进知识溢出和质量升级方面的影响。我们的背景是中国汽车工业，其中外国汽车制造商被要求与国内汽车制造商建立合资企业（交换条件），以换取市场准入（条件）。我们的识别策略利用了一个包含详细车辆质量指标的独特数据集，并依赖于质量维度上的产品内差异。我们表明，关联的国内汽车制造商倾向于采纳其合资伙伴的质量优势，这与学习和知识溢出相一致。我们排除了其他解释，如内生合资企业形成、地理邻近性、重叠客户群、品牌形象关联和专利转让。进一步分析表明，工人流动和供应商网络中介了知识溢出。最后，利用汽车产业的均衡模型，我们表明，除了任何行业范围内的知识溢出之外，因所有权关联而产生的知识溢出，在2007年至2014年间，使关联国内车型的质量提高了3.8%-12.7%，并使其利润增加了1.0%-3.5%。

papers.title: Frictional Sorting
papers.authors: Wenquan Liang, Ran Song, Christopher Timmins
papers.abstract: In many countries around the world, migration costs and housing supply restrictions interact with each other and combine to restrict workers’ location decisions. Using an equilibrium sorting model and rich micro data from China, we evaluate the impacts of these dual constraints on workers’ sorting behavior and quantify the resulting changes in aggregate welfare and inequality. We find strong policy interactions between the two kinds of frictions in determining welfare losses and regional inequality. Counterfactual simulations show that lowering migration costs can increase welfare and reduce regional inequality by moving workers from unproductive inland regions to productive coastal regions in China; such welfare and regional distributional impacts depend on the elasticity of housing supply in coastal regions and vice-versa. Results highlight the policy complementarities between reducing the two kinds of frictions and have general implications for countries with different levels of constraints on mobility and housing supply.
papers.zh_title: 摩擦性分类
papers.zh_abstract: 在世界许多国家，迁移成本和住房供给限制相互作用，共同制约着工人的区位选择。利用均衡分类模型和来自中国的丰富微观数据，我们评估了这些双重约束对工人分类行为的影响，并量化了由此导致的总体福利和不平等的变化。我们发现，在决定福利损失和区域不平等方面，两种摩擦之间存在强烈的政策互动。反事实模拟表明，降低迁移成本可以通过将工人从中国低生产率的内陆地区转移到高生产率的沿海地区来提高福利并减少区域不平等；这种福利和区域分配效应取决于沿海地区的住房供给弹性，反之亦然。结果强调了减少两种摩擦之间的政策互补性，并对具有不同流动性和住房供给约束水平的国家具有普遍意义。

papers.title: Asset Specificity of Non-Financial Firms
papers.authors: Amir Kermani, Yueran Ma
papers.abstract: The specificity of firms' assets affects a wide range of economic issues. We study asset specificity of U.S. non-financial firms using a new dataset on the liquidation recovery rates of all major asset categories across industries. First, we find that non-financial firms' assets are generally highly specific. The average recovery rate (liquidation value over cost net of depreciation) is 35% for plant, property, and equipment (PPE). Second, across industries, physical attributes such as mobility, durability, and standardization account for around 40% of variations in PPE recovery rates. Over time, macroeconomic and industry conditions have the most impact on recovery rates when PPE is not firm-specific. Third, higher asset specificity is associated with less asset sales, greater investment response to uncertainty, and more Q dispersion, consistent with theories of investment irreversibility. Finally, the data suggests that rising intangibles have had a limited impact on firms' liquidation values.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E22, E32, G31, G33
papers.zh_title: 非金融企业的资产专用性
papers.zh_abstract: 企业资产的专用性影响着广泛的经济问题。我们利用一个关于各行业所有主要资产类别清算回收率的新数据集，研究了美国非金融企业的资产专用性。首先，我们发现非金融企业的资产通常具有高度专用性。厂房、财产和设备（PPE）的平均回收率（清算价值除以扣除折旧后的成本）为35%。其次，在不同行业中，流动性、耐用性和标准化等物理属性解释了PPE回收率约40%的变异。随着时间的推移，当PPE不具有企业专用性时，宏观经济和行业状况对回收率的影响最大。第三，更高的资产专用性与更少的资产出售、投资对不确定性更强的反应以及更大的托宾Q离散度相关，这与投资不可逆性的理论一致。最后，数据表明，无形资产的增加对企业清算价值的影响有限。

papers.title: Two Tales of Debt
papers.authors: Amir Kermani, Yueran Ma
papers.abstract: We analyze the heterogeneous nature of corporate debt contracts, some focusing on liquidation values of discrete assets whereas others on going-concern values of the business. Using hand-collected data on firm attributes, we present several findings. First, firms on average have limited liquidation values. Second, companies with lower liquidation values have more debt backed by going-concern values and more intensive monitoring of firm performance. They have higher interest rates only for debt against discrete assets. Third, secured debt is not always tied to liquidation values of discrete assets. We present a model that matches the empirical findings, which demonstrates how creditor monitoring and covenants facilitate borrowing well beyond liquidation values.
papers.zh_title: 债务的两种故事
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了公司债务合同的异质性，其中一些侧重于离散资产的清算价值，而另一些则侧重于企业的持续经营价值。利用手工收集的企业属性数据，我们提出了几个发现。首先，企业平均而言清算价值有限。其次，清算价值较低的公司拥有更多以持续经营价值为支撑的债务，并且对企业绩效的监控更为密集。这些公司仅对以离散资产为抵押的债务支付更高的利率。第三，有担保债务并不总是与离散资产的清算价值挂钩。我们提出了一个与实证发现相匹配的模型，该模型展示了债权人监控和契约如何促进远超清算价值的借贷。

papers.title: Welfare Analysis Meets Causal Inference
papers.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Nathaniel Hendren
papers.abstract: We describe a framework for empirical welfare analysis that uses the causal estimates of a policy’s impact on net government spending. This framework provides guidance for which causal effects are (and are not) needed for empirical welfare analysis of public policies.The key ingredient is the construction of each policy’s marginal value of public funds (MVPF). The MVPF is the ratio of beneficiaries’ willingness to pay for the policy to the net cost to the government. We discuss how the MVPF relates to “traditional” welfare analysis tools such as the marginal excess burden and marginal cost of public funds. We show how the MVPF can be used in practice by applying it to several canonical empirical applications from public finance, labor, development, trade, and industrial organization.
papers.zh_title: 福利分析与因果推断的结合
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了一个实证福利分析框架，该框架利用政策对政府净支出影响的因果估计。该框架为公共政策的实证福利分析需要哪些因果效应（以及不需要哪些）提供了指导。关键要素是构建每项政策的公共资金边际价值（MVPF）。MVPF是受益者对该政策的支付意愿与政府净成本之比。我们讨论了MVPF如何与“传统”福利分析工具（如边际超额负担和公共资金边际成本）相关联。我们通过将MVPF应用于来自公共财政、劳动、发展、贸易和产业组织领域的几个经典实证应用，展示了其在实际中的应用。

papers.title: Interest Rate Uncertainty and Sovereign Default Risk
papers.authors: Alok Johri, Shahed Khan, César Sosa-Padilla
papers.abstract: Empirical studies suggest that fluctuations in the level and volatility of the world interest rate affect sovereign spreads in emerging economies. We incorporate an estimated time-varying process for the world interest rate (with both level and volatility shocks) into a model of sovereign default calibrated to a panel of emerging economies. Time variation in the world interest rate interacts with default incentives in the model and leads to state contingent effects similar to the empirical literature. On average, in response to a rise in the world interest rate the model delivers a 1.4 times increase in the spread. The volatility state has a major impact on this average – the increase in spreads is much larger in high volatility states. Moreover, we show that fluctuations in the world interest rate can generate considerable co-movement in sovereign yields across nations, as seen in the data.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E43, F34, F41
papers.zh_title: 利率不确定性与主权违约风险
papers.zh_abstract: 实证研究表明，世界利率水平和波动性的波动会影响新兴经济体的主权利差。我们将一个估计的世界利率时变过程（包含水平和波动性冲击）纳入一个以新兴经济体面板数据为校准的主权违约模型。模型中世界利率的时变性与违约激励相互作用，产生了与实证文献相似的、依赖于状态的效应。平均而言，面对世界利率上升，模型给出的利差增加了1.4倍。波动性状态对此平均值有重大影响——在高波动性状态下，利差的增加要大得多。此外，我们表明，正如数据所示，世界利率的波动可以在各国之间产生显著的主权利差联动。

papers.title: Molecular Genetics, Risk Aversion, Return Perceptions, and Stock Market Participation
papers.authors: Richard Sias, Laura Starks, Harry J. Turtle
papers.abstract: We show that molecular variation in DNA related to cognition, personality, health, and body shape, predicts an individual’s equity market participation and risk aversion. Moreover, the molecular genetic endowments predict individuals’ return perceptions, most of which we find to be strikingly biased. The genetic endowments also strongly associate with many of the investor characteristics (e.g., trust, sociability, wealth) shown to explain heterogeneity in equity market participation. Our analysis helps elucidate why financial choices are heritable and how genetic endowments can help explain the links between financial choices, risk aversion, beliefs, and other variables known to explain stock market participation.
papers.zh_title: 分子遗传学、风险厌恶、回报感知与股市参与
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，与认知、人格、健康和体型相关的DNA分子变异可以预测个人的股市参与和风险厌恶。此外，分子遗传禀赋可以预测个人的回报感知，我们发现其中大部分感知存在惊人的偏差。这些遗传禀赋还与许多已被证明能解释股市参与异质性的投资者特征（例如，信任、社交性、财富）密切相关。我们的分析有助于阐明为什么金融选择是可遗传的，以及遗传禀赋如何帮助解释金融选择、风险厌恶、信念以及其他已知能解释股市参与的变量之间的联系。

papers.title: Norwegian and US Policies Alleviate Business Vulnerability Due to the Covid-19 Shock Equally Well
papers.authors: Annette Alstadsæter, Julie Brun Bjørkheim, Wojciech Kopczuk, Andreas Økland
papers.abstract: We use Norwegian administrative data and applications for emergency government support to simulate magnitude and distribution of business revenue shock due to the Covid-19 pandemic. We rely on it to analyze the impact of business support policies available in Norway and the United States by comparing simulated results from the various policies on a common data set. We find that policies supporting payroll and fixed costs that were available in both countries have a similar impact of reducing firms' economic distress, by cutting the negative effect of the crisis on profitability, liquidity, debt, and solvency by over a half.
papers.zh_title: 挪威和美国的政策同样有效地缓解了新冠疫情冲击带来的企业脆弱性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用挪威的行政数据和紧急政府支持申请，模拟了新冠疫情导致的企业收入冲击的规模和分布。我们以此为基础，通过在一个共同数据集上比较各种政策的模拟结果，分析了挪威和美国可用的企业支持政策的影响。我们发现，两国都采用的、支持工资和固定成本的政策，在减少企业经济困境方面具有相似的效果，将危机对盈利能力、流动性、债务和偿付能力的负面影响削减了一半以上。

papers.title: Filling a Niche? The Maize Productivity Impacts of Adaptive Breeding by a Local Seed Company in Kenya
papers.authors: Samuel S. Bird, Michael R. Carter, Travis J. Lybbert, Mary Mathenge, Timothy Njagi, Emilia Tjernström
papers.abstract: This paper explores the idea that competitive seed systems may underserve farmers in small, agro-ecological niches, leaving those farmers less productive and poorer than they need be. We develop a theoretical model of the confluence of demand and supply factors that can result in such an equilibrium. We then empirically study the disruption of the maize seed market in Western Kenya that took place when public sector foundation breeding and social impact investment capital together allowed a local seed company to expand and target the area with adaptively-bred maize varieties. A three-year RCT reveals that these seed varieties increased farmer yields and revenues, both for better-resourced farmers (who used non-adapted hybrids and fertilizer prior to the intervention) as well less well-resourced farmers (who did not). This theoretical and empirical evidence suggests news ways for thinking about seeds systems in areas typified by high levels of agro-ecological heterogeneity.
papers.zh_title: 填补利基？肯尼亚一家本地种子公司适应性育种对玉米生产力的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了一个观点，即竞争性的种子系统可能无法充分服务于小型农业生态利基市场中的农民，导致这些农民的生产力低于应有水平且更加贫困。我们建立了一个理论模型，描述了可能导致这种均衡的需求和供给因素的汇合。然后，我们实证研究了肯尼亚西部玉米种子市场的变革，该变革发生在公共部门基础育种和社会影响力投资资本共同使一家本地种子公司得以扩张，并以适应性培育的玉米品种为目标服务该地区时。一项为期三年的随机对照试验表明，这些种子品种提高了农民的产量和收入，无论是对于资源较充足的农民（他们在干预前使用非适应性杂交种和化肥）还是资源较少的农民（他们未使用这些投入）。这一理论和实证证据为思考农业生态异质性较高地区的种子系统提供了新思路。

papers.title: Behavioral Corporate Finance: The Life Cycle of a CEO Career
papers.authors: Marius Guenzel, Ulrike Malmendier
papers.abstract: One of the fastest-growing areas of finance research is the study of managerial biases and their implications for firm outcomes. Since the mid-2000s, this strand of behavioral corporate finance has provided theoretical and empirical evidence on the influence of biases in the corporate realm, such as overconfidence, experience effects, and the sunk-cost fallacy. The field has been a leading force in dismantling the argument that traditional economic mechanisms— selection, learning, and market discipline—would suffice to uphold the rational-manager paradigm. Instead, the evidence reveals that behavioral forces exert a significant influence at every stage of a chief executive officer’s (CEO’s) career. First, at the appointment stage, selection does not impede the promotion of behavioral managers. Instead, competitive environments oftentimes promote their advancement, even under value-maximizing selection mechanisms. Second, while at the helm of the company, learning opportunities are limited, since many managerial decisions occur at low frequency, and their causal effects are clouded by self-attribution bias and difficult to disentangle from those of concurrent events. Third, at the dismissal stage, market discipline does not ensure the firing of biased decision-makers as board members themselves are subject to biases in their evaluation of CEOs. \nBy documenting how biases affect even the most educated and influential decision-makers, such as CEOs, the field has generated important insights into the hard-wiring of biases. Biases do not simply stem from a lack of education, nor are they restricted to low-ability agents. Instead, biases are significant elements of human decision-making at the highest levels of organizations. \nAn important question for future research is how to limit, in each CEO career phase, the adverse effects of managerial biases. Potential approaches include refining selection mechanisms, designing and implementing corporate repairs, and reshaping corporate governance to account not only for incentive misalignments but also for biased decision-making.
papers.zh_title: 行为公司金融：CEO职业生涯的生命周期
papers.zh_abstract: 金融研究中增长最快的领域之一是对管理者偏见及其对公司结果影响的研究。自2000年代中期以来，这一行为公司金融分支提供了关于偏见在公司领域影响的理论和实证证据，例如过度自信、经验效应和沉没成本谬误。该领域一直是瓦解传统经济机制——选择、学习和市场纪律——足以维持理性管理者范式这一论点的主导力量。相反，证据表明，行为力量在首席执行官（CEO）职业生涯的每个阶段都发挥着显著影响。首先，在任命阶段，选择并不会阻碍有行为偏见的经理人的晋升。相反，竞争环境常常促进他们的晋升，即使在价值最大化的选择机制下也是如此。其次，在执掌公司期间，学习机会有限，因为许多管理决策发生频率低，其因果效应被自我归因偏差所模糊，并且难以与同时发生的事件的影响区分开来。第三，在解雇阶段，市场纪律并不能确保有偏见的决策者被解雇，因为董事会成员自身在评估CEO时也会受到偏见的影响。 通过记录偏见如何影响甚至是最有学识和最有影响力的决策者（如CEO），该领域对偏见的“硬接线”产生了重要见解。偏见不仅仅源于缺乏教育，也不仅限于低能力的代理人。相反，偏见是组织最高层人类决策的重要组成部分。 未来研究的一个重要问题是如何在CEO职业生涯的每个阶段限制管理偏见的负面影响。潜在的方法包括完善选择机制、设计和实施公司修复措施，以及重塑公司治理，不仅要考虑激励错位，还要考虑有偏见的决策。

papers.title: Design Choices for Central Bank Digital Currency: Policy and Technical Considerations
papers.authors: Sarah Allen, Srđjan Čapkun, Ittay Eyal, Giulia Fanti, Bryan A. Ford, James Grimmelmann, Ari Juels, Kari Kostiainen, Sarah Meiklejohn, Andrew Miller, Eswar Prasad, Karl Wüst, Fan Zhang
papers.abstract: Central banks around the world are exploring and in some cases even piloting Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDCs). CBDCs promise to realize a broad range of new capabilities, including direct government disbursements to citizens, frictionless consumer payment and money-transfer systems, and a range of new financial instruments and monetary policy levers.
papers.zh_title: 央行数字货币的设计选择：政策与技术考量
papers.zh_abstract: 全球各国央行正在探索，甚至在某些情况下试点央行数字货币（CBDCs）。CBDCs有望实现一系列广泛的新能力，包括直接向公民发放政府款项、无摩擦的消费者支付和汇款系统，以及一系列新型金融工具和货币政策杠杆。

papers.title: The Aggregate Effects of Fiscal Stimulus: Evidence from the COVID-19 Unemployment Supplement
papers.authors: Miguel Garza Casado, Britta Glennon, Julia Lane, David McQuown, Daniel Rich, Bruce A. Weinberg
papers.abstract: The current economic crisis has highlighted the need for data that are both timely and local so that the effects of fiscal policy options on local economies can be evaluated more immediately. This paper highlights the potential value of using two new sources of near real-time data to inform decisions about the appropriate stimulus approach to implement. The first data source is administrative records that provide universal, weekly, information on unemployment claimants. The second data source is transaction level data on economic activity that are available on a daily basis. We make use of discrete changes in stimulus payments to construct a framework for evaluating real-time effects of fiscal policy on local economic activity. In particular, we leverage cross-county and over-time variation in the relative size of the Federal Pandemic Unemployment Compensation (FPUC) COVID-19 supplement to Unemployment Insurance – from $0 to $600 to $300 between March and September 2020 - to estimate the local economic impact of unemployment, earnings replacement, and the interaction between the two. We find that higher earnings replacement rates lead to significantly more consumer spending, even with increases in the unemployment claimant rate, which is consistent with the goal of the fiscal stimulus.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E21, E62, H3, J65
papers.zh_title: 财政刺激的总体效应：来自新冠疫情失业补助的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 当前的经济危机凸显了对既及时又本地化的数据的需求，以便能够更即时地评估财政政策选项对地方经济的影响。本文强调了利用两种新的近实时数据源来为实施适当刺激方法的决策提供信息的潜在价值。第一个数据源是提供每周、普遍性的失业索赔人信息的行政记录。第二个数据源是按日可获取的经济活动交易层面数据。我们利用刺激支付的离散变化构建了一个评估财政政策对地方经济活动实时影响的框架。具体而言，我们利用2020年3月至9月间联邦大流行失业补偿（FPUC）新冠疫情失业保险补助的相对规模——从0美元到600美元再到300美元——在县际和时间上的变化，来估算失业、收入替代以及两者交互作用对地方经济的影响。我们发现，即使失业索赔率上升，更高的收入替代率也会显著增加消费者支出，这与财政刺激的目标一致。

papers.title: Measuring Customer Churn and Interconnectedness
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, Brian Baugh, Marco C. Sammon
papers.abstract: This paper demonstrates that it is possible to construct accurate pictures of firm revenue, growth, geographic dispersion, and customer base characteristics using an increasingly accessible class of consumer financial transaction data. We develop two new measures which characterize firms' customer bases: the rate of churn in a firm's customer base and a metric of the pairwise similarity between firms' customer bases. We show that these measures provide important insights into the behavior of both real firm decisions and firm asset prices. Rates of customer churn affect the level and volatility of firm-level investment, markups, and profits. Churn also affects how quickly firms respond to shocks in the value of their growth options (i.e. Tobin's~Q). Moreover, high churn firms tended to face steeper declines in consumer spending during the recent COVID-19 outbreak. Similarity between firms' customer bases highlights one under-explored type of predictability among stock returns -- we demonstrate that significant alpha can be generated using a trading strategy that exploits our index of customer base similarity across firms.
papers.zh_title: 衡量客户流失与相互关联性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文证明，利用日益可获取的一类消费者金融交易数据，可以构建出关于企业收入、增长、地理分布和客户基础特征的准确图景。我们开发了两个衡量企业客户基础的新指标：企业客户流失率，以及衡量企业间客户基础成对相似性的指标。我们表明，这些指标为理解真实企业决策和企业资产价格行为提供了重要见解。客户流失率影响企业层面投资、加成率和利润的水平与波动性。客户流失还影响企业对其增长期权价值（即托宾Q）冲击的反应速度。此外，在近期新冠疫情爆发期间，高客户流失率企业往往面临消费者支出更急剧的下降。企业间客户基础的相似性揭示了股票收益中一种未被充分探索的可预测性——我们证明，利用我们构建的企业间客户基础相似性指数的交易策略可以产生显著的阿尔法收益。

papers.title: History as Evolution
papers.authors: Nathan Nunn
papers.abstract: In this chapter, I consider the benefits of viewing history through an evolutionary lens. In recent decades, a field of research has emerged, which builds on foundations from biological evolution to study culture within an evolutionary framework. I begin the chapter by discussing the theory behind cultural evolution and the empirical evidence supporting its ability to explain the history of human societies. I then turn to a discussion of how an evolutionary perspective provides important insights into a range of phenomena within economics, including a deeper understanding of human capital, innovation, gender roles, the consequences of warfare, the effects of market competition, why we observe historical persistence and path dependence, and, most importantly, why sustained economic growth is often so elusive. I end by turning to a summary of a growing body of research within economics that has made progress in improving our understanding of cultural evolution and, thus, contributing to evolutionary disciplines outside of economics.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：C73, N01, N10, Z1
papers.zh_title: 历史作为演化
papers.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我探讨了通过演化视角审视历史的益处。近几十年来，一个研究领域兴起，它基于生物演化的基础，在演化框架内研究文化。我首先讨论文化演化背后的理论，以及支持其解释人类社会历史的经验证据。接着，我转向讨论演化视角如何为经济学中的一系列现象提供重要见解，包括对人力资本、创新、性别角色、战争后果、市场竞争效应、历史持续性与路径依赖的更深理解，以及最重要的是，为何持续的经济增长常常如此难以实现。最后，我总结了经济学中日益增长的研究成果，这些研究在增进我们对文化演化的理解方面取得了进展，从而为经济学之外的演化学科做出了贡献。

papers.title: The Tax Elasticity of Capital Gains and Revenue-Maximizing Rates
papers.authors: Ole Agersnap, Owen M. Zidar
papers.abstract: This paper uses a direct-projections approach to estimate the effect of capital gains taxation on realizations at the state level, and then develops a framework for determining revenue-maximizing rates at the federal level. We find that the elasticity of revenues with respect to the tax rate over a ten-year period is -0.5 to -0.3, indicating that capital gains tax cuts do not pay for themselves, and that a 5 percentage point rate increase would yield $18 to $30 billion in annual federal tax revenue. Our long-run estimates yield revenue-maximizing capital gains tax rates of 38 to 47 percent.
papers.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：H0, H2, H21, H24, H71, R5
papers.zh_title: 资本利得的税收弹性与收入最大化税率
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用直接预测方法估计州级资本利得税对实现收益的影响，然后构建一个框架来确定联邦层面的收入最大化税率。我们发现，十年期内税收收入相对于税率的弹性为-0.5至-0.3，表明资本利得减税并不能自给自足，而税率提高5个百分点将使联邦年度税收收入增加180亿至300亿美元。我们的长期估计得出收入最大化的资本利得税率为38%至47%。

papers.title: Nonparametric Identification of Differentiated Products Demand Using Micro Data
papers.authors: Steven T. Berry, Philip A. Haile
papers.abstract: A recent literature considers the identification of heterogeneous demand and supply models via "quasi-experimental'' variation, as from instrumental variables. In this paper we establish nonparametric identification of differentiated products demand when one has "micro data'' linking characteristics of individual consumers to their choices. Micro data provide a panel structure allowing one to exploit variation across consumers within each market, where latent demand shocks are fixed. This facilitates richer demand specifications while substantially softening the reliance on instrumental variables, reducing both the number and types of instruments required. Our results require neither the structure of a "special regressor'' nor a "full support'' assumption on consumer-level observables.
papers.zh_title: 使用微观数据对差异化产品需求进行非参数识别
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的文献考虑通过“准实验”变异（如工具变量）来识别异质性需求与供给模型。在本文中，我们建立了当拥有将个体消费者特征与其选择联系起来的“微观数据”时，差异化产品需求的非参数识别。微观数据提供了面板结构，允许利用每个市场内消费者之间的变异，其中潜在需求冲击是固定的。这促进了更丰富的需求设定，同时大幅减轻了对工具变量的依赖，减少了所需工具的数量和类型。我们的结果既不需要“特殊回归变量”的结构，也不需要对消费者层面可观测变量做出“完全支撑”假设。

papers.title: When Uncle Sam Introduced Main Street to Wall Street: Liberty Bonds and the Transformation of American Finance
papers.authors: Eric Hilt, Matthew S. Jaremski, Wendy Rahn
papers.abstract: We study the effects of the liberty bond drives of World War I on financial intermediation in the 1920s and beyond. Using panel data on U.S. counties, and an instrument that captures differences in the approaches used to market the bonds, we find that higher liberty bond subscription rates led to an increase in investment banks and a contraction in commercial bank assets. We also find that in the late 1930s, individuals residing in states where liberty bond subscription rates had been higher were more likely to report owning stocks or bonds. Although they were conducted to support the American effort in World War I, the liberty loan drives reshaped American finance.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, ME, PE, POL；JEL：N12, N22, N42
papers.zh_title: 当山姆大叔将主街引入华尔街：自由债券与美国金融的转型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究第一次世界大战的自由债券运动对20世纪20年代及以后金融中介的影响。使用美国县级面板数据以及一个捕捉债券营销方法差异的工具变量，我们发现更高的自由债券认购率导致投资银行增加和商业银行资产收缩。我们还发现，在20世纪30年代末，居住在自由债券认购率较高州的个人更可能报告拥有股票或债券。尽管自由贷款运动是为了支持美国在一战中的努力，但它们重塑了美国金融体系。

papers.title: Confidence and the Propagation of Demand Shocks
papers.authors: George-Marios Angeletos, Chen Lian
papers.abstract: We revisit the question of why shifts in aggregate demand drive business cycles. Our theory combines intertemporal substitution in production with rational confusion, or bounded rationality, in consumption and investment. The first element allows aggregate supply to respond to shifts in aggregate demand without nominal rigidity. The second introduces a “confidence multiplier,” that is, a positive feedback loop between real economic activity, consumer expectations of permanent income, and investor expectations of returns. This mechanism amplifies the business-cycle fluctuations triggered by demand shocks (but not necessarily those triggered by supply shocks); it helps investment to comove with consumption; and it allows front-loaded fiscal stimuli to crowd in private spending.
papers.zh_title: 信心与需求冲击的传播
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视为何总需求变动驱动经济周期的问题。我们的理论结合了生产中的跨期替代与消费和投资中的理性混淆或有限理性。第一个要素允许总供给在没有名义刚性的情况下对总需求变动做出反应。第二个要素引入了“信心乘数”，即实际经济活动、消费者对永久收入的预期以及投资者对回报的预期之间的正反馈循环。这一机制放大了由需求冲击（但不一定是由供给冲击）引发的经济周期波动；它有助于投资与消费共同变动；并允许前置的财政刺激挤出私人支出。

papers.title: Bank Syndicates and Liquidity Provision
