papers.authors: Joao A. C. Santos, S. Vish Viswanathan
papers.abstract: We provide evidence that credit lines offer liquidity insurance to borrowers. Borrowers are able to extensively use their credit lines in recessions and ahead of credit line cuts. In fact drawdowns and changes in drawdowns predict internal credit rating downgrades and credit line cuts, suggesting substantial liquidity access before credit line cuts. Credit line cuts are concentrated on borrowers who do not use credit lines, and when they occur they still leave borrowers with funds to draw down. Building on this evidence, we develop a model where syndicates faced with liquidity shocks continue to support credit line commitments due to the continuation value of their relationship with borrowers. Our model yields a set of predictions that find support in the data, including the substantial increase in the lead bank's retained loan share and in the commitment fees on the credit lines issued during the financial crisis of 2008-09. Consistent with the model, credit lines with higher expected drawdown rates pay higher commitment fees, and lead banks often increase their credit line investments in response to the failure of syndicate members, reducing borrowers' risk exposure to bank failures.
papers.zh_title: 银行银团与流动性提供
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供证据表明信用额度为借款人提供流动性保险。借款人能够在经济衰退期间以及信用额度削减之前广泛使用其信用额度。事实上，提款和提款变化预测了内部信用评级下调和信用额度削减，表明在信用额度削减之前存在显著的流动性获取。信用额度削减集中在不使用信用额度的借款人身上，并且当削减发生时，仍为借款人留下可提取的资金。基于这一证据，我们构建了一个模型，其中面临流动性冲击的银团由于与借款人关系的持续价值而继续支持信用额度承诺。我们的模型产生了一系列在数据中得到支持的预测，包括在2008-09年金融危机期间发行的信用额度中，牵头银行保留的贷款份额和承诺费大幅增加。与模型一致，预期提款率较高的信用额度支付更高的承诺费，并且牵头银行通常通过增加对信用额度的投资来应对银团成员的失败，从而降低借款人对银行失败的风险敞口。

papers.title: Intermediation and Competition in Search Markets: An Empirical Case Study
papers.authors: Tobias Salz
papers.abstract: Intermediaries in decentralized markets can affect buyer welfare both directly, by reducing expenses for buyers with high search cost and indirectly, through a search-externality that affects the prices paid by buyers that do not use intermediaries. I investigate the magnitude of these effects in New York City’s trade-waste market, where buyers can either search by themselves or through a waste broker. Combining elements from the empirical search and procurement-auction literatures, I construct and estimate a model for a decentralized market. Results from the model show that intermediaries improve welfare and benefit buyers in both the broker and the search markets.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D43, D44, L0, L13, L81, L97
papers.zh_title: 搜索市场中的中介与竞争：一个实证案例研究
papers.zh_abstract: 分散市场中的中介可以通过两种方式影响买方福利：直接地，通过降低高搜索成本买方的费用；间接地，通过影响不使用中介的买方所支付价格的搜索外部性。我研究了纽约市废弃物市场中这些效应的规模，在该市场中，买方可以自行搜索或通过废弃物经纪人搜索。结合实证搜索和采购拍卖文献的要素，我构建并估计了一个分散市场模型。模型结果表明，中介改善了福利，并使经纪市场和搜索市场中的买方都受益。

papers.title: Understanding Tax Policy: How Do People Reason?
papers.authors: Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: I study how people understand, reason, and learn about two major tax policies: income taxation and estate taxation. Using large-scale Social Economics surveys issued to representative U.S. samples and associated experiments, I seek to elicit respondents' factual knowledge about tax policy and the income or wealth distributions. Most importantly, I study their understanding of the mechanisms of tax policy and the reasoning that underlies their policy views. In decomposing policy views, I find that support for income and estate taxes is most strongly correlated with social preferences, i.e., the perceived benefits of redistribution and concerns around the fairness of inequality and taxation, as well as with broader views of the government. Efficiency concerns play a more minor role. These correlational patterns are confirmed by the experimental approach, which shows people instructional videos that explain the workings and consequences of one of the aspects of tax policy (the "Redistribution'' and the "Efficiency'' treatments) or that bring the two together and focus on the trade-off (the "Economist'' treatment). The Redistribution and Economist treatments significantly increase support for more progressive income or estate taxes, while the Efficiency treatment has no effect. There are large partisan gaps in both the final policy views, and at every step of the reasoning about the underlying mechanisms of taxes. Democrats' and Republicans' divergences in tax policy views can ultimately be traced back to different normative criteria (social preferences) and views of the government, rather than to different perceptions of the efficiency implications of taxation.
papers.meta: Programs：PE, POL；JEL：D72, D9, H20, H24, H3
papers.zh_title: 理解税收政策：人们如何推理？
papers.zh_abstract: 我研究人们如何理解、推理和学习两项主要税收政策：所得税和遗产税。通过对具有代表性的美国样本进行大规模社会经济学调查及相关实验，我试图引出受访者关于税收政策以及收入或财富分配的事实知识。最重要的是，我研究他们对税收政策机制的理解以及支撑其政策观点的推理过程。在分解政策观点时，我发现对所得税和遗产税的支持与社会偏好（即对再分配感知到的益处以及对不平等和税收公平性的关注）以及更广泛的政府观点相关性最强。效率关切的作用较小。这些相关模式通过实验方法得到证实，实验方法向人们展示解释税收政策某一方面（“再分配”和“效率”处理）运作和后果的教学视频，或者将两者结合并聚焦于权衡（“经济学家”处理）。“再分配”和“经济学家”处理显著增加了对更累进所得税或遗产税的支持，而“效率”处理没有效果。在最终政策观点以及关于税收潜在机制推理的每一步，都存在巨大的党派分歧。民主党人和共和党人在税收政策观点上的分歧最终可以追溯到不同的规范性标准（社会偏好）和政府观点，而不是对税收效率影响的不同看法。

papers.title: The International Aspects of Macroprudential Policy
papers.authors: Kristin J. Forbes
papers.abstract: Countries are using macroprudential tools more actively with the goal of improving the resilience of their broader financial systems. A growing body of evidence suggests that these tools can accomplish specific domestic goals and should reduce country vulnerability to many domestic and international shocks. The evidence also suggests, however, that these policies are not an elixir. They will not insulate economies from volatility and they generate leakages to the non-bank financial system and spillovers through international borrowing, lending and other cross-border exposures. Some of these unintended consequences can mitigate the effectiveness of macroprudential policies and generate new vulnerabilities and risks. The “Corona Crisis” provides a lens to evaluate the effectiveness of current macroprudential regulations during a period of extreme market volatility and economic stress. Experience to date suggests that macroprudential tools provide some benefits and can help achieve certain macroeconomic goals, but they have limitations and expectations of what they can accomplish must be realistic.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E5, F33, F36, F38, G21, G23, G28
papers.zh_title: 宏观审慎政策的国际层面
papers.zh_abstract: 各国正更积极地运用宏观审慎工具，旨在增强其整体金融体系的韧性。越来越多的证据表明，这些工具能够实现特定的国内目标，并应能降低国家面对众多国内和国际冲击的脆弱性。然而，证据也表明，这些政策并非万能药。它们无法使经济体免受波动影响，并且会产生向非银行金融体系的泄漏，以及通过国际借贷和其他跨境敞口产生溢出效应。其中一些意外后果可能会削弱宏观审慎政策的有效性，并产生新的脆弱性和风险。“新冠危机”提供了一个视角，用以评估当前宏观审慎监管在市场极端波动和经济压力时期的有效性。迄今为止的经验表明，宏观审慎工具能带来一些益处，并有助于实现某些宏观经济目标，但它们存在局限性，对其所能达成目标的期望必须切合实际。

papers.title: Peak China Housing
papers.authors: Kenneth S. Rogoff, Yuanchen Yang
papers.abstract: China’s real estate has been a key engine of its sustained economic expansion. This paper argues, however, that even before the Covid-19 shock, a decades-long housing boom had given rise to severe price misalignments and regional supply-demand mismatches, making an adjustment both necessary and inevitable. We make use of newly available and updated data sources to analyze supply-demand conditions in the fast-moving Chinese economy. The imbalances are then compared to benchmarks from other economies. We conclude that the sector is quite vulnerable to a sustained aggregate growth shock, such as Covid-19 might pose. In our baseline calibration, using input-output tables and taking account of the very large footprint of housing construction and real-estate related sectors, the adjustment to a decline in housing activity can easily trim a cumulative 5-10 percent from the level of output (over a period of years).
papers.zh_title: 中国住房峰值
papers.zh_abstract: 中国的房地产一直是其持续经济增长的关键引擎。然而，本文认为，即使在新冠疫情冲击之前，持续数十年的住房繁荣已导致严重的价格失衡和区域供需错配，使得调整既必要又不可避免。我们利用新近可得和更新的数据源，分析快速发展的中国经济中的供需状况。然后将这些失衡与其他经济体的基准进行比较。我们得出结论，该行业相当容易受到持续的总体增长冲击（例如新冠疫情可能带来的冲击）的影响。在我们的基准校准中，使用投入产出表并考虑到住房建设和房地产相关行业的巨大体量，对住房活动下降的调整很容易在数年内使产出水平累计减少5%至10%。

papers.title: Decoding India's Low Covid-19 Case Fatality rate
papers.authors: Minu Philip, Debraj Ray, S. Subramanian
papers.abstract: India’s case fatality rate (CFR) under covid-19 is strikingly low, trending from 3% or more, to a current level of around 2.2%. The world average rate is far higher, at around 4%. Several observers have noted that this difference is at least partly due to India’s younger age distribution. In this paper, we use age-specific fatality rates from 14 comparison countries, coupled with India’s distribution of covid-19 cases to “predict" what India’s CFR would be with those age-specific rates. In most cases, those predictions are lower than India’s actual performance, suggesting that India’s CFR is, if anything, too high rather than too low. We supplement the prediction exercises with the application of a decomposition technique, and we additionally account for time lags between case incidence and death, for a more relevant cross-country perspective in the growth phase of the pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 解读印度较低的新冠肺炎病死率
papers.zh_abstract: 印度在新冠疫情下的病死率（CFR）低得惊人，从3%或更高趋势降至目前约2.2%的水平。世界平均病死率则高得多，约为4%。几位观察者指出，这种差异至少部分归因于印度较年轻的年龄分布。在本文中，我们利用14个比较国家的年龄别病死率，结合印度新冠病例的年龄分布，来“预测”如果采用这些年龄别病死率，印度的病死率会是多少。在大多数情况下，这些预测值低于印度的实际表现，这表明印度的病死率非但不低，反而偏高。我们通过应用分解技术来补充预测练习，并且额外考虑了病例发生与死亡之间的时间滞后，以便在大流行的增长阶段获得更具相关性的跨国视角。

papers.title: Public and Private Provision of Information in Market-Based Public Programs: Evidence from Advertising in Health Insurance Marketplaces
papers.authors: Naoki Aizawa, You Suk Kim
papers.abstract: This paper studies the effect of provision of information by the government and private firms through marketing activities in the Affordable Care Act health insurance marketplace. Using detailed TV advertising data, we present evidence that government advertising and private advertising target different geographical areas and provide different messaging content. We estimate the impacts of both types of advertising on consumer demand. We find that government advertising increases overall enrollment and enhances welfare; however, it does not induce consumers to select a particular insurer. Private advertising, in contrast, increases demand for specific insurers, and insurers spending more on advertising tend to offer plans associated with higher consumer utility. However, private advertising alone does not induce consumers to select insurers with better plans very efficiently because it tends to be excessive due to rent-seeking competition.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：G2, I1, I3, L1, M3
papers.zh_title: 基于市场的公共项目中信息的公共与私人提供：来自健康保险市场广告的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了政府和私营企业通过《平价医疗法案》健康保险市场中的营销活动提供信息的效果。利用详细的电视广告数据，我们提供的证据表明，政府广告和私人广告针对不同的地理区域，并提供不同的信息内容。我们估计了两种类型广告对消费者需求的影响。我们发现，政府广告增加了总体参保率并提升了福利；然而，它并未诱导消费者选择特定的保险公司。相比之下，私人广告增加了对特定保险公司的需求，并且广告支出较多的保险公司倾向于提供与更高消费者效用相关的计划。然而，仅靠私人广告并不能非常有效地诱导消费者选择计划更优的保险公司，因为寻租竞争往往导致广告过度。

papers.title: The Effect of Job Displacement on College Enrollment: Evidence from Ohio
papers.authors: Veronica Minaya, Brendan Moore, Judith Scott-Clayton
papers.abstract: Displaced workers suﬀer large and persistent earnings losses. These losses can be mitigated by returning to school, yet the extent to which such workers enroll in post-secondary education in response to displacement is poorly understood. Using employer-employee-student matched administrative data from Ohio, we provide the ﬁrst direct evidence of workers’ enrollment responses following mass layoﬀs in the United States. Close to 10% of these displaced workers enroll in public two- or four-year colleges after displacement, with the typical enrollment persisting for ﬁve semesters and 29% completing a degree. However, much of this enrollment may have occurred regardless of the displacement. To estimate a causal eﬀect, we compare displaced workers over time to similar non-displaced workers. We estimate that for every 100 displaced workers, only about 1 is ever induced to enroll in a public college as a result. This eﬀect is concentrated almost entirely among displaced manufacturing workers, who enroll at a rate of 2.5 per every 100. Such workers with lower within-ﬁrm earnings and from local labor markets with limited for-proﬁt college options are the most likely to enroll in public institutions.
papers.zh_title: 工作流失对大学入学的影响：来自俄亥俄州的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 被解雇的工人会遭受巨大且持久的收入损失。这些损失可以通过重返学校来缓解，然而，这些工人因失业而进入高等教育机构学习的程度尚不明确。利用俄亥俄州雇主-雇员-学生匹配的行政数据，我们首次提供了美国大规模裁员后工人入学反应的直接证据。近10%的被解雇工人在失业后进入公立两年制或四年制大学，典型的入学持续五个学期，其中29%完成了学位。然而，这些入学行为中有很大一部分可能无论是否失业都会发生。为了估计因果效应，我们将被解雇工人与相似的非被解雇工人进行跨时间比较。我们估计，每100名被解雇工人中，只有大约1人因此被诱导进入公立大学。这种效应几乎完全集中在被解雇的制造业工人中，他们的入学率为每100人中有2.5人。那些在工厂内收入较低且来自营利性大学选择有限的当地劳动力市场的工人，最有可能进入公立院校。

papers.title: How Did U.S. Consumers Use Their Stimulus Payments?
papers.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: Using a large-scale survey of U.S. consumers, we study how the large one-time transfers to individuals from the CARES Act affected their consumption, saving and labor-supply decisions. Most respondents report that they primarily saved or paid down debts with their transfers, with only about 15 percent reporting that they mostly spent it. When providing a detailed breakdown of how they used their checks, individuals report having spent or planning to spend only around 40 percent of the total transfer on average. This relatively low rate of spending out of a one-time transfer is higher for those facing liquidity constraints, who are out of the labor force, who live in larger households, who are less educated and those who received smaller amounts. We find no meaningful effect on labor-supply decisions from these transfer payments, except for twenty percent of the unemployed who report that the stimulus payment made them search harder for a job.
papers.zh_title: 美国消费者如何使用他们的刺激支票？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用对美国消费者的大规模调查，我们研究了《关怀法案》中一次性大额转移支付如何影响他们的消费、储蓄和劳动供给决策。大多数受访者报告说，他们主要将转移支付用于储蓄或偿还债务，只有约15%的人报告说他们主要花掉了。当提供如何使用支票的详细分类时，个人报告平均只花费或计划花费总转移支付的大约40%。这种一次性转移支付相对较低的支出率，在面临流动性约束、不在劳动力队伍中、生活在较大家庭、受教育程度较低以及收到金额较少的人群中更高。我们发现这些转移支付对劳动供给决策没有显著影响，除了20%的失业者报告说刺激支付使他们更努力地寻找工作。

papers.title: Union Membership Peaks in Midlife
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Using data from 68 countries on over 8 million respondents over forty years we show union membership peaks in midlife – usually around workers’ late 40s or early 50s. In doing so we extend Blanchflower’s (2007) earlier study, incorporating a further 39 countries and another decade or so of data. We also found it in every US state and the District of Columbia as well as across industries. The fact that this relationship exists in virtually every country across the world challenges a key precept in industrial relations, namely that institutions matter: they appear to matter little, at least in the case of the hump-shaped relationship between unionization and age. The union membership rates at the age peak in the United States and the United Kingdom have lowered over time, while the age at which the peak has occurred has increased in both countries. In part this is due to increasing union membership rates among those over the age of sixty-five. Declines in membership by birth cohort have lowered union density rates as the older cohorts with historically higher membership rates leave labor markets.
papers.zh_title: 工会会员资格在中年达到顶峰
papers.zh_abstract: 利用来自68个国家、超过800万受访者、跨越四十年的数据，我们显示工会会员资格在中年达到顶峰——通常在工人接近50岁或50岁出头时。在此过程中，我们扩展了Blanchflower（2007）的早期研究，纳入了另外39个国家和大约十年的数据。我们还在美国的每个州、哥伦比亚特区以及各个行业中都发现了这一现象。这一关系在世界上几乎每个国家都存在的事实，挑战了劳资关系中的一个关键信条，即制度很重要：它们似乎并不重要，至少在工会化与年龄之间的驼峰形关系方面是如此。美国和英国的工会会员率在年龄峰值处随时间推移而下降，而两国达到峰值的年龄则有所增加。这部分是由于65岁以上人群的工会会员率上升。出生队列的会员人数下降降低了工会密度率，因为历史上会员率较高的年长队列正在离开劳动力市场。

papers.title: Low Interest Rates, Policy, and the Predictive Content of the Yield Curve
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Joseph G. Haubrich
papers.abstract: Does the yield curve's ability to predict future output and recessions differ when interest rates are low, as in the current global environment? In this paper we build on recent econometric work by Shi, Phillips and Hurn that detects changes in the causal impact of the yield curve and relate that to the level of interest rates. We explore the issue using historical data going back to the 19th century for the US and more recent data for the UK, Germany, and Japan. This paper is similar in spirit to Ramey and Zubairy (2018) who look at the government spending multiplier in times of low interest rates.
papers.zh_title: 低利率、政策与收益率曲线的预测内容
papers.zh_abstract: 当利率处于当前全球环境中的低位时，收益率曲线预测未来产出和衰退的能力是否有所不同？在本文中，我们基于Shi、Phillips和Hurn最近的计量经济学工作，该工作检测了收益率曲线因果影响的变化，并将其与利率水平联系起来。我们利用美国可追溯到19世纪的历史数据以及英国、德国和日本更近期的数据来探讨这个问题。本文在精神上与Ramey和Zubairy（2018）相似，他们研究了低利率时期的政府支出乘数。

papers.title: Return to Venture Capital in the Aggregate
papers.authors: Shumiao Ouyang, Jiaheng Yu, Ravi Jagannathan
papers.abstract: We examine the performance of the Aggregate Portfolio of All Equity Investments (APAEI) in 17,242 ventures with first funding round between 1980 and 2006 by following them till 2018, or their exits if earlier. The Gornall and Strebulaev (2020) upward bias in later-stage pre-money-valuations, while affecting all funding-round-to-exit returns, does not affect APAEI’s performance. APAEI had an internal rate of return of 22%, and a superior Generalized Public Market Equivalent of 1.44. When the best 5% of the ventures are dropped from the APAEI portfolio, the risk adjusted return becomes negative. The APAEI portfolio return declines after 1999.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, PR；JEL：G0, G00, G1, G10, G12, G19
papers.zh_title: 风险投资的总回报
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了1980年至2006年间首次融资的17,242家风险企业的全部股权投资组合（APAEI）的表现，追踪这些企业直至2018年，或更早的退出时点。Gornall和Strebulaev（2020）指出的后期融资前估值向上偏差，虽然影响所有从融资轮到退出的回报率，但并不影响APAEI的表现。APAEI的内部收益率为22%，广义公开市场等价倍数为1.44，表现优异。当从APAEI组合中剔除表现最好的5%的风险企业后，风险调整后的回报变为负值。APAEI组合的回报率在1999年之后出现下降。

papers.title: Discrimination and Racial Disparities in Labor Market Outcomes: Evidence from WWII
papers.authors: Anna Aizer, Ryan Boone, Adriana Lleras-Muney, Jonathan Vogel
papers.abstract: The 1940s witnessed substantial reductions in the Black-white earnings gap. We study the role that domestic WWII defense production played in reducing this gap. Exploiting variation across labor markets in the allocation of war contracts to private firms, we find that war production contracts resulted in significant increases in the earnings of Black workers and declines in the racial wage gap, with no effect on white workers. This was achieved via occupational upgrading among Black men to skilled occupations. The gains largely persisted through at least 1970. Using a structural model, we show that declines in discrimination (and not migration or changes in productivity) account for all of the occupational upgrading and half of the estimated wage gains associated with the war production effort. Additionally, the war production effort explains one quarter (one seventh) of the overall improvements in racial gaps in occupation allocations (wages) witnessed over this decade. Finally, war spending led to an increase in the high school graduation rate of Black children, suggesting important intergenerational spillovers associated with declines in labor market discrimination.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：J24, J3, J7, N12, N4
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场结果中的歧视与种族差异：来自二战的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 20世纪40年代见证了黑人与白人之间收入差距的大幅缩小。我们研究了国内二战军工生产在缩小这一差距中所起的作用。利用不同劳动力市场之间军工合同分配给私营企业的差异，我们发现军工生产合同显著提高了黑人劳动者的收入，并缩小了种族工资差距，但对白人劳动者没有影响。这是通过黑人男性向技能型职业的职业升级实现的。这些收益在很大程度上至少持续到了1970年。通过一个结构模型，我们表明歧视的减少（而非迁移或生产率变化）解释了与军工生产努力相关的全部职业升级和一半的估计工资收益。此外，军工生产努力解释了这十年间观察到的种族职业分配差距（工资差距）总体改善的四分之一（七分之一）。最后，军费支出还导致黑人儿童的高中毕业率上升，这表明与劳动力市场歧视减少相关的重要代际溢出效应。

papers.title: What Determines School Segregation? The Crucial Role of Neighborhood Factors
papers.authors: Gregorio S. Caetano, Hugh Macartney
papers.abstract: We develop a novel strategy to identify the relative importance of school and neighborhood factors in determining school segregation. Using detailed student enrollment and residential location data, our research design compares differences in student composition between adjacent Census blocks served by different schools to analogous differences between those schools. Our findings indicate that neighborhood factors explain around 62% of racial segregation and 44% of economic segregation across all schools, playing an even more pronounced role in urban areas, where school segregation has been especially acute. These findings suggest that the involvement of urban planners is essential when attempting to confront inequality of opportunity through education.
papers.zh_title: 什么决定了学校隔离？邻里因素的关键作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新颖的策略来识别学校和邻里因素在决定学校隔离中的相对重要性。利用详细的学生入学和居住地点数据，我们的研究设计比较了由不同学校服务的相邻人口普查区块之间的学生构成差异，与这些学校之间的类似差异。我们的研究结果表明，邻里因素解释了所有学校中约62%的种族隔离和44%的经济隔离，在城市地区，这种作用更为显著，而城市地区的学校隔离尤为严重。这些发现表明，在试图通过教育应对机会不平等问题时，城市规划者的参与至关重要。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Effects of Macroprudential Policy: Evidence from a Narrative Approach
papers.authors: Diego Rojas, Carlos A. Vegh, Guillermo Vuletin
papers.abstract: We analyze the macroeconomic effects of macroprudential policy – in the form of legal reserve requirements – in three Latin American countries (Argentina, Brazil, and Uruguay). To correctly identify innovations in changes in legal reserve requirements, we develop a narrative approach – based on contemporaneous reports from the IMF and Central Banks in the spirit of Romer and Romer (2010) – that classifies each change into endogenous or exogenous to the business cycle. We show that this distinction is critical in understanding the macroeconomic effects of reserve requirements. In particular, we show that output falls in response to exogenous increases in legal reserve requirements but would seem not to be affected (or could even increase!) when using all changes and relying on traditional time-identifying strategies. This bias reflects the practical relevance of the misidentification of endogenous countercyclical changes in reserve requirements. We also push the empirical frontier along two important dimensions. First, in measuring legal reserve requirements, we take into account both the different types of legal reserve requirements in terms of maturity and currency of denomination as well as the structure of deposits. Second, since in practice reserve requirement policy is tightly linked to monetary policy, we also jointly analyze the macroeconomic effects of changes in central bank interest rates. To properly identify exogenous central bank interest rate shocks, we follow Romer and Romer (2004).
papers.zh_title: 宏观审慎政策的宏观经济效应：来自叙事方法的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了三个拉丁美洲国家（阿根廷、巴西和乌拉圭）以法定准备金率形式实施的宏观审慎政策的宏观经济效应。为了正确识别法定准备金率变动的冲击，我们开发了一种叙事方法——基于国际货币基金组织和中央银行的同时期报告，遵循Romer和Romer（2010）的思路——将每次变动分类为对商业周期的内生或外生变动。我们表明，这种区分对于理解准备金要求的宏观经济效应至关重要。特别是，我们发现，当使用所有变动并依赖传统的时间识别策略时，产出似乎不受影响（甚至可能增加！），但对外生性法定准备金率提高的反应是下降的。这种偏差反映了对准备金要求内生性逆周期变动的错误识别的实际相关性。我们还沿着两个重要维度推进了实证前沿。首先，在衡量法定准备金率时，我们既考虑了不同期限和计价货币的法定准备金类型，也考虑了存款结构。其次，由于在实践中准备金要求政策与货币政策紧密相连，我们还联合分析了中央银行利率变动的宏观经济效应。为了正确识别外生性的中央银行利率冲击，我们遵循了Romer和Romer（2004）的方法。

papers.title: Patenting Inventions or Inventing Patents? Continuation Practice at the USPTO
papers.authors: Cesare Righi, Timothy Simcoe
papers.abstract: Continuations allow inventors to add new claims to old patents, leading to concerns about inadvertent infringement and holdup. We study the use of continuations to obtain standard essential patents (SEPs), a setting where patents are easily linked to possibly infringing technology. Continuation filings increase after standard publication. This effect is larger when patent examiners are more lenient, and for applicants with licensing-based business models. Claims of SEPs also become more similar after standard publication, and late claiming is positively correlated with litigation. Our findings suggest widespread use of continuations to “invent patents” that are infringed by already-published standards.
papers.zh_title: 为发明申请专利还是为专利发明？美国专利商标局的延续申请实践
papers.zh_abstract: 延续申请允许发明人为旧专利添加新权利要求，引发了对无意侵权和专利劫持的担忧。我们研究了利用延续申请获取标准必要专利（SEP）的情况，在这种情境下，专利很容易与可能侵权的技术联系起来。标准发布后，延续申请提交量增加。当专利审查员更为宽松时，以及对于以许可为基础的商业模式的申请人，这种效应更大。标准必要专利的权利要求在标准发布后也变得更加相似，并且后期权利要求与诉讼呈正相关。我们的发现表明，广泛使用延续申请来“发明专利”，这些专利被已发布的标准所侵权。

papers.title: Behavioral Welfare Economics and Risk Preferences: A Bayesian Approach
papers.authors: Xiaoxue Sherry Gao, Glenn W. Harrison, Rusty Tchernis
papers.abstract: We propose the use of Bayesian estimation of risk preferences of individuals for applications of behavioral welfare economics to evaluate observed choices that involve risk. Bayesian estimation provides more systematic control of the use of informative priors over inferences about risk preferences for each individual in a sample. We demonstrate that these methods make a difference to the rigorous normative evaluation of decisions in a case study of insurance purchases. We also show that hierarchical Bayesian methods can be used to infer welfare reliably and efficiently even with significantly reduced demands on the number of choices that each subject has to make. Finally, we illustrate the natural use of Bayesian methods in the adaptive evaluation of welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：C11, D6, D81, G40
papers.zh_title: 行为福利经济学与风险偏好：一种贝叶斯方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们建议使用贝叶斯估计个体风险偏好的方法，用于行为福利经济学的应用，以评估涉及风险的观察选择。贝叶斯估计提供了对样本中每个个体风险偏好推断中使用信息性先验的更系统控制。我们通过一个保险购买案例研究证明，这些方法对决策的严格规范评估产生了影响。我们还表明，即使显著减少每个受试者必须做出的选择数量，分层贝叶斯方法也能可靠且高效地推断福利。最后，我们说明了贝叶斯方法在福利适应性评估中的自然应用。

papers.title: Generalizable and Robust TV Advertising Effects
papers.authors: Bradley Shapiro, Günter J. Hitsch, Anna Tuchman
papers.abstract: We provide generalizable and robust results on the causal sales effect of TV advertising for a large number of products in many categories. Such generalizable results provide a prior distribution that can improve the advertising decisions made by firms and the analysis and recommendations of policy makers. To provide generalizable results, we base our analysis on a large number of products and clearly lay out the research protocol used to select the products. We characterize the distribution of all estimates, irrespective of sign, size, or statistical significance. To ensure generalizability, we document the robustness of the estimates. First, we examine the sensitivity of the results to the assumptions made when constructing the data used in estimation. Second, we document whether the estimated effects are sensitive to the identification strategies that we use to claim causality based on observational data. Our results reveal substantially smaller advertising elasticities compared to the results documented in the extant literature, as well as a sizable percentage of statistically insignificant or negative estimates. Finally, we conduct an analysis of return on investment (ROI). While our results show that many brands perform better with their observed advertising than they would without advertising, we document considerable over-investment in advertising at the margin.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：B41, C18, C52, C55, C81, L00, L15, L81, M31, M37
papers.zh_title: 可推广且稳健的电视广告效果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于电视广告对众多类别中大量产品的因果销售效应的可推广且稳健的结果。这些可推广的结果提供了一个先验分布，可以改善企业的广告决策以及政策制定者的分析和建议。为了提供可推广的结果，我们的分析基于大量产品，并清晰阐述了用于选择产品的研究方案。我们描述了所有估计值的分布，无论其符号、大小或统计显著性如何。为确保可推广性，我们记录了估计值的稳健性。首先，我们检验了结果对构建估计所用数据时所作假设的敏感性。其次，我们记录了估计效果是否对我们基于观测数据声称因果关系的识别策略敏感。我们的结果显示，与现有文献中记录的结果相比，广告弹性显著更小，并且有相当大比例的估计值在统计上不显著或为负。最后，我们进行了投资回报率（ROI）分析。虽然我们的结果表明，许多品牌在有广告的情况下比没有广告时表现更好，但我们记录了在边际上存在显著的广告过度投资。

papers.title: A History of Pricing Pollution (Or, Why Pigouvian Taxes are not Necessarily Pigouvian)
papers.authors: H. Spencer Banzhaf
papers.abstract: The standard history of modern environmental economics often views it as an application of A.C. Pigou's theory of externalities, refined over the decades and applied to environmental problems in the 1960s, when the first detailed pro-posals for pricing pollution were outlined by Allen Kneese, Thomas Crocker, John Dales, and others. However, the historical literature has noted problems with this narrative, including a 30-year gap in discussions of such applications and few actual citations to Pigou. This paper offers a simple explanation for this puzzle: Namely, pollution pricing is not (necessarily) Pigouvian. It argues that the early applied literature on the topic was rooted more in questions about common property resources and increasing returns from developing natural re-sources. Both topics were treated by broad literatures by the 1960s, including distinctly American traditions not particularly associated with Pigou.
papers.zh_title: 污染定价的历史（或，为什么庇古税不一定是庇古式的）
papers.zh_abstract: 现代环境经济学的标准历史通常将其视为A.C.庇古外部性理论的应用，经过几十年的完善，并在20世纪60年代应用于环境问题，当时艾伦·尼斯、托马斯·克罗克、约翰·戴尔斯等人提出了首批详细的污染定价方案。然而，历史文献指出了这一叙述存在的问题，包括此类应用讨论中存在30年的空白，以及实际引用庇古的情况很少。本文为这一谜题提供了一个简单的解释：即污染定价（不一定）是庇古式的。它认为，关于该主题的早期应用文献更多地植根于关于公共财产资源和开发自然资源带来的递增回报的问题。到20世纪60年代，这两个主题都已被广泛的文献所探讨，包括与庇古没有特别关联的独特的美国传统。

papers.title: Dollar Safety and the Global Financial Cycle
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Hanno Lustig
papers.abstract: We develop a model of the global financial cycle with one key ingredient: the international demand for safe dollar assets. The model matches patterns of dollar borrowing and currency mismatch, the U.S. external balance sheet, exorbitant privilege, spillovers of the U.S. monetary policy to the rest of the world, and the dollar as a global risk factor. In doing so, we lay out a novel transmission mechanism through which the U.S. monetary policy affects the currency market and the global economy. The global financial cycle is a dollar cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, F3, G15
papers.zh_title: 美元安全性与全球金融周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个全球金融周期模型，其关键要素是国际对安全美元资产的需求。该模型匹配了美元借贷与货币错配的模式、美国外部资产负债表、过高特权、美国货币政策对世界其他地区的溢出效应，以及美元作为全球风险因素的特征。在此过程中，我们阐述了一种新的传导机制，美国货币政策通过该机制影响外汇市场和全球经济。全球金融周期即美元周期。

papers.title: Autonomy and Technology Adoption
papers.authors: Benjamin Bushong, Carolina Corral, Xavier Giné, Aprajit Mahajan, Enrique Seira
papers.abstract: We examine whether autonomy increases adherence to expert recommendations in technology adoption. In a context where farmers overuse fertilizer, we ran a field experiment that combined recommendations with either a restrictive subsidy tied to expert-recommended inputs or a flexible subsidy preserving farmer autonomy over input choice. In the short run, farmers adopted expert recommendations at similar rates regardless of subsidy autonomy and reduced fertilizer over-use by two-thirds. In the longer run, after the intervention ended, farmers with autonomy were significantly more likely to persist with the expert recommendations. We replicate these findings in a complementary laboratory experiment and find suggestive evidence that autonomy increases persistence by improving recommendation recall. Our results suggest that preserving choice can enhance the long-term effectiveness of expert advice and targeted subsidies.
papers.zh_title: 自主性与技术采纳
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了在技术采纳中，自主性是否提高了对专家建议的遵循程度。在农民过度使用化肥的背景下，我们进行了一项实地实验，将建议与两种补贴相结合：一种是限制性补贴，与专家推荐的投入品挂钩；另一种是灵活补贴，保留农民对投入品选择的自主性。短期内，无论补贴自主性如何，农民以相似的比例采纳专家建议，并将化肥过度使用减少了三分之二。在干预结束后的较长期内，拥有自主性的农民显著更有可能坚持专家建议。我们在互补的实验室实验中复制了这些发现，并发现提示性证据表明，自主性通过改善建议回忆来提高坚持率。我们的结果表明，保留选择权可以增强专家建议和定向补贴的长期有效性。

papers.title: Improving Management through Worker Evaluations: Evidence from Auto Manufacturing
papers.authors: Jing Cai, Shing-Yi Wang
papers.abstract: Using a randomized experiment with an automobile manufacturing firm in China, we measure the effects of letting workers evaluate their managers on worker and firm outcomes. In the treatment teams, workers evaluate their supervisors monthly. We find that providing feedback leads to significant reductions in worker turnover and increases in team-level productivity. In addition, workers report higher levels of happiness and positive mood. The evidence suggests that these results are driven by changes in the behavior of managers and an overall better relationship between managers and workers.
papers.zh_title: 通过员工评价改善管理：来自汽车制造业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用与中国一家汽车制造企业的随机实验，衡量了让员工评价其管理者对员工和企业结果的影响。在实验组团队中，员工每月评价其主管。我们发现，提供反馈导致员工离职率显著降低，团队层面生产率提高。此外，员工报告了更高的幸福感和积极情绪。证据表明，这些结果是由管理者行为的变化以及管理者与员工之间整体关系的改善所驱动的。

papers.title: Social Learning along International Migrant Networks
papers.authors: Yuan Tian, Maria Esther Caballero, Brian K. Kovak
papers.abstract: We document the transmission of social distancing practices from the United States to Mexico along migrant networks during the early 2020 Covid-19 pandemic. Using data on pre-existing migrant connections between Mexican and U.S. locations and mobile-phone tracking data revealing social distancing behavior, we find larger declines in mobility in Mexican regions whose emigrants live in U.S. locations with stronger social distancing practices. We rule out confounding pre-trends and use a variety of controls and an instrumental variables strategy based on U.S. stay-at-home orders to rule out the potential influence of disease transmission and migrant sorting between similar locations. Given this evidence, we conclude that our findings represent the effect of information transmission between Mexican migrants living in the U.S. and residents of their home locations in Mexico. Our results demonstrate the importance of personal connections when policymakers seek to change fundamental social behaviors.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, ITI；JEL：D83, F22, I12, J61, O15
papers.zh_title: 国际移民网络中的社会学习
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了2020年初新冠疫情期间，社交距离实践通过移民网络从美国向墨西哥的传播。利用墨西哥与美国地点之间既有的移民联系数据以及揭示社交距离行为的手机追踪数据，我们发现，在其移民居住于社交距离实践更强的美国地点的墨西哥地区，流动性下降幅度更大。我们排除了混淆性的前期趋势，并使用了多种控制变量以及基于美国居家令的工具变量策略，以排除疾病传播和移民在相似地点之间自选择的潜在影响。基于这些证据，我们得出结论，我们的发现代表了居住在美国的墨西哥移民与其在墨西哥家乡居民之间信息传递的影响。我们的结果证明了当政策制定者试图改变基本社会行为时，个人联系的重要性。

papers.title: Data and Policy Decisions: Experimental Evidence from Pakistan
papers.authors: Michael Callen, Saad Gulzar, Syed Ali Hasanain, Muhammad Yasir Khan, Arman B. Rezaee
papers.abstract: We evaluate a program in Pakistan that equips government health inspectors with a smartphone app which channels data on rural clinics to senior policy makers. The system led to rural clinics being inspected 104% more often after 6 months, but only 43.8% more often after a year, with the latter estimate not attaining significance at conventional levels. There is also no clear evidence that the increase in inspections led to increases in general staff attendance. In addition, we test whether senior officials act on the information provided by the system. Focusing only on districts where the app is deployed, we find that highlighting poorly performing facilities on a dashboard viewed by supervisors raises doctor attendance by 75%. Our results indicate that technology may be able to mobilize data to useful effect, even in low capacity settings
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：C93, D02, D73, K42, O17
papers.zh_title: 数据与政策决策：来自巴基斯坦的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了巴基斯坦的一个项目，该项目为政府卫生检查员配备了一款智能手机应用程序，该程序将农村诊所的数据传送给高级政策制定者。该系统导致6个月后农村诊所被检查的频率增加了104%，但一年后仅增加了43.8%，后一个估计值在常规显著性水平上不显著。也没有明确证据表明检查的增加导致了普通员工出勤率的提高。此外，我们测试了高级官员是否根据系统提供的信息采取行动。仅关注部署了该应用程序的地区，我们发现，在主管查看的仪表板上突出显示表现不佳的设施，使医生出勤率提高了75%。我们的结果表明，即使在能力较低的环境中，技术也可能调动数据产生有效作用。

papers.title: Survival Pessimism and the Demand for Annuities
papers.authors: Cormac O'Dea, David Sturrock
papers.abstract: The "annuity puzzle" refers to the fact that annuities are rarely purchased despite the longevity insurance they provide. Most explanations for this puzzle assume that individuals have accurate expectations about their future survival. We provide evidence that individuals misperceive their mortality risk, and study the demand for annuities in a setting where annuities are priced by insurers on the basis of objectively-measured survival probabilities but in which individuals make purchasing decisions based on their own subjective survival probabilities. Subjective expectations have the capacity to explain significant rates of non-annuitization, yielding a quantitatively important explanation for the annuity puzzle.
papers.zh_title: 生存悲观主义与年金需求
papers.zh_abstract: “年金之谜”指的是尽管年金提供了长寿保险，但很少有人购买。对这一谜题的大多数解释假设个人对其未来生存有准确的预期。我们提供了证据表明个人会错误感知其死亡风险，并研究了在年金由保险公司基于客观测量的生存概率定价，但个人基于其自身主观生存概率做出购买决策的设定下的年金需求。主观预期有能力解释显著的非年金化率，为年金之谜提供了一个数量上重要的解释。

papers.title: Structuring Mortgages for Macroeconomic Stability
papers.authors: John Y. Campbell, Nuno Clara, João F. Cocco
papers.abstract: We study mortgage design features aimed at stabilizing the macroeconomy. We model overlapping generations of mortgage borrowers and an infinitely lived risk-averse representative mortgage lender. Mortgages are priced using an equilibrium pricing kernel derived from the lender's endogenous consumption. We consider an adjustable-rate mortgage (ARM) with an option that during recessions allows borrowers to pay only interest on their loan and extend its maturity. We find that this maturity extension option stabilizes consumption growth over the business cycle, shifts defaults to expansions, and is welfare enhancing. The cyclical properties of the maturity extension ARM are attractive to a risk-averse lender so the mortgage can be provided at a relatively low cost.
papers.zh_title: 为宏观经济稳定设计抵押贷款结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了旨在稳定宏观经济的抵押贷款设计特征。我们模拟了抵押贷款借款人的世代交叠模型和一个无限期生存的风险厌恶型代表性抵押贷款机构。抵押贷款使用从贷款机构内生消费中推导出的均衡定价核进行定价。我们考虑一种浮动利率抵押贷款，其附带一项期权，允许借款人在经济衰退期间仅支付贷款利息并延长贷款期限。我们发现，这种期限延长期权稳定了经济周期中的消费增长，将违约转移至扩张期，并提高了福利。期限延长型浮动利率抵押贷款的周期性特征对风险厌恶型贷款机构具有吸引力，因此该抵押贷款可以以相对较低的成本提供。

papers.title: The Return to Capital in Capital-Scarce Countries
papers.authors: Anusha Chari, Jennifer S. Rhee
papers.abstract: In this paper, we use firm-level data to investigate the link between the marginal product of capital and financial rates of return across countries. Computed estimates from financial statement data show that capital-scarce countries display higher marginal products of capital. However, inflation-adjusted financial returns are roughly equal across capital-scarce and capital-abundant countries. The divergence between the marginal products of capital and financial returns implies that there may be little incentive for capital to flow to capital-scarce countries. We suggest that domestic capital-accumulation frictions such as sufficiently large capital adjustment costs can decouple financial rates of return from the marginal product of capital across countries.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM；JEL：E13, F21, G15, G32, O16
papers.zh_title: 资本稀缺国家的资本回报率
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们使用企业层面数据来研究各国资本边际产品与金融回报率之间的联系。根据财务报表数据计算得出的估计显示，资本稀缺国家的资本边际产品更高。然而，经通胀调整后的金融回报率在资本稀缺国家和资本充裕国家之间大致相等。资本边际产品与金融回报率之间的背离意味着资本流向资本稀缺国家的动力可能很小。我们提出，国内资本积累摩擦（例如足够大的资本调整成本）可能导致各国的金融回报率与资本边际产品脱钩。

papers.title: Estimating Trends in Male Earnings Volatility with the Panel Study of Income Dynamics
papers.authors: Robert A. Moffitt, Sisi Zhang
papers.abstract: The possible existence of trends in volatility in the U.S. labor market has been an important issue in both labor economics and macroeconomics. The Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID) has been the workhorse data set used to estimate trends in earnings volatility at the individual level. Studies using the PSID have generally shown upward trends in volatility. However, trends estimated with the PSID conflict with those reported from some other survey and administrative data sets, many of which have shown flat or declining trends. This paper, which is part of a group project attempting to reconcile estimates across different data sets, presents new estimates of trends in male earnings volatility in the U.S. from 1970 to 2016 from the PSID, and addresses a number of concerns with the data that might lead its estimates to differ from those obtained in other data sets. The analysis shows that upward trends in male earnings volatility were concentrated in the 1970s and 1980s, and that trends after 1990 have been modest or even non-existent, depending on whether volatility is expected to return to its mid-2000s level after jumping up in the Great Recession. Thus, volatility trends in the PSID are roughly consistent with those studies using other data sets which find flat volatility trends in the last three decades. Examinations of potential biases from unit nonresponse (i.e., attrition), item nonresponse (i.e., don’t knows and refusals) and resulting imputation, and from a number of other features of the PSID that might affect its population representativeness show no evidence of significant bias from any of these factors. However, suggestive evidence that declines in volatility estimated in studies using administrative data may be a result of a larger left tail of earnings and of problematic trimming procedures used in those studies.
papers.zh_title: 利用收入动态面板研究估计男性收入波动趋势
papers.zh_abstract: 美国劳动力市场波动性是否存在趋势，一直是劳动经济学和宏观经济学的重要议题。收入动态面板研究（PSID）是估计个体层面收入波动趋势的主要数据集。使用PSID的研究通常显示波动性呈上升趋势。然而，PSID估计的趋势与其他一些调查和行政数据集报告的结果存在冲突，其中许多数据集显示波动性持平或下降。本文是一个旨在协调不同数据集估计结果的团体项目的一部分，利用PSID提供了1970年至2016年美国男性收入波动趋势的新估计，并解决了数据中可能导致其估计结果与其他数据集不同的若干问题。分析表明，男性收入波动的上升趋势主要集中在20世纪70年代和80年代，而1990年之后的趋势较为温和甚至不存在，具体取决于波动性在大衰退期间跃升后是否会恢复到21世纪中期水平。因此，PSID中的波动性趋势与那些使用其他数据集发现过去三十年波动性趋势持平的研究大致一致。对单位无应答（即样本损耗）、项目无应答（即“不知道”和拒绝回答）及由此产生的插补，以及PSID中可能影响其人口代表性的其他若干特征所导致的潜在偏差的检验，均未发现任何这些因素存在显著偏差的证据。然而，有提示性证据表明，使用行政数据的研究估计的波动性下降，可能是由于收入左尾较大以及这些研究中使用的有问题的修剪程序所致。

papers.title: The 1918 Influenza Pandemic and its Lessons for COVID-19
papers.authors: Brian Beach, Karen Clay, Martin H. Saavedra
papers.abstract: This article reviews the global health and economic consequences of the 1918 influenza pandemic, with a particular focus on topics that have seen a renewed interest because of COVID-19. We begin by providing an overview of key contextual and epidemiological details as well as the data that are available to researchers. We then examine the effects on mortality, fertility, and the economy in the short and medium run. The role of nonpharmaceutical interventions in shaping those outcomes is discussed throughout. We then examine longer-lasting health consequences and their impact on human capital accumulation and socioeconomic status. Throughout the paper we highlight important areas for future work.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I10, J10, J24, N0
papers.zh_title: 1918年流感大流行及其对COVID-19的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了1918年流感大流行的全球健康和经济后果，特别关注因COVID-19而重新引起兴趣的主题。我们首先概述关键的背景和流行病学细节，以及研究人员可用的数据。然后，我们考察了短期和中期内对死亡率、生育率和经济的影响。全文讨论了非药物干预措施在塑造这些结果中的作用。接着，我们研究了更持久的健康后果及其对人力资本积累和社会经济地位的影响。在整篇论文中，我们强调了未来工作的重要领域。

papers.title: Reconciling Trends in Volatility: Evidence from the SIPP Survey and Administrative Data
papers.authors: Michael D. Carr, Robert A. Moffitt, Emily E. Wiemers
papers.abstract: As part of a set of papers using the same methods and sample selection criteria to estimate trends in male earnings volatility across a number of survey and administrative datasets, we conduct a new investigation of trends in male earnings volatility from the 1980s to 2014 using data from the Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP) survey and the SIPP Gold Standard File (SIPP GSF), which links the SIPP survey to administrative data on earnings. We find that the level of volatility is higher in the SIPP GSF than in the SIPP survey but that the trends are similar. Specifically, over the period where the datasets overlap between 1984 and 2012, volatility in the SIPP survey declines slightly while volatility in the SIPP GSF increases slightly but the differences are small in magnitude. Because the density of low earnings differs considerably across datasets, and volatility may vary across the earnings distribution, we estimate trends in volatility in the SIPP survey and SIPP GSF where we hold the earnings distribution fixed to resemble that in the Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID). We find that differences in the underlying earnings distribution explains almost all of the difference in the level of volatility between the SIPP survey and SIPP GSF and it somewhat reduces the small differences in trends.
papers.zh_title: 协调波动性趋势：来自SIPP调查和行政数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 作为一组使用相同方法和样本选择标准来估计多个调查和行政数据集中男性收入波动趋势的论文的一部分，我们利用收入与项目参与调查（SIPP）和SIPP金标准文件（SIPP GSF）的数据，对20世纪80年代至2014年男性收入波动趋势进行了新的调查。SIPP GSF将SIPP调查与行政收入数据相关联。我们发现，SIPP GSF中的波动水平高于SIPP调查，但趋势相似。具体而言，在1984年至2012年数据集重叠的时期内，SIPP调查中的波动性略有下降，而SIPP GSF中的波动性略有上升，但差异幅度很小。由于不同数据集中低收入密度差异很大，且波动性可能随收入分布而变化，我们估计了SIPP调查和SIPP GSF中的波动性趋势，其中我们固定收入分布以类似于收入动态面板研究（PSID）中的分布。我们发现，潜在收入分布的差异几乎解释了SIPP调查和SIPP GSF之间波动水平差异的全部，并在一定程度上减少了趋势上的微小差异。

papers.title: A Quantitative Theory of the Credit Score
papers.authors: Satyajit Chatterjee, Dean Corbae, Kyle P. Dempsey, José-Víctor Ríos-Rull
papers.abstract: What is the role of credit scores in credit markets? We argue that it is a stand in for a market assessment of a person’s unobservable type (which here we take to be patience). We pose a model of persistent hidden types where observable actions shape the public assessment of a person’s type via Bayesian updating. We show how dynamic reputation can incentivize repayment without monetary costs of default beyond the administrative cost of filing for bankruptcy. Importantly we show how an economy with credit scores implements the same equilibrium allocation. We estimate the model using both credit market data and the evolution of individual’s credit scores. We find a 3% difference in patience in almost equally sized groups in the population with significant turnover and a shift towards becoming more patient with age. If tracking of individual credit actions is outlawed, the benefits of bankruptcy forgiveness are outweighed by the higher interest rates associated with lower incentives to repay.
papers.zh_title: 信用评分的量化理论
papers.zh_abstract: 信用评分在信贷市场中的作用是什么？我们认为，它代表了市场对个人不可观测类型（此处我们将其视为耐心程度）的评估。我们提出了一个持续隐藏类型的模型，其中可观测行为通过贝叶斯更新塑造了公众对个人类型的评估。我们展示了动态声誉如何在不施加除破产行政成本之外的违约货币成本的情况下激励还款。重要的是，我们展示了拥有信用评分的经济体如何实现相同的均衡分配。我们利用信贷市场数据和个人信用评分的演变来估计该模型。我们发现，在人口中几乎同等规模的群体中，耐心程度存在3%的差异，且群体间存在显著流动，并随着年龄增长而变得更加耐心。如果禁止追踪个人信用行为，破产豁免的好处将被与较低还款激励相关的更高利率所抵消。

papers.title: The Average and Heterogeneous Effects of Transportation Investments: Evidence from Sub-Saharan Africa 1960-2010
papers.authors: Remi Jedwab, Adam Storeygard
papers.abstract: Previous work on transportation investments has focused on average impacts in high- and middle-income countries. We estimate average and heterogeneous effects in a poor continent, Africa, using roads and cities data spanning 50 years in 39 countries. Using changes in market access due to distant road construction as a source of exogenous variation, we estimate a 30-year elasticity of city population with respect to market access of about 0.08–0.13. Our results suggest that this elasticity is stronger for small and remote cities, and weaker in politically favored and agriculturally suitable areas. Access to foreign cities besides international ports matters little. Additional evidence points suggestively to rural-urban migration as the primary source of this population increase, though we cannot fully rule out natural increase or reallocation across cities.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI；JEL：F15, F16, O18, O20, R11, R12, R4
papers.zh_title: 交通投资的平均和异质性效应：来自1960-2010年撒哈拉以南非洲的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 以往关于交通投资的研究主要关注高收入和中等收入国家的平均影响。我们利用涵盖39个国家50年间的道路和城市数据，估算了贫困大陆非洲的平均和异质性效应。利用因远方道路建设导致的市场准入变化作为外生变异的来源，我们估计城市人口对市场准入的30年弹性约为0.08–0.13。我们的结果表明，这种弹性对于小型和偏远城市更强，而在政治受青睐和农业适宜地区则较弱。除国际港口外，通往外国城市的可达性影响甚微。额外的证据提示性地表明，农村向城市迁移是这种人口增长的主要来源，尽管我们不能完全排除自然增长或城市间重新分配的可能性。

papers.title: Medium-Term Money Neutrality and the Effective Lower Bound
papers.authors: Gauti B. Eggertsson, Marc Giannoni
papers.abstract: Conventional wisdom suggests that medium-term money neutrality imposes strong limitations on the effects of monetary policy. The point of this paper is that models with medium- and long-term money neutrality are prone to generate non-existence of equilibria at the effective lower bound (ELB) on interest rates. Non-existence is suggestive of sharp output contractions --- so-called contractionary black holes --- at the ELB. Paradoxically, the case for expansionary monetary policy at the ELB is even stronger in models that feature near money neutrality. The results highlight the benefits of a monetary policy regime in which the central bank temporarily overshoots its inflation target once confronted by the ELB.
papers.zh_title: 中期货币中性及有效下限
papers.zh_abstract: 传统观点认为，中期货币中性对货币政策的效果施加了强有力的限制。本文的要点在于，具有中期和长期货币中性的模型容易在利率有效下限（ELB）处产生均衡不存在的问题。均衡不存在暗示着在ELB处会出现剧烈的产出收缩——即所谓的收缩性黑洞。矛盾的是，在具有近似货币中性特征的模型中，在ELB处实施扩张性货币政策的理由甚至更为充分。这些结果凸显了一种货币政策体制的益处，即当面临ELB时，中央银行暂时使其通胀目标超调。

papers.title: Early Fertility Decline in the United States: Tests of Alternative Hypotheses using New Complete-Count Census Microdata and Enhanced County-Level Data
papers.authors: Michael R. Haines, J. David Hacker, Matthew S. Jaremski
papers.abstract: The U.S. fertility transition in the nineteenth century is unusual. Not only did it start from a very high fertility level and very early in the nation’s development, but it also took place long before the nation’s mortality transition, industrialization, and urbanization. This paper assembles new county-level, household-level, and individual-level data, including new complete-count IPUMS microdata databases of the 1830-1880 censuses, to evaluate different theories for the nineteenth-century American fertility transition. We construct cross-sectional models of net fertility for currently-married white couples in census years 1830-1880 and test the results with subset of couples linked between the 1850-1860 and 1860-1870 censuses. We find evidence of marital fertility control consistent with hypotheses as early as 1830. The results indicate support for several different but complementary theories of the early U.S. fertility decline, including the land availability, conventional structuralist, ideational, child demand/quality-quantity trade-off, and life-cycle savings theories.
papers.zh_title: 美国早期生育率下降：利用新完整人口普查微观数据和增强县级数据对替代假说的检验
papers.zh_abstract: 19世纪美国的生育率转型非同寻常。它不仅始于非常高的生育水平且在国家发展早期，而且远在国家死亡率转型、工业化和城市化之前。本文整理了新的县级、家庭级和个体级数据，包括1830-1880年人口普查的新完整计数IPUMS微观数据库，以评估19世纪美国生育率转型的不同理论。我们构建了1830-1880年人口普查年份中当前已婚白人夫妇的净生育率横截面模型，并使用在1850-1860年和1860-1870年人口普查之间关联的夫妇子集对结果进行检验。我们发现了与假说一致的婚内生育控制证据，最早可追溯到1830年。结果表明，支持几种不同但互补的美国早期生育率下降理论，包括土地可得性、传统结构主义、观念、儿童需求/质量数量权衡以及生命周期储蓄理论。

papers.title: COVID-19 and Crime: Effects of Stay-at-Home Orders on Domestic Violence
papers.authors: Lindsey Rose Bullinger, Jillian B. Carr, Analisa Packham
papers.abstract: COVID-19 has led to an abrupt change in time spent at home, with many cities and states implementing official stay-at-home (SAH), or “lockdown” policies. Using cell phone block-level activity data and administrative 911 and crime data from the city of Chicago, we estimate the effects of the Illinois governor's SAH order on calls for police service, crimes recorded by police, and arrests made relating to domestic violence. We find that the SAH order announcement increased time spent at home, leading to a decrease in total calls for police service, but a subsequent increase in domestic violence-related calls for police service. Effects are larger in areas with a high proportion of renters. These effects for domestic violence calls, however, are at odds with reported domestic-related crimes and arrests by police officers; we find that official reports and arrests for domestic violence crimes fell by 8.7 percent and 26.3 percent, respectively. Trends in reported domestic violence crimes mirror drops in total reported crimes; however, declines for domestic violence crimes are an order of magnitude smaller than the decline in other non-violent crime rates. Overall, we estimate that nearly 1,000 cases of domestic violence crimes went underreported between March and April.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19与犯罪：居家令对家庭暴力的影响
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19导致居家时间发生急剧变化，许多城市和州实施了正式的居家令（SAH）或“封锁”政策。利用芝加哥市的手机区块级活动数据以及行政911和犯罪数据，我们估计了伊利诺伊州州长居家令对与家庭暴力相关的警察服务呼叫、警方记录的犯罪以及逮捕的影响。我们发现，居家令公告增加了居家时间，导致警察服务总呼叫量减少，但随后与家庭暴力相关的警察服务呼叫增加。在租房者比例高的地区，影响更大。然而，这些对家庭暴力呼叫的影响与警方报告的与家庭相关的犯罪和逮捕情况不一致；我们发现，官方报告的家庭暴力犯罪和逮捕分别下降了8.7%和26.3%。报告的家庭暴力犯罪趋势与总报告犯罪的下降趋势一致；然而，家庭暴力犯罪的下降幅度比其他非暴力犯罪率的下降幅度小一个数量级。总体而言，我们估计在3月至4月期间，有近1000起家庭暴力犯罪案件未被充分报告。

papers.title: Repurchase Options in the Market for Lemons
papers.authors: Saki Bigio, Liyan Shi
papers.abstract: We study repurchase options (repo contracts) in a competitive asset market with asymmetric information. Gains from trade emerge from a liquidity need, but private information about asset quality prevents the full realization of trade. We obtain a unique equilibrium, which features a pooling repo contract and full participation among borrowers. The equilibrium repo contract resolves adverse selection: the embedded repurchase option prevents the market unraveling that occurs in asset-sale markets. However, the contract is inefficient due to cream skimming. Competition to attract high-quality borrowers through the terms of the repurchase option inefficiently lowers liquidity. The equilibrium contract has a closed form and is portable to many applications.
papers.zh_title: 柠檬市场中的回购期权
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个存在信息不对称的竞争性资产市场中研究回购期权（回购合约）。交易收益源于流动性需求，但关于资产质量的私人信息阻碍了交易的完全实现。我们得到了一个唯一均衡，其特征是存在一个混合回购合约以及借款人的完全参与。均衡回购合约解决了逆向选择问题：嵌入的回购期权防止了资产销售市场中出现的市场崩溃。然而，由于撇脂行为，该合约是低效的。通过回购期权条款吸引高质量借款人的竞争会低效地降低流动性。均衡合约具有封闭形式，并可移植到许多应用中。

papers.title: The Stable Transformation Path
papers.authors: Francisco J. Buera, Joseph P. Kaboski, Martí Mestieri, Daniel G. O'Connor
papers.abstract: Dynamic models of structural transformation are often non-stationary, precluding balanced growth path (BGP) analysis. We develop a generalization of the BGP concept that we call a Stable Transformation Path (STraP). The STraP characterizes the medium-term dynamics of the economy in a turnpike sense; it is the non-stationary path toward which the economy (quickly) con- verges from an arbitrary initial capital stock. Calibrated simulations demonstrate that these medium-term dynamics have important quantitative implications for structural transformation, investment, and growth, including slow convergence. Medium-term dynamics alone account for the observed 40% secular decline in average growth rates across stages of development.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：O1, O11, O14, O4, O41
papers.zh_title: 稳定转型路径
papers.zh_abstract: 结构转型的动态模型通常是非平稳的，这阻碍了平衡增长路径分析。我们发展了一个平衡增长路径概念的推广，称之为稳定转型路径。稳定转型路径在高速公路意义上刻画了经济的中期动态；它是经济从任意初始资本存量（快速）收敛到的非平稳路径。校准后的模拟表明，这些中期动态对结构转型、投资和增长具有重要的定量含义，包括缓慢的收敛。仅中期动态就解释了观察到的各发展阶段平均增长率40%的长期下降。

papers.title: Coping with H-1B Shortages: Firm Performance and Mitigation Strategies
papers.authors: Anna Maria Mayda, Francesc Ortega, Giovanni Peri, Kevin Y. Shih, Chad Sparber
papers.abstract: The United States' H-1B visa program, which allows private firms to hire highly skilled foreign workers, was so severely over-subscribed in the years since 2014 that H-1B status was distributed by lotteries to a subset of applicants. Using data on H-1B applications and on a range of outcomes for publicly traded companies, we find that employers using the H-1B program experienced reduced employment, sales and profits, compared to non-users in the years since 2014. We also find that some employers anticipated the rationing of H-1Bs and retained a larger share of H-1B workers, mitigating the damaging effects of H-1B rationing on their performance.
papers.zh_title: 应对H-1B短缺：企业绩效与缓解策略
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的H-1B签证计划允许私营企业雇佣高技能外籍工人，自2014年以来该计划严重超额认购，H-1B身份通过抽签方式分配给部分申请人。利用H-1B申请数据以及上市公司的一系列结果数据，我们发现，与未使用该计划的企业相比，自2014年以来使用H-1B计划的企业在就业、销售额和利润方面均出现下降。我们还发现，一些雇主预见到了H-1B的配给限制，并保留了更大比例的H-1B工人，从而减轻了H-1B配给对其绩效的破坏性影响。

papers.title: Income and Poverty in the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Jeehoon Han, Bruce D. Meyer, James X. Sullivan
papers.abstract: This paper addresses the economic impact of the COVID-19 pandemic by providing timely and accurate information on the impact of the current pandemic on income and poverty to inform the targeting of resources to those most affected and assess the success of current efforts. We construct new measures of the income distribution and poverty with a lag of only a few weeks using high frequency data from the Basic Monthly Current Population Survey (CPS), which collects income information for a large, representative sample of U.S. families. Because the family income data for this project are rarely used, we validate this timely measure of income by comparing historical estimates that rely on these data to estimates from data on income and consumption that have been used much more broadly. Our results indicate that at the start of the pandemic, government policy effectively countered its effects on incomes, leading poverty to fall and low percentiles of income to rise across a range of demographic groups and geographies. Simulations that rely on the detailed CPS data and that closely match total government payments made show that the entire decline in poverty that we find can be accounted for by the rise in government assistance, including unemployment insurance benefits and the Economic Impact Payments. Our simulations further indicate that of those losing employment the vast majority received unemployment insurance, though this was less true early on in the pandemic and receipt was uneven across the states, with some states not reaching a large share of their out of work residents.\nUpdated information on the summary measures presented in this paper, using the latest data available, may be found at povertymeasurement.org.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：H53, I32, J65
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情中的收入与贫困
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过提供关于当前疫情对收入和贫困影响的及时准确信息，来评估COVID-19疫情的经济影响，以便将资源精准投向受影响最严重的人群，并评估当前努力的成功程度。我们利用基本月度当前人口调查（CPS）的高频数据，构建了滞后仅数周的收入分配和贫困新指标，该调查收集了大量具有代表性的美国家庭样本的收入信息。由于本项目使用的家庭收入数据很少被采用，我们通过将依赖这些数据的历史估计与更广泛使用的收入和消费数据估计进行比较，验证了这一及时收入指标的有效性。我们的结果表明，在疫情初期，政府政策有效抵消了其对收入的影响，导致贫困率下降，并且在一系列人口群体和地区中，低收入百分位的收入有所上升。基于详细的CPS数据并与政府实际支付总额高度匹配的模拟显示，我们发现的贫困率下降完全可以由政府援助的增加来解释，包括失业保险福利和经济影响支付。我们的模拟进一步表明，在失业人群中，绝大多数人获得了失业保险，尽管这在疫情早期并不完全如此，且各州的领取情况不均衡，一些州未能覆盖其大部分失业居民。关于本文所呈现的汇总指标的最新信息（使用最新可用数据）可在povertymeasurement.org找到。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Effects Of Health Insurance On Birth Related Outcomes: Unpacking Compositional Vs. Direct Changes
papers.authors: Jie Ma, Kosali I. Simon
papers.abstract: When women of childbearing age gain health insurance, we expect their birth outcomes to improve, but comparing births that occur before and after policy changes may confound two separate impacts of coverage. For one, health insurance could affect who gives birth, through reduced costs of contraception. Health insurance could also directly improve maternal and child health among those who give birth, through additional prenatal resources. We address this question using the Affordable Care Act young adult provision, comparing birth related outcomes for those aged 24-25 years after the law, to outcomes among older young adults. We show that since the law subsidized contraceptives mainly among higher socioeconomic groups, the composition of mothers shifted towards less advantaged groups. Accounting for this shift, we find evidence of direct improvements in prenatal care and pregnancy-related health (reduced gestational diabetes and hypertension).
papers.zh_title: 健康保险对生育相关结果的异质性影响：分解构成变化与直接变化
papers.zh_abstract: 当育龄女性获得健康保险时，我们预期她们的生育结果会改善，但比较政策变化前后发生的生育可能会混淆保险覆盖的两种不同影响。一方面，健康保险可能通过降低避孕成本来影响谁选择生育。另一方面，健康保险也可能通过增加产前资源，直接改善已生育女性的母婴健康。我们利用《平价医疗法案》的年轻成人条款来解决这个问题，比较该法案实施后24-25岁人群与较年长年轻成人的生育相关结果。我们表明，由于该法案主要补贴了较高社会经济群体的避孕措施，母亲构成转向了更弱势的群体。在考虑这一构成变化后，我们发现了产前护理和妊娠相关健康（妊娠期糖尿病和高血压减少）得到直接改善的证据。

papers.title: Dynamic Trade-offs and Labor Supply Under the CARES Act
papers.authors: Corina Boar, Simon Mongey
papers.abstract: The CARES Act resulted in many unemployed workers receiving benefits that exceeded wages at their previous job. Given this, would an unemployed worker reject an offer to return to their former job at the same wage? Qualitatively, we provide a very simple dynamic model that incorporates four reasons the answer could be ‘no’: (i) the temporary nature of the CARES Act, (ii) uncertainty that their return-to-work offer might expire, (iii) search frictions, and (iv) wage losses out of unemployment in a recession. Quantitatively, when evaluated under empirically relevant parameters, we find it unlikely a worker would reject an offer to return to work at the same wage. We show special cases where this is not true and relate these to anecdotal evidence.
papers.zh_title: 《CARES法案》下的动态权衡与劳动力供给
papers.zh_abstract: 《CARES法案》导致许多失业工人获得的福利超过了他们之前工作的工资。鉴于此，失业工人是否会拒绝以相同工资重返原工作岗位的提议？从定性角度，我们提供了一个非常简单的动态模型，其中包含了答案可能是“否”的四个原因：（i）《CARES法案》的临时性，（ii）重返工作岗位的提议可能失效的不确定性，（iii）搜索摩擦，以及（iv）经济衰退期间失业导致的工资损失。从定量角度，当在经验相关参数下进行评估时，我们发现工人不太可能拒绝以相同工资重返工作岗位的提议。我们展示了这不成立的特殊情况，并将其与轶事证据联系起来。

papers.title: Increasing Hours Worked: Moonlighting Responses to a Large Tax Reform
papers.authors: Alisa Tazhitdinova
papers.abstract: Moonlighting is increasingly popular in OECD countries, with 5 to 10% of workers holding two or more jobs. However, little is known about the responsiveness of moonlighting to financial incentives due to the lack of identifying variation. This paper studies a unique reform in Germany that allowed workers to hold small secondary jobs tax-free, decreasing the marginal tax rate by between 19.5 to 66pp. I show that the reform resulted in a dramatic increase in moonlighting that was not offset by reductions in primary earnings, and that hours constraints is the key determinant of moonlighting.
papers.zh_title: 增加工作时间：对大规模税收改革的兼职反应
papers.zh_abstract: 在OECD国家，兼职现象日益普遍，5%至10%的工人拥有两份或更多工作。然而，由于缺乏识别性变化，关于兼职对财务激励的反应程度知之甚少。本文研究了德国一项独特的改革，该改革允许工人免税从事小型副业，将边际税率降低了19.5至66个百分点。我表明，这项改革导致了兼职活动的急剧增加，且并未被主要收入的减少所抵消，而工作时间限制是决定兼职的关键因素。

papers.title: Gender and Culture
papers.authors: Paola Giuliano
papers.abstract: This paper reviews the literature on gender and culture. Gender gaps in various outcomes (competitiveness, labor force participation, and performance in mathematics, amongst many others) show remarkable differences across countries and tend to persist over time. The economics literature initially explained these differences by looking at standard economic variables such as the level of development, women’s education, the expansion of the service sector, and discrimination. More recent literature has argued that gender differences in a variety of outcomes could reflect underlying cultural values and beliefs. This article reviews the literature on the relevance of culture in the determination of different forms of gender gap. I examine how differences in historical situations could have been relevant in generating gender differences and the conditions under which gender norms tend to be stable or to change over time, emphasizing the role of social learning. Finally, I review the role of different forms of cultural transmission in shaping gender differences, distinguishing between channels of vertical transmission (the role of the family), horizontal transmission (the role of peers), and oblique transmission (the role of teachers or role models).
papers.zh_title: 性别与文化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于性别与文化的文献。各种结果（如竞争力、劳动力参与率和数学表现等）中的性别差距在不同国家之间表现出显著差异，并且往往随时间持续存在。经济学文献最初通过考察标准经济变量（如发展水平、女性教育、服务业的扩张和歧视）来解释这些差异。最近的文献则认为，各种结果中的性别差异可能反映了潜在的文化价值观和信念。本文回顾了关于文化在决定不同形式性别差距中相关性的文献。我考察了历史情境的差异如何可能在产生性别差异方面具有相关性，以及性别规范在何种条件下趋于稳定或随时间变化，强调了社会学习的作用。最后，我回顾了不同形式的文化传播在塑造性别差异中的作用，区分了垂直传播（家庭的作用）、水平传播（同伴的作用）和斜向传播（教师或榜样的作用）渠道。

papers.title: On Socializing and Social Distancing in Markets: Implications for Retail Prices, Store-level Consumer Density, and Disease Transmission
papers.authors: Ricardo Lagos
papers.abstract: I generalize the "noisy search" model of Burdett and Judd (1983) to settings where individual buyers have preferences over the number of other buyers who visit the same seller as them. I consider a version in which buyers have a preference for social distancing derived from the risk of contracting a disease from other buyers, and use it to study the two-way equilibrium interaction between supply-side considerations (such as the distribution of prices posted by sellers) and individual buyers' behavioral responses to the risk of contagion. I find that the price response to the buyers' shift toward social distancing can be an important determinant of the degree to which buyers' individual behavioral responses to the risk of contagion can mitigate the spread of the disease.
papers.zh_title: 论市场中的社交与社交距离：对零售价格、门店层面消费者密度和疾病传播的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我将Burdett和Judd（1983）的“噪声搜索”模型推广到个体买家对访问同一卖家的其他买家数量有偏好的情境。我考虑了一个版本，其中买家因从其他买家那里感染疾病的风险而产生对社交距离的偏好，并利用它来研究供给侧因素（如卖家发布的价格分布）与个体买家对传染风险的行为反应之间的双向均衡互动。我发现，价格对买家转向社交距离行为的反应，可能是决定买家个体对传染风险的行为反应能在多大程度上缓解疾病传播的重要因素。

papers.title: Data-intensive Innovation and the State: Evidence from AI Firms in China
papers.authors: Martin Beraja, David Y. Yang, Noam Yuchtman
papers.abstract: Developing AI technology requires data. In many domains, government data far exceeds in magnitude and scope data collected by the private sector, and AI firms often gain access to such data when providing services to the state. We argue that such access can stimulate commercial AI innovation in part because data and trained algorithms are shareable across government and commercial uses. We gather comprehensive information on firms and public security procurement contracts in China’s facial recognition AI industry. We quantify the data accessible through contracts by measuring public security agencies’ capacity to collect surveillance video. Using a triple-differences strategy, we find that data-rich contracts, compared to data-scarce ones, lead recipient firms to develop significantly and substantially more commercial AI software. Our analysis indicates a contribution of government data to the rise of China’s facial recognition AI firms, and suggests that states’ data collection and provision policies could shape AI innovation.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, POL, PR；JEL：E0, H4, L5, L63, O25, O30, O40, P00, P16, Z21
papers.zh_title: 数据密集型创新与国家：来自中国人工智能企业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 开发人工智能技术需要数据。在许多领域，政府数据在规模和范围上远远超过私营部门收集的数据，人工智能企业在向国家提供服务时通常可以获得这些数据。我们认为，这种访问可以刺激商业人工智能创新，部分原因是数据和训练好的算法可以在政府用途和商业用途之间共享。我们收集了中国面部识别人工智能行业中企业和公共安全采购合同的全面信息。我们通过衡量公共安全机构收集监控视频的能力来量化通过合同可访问的数据。使用三重差分策略，我们发现，与数据稀缺的合同相比，数据丰富的合同使接收企业开发出显著且大量的商业人工智能软件。我们的分析表明，政府数据对中国面部识别人工智能企业的崛起有所贡献，并暗示国家的数据收集和提供政策可能塑造人工智能创新。

papers.title: When Tariffs Disturb Global Supply Chains
papers.authors: Gene M. Grossman, Elhanan Helpman
papers.abstract: We study unanticipated tariffs on imports of intermediate goods in a setting with firm-to-firm supply relationships. Firms that produce differentiated products conduct costly searches for potential input suppliers and negotiate bilateral prices with those that pass a reservation level of match productivity. Global supply chains are formed in anticipation of free trade. Once they are in place, the home government surprises with an input tariff. This can lead to renegotiation with initial suppliers or new search for replacements. We identify circumstances in which renegotiation generates improvement or deterioration in the terms of trade. The welfare implications of a tariff are ambiguous in this second-best setting, but plausible parameter values suggest a welfare loss that rises rapidly at high tariff rates.
papers.zh_title: 当关税扰乱全球供应链时
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在企业间供应关系背景下，对中间产品进口征收的意外关税。生产差异化产品的企业会为潜在投入品供应商进行成本高昂的搜寻，并与那些通过匹配生产率保留水平的供应商谈判双边价格。全球供应链是在预期自由贸易的情况下形成的。一旦这些供应链建立起来，本国政府会出人意料地征收投入品关税。这可能导致与初始供应商重新谈判，或者寻找替代供应商进行新的搜寻。我们识别出重新谈判会导致贸易条件改善或恶化的情况。在这种次优环境中，关税的福利影响是不明确的，但合理的参数值表明，在高关税税率下福利损失会迅速增加。

papers.title: Interbank Networks in the Shadows of the Federal Reserve Act
papers.authors: Haelim Anderson, Selman Erol, Guillermo Ordoñez
papers.abstract: Central banks provide public liquidity to traditional (regulated) banks with the intention of stabilizing the financial system. Shadow banks are not regulated, yet they indirectly access such liquidity through the interbank system. We build a model that shows how public liquidity provision may change the linkages between traditional and shadow banks, increasing systemic risk through three channels: reducing aggregate liquidity, expanding fragile short-term borrowing, and crowding out of private cross-bank insurance. We show that the creation of the Federal Reserve System and the provision of public liquidity changed the structure and nature of the U.S. interbank network in ways that are consistent with the model and its implications. We provide empirical evidence by constructing unique data on balance sheets and detailed disaggregated information on payments and funding connections in Virginia.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D53, D85, E02, E44, G11, G21, G23, N21
papers.zh_title: 《联邦储备法案》阴影下的银行间网络
papers.zh_abstract: 中央银行向传统（受监管）银行提供公共流动性，旨在稳定金融体系。影子银行不受监管，但它们通过银行间系统间接获取此类流动性。我们构建了一个模型，展示了公共流动性供给如何可能改变传统银行与影子银行之间的联系，并通过三个渠道增加系统性风险：减少总体流动性、扩大脆弱的短期借款、挤出私人银行间保险。我们表明，美国联邦储备系统的建立以及公共流动性的供给，改变了美国银行间网络的结构和性质，其方式与模型及其含义一致。我们通过构建弗吉尼亚州独特的资产负债表数据以及关于支付和融资联系的详细分类信息，提供了实证证据。

papers.title: Now Unions Increase Job Satisfaction and Well-being
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Using data from the United States and Europe on nearly two million respondents we show the partial correlation between union membership and employee job satisfaction is positive and statistically significant. This runs counter to findings in the seminal work of Freeman (1978) and Borjas (1979) in the 1970s and most empirical studies since. With data for the United States we show the association between union membership and job satisfaction switched from negative to positive in the 2000s. Cohorts with positive union effects over time come to dominate those with negative effects. The negative association between membership and job satisfaction is apparent in cohorts born in the 1940s and 1950s but turns positive for those born between the 1960s and 1990s. Analyses for Europe since the 2000s confirm the positive association between union membership and worker wellbeing is apparent elsewhere. We also find evidence in the United Kingdom from panel estimation of a positive relation between union membership and job satisfaction. We find positive union associations with other aspects of worker wellbeing including life satisfaction and happiness, several macro variables and various measures of trust. Union members are also less likely to be stressed, worried, depressed, sad or lonely. The findings have important implications for our understanding of trade unionism.
papers.zh_title: 如今工会能提高工作满意度和幸福感
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国和欧洲近两百万受访者的数据，我们发现工会成员身份与员工工作满意度之间的偏相关系数为正且统计显著。这与弗里曼（1978）和博尔哈斯（1979）在20世纪70年代的开创性研究以及此后大多数实证研究的发现相反。利用美国的数据，我们显示工会成员身份与工作满意度之间的关联在21世纪从负相关转变为正相关。随着时间的推移，具有正向工会效应的群体逐渐主导了具有负向效应的群体。工会成员身份与工作满意度之间的负相关在20世纪40年代和50年代出生的人群中明显，但在20世纪60年代至90年代出生的人群中转为正相关。对21世纪以来欧洲的分析证实，工会成员身份与工人幸福感之间的正相关在其他地方也很明显。我们还从英国的面板估计中发现了工会成员身份与工作满意度之间正相关的证据。我们发现工会与工人幸福感的其他方面存在正相关，包括生活满意度和幸福感、若干宏观变量以及各种信任指标。工会成员也不太可能感到压力、担忧、沮丧、悲伤或孤独。这些发现对我们理解工会主义具有重要意义。

papers.title: Four Stylized Facts about COVID-19
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Karen Kopecky, Tao Zha
papers.abstract: We document four facts about the COVID-19 pandemic worldwide relevant for those studying the impact of non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPIs) on COVID-19 transmission. First: across all countries and U.S. states that we study, the growth rates of daily deaths from COVID-19 fell from a wide range of initially high levels to levels close to zero within 20-30 days after each region experienced 25 cumulative deaths. Second: after this initial period, growth rates of daily deaths have hovered around zero or below everywhere in the world. Third: the cross section standard deviation of growth rates of daily deaths across locations fell very rapidly in the first 10 days of the epidemic and has remained at a relatively low level since then. Fourth: when interpreted through a range of epidemiological models, these first three facts about the growth rate of COVID deaths imply that both the effective reproduction numbers and transmission rates of COVID-19 fell from widely dispersed initial levels and the effective reproduction number has hovered around one after the first 30 days of the epidemic virtually everywhere in the world. We argue that failing to account for these four stylized facts may result in overstating the importance of policy mandated NPIs for shaping the progression of this deadly pandemic.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, PE；JEL：C01, C02, C11, I1
papers.zh_title: 关于COVID-19的四个典型事实
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了全球COVID-19大流行的四个事实，这些事实对于研究非药物干预措施（NPI）对COVID-19传播影响的人士具有相关性。第一：在我们研究的所有国家和美国各州中，在每个地区累计死亡人数达到25人后的20-30天内，COVID-19每日死亡人数的增长率从最初广泛的高水平下降到接近零的水平。第二：在这个初始阶段之后，世界各地每日死亡人数的增长率一直徘徊在零附近或低于零。第三：不同地点每日死亡人数增长率的横截面标准差在疫情最初10天内下降得非常迅速，此后一直保持在相对较低的水平。第四：当通过一系列流行病学模型进行解释时，关于COVID-19死亡增长率的这三个事实意味着，COVID-19的有效再生数和传播率都从广泛分散的初始水平下降，并且在疫情最初30天后，有效再生数几乎在世界各地都徘徊在1左右。我们认为，未能考虑这四个典型事实可能会导致高估政策强制实施的NPI在塑造这场致命大流行进程中的重要性。

papers.title: The Economic Impact of Migrants from Hurricane Maria
papers.authors: Giovanni Peri, Derek Rury, Justin C. Wiltshire
papers.abstract: We examine the economic impact of the large migration of Puerto Ricans to Orlando after Hurricane Maria. Using a synthetic control approach, we find that employment in Orlando increased, especially in construction and retail, and find positive aggregate labor market effects for non-Hispanic and less-educated workers. While we find that earnings for these workers decreased slightly in construction, this was balanced by earnings growth in retail and hospitality. These results are consistent with small negative impacts on earnings in sectors exposed to a labor supply shock, offset by positive effects in sectors impacted by an associated positive consumer demand shock.
papers.zh_title: 飓风玛丽亚移民的经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了飓风玛丽亚后波多黎各人大规模迁移到奥兰多的经济影响。使用合成控制方法，我们发现奥兰多的就业增加了，尤其是在建筑业和零售业，并且发现对非西班牙裔和受教育程度较低的工人产生了积极的总体劳动力市场效应。虽然我们发现这些工人在建筑业的收入略有下降，但这被零售和酒店业的收入增长所抵消。这些结果与以下情况一致：在受到劳动力供给冲击的部门，收入受到轻微的负面影响，而在受到相关正向消费需求冲击影响的部门，收入则受到正面影响。

papers.title: The EITC and Maternal Time Use: More Time Working and Less Time with Kids?
papers.authors: Jacob Bastian, Lance Lochner
papers.abstract: Parents spend considerable sums investing in their children's development, with their own time among the most important forms of investment. Given well-documented effects of the Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) on maternal labor supply, it is natural to ask how the EITC affects other time allocation decisions, especially time with children. We use the American Time Use Surveys to study the effects of EITC expansions since 2003 on time devoted to a broad array of activities, with considerable attention to the amount and nature of time spent with children. Our results confirm prior evidence that the EITC increases maternal work and reduces time devoted to home production and leisure, especially among unmarried women. More novel, we show that the EITC also reduces time spent with children; however, almost none of this reduction comes from time devoted to active investment-related activities that are most likely to foster child development.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：D13, H24, H31, H53, I31, I38, J13, J22
papers.zh_title: 劳动所得税抵免与母亲的时间使用：更多时间工作，更少时间陪伴孩子？
papers.zh_abstract: 父母投入大量资金用于子女的发展，其中他们自己的时间是最重要的投资形式之一。鉴于劳动所得税抵免（EITC）对母亲劳动力供给的显著影响，很自然地要问EITC如何影响其他时间分配决策，尤其是与孩子相处的时间。我们使用美国时间使用调查来研究自2003年以来EITC扩张对广泛活动时间投入的影响，并特别关注与孩子相处的时间数量和质量。我们的结果证实了先前的证据，即EITC增加了母亲的工作时间，减少了用于家庭生产和休闲的时间，尤其是在未婚女性中。更值得注意的是，我们表明EITC也减少了与孩子相处的时间；然而，这些减少几乎都不是来自最有可能促进儿童发展的积极投资相关活动的时间。

papers.title: Openness to Trade and the Spread of Industrialization: Evidence from Canada during the First Era of Globalization
papers.authors: Taylor Jaworski, Ian Keay
papers.abstract: We use new data on manufacturing in Canada to quantify the impact of globalization on the growth and composition of industrialization in the second half of the nineteenth century. We find that industries and regions more exposed to international trade experienced faster growth. Consistent with the literature on economic development in Canada, we find that scale economies, government policy decisions, and domestic market expansion also played an important role in manufacturing growth. However, after controlling for these factors, we find that greater exposure to globalization shaped the pattern of regional industrialization in a way not appreciated in Canadian historiography.
papers.zh_title: 贸易开放与工业化的传播：来自第一次全球化时期加拿大的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用加拿大制造业的新数据，量化了19世纪下半叶全球化对工业化增长和构成的影响。我们发现，更易受国际贸易影响的行业和地区经历了更快的增长。与关于加拿大经济发展的文献一致，我们发现规模经济、政府政策决策和国内市场扩张也在制造业增长中发挥了重要作用。然而，在控制了这些因素之后，我们发现，更大的全球化暴露程度以加拿大史学界未曾认识到的方式塑造了区域工业化的模式。

papers.title: Estimating DSGE Models: Recent Advances and Future Challenges
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Pablo A. Guerrón-Quintana
papers.abstract: We review the current state of the estimation of DSGE models. After introducing a general framework for dealing with DSGE models, the state-space representation, we discuss how to evaluate moments or the likelihood function implied by such a structure. We discuss, in varying degrees of detail, recent advances in the field, such as the tempered particle filter, approximated Bayesian computation, the Hamiltonian Monte Carlo, variational inference, and machine learning, methods that show much promise, but that have not been fully explored yet by the DSGE community. We conclude by outlining three future challenges for this line of research.
papers.zh_title: 估计DSGE模型：近期进展与未来挑战
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了DSGE模型估计的当前状态。在介绍了处理DSGE模型的一般框架（状态空间表示）之后，我们讨论了如何评估由这种结构隐含的矩或似然函数。我们以不同程度的细节讨论了该领域的最新进展，例如缓和粒子滤波、近似贝叶斯计算、哈密顿蒙特卡洛、变分推断和机器学习，这些方法显示出很大的前景，但尚未被DSGE学界充分探索。最后，我们概述了这一研究方向的三个未来挑战。

papers.title: Have Income-Based Achievement Gaps Widened or Narrowed?
papers.authors: Shirin A. Hashim, Thomas J. Kane, Thomas Kelley-Kemple, Mary E. Laski, Douglas O. Staiger
papers.abstract: Over the past 30 years, rising income inequality and income-based residential segregation have threatened to widen income-based achievement gaps. Yet, there are no national data which combine a consistent measure of parental income and achievement for individual students to measure those gaps over time. We take two alternative approaches to inferring income-based achievement gaps: First, we reconstruct the student-level relationship using school-level estimates of means and variances of achievement and income. Second, we combine estimates of mean income by race, mother’s education, urbanicity and state with mean achievement for the corresponding subgroups on a national assessment. Using both methods, we find that income-based achievement gaps in 4th and 8th grade narrowed between 1992 and 2015—while math scores rose at all income levels.
papers.zh_title: 基于收入的成就差距是扩大还是缩小了？
papers.zh_abstract: 过去30年间，收入不平等和基于收入的居住隔离加剧，可能扩大基于收入的成就差距。然而，目前缺乏全国性数据，能够将学生个体层面一致的父母收入衡量指标与成就衡量指标结合起来，以衡量这些差距随时间的变化。我们采用两种替代方法来推断基于收入的成就差距：首先，利用学校层面的平均收入和成就估计值及其方差，重建学生层面的关系。其次，将按种族、母亲教育程度、城乡类型和州划分的平均收入估计值，与全国评估中相应子群体的平均成就估计值相结合。使用这两种方法，我们发现，1992年至2015年间，四年级和八年级基于收入的成就差距有所缩小——而所有收入水平的数学成绩均有所上升。

papers.title: Judge Peer Effects in the Courthouse
papers.authors: Ozkan Eren, Naci H. Mocan
papers.abstract: We investigate whether consequential decisions made by judges are impacted by observable characteristics of peer judges. We utilize the universe of decisions on juvenile defendants in each courthouse in a Southern state over fifteen years.
