papers.authors: J. Anthony Cookson, Erik P. Gilje, Rawley Z. Heimer
papers.abstract: How do persistent cash flow shocks affect debt repayment across the distribution of households? Using individual data on natural gas shale royalty payments matched with credit bureau data for 215,639 consumers, we estimate that individuals repay 33 cents of debt per dollar of windfall, and that initially-subprime individuals repay approximately 5 times more debt than initially-prime individuals do. This difference in debt repayment is driven by changes to revolving debt balances. Finally, we show that debt repayment precedes durable goods consumption, particularly for households who were initially financially constrained. These results shed new light on how deleveraging affects household consumption.
papers.zh_title: 页岩冲击：现金意外之财与家庭债务偿还
papers.zh_abstract: 持续的现金流冲击如何影响家庭债务偿还的分布？利用与215,639名消费者的信用局数据相匹配的天然气页岩特许权使用费个人数据，我们估计个人每获得1美元意外之财会偿还33美分债务，并且最初为次级借款人的个人偿还的债务大约是最初为优质借款人的个人的5倍。这种债务偿还差异是由循环债务余额的变化驱动的。最后，我们表明债务偿还先于耐用品消费，特别是对于最初财务受限的家庭。这些结果揭示了去杠杆化如何影响家庭消费的新视角。

papers.title: Using Taxes to Meet an Emission Target
papers.authors: Robert I. Harris, William A. Pizer
papers.abstract: A sizeable number of papers beginning with Roberts and Spence (1976) have studied the use of price floors and ceilings (or “collars”) to manage prices in tradable permit markets. In contrast, economists have only recently begun examining polices to manage quantities under a pollution tax. Importantly, it can be difficult to know how to evaluate these policies, as papers dating back to Pizer (2002) suggest welfare is maximized by not focusing on quantities in the first place. In this paper, we propose an objective function to evaluate these alternative “carbon tax policies to meet an emission target.” The objective function includes a discrete jump in marginal emission consequences at the target, where the discontinuity can be interpreted as a true benefit measure or a necessary political constraint. We parameterize these emission consequences using recent legislative proposals, coupling this function with mitigation cost estimates to define the complete objective. This objective identifies the first-best tax policy design, one that requires relatively complex adjustments to mimic a tradable permit system. Turning to simpler, practical rules, we find that such rules achieve much of the difference in expected net benefits between an ordinary, exogenous tax and the first-best tax policy design. However, the ranking among simple rules depends on the interpretation of the higher, above-target emission penalty as a political constraint or a true benefit measure. We find that making these views explicit could facilitate billions of dollars per year in welfare gains.
papers.zh_title: 利用税收实现排放目标
papers.zh_abstract: 从Roberts和Spence（1976）开始，大量论文研究了在可交易许可证市场中使用价格下限和上限（或“项圈”）来管理价格。相比之下，经济学家直到最近才开始研究在污染税下管理数量的政策。重要的是，评估这些政策可能很困难，因为追溯到Pizer（2002）的论文表明，通过不首先关注数量可以实现福利最大化。在本文中，我们提出了一个目标函数来评估这些替代性的“实现排放目标的碳税政策”。该目标函数包括在目标处边际排放后果的离散跳跃，其中不连续性可以解释为真实的收益度量或必要的政治约束。我们利用最近的立法提案对这些排放后果进行参数化，并将此函数与减排成本估计相结合，以定义完整的目标。该目标确定了最优的税收政策设计，这需要相对复杂的调整来模仿可交易许可证系统。转向更简单的实用规则，我们发现这些规则实现了普通外生税收与最优税收政策设计之间预期净收益差异的大部分。然而，简单规则之间的排序取决于将目标之上的更高排放惩罚解释为政治约束还是真实的收益度量。我们发现，明确这些观点每年可以带来数十亿美元的福利收益。

papers.title: Test Sensitivity for Infection versus Infectiousness of SARS-CoV-2
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: The most commonly used test for the presence of SARS-CoV-2 is a PCR test that is able to detect very low viral loads and inform on treatment decisions. Medical research has confirmed that many individuals might be infected with SARS-CoV-2 but not infectious. Knowing whether an individual is infectious is the critical piece of information for a decision to isolate an individual or not. This paper examines the value of different tests from an information-theoretic approach and shows that applying treatment-based approval standards for tests for infection will lower the value of those tests and likely causes decisions based on them to have too many false positives (i.e., individuals isolated who are not infectious). The conclusion is that test scoring be tailored to the decision being made.
papers.zh_title: SARS-CoV-2感染检测与传染性检测的灵敏度比较
papers.zh_abstract: 最常用的SARS-CoV-2检测方法是PCR检测，它能够检测到极低的病毒载量，并为治疗决策提供信息。医学研究已证实，许多人可能感染了SARS-CoV-2但并无传染性。了解个体是否具有传染性，是决定是否对其进行隔离的关键信息。本文从信息论角度考察了不同检测方法的价值，并表明：将基于治疗目的制定的检测审批标准应用于感染检测，会降低检测的价值，并很可能导致基于这些检测的决策出现过多假阳性（即隔离了不具有传染性的个体）。结论是，检测评分应根据所做出的决策进行定制。

papers.title: Affirmative Action and Pre-College Human Capital
papers.authors: Mitra Akhtari, Natalie Bau, Jean-William P. Laliberté
papers.abstract: Racial affirmative action policies are widespread in college admissions. Yet, evidence on their effects before college is limited. Using four data sets, we study a U.S. Supreme Court ruling that reinstated affirmative action in three states. Using nationwide SAT data for difference-in-differences and synthetic control analyses, we separately identify the aggregate effects of affirmative action for whites and for underrepresented minorities. Using state-wide Texas administrative data, we measure the effect of affirmative action on racial gaps across the pre-treatment test score distribution. When affirmative action is re-instated, racial gaps in SAT scores, grades, attendance, and college applications fall. Average SAT scores for both whites and minorities increase, suggesting that reductions in racial gaps are driven by improvements in minorities' outcomes. Increases in pre-college human capital and college applications are concentrated in the top half of the test score distribution.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：I21, I24, J15, J24, J48
papers.zh_title: 平权行动与大学前人力资本
papers.zh_abstract: 种族平权行动政策在大学招生中广泛存在。然而，关于其在大学前阶段影响的证据有限。利用四个数据集，我们研究了一项美国最高法院裁决，该裁决在三个州恢复了平权行动。利用全国SAT数据进行双重差分和合成控制分析，我们分别识别了平权行动对白人和代表性不足少数族裔的总体效应。利用德克萨斯州全州行政数据，我们衡量了平权行动对预处理考试成绩分布中种族差距的影响。当平权行动恢复后，SAT成绩、成绩、出勤率和大学申请中的种族差距缩小。白人和少数族裔的平均SAT成绩均有所提高，这表明种族差距的缩小是由少数族裔结果的改善驱动的。大学前人力资本和大学申请的增加集中在考试成绩分布的前半部分。

papers.title: Immigration and Entrepreneurship in the United States
papers.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Benjamin Jones, J. Daniel Kim, Javier Miranda
papers.abstract: Immigration can expand labor supply and create greater competition for native-born workers. But immigrants may also start new firms, expanding labor demand. This paper uses U.S. administrative data and other data resources to study the role of immigrants in entrepreneurship. We ask how often immigrants start companies, how many jobs these firms create, and how these firms compare with those founded by U.S.-born individuals. A simple model provides a measurement framework for addressing the dual roles of immigrants as founders and workers. The findings suggest that immigrants act more as "job creators" than "job takers" and that non-U.S. born founders play outsized roles in U.S. high-growth entrepreneurship.
papers.zh_title: 美国移民与创业
papers.zh_abstract: 移民可以扩大劳动力供给，并为本土出生的工人创造更大的竞争。但移民也可能创办新企业，从而扩大劳动力需求。本文利用美国行政数据和其他数据资源，研究移民在创业中的作用。我们探究移民创办公司的频率、这些公司创造的就业岗位数量，以及这些公司与美国本土出生者创办的公司相比如何。一个简单的模型提供了一个衡量框架，用于处理移民作为创始人和工人的双重角色。研究结果表明，移民更多地扮演“就业创造者”而非“就业索取者”的角色，并且非美国出生的创始人在美国高增长创业中发挥着超乎寻常的作用。

papers.title: Tracing the Linkages Between Scientific Research and Energy Innovations: A Comparison of Clean and Dirty Technologies
papers.authors: Robert K. Perrons, Adam B. Jaffe, Trinh Le
papers.abstract: The challenge of mitigating climate change has focused recent attention on basic scientific research feeding into the development of new energy technologies (Popp, 2017). Energy innovation tends to consist of a series of partially overlapping processes involving: (1) the production of scientific and technological knowledge, (2) the translation of that knowledge into working technologies or artifacts, and (3) the introduction of the artifacts into the marketplace, where they are matched with users’ requirements. However, relatively little data are available showing how long each of these processes takes for energy technologies. Here we combine information from patent applications with bibliographic data to shine light on the second process—that is, the translation of scientific knowledge into working prototypes. Our results show that “clean” energy technologies are more dependent on underlying science than “dirty” technologies, and that the average lag between publication of scientific findings and the incorporation of those findings in clean energy patents has risen from about five to about eight years since the 1980s. These findings will help policymakers to devise more effective mechanisms and strategies for accelerating the overall rate of technological change in this domain.
papers.zh_title: 追踪科学研究与能源创新之间的联系：清洁技术与肮脏技术的比较
papers.zh_abstract: 缓解气候变化的挑战使近期关注点集中在为基础科学研究如何转化为新能源技术的开发（Popp, 2017）。能源创新通常由一系列部分重叠的过程组成，包括：(1) 科学和技术知识的产生，(2) 将这些知识转化为可工作的技术或制品，以及 (3) 将制品引入市场，使其与用户需求相匹配。然而，关于能源技术每个过程所需时间的可用数据相对较少。本文结合专利申请信息与书目数据，以揭示第二个过程——即科学知识转化为工作原型。我们的结果表明，“清洁”能源技术比“肮脏”技术更依赖于基础科学，并且自20世纪80年代以来，从科学发现发表到这些发现被纳入清洁能源专利的平均滞后期已从大约五年增加到大约八年。这些发现将帮助政策制定者设计更有效的机制和策略，以加速该领域技术变革的总体速度。

papers.title: Rugged Individualism and Collective (In)action During the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Martin Fiszbein, Mesay Gebresilasse
papers.abstract: Rugged individualism—the combination of individualism and anti-statism—is a prominent feature of American culture with deep roots in the country’s history of frontier settlement. Today, rugged individualism is more prevalent in counties with greater total frontier experience (TFE) during the era of westward expansion. While individualism may be conducive to innovation, it can also undermine collective action, with potentially adverse social consequences. We show that America’s frontier culture hampered the response to the COVID-19 pandemic. Across U.S. counties, greater TFE is associated with less social distancing and mask use as well as weaker local government effort to control the virus. We argue that frontier culture lies at the root of several more proximate explanations for the weak collective response to public health risks, including a lack of civic duty, partisanship, and distrust in science.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EH, LE, PE, POL；JEL：H12, H23, H75, I12, I18, P16
papers.zh_title: 粗犷个人主义与COVID-19大流行期间的集体（不）行动
papers.zh_abstract: 粗犷个人主义——个人主义与反国家主义的结合——是美国文化的一个显著特征，深深植根于该国边疆定居的历史。如今，在西部扩张时期拥有更大总边疆经历（TFE）的县，粗犷个人主义更为普遍。虽然个人主义可能有利于创新，但它也可能破坏集体行动，并可能产生不利的社会后果。我们表明，美国的边疆文化阻碍了对COVID-19大流行的应对。在美国各县，更高的TFE与社会疏离和口罩使用减少，以及地方政府控制病毒的努力减弱相关。我们认为，边疆文化是导致对公共卫生风险集体应对薄弱的几个更直接解释的根源，包括缺乏公民责任感、党派偏见和对科学的不信任。

papers.title: Perinatal Health among 1 Million Chinese-Americans
papers.authors: Douglas Almond, Yi Cheng
papers.abstract: The literature on "missing girls" suggests a net preference for sons both in China and among Chinese immigrants to the West. Perhaps surprisingly, we find that newborn Chinese-American girls are treated more intensively in US hospitals: they are kept longer following delivery, have more medical procedures performed, and have more hospital charges than predicted (by the non-Chinese gender difference). What might explain more aggressive medical treatment? We posit that hospitals are responding to worse health at birth of Chinese-American girls. We document higher rates of low birth weight, congenital anomalies, maternal hypertension, and lower APGAR scores among Chinese Americans girls – outcomes recorded prior to intensive neonatal medical care and relative to the non-Chinese gender gap. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to find that son preference may also compromise "survivor" health at birth. On net, compromised newborn health seems to outweigh the benefit of more aggressive neonatal hospital care for girls. Relative to non-Chinese gender differences, death on the first day of life and in the post-neonatal period is more common among Chinese-American girls, i.e. later than sex selection is typically believed to occur.
papers.zh_title: 100万华裔美国人的围产期健康
papers.zh_abstract: 关于“失踪女性”的文献表明，在中国以及移民到西方的华人中，都存在对儿子的净偏好。令人惊讶的是，我们发现华裔美国新生儿女孩在美国医院受到更密集的治疗：她们在分娩后住院时间更长，接受更多的医疗程序，并且产生的住院费用高于（非华裔性别差异所）预测的水平。什么可以解释更积极的医疗处理？我们假设医院是在应对华裔美国女孩出生时更差的健康状况。我们记录了华裔美国女孩中低出生体重、先天异常、母亲高血压的发生率更高，以及APGAR评分更低——这些结果是在新生儿重症监护之前记录的，并且相对于非华裔性别差距而言。据我们所知，我们是第一个发现重男轻女也可能损害“幸存者”出生时健康的研究。总体而言，新生儿健康受损似乎超过了女孩在医院接受更积极新生儿护理的益处。相对于非华裔性别差异，华裔美国女孩在出生后第一天和新生儿后期（即通常认为性别选择发生之后）的死亡更为常见。

papers.title: The Fractured-Land Hypothesis
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Mark Koyama, Youhong Lin, Tuan-Hwee Sng
papers.abstract: Patterns of state formation have crucial implications for comparative economic development. Diamond (1997) famously argued that “fractured land” was responsible for China’s tendency toward political unification and Europe’s protracted polycentrism. We build a dynamic model with granular geographical information in terms of topographical features and the location of productive agricultural land to quantitatively gauge the effects of fractured land on state formation in Eurasia. We find that topography alone is sufficient, but not necessary, to explain polycentrism in Europe and unification in China. Differences in land productivity, in particular the existence of a core region of high land productivity in northern China, also deliver the same result. We discuss how our results map into observed historical outcomes, assess how robust our findings are, and analyze the predictions of our model for Africa and the Americas.
papers.zh_title: 破碎土地假说
papers.zh_abstract: 国家形成的模式对比较经济发展具有至关重要的影响。戴蒙德（1997）曾著名地论证，“破碎的土地”是中国倾向于政治统一和欧洲长期多中心主义的原因。我们构建了一个动态模型，其中包含基于地形特征和可生产农业用地位置的精细地理信息，以定量评估破碎土地对欧亚大陆国家形成的影响。我们发现，仅凭地形就足以（但并非必需）解释欧洲的多中心主义和中国的统一。土地生产力的差异，特别是中国北部存在一个高土地生产力的核心区域，也得出了相同的结果。我们讨论了我们的结果如何映射到观察到的历史结果，评估了我们的发现有多稳健，并分析了我们的模型对非洲和美洲的预测。

papers.title: The Long-Term Distributional and Welfare Effects of Covid-19 School Closures
papers.authors: Nicola Fuchs-Schündeln, Dirk Krueger, Alexander Ludwig, Irina Popova
papers.abstract: Using a structural life-cycle model, we quantify the long-term impact of school closures during the Corona crisis on children affected at different ages and coming from households with different parental characteristics. In the model, public investment through schooling is combined with parental time and resource investments in the production of child human capital at different stages in the children's development process. We quantitatively characterize both the long-term earnings consequences on children from a Covid-19 induced loss of schooling, as well as the associated welfare losses. Due to self-productivity in the human capital production function, skill attainment at a younger stage of the life cycle raises skill attainment at later stages, and thus younger children are hurt more by the school closures than older children. We find that parental reactions reduce the negative impact of the school closures, but do not fully offset it. The negative impact of the crisis on children's welfare is especially severe for those with parents with low educational attainment and low assets. The school closures themselves are primarily responsible for the negative impact of the Covid-19 shock on the long-run welfare of the children, with the pandemic-induced income shock to parents playing a secondary role.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D15, D31, E24, I24
papers.zh_title: Covid-19学校关闭的长期分配与福利效应
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一个结构性生命周期模型，我们量化了新冠危机期间学校关闭对不同年龄受影响儿童以及来自不同父母特征家庭的儿童的长期影响。在该模型中，通过学校教育进行的公共投资与父母在儿童发展过程不同阶段对儿童人力资本生产的时间与资源投入相结合。我们定量描述了因Covid-19导致的学业损失对儿童造成的长期收入后果，以及相关的福利损失。由于人力资本生产函数中的自我生产率，在生命周期较年轻阶段获得的技能会提高后期阶段的技能获得，因此年龄较小的儿童比年龄较大的儿童受学校关闭的影响更大。我们发现，父母的反应减轻了学校关闭的负面影响，但并未完全抵消。危机对儿童福利的负面影响，对于那些父母教育程度低且资产少的儿童尤为严重。学校关闭本身是Covid-19冲击对儿童长期福利产生负面影响的主要原因，而大流行导致的父母收入冲击则起次要作用。

papers.title: Winners and Losers from Sovereign Debt Inflows
papers.authors: Fernando Broner, Alberto Martin, Lorenzo Pandolfi, Tomas Williams
papers.abstract: We study the transmission of sovereign debt inflow shocks on domestic firms. We exploit episodes of large sovereign debt inflows in six emerging countries that are due to the announcements of these countries' inclusion in two major local-currency sovereign debt indexes. We show that these episodes significantly reduce government bond yields and appreciate the domestic currency, and have heterogeneous stock market effects on domestic firms. Firms operating in tradable industries experience lower abnormal returns than firms in non-tradable industries. In addition, financial, government-related, and firms that rely more on external financing experience relatively higher abnormal returns. The effect on financial and government-related firms is stronger in countries that display larger reductions in government bond yields. The effect on tradable firms is stronger in countries where the domestic currency appreciates more. We provide a stylized model that rationalizes these results. Our findings shed novel light on the channels through which sovereign debt inflows affect firms in emerging economies.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：F3, F31, F32, F34, G15, G23
papers.zh_title: 主权债务流入的赢家与输家
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了主权债务流入冲击对国内企业的传导机制。我们利用了六个新兴国家因被宣布纳入两个主要本币主权债务指数而出现大规模主权债务流入的事件。我们发现，这些事件显著降低了政府债券收益率，并使本币升值，同时对国内企业产生了异质性的股票市场影响。可贸易行业企业的异常回报率低于非贸易行业企业。此外，金融类、政府相关类以及更依赖外部融资的企业获得了相对较高的异常回报率。在政府债券收益率降幅更大的国家，金融类和政府相关类企业受到的影响更强。在本币升值幅度更大的国家，可贸易类企业受到的影响更强。我们提供了一个简化模型来解释这些结果。我们的发现为理解主权债务流入影响新兴经济体企业的渠道提供了新的视角。

papers.title: How to Estimate a VAR after March 2020
papers.authors: Michele Lenza, Giorgio E. Primiceri
papers.abstract: This paper illustrates how to handle a sequence of extreme observations—such as those recorded during the COVID-19 pandemic—when estimating a Vector Autoregression, which is the most popular time-series model in macroeconomics. Our results show that the ad-hoc strategy of dropping these observations may be acceptable for the purpose of parameter estimation. However, disregarding these recent data is inappropriate for forecasting the future evolution of the economy, because it vastly underestimates uncertainty.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, TWP；JEL：C11, C32, E32, E37
papers.zh_title: 2020年3月后如何估计VAR模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文阐述了在估计向量自回归模型（宏观经济学中最流行的时间序列模型）时，如何处理一系列极端观测值（例如COVID-19疫情期间记录的数据）。我们的结果表明，为了参数估计的目的，采用丢弃这些观测值的临时策略可能是可以接受的。然而，忽略这些近期数据对于预测经济的未来演变是不合适的，因为它会严重低估不确定性。

papers.title: Clearing the Bar: Improving Tax Compliance for Small Firms through Target Setting
papers.authors: Yazan Al-Karablieh, Evangelos Koumanakos, Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: We use a new dataset of the universe of Greek corporate tax returns to study a voluntary tax compliance program for small firms. This “self-assessment” program prescribed target taxable profit margins (the ratio of taxable profits to revenues) for different types of activities. Firms that reported profit margins above these targets in a given year were exempt from audits in that year. We find that the firms that take up the program report significantly larger taxable profits than non-eligible firms, with some evidence for longer-lasting effects on tax reporting. Firms that take up the program for more years exhibit stronger effects. We also find that firms can easily and substantially manipulate reported revenue (decreasing it by up to 40%) to help meet prescribed profit margins without paying more in taxes. Overall, the program increased tax revenues collected from small firms, but points to a very large level of baseline under-reporting of profits and the ease of manipulating reported revenues.
papers.zh_title: 设定标准：通过目标设定改善小企业的税收合规
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用希腊所有企业所得税申报表的新数据集，研究了一项针对小企业的自愿税收合规计划。这项“自我评估”计划为不同类型的活动规定了目标应税利润率（应税利润与收入之比）。在给定年份中，报告利润率高于这些目标的企业可免于该年的审计。我们发现，参与该计划的企业报告的应税利润显著高于不符合条件的企业，并且有证据表明对税收报告存在更持久的影响。参与该计划年份越多的企业，其效果越强。我们还发现，企业可以轻易且大幅地操纵报告收入（最多可减少40%），以帮助达到规定的利润率，而无需缴纳更多税款。总体而言，该计划增加了从小企业征收的税收收入，但也表明存在非常严重的利润低报基线水平以及操纵报告收入的便利性。

papers.title: Board Dynamics over the Startup Life Cycle
papers.authors: Michael Ewens, Nadya Malenko
papers.abstract: We explore the dynamics of venture capital (VC)-backed startup boards using novel data on director entry, exit, and characteristics. At formation, a typical board is entrepreneur-controlled. Independent directors join the median board after the second financing, when control becomes shared, and hold a tie-breaking vote. Their presence is particularly likely when the potential for VC-entrepreneur conflicts is higher. At later stages, control switches to VCs and independent director characteristics change. These patterns are consistent with independent directors playing both a mediating and advising role over the startup life cycle, and thus representing another potential source of value-add to startup performance.
papers.zh_title: 初创企业生命周期中的董事会动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用关于董事进入、退出和特征的新数据，探讨了风险投资支持的初创企业董事会的动态。在成立时，典型的董事会由企业家控制。独立董事在第二轮融资后加入中位数董事会，此时控制权变为共享，并拥有打破平局的投票权。当风险投资与企业家之间潜在冲突较高时，独立董事的出现尤其可能。在后期阶段，控制权转向风险投资方，独立董事的特征也会发生变化。这些模式与独立董事在初创企业生命周期中同时发挥调解和建议作用的观点一致，因此代表了另一种可能为初创企业绩效增加价值的来源。

papers.title: Effective Demand Failures and the Limits of Monetary Stabilization Policy
papers.authors: Michael Woodford
papers.abstract: The challenge for stabilization policy presented by the COVID-19 pandemic stems above all from disruption of the circular flow of payments, resulting in a failure of what Keynes (1936) calls “effective demand.” As a consequence, economic activity in many sectors can be inefficiently low, and interest-rate policy cannot eliminate the distortions — not because of a limit on the extent to which interest rates can be reduced, but because interest-rate reductions fail to stimulate demand of the right sorts. Fiscal transfers are instead well-suited to addressing the fundamental problem, and can under certain circumstances achieve a first-best allocation of resources.
papers.zh_title: 有效需求失灵与货币稳定政策的局限性
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行给稳定政策带来的挑战，首先源于支付循环流的中断，导致了凯恩斯（1936）所称的“有效需求”失灵。其结果是，许多部门的经济活动可能低效地低，而利率政策无法消除这些扭曲——这并非因为利率降低的程度存在限制，而是因为降低利率未能刺激正确类型的需求。相反，财政转移支付非常适合解决根本问题，并且在某些情况下可以实现资源的最优配置。

papers.title: To Stay or to Migrate? When Becker Meets Harris-Todaro
papers.authors: Pei-Ju Liao, Ping Wang, Yin-Chi Wang, Chong Kee Yip
papers.abstract: Allowing migration activity as an integral part of demographic transition and economic development, we establish a locational quantity-quality trade-off of children and explore its macroeconomic consequences. We construct a dynamic competitive migration equilibrium framework with rural agents heterogeneous in skills and fertility preferences. We then establish and characterize a mixed migration equilibrium where high-skilled rural agents with low fertility preferences always migrate to cities, low-skilled with high fertility preferences always stay, and only an endogenously determined fraction of high-skilled/high fertility preferences or low-skilled/low fertility preferences ends up moving. By calibrating our model to fit the data from China, we find interesting interactions between fertility and migration decisions in various counterfactual experiments with respect to changes in migration, population control and rural land entitlement policies. We conclude that overlooking the locational quantity-quality trade-off of children may lead to nonnegligible biases in assessing the implications and effectiveness of government policies.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EFG；JEL：O15, O53, R23, R28
papers.zh_title: 留下还是迁移？当贝克尔遇见哈里斯-托达罗
papers.zh_abstract: 将迁移活动作为人口转型和经济发展的一个组成部分，我们建立了子女在区位上的数量-质量权衡模型，并探讨了其宏观经济后果。我们构建了一个动态竞争性迁移均衡框架，其中农村代理人具有异质性的技能和生育偏好。然后，我们建立并刻画了一个混合迁移均衡：高技能低生育偏好的农村代理人总是迁移到城市，低技能高生育偏好的总是留下，而只有内生决定比例的高技能高生育偏好或低技能低生育偏好的代理人最终会迁移。通过校准模型以拟合中国数据，我们在关于迁移、人口控制和农村土地确权政策变化的各种反事实实验中，发现了生育与迁移决策之间有趣的相互作用。我们得出结论，忽视子女在区位上的数量-质量权衡可能会导致在评估政府政策的含义和有效性时产生不可忽视的偏差。

papers.title: Economic Aspects of the Energy Transition
papers.authors: Geoffrey Heal
papers.abstract: I make three points relating to the transition from fossil fuels to non-carbon energy. One is that the economic cost of moving from fossil fuels to renewable energy in electricity generation is very low, and probably lower than many estimates of the economic benefits from this change. The second is that, if it were to move the economy away from fossil fuels and from oil in particular, a carbon tax would have to be much great than generally believed, in the range of $400 per ton CO2 or above. Finally, decarbonization of the economy implies electrification, the replacement of fossil fuels by electricity in for example space heating. Currently electricity is far too expensive for this to be politically realistic: this is because its price does not reflect its marginal cost but this plus a wide range of fixed costs that are recovered in the per kilowatt hour charge. If we are to electrify the economy then the price of electricity will need to be nearer to its marginal cost, which raises questions about the business models of utilities.
papers.zh_title: 能源转型的经济方面
papers.zh_abstract: 我就从化石燃料向非碳能源的转型提出三点看法。第一，在发电领域从化石燃料转向可再生能源的经济成本非常低，可能低于许多对此转变经济效益的估计。第二，如果要使经济摆脱化石燃料，特别是石油，碳税必须远高于普遍认为的水平，大约在每吨二氧化碳400美元或以上。最后，经济脱碳意味着电气化，即在例如空间供暖等领域用电替代化石燃料。目前，电力价格过高，使得这在政治上不现实：这是因为其价格并未反映边际成本，而是边际成本加上在每千瓦时收费中回收的广泛固定成本。如果我们要实现经济电气化，电价将需要更接近其边际成本，这引发了关于公用事业商业模式的问题。

papers.title: Unpaired Kidney Exchange: Overcoming Double Coincidence of Wants without Money
papers.authors: Mohammad Akbarpour, Julien Combe, Yinghua He, Victor Hiller, Robert Shimer, Olivier Tercieux
papers.abstract: For an incompatible patient-donor pair, kidney exchanges often forbid receipt-before-donation (the patient receives a kidney before the donor donates) and donation-before-receipt, causing a double-coincidence-of-wants problem. Our proposed algorithm, the Unpaired kidney exchange algorithm, uses “memory” as a medium of exchange to eliminate these timing constraints. In a dynamic matching model, we prove that Unpaired delivers a waiting time of patients close to optimal and substantially shorter than currently utilized state-of-the-art algorithms. Using a rich administrative dataset from France, we show that Unpaired achieves a match rate of 57 percent and an average waiting time of 440 days. The (infeasible) optimal algorithm is only slightly better (58 percent and 425 days); state-of-the-art algorithms deliver less than 34 percent and more than 695 days. We draw similar conclusions from the simulations of two large U.S. platforms. Lastly, we propose a range of solutions that can address the potential practical concerns of Unpaired.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, ME, PE；JEL：C78, D47, E49
papers.zh_title: 非配对肾脏交换：无需货币克服双重巧合需求
papers.zh_abstract: 对于不相容的患者-捐赠者配对，肾脏交换通常禁止先收后捐（患者在捐赠者捐赠前接受肾脏）和先捐后收，这导致了双重巧合需求问题。我们提出的算法，即非配对肾脏交换算法，利用“记忆”作为交换媒介来消除这些时间限制。在一个动态匹配模型中，我们证明非配对算法提供的患者等待时间接近最优，并且远短于当前使用的最先进算法。利用法国丰富的行政数据集，我们显示非配对算法实现了57%的匹配率和440天的平均等待时间。（不可行的）最优算法仅略好（58%和425天）；最先进算法实现的匹配率低于34%，等待时间超过695天。我们从两个美国大型平台的模拟中得出了类似的结论。最后，我们提出了一系列可以解决非配对算法潜在实际问题的方案。

papers.title: The Impact of Migration Controls on Urban Fiscal Policies and the Intergenerational Transmission of Human Capital in China
papers.authors: Holger Sieg, Chamna Yoon, Jipeng Zhang
papers.abstract: Using newly available data, we document that internal migrants do not enjoy the same access to local public goods and services as city residents in China. We estimate a spatial overlapping generations model with heterogeneous households to quantify the impact of the Hukou system on urban fiscal policies and access to educational opportunities. We find that migrants provide large fiscal externalities to all major cities. We show the feasibility of alternative internal migration policies that offer the potential of decreasing the inequality within China while at the same time increasing the overall level of human capital in the economy.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, PE；JEL：E6, H7, I25, J24
papers.zh_title: 迁移管制对中国城市财政政策及人力资本代际传递的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用新获取的数据，我们记录到中国内部迁移者无法像城市居民一样平等享受地方公共产品和服务。我们构建了一个包含异质性家庭的空间世代交叠模型，以量化户籍制度对城市财政政策及教育机会获取的影响。研究发现，迁移者为所有主要城市带来了巨大的财政外部性。我们论证了替代性内部迁移政策的可行性，这些政策有望在降低中国内部不平等的同时，提升经济体的整体人力资本水平。

papers.title: Abstentions and Social Networks in Congress
papers.authors: Marco Battaglini, Valerio Leone Sciabolazza, Eleonora Patacchini
papers.abstract: We study the extent to which personal connections among legislators influence abstentions in the U.S. Congress. Our analysis is conducted by observing representatives' abstention for the universe of roll call votes held on bills in the 109th-113th Congresses. Our results show that a legislator's propensity to abstain increases when the majority of his or her alumni connections abstains, even after controlling for other well-known predictors of abstention choices and a vast set of fixed effects. We further reveal that a legislator is more prone to abstain than to take sides when the demands from personal connections conflict with those of the legislator's party.
papers.zh_title: 国会中的弃权与社会网络
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了立法者之间的个人联系在多大程度上影响美国国会中的弃权行为。我们的分析通过观察第109届至第113届国会期间所有法案的唱名表决中代表的弃权情况进行。我们的结果表明，当立法者的大多数校友联系人都弃权时，该立法者弃权的倾向会增加，即使在控制了其他已知的弃权选择预测因素和大量固定效应之后也是如此。我们进一步揭示，当个人联系的要求与立法者所在政党的要求相冲突时，立法者更倾向于弃权而非选边站队。

papers.title: Trade and Geography
papers.authors: Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: This paper reviews recent research on geography and trade. One of the key empirical findings over the last decade has been the role of geography in shaping the distributional consequences of trade. One of the major theoretical advances has been the development of quantitative spatial models that incorporate both exogenous first-nature geography (natural endowments) and endogenous second-nature geography (the location choices of economic agents relative to one another) as determinants of the distribution of economic activity across space. These models are sufficiently rich to capture first-order features of the data, such as gravity equations for flows of goods and people. Yet they remain sufficiently tractable as to permit an analytical characterization of the properties of the general equilibrium and facilitate counterfactuals for realistic policy interventions. We distinguish between models of regions or systems of cities (where goods trade and migration take center stage) and models of the internal structure of cities (where commuting becomes relevant). We review some of key empirical predictions of both sets of theories and show that they have been remarkably successful in rationalizing the empirical findings from reduced-form research. Looking ahead, the combination of recent theoretical advances and novel geo-coded data on economic interactions at a fine spatial scale promises many interesting avenues for further research, including discriminating between alternative mechanisms for agglomeration, understanding the implications of new technologies for the organization of work, and assessing the causes, consequences and potential policy implications of spatial sorting.
papers.zh_title: 贸易与地理
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了近期关于地理与贸易的研究。过去十年中一个关键的实证发现是地理在塑造贸易分配后果中的作用。一个主要的理论进展是定量空间模型的发展，该模型将外生的第一性地理（自然禀赋）和内生的第二性地理（经济主体相对于彼此的位置选择）都作为经济活动空间分布的决定因素。这些模型足够丰富，能够捕捉数据的一阶特征，例如商品和人员流动的引力方程。然而，它们仍然足够易于处理，以便对一般均衡的性质进行分析性刻画，并促进对现实政策干预的反事实分析。我们区分了区域或城市体系模型（其中商品贸易和迁移占据中心地位）和城市内部结构模型（其中通勤变得相关）。我们回顾了两类理论的一些关键实证预测，并表明它们在合理化简化形式研究的实证发现方面取得了显著成功。展望未来，近期理论进展与精细空间尺度上经济互动的新型地理编码数据的结合，为进一步研究提供了许多有趣的途径，包括区分集聚的替代机制、理解新技术对工作组织的影响，以及评估空间分类的原因、后果和潜在政策含义。

papers.title: Economic Agents as Imperfect Problem Solvers
papers.authors: Cosmin L. Ilut, Rosen Valchev
papers.abstract: We develop a tractable model of limited cognitive perception of the optimal policy function, with agents using costly reasoning effort to update beliefs about this optimal mapping of economic states into actions. A key result is that agents reason less (more) when observing usual (unusual) states, producing state- and history-dependent behavior. Our application is a standard incomplete markets model with ex-ante identical agents that hold no a-priori behavioral biases. The resulting ergodic distribution of actions and beliefs is characterized by “learning traps”, where locally stable dynamics of wealth generate “familiar” regions of the state space within which behavior appears to follow past-experience-based heuristics. We show qualitatively and quantitatively how these traps have empirically desirable properties: the marginal propensity to consume is higher, hand-to-mouth status is more frequent and persistent, and there is more wealth inequality than in the standard model.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C11, D83, D91, E21, E71
papers.zh_title: 作为不完美问题解决者的经济主体
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个关于最优政策函数有限认知感知的可处理模型，其中主体使用昂贵的推理努力来更新关于经济状态到行动的最优映射的信念。一个关键结果是，主体在观察常见（不常见）状态时推理较少（较多），从而产生依赖于状态和历史的行为。我们的应用是一个标准的不完全市场模型，其中事前相同的主体没有任何先验的行为偏差。由此产生的行动和信念的遍历分布以“学习陷阱”为特征，其中财富的局部稳定动态产生了状态空间的“熟悉”区域，在这些区域内，行为似乎遵循基于过去经验的启发式方法。我们从定性和定量角度展示了这些陷阱如何具有经验上理想的属性：边际消费倾向更高，手到口状态更频繁且更持久，并且财富不平等程度比标准模型更大。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Surprises and Exchange Rate Behavior
papers.authors: Refet S. Gürkaynak, A. Hakan Kara, Burçin Kısacıkoğlu, Sang Seok Lee
papers.abstract: Central banks unexpectedly tightening policy rates often observe the exchange value of their currency depreciate, rather than appreciate as predicted by standard models. We document this for Fed and ECB policy days using event-studies and ask whether an information effect, where the public attributes the policy surprise to an unobserved state of the economy that the central bank is signaling by its policy may explain the abnormality. It turns out that many informational assumptions make a standard two-country New Keynesian model match this behavior. To identify the particular mechanism, we condition on multiple asset prices in the event-study and model implications for these. We find that there is heterogeneity in this dimension in the event-study and no model with a single regime can match the evidence. Further, even after conditioning on possible information effects driving longer term interest rates, there appear to be other drivers of exchange rates. Our results show that existing models have a long way to go in reconciling event-study analysis with model-based mechanisms of asset pricing.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, E52, E58, G14
papers.zh_title: 货币政策冲击与汇率行为
papers.zh_abstract: 中央银行意外收紧政策利率时，通常观察到其货币的汇率贬值，而不是像标准模型预测的那样升值。我们通过事件研究记录了美联储和欧洲央行政策日的这一现象，并探讨信息效应（即公众将政策冲击归因于中央银行通过其政策信号传递的未观察到的经济状态）是否可以解释这种异常。结果表明，许多信息假设使标准的两个国家新凯恩斯模型能够匹配这种行为。为了识别特定机制，我们在事件研究中以多种资产价格为条件，并模拟这些资产价格的模型含义。我们发现事件研究中存在这一维度的异质性，并且没有单一机制模型能够匹配证据。此外，即使在考虑了可能驱动长期利率的信息效应之后，似乎还存在其他驱动汇率的因素。我们的结果表明，现有模型在将事件研究分析与基于模型的资产定价机制相协调方面还有很长的路要走。

papers.title: On the Origins of Gender-Biased Behavior: The Role of Explicit and Implicit Stereotypes
papers.authors: Eliana Avitzour, Adi Choen, Daphna Joel, Victor Lavy
papers.abstract: This study examines the role of implicit and explicit stereotypes behind gender-discriminatory behavior. The empirical context is the grading discriminatory behavior of math teachers in experimental settings. Previous observational studies demonstrated that math teachers show gender bias when grading papers. The mechanisms behind this behavior are mostly unexplored. We asked teachers to grade gender-manipulated exam papers and measured their grading behavior and implicit and explicit gender stereotypes. We found that implicit gender stereotypes and underestimating own implicit stereotypes were associated with boy-favoring grading behavior. Reducing implicit gender stereotypes and exposing teachers to their implicit biases may promote gender equality in schools.
papers.zh_title: 论性别偏见行为的起源：显性和隐性刻板印象的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了性别歧视行为背后的隐性和显性刻板印象的作用。实证背景是实验环境中数学教师的评分歧视行为。先前的观察性研究表明，数学教师在批改试卷时表现出性别偏见。这种行为背后的机制大多未被探索。我们要求教师批改性别操纵的考试试卷，并测量他们的评分行为以及隐性和显性性别刻板印象。我们发现，隐性性别刻板印象和低估自身隐性刻板印象与偏向男孩的评分行为相关。减少隐性性别刻板印象并让教师接触其隐性偏见可能促进学校中的性别平等。

papers.title: Do Black and Indigenous Communities Receive their Fair Share of Vaccines Under the 2018 CDC Guidelines?
papers.authors: Parag A. Pathak, Harald Schmidt, Adam Solomon, Edwin Song, Tayfun Sönmez, M. Utku Ünver
papers.abstract: A major focus of debate about rationing guidelines for COVID-19 vaccines is whether and how to prioritize access for minority populations that have been particularly affected by the pandemic, and been the subject of historical and structural disadvantage, particularly Black and Indigenous individuals. We simulate the 2018 CDC Vaccine Allocation guidelines using data from the American Community Survey under different assumptions on total vaccine supply. Black and Indigenous individuals combined receive a higher share of vaccines compared to their population share for all assumptions on total vaccine supply. However, their vaccine share under the 2018 CDC guidelines is considerably lower than their share of COVID-19 deaths and age-adjusted deaths. We then simulate one method to incorporate disadvantage in vaccine allocation via a reserve system. In a reserve system, units are placed into categories and units reserved for a category give preferential treatment to individuals from that category. Using the Area Deprivation Index (ADI) as a proxy for disadvantage, we show that a 40% high-ADI reserve increases the number of vaccines allocated to Black or Indigenous individuals, with a share that approaches their COVID-19 death share when there are about 75 million units. Our findings illustrate that whether an allocation is equitable depends crucially on the benchmark and highlight the importance of considering the expected distribution of outcomes from implementing vaccine allocation guidelines.
papers.zh_title: 根据2018年CDC指南，黑人和原住民社区是否获得了公平份额的疫苗？
papers.zh_abstract: 关于COVID-19疫苗配给指南的辩论焦点之一是，是否以及如何优先为受疫情影响特别严重且遭受历史和结构性劣势的少数群体（特别是黑人和原住民个体）提供疫苗。我们使用美国社区调查的数据，在总疫苗供应的不同假设下模拟了2018年CDC疫苗分配指南。在所有总疫苗供应假设下，黑人和原住民个体合计获得的疫苗份额高于其人口份额。然而，根据2018年CDC指南，他们的疫苗份额远低于其COVID-19死亡人数和年龄调整后死亡人数的份额。然后，我们模拟了一种通过储备系统将劣势纳入疫苗分配的方法。在储备系统中，单位被分为不同类别，为某一类别保留的单位给予该类别个体优先待遇。使用区域剥夺指数作为劣势的代理指标，我们表明，40%的高区域剥夺指数储备增加了分配给黑人或原住民个体的疫苗数量，当约有7500万单位时，其份额接近其COVID-19死亡份额。我们的研究结果表明，分配是否公平关键取决于基准，并强调了考虑实施疫苗分配指南预期结果分布的重要性。

papers.title: My Taxes are Too Darn High: Why Do Households Protest their Taxes?
papers.authors: Brad C. Nathan, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Alejandro Zentner
papers.abstract: In the United States and many other countries, taxpayers can file a protest to legally reduce their property taxes. While tax protests can provide a unique opportunity to study the (un)willingness to pay taxes, they have received little attention from researchers. To fill that gap, we study what motivates households to protest their property taxes. Using a field experiment and a quasi-experiment, we show that both expected savings and filing frictions play significant roles. We estimate the magnitude of filing frictions using a money metric. We also discuss how low-cost interventions targeted at disadvantaged groups can mitigate existing economic and racial disparities in the system of tax appeals.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：C93, H2, H26, Z13
papers.zh_title: 我的税太高了：为什么家庭会抗议他们的税收？
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国和许多其他国家，纳税人可以提出抗议以合法减少其财产税。虽然税收抗议为研究（不）愿意纳税提供了独特机会，但研究人员对此关注甚少。为填补这一空白，我们研究了促使家庭抗议其财产税的因素。通过一项现场实验和一项准实验，我们表明预期节省和申请摩擦都起着重要作用。我们使用货币度量估计了申请摩擦的大小。我们还讨论了针对弱势群体的低成本干预措施如何能够减轻税收上诉系统中现有的经济和种族差异。

papers.title: Liquidity Transformation and Fragility in the US Banking Sector
papers.authors: Qi Chen, Itay Goldstein, Zeqiong Huang, Rahul Vashishtha
papers.abstract: A key role of banks is liquidity transformation, which is also thought to create fragility, as uninsured depositors face an incentive to withdraw money before others (a so-called panic run). Despite much theoretical work, there has not been much empirical evidence establishing this mechanism. In this paper, we provide the first large-scale evidence of this mechanism. Banks that perform more liquidity transformation exhibit higher fragility, manifested by stronger sensitivities of uninsured deposit flows to bank performance and greater levels of uninsured deposit outflows when performance is poor. We also explore the effects of deposit insurance and systemic risk.
papers.zh_title: 美国银行业部门的流动性转换与脆弱性
papers.zh_abstract: 银行的一个关键作用是流动性转换，这被认为也会造成脆弱性，因为未投保储户面临在他人之前提取资金的激励（所谓的恐慌性挤兑）。尽管有大量理论工作，但尚未有太多实证证据确立这一机制。在本文中，我们提供了这一机制的首个大规模证据。进行更多流动性转换的银行表现出更高的脆弱性，表现为未投保存款流动对银行绩效的敏感性更强，以及在绩效不佳时未投保存款流出水平更高。我们还探讨了存款保险和系统性风险的影响。

papers.title: Unemployment Disrupts Sleep
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Although there is a substantial literature indicating that unemployment and joblessness have profound adverse impacts on individuals’ health and wellbeing, there is relatively little evidence of their impact on sleep. Using data for over 3.5 million individuals in the United States over the period 2006-2019 from the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS) survey series we show sleep disruption patterns that vary by labor market status. We look at sleep measured by hours in a day and days in a month and whether sleep is disturbed over a fortnight, as indicated by problems falling or staying asleep or staying asleep too much. We find the short-term unemployed suffer more short and long sleep than the employed and are more likely to suffer from disturbed sleep. These problems are greater still for the long-term unemployed and for the jobless who say they are unable to work.
papers.zh_title: 失业扰乱睡眠
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管有大量文献表明失业和无业对个人的健康和福祉有深远的负面影响，但关于其对睡眠影响的证据相对较少。使用2006-2019年间美国行为风险因素监测系统调查系列中超过350万个体的数据，我们展示了因劳动力市场状况而异的睡眠中断模式。我们考察了以一天中的小时数和一个月中的天数衡量的睡眠，以及两周内睡眠是否受到干扰，如入睡或保持睡眠困难或睡眠过多所指示。我们发现，短期失业者比就业者经历更多短睡眠和长睡眠，并且更可能遭受睡眠干扰。对于长期失业者和声称无法工作的无业者来说，这些问题更为严重。

papers.title: The Contagion Externality of a Superspreading Event: The Sturgis Motorcycle Rally and COVID-19
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Large in-person gatherings without social distancing and with individuals who have traveled outside the local area are classified as the “highest risk” for COVID-19 spread by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). Between August 7 and August 16, 2020, nearly 500,000 motorcycle enthusiasts converged on Sturgis, South Dakota for its annual motorcycle rally. Large crowds, coupled with minimal mask-wearing and social distancing by attendees, raised concerns that this event could serve as a COVID-19 “super-spreader.” This study is the first to explore the impact of this event on social distancing and the spread of COVID-19. First, using anonymized cell phone data from SafeGraph, Inc. we document that (i) smartphone pings from non-residents, and (ii) foot traffic at restaurants and bars, retail establishments, entertainment venues, hotels and campgrounds each rose substantially in the census block groups hosting Sturgis rally events. Stay-at-home behavior among local residents, as measured by median hours spent at home, fell. Second, using data from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and a synthetic control approach, we show that by September 2, a month following the onset of the Rally, COVID-19 cases increased by approximately 6 to 7 cases per 1,000 population in its home county of Meade. Finally, difference-in-differences (dose response) estimates show that following the Sturgis event, counties that contributed the highest inflows of rally attendees experienced a 7.0 to 12.5 percent increase in COVID-19 cases relative to counties that did not contribute inflows. Descriptive evidence suggests these effects may be muted in states with stricter mitigation policies (i.e., restrictions on bar/restaurant openings, mask-wearing mandates). We conclude that the Sturgis Motorcycle Rally generated public health costs of as much as $12.2 billion.
papers.zh_title: 超级传播事件的传染外部性：斯特吉斯摩托车集会与COVID-19
papers.zh_abstract: 美国疾病控制与预防中心将没有社交距离且参与者来自当地以外地区的大型面对面聚会归类为COVID-19传播的“最高风险”。2020年8月7日至16日，近50万名摩托车爱好者聚集在南达科他州的斯特吉斯参加其年度摩托车集会。大量人群，加上参与者很少佩戴口罩和保持社交距离，引发了人们对这一事件可能成为COVID-19“超级传播者”的担忧。本研究首次探讨了这一事件对社交距离和COVID-19传播的影响。首先，使用SafeGraph公司的匿名手机数据，我们记录了（i）非居民的手机信号，以及（ii）举办斯特吉斯集会活动的普查区组中餐馆和酒吧、零售场所、娱乐场所、酒店和露营地的客流量均大幅上升。当地居民的居家行为（以在家中的中位小时数衡量）下降。其次，使用疾病控制与预防中心的数据和合成控制方法，我们表明，到9月2日，即集会开始后一个月，其所在县米德县的COVID-19病例每1000人增加了约6至7例。最后，双重差分（剂量反应）估计显示，在斯特吉斯事件之后，贡献了最多集会参与者流入的县，相对于没有贡献流入的县，COVID-19病例增加了7.0%至12.5%。描述性证据表明，在采取更严格缓解政策（即限制酒吧/餐厅营业、强制佩戴口罩）的州，这些影响可能被削弱。我们得出结论，斯特吉斯摩托车集会产生了高达122亿美元的公共卫生成本。

papers.title: The Changing Dimensions of Child Development
papers.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Raquel Bernal, Michele Giannola, Milagros Nores
papers.abstract: This paper uses the data on child development collected around the evaluation of a nursery program to estimate the details of the process of human development. We model development as made of three latent factors, reflecting health and cognitive and socio emotional skills. We observe children from age 1 to age 6. We assume that, at each age, these three factors interact among themselves and with a variety of other inputs to determine the level of development at following ages. Relative to other studies, the richness of the data we use allows us to: (i) let the dynamics be rich and flexible; (ii) each factor can play a role in the production of any other factor; (iii) the function changes with age; (iv) parental investment is treated as endogenous. We find that the dynamics of the process can be richer than usually assumed, which has important implications for the degree of persistence of different inputs in time. Persistence also changes with age. The endogeneity of investment is also important.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED；JEL：I15, I25, I32, J13, J24, O15

papers.title: What Explains the Gap in Welfare Use among Immigrants and Natives?
papers.authors: Xiaoning Huang, Neeraj Kaushal, Julia Shu-Huah Wang
papers.abstract: We investigate the gap in welfare use between immigrants and natives over a 24-year period using the Annual Social and Economic Supplement of the Current Population Survey from 1995-2018, spanning periods of economic recessions and recoveries, changes in welfare policy regimes, and policies towards immigrants. A novel contribution of our research is to adopt the Oaxaca-Blinder decomposition analysis to study the effects of demographic factors, macroeconomic trends and policy on welfare use gap between immigrants and natives. Our analysis leads to three main findings: one, if immigrants had the same demographic characteristics as natives their participation in means-tested programs would have been much less overall and much below those of natives. This finding holds true across broader measures of welfare receipt capturing cash and near cash programs and health insurance as well as participation in five specific safety net programs. It also holds true across periods of economic recessions and recovery. Second, we find evidence that the business cycle impacts immigrant and native welfare participation differently. Immigrant participations in Temporary Assistance to Needy Families, Supplemental Nutritional Assistance Program and State Children’s Health Insurance Program are more sensitive to the business cycle than native participations. Three, we find that changes in program eligibility explain only a modest proportion of the immigrant-native gap in welfare use. A possible explanation for this finding is that changes in eligibility rules have affected only specific immigrant populations (e.g. new immigrants) whereas our analysis pertains to all immigrants.
papers.zh_title: 什么解释了移民与本地人之间福利使用的差距？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用1995年至2018年当前人口调查的年度社会与经济补充数据，跨越经济衰退与复苏时期、福利政策体制变化以及针对移民的政策，研究了24年间移民与本地人之间福利使用的差距。我们研究的一个新颖贡献是采用Oaxaca-Blinder分解分析来研究人口因素、宏观经济趋势和政策对移民与本地人福利使用差距的影响。我们的分析得出三个主要发现：第一，如果移民具有与本地人相同的人口特征，他们参与经济状况调查项目的总体程度会低得多，并且远低于本地人。这一发现适用于更广泛的福利领取衡量指标，包括现金和近似现金项目以及健康保险，也适用于五个特定安全网项目的参与情况。这一发现在经济衰退和复苏时期同样成立。第二，我们发现证据表明商业周期对移民和本地人福利参与的影响不同。移民在贫困家庭临时援助、补充营养援助计划和州儿童健康保险计划中的参与比本地人更敏感于商业周期。第三，我们发现项目资格变化仅解释了移民与本地人福利使用差距的一小部分。这一发现的一个可能解释是，资格规则的变化仅影响了特定的移民群体（例如新移民），而我们的分析涉及所有移民。

papers.title: Token-Based Platform Finance
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Ye Li, Neng Wang
papers.abstract: We develop a dynamic model of platform economy where tokens serve as a means of payments among platform users and are issued to ﬁnance investment in platform productivity. Tokens are optimally issued to reward platform owners when the productivity-normalized token supply is low and burnt to boost the franchise value when the productivity-normalized normalized supply is high. Although token price is determined in a liquid market, the platform’s ﬁnancial constraint generates an endogenous token issuance cost, causing underinvestment through the conﬂict of interest between insiders (platform owners) and outsiders (users). Blockchain technology mitigates underinvestment by addressing the platform’s time-inconsistency problem.
papers.zh_title: 基于代币的平台金融
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个平台经济的动态模型，其中代币作为平台用户之间的支付手段，并被发行以资助平台生产力的投资。当生产力标准化后的代币供应量较低时，代币被最优发行以奖励平台所有者；当生产力标准化后的供应量较高时，代币被销毁以提升特许经营权价值。尽管代币价格在流动性市场中决定，但平台的金融约束产生了内生的代币发行成本，通过内部人（平台所有者）与外部人（用户）之间的利益冲突导致投资不足。区块链技术通过解决平台的时间不一致性问题来缓解投资不足。

papers.title: The Fed Takes on Corporate Credit Risk: An Analysis of the Efficacy of the SMCCF
papers.authors: Simon Gilchrist, Bin Wei, Vivian Z. Yue, Egon Zakrajšek
papers.abstract: We evaluate the efficacy of the Secondary Market Corporate Credit Facility (SMCCF), a program designed to stabilize the corporate bond market in the wake of the Covid-19 shock. The Fed announced the SMCCF on March 23 and expanded the program on April 9. Regression discontinuity estimates imply that these announcements reduced credit spreads on bonds eligible for purchase 70 basis points. We refine this analysis by constructing a sample of bonds—issued by the same set of companies—which differ in their SMCCF eligibility. A diff-in-diff analysis shows that both announcements had large effects on credit spreads, narrowing spreads 20 basis points on eligible bonds relative to their ineligible counterparts within the same set of issuers across the two announcement periods. The March 23 announcement also reduced bid-ask spreads ten basis points within ten days of the announcement. By lowering credit spreads and improving liquidity, the April 9 announcement had an especially pronounced effect on “fallen angels.” The actual purchases lowered credit spreads by an additional five basis points and bid-ask spreads by two basis points. These results confirm that the SMCCF made it easier for companies to borrow in the corporate bond market.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E44, E58, G2
papers.zh_title: 美联储承担企业信用风险：二级市场企业信贷便利有效性分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了二级市场企业信贷便利（SMCCF）的有效性，该计划旨在在新冠疫情冲击后稳定企业债券市场。美联储于3月23日宣布SMCCF，并于4月9日扩大了该计划。断点回归估计表明，这些公告使符合购买条件的债券的信用利差降低了70个基点。我们通过构建一个由同一组公司发行的债券样本——这些债券在SMCCF资格上有所不同——来完善这一分析。双重差分分析显示，两次公告都对信用利差产生了较大影响，在两个公告期内，相对于同一发行人中不符合条件的债券，符合条件的债券的利差收窄了20个基点。3月23日的公告还在公告后十天内将买卖价差降低了10个基点。通过降低信用利差和改善流动性，4月9日的公告对“堕落天使”产生了特别显著的影响。实际购买使信用利差额外降低了5个基点，买卖价差降低了2个基点。这些结果证实，SMCCF使公司更容易在企业债券市场借款。

papers.title: On the Origins of the Idea of Ending Poverty
papers.authors: Martin Ravallion
papers.abstract: The late 18th century saw the intellectual germ of the idea of “ending poverty,” but the idea did not get far in economics or policy making until much more recently. Over the 19th century, poverty rates fell substantially in Western Europe and North America, and we started to see mainstream advocates of ending chronic poverty, and policies for doing so. There was an explosion of interest in the idea from around 1960, with policy responses in many countries, including America. In the post-Colonial period, the newly independent states were keen to see an end to poverty. From the 1990s, development agencies began to identify this as their overarching objective. The U.N.’s first Millennium Development Goal (MDG1) of halving the 1990 poverty rate by 2015 was achieved ahead of time. The U.N.’s Sustainable Development Goals came to include ending extreme poverty by 2030. This is more ambitious than MDG1, and more politically challenging. Economic growth in poor countries is likely to remain important, but the policy emphasis has shifted to redistributive interventions, though these will require a deeper reach to the poorest if we are to see the end of poverty, judged by any chosen poverty line.
papers.zh_title: 论终结贫困思想的起源
papers.zh_abstract: 18世纪末，“终结贫困”这一思想在知识界萌芽，但直到最近，该思想在经济学或政策制定中才取得较大进展。在整个19世纪，西欧和北美的贫困率大幅下降，我们开始看到主流倡导终结长期贫困的观点以及相应的政策。大约从1960年起，人们对这一思想的兴趣激增，许多国家（包括美国）都采取了政策回应。在后殖民时期，新独立的国家渴望终结贫困。从20世纪90年代起，发展机构开始将此确定为其首要目标。联合国第一个千年发展目标（MDG1）——到2015年将1990年的贫困率减半——已提前实现。联合国的可持续发展目标进而包括到2030年终结极端贫困。这比MDG1更具雄心，在政治上也更具挑战性。贫困国家的经济增长可能仍然重要，但政策重点已转向再分配干预措施，不过，如果我们要以任何选定的贫困线为标准终结贫困，这些措施需要更深入地触及最贫困人群。

papers.title: Reservation Wages and Workers’ Valuation of Job Flexibility: Evidence from a Natural Field Experiment
papers.authors: Kuan-Ming Chen, Claire Ding, John A. List, Magne Mogstad
papers.abstract: Recent changes in labor arrangements have increased interest in estimating and understanding the value of job flexibility. We leverage a large natural field experiment at Uber to create exogenous variation in expected market wages across individuals and over time. Combining this experiment with high frequency panel data on wages and individual work decisions, we document how labor supply responds to exogenous changes in expected market wages in a setting with virtually no restrictions on driver labor allocation. We find that there is i) systematic heterogeneity in labor supply responses both across drivers and within a driver over time, ii) significant fixed costs of beginning a shift, and iii) high rider demand when it is costly for drivers to work. These three findings motivate a model of labor supply with heterogenous preferences over work schedules, adjustment costs, and statistical dependence between market wages and the costs of driving. We recover the labor supply elasticities and reservation wages of this dynamic labor supply model via a combination of experimental estimates and other data moments. We then perform counterfactual analyses that allow us to examine how preference heterogeneity and adjustment costs influence the responses of workers' to wage incentives as well as infer drivers' willingness to pay for the ability to customize and adjust their work schedule. We also show that a static approach to the driver's dynamic problem delivers materially different estimates of workers' labor supply elasticities and their value of job flexibility.
papers.zh_title: 保留工资与工人对工作灵活性的估值：来自自然现场实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 近期劳动安排的变化增加了对估计和理解工作灵活性价值的兴趣。我们利用Uber的一个大规模自然现场实验，在个体间和时间上创造预期市场工资的外生变化。将该实验与关于工资和个人工作决策的高频面板数据相结合，我们记录了在司机劳动分配几乎没有限制的环境中，劳动供给如何响应预期市场工资的外生变化。我们发现：(i) 劳动供给响应在司机之间以及同一司机随时间推移均存在系统性异质性；(ii) 开始一个班次存在显著的固定成本；(iii) 当司机工作成本高昂时，乘客需求很高。这三个发现激发了一个劳动供给模型，该模型包含对工作安排偏好的异质性、调整成本以及市场工资与驾驶成本之间的统计依赖性。我们通过实验估计和其他数据矩的组合，恢复了这一动态劳动供给模型的劳动供给弹性和保留工资。然后，我们进行反事实分析，使我们能够检验偏好异质性和调整成本如何影响工人对工资激励的响应，并推断司机为获得定制和调整工作安排的能力而愿意支付的金额。我们还表明，对司机动态问题的静态方法会得出关于工人劳动供给弹性及其工作灵活性价值的不同估计。

papers.title: Measuring the Cost of Living in Mexico and the US
papers.authors: David O. Argente, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Munseob Lee
papers.abstract: Cross-country price indexes are crucial to compare living standards between countries and to measure global inequality. An accurate measurement of these price indexes is a difficult task because of the lack of accurate data on the consumption patterns of different countries. We construct a unique data on prices and quantities for consumer packaged goods matched at the barcode-level across the United States and Mexico. We estimate that the Mexican real consumption relative to the United States is larger than previously estimated. We identify heterogeneity in shopping behavior, quality of products, and variety availability as important sources of bias in international price comparisons.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, F0, O0
papers.zh_title: 衡量墨西哥和美国的生活成本
papers.zh_abstract: 跨国价格指数对于比较国家间生活水平和衡量全球不平等至关重要。由于缺乏不同国家消费模式的准确数据，准确衡量这些价格指数是一项艰巨的任务。我们构建了一个独特的、按条形码级别在美国和墨西哥之间匹配的消费品价格和数量数据集。我们估计，墨西哥相对于美国的实际消费比先前估计的要大。我们识别出购物行为、产品质量和品种可用性的异质性是国际价格比较中偏差的重要来源。

papers.title: Disease, Downturns, and Wellbeing: Economic History and the Long-Run Impacts of COVID-19
papers.authors: Vellore Arthi, John Parman
papers.abstract: How might COVID-19 affect human capital and wellbeing in the long run? The COVID-19 pandemic has already imposed a heavy human cost—taken together, this public health crisis and its attendant economic downturn appear poised to dwarf the scope, scale, and disruptiveness of most modern pandemics. What evidence we do have about other modern pandemics is largely limited to short-run impacts. Consequently, recent experience can do little to help us anticipate and respond to COVID-19’s potential long-run impact on individuals over decades and even generations. History, however, offers a solution. Historical crises offer closer analogues to COVID-19 in each of its key dimensions—as a global pandemic, as a global recession—and offer the runway necessary to study the life-course and intergenerational outcomes. In this paper, we review the evidence on the long-run effects on health, labor, and human capital of both historical pandemics (with a focus on the 1918 Influenza Pandemic) and historical recessions (with a focus on the Great Depression). We conclude by discussing how past crises can inform our approach to COVID-19—helping tell us what to look for, what to prepare for, and what data we ought to collect now.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：I1, I3, J1, J6, N1, N3
papers.zh_title: 疾病、经济衰退与福祉：经济史与COVID-19的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19可能如何长期影响人力资本和福祉？COVID-19大流行已经造成了沉重的人员代价——总体而言，这场公共卫生危机及其伴随的经济衰退似乎将使大多数现代大流行的范围、规模和破坏性相形见绌。我们关于其他现代大流行的现有证据大多局限于短期影响。因此，近期的经验几乎无助于我们预测和应对COVID-19对个人数十年甚至几代人的潜在长期影响。然而，历史提供了一个解决方案。历史危机在COVID-19的每个关键维度——作为全球大流行、作为全球衰退——上都提供了更接近的类比，并提供了研究生命历程和代际结果所需的足够时间跨度。在本文中，我们回顾了历史大流行（重点关注1918年流感大流行）和历史衰退（重点关注大萧条）对健康、劳动和人力资本的长期影响的证据。最后，我们讨论了过去的危机如何为我们的COVID-19应对方法提供信息——帮助我们了解应该关注什么、准备什么以及现在应该收集哪些数据。

papers.title: Is the Rise in Illicit Opioids Affecting Labor Supply and Disability Claiming Rates?
papers.authors: Sujeong Park, David Powell
papers.abstract: There is considerable interest in understanding the broader effects of the opioid crisis on labor supply and social insurance programs in the United States. This paper examines how the recent transition of the opioid crisis from prescription opioids to more prevalent misuse of illicit opioids, such as heroin and fentanyl, altered labor supply behavior and disability insurance claiming rates. We exploit differential geographic exposure to the reformulation of OxyContin, the largest reduction in access to abusable prescription opioids to date, to study the effects of substitution to illicit markets. We observe meaningful reductions in labor supply measured in terms of employment-to-population ratios, hours worked, and earnings. We also find significant increases in disability applications and beneficiaries. These labor supply and disability insurance shifts begin immediately after reformulation and are uniquely associated with pre-reformulation rates of OxyContin misuse, not rates of broader pain reliever misuse.
papers.zh_title: 非法阿片类药物增加是否影响劳动力供给和残疾申请率？
papers.zh_abstract: 理解阿片类药物危机对美国劳动力供给和社会保险计划的广泛影响备受关注。本文考察了阿片类药物危机从处方阿片类药物向更普遍滥用非法阿片类药物（如海洛因和芬太尼）的近期转变如何改变了劳动力供给行为和残疾保险申请率。我们利用奥施康定（OxyContin）配方改革（迄今为止对可滥用处方阿片类药物获取的最大限制）所导致的地理差异暴露，来研究向非法市场替代的影响。我们观察到以就业人口比、工作时间和收入衡量的劳动力供给出现显著下降。我们还发现残疾申请和受益人数显著增加。这些劳动力供给和残疾保险的转变在配方改革后立即开始，并且与改革前奥施康定滥用率独特相关，而非更广泛的止痛药滥用率。

papers.title: Linguistic Metrics for Patent Disclosure: Evidence from University Versus Corporate Patents
papers.authors: Nancy Kong, Uwe Dulleck, Adam B. Jaffe, Shupeng Sun, Sowmya Vajjala
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a novel approach to measure disclosure in patent applications using algorithms from computational linguistics. Borrowing methods from the literature on second language acquisition, we analyze core linguistic features of 40,949 U.S. applications in three patent categories related to nanotechnology, batteries, and electricity from 2000 to 2019. Relying on the expectation that universities have more incentives to disclose their inventions than corporations for either incentive reasons or for different source documents that patent attorneys can draw on, we confirm the relevance and usefulness of the linguistic measures by showing that university patents are more readable. Combining the multiple measures using principal component analysis, we find that the gap in disclosure is 0.4 SD, with a wider gap between top applicants. Our results do not change after accounting for the heterogeneity of inventions by controlling for cited-patent fixed effects. We also explore whether one pathway by which corporate patents become less readable is use of multiple examples to mask the “best mode” of inventions. By confirming that computational linguistic measures are useful indicators of readability of patents, we suggest that the disclosure function of patents can be explored empirically in a way that has not previously been feasible.
papers.zh_title: 专利披露的语言学度量：来自大学与企业专利的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种使用计算语言学算法衡量专利申请中披露程度的新方法。借鉴第二语言习得文献中的方法，我们分析了2000年至2019年间与纳米技术、电池和电力相关的三个专利类别中40,949件美国申请的核心语言特征。基于大学比企业更有动机披露其发明（无论是出于激励原因还是专利律师可参考的不同源文件）的预期，我们通过显示大学专利更具可读性，证实了这些语言度量的相关性和有用性。使用主成分分析结合多种度量，我们发现披露差距为0.4个标准差，且顶尖申请人之间的差距更大。在通过控制被引专利固定效应来考虑发明的异质性后，我们的结果没有改变。我们还探讨了企业专利可读性降低的一个可能途径是使用多个示例来掩盖发明的“最佳模式”。通过确认计算语言学度量是专利可读性的有用指标，我们建议专利的披露功能可以以前不可行的方式进行实证探索。

papers.title: On the Use of Outcome Tests for Detecting Bias in Decision Making
papers.authors: Ivan A. Canay, Magne Mogstad, Jack Mountjoy
papers.abstract: The decisions of judges, lenders, journal editors, and other gatekeepers often lead to significant disparities across affected groups. An important question is whether, and to what extent, these group-level disparities are driven by relevant differences in underlying individual characteristics, or by biased decision makers. Becker (1957, 1993) proposed an outcome test of bias based on differences in post-decision outcomes across groups, inspiring a large and growing empirical literature. The goal of our paper is to offer a methodological blueprint for empirical work that seeks to use outcome tests to detect bias. We show that models of decision making underpinning outcome tests can be usefully recast as Roy models, since heterogeneous potential outcomes enter directly into the decision maker's choice equation. Different members of the Roy model family, however, are distinguished by the tightness of the link between potential outcomes and decisions. We show that these distinctions have important implications for defining bias, deriving logically valid outcome tests of such bias, and identifying the marginal outcomes that the test requires.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C21, C26, C51, J15, J16, J71, K14, K42
papers.zh_title: 关于使用结果检验检测决策中的偏见
papers.zh_abstract: 法官、贷款人、期刊编辑和其他守门人的决策常常导致受影响群体间的显著差异。一个重要问题是，这些群体层面的差异在多大程度上是由潜在个体特征的相关差异驱动，还是由有偏见的决策者造成。Becker（1957, 1993）提出了一种基于群体间决策后结果差异的偏见结果检验，激发了大量且不断增长的实证文献。本文的目标是为寻求使用结果检验检测偏见的实证工作提供方法论蓝图。我们表明，支撑结果检验的决策模型可以有效地重新表述为Roy模型，因为异质性的潜在结果直接进入决策者的选择方程。然而，Roy模型家族的不同成员通过潜在结果与决策之间联系的紧密程度来区分。我们表明，这些区别对于定义偏见、推导此类偏见的逻辑有效结果检验以及识别检验所需的边际结果具有重要含义。

papers.title: Coasean Approaches to Ending Overfishing: Bigeye Tuna Conservation in the Western and Central Pacific Ocean
papers.authors: Daniel Ovando, Gary D. Libecap, Katherine D. Millage, Lennon Thomas
papers.abstract: Bigeye tuna in the Western and Central Pacific Ocean were perceived as overfished for nearly 20 years, in large part due to incidental catch in the much larger skipjack tuna fishery. Efforts to halt the overfishing of bigeye stalled due to disagreements over the distribution of costs and benefits from reform. An alternative Coasean-style approach to setting both harvesting levels and the allocation of costs and benefits might offer a path forward. We calculate the costs and benefits of achieving bigeye conservation goals and describe an exchange through which benefits could be realized via removal of Fish Aggregating Devices (FADs). Through trade, aggregate benefits and costs are more apt to be in balance relative to mandated protection controls. The realities of bargaining costs in a multilateral setting are not underappreciated, but in light of existing stalemates in this and other fisheries, consideration of Coasean-style approaches is warranted.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, LE, PE；JEL：Q22, Q28, Q57, Q58
papers.zh_title: 结束过度捕捞的科斯式方法：中西太平洋大眼金枪鱼保护
papers.zh_abstract: 中西太平洋的大眼金枪鱼被认为已过度捕捞近20年，很大程度上是由于在规模大得多的鲣鱼渔业中的兼捕。由于对改革成本和收益分配的分歧，阻止大眼金枪鱼过度捕捞的努力陷入停滞。一种替代性的科斯式方法，即同时设定捕捞水平以及成本和收益的分配，可能提供一条前进道路。我们计算了实现大眼金枪鱼保护目标的成本和收益，并描述了一种通过移除集鱼装置（FADs）来实现收益的交换方式。通过交易，总收益和成本更有可能相对于强制保护控制达到平衡。在多边环境中谈判成本的现实性并未被低估，但鉴于该渔业及其他渔业现有的僵局，考虑科斯式方法是合理的。

papers.title: Communication and the Beliefs of Economic Agents
papers.authors: Bernardo Candia, Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
papers.abstract: New surveys provide a wealth of information on how economic agents form their expectations and how those expectations shape their decisions. We review recent evidence on how changes in macroeconomic expectations, particularly inflation expectations, affect households’ and firms’ actions. We show that the provision of information about inflation to households and firms can sometimes backfire in terms of their subsequent decisions. Whether or not this is the case hinges on how individuals interpret the news about inflation: supply-side interpretations (“inflation is bad for the economy”) lead to negative income effects, which can depress economic activity. We show that households in advanced economies, unlike professional forecasters, typically have such a supply-side interpretation, as do many firms. New communication strategies could avoid public misinterpretation of policy decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E2, E3, E4, E5
papers.zh_title: 沟通与经济主体的信念
papers.zh_abstract: 新的调查提供了关于经济主体如何形成预期以及这些预期如何影响其决策的丰富信息。我们回顾了关于宏观经济预期变化（特别是通胀预期）如何影响家庭和企业行为的最新证据。我们表明，向家庭和企业提供通胀信息有时会对其后续决策产生反效果。是否如此取决于个体如何解读通胀新闻：供给侧解读（“通胀对经济不利”）会导致负面的收入效应，从而抑制经济活动。我们表明，发达经济体的家庭（与专业预测者不同）通常持有这种供给侧解读，许多企业也是如此。新的沟通策略可以避免公众对政策决策的误解。

papers.title: Large Learning Gains in Pockets of Extreme Poverty: Experimental Evidence from Guinea Bissau
papers.authors: Ila Fazzio, Alex Eble, Robin L. Lumsdaine, Peter Boone, Baboucarr Bouy, Pei-Tseng Jenny Hsieh, Chitra Jayanty, Simon Johnson, Ana Filipa Silva
papers.abstract: Children in many extremely poor, remote regions are growing up illiterate and innumerate despite high reported school enrollment ratios. Possible explanations for such poor outcomes include demand – for example, low perceived returns to education compared to opportunity cost; and supply – poor state provision and inability of parents to coordinate and finance better schooling. We conducted a cluster-randomized trial in rural Guinea Bissau to understand the effectiveness and cost of concerted supply-based interventions in such contexts. Our intervention created simple schools offering four years of education to primary-school aged children in lieu of the government. At endline, children receiving the intervention scored 58.1 percentage points better than controls on early grade reading and math tests, demonstrating that the intervention taught children to read and perform basic arithmetic, from a counterfactual condition of very high illiteracy. Our results provide evidence that particularly needy areas may require more concerted, dramatic interventions in education than those usually considered, but that such interventions hold great potential for increasing education levels among the world’s poorest people.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED；JEL：I21, I24, I25, J24, O15
papers.zh_title: 极端贫困地区的巨大学习收益：来自几内亚比绍的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 许多极度贫困、偏远地区的儿童尽管报告的入学率很高，但成长过程中仍是文盲和算术盲。对这种糟糕结果的可能解释包括需求方面——例如，与机会成本相比，教育感知回报低；以及供给方面——国家提供不足，且父母无法协调和资助更好的教育。我们在几内亚比绍农村进行了一项整群随机试验，以了解在此类背景下协调一致的供给干预措施的有效性和成本。我们的干预措施创建了简单的学校，代替政府为小学适龄儿童提供四年教育。在终期评估中，接受干预的儿童在早期阅读和数学测试中的得分比对照组高出58.1个百分点，表明该干预措施教会了儿童阅读和进行基本算术，而反事实状态是极高的文盲率。我们的结果提供了证据，表明特别贫困的地区可能需要比通常考虑的更为协调、更具戏剧性的教育干预，但此类干预在提高世界上最贫困人口的教育水平方面具有巨大潜力。

papers.title: Crimes Against Morality: Unintended Consequences of Criminalizing Sex Work
papers.authors: Lisa Cameron, Jennifer Seager, Manisha Shah
papers.abstract: We examine the impact of criminalizing sex work, exploiting an event in which local officials unexpectedly criminalized sex work in one district in East Java, Indonesia, but not in neighboring districts. We collect data from female sex workers and their clients before and after the change. We find that criminalization increases sexually transmitted infections among female sex workers by 58 percent, measured by biological tests. This is driven by decreased condom access and use. We also find evidence that criminalization decreases earnings among women who left sex work due to criminalization, and decreases their ability to meet their children's school expenses while increasing the likelihood that children begin working to supplement household income. While criminalization has the potential to improve population STI outcomes if the market shrinks permanently, we show that five years post-criminalization the market has rebounded and the probability of STI transmission within the general population is likely to have increased.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, LS；JEL：I18, J16, K42
papers.zh_title: 违反道德罪：将性工作刑事化的意外后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了将性工作刑事化的影响，利用印度尼西亚东爪哇省一个地区的地方官员意外将性工作刑事化而邻近地区没有的事件。我们在政策变化前后收集了女性性工作者及其客户的数据。我们发现，刑事化使女性性工作者的性传播感染（通过生物学检测衡量）增加了58%。这是由于安全套获取和使用减少所致。我们还发现证据表明，刑事化降低了因刑事化而离开性工作的女性的收入，降低了她们支付子女教育费用的能力，同时增加了子女开始工作以补充家庭收入的可能性。虽然如果市场永久萎缩，刑事化有可能改善人群的性传播感染结果，但我们表明，在刑事化五年后，市场已经反弹，并且性传播感染在一般人群中传播的可能性可能已经增加。

papers.title: Non-Random Exposure to Exogenous Shocks: Theory and Applications
papers.authors: Kirill Borusyak, Peter Hull
papers.abstract: We develop new tools for estimating the causal effects of treatments or instruments that combine multiple sources of variation according to a known formula. Examples include treatments capturing spillovers in social and transportation networks, simulated instruments for policy eligibility, and shift-share instruments. We show how exogenous shocks to some, but not all, determinants of such variables can be leveraged while avoiding omitted variables bias. Our solution involves specifying counterfactual shocks that may as well have been realized and adjusting for a summary measure of non-randomness in shock exposure: the average treatment (or instrument) across such counterfactuals. We further show how to use shock counterfactuals for valid finite-sample inference, and characterize the valid instruments that are asymptotically efficient. We apply this framework to address bias when estimating employment effects of market access growth from Chinese high-speed rail construction, and to boost power when estimating coverage effects of expanded Medicaid eligibility.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, ITI, LS；JEL：C21, C26, F14, I13, R40
papers.zh_title: 对外生冲击的非随机暴露：理论与应用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了新的工具，用于估计那些根据已知公式组合多个变异来源的处理或工具的因果效应。例子包括捕捉社会和交通网络中溢出效应的处理、政策资格模拟工具以及份额转移工具。我们展示了如何利用此类变量的某些（而非全部）决定因素的外生冲击，同时避免遗漏变量偏差。我们的解决方案涉及指定可能已经实现的反事实冲击，并针对冲击暴露非随机性的一个汇总度量进行调整：这些反事实下的平均处理（或工具）。我们进一步展示了如何使用反事实冲击进行有效的有限样本推断，并刻画了渐近有效的工具。我们将此框架应用于估计中国高铁建设带来的市场准入增长的就业效应时的偏差校正，以及提高扩大医疗补助资格覆盖效应估计的统计功效。

papers.title: Uncertainty, Long-Run, and Monetary Policy Risks in a Two-Country Macro Model
papers.authors: Kimberly A. Berg, Nelson C. Mark
papers.abstract: We study international currency risk in a two-country dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model under incomplete markets. The underlying sources of risk are direct shocks to productivity growth, shocks to a long-run risk component of productivity growth, shocks to a stochastic volatility component of productivity growth, and shocks to monetary policy. The long-run risk and stochastic volatility shocks have the interpretation of aggregate demand shocks. Cross-country heterogeneity in the model arises from three sources: differences in the long-run risk and stochastic volatility process parameters that we estimate using United States and Japanese total factor productivity data, differences in monetary policy parameters, and differences in export pricing. The driving force behind currency risk is heterogeneity in precautionary saving. Differences in monetary policy can generate moderate currency risk, but structural differences in productivity growth are more important. Export pricing conventions are not important sources of currency risk. Stochastic volatility shocks are key to generating volatility in the currency risk premium, but they do not help at all in explaining the forward premium bias/anomaly.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E43, F31, G12
papers.zh_title: 两国宏观模型中的不确定性、长期风险与货币政策风险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在不完全市场条件下，研究了两国动态随机一般均衡模型中的国际货币风险。风险的潜在来源包括：对生产率增长的直接冲击、对生产率增长长期风险成分的冲击、对生产率增长随机波动成分的冲击，以及对货币政策的冲击。长期风险冲击和随机波动冲击可被解释为总需求冲击。模型中的跨国异质性源于三个方面：我们利用美国和日本的全要素生产率数据估计的长期风险与随机波动过程参数的差异、货币政策参数的差异，以及出口定价的差异。货币风险的驱动力是预防性储蓄的异质性。货币政策差异可以产生适度的货币风险，但生产率增长的结构性差异更为重要。出口定价惯例并非货币风险的重要来源。随机波动冲击对于产生货币风险溢价的波动性至关重要，但它们完全无助于解释远期溢价偏差/异常现象。

papers.title: Man vs. Machine Learning: The Term Structure of Earnings Expectations and Conditional Biases
papers.authors: Jules H. van Binsbergen, Xiao Han, Alejandro Lopez-Lira
papers.abstract: We introduce a real-time measure of conditional biases in firms' earnings forecasts. The measure is defined as the difference between analysts' expectations and a statistically optimal unbiased machine-learning benchmark. Analysts' conditional expectations are, on average, biased upwards, and the bias increases in the forecast horizon. These biases are associated with negative cross-sectional return predictability, and the short legs of many anomalies contain firms with excessively optimistic earnings. Further, managers of companies with the greatest upward-biased earnings forecasts are more likely to issue stocks. Commonly-used linear earnings models do not work out-of-sample and are inferior to those provided by analysts.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D22, D83, D84, G11, G12, G14, G31, G4
papers.zh_title: 人类与机器学习：盈利预期的期限结构与条件性偏差
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种实时衡量企业盈利预测条件性偏差的指标。该指标定义为分析师预期与统计上最优的无偏机器学习基准之间的差异。分析师的预期平均而言存在向上偏差，且偏差随预测期限增加而增大。这些偏差与负面的横截面收益可预测性相关，许多异常现象的短端都包含盈利预期过度乐观的公司。此外，盈利预测向上偏差最大的公司管理者更有可能发行股票。常用的线性盈利模型在样本外表现不佳，且劣于分析师提供的模型。

papers.title: Choice in Insurance Markets: A Pigouvian Approach to Social Insurance Design
papers.authors: Nathaniel Hendren, Camille Landais, Johannes Spinnewijn
papers.abstract: Should choice be offered in social insurance programs? The paper presents a conceptual framework that identifies the key forces determining the value of offering choice, reviews some existing evidence on these forces, and aims to guide further empirical research in different in- surance domains. The value of offering choice is higher the larger the variation in individual valuations, but gets reduced by both selection on risk and selection on moral hazard. The imple- mentation of choice-based policies is further challenged by the presence of adverse selection and choice frictions or the obligation to offer basic uncompensated care. These inefficiencies can be seen as externalities, which do not rationalize the absence of providing choice per se, but point to the need for regulatory policies and the potential value of corrective pricing à la Pigou.
papers.zh_title: 保险市场中的选择：社会保险设计的庇古方法
papers.zh_abstract: 社会保险项目中是否应提供选择？本文提出了一个概念框架，识别决定提供选择价值的关键力量，回顾了关于这些力量的一些现有证据，并旨在指导不同保险领域的进一步实证研究。提供选择的价值越大，个体估值差异越大，但会因风险选择（逆向选择）和道德风险选择而降低。基于选择的政策的实施还面临逆向选择和选择摩擦的存在，或提供基本无偿护理义务的挑战。这些低效率可被视为外部性，它们本身并不证明不提供选择的合理性，而是指出了监管政策的必要性以及庇古式矫正定价的潜在价值。

papers.title: Pandemics Through the Lens of Occupations
papers.authors: Anand Chopra, Michael B. Devereux, Amartya Lahiri
papers.abstract: We outline a macro-pandemic model where individuals can select into working from home or in the market. Market work increases the risk of infection. Occupations differ in the ease of substitution between market and home work, and in the risk of infection. We examine the evo- lution of a pandemic in the model as well as its macroeconomic and distributional consequences. The model is calibrated to British Columbian data to examine the implications of shutting down different industries by linking industries to occupations. We find that endogenous choice to self- isolate is key: it reduces the peak infection rate by 2 percentage points but reduces the trough consumption level by 4 percentage points, even without policy mandated lockdowns. The model also produces widening consumption inequality, a fact that has characterized COVID-19.
papers.zh_title: 通过职业视角看大流行病
papers.zh_abstract: 我们勾勒了一个宏观大流行病模型，其中个体可以选择在家工作或在市场工作。市场工作会增加感染风险。不同职业在家庭工作与市场工作之间的替代难易程度以及感染风险上存在差异。我们研究了模型中大流行病的演变及其宏观经济和分配后果。该模型根据不列颠哥伦比亚省的数据进行校准，通过将行业与职业联系起来，考察关闭不同行业的影响。我们发现，即使没有政策强制封锁，内生选择自我隔离也是关键：它将感染峰值率降低了2个百分点，但将消费低谷水平降低了4个百分点。该模型还产生了消费不平等加剧的现象，这是COVID-19的一个特征。

papers.title: Globalization and Pandemics
papers.authors: Pol Antràs, Stephen J. Redding, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg
papers.abstract: We propose a theory of the relationship between globalization and pandemics. We start by documenting the importance of international trade for the diffusion of infections in several pandemics throughout history and by showing that trade and travel are closely intertwined. Motivated by this evidence, we build a framework in which business travel facilitates trade according to a constant elasticity gravity equation mediated by mobility frictions. In turn, travel leads to human interactions that transmit disease, as in the Susceptible-Infected-Recovered (SIR) model. We highlight three novel interactions between these two mechanisms. First, trade-motivated travel generates an epidemiological externality across countries. Therefore, reductions in international frictions affect the evolution of the epidemic in each country, and the condition for a pandemic to occur. Second, if infections lead to deaths, or reduce individual labor supply, we establish a general equilibrium social distancing effect, whereby increases in relative prices in unhealthy countries reduce travel to those countries. Third, if agents internalize the threat of infection, we show that their behavioral responses lead to a reduction in travel that is larger for higher-trade-cost locations, and hence leads to an initial fall in the ratio of trade to GDP in the early stages of the epidemic, before a subsequent recovery.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IFM, ITI；JEL：F1, F2, F4, F6, I1
papers.zh_title: 全球化与大流行病
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个关于全球化与大流行病之间关系的理论。我们首先通过历史数据记录了国际贸易在多次大流行病中对于感染扩散的重要性，并表明贸易与旅行紧密相连。受此证据启发，我们构建了一个框架，其中商务旅行根据由流动性摩擦调节的恒定弹性引力方程促进贸易。反过来，旅行导致人际互动，从而传播疾病，如同易感-感染-康复（SIR）模型所述。我们强调了这两种机制之间的三种新颖互动。第一，贸易驱动的旅行产生了跨国流行病学外部性。因此，国际摩擦的减少会影响每个国家流行病的演变以及大流行病发生的条件。第二，如果感染导致死亡或减少个体劳动力供给，我们建立了一个一般均衡的社会距离效应，即不健康国家相对价格的上升会减少前往这些国家的旅行。第三，如果个体内化感染威胁，我们表明他们的行为反应会导致旅行减少，且对于贸易成本较高的地点，减少幅度更大，因此在流行病早期阶段导致贸易与GDP之比最初下降，随后才恢复。

papers.title: Measuring Property Rights Institutions
papers.authors: Simeon Djankov, Edward L. Glaeser, Valeria Perotti, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: How do the different elements in the standard bundle of property rights – such as the right of possession or the right of transfer – differentially impact outcomes, such as urban development? This paper incorporates insecure property rights into a standard model of urban land prices and density, and makes predictions about investment in land and property, informality, and the efficiency of land use.
