Our empirical analysis links data on institutions related to land titling and transfer with multiple urban outcomes, from 190 countries. The evidence is generally consistent with the model’s predictions, and more broadly with the Demsetz’s (1967) approach to property rights institutions. Indeed, we document world-wide improvements in the quality of institutions facilitating property transfer over time.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：O17, O18, O43, R14, R21
papers.zh_title: 衡量产权制度
papers.zh_abstract: 标准产权束中的不同要素——例如占有权或转让权——如何对城市发展等结果产生差异化影响？本文将不安全的产权纳入城市土地价格和密度的标准模型，并对土地和财产投资、非正规性以及土地利用效率做出预测。我们的实证分析将190个国家与土地确权和转让相关的制度数据与多个城市结果联系起来。证据总体上与模型的预测一致，并且更广泛地与德姆塞茨（1967）关于产权制度的方法论相符。事实上，我们记录了全球范围内促进财产转让的制度质量随时间推移而改善。

papers.title: Child Skill Production: Accounting for Parental and Market-Based Time and Goods Investments
papers.authors: Elizabeth M. Caucutt, Lance Lochner, Joseph Mullins, Youngmin Park
papers.abstract: Families invest parental time, home goods/services, and market-based child care in their children. We study these investments, focusing on two issues: the role of parental human capital and the substitutability of inputs in the skill production process. We develop a relative demand estimation strategy that uses intratemporal optimality to estimate input substitutability, as well as the relative productivity of inputs and the role played by parental education. This approach requires only a weak separability assumption on the dynamics of skills, no data on skills, and easily addresses measurement error in inputs. We show how relative demand restrictions can simplify estimation of the dynamics of skill production using (noisy) measures of skills when there are multiple investment inputs that are imperfectly measured. Finally, we show how moments related to relative demand can be combined with moments related to skill dynamics to determine whether beliefs about skill production align with the true technology. Using data from the Child Development Supplement of the PSID, we estimate the skill production technology for children ages 12 and younger, finding moderately strong complementarity between inputs. We estimate little effect of parental education on the child production technology: more-educated parents invest more, because they have higher incomes and stronger preference for children’s skills. Counterfactual simulations show that the degree of input complementarity we estimate has important implications for policies that subsidize specific inputs or provide free child care.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS；JEL：D13, D15, I24, J13, J22, J24
papers.zh_title: 儿童技能生产：考虑父母与市场的时间及商品投资
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭在子女身上投入父母时间、家庭商品/服务以及市场化的儿童保育。我们研究这些投资，重点关注两个问题：父母人力资本的作用以及技能生产过程中投入要素的可替代性。我们开发了一种相对需求估计策略，利用期内最优条件来估计投入要素的可替代性，以及投入要素的相对生产率和父母教育所起的作用。该方法仅需要对技能动态做出弱可分性假设，无需技能数据，并且易于解决投入要素的测量误差问题。我们展示了当存在多个测量不完美的投资投入时，相对需求约束如何简化利用（有噪声的）技能指标对技能生产动态的估计。最后，我们展示了如何将相对需求相关的矩与技能动态相关的矩相结合，以确定关于技能生产的信念是否与真实技术一致。利用PSID儿童发展补充调查的数据，我们估计了12岁及以下儿童的技能生产技术，发现投入要素之间存在中等强度的互补性。我们估计父母教育对儿童生产技术影响甚微：受教育程度更高的父母投资更多，是因为他们收入更高且对子女技能有更强的偏好。反事实模拟表明，我们估计的投入互补程度对补贴特定投入或提供免费儿童保育的政策具有重要含义。

papers.title: On the Equilibrium Properties of Network Models with Heterogeneous Agents
papers.authors: Treb Allen, Costas Arkolakis, Xiangliang Li
papers.abstract: We consider a broad class of spatial models where there are many types of interactions across a large number of locations. We provide a new theorem that offers an iterative algorithm for calculating an equilibrium and sufficient and “globally necessary” conditions under which the equilibrium is unique. We show how this theorem enables the characterization of equilibrium properties for two important spatial systems: an urban model with spillovers across a large number of different types of agents and a dynamic migration model with forward looking agents. An Online Appendix provides eleven additional examples of both spatial and non-spatial economic frameworks for which our theorem provides new equilibrium characterizations.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI；JEL：C6, D85, E23, F4, O18, R13
papers.zh_title: 异质性主体网络模型的均衡性质
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑一大类空间模型，其中在大量地点之间存在多种类型的互动。我们提供了一个新定理，该定理给出了计算均衡的迭代算法，以及均衡唯一的充分且“全局必要”条件。我们展示了该定理如何能够刻画两个重要空间系统的均衡性质：一个包含大量不同类型主体间溢出效应的城市模型，以及一个包含前瞻性主体的动态迁移模型。在线附录提供了另外十一个空间和非空间经济框架的例子，我们的定理为这些框架提供了新的均衡刻画。

papers.title: Average Inflation Targeting and Household Expectations
papers.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Edward S. Knotek II, Raphael Schoenle
papers.abstract: Using a daily survey of U.S. households, we study how the Federal Reserve’s announcement of its new strategy of average inflation targeting affected households’ expectations. Starting with the day of the announcement, there is a very small uptick in the minority of households reporting that they had heard news about monetary policy relative to prior to the announcement, but this effect fades within a few days. Those hearing news about the announcement do not seem to have understood the announcement: they are no more likely to correctly identify the Fed’s new strategy than others, nor are their expectations different. When we provide randomly selected households with pertinent information about average inflation targeting, their expectations still do not change in a different way than when households are provided with information about traditional inflation targeting. Even one year after the announcement, U.S. households remain mostly unaware of the change in strategy or its implications.
papers.zh_title: 平均通胀目标制与家庭预期
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国日度家庭调查数据，我们研究了美联储宣布其平均通胀目标制新策略如何影响家庭预期。自宣布之日起，与宣布前相比，报告听到货币政策新闻的家庭比例出现非常微小的上升，但这一效应在几天内消退。听到该宣布新闻的家庭似乎并未理解这一宣布：他们正确识别美联储新策略的可能性并不比其他家庭更高，其预期也没有差异。当我们向随机选择的家庭提供关于平均通胀目标制的相关信息时，他们的预期仍然不会以不同于向家庭提供传统通胀目标制信息的方式发生变化。即使在宣布一年后，美国家庭大多仍不了解这一策略变化或其含义。

papers.title: Inequality of Opportunity for Income in Denmark and the United States: A Comparison Based on Administrative Data
papers.authors: Pablo Mitnik, Anne-Line Helsø, Victoria L. Bryant
papers.abstract: We carry out a comparative analysis of inequality of opportunity (IOp) for long-run income in Denmark and the United States. We adopt a luck-egalitarian understanding of IOp, use high-quality administrative data, and rely on highly improved methods. These include novel identification assumptions that allow us to produce set estimates of IOp in the United States relative to Denmark rather than just lower-bound estimates of IOp in the two countries. There are five main results. First, with types based only on gender and parental income rank as the circumstances beyond people’s control, measured IOp for income is high in the United States and far from negligible in Denmark: before taxes and transfers, the lower-bound Gini coefficients for individual earnings and family income opportunities are in the 0.21-024 range in the United States and in the 0.08–0.12 range in Denmark. Second, the tax system and the welfare state reduce measured IOp in both countries, but they do so by more than twice as much in Denmark. Third, our analyses in terms of disposable family income per adult—which factor in taxes and transfers and purge the effect of the association between parental income and the probability of marriage—entail that there is more IOp for income in the United States than overall income inequality in Denmark. Fourth, IOp for income is substantially higher in the United States than in Denmark. With opportunities defined in terms of disposable family income per adult, IOp is at the very least 68 percent higher in the United States, and this result is very robust to the inequality index employed in the analysis. Fifth, our lower-bound estimates of the unfair inequality as a share of overall inequality are much larger in both countries than typically reported for advanced economies. When we account for race and ethnicity as circumstances beyond people’s control (in addition to gender and parental income), our lower-bound estimate of that share for the U.S. reaches almost 58 percent. We conclude that the distribution of economic opportunities—and not just of economic outcomes—is substantially less unequal in Denmark than in the U.S., and that a very large share of U.S. income inequality may be tracked back to circumstances beyond people’s control.
papers.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D31, D63, H23, I30, J62, Z13, Z18
papers.zh_title: 丹麦与美国收入机会不平等：基于行政数据的比较
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对丹麦和美国长期收入的机会不平等进行了比较分析。我们采用运气平等主义的机会不平等理解，使用高质量的行政数据，并依赖大幅改进的方法。这些方法包括新颖的识别假设，使我们能够产生美国相对于丹麦的机会不平等集合估计，而不仅仅是两国机会不平等的下界估计。主要有五个结果。第一，仅以性别和父母收入排名作为人们无法控制的环境因素，美国收入机会不平等的测量值很高，丹麦也远非可忽略：在税收和转移支付之前，个人收入和家庭收入机会的下界基尼系数在美国为0.21-0.24，在丹麦为0.08-0.12。第二，税收制度和福利国家在两国都降低了测量的机会不平等，但在丹麦的降低幅度是美国的两倍以上。第三，我们以每位成人可支配家庭收入（计入税收和转移支付，并剔除父母收入与婚姻概率关联的影响）进行的分析表明，美国收入机会不平等程度高于丹麦总体收入不平等。第四，美国收入机会不平等显著高于丹麦。以每位成人可支配家庭收入定义机会时，美国机会不平等至少高出68%，且这一结果对分析中使用的基尼系数非常稳健。第五，我们关于不公平不平等占总体不平等份额的下界估计在两国都远大于通常对发达经济体的报告。当我们将种族和民族作为人们无法控制的环境因素（除性别和父母收入外）时，美国该份额的下界估计达到近58%。我们得出结论：丹麦的经济机会分布（而不仅仅是经济结果分布）远不如美国不平等，且美国收入不平等中很大一部分可能追溯到人们无法控制的环境因素。

papers.title: Marginal Effects of Merit Aid for Low-Income Students
papers.authors: Joshua Angrist, David Autor, Amanda Pallais
papers.abstract: Financial aid from the Susan Thompson Buffett Foundation (STBF) provides exceptionally generous support to a college population similar to that served by a host of state aid programs. In conjunction with STBF, we randomly assigned aid awards to thousands of Nebraska high school graduates from low-income, minority, and first-generation college households. Randomly- assigned STBF awards boost bachelor's (BA) degree completion for students targeting four-year schools by about 8 points. Degree gains are concentrated among four-year applicants who would otherwise have been unlikely to pursue a four-year program. Degree effects are mediated by award-induced increases in credits earned towards a BA in the first year of college. The extent of initial four-year college engagement explains heterogeneous effects by target campus and across covariate subgroups. Most program spending is a transfer, reducing student debt without affecting degree attainment. Award-induced marginal spending is modest. The projected lifetime earnings impact of awards exceeds marginal educational spending for all of the subgroups examined in the study. Projected earnings gains exceed funder costs for low-income, non-white, urban, and first-generation students, and for students with relatively weak academic preparation.
papers.zh_title: 低收入学生助学金边际效应
papers.zh_abstract: 苏珊·汤普森·巴菲特基金会的助学金为与众多州助学金项目服务对象相似的大学生群体提供了异常慷慨的支持。与基金会合作，我们随机向数千名来自低收入、少数族裔和第一代大学生家庭的内布拉斯加州高中毕业生分配助学金。随机分配的助学金使以四年制大学为目标的学生获得学士学位的比例提高了约8个百分点。学位提升集中在那些原本不太可能攻读四年制项目的四年制大学申请者中。学位效应由助学金诱导的大学第一年获得学士学位学分增加所中介。初始四年制大学参与程度解释了按目标校园和协变量子群划分的异质性效应。大部分项目支出是转移支付，减少了学生债务而不影响学位获得。助学金诱导的边际支出适中。对于研究中考察的所有子群，助学金预计的终身收入影响超过了边际教育支出。对于低收入、非白人、城市和第一代大学生以及学业准备相对较弱的学生，预计收入增长超过了资助者成本。

papers.title: The Effects of COVID-19 on U.S. Small Businesses: Evidence from Owners, Managers, and Employees
papers.authors: Georgij Alekseev, Safaa Amer, Manasa Gopal, Theresa Kuchler, JW Schneider, Johannes Stroebel, Nils C. Wernerfelt
papers.abstract: We analyze a large-scale survey of owners, managers, and employees of small businesses in the United States to understand the effects of the early stages of the COVID-19 pandemic on those businesses. The survey was fielded in late April 2020 among Facebook business page administrators, frequent sellers on Facebook's e-commerce platform Marketplace, and the general Facebook user population. We observe more than 66,000 responses covering most sectors of the economy, including many businesses that had stopped operating due to the pandemic. The survey asks 136 questions covering topics such as changes in business operations and employment, changes in financing patterns, and the interaction of household and business responsibilities. We characterize the adjustments implemented to survive the pandemic and explore the key challenges to continue operating or to re-open. We show how these patterns differ across industry, firm size, owner gender, and other firm characteristics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, LS, ME, PE, PR；JEL：G0, M1
papers.zh_title: COVID-19对美国小企业的影响：来自所有者、管理者和员工的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一项针对美国小企业所有者、管理者和员工的大规模调查，以了解COVID-19大流行早期阶段对这些企业的影响。该调查于2020年4月下旬在Facebook商业页面管理员、Facebook电子商务平台Marketplace的频繁卖家以及普通Facebook用户群体中进行。我们观察到超过66,000份回复，涵盖了经济的大部分部门，包括许多因大流行而停止运营的企业。调查包含136个问题，涉及业务运营和就业变化、融资模式变化以及家庭与企业责任的互动等主题。我们描述了为在大流行中生存而实施的调整，并探讨了继续运营或重新开业的主要挑战。我们展示了这些模式如何因行业、企业规模、所有者性别和其他企业特征而异。

papers.title: Gangs, Labor Mobility and Development
papers.authors: Nikita Melnikov, Carlos Schmidt-Padilla, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
papers.abstract: We study how territorial control by criminal organizations affects economic development. We exploit a natural experiment in El Salvador, where the emergence of these criminal organizations was the consequence of an exogenous shift in American immigration policy that led to the deportation of gang leaders from the United States to El Salvador. Upon arrival, the gangs gained control over many urban areas and re-created a system of borders to protect their territory from outsiders. Using a spatial regression discontinuity design, we find that individuals in gang-controlled neighborhoods have less material well-being, income, and education than individuals living only 50 meters away but outside of gang territory. None of these discontinuities existed before the arrival of the gangs. A key mechanism behind the results is that gangs restrict individuals’ mobility, affecting their labor market options by preventing them from commuting to other parts of the city. The results are not determined by high rates of selective migration, differential exposure to extortion and violence, or differences in public goods provision.
papers.zh_title: 帮派、劳动力流动与发展
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究犯罪组织对领土的控制如何影响经济发展。我们利用萨尔瓦多的一项自然实验，其中这些犯罪组织的出现是美国移民政策外生转变的结果，该政策导致帮派头目从美国被驱逐到萨尔瓦多。抵达后，帮派控制了许多城市地区，并重建了一套边界系统以保护其领土免受外人侵扰。利用空间断点回归设计，我们发现帮派控制社区的居民在物质福利、收入和教育方面比仅住在50米外但处于帮派领土之外的居民更差。在帮派到来之前，这些断点都不存在。结果背后的一个关键机制是帮派限制了个人的流动性，通过阻止他们通勤到城市其他地区而影响其劳动力市场选择。这些结果并非由高选择性迁移、遭受敲诈和暴力的差异或公共品供给差异所决定。

papers.title: On Public Spending and Economic Unions
papers.authors: Fernando Broner, Alberto Martin, Jaume Ventura
papers.abstract: We analyze the conduct of fiscal policy in a financially integrated union in the presence of financial frictions. Frictions create a wedge between the return to investment and the union interest rate. This leads to an over-spending externality. While the social cost of spending is the return to investment, governments care mostly about the (depressed) interest rate they face. In other words, the crowding out effects of public spending are partly "exported" to the rest of the union. We argue that it may be hard for the union to deal with this externality through the design of fiscal rules, which are bound to be shaped by the preferences of the median country and not by efficiency considerations. We also analyze how this overspending externality -- and the union's ability to deal with it effectively -- changes when the union is financially integrated with the rest of the world. Finally, we extend our model by introducing a zero lower bound on interest rates and show that, if financial frictions are severe enough, the union is pushed into a liquidity trap and the direction of the spending externality is reversed. At such times, fiscal rules that are appropriate during normal times might backfire.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：E62, F32, F34, F36, F41, F45
papers.zh_title: 论公共支出与经济联盟
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在存在金融摩擦的情况下，金融一体化联盟中财政政策的实施。摩擦在投资回报与联盟利率之间造成了楔子。这导致了一种过度支出外部性。虽然支出的社会成本是投资回报，但政府主要关心他们面临的（被压低的）利率。换句话说，公共支出的挤出效应部分被“出口”到了联盟其他地区。我们认为，联盟可能难以通过设计财政规则来处理这种外部性，因为这些规则必然受中间国家偏好而非效率考虑的影响。我们还分析了当联盟与世界其他地区金融一体化时，这种过度支出外部性以及联盟有效处理它的能力如何变化。最后，我们通过引入利率零下限扩展了模型，并表明如果金融摩擦足够严重，联盟会被推入流动性陷阱，支出外部性的方向会发生逆转。在这种时候，正常时期合适的财政规则可能会适得其反。

papers.title: The Intergenerational Effects of the Vietnam Draft on Risky Behaviors
papers.authors: Monica Deza, Alvaro Mezza
papers.abstract: We exploit the natural experiment provided by the Vietnam lottery draft to evaluate the intergenerational effect of fathers’ draft eligibility on children’s propensity to engage in risky health behaviors during adolescence using the NLSY97. Draft eligibility increases measures of substance use, intensity of use, decreases age of initiation—particularly for marijuana—and increases measures of delinquency. We explore potential mechanisms: Draft eligibility affects paternal parenting styles and attitudes towards the respondent, environmental aspects, and even maternal factors. Results are robust to alternative specifications and falsification diagnostics. Our results indicate that previous analyses underestimate the full negative effects of draft eligibility.
papers.zh_title: 越南征兵对风险行为的代际影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用越南抽签征兵提供的自然实验，使用NLSY97数据评估父亲征兵资格对青少年时期子女从事健康风险行为倾向的代际影响。征兵资格增加了物质使用、使用强度的指标，降低了开始年龄——尤其是大麻——并增加了犯罪指标。我们探索了潜在机制：征兵资格影响父亲的教养方式和对受访者的态度、环境方面甚至母亲因素。结果对替代规范和伪造诊断是稳健的。我们的结果表明，以往的分析低估了征兵资格的全面负面影响。

papers.title: Pandemics, Vaccines and an Earnings Damage Function
papers.authors: Harrison Hong, Jeffrey D. Kubik, Neng Wang, Xiao Xu, Jinqiang Yang
papers.abstract: We derive a parsimonious model of damage to corporate earnings from COVID-19. Using measures of expected damage from industry-level earnings forecast revisions, we estimate this model with nonlinear least squares and identifying restrictions related to forecast rationality. Forecasts in mid-May 2020 imply an earnings crash and lower earnings growth until a vaccine arrives in 1.48 years (95% CI [0.61, 5.88]). We extend our framework to account for time-varying vaccine arrival rates. Mid-August 2020 forecasts imply a vaccine arrival in 0.61 years (95% CI [0.35, 1.06]), which is due to positive vaccine news as opposed to fiscal or monetary policy news.
papers.zh_title: 大流行病、疫苗与盈利损害函数
papers.zh_abstract: 我们推导出一个关于COVID-19对企业盈利损害的简约模型。利用行业层面盈利预测修正的预期损害度量，我们通过非线性最小二乘法并施加与预测理性相关的识别约束来估计该模型。2020年5月中旬的预测暗示盈利崩溃，且盈利增长放缓直至疫苗在1.48年（95%置信区间[0.61, 5.88]）内到来。我们将框架扩展以考虑时变的疫苗到达率。2020年8月中旬的预测暗示疫苗在0.61年（95%置信区间[0.35, 1.06]）内到来，这是由于积极的疫苗消息而非财政或货币政策消息。

papers.title: Fencing off Silicon Valley: Cross-Border Venture Capital and Technology Spillovers
papers.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Sina T. Ates, Josh Lerner, Richard R. Townsend, Yulia Zhestkova
papers.abstract: The treatment of foreign investors is a contentious topic in U.S. entrepreneurship policy. We model a setting where foreign corporate investments in Silicon Valley may allow U.S. entrepreneurs to pursue technologies that they could not otherwise, but may also lead to knowledge spillovers. We show that despite the benefits from such inbound investments for U.S. firms, it may be optimal for the U.S. government to raise their costs to deter these investments. Using as comprehensive as possible a sample of investments by foreign corporate investors in U.S. startups, we find evidence consistent with the presence of knowledge spillovers to foreign investors.
papers.zh_title: 围堵硅谷：跨境风险投资与技术溢出
papers.zh_abstract: 外国投资者的待遇是美国创业政策中一个争议性话题。我们构建了一个模型，其中外国企业对硅谷的公司投资可能使美国创业者得以追求原本无法实现的技术，但也可能导致知识溢出。我们表明，尽管此类入境投资对美国企业有利，但美国政府可能最优选择是提高其成本以阻止这些投资。利用尽可能全面的外国企业投资者对美国初创企业投资的样本，我们发现了与知识溢出至外国投资者相一致的证据。

papers.title: Expanding the Measurement of Culture with a Sample of Two Billion Humans
papers.authors: Nick Obradovich, Ömer Özak, Ignacio Martín, Ignacio Ortuño-Ortín, Edmond Awad, Manuel Cebrián, Rubén Cuevas, Klaus Desmet, Iyad Rahwan, Ángel Cuevas
papers.abstract: Culture has played a pivotal role in human evolution. Yet, the ability of social scientists to study culture is limited by the currently available measurement instruments. Scholars of culture must regularly choose between scalable but sparse survey-based methods or restricted but rich ethnographic methods. Here, we demonstrate that massive online social networks can advance the study of human culture by providing quantitative, scalable, and high-resolution measurement of behaviorally revealed cultural values and preferences. We employ publicly available data across nearly 60,000 topic dimensions drawn from two billion Facebook users across 225 countries and territories. We first validate that cultural distances calculated from this measurement instrument correspond to traditional survey-based and objective measures of cross-national cultural differences. We then demonstrate that this expanded measure enables rich insight into the cultural landscape globally at previously impossible resolution. We analyze the importance of national borders in shaping culture, explore unique cultural markers that identify subnational population groups, and compare subnational divisiveness to gender divisiveness across countries. The global collection of massive data on human behavior provides a high-dimensional complement to traditional cultural metrics. Further, the granularity of the measure presents enormous promise to advance scholars' understanding of additional fundamental questions in the social sciences. The measure enables detailed investigation into the geopolitical stability of countries, social cleavages within both small and large-scale human groups, the integration of migrant populations, and the disaffection of certain population groups from the political process, among myriad other potential future applications.
papers.meta: Programs：POL, TWP；JEL：C80, J10, J16, O10, R10, Z10
papers.zh_title: 以二十亿人类样本扩展文化测量
papers.zh_abstract: 文化在人类进化中发挥了关键作用。然而，社会科学家研究文化的能力受到现有测量工具的限制。文化学者通常必须在可扩展但稀疏的基于调查的方法与受限但丰富的民族志方法之间做出选择。在此，我们证明大规模在线社交网络可以通过提供对行为揭示的文化价值观和偏好的定量、可扩展且高分辨率的测量，推动人类文化研究。我们利用来自225个国家和地区20亿Facebook用户的近60,000个主题维度的公开数据。我们首先验证了从该测量工具计算出的文化距离与传统的基于调查和客观的跨国文化差异测量指标相对应。然后，我们证明这种扩展的测量能够以前所未有的分辨率深入洞察全球文化格局。我们分析了国家边界在塑造文化中的重要性，探索了识别次国家级人口群体的独特文化标记，并比较了各国次国家级分歧与性别分歧。全球范围内大规模人类行为数据的收集为传统文化指标提供了高维补充。此外，该测量的粒度为进一步推进学者理解社会科学中其他基本问题带来了巨大希望。该测量能够详细研究国家的地缘政治稳定性、小规模和大规模人类群体内部的社会裂痕、移民人口的融合，以及某些人口群体对政治进程的疏离感，以及其他众多潜在的未来应用。

papers.title: Optimal Financial Transaction Taxes
papers.authors: Eduardo Dávila
papers.abstract: This paper characterizes the optimal transaction tax in an equilibrium model of competitive financial markets. As long as investors hold heterogeneous beliefs that are not related to their fundamental trading motives and the planner calculates welfare using any single belief, a strictly positive tax is optimal, regardless of the magnitude of fundamental trading. Under some conditions, the optimal tax is independent of the belief used by the planner to calculate welfare. The optimal tax can be implemented by adjusting its value until observed total volume equals fundamental volume. Knowledge of i) the share of non-fundamental trading volume and ii) the semi-elasticity of trading volume to tax changes is sufficient to quantify the optimal tax. A calibration of the model consistent with empirically estimated volume semi-elasticities to tax changes and that features a 30% share of non-fundamental trading volume is associated with a 37bps optimal tax.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, PE；JEL：D61, G18, H21
papers.zh_title: 最优金融交易税
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在竞争性金融市场的均衡模型中刻画了最优交易税。只要投资者持有与其基本交易动机无关的异质信念，并且计划者使用任何单一信念计算福利，那么无论基本交易规模如何，严格为正的税收都是最优的。在某些条件下，最优税收独立于计划者用于计算福利的信念。最优税收可以通过调整其值直到观察到的总交易量等于基本交易量来实施。了解(i)非基本交易量的份额和(ii)交易量对税收变化的半弹性足以量化最优税收。一个与经验估计的交易量半弹性一致且具有30%非基本交易量份额的模型校准，对应37个基点的最优税收。

papers.title: Dissertators with Distantly Related Foci Face Divergent Near-Term Outcomes
papers.authors: Kevin M. Kniffin, Andrew S. Hanks, Xuechao Qian, Bo Wang, Bruce A. Weinberg
papers.abstract: Institutional leaders have long championed interdisciplinary research; however, researchers have paid relatively little attention to the people responding to such calls and their subsequent career outcomes. With the benefit of two large datasets spanning from 1986 through 2016, we show that interdisciplinary dissertations have become consistently more common in recent years as institutional leaders have highlighted the value of boundary-spanning research for solving important and emergent problems. With the benefit of survey data from a near-complete population of all dissertators in the US starting in 2001 through 2016, we observe a consistent upward trend in interdisciplinary dissertations. Unfortunately, we show that these interdisciplinary dissertators have experienced a comparably persistent penalty when considering salaries for their first year after earning the PhD. We also show that among interdisciplinary dissertators, individuals in lower-paying fields tend to earn more when choosing distantly related topic-combinations whereas researchers in higher-paying fields tend to be most rewarded for staying within relatively narrow disciplinary silos.
papers.zh_title: 研究焦点相距甚远的博士毕业生面临分化的短期结果
papers.zh_abstract: 机构领导者长期以来一直倡导跨学科研究；然而，研究人员对响应此类号召的人及其后续职业成果关注相对较少。借助1986年至2016年的两个大型数据集，我们表明，近年来随着机构领导者强调跨界研究对于解决重要和新兴问题的价值，跨学科博士论文变得越来越普遍。利用2001年至2016年美国几乎所有博士毕业生的调查数据，我们观察到跨学科博士论文的持续上升趋势。不幸的是，我们发现这些跨学科博士毕业生在获得博士学位后的第一年薪资方面经历了持续性的惩罚。我们还表明，在跨学科博士毕业生中，低薪领域的个体在选择相距较远的主题组合时往往收入更高，而高薪领域的研究人员则倾向于在相对狭窄的学科范围内获得最大回报。

papers.title: Venture Capitalists and COVID-19
papers.authors: Paul Gompers, Will Gornall, Steven N. Kaplan, Ilya A. Strebulaev
papers.abstract: We survey over 1,000 institutional and corporate venture capitalists (VCs) at more than 900 different firms to learn how their decisions and investments have been affected by the COVID-19 pandemic. We compare their survey answers to those provided by a large sample of VCs in early 2016 and analyzed in Gompers, Gornall, Kaplan, and Strebulaev (2020). VCs have slowed their investment pace (71% of normal) and expect to invest at 81% of their normal pace over the coming year. Not surprisingly, they have devoted more time to guiding the portfolio companies through the pandemic. VCs report that 52% of their portfolio companies are positively affected or unaffected by the pandemic; 38% are negatively affected; and 10% are severely negatively affected. Overall, they expect the pandemic to have a small negative effect on their fund IRRs (-1.6%) and MOICs (-0.07). Surprisingly, we find little change in the allocation of their time to helping portfolio companies relative to looking for new investments. In general, we find only modest differences between institutional and corporate VCs.
papers.zh_title: 风险投资家与COVID-19
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了来自900多家不同公司的1000多名机构和企业风险投资家，以了解他们的决策和投资如何受到COVID-19大流行的影响。我们将他们的调查答案与2016年初由Gompers、Gornall、Kaplan和Strebulaev（2020）分析的大量风险投资家样本提供的答案进行了比较。风险投资家已经放慢了投资步伐（为正常的71%），并预计在未来一年以正常速度的81%进行投资。毫不奇怪，他们投入了更多时间来指导投资组合公司度过大流行。风险投资家报告称，其投资组合公司中有52%受到大流行的正面影响或未受影响；38%受到负面影响；10%受到严重负面影响。总体而言，他们预计大流行将对其基金内部收益率（-1.6%）和投资回报倍数（-0.07）产生较小的负面影响。令人惊讶的是，我们发现他们在帮助投资组合公司与寻找新投资之间的时间分配几乎没有变化。总体而言，我们发现机构和企业风险投资家之间只有适度的差异。

papers.title: Intergenerational Mobility in Socio-emotional Skills
papers.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Áureo de Paula, Alessandro Toppeta
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the intergenerational transmission of socio-emotional skills during childhood, using data from the 1970 British Cohort Study (BCS70) in the United Kingdom. This dataset enables us to measure two dimensions of socio-emotional development: internalising and externalising skills. More importantly, we can use multiple measures of parents’ skills collected during both their childhood and their adulthood. Whereas parent-child skills are strongly related when both are measured contemporaneously, they remain correlated when both are measured in childhood, with a stronger transmission observed from mothers to their children. Additionally, by leveraging the BCS70 data on socio-emotional skills for three generations, we estimate multi-generational persistence. Notably, we find a correlation between the grandmother’s internalising skill and the grandchildren’s skills, even after accounting for parental skills.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：D63, I21, J24, J62
papers.zh_title: 社会情感技能的代际流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用英国1970年英国队列研究的数据，调查了儿童时期社会情感技能的代际传递。该数据集使我们能够测量社会情感发展的两个维度：内化技能和外化技能。更重要的是，我们可以利用在父母童年和成年时期收集的多种父母技能测量指标。虽然父母与子女的技能在同时测量时密切相关，但当两者都在童年时期测量时，它们仍然相关，并且观察到从母亲到子女的传递更强。此外，通过利用BCS70关于三代人社会情感技能的数据，我们估计了多代持续性。值得注意的是，我们发现祖母的内化技能与孙辈的技能之间存在相关性，即使在考虑了父母技能之后也是如此。

papers.title: SME Failures Under Large Liquidity Shocks: An Application to the COVID-19 Crisis
papers.authors: Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Veronika Penciakova, Nick Sander
papers.abstract: We study the effects of financial frictions on firm exit when firms face large liquidity shocks. We develop a simple model of firm cost-minimization, where firms’ borrowing capacity to smooth temporary shocks to liquidity is limited. In this framework, firm exit arises from the interaction between this financial friction and fluctuations in cash flow due to aggregate and sectoral changes in demand conditions, as well as more traditional shocks to productivity. To evaluate the implications of our model, we use firm level data on small and medium sized enterprises (SMEs) in 11 European countries. We confirm that our framework is consistent with official failure rates in 2017-2019, a period characterized by standard business cycle fluctuations in demand. To capture a large liquidity shock, we apply our framework to the COVID-19 crisis. We find that, absent government support, SME failure rates would have increased by 6.01 percentage points, putting 3.1 percent of employment at risk. Our results also show that in the presence of financial frictions and in the absence of government support, the firms failing due to COVID have similar productivity and growth to firms that survive COVID.
papers.zh_title: 大型流动性冲击下的中小企业倒闭：以新冠疫情危机为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当企业面临大规模流动性冲击时，金融摩擦对企业退出的影响。我们构建了一个简单的企业成本最小化模型，在该模型中，企业为平滑暂时性流动性冲击而进行借贷的能力是有限的。在此框架下，企业退出源于这种金融摩擦与因总体和行业需求状况变化以及更传统的生产率冲击所导致的现金流波动之间的相互作用。为了评估我们模型的含义，我们使用了11个欧洲国家中小企业的企业层面数据。我们确认，我们的框架与2017-2019年（一个以标准商业周期需求波动为特征的时期）的官方倒闭率是一致的。为了捕捉一次大规模的流动性冲击，我们将我们的框架应用于新冠疫情危机。我们发现，如果没有政府支持，中小企业的倒闭率将上升6.01个百分点，使3.1%的就业面临风险。我们的结果还表明，在存在金融摩擦且缺乏政府支持的情况下，因新冠疫情而倒闭的企业与幸存下来的企业具有相似的生产率和增长水平。

papers.title: Modeling the Consumption Response to the CARES Act
papers.authors: Christopher D. Carroll, Edmund Crawley, Jiri Slacalek, Matthew N. White
papers.abstract: To predict the effects of the 2020 U.S. CARES Act on consumption, we extend a model that matches responses to past consumption stimulus packages. The extension allows us to account for two novel features of the coronavirus crisis. First, during lockdowns, many types of spending are undesirable or impossible. Second, some of the jobs that disappear during the lockdown will not reappear. We estimate that, if the lockdown is short-lived (the median point of view as we are writing in April 2020), the combination of expanded unemployment insurance benefits and stimulus payments should be sufficient to allow a swift recovery in consumer spending to pre-crisis levels. If the lockdown lasts longer (or there is a ‘second wave’), an extension of enhanced unemployment benefits will likely be necessary for consumption spending to recover quickly.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D14, D83, D84, E21, E32
papers.zh_title: 模拟对《CARES法案》的消费反应
papers.zh_abstract: 为了预测2020年美国《CARES法案》对消费的影响，我们扩展了一个能够匹配过去消费刺激计划反应的模型。这一扩展使我们能够考虑新冠疫情危机的两个新特征。首先，在封锁期间，许多类型的消费是不被期望或不可能的。其次，封锁期间消失的部分工作岗位将不会重新出现。我们估计，如果封锁是短暂的（截至2020年4月撰写本文时的中位数观点），扩大的失业保险福利和刺激性支付的组合应该足以使消费者支出迅速恢复到危机前的水平。如果封锁持续时间更长（或者出现“第二波”），那么为了消费支出能够快速复苏，延长增强型失业救济金可能是必要的。

papers.title: Nudging Timely Wage Reporting: Field Experimental Evidence from the United States Social Supplementary Income Program
papers.authors: C. Yiwei Zhang, Jeffrey Hemmeter, Judd B. Kessler, Robert D. Metcalfe, Robert Weathers
papers.abstract: We study a large-scale (n=50,000) natural field experiment implemented by the U.S. Social Security Administration that was aimed at increasing the timely and accurate self-reporting of wages by Supplemental Security Income (SSI) recipients. Sending a letter reminding SSI recipients of their wage reporting responsibilities significantly increased both the likelihood of reporting any earnings and the total amount of earnings reported, though this effect decays slightly over time. However, the specific letter content—providing social information or highlighting the salience of penalties—had no systematic effect. We develop a conservative estimate that the letters generated roughly $5.91 in savings on average per dollar spent for the U.S. government.
papers.zh_title: 助推及时工资报告：来自美国社会补充收入计划的实地实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项由美国社会保障局实施的大规模（n=50,000）自然实地实验，该实验旨在提高补充保障收入领取者及时准确地自我报告工资的水平。向补充保障收入领取者发送一封提醒其工资报告责任的信件，显著增加了报告任何收入的可能性以及报告的收入总额，尽管这种效应会随时间略有衰减。然而，具体的信件内容——提供社会信息或强调惩罚的显著性——没有产生系统性影响。我们得出一个保守估计，即这些信件平均每花费1美元，为美国政府节省了大约5.91美元。

papers.title: The International Propagation of Economic Downturns Through Multinational Companies: The Real Economy Channel
papers.authors: Jan Bena, Serdar Dinc, Isil Erel
papers.abstract: We study how non-financial multinational companies propagate economic declines from their subsidiaries located in countries experiencing an economic downturn to subsidiaries in countries not experiencing one. We find that investment is 18% lower in subsidiaries of these parents relative to the same-industry, same-country subsidiaries of parents that are headquartered in the same parent country but do not have a subsidiary in a country experiencing an economic downturn. The employment growth rate in the affected subsidiaries is zero or negative while it is 1.4% in the subsidiaries of unaffected parents. The aggregate industry-level sales and employment are also negatively impacted in the countries of the affected subsidiaries.
papers.zh_title: 经济衰退通过跨国公司的国际传导：实体经济渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了非金融跨国公司如何将经济衰退从其位于经历经济衰退国家的子公司传导至位于未经历经济衰退国家的子公司。我们发现，与那些总部位于同一母公司国家、但在经历经济衰退国家没有子公司、且处于相同行业和相同国家的母公司子公司相比，这些母公司子公司的投资要低18%。受影响子公司的就业增长率为零或负值，而未受影响母公司子公司的就业增长率为1.4%。在受影响子公司所在国家，总体行业层面的销售额和就业也受到负面影响。

papers.title: A Theory of Foreign Exchange Interventions
papers.authors: Sebastián Fanelli, Ludwig Straub
papers.abstract: We study a real small open economy with two key ingredients: (i) partial segmentation of home and foreign bond markets and (ii) a pecuniary externality that makes the real exchange rate excessively volatile in response to capital flows. Partial segmentation implies that, by intervening in the bond markets, the central bank can affect the exchange rate and the spread between home- and foreign-bond yields. Such interventions allow the central bank to address the pecuniary externality, but they are also costly, as foreigners make carry-trade profits. We analytically characterize the optimal intervention policy that solves this trade-off: (a) the optimal policy leans against the wind, stabilizing the exchange rate; (b) it involves smooth spreads but allows exchange rates to jump; (c) it partly relies on “forward guidance”, with non-zero interventions even after the shock has subsided; (d) it requires credibility, in that central banks do not intervene without commitment. Finally, we shed light on the global consequences of widespread interventions, using a multi-country extension of our model. We find that, left to themselves, countries over-accumulate reserves, reducing welfare and leading to inefficiently low world interest rates.
papers.zh_title: 外汇干预理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个具有两个关键特征的真实小型开放经济体：（i）国内和国外债券市场的部分分割，以及（ii）一种货币外部性，使得实际汇率对资本流动的反应过度波动。部分分割意味着，通过干预债券市场，中央银行可以影响汇率以及国内和国外债券收益率之间的利差。这种干预使中央银行能够解决货币外部性，但也是有代价的，因为外国投资者会进行套利交易获利。我们分析性地刻画了解决这一权衡的最优干预政策：（a）最优政策是逆风而行，稳定汇率；（b）它涉及平滑的利差，但允许汇率跳跃；（c）它部分依赖于“前瞻性指引”，即使在冲击消退后仍进行非零干预；（d）它需要可信度，即没有承诺的中央银行不会进行干预。最后，我们利用模型的多国扩展，揭示了广泛干预的全球后果。我们发现，如果放任自流，各国会过度积累储备，降低福利并导致世界利率低效地偏低。

papers.title: Impediments to the Schumpeterian Process in the Replacement of Large Firms
papers.authors: Mara Faccio, John J. McConnell
papers.abstract: Using newly-assembled data encompassing up to 75 countries and starting circa 1910, we find that the Schumpeterian process of creative destruction aptly describes the replacement of large firms by other firms, but exceptions to the norm of replacement are not rare and replacement is often not by new firms. Initial firm size and political connections represent the main obstacles to the Schumpeterian process while board interlocks and a corporate culture of innovation play modest roles. Consistent with a theory of political capture, when accompanied by regulations that restrict entry, political connections play a formidable role in abetting large firms remaining large.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, POL；JEL：G3, G38, O16, P16
papers.zh_title: 大型企业更替中熊彼特过程的障碍
papers.zh_abstract: 利用新汇编的、涵盖多达75个国家且起始于1910年左右的数据，我们发现熊彼特的创造性破坏过程恰当地描述了大型企业被其他企业所取代的现象，但不符合更替常态的例外情况并不罕见，而且更替往往不是由新企业完成的。初始企业规模和政治关联是熊彼特过程的主要障碍，而董事会连锁和企业创新文化的作用则较为温和。与政治俘获理论一致，当伴随着限制进入的监管时，政治关联在助长大型企业保持其规模方面发挥着巨大作用。

papers.title: Long-run Returns to Private Equity in Emerging Markets
papers.authors: Shawn Cole, Martin Melecky, Florian Mölders, Tristan Reed
papers.abstract: We provide the first evidence on the long-run returns to private equity in emerging and frontier markets using the cash flows from every equity investment made by the International Finance Corporation across 130 countries over 58 years. Risk-adjusted returns are comparable to the S&P 500, at least from 1961 until 2010. Returns improve with economic growth, but decline as banking systems deepen and countries relax capital controls. These results are consistent with the thesis that financial frictions have prevented the flow of capital from rich to poor countries, and that the persistence of impact investors’ performance may rely on identifying or creating new markets that lack access to capital.
papers.zh_title: 新兴市场私募股权的长期回报
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用国际金融公司在130个国家58年间每笔股权投资产生的现金流，首次提供了新兴市场和前沿市场私募股权长期回报的证据。至少从1961年到2010年，风险调整后的回报与标普500指数相当。回报随着经济增长而改善，但随着银行体系深化和各国放松资本管制而下降。这些结果与以下论点一致：金融摩擦阻碍了资本从富国流向穷国，并且影响力投资者的持续表现可能依赖于识别或创造缺乏资本准入的新市场。

papers.title: Is the Selfish Life-Cycle Model More Applicable in Japan and, If So, Why? A Literature Survey
papers.authors: Charles Yuji Horioka
papers.abstract: The selfish life-cycle model or hypothesis is, together with the dynasty or altruism model, the most widely used theoretical model of household behavior in economics, but does this model apply in the case of a country like Japan, which is said to have closer family ties than other countries? In this paper, we first provide a brief exposition of the simplest version of the selfish life-cycle model and then survey the literature on household saving and bequest behavior in Japan in order to answer this question. The paper finds that almost all of the available evidence suggests that the selfish life-cycle model applies to at least some extent in all countries but that there is more consistent support for this model in Japan than in the United States and other countries. It then explores possible explanations for why the life-cycle model is more consistently supported in Japan than in other countries, attributing this finding to government policies, institutional factors, economic factors, demographic factors, and cultural factors. Finally, it shows that the findings of the paper have many important implications for economic modeling and for government tax and expenditure policies.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：D11, D12, D14, D15, D64, E21, J14
papers.zh_title: 自私的生命周期模型在日本是否更适用？如果是，为什么？一项文献综述
papers.zh_abstract: 自私的生命周期模型或假说，与王朝模型或利他主义模型一起，是经济学中最常用的家庭行为理论模型，但这个模型是否适用于像日本这样据说家庭纽带比其他国更紧密的国家？在本文中，我们首先简要阐述了最简单的自私生命周期模型版本，然后为了回答这个问题，我们调查了关于日本家庭储蓄和遗赠行为的文献。本文发现，几乎所有可获得的证据都表明，自私的生命周期模型至少在一定程度上适用于所有国家，但该模型在日本得到的支持比在美国和其他国家更为一致。然后，本文探讨了生命周期模型在日本比在其他国家得到更一致支持的可能解释，将此发现归因于政府政策、制度因素、经济因素、人口因素和文化因素。最后，本文表明，该研究的发现对经济建模以及政府税收和支出政策具有许多重要启示。

papers.title: Health Insurance Menu Design for Large Employers
papers.authors: Kate Ho, Robin S. Lee
papers.abstract: We provide a framework for large employers designing a menu of health plan offerings that differ on both financial and non-financial dimensions. Using detailed administrative data from Harvard University, we estimate a model of plan choice and utilization, and evaluate the benefits of cost sharing and plan variety. For this population of employed consumers, and a single plan with a generous out-of-pocket maximum and zero deductible, we find that modest cost sharing of approximately 30% maximizes average employee surplus. Further gains from offering choice are limited if based solely on financial characteristics, but can be meaningful if paired with differentiation along other dimensions where consumer preferences are correlated with efficient coverage levels.
papers.zh_title: 大型雇主的健康保险菜单设计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为大型雇主设计一个在财务和非财务维度上均有差异的健康保险计划菜单提供了分析框架。利用哈佛大学的详细行政数据，我们估计了一个计划选择与利用模型，并评估了成本分摊和计划多样性的收益。对于这一就业消费者群体，以及一个设有慷慨自付上限和零免赔额的单一计划，我们发现大约30%的适度成本分摊能最大化平均员工剩余。如果仅基于财务特征提供选择，其额外收益有限；但如果与消费者偏好与有效保障水平相关的其他维度差异化相结合，则可能具有实际意义。

papers.title: Firm-Level Risk Exposures and Stock Returns in the Wake of COVID-19
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis, Stephen Hansen, Cristhian Seminario-Amez
papers.abstract: Firm-level stock returns differ enormously in reaction to COVID-19 news. We characterize these reactions using the Risk Factors discussions in pre-pandemic 10-K filings and two text-analytic approaches: expert-curated dictionaries and supervised machine learning (ML). Bad COVID-19 news lowers returns for firms with high exposures to travel, traditional retail, aircraft production and energy supply—directly and via downstream demand linkages—and raises them for firms with high exposures to healthcare policy, e-commerce, web services, drug trials and materials that feed into supply chains for semiconductors, cloud computing and telecommunications. Monetary and fiscal policy responses to the pandemic strongly impact firm-level returns as well, but differently than pandemic news. Despite methodological differences, dictionary and ML approaches yield remarkably congruent return predictions. Importantly though, ML operates on a vastly larger feature space, yielding richer characterizations of risk exposures and outperforming the dictionary approach in goodness-of-fit. By integrating elements of both approaches, we uncover new risk factors and sharpen our explanations for firm-level returns. To illustrate the broader utility of our methods, we also apply them to explain firm-level returns in reaction to the March 2020 Super Tuesday election results.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19冲击下的企业层面风险暴露与股票回报
papers.zh_abstract: 企业层面的股票回报对COVID-19新闻的反应差异巨大。我们利用疫情前10-K文件中的风险因素讨论以及两种文本分析方法——专家策划词典和监督机器学习——来刻画这些反应。负面COVID-19新闻降低了那些对旅游、传统零售、飞机生产和能源供应（直接及通过下游需求关联）有高暴露企业的回报，同时提高了那些对医疗政策、电子商务、网络服务、药物试验以及半导体、云计算和电信供应链中投入材料有高暴露企业的回报。应对疫情的货币和财政政策也强烈影响企业层面回报，但其影响方式与疫情新闻不同。尽管方法存在差异，词典和机器学习方法得出了显著一致的回报预测。然而，重要的是，机器学习在远为庞大的特征空间上运行，提供了更丰富的风险暴露刻画，并在拟合优度上优于词典方法。通过整合两种方法的要素，我们发现了新的风险因素，并增强了对企业层面回报的解释。为说明我们方法的更广泛实用性，我们还将其应用于解释2020年3月超级星期二选举结果引发的企业层面回报。

papers.title: The Wisdom of the Robinhood Crowd
papers.authors: Ivo Welch
papers.abstract: Robinhood (RH) investors collectively increased their holdings in the March 2020 COVID bear market, indicating an absence of panic and margin calls. Their steadfastness was rewarded in the subsequent bull market. Despite unusual interest in some “experience” stocks, their aggregated consensus portfolio (likely mimicking the household-equal-weighted portfolio) primarily tilted towards stocks with high past share volume and dollar-trading volume. These were mostly big stocks. Both their timing and their consensus portfolio performed well from mid-2018 to mid-2020.
papers.zh_title: Robinhood群体的智慧
papers.zh_abstract: Robinhood投资者在2020年3月的COVID熊市中集体增加了持仓，表明没有出现恐慌和追加保证金的情况。他们的坚定在随后的牛市中获得了回报。尽管对一些“体验”股票表现出异常兴趣，他们汇总的共识投资组合（可能模仿家庭等权重投资组合）主要偏向于过去高成交量和美元交易量的股票，这些大多是大型股票。从2018年中到2020年中，他们的择时和共识投资组合表现良好。

papers.title: COVID-19 Changed Tastes for Safety-Net Programs
papers.authors: Alex Rees-Jones, John D'Attoma, Amedeo Piolatto, Luca Salvadori
papers.abstract: In June 2020, we surveyed 2,516 Americans regarding their preferences for both short- and long-term expansions to government-provided healthcare and unemployment insurance programs. We find that support for such programs is positively associated with (a) COVID-19 deaths and infections in the respondent’s county, (b) the pandemic-induced change in the unemployment rate in the respondent’s county, and (c) survey elicitations of the respondent’s perceptions of COVID-19’s consequences. These associations persist when controlling for pre-COVID-19 political ideology and demographics. These results suggest that real or perceived exposure to COVID-19’s consequences has influenced support for expansions to the U.S. safety-net system.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19改变了人们对安全网项目的偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年6月，我们对2516名美国人进行了调查，了解他们对政府提供的医疗和失业保险项目短期和长期扩张的偏好。我们发现，对这些项目的支持与以下因素正相关：（a）受访者所在县的COVID-19死亡和感染人数，（b）疫情导致的受访者所在县失业率变化，以及（c）调查中受访者对COVID-19后果的感知。这些关联在控制疫情前的政治意识形态和人口统计特征后仍然存在。这些结果表明，对COVID-19后果的真实或感知暴露影响了人们对美国安全网系统扩张的支持。

papers.title: Cross-Sectional Uncertainty and the Business Cycle: Evidence from 40 Years of Options Data
papers.authors: Ian Dew-Becker, Stefano Giglio
papers.abstract: This paper presents a novel and unique measure of cross-sectional uncertainty constructed from stock options on individual firms. Cross-sectional uncertainty varied little between 1980 and 1995, and subsequently had three distinct peaks -- during the tech boom, the financial crisis, and the coronavirus epidemic. Cross-sectional uncertainty has had a mixed relationship with overall economic activity, and aggregate uncertainty is much more powerful for forecasting aggregate growth. The data and moments can be used to calibrate and test structural models of the effects of uncertainty shocks. In international data, we find similar dynamics and a strong common factor in cross-sectional uncertainty. The data is available on our websites. A companion paper [Dew-Becker and Giglio, "Real-time forward-looking skewness over the business cycle"] finds firm-level skewness is significantly procyclical.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：C58, D81, D84, E22, E30, E32, E37, G13
papers.zh_title: 横截面不确定性与经济周期：来自40年期权数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种新颖且独特的横截面不确定性度量，该度量基于个股的股票期权构建。横截面不确定性在1980年至1995年间变化不大，随后出现了三个明显的峰值——在科技繁荣、金融危机和冠状病毒疫情期间。横截面不确定性与整体经济活动的关系复杂，而总体不确定性在预测总体增长方面更为有力。这些数据和矩可用于校准和检验不确定性冲击效应的结构模型。在国际数据中，我们发现了类似的动态特征以及横截面不确定性中一个强大的共同因子。数据可在我们的网站上获取。一篇配套论文[Dew-Becker and Giglio, "Real-time forward-looking skewness over the business cycle"]发现企业层面的偏度具有显著的顺周期性。

papers.title: A Calculation of the Social Returns to Innovation
papers.authors: Benjamin F. Jones, Lawrence H. Summers
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the social returns to investments in innovation. The disparate spillovers associated with innovation, including imitation, business stealing, and intertemporal spillovers, have made calculations of the social returns difficult. Here we provide an economy-wide calculation that nets out the many spillover margins. We further assess the role of capital investment, diffusion delays, learning-by-doing, productivity mismeasurement, health outcomes, and international spillovers in assessing the average social returns. Overall, our estimates suggest that the social returns are very large. Even under conservative assumptions, innovation efforts produce social benefits that are many multiples of the investment costs.
papers.zh_title: 创新社会回报的计算
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估算了创新投资的社会回报。与创新相关的各种溢出效应，包括模仿、商业窃取和跨期溢出，使得社会回报的计算变得困难。在此，我们提供了一种全经济范围的核算方法，剔除了众多溢出渠道。我们进一步评估了资本投资、扩散延迟、干中学、生产率测量误差、健康结果和国际溢出在评估平均社会回报中的作用。总体而言，我们的估计表明社会回报非常大。即使在保守假设下，创新努力产生的社会收益也是投资成本的数倍。

papers.title: Tapping into Talent: Coupling Education and Innovation Policies for Economic Growth
papers.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Jeremy G. Pearce, Marta Prato
papers.abstract: How do innovation and education policy affect individual career choice and aggregate productivity? This paper analyzes the various layers that connect R&D subsidies and higher education policy to productivity growth. We put the development of scarce talent and career choice at the center of a new endogenous growth framework with individual-level heterogeneity in talent, frictions, and preferences. We link the model to micro-level data from Denmark and uncover a host of facts about the links between talent, higher education, and innovation. We use these facts to calibrate the model and study counterfactual policy exercises. We find that R&D subsidies, while less effective than standard models, can be strengthened when combined with higher education policy that alleviates financial frictions for talented youth. Education and innovation policies not only alleviate different frictions, but also impact innovation at different time horizons. Education policy is also more effective in societies with high income inequality.
papers.zh_title: 挖掘人才：耦合教育与创新政策促进经济增长
papers.zh_abstract: 创新和教育政策如何影响个人职业选择和总体生产率？本文分析了连接研发补贴和高等教育政策与生产率增长的各个层面。我们将稀缺人才的培养和职业选择置于一个新的内生增长框架中心，该框架包含个体层面的人才异质性、摩擦和偏好。我们将模型与丹麦的微观数据联系起来，揭示了关于人才、高等教育和创新之间联系的一系列事实。我们利用这些事实校准模型并研究反事实政策实验。我们发现，研发补贴虽然不如标准模型有效，但当与缓解有才华青年财务摩擦的高等教育政策相结合时，其效果可以得到加强。教育和创新政策不仅缓解不同的摩擦，而且在不同时间范围内影响创新。在收入不平等程度较高的社会中，教育政策也更为有效。

papers.title: Does Fiscal Policy Matter for Stock-Bond Return Correlation?
papers.authors: Erica X.N. Li, Tao Zha, Ji Zhang, Hao Zhou
papers.abstract: We explore an important role of monetary-fiscal policy interactions in explaining three stylized facts: (1) a positive correlation of stock and bond returns in 1971-2001 and a negative one after 2001, (2) a negative correlation of consumption and inflation in 1971-2001 and a positive one after 2001, and (3) the coexistence of a positive bond risk premium and a negative correlation of stock and bond returns. Our general equilibrium model shows that these correlation changes across two policy regimes are driven by a combination of technology and investment shocks, while positive risk premiums are driven by the technology shock only.\n
papers.zh_title: 财政政策对股债收益相关性重要吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了货币-财政政策互动在解释三个典型事实中的重要作用：（1）1971-2001年股债收益正相关，2001年后负相关；（2）1971-2001年消费与通胀负相关，2001年后正相关；（3）正债券风险溢价与股债收益负相关并存。我们的一般均衡模型表明，这两个政策制度下的相关性变化是由技术和投资冲击的组合驱动的，而正风险溢价仅由技术冲击驱动。

papers.title: Behavioral Biases are Temporally Stable
papers.authors: Victor Stango, Jonathan Zinman
papers.abstract: Social scientists often consider temporal stability when assessing the usefulness of a construct and its measures, but whether behavioral biases display such stability is relatively unknown. We estimate stability for 25 biases, in a nationally representative sample, using repeated elicitations three years apart. Bias level indicators are largely stable in the aggregate and within-person. Within-person intertemporal rank correlations imply moderate stability and increase dramatically when using other biases as instrumental variables. Additional results reinforce three key inferences: biases are stable, accounting for classical measurement error in bias elicitation data is important, and eliciting multiple measures of multiple biases is valuable.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, DEV, EEE, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：C36, C81, D90, E70
papers.zh_title: 行为偏差具有时间稳定性
papers.zh_abstract: 社会科学家在评估一个构念及其测量方法的有用性时，通常会考虑时间稳定性，但行为偏差是否表现出这种稳定性却相对未知。我们利用一个具有全国代表性的样本，通过相隔三年的重复诱发实验，估计了25种偏差的稳定性。偏差水平指标在总体层面和个体内部基本保持稳定。个体内部的跨期秩相关表明稳定性适中，但在使用其他偏差作为工具变量时，这种稳定性会显著提高。其他结果进一步强化了三个关键推论：偏差是稳定的，在偏差诱发数据中考虑经典测量误差很重要，以及同时诱发多种偏差的多个测量指标是有价值的。

papers.title: A Return Based Measure of Firm Quality
papers.authors: Ravi Jagannathan, Yang Zhang
papers.abstract: We show that superior performance relative to peers during stressful times identifies higher quality firms as measured by conventional historical financial statement based measures as well as default probability measures. Quality measured this way is persistent, but different from price momentum. Further, a managed portfolio that takes a long position in top quintile (Stable) firms and a short position in bottom quintile (Vulnerable) firms earns superior risk adjusted returns in excess of the risk-free rate. The portfolio has an annualized Fama and French three-factor alpha of 5.2% (t=5.04) and a five-factor alpha of 3.3% (t=3.38)
papers.zh_title: 基于回报的企业质量衡量指标
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在压力时期相对于同行的卓越表现能够识别出更高质量的企业，这些企业通过传统的基于历史财务报表的衡量指标以及违约概率指标来衡量。以这种方式衡量的质量具有持续性，但与价格动量不同。此外，一个持有最高五分位（稳定）企业多头头寸和最低五分位（脆弱）企业空头头寸的管理型投资组合，能够获得超过无风险利率的经风险调整后的超额收益。该投资组合的年化Fama-French三因子阿尔法为5.2%（t=5.04），五因子阿尔法为3.3%（t=3.38）。

papers.title: The Aggregate Demand for Bank Capital
papers.authors: Milton Harris, Christian Opp, Marcus Opp
papers.abstract: We propose a novel conceptual approach to transparently characterizing credit market outcomes in economies with multi-dimensional borrower heterogeneity. Based on characterizations of securities' implicit demand for bank equity capital, we obtain closed-form expressions for the composition of credit, including a sufficient statistic for the provision of bank loans, and a novel cross-sectional asset pricing relation for securities held by regulated levered institutions. Our framework sheds light on the compositional shifts in credit prior to the 07/08 financial crisis and the European debt crisis, and can provide guidance on the allocative effects of shocks affecting both banks and the cross-sectional distribution of borrowers.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：G12, G21, G23, G28
papers.zh_title: 银行资本的总体需求
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的概念方法，用于透明地刻画具有多维借款人异质性的经济体中的信贷市场结果。基于对证券隐含的银行股权资本需求的特征描述，我们得到了信贷构成的闭式表达式，包括一个用于衡量银行贷款供给的充分统计量，以及一个适用于受监管杠杆机构持有的证券的横截面资产定价关系。我们的框架揭示了07/08金融危机和欧洲债务危机之前信贷构成的转变，并可以为同时影响银行和借款人横截面分布的冲击的配置效应提供指导。

papers.title: Worker Empowerment and Subjective Evaluation: On Building an Effective Conflict Culture
papers.authors: W. Bentley MacLeod, Victoria Valle Lara, Christian Zehnder
papers.abstract: Although conflicts typically lead to a waste of resources, organizations may still benefit from a corporate culture that tolerates or even encourages conflicts. The reason is that coordinated conflicts may help to enforce informal contracts and foster cooperation. In this paper we report results of a series of laboratory experiments designed to explore whether and under what conditions an efficiency-enhancing conflict culture can emerge. Using a principal-worker setup with subjective performance evaluation, we show that establishing a functional conflict culture is a delicate matter. If conflicts are encouraged in a careless, hands-off manner, the destructive side of conflicts is likely to dominate. To be successful a conflict culture requires a careful management of fairness norms. In our experiment we find that conflicts have positive net effects on efficiency only if an explicit code of conduct is established and conflicts are institutionalized through a grievance process. Thus, providing workers with more power may be a necessary but not sufficient condition for improving productivity when performance evaluations are subjective.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS；JEL：D02, D03, J33, J41, M5, M52
papers.zh_title: 员工赋权与主观评价：构建有效的冲突文化
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管冲突通常会导致资源浪费，但组织仍可能从容忍甚至鼓励冲突的企业文化中受益。原因是协调一致的冲突可能有助于执行非正式契约并促进合作。在本文中，我们报告了一系列实验室实验的结果，旨在探讨效率提升型冲突文化是否以及在何种条件下能够出现。我们采用带有主观绩效评估的委托-员工设置，表明建立功能性冲突文化是一件微妙的事情。如果以粗放、不干预的方式鼓励冲突，冲突的破坏性一面很可能占据主导。要成功建立冲突文化，需要谨慎管理公平规范。在我们的实验中，我们发现只有当建立了明确的行为准则并且通过申诉程序将冲突制度化时，冲突才能对效率产生正向净效应。因此，当绩效评估是主观的时，赋予员工更多权力可能是提高生产力的必要条件，但并非充分条件。

papers.title: Why Does the Fed Move Markets so Much? A Model of Monetary Policy and Time-Varying Risk Aversion
papers.authors: Carolin Pflueger, Gianluca Rinaldi
papers.abstract: We build a new model integrating a work-horse New Keynesian model with investor risk aversion that moves with the business cycle. We show that the same habit preferences that explain the equity volatility puzzle in quarterly data also naturally explain the large high-frequency stock response to Federal Funds rate surprises. In the model, a surprise increase in the short-term interest rate lowers output and consumption relative to habit, thereby raising risk aversion and amplifying the fall in stocks. The model explains the positive correlation between changes in breakeven inflation and stock returns around monetary policy announcements with long-term inflation news.
papers.zh_title: 为什么美联储对市场影响如此之大？一个货币政策与时变风险厌恶的模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个新模型，将经典的新凯恩斯模型与随经济周期变动的投资者风险厌恶相结合。我们表明，能够解释季度数据中股权波动之谜的相同习惯偏好，也自然能够解释股票对联邦基金利率意外变动的大幅高频反应。在该模型中，短期利率的意外上升会降低产出和消费（相对于习惯水平），从而提高风险厌恶程度并放大股票下跌。该模型用长期通胀新闻解释了在货币政策公告前后，盈亏平衡通胀率变化与股票回报之间的正相关关系。

papers.title: A Counterfactual Economic Analysis of Covid-19 Using a Threshold Augmented Multi-Country Model
papers.authors: Alexander Chudik, Kamiar Mohaddes, M. Hashem Pesaran, Mehdi Raissi, Alessandro Rebucci
papers.abstract: This paper develops a threshold-augmented dynamic multi-country model (TGVAR) to quantify the macroeconomic effects of Covid-19. We show that there exist threshold effects in the relationship between output growth and excess global volatility at individual country levels in a significant majority of advanced economies and in the case of several emerging markets. We then estimate a more general multi-country model augmented with these threshold effects as well as long term interest rates, oil prices, exchange rates and equity returns to perform counterfactual analyses. We distinguish common global factors from trade-related spillovers, and identify the Covid-19 shock using GDP growth forecast revisions of the IMF in 2020Q1. We account for sample uncertainty by bootstrapping the multi-country model estimated over four decades of quarterly observations. Our results show that the Covid-19 pandemic will lead to a significant fall in world output that is most likely long-lasting, with outcomes that are quite heterogeneous across countries and regions. While the impact on China and other emerging Asian economies are estimated to be less severe, the United States, the United Kingdom, and several other advanced economies may experience deeper and longer-lasting effects. Non-Asian emerging markets stand out for their vulnerability. We show that no country is immune to the economic fallout of the pandemic because of global interconnections as evidenced by the case of Sweden. We also find that long-term interest rates could fall significantly below their recent lows in core advanced economies, but this does not seem to be the case in emerging markets.
papers.zh_title: 使用阈值增强的多国模型对新冠疫情进行反事实经济分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一个阈值增强的动态多国模型（TGVAR），以量化新冠疫情（Covid-19）的宏观经济影响。我们表明，在绝大多数发达经济体和一些新兴市场国家中，产出增长与全球超额波动率之间的关系存在阈值效应。然后，我们估计了一个更一般的多国模型，该模型加入了这些阈值效应以及长期利率、油价、汇率和股票回报，以进行反事实分析。我们区分了共同的全球因素和与贸易相关的溢出效应，并使用国际货币基金组织（IMF）在2020年第一季度对GDP增长预测的修正来识别新冠疫情冲击。我们通过对基于四十年季度观测数据估计的多国模型进行自助法（bootstrap）来考虑样本不确定性。我们的结果表明，新冠疫情将导致世界产出显著下降，且这种下降很可能持续很长时间，各国和各地区的结果差异很大。虽然对中国和其他亚洲新兴经济体的影响估计较轻，但美国、英国和其他几个发达经济体可能经历更深重和更持久的影响。非亚洲新兴市场因其脆弱性而尤为突出。我们表明，由于全球互联性，没有哪个国家能免受疫情的经济冲击，瑞典的情况就证明了这一点。我们还发现，核心发达经济体的长期利率可能大幅低于其近期低点，但新兴市场似乎并非如此。

papers.title: War, Socialism and the Rise of Fascism: An Empirical Exploration
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Giuseppe De Feo, Giacomo De Luca, Gianluca Russo
papers.abstract: The recent ascent of right-wing populist movements in many countries has rekindled interest in understanding the causes of the rise of Fascism in inter-war years. In this paper, we argue that there was a strong link between the surge of support for the Socialist Party after World War I (WWI) and the subsequent emergence of Fascism in Italy. We first develop a source of variation in Socialist support across Italian municipalities in the 1919 election based on war casualties from the area. We show that these casualties are unrelated to a battery of political, economic and social variables before the war and had a major impact on Socialist support (partly because the Socialists were the main anti-war political movement). Our main result is that this boost to Socialist support (that is “exogenous” to the prior political leaning of the municipality) led to greater local Fascist activity as measured by local party branches and Fascist political violence (squadrismo), and to significantly larger vote share of the Fascist Party in the 1924 election. We document that the increase in the vote share of the Fascist Party was not at the expense of the Socialist Party and instead came from right-wing parties, thus supporting our interpretation that center-right and right-wing voters coalesced around the Fascist Party because of the “red scare”. We also show that the veterans did not consistently support the Fascist Party and there is no evidence for greater nationalist sentiment in areas with more casualties. We provide evidence that landowner associations and greater presence of local elites played an important role in the rise of Fascism. Finally, we find greater likelihood of Jewish deportations in 1943-45 and lower vote share for Christian Democrats after World War II in areas with greater early Fascist activity.
papers.zh_title: 战争、社会主义与法西斯主义的兴起：一项实证探索
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来许多国家右翼民粹主义运动的兴起，重新激发了人们对理解两次世界大战期间法西斯主义兴起原因的兴趣。在本文中，我们认为，第一次世界大战后社会主义党支持率的激增与意大利随后法西斯主义的出现之间存在紧密联系。我们首先基于该地区的战争伤亡人数，构建了1919年选举中意大利各市镇社会主义支持率的一个变异来源。我们表明，这些伤亡人数与战前的一系列政治、经济和社会变量无关，并对社会主义支持率产生了重大影响（部分原因是社会主义者是主要的反战政治运动）。我们的主要结果是，这种对社会主义支持率的提升（相对于该市镇先前的政治倾向是“外生的”）导致了更大的地方法西斯活动，表现为地方党支部和法西斯政治暴力（squadrismo），并在1924年选举中显著增加了法西斯党的得票率。我们记录到，法西斯党得票率的增加并非以牺牲社会主义党为代价，而是来自右翼政党，这支持了我们的解释，即中右翼和右翼选民因“红色恐慌”而团结在法西斯党周围。我们还表明，退伍军人并未一致支持法西斯党，也没有证据表明伤亡人数更多的地区存在更强的民族主义情绪。我们提供了证据，表明地主协会和更多地方精英的存在在法西斯主义的兴起中发挥了重要作用。最后，我们发现，在早期法西斯活动更活跃的地区，1943-45年犹太人被驱逐的可能性更大，二战后基督教民主党的得票率也更低。

papers.title: What Is CEO Overconfidence? Evidence from Executive Assessments
papers.authors: Steven N. Kaplan, Morten Sorensen, Anastasia A. Zakolyukina
papers.abstract: We use detailed assessments of CEO personalities to explore the option-based measure of CEO overconfidence, Longholder, introduced by Malmendier and Tate (2005a) and widely used in the behavioral corporate finance and economics literatures. Longholder is significantly related to several specific characteristics and is negatively related to general ability. These relations also hold for overconfidence measures derived from CEOs’ earnings guidance. Investment-cash flow sensitivities are larger for both Longholder and less able CEOs. Overall, Longholder CEOs have many of the same characteristics traditionally associated with overconfident individuals, including lower general ability, supporting the interpretation of this measure as reflecting overconfidence.
papers.zh_title: 什么是CEO过度自信？来自高管评估的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用对CEO个性的详细评估，来探讨由Malmendier和Tate（2005a）提出并在行为公司金融和经济学文献中广泛使用的基于期权的CEO过度自信衡量指标——Longholder。Longholder与几个特定特征显著相关，并且与一般能力负相关。这些关系也适用于从CEO盈利指引中得出的过度自信衡量指标。投资-现金流敏感性对于Longholder型CEO和能力较弱的CEO都更大。总体而言，Longholder型CEO具有许多传统上与过度自信个体相关的相同特征，包括较低的一般能力，这支持了将该指标解释为反映过度自信的观点。

papers.title: Institutional Change and Institutional Persistence
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Georgy Egorov, Konstantin Sonin
papers.abstract: In this essay, we provide a simple conceptual framework to elucidate the forces that lead to institutional persistence and change. Our framework is based on a dynamic game between different groups, who care both about current policies and institutions and future policies, which are themselves determined by current institutional choices, and clarifies the forces that lead to the most extreme form of institutional persistence (“institutional stasis”) and the potential drivers of institutional change. We further study the strategic stability of institutions, which arises when institutions persist because of fear of subsequent, less beneficial changes that would follow initial reforms. More importantly, we emphasize that, despite the popularity of ideas based on institutional stasis in the economics and political science literatures, most institutions are in a constant state of flux, but their trajectory may still be shaped by past institutional choices, thus exhibiting “path-dependent change”, so that initial conditions determine both the subsequent trajectories of institutions and how they respond to shocks. We conclude the essay by discussing how institutions can be designed to bolster stability, the relationship between social mobility and institutions, and the interplay between culture and institutions.
papers.meta: Programs：POL；JEL：C73, D72, D74, N10, N40, P16
papers.zh_title: 制度变迁与制度持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了一个简单的概念框架，用以阐明导致制度持续性与制度变迁的力量。该框架基于不同群体之间的动态博弈，这些群体既关心当前的政策和制度，也关心未来的政策——而未来政策本身又由当前的制度选择决定。框架阐明了导致最极端制度持续性形式（“制度停滞”）的力量，以及制度变迁的潜在驱动因素。我们进一步研究了制度的战略稳定性，这种稳定性产生于制度因担心初始改革后可能出现的、后续不利变化而得以持续。更重要的是，我们强调，尽管基于制度停滞的观点在经济学和政治学文献中颇为流行，但大多数制度实际上处于持续变动状态，不过其轨迹仍可能受到过去制度选择的影响，从而表现出“路径依赖式变迁”，即初始条件既决定了制度的后续演进轨迹，也决定了制度如何应对冲击。最后，我们讨论了如何设计制度以增强稳定性、社会流动性与制度之间的关系，以及文化与制度之间的相互作用。

papers.title: Crisis Innovation
papers.authors: Tania Babina, Asaf Bernstein, Filippo Mezzanotti
papers.abstract: The effect of financial crises on innovation is an unsettled and important question for economic growth, but one difficult to answer with modern data. Using a differences-in-differences design surrounding the Great Depression, we document that local distress caused a sudden and persistent decline in patenting by the largest organizational form of innovation at this time—technological entrepreneurs. Parallel trends prior to the shock, evidence of a drop within every major technology class, and consistent results using distress driven by commodity shocks—all suggest a causal effect of distress. Despite this, we find that innovation during crises can be more resilient than it may appear at first glance. First, there is no observable change in the number of future citations, despite the decline in the number of patents filed. Second, the shock is in part absorbed through a reallocation of inventors into firms, who over the long-run produce patents with greater impact. Third, the results reveal no immediate brain drain of inventors from the affected areas. Overall, we demonstrate that crises can be both destructive and creative forces for innovation, and provide the first systematic evidence of the role played by the Great Depression in the long-run organization of innovative activity.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG, PR；JEL：G01, G21, N12, N22, N32, O3
papers.zh_title: 危机中的创新
papers.zh_abstract: 金融危机对创新的影响是一个尚未解决且对经济增长至关重要的问题，但用现代数据难以回答。利用围绕大萧条的双重差分设计，我们记录了地方性困境导致当时最大的创新组织形式——技术型企业家——的专利申请活动出现突然且持续的下降。冲击前的平行趋势、每个主要技术类别内部专利申请量下降的证据，以及利用商品冲击驱动的困境所得出的一致结果，都表明困境具有因果效应。尽管如此，我们发现危机期间的创新可能比初看起来更具韧性。首先，尽管专利申请数量下降，但未来被引次数没有可观测的变化。其次，冲击在一定程度上通过发明人向企业重新配置而被吸收，这些发明人在长期内会产出影响力更大的专利。第三，结果并未显示受影响地区出现发明人的即时人才流失。总体而言，我们证明了危机对创新而言既可以是破坏性力量，也可以是创造性力量，并首次系统性地提供了大萧条在创新活动长期组织中所扮演角色的证据。

papers.title: History and Urban Economics
papers.authors: W. Walker Hanlon, Stephan Heblich
papers.abstract: This article reviews recent literature using insights from history to answer central questions in urban economics. This area of research has seen rapid growth in the past decade, thanks to new technologies that have made available increasingly rich data stretching far back in time. The focus is to review innovative methods to exploit historical information and discuss applications of these data that provide new insights into (i) the long run growth of cities or regional economies and (ii) the spatial organization of economic activities within cities. The review also surveys the growing literature outside urban economics that uses the historical urbanization as a proxy for economic growth, discusses differences between how economic historians and urban economists think about the relationship between urbanization and growth, and considers how these views might be reconciled.
papers.zh_title: 历史与城市经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了近期利用历史洞见来回答城市经济学核心问题的文献。得益于新技术使得时间跨度越来越大的丰富数据变得可用，这一研究领域在过去十年中经历了快速增长。本文的重点是回顾利用历史信息的创新方法，并讨论这些数据的应用如何为以下方面提供新见解：（i）城市或区域经济的长期增长，以及（ii）经济活动在城市内部的空间组织。本文还综述了城市经济学之外日益增长的、将历史城市化作为经济增长代理变量的文献，讨论了经济史学家与城市经济学家在看待城市化与增长关系上的差异，并思考了这些观点如何可能被调和。

papers.title: Fifty Shades of QE: Comparing Findings of Central Bankers and Academics
papers.authors: Brian Fabo, Martina Jančoková, Elisabeth Kempf, Ľuboš Pástor
papers.abstract: We compare the findings of central bank researchers and academic economists regarding the macroeconomic effects of quantitative easing (QE). We find that central bank papers find QE to be more effective than academic papers do. Central bank papers report larger effects of QE on output and inflation. They also report QE effects on output that are more significant, both statistically and economically, and they use more positive language in the abstract. Central bank researchers who report larger QE effects on output experience more favorable career outcomes. A survey of central banks reveals substantial involvement of bank management in research production.\n
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：A11, E52, E58, G28
papers.zh_title: 量化宽松的五十种色调：比较央行官员与学术研究者的发现
papers.zh_abstract: 我们比较了央行研究人员和学术经济学家关于量化宽松（QE）宏观经济效应的研究结果。我们发现，央行论文认为QE比学术论文更有效。央行论文报告了QE对产出和通胀的更大影响。它们还报告了QE对产出的影响在统计上和经济上都更为显著，并且在摘要中使用了更积极的语言。报告QE对产出影响更大的央行研究人员，其职业发展结果更为有利。一项对央行的调查显示，银行管理层在研究产出中参与了大量工作。

papers.title: A Satellite Account for Health in the United States
papers.authors: David M. Cutler, Kaushik Ghosh, Kassandra Messer, Trivellore Raghunathan, Allison B. Rosen, Susan T. Stewart
papers.abstract: This paper develops a satellite account for the US health sector and measures productivity growth in health care for the elderly population between 1999 and 2012. We measure the change in medical spending and health outcomes for a comprehensive set of 80 conditions. Medical care has positive productivity growth over the time period, with aggregate productivity growth of 1.5% per year. However, there is significant heterogeneity in productivity growth. Care for cardiovascular disease has had very high productivity growth. In contrast, care for people with musculoskeletal conditions has been costly but has not led to improved outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PR；JEL：E2, I10, I11, I12, I38
papers.zh_title: 美国健康卫星账户
papers.zh_abstract: 本文为美国卫生部门开发了一个卫星账户，并衡量了1999年至2012年间老年人口医疗保健的生产率增长。我们衡量了涵盖80种疾病的综合医疗支出和健康结果的变化。在此期间，医疗保健具有正的生产率增长，总体生产率增长为每年1.5%。然而，生产率增长存在显著的异质性。心血管疾病的护理具有非常高的生产率增长。相比之下，对肌肉骨骼疾病患者的护理成本高昂，但并未带来改善的结果。

papers.title: The Economics of Currency Risk
papers.authors: Tarek Alexander Hassan, Tony Zhang
papers.abstract: This article reviews the literature on currency and country risk with a focus on its macroeconomic origins and implications. A growing body of evidence shows countries with safer currencies enjoy persistently lower interest rates and a lower required return to capital. As a result, they accumulate relatively more capital than countries with currencies international investors perceive as risky. Whereas earlier research focused mainly on the role of currency risk in generating violations of uncovered interest parity and other financial anomalies, more recent evidence points to important implications for the allocation of capital across countries, the efficacy of exchange rate stabilization policies, the sustainability of trade deficits, and the spillovers of shocks across international borders.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E22, E4, F31, F34, F4, G12, G15, G3
papers.zh_title: 货币风险经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于货币风险和国家风险的文献，重点关注其宏观经济起源和影响。越来越多的证据表明，拥有更安全货币的国家享有持续较低的利率和较低的资本必要回报率。因此，与国际投资者认为有风险的货币国家相比，它们积累了相对更多的资本。早期研究主要关注货币风险在导致无抛补利率平价失效和其他金融异象中的作用，而近期证据则指出了其对国家间资本配置、汇率稳定政策有效性、贸易赤字可持续性以及冲击跨国溢出效应的重要影响。

papers.title: Patent Quality: Towards a Systematic Framework for Analysis and Measurement
papers.authors: Kyle W. Higham, Gaétan de Rassenfosse, Adam B. Jaffe
papers.abstract: The 'quality' of novel technological innovations is extremely variable, and the ability to measure innovation quality is essential to sensible, evidence-based policy. Patents, an often vital precursor to a commercialised innovation, share this heterogeneous quality distribution. A pertinent question then arises: How should we define and measure patent quality? Accepting that different stakeholders have different views of this concept, we take a multi-dimensional view of patent quality in this work. We first test the consistency of popular post-grant outcomes that are often used as patent quality measures. Finding these measures to be generally inconsistent, we then use a raft of patent indicators that are defined at the time of grant to dissect the characteristics associated with different post-grant outcomes. We find broad disagreement in the relative importance of individual characteristics between outcomes and, further, significant variation of the same across technologies within outcomes. We conclude that measurement of patent quality is highly sensitive to both stakeholder viewpoint and technology type. Our findings bear implications for scholarly research using patent data as well as for policy discussions about patent quality.
papers.zh_title: 专利质量：迈向系统化分析与测量框架
papers.zh_abstract: 新型技术创新的“质量”具有极大的变异性，而衡量创新质量的能力对于制定明智的循证政策至关重要。专利作为商业化创新的关键前提，同样呈现出这种异质性的质量分布。由此产生一个关键问题：我们应如何定义和衡量专利质量？考虑到不同利益相关者对这一概念持有不同观点，本研究从多维视角审视专利质量。我们首先检验了常被用作专利质量衡量指标的授权后结果的内部一致性。发现这些指标普遍不一致后，我们利用一系列在专利授权时定义的指标，剖析了与不同授权后结果相关的特征。我们发现，不同结果之间各特征相对重要性存在广泛分歧，且在同一结果内部，不同技术领域间也存在显著差异。我们得出结论：专利质量的衡量对利益相关者视角和技术类型高度敏感。我们的发现对使用专利数据的学术研究以及关于专利质量的政策讨论均具有启示意义。

papers.title: The World War II Crisis Innovation Model: What Was It, and Where Does It Apply?
papers.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
papers.abstract: World War II was one of the most acute emergencies in U.S. history, and the first where mobilizing science and technology was a major part of the government response. The U.S. Office of Scientific Research and Development (OSRD) led a far-ranging research effort to develop technologies and medical treatments that not only helped win the war, but also transformed civilian life, while laying the foundation for postwar innovation policy after it was dissolved. Scholars and policymakers have appealed to the wartime model as a template for other problems, often invoking the Manhattan Project rather than OSRD, which initiated and managed the broader effort of which atomic fission and dozens of other programs were a part. In this paper we bring OSRD into focus, describe how it worked, and explore what insights its experience offers today. We argue that several aspects of OSRD continue to be relevant, especially in crises, while also cautioning on the limits to generalizing from World War II to other settings.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, PE, PR；JEL：H12, H56, N42, N72, O31, O32, O38
papers.zh_title: 二战危机创新模式：它是什么，适用于何处？
papers.zh_abstract: 第二次世界大战是美国历史上最严重的紧急情况之一，也是动员科学技术成为政府应对措施主要组成部分的第一次。美国科学研究与发展办公室领导了一项广泛的研究工作，开发技术和医疗方法，这不仅帮助赢得了战争，也改变了平民生活，同时在其解散后为战后创新政策奠定了基础。学者和政策制定者曾将战时模式作为其他问题的模板，通常引用曼哈顿计划而非OSRD，而OSRD发起并管理了包括核裂变和数十个其他项目在内的更广泛努力。在本文中，我们聚焦OSRD，描述其运作方式，并探讨其经验今天能提供哪些见解。我们认为，OSRD的若干方面至今仍具有相关性，尤其是在危机中，同时我们也提醒注意从二战推广到其他情境的局限性。

papers.title: Who Should Work from Home during a Pandemic? The Wage-Infection Trade-off
papers.authors: Sangmin Aum, Sang Yoon (Tim) Lee, Yongseok Shin
papers.abstract: Shutting down the workplace is an effective means of reducing contagion, but can incur large economic losses. We construct an exposure index, which measures infection risks across occupations, and a work-from-home index, which gauges the ease with which a job can be performed remotely across both industries and occupations. Because the two indices are negatively correlated but distinct, the economic costs of containing a pandemic can be minimized by only sending home those jobs that are highly exposed but easy to perform from home. Compared to a lockdown of all non-essential jobs, the optimal policy attains the same reduction in aggregate exposure (32 percent) with one-third fewer workers sent home (24 vs. 36 percent) and with only half the loss in aggregate wages (15 vs. 30 percent). A move from the lockdown to the optimal policy reduces the exposure of low-wage workers the most and the wage loss of the high-wage workers the most, although everyone's wage losses become smaller. A constrained optimal policy under which health workers cannot be sent home still achieves the same exposure reduction with a one-third smaller loss in aggregate wages (19 vs. 30 percent).
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间谁应居家办公？工资与感染的权衡
papers.zh_abstract: 关闭工作场所是减少传染的有效手段，但可能造成巨大的经济损失。我们构建了一个暴露指数，用于衡量不同职业的感染风险；同时构建了一个居家办公指数，用于评估不同行业和职业中工作可远程完成的难易程度。由于这两个指数呈负相关但彼此不同，因此，仅让那些暴露风险高但易于居家完成的工作者回家，可以最小化控制疫情的经济成本。与封锁所有非必要工作岗位相比，最优政策在实现相同的总体暴露减少（32%）的情况下，让回家的工人减少了三分之一（24%对36%），且总体工资损失仅为一半（15%对30%）。从封锁政策转向最优政策，对低工资工人的暴露减少最多，对高工资工人的工资损失减少最多，尽管每个人的工资损失都变得更小。即使在卫生工作者不能回家的约束条件下，最优政策仍能实现相同的暴露减少，且总体工资损失减少三分之一（19%对30%）。

papers.title: Flight to Safety: How Economic Downturns Affect Talent Flows to Startups
papers.authors: Shai Bernstein, Richard R. Townsend, Ting Xu
papers.abstract: Using proprietary data from AngelList Talent, we study how individuals’ job search and application behavior changed during the COVID downturn. We find that job seekers shifted their searches toward more established firms and away from early-stage startups, even within the same individual over time. Simultaneously, they broadened their other search parameters. Relative to more established firms, early-stage startups experienced a decline in applications, primarily driven by higher quality candidates. These declines hold within a firm or job posting over time. Our findings uncover a flight to safety channel in the labor market, which may amplify the pro-cyclical nature of entrepreneurial activities.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：E32, J22, J24, L26, M13
papers.zh_title: 避险行为：经济衰退如何影响人才流向初创企业
papers.zh_abstract: 利用AngelList Talent的专有数据，我们研究了在COVID-19经济衰退期间，个人的求职和申请行为如何变化。我们发现，求职者将搜索方向转向更成熟的企业，远离早期初创企业，即使在同一人随时间变化的行为中也是如此。同时，他们拓宽了其他搜索参数。与更成熟的企业相比，早期初创企业的申请数量下降，这主要是由更高质量的候选人减少所致。这些下降在同一企业或职位发布随时间变化的情况下依然成立。我们的发现揭示了劳动力市场中的一种“避险”渠道，这可能会放大创业活动的顺周期性。

papers.title: A Helicopter Tour of Some Underlying Issues In Empirical Industrial Organization
papers.authors: Ariel Pakes
papers.abstract: The paper considers conceptual issues underlying empirical work on markets. It has three parts. The first reviews the analysis of demand and equilibrium in retail markets and then considers recent advances in the analysis of markets which require different assumptions; markets where adverse selection and moral hazard may be important, vertical markets with bargaining, and markets wherein a centralized allocation mechanism replaces prices. The second part considers the analysis of cost and production. It reviews the simultaneity and selection issues in production function estimation and then considers; the distinction between revenue and quantity generating functions and its implications for the analysis of markups, and the empirical analysis of fixed costs and its implications for the analysis of product repositioning. The paper concludes by considering issues that arise due to the complexity of empirical analysis of market dynamics and appropriate ways of dealing with them.
papers.zh_title: 实证产业组织若干基础问题的概览
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了市场实证研究背后的概念性问题。全文分为三部分。第一部分回顾了零售市场中需求与均衡的分析，然后考虑了需要不同假设的市场分析的最新进展：逆向选择和道德风险可能重要的市场、存在讨价还价的垂直市场，以及集中化分配机制取代价格的市场。第二部分考虑了成本与生产的分析。它回顾了生产函数估计中的联立性和选择性问题，然后探讨了：收入生成函数与数量生成函数之间的区别及其对加成率分析的影响，以及固定成本的实证分析及其对产品重新定位分析的影响。本文最后考虑了由于市场动态实证分析的复杂性而产生的问题，以及处理这些问题的适当方法。

papers.title: Trade with Nominal Rigidities: Understanding the Unemployment and Welfare Effects of the China Shock
papers.authors: Andrés Rodríguez-Clare, Mauricio Ulate, José P. Vásquez
