papers.abstract: We present a dynamic quantitative trade and migration model that incorporates downward nominal wage rigidities and show how this framework can generate changes in unemployment and labor participation that match those uncovered by the empirical literature studying the “China shock.” We find that the China shock leads to average welfare increases in most U.S. states, including many that experience unemployment during the transition. However, nominal rigidities reduce the overall U.S. gains by around two thirds. In addition, there are 18 states that experience welfare losses in the presence of downward nominal wage rigidity that would have experienced gains without it.
papers.zh_title: 名义刚性下的贸易：理解中国冲击的失业与福利效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个包含向下名义工资刚性的动态定量贸易与移民模型，并展示了该框架如何产生与实证研究“中国冲击”文献所揭示的失业和劳动参与率变化相匹配的结果。我们发现，中国冲击导致美国大多数州的平均福利增加，包括许多在转型期间经历失业的州。然而，名义刚性使美国的总体收益减少了约三分之二。此外，在存在向下名义工资刚性的情况下，有18个州经历了福利损失，而如果没有这种刚性，这些州本应获得收益。

papers.title: Distance, Empire, and British Exports Over Two Centuries
papers.authors: David S. Jacks, Kevin Hjortshøj O'Rourke, Alan M. Taylor, Yoto Yotov
papers.abstract: We introduce a new, publicly available dataset on the universe of British exports at the bilateral, commodity level from 1700 to 1899. We then pit two primary determinants of bilateral trade against one another: the trade-diminishing effects of distance versus the trade-enhancing effects of the British Empire. We find that the impact of distance fell by roughly two-thirds between the 1780s and 1860s. The influence of empire on British exports was very large throughout, but the impact of 18th century mercantilism was much higher than that of "liberal empire" in the late 19th century.

papers.title: Emerging Markets Sovereign CDS Spreads During COVID-19: Economics versus Epidemiology News
papers.authors: Timo Daehler, Joshua Aizenman, Yothin Jinjarak
papers.abstract: Can bad news about COVID-19 induce negative expectations on sovereign credit risks? We investigate the factors driving credit default swap (CDS) spreads of emerging market sovereigns around the outbreak of COVID-19. Using 2014-2019 data, we estimate a two-factor model of global and regional risks and then extrapolate the model-implied spreads for the period July 2019–June 2020. Intriguingly, the model initially predicts the realized spreads well but loses predictive accuracy during the COVID-19 pandemic. Fiscal space and oil-revenue dependence primarily drive the differences between the realized and predicted sovereign spreads. Our augmented-factor model indicates that the cumulative COVID-19 mortality rate growth is positively associated with the CDS spreads. The evidence suggests that the epidemiological deterioration can lower confidence in the sovereign credit markets due to the prospects of prolonged lockdowns and a slower GDP growth recovery. Our results also hold for a single regression of daily spread changes during 2014-2020.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19期间新兴市场主权CDS利差：经济新闻与流行病学新闻
papers.zh_abstract: 关于COVID-19的坏消息能否引发对主权信用风险的负面预期？我们研究了COVID-19爆发前后新兴市场主权信用违约互换（CDS）利差的驱动因素。利用2014-2019年的数据，我们估计了一个包含全球和区域风险的双因子模型，然后外推了2019年7月至2020年6月期间模型隐含的利差。有趣的是，该模型最初能很好地预测实际利差，但在COVID-19大流行期间失去了预测准确性。财政空间和石油收入依赖性是实际与预测主权利差差异的主要驱动因素。我们的扩展因子模型表明，累计COVID-19死亡率增长与CDS利差正相关。证据表明，由于长期封锁和GDP增长复苏放缓的前景，流行病学状况恶化可能降低主权信贷市场的信心。我们的结果在2014-2020年每日利差变化的单一回归中也成立。

papers.title: Public Policy and Participation in Political Interest Groups: An Analysis of Minimum Wages, Labor Unions, and Effective Advocacy
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Michael R. Strain
papers.abstract: Why do individuals join interest groups? Through what channels do interest groups and public policy affect one another? We study these questions by analyzing the interplay among labor unions, minimum wages, news coverage, and public opinion. Over the past decade, labor unions have played a significant role in advocating for state and federal minimum wage increases. Over this period, we find that each dollar in minimum wage increase predicts a 5 percent increase (0.3 pp) in the union membership rate among individuals age 16–40. We document four additional facts that shed light on the mechanisms that may underlie this finding. First, while we find increases overall in union membership, we find declines among the minimum wage’s most direct beneficiaries. This is consistent with a classic “free-riding” hypothesis. Second, we find increases in union membership among much broader groups that are not directly affected by the minimum wage. Third, we find that minimum wage increases predict increases in unions’ favorability ratings among the public. Fourth, we find that events in the legislative histories of minimum wage increases predict increases in counts of newspaper articles that simultaneously discuss the minimum wage and key players in the labor movement. Overall coverage of organized labor shifts towards articles that discuss the minimum wage. These facts are consistent with models in which a desire to affiliate with “effective advocacy” is an important driver of the decision to participate in unions and other politically oriented groups.
papers.zh_title: 公共政策与政治利益集团参与：最低工资、工会与有效倡导的分析
papers.zh_abstract: 个人为何加入利益集团？利益集团与公共政策如何相互影响？我们通过分析工会、最低工资、新闻报道和公众舆论之间的相互作用来研究这些问题。在过去十年中，工会在倡导州和联邦最低工资上涨方面发挥了重要作用。在此期间，我们发现，每增加一美元的最低工资，预测16-40岁人群的工会会员率将增加5%（0.3个百分点）。我们记录了四个额外的事实，揭示了可能支撑这一发现的机制。首先，虽然我们发现工会会员总体增加，但在最低工资最直接的受益者中却出现了下降。这与经典的“搭便车”假说一致。其次，我们发现，在不受最低工资直接影响的更广泛群体中，工会会员有所增加。第三，我们发现最低工资上涨预示着公众对工会的好感度上升。第四，我们发现最低工资上涨立法过程中的事件，预示着同时讨论最低工资和劳工运动关键人物的报纸文章数量增加。对工会组织的整体报道转向讨论最低工资的文章。这些事实与以下模型一致：即对“有效倡导”的归属感是决定加入工会和其他政治导向团体的重要驱动因素。

papers.title: Global Financial Cycle and Liquidity Management
papers.authors: Olivier Jeanne, Damiano Sandri
papers.abstract: We use a tractable model to show that emerging markets can protect themselves from the global financial cycle by expanding (rather than restricting) capital flows. This involves accumulating reserves when global liquidity is high to buy back domestic assets at a discount when global financial conditions tighten. Since the private sector does not internalize how this buffering mechanism reduces international borrowing costs, a social planner increases the size of capital flows beyond the laissez-faire equilibrium. The model also provides a role for foreign exchange intervention in less financially developed countries. The main predictions of the model are consistent with the data.
papers.zh_title: 全球金融周期与流动性管理
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个易于处理的模型表明，新兴市场可以通过扩大（而非限制）资本流动来保护自己免受全球金融周期的影响。这包括在全球流动性高时积累储备，以便在全球金融状况收紧时以折扣价回购国内资产。由于私人部门没有内化这种缓冲机制降低国际借贷成本的作用，社会规划者会将资本流动规模扩大到自由放任均衡之上。该模型也为金融欠发达国家的外汇干预提供了作用依据。该模型的主要预测与数据一致。

papers.title: Deterrence Effects of Antifraud and Abuse Enforcement in Health Care
papers.authors: David H. Howard, Ian McCarthy
papers.abstract: Estimates of the benefits of antifraud enforcement in health care typically focus on direct monetary damages. Deterrence effects are acknowledged but unquantified. We evaluate the impact of a Department of Justice investigation of hospitals accused of billing Medicare for unnecessary implantable cardiac defibrillator (ICD) procedures on their use. Using 100% inpatient and outpatient procedure data from Florida, we estimate that the investigation caused a 22% decline in unnecessary ICD implantations. The present value of savings nationally over a 10 year period is $2.7 billion, nearly 10 times larger than the $280 million in settlements the Department of Justice recovered from hospitals. The investigation had a large and long-lasting effect on physician behavior, indicating the utility of antifraud enforcement as a tool for reducing wasteful medical care.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健领域反欺诈与滥用执法的威慑效应
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗保健领域反欺诈执法的收益估算通常侧重于直接货币损害赔偿。威慑效应虽被承认但未量化。我们评估了美国司法部对涉嫌向医疗保险收取不必要植入式心脏复律除颤器（ICD）手术费用的医院进行调查的影响。利用佛罗里达州100%的住院和门诊手术数据，我们估计该调查导致不必要的ICD植入量下降了22%。全国范围内10年期间的储蓄现值为27亿美元，几乎是司法部从医院追回的2.8亿美元和解金的10倍。该调查对医生行为产生了巨大且持久的影响，表明反欺诈执法作为减少浪费性医疗保健工具的有效性。

papers.title: Wealth Transfers and Net Wealth at Death: Evidence from the Italian Inheritance Tax Records 1995–2016
papers.authors: Paolo Acciari, Salvatore Morelli
papers.abstract: In this paper we describe a novel source of data on the full record of inheritance tax files in Italy, covering up to 63% of total deceased. The work documents a substantial rise in the total value of inheritance and gifts as a share of national income, from 8.4% in 1995 to 15.1% in 2016. Consistent with the increasing role of total personal net wealth in the economy, the weight of inheritance and gifts in Italy appears relatively high by international standards. Over the same period, total wealth left at death has also become increasingly concentrated. The estates valued at least one million Euro were worth 18.7% of total estate in the mid 1990s and 24.8% in 2016. This paper also documents that revenues collected from the inheritance tax underwent a large decline from 0.14% to 0.06% of total tax revenue between 1995 and 2016. Data also allow a disaggregated analysis by demographic and geographic characteristics.
papers.zh_title: 财富转移与死亡时净财富：来自意大利1995-2016年遗产税记录的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们描述了一个关于意大利遗产税档案完整记录的新数据来源，覆盖高达63%的死亡人口。该研究记录了遗产和赠与总价值占国民收入比重的显著上升，从1995年的8.4%增至2016年的15.1%。与个人净财富总额在经济中日益增长的作用一致，意大利遗产和赠与的比重按国际标准来看相对较高。同期，死亡时留下的总财富也变得越来越集中。价值至少100万欧元的遗产在1990年代中期占总遗产的18.7%，到2016年达到24.8%。本文还记录了遗产税收入从1995年占税收总额的0.14%大幅下降至2016年的0.06%。数据还允许按人口和地理特征进行分解分析。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Cooperation/Coordination and Global Financial Crises in Historical Perspective
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic spawned a global liquidity crisis in March 2020. The global liquidity crisis was alleviated by the Federal Reserve and other advanced country central banks cooperating by extending the swap lines they developed in the Global Financial Crisis 2007-2008. Central bank cooperation in 2020 evolved from a two-century history across several monetary regimes that is surveyed in this paper. I find that in monetary regimes which are rules-based cooperation was most successful. International currency swaps developed to manage exchange rates during the Bretton Woods era have evolved into the leading tool to manage international liquidity crises. The swap network can be viewed as a step in the direction of a global financial safety net.
papers.zh_title: 历史视角下的货币政策合作/协调与全球金融危机
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行在2020年3月引发了一场全球流动性危机。这场全球流动性危机通过美联储和其他发达国家央行合作，扩展其在2007-2008年全球金融危机中建立的互换额度而得到缓解。2020年的央行合作源于本文所考察的跨越两个世纪、历经多种货币制度的历史。我发现，在基于规则的货币制度中，合作最为成功。在布雷顿森林体系时代为管理汇率而发展起来的国际货币互换，已演变为管理国际流动性危机的主要工具。互换网络可以被视为朝着全球金融安全网方向迈出的一步。

papers.title: Digital Messaging to Improve College Enrollment and Success
papers.authors: Christopher Avery, Benjamin L. Castleman, Michael Hurwitz, Bridget T. Long, Lindsay C. Page
papers.abstract: We investigate the efficacy of text messaging campaigns to remind students about and support them with key steps in the college search, application, selection and transition process. First, in collaboration with the College Board and uAspire, both national non-profit organizations, we implemented text-message based outreach and advising to students in over 700 US high schools that primarily serve large shares of low-income students. Second, we collaborated with several school districts in the state of Texas to implement a school-based version of the intervention. In the national sample, treatment students received outreach approximately once per month from uAspire counselors, whereas in the Texas sample, treatment students received outreach once every one to two weeks from their high school counselors. In both samples, outreach began in Spring 2015 and continued through September 2016. We tested these interventions with concurrent cluster randomized control trials with randomization at the school level. In contrast to the national version of the intervention, which tended to produce null effects, the school-based intervention yielded positive and significant impacts on several college-going steps and on college enrollment for certain subgroups. We discuss key differences between the two versions of the intervention that may have contributed to these divergent results.
papers.zh_title: 数字信息传递改善大学入学与成功
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了短信提醒活动在提醒学生并支持他们完成大学搜索、申请、选择和过渡过程中的关键步骤方面的有效性。首先，我们与全国性非营利组织大学理事会和uAspire合作，向美国700多所主要服务大量低收入学生的高中的学生实施了基于短信的外展和咨询。其次，我们与德克萨斯州的几个学区合作，实施了一个基于学校的干预版本。在全国样本中，治疗组学生大约每月从uAspire顾问那里收到一次外展信息，而在德克萨斯州样本中，治疗组学生每1-2周从他们的高中顾问那里收到一次外展信息。在两个样本中，外展活动均始于2015年春季，持续到2016年9月。我们通过在学校层面随机化的并行整群随机对照试验测试了这些干预措施。与倾向于产生零效应的全国版干预相比，基于学校的干预对某些子群体的几个大学入学步骤和大学入学率产生了积极且显著的影响。我们讨论了两种干预版本之间可能导致这些不同结果的关键差异。

papers.title: Measuring the Effects of Firm Uncertainty on Economic Activity: New Evidence from One Million Documents
papers.authors: Kyle Handley, J. Frank Li
papers.abstract: We construct a new measure of firm-level uncertainty from analyzing the text of mandatory reports filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Using firm and establishment level panel data on investment margins and employment dynamics, we find our uncertainty measure has large effects on investment even after controlling for industry and time-varying shocks. Periods of high firm uncertainty (1) reduce investment rates by 0.5% and attenuate the response to positive sales shocks by about half and (2) reduce employment growth rates by 1.4% and the response to positive sales shocks by 30%. Firms are less responsive to demand shocks at the firm level and across establishments within the firm. Consistent with “wait and see” dynamics, uncertainty affects new investment activity, e.g. plant births and acquisition, more than disinvestment margins.
papers.zh_title: 衡量企业不确定性对经济活动的影响：来自一百万份文件的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过分析提交给美国证券交易委员会的强制性报告文本，构建了一个新的企业层面不确定性衡量指标。利用企业和机构层面关于投资边际和就业动态的面板数据，我们发现即使在控制了行业和时变冲击之后，我们的不确定性衡量指标对投资也有很大影响。高企业不确定性时期（1）使投资率降低0.5%，并将对正向销售冲击的反应减弱约一半；（2）使就业增长率降低1.4%，并将对正向销售冲击的反应减弱30%。企业在企业层面以及企业内部各机构之间对需求冲击的反应都较小。与“观望”动态一致，不确定性对新投资活动（如工厂诞生和收购）的影响大于对撤资边际的影响。

papers.title: Discovering Treatment Effectiveness via Median Treatment Effects—Applications to COVID-19 Clinical Trials
papers.authors: John Mullahy
papers.abstract: Comparing median outcomes to gauge treatment effectiveness is widespread practice in clinical and other investigations. While common, such difference-in-median characterizations of effectiveness are but one way to summarize how outcome distributions compare. This paper explores properties of median treatment effects as indicators of treatment effectiveness. The paper's main focus is on decisionmaking based on median treatment effects and it proceeds by considering two paths a decisionmaker might follow. Along one, decisions are based on point-identified differences in medians alongside partially identified median differences; along the other decisions are based on point-identified differences in medians in conjunction with other point-identified parameters. On both paths familiar difference-in-median measures play some role yet in both the traditional standards are augmented with information that will often be relevant in assessing treatments' effectiveness. Implementing both approaches is shown to be straightforward. In addition to its analytical results the paper considers several policy contexts in which such considerations arise. While the paper is framed by recently reported findings on treatments for COVID-19 and uses several such studies to explore empirically some properties of median-treatment-effect measures of effectiveness, its results should be broadly applicable.
papers.zh_title: 通过中位数治疗效果发现治疗有效性——在COVID-19临床试验中的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 比较中位数结果以衡量治疗有效性在临床和其他研究中是普遍做法。虽然常见，但这种中位数差异对有效性的描述只是总结结果分布比较的一种方式。本文探讨了中位数治疗效果作为治疗有效性指标的特性。本文的主要焦点是基于中位数治疗效果的决策，并通过考虑决策者可能遵循的两条路径进行。沿着一条路径，决策基于点识别的中位数差异以及部分识别的中位数差异；沿着另一条路径，决策基于点识别的中位数差异以及其他点识别参数。在这两条路径上，熟悉的中位数差异衡量指标都发挥了一定作用，然而在这两种情况下，传统标准都补充了通常与评估治疗有效性相关的信息。实施这两种方法被证明是直接的。除了分析结果外，本文还考虑了出现此类考虑的几个政策背景。虽然本文以最近报道的COVID-19治疗发现为框架，并利用其中几项研究来实证探索中位数治疗效果衡量指标有效性的某些特性，但其结果应具有广泛适用性。

papers.title: Flexible Wages, Bargaining, and the Gender Gap
papers.authors: Barbara Biasi, Heather Sarsons
papers.abstract: Does flexible pay increase the gender wage gap? To answer this question we analyze the wages of public-school teachers in Wisconsin, where a 2011 reform allowed school districts to set teachers' pay more flexibly and engage in individual negotiations. Using quasi-exogenous variation in the timing of the introduction of flexible pay driven by the expiration of pre-existing collective-bargaining agreements, we show that flexible pay increased the gender pay gap among teachers with the same credentials. This gap is larger for younger teachers and absent for teachers working under a female principal or superintendent. Survey evidence suggests that the gap is partly driven by women not engaging in negotiations over pay, especially when the counterpart is a man. This gap is not driven by gender differences in job mobility, ability, or a higher demand for male teachers. We conclude that environmental factors are an important determinant of the gender wage gap in contexts where workers are required to negotiate.
papers.zh_title: 弹性工资、谈判与性别差距
papers.zh_abstract: 弹性薪酬是否会扩大性别工资差距？为了回答这个问题，我们分析了威斯康星州公立学校教师的工资，该州2011年的一项改革允许学区更灵活地设定教师薪酬并进行个人谈判。利用由现有集体谈判协议到期驱动的弹性薪酬引入时间的准外生变化，我们表明弹性薪酬增加了具有相同资历的教师之间的性别薪酬差距。这种差距在年轻教师中更大，而在女性校长或学监领导下工作的教师中则不存在。调查证据表明，这种差距部分是由女性不参与薪酬谈判所驱动的，尤其是当对方是男性时。这种差距并非由性别在职业流动性、能力或对男教师更高需求方面的差异所驱动。我们得出结论，在需要工人进行谈判的环境中，环境因素是性别工资差距的重要决定因素。

papers.title: Concessions, Violence, and Indirect Rule: Evidence from the Congo Free State
papers.authors: Sara Lowes, Eduardo Montero
papers.abstract: All colonial powers granted concessions to private companies to extract natural resources during the colonial era. Within Africa, these concessions were characterized by indirect rule and violence. We use the arbitrarily defined borders of rubber concessions granted in the north of the Congo Free State to examine the causal effects of this form of economic organization on development. We find that historical exposure to the concessions causes significantly worse education, wealth, and health outcomes. To examine mechanisms, we collect survey and experimental data from individuals near a former concession boundary. We find that village chiefs inside the former concessions provide fewer public goods, are less likely to be elected, and are more likely to be hereditary. However, individuals within the concessions are more trusting, more cohesive, and more supportive of sharing income. The results are relevant for the many places that were designated as concessions to private companies during the colonial era.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：D72, N47, O15, O43, Z1, Z13
papers.zh_title: 特许经营权、暴力与间接统治：来自刚果自由邦的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 所有殖民列强在殖民时代都向私营公司授予特许经营权以开采自然资源。在非洲内部，这些特许经营权的特点是间接统治和暴力。我们利用刚果自由邦北部橡胶特许经营权任意划定的边界来考察这种经济组织形式对发展的因果效应。我们发现，历史上接触特许经营权会导致显著更差的教育、财富和健康结果。为了考察机制，我们收集了前特许经营权边界附近个体的调查和实验数据。我们发现，前特许经营权内部的村长提供的公共物品更少，当选的可能性更低，且更可能是世袭的。然而，特许经营权内部的个体更加信任、更有凝聚力，并且更支持收入共享。这些结果对于殖民时代被指定为私营公司特许经营权的许多地方具有相关性。

papers.title: The Global Factor Structure of Exchange Rates
papers.authors: Sofonias Korsaye, Fabio Trojani, Andrea Vedolin
papers.abstract: We provide a model-free framework to study the global factor structure of exchange rates. To this end, we propose a new methodology to estimate international stochastic discount factors (SDFs) that jointly price cross-sections of international assets, such as stocks, bonds, and currencies, in the presence of frictions. We theoretically establish a two-factor representation for the cross-section of international SDFs, consisting of one global and one local factor, which is independent of the currency denomination. We show that our two-factor specification prices a large cross-section of international asset returns, not just in- but also out-of-sample with R2s of up to 80%.
papers.zh_title: 汇率的全球因子结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个无模型框架来研究汇率的全球因子结构。为此，我们提出了一种新方法来估计国际随机贴现因子（SDFs），该因子在存在摩擦的情况下共同为国际资产（如股票、债券和货币）的横截面定价。我们从理论上建立了国际SDFs横截面的双因子表示，由一个全球因子和一个局部因子组成，该表示独立于计价货币。我们证明，我们的双因子规范为国际资产收益的大横截面定价，不仅在样本内，而且在样本外，R²高达80%。

papers.title: Face Masks, Public Policies and Slowing the Spread of COVID-19: Evidence from Canada
papers.authors: Alexander Karaivanov, Shih En Lu, Hitoshi Shigeoka, Cong Chen, Stephanie Pamplona
papers.abstract: We estimate the impact of mask mandates and other non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPI) on COVID-19 case growth in Canada, including regulations on businesses and gatherings, school closures, travel and self-isolation, and long-term care homes. We partially account for behavioral responses using Google mobility data. Our identification approach exploits variation in the timing of indoor face mask mandates staggered over two months in the 34 public health regions in Ontario, Canada's most populous province. We find that, in the first few weeks after implementation, mask mandates are associated with a reduction of 25 percent in the weekly number of new COVID-19 cases. Additional analysis with province-level data provides corroborating evidence. Counterfactual policy simulations suggest that mandating indoor masks nationwide in early July could have reduced the weekly number of new cases in Canada by 25 to 40 percent in mid-August, which translates into 700 to 1,100 fewer cases per week.
papers.zh_title: 口罩、公共政策与减缓COVID-19传播：来自加拿大的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了口罩强制令和其他非药物干预措施（NPI）对加拿大COVID-19病例增长的影响，包括对企业与集会的监管、学校关闭、旅行与自我隔离以及长期护理机构。我们部分利用谷歌移动数据来考虑行为反应。我们的识别方法利用了加拿大人口最多的省份安大略省34个公共卫生区域在两个月内交错实施的室内口罩强制令的时间差异。我们发现，在实施后的最初几周内，口罩强制令与每周新增COVID-19病例数减少25%相关。使用省级数据的额外分析提供了佐证。反事实政策模拟表明，如果在7月初全国范围内强制要求室内佩戴口罩，到8月中旬加拿大每周新增病例数可能减少25%至40%，相当于每周减少700至1100例病例。

papers.title: Rules vs. Discretion: Treatment of Mental Illness in U.S. Adolescents
papers.authors: Emily Cuddy, Janet Currie
papers.abstract: Many mental health disorders start in adolescence and appropriate initial treatment may improve trajectories. But what is appropriate treatment? We use a large national database of insurance claims to examine the impact of initial mental health treatment on the outcomes of adolescent children over the next two years, where treatment is either consistent with FDA guidelines, consistent with looser guidelines published by professional societies (“grey-area” prescribing), or inconsistent with any guidelines (“red-flag” prescribing). We find that red-flag prescribing increases self-harm, use of emergency rooms, and health care costs, suggesting that treatment guidelines effectively scale up good treatment in practice.
papers.zh_title: 规则与自由裁量权：美国青少年精神疾病的治疗
papers.zh_abstract: 许多精神健康障碍始于青春期，适当的初始治疗可能会改善发展轨迹。但什么是适当的治疗？我们使用一个大型的国家保险索赔数据库，研究初始精神健康治疗对青少年儿童未来两年结果的影响，其中治疗要么符合FDA指南，要么符合专业协会发布的较宽松指南（“灰色地带”处方），要么不符合任何指南（“红旗”处方）。我们发现，“红旗”处方会增加自残、急诊室使用和医疗保健成本，这表明治疗指南在实践中有效地推广了良好的治疗。

papers.title: Private Equity and COVID-19
papers.authors: Paul A. Gompers, Steven N. Kaplan, Vladimir Mukharlyamov
papers.abstract: We survey more than 200 private equity (PE) managers from firms with $1.9 trillion of assets under management (AUM) about their portfolio performance, decisionmaking and activities during the Covid-19 pandemic. Given that PE managers have significant incentives to maximize value, their actions during the current pandemic should indicate what they perceive as being important for both the preservation and creation of value. PE managers believe that 40% of their portfolio companies are moderately negatively affected and 10% are very negatively affected by the pandemic. The private equity managers—both investment and operating partners— are actively engaged in the operations, governance, and financing in all of their current portfolio companies. These activities are more intensively pursued in those companies that have been more severely affected by the Covid-19 pandemic. As a result of the pandemic, they expect the performance of their existing funds to decline. They are more pessimistic about that decline than the VCs surveyed in Gompers et al. (2020b). Despite the pandemic, private equity managers are seeking new investments. Relative to the 2012 survey results reported in Gompers, Kaplan, and Mukharlyamov (2016): the PE investors place a greater weight on revenue growth for value creation; they give a larger equity stake to management teams; and, they also appear to target somewhat lower returns.
papers.zh_title: 私募股权与COVID-19
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了来自管理资产总额达1.9万亿美元的公司的200多名私募股权（PE）经理，了解他们在COVID-19大流行期间的投资组合表现、决策和活动。鉴于PE经理有显著的激励来最大化价值，他们在当前大流行期间的行动应表明他们认为什么对价值保存和创造都很重要。PE经理认为，他们40%的投资组合公司受到大流行的中度负面影响，10%受到非常严重的负面影响。私募股权经理——无论是投资合伙人还是运营合伙人——都积极参与其所有当前投资组合公司的运营、治理和融资。这些活动在那些受COVID-19大流行影响更严重的公司中更为密集地开展。由于大流行，他们预计现有基金的表现将下降。他们对这种下降的悲观程度高于Gompers等人（2020b）调查的风险投资家。尽管有大流行，私募股权经理仍在寻求新的投资。相对于Gompers、Kaplan和Mukharlyamov（2016）报告的2012年调查结果：PE投资者更重视收入增长以创造价值；他们给予管理团队更大的股权份额；而且，他们似乎也设定了略低的回报目标。

papers.title: Calculating DAF Payout and What We Learn When We Do It Correctly
papers.authors: James Andreoni, Ray Madoff
papers.abstract: The tremendous increase in the use of donor-advised funds for charitable donations has led policy-makers to ask if there is sufficient regulation and oversight of DAFs. In the absence of account level reporting, the debate has focused on the average payout rates of DAF sponsoring organizations, which have been reported by the DAF industry to exceed 20%. We show that the industry-preferred method for calculating payout rate overstates the correct payout by more than 50%. We then argue that the flow rate is uninformative unless grounded in the stock of assets held by the DAF sponsor. We suggest a different measure of flow we call the stockpiling rate. Finally, we show that transfers between DAFSs cause DAF grants to be overstated. Reporting transfers separately would allow a more precise estimate of flow.
papers.zh_title: 正确计算DAF支出率及其启示
papers.zh_abstract: 捐赠者建议基金（DAF）用于慈善捐赠的急剧增加，导致政策制定者质疑对DAF的监管和监督是否充分。在缺乏账户层面报告的情况下，争论集中在DAF赞助组织的平均支出率上，DAF行业报告该比率超过20%。我们表明，行业偏好的支出率计算方法将正确的支出率高估了50%以上。然后，我们认为，除非基于DAF赞助商持有的资产存量，否则流量率是无信息的。我们提出了一种不同的流量衡量指标，称为囤积率。最后，我们表明，DAF之间的转移导致DAF赠款被高估。单独报告转移将允许更精确地估计流量。

papers.title: When Information is Not Enough: Evidence from a Centralized School Choice System
papers.authors: Kehinde F. Ajayi, Willa H. Friedman, Adrienne M. Lucas
papers.abstract: Students often make school choice decisions with inadequate information. We present results from delivering information to randomly selected students (and some randomly selected parents) across 900 junior high schools in Ghana, a country with universal secondary school choice. We provided guidance on application strategies and reported the selectivity and exit exam performance of secondary schools, information students and parents prioritized. We find that despite information changing the characteristics of schools to which students applied and students gaining admission to higher value-added schools, they were not more likely to matriculate on time or at all. Information was not the only constraint.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, PE；JEL：D84, I21, I24, I25, O15
papers.zh_title: 当信息不足时：来自集中择校系统的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 学生通常在信息不足的情况下做出择校决定。我们展示了向加纳900所初中随机选择的学生（以及一些随机选择的家长）提供信息的结果，加纳是一个拥有普及高中择校制度的国家。我们提供了关于申请策略的指导，并报告了中学的选择性和毕业考试成绩，这是学生和家长优先考虑的信息。我们发现，尽管信息改变了学生申请的学校特征，并且学生被录取到了增值更高的学校，但他们按时入学或根本入学的可能性并没有增加。信息并非唯一的约束。

papers.title: The Unemployed With Jobs and Without Jobs
papers.authors: Robert E. Hall, Marianna Kudlyak
papers.abstract: Potential workers are classified as unemployed if they seek work but are not working. The unemployed population contains two groups—those with jobs and those without jobs. Those with jobs are on furlough or temporary layoff. This group expanded tremendously in April 2020, at the trough of the pandemic recession. They wait out periods of non-work with the understanding that their jobs still exist and that they will be recalled. We show that the resulting temporary-layoff unemployment mostly dissipated by the end of 2020. Potential workers without jobs constitute what we call jobless unemployment. Shocks that elevate jobless unemployment have much more persistent effects. Historical major adverse shocks, such as the financial crisis in 2008, created mostly jobless unemployment and consequently caused extended periods of elevated unemployment. Jobless unemployment reached its pandemic peak in November 2020, at 4.9%, modest by historical standards, and has declined at a faster-than-historical pace since.
papers.zh_title: 有工作的失业者和无工作的失业者
papers.zh_abstract: 潜在工人如果正在寻找工作但没有工作，则被归类为失业。失业人口包含两个群体——有工作的和没有工作的。有工作的人处于休假或临时裁员状态。这一群体在2020年4月，即大流行衰退的最低点，急剧扩大。他们在不工作期间等待，并理解他们的工作仍然存在，他们将被召回。我们表明，由此产生的临时裁员失业在2020年底基本消散。没有工作的潜在工人构成了我们所谓的无工作失业。推高无工作失业的冲击具有更持久的影响。历史上的重大不利冲击，例如2008年的金融危机，主要造成了无工作失业，并因此导致了失业率长期居高不下。无工作失业在2020年11月达到大流行峰值4.9%，按历史标准衡量是温和的，并且此后以快于历史的速度下降。

papers.title: State Investment in Higher Education: Effects on Human Capital Formation, Student Debt, and Long-term Financial Outcomes of Students
papers.authors: Rajashri Chakrabarti, Nicole Gorton, Michael F. Lovenheim
papers.abstract: Most public colleges and universities rely heavily on state financial support. As state budgets have tightened in recent decades, appropriations for higher education have declined substantially. Despite concerns expressed by policymakers and scholars that the declines in state support have reduced the return to education investment for public sector students, little evidence exists that can identify the causal effect of these funds on long-run outcomes. We present the first such analysis in the literature using new data that leverages the merger of two rich datasets: consumer credit records from the New York Fed's Consumer Credit Panel (CCP) sourced from Equifax and administrative college enrollment and attainment data from the National Student Clearinghouse. We overcome identification concerns related to the endogeneity of state appropriation variation using an instrument that interacts the baseline share of total revenue that comes from state appropriations at each public institution with yearly variation in state-level appropriations. Our analysis is conducted separately for two-year and four-year students, and we analyze individuals into their mid-30s. For four-year students, we find that state appropriation increases lead to substantially lower student debt originations. They also react to appropriation increases by shortening their time to degree, but we find little effect on other outcomes. In the two-year sector, state appropriation increases lead to more collegiate and post-collegiate educational attainment, more educational debt consistent with the increased educational attainment, but lower likelihood of delinquency and default. State support also leads to more car and home ownership with lower adverse debt outcomes, and these students experience substantial increases in their credit score and in the affluence of the neighborhood in which they live. Examining mechanisms, we find state appropriations are passed on to students in the form of lower tuition in the four-year sector with no institutional spending response. For community colleges, we find evidence of both price and quality mechanisms, the latter captured in higher educational resources in key spending categories. These results are consistent with the different pattern of effects we document in the four-year and two-year sectors. Our results underscore the importance of state support for higher education in driving student debt outcomes and the long-run returns to postsecondary investments students experience.
papers.zh_title: 州高等教育投资：对学生人力资本形成、学生债务和长期财务结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 大多数公立学院和大学严重依赖州的财政支持。随着近几十年来州预算收紧，高等教育拨款大幅下降。尽管政策制定者和学者担心州支持的减少降低了公立部门学生的教育投资回报，但很少有证据能够识别这些资金对长期结果的因果效应。我们利用新数据进行了文献中的首次此类分析，该数据融合了两个丰富的数据集：来自纽约联储消费者信贷小组（CCP）的消费者信用记录（源自Equifax）和来自国家学生信息交换所的行政大学入学和毕业数据。我们使用一个工具变量克服了与州拨款变化内生性相关的识别问题，该工具变量将每所公立机构来自州拨款的基线总收入份额与州级拨款的年度变化进行交互。我们的分析分别针对两年制和四年制学生进行，并分析个体直至其30多岁。对于四年制学生，我们发现州拨款增加导致学生债务发放大幅降低。他们还通过缩短获得学位的时间来应对拨款增加，但我们发现对其他结果影响甚微。在两年制部门，州拨款增加导致更高的大学和大学后教育成就，更多的教育债务（与教育成就增加一致），但违约和拖欠的可能性更低。州支持还导致更多的汽车和房屋所有权，同时不良债务结果更少，这些学生的信用评分和他们居住社区的富裕程度都大幅提高。在考察机制时，我们发现州拨款以四年制部门学费降低的形式传递给学生，而机构支出没有反应。对于社区学院，我们发现了价格机制和质量机制的证据，后者体现在关键支出类别中更高的教育资源上。这些结果与我们记录的四年制和两年制部门的不同影响模式一致。我们的结果强调了州对高等教育的支持在推动学生债务结果和学生所经历的中学后投资长期回报方面的重要性。

papers.title: The Effects of Government Licensing on E-commerce: Evidence from Alibaba
papers.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Zhentong Lu, Xiaolu Zhou, Chunxiao Li
papers.abstract: Using proprietary data from Alibaba, we examine how the 2015 Food Safety Law (FSL) affects e-commerce in China. The FSL requires most food sellers on e-commerce platforms to obtain a valid, online license for retail food handling. Because the FSL was rolled out progressively, we have a rare opportunity to observe a gradual transition from voluntary certification to partial licensing and mandatory licensing.\nData summary shows that, conditional on sellers with valid licensing information, those that had a better online reputation and more online food sales before FSL tend to display their FSL license earlier on the platform, and buyers are more willing to transact with a seller after she displays her FSL license. \nTo identify the causal impact of the FSL, we compare food and non-food categories via synthetic control matching. We find the average quality of surviving food sellers has improved after partial and mandatory licensing, partly because those who are unwilling to obtain the FSL license must exit the platform. Despite an increase in seller concentration, the platform's gross merchandise value (GMV) in the food category did not decline post FSL, nor did the average sales price increase significantly one year into full enforcement of the FSL.
papers.zh_title: 政府许可对电子商务的影响：来自阿里巴巴的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用阿里巴巴的专有数据，我们研究了2015年《食品安全法》如何影响中国的电子商务。《食品安全法》要求电子商务平台上的大多数食品销售者获得有效的在线零售食品经营许可证。由于《食品安全法》是逐步推行的，我们难得有机会观察到从自愿认证到部分许可再到强制许可的渐进过渡。数据总结显示，在拥有有效许可信息的卖家中，那些在《食品安全法》实施前拥有更好在线声誉和更多在线食品销售的卖家更倾向于在平台上更早展示其《食品安全法》许可证，而买家在卖家展示其《食品安全法》许可证后更愿意与其交易。为了识别《食品安全法》的因果影响，我们通过合成控制匹配比较了食品和非食品类别。我们发现，在部分许可和强制许可之后，幸存食品卖家的平均质量有所提高，部分原因是那些不愿获得《食品安全法》许可证的卖家必须退出平台。尽管卖家集中度有所增加，但平台在食品类别的总商品交易额在《食品安全法》实施后并未下降，且在《食品安全法》全面实施一年后，平均销售价格也未显著上涨。

papers.title: Renegotiation in Debt Chains
papers.authors: Vincent Glode, Christian Opp
papers.abstract: We develop a tractable model of strategic debt renegotiation in which businesses are sequentially interconnected through their liabilities. This financing structure, which we refer to as a debt chain, gives rise to externalities as a lender’s willingness to provide concessions to his privately-informed borrower depends on how this lender’s own liabilities are expected to be renegotiated. Our analysis reveals how targeted government subsidies and debt reductions as well as incentives for early renegotiation following large economic shocks such as COVID-19 or a financial crisis can prevent default waves.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：G21, G32, G33, G38
papers.zh_title: 债务链中的重新谈判
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个易于处理的战略债务重新谈判模型，其中企业通过其负债顺序相互连接。这种融资结构（我们称之为债务链）产生了外部性，因为贷款人向掌握私人信息的借款人提供让步的意愿取决于该贷款人自身的负债预计将如何被重新谈判。我们的分析揭示了，在COVID-19或金融危机等大规模经济冲击之后，有针对性的政府补贴和债务减免以及早期重新谈判的激励措施如何能够防止违约浪潮。

papers.title: A Cost/Benefit Analysis of Clinical Trial Designs for COVID-19 Vaccine Candidates
papers.authors: Donald A. Berry, Scott Berry, Peter Hale, Leah Isakov, Andrew W. Lo, Kien Wei Siah, Chi Heem Wong
papers.abstract: We compare and contrast the expected duration and number of infections and deaths averted among several designs for clinical trials of COVID-19 vaccine candidates, including traditional randomized clinical trials and adaptive and human challenge trials. Using epidemiological models calibrated to the current pandemic, we simulate the time course of each clinical trial design for 504 unique combinations of parameters, allowing us to determine which trial design is most effective for a given scenario. A human challenge trial provides maximal net benefits—averting an additional 1.1M infections and 8,000 deaths in the U.S. compared to the next best clinical trial design—if its set-up time is short or the pandemic spreads slowly. In most of the other cases, an adaptive trial provides greater net benefits.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19候选疫苗临床试验设计的成本效益分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们比较和对比了几种COVID-19候选疫苗临床试验设计的预期持续时间以及避免的感染和死亡人数，包括传统的随机临床试验、适应性试验和人类挑战试验。使用根据当前大流行校准的流行病学模型，我们模拟了每种临床试验设计在504种独特参数组合下的时间进程，从而能够确定在给定情景下哪种试验设计最有效。如果人类挑战试验的设置时间短或大流行传播缓慢，则其提供最大的净效益——与次优的临床试验设计相比，在美国额外避免了110万例感染和8000例死亡。在大多数其他情况下，适应性试验提供更大的净效益。

papers.title: The Distribution of COVID-19 Related Risks
papers.authors: Patrick Baylis, Pierre-Loup Beauregard, Marie Connolly, Nicole Fortin, David A. Green, Pablo Gutierrez Cubillos, Sam Gyetvay, Catherine Haeck, Timea Laura Molnar, Gaëlle Simard-Duplain, Henry E. Siu, Maria teNyenhuis, Casey Warman
papers.abstract: This paper documents two COVID-related risks, viral risk and employment risk, and their distributions across the Canadian population. The measurement of viral risk is based on the VSE COVID Risk/Reward Assessment Tool, created to assist policymakers in determining the impacts of economic shutdowns and re-openings over the course of the pandemic. We document that women are more concentrated in high viral risk occupations and that this is the source of their greater employment loss over the course of the pandemic so far. They were also less likely to maintain one form of contact with their former employers, reducing employment recovery rates. Low educated workers face the same virus risk rates as high educated workers but much higher employment losses. Based on a rough counterfactual exercise, this is largely accounted for by their lower likelihood of switching to working from home which, in turn, is related to living conditions such as living in crowded dwellings. For both women and the low educated, existing inequities in their occupational distributions and living situations have resulted in them bearing a disproportionate amount of the risk emerging from the pandemic. Assortative matching in couples has tended to exacerbate risk inequities.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, LS；JEL：E32, I18, J15, J16, J21
papers.zh_title: COVID-19相关风险的分布
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了两种与COVID相关的风险，即病毒风险和就业风险，及其在加拿大人口中的分布。病毒风险的测量基于VSE COVID风险/回报评估工具，该工具旨在帮助政策制定者确定大流行期间经济关闭和重新开放的影响。我们记录到，女性更集中于高病毒风险职业，这是她们在大流行期间迄今遭受更大就业损失的原因。她们也更不可能与前雇主保持一种形式的联系，从而降低了就业恢复率。低教育水平工人面临与高教育水平工人相同的病毒风险率，但就业损失却高得多。基于一个粗略的反事实练习，这主要是由于他们转向居家办公的可能性较低，而这又与居住条件（如居住在拥挤的住房中）有关。对于女性和低教育水平者而言，其职业分布和居住状况中现有的不平等导致他们承担了大流行中出现的过大比例的风险。夫妻间的选型匹配往往加剧了风险不平等。

papers.title: Incentivizing Negative Emissions Through Carbon Shares
papers.authors: Derek Lemoine
papers.abstract: I analyze a novel climate policy instrument that attaches a transferable asset to each unit of carbon in the atmosphere. I show that this instrument improves on an emission tax by incentivizing both optimal emission reductions and optimal removal of past emissions. Emitters post a bond equal to the worst-case social cost of carbon, and the regulator deducts damages as they are realized over time. Quantitatively, a bond that is double the optimal emission tax is sufficient to provide optimal carbon removal incentives in 95% of cases.
papers.zh_title: 通过碳份额激励负排放
papers.zh_abstract: 我分析了一种新颖的气候政策工具，该工具将一种可转让资产附加到大气中的每单位碳上。我表明，该工具通过激励最优的减排和最优的过去排放清除，改进了排放税。排放者缴纳一笔等于最坏情况社会碳成本的债券，监管机构随着时间推移扣除实际发生的损害。定量分析表明，在95%的情况下，相当于最优排放税两倍的债券足以提供最优的碳清除激励。

papers.title: Using Satellite Imagery to Understand and Promote Sustainable Development
papers.authors: Marshall Burke, Anne Driscoll, David Lobell, Stefano Ermon
papers.abstract: Accurate and comprehensive measurements of a range of sustainable development outcomes are fundamental inputs into both research and policy. We synthesize the growing literature that uses satellite imagery to understand these outcomes, with a focus on approaches that combine imagery with machine learning. We quantify the paucity of ground data on key human-related outcomes and the growing abundance and resolution (spatial, temporal, and spectral) of satellite imagery. We then review recent machine learning approaches to model-building in the context of scarce and noisy training data, highlighting how this noise often leads to incorrect assessment of models’ predictive performance. We quantify recent model performance across multiple sustainable development domains, discuss research and policy applications, explore constraints to future progress, and highlight key research directions for the field.
papers.zh_title: 利用卫星图像理解和促进可持续发展
papers.zh_abstract: 一系列可持续发展成果的准确和全面测量是研究和政策的基本输入。我们综合了利用卫星图像理解这些成果的日益增长的文献，重点关注将图像与机器学习相结合的方法。我们量化了关键人类相关成果地面数据的匮乏以及卫星图像日益增长的丰富性和分辨率（空间、时间和光谱）。然后，我们回顾了在训练数据稀缺且有噪声的背景下最近的机器学习建模方法，强调这种噪声如何常常导致对模型预测性能的错误评估。我们量化了最近模型在多个可持续发展领域的性能，讨论了研究和政策应用，探讨了未来进展的制约因素，并强调了该领域的关键研究方向。

papers.title: A Toolkit for Solving Models with a Lower Bound on Interest Rates of Stochastic Duration
papers.authors: Gauti B. Eggertsson, Sergey K. Egiev, Alessandro Lin, Josef Platzer, Luca Riva
papers.abstract: This paper presents a toolkit to solve for equilibrium in economies with the effective lower bound (ELB) on the nominal interest rate in a computationally efficient way under a special assumption about the underlying shock process, a two-state Markov process with an absorbing state. We illustrate the algorithm in the canonical New Keynesian model, replicating the optimal monetary policy in Eggertsson and Woodford (2003), as well as showing how the toolkit can be used to analyse the medium-scale DSGE model developed by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York. As an application, we show how various policy rules perform relative to the optimal commitment equilibrium. A key conclusion is that previously suggested policy rules – such as price level targeting and nominal GDP targeting – do not perform well when there is a small drop in the price level, as observed during the Great Recession, because they do not imply sufficiently strong commitment to low future interest rates (“make-up strategy”). We propose two new policy rules, Cumulative Nominal GDP Targeting Rule and Symmetric Dual-Objective Targeting Rule that are more robust. Had these policies been in place in 2008, they would have reduced the output contraction by approximately 80 percent. If the Federal Reserve had followed Average Inflation Targeting – which can arguably approximate the new policy framework announced in August 2020 – the output contraction would have been roughly 25 percent smaller.
papers.zh_title: 求解具有随机持续期限利率下限的模型的工具包
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了一个工具包，用于在关于潜在冲击过程（一个具有吸收状态的两状态马尔可夫过程）的特殊假设下，以计算高效的方式求解名义利率存在有效下限的经济体中的均衡。我们在经典的新凯恩斯模型中说明了该算法，复制了Eggertsson和Woodford（2003）的最优货币政策，并展示了该工具包如何用于分析纽约联邦储备银行开发的中等规模DSGE模型。作为一个应用，我们展示了各种政策规则相对于最优承诺均衡的表现。一个关键结论是，先前提出的政策规则——如价格水平目标和名义GDP目标——在价格水平小幅下降时（如大衰退期间所观察到的）表现不佳，因为它们没有意味着对未来低利率的足够强承诺（“弥补策略”）。我们提出了两个新的政策规则，即累积名义GDP目标规则和对称双目标目标规则，它们更加稳健。如果这些政策在2008年实施，它们本可以将产出收缩减少约80%。如果美联储遵循平均通胀目标——这可以说近似于2020年8月宣布的新政策框架——产出收缩本可以减少约25%。

papers.title: Bank Liquidity Provision Across the Firm Size Distribution
papers.authors: Gabriel Chodorow-Reich, Olivier Darmouni, Stephan Luck, Matthew C. Plosser
papers.abstract: We use supervisory loan-level data to document that small firms (SMEs) obtain shorter maturity credit lines than large firms; have less active maturity management; post more collateral; have higher utilization rates; and pay higher spreads. We rationalize these facts as the equilibrium outcome of a trade-off between lender commitment and discretion. Using the COVID recession, we test the prediction that SMEs are subject to greater lender discretion by examining credit line utilization. We show that SMEs do not drawdown in contrast to large firms despite SME demand, but that PPP loans helped alleviate the shortfall.
papers.zh_title: 银行流动性供给与企业规模分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用监管层面的贷款数据记录到，小企业（SMEs）获得的信贷额度期限比大企业短；其期限管理活跃度较低；抵押品要求更高；信贷额度利用率更高；且支付的利差更高。我们将这些事实合理化，视为贷款人承诺与自由裁量权之间权衡的均衡结果。利用新冠疫情衰退，我们通过考察信贷额度使用情况来检验小企业面临更大贷款人自由裁量权的预测。我们发现，尽管小企业有需求，但它们并未像大企业那样提取信贷额度，而薪资保护计划（PPP）贷款有助于缓解这一短缺。

papers.title: Temptation and Commitment: A Model of Hand-to-Mouth Behavior
papers.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Agnes Kovacs, Patrick Moran
papers.abstract: This paper presents a model of consumption behavior that explains the presence of ‘wealthy hand-to-mouth’ consumers using a mechanism that differs from those analyzed previously. We show that a two-asset model with temptation preferences generates a demand for commitment and thus illiquidity, leading to hand-to-mouth behavior even when liquid assets deliver higher returns than illiquid assets. This preference for illiquidity has important implications for consumption behaviour and for fiscal stimulus policies. Our model matches the recent empirical evidence that MPCs remain high even for large income shocks, suggesting a larger response to targeted fiscal stimulus than previously believed.
papers.zh_title: 诱惑与承诺：一个“手到口”消费行为的模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个消费行为模型，该模型通过一种与以往分析不同的机制来解释“富裕的手到口”消费者的存在。我们证明，一个包含诱惑偏好的双资产模型会产生对承诺（从而对非流动性）的需求，即使流动性资产带来的回报高于非流动性资产，也会导致手到口行为。这种对非流动性的偏好对消费行为和财政刺激政策具有重要影响。我们的模型与近期实证证据相符，即即使面对大额收入冲击，边际消费倾向（MPC）仍然很高，这表明对定向财政刺激的反应比先前认为的更大。

papers.title: Medical Research and Health Care Finance: Evidence from Academic Medical Centers
papers.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Misty L. Heggeness, Jennifer L. Kao
papers.abstract: Academic Medical Centers (AMCs)—comprising medical schools, teaching hospitals, and research laboratories—play an important role in US biomedical innovation. The Balanced Budget Act of 1997 changed reimbursements for Medicare inpatient claims and subsidies for medical residents. We compare AMCs' relative exposure to the reform and how these differences affect their researchers' ability to attract NIH grant funding, as well as the quantity, impact, and content of their publications. We find that in response to the reform, research activity increases by approximately 6%, with larger effects observed for “translational” and clinical research. We find little effect on clinical outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 医学研究与医疗融资：来自学术医疗中心的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 学术医疗中心（AMCs）——包括医学院、教学医院和研究实验室——在美国生物医学创新中扮演着重要角色。1997年的《平衡预算法案》改变了医疗保险住院索赔的报销方式以及对医学住院医师的补贴。我们比较了各学术医疗中心对该改革的相对暴露程度，以及这些差异如何影响其研究人员吸引美国国立卫生研究院（NIH）资助的能力，以及其出版物的数量、影响和内容。我们发现，作为对该改革的回应，研究活动增加了约6%，其中对“转化”研究和临床研究的影响更大。我们几乎没有发现对临床结果的影响。

papers.title: Have Exchange-Listed Firms Become Less Important for the Economy?
papers.authors: Frederik P. Schlingemann, René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: The firms listed on the stock market in aggregate contribute less to total non-farm employment and GDP now than in the 1970s. A major reason for this development is the decline of manufacturing and the growth of the service economy as firms providing services are less likely to be listed on exchanges. A firm’s stock market capitalization is much less instructive about its employment now than in earlier years. Listed stock market superstars account for less employment than they did in the 1970s. Market capitalizations have not become systematically less informative about firms’ contribution to GDP.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：E44, G23, G32, K22, L16
papers.zh_title: 交易所上市公司对经济的重要性是否已下降？
papers.zh_abstract: 总体而言，股票市场上市的公司对非农就业总量和国内生产总值（GDP）的贡献现在低于20世纪70年代。这一发展的一个主要原因是制造业的衰落和服务经济的增长，因为提供服务的公司上市的可能性较低。现在，一家公司的股票市值对其就业情况的指示作用远不如早年。上市股市巨星所贡献的就业量低于20世纪70年代。市值对公司GDP贡献的信息含量并未系统性降低。

papers.title: A Theory of Voluntary Testing and Self-isolation in an Ongoing Pandemic
papers.authors: Thomas F. Hellmann, Veikko Thiele
papers.abstract: Thinking beyond Covid-19, there is a growing interest in what economic structures will be needed to face ongoing pandemics. In this paper we focus on the diagnostic problem and examine a new paradigm of voluntary self-testing by private individuals. People without symptoms face daily choices of either taking the risk of going out (to work and socialize), versus staying at home in self-isolation. Our theory shows that two types of people voluntary test themselves: those who otherwise would have self-isolated, and those who would have gone out indiscriminately. Our central insight is that the equilibrium infection risk falls when home-based testing becomes cheaper and easier to use, even if tests are not always accurate. Our results challenge the clinical mainstream view that diagnostic testing is a prerogative of the medical profession, and supports the notion that frequent self-testing is vital for an economy facing an ongoing pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 持续大流行中自愿检测与自我隔离的理论
papers.zh_abstract: 超越新冠疫情，人们越来越关注需要什么样的经济结构来应对持续的大流行。在本文中，我们聚焦于诊断问题，并研究一种由私人个体进行自愿自我检测的新范式。没有症状的人每天都面临着选择：要么冒险外出（工作和社交），要么待在家中自我隔离。我们的理论表明，有两类人会自愿进行检测：一类是原本会自我隔离的人，另一类是原本会不加区分地外出的人。我们的核心见解是，当家庭检测变得更便宜、更易用时，均衡感染风险会下降，即使检测并非总是准确。我们的结果挑战了临床主流观点——即诊断检测是医疗行业的特权，并支持了以下观点：频繁的自我检测对于面临持续大流行的经济体至关重要。

papers.title: Who Benefits From the Child Tax Credit?
papers.authors: Jacob Goldin, Katherine Michelmore
papers.abstract: In recent years, the Child Tax Credit (CTC) has provided a cash transfer of up to $2,000 per child under age 17 to millions of families in the United States. Using the Current Population Survey, we examine the aggregate effects and distributional implications of the rules governing the credit. We focus on the rules that were in place for years prior to 2021 and that are currently scheduled to apply for years beginning in 2022. While approximately 90% of children benefit to at least some degree from the CTC, we document striking disparities in eligibility and benefits by income and race. The vast majority of children living in households in the bottom decile of the national income distribution are completely ineligible for the CTC and the majority of filers in the bottom thirty percent are eligible only for a partial credit. In contrast, virtually all children living in households in the top half of the income distribution qualify for the full credit amount. Approximately three-quarters of white, non-Hispanic and Asian children are eligible for the full CTC, compared to only about half of Black and Hispanic children. We use our results to estimate the distributional effects of a range of reforms to the CTC eligibility rules. Our results suggest that reforming the credit to include a larger share of children would more evenly distribute the credit’s benefits across children of different races and incomes.
papers.zh_title: 谁从儿童税收抵免中受益？
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，儿童税收抵免（CTC）为美国数百万家庭提供了每名17岁以下儿童最高2000美元的现金转移。利用当前人口调查数据，我们研究了管理该抵免规则的总体效应和分配影响。我们重点关注2021年之前实施且目前计划从2022年开始适用的规则。虽然约90%的儿童在某种程度上受益于CTC，但我们发现按收入和种族划分的资格和福利存在显著差异。绝大多数居住在全国收入分配底层十分位家庭的儿童完全不符合CTC资格，而底层30%收入群体中的多数申报者仅能获得部分抵免。相比之下，几乎所有居住在上半部分收入分配家庭的儿童都有资格获得全额抵免。约四分之三的非西班牙裔白人和亚裔儿童有资格获得全额CTC，而黑人和西班牙裔儿童中这一比例仅约一半。我们利用研究结果估算了多项CTC资格规则改革的分配效应。结果表明，改革抵免规则以覆盖更多儿童，将更均匀地在不同种族和收入的儿童之间分配抵免福利。

papers.title: Corporate Taxation and the Distribution of Income
papers.authors: James R. Hines Jr.
papers.abstract: Higher corporate taxes reduce corporate business operations, replacing them with operations by noncorporate businesses that are risky and have undiversified ownership. This shift contributes to income dispersion, with effects so large that higher corporate taxes can increase income inequality even when the corporate tax burden falls entirely on capital owned disproportionately by the rich. Estimates suggest that the riskiness of U.S. noncorporate business increases by 12.3% the aggregate income of the top one percent, and that income dispersion created by a higher U.S. corporate tax rate offsets more than half of the distributional effects of reducing average returns to capital.
papers.zh_title: 公司税与收入分配
papers.zh_abstract: 更高的公司税会减少公司业务运营，取而代之的是风险较高且所有权分散的非公司企业运营。这种转变加剧了收入分散，其影响如此之大，以至于即使公司税负完全由富人不成比例拥有的资本承担，更高的公司税也可能加剧收入不平等。估计表明，美国非公司企业的风险性使最顶层1%人群的总收入增加了12.3%，而更高的美国公司税率所产生的收入分散抵消了降低资本平均回报率分配效应的一半以上。

papers.title: Highways and Globalization
papers.authors: Taylor Jaworski, Carl Kitchens, Sergey Nigai
papers.abstract: This paper quantifies the value of US highways. We develop a multisector general equilibrium model with many locations in the United States (i.e., counties) and many countries. In the model, producers choose shipping routes subject to domestic and international trade costs, endogenous congestion, and port efficiency at international transshipment points. Applying the model, we find that removing the Interstate Highway System reduces real GDP by $421-$578 billion. The results highlight the gains from intersectoral and international trade as well as the role of domestic transportation infrastructure in shaping regional comparative advantage.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ITI；JEL：F11, F14, H54, R13, R42
papers.zh_title: 高速公路与全球化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文量化了美国高速公路的价值。我们构建了一个包含美国多个地点（即县）和多个国家的多部门一般均衡模型。在该模型中，生产者在面临国内和国际贸易成本、内生拥堵以及国际转运点港口效率的情况下选择运输路线。应用该模型，我们发现拆除州际公路系统将使实际GDP减少4210亿至5780亿美元。结果突显了部门间和国际贸易的收益，以及国内交通基础设施在塑造区域比较优势中的作用。

papers.title: Powering Work from Home
papers.authors: Steve Cicala
papers.abstract: This paper documents an increase in residential electricity consumption while industrial and commercial consumption has fallen during the COVID-19 pandemic in the United States. Hourly smart meter data from Texas reveals how daily routines changed during the pandemic, with usage during weekdays closely resembling those of weekends. The 16% residential increase during work hours offsets the declines from commercial and industrial customers. Using monthly data from electric utilities nationwide, I find a 10% increase in residential consumption, and a 12% and 14% reduction in commercial and industrial usage, respectively, during the second quarter of 2020. This contrasts with the financial crisis of 2008, which also witnessed a rapid decline in industrial electricity consumption, but left residential usage unaffected. The increase in residential consumption is found to be positively associated with the share of the labor force that may work from home. From April through July of 2020, total excess expenditure on residential electricity was nearly $6B.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IO, PE；JEL：G5, L94, Q4
papers.zh_title: 为居家办公提供电力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了COVID-19疫情期间美国居民用电量增加，而工业和商业用电量下降的情况。德克萨斯州的每小时智能电表数据揭示了疫情期间日常作息的变化，工作日的用电模式与周末非常相似。工作时间内居民用电量增加16%，抵消了商业和工业客户的用电量下降。利用全国电力公司的月度数据，我发现2020年第二季度居民用电量增加了10%，而商业和工业用电量分别减少了12%和14%。这与2008年金融危机形成对比，当时工业用电量也迅速下降，但居民用电量未受影响。研究发现，居民用电量的增加与可能居家办公的劳动力比例呈正相关。从2020年4月到7月，居民用电的总超额支出接近60亿美元。

papers.title: The Effects of the Affordable Care Act on the Near-Elderly: Evidence for Health Insurance Coverage and Labor Market Outcomes
papers.authors: Mark Duggan, Gopi Shah Goda, Gina Li
papers.abstract: The Affordable Care Act (ACA) not only changed the landscape of health insurance coverage in the United States, but also affected the relationship between working decisions and health insurance. In this paper, we estimate the impact of the ACA on the near-elderly (ages 60- 64) in the five years after the implementation of its key provisions in early 2014. We exploit variation across geographic areas in the pre-existing level of uninsurance and use 65-69 year olds, whose insurance coverage was unaffected by the ACA, as a within-region control group. Our findings indicate that the ACA increased health insurance coverage among the near elderly by 4.5 percentage points and reduced their labor force participation rate by 0.6 percentage points.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H2, H31, H51, H75, I13, J14, J21, J26
papers.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》对临近退休人群的影响：健康保险覆盖与劳动力市场结果的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 《平价医疗法案》（ACA）不仅改变了美国健康保险覆盖的格局，还影响了工作决策与健康保险之间的关系。在本文中，我们估算了ACA在2014年初其主要条款实施后的五年内对临近退休人群（60-64岁）的影响。我们利用不同地理区域在ACA实施前未参保率的差异，并将保险覆盖不受ACA影响的65-69岁人群作为区域内对照组。我们的研究结果表明，ACA使临近退休人群的健康保险覆盖率提高了4.5个百分点，并使其劳动力参与率降低了0.6个百分点。

papers.title: A Q-Theory of Banks
papers.authors: Juliane Begenau, Saki Bigio, Jeremy Majerovitz, Matias Vieyra
papers.abstract: We introduce a dynamic bank theory featuring delayed loss recognition and a regulatory capital constraint, aiming to match the bank leverage dynamics captured by Tobin’s Q. We start from four facts: (1) book and market equity values diverge, especially during crises; (2) Tobin’s Q predicts future bank profitability; (3) neither book nor market leverage constraints are strictly binding for most banks; and (4) bank leverage and Tobin’s Q are mean reverting but highly persistent. We demonstrate that delayed loss accounting rules interact with bank capital requirements, introducing a tradeoff between loan growth and financial fragility. Our welfare analysis implies that accounting rules and capital regulation should optimally be set jointly. This paper emphasizes the need to reconcile regulatory dependence on book values with the market’s emphasis on fundamental values to enhance understanding of banking dynamics and improve regulatory design.
papers.zh_title: 银行的Q理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个动态银行理论，该理论包含延迟损失确认和监管资本约束，旨在匹配由托宾Q捕捉的银行杠杆动态。我们从四个事实出发：（1）账面权益与市场权益价值出现背离，尤其是在危机期间；（2）托宾Q预测银行未来盈利能力；（3）对大多数银行而言，账面和市场杠杆约束均未严格约束；（4）银行杠杆和托宾Q均值回归但高度持久。我们证明，延迟损失会计规则与银行资本要求相互作用，引入了贷款增长与金融脆弱性之间的权衡。我们的福利分析表明，会计规则和资本监管应最优地联合设定。本文强调了协调监管对账面价值的依赖与市场对基本价值的关注的必要性，以增进对银行动态的理解并改进监管设计。

papers.title: Firm Dynamics and Trade
papers.authors: George A. Alessandria, Costas Arkolakis, Kim J. Ruhl
papers.abstract: We review the literature that studies the dynamics of firms in foreign markets, both at the intensive and extensive margins, and their aggregate implications. We first summarize a set of micro facts on exporter entry, expansion, contraction, and exit and macro facts about the response of aggregate trade flows to trade-policy and business-cycle shocks. We then present the canonical model developed in the literature to account for these facts and discuss its connection to the empirical evidence. We show how three model features — future uncertain profits, an investment in market access, and high depreciation of that access upon exit — generate transition dynamics and long-run aggregate outcomes from a cut in tariffs. The model and its extensions contribute to our understanding of the dynamics of trade integration and the evolution of future trade barriers. We discuss the key challenges faced by the canonical model, possible extensions, and applications of the framework to recent global events.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：F1, F11, F12, F14, F15, F41, F61, F62
papers.zh_title: 企业动态与贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了研究企业在国外市场动态的文献，包括集约边际和广延边际，及其总体影响。我们首先总结了关于出口企业进入、扩张、收缩和退出的微观事实，以及关于贸易流量对贸易政策和商业周期冲击反应的宏观事实。然后，我们介绍了文献中为解释这些事实而发展的经典模型，并讨论了其与经验证据的联系。我们展示了三个模型特征——未来不确定的利润、市场准入投资以及退出时该准入的高折旧——如何从关税削减中产生转型动态和长期总体结果。该模型及其扩展有助于我们理解贸易一体化的动态和未来贸易壁垒的演变。我们讨论了经典模型面临的主要挑战、可能的扩展以及该框架在近期全球事件中的应用。

papers.title: Teenage Driving, Mortality, and Risky Behaviors
papers.authors: Jason U. Huh, Julian Reif
papers.abstract: We investigate the effect of teenage driving on mortality and risky behaviors in the United States using a regression discontinuity design. We estimate that motor vehicle fatalities rise by 40% at the minimum legal driving age cutoff, implying a mortality risk per additional mile driven 6-9 times higher than the risk faced by adult drivers. We also find a stark 80% increase in female deaths from drug overdoses and carbon monoxide poisoning at the cutoff, caused by changes in both suicides and accidental deaths. Our analysis suggests driving regulations could be an effective tool to improve teenage health.
papers.zh_title: 青少年驾驶、死亡率与风险行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用断点回归设计研究了美国青少年驾驶对死亡率和风险行为的影响。我们估计，在法定最低驾驶年龄临界点，机动车死亡人数上升了40%，这意味着每额外行驶一英里的死亡风险是成年驾驶员所面临风险的6-9倍。我们还发现，在该临界点，女性因药物过量和一氧化碳中毒导致的死亡人数急剧增加了80%，这是由自杀和意外死亡的变化共同造成的。我们的分析表明，驾驶法规可能是改善青少年健康的有效工具。

papers.title: Did COVID-19 Market Disruptions Disrupt Food Security? Evidence from Households in Rural Liberia and Malawi
papers.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Dahyeon Jeong, Naresh Kumar, David Sungho Park, Jonathan Robinson, Alan Spearot
papers.abstract: We quantify the effect of market disruptions due to COVID-19 on the lives of households in rural areas of Liberia and Malawi, utilizing panel data from phone surveys that were implemented as part of a randomized cash transfer experiment. The surveys began collection several months before the pandemic and have continued throughout it. The household survey included a consistent set of internationally accepted and validated questions on food security (the household dietary diversity score, the household hunger scale, and the food consumption score). In both countries, market activity was severely disrupted and we observe large declines in income among market vendors, but we find no evidence of declines in food security for households in the short run. Even though we observe no adverse effects of the lockdowns on food security among the control group, cash transfers improved dietary quality and quantity over the low levels observed at baseline.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19市场混乱是否破坏了粮食安全？来自利比里亚和马拉维农村家庭的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用作为随机现金转移实验一部分的电话调查面板数据，量化了COVID-19导致的市场混乱对利比里亚和马拉维农村地区家庭生活的影响。调查在大流行前几个月开始收集数据，并贯穿整个大流行期间持续进行。家庭调查包含一套国际公认且经过验证的粮食安全相关问题（家庭膳食多样性评分、家庭饥饿量表和食物消费评分）。在这两个国家，市场活动受到严重干扰，我们观察到市场摊贩的收入大幅下降，但短期内未发现家庭粮食安全下降的证据。尽管我们观察到封锁对对照组家庭的粮食安全没有不利影响，但现金转移改善了基线观察到的低水平下的膳食质量和数量。

papers.title: A q Theory of Internal Capital Markets
papers.authors: Min Dai, Xavier Giroud, Wei Jiang, Neng Wang
papers.abstract: We propose a tractable model of dynamic investment, spinoﬀs, ﬁnancing, and risk management for a multi-division ﬁrm facing costly external ﬁnance. Our main results are: (1) within-ﬁrm resource allocation is based not only on the divisions’ productivity—as in “winner picking” models—but also their risk; (2) ﬁrms may voluntarily spin oﬀ productive divisions to increase liquidity; (3) diversiﬁcation can reduce ﬁrm value in low-liquidity states; (4) corporate socialism makes liquidity less valuable; (5) division investment is determined by the ratio between marginal q and marginal value of cash. We further generalize our model to account for capital redeployability, M&As, and managerial entrenchment.
papers.zh_title: 内部资本市场的q理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个多部门公司在面临昂贵外部融资时的动态投资、分拆、融资和风险管理的可处理模型。我们的主要结果是：（1）公司内部资源配置不仅基于各部门的生产率（如“赢家挑选”模型所述），还基于其风险；（2）公司可能自愿分拆高生产率部门以增加流动性；（3）多元化在低流动性状态下可能降低公司价值；（4）公司社会主义使流动性价值降低；（5）部门投资由边际q与现金边际价值之比决定。我们进一步将模型推广到考虑资本可重新部署性、并购和管理层固守。

papers.title: Neglected No More: Housing Markets, Mortgage Lending, and Sea Level Rise
papers.authors: Benjamin J. Keys, Philip Mulder
papers.abstract: In this paper, we explore dynamic changes in the capitalization of sea level rise (SLR) risk in housing and mortgage markets. Our results suggest a disconnect in coastal Florida real estate: From 2013-2018, home sales volumes in the most-SLR-exposed communities declined 16-20% relative to less-SLR-exposed areas, even as their sale prices grew in lockstep. Between 2018-2020, however, relative prices in these at-risk markets finally declined by roughly 5% from their peak. Lender behavior cannot reconcile these patterns, as we show that both all-cash and mortgage-financed purchases have similarly contracted, with little evidence of increases in loan denial or securitization. We propose a demand-side explanation for our findings where prospective buyers have become more pessimistic about climate change risk than prospective sellers. The lead-lag relationship between transaction volumes and prices in SLR-exposed markets is consistent with dynamics at the peak of prior real estate bubbles.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：G21, G22, G50, Q54, R21, R31
papers.zh_title: 不再被忽视：住房市场、抵押贷款与海平面上升
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们探讨了海平面上升风险在住房和抵押贷款市场中资本化的动态变化。我们的结果表明佛罗里达州沿海房地产存在脱节现象：从2013年到2018年，与海平面上升风险较低的地区相比，海平面上升风险最高社区的房屋销售量下降了16-20%，尽管其销售价格同步增长。然而，在2018年至2020年间，这些风险市场的相对价格最终从峰值下降了约5%。贷款人行为无法解释这些模式，因为我们显示全现金和抵押贷款融资的购买均出现类似收缩，几乎没有证据表明贷款拒绝或证券化增加。我们提出了一种需求侧解释，即潜在买家对气候变化风险的悲观程度高于潜在卖家。海平面上升风险市场中交易量与价格之间的领先-滞后关系与先前房地产泡沫高峰期的动态一致。

papers.title: De-globalization: Driven by Global Crises?
papers.authors: Assaf Razin
papers.abstract: International trade increased rapidly after 1990, fueled by the growth of a complex network of global value chains. Financial globalization gathered force. Trade globalization, however, reversed course since the Global Financial Crisis. The new trend is expected to endure after the Global Pandemic Crisis. There is no indication so far of significant reversal of financial globalization.
papers.zh_title: 去全球化：由全球危机驱动？
papers.zh_abstract: 国际贸易在1990年后迅速增长，受到全球价值链复杂网络发展的推动。金融全球化也日益加强。然而，自全球金融危机以来，贸易全球化趋势逆转。这一新趋势预计在全球大流行危机后仍将持续。迄今为止，没有迹象表明金融全球化出现显著逆转。

papers.title: City Limits: What do Local-Area Minimum Wages Do?
papers.authors: Arindrajit Dube, Attila S. Lindner
papers.abstract: Cities are increasingly setting their own minimum wages, and this trend has accelerated sharply in recent years. While in 2010 there were only three cities with their own minimum wages exceeding the state or federal standard, by 2020 there were 42. This new phenomenon raises the question: is it desirable to have city-level variation in minimum wage polices? We discuss the main trade-offs emerging from local variation in minimum wage polices and evaluate their empirical relevance. First, we document what type of cities raise minimum wages and we discuss how these characteristics can potentially impact the effectiveness of city-level minimum wage policies. Second, we summarize the evolving evidence on city-level minimum wage changes and provide some new evidence of our own. Early evidence suggests that the impact of the policy on wages and employment to date has been broadly similar to the evidence on state and federal-level minimum wage changes. Overall, city-level minimum wages seem to be able to tailor the policy to local economic environment without imposing substantial distortions in allocation of labor and businesses across locations.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J01, J18, J2, J23, J3, J31, J38, J8, J88
papers.zh_title: 城市界限：地方最低工资有何作用？
papers.zh_abstract: 城市越来越多地设定自己的最低工资，这一趋势近年来急剧加速。2010年，只有三个城市的最低工资超过州或联邦标准，而到2020年已有42个。这一新现象引发了一个问题：城市层面的最低工资政策差异是否可取？我们讨论了地方最低工资政策差异带来的主要权衡，并评估其经验相关性。首先，我们记录了哪些类型的城市提高了最低工资，并讨论了这些特征如何可能影响城市层面最低工资政策的有效性。其次，我们总结了城市层面最低工资变化的现有证据，并提供了一些我们自己的新证据。早期证据表明，迄今为止该政策对工资和就业的影响与州和联邦层面最低工资变化的证据大致相似。总体而言，城市层面的最低工资似乎能够根据当地经济环境调整政策，而不会在劳动力和企业跨地区配置中造成重大扭曲。

papers.title: Capital Flows in Risky Times: Risk-on/Risk-off and Emerging Market Tail Risk
papers.authors: Anusha Chari, Karlye Dilts Stedman, Christian Lundblad
papers.abstract: This paper characterizes the implications of risk-on/risk-off shocks for emerging market capital flows and returns. We document that these shocks have important implications not only for the median of emerging markets flows and returns but also for the left tail. Further, while there are some differences in the effects across bond vs. equity markets and flows vs. asset returns, the effects associated with the worst realizations are generally larger than that on the median realization. We apply our methodology to the COVID-19 shock to examine the pattern of flow and return realizations: the sizable risk-off nature of this shock engenders reactions that reside deep in the left tail of most relevant emerging market quantities.
papers.zh_title: 风险时期的资本流动：风险偏好/风险规避与新兴市场尾部风险
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了风险偏好/风险规避冲击对新兴市场资本流动和回报的影响。我们记录了这些冲击不仅对新兴市场流动和回报的中位数有重要影响，而且对左尾也有重要影响。此外，尽管债券与股票市场以及流动与资产回报之间的影响存在一些差异，但与最差实现值相关的影响通常大于中位数实现值的影响。我们将我们的方法应用于COVID-19冲击，以考察流动和回报实现值的模式：这一冲击显著的风险规避性质引发了大多数相关新兴市场数量指标深陷左尾的反应。

papers.title: Dominant Currencies: How Firms Choose Currency Invoicing and Why it Matters
papers.authors: Mary Amiti, Oleg Itskhoki, Jozef Konings
papers.abstract: Using new data on currency invoicing for Belgian firms, we analyze how firms make their currency choice, for both exports and imports, and the implications of this choice for exchange rate pass-through into prices and quantities. We derive our estimating equations from a theoretical framework featuring variable markups, international input sourcing, and staggered price setting with endogenous currency choice. Our structural specification provides a new test of the allocative consequences of nominal rigidities, by estimating the treatment effect of foreign-currency price stickiness on the dynamic response of prices and quantities, controlling for the endogeneity of the firm's currency choice. We show that flexible-price determinants of exchange rate pass-through are also the key firm characteristics that determine currency choice. In particular, small non-importing firms tend to price their exports in euros (producer currency) and exhibit complete exchange-rate pass-through into destination prices at all horizons. In contrast, large import-intensive firms tend to denominate their exports in foreign currencies, especially in the US dollar, exhibiting a lower pass-through of the euro-destination exchange rate and a pronounced sensitivity to the dollar-destination exchange rate. The effects of foreign-currency price stickiness are still significant beyond the one-year horizon, but gradually dissipate in the long run.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E31, F31, F41
papers.zh_title: 主导货币：企业如何选择发票货币及其重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 利用比利时企业发票货币的新数据，我们分析了企业如何为其出口和进口做出货币选择，以及这一选择对汇率传递至价格和数量的影响。我们从包含可变加成、国际投入采购和内生货币选择下的交错定价的理论框架中推导出估计方程。我们的结构规范通过估计外币价格粘性对价格和数量动态响应的处理效应，同时控制企业货币选择的内生性，为名义刚性的配置后果提供了新的检验。我们表明，汇率传递的灵活价格决定因素也是决定货币选择的关键企业特征。特别是，小型非进口企业倾向于以欧元（生产者货币）为其出口定价，并在所有时间范围内表现出完全的汇率传递至目的地价格。相反，大型进口密集型企业倾向于以外币（尤其是美元）计价其出口，表现出较低的欧元-目的地汇率传递，并对美元-目的地汇率表现出显著的敏感性。外币价格粘性的影响在一年期之后仍然显著，但在长期逐渐消失。

papers.title: Human Capital Depreciation and Returns to Experience
papers.authors: Michael Dinerstein, Rigissa Megalokonomou, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: Human capital can depreciate if skills are unused. But estimating human capital depreciation is challenging, as worker skills are difficult to measure and less productive workers are more likely to spend time in non-employment. We overcome these challenges with new administrative data on teachers’ assignments and their students’ outcomes, and quasi-random variation from the teacher assignment process in Greece. We find significant losses to output, as a one-year increase in time without formal employment lowers students’ test scores by 0.05 standard deviations. Using a simple production model, we estimate a skill depreciation rate of 4.3% and experience returns of 6.8%.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H52, I26, J24
papers.zh_title: 人力资本折旧与经验回报
papers.zh_abstract: 如果技能未被使用，人力资本可能会折旧。但估计人力资本折旧具有挑战性，因为工人技能难以衡量，且生产率较低的工人更可能处于非就业状态。我们利用希腊教师分配过程中教师任务和学生成果的新行政数据以及准随机变异克服了这些挑战。我们发现产出显著损失，因为非正式就业时间每增加一年，学生考试成绩下降0.05个标准差。使用一个简单的生产模型，我们估计技能折旧率为4.3%，经验回报率为6.8%。

papers.title: Temporary Unemployment and Labor Market Dynamics During the COVID-19 Recession
papers.authors: Jessica Gallant, Kory Kroft, Fabian Lange, Matthew J. Notowidigdo
papers.abstract: This paper develops a search-and-matching model that incorporates temporary unemployment and applies the model to study the labor market dynamics of the COVID-19 recession in the US. We calibrate the model using panel data from the Current Population Survey for 2001-2019, and we find that the model-based job finding rates match observed job finding rates during the entire sample period and out-of-sample up through July 2020. We also find that the Beveridge curve is well-behaved and displays little change in market tightness in 2020 once we use the calibrated model to adjust for changes in the composition of the unemployed. We then use the model to project the path of unemployment over the next 18 months. Under a range of assumptions about job losses and labor demand, our model predicts a more rapid recovery compared to a model that does not distinguish between temporary and permanent unemployment and compared to professional and academic forecasts. We find that in order to rationalize the professional forecasts of the unemployment rate, some combination of the vacancy rate, job separation rate, and recall rate of workers on temporary layoff must deteriorate substantially from current levels in the next several months.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情衰退期间的临时失业与劳动力市场动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个纳入临时失业的搜索匹配模型，并将其应用于研究美国新冠疫情衰退期间的劳动力市场动态。我们利用2001-2019年当前人口调查的面板数据对模型进行校准，发现基于模型的就业率与整个样本期间及截至2020年7月的样本外观测到的就业率相匹配。我们还发现，一旦使用校准模型调整失业者构成的变化，贝弗里奇曲线表现良好，且2020年市场紧张程度变化不大。随后，我们利用该模型预测未来18个月的失业路径。在一系列关于失业和劳动力需求的假设下，我们的模型预测的复苏速度比不区分临时失业和永久失业的模型以及专业和学术预测更快。我们发现，为了合理化专业预测的失业率，未来几个月内，职位空缺率、离职率和临时解雇工人的召回率必须从当前水平大幅恶化。

papers.title: Optimal Foreign Reserves and Central Bank Policy Under Financial Stress
papers.authors: Luis Felipe Céspedes, Roberto Chang
papers.abstract: We study the interaction between optimal foreign reserves accumulation and central bank international liquidity provision in a small open economy under financial stress. Firms and households finance investment and consumption by borrowing from domestic financial intermediaries (banks), which in turn borrow from abroad. Binding financial constraints can cause the domestic rate of interest to rise above the world rate and the real exchange rate to depreciate, leading to inefficiently low investment and consumption. A role then emerges for a central bank that accumulates reserves in order to provide liquidity if financial frictions bind. The optimal level of international reserves in this context depends, among other variables, on the term premium, the depth of financial markets, ex ante financial uncertainty and the precise way the central bank intervenes. The model is consistent with both the increase in international reserves observed during the period 2004-2008 and with policy intervention after the Lehman bankruptcy.
papers.zh_title: 金融压力下的最优外汇储备与中央银行政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个小型开放经济体在金融压力下最优外汇储备积累与中央银行国际流动性提供之间的相互作用。企业和家庭通过向国内金融中介（银行）借款来为投资和消费融资，而银行则从国外借款。具有约束力的金融约束可能导致国内利率上升至高于世界利率，并使实际汇率贬值，从而导致投资和消费低效低下。此时，中央银行的作用显现，它积累储备以便在金融摩擦出现时提供流动性。在此背景下，最优国际储备水平取决于期限溢价、金融市场深度、事前金融不确定性以及中央银行干预的具体方式等因素。该模型既与2004-2008年期间观察到的国际储备增长一致，也与雷曼兄弟破产后的政策干预相符。

papers.title: The Rise of Income and Wealth Inequality in America: Evidence from Distributional Macroeconomic Accounts
papers.authors: Emmanuel Saez, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: This paper studies inequality in America through the lens of distributional macroeconomic accounts—comprehensive distributions of the aggregate amount of income and wealth recorded in the official macroeconomic accounts of the United States. We use these distributional macroeconomic accounts to quantify the rise of income and wealth concentration since the late 1970s, the change in tax progressivity, and the direct redistributive effects of government intervention in the economy. Between 1978 and 2018, the share of pre-tax income earned by the top 1% rose from 10% to about 19% and the share of wealth owned by the top 0.1% rose from 7% to about 18%. In 2018, the tax system was regressive at the top end; the top 400 wealthiest Americans paid a lower average tax rate than the macroeconomic tax rate of 29%. We confront our methods and findings with those of other studies, pinpoint the areas where more research is needed, and describe how additional data collection could improve inequality measurement.
papers.zh_title: 美国收入与财富不平等的加剧：来自分配性宏观经济账户的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过分配性宏观经济账户的视角研究美国的不平等问题——这些账户提供了美国官方宏观经济账户中记录的总收入和总财富的全面分布。我们利用这些分配性宏观经济账户来量化自20世纪70年代末以来收入和财富集中度的上升、税收累进性的变化以及政府经济干预的直接再分配效应。1978年至2018年间，税前收入前1%人群的份额从10%上升到约19%，财富前0.1%人群的份额从7%上升到约18%。2018年，税收体系在顶层是累退的；最富有的400名美国人缴纳的平均税率低于29%的宏观税率。我们将我们的方法和发现与其他研究进行对比，指出需要更多研究的领域，并描述额外的数据收集如何能够改善不平等衡量。

papers.title: Trends in US Income and Wealth Inequality: Revising After the Revisionists
papers.authors: Emmanuel Saez, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: Recent studies argue that US inequality has increased less than previously thought, in particular due to a more modest rise of wealth and capital income at the top (Smith et al., 2019; Smith, Zidar and Zwick, 2020; Auten and Splinter, 2019). We examine the claims made in these papers point by point, separating genuine improvements from arguments that do not appear to us well grounded empirically or conceptually. Taking stock of this body of work, and factoring in other improvements, we provide a comprehensive update of our estimates of US income and wealth inequality. Although some of the points raised by the revisionists are valuable, the core quantitative findings of this literature do not appear to be supported by the data. The low capital share of private business income estimated in Smith et al. (2019) is not consistent with the large capital stock of these businesses. In Smith, Zidar and Zwick (2020), the interest rate assigned to the wealthy is higher than in the datasets where both income and wealth can be observed, leading to downward biased top wealth shares; capitalizing equities using almost only dividends dramatically underestimates the wealth of billionaires relative to the Forbes 400. In Auten and Splinter (2019), business profits earned by the top 1% but not taxable (due in particular to generous depreciation rules) are classified as tax evasion; tax evasion is then allocated to the bottom 99% based on an erroneous reading of random audit data. Our revised series show a rise of inequality similar to Saez and Zucman (2016) and Piketty, Saez, and Zucman (2018) while allowing for a more granular depiction of the composition of wealth and income at the top.
papers.zh_title: 美国收入与财富不平等趋势：修正后的再修正
papers.zh_abstract: 最近的研究认为，美国不平等程度的加剧小于之前的估计，特别是由于顶层财富和资本收入的增长更为温和（Smith等人，2019；Smith, Zidar和Zwick，2020；Auten和Splinter，2019）。我们逐点审视这些论文中提出的主张，将真正的改进与那些在我们看来缺乏实证或概念依据的论点区分开来。在总结这些研究成果并纳入其他改进的基础上，我们全面更新了美国收入和财富不平等的估计。尽管修正主义者提出的一些观点具有价值，但该文献的核心量化发现似乎并未得到数据支持。Smith等人（2019）估计的私营企业资本收入份额较低，与这些企业庞大的资本存量不一致。在Smith, Zidar和Zwick（2020）中，分配给富人的利率高于能够同时观测收入和财富的数据集中的利率，导致顶层财富份额估计偏低；几乎仅使用股息对股权进行资本化，严重低估了亿万富翁相对于福布斯400榜单的财富。在Auten和Splinter（2019）中，前1%人群赚取但因慷慨的折旧规则等原因而无需纳税的企业利润被归类为逃税；然后，基于对随机审计数据的错误解读，这些逃税被分配给底层99%的人群。我们修正后的序列显示，不平等的上升幅度与Saez和Zucman（2016）以及Piketty, Saez和Zucman（2018）的估计相似，同时允许对顶层财富和收入的构成进行更细致的描述。

papers.title: Anxiety or Pain? The Impact of Tariffs and Uncertainty on Chinese Firms in the Trade War
papers.authors: Felipe Benguria, Jaerim Choi, Deborah L. Swenson, Mingzhi Xu
papers.abstract: The unexpected outbreak of the U.S.-China trade war led to dramatic increases in the import and export tariffs confronting Chinese firms. Due to firm-level differences in trade engagement, customs trade data combined with tariff changes allow us to measure firm-level exposure to the trade war. Further, by adopting a new textual analysis approach to listed firms' annual reports, we develop trade policy uncertainty (TPU) measures that vary over firms and time. Our difference-in-differences examination of these firm-level data reveals that trade war increases in U.S. tariffs and Chinese retaliatory tariffs both raised Chinese firms’ TPU. The impact of tariffs on uncertainty is heterogeneous, and is most pronounced for smaller and less capital-intensive firms. This effect is also smaller for Chinese exporters that were more diversified in terms of partner countries. In the second stage of our analysis we explore and document the negative connection between Chinese firm-level increases in TPU and subsequent firm performance. Our estimates indicate that Chinese firms hit by a one standard deviation increase in TPU during the trade war reduced firm-level investment, R&D expenditures, and profits by 1.4, 2.7, and 8.9 percent, respectively.
papers.zh_title: 焦虑还是痛苦？关税与不确定性对贸易战中中国企业的影响
