papers.zh_abstract: 中美贸易战的意外爆发导致中国企业面临的进出口关税大幅增加。由于企业在贸易参与度上存在差异，结合关税变化的海关贸易数据使我们能够衡量企业在贸易战中的暴露程度。此外，通过对上市公司年报采用新的文本分析方法，我们构建了随企业和时间变化的贸易政策不确定性（TPU）指标。我们对这些企业层面数据进行双重差分检验，发现贸易战中美国关税和中国报复性关税的增加都提高了中国企业的TPU。关税对不确定性的影响具有异质性，对规模较小和资本密集度较低的企业最为显著。对于出口目的国更加多元化的中国出口商，这种影响也较小。在分析的第二阶段，我们探索并记录了中国企业层面TPU上升与后续企业绩效之间的负相关关系。我们的估计表明，在贸易战期间受到TPU一个标准差增加冲击的中国企业，其投资、研发支出和利润分别下降了1.4%、2.7%和8.9%。

papers.title: The Rise and Fall of Import Substitution
papers.authors: Douglas A. Irwin
papers.abstract: In the 1950s, many economists believed that import substitution – policies to restrict imports of manufactured goods – was the best trade strategy to promote industrialization and economic growth in developing countries. By the mid-1960s, there was widespread disenchantment with the results of such policies, even among its proponents. This paper traces the rise and fall of import substitution as a development idea. Perhaps surprisingly, early advocates of import substitution were quite cautious in their support for the policy and were also among the first to question it based on evidence derived from country experiences.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI；JEL：B27, B31, F13, F14, O14, O19, O24
papers.zh_title: 进口替代的兴衰
papers.zh_abstract: 在20世纪50年代，许多经济学家认为进口替代——即限制制成品进口的政策——是发展中国家促进工业化和经济增长的最佳贸易战略。到20世纪60年代中期，即使在其支持者中，也对这类政策的结果普遍感到失望。本文追溯了进口替代作为一种发展理念的兴衰。或许令人惊讶的是，进口替代的早期倡导者对该政策的支持相当谨慎，并且也是最早基于国家经验证据对其提出质疑的人之一。

papers.title: Ethnographic and Field Data in Historical Economics
papers.authors: Sara Lowes
papers.abstract: This chapter will cover recent research in historical economics that uses ethnographic data and data from surveys and lab experiments. The study of historical economics, particularly outside of non-Western countries, has been constrained by availability of historical data. However, recent work incorporates data and tools from other fields and sub-fields to fill this gap. For example, economists are increasingly taking advantage of ethnographic data sets compiled by anthropologists. There is also growing interest in the use of original survey data collection both within and across countries and lab-in-the-field experiments to answer questions on culture and institutions. Often, these tools are used together to provide complementary evidence on the question of interest. These sources of data have been particularly important for research on areas where there is limited historical data, and they have increased the scope of questions that can be examined. This chapter will overview these recent developments and highlight the benefits of these diverse methodologies and data sources.
papers.zh_title: 历史经济学中的人种志与实地数据
papers.zh_abstract: 本章将涵盖近期使用人种志数据以及调查和实验室实验数据的历史经济学研究。历史经济学的研究，尤其是在非西方国家之外，一直受到历史数据可得性的限制。然而，近期的工作整合了其他领域和子领域的数据与工具来填补这一空白。例如，经济学家越来越多地利用人类学家编制的人种志数据集。同时，对于使用国内外原始调查数据收集以及实地实验来回答文化和制度问题的兴趣也在增长。通常，这些工具被结合使用，以提供关于研究问题的互补性证据。这些数据来源对于历史数据有限的领域的研究尤为重要，并且它们扩大了可研究问题的范围。本章将概述这些最新发展，并强调这些多样化方法和数据来源的优势。

papers.title: The Micro Anatomy of Macro Consumption Adjustments
papers.authors: Rafael Guntin, Pablo Ottonello, Diego Perez
papers.abstract: We study crises characterized by large adjustments of aggregate consumption through their microlevel patterns. We show that leading theories designed to explain aggregate consumption dynamics differ markedly in their cross-sectional predictions. While theories based on financial frictions predict that rich households with liquid assets should be able to smooth consumption during bad times, neoclassical theories predict that these agents would optimally adjust their consumption if crises severely affect their permanent income. Using microlevel data on several episodes of large aggregate-consumption adjustment, we document that rich households significantly adjust consumption relative to their income, consistent with the permanent-income hypothesis of consumption during crises. We discuss our findings' implications for the effectiveness of stabilization policies that target consumption during crises.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E60, F41, F44
papers.zh_title: 宏观消费调整的微观解剖
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过微观层面的模式来研究以总消费大幅调整为特征的危机。我们表明，旨在解释总消费动态的主要理论在其横截面预测上存在显著差异。基于金融摩擦的理论预测，拥有流动资产的富裕家庭应该能够在经济不景气时平滑消费，而新古典理论则预测，如果危机严重影响了这些经济主体的永久收入，他们将最优地调整消费。利用多次总消费大幅调整事件的微观数据，我们记录了富裕家庭相对于其收入显著调整消费的情况，这与危机期间消费的永久收入假说一致。我们讨论了我们的发现对于旨在危机期间针对消费的稳定政策有效性的启示。

papers.title: Research Funding and Collaboration
papers.authors: Benjamin Davies, Jason Gush, Shaun C. Hendy, Adam B. Jaffe
papers.abstract: We analyse whether research funding contests promote co-authorship. Our analysis combines Scopus publication records with data on applications to the Marsden Fund, the premiere source of funding for basic research in New Zealand. On average, and after controlling for observable and unobservable heterogeneity, applicant pairs were 13.8 percentage points more likely to co-author in a given year if they co-proposed during the previous ten years than if they did not. This co-authorship rate was not significantly higher among funded pairs. However, when we increase post-proposal publication lags towards the length of a typical award, we find that funding, rather than participation, promotes co-authorship.
papers.zh_title: 研究资助与合作
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了研究资助竞赛是否促进了合著关系。我们的分析将Scopus出版记录与新西兰基础研究首要资金来源——马斯登基金的申请数据相结合。平均而言，在控制了可观测和不可观测的异质性后，如果申请者配对在过去十年内共同提出过项目，他们在给定年份内合著的可能性比未共同提出项目的配对高出13.8个百分点。在获得资助的配对中，这一合著率并未显著更高。然而，当我们延长申请后出版时滞至典型资助周期长度时，我们发现是资助本身而非参与行为促进了合著。

papers.title: Firm-Embedded Productivity and Cross-Country Income Differences
papers.authors: Vanessa I. Alviarez, Javier Cravino, Natalia Ramondo
papers.abstract: We measure the contribution of firm-embedded productivity to cross-country income differences. By firm-embedded productivity we refer to the components of productivity that differ across firms and that can be transferred internationally, such as blueprints, management practices, and intangible capital. Our approach relies on microlevel data on the cross-border operations of multinational enterprises (MNEs). We compare the market shares of the exact same MNE in different countries and document that they are about four times larger in developing than in high-income countries. This finding indicates that MNEs face less competition in less-developed countries, suggesting that firm-embedded productivity in those countries is scarce. We propose and implement a new measure of firm-embedded productivity based on this observation. We find a strong positive correlation between our measure and output per-worker across countries. In our sample, differences in firm-embedded productivity account for roughly a third of the cross-country variance in output per-worker.
papers.zh_title: 企业嵌入生产率与跨国收入差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了企业嵌入生产率对跨国收入差异的贡献。所谓企业嵌入生产率，指的是在不同企业间存在差异且可在国际间转移的生产率组成部分，例如蓝图、管理实践和无形资本。我们的方法依赖于跨国企业跨境运营的微观层面数据。我们比较了同一家跨国企业在不同国家的市场份额，并发现其在发展中国家的市场份额约为高收入国家的四倍。这一发现表明，跨国企业在欠发达国家面临的竞争较少，暗示这些国家的企业嵌入生产率较为稀缺。基于这一观察，我们提出并实施了一种新的企业嵌入生产率衡量指标。我们发现，各国间该指标与人均产出之间存在强烈的正相关关系。在我们的样本中，企业嵌入生产率的差异解释了大约三分之一的国家间人均产出差异。

papers.title: The Domestic Political-Economy of the WTO Crisis: Lessons for Preserving Multilateralism
papers.authors: Renee Bowen, J. Lawrence Broz
papers.abstract: A major contributor to the crisis at the World Trade Organization (WTO) is the decline in support for multilateralism in the United States. Three key problems with WTO design precipitated the decline. First, incomplete rules related to trade remedies are interpreted by the WTO’s Appellate Body (AB) in ways that conflict with a narrow set of sensitive US domestic priorities. Second, existing WTO rules do not sufficiently account for non-market economies, such as China. Third, remediation of these problems is infeasible due to consensus-based decision-making in the WTO. These problems represent more fundamental challenges induced by increased economic integration—loss of sovereignty and erosion of democracy. To alleviate these problems in multilateral agreements we suggest: 1) a narrow solution that carves out a special process for handling trade remedy disputes; 2) a broad solution that relaxes the requirement of consensus for WTO reform, adopting some form of supermajority voting or a sunset clause; 3) the reform of domestic consensus-building institutions within the US that directly address the political-economy sources of voter discontent.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, LE, POL；JEL：A11, F02, F13, F5, F51, F52, F53, F55, F6, H1, H4, K12, K33
papers.zh_title: WTO危机的国内政治经济学：维护多边主义的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 世界贸易组织危机的一个主要促成因素是美国对多边主义支持度的下降。WTO设计的三个关键问题导致了这种下降。首先，与贸易救济相关的不完整规则被WTO上诉机构以与美国少数敏感国内优先事项相冲突的方式解释。其次，现有WTO规则未能充分考虑非市场经济体，例如中国。第三，由于WTO基于共识的决策机制，解决这些问题不可行。这些问题代表了经济一体化加深所引发的更根本性挑战——主权丧失和民主侵蚀。为了缓解多边协议中的这些问题，我们建议：1）一个狭窄的解决方案，即设立一个处理贸易救济争端的特殊程序；2）一个广泛的解决方案，即放宽WTO改革的共识要求，采用某种形式的超级多数投票或日落条款；3）改革美国国内的共识构建机构，直接解决选民不满的政治经济根源。

papers.title: Introducing CogX: A New Preschool Education Program Combining Parent and Child Interventions
papers.authors: Roland G. Fryer Jr, Steven D. Levitt, John A. List, Anya Samek
papers.abstract: We present the results of a novel early childhood intervention in which disadvantaged 3-4-year- old children were randomized to receive a new preschool and parent education program focused on cognitive and non-cognitive skills (CogX) or to a control group that did not receive preschool education. In addition to a typical academic year (9 month) program, we also evaluated a shortened summer version of the program (2 months) in which children were treated immediately prior to the start of Kindergarten. Both programs, including the shortened version, significantly improved cognitive test scores by about one quarter of a standard deviation relative to the control group at the end of the year. The shortened version of the program was equally as effective as the academic- year program because most of the gains in the academic-year program occurred within the first few months.
papers.zh_title: 引入CogX：一种结合家长与儿童干预的新型学前教育项目
papers.zh_abstract: 我们展示了一项新颖的早期儿童干预结果，其中处于不利地位的3-4岁儿童被随机分配接受一个专注于认知和非认知技能的新型学前教育和家长教育项目，或进入未接受学前教育的对照组。除了典型的学年项目外，我们还评估了一个缩短的暑期版本，在该版本中，儿童在幼儿园入学前立即接受干预。两个项目，包括缩短版本，在学年结束时均显著提高了认知测试分数，相对于对照组提高了约四分之一个标准差。缩短版本的项目与学年项目同样有效，因为学年项目的大部分收益发生在最初几个月内。

papers.title: Liquidity Requirements, Free-Riding, and the Implications for Financial Stability Evidence from the early 1900s
papers.authors: Mark Carlson, Matthew S. Jaremski
papers.abstract: Maintaining sufficient liquidity in the financial system is vital for its stability. However, since returns on liquid assets are typically low, individual financial institutions may seek to hold fewer such assets, especially if they believe they can rely on other institutions for liquidity support. We examine whether state banks in the early 1900s took advantage of relatively high cash balances maintained by national banks, due to reserve requirements, to hold less cash themselves. We find that state banks did hold less cash in places where both state legal requirements were lower and national banks were more prevalent.
papers.zh_title: 流动性要求、搭便车行为及其对金融稳定的影响——来自20世纪初的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在金融体系中维持充足的流动性对其稳定性至关重要。然而，由于流动性资产的回报通常较低，个别金融机构可能寻求持有更少的此类资产，特别是当它们认为可以依赖其他机构提供流动性支持时。我们考察了20世纪初的州银行是否利用国民银行因准备金要求而维持的相对较高现金余额，来减少自身持有的现金。我们发现，在州法律要求较低且国民银行更为普遍的地方，州银行确实持有更少的现金。

papers.title: Covid-19 and the U.S. Safety Net
papers.authors: Robert A. Moffitt, James P. Ziliak
papers.abstract: We examine trends in employment, earnings, and incomes over the last two decades in the United States, and how the safety net has responded to changing fortunes, including the shutdown of the economy in response to the Covid-19 Pandemic. The U.S. safety net is a patchwork of different programs providing in-kind as well as cash benefits and had many holes prior to the Pandemic. In addition, few of the programs are designed explicitly as automatic stabilizers. We show that the safety net response to employment losses in the Covid-19 Pandemic largely consists only of increased support from unemployment insurance and food assistance programs, which did not replace the lost income for many households. We discuss possible options to reform social assistance in America that may provide more robust income floors in times of economic downturns.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情与美国的保障网
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了过去二十年美国就业、收入和所得的趋势，以及保障网如何应对经济形势的变化，包括为应对新冠疫情而实施的经济停摆。美国的保障网是由提供实物和现金福利的不同项目拼凑而成的，在疫情之前就存在许多漏洞。此外，很少有项目被明确设计为自动稳定器。我们表明，保障网对新冠疫情中就业损失的应对主要仅包括来自失业保险和食品援助项目的支持增加，这并未弥补许多家庭失去的收入。我们讨论了改革美国社会救助的可能选项，这些选项可能在经济低迷时期提供更坚实的收入底线。

papers.title: Firm Input Choice Under Trade Policy Uncertainty
papers.authors: Kyle Handley, Nuno Limão, Rodney D. Ludema, Zhi Yu
papers.abstract: We examine the role of trade policy uncertainty in shaping the import decisions of firms. If the adoption of a new input requires a sunk cost investment, then the prospect of price increases in that input, e.g. due to trade barriers, reduces the adoption of that input (a substitution effect) and possibly other inputs (complementarity via lower profits). Thus trade policy uncertainty can affect a firm’s entire input mix. We provide a new model of input price uncertainty that captures both effects and derive its empirical implications. We test these using an important episode that lowered input price uncertainty: China’s accession to the WTO and the associated commitment to bind its import tariffs. We estimate large increases in imported inputs by firms from accession; the reduced uncertainty from commitment generates substitution effects larger than the reductions in applied tariffs in 2000-2006 and has significant profit effects.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F02, F1, F12, F13, F14, F61, O19, O24
papers.zh_title: 贸易政策不确定性下的企业投入选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了贸易政策不确定性在塑造企业进口决策中的作用。如果采用一种新投入品需要沉没成本投资，那么该投入品价格（例如由于贸易壁垒）上涨的前景会减少对该投入品的采用（替代效应），并可能减少其他投入品的采用（通过降低利润产生的互补效应）。因此，贸易政策不确定性可以影响企业的整个投入组合。我们提供了一个新的投入品价格不确定性模型，该模型捕捉了这两种效应，并推导出其经验含义。我们利用一个降低了投入品价格不确定性的重要事件——中国加入WTO及其约束进口关税的相关承诺——来检验这些含义。我们估计，企业因加入WTO而大幅增加了进口投入品；来自承诺的不确定性降低所产生的替代效应大于2000-2006年实际关税削减的效应，并产生了显著的利润效应。

papers.title: Opening the Door: Immigrant Legalization and Family Reunification in the United States
papers.authors: Elizabeth U. Cascio, Ethan G. Lewis
papers.abstract: Does opening the door to U.S. citizenship for unauthorized immigrants cause out- of-control “chain migration”? We address this question using variation from the legalization programs of the Immigration Reform and Control Act of 1986 (IRCA). Exploiting IRCA’s introduction and differences across metropolitan areas in program intensity, we estimate that each IRCA-legalized Mexican was responsible for the subsequent immigration and legal admission of one relative – in total – through 2019. Most sponsored relatives were immediate family, and the adult sponsorship rate is inconsistent with out-of-control chain migration. Estimates using cross-country variation are substantively similar and suggest limited demand for reunification of extended families.
papers.zh_title: 打开大门：美国移民合法化与家庭团聚
papers.zh_abstract: 为无证移民打开美国公民身份之门是否会导致失控的“连锁移民”？我们利用1986年《移民改革与控制法》合法化计划带来的变化来回答这个问题。利用《移民改革与控制法》的引入以及不同大都市区在计划强度上的差异，我们估计，每个通过《移民改革与控制法》合法化的墨西哥人，到2019年总共负责了随后一位亲属的移民和合法入境。大多数被担保的亲属是直系亲属，成年人的担保率与失控的连锁移民不一致。使用跨国差异的估计在实质上相似，并表明对大家庭团聚的需求有限。

papers.title: Social Finance
papers.authors: Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel
papers.abstract: We review an empirical literature that studies the role of social interactions in driving economic and financial decision making. We first summarize recent work that documents an important role of social interactions in explaining household decisions in housing and mortgage markets. This evidence shows, for example, that there are large peer effects in mortgage refinancing decisions and that individuals' beliefs about the attractiveness of housing market investments are affected by the recent house price experiences of their friends. We also summarize the evidence that social interactions affect the stock market investments of both retail and professional investors as well as household financial decisions such as retirement savings, borrowing, and default. Along the way, we describe a number of easily accessible recent data sets for the study of social interactions in finance, including the "Social Connectedness Index," which measures the frequency of Facebook friendship links across geographic regions. We conclude by outlining several promising directions for further research at the intersection of household finance and "social finance."
papers.zh_title: 社会金融
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了研究社会互动在驱动经济和金融决策中作用的实证文献。我们首先总结了近期的工作，这些工作记录了社会互动在解释住房和抵押贷款市场中的家庭决策方面的重要作用。例如，这些证据表明，抵押贷款再融资决策中存在显著的同伴效应，并且个人对住房市场投资吸引力的信念受到其朋友近期房价经历的影响。我们还总结了社会互动影响散户和专业投资者的股票市场投资，以及退休储蓄、借贷和违约等家庭财务决策的证据。在此过程中，我们描述了一些近期易于获取的用于研究金融中社会互动的数据集，包括“社会关联指数”，该指数衡量了跨地理区域的Facebook好友链接频率。最后，我们概述了在家庭金融和“社会金融”交叉领域进一步研究的几个有前景的方向。

papers.title: Civil Liberties in Times of Crisis
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Luca Braghieri, Sarah Eichmeyer, Minjeong Joyce Kim, Stefanie Stantcheva, David Y. Yang
papers.abstract: Major crises — from terrorist attacks to epidemic outbreaks — bring the trade-off between individual civil liberties and societal well-being into sharp relief. In this paper, we study how willing citizens are to restrict civil liberties to improve public health conditions in the context of the COVID-19 pandemic. We design and conduct representative surveys involving approximately 550,000 responses across 15 countries, including China and the United States, during many months of the COVID-19 pandemic, from March 2020 until January 2021. We document significant heterogeneity across countries and demographic groups in willingness to sacrifice rights for public welfare. Citizens disadvantaged by income, education, or race are less willing to sacrifice rights than their more advantaged peers in every country, as are those with prior experience in communist regimes. Leveraging naturally occurring variation as well as experimental approaches, we estimate that a one standard deviation increase in health security concerns increases willingness to sacrifice civil liberties by approximately 68%-83% of the difference between the average Chinese and U.S. citizen. Stated preferences correlate with observed behavior including demand for tracing apps, donations, and petitions.
papers.zh_title: 危机时期的公民自由
papers.zh_abstract: 重大危机——从恐怖袭击到疫情爆发——使个人公民自由与社会福祉之间的权衡变得尤为突出。本文以COVID-19疫情为背景，研究公民在多大程度上愿意限制公民自由以改善公共卫生状况。我们设计并实施了具有代表性的调查，覆盖15个国家约55万份回复，包括中国和美国，时间跨度为2020年3月至2021年1月疫情期间的多个月份。我们记录了不同国家和人口群体在牺牲权利以换取公共福利意愿上的显著异质性。在每个国家，收入、教育或种族方面处于劣势的公民比其优势群体更不愿意牺牲权利，有共产主义政权经历的人也是如此。利用自然发生的变化以及实验方法，我们估计健康安全担忧每增加一个标准差，牺牲公民自由的意愿大约会增加相当于中国和美国公民平均差异的68%-83%。陈述的偏好与观察到的行为相关，包括对追踪应用程序、捐款和请愿的需求。

papers.title: An Analysis of the Performance of Target Date Funds
papers.authors: John B. Shoven, Daniel B. Walton
papers.abstract: This paper presents a thorough evaluation of target date funds for the period 2010-2020. These funds have grown enormously in assets, reaching $1.4 trillion by the end of 2019. They account for approximately 24 percent of all of the assets in 401(k) accounts. The paper reports on the results of a style analysis evaluation of TDFs which results in their effective asset allocation. It examines the constant in the style analysis regressions which reflects the over- or under-performance of the funds relative to a passive benchmark with the same asset allocation. Lower cost TDFs tend to match the benchmark, whereas higher cost TDFs deviate considerably from theirs. We examine how TDFs performed in the stock market crash between 2/19/20 and 3/23/20. In this five week period, broad market averages fell by about one-third. We find that the value of long-dated TDFs (those with a target date of 2045 and beyond) fell by between 30 and 35 percent, whereas the 2025 funds, designed for people roughly 60 years old, lost between 20 and 25 percent of their value. We find that past performance only weakly influences future expected performance. As with equity funds in general in this period, TDFs with actively managed ingredient funds, on average, trailed the performance of their cheaper passively managed counterparts.
papers.zh_title: 目标日期基金绩效分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对2010-2020年期间的目标日期基金进行了全面评估。这些基金的资产规模大幅增长，截至2019年底达到1.4万亿美元，约占所有401(k)账户资产的24%。本文报告了对目标日期基金进行风格分析评估的结果，该评估得出了其有效资产配置。它考察了风格分析回归中的常数项，该常数项反映了基金相对于具有相同资产配置的被动基准的超越或落后表现。低成本的目标日期基金往往与基准相匹配，而高成本的目标日期基金则与其基准存在显著偏差。我们研究了目标日期基金在2020年2月19日至3月23日股市崩盘期间的表现。在这五周内，广泛市场平均指数下跌了约三分之一。我们发现，长期目标日期基金（目标日期为2045年及以后）的价值下跌了30%至35%，而针对大约60岁人群设计的2025年基金则损失了20%至25%的价值。我们发现，过去的表现对未来预期表现的影响很弱。与这一时期的一般股票基金一样，拥有主动管理成分基金的目标日期基金，平均而言，其表现落后于更便宜的被动管理同类基金。

papers.title: Imposing Policy on Reluctant Actors: The Hospital Desegregation Campaign and Black Postneonatal Mortality in the Deep South
papers.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Kerwin Kofi Charles, Daniel I. Rees
papers.abstract: In 1966, Southern hospitals were barred from participating in Medicare unless they discontinued their longstanding practice of racial segregation. Using data from five Deep South states and exploiting county-level variation in Medicare certification dates, we find that gaining access to an ostensibly integrated hospital had no effect on Black postneonatal mortality. Similarly, there is little evidence that the campaign contributed to the trend towards in-hospital births among Southern Black mothers. These results are consistent with descriptions of the hospital desegregation campaign as producing only cosmetic changes and illustrate the limits of anti-discrimination policies imposed upon reluctant actors.
papers.zh_title: 对不情愿行为者施加政策：南方腹地的医院废除种族隔离运动与黑人产后新生儿死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: 1966年，南方医院被禁止参与医疗保险，除非它们停止长期以来的种族隔离做法。利用五个南方腹州的数据，并利用县级医疗保险认证日期的差异，我们发现，获得表面上一体化医院的机会对黑人产后新生儿死亡率没有影响。同样，几乎没有证据表明这场运动促进了南方黑人母亲在医院分娩的趋势。这些结果与将医院废除种族隔离运动描述为仅产生表面变化的描述一致，并说明了强加于不情愿行为者的反歧视政策的局限性。

papers.title: Millionaires Speak: What Drives Their Personal Investment Decisions?
papers.authors: Svetlana Bender, James J. Choi, Danielle Dyson, Adriana Z. Robertson
papers.abstract: We survey 2,484 U.S. individuals with at least $1 million of investable assets about how well leading academic theories describe their financial beliefs and personal investment decisions. The wealthy’s beliefs about financial markets and the economy are surprisingly similar to those of the average U.S. household, but the wealthy are less driven by discomfort with the market, financial constraints, and labor income considerations. Portfolio equity share is most affected by professional advice, time until retirement, personal experiences, rare disaster risk, and health risk. Concentrated equity holding is most often motivated by belief that the stock has superior risk-adjusted returns. Beliefs about how expected returns vary with stock characteristics frequently differ from historical relationships, and more risk is not always associated with higher expected returns. Active equity fund investment is most motivated by professional advice and the expectation of higher average returns. Berk and Green (2004) rationalize return chasing in the absence of fund performance persistence by positing that past returns reveal managerial skill but there are diminishing returns to scale in active management. Forty-two percent of respondents agree with the first assumption, 33% with the second, and 19% with both.
papers.zh_title: 百万富翁之言：什么驱动他们的个人投资决策？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了2484名拥有至少100万美元可投资资产的美国个人，了解领先的学术理论在多大程度上描述了他们的金融信念和个人投资决策。富人对金融市场和经济的信念与普通美国家庭惊人地相似，但富人较少受到市场不适感、财务约束和劳动收入考虑的影响。投资组合股权比例受专业建议、退休时间、个人经历、罕见灾难风险和健康风险的影响最大。集中持股最常受到股票具有优越风险调整后回报这一信念的驱动。关于预期回报如何随股票特征变化的信念经常与历史关系不同，并且更多风险并不总是与更高预期回报相关。主动型股票基金投资最受专业建议和对更高平均回报的预期驱动。Berk和Green（2004）通过假设过去回报揭示了管理技能，但主动管理存在规模报酬递减，从而在没有基金业绩持续性的情况下合理化追逐回报的行为。42%的受访者同意第一个假设，33%同意第二个，19%同意两者。

papers.title: Wealth Mobility in the 1860s
papers.authors: Brandon Dupont, Joshua L. Rosenbloom
papers.abstract: We offer new evidence on the regional dynamics of wealth holding in the United States over the Civil War decade based on a hand-linked random sample of wealth holders drawn from the 1860 census. Despite the wealth shock caused by emancipation, we find that patterns of wealth mobility were broadly similar for northern and southern residents in 1860. Looking at the determinants of individual wealth holding in 1870, we find that the elasticity with respect to 1860 wealth was quite low in both regions—consistent with high levels of wealth mobility.
papers.zh_title: 1860年代的财富流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们基于从1860年人口普查中手工链接的财富持有者随机样本，提供了关于美国内战十年期间财富持有区域动态的新证据。尽管解放奴隶造成了财富冲击，我们发现1860年南方和北方居民的财富流动模式大致相似。考察1870年个人财富持有的决定因素，我们发现相对于1860年财富的弹性在两个地区都相当低——这与高水平的财富流动性一致。

papers.title: Historical Data: Where to Find Them, How to Use Them
papers.authors: Paola Giuliano, Andrea Matranga
papers.abstract: The use of historical data has become a standard tool in economics, serving three main purposes: to examine the influence of the past on current economic outcomes; to use unique natural experiments to test modern economic theories; and to use modern economic theories to refine our understanding of important historical events. In this chapter, we provide a comprehensive analysis of the types of historical data most commonly used in economic research and discuss a variety of issues that they raise, such as the constant change in national and administrative borders; the reshuffling of ethnic groups due to migration, colonialism, natural disasters, and many other forces. We also point out which methodological advances allow economists to overcome or minimize these problems.
papers.zh_title: 历史数据：在哪里找到它们，如何使用它们
papers.zh_abstract: 历史数据的使用已成为经济学中的标准工具，服务于三个主要目的：考察过去对当前经济结果的影响；利用独特的自然实验检验现代经济理论；以及利用现代经济理论深化我们对重要历史事件的理解。在本章中，我们全面分析了经济研究中最常用的历史数据类型，并讨论了它们引发的各种问题，例如国家和行政边界的不断变化；由于移民、殖民主义、自然灾害和许多其他力量导致的族群重组。我们还指出了哪些方法论进步使经济学家能够克服或最小化这些问题。

papers.title: Post COVID-19 Exit Strategies and Emerging Markets Economic Challenges
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Hiro Ito
papers.abstract: We outline two divergent exit strategies of the U.S. from the post COVID-19 debt-overhang, and analyze their implications on Emerging Markets and global stability. The first strategy is the U.S. aiming at returning to the 2019, pre-COVID mode of loose fiscal policy and accommodating monetary policy. The short-term benefits of this strategy include faster economic growth as long as the snowball effect – the difference between the interest rate on public debt and the growth rate – is negative. This strategy may entail a growing tail risk of a deeper crisis triggered by a future reversal of the snowball effect, inducing a deeper future sudden stop crises and instability of Emerging Markets. We illustrate this scenario by evaluating Emerging Markets’ lost growth decade during the 1980s, triggered by the massive reversal of the snowball effect in the U.S. during 1974-1984. The second strategy entails a two-pronged approach. First, turning U.S. fiscal priorities from fighting COVID’s medical and economic challenges, towards investment in social, medical and physical infrastructures. Second, with a lag, promoting a gradual fiscal adjustment aiming at reaching overtime primary-surpluses and debt resilience. We illustrate this scenario by reviewing the exit strategy of the U.S. post-WWII, and its repercussions on the ‘Phoenix Emergence’ of Western Europe and Japan from WWII destruction. The contrast between the two exit strategies suggests that the two-pronged approach is akin to an upfront investment in greater long-term global stability. We also empirically show how lowering the cost of serving public debt has been associated with higher real output growth.
papers.zh_title: 后COVID-19退出策略与新兴市场经济挑战
papers.zh_abstract: 我们概述了美国摆脱后COVID-19债务积压的两种不同退出策略，并分析了它们对新兴市场和全球稳定的影响。第一种策略是美国旨在回归2019年COVID前的宽松财政政策和适应性货币政策模式。这种策略的短期好处包括更快的经济增长，只要滚雪球效应——公共债务利率与增长率之差——为负。这种策略可能伴随着日益增长的尾部风险，即未来滚雪球效应逆转引发的更深层次危机，导致新兴市场未来更严重的突然停止危机和不稳定。我们通过评估1980年代新兴市场失去的十年增长来说明这一情景，该情景由1974-1984年间美国滚雪球效应的大规模逆转引发。第二种策略涉及双管齐下的方法。首先，将美国的财政优先事项从抗击COVID的医疗和经济挑战转向对社会、医疗和实体基础设施的投资。其次，在滞后一段时间后，推动逐步的财政调整，目标是逐步实现基本盈余和债务韧性。我们通过回顾美国二战后退出策略及其对西欧和日本从二战破坏中“凤凰崛起”的影响来说明这一情景。两种退出策略的对比表明，双管齐下的方法类似于对更大长期全球稳定的前期投资。我们还实证展示了降低公共债务服务成本如何与更高的实际产出增长相关联。

papers.title: What Explains Temporal and Geographic Variation in the Early US Coronavirus Pandemic?
papers.authors: Hunt Allcott, Levi Boxell, Jacob C. Conway, Billy A. Ferguson, Matthew Gentzkow, Benjamin Goldman
papers.abstract: We provide new evidence on the drivers of the early US coronavirus pandemic. We combine an epidemiological model of disease transmission with quasi-random variation arising from the timing of stay-at-home-orders to estimate the causal roles of policy interventions and voluntary social distancing. We then relate the residual variation in disease transmission rates to observable features of cities. We estimate significant impacts of policy and social distancing responses, but we show that the magnitude of policy effects is modest, and most social distancing is driven by voluntary responses. Moreover, we show that neither policy nor rates of voluntary social distancing explain a meaningful share of geographic variation. The most important predictors of which cities were hardest hit by the pandemic are exogenous characteristics such as population and density.
papers.zh_title: 什么解释了美国早期冠状病毒大流行的时间和地理差异？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于美国早期冠状病毒大流行驱动因素的新证据。我们将疾病传播的流行病学模型与居家令时间安排产生的准随机变化相结合，以估计政策干预和自愿社交距离的因果作用。然后，我们将疾病传播率的残差变化与城市的可观测特征联系起来。我们估计了政策和社交距离反应的显著影响，但我们表明政策效应的幅度是适度的，并且大多数社交距离是由自愿反应驱动的。此外，我们表明，政策和自愿社交距离率都不能解释地理差异的重要部分。哪些城市受疫情影响最严重的最重要预测因素是人口和密度等外生特征。

papers.title: How Did Depositors Respond to COVID-19?
papers.authors: Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Mingzhu Tai, Wensi Xie
papers.abstract: Why did banks experience massive deposit inflows during the first months of the pandemic? Using weekly branch-level data on interest rates and county-level data on COVID-19 cases, we discover that interest rates at bank branches in counties with higher COVID-19 infection rates fell by more than rates at other branches—even branches of the same bank in different counties. When differentiating weeks by the degree of stock market distress and counties by the likely impact of COVID-19 cases on economic anxiety, the evidence suggests that the deposit inflows were triggered by a surge in the supply of precautionary savings.
papers.zh_title: 储户如何应对COVID-19？
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么银行在疫情最初几个月经历了大规模存款流入？利用每周分行层面的利率数据和县级COVID-19病例数据，我们发现，COVID-19感染率较高县的银行分行利率下降幅度大于其他分行——即使是同一银行在不同县的分行。在区分股市困境程度不同的周次以及COVID-19病例对经济焦虑可能影响不同的县时，证据表明存款流入是由预防性储蓄供给激增引发的。

papers.title: The Economic Case for Protecting Biodiversity
papers.authors: Geoffrey Heal
papers.abstract: This paper summarizes in non-technical terms the economic case for conserving biodiversity, and explains why we cannot rely on market forces to do this task. It reviews the policy interventions that could help in biodiversity conservation.
papers.zh_title: 保护生物多样性的经济理由
papers.zh_abstract: 本文以非技术性术语总结了保护生物多样性的经济理由，并解释了为什么我们不能依赖市场力量来完成这一任务。它回顾了可能有助于生物多样性保护的政策干预措施。

papers.title: Sparse Network Asymptotics for Logistic Regression under Possible Misspecification
papers.authors: Bryan S. Graham
papers.abstract: Consider a bipartite network where N consumers choose to buy or not to buy M different products. This paper considers the properties of the logit fit of the N ×M array of “i-buys-j” purchase decisions, Y = [Yij ]1≤i≤N,1≤j≤M, onto a vector of known functions of consumer and product attributes under asymptotic sequences where (i) both N and M grow large, (ii) the average number of products purchased per consumer is finite in the limit, (iii) there exists dependence across elements in the same row or same column of Y (i.e., dyadic dependence) and (iv) the true conditional probability of making a purchase may, or may not, take the assumed logit form. Condition (ii) implies that the limiting network of purchases is sparse: only a vanishing fraction of all possible purchases are actually made. Under sparse network asymptotics, I show that the parameter indexing the logit approximation solves a particular Kullback–Leibler Information Criterion (KLIC) minimization problem (defined with respect to a certain Poisson population). This finding provides a simple characterization of the logit pseudo-true parameter under general misspecification. With respect to sampling theory, sparseness implies that the first and last terms in an extended Hoeffding-type variance decomposition of the score of the logit pseudo composite log-likelihood are of equal order. In contrast, under dense network asymptotics, the last term is asymptotically negligible. Asymptotic normality of the logistic regression coefficients is shown using a martingale central limit theorem (CLT) for triangular arrays. Unlike in the dense case, the normality result derived here also holds under degeneracy of the network graphon. Relatedly, when there “happens to be” no dyadic dependence in the dataset in hand, it specializes to recently derived results on the behavior of logistic regression with rare events and iid data. Simulation results suggest that sparse network asymptotics better approximate the finite network distribution of the logit estimator.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, LS, TWP；JEL：C01, C31, C33, C55
papers.zh_title: 可能误设下逻辑回归的稀疏网络渐近性
papers.zh_abstract: 考虑一个二分网络，其中N个消费者选择购买或不购买M种不同产品。本文研究了将N×M的“i购买j”购买决策数组Y = [Yij]1≤i≤N,1≤j≤M对消费者和产品属性已知函数向量进行逻辑拟合的性质，在渐近序列下：(i) N和M都变大，(ii) 每个消费者平均购买的产品数量在极限中是有限的，(iii) Y的同一行或同一列元素之间存在依赖（即二元依赖），(iv) 购买的真实条件概率可能或可能不采用假设的逻辑形式。条件(ii)意味着购买的限制网络是稀疏的：只有极小比例的所有可能购买实际发生。在稀疏网络渐近性下，我表明索引逻辑近似的参数解决了特定的Kullback-Leibler信息准则（KLIC）最小化问题（相对于某个泊松总体定义）。这一发现为一般误设下的逻辑伪真实参数提供了简单刻画。关于抽样理论，稀疏性意味着逻辑伪复合对数似然得分的扩展Hoeffding型方差分解中的第一项和最后一项具有相同阶数。相比之下，在密集网络渐近性下，最后一项渐近可忽略。使用三角阵列的鞅中心极限定理（CLT）证明了逻辑回归系数的渐近正态性。与密集情况不同，这里导出的正态性结果在网络图函数退化时也成立。相关地，当手头数据集中“恰好没有”二元依赖时，它专门适用于最近关于稀有事件和独立同分布数据下逻辑回归行为的结果。模拟结果表明，稀疏网络渐近性更好地逼近了逻辑估计量的有限网络分布。

papers.title: Elections, Political Polarization, and Economic Uncertainty
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, Aniket Baksy, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Jonathan A. Rodden
papers.abstract: We examine patterns of economic policy uncertainty (EPU) around national elections in 23 countries. Uncertainty shows a clear tendency to rise in the months leading up to elections. Average EPU values are 13% higher in the month of and the month prior to an election than in other months of the same national election cycle, conditional on country effects, time effects, and country-specific time trends. In a closer examination of U.S. data, EPU rises by 28% in the month of presidential elections that are close and polarized, as compared to elections that are neither. This pattern suggests that the 2020 US Presidential Election could see a large rise in economic policy uncertainty. It also suggests larger spikes in uncertainty around future elections in other countries that have experienced rising polarization in recent years.
papers.zh_title: 选举、政治两极分化与经济不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了23个国家全国选举前后经济政策不确定性（EPU）的模式。不确定性在选举前几个月明显趋于上升。在控制国家效应、时间效应和国家特定时间趋势后，选举当月和前一月的平均EPU值比同一国家选举周期其他月份高13%。在对美国数据的更仔细研究中，与既不接近也不两极分化的选举相比，在接近且两极分化的总统选举当月，EPU上升28%。这一模式表明，2020年美国总统选举可能导致经济政策不确定性大幅上升。这也表明，近年来两极分化加剧的其他国家未来选举中，不确定性可能出现更大峰值。

papers.title: Efficiency Wages, Unemployment, and Environmental Policy
papers.authors: Garth Heutel, Xin Zhang
papers.abstract: We study the incidence of pollution taxes and their impact on unemployment in an analytical general equilibrium efficiency wage model. We find closed-form solutions for the effect of a pollution tax on unemployment, factor prices, and output prices, and we identify and isolate different channels through which these general equilibrium effects arise. An effect arising from the efficiency wage specification depends on the form of the workers' effort function. Numerical simulations further illustrate our results and show that this efficiency wage effect can fully offset the sources-side incidence results found in models that omit it.
papers.zh_title: 效率工资、失业与环境政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个分析性一般均衡效率工资模型中研究了污染税的归宿及其对失业的影响。我们找到了污染税对失业、要素价格和产出价格影响的闭式解，并识别和隔离了这些一般均衡效应产生的不同渠道。来自效率工资设定的效应取决于工人努力函数的形式。数值模拟进一步说明了我们的结果，并表明这种效率工资效应可以完全抵消忽略它的模型中发现的需求侧归宿结果。

papers.title: Liquidity and Volatility
papers.authors: Itamar Drechsler, Alan Moreira, Alexi Savov
papers.abstract: Liquidity provision is a bet against private information: if private information turns out to be higher than expected, liquidity providers lose. Since information generates volatility, and volatility co-moves across assets, liquidity providers have a negative exposure to aggregate volatility shocks. As aggregate volatility shocks carry a very large premium in option markets, this negative exposure can explain why liquidity provision earns high average returns. We show this by incorporating uncertainty about the amount of private information into an otherwise standard model. We test the model in the cross section of short-term reversals, which mimic the portfolios of liquidity providers. As predicted by the model, reversals have large negative betas to aggregate volatility shocks. These betas explain their average returns with the same risk price as in option markets, and their predictability by VIX in the time series. Volatility risk thus explains the liquidity premium among stocks and why it increases in volatile times. Our results provide a novel view of the risks and returns to liquidity provision.
papers.zh_title: 流动性与波动性
papers.zh_abstract: 流动性提供是对私人信息的押注：如果私人信息高于预期，流动性提供者就会亏损。由于信息产生波动性，且波动性跨资产共同变动，流动性提供者对总体波动性冲击具有负向敞口。由于总体波动性冲击在期权市场中带有非常大的溢价，这种负向敞口可以解释为什么流动性提供能获得高平均回报。我们通过将私人信息量的不确定性纳入一个原本标准的模型来展示这一点。我们在短期反转的横截面上测试模型，这些反转模仿了流动性提供者的投资组合。正如模型预测的那样，反转对总体波动性冲击具有大的负贝塔值。这些贝塔值用与期权市场相同的风险价格解释了它们的平均回报，以及它们在时间序列上被VIX预测的特性。因此，波动性风险解释了股票中的流动性溢价以及为什么它在波动时期增加。我们的结果为流动性提供的风险和回报提供了新视角。

papers.title: Bottom-up Markup Fluctuations
papers.authors: Ariel Burstein, Vasco M. Carvalho, Basile Grassi
papers.abstract: We study markup cyclicality in a granular macroeconomic model with oligopolistic competition. We first characterize how firm, sectoral, and aggregate markups comove with output at different levels of aggregation in response to firm-level shocks. We then quantify the model’s ability to reproduce salient features of the cyclical properties of measured markups in French administrative firm-level data from the bottom (firm) level to the aggregate level. We document that (i) firm-level markups rise with market share and sector-level markups with concentration, (ii) the relationship between markups and sectoral output varies by firm size—negative for small firms but positive for large ones, (iii) sector-level markups move positively with sectoral output, and (iv) sectoral markups show no systematic relationship with aggregate output. Our model helps rationalize these seemingly conflicting patterns of markup cyclicality in the data.
papers.zh_title: 自下而上的加成波动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个具有寡头竞争的宏观经济学模型中的加成周期性。我们首先刻画了在应对企业层面冲击时，企业、部门和总体加成如何在不同加总水平上与产出共同变动。然后，我们量化了模型再现法国行政企业层面数据中从底层（企业）到总体层面测量加成的周期性特征显著特点的能力。我们记录了：(i) 企业层面加成随市场份额上升，部门层面加成随集中度上升，(ii) 加成与部门产出的关系因企业规模而异——对小企业为负，但对大企业为正，(iii) 部门层面加成与部门产出正相关，(iv) 部门加成与总体产出没有系统关系。我们的模型有助于合理化数据中这些看似矛盾的加成周期性模式。

papers.title: Offshoring and Inflation
papers.authors: Diego A. Comin, Robert C. Johnson
papers.abstract: Did trade integration suppress inflation? Conventional wisdom says yes, based on the disinflationary supply-side impacts of trade. These supply-side arguments are incomplete however, because trade dynamics also influence aggregate demand. We analyze how trade dynamics shape inflation in New Keynesian models, depending on whether trade is changing for inputs versus final goods, whether shocks are anticipated versus unanticipated, and whether they are transitory versus persistent. Specifically, we stress that anticipated and persistent increases in future trade raise inflation today. Consistent with this channel, we show that inflation increases before and after countries adopt free trade agreements, which contain news about future increases in trade. Embedding this mechanism into extended models with pro-competitive and distributional effects of trade, we find that rising trade in the United States led to higher inflation between 1995 and 2010, with a reversal thereafter as trade integration stalled.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E5, F1, F15, F4, F6
papers.zh_title: 离岸外包与通货膨胀
papers.zh_abstract: 贸易一体化抑制了通货膨胀吗？传统观点认为是的，基于贸易的供给侧通缩影响。然而，这些供给侧论点是不完整的，因为贸易动态也影响总需求。我们分析了贸易动态如何在新凯恩斯模型中塑造通货膨胀，取决于贸易是投入品还是最终品的变化，冲击是预期的还是非预期的，以及它们是暂时的还是持久的。具体来说，我们强调，未来贸易的预期和持久增加会提高今天的通货膨胀。与这一渠道一致，我们表明通货膨胀在各国采用自由贸易协定（包含未来贸易增加的新闻）前后上升。将这一机制嵌入具有贸易的促进竞争和分配效应的扩展模型中，我们发现美国不断增长的贸易在1995年至2010年间导致了更高的通货膨胀，此后随着贸易一体化停滞而逆转。

papers.title: (S)Cars and the Great Recession
papers.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Kieran P. Larkin, Morten O. Ravn, Mario Padula
papers.abstract: US households’ consumption and car purchases collapsed during the Great Recession, for reasons that are still poorly understood. In this paper we use the Consumer Expenditure Survey to derive cohort and business cycle decompositions of consumption profiles. When decomposing the car expenditure data into its extensive and intensive margins, we find that the intensive margin contracted sharply in the Great Recession, a finding in stark contrast to conventional wisdom and to the experience of prior recessions. We interpret the evidence through the prism of a very rich life-cycle model where individuals are subject to idiosyncratic uninsurable income shocks, aggregate income shocks, wealth shocks, and credit shocks. We show that, because of their salience and the transaction costs, cars are particularly sensitive to changes in the perception of fu- ture expected income and its variability. We find that on top of a large aggregate income shock, life-cycle income profile shocks and wealth shocks are important determinants of consumption choices during the Great Recession.
papers.zh_title: (S)汽车与大衰退
papers.zh_abstract: 在大衰退期间，美国家庭的消费和汽车购买量大幅下降，其原因至今仍不明确。本文利用消费者支出调查数据，对消费概况进行了队列分解和商业周期分解。在将汽车支出数据分解为广延边际和集约边际时，我们发现集约边际在大衰退中急剧收缩，这一发现与传统观点以及以往衰退的经验形成鲜明对比。我们通过一个非常丰富的生命周期模型来解读这些证据，在该模型中，个体面临特殊的不可保险的收入冲击、总体收入冲击、财富冲击和信贷冲击。我们表明，由于汽车的显著性和交易成本，汽车对未来预期收入及其波动性的感知变化特别敏感。我们发现，除了巨大的总体收入冲击外，生命周期收入概况冲击和财富冲击也是大衰退期间消费选择的重要决定因素。

papers.title: Misallocation and Capital Market Integration: Evidence From India
papers.authors: Natalie Bau, Adrien Matray
papers.abstract: We show that foreign capital liberalization reduces capital misallocation and increases aggregate productivity for affected industries in India. The staggered liberalization of access to foreign capital across disaggregated industries allows us to identify changes in firms' input wedges, overcoming major challenges in the measurement of the effects of changing misallocation. Liberalization increases capital overall. For domestic firms with initially high marginal revenue products of capital (MRPK), liberalization increases revenues by 23%, physical capital by 53%, wage bills by 28%, and reduces MRPK by 33% relative to low MRPK firms. The effects of liberalization are largest in areas with less developed local banking sectors, indicating that inefficiencies in that sector may cause misallocation. Finally, we propose an assumption under which a novel method exploiting natural experiments can be used to bound the effect of changes in misallocation on treated industries' aggregate productivity. These industries' Solow residual increases by 3–16%.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, IFM；JEL：F21, F38, F6, O1, O11, O12, O4
papers.zh_title: 资源错配与资本市场一体化：来自印度的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，外国资本自由化减少了印度受影响行业的资本错配，并提高了总体生产率。跨细分行业的外国资本准入的错开自由化使我们能够识别企业投入楔子的变化，克服了衡量错配变化影响的主要挑战。自由化总体上增加了资本。对于最初资本边际收益产品（MRPK）较高的国内企业，相对于低MRPK企业，自由化使收入增加23%，实物资本增加53%，工资支出增加28%，并使MRPK降低33%。自由化的影响在地方银行部门欠发达的地区最大，表明该部门的低效率可能导致资源错配。最后，我们提出一个假设，在此假设下，可以利用一种利用自然实验的新方法来界定错配变化对受处理行业总体生产率的影响。这些行业的索洛残差增加了3-16%。

papers.title: Economic Adjustment during the Great Recession: The Role of Managerial Quality
papers.authors: Gilbert Cette, Jimmy Lopez, Jacques Mairesse, Giuseppe Nicoletti
papers.abstract: This study investigates empirically how managerial practices have affected macroeconomic adjustment during the Great Recession after the 2008 economic crisis. We use the local projection method pioneered by Jordà (2005) on a country x industry balanced panel data over the 2007-2015 period for eighteen industries in ten OECD countries. We find that, in countries where management quality is higher, production and employment are more resilient during the Great Recession. Moreover, this effect on resilience is stronger for industries deeply affected by the 2008 crisis and goes with wage moderation as well as an unchanged labor share.
papers.zh_title: 大衰退期间的经济调整：管理质量的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究实证调查了管理实践如何影响2008年经济危机后大衰退期间的宏观经济调整。我们使用Jordà（2005）开创的局部投影方法，对2007-2015年期间十个OECD国家十八个行业的面板数据进行分析。我们发现，在管理质量较高的国家，生产率和就业在大衰退期间更具韧性。此外，这种对韧性的影响在受2008年危机影响严重的行业中更为显著，并且伴随着工资适度增长和劳动份额不变。

papers.title: Externalities as Arbitrage
papers.authors: Benjamin M. Hébert
papers.abstract: How can we assess whether macro-prudential regulations are having their intended effects? If these regulations are optimal, their marginal benefit of addressing externalities should equal their marginal cost of distorting risk-sharing. These risk-sharing distortions will manifest as trading opportunities that intermediaries are unable to exploit. Focusing in particular on arbitrage opportunities, I construct an “externality-mimicking portfolio” whose returns track the externalities that would rationalize existing regulations as optimal. I conduct a revealed-preference exercise using this portfolio and test whether the recovered externalities are sensible. I find that the signs of existing CIP violations are inconsistent with optimal policy.
papers.zh_title: 作为套利的外部性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们如何评估宏观审慎监管是否达到了预期效果？如果这些监管是最优的，那么它们解决外部性的边际收益应该等于扭曲风险分担的边际成本。这些风险分担扭曲将表现为中介机构无法利用的交易机会。特别关注套利机会，我构建了一个“模仿外部性的投资组合”，其回报追踪那些能够使现有监管合理化为最优的外部性。我利用这个投资组合进行了一项显示性偏好检验，并检验恢复出的外部性是否合理。我发现，现有货币基差套利（CIP）违背的迹象与最优政策不一致。

papers.title: How Do CEOs Make Strategy?
papers.authors: Mu-Jeung Yang, Michael Christensen, Nicholas Bloom, Raffaella Sadun, Jan Rivkin
papers.abstract: We explore the critical question of how executives make strategic decisions. Utilizing a new survey of 262 CEO alumni of Harvard Business School, we gather evidence on four aspects of each executive’s business strategy: its overall structure, its formalization, its development, and its implementation. We report three key results. First, different CEOs use markedly different processes to make strategic decisions; some follow highly formalized, rigorous, and deliberate processes, while others rely heavily on instinct and intuition. Second, more structured strategy processes are associated with larger firm size and faster employment growth. Third, using a regression discontinuity centered around a change in the curriculum of Harvard Business School’s required strategy course, we trace differences in strategic decision making back to differences in managerial education.
papers.zh_title: CEO如何制定战略？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了高管如何制定战略决策这一关键问题。利用对262位哈佛商学院CEO校友的新调查，我们收集了每位高管商业战略四个方面的证据：总体结构、正式化程度、制定过程以及实施情况。我们报告了三个关键结果。首先，不同的CEO使用截然不同的流程来制定战略决策；有些人遵循高度正式化、严谨和深思熟虑的流程，而另一些人则严重依赖本能和直觉。其次，更结构化的战略流程与更大的企业规模和更快的就业增长相关。第三，利用围绕哈佛商学院必修战略课程大纲变化的断点回归，我们将战略决策的差异追溯到管理教育的差异。

papers.title: Uncertainty, Wages, and the Business Cycle
papers.authors: Matteo Cacciatore, Federico Ravenna
papers.abstract: We show that limited wage flexibility in economic downturns generates strong and state-dependent amplification of uncertainty shocks. It also explains the cyclical behavior of empirical measures of uncertainty. Central to our analysis is the existence of matching frictions in the labor market and an occasionally binding constraint on downward wage adjustment. The wage constraint enhances the concavity of firms' hiring rule, generating an endogenous profit-risk premium. In turn, uncertainty shocks increase the profit-risk premium when the economy operates close to the wage constraint. This implies that higher uncertainty can severely deepen a recession, although its impact is weaker on average. Non-linear local projections and VAR estimates support the model predictions. Additionally, the variance of the unforecastable component of future economic outcomes always increases at times of low economic activity. Thus, measured uncertainty rises in a recession even in the absence of uncertainty shocks.
papers.zh_title: 不确定性、工资与经济周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，经济衰退时期有限的工资灵活性会产生强烈且状态依赖的不确定性冲击放大效应。这也解释了不确定性经验测量指标的周期性行为。我们分析的核心是劳动力市场中存在匹配摩擦以及一个偶尔具有约束力的工资向下调整约束。工资约束增强了企业雇佣规则的凹性，产生了内生的利润风险溢价。反过来，当经济接近工资约束运行时，不确定性冲击会增加利润风险溢价。这意味着更高的不确定性可能会严重加深衰退，尽管其平均影响较弱。非线性局部投影和VAR估计支持了模型预测。此外，未来经济结果中不可预测成分的方差总是在经济活动低迷时期增加。因此，即使没有不确定性冲击，测量的不确定性也会在衰退中上升。

papers.title: How to Talk When a Machine is Listening?: Corporate Disclosure in the Age of AI
papers.authors: Sean Cao, Wei Jiang, Baozhong Yang, Alan L. Zhang
papers.abstract: Growing AI readership, proxied by expected machine downloads, motivates firms to prepare filings that are friendlier to machine parsing and processing. Firms avoid words that are perceived as negative by computational algorithms, as compared to those deemed negative only by dictionaries meant for human readers. The publication of Loughran and McDonald (2011) serves as an instrumental event attributing the difference-in-differences in the measured sentiment to machine readership. High machine-readership firms also exhibit speech emotion assessed as embodying more positivity and excitement by audio processors. This is the first study exploring the feedback effect on corporate disclosure in response to technology.
papers.zh_title: 当机器在听时如何说话？：人工智能时代的企业信息披露
papers.zh_abstract: 日益增长的AI读者群（以预期的机器下载量为代表）激励企业准备更有利于机器解析和处理的文件。与仅针对人类读者的词典所认为的负面词汇相比，企业会避免使用被计算算法视为负面的词汇。Loughran和McDonald（2011）的发表作为一个工具性事件，将测量情绪的双重差分归因于机器读者群。高机器读者群的企业还表现出语音情感，音频处理器认为其体现了更多的积极性和兴奋感。这是首次探索企业信息披露对技术反馈效应的研究。

papers.title: The Political Economics of Non-democracy
papers.authors: Georgy Egorov, Konstantin Sonin
papers.abstract: We survey recent theoretical and empirical literature on political economics of non-democracies. Dictators face many challenges to their rule: internal, such as palace coups or breakdown of their support coalition, or external, such as mass protests or revolutions. We analyze strategic decisions made by dictators — hiring political loyalists to positions that require competence, restricting media freedom at the cost of sacrificing bureaucratic efficiency, running a propaganda campaign, organizing electoral fraud, purging associates and opponents, and repressing citizens — as driven by the desire to maximize the regime's chances of staying in power. We argue that the key to understanding the functioning and ultimately the fate of a nondemocratic regime is the information flows within the regime, and the institutions that govern these information flows.
papers.meta: Programs：POL；JEL：C73, D72, D74, D82, D83, P16
papers.zh_title: 非民主制度的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们综述了关于非民主制度政治经济学的近期理论和实证文献。独裁者面临许多对其统治的挑战：内部挑战，如宫廷政变或支持联盟的瓦解；外部挑战，如大规模抗议或革命。我们分析了独裁者做出的战略决策——将政治忠诚者任命到需要能力的职位、以牺牲官僚效率为代价限制媒体自由、开展宣传运动、组织选举舞弊、清洗同僚和反对者以及镇压公民——这些决策都源于最大化政权继续掌权机会的愿望。我们认为，理解非民主制度运作及其最终命运的关键在于政权内部的信息流动，以及管理这些信息流动的制度。

papers.title: Moneyball in Medicare: Heterogeneous Treatment Effects
papers.authors: Edward C. Norton, Emily J. Lawton, Jun Li
papers.abstract: One of the most important changes to the United States health care system over the last two decades is the emergence of pay-for-performance as a way to encourage hospitals and other providers to improve quality of care. Unlike fee-for-service, these value-based purchasing programs measure aspects of quality and financially reward hospitals that are outstanding or at least improving in their care. Prior research has shown that hospitals often improve more when the marginal financial incentives are larger. However, the exact relationship between marginal financial incentives and year-over-year improvement in measures remains unclear. In this study, we use national 20152018 data on approximately 2,700 hospitals to estimate how hospitals respond to pay-for-performance incentives in the Hospital Value-Based Purchasing (HVBP) Program. We show that this relationship is non-linear, has strong serial correlation, is somewhat similar for safety-net hospitals as non-safety-net hospitals, and is proportional to the size of the Medicare patient population.
papers.zh_title: 医疗领域的“点球成金”：异质性处理效应
papers.zh_abstract: 过去二十年间，美国医疗体系最重要的变革之一，是“按绩效付费”作为鼓励医院及其他医疗服务提供者提升护理质量的方式而兴起。与按服务收费不同，这些基于价值的采购项目会衡量护理质量的多个维度，并对表现卓越或至少有所改善的医院给予经济奖励。先前的研究表明，当边际经济激励更大时，医院的改善幅度通常也更大。然而，边际经济激励与护理质量指标逐年改善之间的确切关系仍不明确。在本研究中，我们利用2015年至2018年全国约2700家医院的数据，估算医院如何对医院基于价值采购（HVBP）项目中的按绩效付费激励做出反应。我们发现，这种关系是非线性的，具有较强的序列相关性，在安全网医院与非安全网医院之间有一定相似性，并且与医疗保险患者群体的规模成正比。

papers.title: Overreaction and Working Memory
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Spencer Yongwook Kwon, Augustin Landier, Yueran Ma, David Thesmar
papers.abstract: We study how biases in expectations vary across different settings, through a large-scale randomized experiment where participants forecast stable random processes. The experiment allows us to control the data generating process and the participants’ relevant information sets, so we can cleanly measure forecast biases. We find that forecasts display significant overreaction to the most recent observation. Moreover, overreaction is especially pronounced for less persistent processes and longer forecast horizons. We also find that commonly-used expectations models do not easily account for the variation in overreaction across settings. We provide a theory of expectations formation with imperfect utilization of past information. Our model closely fits the empirical findings.
papers.zh_title: 过度反应与工作记忆
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项大规模随机实验来研究预期偏差在不同情境下如何变化，参与者在该实验中预测稳定的随机过程。该实验使我们能够控制数据生成过程以及参与者的相关信息集，从而能够清晰地衡量预测偏差。我们发现，预测对最新观测值表现出显著的过度反应。此外，对于持续性较弱的过程和更长的预测期限，过度反应尤为明显。我们还发现，常用的预期模型难以轻易解释不同情境下过度反应的变化。我们提出了一种预期形成理论，该理论涉及对过去信息的不完全利用。我们的模型与实证结果高度吻合。

papers.title: Estimating the Costs of Filing Tax Returns and the Potential Savings from Policies Aimed at Reducing These Costs
papers.authors: Youssef Benzarti
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the cost of filing taxes and assesses several policy proposals aimed at reducing these costs. Using US tax returns, a quasi-experimental method and additional extrapolations based on survey evidence, I uncover three main findings. First, filing costs are large and have been steadily increasing over time. Second, part of this increase in filing costs can be attributed to an increase in the number of schedules filed per taxpayer. Third, pre-populating tax returns and offering free filing options can result in substantial cost savings for taxpayers.
papers.zh_title: 估算报税成本及旨在降低这些成本的政策所带来的潜在节省
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估算了报税成本，并评估了几项旨在降低这些成本的政策提案。利用美国纳税申报表、一种准实验方法以及基于调查证据的额外推断，我发现了三个主要结论。第一，报税成本高昂，并且随着时间的推移持续上升。第二，报税成本上升的部分原因可归因于每位纳税人提交的附表数量增加。第三，预填纳税申报表并提供免费报税选项可以为纳税人带来可观的成本节省。

papers.title: Reconsidering Risk Aversion
papers.authors: Daniel J. Benjamin, Mark Alan Fontana, Miles S. Kimball
papers.abstract: Risk aversion is typically inferred from real or hypothetical choices over risky lotteries, but such “untutored” choices may reflect mistakes rather than preferences. We develop a procedure to obtain a better measure of normatively relevant preferences: after eliciting untutored choices, we confront participants with their choices that are inconsistent with intertemporal-expected-utility axioms and allow them to reconsider their choices. We demonstrate this procedure via a survey about hypothetical retirement investment choices administered to 596 Cornell students. We find that, on average, reconsidered choices are more consistent with almost all axioms, with one exception related to a counterfactual reference point.
papers.zh_title: 重新审视风险厌恶
papers.zh_abstract: 风险厌恶通常从对风险彩票的真实或假设选择中推断出来，但这种“未经指导的”选择可能反映的是错误而非偏好。我们开发了一个程序来获得规范性相关偏好的更好度量：在引出未经指导的选择后，我们让参与者面对其与跨期期望效用公理不一致的选择，并允许他们重新考虑自己的选择。我们通过对596名康奈尔学生进行的关于假设退休投资选择的调查来演示这一程序。我们发现，平均而言，重新考虑后的选择与几乎所有公理更加一致，但有一个与反事实参照点相关的例外。

papers.title: How Should Tax Progressivity Respond to Rising Income Inequality?
papers.authors: Jonathan Heathcote, Kjetil Storesletten, Giovanni L. Violante
papers.abstract: We address this question in a heterogeneous-agent incomplete-markets model featuring exogenous idiosyncratic risk, endogenous skill investment, and flexible labor supply. The tax and transfer schedule is restricted to be log-linear in income, a good description of the US system. Rising inequality is modeled as a combination of skill-biased technical change and growth in residual wage dispersion. When facing shifts in the income distribution like those observed in the US, a utilitarian planner chooses higher progressivity in response to larger residual inequality but lower progressivity in response to widening skill price dispersion reflecting technical change. Overall, optimal progressivity is approximately unchanged between 1980 and 2016. We document that the progressivity of the actual US tax and transfer system has similarly changed little since 1980, in line with the model prescription.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, PE；JEL：E24, H21, J24, J3, J31
papers.zh_title: 税收累进性应如何应对收入不平等加剧？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有外生异质性风险、内生技能投资和弹性劳动供给的异质性代理人不完全市场模型中探讨这一问题。税收和转移支付计划被限制为收入的对数线性形式，这很好地描述了美国体系。不平等加剧被建模为技能偏向型技术变化和残差工资离散度增长的组合。当面临类似美国观察到的收入分布变化时，功利主义规划者会选择更高的累进性以应对更大的残差不平等，但会选择更低的累进性以应对反映技术变化的技能价格离散度扩大。总体而言，1980年至2016年间最优累进性大致保持不变。我们记录到，自1980年以来，美国实际税收和转移支付体系的累进性同样变化甚微，这与模型建议一致。

papers.title: The Slope of the Phillips Curve: Evidence from U.S. States
papers.authors: Jonathon Hazell, Juan Herreño, Emi Nakamura, Jón Steinsson
papers.abstract: We estimate the slope of the Phillips curve in the cross section of U.S. states using newly constructed state-level price indexes for non-tradeable goods back to 1978. Our estimates indicate that the slope of the Phillips curve is small and was small even during the early 1980s. We estimate only a modest decline in the slope of the Phillips curve since the 1980s. We use a multi-region model to infer the slope of the aggregate Phillips curve from our regional estimates. Applying our estimates to recent unemployment dynamics yields essentially no missing disinflation or missing reinflation over the past few business cycles. Our results imply that the sharp drop in core inflation in the early 1980s was mostly due to shifting expectations about long-run monetary policy as opposed to a steep Phillips curve, and the greater stability of inflation since the 1990s is mostly due to long-run inflationary expectations becoming more firmly anchored.
papers.zh_title: 菲利普斯曲线的斜率：来自美国各州的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用新构建的、可追溯至1978年的美国各州非贸易品价格指数，在截面数据上估计了菲利普斯曲线的斜率。我们的估计表明，菲利普斯曲线的斜率很小，即使在20世纪80年代初期也是如此。我们估计自20世纪80年代以来，菲利普斯曲线的斜率仅出现了适度下降。我们使用一个多区域模型，从我们的区域估计中推断出总体菲利普斯曲线的斜率。将我们的估计应用于近期的失业动态，结果显示在过去几个商业周期中，基本上不存在缺失的通缩或缺失的再通胀。我们的结果表明，20世纪80年代初核心通胀率的急剧下降主要是由于对长期货币政策的预期转变，而非陡峭的菲利普斯曲线；而自20世纪90年代以来通胀率更加稳定，主要是由于长期通胀预期变得更加稳固。

papers.title: Macroeconomic Outcomes and COVID-19: A Progress Report
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Charles I. Jones
papers.abstract: This paper combines data on GDP, unemployment, and Google's COVID-19 Community Mobility Reports with data on deaths from COVID-19 to study the macroeconomic outcomes of the pandemic. We present results from an international perspective using data at the country level as well as results for individual U.S. states and key cities throughout the world. The data from these different levels of geographic aggregation offer a remarkably similar view of the pandemic despite the substantial heterogeneity in outcomes. Countries like Korea, Japan, Germany, and Norway and cities such as Tokyo and Seoul have comparatively few deaths and low macroeconomic losses. At the other extreme, New York City, Lombardy, the United Kingdom, and Madrid have many deaths and large macroeconomic losses. There are fewer locations that seem to succeed on one dimension but suffer on the other, but these include California and Sweden. The variety of cases potentially offers useful policy lessons regarding how to use non-pharmaceutical interventions to support good economic and health outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济结果与COVID-19：进展报告
papers.zh_abstract: 本文结合GDP、失业率、谷歌COVID-19社区流动性报告以及COVID-19死亡数据，研究疫情对宏观经济的影响。我们利用国家层面的数据从国际视角呈现结果，同时也分析了美国各州和全球主要城市的情况。尽管结果存在显著异质性，但这些不同地理聚合层面的数据对疫情提供了极为相似的看法。韩国、日本、德国和挪威等国家，以及东京和首尔等城市，死亡人数相对较少，宏观经济损失也较低。在另一个极端，纽约市、伦巴第、英国和马德里死亡人数众多，宏观经济损失巨大。似乎在一方面成功但在另一方面遭受损失的地点较少，但其中包括加利福尼亚和瑞典。这些多样化的案例可能为如何利用非药物干预措施支持良好的经济和健康结果提供有用的政策教训。

papers.title: Impact of Consequence Information on Insurance Choice
papers.authors: Anya Samek, Justin R. Sydnor
papers.abstract: Insurance choices are often hard to rationalize by standard theory and frequently appear sub-optimal. A key reason may be that people are unable to map the cost-sharing features of plans to their distribution of financial consequences. We develop and experimentally test a decision aid that provides this mapping to simplify comparisons of plan options. In two experiments mirroring typical health insurance decisions, we find that when people choose plans using standard feature-based information, they violate dominance at high rates. Our distribution-based decision aid substantially reduces dominance violations, and also changes choice patterns in situations where there is no dominant option. Choice patterns under feature-based menus can be most easily rationalized by models of heuristic choices, such as minimizing premium or deductible. With the decision aid, though, significantly more people have choice patterns that are better explained by expected utility theory. We compare our distribution-based approach to an alternative of providing estimates of the expected value of costs, which is the most common decision-support available in most insurance markets. Providing expected values affects choices in a similar direction as our consequence-based approach, but in a more muted fashion, and is only about half as effective at reducing dominance violations.
papers.zh_title: 后果信息对保险选择的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 保险选择通常难以用标准理论合理化，并且经常显得次优。一个关键原因可能是人们无法将计划的成本分摊特征映射到其财务后果的分布上。我们开发并实验测试了一种决策辅助工具，该工具提供了这种映射，以简化计划选项的比较。在两项模拟典型健康保险决策的实验中，我们发现，当人们使用基于标准特征的信息选择计划时，他们以高比率违反优势原则。我们的基于分布的决策辅助工具显著减少了优势违反，并且在没有主导选项的情况下也改变了选择模式。基于特征菜单下的选择模式最容易通过启发式选择模型（如最小化保费或免赔额）来合理化。然而，有了决策辅助工具，显著更多人的选择模式能更好地由预期效用理论解释。我们将基于分布的方法与提供成本预期值估计的替代方法进行比较，后者是大多数保险市场中最常见的决策支持。提供预期值对选择的影响方向与我们的基于后果的方法相似，但影响更为温和，并且在减少优势违反方面的效果仅约为后者的一半。

papers.title: r Minus g
papers.authors: Robert J. Barro
papers.abstract: Long-term data show that the dynamic efficiency condition `r>g` holds when `g` is represented by the average growth rate of real GDP if `r` is the average real rate of return on equity, `E(r^e)`, but not if `r` is the risk-free rate, `r^f`. This pattern accords with a simple disaster-risk model calibrated to fit observed equity premia. If Ponzi (chain-letter) finance by private agents and the government are precluded, the equilibrium can feature `r^f≤E(g)`, a result that does not signal dynamic inefficiency. In contrast, `E(r^e)>E(g)` is required for dynamic efficiency, implied by the model, and consistent with the data. The model satisfies Ricardian Equivalence because, without Ponzi finance by the government, a rise in safe assets from increased public debt is matched by an increase in the safe (that is, certain) present value of liabilities associated with net taxes.\n\n
papers.zh_title: r 减去 g
papers.zh_abstract: 长期数据显示，当g以实际GDP平均增长率表示，且r为权益平均实际回报率E(r^e)时，动态效率条件“r>g”成立；但如果r为无风险利率r^f，则不成立。这一模式符合一个简单的灾难风险模型，该模型经过校准以拟合观察到的股权溢价。如果禁止私人主体和政府进行庞氏（连锁信）融资，均衡可能呈现r^f≤E(g)的特征，这一结果并不表明动态无效率。相比之下，动态效率要求E(r^e)>E(g)，这由模型隐含且与数据一致。该模型满足李嘉图等价，因为在没有政府庞氏融资的情况下，公共债务增加带来的安全资产上升，与净税收相关负债的安全（即确定的）现值增加相匹配。

papers.title: Searching for the Equity Premium
papers.authors: Hang Bai, Lu Zhang
papers.abstract: Labor market frictions are crucial for the equity premium in production economies. A dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model with recursive utility, search frictions, and capital accumulation yields a high equity premium of 4.26% per annum, a stock market volatility of 11.8%, and a low average interest rate of 1.59%, while simultaneously retaining plausible business cycle dynamics. The equity premium and stock market volatility are strongly countercyclical, while the interest rate and consumption growth are largely unpredictable. Because of wage inertia, dividends are procyclical despite consumption smoothing via capital investment. The welfare cost of business cycles is huge, 29%.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, LS, ME；JEL：E32, E44, G12
papers.zh_title: 寻找股权溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动力市场摩擦对于生产经济中的股权溢价至关重要。一个具有递归效用、搜索摩擦和资本积累的动态随机一般均衡模型，产生了每年4.26%的高股权溢价、11.8%的股市波动率和1.59%的低平均利率，同时保持了合理的商业周期动态。股权溢价和股市波动率呈现强烈的逆周期性，而利率和消费增长在很大程度上不可预测。由于工资惯性，尽管通过资本投资进行消费平滑，股息仍呈顺周期性。商业周期的福利成本巨大，达到29%。

papers.title: Industrial Clusters, Networks and Resilience to the Covid-19 Shock in China
papers.authors: Ruochen Dai, Dilip Mookherjee, Yingyue Quan, Xiaobo Zhang
papers.abstract: We examine how exposure of Chinese firms to the Covid-19 shock varied with a cluster index (measuring spatial agglomeration of firms in related industries) at the county level. Two data sources are used: entry flows of newly registered firms in the entire country, and an entrepreneur survey regarding operation of existing firms. Both show greater resilience in counties with a higher cluster index, after controlling for industry dummies and local infection rates, besides county and time dummies in the entry data. Reliance of clusters on informal entrepreneur hometown networks and closer proximity to suppliers and customers help explain these findings.
papers.zh_title: 产业集群、网络与中国对COVID-19冲击的韧性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了中国企业受COVID-19冲击的程度如何随县级集群指数（衡量相关行业企业空间集聚程度的指标）而变化。使用了两个数据来源：全国新注册企业的进入流量，以及关于现有企业运营的企业家调查。在控制行业虚拟变量和本地感染率，以及进入数据中的县和时间虚拟变量后，两者均显示集群指数较高的县具有更强的韧性。集群对非正式企业家同乡网络的依赖以及与供应商和客户更近的距离有助于解释这些发现。

papers.title: The Long-Run Effects of the Affordable Care Act: A Pre-Committed Research Design Over the COVID-19 Recession and Recovery
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: The long-run costs and benefits of social insurance expansions may not be realized until a program has been in place through a cycle of boom, bust, and recovery. In the case of the Affordable Care Act (ACA), the arrival of the program's inaugural bust and recovery have been hastened by the COVID-19 pandemic. In this context, our analysis begins by developing two facts. First, during the pre-pandemic boom, we show that the ACA's effects had largely stabilized by 2016. Second, we develop a new fact involving variations in the ACA's effects across industries. Specifically, we show that the ACA’s effects differed dramatically across industries with lower versus higher levels of pre-ACA insurance coverage, and that this difference cannot be explained by differences in workers’ incomes or other observable characteristics, nor by geographic differences in pre-ACA uninsured rates. Finally, we set the stage for pre-committed analyses of the ACA's effects over the remainder of the current cycle of boom, bust, and recovery. In so doing, we seek to advance the use of pre-committed research designs in observational settings.
papers.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》的长期效应：跨越COVID-19衰退与复苏的预先承诺研究设计
papers.zh_abstract: 社会保险扩张的长期成本和收益可能直到一个项目经历了繁荣、萧条和复苏的完整周期后才能显现。就《平价医疗法案》（ACA）而言，该法案首次萧条和复苏的到来因COVID-19疫情而加速。在此背景下，我们的分析首先确立了两个事实。首先，在疫情前的繁荣期，我们表明ACA的影响到2016年已基本稳定。其次，我们发展了一个新事实，涉及ACA影响在不同行业间的差异。具体来说，我们表明ACA的影响在ACA前保险覆盖率较低与较高的行业之间存在显著差异，并且这种差异无法用工人收入或其他可观测特征的差异来解释，也无法用ACA前未参保率的地理差异来解释。最后，我们为在当前繁荣、萧条和复苏周期的剩余阶段对ACA影响进行预先承诺分析奠定了基础。通过这样做，我们旨在推动在观察性环境中使用预先承诺研究设计。

papers.title: Does Context Outweigh Individual Characteristics in Driving Voting Behavior? Evidence from Relocations within the U.S.
papers.authors: Enrico Cantoni, Vincent Pons
papers.abstract: We measure the overall influence of contextual versus individual factors (e.g., voting rules and media as opposed to race and education) on voter behavior, and explore underlying mechanisms. Using a U.S.-wide voter-level panel, 2008–18, we examine voters who relocate across state and county lines, tracking changes in registration, turnout, and party affiliation to estimate location and individual fixed effects in a value-added model. Location explains 37 percent of the cross-state variation in turnout (to 63 percent for individual characteristics) and an only slightly smaller share of variation in party affiliation. Place effects are larger for young and White voters.
papers.zh_title: 情境因素是否比个人特征更能驱动投票行为？来自美国境内迁移的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了情境因素与个人因素（例如，投票规则和媒体相对于种族和教育）对选民行为的总体影响，并探讨了潜在机制。利用2008-2018年全美选民层面面板数据，我们考察了跨州和县界迁移的选民，追踪其登记、投票率和党派归属的变化，在增值模型中估计地点和个人的固定效应。地点解释了投票率跨州变异的37%（个人特征解释63%），并解释了略小份额的党派归属变异。地点效应在年轻选民和白人选民中更大。

papers.title: An Executive Order Worth $100 Billion: The Impact of an Immigration Ban’s Announcement on Fortune 500 Firms’ Valuation
papers.authors: Dany Bahar, Prithwiraj Choudhury, Britta Glennon
papers.abstract: On June 22, 2020, President Trump issued an Executive Order (EO) that suspended new work visas, barring nearly 200,000 foreign workers and their dependents from entering the United States and preventing American companies from hiring skilled immigrants using H-1B or L1 visas. Exploiting this shock, and using event study methodology analyzing the cumulative average abnormal returns (CAARs) of Fortune 500 companies following this order, we find that the EO statistically and economically significantly caused negative CAARs of up to 0.45%, the equivalent of over 100 billion of US dollars of losses, based on the firms’ valuation before the event. Our results are particularly pronounced for firms that had maintained or increased their reliance on skilled immigrant workers over the prior years.
papers.zh_title: 价值1000亿美元的行政令：移民禁令公告对财富500强企业估值的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年6月22日，特朗普总统发布了一项行政令，暂停新的工作签证，禁止近20万名外国工人及其家属进入美国，并阻止美国公司使用H-1B或L1签证雇佣技术移民。利用这一冲击，并采用事件研究方法分析该行政令后财富500强企业的累计平均异常回报率（CAARs），我们发现该行政令在统计和经济上均显著导致了高达0.45%的负向CAARs，相当于基于事件前企业估值的超过1000亿美元的损失。我们的结果在那些过去几年维持或增加了对技术移民工人依赖的企业中尤为显著。

papers.title: Lead in Drinking Water and Birth Outcomes: A Tale of Two Water Treatment Plants
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Muzhe Yang
papers.abstract: The recent lead-in-water crisis in Newark has renewed concerns about the crisis being a widespread problem in the nation. Using data on the exact home addresses of pregnant women residing in the city combined with information on the spatial boundary separating areas within the city serviced by two water treatment plants, we exploit an exogenous change in water chemistry that resulted in lead leaching into the tap water of one plant's service area, but not the other's, to identify a causal effect of prenatal lead exposure on fetal health. We find robust evidence of adverse health impacts, which has important policy implications in light of the substantial number of lead water pipes that remain in use as part of our aging infrastructure and the cost-benefit calculus of lead abatement interventions.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：H75, I12, I18, Q53, Q58
papers.zh_title: 饮用水中的铅与出生结局：两个水处理厂的故事
papers.zh_abstract: 近期纽瓦克的饮用水铅污染危机再次引发担忧，即此类危机可能成为全国范围内的普遍问题。利用居住在该市的孕妇确切家庭住址数据，结合该市两个水处理厂服务区域的空间分界信息，我们利用水化学变化的外生冲击——该变化导致其中一个水处理厂服务区的自来水铅浸出，而另一个则未受影响——来识别产前铅暴露对胎儿健康的因果效应。我们发现了健康不良影响的稳健证据，鉴于我们老化的基础设施中仍有大量铅水管在使用，以及铅减排干预措施的成本效益计算，这一发现具有重要的政策意义。

papers.title: Disentangling Motivation and Study Productivity as Drivers of Adolescent Human Capital Formation: Evidence from a Field Experiment and Structural Analysis
papers.authors: Christopher Cotton, Brent R. Hickman, John A. List, Joseph Price, Sutanuka Roy
papers.abstract: We estimate a structural model of endogenous short-run human capital investment focusing on a learner’s leisure-study choices, influenced by external costs/benefits and two key internal factors: learning productivity and willingness to engage in study activity. Our novel self-investment framework rigorously quantifies models of learning that have existed in the psychology literature for decades. Our identification strategy combines panel data and study-incentive variation to point identify student-level parameters. Empirically, we find that idiosyncratic productivity and motivation traits are uncorrelated, and that low productivity is the stronger predictor of academic struggles, not low motivation. We investigate the influence of external factors on student learning and find that school quality affects it through 3 channels: augmenting productivity, augmenting skill production TFP, and by altering the mapping between learning activity and permanent skill gains.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：C93, I21, I24, I25, I26, J01, J24, O38
papers.zh_title: 区分动机和学习生产力作为青少年人力资本形成的驱动因素：来自实地实验和结构分析的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个内生短期人力资本投资的结构模型，重点关注学习者的休闲-学习选择，该选择受外部成本/收益以及两个关键内部因素影响：学习生产力和参与学习活动的意愿。我们的新颖自我投资框架严格量化了心理学文献中已存在数十年的学习模型。我们的识别策略结合面板数据和学习激励变化，以点识别学生层面的参数。实证发现，特质性的生产力和动机特征不相关，且低生产力是学业困难更强的预测因素，而非低动机。我们研究了外部因素对学生学习的影响，发现学校质量通过三个渠道发挥作用：提高生产力、提高技能生产全要素生产率，以及改变学习活动与永久技能增益之间的映射关系。

papers.title: Granular Credit Risk
papers.authors: Sigurd Galaasen, Rustam Jamilov, Ragnar Juelsrud, Hélène Rey
papers.abstract: What is the impact of granular credit risk on banks and the economy? We quantify single-name exposure risk in bank portfolios by applying a novel empirical strategy to an administrative loan-level dataset from Norway. Exploiting the fat-tailed properties of the loan-share distribution, we use the granular instrumental variable approach to show that idiosyncratic borrower risk survives aggregation within banks’ portfolios. These granular credit shocks spill over from affected banks to firms, reducing investment and raising default risk among non-granular borrowers, with sizeable consequences for the real economy.
papers.zh_title: 颗粒信用风险
papers.zh_abstract: 颗粒信用风险对银行和经济有何影响？我们通过将一种新颖的实证策略应用于挪威的行政贷款层面数据集，量化了银行投资组合中的单一名称敞口风险。利用贷款份额分布的厚尾特性，我们采用颗粒工具变量方法表明，异质性借款人的风险在银行投资组合内的加总过程中得以幸存。这些颗粒信用冲击从受影响的银行溢出到企业，减少了投资并提高了非颗粒借款人的违约风险，对实体经济产生了相当大的影响。

papers.title: The Risk of Narrow, Disputable Results in the U.S. Electoral College: 1836-2020
papers.authors: Michael Geruso, Dean Spears
papers.abstract: Close elections are important for many reasons, including that consequent election disputes can weaken democratic legitimacy and risk political violence. We quantify the probability of close outcomes in US presidential races with novel applications of empirical election models from several sources. We show that razor-thin margins are very likely under the Electoral College (EC). And we establish that the EC causes this closeness: It would not occur under any plausibly comparable popular vote system. The tendency of the EC to generate close elections is true today and throughout US presidential voting history.
papers.zh_title: 美国选举团中狭窄、可争议结果的风险：1836-2020年
papers.zh_abstract: 势均力敌的选举之所以重要，原因众多，包括由此引发的选举争议可能削弱民主合法性并带来政治暴力风险。我们通过新颖地应用来自多个来源的实证选举模型，量化了美国总统选举中出现接近结果的可能性。我们表明，在选举团制度下，极其微弱的优势非常可能出现。并且我们证实，这种接近性是由选举团制度造成的：在任何合理可比的大众投票制度下都不会出现这种情况。选举团制度倾向于产生势均力敌的选举，这一现象在当今以及整个美国总统选举历史中都是如此。

papers.title: The Pandemic Economic Crisis, Precautionary Behavior, and Mobility Constraints: An Application of the Dynamic Disequilibrium Model with Randomness
papers.authors: Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the economic impact of the pandemic, providing insights into the consequences of alternative policies. Our framework focuses on three key features: (a) Covid-19 is a sectoral shock of unknown depth and duration affecting some sectors and technologies more than others; (b) there are constraints in shifting resources across sectors; and (c) there is a high level of uncertainty about the disease and its economic aftermath, inducing a high level of precautionary behavior by some agents and leading to others facing more severe credit constraints. Because of macroeconomic externalities, precautionary behavior exacerbates the downturn, and even sectors where Covid-19 does not directly affect consumption or production may face unemployment. Multipliers associated with different government expenditure programs differ markedly. The paper describes policies that can mitigate precautionary behavior, leading to reduced unemployment. Greater wage flexibility may lead to increased unemployment. \nThe precautionary behavior is the antithesis of equilibrium behavior, suggesting that standard equilibrium approaches may not provide the appropriate framework for analyzing the pandemic: individuals know that they don’t know the future, that existing and newly made contracts and plans may be broken, and that they need to be able to respond to these unknowable contingencies.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, PE；JEL：B22, E21, E23, E24, E61, E63, G28, J21, J23
papers.zh_title: 疫情经济危机、预防性行为与流动性约束：带随机性的动态非均衡模型的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了疫情的经济影响，为不同政策的后果提供了见解。我们的框架聚焦于三个关键特征：(a) 新冠疫情是一种深度和持续时间未知的部门冲击，对某些部门和技术的影响大于其他；(b) 跨部门转移资源存在约束；(c) 关于疾病及其经济后果存在高度不确定性，导致某些主体采取高度预防性行为，并使得其他主体面临更严格的信贷约束。由于宏观经济外部性，预防性行为加剧了经济衰退，即使新冠疫情未直接影响消费或生产的部门也可能面临失业。与不同政府支出计划相关的乘数存在显著差异。本文描述了可以缓解预防性行为、从而降低失业率的政策。更大的工资灵活性可能导致失业率上升。 预防性行为是均衡行为的对立面，这表明标准的均衡方法可能无法为分析疫情提供合适的框架：个体知道自己对未来一无所知，知道现有和新签订的合同与计划可能被打破，并且需要能够应对这些不可知的突发事件。

papers.title: Piecewise-Linear Approximations and Filtering for DSGE Models with Occasionally Binding Constraints
papers.authors: S. Borağan Aruoba, Pablo Cuba-Borda, Kenji Higa-Flores, Frank Schorfheide, Sergio Villalvazo
papers.abstract: We develop an algorithm to construct approximate decision rules that are piecewise-linear and continuous for DSGE models with an occasionally binding constraint. The functional form of the decision rules allows us to derive a conditionally optimal particle filter (COPF) for the evaluation of the likelihood function that exploits the structure of the solution. We document the accuracy of the likelihood approximation and embed it into a particle Markov chain Monte Carlo algorithm to conduct Bayesian estimation. Compared with a standard bootstrap particle filter, the COPF significantly reduces the persistence of the Markov chain, improves the accuracy of Monte Carlo approximations of posterior moments, and drastically speeds up computations. We use the techniques to estimate a small-scale DSGE model to assess the effects of the government spending portion of the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act in 2009 when interest rates reached the zero lower bound.
papers.zh_title: 针对具有偶尔约束的DSGE模型的分段线性近似与滤波
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种算法，用于为具有偶尔约束的动态随机一般均衡模型构建分段线性且连续的近似决策规则。决策规则的函数形式使我们能够推导出一个条件最优粒子滤波器，用于评估似然函数，该滤波器利用了求解的结构。我们记录了似然近似的准确性，并将其嵌入到粒子马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛算法中，以进行贝叶斯估计。与标准自助粒子滤波器相比，条件最优粒子滤波器显著降低了马尔可夫链的持久性，提高了后验矩蒙特卡洛近似的准确性，并大幅加快了计算速度。我们利用这些技术估计一个小型动态随机一般均衡模型，以评估2009年利率触及零下限时《美国复苏与再投资法案》中政府支出部分的影响。

papers.title: The ESG-Innovation Disconnect: Evidence from Green Patenting
papers.authors: Lauren Cohen, Umit G. Gurun, Quoc H. Nguyen
papers.abstract: No firm or sector of the global economy is untouched by innovation. In equilibrium, innovators will flock to (and innovation will occur) where the returns to innovative capital are the highest. In this paper, we document a strong empirical pattern in green patent production. Specifically, we find that oil, gas, and energy-producing firms – firms with lower Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) scores, and who are often explicitly excluded from ESG funds’ investment universe – are key innovators in the United States’ green patent landscape.
