These energy producers produce more, and significantly higher quality, green innovation. In many green technology spaces, they appear to be influential first-movers, not easily substitutable, and to produce ongoing foundational aspects of innovation and commercialization on which other alternative energy producers build. This is broadly true across the green patenting spectrum, and continues through the present day, concentrating specifically in certain green technology branches (for instance, in carbon capture).
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, LE, PR；JEL：G11, G30, O31, O32
papers.zh_title: ESG与创新的脱节：来自绿色专利的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 全球经济的任何企业或部门都无法免受创新的影响。在均衡状态下，创新者将涌向（创新将发生在）创新资本回报最高的地方。在本文中，我们记录了绿色专利生产中的一个强烈实证模式。具体而言，我们发现石油、天然气和能源生产企业——这些企业环境、社会和治理得分较低，且常被明确排除在ESG基金的投资范围之外——是美国绿色专利格局中的关键创新者。这些能源生产商生产了更多且质量显著更高的绿色创新。在许多绿色技术领域，它们似乎是具有影响力的先行者，不易被替代，并持续生产其他替代能源生产商赖以发展的基础性创新和商业化要素。这在绿色专利谱系中普遍成立，并持续至今，尤其集中在某些绿色技术分支（例如碳捕获）。

papers.title: Partisan Residential Sorting on Climate Change Risk
papers.authors: Asaf Bernstein, Stephen B. Billings, Matthew Gustafson, Ryan Lewis
papers.abstract: Is climate change partisanship reflected in residential decisions? Comparing individual properties in the same zip code with similar elevation and proximity to the coast, houses exposed to sea level rise (SLR) are increasingly more likely to be owned by Republicans and less likely to be owned by Democrats. We find a partisan residency gap for even moderately SLR exposed properties of more than 5 percentage points, which has more than doubled over the past six years. Findings are unchanged controlling flexibly for other individual demographics and a variety of granular property characteristics, including the value of the home. Residential sorting manifests among owners regardless of occupancy, but not among renters, and is driven by long-run SLR exposure but not current flood risk. Anticipatory sorting on climate change suggests that households that are most likely to vote against climate friendly policies and least likely to adapt may ultimately bear the burden of climate change.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PE, POL；JEL：D10, D72, G1, G5, Q5, Q54, R2, R21, R23, R31
papers.zh_title: 气候变化风险上的党派居住分化
papers.zh_abstract: 气候变化党派性是否反映在居住决策中？比较同一邮政编码区内海拔和海岸距离相似的独立房产，暴露于海平面上升风险的房屋越来越可能由共和党人拥有，而越来越不可能由民主党人拥有。我们发现，即使是中等海平面上升暴露的房产，党派居住差距也超过5个百分点，并且这一差距在过去六年中翻了一番以上。在灵活控制其他个人人口统计特征和多种精细房产特征（包括房屋价值）后，结果保持不变。居住分化体现在无论是否自住的业主中，但租户中不存在，且由长期海平面上升暴露驱动，而非当前洪水风险。针对气候变化的预期性居住分化表明，最可能投票反对气候友好政策且最不可能适应的家庭，最终可能承担气候变化的负担。

papers.title: Expectations, Infections, and Economic Activity
papers.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Miguel Godinho de Matos, Francisco Lima, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
papers.abstract: This paper develops a quantitative theory of how people weigh the risks of infections against the benefits of engaging in social interactions that contribute to the spread of infectious diseases. Our framework takes into account the interrelated yet distinct effects of public policies and private behavior on the spread of the disease. We evaluate the model using a novel micro data set on consumption expenditures in Portugal. The estimated model accounts for the cross-sectional consumption response of individuals of different ages at a given time, as well as the time-series response of consumption of the young and old across the first three waves of Covid. Our model highlights the critical role of expectations in shaping how human behavior influences the dynamics of epidemics.
papers.zh_title: 预期、感染与经济活动
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个定量理论，用以分析人们如何在感染风险与参与社交互动（这些互动会促进传染病传播）的收益之间进行权衡。我们的框架考虑了公共政策和私人行为对疾病传播相互关联但又截然不同的影响。我们利用葡萄牙消费支出的新型微观数据集对模型进行了评估。估计出的模型解释了特定时间点不同年龄个体的横截面消费反应，以及新冠前三波疫情中年轻人和老年人消费的时间序列反应。我们的模型强调了预期在塑造人类行为如何影响流行病动态中的关键作用。

papers.title: Reliance on Science by Inventors: Hybrid Extraction of In-text Patent-to-Article Citations
papers.authors: Matt Marx, Aaron Fuegi
papers.abstract: We curate and characterize a complete set of citations from patents to scientific articles, including nearly 16 million from the full text of USPTO and EPO patents. Combining heuristics and machine learning, we achieve 25% higher performance than machine learning alone. At 99.4% accuracy, coverage of 87.6% is achieved, and coverage above 90% with accuracy above 93%. Performance is evaluated with a set of 5,939 randomly-sampled, cross-verified “known good” citations, which the authors have never seen. We compare these “in-text” citations with the “official” citations on the front page of patents. In-text citations are more diverse temporally, geographically, and topically. They are less self-referential and less likely to be recycled from one patent to the next. That said, in-text citations have been overshadowed by front-page in the past few decades, dropping from 80% of all paper-to-patent citations to less than 40%. In replicating two published articles that use only citations on the front page of patents, we show that failing to capture those in the body text leads to understating the relationship between academic science and commercial invention. All patent-to-article citations, as well as the known-good test set, are available at http://relianceonscience.org.
papers.zh_title: 发明人对科学的依赖：专利正文中专利-论文引用的混合提取
papers.zh_abstract: 我们整理并描述了一套完整的从专利到科学文章的引用集，包括来自美国专利商标局和欧洲专利局专利全文的近1600万条引用。结合启发式方法和机器学习，我们实现了比单独使用机器学习高出25%的性能。在99.4%的准确率下，覆盖率达到87.6%，并且当准确率超过93%时，覆盖率超过90%。性能通过一组5939个随机抽样、交叉验证的“已知正确”引用进行评估，作者此前从未见过这些引用。我们将这些“正文内”引用与专利首页上的“官方”引用进行了比较。正文内引用在时间、地理和主题上更加多样化。它们更少自我引用，也更少从一个专利重复使用到下一个专利。尽管如此，在过去几十年中，正文内引用已被首页引用所掩盖，从占所有专利-论文引用的80%下降到不足40%。在复现两篇仅使用专利首页引用的已发表文章时，我们表明，未能捕获正文中的引用会导致低估学术科学与商业发明之间的关系。所有专利-论文引用以及已知正确的测试集均可从http://relianceonscience.org获取。

papers.title: The Dynamic Impact of Exporting on Firm R&D Investment
papers.authors: Florin G. Maican, Matilda Orth, Mark J. Roberts, Van Anh Vuong
papers.abstract: This article estimates a dynamic structural model of firm R&D investment in twelve Swedish manufacturing industries and uses it to measure rates of return to R&D and to simulate the impact of trade restrictions on the investment incentives. R&D spending is found to have a larger impact on firm productivity in the export market than in the domestic market. Export market profits are a substantial source of the expected return to R&D. Counterfactual simulations show that trade restrictions lower both the expected return to R&D and R&D investment level, thus reducing an important source of the dynamic gains from trade. A 20 percent tariff on Swedish exports reduces the expected benefits of R&D by an average of 32.2 percent and lowers the amount of R&D spending by 13.9 percent in the high-tech industries. The corresponding reductions in the low-tech industries are 30.4 and 8.9 percent, respectively. R&D adjustments in response to export tariffs mainly occur on the intensive, rather than the extensive, margin.
papers.zh_title: 出口对企业研发投资的动态影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计了瑞典十二个制造业行业中企业研发投资的动态结构模型，并利用该模型衡量研发回报率以及模拟贸易限制对投资激励的影响。研究发现，研发支出对出口市场中企业生产率的影响大于对国内市场的影响。出口市场利润是研发预期回报的重要来源。反事实模拟表明，贸易限制降低了研发的预期回报和研发投资水平，从而削弱了贸易动态收益的一个重要来源。对瑞典出口征收20%的关税会使高科技行业研发的预期收益平均降低32.2%，并使研发支出金额减少13.9%。低科技行业的相应降幅分别为30.4%和8.9%。研发对出口关税的调整主要发生在集约边际上，而非广延边际上。

papers.title: Some Facts about Dominant Firms
papers.authors: Germán Gutiérrez, Thomas Philippon
papers.abstract: We measure the evolution of dominant firms in the U.S. economy since 1960, and globally since 1990. Contrary to common wisdom, dominant firms have not become larger, have not become more productive, and their contribution to aggregate productivity growth has fallen by more than one third since 2000.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DAE, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D24, L11, O40
papers.zh_title: 关于主导企业的一些事实
papers.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了自1960年以来美国经济中以及自1990年以来全球经济中主导企业的演变。与普遍看法相反，主导企业并未变得更大，也未变得更具生产力，而且它们对总体生产率增长的贡献自2000年以来下降了超过三分之一。

papers.title: Communication and Bargaining Breakdown: An Empirical Analysis
papers.authors: Matthew Backus, Thomas Blake, Jett Pettus, Steven Tadelis
papers.abstract: Bargaining breakdown—whether as delay, conflict, or missing trade—plagues bargaining in environments with incomplete information. Can a bargaining environment that facilitates or restricts communication alleviate these costs? We exploit a unique opportunity to study this question using real market transactions: eBay Germany’s Best Offer platform. On May 23, 2016, the platform introduced unstructured communication allowing buyers and sellers on the desktop version of the site, but not the mobile app, to accompany price offers with a message. Using this natural experiment, our difference-in-differences approach documents a 14% decrease in the the rate of breakdown among compliers. Though adoption is immediate, the effect is not. We show, using text analysis, that the dynamics are consistent with repeat players learning how to use communication in bargaining, and that the messaging strategies of experienced sellers are correlated with successful bargaining.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, POL；JEL：C78, D82, D83, M21
papers.zh_title: 沟通与谈判破裂：一项实证分析
papers.zh_abstract: 谈判破裂——无论是表现为延迟、冲突还是交易缺失——困扰着信息不完全环境中的谈判。一个促进或限制沟通的谈判环境能否减轻这些成本？我们利用一个独特的机会，通过真实市场交易来研究这个问题：eBay德国的“最佳报价”平台。2016年5月23日，该平台引入了非结构化沟通，允许桌面版网站（而非移动应用）上的买家和卖家在报价时附带一条消息。利用这一自然实验，我们的双重差分方法记录了在依从者中谈判破裂率下降了14%。尽管采用是即时的，但效果并非如此。我们通过文本分析表明，这种动态与重复参与者学习如何在谈判中使用沟通是一致的，并且经验丰富的卖家的消息传递策略与成功的谈判相关。

papers.title: Input-Output Networks and Misallocation
papers.authors: Jing Hang, Pravin Krishna, Heiwai Tang
papers.abstract: This paper develops a framework for studying the macroeconomic costs of resource misallocation. The framework enables the assessment of the conditions under which the existing estimates in the misallocation literature, which are largely based on a value-added production structure and ignore inter-sectoral linkages, provide an unbiased estimate of misallocation costs in relation to a more general setting, in which production of gross output relies upon input-output linkages across sectors. We show that in the absence of intermediate input distortions, the two approaches are isomorphic and will yield the same estimated aggregate productivity loss. When firm-specific intermediate input distortions are present, however, the value-added model produces biased estimates of TFP losses due to both model misspecification and incorrect inferences of firms' productivity and distortions. Using Chinese and Indian enterprise data, we find quantitatively similar TFP losses from resource misallocation for China, regardless of the model used, while for India, we infer significantly larger TFP losses under the gross output model.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, PR；JEL：E1, E23, L16, O11, O4
papers.zh_title: 投入产出网络与资源错配
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个研究资源错配宏观经济成本的框架。该框架能够评估在何种条件下，现有错配文献中的估计（这些估计主要基于增加值生产结构并忽略部门间联系）相对于一个更一般的设定（其中总产出生产依赖于跨部门的投入产出联系）能够提供无偏的错配成本估计。我们表明，在不存在中间投入扭曲的情况下，这两种方法同构，并将得出相同的估计总生产率损失。然而，当存在企业特定的中间投入扭曲时，增加值模型会因模型设定错误以及对生产率和扭曲的错误推断而产生有偏的全要素生产率损失估计。利用中国和印度的企业数据，我们发现对于中国，无论使用哪种模型，资源错配导致的全要素生产率损失在数量上相似；而对于印度，我们在总产出模型下推断出显著更大的全要素生产率损失。

papers.title: When Externalities Collide: Influenza and Pollution
papers.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Matthew J. Neidell, Nicholas J. Sanders, Gregor Singer
papers.abstract: Influenza and air pollution each pose significant health risks with global economic consequences. Their shared etiological pathways present a case of compounding health risk via interacting externalities. Using instrumental variables based on changing wind direction, we show increased levels of contemporaneous pollution increase influenza hospitalizations. We exploit random variation in effectiveness of the influenza vaccine as an additional instrument to show vaccine protection neutralizes this relationship. Thus, pollution control and vaccination campaigns jointly provide greater returns than those implied by addressing either in isolation. We show the importance of this consideration in addressing observed gaps in influenza incidence by race.
papers.zh_title: 当外部性碰撞时：流感和污染
papers.zh_abstract: 流感和空气污染各自都构成重大的健康风险，并带来全球经济后果。它们共同的病因学途径呈现了一个通过相互作用的外部性导致复合健康风险的案例。利用基于风向变化的工具变量，我们表明同期污染水平的增加会提高流感住院率。我们利用流感疫苗有效性中的随机变异作为额外的工具变量，以表明疫苗保护能中和这种关系。因此，污染控制和疫苗接种运动共同带来的回报大于单独解决其中任何一个问题所隐含的回报。我们展示了这一考虑在解释按种族划分的流感发病率观察到的差距中的重要性。

papers.title: Personal Power Dynamics in Bargaining
papers.authors: Renee Bowen, Ilwoo Hwang, Stefan Krasa
papers.abstract: We study bargaining between a fixed agenda-setter and responder over successive issues. If the responder rejects the setter’s proposal, the setter can attempt to assert her will to implement her ideal and will succeed with a probability that depends on her “personal power”. Players learn about the setter’s power as gridlock persists. Gridlock occurs when the setter’s perceived power is either too high or too low, and the players reach compromise when the setter has moderate personal power. The presence of “difficult” issues can induce more compromise as the players have incentives to avoid testing the setter’s power.
papers.zh_title: 谈判中的个人权力动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个固定的议程设定者与回应者就连续问题进行谈判的过程。如果回应者拒绝设定者的提议，设定者可以尝试主张其意志以实施其理想方案，并且成功的概率取决于她的“个人权力”。随着僵局的持续，参与者会了解设定者的权力。当设定者的感知权力过高或过低时，僵局就会发生；而当设定者拥有适度的个人权力时，参与者会达成妥协。“困难”问题的存在可以促使更多妥协，因为参与者有动机避免测试设定者的权力。

papers.title: Children and the Remaining Gender Gaps in the Labor Market
papers.authors: Patricia Cortés, Jessica Pan
papers.abstract: The past five decades have seen a remarkable convergence in the economic roles of men and women in society. Yet, persistently large gender gaps in terms of labor supply, earnings, and representation in top jobs remain. Moreover, in countries like the U.S., convergence in labor market outcomes appears to have slowed in recent decades. In this article, we focus on the role of children and show that many potential explanations for the remaining gender disparities in labor market outcomes are related to the fact that children impose significantly larger penalties on the career trajectories of women relative to men. In the U.S., we document that close to two-thirds of the overall gender earnings gap can be accounted for by the differential impacts of children on women and men. We propose a simple model of household decision-making to motivate the link between children and gender gaps in the labor market, and to help rationalize how various factors potentially interact with parenthood to produce differential outcomes for men and women. We discuss several forces that might make the road to gender equity even more challenging for modern cohorts of parents, and offer a critical discussion of public policies in seeking to address the remaining gaps.
papers.zh_title: 子女与劳动力市场中持续存在的性别差距
papers.zh_abstract: 过去五十年间，男性和女性在社会中的经济角色出现了显著趋同。然而，在劳动力供给、收入以及高层职位代表性方面，仍然存在持续且巨大的性别差距。此外，在美国等国家，劳动力市场结果的趋同速度近几十年来似乎有所放缓。在本文中，我们聚焦于子女的作用，并表明，对于劳动力市场结果中剩余性别差异的许多潜在解释，都与这样一个事实相关：相较于男性，子女对女性的职业轨迹造成了显著更大的惩罚。在美国，我们记录到，总体性别收入差距中近三分之二可由子女对女性和男性的不同影响来解释。我们提出了一个简单的家庭决策模型，以阐明子女与劳动力市场性别差距之间的联系，并帮助理解各种因素如何可能与为人父母的身份相互作用，从而为男性和女性带来不同的结果。我们讨论了若干可能使现代父母群体实现性别平等的道路更具挑战性的力量，并对旨在解决剩余差距的公共政策进行了批判性讨论。

papers.title: The Value of Social Status
papers.authors: Alexander W. Butler, Bruce I. Carlin, Alan D. Crane, Boyang Liu, James P. Weston
papers.abstract: We quantify the value of social status using market prices for Delaware license plates. Delaware plates are numbered sequentially, are private property, and can be legally bequeathed or traded in a secondary market. License plates offer no direct economic benefit other than authorizing the operation of a motor vehicle. But they appear to be a source of social status. Not only do market prices suggest a preference for lower plate numbers, but there exist extreme price jumps that indicate that exclusive clubs exist whereby the number of digits on the plate convey implicit membership. The aggregate value of this market indicates that people purchase status as a significant portion of their consumption bundle. Finally, social status as an asset appears to be uncorrelated with aggregate economic and market conditions.
papers.zh_title: 社会地位的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用特拉华州车牌的市场价格来量化社会地位的价值。特拉华州车牌按顺序编号，属于私人财产，可以合法地遗赠或在二级市场上交易。车牌除了授权机动车行驶外，不提供直接的经济利益。但它们似乎是社会地位的一个来源。不仅市场价格显示出对较低车牌号的偏好，而且存在极端的价格跳跃，表明存在排他性俱乐部，其中车牌上的数字位数传达了隐含的会员身份。该市场的总价值表明，人们将地位作为其消费组合的重要组成部分进行购买。最后，作为一种资产，社会地位似乎与总体经济和市场状况不相关。

papers.title: Valuing Rare Pediatric Drugs: An Economics Perspective
papers.authors: Rena M. Conti, Jonathan Gruber, Daniel A. Ollendorf, Peter J. Neumann
papers.abstract: There is a coming wave of novel genetic therapies aiming to treat rare pediatric disease. A large literature investigates the valuation of new treatments, but the valuation of treatments for rare pediatric illness raises a host of unique issues. In this paper, we review the challenges of applying both the standard economic model and standard approaches to estimating cost-effectiveness using the quality-adjusted life year (QALY) to this case. We argue that there are a large number of special issues that have only been partially addressed by past work and we conclude that more data and the development of new methods are vital as innovators, health technology assessment practitioners and policymakers confront the launch of these new drugs.
papers.zh_title: 评估罕见儿科药物的价值：一个经济学视角
papers.zh_abstract: 旨在治疗罕见儿科疾病的新型基因疗法浪潮即将到来。大量文献研究了新疗法的估值，但对罕见儿科疾病治疗的估值引发了一系列独特的问题。在本文中，我们回顾了将标准经济模型以及使用质量调整生命年（QALY）估算成本效益的标准方法应用于此案例所面临的挑战。我们认为，存在大量过去工作仅部分涉及的特殊问题，并且我们得出结论，随着创新者、卫生技术评估从业者和政策制定者面对这些新药的上市，更多数据和新方法的开发至关重要。

papers.title: The Liquidity Sensitivity of Healthcare Consumption: Evidence from Social Security Payments
papers.authors: Tal Gross, Timothy Layton, Daniel Prinz
papers.abstract: Some consumers lack the cash needed to pay for medical care. As a result, they either delay care until they can pay for it or they forgo the care altogether. To test for such a possibility, we study the distribution of monthly Social Security checks among Medicare Part D enrollees. When Social Security checks are distributed, prescription fills increase by 6-12 percent. In that sense, drug consumption of low-income Medicare recipients is "liquidity sensitive." We then study recipients who transition onto a program that eliminates copayments. When those recipients do not face copayments, their drug consumption becomes less liquidity sensitive. That finding implies that, beyond risk protection, generous insurance also provides recipients with the ability to consume healthcare when they need it rather than when they have cash. Further, we find that recipients whose drug consumption is most liquidity sensitive exhibit price elasticities of demand that are twice the size of the average elasticity, suggesting that more-generous insurance causes recipients both to re-time prescription filling and also to start filling prescriptions that they otherwise would not fill. We present a stylized model that uses this finding to call into question the conventional interpretation of demand-response to price as solely inefficient moral hazard.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：G5, H0, I1, I13
papers.zh_title: 医疗消费的流动性敏感性：来自社会保障金的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 一些消费者缺乏支付医疗费用所需的现金。因此，他们要么推迟就医直到有能力支付，要么完全放弃治疗。为了检验这种可能性，我们研究了医疗保险D部分参保者中每月社会保障金的发放情况。当社会保障金发放时，处方药配药量增加了6%至12%。从这个意义上说，低收入医疗保险受益人的药物消费是“流动性敏感的”。然后，我们研究了转入一个取消共付额计划的受益人。当这些受益人无需面对共付额时，他们的药物消费变得不那么具有流动性敏感性。这一发现意味着，除了风险保护之外，慷慨的保险还为受益人提供了在需要时而非有现金时消费医疗保健的能力。此外，我们发现，药物消费对流动性最敏感的受益人，其需求价格弹性是平均弹性的两倍，这表明更慷慨的保险既导致受益人重新安排处方配药时间，也开始配取他们原本不会配取的处方药。我们提出了一个程式化模型，利用这一发现对将价格需求反应仅仅解释为低效道德风险的传统观点提出了质疑。

papers.title: The (Missing) Relation Between Acquisition Announcement Returns and Value Creation
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Utpal Bhattacharya, Stacey E. Jacobsen
papers.abstract: Cumulative abnormal returns (CAR) computed around acquisition announcements are widely considered to be market-based assessments of expected value creation. We show, however, that announcement returns do not correlate with commonly used and new measures of ex-post outcomes. A simple characteristics-based model using standard information known at the announcement date can predict these outcomes reasonably well, yet CAR even fails to capture the predictions from this model. Evidence suggests that information about the standalone acquirer dominates CAR, making it virtually impossible to extract deal-related information. We conclude that CAR is an unreliable measure of expected value creation.
papers.zh_title: 收购公告收益与价值创造之间的（缺失）关系
papers.zh_abstract: 围绕收购公告计算的累积异常收益（CAR）被广泛视为基于市场的预期价值创造评估。然而，我们表明，公告收益与常用及新的事后结果衡量指标并不相关。一个使用公告日已知标准信息的简单基于特征的模型可以相当好地预测这些结果，但CAR甚至未能捕捉到该模型的预测。证据表明，关于独立收购方的信息主导了CAR，使得提取交易相关信息几乎不可能。我们得出结论，CAR是预期价值创造的一个不可靠的衡量指标。

papers.title: Milton Friedman and Exchange Rates in Developing Countries
papers.authors: Sebastian Edwards
papers.abstract: Milton Friedman’s famous 1953 essay, “The case for flexible exchange rates,” deals entirely with advanced nations. An interesting question is what Friedman thought about exchange rate and monetary regimes in emerging economies. In this paper I investigate how his views on the subject evolved through time. I analyze speeches, articles, and interviews. I examine his archives for correspondence and unpublished manuscripts. I show that for him flexible rates were a second best solution for middle income and poor nations. I also analyze Friedman’s role in Chile’s failed attempt, during the Pinochet regime, at using a fixed exchange rate to stabilize the economy and eliminate inflation.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：B17, B2, B22, B27, B3, F31, F32
papers.zh_title: 米尔顿·弗里德曼与发展中国家的汇率
papers.zh_abstract: 米尔顿·弗里德曼1953年著名的论文《支持浮动汇率的理由》完全针对发达国家。一个有趣的问题是，弗里德曼对新兴经济体的汇率和货币制度有何看法。在本文中，我研究了他的观点在这一主题上如何随时间演变。我分析了演讲、文章和访谈。我查阅了他的档案，寻找信件和未发表的手稿。我表明，对他来说，浮动汇率对中等收入和贫穷国家而言是次优选择。我还分析了弗里德曼在智利皮诺切特政权期间，试图利用固定汇率稳定经济和消除通胀的失败尝试中所扮演的角色。

papers.title: Socioeconomic Status and the Experience of Pain: An Example from Knees
papers.authors: David M. Cutler, Ellen Meara, Susan Stewart
papers.abstract: Reports of pain differ markedly across socioeconomic groups and are correlated with outcomes such as functional limitations and disability insurance receipt. This paper examines the differential experience of pain by education. We focus on knee pain, the most common musculoskeletal complaint. Comparing clinical interpretation of knee x-rays of people with and without pain, there are few differences in presence or clinical severity of arthritis across education groups. In contrast, less educated people report more pain for any given objective measure of arthritis. After confirming that reported pain maps to objective measures like walking speed and range of motion, we test four theories for differential experience of pain: differences in obesity, physically demanding occupations, psychological factors, and medical treatment differences. We find that physical demands on the job and obesity each explain about one-third of the education gradient in knee pain. There is an interaction between the two; physical requirements on the job are associated with knee pain primarily in those who are obese. In contrast, psychological traits and access to medical care explain little of the difference in reported pain by education level. These findings imply that educational gradients in pain are likely to persist or even widen as the need for physically demanding occupations—like home health aides and personal service workers—grows in importance with the aging population, and the working population continues to be obese.
papers.zh_title: 社会经济地位与疼痛体验：以膝盖为例
papers.zh_abstract: 疼痛的报告在不同社会经济群体之间存在显著差异，并且与功能限制和伤残保险领取等结果相关。本文考察了不同教育程度下疼痛体验的差异。我们聚焦于膝盖疼痛，这是最常见的肌肉骨骼主诉。通过比较有疼痛和无疼痛人群的膝盖X光片的临床解读，我们发现不同教育群体之间关节炎的存在或临床严重程度几乎没有差异。相比之下，对于任何给定的关节炎客观测量指标，受教育程度较低的人报告了更多的疼痛。在确认报告的疼痛与步行速度和关节活动范围等客观指标相符后，我们检验了关于疼痛体验差异的四种理论：肥胖差异、体力要求高的职业、心理因素以及医疗治疗差异。我们发现，工作中的体力要求和肥胖各自解释了膝盖疼痛教育梯度的大约三分之一。两者之间存在交互作用；工作中的体力要求主要与肥胖者的膝盖疼痛相关。相比之下，心理特征和医疗服务的可及性几乎无法解释按教育水平划分的疼痛报告差异。这些发现意味着，随着人口老龄化，对家庭健康助理和个人服务工作者等体力要求高的职业的需求日益增长，且劳动人口持续肥胖，疼痛的教育梯度可能会持续甚至扩大。

papers.title: Political Polarization and Expected Economic Outcomes
papers.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: We use a large-scale representative survey of households from October 19-21 that elicits respondents’ expectations about the presidential election’s outcome as well as their economic expectations to document several new facts. First, people disagree strongly about the likely outcome of the election, despite widespread publicly available polling information. Most Democrats are very confident in a Biden win while most Republicans are very confident in a Trump win. Second, respondents predict a fairly rosy economic scenario if their preferred candidate wins but a dire one if the other candidate wins. Since most respondents are confident in their favored outcome, unconditional forecasts are similar across parties despite the fact that underlying probability distributions and conditional forecasts are very different. Third, when presented with recent polling data, most voters change their views by little unless they are independent and/or have relatively weak priors about the outcome. Information that emphasizes the uncertainty in polling data has larger effects in terms of reducing polarization in expected probabilities over different electoral outcomes. Fourth, exogenous information that changes individuals’ probability distribution over electoral outcomes also changes their unconditional forecasts in a corresponding manner. These changes in economic expectations in turn are likely to affect household economic decisions.
papers.zh_title: 政治极化与预期经济结果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用10月19日至21日进行的一项大规模代表性家庭调查，该调查收集了受访者对总统选举结果的预期以及他们的经济预期，以记录几个新事实。首先，尽管存在广泛公开的民调信息，但人们对选举的可能结果存在严重分歧。大多数民主党人非常有信心拜登会赢，而大多数共和党人则非常有信心特朗普会赢。其次，受访者预测，如果他们偏好的候选人获胜，经济前景将相当乐观；但如果另一位候选人获胜，经济前景则十分严峻。由于大多数受访者对自己偏好的结果充满信心，尽管潜在的概率分布和条件预测差异很大，但两党的无条件预测却相似。第三，当看到最近的民调数据时，大多数选民的观点几乎没有改变，除非他们是独立选民和/或对选举结果持有相对较弱的先验信念。强调民调数据不确定性的信息在减少不同选举结果预期概率的极化方面效果更大。第四，改变个人对选举结果概率分布的外生信息也会相应地改变他们的无条件预测。这些经济预期的变化反过来又可能影响家庭的经济决策。

papers.title: Making Rallies Great Again: The Effects of Presidential Campaign Rallies on Voter Behavior, 2008-2016
papers.authors: James M. Snyder Jr., Hasin Yousaf
papers.abstract: Populism has surged around the world in recent decades. One campaign activity that may be especially important for populist leaders is holding large rallies to gain unmediated support from "the people." In this paper, we explore whether populist leaders are particularly effective in gaining support via their rallies. We do this by studying the effect of campaign rallies held by Donald Trump and other U.S. Presidential candidates since 2008. To measure the short-run causal impact of rallies, we exploit the fact that some respondents in the CCES were surveyed a few days before a rally, while others were surveyed a few days afterwards. We find that Trump's rallies produced a short-lived increase in his support over Clinton (especially among leaning Republicans), intention to vote (especially among strong Republicans), and individual campaign contributions for him. We do not find consistent, robust effects for other candidates. In terms of channels, we find that local media coverage of all candidates increased around their rallies, suggesting that the quantity of media coverage alone does not explain the findings.
papers.zh_title: 让集会再次伟大：2008-2016年总统竞选集会对选民行为的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，民粹主义在全球范围内兴起。对于民粹主义领导人来说，一项可能特别重要的竞选活动是举行大型集会，以获得来自“人民”的未经中介的支持。在本文中，我们探讨民粹主义领导人是否特别擅长通过集会获得支持。我们通过研究自2008年以来唐纳德·特朗普和其他美国总统候选人举行的竞选集会的效果来做到这一点。为了衡量集会的短期因果影响，我们利用了CCES中一些受访者在集会前几天接受调查，而另一些则在集会后几天接受调查这一事实。我们发现，特朗普的集会使他对克林顿的支持率（尤其是在倾向共和党人中）、投票意愿（尤其是在坚定共和党人中）以及个人竞选捐款出现了短暂增长。我们没有发现其他候选人有一致、稳健的效果。在传导渠道方面，我们发现所有候选人的地方媒体报道在其集会前后都有所增加，这表明仅凭媒体报道的数量并不能解释这些发现。

papers.title: Using Divide and Conquer to Improve Tax Collection: Theory and Laboratory Evidence
papers.authors: Sylvain Chassang, Lucia Del Carpio, Samuel Kapon
papers.abstract: We consider a government collecting taxes from a large number of tax-payers using limited enforcement capacity. Under random enforcement, limited capacity results in multiple equilibria: if most agents comply, limited enforcement is sufficient to dissuade individual misbehavior; if most agents do not comply, enforcement capacity is over-stretched and fails to dissuade misbehavior. In settings without behavioral frictions, prioritized enforcement strategies can implement high collection as the unique rationalizable outcome. We investigate both theoretically and experimentally the extent to which this insight extends to environments with incomplete information and bounded rationality.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LE, PE, POL；JEL：C72, C73, C92, D73, D82, D86, H26
papers.zh_title: 利用分而治之策略改善税收征管：理论与实验室证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑一个政府利用有限的执法能力向大量纳税人征税。在随机执法下，有限的能力会导致多重均衡：如果大多数纳税人遵守，有限的执法就足以阻止个人的违规行为；如果大多数纳税人不遵守，执法能力就会过度紧张，无法阻止违规行为。在没有行为摩擦的环境中，优先执法策略可以将高遵从度作为唯一可理性化的结果来实现。我们从理论和实验两方面研究了这一见解在多大程度上可以扩展到信息不完全和有限理性的环境中。

papers.title: Employment Effects of the Earned Income Tax Credit: Taking the Long View
papers.authors: Diane Whitmore Schanzenbach, Michael R. Strain
papers.abstract: The Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) is the cornerstone U.S. anti-poverty program for families with children, typically lifting millions of children out of poverty each year. Targeted to low-income households with children, and only available to those who work, the EITC contains strong incentives for non-workers to become employed. Most of the existing economics literature focuses on federal EITC expansions in the 1980s and 1990s. This paper takes a longer view, studying all federal expansions since the program’s inception in 1975. We find robust evidence that EITC expansions increase the extensive margin of labor supply.
papers.zh_title: 劳动所得税抵免的就业效应：长远视角
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动所得税抵免（EITC）是美国针对有子女家庭的反贫困计划的基石，通常每年使数百万儿童摆脱贫困。EITC针对有子女的低收入家庭，并且仅适用于有工作者，它为不工作者提供了强烈的就业激励。现有的大部分经济学文献关注的是20世纪80年代和90年代联邦EITC的扩张。本文采取更长远视角，研究自1975年该计划创立以来所有联邦扩张的影响。我们发现了强有力的证据表明，EITC扩张增加了劳动供给的广延边际。

papers.title: Promoting Parental Involvement in Schools: Evidence From Two Randomized Experiments
papers.authors: Felipe Barrera-Osorio, Paul Gertler, Nozomi Nakajima, Harry Patrinos
papers.abstract: Parental involvement programs aim to increase school-and-parent communication and support children’s overall learning environment. This paper examines the effects of low-cost, group-based parental involvement interventions in Mexico using data from two randomized controlled trials. The first experiment provided financial resources to parent associations. The second experiment provided information to parents about how to support their children’s learning. Overall, the interventions induced different types of parental engagement in schools. The information intervention changed parenting behavior at home – with large effects among indigenous parents who have historically been discriminated and socially excluded – and improved student behavior in school. The grants did not impact parent or student behaviors. Notably, we do not find impacts of either intervention on educational achievement. To understand these null effects, we explore how social ties between parents and teachers evolved over the course of the two interventions. Parental involvement interventions led to significant changes in perceived trustworthiness between teachers and parents. The results suggest that parental involvement interventions can backfire if institutional rules are unclear about the expectations of parents and teachers as parents increase their involvement in schools.
papers.zh_title: 促进家长参与学校：来自两项随机实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 家长参与项目旨在增加学校与家长的沟通，并支持儿童的整体学习环境。本文利用两项随机对照试验的数据，研究了墨西哥低成本、基于群体的家长参与干预措施的效果。第一个实验为家长协会提供了财政资源。第二个实验向家长提供了关于如何支持子女学习的信息。总体而言，这些干预措施引发了不同类型的家长参与学校的行为。信息干预改变了家长在家中的养育行为——对历史上曾遭受歧视和社会排斥的土著家长影响显著——并改善了学生在校的行为。拨款并未影响家长或学生的行为。值得注意的是，我们没有发现任何一种干预措施对学业成绩有影响。为了理解这些无效结果，我们探讨了在两项干预过程中家长与教师之间的社会联系是如何演变的。家长参与干预措施导致教师和家长之间感知到的可信度发生了显著变化。结果表明，如果制度规则对家长和教师的期望不明确，随着家长增加对学校的参与，家长参与干预措施可能会适得其反。

papers.title: Refinancing, Monetary Policy, and the Credit Cycle
papers.authors: Gene Amromin, Neil Bhutta, Benjamin J. Keys
papers.abstract: We assess the complicated reality of monetary policy transmission through mortgage markets by synthesizing the existing literature on the role of refinancing in policy implementation. After briefly reviewing mortgage market institutions in the U.S. and documenting refinance activity over time, we summarize the links between refinancing and consumption, and describe the frictions impeding the refinancing channel. The paper draws heavily on research emerging from the experience of the financial crisis of 2008-09, as it highlights a combination of market, institutional, and policy-making factors that dulled the transmission mechanism. We conclude with a discussion of potential mortgage market innovations, and the applicability of lessons learned to the ongoing stresses induced by the COVID-19 pandemic.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, ME, PE；JEL：D12, D14, E50, G21, G51, R31
papers.zh_title: 再融资、货币政策与信贷周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过综合现有关于再融资在政策实施中作用的文献，评估了货币政策通过抵押贷款市场传导的复杂现实。在简要回顾美国抵押贷款市场制度并记录随时间变化的再融资活动后，我们总结了再融资与消费之间的联系，并描述了阻碍再融资渠道的摩擦。本文大量借鉴了从2008-09年金融危机经验中涌现的研究，因为它突显了市场、制度和政策制定因素的组合，这些因素削弱了传导机制。最后，我们讨论了潜在的抵押贷款市场创新，以及所学经验教训对COVID-19大流行所引发的持续压力的适用性。

papers.title: Who Benefits from Analyst “Top Picks”?
papers.authors: Justin Birru, Sinan Gokkaya, Xi Liu, René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: Following the Global Settlement, analysts extensively use a top pick designation to highlight their highest conviction best ideas. Such a designation enables analysts to provide greater granularity of information, but it can potentially be influenced by conflicts of interest. Examining a comprehensive sample of top picks, we find, even though top picks are more likely to be investment banking clients, they have greater investment value, attract greater media and investor attention, and lead to more trading than buy recommendations. Bad top picks are more likely to be influenced by strategic objectives and have adverse consequences for analysts. Institutions, but not retail investors, discern between good and bad top picks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G11, G12, G14, G20, G23, G24
papers.zh_title: 谁从分析师的“首选股”中受益？
papers.zh_abstract: 在全球和解之后，分析师广泛使用“首选股”标签来突出他们最具信心的最佳投资理念。这种标签使分析师能够提供更细粒度的信息，但它可能受到利益冲突的影响。通过检查一个全面的首选股样本，我们发现，尽管首选股更可能是投资银行客户，但它们比买入推荐具有更大的投资价值，吸引更多的媒体和投资者关注，并导致更多的交易。糟糕的首选股更可能受到战略目标的影响，并对分析师产生不利后果。机构投资者（而非散户投资者）能够辨别好的和坏的首选股。

papers.title: The Age Profile of Life-satisfaction After Age 65 in the U.S.
papers.authors: Péter Hudomiet, Michael D. Hurd, Susann Rohwedder
papers.abstract: Although income and wealth are frequently used as indicators of well-being, they are increasingly augmented with subjective measures such as life satisfaction to capture broader dimensions of individuals’ well-being. Based on data from large surveys of individuals, life satisfaction in cross-section increases with age beyond retirement into advanced old age. It may seem puzzling that average life satisfaction would be higher at older ages because older individuals are more likely to experience chronic or acute health conditions, or the loss of a spouse. Accordingly, this empirical pattern has been called the “paradox of well-being.” We examine the age profile of life satisfaction of the U.S. population age 65 and older in the Health and Retirement Study (HRS) and also find increasing life satisfaction at older ages in cross-section. But based on the longitudinal dimension of the HRS life satisfaction significantly declines with age and the rate of decline accelerates with age. Widowing and health shocks play important roles in this decline. We reconcile the cross-section and longitudinal measurements by showing that both differential mortality and differential non-response bias the cross-sectional age profile upward: individuals with higher life satisfaction and in better health tend to live longer and to remain in the survey, causing average values to increase. We conclude that the optimistic view about increasing life satisfaction at older ages based on cross-sectional data is not warranted.
papers.zh_title: 美国65岁后生活满意度的年龄分布
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管收入和财富经常被用作福祉指标，但它们越来越多地被生活满意度等主观测量指标所补充，以捕捉个人福祉的更广泛维度。基于大型个人调查数据，横截面上的生活满意度在退休后随着年龄增长而增加，直至高龄。平均生活满意度在更年长时更高似乎令人费解，因为年长者更可能经历慢性或急性健康状况，或丧偶。因此，这种经验模式被称为“福祉悖论”。我们利用健康与退休研究（HRS）考察了美国65岁及以上人口生活满意度的年龄分布，并在横截面数据中也发现年长者的生活满意度在增加。但基于HRS的纵向维度，生活满意度随年龄增长显著下降，且下降速度随年龄增长而加快。丧偶和健康冲击在这一下降中扮演了重要角色。我们通过证明差异性死亡率和差异性无应答偏差都使横截面年龄分布向上偏斜，来调和横截面与纵向测量的差异：生活满意度更高、健康状况更好的个体往往活得更久并留在调查中，导致平均值上升。我们得出结论，基于横截面数据得出的关于年长者生活满意度上升的乐观观点是没有根据的。

papers.title: Affective Polarization Did Not Increase During the Coronavirus Pandemic
papers.authors: Levi Boxell, Jacob Conway, James N. Druckman, Matthew Gentzkow
papers.abstract: We document trends in affective polarization during the coronavirus pandemic. In our main measure, affective polarization is relatively flat between July 2019 and February 2020, then falls significantly around the onset of the pandemic. Two other data sources show no evidence of an increase in polarization around the onset of the pandemic. Finally, we show in an experiment that priming respondents to think about the coronavirus pandemic significantly reduces affective polarization.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间情感极化并未加剧
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了新冠疫情期间情感极化的趋势。在我们的主要衡量指标中，情感极化在2019年7月至2020年2月期间相对平稳，随后在疫情爆发前后显著下降。另外两个数据来源显示，疫情爆发前后没有出现极化加剧的证据。最后，我们在实验中表明，引导受访者思考新冠疫情会显著降低情感极化。

papers.title: Russian Holidays Predict Troll Activity 2015-2017
papers.authors: Douglas Almond, Xinming Du, Alana Vogel
papers.abstract: While international election interference is not new, Russia is credited with “industrializing” trolling on English-language social media platforms. In October 2018, Twitter retrospectively identified 2.9 million English-language tweets as covertly written by trolls from Russia's Internet Research Agency. Most active 2015-2017, these Russian trolls generally supported the Trump campaign (Senate Intelligence Committee, 2019) and researchers have traced how this content disseminated across Twitter. Here, we take a different tack and seek exogenous drivers of Russian troll activity. We find that trolling fell 35% on Russian holidays and to a lesser extent, when temperatures were cold in St. Petersburg. More recent trolls released by Twitter do not show any systematic relationship to holidays and temperature, although substantially fewer of these that have been made public to date. Our finding for the pre-2018 interference period may furnish a natural experiment for evaluating the causal effect of Russian trolling on indirectly-affected outcomes and political behaviors — outcomes that are less traceable to troll content and potentially more important to policymakers than the direct dissemination activities previously studied. As a case in point, we describe suggestive evidence that Russian holidays impacted daily trading prices in 2016 election betting markets.
papers.zh_title: 俄罗斯节假日预测2015-2017年网络水军活动
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管国际选举干预并非新鲜事，但俄罗斯被认为在英语社交媒体平台上将网络水军活动“工业化”。2018年10月，推特追溯识别出290万条英语推文是由俄罗斯互联网研究机构的水军秘密撰写的。这些俄罗斯水军在2015-2017年最为活跃，普遍支持特朗普竞选活动（参议院情报委员会，2019年），研究人员已追踪了这些内容在推特上的传播方式。在此，我们采取不同思路，寻找俄罗斯水军活动的外生驱动因素。我们发现，在俄罗斯节假日期间，水军活动下降了35%，在圣彼得堡气温较低时下降幅度较小。推特后来发布的水军数据未显示与节假日和气温存在系统性关系，尽管迄今为止公开的这些数据数量要少得多。我们对2018年前干预时期的发现，可能为评估俄罗斯水军活动对间接影响结果和政治行为的因果效应提供自然实验——这些结果比之前研究的直接传播活动更难以追溯到水军内容，且对政策制定者可能更为重要。作为例证，我们描述了暗示性证据：俄罗斯节假日影响了2016年选举博彩市场的每日交易价格。

papers.title: U.S. Robots and their Impacts in the Tropics: Evidence from Colombian Labor Markets
papers.authors: Adriana D. Kugler, Maurice Kugler, Laura Ripani, Rodimiro Rodrigo
papers.abstract: Previous studies for developed countries show negative short-run impacts of automation on employment and earnings. In this paper, we instead examine whether automation by a key trading partner can hurt workers in a developing country. We specifically focus in Colombia’s labor market, and how the automation in the U.S. impacts Colombian workers by replacing exports from Colombia for cheaper robot-made U.S. products. We use employer-employee matched data from the Colombian social security records combined with data on U.S. exposure to robots in different sectors from 2011 to 2016 to examine if robots in the U.S. are displacing workers in Colombia. We find that U.S. robots decrease employment and earnings for Colombian workers in those sectors of local labor markets that have high levels of automation -measured as robots per thousand workers- in the U.S. labor market. In terms of turnover, as expected, there is an increase in dismissals and a decrease in hires for workers in sectors highly impacted by robots in the U.S. Moreover, the negative displacement effects of robots are greater for women; older workers; workers employed in small and medium sized enterprises, and workers employed in manufacturing. Importantly, local labor markets which exported the most to the U.S. in the past, are also the most affected by the increased adoption of U.S. robots, suggesting that Colombian workers may be losing employment to automated jobs reshored back to the U.S. Our estimates suggest that during our period of analysis, the adoption of robots in the U.S. led to a cumulative loss of between 63,000 and 100,000 jobs in Colombia.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS；JEL：C33, C36, F66, J21, J23, J63
papers.zh_title: 美国机器人及其对热带地区的影响：来自哥伦比亚劳动力市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 先前对发达国家的研究显示，自动化对就业和收入有短期负面影响。本文转而考察主要贸易伙伴的自动化是否会损害发展中国家的工人。我们特别关注哥伦比亚劳动力市场，以及美国自动化如何通过用更便宜的机器人制造的美国产品替代哥伦比亚出口，从而影响哥伦比亚工人。我们使用2011年至2016年哥伦比亚社保记录中的雇主-雇员匹配数据，结合美国各行业机器人暴露数据，检验美国机器人是否正在取代哥伦比亚工人。我们发现，美国机器人降低了哥伦比亚工人在当地劳动力市场中那些美国劳动力市场自动化水平较高（以每千名工人机器人数量衡量）的行业的就业和收入。在人员流动方面，正如预期，受美国机器人影响较大的行业的工人解雇增加、招聘减少。此外，机器人的负面替代效应对女性、老年工人、中小型企业员工以及制造业工人更为显著。重要的是，过去对美出口最多的当地劳动力市场，也受到美国机器人采用增加的最严重影响，这表明哥伦比亚工人可能因自动化岗位回流美国而失去就业机会。我们的估计表明，在分析期间，美国机器人的采用导致哥伦比亚累计损失了6.3万至10万个工作岗位。

papers.title: Who Married, (to) Whom, and Where? Trends in Marriage in the United States, 1850-1940
papers.authors: Claudia Olivetti, M. Daniele Paserman, Laura Salisbury, E. Anna Weber
papers.abstract: We present new findings about the relationship between marriage and socioeconomic background in the United States in the late 19th and early 20th Centuries. Imputing socioeconomic status of family of origin from first names, we document a socioeconomic gradient for women in the probability of marriage and the socioeconomic status of husbands. This socioeconomic gradient becomes steeper over time. We investigate the degree to which it can be explained by occupational income divergence across geographic regions. Regional divergence explains about one half of the socioeconomic divergence in the probability of marriage, and almost all of the increase in marital sorting. Differences in urbanization rates and the share of foreign-born across states drive most of these differences, while other factors (the scholarization rate, the sex ratio and the share in manufacturing) play a smaller role.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：J12, J62, N31, N32, N91, N92
papers.zh_title: 谁与谁结婚，在哪里结婚？美国婚姻趋势，1850-1940
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了关于19世纪末20世纪初美国婚姻与社会经济背景关系的新发现。通过从名字中推算原生家庭的社会经济地位，我们记录了女性在结婚概率和丈夫社会经济地位方面的社会经济梯度。这种社会经济梯度随时间推移变得更加陡峭。我们研究了这种梯度在多大程度上可由地理区域间的职业收入差异解释。区域差异解释了结婚概率社会经济差异的大约一半，以及婚姻匹配度增加的几乎全部。各州间城市化率和外国出生人口比例的差异是这些差异的主要驱动因素，而其他因素（入学率、性别比和制造业就业份额）作用较小。

papers.title: Has the Paycheck Protection Program Succeeded?
papers.authors: R. Glenn Hubbard, Michael R. Strain
papers.abstract: Enacted March 27, 2020, the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) was the most ambitious and creative fiscal policy response to the Pandemic Recession in the United States. PPP offers forgivable loans — essentially grants — to businesses with 500 or fewer employees that meet certain requirements. In this paper, we present evidence that PPP has substantially increased the employment, financial health, and survival of small businesses, using data from the Dun & Bradstreet Corporation. We use event studies and standard difference-in-difference models to estimate the effect of a small business applying for larger PPP loans and of a small business being eligible for PPP based on size. While our findings are informative, we believe it is too early to issue conclusive judgment on PPP’s success. We offer lessons for the future from the PPP experience thus far.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E24, E62, H25, H3, H32
papers.zh_title: 薪资保护计划成功了吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年3月27日颁布的薪资保护计划（PPP）是美国应对疫情衰退最具雄心和创意的财政政策。PPP向符合特定条件的500名及以下员工企业提供可豁免贷款——实质上是赠款。本文利用邓白氏公司的数据，提供证据表明PPP显著提高了小企业的就业、财务健康和生存率。我们使用事件研究和标准双重差分模型，估计小企业申请较大额PPP贷款以及小企业基于规模符合PPP资格的影响。尽管我们的发现具有参考价值，但我们认为对PPP的成功做出最终判断还为时过早。我们根据迄今的PPP经验为未来提供启示。

papers.title: Economic Benefits of COVID-19 Screening Tests
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Michael C. Droste, Michael Mina, James H. Stock
papers.abstract: We assess the economic value of screening testing programs as a policy response to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. We find that the fiscal, macroeconomic, and health benefits of rapid SARS-CoV-2 screening testing programs far exceed their costs, with the ratio of economic benefits to costs typically in the range of 4-15 (depending on program details), not counting the monetized value of lives saved. Unless the screening test is highly specific, however, the signal value of the screening test alone is low, leading to concerns about adherence. Confirmatory testing increases the net economic benefits of screening tests by reducing the number of healthy workers in quarantine and by increasing adherence to quarantine measures. The analysis is undertaken using a behavioral SIR model for the United States with 5 age groups, 66 economic sectors, screening and diagnostic testing, and partial adherence to instructions to quarantine or to isolate.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19筛查测试的经济效益
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了筛查测试项目作为应对持续COVID-19疫情政策的经济价值。我们发现，快速SARS-CoV-2筛查测试项目的财政、宏观经济和健康效益远超其成本，经济效益与成本之比通常在4-15之间（取决于项目细节），这还不包括挽救生命的货币化价值。然而，除非筛查测试具有高度特异性，否则仅凭筛查测试的信号价值较低，会导致对依从性的担忧。确认性测试通过减少隔离中的健康工人数量并提高对隔离措施的依从性，增加了筛查测试的净经济效益。该分析采用针对美国的行为SIR模型进行，该模型包含5个年龄组、66个经济部门、筛查和诊断测试，以及对隔离或自我隔离指令的部分依从性。

papers.title: Private Equity and Growth
papers.authors: Boyan Jovanovic, Sai Ma, Peter L. Rousseau
papers.abstract: We study private equity in a dynamic general equilibrium model and ask two questions: (i) Why does the investment of venture funds respond more strongly to the business cycle than that of buyout funds? (ii) Why are venture funds returns higher than those of buyout? On (i), venture brings in new capital whereas buyout largely reorganizes existing capital; this can explain the stronger co-movement of venture with aggregate Tobin's Q. Regarding (ii), venture returns co-move more strongly with aggregate consumption and therefore pay a higher premium. Our model embodies this logic and fits the data on investment and returns well. At the estimated parameters, the two PE sectors together contribute between 14 and 21 percent of observed growth, relative to the extreme case where private equity is absent.
papers.zh_title: 私募股权与增长
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在动态一般均衡模型中研究私募股权，并提出两个问题：（i）为什么风险投资基金的投资对商业周期的反应比收购基金更强？（ii）为什么风险基金的回报高于收购基金？关于（i），风险投资引入新资本，而收购主要重组现有资本；这可以解释风险投资与总体托宾Q值更强的联动性。关于（ii），风险投资回报与总体消费的联动性更强，因此支付更高的溢价。我们的模型体现了这一逻辑，并很好地拟合了投资和回报数据。在估计参数下，相对于私募股权完全缺失的极端情况，两个私募股权部门共同贡献了观察到的增长的14%至21%。

papers.title: The Market Risk Premium for Unsecured Consumer Credit Risk
papers.authors: Matthias Fleckenstein, Francis A. Longstaff
papers.abstract: We use the prices of credit card asset-backed securities to study the market risk premium associated with unsecured consumer credit risk. The consumer credit risk premium has historically been comparable to high yield corporate bond spreads, but has increased dramatically since the financial crisis. We find evidence that this increase is primarily due to balance-sheet costs imposed by recent changes in regulatory capital requirements which have effectively placed credit card securitizations back onto issuer balance sheets. These changes in capital regulation may have added hundreds of basis points to the cost of unsecured household credit.
papers.zh_title: 无担保消费信贷风险的市场风险溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用信用卡资产支持证券的价格来研究无担保消费信贷风险的市场风险溢价。历史上，消费信贷风险溢价与高收益公司债券利差相当，但自金融危机以来大幅上升。我们发现证据表明，这一增长主要是由于近期监管资本要求变化带来的资产负债表成本，这些变化实际上将信用卡证券化重新放回了发行人的资产负债表上。这些资本监管的变化可能使无担保家庭信贷的成本增加了数百个基点。

papers.title: Retail Financial Innovation and Stock Market Dynamics: The Case of Target Date Funds
papers.authors: Jonathan A. Parker, Antoinette Schoar, Yang Sun
papers.abstract: Target Date Funds (TDFs) are designed to provide unsophisticated or inattentive investors with age-appropriate exposures to different asset classes like stocks and bonds. The rise of TDFs has moved a significant share of retirement investors into macro-contrarian strategies that sell stocks after relatively good stock market performance. This rebalancing drives contrarian flows across equity mutual funds held by TDFs, stabilizing their funding, and reduces stock returns for stocks disproportionately held by these funds when stock market returns are relatively high. Continued growth in TDFs and similar investment products may dampen stock market volatility and increase the transmission of shocks across asset classes.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：G12, G23, G51
papers.zh_title: 零售金融创新与股票市场动态：以目标日期基金为例
papers.zh_abstract: 目标日期基金（TDFs）旨在为不成熟或注意力不集中的投资者提供与年龄相适应的股票和债券等不同资产类别的敞口。TDFs的兴起使大量退休投资者转向宏观逆向策略，即在股票市场表现相对较好后卖出股票。这种再平衡导致TDFs持有的股票共同基金出现逆向资金流，稳定了其资金来源，并在股票市场回报相对较高时，降低了这些基金不成比例持有的股票的回报。TDFs及类似投资产品的持续增长可能会抑制股票市场波动，并增加冲击在不同资产类别之间的传导。

papers.title: Spillovers from Ancillary Services to Wholesale Energy Markets
papers.authors: Jesse F. Buchsbaum, Catherine Hausman, Johanna L. Mathieu, Jing Peng
papers.abstract: In electricity markets, generators are rewarded both for providing energy and for enabling grid reliability. The two functions are compensated with two separate payments: energy market payments and ancillary services market payments. We provide evidence of changes in the generation mix in the energy market that are driven by exogenous changes in an ancillary services market. We provide a theoretical framework and quasi-experimental evidence for understanding the mechanism, showing that it results from the multi-product nature of power plants combined with discontinuities in costs. Although research in economics typically focuses solely on the energy market, our results suggest that spillovers between markets are important as well. Furthermore, policy changes relating to grid operations, grid reliability, or climate change could have unintended effects.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：L21, L94, L98, Q42, Q48, Q53, Q58
papers.zh_title: 辅助服务对批发能源市场的溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 在电力市场中，发电商既因提供能源而获得奖励，也因确保电网可靠性而获得奖励。这两种功能通过两种独立的支付来补偿：能源市场支付和辅助服务市场支付。我们提供了证据，表明能源市场中发电组合的变化是由辅助服务市场的外生变化驱动的。我们提供了一个理论框架和准实验证据来理解这一机制，表明它源于发电厂的多产品特性与成本的不连续性。尽管经济学研究通常只关注能源市场，但我们的结果表明，市场之间的溢出效应也很重要。此外，与电网运营、电网可靠性或气候变化相关的政策变化可能会产生意想不到的后果。

papers.title: Structural Breaks in an Endogenous Growth Model
papers.authors: Timothy Cogley, Boyan Jovanovic
papers.abstract: We study the effects of parameter uncertainty prompted by structural breaks. In our model, agents respond differently to uncertainty prompted by regime shifts in shock processes than they react to comparable perceived increases in shock volatility. The magnitude of the response to an increase in uncertainty about TFP associated with a structural break is greater than that of a response to a comparable perceived rise in volatility. This is because lifetime utility varies more when shocks shift beliefs and perceived wealth.
papers.zh_title: 内生增长模型中的结构突变
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由结构突变引发的参数不确定性的影响。在我们的模型中，对于由冲击过程中的制度转换所引发的不确定性，经济主体的反应不同于他们对可比较的感知到的冲击波动性上升的反应。与全要素生产率（TFP）相关的结构突变所引发的不确定性上升，其反应幅度大于对可比较的感知到的波动性上升的反应。这是因为当冲击改变信念和感知财富时，终身效用的变化更大。

papers.title: Mandatory Retirement for Judges Improved Performance on U.S. State Supreme Courts
papers.authors: Elliott Ash, W. Bentley MacLeod
papers.abstract: Mandatory retirement for judges has often been considered as a policy response to an aging judicial workforce. This paper provides empirical evidence on how mandatory retirement influences judge performance using a wave of such reforms in U.S. state supreme courts as a natural experiment. We find that introducing mandatory retirement improves court performance as measured by output (number of published opinions) and legal influence (number of forward citations to those opinions). While older judges are cited less often than younger judges, the effect of mandatory retirement on performance is much larger than what would be expected from a change in the age distribution. We find some evidence that the additional effect is due to selective attrition and that the presence of older judges reduces the performance of younger judges.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LE, LS；JEL：D02, J26, J41, J44, K0, K4
papers.zh_title: 法官强制退休制度改善了美国州最高法院的表现
papers.zh_abstract: 法官强制退休制度常被视为应对司法队伍老龄化的政策。本文利用美国州最高法院一波此类改革作为自然实验，提供了关于强制退休如何影响法官绩效的实证证据。我们发现，引入强制退休制度改善了法院的表现，这通过产出（已发表意见的数量）和法律影响力（这些意见的前向引用次数）来衡量。虽然年长法官被引用的次数少于年轻法官，但强制退休对绩效的影响远大于仅因年龄分布变化所预期的效果。我们找到一些证据表明，额外效应是由于选择性离职，并且年长法官的存在降低了年轻法官的绩效。

papers.title: Uncertainty and Growth Disasters
papers.authors: Boyan Jovanovic, Sai Ma
papers.abstract: This paper documents several facts on the real effects of economic uncertainty. First, higher uncertainty is associated with a more dispersed distribution of output growth. Second, the relation is highly asymmetric: A rise in uncertainty is associated with a sharp decline in the lower tail of the growth distribution whereas it has a much smaller and insignificant impact on its upper tail. Third, the negative response of growth to uncertainty shocks is larger when the equity market is more volatile. We build a model in which growth and uncertainty are both endogenous: rapid adoption of new technology raises economic uncertainty and may cause measured productivity to decline. The equilibrium growth distribution is negatively skewed and higher uncertainty leads to a thicker left tail and to more labor reallocation among jobs and among
papers.zh_title: 不确定性与增长灾难
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了关于经济不确定性实际影响的几个事实。首先，更高的不确定性与更分散的产出增长分布相关。其次，这种关系高度不对称：不确定性上升与增长分布下尾的急剧下降相关，而对上尾的影响则小得多且不显著。第三，当股票市场波动性更大时，增长对不确定性冲击的负面反应更大。我们构建了一个增长和不确定性都是内生的模型：新技术的快速采用提高了经济不确定性，并可能导致测度的生产率下降。均衡增长分布是负偏态的，更高的不确定性导致左尾更厚，并导致工作和职业间更多的劳动力重新配置。

papers.title: Data Sharing and Market Power with Two-Sided Platforms
papers.authors: Rishabh Kirpalani, Thomas Philippon
papers.abstract: We study an economy in which consumers and merchants (sellers) interact on a two-sided platform. Consumers can share data about their tastes for different varieties of a single good with the platform which in turn sells this data to merchants. Data sharing increases gains from trade by improving match quality but gives more market power to the platform relative to the merchants which can reduce entry and consequently consumer welfare. This leads to an externality not internalized by consumers thus leading to more data sharing than is efﬁcient. We highlight two reasons why more precise information increases the market power of the platform. The ﬁrst is a copycat (private label) externality that increases the outside option for the platform of selling the good directly to consumers. The second is a consumer access externality that reduces the outside option of the merchants when information gets more precise, as more buyers are able to ﬁnd their desired variety on the platform. Our model explains the qualitative differences between traditional retail platforms (physical stores) and digital online platforms and why the latter are more likely to require regulatory interventions that the former.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO；JEL：D2, D4, D42, D43, L11, L12
papers.zh_title: 双边平台的数据共享与市场势力
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个消费者和商家（卖方）在双边平台上互动的经济。消费者可以将其对不同种类单一商品偏好的数据与平台共享，平台随后将这些数据出售给商家。数据共享通过提高匹配质量增加了交易收益，但相对于商家而言，赋予了平台更多的市场势力，这可能会减少进入并因此降低消费者福利。这导致了一种未被消费者内部化的外部性，从而导致数据共享超过有效水平。我们强调了更精确的信息增加平台市场势力的两个原因。第一个是模仿（自有品牌）外部性，它增加了平台直接向消费者销售商品的外部选择。第二个是消费者接入外部性，当信息变得更精确时，它降低了商家的外部选择，因为更多买家能够在平台上找到他们想要的品种。我们的模型解释了传统零售平台（实体店）与数字在线平台之间的定性差异，以及为什么后者比前者更可能需要监管干预。

papers.title: Learning During the COVID-19 Pandemic: It Is Not Who You Teach, but How You Teach
papers.authors: George Orlov, Douglas McKee, James Berry, Austin Boyle, Thomas DiCiccio, Tyler Ransom, Alex Rees-Jones, Jörg Stoye
papers.abstract: We use standardized end-of-course knowledge assessments to examine student learning during the disruptions induced by the COVID-19 pandemic. Examining seven economics courses taught at four US R1 institutions, we find that students performed substantially worse, on average, in Spring 2020 when compared to Spring or Fall 2019. We find no evidence that the effect was driven by specific demographic groups. However, our results suggest that teaching methods that encourage active engagement, such as the use of small group activities and projects, played an important role in mitigating this negative effect. Our results point to methods for more effective online teaching as the pandemic continues.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间的学习：关键不在于教谁，而在于如何教
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用标准化的课程结束知识评估来考察COVID-19大流行导致的干扰期间学生的学习情况。通过考察在美国四所R1机构教授的七门经济学课程，我们发现，与2019年春季或秋季相比，学生在2020年春季的平均表现明显更差。我们没有发现证据表明这种影响是由特定人口群体驱动的。然而，我们的结果表明，鼓励积极参与的教学方法，例如使用小组活动和项目，在减轻这种负面影响方面发挥了重要作用。随着疫情的持续，我们的结果为更有效的在线教学指出了方法。

papers.title: Fintech Borrowers: Lax-Screening or Cream-Skimming?
papers.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Vincent Yao
papers.abstract: We study the personal credit market using unique individual-level data covering fintech and traditional lenders. We show that fintech lenders acquire market share by first lending to higher-risk borrowers and then to safer borrowers, and mainly rely on hard information to make credit decisions. Fintech borrowers are significantly more likely to default than neighbor individuals with the same characteristics borrowing from traditional financial institutions. Furthermore, they tend to experience only a short- lived reduction in the cost of credit, because their indebtedness increases more than non-fintech borrowers a few months after loan origination. However, fintech lenders' pricing strategies are likely to take this into account.
papers.zh_title: 金融科技借款人：宽松筛选还是摘樱桃？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用涵盖金融科技和传统贷款机构的独特个人层面数据研究个人信贷市场。我们表明，金融科技贷款机构通过首先向高风险借款人放贷，然后向更安全的借款人放贷来获取市场份额，并且主要依赖硬信息来做出信贷决策。金融科技借款人比具有相同特征、从传统金融机构借款的邻近个人更有可能违约。此外，他们往往只会经历短暂的信贷成本降低，因为在贷款发放几个月后，他们的负债比非金融科技借款人增加得更多。然而，金融科技贷款机构的定价策略很可能考虑到了这一点。

papers.title: Is There Too Much Benchmarking in Asset Management?
papers.authors: Anil K Kashyap, Natalia Kovrijnykh, Jian Li, Anna Pavlova
papers.abstract: We propose a tractable model of asset management in which benchmarking arises endogenously, and analyze its unintended welfare consequences. Fund managers’ portfolios are not contractible and they incur private costs in running them. Incentive contracts for fund managers create a pecuniary externality through their effect on asset prices. Benchmarking inflates asset prices and creates crowded trades. The crowding reduces the effectiveness of benchmarking in incentive contracts for others, which fund investors fail to account for. A social planner, recognizing the crowding, opts for contracts with less benchmarking and less incentive provision. The planner also delivers lower asset management costs.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D82, D86, G11, G12, G23
papers.zh_title: 资产管理中是否存在过度基准化？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个易于处理的资产管理模型，其中基准化是内生的，并分析了其非预期的福利后果。基金经理的投资组合不可契约化，且他们在管理投资组合时承担私人成本。基金经理的激励合同通过影响资产价格产生货币外部性。基准化推高了资产价格并导致拥挤交易。这种拥挤降低了基准化在他人激励合同中的有效性，而基金投资者未能考虑到这一点。认识到拥挤问题的社会规划者会选择基准化程度较低、激励提供较少的合同。规划者还能降低资产管理成本。

papers.title: Idea Diffusion and Property Rights
papers.authors: Boyan Jovanovic, Zhu Wang
papers.abstract: We study innovation and diffusion of technology at the industry level. We derive an industry's evolution, from birth to its maturity, and we characterize how diffusion affects the incentive to innovate. The model implies that pro­tection of innovators should be only partial due to the matching externality in the meetings in which idea transfers take place. The model also shows that enhancing idea diffusion is socially beneficial and can generate industry over­taking patterns endogenously. We fit the model to the early experiences of the U.S. automobile and personal computer industries and quantify the theoretical predictions.
papers.zh_title: 创意扩散与产权
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了行业层面的创新与技术扩散。我们推导了一个行业从诞生到成熟的发展过程，并刻画了扩散如何影响创新激励。该模型表明，由于创意转移发生的会面中存在匹配外部性，对创新者的保护应仅为部分性的。模型还显示，增强创意扩散对社会有益，并能内生地产生行业赶超模式。我们将模型拟合到美国汽车和个人电脑行业的早期经验，并量化了理论预测。

papers.title: Hospital Allocation and Racial Disparities in Health Care
papers.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Pragya Kakani, Adam Sacarny
papers.abstract: We develop a simple framework to measure the role of hospital allocation in racial disparities in health care and use it to study Black and white Medicare patients who are treated for heart attacks – a condition where virtually everyone receives care, hospital care is highly effective, and hospital quality has been validated. We report four facts. (1) Black patients receive care at lower-performing hospitals than white patients, even when they live in the same hospital market or ZIP code within a hospital market. (2) Over the past two decades, the gap in performance between hospitals treating Black and white patients shrank by over two-thirds. (3) This progress is due to more rapid performance improvement at hospitals that tended to treat Black patients, rather than faster reallocation of Black patients to better hospitals. (4) Hospital performance improvement is correlated with adoption of a high-return low-cost input, beta-blockers. Closing remaining disparities in allocation and harnessing the forces of performance improvement, including technology diffusion, may be novel levers to further reduce disparities.
papers.zh_title: 医院分配与医疗保健中的种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简单框架来衡量医院分配在医疗保健种族差异中的作用，并利用它来研究因心脏病发作接受治疗的黑人和白人医疗保险患者——这是一种几乎所有人都接受治疗、医院护理高效且医院质量已得到验证的疾病。我们报告了四个事实。（1）即使在同一个医院市场或同一个医院市场内的邮政编码区，黑人患者也比白人患者在绩效更低的医院接受治疗。（2）在过去二十年中，治疗黑人和白人患者的医院之间的绩效差距缩小了三分之二以上。（3）这一进展是由于倾向于治疗黑人患者的医院绩效改善更快，而非黑人患者更快地重新分配到更好的医院。（4）医院绩效改善与采用高回报低成本投入物β受体阻滞剂相关。缩小分配中剩余的差距以及利用绩效改善的力量（包括技术扩散），可能是进一步减少差异的新杠杆。

papers.title: Obsolescence of Capital and Investment Spikes
papers.authors: Arthur Fishman, Boyan Jovanovic
papers.abstract: The prospect of capital obsolescence inhibits investment. Investors thus become more optimistic when the obsolescence of their capital slows down. We propose a model with no fixed costs of investment, and random technological progress that induces obsolescence of capital in place. Spikes occur precisely when technological progress slows down. Moreover, the more variable the progress, the larger are the spikes. Cross-industry data show that where price of capital declines are more variable, investment spikes are larger.
papers.zh_title: 资本过时与投资尖峰
papers.zh_abstract: 资本过时的前景抑制了投资。因此，当投资者资本的过时速度放缓时，他们会变得更加乐观。我们提出了一个模型，该模型没有固定投资成本，并且随机的技术进步会导致现有资本过时。投资尖峰恰好发生在技术进步放缓时。此外，技术进步的变化越大，投资尖峰就越大。跨行业数据显示，在资本价格下降变化更大的行业中，投资尖峰也更大。

papers.title: Adverse Selection Dynamics in Privately-Produced Safe Debt Markets
papers.authors: Nathan Foley-Fisher, Gary B. Gorton, Stéphane Verani
papers.abstract: Privately-produced safe debt is designed so that there is no adverse selection in trade. This is because no agent finds it profitable to produce private information about the debt’s backing and all agents know this (i.e., it is information-insensitive). But in some macro states, it becomes profitable for some agents to produce private information, and then the debt faces adverse selection when traded (i.e., it becomes information-sensitive). We empirically study these adverse selection dynamics in a very important asset class, collateralized loan obligations, a large symbiotic appendage of the regulated banking system, which finances loans to below investment-grade firms.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E44, G14, G23
papers.zh_title: 私人生产的安全债务市场中的逆向选择动态
papers.zh_abstract: 私人生产的安全债务被设计成在交易中不存在逆向选择。这是因为没有代理人发现生产关于债务支持的私人信息是有利可图的，并且所有代理人都知道这一点（即，它是信息不敏感的）。但在某些宏观状态下，一些代理人生产私人信息变得有利可图，此时债务在交易中面临逆向选择（即，它变得信息敏感）。我们实证研究了在一个非常重要的资产类别——担保贷款凭证（受监管银行体系的一个大型共生附属机构，为低于投资级的企业提供贷款融资）中的这些逆向选择动态。

papers.title: Bury the Gold Standard? A Quantitative Exploration
papers.authors: Anthony M. Diercks, Jonathan Rawls, Eric Sims
papers.abstract: This paper is one of the first to study the present-day properties of the gold standard in a quantitative model commonly used in central banks. We incorporate gold into an otherwise standard estimated New Keynesian model and compare the positive and normative implications of adopting a gold standard to other more commonly advocated policies. We show that under certain conditions, the gold standard is akin to a nominal GDP targeting framework and can at times be considered an improvement. However, unlike more conventional policies, the gold standard must react to shocks to the supply and demand for gold. We estimate the model for the post-2000 period using a novel dataset on the supply of gold and find that following a gold standard would result in dramatic increases in the volatilities of macroeconomic aggregates and a significant deterioration in household welfare. This is because the estimated shocks to gold supply and demand are significantly larger than for other more conventional aggregate shocks. In the end, what buries the gold standard turns out to be instability in the dynamics of gold itself.
papers.zh_title: 埋葬金本位？一项定量探索
papers.zh_abstract: 本文是首批在中央银行常用的定量模型中研究金本位制当代特性的论文之一。我们将黄金纳入一个原本标准的新凯恩斯主义估计模型，并比较采用金本位制与其他更常被倡导的政策在实证和规范意义上的含义。我们表明，在某些条件下，金本位制类似于名义GDP目标框架，有时可被视为一种改进。然而，与更传统的政策不同，金本位制必须对黄金的供给和需求冲击做出反应。我们使用一个关于黄金供给的新数据集，对2000年后的时期进行了模型估计，发现遵循金本位制将导致宏观经济总量的波动性急剧增加，并显著恶化家庭福利。这是因为估计出的黄金供给和需求冲击远大于其他更传统的总体冲击。最终，埋葬金本位制的正是黄金自身动态的不稳定性。

papers.title: A Comparison of Monthly Global Indicators for Forecasting Growth
papers.authors: Christiane Baumeister, Pierre Guérin
papers.abstract: This paper evaluates the predictive content of a set of alternative monthly indicators of global economic activity for nowcasting and forecasting quarterly world GDP using mixed-frequency models. We find that a recently proposed indicator that covers multiple dimensions of the global economy consistently produces substantial improvements in forecast accuracy, while other monthly measures have more mixed success. This global economic conditions indicator contains valuable information also for assessing the current and future state of the economy for a set of individual countries and groups of countries. We use this indicator to track the evolution of the nowcasts for the US, the OECD area, and the world economy during the coronavirus pandemic and quantify the main factors driving the nowcasts.
papers.zh_title: 用于预测增长的月度全球指标比较
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了一组替代性月度全球经济活动指标在利用混频模型进行季度世界GDP的即时预测和预测时的预测内容。我们发现，一个最近提出的涵盖全球经济多个维度的指标持续地大幅提高了预测准确性，而其他月度指标的成功程度则参差不齐。该全球经济状况指标对于评估一组特定国家和国家集团当前及未来的经济状况也包含有价值的信息。我们利用该指标追踪美国、经合组织地区和世界经济在新冠疫情期间即时预测的演变，并量化了驱动这些即时预测的主要因素。

papers.title: Rural-Urban Migration and House Prices in China
papers.authors: Carlos Garriga, Aaron Hedlund, Yang Tang, Ping Wang
papers.abstract: This paper uses a dynamic competitive spatial equilibrium framework to evaluate the contribution of rural-urban migration induced by structural transformation to the behavior of Chinese housing markets. In the model, technological progress drives workers facing heterogeneous mobility costs to migrate from the rural agricultural sector to the higher paying urban manufacturing sector. Upon arrival to the city, workers purchase housing using long-term mortgages. Quantitatively, the model fits cross-sectional house price behavior across a representative sample of Chinese cities between 2003 and 2015. The model is then used to evaluate how changes to city migration policies and land supply regulations affect the speed of urbanization and house price appreciation. The analysis indicates that making migration policy more egalitarian or land policy more uniform would promote urbanization but also would contribute to larger house price dispersion.
papers.zh_title: 中国城乡迁移与房价
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个动态竞争性空间均衡框架来评估由结构转型引发的城乡迁移对中国住房市场行为的贡献。在该模型中，技术进步驱动面临异质性迁移成本的工人从农村农业部门迁移到收入更高的城市制造业部门。到达城市后，工人使用长期抵押贷款购买住房。在定量上，该模型拟合了2003年至2015年间中国代表性城市样本的横截面房价行为。然后，利用该模型评估城市迁移政策和土地供应法规的变化如何影响城市化速度和房价上涨。分析表明，使迁移政策更加平等或土地政策更加统一将促进城市化，但也会导致更大的房价离散度。

papers.title: Nursing Home Quality, COVID-19 Deaths, and Excess Mortality
papers.authors: Christopher J. Cronin, William N. Evans
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic in the US has been particularly devastating for nursing home residents. A key question is how have some nursing homes been able to effectively protect their residents, while others have not? Using data on the universe of US nursing homes, we examine whether establishment quality is predictive of COVID-19 mortality. Higher-quality nursing homes, as measured by inspection ratings, have substantially lower COVID-19 mortality. Quality does not predict the ability to prevent any COVID-19 resident or staff cases, but higher-quality establishments prevent the spread of resident infections conditional on having one. Preventing COVID-19 cases and deaths may come at some cost, as high-quality homes have substantially higher non-COVID deaths, a result consistent with high excess non-COVID mortality among the elderly since March. The positive correlation between establishment quality and non-COVID mortality is driven entirely by nursing homes located in counties with below-median COVID-19 case rates. As a result, high-quality homes in these counties have significantly more total deaths than their low-quality counterparts. The concentration of excess death in low-risk areas suggests that future suffering could be avoided with more nuanced guidelines, such as those recently suggested by CMS that outline a role for in-person visits in lower-risk areas.
papers.zh_title: 养老院质量、COVID-19死亡与超额死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情在美国对养老院居民造成了尤为严重的冲击。一个关键问题是，为何一些养老院能够有效保护其居民，而另一些却不能？利用美国所有养老院的数据，我们考察了机构质量是否能预测COVID-19死亡率。以检查评级衡量的更高质量养老院，其COVID-19死亡率显著更低。质量并不能预测避免任何居民或工作人员感染COVID-19的能力，但更高质量的机构在出现首例居民感染后，能够防止感染的扩散。预防COVID-19病例和死亡可能需付出一定代价，因为高质量养老院的非COVID死亡人数显著更高，这一结果与自3月以来老年人中非COVID超额死亡率较高的情况一致。机构质量与非COVID死亡率之间的正相关完全由位于COVID-19病例率低于中位数的县的养老院驱动。因此，这些县的高质量养老院的总死亡人数显著高于低质量养老院。超额死亡集中在低风险地区，这表明通过更细致的指导方针（例如CMS最近建议的、为低风险地区面对面探访设定角色的方针）可以避免未来的痛苦。

papers.title: Five-Year Impacts of Group-Based Financial Education and Savings Promotion for Ugandan Youth
papers.authors: Samantha Horn, Julian Jamison, Dean Karlan, Jonathan Zinman
papers.abstract: We experimentally evaluate group-based financial education, savings account access, or both for members of Ugandan youth groups. We measure both short- and long-run impacts with one- and five- year endline household surveys. Education, but not account access, increases measured financial knowledge and trust at one-year. At five-years, knowledge effects essentially disappear, and trust effects weaken. However, savings and income increase for each treatment at both endlines, which is noteworthy given the interventions’ low cost and the long time horizon of our second endline. Exploring potential mechanisms, we find evidence consistent with multiple pathways to behavior change and outcome improvement.
papers.zh_title: 乌干达青年群体金融教育与储蓄促进的五年影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验评估了针对乌干达青年群体成员的群体金融教育、储蓄账户获取或两者结合的效果。我们通过一年和五年的终线家庭调查来衡量短期和长期影响。在一年时，教育（而非账户获取）提高了测得的金融知识和信任度。在五年时，知识效应基本消失，信任效应减弱。然而，在每个终线期，每种处理组的储蓄和收入均有所增加，考虑到干预措施的低成本以及我们第二次终线调查的长期时间跨度，这一点值得关注。在探索潜在机制时，我们发现了与行为改变和结果改善的多条路径相一致的证据。

papers.title: The Persistence of Miscalibration
papers.authors: Michael Boutros, Itzhak Ben-David, John R. Graham, Campbell R. Harvey, John W. Payne
papers.abstract: Using 14,800 forecasts of one-year S&P 500 returns made by Chief Financial Officers over a 12-year period, we track the individual executives who provide multiple forecasts to study how their beliefs evolve dynamically. While CFOs’ return forecasts are systematically unbiased, their confidence intervals are far too narrow, implying significant miscalibration. We find that when return realizations fall outside of ex-ante confidence intervals, CFOs’ subsequent confidence intervals widen considerably. These results are consistent with a model of Bayesian learning which suggests that the evolution of beliefs should be impacted by return realizations. However, the magnitude of the updating is dampened by the strong conviction in beliefs inherent in the initial miscalibration and, as a result, miscalibration persists.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D03, D83, D84, E03, G30, G41
papers.zh_title: 校准错误的持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 利用首席财务官在12年间对一年期标普500指数回报率的14,800次预测，我们追踪了提供多次预测的个别高管，以研究他们的信念如何动态演变。虽然CFO的回报率预测在系统上无偏，但其置信区间过窄，表明存在显著的校准错误。我们发现，当回报实现值落在事前置信区间之外时，CFO随后的置信区间会显著扩大。这些结果与贝叶斯学习模型一致，该模型表明信念的演变应受到回报实现值的影响。然而，更新幅度因初始校准错误中固有的强烈信念而受到抑制，因此校准错误持续存在。

papers.title: Product Recalls and Firm Reputation
papers.authors: Boyan Jovanovic
papers.abstract: Product-recall data and information on stock-price reactions to recalls are used to estimate the value of reputation in a model in which product quality is not contractible. A recall is the result of a product defect that signals low effort. The recall triggers a reduction in the firm's product price and value which then both rise steadily until its next defect occurs. We estimate that reputation accounts for 8.3 percent of firm value and that welfare is 26 percent of its first best level. A policy intervention that attains first best is a recall tax accompanied by a flow subsidy.
papers.zh_title: 产品召回与企业声誉
papers.zh_abstract: 利用产品召回数据以及召回对股价反应的信息，我们在一个产品质量不可契约化的模型中估计了声誉的价值。召回是产品缺陷的结果，表明低努力水平。召回引发企业产品价格和价值的下降，随后两者稳步上升，直到下一次缺陷发生。我们估计声誉占企业价值的8.3%，福利水平为最优水平的26%。实现最优的政策干预是征收召回税并辅以流量补贴。

papers.title: A New Measure of Utilization-adjusted TFP Growth for Europe and the United States
papers.authors: Diego A. Comin, Javier Quintana Gonzalez, Tom G. Schmitz, Antonella Trigari
papers.abstract: We compute new estimates for Total Factor Productivity (TFP) growth in the United States and in five European countries. Departing from standard methods, we account for positive profits and use firm surveys to proxy for unobserved changes in factor utilization. These novelties have a major impact, especially in Europe, where our estimated TFP growth series are less volatile and less cyclical than the ones obtained with standard methods. Based on our approach, we provide annual industry-level and aggregate TFP series, as well as the first estimates of utilization-adjusted quarterly TFP growth in Europe.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ME, PR, TWP；JEL：E01, E30, O30, O40
papers.zh_title: 欧洲与美国利用调整后的全要素生产率增长的新度量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为美国和五个欧洲国家计算了全要素生产率增长的新估计值。与标准方法不同，我们考虑了正利润，并使用企业调查来代理要素利用率的未观测变化。这些创新产生了重大影响，尤其是在欧洲，我们估计的全要素生产率增长序列比标准方法得到的序列波动性更小、周期性更弱。基于我们的方法，我们提供了年度行业层面和总体的全要素生产率序列，以及欧洲首个利用调整后的季度全要素生产率增长估计值。

papers.title: Land Quality
papers.authors: J. Vernon Henderson, Adam Storeygard, David N. Weil
papers.abstract: We develop a new measure of land quality by estimating weights in a Poisson regression of grid-cell population on geographic characteristics and country fixed effects. Aggregating to countries, we construct average land quality (ALQ) and quality-adjusted population density (QAPD). We show: First, current income per capita is positively correlated with ALQ. Second, while income today is unrelated to conventional population density, it is strongly negatively related to QAPD. Third, this negative relationship was not present in 1820 and emerged because today’s lower income countries have experienced faster subsequent population growth. Fourth, countries with higher average land quality began sustained modern economic growth earlier, and this earlier takeoff largely explains the modern income-ALQ relationship. We posit a framework in which land quality induced denser populations in Malthusian equilibrium and, via agglomeration, earlier takeoffs. Less dense countries experienced larger population multipliers during their later demographic transitions due to imported health technologies.
papers.zh_title: 土地质量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过估计一个将网格单元人口对地理特征和国家固定效应进行泊松回归的权重，开发了一种新的土地质量衡量指标。汇总到国家层面，我们构建了平均土地质量（ALQ）和质量调整后的人口密度（QAPD）。我们表明：第一，当前人均收入与ALQ正相关。第二，虽然当前收入与传统人口密度无关，但与QAPD强烈负相关。第三，这种负相关关系在1820年并不存在，而是因为当今收入较低的国家随后经历了更快的人口增长。第四，平均土地质量较高的国家更早开始持续的现代经济增长，而这种更早的起飞在很大程度上解释了现代收入与ALQ之间的关系。我们提出了一个框架，其中土地质量在马尔萨斯均衡中导致人口更密集，并通过集聚效应导致更早的经济起飞。人口较不密集的国家在随后的 demographic transition 中，由于引进了健康技术，经历了更大的人口乘数效应。

papers.title: Corporate Governance, Business Group Governance and Economic Development Traps
papers.authors: Luis Dau, Randall Morck, Bernard Yeung
papers.abstract: Every firm in a developed economy relies on the mere existence of countless other firms to keep prices competitive up and down all supply chains. Without this network externality, no firm forms; and without many firms, no network forms; locking in a low-income trap. Business group governance supersedes corporate governance in most developing economies and in the rapid catch-up development phases of most high-income economies by hierarchically coordinating firms in multiple industries, internalizing this network externality. High-income economies grow via creative destruction - creative firms imposing a negative externality upon firms they destroy or disrupt, but a larger positive innovation-related externality upon the whole economy. Business groups avoid creative self-destruction, innovation by one group firm that disrupts another. Corporate governance supersedes business group governance in high-income economies to facilitate productivity growth. If business group governance does not retreat, productivity growth is impaired and a middle-income trap can result.
papers.zh_title: 公司治理、商业集团治理与经济发展陷阱
papers.zh_abstract: 在发达经济体中，每家企业都依赖于无数其他企业的存在，以保持所有供应链上下游的价格竞争力。没有这种网络外部性，企业就无法形成；而没有众多企业，网络也无法形成，从而陷入低收入陷阱。在大多数发展中经济体以及多数高收入经济体快速追赶的发展阶段，商业集团治理通过层级化协调多个行业的企业，将这种网络外部性内部化，从而取代了公司治理。高收入经济体通过创造性破坏实现增长——创造性企业对其摧毁或颠覆的企业施加负外部性，但对整个经济产生更大的与创新相关的正外部性。商业集团会避免创造性的自我毁灭，即一个集团企业的创新扰乱另一个集团企业。在高收入经济体中，公司治理取代商业集团治理以促进生产率增长。如果商业集团治理不退出，生产率增长将受到损害，并可能导致中等收入陷阱。

papers.title: Effects of the COVID-19 Pandemic on Domestic Violence in Los Angeles
papers.authors: Amalia R. Miller, Carmit Segal, Melissa K. Spencer
papers.abstract: Around the world, policymakers and news reports warned that the COVID-19 pandemic, and attendant restrictions on individual mobility and commercial activity, could lead to a surge in domestic violence (DV). Some prominent initial studies of the effects of the pandemic showed evidence of greater DV incidence, but findings were inconsistent across locations and DV measures. This paper focuses on a single major city, Los Angeles, to measure the impact of the initial pandemic shutdown on three DV measures based on police data (911 calls, crime incidents, and arrests) as well as measures based on two non-police administrative sources (the county DV hotline and hospital records). After confirming the prior finding of an increase in DV calls to police during the shutdown, we also show that calls to the hotline increased. However, we find that DV crimes recorded by police and hospital visits by female assault (and DV) victims both decreased significantly, suggesting that the increase in calls came from higher reporting rates, possibly for verbal disputes. Arrests per population for DV crimes were unaffected by the shutdown, but a higher share of DV crimes led to arrests.
