This points against a decrease in the intensity of policing of DV crimes driving the lower crime rate. We conclude that the initial LA shutdown increased the rates at which people contacted authorities about domestic-related concerns, but decreased the overall incidence of physical DV crimes in the population.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J12, J16, K14, K42
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情对洛杉矶家庭暴力的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 全球范围内，政策制定者和新闻报道警告称，COVID-19疫情及其伴随的个人流动性和商业活动限制可能导致家庭暴力激增。一些关于疫情影响的初步重要研究显示了家庭暴力发生率上升的证据，但不同地点和家庭暴力衡量指标之间的结果并不一致。本文聚焦于洛杉矶这一主要城市，基于警方数据（911报警电话、犯罪事件和逮捕）以及两个非警方行政来源（县家庭暴力热线和医院记录）的衡量指标，衡量疫情初期封锁对三种家庭暴力指标的影响。在确认了封锁期间警方接到的家庭暴力报警电话增加这一先前发现后，我们还显示热线电话也增加了。然而，我们发现警方记录的家庭暴力犯罪和女性攻击（及家庭暴力）受害者的医院就诊次数均显著下降，这表明报警电话的增加源于更高的报告率，可能涉及言语纠纷。人均家庭暴力犯罪逮捕率未受封锁影响，但更高比例的家庭暴力犯罪导致了逮捕。这反驳了家庭暴力犯罪执法强度下降导致犯罪率降低的观点。我们得出结论，洛杉矶初期的封锁提高了人们就家庭相关问题联系当局的频率，但降低了人群中身体家庭暴力犯罪的总体发生率。

papers.title: Economic Studies on the Opioid Crisis: A Review
papers.authors: Johanna Catherine Maclean, Justine Mallatt, Christopher J. Ruhm, Kosali Simon
papers.abstract:
The United States has experienced an unprecedented crisis related to the misuse of and addiction to opioids. As of 2018, 128 Americans die each day of an opioid overdose, and total economic costs associated with opioid misuse are estimated to be more than $500 billion annually. The crisis has evolved in three phases, starting in the 1990s and continuing through 2010 with a massive increase in use of prescribed opioids associated with lax prescribing regulations and aggressive marketing eﬀorts by the pharmaceutical industry. A second phase included tightening restrictions on prescribed opioids, reformulation of some commonly misused prescription medications, and a shift to heroin consumption over the period 2010 to 2013. Since 2013, the third phase of the crisis has included a movement towards synthetic opioids, especially fentanyl, and a continued tightening of opioid prescribing regulations, along with the growth of both harm reduction and addiction treatment access policies.

Economic research, using innovative frameworks, causal methods, and rich data, has added to our understanding of the causes and consequences of the crisis. This body of research also identiﬁes intended and unintended impacts of policies designed to address the crisis. Although there is general agreement that the causes of the crisis include a combination of supply- and demand-side factors, and interactions between them, there is less consensus regarding the relative importance of each. Studies show that regulations can reduce opioid prescribing but may have less impact on root causes of the crisis and, in some cases, have spillover eﬀects resulting in greater use of more harmful substances obtained in illicit markets, where regulation is less possible. There are eﬀective opioid use disorder treatments available, but access, stigma, and cost hurdles have stiﬂed utilization, resulting in a large degree of under-treatment in the U.S.

How challenges brought about by the COVID-19 pandemic may intersect with the opioid crisis is unclear. Emerging areas for future research include understanding how societal and healthcare systems disruptions aﬀect opioid use, as well as which regulations and policies most eﬀectively reduce potentially inappropriate prescription opioid use and illicit opioid sources without unintended negative consequences.
papers.zh_title: 阿片类药物危机的经济学研究：综述
papers.zh_abstract: 美国经历了一场与阿片类药物滥用和成瘾相关的空前危机。截至2018年，每天有128名美国人死于阿片类药物过量，与阿片类药物滥用相关的总经济成本估计每年超过5000亿美元。这场危机经历了三个阶段：从20世纪90年代开始，持续到2010年，由于宽松的处方规定和制药行业的积极营销努力，处方阿片类药物使用量大幅增加；第二阶段包括2010年至2013年期间收紧处方阿片类药物的限制、重新配制一些常用滥用的处方药，以及转向海洛因消费；自2013年以来，危机的第三阶段包括转向合成阿片类药物，尤其是芬太尼，同时继续收紧阿片类药物处方规定，并发展减少伤害和成瘾治疗可及性政策。经济学研究利用创新框架、因果方法和丰富数据，加深了我们对危机原因和后果的理解。这一研究体系还识别了旨在应对危机的政策所产生的预期和非预期影响。尽管普遍认为危机的原因包括供需双方因素及其相互作用，但对于各因素的相对重要性尚未达成共识。研究表明，法规可以减少阿片类药物处方，但可能对危机的根本原因影响较小，并且在某些情况下会产生溢出效应，导致在监管较难的非法市场上更多地使用更有害的物质。存在有效的阿片类药物使用障碍治疗方法，但可及性、污名化和成本障碍阻碍了其利用，导致美国存在大量治疗不足的情况。COVID-19疫情带来的挑战如何与阿片类药物危机相互交织尚不清楚。未来研究的新兴领域包括理解社会和医疗系统中断如何影响阿片类药物使用，以及哪些法规和政策能在不产生意外负面后果的情况下最有效地减少潜在不适当的处方阿片类药物使用和非法阿片类药物来源。

papers.title: Forward Guidance and Durable Goods Demand
papers.authors: Alisdair McKay, Johannes F. Wieland
papers.abstract: Durable goods attenuate the power of forward guidance. The extensive and intensive margins of durable goods demand are both more sensitive to the contemporaneous user cost than to future user costs. Changes in the contemporaneous real interest rate directly affect the contemporaneous user cost and durable demand, whereas promises of low future real interest rates have weaker effects through equilibrium price changes. Quantitatively, reducing the real interest rate one year from now increases output by only forty percent as much as reducing the real interest rate today. Our results are little affected by the maturity of financial assets that finance durable purchases.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E21, E22, E43, E52, E58
papers.zh_title: 前瞻指引与耐用品需求
papers.zh_abstract: 耐用品削弱了前瞻指引的力量。耐用品需求的广延边际和集约边际对当期用户成本比未来用户成本更为敏感。当期实际利率的变化直接影响当期用户成本和耐用品需求，而承诺未来低实际利率则通过均衡价格变化产生较弱的影响。定量来看，将一年后的实际利率降低一个单位，其产出增加效果仅为降低当期实际利率的40%。我们的结果几乎不受为耐用品购买融资的金融资产期限的影响。

papers.title: Stereotypes in Financial Literacy: Evidence from PISA
papers.authors: Laura Bottazzi, Annamaria Lusardi
papers.abstract: We examine gender differences in financial literacy among high school students in Italy using data from the 2012 Programme for International Student Assessment (PISA). Gender differences in financial literacy are large among the young in Italy. They are present in all regions and are particularly severe in the South and the Islands. Combining the rich PISA data with a variety of other indicators, we provide a thorough analysis of the potential determinants of the gender gap in financial literacy. We find that parental background, in particular the role of mothers, matters for the financial knowledge of girls. Moreover, we show that the social and cultural environment in which girls and boys live plays a crucial role in explaining gender differences. We also show that history matters: Medieval commercial hubs and the nuclear family structure created conditions favorable to the transformation of the role of women in society, and shaped gender differences in financial literacy as well.
papers.zh_title: 金融素养中的刻板印象：来自PISA的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2012年国际学生评估项目的数据，研究了意大利高中生在金融素养方面的性别差异。在意大利年轻人中，金融素养的性别差异很大。这些差异存在于所有地区，在南部和岛屿地区尤为严重。通过将丰富的PISA数据与各种其他指标相结合，我们对金融素养性别差异的潜在决定因素进行了全面分析。我们发现，父母背景，特别是母亲的作用，对女孩的金融知识很重要。此外，我们表明女孩和男孩所处的社会和文化环境在解释性别差异方面起着关键作用。我们还表明历史很重要：中世纪的商业中心以及核心家庭结构为妇女在社会中角色的转变创造了有利条件，并同样塑造了金融素养方面的性别差异。

papers.title: Choices and Outcomes in Assignment Mechanisms: The Allocation of Deceased Donor Kidneys
papers.authors: Nikhil Agarwal, Charles Hodgson, Paulo Somaini
papers.abstract: While the mechanism design paradigm emphasizes notions of efficiency based on agent preferences, policymakers often focus on alternative objectives. School districts emphasize educational achievement, and transplantation communities focus on patient survival. It is unclear whether choice-based mechanisms perform well when assessed based on these outcomes. This paper evaluates the assignment mechanism for allocating deceased donor kidneys on the basis of patient life-years from transplantation (LYFT).We examine the role of choice in increasing LYFT and compare realized assignments to benchmarks that remove choice. Our model combines choices and outcomes in order to study how selection affects LYFT. We show how to identify and estimate the model using instruments derived from the mechanism. The estimates suggest that the design in use selects patients with better post-transplant survival prospects and matches them well, resulting in an average LYFT of 9.29, which is 1.75 years more than a random assignment. However, the maximum aggregate LYFT is 14.08. Realizing the majority of the gains requires transplanting relatively healthy patients, who would have longer life expectancies even without a transplant. Therefore, a policymaker faces a dilemma between transplanting patients who are sicker and those for whom life will be extended the longest.
papers.zh_title: 分配机制中的选择与结果：已故捐赠者肾脏的分配
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管机制设计范式强调基于代理人偏好的效率概念，但政策制定者通常关注替代目标。学区强调教育成就，移植界关注患者生存。当基于这些结果进行评估时，基于选择的机制是否表现良好尚不清楚。本文基于患者移植后生命年数这一指标，评估了已故捐赠者肾脏的分配机制。我们考察了选择在增加移植后生命年数中的作用，并将实际分配与去除选择的基准进行了比较。我们的模型结合了选择和结果，以研究选择如何影响移植后生命年数。我们展示了如何利用源自该机制的工具变量来识别和估计该模型。估计结果表明，当前使用的设计选择了移植后生存前景更好的患者，并进行了良好匹配，导致平均移植后生命年数为9.29年，比随机分配多1.75年。然而，最大总移植后生命年数为14.08年。实现大部分收益需要移植相对健康的患者，即使没有移植，这些患者也会有更长的预期寿命。因此，政策制定者面临着在移植病情更重的患者与移植寿命延长最长的患者之间的两难选择。

papers.title: FinTech Adoption and Household Risk-Taking: From Digital Payments to Platform Investments
papers.authors: Claire Yurong Hong, Xiaomeng Lu, Jun Pan
papers.abstract: We study household finance in the age of FinTech, where consumption, payments, and investments take place via all-in-one super-apps. We hypothesize that FinTech adoption can improve household risk-taking by breaking down the traditional physical and psychological barriers and enhance financial inclusion. Taking advantage of an individual-level FinTech dataset, we find that higher FinTech adoption, both at the individual-level and the county-level instrumented by distance-from-Hangzhou, results in higher participation and more risk-taking in mutual-fund investments. Moreover, individuals who are otherwise more constrained, those with higher risk tolerance or living in under-banked counties, stand to benefit more from the advent of FinTech.
papers.zh_title: 金融科技采纳与家庭风险承担：从数字支付到平台投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了金融科技时代的家庭金融，其中消费、支付和投资通过一体化超级应用进行。我们假设，金融科技的采纳可以通过打破传统的物理和心理障碍来改善家庭风险承担，并增强金融包容性。利用个人层面的金融科技数据集，我们发现，无论是个人层面还是以距杭州距离为工具变量的县级层面，更高的金融科技采纳都会导致更高的共同基金投资参与度和更多的风险承担。此外，原本受到更多约束的个人、风险承受能力较高的人或生活在银行服务不足县的人，从金融科技的出现中获益更多。

papers.title: How Would Medicare for All Affect Health System Capacity? Evidence from Medicare for Some
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Joshua D. Gottlieb, Jeffrey Hicks
papers.abstract: Proposals to create a national health care plan such as "Medicare for All" rely heavily on reducing the prices that insurers pay for health care. These changes affect physicians' short-run incentives for care provision and may also change health care providers' incentives to invest in capacity, thereby influencing the availability of care in the long term. We provide evidence on these responses using a major Medicare payment change combined with survey data on physicians' time use. We find evidence that physicians increase their time spent on capacity building when remuneration increases, and that they are subsequently more willing to accept new patients---especially those who may be the residual claimants on marginal capacity. These forces imply that short-run supply curves likely differ from long-run supply curves. Policymakers need to account for how major changes to payment incentives would influence the investments that determine health system capacity.
papers.zh_title: 全民医保将如何影响卫生系统能力？来自部分医保的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 创建国家医疗计划（如“全民医保”）的提案在很大程度上依赖于降低保险公司为医疗保健支付的价格。这些变化会影响医生提供护理的短期激励，也可能改变医疗保健提供者投资于能力的激励，从而影响长期护理的可及性。我们利用一次重大的医疗保险支付变化，结合医生时间使用的调查数据，提供了关于这些反应的证据。我们发现，当报酬增加时，医生会增加用于能力建设的时间，随后他们更愿意接受新患者——尤其是那些可能是边际能力剩余索取者的患者。这些力量意味着短期供给曲线可能与长期供给曲线不同。政策制定者需要考虑支付激励的重大变化将如何影响决定卫生系统能力的投资。

papers.title: Answering the Call of Automation: How the Labor Market Adjusted to Mechanizing Telephone Operation
papers.authors: James Feigenbaum, Daniel P. Gross
papers.abstract: In the early 1900s, telephone operation was among the most common jobs for American women, and telephone operators were ubiquitous. Between 1920 and 1940, AT&T undertook one of the largest automation investments in modern history, replacing operators with mechanical switching technology in over half of the U.S. telephone network. Using variation across U.S. cities in the timing of adoption, we study how this wave of automation affected the labor market for young women. Although automation eliminated most of these jobs, it did not reduce future cohorts' overall employment: the decline in operators was counteracted by employment growth in middle-skill clerical jobs and lower- skill service jobs, including in new categories of work. Using a new genealogy-based census-linking method, we show that incumbent telephone operators were most impacted, and a decade later more likely to be in lower-paying occupations or no longer working.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：J21, J24, J62, J63, M51, M54, N32, O33
papers.zh_title: 响应自动化的召唤：劳动力市场如何适应电话接线机械化
papers.zh_abstract: 在20世纪初，电话接线是美国女性最常见的职业之一，电话接线员无处不在。1920年至1940年间，AT&T进行了现代史上最大规模的自动化投资之一，用机械交换技术取代了美国超过一半电话网络中的接线员。利用美国各城市采用该技术的时间差异，我们研究了这波自动化浪潮如何影响年轻女性的劳动力市场。尽管自动化消除了大部分此类工作岗位，但它并未减少未来群体的整体就业：接线员的减少被中等技能文职工作和低技能服务工作的就业增长所抵消，其中包括新的工作类别。利用一种新的基于家谱的人口普查关联方法，我们表明在职电话接线员受到的影响最大，十年后她们更可能从事低薪职业或不再工作。

papers.title: Productivity Shocks, Long-Term Contracts and Earnings Dynamics
papers.authors: Neele Balke, Thibaut Lamadon
papers.abstract: This paper examines how employer- and worker-specific productivity shocks transmit to earnings and employment in an economy with search frictions and firm commitment. We develop an equilibrium search model with worker and firm shocks and characterize the optimal contract offered by competing firms to attract and retain workers. In equilibrium, risk-neutral firms provide only partial insurance against shocks to risk-averse workers and offer contingent contracts, where payments are backloaded in good times and frontloaded in bad times. We prove that there exists a unique spot target wage, which serves as an attraction point for smooth wage adjustments. The structural model is estimated on matched employer-employee data from Sweden. The estimates indicate that firms absorb persistent worker and firm shocks, with respective passthrough values of 27 and 11%, but price permanent worker differences, a large contributor (32%) to variations in wages. A large share of the earnings growth variance can be attributed to job mobility, which interacts with productivity shocks. We evaluate the effects of redistributive policies and find that almost 40% of government-provided insurance is undone by crowding out firm-provided insurance.
papers.zh_title: 生产率冲击、长期合同与收入动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在存在搜索摩擦和企业承诺的经济中，雇主和工人特定的生产率冲击如何传导至收入和就业。我们构建了一个包含工人和企业冲击的均衡搜索模型，并刻画了竞争性企业为吸引和留住工人而提供的最优合同。在均衡中，风险中性企业仅为风险厌恶工人提供针对冲击的部分保险，并提供或有合同，其中支付在好时期后置，在坏时期前置。我们证明存在一个唯一的现货目标工资，它作为平滑工资调整的吸引点。该结构模型基于瑞典的雇主-雇员匹配数据进行估计。估计结果表明，企业吸收了持续的工人和企业冲击，其传导值分别为27%和11%，但对永久性的工人差异进行定价，这是工资变动的一个主要贡献因素（占32%）。收入增长方差中很大一部分可归因于与生产率冲击相互作用的职业流动性。我们评估了再分配政策的效果，发现政府提供的保险中近40%因挤出企业提供的保险而被抵消。

papers.title: Persistence and Path Dependence in the Spatial Economy
papers.authors: Treb Allen, Dave Donaldson
papers.abstract: How much of the spatial distribution of economic activity today is determined by history rather than by geographic fundamentals? And if history matters for spatial allocations, does it also matter for overall eﬃciency? This paper develops a forward-looking dynamic framework for the theoretical and empirical study of such questions. We derive conditions on the strength of agglomeration externalities under which equilibria are unique and yet temporary historical shocks can have particularly persistent, or even permanent (i.e. path-dependent) consequences. When estimated using U.S. data from 1800-2000, this model displays multi-century persistence from small and temporary shocks as well as path dependence (with large aggregate welfare eﬀects) throughout much of our estimated parameter range.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI；JEL：C33, C62, F1, R11, R13, R23
papers.zh_title: 空间经济中的持久性与路径依赖
papers.zh_abstract: 当今经济活动空间分布在多大程度上由历史而非地理基础决定？如果历史对空间分配重要，它是否也对整体效率重要？本文为这类问题的理论和实证研究开发了一个前瞻性的动态框架。我们推导了集聚外部性强度下的条件，在这些条件下均衡是唯一的，但暂时的历史冲击可能产生特别持久甚至永久（即路径依赖）的后果。当使用1800-2000年的美国数据进行估计时，该模型显示出小规模暂时冲击带来的多世纪持久性，以及在我们大部分估计参数范围内具有路径依赖性（并产生巨大的总体福利效应）。

papers.title: COVID-19 Restrictions Reduced Abortion Clinic Visits, Even in Blue States
papers.authors: Martin Andersen, Sylvia Bryan, David Slusky
papers.abstract: At the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, 13 states used elective procedure bans to explicitly restrict access to surgical abortions and an additional 20 states banned all elective procedures, without reference to abortion. In this paper, we study the effects of these state-level bans on visits to abortion clinics. Using a balanced panel of 757 abortion clinics, we find that clinics in states banning elective procedures experienced an 18% reduction in visits, and surgical abortion bans led to a further 9% reduction, entirely from fewer visits to clinics that provided surgical abortions. These restrictions resulted in approximately 18,000 fewer abortions in 2020 compared to 2019, leading to 8400 additional births. The effects of these bans on mobility were not confined to traditionally “red” states but also affected mobility to clinics in “blue” states.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19限制减少了堕胎诊所就诊，即使在蓝州也是如此
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行初期，13个州利用选择性手术禁令明确限制外科堕胎手术，另外20个州禁止所有选择性手术，但未提及堕胎。在本文中，我们研究了这些州级禁令对堕胎诊所就诊的影响。使用包含757家堕胎诊所的平衡面板数据，我们发现，禁止选择性手术的州的诊所就诊量减少了18%，而外科堕胎禁令导致进一步减少9%，这完全是由于提供外科堕胎的诊所就诊量减少所致。这些限制导致2020年堕胎数量比2019年减少约18,000例，从而增加了8,400例出生。这些禁令对流动性的影响并不仅限于传统的“红州”，也影响了前往“蓝州”诊所的流动性。

papers.title: Asymmetric Demand Response when Prices Increase and Decrease: The Case of Child Healthcare
papers.authors: Toshiaki Iizuka, Hitoshi Shigeoka
papers.abstract: This study tests whether demand responds symmetrically to price increases and decreases—a seemingly obvious proposition under conventional demand theory that has not been rigorously tested. Exploiting rapid expansion in municipal subsidies for child healthcare in a difference-in-differences framework, we find evidence against it: when coinsurance, our price measure, increases from 0% to 30%, the demand response is more than twice that to a price decrease from 30% to 0%, a result consistent with loss aversion. This result indicates that, while economists and policymakers pay little attention, the price change direction matters, and that welfare analysis should incorporate this direction.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, PE；JEL：I11, I13, I18, J13
papers.zh_title: 价格上涨与下跌时的非对称需求响应：以儿童医疗保健为例
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究检验了需求是否对价格上涨和下跌做出对称响应——这在传统需求理论下看似显而易见，但尚未经过严格检验。利用双重差分框架中市政儿童医疗保健补贴的快速扩张，我们发现了反对这一点的证据：当我们的价格度量——共付比例——从0%增加到30%时，需求响应是价格从30%降至0%时的两倍多，这一结果与损失厌恶一致。这一结果表明，尽管经济学家和政策制定者很少关注，但价格变化方向很重要，福利分析应纳入这一方向。

papers.title: Intangible Value
papers.authors: Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Edward Kim, Dimitris Papanikolaou
papers.abstract: Intangible assets are absent from traditional measures of firm value despite their growing importance in firms' capital stocks. We propose a simple improvement to the classic Fama and French (1992, 1993) value factor that incorporates intangibles and addresses differences in accounting practices across industries. Our intangible value factor prices assets as well as or better than the traditional value factor but yields substantially higher returns. This outperformance holds over the entire sample period, including in more recent decades during which value has underperformed. We show that the intangible value factor sorts more effectively within industries on productivity, profitability, financial soundness, and on other valuation ratios such as price-to-earnings.
papers.zh_title: 无形价值
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管无形资产在企业资本存量中的重要性日益增长，但它们却缺席于传统的企业价值度量。我们提出了对经典Fama和French（1992, 1993）价值因子的一个简单改进，该改进纳入了无形资产并解决了不同行业间会计实践的差异。我们的无形价值因子在资产定价方面与传统价值因子表现相当或更好，但产生了显著更高的回报。这种优异表现贯穿整个样本期，包括价值因子表现不佳的最近几十年。我们表明，无形价值因子在行业内更有效地根据生产率、盈利能力、财务稳健性以及其他估值比率（如市盈率）进行排序。

papers.title: Farm Product Prices, Redistribution, and the Early U.S. Great Depression
papers.authors: Joshua K. Hausman, Paul W. Rhode, Johannes F. Wieland
papers.abstract: We argue that falling farm product prices, incomes, and spending may explain 10-30 percent of the 1930 U.S. output decline. Crop prices collapsed, reducing farmers' incomes. And across U.S. states and Ohio counties, auto sales fell most in crop-growing areas. The large spending response may be explained by farmers' indebtedness. Reasonable assumptions about the marginal propensity to spend of farmers relative to nonfarmers and the pass-through of farm prices to retail prices imply that the collapse of farm product prices in 1930 was a powerful propagation mechanism worsening the Depression.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ME；JEL：E32, E65, N12, N52, Q11, Q12
papers.zh_title: 农产品价格、再分配与早期美国大萧条
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，农产品价格、收入和支出的下降可能解释了1930年美国产出下降的10-30%。农作物价格暴跌，减少了农民的收入。在美国各州和俄亥俄州各县，汽车销量在农作物种植区下降最多。这种巨大的支出反应可能由农民的负债状况解释。关于农民相对于非农民的边际消费倾向以及农产品价格向零售价格传导的合理假设表明，1930年农产品价格的崩溃是一个加剧大萧条的强大传播机制。

papers.title: Price Ceiling, Market Structure, and Payout Policies
papers.authors: Mao Ye, Miles Zheng, Xiongshi Li
papers.abstract: To prevent firms from manipulating prices, U.S. regulators set price ceilings for open-market share repurchases. We find that market structure reforms in the 1990s and 2000s dramatically increased share repurchases because they relaxed constraints that prevent firms from competing with other traders under price ceilings. The 2016 Tick Size Pilot, a controlled experiment that partially reversed previous reforms, significantly reduced share repurchases. Market structure frictions provide a unified explanation for two puzzles: the dividend puzzle exists because previous research has overlooked market structure frictions; share repurchases increase relative to dividends over time because market structure reforms gradually reduce these frictions.
papers.zh_title: 价格上限、市场结构与支付政策
papers.zh_abstract: 为防止企业操纵价格，美国监管机构为公开市场股票回购设定了价格上限。我们发现，1990年代和2000年代的市场结构改革大幅增加了股票回购，因为它们放松了限制，使企业能够在价格上限下与其他交易者竞争。2016年的最小报价单位试点（Tick Size Pilot）作为一项部分逆转先前改革的受控实验，显著减少了股票回购。市场结构摩擦为两个谜题提供了统一解释：股息谜题之所以存在，是因为先前的研究忽视了市场结构摩擦；股票回购相对于股息随时间增加，是因为市场结构改革逐渐减少了这些摩擦。

papers.title: Brexit Uncertainty and its (Dis)Service Effects
papers.authors: Saad Ahmad, Nuno Limão, Sarah Oliver, Serge Shikher
papers.abstract: We estimate the impact of increased policy uncertainty from Brexit on UK trade in services. We apply an uncertainty-augmented gravity equation to UK services trade with the European Union at the industry level from 2016Q1 to 2018Q4. By exploiting the variation in the probability of Brexit from prediction markets interacted with a new trade policy risk measure across service industries we identify a significant negative impact of the threat of Brexit on trade values and participation. The increased probability of Brexit in this period lowered services exports by at least 20 log points.
papers.zh_title: 英国脱欧不确定性及其（非）服务效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了英国脱欧带来的政策不确定性增加对英国服务贸易的影响。我们采用一个包含不确定性的引力方程，研究了2016年第一季度至2018年第四季度英国与欧盟在行业层面的服务贸易。通过利用预测市场中英国脱欧概率的变化，并结合跨服务行业的新贸易政策风险度量指标，我们识别出脱欧威胁对贸易价值和参与度具有显著的负面影响。在此期间，英国脱欧概率的增加使服务出口至少下降了20个对数点。

papers.title: Reputation and Earnings Dynamics
papers.authors: Boyan Jovanovic, Julien Prat
papers.abstract: Cyclical patterns in earnings can arise when contracts between firms and their workers are incomplete, and when workers cannot borrow or lend so as to smooth their consumption. Effort cycles generate occasional large changes in earnings. These large changes are transitory, consistent with recent empirical findings.
papers.zh_title: 声誉与收入动态
papers.zh_abstract: 当企业与工人之间的合同不完全，且工人无法通过借贷来平滑消费时，收入会出现周期性模式。努力程度的周期会导致收入偶尔发生大幅变化。这些大幅变化是暂时性的，这与近期的实证发现一致。

papers.title: The Structure of Business Taxation in China
papers.authors: Zhao Chen, Yuxuan He, Zhikuo Liu, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato, Daniel Yi Xu
papers.abstract: This paper documents facts about the structure of business taxation in China using administrative tax data from 2007 to 2011 from the State Taxation Administration. We first document the importance of different business taxes across industries. While corporate income taxes play an important role for manufacturing firms, these firms also remit a large share of their tax payments through the value-added tax system, through the excise tax system and through payroll taxes. Gross receipts taxes play an important role for firms in other industries, leading to spillovers that may affect the overall economy. Second, we evaluate whether the structure of China’s tax revenue matches its stage of development. A cross-country comparison of sources of government revenue shows that China collects a high share of tax revenue from taxes on goods and services and a high share of income tax on corporations. Finally, we study whether firm-level differences in effective tax rates can be an important source of allocative inefficiencies. Decomposing the variation in effective tax rates across firms, we find that government policies, including loss carry-forward provisions and preferential policies for regional, foreign, small, and high-tech firms, have significant explanatory power. Nonetheless, while effective tax rates vary along a number of dimensions, tax policy does not explain the large dispersion in the returns to factors of production across firms.
papers.zh_title: 中国商业税制的结构
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用国家税务总局2007年至2011年的行政税收数据，记录了关于中国商业税制结构的事实。我们首先记录了不同行业各类商业税的重要性。虽然企业所得税对制造业企业起着重要作用，但这些企业也通过增值税系统、消费税系统和工资税缴纳了很大一部分税款。总收入税对其他行业的企业起着重要作用，这可能导致影响整体经济的溢出效应。其次，我们评估了中国税收结构是否与其发展阶段相匹配。政府收入来源的跨国比较显示，中国从商品和服务税中获得的税收份额较高，从企业所得税中获得的税收份额也较高。最后，我们研究了企业层面有效税率的差异是否可能成为配置效率低下的重要来源。通过分解企业间有效税率的差异，我们发现政府政策，包括亏损结转条款以及对区域、外资、小型和高科技企业的优惠政策，具有显著的解释力。尽管如此，尽管有效税率在多个维度上存在差异，但税收政策并不能解释企业间生产要素回报的巨大离散程度。

papers.title: Local Public Finance Dynamics and Hurricane Shocks
papers.authors: Rhiannon Jerch, Matthew E. Kahn, Gary C. Lin
papers.abstract: Since 1980, over 2,000 local governments in US Atlantic and Gulf states have been hit by a hurricane. Such natural disasters can exert severe budgetary pressure on local governments’ ability to provide critical infrastructure, goods, and services. We study local government revenue, expenditure, and borrowing dynamics in the aftermath of hurricanes. These shocks reduce tax revenues and expenditures, and increase the cost of debt in the decade following exposure. Major hurricanes have much larger effects than minor hurricanes. Our results reveal how hurricanes create collateral fiscal damage for local governments by increasing the cost of debt at critical moments after a hurricane strike. Municipalities with a racial minority composition 1 standard deviation above the sample mean suffer expenditure losses more than 2 times larger and debt default risk 8 times larger than municipalities with average racial composition in the decade following a hurricane strike. These results suggest that climate change can exacerbate environmental justice challenges.
papers.zh_title: 地方公共财政动态与飓风冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 自1980年以来，美国大西洋和墨西哥湾沿岸各州有超过2000个地方政府遭受过飓风袭击。此类自然灾害可能对地方政府提供关键基础设施、商品和服务的能力造成严重的预算压力。我们研究了飓风过后地方政府的收入、支出和借贷动态。这些冲击在遭受袭击后的十年内减少了税收收入和支出，并增加了债务成本。重大飓风的影响远大于小型飓风。我们的结果揭示了飓风如何通过在袭击后的关键时刻增加债务成本，对地方政府造成附带财政损害。在飓风袭击后的十年里，种族少数群体构成比样本均值高一个标准差的城市，其支出损失是种族构成平均城市的2倍以上，债务违约风险是后者的8倍。这些结果表明，气候变化可能加剧环境正义挑战。

papers.title: Mothers’ Social Networks and Socioeconomic Gradients of Isolation
papers.authors: Alison Andrew, Orazio Attanasio, Britta Augsburg, Jere Behrman, Monimalika Day, Pamela Jervis, Costas Meghir, Angus Phimister
papers.abstract: Social connections are fundamental to human wellbeing. We examine the social networks of mothers of young children in rural Odisha, India. Gendered norms around marriage, mobility and work likely shape this group’s opportunities to form and maintain ties. We track 2,170 mothers’ networks over four years and find a high degree of isolation. Wealthier women and women from more-advantaged castes and tribes have smaller networks than their less-advantaged peers, primarily because they know fewer women within their own socioeconomic group. There exists strong, but symmetric, homophily by socioeconomic group. Socioeconomic differences are associated with toilet ownership and labor force participation.
papers.zh_title: 母亲的社会网络与社会经济隔离梯度
papers.zh_abstract: 社会关系是人类福祉的基础。我们考察了印度奥里萨邦农村地区幼儿母亲的社会网络。围绕婚姻、流动性和工作的性别规范可能塑造了这一群体建立和维持关系的机会。我们对2170名母亲的网络进行了为期四年的追踪，发现高度隔离的现象。较富裕的女性和来自更优势种姓和部落的女性，其网络规模小于较弱势的同龄人，这主要是因为她们在自己社会经济群体内认识的女性较少。存在强烈但对称的按社会经济群体划分的同质性。社会经济差异与厕所拥有率和劳动力参与率相关。

papers.title: The Geopolitics of International Trade in Southeast Asia
papers.authors: Kerem Coşar, Benjamin D. Thomas
papers.abstract: Motivated by the historically tense geopolitical situation in Southeast Asia, we simulate the potential closure of key maritime waterways in the region to predict the impact on trade and welfare. We generate initial (unobstructed) and counterfactual (rerouted) least-cost maritime paths between trading countries, and use the distances of these routes in a workhorse model of international trade to estimate welfare effects. We find heterogeneous and economically significant reductions in real GDP, and show the magnitude of welfare loss is directly correlated with military spending as a proportion of GDP, suggesting nations may be responding to economic security threats posed by such potential conflicts.
papers.zh_title: 东南亚国际贸易的地缘政治
papers.zh_abstract: 受东南亚历史上紧张的地缘政治局势启发，我们模拟了该地区关键海上航道可能关闭的情景，以预测对贸易和福利的影响。我们生成了贸易国之间初始（无阻碍）和反事实（改道）的最低成本海上路径，并利用这些路径的距离，在一个国际贸易的经典模型中估算福利效应。我们发现实际GDP出现异质性且经济上显著的下降，并表明福利损失的大小与军费支出占GDP的比例直接相关，这表明各国可能正在应对此类潜在冲突所带来的经济安全威胁。

papers.title: Dog Eat Dog: Measuring Network Effects Using a Digital Platform Merger
papers.authors: Chiara Farronato, Jessica Fong, Andrey Fradkin
papers.abstract: Digital platforms are increasingly the subject of regulatory scrutiny. In comparison to multiple competitors, a single platform may increase consumer welfare if network effects are large or may decrease welfare due to higher prices or reduction in platform variety. We study the net effect of this trade-off in the context of the merger between the two largest platforms for pet-sitting services. We exploit variation in pre-merger market shares and a difference-in-differences approach to causally estimate network effects at the platform and market level. We find that consumers are, on average, not substantially better off with a single combined platform than with two separate and competing platforms. On one hand, users of the acquiring platform benefited from the merger because of network effects. On the other hand, users of the acquired platform experienced worse outcomes. Our results highlight the importance of platform differentiation even when platforms enjoy network effects.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D22, D43, L12, L41, L81, M21
papers.zh_title: 狗咬狗：利用数字平台合并衡量网络效应
papers.zh_abstract: 数字平台正日益受到监管审查。与多个竞争对手相比，如果网络效应很大，单一平台可能会增加消费者福利，也可能因价格提高或平台种类减少而降低福利。我们以两个最大的宠物看护服务平台合并为背景，研究了这种权衡的净效应。我们利用合并前市场份额的差异，并采用双重差分法，在平台和市场层面因果性地估计了网络效应。我们发现，平均而言，消费者在单一合并平台下的状况并不比在两个独立且相互竞争的平台下好多少。一方面，由于网络效应，收购平台的用户从合并中受益。另一方面，被收购平台的用户经历了更差的结果。我们的结果强调了即使平台享有网络效应，平台差异化的重要性。

papers.title: Comprehensive Approaches to Increasing Student Completion in Higher Education: A Survey of the Landscape
papers.authors: Rachel Fulcher Dawson, Melissa S. Kearney, James X. Sullivan
papers.abstract: We describe the challenge of college non-completion in the U.S. and a variety of explanations for the high rate of non-completion. We then provide an overview of the implementation of and evidence from eight specific college completion interventions designed to increase college completion rates through a comprehensive set of services. The eight interventions that we review have all been implemented in the past decade and have been evaluated through randomized controlled trials (RCT). After we describe the eight featured programs and the evidence on their effectiveness, we discuss the potential to replicate these programs and deliver them at scale. Finally, we offer some recommendations for future research, with the goal of establishing a body of practical evidence for organizations and policymakers to learn from as they work to address the college completion crisis.
papers.zh_title: 提高高等教育学生完成率的综合方法：全景调查
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了美国大学未完成学业的挑战以及高辍学率的多种解释。然后，我们概述了八项旨在通过一揽子综合服务来提高大学毕业率的特定干预措施的实施情况和相关证据。我们回顾的这八项干预措施均在过去十年中实施，并通过随机对照试验进行了评估。在描述了这八个重点项目及其有效性证据之后，我们讨论了复制这些项目并大规模推广的潜力。最后，我们为未来研究提出了一些建议，旨在为组织和政策制定者建立一个可供借鉴的实用证据体系，以帮助他们应对大学完成率危机。

papers.title: A Generalizable and Accessible Approach to Machine Learning with Global Satellite Imagery
papers.authors: Esther Rolf, Jonathan Proctor, Tamma Carleton, Ian Bolliger, Vaishaal Shankar, Miyabi Ishihara, Benjamin Recht, Solomon Hsiang
papers.abstract: Combining satellite imagery with machine learning (SIML) has the potential to address global challenges by remotely estimating socioeconomic and environmental conditions in data-poor regions, yet the resource requirements of SIML limit its accessibility and use. We show that a single encoding of satellite imagery can generalize across diverse prediction tasks (e.g. forest cover, house price, road length). Our method achieves accuracy competitive with deep neural networks at orders of magnitude lower computational cost, scales globally, delivers label super-resolution predictions, and facilitates characterizations of uncertainty. Since image encodings are shared across tasks, they can be centrally computed and distributed to unlimited researchers, who need only fit a linear regression to their own ground truth data in order to achieve state-of-the-art SIML performance.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, PE；JEL：C02, C8, O13, O18, Q5, R1
papers.zh_title: 基于全球卫星影像的机器学习通用且可及的方法
papers.zh_abstract: 将卫星影像与机器学习相结合（SIML）有望通过远程估算数据匮乏地区的社会经济和环境状况来应对全球性挑战，然而SIML的资源需求限制了其可及性和应用。我们证明，单一卫星影像编码能够泛化应用于多种不同的预测任务（例如森林覆盖、房价、道路长度）。我们的方法在计算成本降低数个数量级的情况下，实现了与深度神经网络相媲美的准确性，可全球规模化应用，提供标签超分辨率预测，并有助于不确定性表征。由于影像编码在不同任务间共享，它们可以集中计算并分发给无限数量的研究人员，这些研究人员只需将自己的真实数据拟合线性回归，即可达到最先进的SIML性能。

papers.title: Sizing up Corporate Restructuring in the COVID Crisis
papers.authors: Robin Greenwood, Benjamin Iverson, David Thesmar
papers.abstract: In the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic, the financial and legal system will need to deal with a surge of financial distress in the business sector. Some firms will be able to survive, while others will face bankruptcy and thus need to be liquidated or reorganized. Many surviving firms will need to be downsized or acquired. In normal times, this triage is supported by the court system, banks, and financial markets. The goal of this paper is to size up the coming surge of financial distress, list the challenges it presents in the current environment, and analyze potential policy solutions. Overall, our analysis suggests that the two key issues will be court congestion and excess liquidation and failure of small firms.
papers.zh_title: 评估新冠疫情危机中的企业重组规模
papers.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情之后，金融和法律体系将需要应对企业部门激增的财务困境。一些企业将能够生存，而另一些则将面临破产，因此需要清算或重组。许多幸存的企业将需要缩减规模或被收购。在正常情况下，这种分类工作由法院系统、银行和金融市场支持。本文的目标是评估即将到来的财务困境浪潮的规模，列出其在当前环境下带来的挑战，并分析潜在的政策解决方案。总体而言，我们的分析表明，两个关键问题将是法院拥堵以及小企业的过度清算和倒闭。

papers.title: Ratings-Driven Demand and Systematic Price Fluctuations
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Jiacui Li, Andrea Rossi, Yang Song
papers.abstract: We show that mutual fund ratings generate correlated demand that creates systematic price fluctuations. Mutual fund investors chase fund performance via Morningstar ratings. Until June 2002, funds pursuing the same investment style had highly correlated ratings. Therefore, rating-chasing investors directed capital into winning styles, generating style-level price pressures, which reverted over time. In June 2002, Morningstar reformed its methodology of equalizing ratings across styles. Style-level correlated demand via mutual funds immediately became muted, significantly altering the time-series and cross-sectional variation in style returns.
papers.zh_title: 评级驱动的需求与系统性价格波动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，共同基金评级会产生相关需求，从而造成系统性价格波动。共同基金投资者通过晨星评级追逐基金业绩。直到2002年6月，采用相同投资风格的基金具有高度相关的评级。因此，追逐评级的投资者将资本引导至表现优异的风格，产生风格层面的价格压力，这种压力会随时间逆转。2002年6月，晨星改革了其跨风格均衡评级的方法。通过共同基金产生的风格层面相关需求立即减弱，显著改变了风格回报的时间序列和横截面变化。

papers.title: Volatility Expectations and Returns
papers.authors: Lars A. Lochstoer, Tyler Muir
papers.abstract: We provide evidence that agents have slow-moving beliefs about stock market volatility that lead to initial underreaction to volatility shocks followed by delayed overreaction. These dynamics are mirrored in the VIX and variance risk premiums which reflect investor expectations about volatility and are also supported in surveys and in firm-level option prices. We embed these expectations into an asset pricing model and find that the model can account for a number of stylized facts about market returns and return volatility which are difficult to reconcile, including a weak, or even negative, risk-return tradeoff.
papers.zh_title: 波动率预期与回报
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了证据，表明经济主体对股市波动率具有缓慢变化的信念，这导致对波动率冲击最初反应不足，随后反应过度。这些动态反映在VIX指数和方差风险溢价中，它们反映了投资者对波动率的预期，并在调查和公司层面的期权价格中得到支持。我们将这些预期嵌入到一个资产定价模型中，发现该模型可以解释关于市场回报和回报波动率的一系列难以调和的典型事实，包括一个微弱甚至负向的风险-回报权衡。

papers.title: The Antebellum Roots of Distinctively Black Names
papers.authors: Trevon Logan, Lisa D. Cook, John Parman
papers.abstract: This paper explores the existence of distinctively Black names in the antebellum era. Building on recent research that documents the existence of a national naming pattern for African American males in the late nineteenth and early twentieth centuries (Cook, Logan and Parman 2014), we analyze three distinct and novel antebellum data sources and uncover three stylized facts. First, the Black names identified by Cook, Logan and Parman using post-Civil War data are common names among Blacks before Emancipation. Second, these same Black names are racially distinctive in the antebellum period. Third, the racial distinctiveness of the names increases from the early 1800s to the time of the Civil War. Taken together, these facts provide support for the claim that Black naming patterns existed in the antebellum era and that racial distinctiveness in naming patterns was an established practice well before Emancipation. These findings further challenge the view that Black names are a product of twentieth century phenomena such as the Civil Rights Movement.
papers.zh_title: 内战前独特黑人姓名的根源
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了内战前时期是否存在独特的黑人姓名。基于近期研究（Cook, Logan and Parman 2014）所记录的19世纪末20世纪初非裔美国男性存在全国性命名模式这一发现，我们分析了三个不同的、新颖的内战前数据来源，并揭示了三个典型化事实。第一，Cook、Logan和Parman利用内战后数据所识别的黑人姓名，在解放前黑人群体中已是常见姓名。第二，这些相同的黑人姓名在内战前时期具有种族独特性。第三，这些姓名的种族独特性从19世纪初到内战时期不断增强。综合来看，这些事实支持了以下论断：黑人命名模式在内战前时期就已存在，且命名模式中的种族独特性在解放前早已是既定实践。这些发现进一步挑战了黑人姓名是20世纪现象（如民权运动）产物的观点。

papers.title: Search and Information Frictions on Global E-Commerce Platforms: Evidence from AliExpress
papers.authors: Jie Bai, Maggie Chen, Jin Liu, Xiaosheng Mu, Daniel Yi Xu
papers.abstract: We study how search and information frictions shape market dynamics in global e-commerce. Observational data and self-collected quality measures from AliExpress establish the existence of search and information frictions. A randomized experiment that offers new exporters exogenous demand and information shocks demonstrates the potential role of sales accumulation in enhancing seller visibility and overcoming these demand frictions. However, we show theoretically and quantitatively that this demand-reinforcement mechanism is undermined by the large number of online exporters. Our structural model rationalizes the experimental findings and quantifies efficiency gains from reducing the number of inactive sellers.
papers.zh_title: 全球电商平台上的搜索与信息摩擦：来自速卖通的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了搜索摩擦和信息摩擦如何塑造全球电子商务中的市场动态。来自速卖通的观测数据和自行收集的质量度量证实了搜索摩擦和信息摩擦的存在。一项随机实验为新的出口商提供了外生的需求冲击和信息冲击，展示了销售积累在提升卖家可见度并克服这些需求摩擦方面的潜在作用。然而，我们在理论上和定量上表明，这种需求强化机制因在线出口商数量庞大而受到削弱。我们的结构模型使实验结果合理化，并量化了减少非活跃卖家数量所带来的效率提升。

papers.title: Social Positions and Fairness Views on Inequality
papers.authors: Kristoffer B. Hvidberg, Claus Kreiner, Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: We link survey data on Danish people's perceived income positions and fairness views on inequality within various reference groups to administrative records on their reference groups, income histories, and life events. People are, on average, well- informed about the income levels of their reference groups. Yet, lower-ranked respondents in all groups tend to overestimate their own position among others because they believe others' incomes are lower than is the case, while the opposite holds for higher- ranked respondents. Misperceptions of positions in reference groups relate to proximity to other individuals, transparency norms, and visible signals of income. People view inequalities within their co-workers and education groups as significantly more unfair than overall inequality, yet underestimate inequality the most exactly within these groups. Views on the fairness of inequalities are strongly correlated with an individual's current position, move with shocks like unemployment or promotions, and change when experimentally showing people their actual positions. However, the higher perceived unfairness of income differences within co-workers and education groups stays unchanged. The theoretical framework shows that this can have important implications for redistribution policy.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, POL；JEL：D1, D63, D8, H20, H31
papers.zh_title: 社会地位与对不平等公平性的看法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将丹麦人关于其感知收入地位及对不同参照组内不平等公平性看法的调查数据，与这些参照组、收入历史和生活事件的行政记录联系起来。平均而言，人们对其参照组的收入水平了解充分。然而，在所有群体中，地位较低的受访者倾向于高估自己在他人中的位置，因为他们认为他人的收入低于实际情况，而地位较高的受访者则相反。对参照组内地位的认知偏差与个体间的接近程度、透明度规范以及收入的可见信号有关。人们认为同事群体和教育群体内部的不平等比总体不平等更不公平，但恰恰在这些群体内，他们对不平等的低估最为严重。对不平等公平性的看法与个人当前地位密切相关，会随失业或晋升等冲击而变动，并在实验性地向人们展示其实际地位时发生改变。然而，对同事和教育群体内收入差异更高程度的不公平感知保持不变。理论框架表明，这对再分配政策可能具有重要含义。

papers.title: Designing, not Checking, for Policy Robustness: An Example with Optimal Taxation
papers.authors: Benjamin Lockwood, Afras Y. Sial, Matthew C. Weinzierl
papers.abstract: Economists typically check the robustness of their results by comparing them across plausible ranges of parameter values and model structures. A preferable approach to robustness—for the purposes of policymaking and evaluation—is to design policy that takes these ranges into account. We modify the standard optimal income tax model to include the policymaker’s subjective uncertainty over parameter values, and we characterize robust optimal policy as that which maximizes expected social welfare. After calibrating uncertainty over the elasticity of taxable income from past empirical work and novel survey data on economists’ beliefs, we compare the implied robust optimal marginal tax rates to the alternative benchmark policy based on the best point estimates of relevant parameters. Our results suggest that robust optimal marginal tax rates are typically more progressive than in benchmark analyses, raising top marginal tax rates by between 5 and 7 percentage points, and generating modest expected welfare gains.
papers.zh_title: 为政策稳健性而设计，而非检验：以最优税收为例
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学家通常通过比较参数值和模型结构在合理范围内的结果来检验其结论的稳健性。出于政策制定和评估的目的，一种更优的稳健性方法是设计能够考虑这些范围的政策。我们修改了标准的最优所得税模型，纳入了政策制定者对参数值的主观不确定性，并将稳健的最优政策描述为最大化预期社会福利的政策。在根据过去实证工作和对经济学家信念的新调查数据校准了应税收入弹性的不确定性后，我们将由此得出的稳健最优边际税率与基于相关参数最佳点估计的替代基准政策进行了比较。我们的结果表明，稳健的最优边际税率通常比基准分析更具累进性，将最高边际税率提高了5到7个百分点，并产生了适度的预期福利收益。

papers.title: How New Fed Corporate Bond Programs Dampened the Financial Accelerator in the Covid-19 Recession
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, John V. Duca
papers.abstract: In the financial crisis and recession induced by the Covid-19 pandemic, many investment-grade firms became unable to borrow from securities markets. In response, the Fed not only reopened its commercial paper funding facility but also announced it would purchase newly issued and seasoned bonds of corporations rated as investment grade before the Covid pandemic at spreads roughly 1 percentage point above non-recession averages. A careful splicing of different unemployment rate series enables us to assess the effectiveness of recent Fed interventions in these long-term debt markets over long sample periods, spanning the Great Depression, Great Recession and the Covid Recession. Findings indicate that the announcement of forthcoming corporate bond backstop facilities have capped risk premia at levels 100 basis points above non-recession averages, akin to a “penalty rate” for lender of last resort interventions during financial crises. In doing so, these Fed facilities have limited the role of external finance premia in amplifying the macroeconomic impact of the Covid pandemic. Nevertheless, the corporate bond programs blend the roles of the Federal Reserve in conducting monetary policy via its balance sheet, acting as a lender of last resort, and pursuing credit policies.
papers.zh_title: 美联储新公司债券计划如何在新冠疫情衰退中抑制金融加速器
papers.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情引发的金融危机和衰退中，许多投资级公司无法从证券市场借款。作为回应，美联储不仅重新开放了其商业票据融资便利，还宣布将购买在新冠疫情前被评为投资级的公司新发行和已发行的债券，其利差大约比非衰退时期的平均水平高出1个百分点。通过对不同失业率序列的仔细拼接，我们能够评估近期美联储在这些长期债务市场干预措施的有效性，覆盖了大萧条、大衰退和新冠疫情衰退等长样本期。研究结果表明，即将推出的公司债券支持便利的公告已将风险溢价限制在比非衰退平均水平高出100个基点的水平，类似于金融危机中最后贷款人干预的“惩罚性利率”。通过这种方式，这些美联储便利限制了外部融资溢价在放大新冠疫情宏观经济影响中的作用。然而，公司债券计划融合了美联储通过其资产负债表实施货币政策、充当最后贷款人以及执行信贷政策的角色。

papers.title: Foreign Currency Borrowing of Corporations as Carry Trades: Evidence from India
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Siddharth Vij
papers.abstract: We establish that macroprudential policies limiting capital flows can curb risks arising from corporate foreign currency borrowing in emerging markets. Using detailed firm-level data from India, we show that propensity to issue foreign currency debt for the same firm is higher when the difference in short-term interest rates between India and the US is higher, i.e., when the dollar ‘carry trade’ is more profitable; this behavior is driven by the period after the global financial crisis. The positive relationship between issuance and the ‘carry trade’ breaks down once regulators institute more stringent interest-rate caps on foreign currency borrowing. Riskier borrowers such as importers and those with higher interest costs cut issuance most. Firm equity exposure to foreign exchange risk rose after issuance in favorable funding conditions and emerged as a source of external sector vulnerability during the ‘taper tantrum’ of 2013. Macroprudential policy action limiting capital flows is able to nullify this effect, such as during the market stress due to the COVID-19 pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 企业外币借款作为套利交易：来自印度的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证实，限制资本流动的宏观审慎政策可以遏制新兴市场企业外币借款带来的风险。利用印度详细的公司层面数据，我们表明，当印度与美国短期利率差异较大时，即美元“套利交易”更有利可图时，同一公司发行外币债务的倾向更高；这种行为在全球金融危机后尤为明显。一旦监管机构对外币借款实施更严格的利率上限，发行与“套利交易”之间的正相关关系就会瓦解。风险较高的借款人，如进口商和利息成本较高的公司，削减发行的幅度最大。在有利融资条件下发行后，公司股权对外汇风险的敞口增加，并在2013年的“缩减恐慌”期间成为外部部门脆弱性的一个来源。限制资本流动的宏观审慎政策行动能够消除这种影响，例如在新冠疫情导致的市场压力期间。

papers.title: Building an Epidemiology of Happiness
papers.authors: John F. Helliwell, David Gyarmati, Craig Joyce, Heather Orpana
papers.abstract: Starting from the assumption that improving well-being is the central consideration for public policies, we show how subjective well-being research can help, and already is helping, to choose public policies based on their consequences for all aspects of life. The core of the paper lies in examples where the methods we propose, often in systematic experimental contexts, have already been used to guide the evaluation and ranking of alternative policy options in public health, education, workplace training, and social welfare. The arrival of COVID-19 has increased the urgency for a well-being focus, since the policy decisions being faced by governments dealing with the pandemic require an approach much broader than provided by more typical policy evaluations in all disciplines, including especially the social context and the distribution of costs and consequences. A broader approach to policy design and choice is fully consistent with the underlying aims of epidemiology, with similar gains likely in other policy disciplines. A focus on subjective well-being as an umbrella measure of welfare might help to restore to economics the breadth of purpose and methods it had two centuries ago, when happiness was considered the appropriate goal for private actions and public policies.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：H12, H51, I14, I18, I31
papers.zh_title: 构建幸福流行病学
papers.zh_abstract: 基于改善福祉是公共政策核心考量这一假设，我们展示了主观幸福感研究如何能够、并且已经在帮助根据政策对生活各方面的影响来选择公共政策。本文的核心在于举例说明，我们提出的方法（通常是在系统的实验背景下）已被用于指导公共卫生、教育、职场培训和社会福利等领域替代政策方案的评估和排序。新冠疫情的到来增加了对福祉关注的紧迫性，因为政府应对疫情所面临的政策决策需要一种比所有学科（尤其是包括社会背景以及成本和后果的分配）中更典型的政策评估更为广泛的方法。一种更广泛的政策设计和选择方法与流行病学的根本目标完全一致，并且可能在其他政策学科中带来类似的收益。将主观幸福感作为福利的总体衡量指标，可能有助于恢复经济学在两个世纪前所具有的广泛目的和方法，当时幸福被视为私人行动和公共政策的适当目标。

papers.title: Twisting the Demand Curve: Digitalization and the Older Workforce
papers.authors: Erling Barth, James C. Davis, Richard B. Freeman, Kristina McElheran
papers.abstract: This paper uses U.S. Census Bureau panel data that link firm software investment to worker earnings. We regress the log of earnings of workers by age group on the software investment by their employing firm. To unpack the potential causal factors for differential software effects by age group we extend the AKM framework by including job-spell fixed effects that allow for a correlation between the worker-firm match and age and by including time-varying firm effects that allow for a correlation between wage-enhancing productivity shocks and software investments. Within job-spell, software capital raises earnings at a rate that declines post age 50 to about zero after age 65. By contrast, the effects of non-IT equipment investment on earnings increase for workers post age 50. The difference between the software and non-IT equipment effects suggests that our results are attributable to the technology rather than to age-related bargaining power. Our data further show that software capital increases the earnings of high-wage workers relative to low-wage workers and the earnings in high-wage firms relative to low-wage firms, and may thus widen earnings inequality within and across firms.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS；JEL：J0, J01, J11, J2, O0, O32, O33
papers.zh_title: 扭曲需求曲线：数字化与老年劳动力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用美国人口普查局的面板数据，将企业软件投资与工人收入联系起来。我们按年龄组对工人收入的对数进行回归，自变量为其受雇企业的软件投资。为了揭示不同年龄组软件效应差异的潜在因果因素，我们扩展了AKM框架，加入了允许工人-企业匹配与年龄相关的工作任期固定效应，以及允许工资提升的生产率冲击与软件投资相关的时间变化的企业效应。在工作任期内，软件资本会提高收入，但其提高率在50岁后下降，到65岁后降至接近零。相比之下，非IT设备投资对收入的影响在50岁后反而增加。软件与非IT设备效应的差异表明，我们的结果可归因于技术本身，而非与年龄相关的议价能力。我们的数据进一步显示，软件资本提高了高工资工人相对于低工资工人的收入，以及高工资企业相对于低工资企业的收入，因此可能加剧企业内部和企业间的收入不平等。

papers.title: Maximize Utility subject to R≤1: A Simple Price-Theory Approach to Covid-19 Lockdown and Reopening Policy
papers.authors: Eric Budish
papers.abstract: This paper presents a simple price-theory approach to Covid-19 lockdown and reopening policy. The key idea is to conceptualize R ≤ 1 as a constraint, allowing traditional economic and societal goals to be the policy objective, all within a simple static optimization framework. This approach yields two main insights. First, the R ≤ 1 constraint imposes a disease-transmission budget on society. Society should optimally spend this budget on the activities with the highest ratio of utility to disease-transmission risk, dropping activities with too low a ratio of utility to risk. Second, masks, tests, and other simple interventions increase activities' utility-to-risk ratios, and hence expand how much activity society can engage in and utility society can achieve while staying within the R ≤ 1 budget. A simple numerical example, based on estimates from the medical literature for R0 and the efficacy of facemasks and complementary measures, suggests the potential gains are enormous. Overall, the formulation provides economics language for a policy middle ground between society-wide lockdown and ignore-the-virus, and a new infectious threat response paradigm alongside “eradicate” and “minimize”.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IO, LE, PE, TWP；JEL：C61, D47, D6, D7, E6, H12, I1, I18, L51
papers.zh_title: 在R≤1约束下最大化效用：新冠封锁与重启政策的简单价格理论方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种针对新冠封锁与重启政策的简单价格理论方法。核心思想是将R≤1概念化为一个约束条件，使传统经济和社会目标成为政策目标，所有分析均在一个简单的静态优化框架内进行。该方法得出两个主要见解。首先，R≤1约束为社会设定了一个疾病传播预算。社会应最优地将这一预算分配给效用与疾病传播风险比率最高的活动，并放弃那些效用与风险比率过低的活动。其次，口罩、检测及其他简单干预措施提高了活动的效用-风险比，从而在遵守R≤1预算的前提下，扩大了社会可参与的活动范围及可实现的效用。基于医学文献中关于R0以及口罩和补充措施有效性的估算，一个简单的数值示例表明潜在收益巨大。总体而言，该框架为介于全社会封锁与忽视病毒之间的政策中间地带提供了经济学语言，并提出了一个与“根除”和“最小化”并列的新型传染病威胁应对范式。

papers.title: Aggregate and Distributional Impacts of LTV Policy in China
papers.authors: Kaiji Chen, Qing Wang, Tong Xu, Tao Zha
papers.abstract: We study how China’s loan-to-value (LTV) policy affects mortgage markets and household consumption, focusing on an abrupt and unprecedented relaxation in LTV limits for secondary houses from 2014Q4 to 2016Q3. Using a rich dataset of over three million loan-level records from a major Chinese commercial bank, supplemented by survey data on urban household finances, we analyze how this policy shift influenced mortgage demand, house prices, and consumption across household groups and at the aggregate level. We find that this LTV relaxation, aimed at promoting housing investments, spurred a mortgage boom, especially in primary home mortgages, while crowding out household consumption among middle-aged, high-education households. Motivated by these findings, we develop and calibrate a dynamic equilibrium model that distinguishes between primary homes for housing services and secondary houses for investment. When the LTV limit for secondary houses is relaxed, demand for these properties surges, increasing house prices and capital gains. Unlike prior literature, we identify a housing investment channel in which these capital gains enable existing homeowners---particularly middle-aged and high-income households---to upsize their primary residences. Rising house prices then drive further demand and mortgage borrowing, amplifying the effects of the LTV policy change and reducing these households' non-housing consumption.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E02, E21, E50, G11, G12, G18
papers.zh_title: 中国贷款价值比政策的总体与分配效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究中国的贷款价值比政策如何影响抵押贷款市场和家庭消费，重点关注2014年第四季度至2016年第三季度期间二手房贷款价值比上限的突然且前所未有的放松。利用来自一家主要中国商业银行超过三百万笔贷款记录的丰富数据集，并辅以城市家庭金融调查数据，我们分析了这一政策转变如何影响不同家庭群体以及总体层面的抵押贷款需求、房价和消费。我们发现，这项旨在促进住房投资的贷款价值比放松政策，引发了抵押贷款热潮，尤其是首套房抵押贷款，同时挤出了中年、高学历家庭的消费。受这些发现启发，我们构建并校准了一个动态均衡模型，该模型区分了提供住房服务的首套房和用于投资的二手房。当二手房贷款价值比上限放松时，对这些房产的需求激增，推高了房价和资本收益。与以往文献不同，我们识别出一个住房投资渠道：这些资本收益使现有房主——尤其是中年和高收入家庭——能够扩大其首套住房面积。房价上涨进而推动进一步的需求和抵押贷款借贷，放大了贷款价值比政策变化的影响，并减少了这些家庭的非住房消费。

papers.title: Choice Screen Auctions
papers.authors: Michael Ostrovsky
papers.abstract: Choice screen auctions have been recently deployed in 31 European countries, allowing consumers to choose their preferred search engine on Google's Android platform instead of being automatically defaulted to Google's own search engine. I show that a seemingly minor detail in the design of these auctions—whether they are conducted on a “per appearance” or a “per install” basis—plays a major role in the mix and characteristics of auction winners, and, consequently, in their expected overall market share. I also show that “per install” auctions distort the incentives of alternative search engines toward extracting as much revenue as possible from each user who installs them, at the expense of lowering the expected number of such users. The distortion becomes worse as the auction gets more competitive and the number of bidders increases. Empirical evidence from Android choice screen auctions conducted in 2020 is consistent with my theoretical results.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PR；JEL：C72, D44, D47, K21, L40, L50, L86
papers.zh_title: 选择屏幕拍卖
papers.zh_abstract: 选择屏幕拍卖近期已在31个欧洲国家部署，允许消费者在谷歌的安卓平台上选择他们偏好的搜索引擎，而非被自动默认设置为谷歌自己的搜索引擎。我表明，这些拍卖设计中的一个看似微小的细节——即它们是按“每次展示”还是按“每次安装”进行——对拍卖获胜者的组合和特征，以及进而对其预期的总体市场份额起着重要作用。我还表明，“按每次安装”拍卖会扭曲替代搜索引擎的激励，使其倾向于从每个安装其服务的用户那里榨取尽可能多的收入，而这以降低此类用户的预期数量为代价。随着拍卖竞争加剧和竞标者数量增加，这种扭曲会变得更严重。来自2020年安卓选择屏幕拍卖的实证证据与我的理论结果一致。

papers.title: Dynamic General Equilibrium Modeling of Long and Short-Run Historical Events
papers.authors: Gary D. Hansen, Lee E. Ohanian, Fatih Ozturk
papers.abstract: We provide quantitative analyses of two striking historical episodes, the timing of the Industrial Revolution in England, and the sources of U.S. economic fluctuations between 1889-1929. Applying data from 1245-1845 within the “Malthus to Solow” framework shows that the timing of the Industrial Revolution reflects a subtle interplay between large changes in TFP and deaths from plagues. We find that U.S. economic fluctuations, including the Panics of 1893 and 1907, were driven primarily by volatile TFP, and that growth during the “Roaring Twenties” should have been even stronger, reflecting a large labor wedge that emerged around World War I.
papers.zh_title: 长短期历史事件的动态一般均衡建模
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了两个引人注目的历史事件的定量分析：英国工业革命的时间节点，以及1889年至1929年间美国经济波动的根源。将1245年至1845年的数据应用于“从马尔萨斯到索洛”框架中表明，工业革命的时间节点反映了全要素生产率的巨大变化与瘟疫导致的死亡人数之间微妙的相互作用。我们发现，美国的经济波动，包括1893年和1907年的恐慌，主要是由波动的全要素生产率驱动的，并且“咆哮的二十年代”期间的增长本应更加强劲，这反映了一次世界大战前后出现的巨大劳动楔子。

papers.title: Propagation and Insurance in Village Networks
papers.authors: Cynthia Kinnan, Krislert Samphantharak, Robert Townsend, Diego A. Vera Cossio
papers.abstract: Firms in developing countries are embedded in supply chains and labor networks. These linkages may propagate or attenuate shocks. Using panel data from Thai villages, we document three facts: as households facing idiosyncratic shocks adjust their production, these shocks propagate to other households on both the production and consumption sides; propagation is greater via labor than supply chain links; and shocks in denser networks and to more central households propagate more, while access to formal or informal insurance reduces propagation. Social benefits from expanding safety nets may be higher than private benefits.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PR；JEL：D13, D22, I15, O1, Q12
papers.zh_title: 村庄网络中的传播与保险
papers.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的企业嵌入在供应链和劳动力网络中。这些联系可能传播或减弱冲击。利用泰国村庄的面板数据，我们记录了三个事实：当面临异质性冲击的家庭调整其生产时，这些冲击会通过生产和消费两侧传播给其他家庭；通过劳动力联系的传播大于通过供应链联系的传播；在更密集网络中的冲击以及针对更核心家庭的冲击传播得更广，而获得正式或非正式保险则会减少传播。扩大安全网的社会效益可能高于私人效益。

papers.title: Going-Concern Debt of Financial Intermediaries
papers.authors: Yueran Ma, José A. Scheinkman
papers.abstract: We study asset and debt characteristics of US bank holding companies. We show that financial institutions, especially large institutions, are not just about holding discrete assets. Services and going-concern values are important, and capital market debt against going-concern values accounts for 10% to 15% of total assets, comparable to the volume of capital market debt against discrete assets. We find that financial institutions’ debt against going-concern values has weak monitoring, relative to similar debt among non-financial firms. We argue that weak monitoring prevails because creditors cannot easily punish or restructure these institutions should they violate covenants, which limits covenants’ usefulness.
papers.zh_title: 金融中介的持续经营债务
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究美国银行控股公司的资产和债务特征。我们表明，金融机构，尤其是大型机构，并不仅仅关乎持有离散资产。服务和持续经营价值很重要，而针对持续经营价值的资本市场债务占总资产的10%至15%，与针对离散资产的资本市场债务规模相当。我们发现，与非金融企业的类似债务相比，金融机构针对持续经营价值的债务受到的监督较弱。我们认为，弱监督之所以普遍存在，是因为债权人无法在机构违反契约时轻易地惩罚或重组这些机构，这限制了契约的有用性。

papers.title: Trade Integration, Global Value Chains, and Capital Accumulation
papers.authors: Michael Sposi, Kei-Mu Yi, Jing Zhang
papers.abstract: Motivated by increasing trade and fragmentation of production across countries, accompanied by income convergence by many emerging economies, we build a dynamic two-country model featuring sequential, multi-stage production and capital accumulation. As trade costs decline over time, global-value-chain (GVC) trade expands across countries, particularly more in the faster growing country, consistent with the empirical pattern. Via Heckscher-Ohlin forces, GVC trade can generate back-and-forth feedback between comparative advantage and capital accumulation (growth). Moreover, GVC trade increases both steady-state and dynamic gains from trade.
papers.zh_title: 贸易一体化、全球价值链与资本积累
papers.zh_abstract: 受各国间贸易增长和生产碎片化以及许多新兴经济体收入趋同的启发，我们构建了一个具有序贯多阶段生产和资本积累的动态两国模型。随着贸易成本随时间下降，全球价值链贸易在各国间扩张，尤其是在增长较快的国家扩张得更快，这与实证模式一致。通过赫克歇尔-俄林力量，全球价值链贸易可以在比较优势和资本积累（增长）之间产生来回反馈。此外，全球价值链贸易增加了贸易的稳态收益和动态收益。

papers.title: Can Nudges Increase Take-up of the EITC?: Evidence from Multiple Field Experiments
papers.authors: Elizabeth Linos, Allen Prohofsky, Aparna Ramesh, Jesse Rothstein, Matt Unrath
papers.abstract: The Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) distributes more than $60 billion to over 20 million low-income families annually. Nevertheless, an estimated one-fifth of eligible households do not claim it. We ran six pre-registered, large-scale field experiments to test whether “nudges” could increase EITC take-up (N=1million). Despite varying the content, design, messenger, and mode of our messages, we find no evidence that they affected households’ likelihood of filing a tax return or claiming the credit. We conclude that even the most behaviorally informed low-touch outreach efforts cannot overcome the barriers faced by low-income households who do not file returns.
papers.zh_title: 助推能否提高劳动所得税抵免的领取率？来自多项现场实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动所得税抵免每年向超过2000万低收入家庭发放超过600亿美元。然而，估计有五分之一符合条件的家庭未申领该抵免。我们进行了六项预先注册的大规模现场实验，以测试“助推”能否提高劳动所得税抵免的领取率（样本量N=100万）。尽管我们改变了信息的内容、设计、发送者和发送方式，但我们没有发现任何证据表明它们影响了家庭提交纳税申报表或申领抵免的可能性。我们得出结论，即使是基于行为科学的最精心设计的低接触外联努力，也无法克服那些不提交纳税申报表的低收入家庭所面临的障碍。

papers.title: Optimal Vaccine Subsidies for Endemic and Epidemic Diseases
papers.authors: Matthew Goodkin-Gold, Michael Kremer, Christopher M. Snyder, Heidi L. Williams
papers.abstract: Vaccines exert a positive externality, reducing spread of disease from the consumer to others, providing a rationale for subsidies. We study how optimal subsidies vary with disease characteristics by integrating a standard epidemiological model into a vaccine market with rational economic agents. In the steady-state equilibrium for an endemic disease, across market structures ranging from competition to monopoly, the marginal externality and optimal subsidy are non-monotonic in disease infectiousness, peaking for diseases that spread quickly but not so quickly as to drive all consumers to become vaccinated.\nMotivated by the Covid-19 pandemic, we adapt the analysis to study a vaccine campaign introduced at a point in time against an emerging epidemic. While the nonmonotonic pattern of the optimal subsidy persists, new findings emerge. Universal vaccination with a perfectly effective vaccine becomes a viable firm strategy: the marginal consumer is still willing to pay since those infected before vaccine rollout remain a source of transmission. We derive a simple condition under which vaccination exhibits increasing social returns, providing an argument for concentrating a capacity-constrained campaign in few regions. We discuss a variety of extensions and calibrations of the results to vaccines and other mitigation measures targeting existing diseases.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, LE, PE, PR；JEL：D4, I18, L11, L65, O31
papers.zh_title: 地方病与流行病的最优疫苗补贴
papers.zh_abstract: 疫苗具有正外部性，能减少疾病从消费者向他人传播，这为补贴提供了理论依据。我们通过将标准流行病学模型整合到理性经济主体的疫苗市场中，研究最优补贴如何随疾病特征变化。在地方病的稳态均衡中，从竞争到垄断的市场结构下，边际外部性和最优补贴与疾病传染性呈非单调关系，在那些传播迅速但尚未快至促使所有消费者接种疫苗的疾病中达到峰值。受新冠疫情启发，我们调整分析以研究针对新兴流行病在某一时间点推出的疫苗接种活动。虽然最优补贴的非单调模式依然存在，但出现了新发现。使用完全有效疫苗的全民接种成为可行的企业策略：边际消费者仍愿意支付，因为疫苗推出前已感染者仍是传播源。我们推导出一个简单条件，在此条件下疫苗接种表现出递增的社会回报，这为将产能受限的活动集中在少数地区提供了论据。我们讨论了多种扩展，并将结果校准到针对现有疾病的疫苗及其他缓解措施。

papers.title: Wages, Hires, and Labor Market Concentration
papers.authors: Ioana Marinescu, Ivan Ouss, Louis-Daniel Pape
papers.abstract: How does employer market power affect workers? We compute the concentration of new hires by occupation and commuting zone in France using linked employer-employee data. Using instrumental variables with worker and firm fixed effects, we find that a 10% increase in labor market concentration decreases hires by 12.4% and the wages of new hires by nearly 0.9%, as hypothesized by monopsony theory. Based on a simple merger simulation, we find that a merger between the top two employers in the retail industry would be most damaging, with about 24 million euros in annual lost wages for new hires, and an 8000 decrease in annual hires.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS；JEL：J23, J3, J42, K21, L13
papers.zh_title: 工资、雇佣与劳动力市场集中度
papers.zh_abstract: 雇主市场势力如何影响工人？我们利用关联的雇主-雇员数据，计算了法国各职业和通勤区的新雇佣集中度。使用包含工人和企业固定效应的工具变量，我们发现劳动力市场集中度每增加10%，新雇佣人数减少12.4%，新雇佣工资下降近0.9%，这与买方垄断理论的假设一致。基于一个简单的合并模拟，我们发现零售业前两大雇主之间的合并最具破坏性，每年导致新雇佣工资损失约2400万欧元，年雇佣人数减少8000人。

papers.title: Searching, Recalls, and Tightness: An Interim Report on the COVID Labor Market
papers.authors: Eliza Forsythe, Lisa B. Kahn, Fabian Lange, David G. Wiczer
papers.abstract: We report on the state of the labor market midway through the COVID recession, focusing particularly on measuring market tightness. As we show using a simple model, tightness is crucial for understanding the relative importance of labor supply or demand side factors in job creation. In tight markets, worker search eﬀort has a relatively larger impact on job creation, while employer proﬁtability looms larger in slack markets. We measure tightness combining job seeker information from the CPS and vacancy postings from Burning Glass Technologies. To parse the former, we develop a taxonomy of the non-employed that identiﬁes job seekers and excludes the large number of those on temporary layoﬀ who are waiting to be recalled. With this taxonomy, we ﬁnd that eﬀective tightness has declined about 50% since the onset of the epidemic to levels last seen in 2016, when labor markets generally appeared to be tight. Disaggregating market tightness, we ﬁnd mismatch has surprisingly declined in the COVID recession. Further, while markets still appear to be tight relative to other recessionary periods, this could change quickly if the large group of those who lost their jobs but are not currently searching for a range of COVID-related reasons reenter the search market.
papers.zh_title: 搜索、召回与市场紧度：新冠疫情劳动力市场中期报告
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了新冠疫情衰退中期劳动力市场的状况，特别关注市场紧度的衡量。如我们使用简单模型所示，市场紧度对于理解劳动力供给或需求因素在就业创造中的相对重要性至关重要。在紧市场中，工人搜索努力对就业创造的影响相对较大，而在松弛市场中，雇主盈利能力更为突出。我们结合当前人口调查（CPS）的求职者信息和Burning Glass Technologies的职位发布来衡量市场紧度。为解析前者，我们开发了一个非就业者分类法，识别求职者并排除大量等待被召回的临时裁员者。利用这一分类法，我们发现有效市场紧度自疫情爆发以来下降了约50%，降至2016年的水平，当时劳动力市场普遍看似紧张。分解市场紧度，我们惊讶地发现新冠疫情衰退中错配有所下降。此外，尽管市场相对于其他衰退时期仍显得紧张，但如果因一系列与新冠疫情相关原因而失业但目前未在求职的大量人群重新进入搜索市场，这种情况可能迅速改变。

papers.title: Do Family Policies Reduce Gender Inequality? Evidence from 60 Years of Policy Experimentation
papers.authors: Henrik Kleven, Camille Landais, Johanna Posch, Andreas Steinhauer, Josef Zweimüller
papers.abstract: Do family policies reduce gender inequality in the labor market? We contribute to this debate by investigating the joint impact of parental leave and child care, using administrative data covering the labor market and birth histories of Austrian workers over more than half a century. We start by quasi-experimentally identifying the causal effects of all family policy reforms since the 1950s, including the introduction of maternal leave benefits in 1961, on the full dynamics of male and female earnings. We then use these causal estimates to compute gender inequality series for counterfactual scenarios regarding the evolution of family policies. Our results show that the enormous expansions of parental leave and child care subsidies have had virtually no impact on gender convergence.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H31, H42, J08, J13, J16, J18, J22
papers.zh_title: 家庭政策能减少性别不平等吗？来自60年政策实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭政策能否减少劳动力市场中的性别不平等？我们通过利用覆盖奥地利工人半个多世纪劳动力市场和生育史的行政数据，研究育儿假和儿童保育的联合影响，为这一辩论做出贡献。我们首先通过准实验方法识别自20世纪50年代以来所有家庭政策改革（包括1961年引入的产假福利）对男性和女性收入完整动态的因果效应。然后，我们利用这些因果估计，计算关于家庭政策演变的反事实情景下的性别不平等序列。我们的结果表明，育儿假和儿童保育补贴的大幅扩张对性别趋同几乎没有影响。

papers.title: From Heterogeneous Firms to Heterogeneous Trade Elasticities: The Aggregate Implications of Firm Export Decisions
papers.authors: Rodrigo Adão, Costas Arkolakis, Sharat Ganapati
papers.abstract: We study the consequences of globalization in monopolistic competition models where heterogeneous firms select into export markets. We summarize firm heterogeneity at the extensive and intensive margins of firm exports with two nonparametric elasticity functions that depend only on the share of active firms in a market. Given changes in trade costs, these elasticity functions are sufficient to compute the model’s counterfactual predictions, and their shape generates heterogeneity in welfare responses across countries. We estimate these functions using the model’s semiparametric gravity equations for firm export margins, which yield trade elasticity estimates that vary with the number of exporters in a market and the country’s level of development. Compared to constant-elasticity gravity models, our estimates imply gains from trade that are larger in developed countries but smaller in developing countries, with differences arising mainly due to the entry and selection of heterogeneous firms.
papers.zh_title: 从异质性企业到异质性贸易弹性：企业出口决策的总体影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究垄断竞争模型中异质性企业选择进入出口市场时的全球化后果。我们通过两个非参数弹性函数总结企业出口的广延边际和集约边际的异质性，这些函数仅取决于市场中活跃企业的份额。给定贸易成本变化，这些弹性函数足以计算模型的反事实预测，其形状导致各国福利响应的异质性。我们利用模型对企业出口边际的半参数引力方程估计这些函数，得到的贸易弹性估计值随市场中出口商数量和一国发展水平而变化。与恒定弹性引力模型相比，我们的估计意味着发达国家的贸易收益更大，而发展中国家的贸易收益更小，差异主要源于异质性企业的进入和选择。

papers.title: Anatomy of Technology in the Firm
papers.authors: Xavier Cirera, Diego A. Comin, Marcio Cruz, Kyung Min Lee
papers.abstract: We collect detailed data on the technologies used in a comprehensive set of business functions in a representative sample of ﬁrms in Vietnam, Senegal, and the Brazilian state of Ceará, and construct measures of technology sophistication at the business function and ﬁrm levels. There is a large variance of sophistication across ﬁrms, but we ﬁnd that the variance of technology sophistication across the business functions of a ﬁrm (within-ﬁrm variance) is 2.8 times larger. We develop a model of technology adoption with heterogeneity in adoption costs across business functions and with non-homothetic production that induces heterogeneity in the marginal value of technology sophistication across functions. The model predicts a stable cross-ﬁrm relationship between sophistication in the business function and ﬁrm-level technology that we call the technology curve. We ﬁnd that the slopes of technology curves diﬀer greatly across business functions and that curves account for one third of within-ﬁrm variance in sophistication. A development accounting exercise shows that cross-ﬁrm variation in sophistication measures accounts for thirty percent of cross-ﬁrm diﬀerences in productivity.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IO, ITI, ME, PR；JEL：D2, E23, L23, O10, O40
papers.zh_title: 企业内部技术剖析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们收集了越南、塞内加尔和巴西塞阿拉州代表性样本企业中一套全面业务职能所用技术的详细数据，并构建了业务职能和企业层面的技术复杂度指标。企业间复杂度差异很大，但我们发现企业内部各业务职能之间的技术复杂度差异（企业内部方差）是其2.8倍。我们开发了一个技术采用模型，其中业务职能间的采用成本存在异质性，且非位似生产导致不同职能间技术复杂度的边际价值存在异质性。该模型预测了业务职能复杂度与企业层面技术之间稳定的跨企业关系，我们称之为技术曲线。我们发现不同业务职能的技术曲线斜率差异很大，且曲线解释了企业内部复杂度方差的三分之一。一项发展核算表明，复杂度指标的跨企业差异解释了企业间生产率差异的百分之三十。

papers.title: Sudden Stops and Optimal Foreign Exchange Intervention
papers.authors: J. Scott Davis, Michael B. Devereux, Changhua Yu
papers.abstract: We model sudden stops in a small open economy as rare discrete events precipitated by increases in the world risk-free rate. When external debt is large, the model exhibits multiple equilibria, one where external debt and consumption remain high, and one with a collapse in external debt and consumption. Private agents delever following an increase in the world interest rate, but they fail to internalize the impact of deleveraging on the price of collateral. For high levels of debt, even a small increase in the world interest rate can eliminate the high debt equilibrium and the economy experiences a sudden stop. The central bank can use foreign exchange intervention to prevent the sudden stop. If reserves cannot be borrowed, optimal policy is to “lean against the wind”, buying foreign reserves ex-ante when private borrowing is high and selling them after an interest rate shock when private agents are deleveraging.
papers.zh_title: 突然停止与最优外汇干预
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将小型开放经济中的突然停止建模为由世界无风险利率上升引发的罕见离散事件。当外部债务较高时，模型表现出多重均衡：一种均衡是外部债务和消费保持高位，另一种则是外部债务和消费崩溃。私人代理人在世界利率上升后去杠杆，但他们未能内化去杠杆对抵押品价格的影响。对于高债务水平，即使世界利率小幅上升也可能消除高债务均衡，经济经历突然停止。中央银行可以利用外汇干预来防止突然停止。如果储备无法借入，最优政策是“逆风而行”，在私人借款高时预先购买外汇储备，在利率冲击后私人代理人去杠杆时出售储备。

papers.title: Understanding the Success of the Know-Nothing Party
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Katherine Eriksson, Gregory Niemesh
papers.abstract: We study the contribution of economic conditions to the success of the first avowedly nativist political party in the United States. The Know-Nothing Party gained control of a number of state governments in the 1854-1856 elections running on a staunchly anti-Catholic and anti-Irish platform. Our analysis focuses on the case of Massachusetts, which had experienced a wave of Irish Famine immigration and was at the forefront of industrialization in the United States. Voters in towns with more exposure to Irish labor market crowdout and deskilling in manufacturing were more likely to vote for Know-Nothing candidates in state elections. These two forces played a decisive role in 1855, but not the other years of the Know Nothings’ success. We find evidence of reduced wealth accumulation for native workers most exposed to labor market crowdout and deskilling, though this was tempered by occupational upgrading.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS, POL；JEL：J01, J1, J15, J71, N12, N32
papers.zh_title: 理解一无所知党的成功
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究经济状况对美国第一个公开宣称本土主义政党的成功的贡献。一无所知党在1854-1856年选举中凭借强烈反天主教和反爱尔兰的纲领赢得了多个州政府的控制权。我们的分析聚焦于马萨诸塞州，该州经历了爱尔兰饥荒移民潮，并处于美国工业化的前沿。在制造业中，爱尔兰劳动力市场挤出和技能降级暴露程度更高的城镇，选民更可能在州选举中投票给一无所知党候选人。这两种力量在1855年发挥了决定性作用，但在一无所知党成功的其他年份则不然。我们发现，受劳动力市场挤出和技能降级影响最大的本土工人财富积累减少的证据，尽管这被职业升级所缓和。

papers.title: Effects of Welfare Reform on Parenting
papers.authors: Nancy Reichman, Hope Corman, Dhaval M. Dave, Ariel Kalil, Ofira Schwartz-Soicher
papers.abstract: This study investigated the effects of welfare reform in the 1990s, which represented a major policy shift that substantially and permanently retracted cash assistance to poor mothers in the U.S., on parenting. Using data on women from the 1979 cohort of the National Longitudinal Survey of Youth linked with information on their 10- to 14-year-old children from the Child Self-Administered and Self-Report surveys, we exploited variation in the implementation of welfare reform across states, over time, and across treatment and comparison groups to estimate the effects of welfare reform on parent-child activities and closeness of the mother-child relationship. We found that welfare reform had adverse effects on engagement in parent-child activities, children feeling close to their mothers, and mothers knowing their children’s whereabouts, with the effects generally concentrated among boys. These findings have implications for children’s development and contribute to a virtually non-existent literature on the effects of welfare reform on parenting and the small but growing economic literature on parenting. We found no evidence that the effects of welfare reform on parenting operated through the mother working more than full time, having multiple jobs, working in a service job, or having a non-standard work schedule.
papers.zh_title: 福利改革对养育方式的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了1990年代福利改革对养育方式的影响，该改革代表了一项重大政策转变，大幅且永久性地削减了美国对贫困母亲的现金援助。利用1979年国家青年纵向调查队列中女性的数据，并结合其10至14岁子女的儿童自填问卷和自报调查信息，我们利用各州福利改革实施时间、跨时期以及处理组与对照组之间的差异，来估计福利改革对亲子活动和母子关系亲密程度的影响。我们发现，福利改革对亲子活动参与度、孩子对母亲的亲近感以及母亲了解孩子行踪产生了不利影响，且这些影响主要集中在男孩身上。这些发现对儿童发展具有启示意义，并补充了关于福利改革对养育方式影响的几乎不存在的文献，以及规模虽小但不断增长的经济学养育方式文献。我们没有发现证据表明福利改革对养育方式的影响是通过母亲超全职工作、从事多份工作、从事服务业工作或拥有非标准工作时间表来发挥作用的。

papers.title: Powering Up Productivity: The Eﬀects of Electriﬁcation on U.S. Manufacturing
papers.authors: Martin Fiszbein, Jeanne Lafortune, Ethan G. Lewis, José Tessada
papers.abstract: We use 1890-1940 sector-county level data to identify the impact of electricity on manufacturing industries, exploiting pre-electrification variation in energy intensity across industries combined with variation across locations in proximity to early hydroelectric power plants. We find that labor productivity gains from electricity were rapid and long-lasting, in contrast with established narratives. Electrification was quickly accompanied by capital deepening and organizational changes that may have contributed to these gains. Impacts varied with market structure: productivity increased without expanding employment in sector-county cells with large initial firm size, while, in contrast, both output and employment increased in cells with small initial firm size.
papers.zh_title: 提升生产力：电气化对美国制造业的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用1890-1940年县级行业数据来识别电力对制造业的影响，利用电气化前各行业能源强度的差异以及各地与早期水电站距离的差异。我们发现，与既定叙述相反，电力带来的劳动生产率提升是迅速且持久的。电气化很快伴随着资本深化和组织变革，这些可能促进了上述提升。影响因市场结构而异：在初始企业规模较大的县级行业单元中，生产率提高但就业未扩大；相反，在初始企业规模较小的单元中，产出和就业均有所增加。

papers.title: Optimally Imprecise Memory and Biased Forecasts
papers.authors: Rava Azeredo da Silveira, Yeji Sung, Michael Woodford
papers.abstract: We propose a model of optimal decision making subject to a memory constraint. The constraint is a limit on the complexity of memory measured using Shannon's mutual information, as in models of rational inattention; but our theory differs from that of Sims (2003) in not assuming costless memory of past cognitive states. We show that the model implies that both forecasts and actions will exhibit idiosyncratic random variation; that average beliefs will also differ from rational expectations beliefs, with a bias that fluctuates forever with a variance that does not fall to zero even in the long run; and that more recent news will be given disproportionate weight in forecasts. We solve the model under a variety of assumptions about the degree of persistence of the variable to be forecasted and the horizon over which it must be forecasted, and examine how the nature of forecast biases depends on these parameters. The model provides a simple explanation for the over-reaction to news observed in the laboratory by Afrouzi et al. (2023).
papers.zh_title: 最优不精确记忆与有偏预测
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个在记忆约束下进行最优决策的模型。该约束是使用香农互信息衡量的记忆复杂性的限制，如同理性疏忽模型；但我们的理论不同于Sims（2003），它不假设过去认知状态的记忆是无成本的。我们表明，该模型意味着预测和行动都将表现出异质性的随机变异；平均信念也将与理性预期信念不同，其偏差会永远波动，方差即使在长期内也不会降至零；并且较新的信息在预测中会被赋予不成比例的权重。我们在关于待预测变量持久性和预测期限的各种假设下求解模型，并考察预测偏差的性质如何依赖于这些参数。该模型为Afrouzi等人（2023）在实验室中观察到的对新闻的过度反应提供了一个简单的解释。

papers.title: Long-term Effects of the Targeting the Ultra Poor Program
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Esther Duflo, Garima Sharma
papers.abstract: This paper studies the long-run effects of a "big-push" program providing a large asset transfer to the poorest Indian households. In a randomized controlled trial that follows these households over 10 years, we find positive effects on consumption (0.6 SD), food security (0.1 SD), income (0.3 SD), and health (0.2 SD). These effects grow for the first seven years following the transfer and persist until year 10. One main channel for persistence is that treated households take better advantage of opportunities to diversify into more lucrative wage employment, especially through migration.
papers.zh_title: “瞄准最贫困群体”项目的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一项“大推动”项目的长期影响，该项目向印度最贫困家庭提供大规模资产转移。在一项对这些家庭进行10年跟踪的随机对照试验中，我们发现对消费（0.6个标准差）、粮食安全（0.1个标准差）、收入（0.3个标准差）和健康（0.2个标准差）产生了积极影响。这些影响在资产转移后的头七年内持续增长，并持续到第十年。持续性的一个主要渠道是，受助家庭更好地利用机会，通过迁移等方式实现多元化，进入报酬更高的工资性就业。

papers.title: Did U.S. Politicians Expect the China Shock?
papers.authors: Matilde Bombardini, Bingjing Li, Francesco Trebbi
papers.abstract: In the two decades straddling China's WTO accession, the China Shock, i.e. the rapid trade integration of China in the early 2000's, has had a profound economic impact across U.S. regions.
