Our results generalize the Fama-MacBeth two-pass regression approach from the classical discrete-time factor setting to a continuous-time factor model with general dynamics for the factors, idiosyncratic components and factor loadings, while accounting for the fact that the inputs of the second-pass regression are themselves estimated in the first pass.
papers.zh_title: 连续时间资产定价模型中风险溢价的推断
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发并实施了渐近理论，利用在递增时间跨度内以高频采样的个股收益率，对连续时间资产定价模型进行推断。我们研究了风险连续部分和跳跃部分的风险溢价的识别与估计。我们的结果将经典离散时间因子设定下的Fama-MacBeth两阶段回归方法推广到连续时间因子模型，该模型包含因子、特质成分和因子载荷的一般动态，同时考虑了第二阶段回归的输入本身是在第一阶段估计的这一事实。

papers.title: Mandated and Voluntary Social Distancing During The COVID-19 Epidemic: A Review
papers.authors: Sumedha Gupta, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: For much of 2020, the COVID-19 epidemic upended social and economic life globally. In an effort to reduce COVID-19 risks in the U.S., state and local governments issued many recommendations and regulations to induce social distancing, adding to voluntary reductions in interpersonal contact. The responses to the epidemic helped contain spread, but also lead to high unintended societal costs. In the summer months, states took steps to revive the economy and lift social distancing regulations. However, as many epidemiologists expected, the scale of the epidemic has expanded very rapidly in the fall. In the week of October 14, the US generated around 57,000 new COVID-19 cases and 700 deaths each day. By November 15, the country was generating about 151,000 new cases and 1,200 deaths per day. These rapid increases in cases and deaths raise concerns about the capacity of local healthcare systems around the country. State governments are once again facing difficult choices about whether and how to use policies to address the spread of the virus. The incoming Biden-Harris administration faces an important challenge in trying to manage the epidemic as well as a large scale vaccination campaign. Although the epidemic is less than a year old, it has generated a huge volume of research by economists, epidemiologists, and others. This body of work may help inform policy decisions facing society in the coming months.\nIn this paper, we make five broad contributions. First, we provide a concise review of economic and social science research on mobility patterns, labor market outcomes, consumer behavior, and population health during the first phase of the epidemic. Second, we sketch a simple microeconomic model that may be useful considering the determinants of social distancing and the role of different policy instruments in promoting distancing. Third, we present a simple typology of the policies that were used at the state and county levels during the closure and re-opening phases of the epidemic in the U.S.. Fourth, we review a collection of new data sources that have played an important role in monitoring and analyzing population behavior this year. Fifth, we present results from event study regressions that try to disentangle private vs. policy-induced changes in mobility patterns during the early part of the epidemic.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间的强制与自愿社交距离：综述
papers.zh_abstract: 在2020年的大部分时间里，COVID-19疫情颠覆了全球的社会和经济生活。为降低美国的COVID-19风险，州和地方政府发布了大量建议和规定以诱导社交距离，这加剧了人际接触的自愿减少。对疫情的反应有助于控制传播，但也导致了高昂的非预期社会成本。夏季，各州采取措施重振经济并解除社交距离规定。然而，正如许多流行病学家所预期，秋季疫情规模迅速扩大。截至10月14日当周，美国每天新增约57,000例COVID-19病例和700例死亡。到11月15日，该国每天新增约151,000例病例和1,200例死亡。病例和死亡的快速增加引发了对全国各地地方医疗系统能力的担忧。州政府再次面临艰难选择，即是否以及如何使用政策来应对病毒传播。即将上任的拜登-哈里斯政府在管理疫情以及大规模疫苗接种运动方面面临重大挑战。尽管疫情发生不到一年，但已产生了经济学家、流行病学家和其他学者的大量研究。这些工作可能有助于为未来几个月社会面临的政策决策提供信息。本文做出五项主要贡献。第一，我们简要回顾了疫情第一阶段关于流动性模式、劳动力市场结果、消费者行为和人口健康的经济学和社会科学研究。第二，我们勾勒了一个简单的微观经济模型，该模型可能有助于考虑社交距离的决定因素以及不同政策工具在促进社交距离中的作用。第三，我们提出了一个简单的政策类型学，涵盖了美国疫情关闭和重新开放阶段在州和县层面使用的政策。第四，我们回顾了一系列新的数据来源，这些来源在今年监测和分析人口行为方面发挥了重要作用。第五，我们展示了事件研究回归的结果，试图在疫情早期区分流动性模式变化的私人因素与政策诱导因素。

papers.title: We are all Behavioral, More or Less: A Taxonomy of Consumer Decision Making
papers.authors: Victor Stango, Jonathan Zinman
papers.abstract: We examine how 17 behavioral biases relate to each other, to other decision inputs, and to decision outputs. Most consumers exhibit multiple biases in our nationally representative panel data. There is substantial heterogeneity across consumers, even within similar demographic/skill groups. Biases are positively correlated within person, especially after adjusting for measurement error, and less correlated with other inputs—risk aversion, patience, cognitive skills, and personality traits—with some expected exceptions. Accounting for this correlation structure, we reduce our 29 decision inputs to eight common factors. Seven common factors load on at least two biases, six on clusters of theoretically related biases, and two or three are distinctly behavioral. All but one common factor is distinct from cognitive skills. Factor scores strongly conditionally correlate with decisions and outcomes in various domains. We discuss several potential implications of this taxonomy for various approaches to modeling influences of behavioral biases on decision making.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EH, IO, LE, PE；JEL：C36, C81, D90, E70
papers.zh_title: 我们或多或少都是行为性的：消费者决策的分类学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了17种行为偏差如何相互关联，以及它们与其他决策输入和决策输出的关系。在我们的全国代表性面板数据中，大多数消费者表现出多种偏差。即使在相似的人口统计/技能群体内，消费者之间也存在显著的异质性。偏差在个体内呈正相关，尤其是在调整测量误差后，并且与其他输入（风险厌恶、耐心、认知技能和人格特质）的相关性较低，但存在一些预期的例外。考虑到这种相关结构，我们将29个决策输入缩减为八个共同因子。七个共同因子至少负载于两种偏差，六个负载于理论上相关的偏差集群，两到三个明显是行为性的。除一个共同因子外，所有因子都与认知技能不同。因子得分与各领域的决策和结果在条件上高度相关。我们讨论了这种分类学对多种建模行为偏差对决策制定影响方法的若干潜在启示。

papers.title: Mediating Conflict in the Lab
papers.authors: Alessandra Casella, Evan Friedman, Manuel Perez Archila
papers.abstract: Mechanism design teaches us that a mediator can strictly improve the chances of peace between two opponents even when the mediator has no independent resources, is less informed than the two parties, and has no enforcement power. We test the theory in a lab experiment where two subjects negotiate how to share a resource; in case of conflict, the subjects' privately known strength determines their payoffs. The subjects send cheap talk messages about their strength to one another (in the treatment with direct communication) or to the mediator (in the mediation treatment), before making their demands or receiving the mediator's recommendations. We find that, in line with the theory, messages are significantly more sincere when sent to the mediator. However, contrary to the theory, peaceful resolution is not more frequent, even when the mediator is a computer implementing the optimal mediation program. While the theoretical result refers to the best (i.e. most peaceful) equilibrium under mediation, multiple equilibria exist, and the best equilibrium is particularly vulnerable to small deviations from full truthfulness. Subjects are not erratic and their deviations induce only small losses in payoffs, and yet they translate into significant increases in conflict.
papers.zh_title: 实验室中的冲突调解
papers.zh_abstract: 机制设计理论告诉我们，即使调解人没有独立资源、信息少于双方且没有执行权力，调解人也能严格改善双方之间和平的机会。我们在实验室实验中检验了这一理论，其中两名受试者就如何分享资源进行谈判；在冲突情况下，受试者私下知晓的实力决定了他们的收益。受试者在提出要求或接受调解人建议之前，向对方（在直接沟通处理中）或调解人（在调解处理中）发送关于其实力的廉价谈话信息。我们发现，与理论一致，当信息发送给调解人时，信息显著更真诚。然而，与理论相反，和平解决并未更频繁地发生，即使调解人是实施最优调解程序的计算机。虽然理论结果指的是调解下最优（即最和平）的均衡，但存在多重均衡，且最优均衡特别容易受到完全诚实性的微小偏离的影响。受试者并非反复无常，他们的偏离仅导致收益的小幅损失，但这些损失却转化为冲突的显著增加。

papers.title: Consumer Surplus of Alternative Payment Methods: Paying Uber with Cash
papers.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David O. Argente
papers.abstract: We estimate the private benefits for Uber riders from using alternative payment methods. We focus on Mexico where riders have the option to use cash or credit cards to pay for rides. We use three field experiments involving approximately 400,000 riders to estimate the loss of private benefits for riders if a ban on cash payments is implemented. We find that Uber riders, using cash as means of payment either sometimes or exclusively, suffer an average loss of approximately 50% of their expenditures on trips paid in cash before the ban.
papers.zh_title: 替代支付方式的消费者剩余：用现金支付优步
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了优步乘客使用替代支付方式的私人收益。我们聚焦于墨西哥，那里的乘客可以选择用现金或信用卡支付车费。我们通过三项涉及约40万名乘客的实地实验，估算了如果实施现金支付禁令，乘客私人收益的损失。我们发现，无论是偶尔还是完全使用现金支付车费的优步乘客，在禁令实施前，他们用现金支付的车费支出平均损失约为50%。

papers.title: Stay-at-Home Orders in a Fiscal Union
papers.authors: Mario J. Crucini, Oscar O'Flaherty
papers.abstract: State and local governments throughout the United States attempted to mitigate the spread of Covid-19 using stay-at-home orders to limit social interactions and mobility. We study the economic impact of these orders and their optimal implementation in a fiscal union. Using an event study framework, we find that stay-at-home orders caused a 4 percentage point decrease in consumer spending and hours worked. These estimates suggest a $10 billion decrease in spending and $15 billion in lost earnings. We then develop an economic SIR model with multiple locations to study the optimal implementation of stay-at-home orders. From a national welfare perspective, the model suggests that it is optimal for locations with higher infection rates to set stricter mitigation policies. This occurs as a common, national policy is too restrictive for the economies of mildly infected areas and causes greater declines in consumption and hours worked than are optimal.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IFM, PE；JEL：E3, E47, E62, H12, H23, H7
papers.zh_title: 财政联盟中的居家令
papers.zh_abstract: 美国各州和地方政府试图通过居家令来限制社交互动和人员流动，以减缓新冠疫情的传播。我们研究了这些命令的经济影响及其在财政联盟中的最优实施。使用事件研究框架，我们发现居家令导致消费者支出和工作时间减少了4个百分点。这些估计表明支出减少了100亿美元，收入损失了150亿美元。然后，我们开发了一个包含多个地点的经济SIR模型，以研究居家令的最优实施。从国家福利的角度来看，该模型表明，感染率较高的地点设定更严格的缓解政策是最优的。这是因为统一的全国性政策对轻度感染地区的经济来说过于严格，导致消费和工作时间的下降幅度超过了最优水平。

papers.title: Urban Mortality and the Repeal of Federal Prohibition
papers.authors: David S. Jacks, Krishna Pendakur, Hitoshi Shigeoka
papers.abstract: Federal prohibition was one of the most ambitious policy interventions in US history. However, the removal of restrictions on alcohol after 1933 was not uniform. Using a new balanced panel on annual deaths, we find that city-level repeal is associated with a 11.6% decrease in the rate of death by non-automobile accidents, a category which critically include accidental poisonings. We relate this finding to a large literature which emphasizes – but never precisely quantifies – the mortality effects of adulterated alcohol during federal prohibition. Thus, repeal likely led to a large annual reduction in accidental poisonings. However, combined with previous results showing even larger increases in infant mortality, repeal nonetheless likely had negative contemporaneous effects on public health.
papers.zh_title: 城市死亡率与联邦禁酒令的废除
papers.zh_abstract: 联邦禁酒令是美国历史上最雄心勃勃的政策干预之一。然而，1933年后对酒精限制的解除并不统一。利用一个新的年度死亡人数平衡面板数据，我们发现城市层面的禁酒令废除与非机动车事故（其中关键包括意外中毒）死亡率下降11.6%相关。我们将这一发现与大量强调联邦禁酒令期间掺假酒精死亡率影响（但从未精确量化）的文献联系起来。因此，废除禁酒令很可能导致意外中毒人数每年大幅减少。然而，结合先前显示婴儿死亡率增幅更大的结果，废除禁酒令仍然可能对公共健康产生了负面的同期影响。

papers.title: The Effect of Computer-Assisted Learning on Students' Long-Term Development
papers.authors: Nicola Bianchi, Yi Lu, Hong Song
papers.abstract: In this paper, we examine the effect of computer-assisted learning on students’ long-term development. We explore the implementation of the “largest ed-tech intervention in the world to date,” which connected China’s best teachers to more than 100 million rural students through satellite internet. We find evidence that exposure to the program improved students’ academic achievement, labor performance, and computer usage. We observe these effects up to ten years after program implementation. These findings indicate that education technology can have long-lasting positive effects on a variety of outcomes and can be effective in reducing the rural–urban education gap.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS；JEL：I24, I26, I28, O15, O38
papers.zh_title: 计算机辅助学习对学生长期发展的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们研究了计算机辅助学习对学生长期发展的影响。我们探讨了“迄今为止世界上最大的教育技术干预”的实施情况，该干预通过卫星互联网将中国最优秀的教师与超过1亿的农村学生连接起来。我们发现证据表明，接触该计划提高了学生的学业成绩、劳动表现和计算机使用能力。我们在计划实施后长达十年的时间里观察到了这些影响。这些发现表明，教育技术可以对各种结果产生持久的积极影响，并能有效缩小城乡教育差距。

papers.title: The Impact of Organizational Boundaries on Healthcare Coordination and Utilization
papers.authors: Leila Agha, Keith Marzilli Ericson, Xiaoxi Zhao
papers.abstract: We measure organizational concentration—the distribution of a patient's healthcare across organizations—to examine how firm boundaries affect healthcare efficiency. First, when patients move to regions where outpatient visits are typically concentrated within a small set of firms, their healthcare utilization falls. Second, for patients whose PCPs exit the market, switching to a PCP with 1 standard deviation higher organizational concentration reduces utilization by 21%. This finding is robust to controlling for the spread of healthcare across providers. Increases in organizational concentration predict improvements in diabetes care and are not associated with greater use of emergency department or inpatient care.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CF, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D23, I11, L14
papers.zh_title: 组织边界对医疗协调与利用的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们衡量组织集中度——患者医疗在组织间的分布——以考察企业边界如何影响医疗效率。首先，当患者迁移到门诊就诊通常集中在一小部分企业的地区时，他们的医疗利用率会下降。其次，对于其初级保健医生退出市场的患者，转向组织集中度高出1个标准差的初级保健医生会使医疗利用率降低21%。这一发现在控制医疗在提供者之间的分散程度后依然稳健。组织集中度的提高预示着糖尿病护理的改善，并且与急诊或住院护理使用率的增加无关。

papers.title: Dynamical Structure and Spectral Properties of Input-Output Networks
papers.authors: Ernest Liu, Aleh Tsyvinski
papers.abstract: We associate a dynamical system with input-output networks and study its spectral properties. Specifically, we develop a dynamic production network model featuring adjustment costs of changing inputs and thus gradual recovery from temporary TFP shocks. First, we explicitly solve for the output and welfare effects of temporary shocks. We show shocks to sectors that generate significant sales through distant linkages to the consumer are most damaging. Second, we eigendecompose the input-output matrix and show, because higher-order linkages take longer to recover, fewer eigenvectors are needed to represent the welfare impact of sectoral shocks in the dynamic economy compared to the Domar weights. Third, we analyze the U.S. input-output structure and show the welfare impact of temporary shocks has a low-dimensional, 4-factor structure (out of 171 eigenvectors). Finally, we revisit the historical use of input-output analysis in target selection for bombing Nazi Germany and Imperial Japan during WWII.
papers.zh_title: 投入产出网络的动力学结构与谱性质
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将一个动力系统与投入产出网络相关联，并研究其谱性质。具体来说，我们开发了一个动态生产网络模型，该模型具有调整投入成本的特征，因此能从暂时的全要素生产率冲击中逐渐恢复。首先，我们明确求解了暂时冲击对产出和福利的影响。我们表明，对通过远距离联系向消费者产生显著销售的部门造成的冲击最具破坏性。其次，我们对投入产出矩阵进行特征分解，并表明，由于高阶联系需要更长时间恢复，在动态经济中，表示部门冲击福利影响所需的特征向量比Domar权重更少。第三，我们分析了美国的投入产出结构，并表明暂时冲击的福利影响具有低维度的4因子结构（在171个特征向量中）。最后，我们重新审视了历史上在二战期间对纳粹德国和日本帝国进行轰炸目标选择时投入产出分析的使用。

papers.title: GDP, Wellbeing, and Health: Thoughts on the 2017 Round of the International Comparison Program
papers.authors: Angus Deaton, Paul Schreyer
papers.abstract: In March 2020, the International Comparison Project published its latest results, for the calendar year 2017. This round presents common-unit or purchasing-power-parity data for 137 countries on Gross Domestic Product and its components. We review a number of important issues, what is new, what is not new, and what the new data can and cannot do. Of great importance is the lack of news, that the results are broadly in line with earlier results from 2011. We consider the relationship between national accounts measures and health, particularly in light of the COVID-19 epidemic which may reduce global inequality, even as it increases inequality within countries. We emphasize things that GDP cannot do, some familiar—like its silence on distribution—and some less familiar—including its increasing detachment from national material wellbeing in a globalized world where international transfers of capital and property rights can have enormous effects on GDP, such as the 26 percent increase in Ireland’s GDP in 2015.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, EH, IFM；JEL：E01, F10, F62, I15, I31, P22, Y1
papers.zh_title: GDP、福祉与健康：对2017年国际比较计划轮次的思考
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年3月，国际比较项目发布了其最新结果，涵盖2017日历年度。本轮提供了137个国家国内生产总值及其组成部分的共同单位或购买力平价数据。我们回顾了若干重要问题：哪些是新的，哪些不是新的，以及新数据能做什么和不能做什么。一个非常重要的方面是缺乏新意，即结果与2011年的早期结果大致一致。我们考虑了国民账户衡量指标与健康之间的关系，特别是考虑到COVID-19疫情，该疫情可能减少全球不平等，即使它加剧了国家内部的不平等。我们强调了GDP无法做到的事情，有些是熟悉的——比如它对分配的沉默——有些则不太熟悉——包括在一个全球化的世界中，GDP与国家物质福祉的日益脱节，因为资本和产权的国际转移可能对GDP产生巨大影响，例如2015年爱尔兰GDP增长了26%。

papers.title: Divided We Fall: International Health and Trade Coordination During a Pandemic
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond, Ernst-Ludwig von Thadden
papers.abstract: We analyze the role of international trade and health coordination in times of a pandemic by building a two-economy, two-good trade model integrated into a micro-founded SIR model of infection dynamics. Uncoordinated governments with national mandates can adopt (i) containment policies to suppress infection spread domestically, and (ii) (import) tariffs to prevent infection coming from abroad. The efficient, i.e., coordinated, risk-sharing arrangement dynamically adjusts both policy instruments to share infection and economic risks internationally. However, in Nash equilibrium, uncoordinated trade policies robustly feature inefficiently high tariffs that peak with the pandemic in the foreign economy. This distorts terms of trade dynamics and magnifies the welfare costs of tariff wars during a pandemic due to lower levels of consumption and production as well as smaller gains via diversification of infection curves across economies.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IFM, ITI, PE；JEL：F1, F4, H87, I1
papers.zh_title: 分裂则衰：疫情期间的国际卫生与贸易协调
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个融入微观基础感染动态SIR模型的两经济体、两商品贸易模型，分析了疫情期间国际贸易与卫生协调的作用。拥有国家授权的非协调政府可以采取（i）遏制政策以抑制国内感染传播，以及（ii）（进口）关税以防止来自国外的感染。有效的、即协调的风险分担安排会动态调整这两种政策工具，以在国际上分担感染和经济风险。然而，在纳什均衡中，非协调的贸易政策稳健地表现为效率低下的高关税，其峰值出现在外国经济疫情高峰期。这扭曲了贸易条件动态，并因消费和生产水平降低以及跨经济体感染曲线多样化带来的收益减少，放大了疫情期间关税战的福利成本。

papers.title: The Distributional Effects of Student Loan Forgiveness
papers.authors: Sylvain Catherine, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: We study the distributional consequences of student debt forgiveness in present value terms, accounting for differences in repayment behavior across the earnings distribution. Full or partial forgiveness is regressive because high earners took larger loans, but also because, for low earners, balances greatly overstate present values. Consequently, forgiveness would benefit the top decile as much as the bottom three deciles combined. Blacks and Hispanics would also benefit substantially less than balances suggest. Enrolling households who would benefit from income-driven repayment is the least expensive and most progressive policy we consider.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D14, G18, G5, G51, H52, H81, J18, J24
papers.zh_title: 学生贷款减免的分配效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了学生债务减免在现值方面的分配后果，考虑了不同收入阶层还款行为的差异。全额或部分减免是累退的，因为高收入者获得了更大的贷款，但也因为对于低收入者而言，余额大大高估了现值。因此，减免将使收入最高的十分之一群体受益，其程度相当于收入最低的三个十分之一群体的总和。黑人和西班牙裔的受益程度也远低于余额所暗示的水平。让能从收入驱动还款中受益的家庭加入，是我们考虑的最便宜且最累进的政策。

papers.title: TFPR: Dispersion and Cyclicality
papers.authors: Russell Cooper, Özgen Öztürk
papers.abstract: This paper studies the determinants of TFPR, a revenue based measure of total factor productivity. Recent business cycle models are built upon the assumption of countercyclical dispersion in TFPR. But, the distribution of TFPR is endogenous, dependent upon exogenous shocks and the endogenous determination of prices. An overlapping generations model with monopolistic competition and state dependent pricing is constructed to study the factors that shape the TFPR distribution. The empirical focus is on three key data patterns: (i) countercyclical dispersion of TFPR , (ii) countercyclical dispersion of price changes and (iii) countercyclical frequency of price adjustment. The analysis uncovers two interesting scenarios in which these moments are matched. One arises in the presence of shocks to the dispersion of TFPQ, a quantity based measure of total factor productivity, along with a negatively correlated change in the mean of TFPQ. The second arises if the monetary authority responds to shocks to the dispersion of TFPQ by “leaning against the wind”. Due to state contingent pricing, the model is nonlinear. Simple correlations mask these nonlinearities of the underlying economy. The real eﬀects of monetary innovations are state dependent, with monetary policy less eﬀective in recessions.
papers.zh_title: TFPR：离散性与周期性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了TFPR（一种基于收入的全要素生产率衡量指标）的决定因素。最近的商业周期模型建立在TFPR离散性呈逆周期性的假设之上。但是，TFPR的分布是内生的，取决于外生冲击和价格的内生决定。我们构建了一个具有垄断竞争和状态依赖定价的代际交叠模型，以研究塑造TFPR分布的因素。实证重点放在三个关键数据模式上：（i）TFPR的逆周期离散性，（ii）价格变化的逆周期离散性，以及（iii）价格调整频率的逆周期性。分析揭示了两种有趣的情景，在这些情景中这些矩得以匹配。一种情景出现在存在TFPQ（一种基于数量的全要素生产率衡量指标）离散性冲击，同时TFPQ均值发生负相关变化的情况下。第二种情景出现在货币当局通过“逆风而行”来应对TFPQ离散性冲击时。由于状态依赖定价，该模型是非线性的。简单相关性掩盖了基础经济的这些非线性特征。货币创新的实际效应是状态依赖的，货币政策在经济衰退时效果较差。

papers.title: Do State Tobacco 21 Laws Work?
papers.authors: Calvin Bryan, Benjamin Hansen, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Tobacco 21 (T-21) laws prohibit the sale of tobacco products to individuals under age 21. This study is the first to comprehensively examine the impacts of statewide T-21 laws on youth tobacco consumption, including spillovers to minor teens. Using data from the 2009-2019 Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance Survey (BRFSS) and a difference-in-differences approach, we find that the enactment of a statewide T-21 law was associated with a 2.5 to 3.9 percentage-point decline in smoking participation among 18-to-20-year-olds. A causal interpretation of our estimates is supported by event-study analyses and falsification tests for young adults ages 21 and older. Next, using data from the 2009-2019 State Youth Risky Behavior Surveys (YRBS), we find that statewide T-21 laws reduced tobacco cigarette and electronic cigarette (e-cigarette) consumption among 18-year-old high school students. However, descriptive evidence suggests that the negative impact of T-21 laws on e-cigarette use among 18-year-olds may be partially blunted by an increase in borrowing e-cigarettes from others. Finally, we find that T-21 laws generate important spillovers including (i) a reduction in tobacco cigarette use among 16-to-17-year-olds, a group that relies heavily on the “social market” — including 18-year-old peers — to access tobacco, and (ii) reductions in both marijuana use and frequency of alcohol consumption among older teenagers.
papers.zh_title: 州级烟草21岁法案有效吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 烟草21岁（T-21）法案禁止向21岁以下个人销售烟草产品。本研究首次全面考察了全州范围的T-21法案对青少年烟草消费的影响，包括对未成年青少年的溢出效应。使用2009-2019年行为风险因素监测调查（BRFSS）的数据和双重差分方法，我们发现，全州范围T-21法案的颁布与18至20岁人群吸烟参与率下降2.5至3.9个百分点相关。事件研究分析和针对21岁及以上年轻成年人的安慰剂检验支持了我们估计的因果解释。接下来，使用2009-2019年州青少年危险行为调查（YRBS）的数据，我们发现，全州范围的T-21法案减少了18岁高中学生的传统卷烟和电子烟消费。然而，描述性证据表明，T-21法案对18岁人群电子烟使用的负面影响可能部分被从他人处借用电子烟的增加所削弱。最后，我们发现T-21法案产生了重要的溢出效应，包括（i）减少16至17岁青少年的传统卷烟使用，该群体严重依赖“社交市场”（包括18岁的同龄人）获取烟草，以及（ii）减少较大年龄青少年的大麻使用和饮酒频率。

papers.title: Did COVID-19 Change Life Insurance Offerings?
papers.authors: Timothy F. Harris, Aaron Yelowitz, Charles J. Courtemanche
papers.abstract: The profitability of life insurance offerings is contingent on accurate projections and pricing of mortality risk. The COVID-19 pandemic created significant uncertainty, with dire mortality predictions from early forecasts resulting in widespread government intervention and greater individual precaution that reduced the projected death toll. We analyze how life insurance companies changed pricing and offerings in response to COVID-19 using monthly data on term life insurance policies from Compulife. We estimate event-study models that exploit well-established variation in the COVID-19 mortality rate based on age and underlying health status. Despite the increase in mortality risk and significant uncertainty, we find limited evidence that life insurance companies increased premiums or decreased policy offerings due to COVID-19.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19是否改变了人寿保险产品？
papers.zh_abstract: 人寿保险产品的盈利能力取决于对死亡风险的准确预测和定价。COVID-19疫情造成了巨大的不确定性，早期预测的可怕死亡率预测导致广泛的政府干预和更大的个人预防措施，从而减少了预计的死亡人数。我们使用Compulife的定期寿险保单月度数据，分析了人寿保险公司如何因应COVID-19改变定价和产品供应。我们估计了事件研究模型，利用基于年龄和潜在健康状况的COVID-19死亡率的既定差异。尽管死亡风险增加且存在重大不确定性，我们发现有限的证据表明人寿保险公司因COVID-19提高了保费或减少了保单供应。

papers.title: Natural Barriers and Policy Barriers
papers.authors: Yang Jiao, Shang-Jin Wei
papers.abstract: This paper investigates whether "natural" trade barriers of a country due to geography and other factors outside the country's control stimulate more or less policy barriers such as tariffs. Our theory predicts that the politician's relative weight on private benefits over social welfare in a "protection-for-sale" setup depends on these "natural" features. The key mechanism is that a society's willingness to invest in improving institutions that constrain rent-seeking behavior is influenced by the natural barriers. Two types of empirical evidence support the theoretical predictions. First, "natural" barriers beget policy barriers - countries with more "natural" barriers tend to have higher tariffs and more NTBs. Second, liberalization begets liberalization - in response to unilateral trade reforms in China in the early 2000s, those other countries that benefit more from the Chinese liberalization also undertake more liberalization of their own.
papers.zh_title: 自然壁垒与政策壁垒
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一个国家的“自然”贸易壁垒（由地理和其他国家无法控制的因素造成）是刺激更多还是更少的政策壁垒（如关税）。我们的理论预测，在“出售保护”框架中，政治家对私人利益相对于社会福利的权重取决于这些“自然”特征。关键机制在于，一个社会投资于改善约束寻租行为的制度的意愿受到自然壁垒的影响。两类实证证据支持理论预测。首先，“自然”壁垒导致政策壁垒——具有更多“自然”壁垒的国家往往有更高的关税和更多的非关税壁垒。其次，自由化导致自由化——作为对21世纪初中国单边贸易改革的回应，那些从中国自由化中受益更多的其他国家也进行了更多的自身自由化。

papers.title: The Rise of State-Connected Private Owners in China
papers.authors: Chong-En Bai, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Zheng Michael Song, Xin Wang
papers.abstract: We use administrative registration records with information on the owners of all Chinese firms to document their connections through equity investments. We show that the largest private owners have direct equity ties with state owners, the next largest private owners have equity ties with private owners that themselves have equity ties with state owners, and the smallest private owners do not have any ties with state owners. The network of “state-connected” private owners has expanded over the last two decades. The share of registered capital of “state-connected” private owners increased by almost 20 percentage points between 2000 and 2019.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, POL, PR；JEL：E0, F0, O0, P0
papers.zh_title: 中国国有关联私人所有者的崛起
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用包含所有中国企业所有者信息的行政登记记录，通过股权投资记录其关联。我们发现，最大的私人所有者与国家所有者有直接的股权联系，次大的私人所有者与那些自身与国家所有者有股权联系的私人所有者有股权联系，而最小的私人所有者与国家所有者没有任何联系。“国有关联”私人所有者的网络在过去二十年中有所扩张。在2000年至2019年间，“国有关联”私人所有者的注册资本份额增加了近20个百分点。

papers.title: Labor Market Implications of Education MisMatch
papers.authors: Carla Varona Cervantes, Russell Cooper
papers.abstract: This project studies the impact of education mismatch on labor outcomes. Across our sample of OECD countries, there is evidence of mismatch in educational attainment and labor markets. Labor market outcomes are not independent of education mismatch. Our framework for analysis is a dynamic choice model, focusing on education and training decisions. From the estimation of model parameters, the main factor explaining education mismatch is dispersion across individuals in the perceived value of education. From simulations of lifecycle dynamics and counterfactual experiments, among four key countries, education undermatch in Japan is sustained through labor market mechanisms while in Germany, Italy and the US, education undermatch is largely resolved in that these individuals are eventually employed in skilled jobs. Training plays a key role in these dynamics.
papers.zh_title: 教育错配的劳动力市场影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本项目研究教育错配对劳动力结果的影响。在我们选取的OECD国家样本中，存在教育程度与劳动力市场错配的证据。劳动力市场结果并非独立于教育错配。我们的分析框架是一个动态选择模型，重点关注教育和培训决策。从模型参数估计来看，解释教育错配的主要因素是个体间对教育感知价值的差异。通过对生命周期动态的模拟和反事实实验，在四个关键国家中，日本的教育不足通过劳动力市场机制得以维持，而在德国、意大利和美国，教育不足在很大程度上得到解决，因为这些个体最终受雇于技能型工作。培训在这些动态过程中发挥着关键作用。

papers.title: Designing Advance Market Commitments for New Vaccines
papers.authors: Michael Kremer, Jonathan D. Levin, Christopher M. Snyder
papers.abstract: Advance market commitments (AMCs) provide a mechanism to stimulate investment by suppliers of products to low-income countries. In an AMC, donors commit to a fund from which a specified subsidy is paid per unit purchased by low-income countries until the fund is exhausted, strengthening suppliers' incentives to invest in research, development, and capacity. Last decade saw the launch of a $1.5 billion pilot AMC to distribute pneumococcal vaccine to the developing world; in the current pandemic, variations on AMCs are being used to fund Covid-19 vaccines.\nThis paper undertakes the first formal analysis of AMCs. We construct a model in which an altruistic donor negotiates on behalf of a low-income country with a vaccine supplier after the supplier has sunk investments. We use this model to explain the logic of an AMC—as a solution to a hold-up problem—and to analyze alternative design features under various economic conditions (cost uncertainty, supplier competition). A key finding is that optimal AMC design differs markedly depending on where the product is in its development cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D02, I18, O19, O31
papers.zh_title: 为新疫苗设计预先市场承诺
papers.zh_abstract: 预先市场承诺（AMC）提供了一种机制，以刺激低收入国家产品供应商的投资。在AMC中，捐助者承诺设立一个基金，低收入国家每购买一单位产品，就从该基金中支付指定补贴，直至基金耗尽，从而增强供应商在研发和产能方面投资的激励。过去十年，一项15亿美元的试点AMC启动，用于向发展中国家分发肺炎球菌疫苗；在当前疫情中，AMC的变体正被用于资助新冠疫苗。本文首次对AMC进行正式分析。我们构建了一个模型，其中利他主义捐助者在供应商沉没投资后，代表低收入国家与疫苗供应商进行谈判。我们利用该模型解释AMC的逻辑——作为解决“敲竹杠”问题的一种方案——并分析在不同经济条件（成本不确定性、供应商竞争）下的替代设计特征。一个关键发现是，最优AMC设计因产品处于其开发周期的不同阶段而显著不同。

papers.title: Jim Crow in the Saddle: The Expulsion of African American Jockeys from American Racing
papers.authors: Michael Leeds, Hugh Rockoff
papers.abstract: Between the Civil War and the turn of the nineteenth century there were many prominent African American jockeys. They rode winners in all of the Triple-Crown races. But at the turn of the century they were forced out. This paper uses a new data set on the Triple-Crown races, which includes odds on all of the entrants in all of the races, to explore the causes of the expulsion of African American jockeys. Our conclusion is that although there is some evidence of prejudice by owners and the betting public – for the latter in the Kentucky Derby although not in the other legs of the Triple Crown – historical evidence indicates that the final push came from the White jockeys who were determined to “draw the color line.”
papers.zh_title: 马鞍上的吉姆·克劳：非裔美国骑师被逐出美国赛马界
papers.zh_abstract: 在内战至十九世纪末期间，有许多杰出的非裔美国骑师。他们曾骑乘赛马赢得所有三冠王赛事。但在世纪之交，他们被迫退出。本文利用三冠王赛事的新数据集（包含所有赛事中所有参赛马匹的赔率），探讨非裔美国骑师被驱逐的原因。我们的结论是，尽管存在马主和博彩公众偏见的证据——对于后者，在肯塔基德比中有所体现，但在三冠王其他赛事中则不然——历史证据表明，最终的推动力来自决心“划清种族界限”的白人骑师。

papers.title: How Spillovers from Appointment Reminders Improve Health Clinic Efficiency
papers.authors: Claire E. Boone, Pablo A. Celhay, Paul Gertler, Tadeja Gracner, Josefina Rodriguez
papers.abstract: Missed clinic appointments present a significant burden to health care through disruption of care, inefficient use of staff time and wasted clinical resources. Short message service (SMS) appointment reminders show promise to improve clinics’ management through timely appointment cancellations and efficient re-scheduling, but evidence from large-scale interventions is missing. We study a nationwide SMS appointment reminder program in Chile for chronic disease patients at public primary care clinics. Using longitudinal clinic-level data we find that after two years the program increased clinics’ total number of visits per by 5.1% on average. The program did not change the number of visits by chronic patients eligible to receive the reminder, but it instead increased visits by other patients, ineligible to receive reminders in clinics that adopted the program by 7.4% on average. These results suggest that the appointment reminder systems increased clinics’ ability to care for more patients through timely cancellations and re-scheduling.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, PR；JEL：I1, I11, I12
papers.zh_title: 预约提醒的溢出效应如何提升诊所效率
papers.zh_abstract: 错过诊所预约通过扰乱护理、低效利用员工时间和浪费临床资源，给医疗保健带来沉重负担。短信（SMS）预约提醒有望通过及时取消预约和高效重新安排来改善诊所管理，但缺乏大规模干预的证据。我们研究了智利针对公立初级保健诊所慢性病患者的全国性短信预约提醒项目。利用纵向诊所层面数据，我们发现项目实施两年后，诊所的总就诊次数平均增加了5.1%。该项目并未改变有资格接收提醒的慢性病患者的就诊次数，反而使实施项目的诊所中其他无资格接收提醒的患者的就诊次数平均增加了7.4%。这些结果表明，预约提醒系统通过及时取消和重新安排，提高了诊所服务更多患者的能力。

papers.title: Estimating Preferences for Neighborhood Amenities Under Imperfect Information
papers.authors: Fernando V. Ferreira, Maisy Wong
papers.abstract: We introduce a generalized neighborhood choice model that allows for heterogeneity in knowledge of local amenities. In reality, people often make decisions about where to live without complete information, which can influence their choices and distort the estimated value of amenities. To mitigate this bias, we construct a latent quality index using panel data from a neighborhood choice program that provided information on rents and same-school networks to graduating students. Our analysis shows that individuals tend to switch to neighborhoods with larger networks and lower rents, and these effects persist even after graduation, influencing their actual residential choices. Our marginal willingness-to-pay estimates indicate that living in a neighborhood with a larger network is worth an additional $123 per month, and not accounting for endogeneity could overestimate this amount by as much as 70%.
papers.zh_title: 信息不完全下对社区便利设施偏好的估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个广义的社区选择模型，该模型允许对当地便利设施知识的异质性。在现实中，人们常常在信息不完全的情况下做出居住决策，这会影响他们的选择并扭曲对便利设施价值的估计。为了减轻这种偏差，我们利用一个社区选择项目的面板数据构建了一个潜在质量指数，该项目向即将毕业的学生提供了关于租金和同校网络的信息。我们的分析表明，个体倾向于转向拥有更大网络和更低租金的社区，这些效应甚至在毕业后仍然持续，影响他们实际的居住选择。我们的边际支付意愿估计表明，居住在一个拥有更大网络的社区价值每月额外123美元，而不考虑内生性可能会高估这一数额高达70%。

papers.title: Gender Identity, Race, and Ethnicity-based Discrimination in Access to Mental Health Care: Evidence from an Audit Correspondence Field Experiment
papers.authors: Luca Fumarco, Benjamin Harrell, Patrick Button, David Schwegman, E Dils
papers.abstract: Racial, ethnic, and gender minorities face mental health disparities. While mental health care can help, minoritized groups could face discriminatory barriers in accessing it. Discrimination may be particularly pronounced in mental health care because providers have more discretion over accepting patients. Research documents discrimination broadly, including in access to health care, but there is limited empirical research on discrimination in access to mental health care. We provide the first experimental evidence, from a correspondence audit field experiment (“simulated patients” study), of the extent to which transgender and non-binary people, African Americans, and Hispanics face discrimination in access to mental health care appointments. We find significant discrimination against transgender or non-binary African Americans and Hispanics. We do not find evidence of discrimination against White transgender and non-binary prospective patients. We are mostly inconclusive as to if cisgender African Americans or Hispanics face discrimination, except we find evidence of discrimination against cisgender African American women.
papers.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：C93, I11, I14, I18, J15, J16
papers.zh_title: 基于性别认同、种族和族裔的心理健康服务获取歧视：来自审计通信实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 种族、族裔和性别少数群体面临心理健康差异。虽然心理健康服务可以提供帮助，但少数群体在获取服务时可能面临歧视性障碍。由于医疗服务提供者在接收患者方面拥有更多自由裁量权，歧视在心理健康服务中可能尤为突出。研究记录了广泛的歧视，包括在医疗保健获取方面，但关于心理健康服务获取歧视的实证研究有限。我们通过一项通信审计实地实验（“模拟患者”研究），首次提供了关于跨性别者、非二元性别者、非裔美国人和西班牙裔在获取心理健康服务预约时面临歧视程度的实验证据。我们发现针对跨性别或非二元性别的非裔美国人和西班牙裔存在显著歧视。我们没有发现针对白人跨性别和非二元性别潜在患者的歧视证据。关于顺性别非裔美国人或西班牙裔是否面临歧视，我们的结论大多不确定，但我们发现了针对顺性别非裔美国女性的歧视证据。

papers.title: Local Sectoral Specialization in a Warming World
papers.authors: Bruno Conte, Klaus Desmet, Dávid Krisztián Nagy, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg
papers.abstract: This paper quantitatively assesses the world's changing economic geography and sectoral specialization due to global warming. It proposes a two-sector dynamic spatial growth model that incorporates the relation between economic activity, carbon emissions, and temperature. The model is taken to the data at the 1° by 1° resolution for the entire world. Over a 200-year horizon, rising temperatures consistent with emissions under Representative Concentration Pathway 8.5 push people and economic activity northwards to Siberia, Canada, and Scandinavia. Compared to a world without climate change, clusters of agricultural specialization shift from Central Africa, Brazil, and India's Ganges Valley, to Central Asia, parts of China and northern Canada. Equatorial latitudes that lose agriculture specialize more in non-agriculture but, due to their persistently low productivity, lose population. By the year 2200, predicted losses in real GDP and utility are 6% and 15%, respectively. Higher trade costs make adaptation through changes in sectoral specialization more costly, leading to less geographic concentration in agriculture and larger climate-induced migration.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：F18, O13, O41, Q56, R11, R12
papers.zh_title: 变暖世界中的地方部门专业化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文定量评估了全球变暖导致的世界经济地理和部门专业化的变化。它提出了一个两部门动态空间增长模型，该模型纳入了经济活动、碳排放和温度之间的关系。该模型以全球1°×1°分辨率的数据进行校准。在200年的时间跨度内，与代表性浓度路径8.5下的排放相一致的气温上升，将人口和经济活动向北推向西伯利亚、加拿大和斯堪的纳维亚。与没有气候变化的世界相比，农业专业化集群从中非、巴西和印度恒河河谷转移到中亚、中国部分地区和加拿大北部。失去农业的赤道纬度地区更多地转向非农业专业化，但由于其持续的低生产率，人口减少。到2200年，实际GDP和效用的预测损失分别为6%和15%。更高的贸易成本使得通过改变部门专业化来适应变得更加昂贵，导致农业地理集中度降低和更大的气候引发的移民。

papers.title: Why is End-of-Life Spending So High? Evidence from Cancer Patients
papers.authors: Dan Zeltzer, Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Tzvi Shir, Salomon M. Stemmer, Ran D. Balicer
papers.abstract: The concentration of healthcare spending at the end of life is widely documented but poorly understood. To gain insight, we focus on patients newly diagnosed with cancer. They display the familiar pattern: even among cancer patients with similar initial prognoses, monthly spending in the year post diagnosis is over twice as high for those who die within the year than those who survive. This elevated spending on decedents is almost entirely driven by higher inpatient spending, particularly low-intensity admissions, which rise as the prognosis deteriorates. However, even for patients with very poor prognoses at the time of admission, most low-intensity admissions do not result in death, making it difficult to target spending reductions. We also find that among patients with the same cancer type and initial prognosis, end-of-life spending is substantially more elevated for younger patients compared to older patients, suggesting that treatment decisions are not exclusively present-focused. Taken together, these results provide a richer understanding of the sources of high end-of-life spending, without revealing any natural “remedies.”
papers.zh_title: 临终医疗支出为何如此之高？来自癌症患者的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗支出在生命末期的集中现象已被广泛记录，但对其原因知之甚少。为了深入了解，我们聚焦于新诊断的癌症患者。他们呈现出熟悉的模式：即使在初始预后相似的癌症患者中，诊断后一年内死亡者的月均支出是存活者的两倍多。临终者支出的增加几乎完全由更高的住院支出驱动，尤其是低强度入院，随着预后恶化而增加。然而，即使对于入院时预后极差的患者，大多数低强度入院并未导致死亡，这使得针对性地削减支出变得困难。我们还发现，在相同癌症类型和初始预后的患者中，年轻患者的临终支出显著高于老年患者，这表明治疗决策并非完全以当前为导向。综合来看，这些结果提供了对高临终支出来源的更丰富理解，但并未揭示任何自然的“补救措施”。

papers.title: Aggregate Advertising Expenditure in the U.S. Economy: What's Up? Is It Real?
papers.authors: Alvin Silk, Ernst R. Berndt
papers.abstract: The two components of the advertising industry – the creative sector that develops and produces messages, and the communications sector that transmits messages via various media – have each been greatly affected by advances in creative design and communications technologies. As the media composition of advertising has changed in the last century for both local and national advertising – from newspapers, outdoor and radio advertising to network and cable television, and most recently to internet and digital media – so too has been transformed the very concept of advertising, its functionality and its measurement.\nWe compare four sources of annual nominal U.S. aggregate advertising expenditure data – from the public sector Internal Revenue Service and the U.S. Census Bureau Survey of Service Industries, and the private sector McCann Erickson and Magna Global advertising agencies– that are available over various time periods. In nominal terms, we estimate the elasticity of advertising expenditures with respect to Gross Domestic Product, and find that this elasticity appears to have increased substantially beginning in the late 1990s – from about 1.4 to 1.9. The timing of this structural break coincides roughly with the decline of print, radio and network and cable television, and the dramatic increase in digital and internet-based advertising. \nTo understand the forces underlying this structural break in nominal advertising expenditures, data on media-specific advertising prices are needed, thereby converting nominal to real advertising. However, currently annual U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics Producer Price Index data on digital and many other advertising media prices are only available beginning in 2010. The availability of media-specific quality-constant price indexes would not only enable researchers to trace more completely the recent impact of digital and internet advertising, but would also facilitate contemporary and longstanding issues to be addressed surrounding the measurement of advertising effects, including how variations in the durability of response to advertising across media are related to inter-media price differentials, and why heterogeneity among firms and industries may arise with respect to the procyclicality of advertising policies.
papers.zh_title: 美国经济中的广告总支出：发生了什么变化？这是真实的吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 广告业的两个组成部分——负责开发和制作信息的创意部门，以及通过各种媒体传输信息的通信部门——都受到了创意设计和通信技术进步的极大影响。在过去一个世纪中，无论是本地广告还是全国广告，其媒体构成都发生了变化——从报纸、户外和广播广告，到网络和有线电视，再到最近的互联网和数字媒体——广告的概念、功能及其衡量方式也随之发生了转变。 我们比较了美国年度名义广告总支出的四个数据来源——来自公共部门的美国国税局和美国人口普查局服务业调查，以及私营部门的麦肯·埃里克森和Magna Global广告公司——这些数据覆盖了不同的时间段。以名义值计算，我们估算了广告支出相对于国内生产总值的弹性，并发现这一弹性似乎从20世纪90年代末开始大幅上升——从约1.4增至1.9。这一结构性断裂的时间点大致与印刷、广播、网络和有线电视的衰落，以及数字和互联网广告的急剧增长相吻合。 为了理解名义广告支出中这一结构性断裂背后的力量，需要特定媒体广告价格的数据，从而将名义广告转换为实际广告。然而，目前美国劳工统计局生产者价格指数中关于数字和许多其他广告媒体价格的年度数据仅从2010年开始可用。特定媒体质量恒定价格指数的可用性，不仅将使研究人员能够更完整地追溯数字和互联网广告的近期影响，还将有助于解决围绕广告效果衡量的当代和长期问题，包括不同媒体广告响应持久性的变化如何与媒体间价格差异相关联，以及为什么企业和行业之间在广告政策的顺周期性方面可能存在异质性。

papers.title: The Color of Money: Federal vs. Industry Funding of University Research
papers.authors: Tania Babina, Alex Xi He, Sabrina T. Howell, Elisabeth Ruth Perlman, Joseph Staudt
papers.abstract: U.S. universities have experienced a shift in research funding away from federal and towards private industry sources. This paper evaluates whether the source of funding – federal or private industry – is relevant for commercialization of research outputs. We link person-level grant data from 22 universities to patent and career outcomes (including IRS W-2 records). To identify a causal effect, we exploit individual-level variation in exposure to narrow federal R&D programs stemming from pre-existing field specialization. We instrument for the researcher’s funding sources with aggregate supply shocks to federal funding within these narrow fields. The results show that a higher share of federal funding reduces patenting and the chances of joining an incumbent firm, while increasing the chances of high- tech entrepreneurship and of remaining employed in academia. A decline in the federal share of funding is offset by an increase in the private share of funding, which has opposite effects. We conclude that the incentives of private funders to appropriate research outputs have important implications for the trajectory of university researcher careers and intellectual property.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ED, PR；JEL：G18, G38, I2, O3
papers.zh_title: 金钱的颜色：联邦与行业对大学研究的资助
papers.zh_abstract: 美国大学的研究资助正从联邦来源转向私营行业来源。本文评估了资助来源——联邦还是私营行业——是否与研究产出的商业化相关。我们将来自22所大学的个人层面资助数据与专利和职业结果（包括美国国税局W-2记录）联系起来。为了识别因果效应，我们利用了个人层面在先前领域专业化基础上接触狭窄联邦研发项目的差异。我们用这些狭窄领域内联邦资助的总体供给冲击作为研究者资助来源的工具变量。结果显示，联邦资助比例越高，会降低专利申请和加入现有公司的机会，同时增加高科技创业和继续受雇于学术界的可能性。联邦资助份额的下降被私营资助份额的增加所抵消，而私营资助具有相反的效果。我们得出结论，私营资助者获取研究产出的激励对大学研究者职业轨迹和知识产权具有重要影响。

papers.title: Nothing but the Truth? Private Information and Reporting on Corporate Social Responsibility
papers.authors: Jean-Etienne de Bettignies, Hua Fang Liu, David T. Robinson
papers.abstract: We develop and test a model in which firms can make non-verifiable statements about their CSR engagement, and hence may have incentives to mislead markets with exaggerated CSR claims. Firms may privately receive a signal correlated with their CSR engagement - e.g. a measure of greenhouse gas emissions - and have discretion over whether to publicly disclose it. Based on whether a signal is disclosed to them, and on what the signal is, markets form beliefs about the firm's CSR activities and the truthfulness of its claims. The model illustrates the disciplining effect of ex post private signal availability on firms' ex ante reporting on their CSR engagement. We test the model using a difference-in-differences approach that exploits special features of the introduction of the UK Companies Act of 2013, and find evidence supporting the model's predictions.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：D62, J31, M14, M52, Q58
papers.zh_title: 唯有真相？企业社会责任的私人信息与报告
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发并测试了一个模型，在该模型中，企业可以就其企业社会责任参与做出不可验证的陈述，因此可能有动机用夸大的企业社会责任声明来误导市场。企业可能私下收到一个与其企业社会责任参与相关的信号——例如温室气体排放的衡量指标——并有权决定是否公开披露该信号。基于信号是否被披露给它们以及信号的内容，市场会形成关于企业企业社会责任活动及其声明真实性的信念。该模型说明了事后私人信号可用性对企业事前关于其企业社会责任参与的报告的约束效应。我们利用英国2013年公司法引入的特殊特征，采用双重差分法对该模型进行了检验，并发现了支持模型预测的证据。

papers.title: The Effect of Occupational Licensing Stringency on the Teacher Quality Distribution
papers.authors: Bradley Larsen, Ziao Ju, Adam Kapor, Chuan Yu
papers.abstract: Concerned about the low academic ability of public school teachers, in the 1990s and 2000s, some states increased licensing stringency to weed out low-quality candidates, while others decreased restrictions to attract high-quality candidates. We offer a theoretical model justifying both reactions. Using data from 1991–2007 on licensing requirements and teacher quality—as measured by the selectivity of teachers’ undergraduate institutions—we find that stricter licensing requirements, especially those emphasizing academic coursework, increase the left tail of the quality distribution for secondary school teachers without significantly decreasing quality for high-minority or high-poverty districts.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：I2, J2, J4, J5, K2, K31, L5, L8
papers.zh_title: 职业许可严格程度对教师质量分布的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 出于对公立学校教师学术能力低下的担忧，在20世纪90年代和21世纪初，一些州提高了许可的严格程度以淘汰低质量候选人，而另一些州则减少了限制以吸引高质量候选人。我们提出了一个理论模型来证明这两种反应都是合理的。利用1991年至2007年关于许可要求和教师质量（以教师本科院校的选择性衡量）的数据，我们发现，更严格的许可要求，尤其是那些强调学术课程的要求，增加了中学教师质量分布的左尾，同时并未显著降低高少数民族或高贫困学区的教师质量。

papers.title: How Well Insured are Job Losers? Efficacy of the Public Safety Net.
papers.authors: Chloe N. East, David Simon
papers.abstract: An extensive literature documents large and persistent declines in earnings following job loss. We study how the public safety net mitigates this using the 1996-2013 Survey of Income and Program Participation. Using an individual fixed effects model, we document which public programs provide the most insurance, and how this varies by pre-job loss characteristics. We find that Unemployment Insurance provides the largest buffer against lost income, but that the neediest are less well insured compared to middle- and higher- income job losers. This has important implications for the progressivity of the safety net, and how best to support displaced workers.
papers.zh_title: 失业者的保险程度如何？公共安全网的效能
papers.zh_abstract: 大量文献记录了失业后收入大幅且持续的下降。我们利用1996-2013年收入与项目参与调查，研究公共安全网如何缓解这种情况。使用个体固定效应模型，我们记录了哪些公共项目提供了最大的保险，以及这如何因失业前的特征而异。我们发现，失业保险提供了对收入损失的最大缓冲，但与中高收入的失业者相比，最贫困者的保险程度较低。这对安全网的累进性以及如何最好地支持失业工人具有重要意义。

papers.title: Child-Driven Parenting: Differential Early Childhood Investment by Offspring Genotype
papers.authors: Asta Breinholt, Dalton Conley
papers.abstract: A growing literature points to children’s influence on parents’ behavior, including parental investments in children. Further, previous research has shown differential parental response by socioeconomic status to children's birth weight, cognitive ability, and school outcomes – all early life predictors of later socioeconomic success. This study considers an even earlier, more exogenous predictor of parental investments: offspring genotype. Specifically, we analyze (1) whether children’s genetic propensity towards educational success affects parenting during early childhood; and (2) whether parenting in response to children’s genetic propensity towards educational success is socially stratified. Using data from the Avon Longitudinal Survey of Parents and Children (N=7,738), we construct polygenic scores for educational attainment and regress cognitively stimulating parenting behavior during early childhood on these polygenic scores. We use a range of modeling strategies to address the concern that child’s genotype may be proxying unmeasured parent characteristics. Results show that parents provide more cognitive stimulation to children with higher education polygenic scores. This pattern varies by socioeconomic status with college-educated parents responding less to children’s genetic propensity towards educational success than non-college-educated parents do.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：D13, I14, I24, J13
papers.zh_title: 儿童驱动的养育：后代基因型对早期儿童投资的差异化影响
papers.zh_abstract: 越来越多的文献指出儿童对父母行为的影响，包括父母对子女的投资。此外，先前的研究表明，父母对子女出生体重、认知能力和学业成果（这些均为后期社会经济成功的早期生活预测指标）的反应因社会经济地位而异。本研究考虑了一个更早、更外生的父母投资预测因素：后代的基因型。具体而言，我们分析了（1）儿童对教育成功的遗传倾向是否会影响早期儿童期的养育行为；以及（2）父母对儿童教育成功遗传倾向的反应是否具有社会分层性。利用埃文亲子纵向研究数据（样本量N=7,738），我们构建了教育成就的多基因评分，并将早期儿童期的认知刺激性养育行为对这些多基因评分进行回归。我们采用一系列建模策略来解决儿童基因型可能代表未测量的父母特征这一担忧。结果显示，父母对具有更高教育多基因评分的儿童提供更多认知刺激。这种模式因社会经济地位而异，受过大学教育的父母对儿童教育成功遗传倾向的反应低于未受过大学教育的父母。

papers.title: The Gender Gap Among Top Business Executives
papers.authors: Wolfgang Keller, Teresa Molina, William W. Olney
papers.abstract: This paper examines gender differences among top US business executives using a large executive-employer matched data set spanning the last quarter century. Female executives make up 6% of the sample and exhibit more labor market churning — both higher entry and higher exit rates. Unconditionally, women earn 26% less than men, which decreases to 8% once executive characteristics, firm characteristics, and in particular job title are accounted for. We find that female executives are disproportionately represented in firms with more temporal flexibility and female-friendly corporate cultures, but this does not explain the gender pay gap. Rather, corporate culture is correlated with gender pay gaps within firms; specifically the within-firm gender pay gap is significantly smaller at female-friendly firms.
papers.zh_title: 高层企业高管中的性别差距
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用过去四分之一个世纪的大型高管-雇主匹配数据集，考察了美国高层企业高管中的性别差异。女性高管占样本的6%，并且表现出更高的劳动力市场流动性——无论是进入率还是退出率都更高。无条件情况下，女性收入比男性低26%，在考虑高管特征、企业特征，特别是职位头衔后，这一差距缩小至8%。我们发现，女性高管不成比例地集中在具有更高时间灵活性和女性友好企业文化的公司中，但这并不能解释性别薪酬差距。相反，企业文化与企业内部的性别薪酬差距相关；具体而言，在女性友好的公司中，企业内部的性别薪酬差距显著更小。

papers.title: Economic Analysis and Infrastructure Investment
papers.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, James M. Poterba
papers.abstract: This paper summarizes economic research on investment in public infrastructure and introduces the findings of several new studies on this topic. It begins with a review of several potential justifications for the public sector’s involvement in building, financing, and operating infrastructure, including limitations of private capital markets, externalities, and the control of natural monopolies. It then describes the conditions that characterize an optimal infrastructure investment program, emphasizing the need to extend project-based microeconomic cost-benefit analysis to incorporate the value of economy-wide macroeconomic and other externalities. It notes the importance of efficient use of infrastructure capital, and discusses three areas -- procurement, project management, and expenditure on externality mitigation – where further research could identify paths to efficiency improvement. It concludes by identifying several trends that have emerged since outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic that may have long-term effects on the role of both physical and digital infrastructure in the U.S. economy.
papers.zh_title: 经济分析与基础设施投资
papers.zh_abstract: 本文总结了关于公共基础设施投资的经济研究，并介绍了该主题下几项新研究的发现。文章首先回顾了公共部门参与建设、融资和运营基础设施的若干潜在理由，包括私人资本市场的局限性、外部性以及自然垄断的控制。然后，它描述了最优基础设施投资计划的条件，强调需要将基于项目的微观经济成本效益分析扩展到涵盖整个经济范围的宏观经济及其他外部性的价值。文章指出了基础设施资本有效利用的重要性，并讨论了三个领域——采购、项目管理和外部性缓解支出——在这些领域，进一步的研究可以识别提高效率的途径。最后，文章总结了自COVID-19疫情爆发以来出现的几种趋势，这些趋势可能对实体和数字基础设施在美国经济中的作用产生长期影响。

papers.title: Selection and Causation in the Parental Education Gradient in Health: Lessons from a Large Sample of Adoptees
papers.authors: Evelina Björkegren, Mikael Lindahl, Mårten Palme, Emilia Simeonova
papers.abstract: We use data from a large sample of adoptees born in Sweden to study to what extent the well-established association between parental educational attainments and adult health of the child generation can be attributed to pre- or post-birth factors, respectively. We find a significant association between the educational attainment of the adopting parents and child health outcomes as adults. These results suggest that growing up in a better-educated household has long-term effects on health outcomes. Our analysis of the mechanisms behind the results suggests that formation of human capital, and in particular cognitive and non-cognitive skills, may be important.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS；JEL：I1, I12, I14, I26
papers.zh_title: 父母教育梯度对健康影响中的选择与因果关系：来自大规模被收养者样本的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用瑞典出生的大规模被收养者样本数据，研究父母教育成就与子女成年健康之间已确立的关联在多大程度上可归因于出生前或出生后的因素。我们发现，收养父母的教育成就与子女成年后的健康结果之间存在显著关联。这些结果表明，在受教育程度更高的家庭中成长对健康结果有长期影响。我们对结果背后机制的分析表明，人力资本的形成，特别是认知和非认知技能，可能至关重要。

papers.title: Monetary Policy and Redistribution in Open Economies
papers.authors: Xing Guo, Pablo Ottonello, Diego J. Perez
papers.abstract: We study how monetary policy affects the asymmetric effects of globalization. To this end, we build an open-economy heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian model (HANK), in which households differ in their income, wealth, and real and financial integration with international markets. We use the model to reassess classic questions in international macroeconomics, but from a distributional perspective: What are the international spillovers of policies and shocks, how do alternative exchange-rate regimes compare, and what are the implications for monetary policy of the international price system. Our results indicate the presence of a trade-off between aggregate stabilization and inequality in consumption responses to external shocks. The asymmetric effects of globalization can be smaller for economies with higher international integration.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E52, F3, F32, F41, F6
papers.zh_title: 开放经济体中的货币政策与再分配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究货币政策如何影响全球化的非对称效应。为此，我们构建了一个开放经济体的异质性主体新凯恩斯模型（HANK），其中家庭在收入、财富以及与国际市场的实体和金融一体化程度方面存在差异。我们利用该模型从分配视角重新审视国际宏观经济学中的经典问题：政策和冲击的国际溢出效应如何，不同汇率制度如何比较，以及国际价格体系对货币政策有何影响。我们的结果表明，在应对外部冲击时，总体稳定与消费反应不平等之间存在权衡。对于国际一体化程度更高的经济体，全球化的非对称效应可能更小。

papers.title: Education and Consanguineous Marriage
papers.authors: Ş. Pelin Akyol, Naci H. Mocan
papers.abstract: At least one of every five marriages is consanguineous (between couples who are second cousins or closer) in the Middle East and North Africa, and the rate is higher than 50 percent in some parts of the world. Consanguineous marriage generates serious health problems for the offspring and constitutes an economic problem with its associated medical costs and the impact on human capital. The prevalence of consanguineous marriage and the resultant kinship networks can shape various dimensions of the society ranging from institutional structure to attitudes such as trust, individualism, and nepotism. Using data from Turkey and leveraging an education reform which increased mandatory schooling by three years, we find that the reform made women less likely to find consanguineous marriage as an acceptable practice, and that the reform reduced women’s propensity to marry a first cousin or a blood relative. Exposure to the reform altered women’s preferences in favor of personal autonomy. Women who are exposed to the reform are more likely to have met their husbands outside of family networks, they are less likely to get forced into marriage against their consent, and they are less likely to agree that only a son can ensure the continuation of the family blood line. These results indicate that educational attainment can alter behaviors and attitudes which may be rooted in culture.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I15, I18, I20, J10, Z1
papers.zh_title: 教育与近亲结婚
papers.zh_abstract: 在中东和北非，至少五分之一的婚姻是近亲结婚（夫妻为二代堂表亲或更近的关系），而在世界某些地区，这一比例超过50%。近亲结婚会给后代带来严重的健康问题，并因其相关的医疗费用和对人力资本的影响而构成经济问题。近亲结婚的盛行以及由此产生的亲属网络可以塑造社会的各个方面，从制度结构到信任、个人主义和裙带关系等态度。利用土耳其的数据，并借助一项将义务教育年限增加三年的教育改革，我们发现该改革使女性更不容易认为近亲结婚是可接受的做法，并且降低了女性与表亲或血亲结婚的倾向。接触改革改变了女性的偏好，使其倾向于个人自主。接触改革的女性更有可能在家庭网络之外认识丈夫，更不可能被迫违背自己意愿结婚，也更不可能同意只有儿子才能确保家族血脉延续的观点。这些结果表明，教育成就能够改变可能根植于文化的行为和态度。

papers.title: Efficient Programs to Support Businesses During and After Lockdowns
papers.authors: Thomas Philippon
papers.abstract: I analyze efficient government interventions to mitigate financial distress during a severe macroeconomic downturn. At the macroeconomic level, the key variable is the gap between the real wage and the shadow cost of labor. This gap is large when unemployment is high. At the micro level, laissez-faire leads to excessive liquidation of businesses but an indiscriminate bailout prevents efficient reallocations and implies a large transfer from taxpayers to existing private creditors. I show that a cost-efficient intervention can be achieved with a continuation premium, whereby the government agrees to reduce its claims by the same haircut as private creditors plus a fixed premium.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D24, G33, G38, H12
papers.zh_title: 封锁期间及之后支持企业的高效计划
papers.zh_abstract: 我分析了在严重宏观经济衰退期间缓解财务困境的高效政府干预措施。在宏观层面，关键变量是实际工资与劳动力影子成本之间的差距。当失业率高时，这一差距很大。在微观层面，自由放任会导致企业过度清算，但无差别的救助会阻止有效的资源重新配置，并意味着从纳税人向现有私人债权人进行大规模转移。我表明，通过持续溢价可以实现成本高效的干预，即政府同意以与私人债权人相同的减记比例加上固定溢价来减少其债权。

papers.title: Polluting Public Funds: The Effect of Environmental Regulation on Municipal Bonds.
papers.authors: Akshaya Jha, Stephen A. Karolyi, Nicholas Z. Muller
papers.abstract: We present three findings on the effects of environmental regulation on the municipal bond market. First, yields increase (decrease) after a new standard is proposed (finalized), consistent with the resolution of regulatory uncertainty. Second, around annual compliance announcements, yields fall for counties that remain in compliance but increase for newly noncompliant counties. Third, yields are substantially higher for bonds from counties just above the pollution threshold relative to counties just below the threshold. Our findings suggest that increases in regulatory stringency or uncertainty over future environmental policy increase the cost of municipal debt raised to fund critical infrastructure.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, PE；JEL：G12, G14, Q52, Q53, Q58, R51
papers.zh_title: 污染公共资金：环境监管对市政债券的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了关于环境监管对市政债券市场影响的三个发现。首先，在新标准提出（最终确定）后，收益率上升（下降），这与监管不确定性的消除相一致。其次，在年度合规公告前后，对于保持合规的县，收益率下降，但对于新不合规的县，收益率上升。第三，相对于刚好低于污染阈值的县，来自刚好高于污染阈值的县的债券收益率显著更高。我们的发现表明，监管严格程度的增加或未来环境政策的不确定性会提高为关键基础设施融资而筹集的市政债务成本。

papers.title: Rules, Discretion, and Corruption in Procurement: Evidence from Italian Government Contracting
papers.authors: Francesco Decarolis, Raymond Fisman, Paolo Pinotti, Silvia Vannutelli
papers.abstract: The benefits of bureaucratic discretion depend on the extent to which it is used for public benefit versus exploited for private gain. We study the relationship between discretion and corruption in Italian government procurement auctions, using a confidential database of firms and procurement officials investigated for corruption by Italian enforcement authorities. We show that discretionary procedure auctions (those awarded based on negotiated rather than open bidding) are associated with corruption only when accompanied by limits to competition. We further show that, while these “corruptible” discretionary auctions are chosen more often by officials who are themselves investigated for corruption, they are used less often in procurement administrations in which at least one official is investigated for corruption. These findings fit with a framework in which more discretion leads to greater efficiency as well as more opportunities for theft, and a central monitor manages this trade-off by limiting discretion for high-corruption procedures and locales. Overall, our results suggest that competition may allow procurement authorities to extract the benefits of discretion while limiting the resultant risks of abuse.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D72, D73, H57, K42
papers.zh_title: 采购中的规则、自由裁量权与腐败：来自意大利政府合同的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 官僚自由裁量权的收益取决于其用于公共利益还是被滥用于私人利益。我们利用意大利执法机构调查的涉及腐败的企业和采购官员的机密数据库，研究了意大利政府采购拍卖中自由裁量权与腐败之间的关系。我们表明，只有在伴随竞争限制时，自由裁量程序拍卖（即基于谈判而非公开招标授予的拍卖）才与腐败相关。我们进一步表明，虽然这些“易腐败的”自由裁量拍卖更常被自身受到腐败调查的官员选择，但在至少有一名官员受到腐败调查的采购管理部门中，它们的使用频率较低。这些发现符合一个框架，即更多的自由裁量权既带来更高的效率，也带来更多的盗窃机会，而中央监督者通过限制高腐败程序和地区的自由裁量权来管理这种权衡。总体而言，我们的结果表明，竞争可能允许采购当局在限制由此产生的滥用风险的同时，获取自由裁量权的收益。

papers.title: The Value of Time in the United States: Estimates from Nationwide Natural Field Experiments
papers.authors: Ariel Goldszmidt, John A. List, Robert D. Metcalfe, Ian Muir, V. Kerry Smith, Jenny Wang
papers.abstract: The value of time determines relative prices of goods and services, investments, productivity, economic growth, and measurements of income inequality. Economists in the 1960s began to focus on the value of non-work time, pioneering a deep literature exploring the optimal allocation and value of time. By leveraging key features of these classic time allocation theories, we use a novel approach to estimate the value of time (VOT) via two large-scale natural field experiments with the ridesharing company Lyft. We use random variation in both wait times and prices to estimate a consumer's VOT with a data set of more than 14 million observations across consumers in U.S. cities. We find that the VOT is roughly $19 per hour (or 75% (100%) of the after-tax mean (median) wage rate) and varies predictably with choice circumstances correlated with the opportunity cost of wait time. Our VOT estimate is larger than what is currently used by the U.S. Government, suggesting that society is under-valuing time improvements and subsequently under-investing public resources in time-saving infrastructure projects and technologies.
papers.zh_title: 美国的时间价值：来自全国性自然实地实验的估计
papers.zh_abstract: 时间价值决定了商品和服务的相对价格、投资、生产率、经济增长以及收入不平等的衡量。20世纪60年代的经济学家开始关注非工作时间的价值，开创了探索时间最优分配和价值的深厚文献。通过利用这些经典时间分配理论的关键特征，我们采用一种新颖的方法，通过与拼车公司Lyft进行的两个大规模自然实地实验来估计时间价值。我们利用等待时间和价格的随机变化，使用涵盖美国城市消费者超过1400万次观测的数据集来估计消费者的时间价值。我们发现时间价值约为每小时19美元（相当于税后平均工资率的75%或中位数工资率的100%），并且随着与等待时间机会成本相关的选择环境而可预测地变化。我们的时间价值估计高于美国政府目前使用的数值，这表明社会低估了时间改善的价值，并因此对节省时间的基础设施项目和技术投入了不足的公共资源。

papers.title: Financial Fragility during the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Robert L. Clark, Annamaria Lusardi, Olivia S. Mitchell
papers.abstract: Early in the COVID-19 pandemic, much of the US economy was closed to limit the virus’ spread, and several emergency interventions were implemented. Our analysis of older (45-75) respondents fielded in April-May of 2020 indicates that about one in five respondents was financially fragile and would have difficulty facing a mid-size emergency expense. Some subgroups were at particular risk of facing financial difficulties, especially younger respondents, those with larger families, Hispanics, and the low income. Moreover, the more financially literate were better able to handle such shocks, indicating that knowledge can provide some additional protection during a pandemic.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19大流行期间的金融脆弱性
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行初期，美国大部分经济被关闭以限制病毒传播，并实施了几项紧急干预措施。我们对2020年4月至5月期间调查的45-75岁受访者的分析表明，大约五分之一的受访者存在金融脆弱性，难以应对中等规模的紧急支出。一些亚群体面临财务困难的风险尤其高，特别是较年轻的受访者、家庭规模较大的受访者、西班牙裔以及低收入群体。此外，金融素养较高的人更能应对此类冲击，这表明知识可以在大流行期间提供一些额外的保护。

papers.title: Job Satisfaction Over the Life Course
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: We examine the relationship between union membership and job satisfaction over the life-course using data from the National Child Development Study (NCDS) tracking all those born in Great Britain in a single week in March in 1958 through to age 55 (2013). Data from immigrants as well as non-respondents to the original 1958 Perinatal Mortality Study (PMS) are added in later years. Conditioning on one’s social class at birth, together with one’s education and employment status, we find there is a significant negative correlation between union membership and job satisfaction that is apparent across the life-course. Lagged union membership status going back many years is negatively correlated with current job satisfaction, though its effects become statistically non-significant when conditioning on current union membership status. These results provide a different perspective to longitudinal studies showing short-term positive responses to switches in membership status. They are consistent with earlier work showing that this cohort of workers, and others before them, have persistently lower job satisfaction as union members compared to their non-union counterparts.
papers.zh_title: 整个生命历程中的工作满意度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用国家儿童发展研究的数据，考察了工会会员身份与工作满意度在整个生命历程中的关系。该研究追踪了1958年3月某一周内出生于英国的所有人，直至其55岁（2013年）。在后续年份中，还加入了移民以及1958年围产期死亡率研究的原始非受访者的数据。在控制了出生时的社会阶层以及教育和就业状况后，我们发现工会会员身份与工作满意度之间存在显著的负相关，这种关系在整个生命历程中都很明显。多年前的滞后工会会员身份与当前工作满意度呈负相关，但在控制当前工会会员身份后，其影响在统计上变得不显著。这些结果为显示会员身份转换带来短期积极反应的纵向研究提供了不同的视角。它们与早期研究一致，表明这一工人群体及其之前的群体，作为工会会员，其工作满意度持续低于非工会会员。

papers.title: School’s Out: Experimental Evidence on Limiting Learning Loss Using “Low-Tech” in a Pandemic
papers.authors: Noam Angrist, Peter Bergman, Moitshepi Matsheng
papers.abstract: Schools closed extensively during the COVID-19 pandemic and occur in other settings, such as teacher strikes and natural disasters. This paper provides some of the first experimental evidence on strategies to minimize learning loss when schools close. We run a randomized trial of low-technology interventions – SMS messages and phone calls – with parents to support their child. The combined treatment cost-effectively improves learning by 0.12 standard deviations. We develop remote assessment innovations, which show robust learning outcomes. Our findings have immediate policy relevance and long-run implications for the role of technology and parents as partial educational substitutes when schooling is disrupted.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, IO；JEL：I10, I20, I24, I25
papers.zh_title: 学校停课：关于在大流行中使用“低技术”限制学习损失的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行期间，学校广泛停课，这种情况也发生在其他环境中，如教师罢工和自然灾害。本文提供了一些关于在学校停课时最小化学习损失策略的首批实验证据。我们进行了一项低技术干预措施——短信和电话——的随机试验，以支持家长帮助孩子。综合治疗成本有效地将学习效果提高了0.12个标准差。我们开发了远程评估创新，显示出稳健的学习成果。我们的发现具有直接的现实政策意义，并对当学校教育中断时，技术和家长作为部分教育替代者的角色具有长期启示。

papers.title: Granular Instrumental Variables
papers.authors: Xavier Gabaix, Ralph S. J. Koijen
papers.abstract: We propose a new way to construct instruments in a broad class of economic environments. In the economies we study, a few large firms, industries or countries account for an important share of economic activity. As the idiosyncratic shocks from these large players affect aggregate outcomes, they are valid and often powerful instruments. We provide a methodology to extract idiosyncratic shocks from the data and create “granular instrumental variables” (GIVs), which are size-weighted sums of idiosyncratic shocks. These GIVs allow us to then estimate parameters of interest, including causal elasticities and multipliers. We illustrate the idea in a basic supply and demand framework. GIVs provide a novel approach to identify both supply and demand elasticities based on idiosyncratic shocks to either supply or demand. We then show how to extend the basic procedure to cover a range of empirically relevant situations. As an application, we measure how “sovereign yield shocks” transmit across countries in the Eurozone. We sketch how GIVs could be useful to estimate a host of other causal parameters in economics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, LS, ME；JEL：C01, E0, F0, G0
papers.zh_title: 颗粒工具变量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种在广泛的经济环境中构建工具变量的新方法。在我们研究的经济体中，少数大型企业、行业或国家占据了经济活动的重要份额。由于这些大型参与者的特质冲击会影响总体结果，因此它们是有效且通常强有力的工具变量。我们提供了一种从数据中提取特质冲击并创建“颗粒工具变量”的方法，该变量是特质冲击的规模加权和。这些颗粒工具变量使我们能够估计感兴趣的参数，包括因果弹性和乘数。我们在一个基本的供需框架中阐述了这一思想。颗粒工具变量提供了一种基于供给或需求的特质冲击来识别供给和需求弹性的新方法。然后，我们展示了如何将基本程序扩展到涵盖一系列经验相关的情况。作为一个应用，我们衡量了“主权收益率冲击”如何在欧元区国家间传导。我们概述了颗粒工具变量如何有助于估计经济学中的许多其他因果参数。

papers.title: Revisiting the Entrepreneurial Commercialization of Academic Science: Evidence from “Twin” Discoveries
papers.authors: Matt Marx, David H. Hsu
papers.abstract: Which factors shape the commercialization of academic scientific discoveries via startup formation? Prior literature has identified several contributing factors but does not address the fundamental problem that the commercial potential of a nascent discovery is generally unobserved, which potentially confounds inference. We construct a sample of approximately 20,000 “twin” scientific articles, which allows us to hold constant differences in the nature of the advance and more precisely examine characteristics that predict startup commercialization. In this framework, several commonly-accepted factors appear not to influence commercialization. However, we find that teams of academic scientists whose former collaborators include “star” serial entrepreneurs are much more likely to commercialize their own discoveries via startups, as are more interdisciplinary teams of scientists.
papers.zh_title: 重新审视学术科学的创业商业化：来自“双胞胎”发现的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 哪些因素通过初创企业形成塑造了学术科学发现的商业化？现有文献已经确定了几个促成因素，但没有解决一个根本问题，即新生发现的商业潜力通常是不可观测的，这可能会混淆推断。我们构建了一个约20,000篇“双胞胎”科学文章的样本，这使得我们能够控制进展性质的差异，并更精确地检查预测初创企业商业化的特征。在这个框架下，几个普遍接受的因素似乎并不影响商业化。然而，我们发现，其前合作者包括“明星”连续创业者的学术科学家团队，以及更具跨学科性的科学家团队，通过初创企业商业化自身发现的可能性要大得多。

papers.title: Police Force Size and Civilian Race
papers.authors: Aaron Chalfin, Benjamin Hansen, Emily K. Weisburst, Morgan C. Williams, Jr.
papers.abstract: We report the first empirical estimate of the race-specific effects of larger police forces in the United States. Each additional police officer abates approximately 0.1 homicides. In per capita terms, effects are twice as large for Black versus white victims. At the same time, larger police forces make more arrests for low-level “quality-of-life” offenses, with effects that imply a disproportionate burden for Black Americans. Notably, cities with large Black populations do not share equally in the benefits of investments in police manpower. Our results provide novel empirical support for the popular narrative that Black communities are simultaneously over and under-policed.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：H72, J15, J18, K42
papers.zh_title: 警察规模与平民种族
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了美国警察规模扩大对种族特定影响的首次实证估计。每增加一名警察，大约可减少0.1起凶杀案。按人均计算，对黑人受害者的影响是白人受害者的两倍。同时，更大的警察队伍会因低层次的“生活质量”犯罪而逮捕更多人，其影响意味着黑人美国人承受了不成比例的负担。值得注意的是，黑人人口众多的城市并未平等分享警察人力投资的收益。我们的结果为黑人社区同时被过度和不足警务化的流行说法提供了新颖的实证支持。

papers.title: Credit Frictions in the Great Recession
papers.authors: Patrick J. Kehoe, Pierlauro Lopez, Virgiliu Midrigan, Elena Pastorino
papers.abstract: Although a credit tightening is commonly recognized as a key determinant of the Great Recession, to date, it is unclear whether a worsening of credit conditions faced by households or by firms was most responsible for the downturn. Some studies have suggested that the household-side credit channel is quantitatively the most important one. Many others contend that the firm-side channel played a crucial role. We propose a model in which both channels are present and explicitly formalized. Our analysis indicates that the household-side credit channel is quantitatively more relevant than the firm-side credit channel. We then evaluate the relative benefits of a fixed-sized transfer to households and to firms that improves each group's access to credit. We find that the effects of such a transfer on employment are substantially larger when the transfer targets households rather than firms. Hence, we provide theoretical and quantitative support to the view that the employment decline during the Great Recession would have been less severe if instead of focusing on easing firms' access to credit, the government had expended an equal amount of resources to alleviate households' credit constraints.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E3, E32, E6, E62, G51, J2, J38, J6, J64
papers.zh_title: 大衰退中的信贷摩擦
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管信贷紧缩被普遍认为是导致大衰退的关键因素，但迄今为止，尚不清楚家庭或企业面临的信贷条件恶化对经济衰退的影响最大。一些研究表明，家庭侧信贷渠道在数量上最为重要。另有许多人则认为，企业侧渠道发挥了关键作用。我们提出了一个模型，其中两种渠道都存在并得到明确形式化。我们的分析表明，家庭侧信贷渠道在数量上比企业侧信贷渠道更为重要。然后，我们评估了向家庭和企业提供固定规模转移支付以改善各自信贷获取能力的相对收益。我们发现，当转移支付针对家庭而非企业时，这种转移支付对就业的影响要大得多。因此，我们从理论和数量上支持了以下观点：如果政府不是专注于缓解企业信贷获取，而是投入同等资源来缓解家庭信贷约束，那么大衰退期间的就业下降本不会如此严重。

papers.title: COVID and the Economic Importance of In-Person K-12 Schooling
papers.authors: David A. Green, Ali Karimirad, Gaëlle Simard-Duplain, Henry E. Siu
papers.abstract: The extent to which K-12 schools should remain open is at the forefront of discussions on long-term pandemic management. In this context, there has been little mention of the immediate importance of K-12 schooling for the rest of the economy. Eliminating in-person schooling reduces the amount of labour time parents of school-aged children have available to work, and therefore reduces income to those workers and the economy as a whole. We discuss two measures of economic importance, and how they can be modified to better reflect the vital role played by K-12 education. The first is its size, as captured by the fraction of GDP that is produced by that sector. The second is its centrality, reflecting how essential a sector is to the network of economic activity. Using data from Canada’s Census of Population and Symmetric Input-Output Tables, we show how accounting for this role dramatically increases the importance of K-12 schooling.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情与面对面K-12学校教育的经济重要性
papers.zh_abstract: K-12学校是否应保持开放是长期疫情管理讨论的前沿问题。在此背景下，很少有人提及K-12学校教育对经济其他部门的直接重要性。取消面对面教学会减少学龄儿童父母可用于工作的时间，从而减少这些工人和整个经济的收入。我们讨论了两种衡量经济重要性的指标，以及如何修改它们以更好地反映K-12教育所起的关键作用。第一个是其规模，由该部门生产的GDP份额来衡量。第二个是其中心性，反映一个部门对经济活动网络的重要性。利用加拿大人口普查和对称投入产出表的数据，我们展示了考虑这一作用如何显著增加K-12学校教育的重要性。

papers.title: Is Air Pollution Regulation Too Lenient? Evidence from US Offset Markets
papers.authors: Joseph S. Shapiro, Reed Walker
papers.abstract: This paper describes a framework to estimate the marginal cost of air pollution regulation, then applies it to assess whether a large set of existing U.S. air pollution regulations have marginal benefits exceeding their marginal costs. The approach utilizes an important yet under-explored provision of the Clean Air Act requiring new or expanding plants to pay incumbents in the same or neighboring counties to reduce their pollution emissions. These “offset” regulations create several hundred decentralized, local markets for pollution that differ by pollutant and location. Economic theory and empirical tests suggest these market prices reveal information about the marginal cost of abatement for new or expanding firms. We compare estimates of the marginal benefit of abatement from leading air quality models to offset prices. We find that, for most regions and pollutants, the marginal benefits of pollution abatement exceed mean offset prices more than ten-fold. In at least one market, however, estimated marginal benefits are below offset prices.
papers.zh_title: 空气污染监管是否过于宽松？来自美国抵消市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了一个估算空气污染监管边际成本的框架，然后将其应用于评估美国现有大量空气污染监管的边际收益是否超过其边际成本。该方法利用了《清洁空气法》中一个重要但尚未充分探索的条款，该条款要求新建或扩建的工厂向同一或邻近县的现有企业支付费用，以减少其污染排放。这些“抵消”监管创建了数百个分散的、地方性的污染市场，这些市场因污染物和地点而异。经济理论和实证检验表明，这些市场价格揭示了新建或扩建企业减排的边际成本信息。我们将领先空气质量模型估算的减排边际收益与抵消价格进行比较。我们发现，对于大多数地区和污染物，减排的边际收益超过平均抵消价格的十倍以上。然而，在至少一个市场中，估算的边际收益低于抵消价格。

papers.title: The Remarkable Growth in Financial Economics, 1974-2020
papers.authors: G. William Schwert
papers.abstract: Academic finance has grown and evolved in the 46 years since the Journal of Financial Economics (JFE) began publishing papers. This paper uses detailed data on the 2,858 papers written by 3,152 different authors published in the JFE from 1974-2019. Cumulatively, these papers have received 278,018 citations from other published papers as reflected in the Social Science Citation Index. Increasing computing power and electronic communication have likely resulted in trends toward more empirical work, more co-authorship, and more complex papers. Growth in the demand for finance faculty has driven up faculty salaries, and therefore the demand for journal services.
papers.zh_title: 金融经济学的显著增长，1974-2020年
papers.zh_abstract: 自《金融经济学杂志》（JFE）开始发表论文以来的46年间，学术金融学已经发展并演变。本文使用了1974年至2019年间发表在JFE上的2858篇论文的详细数据，这些论文由3152位不同的作者撰写。累计而言，这些论文在社会科学引文索引中获得了来自其他已发表论文的278018次引用。计算能力的增强和电子通信的发展可能导致实证研究增多、合著增加以及论文更复杂的趋势。对金融教师需求的增长推高了教师薪资，从而也增加了对期刊服务的需求。

papers.title: Zombies at Large? Corporate Debt Overhang and the Macroeconomy
papers.authors: Òscar Jordà, Martin Kornejew, Moritz Schularick, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: With business leverage at record levels, the effects of corporate debt overhang on growth and investment have become a prominent concern. In this paper, we study the effects of corporate debt overhang based on long-run cross-country data covering the near- universe of modern business cycles. We show that business credit booms typically do not leave a lasting imprint on the macroeconomy. Quantile local projections indicate that business credit booms do not affect the economy’s tail risks either. Yet in line with theory, we find that the economic costs of corporate debt booms rise when inefficient debt restructuring and liquidation impede the resolution of corporate financial distress and make it more likely that corporate zombies creep along.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, G32, G33, N20
papers.zh_title: 僵尸企业横行？企业债务积压与宏观经济
papers.zh_abstract: 随着企业杠杆率达到创纪录水平，企业债务积压对增长和投资的影响已成为一个突出的担忧。在本文中，我们基于覆盖现代商业周期近乎全貌的长期跨国数据，研究了企业债务积压的影响。我们表明，企业信贷繁荣通常不会对宏观经济留下持久印记。分位数局部投影表明，企业信贷繁荣也不会影响经济的尾部风险。然而，与理论一致，我们发现，当低效的债务重组和清算阻碍企业财务困境的解决，并使得企业僵尸化更可能蔓延时，企业债务繁荣的经济成本就会上升。

papers.title: Cybersecurity Risk
papers.authors: Chris Florackis, Christodoulos Louca, Roni Michaely, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: Using textual analysis and comparing cybersecurity-risk disclosures of firms that were hacked to others that were not, we propose a novel firm-level measure of cybersecurity risk for all US-listed firms. We then examine whether cybersecurity risk is priced in the cross-section of stock returns. Portfolios of firms with high exposure to cybersecurity risk outperform other firms, on average, by up to 8.3% per year. At the same time, high-exposure firms perform poorly in periods of high cybersecurity risk. Reassuringly, the measure is higher in information-technology industries, correlates with characteristics linked to firms hit by cyberattacks, and predicts future cyberattacks.
papers.zh_title: 网络安全风险
