papers.zh_abstract: 利用文本分析，并比较被黑客攻击的公司与未被攻击公司的网络安全风险披露，我们为所有美国上市公司提出了一种新颖的公司层面网络安全风险度量指标。然后，我们检验了网络安全风险是否在股票回报的横截面上被定价。高网络安全风险敞口的公司投资组合平均每年比其他公司表现高出8.3%。同时，高敞口公司在网络安全风险高企时期表现不佳。令人欣慰的是，该指标在信息技术行业更高，与遭受网络攻击公司的特征相关，并能预测未来的网络攻击。

papers.title: Do Enlarged Fiscal Deficits Cause Inflation: The Historical Record
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Mickey D. Levy
papers.abstract: In this paper we survey the historical record for over two centuries on the connection between expansionary fiscal policy and inflation. As a backdrop, we briefly lay out several theoretical approaches to the effects of fiscal deficits on inflation: the earlier Keynesian and monetarist approaches; and modern approaches incorporating expectations and forward looking behavior: unpleasant monetarist arithmetic and the fiscal theory of the price level.
papers.zh_title: 扩大的财政赤字会导致通货膨胀吗：历史记录
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们调查了两个多世纪以来关于扩张性财政政策与通货膨胀之间联系的历史记录。作为背景，我们简要阐述了关于财政赤字对通货膨胀影响的几种理论方法：早期的凯恩斯主义和货币主义方法；以及包含预期和前瞻性行为的现代方法：不愉快的货币主义算术和价格水平的财政理论。

papers.title: Who Benefits From Attending Effective High Schools?
papers.authors: C. Kirabo Jackson, Shanette C. Porter, John Q. Easton, Sebastián Kiguel
papers.abstract: We estimate the longer-run effects of attending an effective high school (one that improves a combination of test scores, survey measures of socio-emotional development, and behaviors in 9th grade) for students who are more versus less educationally advantaged (i.e., likely to attain more years of education based on 8th-grade characteristics). All students benefit from attending effective schools, but the least advantaged students experience larger improvements in high-school graduation, college going, and school-based arrests. This heterogeneity is not solely due to less-advantaged groups being marginal for particular outcomes. Commonly used test-score value-added understates the long-run importance of effective schools, particularly for less-advantaged populations. Patterns suggest this partly reflects less-advantaged students being relatively more responsive to non-test-score dimensions of school quality.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I20, J0
papers.zh_title: 谁从就读有效高中中受益？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了就读有效高中（即能提高九年级考试成绩、社会情感发展调查指标和行为综合表现的高中）对教育优势程度不同（即基于八年级特征可能获得更多教育年限）的学生的长期影响。所有学生都从就读有效学校中受益，但最不具优势的学生在高中毕业、大学入学和校内逮捕方面经历了更大的改善。这种异质性并不仅仅是因为弱势群体在特定结果上处于边际状态。常用的考试成绩增值指标低估了有效学校的长期重要性，特别是对弱势群体而言。模式表明，这在一定程度上反映了弱势学生对学校质量的非考试成绩维度相对更敏感。

papers.title: A Unified Model of Cohort Mortality for Economic Analysis
papers.authors: Adriana Lleras-Muney, Flavien E. Moreau
papers.abstract: We propose a dynamic production function of population health and mortality from birth onwards. Our parsimonious model provides an excellent fit for the mortality and survival curves for both primate and human populations since 1816. The model sheds light on the dynamics behind many phenomena documented in the literature, including (i) the existence and evolution of mortality gradients across socio-economic statuses, (ii) non-monotonic dynamic effects of in-utero shocks, (iii) persistent or “scarring” effects of wars and (iv) mortality displacement after large temporary shocks such as extreme weather.
papers.zh_title: 用于经济分析的队列死亡率统一模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个从出生开始的人口健康与死亡率的动态生产函数。我们的简约模型对自1816年以来的灵长类动物和人类种群的死亡率与生存曲线均提供了极佳的拟合。该模型揭示了文献中记载的许多现象背后的动态机制，包括：(i) 不同社会经济地位之间死亡率梯度的存在与演变，(ii) 子宫内冲击的非单调动态效应，(iii) 战争的持续性或“疤痕”效应，以及 (iv) 极端天气等大型暂时性冲击后的死亡率位移。

papers.title: Toward a Uniform Classification of Nurse Practitioner Scope of Practice Laws
papers.authors: Benjamin J. McMichael, Sara Markowitz
papers.abstract: Many states’ scope of practice laws limit the ability of nurse practitioners to deliver care by requiring physician supervision of their practices and prescribing activities. A robust literature has evolved around examining the role of these scope of practice laws in various contexts, including labor market outcomes, healthcare access, healthcare prices, and the delivery of care for specific diseases. Unfortunately, these studies use different, and sometimes conflicting, measures of scope of practice laws, limiting their comparability and overall usefulness to policymakers and future researchers. We address this salient problem by providing a recommended coding of nurse practitioner scope of practice laws over a 24-year period based on actual statutory and regulatory language. Our classification of scope of practice laws solves an important problem within this growing literature and provides a solid legal foundation for researchers as they continue to investigate the effects of these laws.
papers.zh_title: 迈向执业护士执业范围法律的统一分类
papers.zh_abstract: 许多州的执业范围法律通过要求医生监督执业护士的实践和处方活动，限制了其提供护理的能力。围绕这些执业范围法律在不同情境下的作用，已形成了丰富的文献，包括劳动力市场结果、医疗可及性、医疗价格以及特定疾病护理的提供。不幸的是，这些研究使用了不同且有时相互矛盾的执业范围法律衡量标准，限制了它们的可比性以及对政策制定者和未来研究者的整体实用性。我们通过基于实际成文法和监管语言，提供一个24年期间执业护士执业范围法律的推荐编码，来解决这一突出问题。我们对执业范围法律的分类解决了这一不断增长的文献中的一个重要问题，并为研究者继续调查这些法律的影响提供了坚实的法律基础。

papers.title: The Career Evolution of the Sex Gap in Wages: Discrimination vs. Human Capital Investment
papers.authors: David Neumark, Giannina Vaccaro
papers.abstract: Several studies find that there is little sex gap in wages at labor market entry, and that the sex gap in wages emerges (and grows) with time in the labor market. This evidence is consistent with (i) there is little or no sex discrimination in wages at labor market entry, and (ii) the emergence of the sex gap in wages with time in the labor market reflects differences between women and men in human capital investment (and other decisions), with women investing less early in their careers. Indeed, some economists explicitly interpret the evidence this way. We show that this interpretation ignores two fundamental implications of the human capital model, and that differences in investment can complicate the interpretation of both the starting sex gap in wages (or absence of a gap), and the differences in “returns” to experience. We then estimate stylized structural models of human capital investment and wage growth to identify the effects of discrimination (or other sources of a starting pay gap) and differences in human capital investment.
papers.zh_title: 工资性别差距的职业演变：歧视与人力资本投资
papers.zh_abstract: 多项研究发现，在进入劳动力市场时工资的性别差距很小，而工资的性别差距随着在劳动力市场的时间推移而出现（并扩大）。这一证据与以下两点一致：(i) 在进入劳动力市场时，工资方面几乎没有或根本没有性别歧视，以及 (ii) 工资性别差距随劳动力市场时间推移而出现，反映了女性和男性在人力资本投资（及其他决策）上的差异，女性在职业生涯早期投资较少。事实上，一些经济学家明确以此方式解释这一证据。我们表明，这种解释忽略了人力资本模型的两个基本含义，并且投资差异可能使对起始工资性别差距（或差距缺失）以及经验“回报”差异的解释复杂化。然后，我们估计了人力资本投资和工资增长的简约结构模型，以识别歧视（或起始工资差距的其他来源）与人力资本投资差异的影响。

papers.title: The Political Economy of Deep Integration
papers.authors: Giovanni Maggi, Ralph Ossa
papers.abstract: Modern trade agreements no longer emphasize basic trade liberalization but instead focus on international policy coordination in a much broader sense. In this paper we introduce the emerging literature on the political economy of such deep integration agreements. We organize our discussion around three main points. First, the political conflict surrounding trade agreements is moving beyond the classic antagonism of exporter interests who gain from trade and import-competing interests who lose from trade. Second, there is a more intense popular backlash against deep integration agreements than there was against shallow integration agreements. And third, the welfare economics of trade agreements have become more complex, in the sense that the insight that "free trade is good" is no longer sufficient as a guide to evaluating the efficiency of international agreements.
papers.zh_title: 深度一体化的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 现代贸易协定不再强调基本的贸易自由化，而是聚焦于更广泛意义上的国际政策协调。在本文中，我们介绍了关于此类深度一体化协定的政治经济学新兴文献。我们围绕三个主要观点组织讨论。首先，围绕贸易协定的政治冲突正在超越经典的从贸易中获益的出口商利益与因贸易受损的进口竞争利益之间的对立。其次，与浅层一体化协定相比，针对深度一体化协定的民众反弹更为激烈。第三，贸易协定的福利经济学变得更加复杂，因为“自由贸易是好的”这一见解不再足以作为评估国际协定效率的指南。

papers.title: Horizonal Merger Analysis
papers.authors: Louis Kaplow
papers.abstract: Economic analysis of competition regulation is most developed in the domain of horizontal mergers, and modern agency guidelines reflect a substantial consensus on the appropriate template for merger assessment. Nevertheless, official protocols are understood to rest on a problematic market definition exercise, to use HHIs and ΔHHIs in ways that conflict with standard models, and more broadly to diverge with how economic analysis of proposed mergers should be and often is conducted. These gaps, unfortunately, are more consequential than is generally appreciated. Moreover, additional unrecognized errors and omissions are at least as important: analysis of efficiencies, which are thought to justify a permissive approach, fails to draw on the most relevant fields of economics; entry is often a misanalyzed afterthought; official information collection and decision protocols violate basic tenets of decision analysis; and single-sector, partial equilibrium analysis is employed despite the presence of substantial distortions (many due to imperfect competition) in many sectors of the economy. This article elaborates these deficiencies, offers preliminary analysis of how they can best be addressed, and identifies priorities for further research.
papers.zh_title: 横向并购分析
papers.zh_abstract: 竞争监管的经济分析在横向并购领域最为成熟，现代机构指南反映了对并购评估适当模板的实质性共识。然而，官方协议被认为依赖于有问题的市场界定练习，以与标准模型相冲突的方式使用赫芬达尔-赫希曼指数（HHI）和ΔHHI，并且更广泛地说，与经济分析应该如何以及通常如何进行拟议并购评估存在分歧。不幸的是，这些差距比通常认识到的更为重要。此外，其他未被认识到的错误和遗漏至少同样重要：被认为证明宽松方法合理性的效率分析未能借鉴最相关的经济学领域；进入往往是被错误分析的事后想法；官方信息收集和决策协议违反了决策分析的基本原则；并且在经济许多部门存在大量扭曲（许多源于不完全竞争）的情况下，仍采用单一部门、局部均衡分析。本文阐述了这些缺陷，提供了如何最好地解决这些问题的初步分析，并确定了进一步研究的优先事项。

papers.title: Effects of English Learner Reclassification Policies on Academic Trajectories
papers.authors: Julian Betts, Laura Hill, Karen Bachofer, Joseph Hayes, Andrew Lee, Andrew Zau
papers.abstract: In California 38% of students are either current or former English Learners (ELs). A crucial decision in their educational trajectory is when to reclassify ELs. Upon reclassification, ELs cease to receive language supports, but have more opportunities to take the same courses as fluent English speakers. This paper uses regression discontinuity in California’s two largest school districts to ask: “Are ELs being reclassified at the right time?” In most cases the districts were reclassifying students appropriately, with no discontinuity for outcomes including test scores and graduation on time. Exceptions in which those meeting the reclassification criteria subsequently performed worse were resolved with Los Angeles’s newer reclassification policy.
papers.zh_title: 英语学习者重新分类政策对学业轨迹的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在加利福尼亚州，38%的学生是当前或曾经的英语学习者（ELs）。他们学业轨迹中的一个关键决策是何时对ELs进行重新分类。重新分类后，ELs不再接受语言支持，但有更多机会与流利英语使用者修读相同课程。本文利用加利福尼亚州两个最大学区的断点回归设计来探究：“ELs是否在正确的时间被重新分类？”在大多数情况下，学区恰当地对学生进行了重新分类，在包括考试成绩和按时毕业在内的结果上没有出现不连续性。例外情况是，那些符合重新分类标准的学生随后表现更差，而洛杉矶的新重新分类政策解决了这一问题。

papers.title: Modern US Workers’ Compensation and Work-Related Injury: No Evidence of Moral Hazard
papers.authors: Emiliano Huet-Vaughn, Youssef Benzarti
papers.abstract: We exploit recent decades of US state-level reforms to the generosity of workers’ compensation programs to estimate the associated moral hazard, utilizing an event- study design and analyzing 9 separate reform categories. The reforms vary - some affecting benefit size, some the probability of receiving benefits; some paid in cash, some in-kind; some constituting increases, some decreases, in generosity. Across the board, we find no evidence of resulting changes in workplace injuries, and, generally, can rule out even moderate moral hazard responses for severe and less severe injuries, suggesting a key moral hazard cost of workers’ compensation benefits is negligible.
papers.zh_title: 现代美国工人赔偿与工伤：无道德风险证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用近几十年来美国各州对工人赔偿计划慷慨程度的改革，利用事件研究设计并分析9个独立的改革类别，来估计相关的道德风险。这些改革各不相同——有些影响福利规模，有些影响获得福利的概率；有些以现金支付，有些以实物支付；有些增加了慷慨程度，有些则减少了。总体而言，我们没有发现由此导致的工作场所伤害变化的证据，并且通常可以排除对严重和不太严重伤害的适度道德风险反应，这表明工人赔偿福利的一个关键道德风险成本可以忽略不计。

papers.title: A Theory of the Nominal Character of Stock Securities
papers.authors: Bernard Dumas, Marcel Savioz
papers.abstract: We construct recursive solutions for, and study the properties of the dynamic equilibrium of an economy with three types of agents: (i) house-hold/investors who supply labor with a finite elasticity, consume a large variety of goods that are not perfect substitutes and trade government bonds; (ii) firms that produce those varieties of goods, receive productivity shocks and set prices in a Calvo manner; (iii) a government that collects an income-driven fiscal surplus and acts mechanically, buying and selling bonds in accordance with a Taylor policy rule based on expected inflation. In this setting we show that stock market returns are much less than one-for-one related to inflation over a one-year holding period, which means that stock securities have a strong nominal character. We also show that their nominal character diminishes as the length of the stock-holding period increases, in accordance with empirical evidence.
papers.zh_title: 股票证券名义特征的理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了递归解，并研究了一个包含三类代理人的经济体的动态均衡性质：(i) 家庭/投资者，他们以有限弹性提供劳动力，消费大量非完全替代品，并交易政府债券；(ii) 企业，它们生产这些差异化产品，受到生产率冲击，并以卡尔沃方式设定价格；(iii) 政府，它征收与收入相关的财政盈余，并机械地运作，根据基于预期通胀的泰勒政策规则买卖债券。在此设定下，我们表明，在一年持有期内，股票市场回报与通胀的关联远小于一对一，这意味着股票证券具有很强的名义特征。我们还表明，随着股票持有期长度的增加，其名义特征会减弱，这与经验证据一致。

papers.title: Firms' Exposures to Geographic Risks
papers.authors: Bernard Dumas, Tymur Gabuniya, Richard C. Marston
papers.abstract: The distinction between domicile and place of business is becoming more and more relevant as a growing number of firms have activities abroad. In most statistical studies of international stock returns, a firm is included in a country’s index if its headquarters are located in that country. This classification scheme ignores the operations of the firm. We propose, instead, to measure the firms’ exposures to “geographic zones” according to the place where they conduct business. As a representation of “geographic risks”, we synthesize zone factors from all firms in the dataset, be they domestic firms or multinationals. And we show the properties of the exposures to the zone factors.
papers.zh_title: 企业对地理风险的暴露
papers.zh_abstract: 随着越来越多的企业在海外开展业务，注册地与营业地之间的区别变得越来越重要。在大多数关于国际股票回报的统计研究中，如果一家公司的总部位于某个国家，该公司就会被纳入该国的指数。这种分类方案忽略了企业的实际运营情况。我们提出，应根据企业开展业务的地点来衡量其对“地理区域”的风险暴露。作为“地理风险”的代表，我们从数据集中的所有企业（无论是国内企业还是跨国公司）中综合出区域因子。我们展示了这些区域因子风险暴露的特性。

papers.title: Common Shocks in Stocks and Bonds
papers.authors: Anna Cieslak, Hao Pang
papers.abstract: We propose an approach to identifying economic shocks (monetary, growth, and risk-premium news) from stock returns and Treasury yield changes, which allows us to study the drivers of asset prices at a daily frequency since the early 1980s. We apply the identification to examine investors’ responses to news from the Fed and key macro announcements. We uncover two risk-premium shocks—time-varying compensation for discount-rate and cash-flow news—which have distinct effects on stocks and bonds. Since the mid-1990s, the Fed-induced reductions in both risk premium sources have generated high average stock returns but an ambiguous response in bonds on FOMC days.
papers.zh_title: 股票与债券中的共同冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种从股票回报和国债收益率变化中识别经济冲击（货币、增长和风险溢价新闻）的方法，这使得我们能够研究自20世纪80年代初以来每日频率下资产价格的驱动因素。我们应用这种识别方法来考察投资者对美联储和关键宏观公告新闻的反应。我们发现了两种风险溢价冲击——对贴现率和现金流新闻的时变补偿——它们对股票和债券有不同的影响。自20世纪90年代中期以来，美联储引发的这两种风险溢价来源的降低，在联邦公开市场委员会会议日产生了较高的平均股票回报，但债券的反应却不明确。

papers.title: Gender Differences in Negotiation and Policy for Improvement
papers.authors: Maria Recalde, Lise Vesterlund
papers.abstract: Men more than women succeed when negotiating over labor-market outcomes, and gender differences in negotiation likely contribute to the gender wage gap and to horizontal and vertical segregation in the labor market. We review the evidence on the many initiatives that have been put in place to reduce the effect of gender differences in negotiation. Categorizing these as either ‘fix-the-women’ or ‘fix-the-institutions’ initiatives we find serious challenges to the former. Women do not appear to be broken and encouraging them to negotiate more and differently often backfires. The evidence suggests that ‘fix-the-institution’ initiatives are more effective in reducing gender differences in outcomes. Concerns of adverse effects of banning negotiations or salary history requests have not materialized, and preliminary evidence points to reductions in the gender differences in negotiation outcomes. The strongest evidence on effectiveness in narrowing gender disparities is found for policies that increase transparency. Numerous studies find that gender differences in negotiation diminish when it is clear what to expect from the negotiation and suggest that initiatives which improve transparency are likely to help equalize opportunities at the bargaining table.
papers.zh_title: 谈判中的性别差异与改进政策
papers.zh_abstract: 在劳动力市场结果的谈判中，男性比女性更成功，而谈判中的性别差异可能导致了性别工资差距以及劳动力市场中的横向和纵向隔离。我们回顾了为减少谈判中性别差异影响而实施的众多举措的证据。将这些举措分为“修复女性”或“修复制度”两类，我们发现前者面临严峻挑战。女性似乎并没有问题，鼓励她们更多、更不同地谈判往往会适得其反。证据表明，“修复制度”的举措在减少结果中的性别差异方面更为有效。对禁止谈判或薪资历史要求的负面影响的担忧并未成为现实，初步证据表明这些举措减少了谈判结果中的性别差异。在缩小性别差距的有效性方面，最有力的证据来自提高透明度的政策。大量研究发现，当谈判预期结果明确时，谈判中的性别差异会减小，这表明提高透明度的举措可能有助于在谈判桌上实现机会均等。

papers.title: Why is Intermediating Houses so Difficult? Evidence from iBuyers
papers.authors: Greg Buchak, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
papers.abstract: We examine frictions in dealer intermediation in durable consumer goods markets through the lens of “iBuyers,” technology-driven entrants that facilitate transactions via online platforms and algorithmic pricing. iBuyers provide liquidity to households by bypassing the lengthy household-to-household sale process and earn a positive gross spread. However, their intermediation is limited to relatively liquid and easierto- value homes. We build and calibrate a dynamic search model with intermediaries facing adverse selection to quantify the economic frictions in this market. The central trade-off is that while providing liquidity requires fast transactions, this leads to less accurate valuations and exposes intermediaries to adverse selection. iBuyer technology offers a limited middle ground, enabling fast transactions with limited information loss, but it works best for liquid, easy-to-value homes. We then use our model to explore intermediation in durable goods markets, adjusting key asset and market properties based on (i) informational asymmetry, (ii) market liquidity, and (iii) the benefits of search driven by subjective value dispersion. Illiquid and hard-to-price assets, like homes, experience less intermediation, especially if underutilized during the process. In contrast, the greater homogeneity and easier pricing of goods like cars, along with their higher liquidity due to mobility, may help explain why intermediation in these markets has historically been higher.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, PE, PR；JEL：G0, G2, G5, L0, R20
papers.zh_title: 为什么房屋中介如此困难？来自iBuyers的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过“iBuyers”（技术驱动型新进入者，通过在线平台和算法定价促进交易）的视角，考察了耐用品消费市场中经销商中介的摩擦。iBuyers通过绕过冗长的个人对个人销售流程为家庭提供流动性，并赚取正的总价差。然而，它们的中介服务仅限于相对流动性强且易于估值的房屋。我们构建并校准了一个包含面临逆向选择的中介的动态搜索模型，以量化该市场中的经济摩擦。核心权衡在于：提供流动性需要快速交易，但这会导致估值准确性降低，并使中介面临逆向选择。iBuyer技术提供了一个有限的中间地带，能够在信息损失有限的情况下实现快速交易，但它最适合流动性强、易于估值的房屋。然后，我们利用模型探索耐用品市场中的中介行为，根据（i）信息不对称、（ii）市场流动性和（iii）由主观价值分散驱动的搜索收益，调整关键资产和市场属性。流动性差且难以定价的资产（如房屋）经历的中介较少，尤其是在过程中未被充分利用的情况下。相比之下，汽车等商品更高的同质性和更易定价，加上其因流动性而带来的更高流动性，可能有助于解释为什么这些市场中的中介在历史上一直更高。

papers.title: Away from Home and Back: Coordinating (Remote) Workers in 1800 and 2020
papers.authors: Réka Juhász, Mara P. Squicciarini, Nico Voigtländer
papers.abstract: This paper examines the future of remote work by drawing parallels between two contexts: The move from home to factory-based production during the Industrial Revolution and the shift to work from home today. Both are characterized by a similar trade-off: the potential productivity advantage of the new working arrangement made possible by technology (mechanization or ICT), versus organizational barriers such as coordinating workers. Using contemporary data, we show that organizational barriers seem to be present today. Without further technological or organizational innovations, remote work may not be here to stay just yet.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, POL, PR；JEL：F63, O14
papers.zh_title: 离家与归家：协调1800年和2020年的（远程）工作者
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过类比两种情境来考察远程工作的未来：工业革命期间从家庭生产向工厂生产的转变，以及当今向居家工作的转变。两者都具有相似的权衡：新技术（机械化或信息通信技术）使新的工作安排成为可能，从而带来潜在的生产率优势，但同时也面临协调工作者等组织障碍。利用当代数据，我们表明组织障碍如今似乎仍然存在。如果没有进一步的技术或组织创新，远程工作可能还不会持久存在。

papers.title: A Thousand Cuts: Cumulative Lead Exposure Reduces Academic Achievement
papers.authors: Alex Hollingsworth, Mike Huang, Ivan J. Rudik, Nicholas J. Sanders
papers.abstract: We study how ambient lead exposure impacts learning in elementary school by leveraging a natural experiment where a large national automotive racing organization switched from leaded to unleaded fuel. We find increased levels and duration of exposure to lead negatively affect academic performance, shift the entire academic performance distribution, and negatively impact both younger and older children. A single average race emitted more than 10 kilograms of lead — a quantity similar to the total annual emissions of an airport or the median lead-emitting industrial facility in the United States. The average treated student in our setting has an expected income reduction of $5,200 in present value terms. Avoiding said treatment has an effect size similar to improving teacher value added by one-fourth of a standard deviation, reducing class size by 3 students, or increasing school spending per pupil by $750. The marginal impacts of lead are larger in impoverished, non-white counties, and among students with greater duration of exposure, even after controlling for the total quantity of exposure.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EEE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I14, I21, Q51, Q53
papers.zh_title: 千刀万剐：累积铅暴露降低学业成绩
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个自然实验——一家大型全国性汽车赛车组织从含铅燃料转向无铅燃料——研究了环境铅暴露如何影响小学生的学习。我们发现，铅暴露水平和持续时间的增加会对学业表现产生负面影响，会改变整个学业表现分布，并对年龄较小和较大的儿童均产生负面影响。一场普通比赛排放的铅超过10公斤——这一数量与美国一个机场或中位数铅排放工业设施的年总排放量相当。在我们的设定中，平均受处理学生预期收入现值减少5200美元。避免这种处理的效果大小相当于：将教师增值提高四分之一个标准差、将班级规模减少3名学生、或将每位学生的人均学校支出增加750美元。即使在控制了总暴露量之后，铅的边际影响在贫困的非白人县以及暴露持续时间更长的学生中更大。

papers.title: Learning to Navigate a New Financial Technology: Evidence from Payroll Accounts
papers.authors: Emily Breza, Martin Kanz, Leora F. Klapper
papers.abstract: How do inexperienced consumers learn to use a new financial technology? We present results from a field experiment that introduced payroll accounts in a population of largely unbanked factory workers in Bangladesh. In the experiment, workers in a treatment group received monthly wage payments into a bank or mobile money account while workers in a control group continued to receive wages in cash, with a subset also receiving an account without automatic wage payments. We find that exposure to payroll accounts leads to increased account use and consumer learning. Those receiving accounts with automatic wage payments learn to use the account without assistance, begin to use a wider set of account features, and learn to avoid illicit fees, which are common in emerging markets for consumer finance. The treatments have real effects, leading to increased savings and improvements in the ability to cope with unanticipated economic shocks. We conduct an additional audit study and find suggestive evidence of market externalities from consumer learning: mobile money agents are less likely to overcharge inexperienced customers in areas with higher levels of payroll account adoption. This suggests potentially important equilibrium effects of introducing accounts at scale.
papers.zh_title: 学习驾驭新金融技术：来自工资账户的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 缺乏经验的消费者如何学习使用新的金融技术？我们展示了一项实地实验的结果，该实验在孟加拉国主要由无银行账户的工厂工人群体中引入了工资账户。实验中，处理组的工人每月通过银行或移动货币账户领取工资，而对照组的工人继续以现金领取工资，其中一部分人还获得了没有自动工资存入的账户。我们发现，接触工资账户会导致账户使用增加和消费者学习。那些获得自动工资存入账户的工人无需帮助就能学会使用账户，开始使用更广泛的账户功能，并学会避免非法费用，这在新兴消费金融市场中很常见。这些处理产生了实际效果，导致储蓄增加以及应对意外经济冲击的能力得到改善。我们进行了一项额外的审计研究，并发现了消费者学习产生市场外部性的提示性证据：在工资账户采用率较高的地区，移动货币代理商向缺乏经验的客户多收费的可能性较小。这表明大规模引入账户可能产生重要的均衡效应。

papers.title: Why Do Sectoral Employment Programs Work? Lessons from WorkAdvance
papers.authors: Lawrence F. Katz, Jonathan Roth, Richard Hendra, Kelsey Schaberg
papers.abstract: This paper examines the evidence from randomized evaluations of sector-focused training programs that target low-wage workers and combine upfront screening, occupational and soft skills training, and wraparound services. The programs generate substantial and persistent earnings gains (11 to 40 percent) following training completion. Theoretical mechanisms for program impacts are explored for the WorkAdvance demonstration. Earnings gains are generated by getting participants into higher-wage jobs in higher-earning industries and occupations not just by raising employment. Training in transferable and certifiable skills (likely under-provided from poaching concerns) and reductions of employment barriers to high-wage sectors for non-traditional workers appear to play key roles.
papers.zh_title: 为什么行业就业计划有效？来自WorkAdvance的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了针对低工资工人的、以行业为重点的培训项目的随机评估证据，这些项目结合了前期筛选、职业和软技能培训以及全方位服务。这些项目在培训完成后产生了显著且持久的收入增长（11%至40%）。针对WorkAdvance示范项目，探讨了项目影响的理论机制。收入增长是通过让参与者进入收入更高行业和职业中的更高工资岗位实现的，而不仅仅是提高就业率。可转移和可认证技能（可能因担心被挖角而供给不足）的培训，以及为非传统工人减少进入高工资行业的就业障碍，似乎发挥了关键作用。

papers.title: A Macroeconomic Model of Healthcare Saturation, Inequality and the Output-Pandemia Tradeoff
papers.authors: Enrique G. Mendoza, Eugenio I. Rojas, Linda L. Tesar, Jing Zhang
papers.abstract: COVID-19 became a global health emergency when it threatened the catastrophic collapse of health systems as demand for health goods and services and their relative prices surged. Governments responded with lockdowns and increases in transfers. Empirical evidence shows that lockdowns and healthcare saturation contribute to explain the cross-country variation in GDP drops even after controlling for COVID-19 cases and mortality. We explain this output-pandemia tradeoff as resulting from a shock to subsistence health demand that is larger at higher capital utilization in a model with entrepreneurs and workers. The health system moves closer to saturation as the gap between supply and subsistence narrows, which worsens consumption and income inequality. An externality distorts utilization, because firms do not internalize that lower utilization relaxes healthcare saturation. The optimal policy response includes lockdowns and transfers to workers. Quantitatively, strict lockdowns and large transfer hikes can be optimal and yield sizable welfare gains because they prevent a sharp rise in inequality. Welfare and output costs vary in response to small parameter changes or deviations from optimal policies. Weak lockdowns coupled with weak transfers programs are the worst alternative and yet are in line with what several emerging and least developed countries have implemented.
papers.zh_title: 医疗饱和、不平等与产出-大流行病权衡的宏观经济模型
papers.zh_abstract: 当对健康商品和服务的需求及其相对价格飙升，威胁到卫生系统灾难性崩溃时，COVID-19成为了一场全球卫生紧急事件。各国政府以封锁和增加转移支付作为回应。实证证据表明，即使在控制了COVID-19病例和死亡率之后，封锁和医疗饱和也有助于解释各国GDP下降的差异。我们用一个包含企业家和工人的模型解释这种产出-大流行病权衡，认为它源于对生存健康需求的冲击，该冲击在资本利用率更高时更大。随着供给与生存需求之间的差距缩小，卫生系统更接近饱和，这加剧了消费和收入不平等。一种外部性扭曲了利用率，因为企业没有内化较低的利用率可以缓解医疗饱和。最优政策响应包括封锁和对工人的转移支付。从量化角度看，严格的封锁和大规模的转移支付增加可能是最优的，并能产生可观的福利收益，因为它们防止了不平等的急剧上升。福利和产出成本会因参数的小幅变化或对最优政策的偏离而有所不同。弱封锁加上弱转移支付计划是最糟糕的选择，然而这正是几个新兴国家和最不发达国家所实施的。

papers.title: School Closures During the 1918 Flu Pandemic
papers.authors: Philipp Ager, Katherine Eriksson, Ezra Karger, Peter Nencka, Melissa A. Thomasson
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has reignited interest in responses to the 1918-19 influenza pandemic, the last comparable U.S. public health emergency. During both pandemics, many state and local governments made the controversial decision to close schools. We study the short- and long-run effects of 1918-19 pandemic-related school closures on children. We find precise null effects of school closures in 1918 on school attendance in 1919-20 using newly collected data on the exact timing of school closures for 168 cities in 1918-19. Linking affected children to their adult outcomes in the 1940 census, we also find precise null effects of school closures on adult educational attainment, wage income, non-wage income, and hours worked in 1940. Our results are not inconsistent with an emerging literature that finds negative short-run effects of COVID-19-related school closures on learning. The situation in 1918 was starkly different from today: (1) schools closed in 1918 for many fewer days on average, (2) the 1918 virus was much deadlier to young adults and children, boosting absenteeism even in schools that stayed open, and (3) the lack of effective remote learning platforms in 1918 may have reduced the scope for school closures to increase socioeconomic inequality.
papers.zh_title: 1918年流感大流行期间的学校关闭
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行重新激发了人们对1918-19年流感大流行（美国上一次类似的公共卫生紧急事件）应对措施的兴趣。在这两次大流行期间，许多州和地方政府都做出了关闭学校的争议性决定。我们研究了1918-19年大流行相关学校关闭对儿童的短期和长期影响。利用新收集的关于1918-19年168个城市学校关闭确切时间的数据，我们发现1918年学校关闭对1919-20年入学率的影响精确为零。通过将受影响的儿童与他们在1940年人口普查中的成年结果联系起来，我们还发现学校关闭对成年后的教育程度、工资收入、非工资收入和1940年工作时长的影响精确为零。我们的结果与新兴文献中发现的COVID-19相关学校关闭对学习的负面短期影响并不矛盾。1918年的情况与今天截然不同：（1）1918年学校平均关闭天数少得多，（2）1918年的病毒对年轻人和儿童的致死率更高，即使是在保持开放的学校也导致缺勤率上升，（3）1918年缺乏有效的远程学习平台，可能减少了学校关闭加剧社会经济不平等的可能性。

papers.title: Early Career Setbacks and Women’s Career-Family Trade-Off
papers.authors: Itzik Fadlon, Frederik Plesner Lyngse, Torben Heien Nielsen
papers.abstract: We study how early career setbacks—in the form of worse initial job matches—have permanent labor and marriage market impacts differentially for males and females. We analyze the Danish physician labor market and exploit a randomized lottery that determines sorting into internships, which differ in the bundle of location and career opportunities they provide. Using administrative data for over fifteen years after the lottery experiment, we find that initial labor market sorting has important long-run effects on occupational choice and career trajectories for women only, which increases the gender earnings gap by 10-15 percent over the decades after graduation from medical school. We show that the differential gender sensitivity to setbacks is driven by women’s career-family trade-off, where women exhibit earlier and higher fertility and subsequently sort into more flexible but lower-paying jobs that facilitate their greater family responsibilities. Our findings have implications for policies aimed at gender equality, as they reveal how persistent gaps can arise even in settings with institutional equality of opportunity and they point to addressing family considerations and job flexibility as key channels.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I11, I23, J01, J13, J16, J24, R23
papers.zh_title: 早期职业挫折与女性的职业-家庭权衡
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究早期职业挫折——以较差的初始工作匹配形式——如何对男性和女性产生不同的持久劳动力市场和婚姻市场影响。我们分析了丹麦医生劳动力市场，并利用一个随机抽签来决定实习岗位的分配，这些岗位在提供的地点和职业机会组合上有所不同。利用抽签实验后超过十五年的行政数据，我们发现，初始劳动力市场分配仅对女性的职业选择和职业轨迹产生重要的长期影响，这导致在医学院毕业后的几十年里，性别收入差距扩大了10-15%。我们表明，女性对挫折的敏感性差异是由女性的职业-家庭权衡驱动的，即女性生育更早、生育率更高，随后转向更灵活但收入较低的工作，这些工作有助于她们承担更大的家庭责任。我们的发现对旨在实现性别平等的政策具有启示意义，因为它们揭示了即使在制度机会平等的情况下，持久的差距也可能出现，并指出将家庭考虑和工作灵活性作为关键渠道加以解决。

papers.title: Estimating the Price Elasticity of Demand for Subways: Evidence from Mexico
papers.authors: Lucas W. Davis
papers.abstract: This paper uses fare changes in Mexico City, Guadalajara, and Monterrey to estimate the price elasticity of demand for urban rail transit. In two of the cases there is a significant fare increase (30%+), and in the third there is a 60-day fare holiday. Ridership responds sharply in the expected direction in all three cities, implying price elasticities which range across cities from -.23 to -.32. In addition, there is suggestive evidence that the temporary fare holiday led to a higher baseline level of ridership. These estimates are directly relevant for policymakers considering alternative pricing structures for urban rail. The paper discusses the relevant economic considerations and then shows how the estimated elasticities can be used to perform policy counterfactuals.
papers.zh_title: 估算地铁需求的价格弹性：来自墨西哥的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用墨西哥城、瓜达拉哈拉和蒙特雷的票价变化来估算城市轨道交通的需求价格弹性。在两种情况下，票价大幅上涨（超过30%），在第三种情况下，则有60天的票价免费期。在所有三个城市，客流量都按照预期方向急剧变化，由此得出的价格弹性在各城市间从-0.23到-0.32不等。此外，有提示性证据表明，临时票价免费期导致了一个更高的客流量基线水平。这些估计值对于考虑城市轨道交通替代定价结构的政策制定者具有直接相关性。本文讨论了相关的经济考量，然后展示了如何使用估算的弹性来进行政策反事实分析。

papers.title: Transhumant Pastoralism, Climate Change, and Conflict in Africa
papers.authors: Eoin F. McGuirk, Nathan Nunn
papers.abstract: We consider the effects of climate change on seasonally migrant populations that herd livestock – i.e., transhumant pastoralists – in Africa. Traditionally, transhumant pastoralists benefit from a cooperative relationship with sedentary agriculturalists whereby arable land is used for crop farming in the wet season and animal grazing in the dry season. Droughts can disrupt this arrangement by inducing pastoral groups to migrate to agricultural lands before the harvest, causing conflict to emerge. We examine this hypothesis by combining ethnographic information on the traditional locations of transhumant pastoralists and sedentary agriculturalists with high-resolution data on the location and timing of rainfall and violent conflict events in Africa from 1989–2018. We show that droughts in the territory of transhumant pastoralists lead to conflict in neighboring areas. Consistent with the hypothesis, these conflict events are concentrated in agricultural areas; they occur during the wet season and not the dry season; and they are due to rainfall’s impact on plant biomass growth. This mechanism explains a sizable proportion of conflict events in Africa, particularly civil conflicts and religious-extremist attacks. We find that the effects are muted in the presence of irrigation aid projects, but not in the presence of other forms of foreign aid. The effects approach zero as pastoral groups share more political power.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, ITI, POL；JEL：N10, Q54, Z1
papers.zh_title: 非洲的游牧畜牧业、气候变化与冲突
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑了气候变化对非洲季节性迁徙放牧人群（即游牧牧民）的影响。传统上，游牧牧民与定居农业者之间存在合作关系，即耕地用于雨季的农作物种植和旱季的牲畜放牧。干旱可能破坏这种安排，诱使牧民群体在收获前迁移到农业用地，从而导致冲突出现。我们通过将游牧牧民和定居农业者传统居住地的民族志信息，与1989-2018年非洲降雨和暴力冲突事件的位置及时间的高分辨率数据相结合，来检验这一假设。我们表明，游牧牧民领地内的干旱会导致邻近地区的冲突。与假设一致，这些冲突事件集中在农业区；它们发生在雨季而非旱季；并且是由于降雨对植物生物量增长的影响所致。这一机制解释了非洲相当大比例的冲突事件，特别是内战和宗教极端主义袭击。我们发现，在存在灌溉援助项目的情况下，这些影响会减弱，但在存在其他形式的外国援助时则不会。随着牧民群体分享更多政治权力，这些影响趋近于零。

papers.title: In the Red: Overdrafts, Payday Lending and the Underbanked
papers.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Angela T. Ma, Emily Williams
papers.abstract: The reordering of transactions from "high-to-low" is a controversial bank practice thought to maximize fees paid by low-income customers on overdrawn accounts. We exploit multiple class-action lawsuits resulting in mandatory changes to this practice, coupled with payday lending data, to show that after banks cease high-to-low reordering, low-income individuals reduce borrowing from alternative lenders. These consumers increase consumption, experience long-term improvements in overall financial health, and gain access to lower-cost loans in the traditional system. These findings highlight that aggressive bank practices create a demand for alternative financial services, highlighting an important link between the traditional and alternative financial systems.
papers.zh_title: 赤字：透支、发薪日贷款与缺乏银行服务者
papers.zh_abstract: 将交易从“高到低”重新排序是一种有争议的银行做法，被认为可以最大化从透支账户的低收入客户那里收取的费用。我们利用多起集体诉讼导致强制改变这一做法的情况，结合发薪日贷款数据，表明在银行停止高到低重新排序后，低收入个人减少了从替代贷款机构的借款。这些消费者增加了消费，整体财务状况得到长期改善，并且能够获得传统体系中成本更低的贷款。这些发现突显出，激进的银行做法创造了对替代金融服务的需求，揭示了传统金融体系与替代金融体系之间的重要联系。

papers.title: When Workers Travel: Nursing Supply During COVID-19 Surges
papers.authors: Joshua D. Gottlieb, Avi Zenilman
papers.abstract: We study how short-term labor markets responded to an extraordinary demand shock during the COVID-19 pandemic. We use traveling nurse jobs - a market hospitals use to fill temporary staffing needs - to examine workers' willingness to move to places with larger demand shocks. We find a dramatic increase in market size during the pandemic, especially for those specialties central to COVID-19 care. The number of jobs increased far more than compensation, suggesting that labor supply to this fringe of the nursing market is quite elastic. To examine workers' willingness to move across different locations, we examine jobs in different locations on the same day, and find an even more elastic supply response. We show that part of this supply responsiveness comes from workers' willingness to travel longer distances for jobs when payment increases, suggesting that an integrated national market facilitates reallocating workers when demand surges. This implies that a simultaneous national demand spike might be harder for the market to accommodate rapidly.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS；JEL：I11, J22, J30, J41, J61, R20
papers.zh_title: 当工作者流动时：COVID-19激增期间的护理人员供给
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了短期劳动力市场如何应对COVID-19疫情期间的异常需求冲击。我们利用旅行护士职位——医院用来填补临时人员需求的市场——来考察工作者迁移到需求冲击更大地区的意愿。我们发现疫情期间市场规模急剧扩大，尤其是那些对COVID-19护理至关重要的专业。职位数量的增长远超薪酬增长，表明护理市场这一边缘的劳动力供给相当有弹性。为了考察工作者在不同地点间迁移的意愿，我们研究了同一天不同地点的职位，并发现了更具弹性的供给反应。我们表明，这种供给响应部分源于工作者在薪酬增加时愿意为工作旅行更远的距离，这表明一个整合的全国性市场有助于在需求激增时重新分配工作者。这意味着同时发生的全国性需求激增可能更难被市场快速容纳。

papers.title: Where Does Wealth Come From?
papers.authors: Sandra E. Black, Paul J. Devereux, Fanny Landaud, Kjell G. Salvanes
papers.abstract: Much attention has been given to rising wealth inequality in recent decades. However, understanding inequality requires an understanding of how wealth relates to the potential wealth an individual could accumulate and where this wealth comes from. Using administrative data from Norway, we create measures of potential wealth that abstract from differential consumption and spending behavior. We then examine how these measures relate to observed net wealth of individuals at a point in time and the role played by different sources of wealth in the distribution of potential wealth. We find that net wealth is a reasonable proxy for potential wealth, particularly in the tails of the distribution. Importantly, people in different parts of the potential wealth (or actual net wealth) distribution get their wealth from very different sources. Labor income is the most important determinant of wealth, except among the top 1%, where capital income and capital gains on financial assets become important. Inheritances and gifts are not an important determinant of wealth, even at the top of the wealth distribution. Finally, although inheritances are not important, parental wealth does influence child’s wealth; children of wealthy parents accumulate wealth from very different sources than children of less wealthy parents.
papers.zh_title: 财富从何而来？
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，财富不平等加剧的问题备受关注。然而，理解不平等需要理解财富与个人可能积累的潜在财富之间的关系，以及这些财富的来源。利用挪威的行政数据，我们创建了排除差异化消费和支出行为的潜在财富衡量指标。然后，我们考察了这些指标如何与个人在某一时点的观察到的净资产相关联，以及不同财富来源在潜在财富分布中的作用。我们发现，净资产是潜在财富的一个合理代理变量，尤其是在分布的尾部。重要的是，处于潜在财富（或实际净资产）分布不同位置的人，其财富来源截然不同。劳动收入是财富最重要的决定因素，除了前1%的人群，对他们而言，资本收入和金融资产资本收益变得重要。即使在财富分布的顶端，遗产和赠与也不是财富的重要决定因素。最后，尽管遗产不重要，但父母的财富确实会影响子女的财富；富裕父母的子女积累财富的来源与不太富裕父母的子女截然不同。

papers.title: A Panel Regression Approach to Holdings-based Fund Performance Measures
papers.authors: Wayne E. Ferson, Junbo L. Wang
papers.abstract: Portfolio performance measures using holdings data are panel regressions. The returns of a fund’s stocks are regressed on its lagged portfolio weights. Stock fixed effects isolate average performance from time-series predictive ability. Control variables condition fund performance on the characteristics of the stocks held. The long term performance of average holdings drives some of the classical measures, while predictive ability drives others. A “buy-and-hold drift,” where portfolio weights increase over time in the higher alpha stocks, affects performance measures. Investor flows respond to average performance net of the buy-and-hold drift.
papers.zh_title: 基于持仓的基金业绩度量的面板回归方法
papers.zh_abstract: 使用持仓数据的投资组合业绩度量是面板回归。基金的股票收益对其滞后投资组合权重进行回归。股票固定效应将平均业绩与时间序列预测能力分离开来。控制变量根据所持股票的特征来调整基金业绩。平均持仓的长期业绩驱动了一些经典度量指标，而预测能力则驱动了其他指标。一种“买入并持有漂移”，即投资组合权重随时间在较高阿尔法股票中增加，会影响业绩度量。投资者资金流会响应扣除买入并持有漂移后的平均业绩。

papers.title: Central Bank Digital Currency: When Price and Bank Stability Collide
papers.authors: Linda Schilling, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Harald Uhlig
papers.abstract: A central bank digital currency, or CBDC, may provide an attractive alternative to traditional demand deposits held in private banks. When offering CBDC accounts, the central bank needs to confront classic issues of banking: conducting maturity transformation while providing liquidity to private customers who suffer “spending” shocks. We analyze these issues in a nominal version of a Diamond and Dybvig (1983) model, with an additional and exogenous price stability objective for the central bank. While the central bank can always deliver on its nominal obligations, runs can nonetheless occur, manifesting themselves either as excessive real asset liquidation or as a failure to maintain price stability. We demonstrate an impossibility result that we call the CBDC trilemma: of the three goals of efficiency, financial stability (i.e., absence of runs), and price stability, the central bank can achieve at most two.
papers.zh_title: 央行数字货币：当价格稳定与银行稳定冲突时
papers.zh_abstract: 央行数字货币（CBDC）可能为私人银行的传统活期存款提供一种有吸引力的替代品。在提供CBDC账户时，央行需要面对经典的银行业问题：在向遭受“支出”冲击的私人客户提供流动性的同时，进行期限转换。我们在一个名义版本的Diamond和Dybvig（1983）模型中分析了这些问题，并为央行增加了一个外生的价格稳定目标。虽然央行总能履行其名义义务，但挤兑仍然可能发生，表现为过度的实际资产清算或未能维持价格稳定。我们证明了一个不可能结果，称之为CBDC三难困境：在效率、金融稳定（即无挤兑）和价格稳定这三个目标中，央行最多只能实现两个。

papers.title: Understanding Debt in the Older Population
papers.authors: Annamaria Lusardi, Olivia S. Mitchell, Noemi Oggero
papers.abstract: Poor financial capability can erode well-being in later life. To explore debt and debt management among older Americans, age 51-61, we designed and analyzed a new module in the 2018 Health and Retirement Study along with information from the 2018 National Financial Capability Study. Even though this group should be at the peak of their retirement savings, it nevertheless carries debt due to student loans and unpaid medical bills; having children also contributes to carrying debt close to retirement. By contrast, the financially literate have more positive financial perceptions and behaviors. Specifically, being able to answer one additional financial literacy question correctly is associated with a higher probability of reporting an above average credit record and planning for retirement. Higher financial literacy is also linked to being less likely to carry excessive debt, being contacted by debt collectors, and carrying medical debt or student loans, even after accounting for a large range of demographics and other characteristics. Evidently, financial knowledge can help limit debt exposure at older ages.
papers.zh_title: 理解老年人口的债务问题
papers.zh_abstract: 较差的财务能力会侵蚀晚年的福祉。为了探讨美国51-61岁老年人的债务和债务管理问题，我们设计并分析了2018年健康与退休研究中的一个新模块，以及2018年全国财务能力研究的信息。尽管这个群体应该处于退休储蓄的顶峰，但他们仍然因学生贷款和未付医疗账单而背负债务；有子女也导致在临近退休时背负债务。相比之下，具有财务素养的人拥有更积极的财务认知和行为。具体来说，能够多正确回答一个财务知识问题，与报告高于平均水平的信用记录和为退休做计划的更高概率相关。即使考虑了广泛的人口统计和其他特征，更高的财务素养也与不太可能背负过多债务、被收债人联系、以及背负医疗债务或学生贷款相关。显然，财务知识有助于限制老年时的债务风险。

papers.title: What Makes a Tax Evader?
papers.authors: Marcelo L. Bergolo, Martin Leites, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Matias Strehl
papers.abstract: Why do some individuals evade taxes while others do not? We study this question using administrative tax records from Uruguay linked to a tailored survey of taxpayers. Using third-party reports, we measure individual income under-reporting as an indicator of evasion. We then examine how three factors predict who evades: social preferences (e.g., honesty measured through incentivized laboratory games), peers (e.g., the behavior of current and former coworkers), and economic factors (e.g., the marginal tax rate). We find that social preferences have little power to predict evasion, while economic factors matter more and peer behavior is the strongest predictor.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, PE；JEL：H24, H26, K42, Z1, Z13
papers.zh_title: 什么造就了逃税者？
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么有些人逃税而另一些人不逃？我们利用乌拉圭的行政税务记录，并结合针对纳税人的定制调查来研究这个问题。利用第三方报告，我们衡量个人收入低报作为逃税的指标。然后，我们考察三个因素如何预测谁逃税：社会偏好（例如，通过激励性实验室游戏衡量的诚实度）、同伴（例如，现任和前任同事的行为）以及经济因素（例如，边际税率）。我们发现，社会偏好预测逃税的能力很弱，而经济因素更重要，同伴行为是最强的预测因素。

papers.title: Social Networks Shape Beliefs and Behavior: Evidence from Social Distancing During the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Michael Bailey, Drew M. Johnston, Martin Koenen, Theresa Kuchler, Dominic Russel, Johannes Stroebel
papers.abstract: We show that social network exposure to COVID-19 cases shapes individuals’ beliefs and behaviors concerning the coronavirus. We use de-identified data from Facebook to document that individuals with friends in areas with worse COVID-19 outbreaks reduce their mobility more than otherwise similar individuals with friends in less affected areas. The effects are quantitatively large and long-lasting: a one standard deviation increase in friend-exposure to COVID-19 cases in March 2020 results in a 1.2 percentage point increase in the probability of staying home on a given day through at least the end of May 2020. As the pandemic progresses—and the characteristics of individuals with the highest friend-exposure vary— changes in friend-exposure continue to drive changes in social distancing behavior, ruling out many unobserved effects as drivers of our results. We also show that individuals with higher friend-exposure to COVID-19 are more likely to publicly post in support of social distancing measures and less likely to be members of groups advocating to "reopen" the economy. These findings suggest that friends can influence individuals’ beliefs about the risks of the disease and thereby induce them to engage in mitigating public health behavior.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, EFG, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D83, D85, H0, I0
papers.zh_title: 社交网络塑造信念和行为：来自COVID-19疫情期间社交距离的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，社交网络对COVID-19病例的暴露程度塑造了个人关于冠状病毒的信念和行为。我们利用来自Facebook的去标识化数据，记录了那些朋友所在地区COVID-19疫情更严重的个人，其流动性减少的程度超过了其他方面相似但朋友在受影响较小地区的个人。这些影响在数量上很大且持久：2020年3月朋友暴露于COVID-19病例的程度每增加一个标准差，会导致在给定日期（至少持续到2020年5月底）留在家中的概率增加1.2个百分点。随着疫情的进展——以及朋友暴露程度最高的个人特征发生变化——朋友暴露程度的变化继续驱动社交距离行为的变化，这排除了许多未观测到的效应作为我们结果驱动因素的可能性。我们还表明，朋友暴露于COVID-19程度更高的个人更有可能公开发布支持社交距离措施的帖子，并且不太可能成为倡导“重启”经济的团体的成员。这些发现表明，朋友可以影响个人对疾病风险的信念，从而促使他们采取缓解公共卫生的行为。

papers.title: The Impact of Covid-19 on Productivity
papers.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Paul Mizen, Pawel Smietanka, Gregory Thwaites
papers.abstract: We analyse the impact of Covid-19 on productivity using data from an innovative monthly firm survey panel that asks for quantitative impacts of Covid on inputs and outputs. We find total factor productivity (TFP) fell by up to 5% during 2020-21. The overall impact combined large reductions in ‘within-firm’ productivity, with an offsetting positive ‘between-firm’ effects as less productive sectors, and less productive firms within them, contracted. Despite these large pandemic effects, firms’ post-Covid forecasts imply surprisingly little lasting impact on aggregate TFP. We also see significant heterogeneity over firms and sectors, with the greatest impacts in those requiring extensive in-person activity. We also ask about unmeasured inflation in the form of deteriorating product quality, finding an additional 1.4% negative impact on TFP.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情对生产率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项创新的月度企业调查面板数据，该数据询问了新冠疫情对投入和产出的量化影响，分析了疫情对生产率的影响。我们发现，2020-21年间全要素生产率下降了高达5%。总体影响包括“企业内部”生产率的大幅下降，以及“企业间”的正向抵消效应，即生产率较低的行业及其内部生产率较低的企业出现收缩。尽管存在这些显著的疫情效应，但企业疫情后的预测表明，疫情对总体全要素生产率的持久影响出奇地小。我们还观察到企业和行业之间存在显著的异质性，其中对需要大量面对面活动的行业影响最大。我们还调查了以产品质量下降形式存在的未计量通胀，发现这对全要素生产率造成了额外的1.4%的负面影响。

papers.title: U.S. Macro Policies and Global Economic Challenges
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Hiro Ito
papers.abstract: This paper overviews different exit strategies for the U.S. from the debt-overhang, and analyses their implications for emerging markets and global stability. These strategies are discussed in the context of the debates about secular-stagnation versus debt-overhang, the fiscal theory of the price level, the size of fiscal multipliers, prospects for a multipolar currency system, and historical case studies. We conclude that the reallocation of U.S. fiscal efforts towards infrastructure investment aiming at boosting growth, followed by a gradual tax increase, aiming at reaching a modest primary fiscal surplus over time are akin to an upfront investment in greater long-term global stability. Such a trajectory may solidify the viability and credibility of the U.S. dollar as a global anchor, thereby stabilizing Emerging Markets economies and global growth.
papers.zh_title: 美国宏观政策与全球经济挑战
papers.zh_abstract: 本文概述了美国摆脱债务积压的不同退出策略，并分析了这些策略对新兴市场和全球稳定的影响。这些策略是在关于长期停滞与债务积压、价格水平的财政理论、财政乘数大小、多极货币体系前景以及历史案例研究的辩论背景下讨论的。我们得出结论，美国将财政努力重新分配至旨在促进增长的基础设施投资，随后逐步增税以实现适度的基本财政盈余，这类似于为更大的长期全球稳定进行前期投资。这样的路径可能巩固美元作为全球锚的可行性和可信度，从而稳定新兴市场经济体和全球增长。

papers.title: U.S.-China Innovation Competition
papers.authors: Gerard Hoberg, Huaizhou Li, Gordon M. Phillips
papers.abstract: We examine how foreign information access affects competition in innovation. We construct measures of Chinese information-gathering capacity based on industry geography and internet penetration. They predict actual Chinese-user downloads of U.S. firm filings. Increases in Chinese information access are followed by lower U.S. firm R&D, patent values, and patent grants. Chinese firms increase patenting in the same technology areas and cite more affected U.S. firms’ prior patents. The effects are stronger in more contested markets and in industries receiving Chinese government support. Placebo tests do not produce similar results. The evidence is consistent with Chinese innovation competition reducing U.S. innovation.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：D43, F13, L21, L26, O31, O34
papers.zh_title: 美中创新竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了外国信息获取如何影响创新竞争。我们基于行业地理分布和互联网普及率构建了中国信息获取能力的衡量指标。这些指标预测了中国用户实际下载美国公司文件的情况。中国信息获取的增加，随后导致美国公司的研发投入、专利价值和专利授权量下降。中国公司在相同技术领域的专利申请增加，并更多地引用受影响美国公司的先前专利。这种效应在竞争更激烈的市场以及获得中国政府支持的行业中更为显著。安慰剂检验未产生类似结果。证据表明，中国的创新竞争减少了美国的创新。

papers.title: Long-Term Effects of Equal Sharing: Evidence from Inheritance Rules for Land
papers.authors: Charlotte Bartels, Simon Jäger, Natalie Obergruber
papers.abstract: What are the long-term economic effects of a more equal distribution of wealth? We exploit variation in historical inheritance rules for land traversing political, linguistic, geological, and religious borders in Germany. In some German areas, inherited land was to be shared or divided equally among children, while in others land was ruled to be indivisible. Using a geographic regression discontinuity design, we show that equal division of land led to a more equal distribution of land; other potential drivers of growth are smooth at the boundary and equal division areas were not historically more developed. Today, equal division areas feature higher average incomes and a right-shifted skill, income, and wealth distribution. Higher top incomes and top wealth in equal division areas coincide with higher education, and higher labor productivity. We show evidence consistent with the more even distribution of land leading to more innovative industrial by-employment during Germany’s transition from an agrarian to an industrial economy and, in the long-run, more entrepreneurship.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：E02, H24, J24, J43, N13, N14, N23, N24, N33, N34, N53, N54, N93, N94, O3, P42, R52
papers.zh_title: 平等分享的长期效应：来自土地继承规则的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 更平等的财富分配会带来哪些长期经济效应？我们利用德国境内跨越政治、语言、地质和宗教边界的土地历史继承规则差异。在德国某些地区，继承的土地必须在子女间平均分配或分割，而在其他地区，土地则被规定为不可分割。通过使用地理断点回归设计，我们发现土地的平均分配导致了更平等的土地分配；其他潜在的增长驱动因素在边界处是平滑的，且平均分配地区在历史上并未更发达。如今，平均分配地区的人均收入更高，技能、收入和财富分布呈右移态势。平均分配地区较高的顶层收入和顶层财富与更高的教育水平和更高的劳动生产率同时出现。我们提供的证据表明，在德国从农业经济向工业经济转型期间，更平等的土地分配导致了更具创新性的工业兼业活动，并在长期内促进了更多的创业活动。

papers.title: The Accuracy of Tax Imputations: Estimating Tax Liabilities and Credits Using Linked Survey and Administrative Data
papers.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Derek Wu, Grace Finley, Patrick Langetieg, Carla Medalia, Mark Payne, Alan Plumley
papers.abstract: This paper calculates accurate estimates of income and payroll taxes using a groundbreaking set of linked survey and administrative tax data that are part of the Comprehensive Income Dataset (CID). We compare our estimates to survey imputations produced by the Census Bureau and those generated using the TAXSIM calculator from the National Bureau of Economic Research. The administrative data include two sets of Internal Revenue Service (IRS) data: (1) a limited set of tax information for the population of individual income tax returns covering selected line items from Forms 1040, W-2, and 1099-R; and (2) an extensive set of population tax records processed by the IRS in 2011, covering nearly every line item on Form 1040 and most lines on a series of third-party information returns. We link these IRS records to the Current Population Survey Annual Social and Economic Supplement (CPS) for reference year 2010. We describe how we form tax units and estimate various types of tax liabilities and credits using these linked data, providing a roadmap for constructing accurate measures of taxes while preserving the survey family as the sharing unit for distributional analyses. We find that aggregate estimates of various tax components using the limited and extensive tax data estimates are close to each other and much closer to public IRS tabulations than either of the imputations using survey data alone. At the individual level, the absolute errors of survey-only imputations of federal income taxes and total taxes are on average 10% and 13%, respectively, of adjusted gross income. In contrast, the limited tax data imputations yield mean absolute errors for federal income taxes and total taxes that are about 2% and 3% of adjusted gross income, respectively. For the Earned Income Tax Credit, the limited tax data imputation is off by less than $20 on average for a typical family (compared to more than $500 using either of the survey-only imputations).
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：C42, C81, H20, H24, I32
papers.zh_title: 税收推算的准确性：利用关联调查与行政数据估算税收负债与税收抵免
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用综合收入数据集中一组开创性的关联调查和行政税收数据，计算了所得税和工资税的准确估计值。我们将我们的估计值与人口普查局产生的调查推算值以及国家经济研究局TAXSIM计算器生成的推算值进行了比较。行政数据包括两套美国国税局数据：（1）针对个人所得税申报表总体的有限税收信息，涵盖1040表、W-2表和1099-R表的选定行项目；（2）2011年由国税局处理的一套广泛的总体税收记录，涵盖了1040表几乎每个行项目以及一系列第三方信息申报表的大部分行项目。我们将这些国税局记录与参考年份2010年的当前人口调查年度社会与经济补充调查进行了关联。我们描述了如何形成税收单位，并利用这些关联数据估算各种类型的税收负债和税收抵免，为构建准确的税收衡量指标提供了路线图，同时保留调查家庭作为分配分析中的共享单位。我们发现，使用有限和广泛税收数据估计的各种税收组成部分的总量估计值彼此接近，并且比仅使用调查数据的推算值更接近国税局的公开表格。在个体层面，仅使用调查数据推算的联邦所得税和总税收的绝对误差平均分别约为调整后总收入的10%和13%。相比之下，有限税收数据推算的联邦所得税和总税收的平均绝对误差分别约为调整后总收入的2%和3%。对于劳动所得税抵免，有限税收数据推算的典型家庭平均误差不到20美元（而使用两种仅基于调查的推算方法，误差均超过500美元）。

papers.title: Probability Assessments of an Ice-Free Arctic: Comparing Statistical and Climate Model Projections
papers.authors: Francis X. Diebold, Glenn D. Rudebusch
papers.abstract: The downward trend in the amount of Arctic sea ice has a wide range of environmental and economic consequences including important effects on the pace and intensity of global climate change. Based on several decades of satellite data, we provide statistical forecasts of Arctic sea ice extent during the rest of this century. The best fitting statistical model indicates that overall sea ice coverage is declining at an increasing rate. By contrast, average projections from the CMIP5 global climate models foresee a gradual slowing of Arctic sea ice loss even in scenarios with high carbon emissions. Our long-range statistical projections also deliver probability assessments of the timing of an ice-free Arctic. These results indicate almost a 60 percent chance of an effectively ice-free Arctic Ocean sometime during the 2030s—much earlier than the average projection from the global climate models.
papers.zh_title: 无冰北极的概率评估：比较统计模型与气候模型预测
papers.zh_abstract: 北极海冰数量的下降趋势具有广泛的环境和经济后果，包括对全球气候变化速度和强度的重大影响。基于几十年的卫星数据，我们提供了本世纪剩余时间内北极海冰范围的统计预测。最佳拟合的统计模型表明，总体海冰覆盖面积正以加速的速度减少。相比之下，CMIP5全球气候模型的平均预测显示，即使在碳排放量高的情景下，北极海冰的损失也会逐渐放缓。我们的长期统计预测还提供了无冰北极出现时间的概率评估。这些结果表明，在2030年代期间，北极洋出现实际上无冰的概率接近60%——这比全球气候模型的平均预测要早得多。

papers.title: A Model of Occupational Licensing and Statistical Discrimination
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Bobby W. Chung
papers.abstract: We develop a model of statistical discrimination in occupational licensing. In the model, there is endogenous occupation selection and wage determination that depends on how costly it is to obtain the license and the productivity of the human capital that is bundled with the license. Under these assumptions, we find a unique equilibrium with sharp comparative statics for the licensing premiums. The key theoretical result in this paper is that the licensing premium is higher for workers who are members of demographic groups that face a higher cost of licensing. The intuition for this result is that the higher cost of licensing makes the license a more informative labor market signal. The predictions of the model can explain, for example, the empirical finding in the literature that occupational licenses that preclude felons close the racial wage gap among men by conferring a higher premium to black men than white men. Moreover, we show that in general the optimal cost of licensing is non-zero: an infinitely costly license screens out all workers while a cost less license is no screen at all.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LE, LS；JEL：D21, J31, J7, K31, L51, M5
papers.zh_title: 职业许可与统计歧视模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个职业许可中的统计歧视模型。在该模型中，存在内生的职业选择和工资决定，这取决于获得许可的成本以及与许可捆绑的人力资本的生产率。在这些假设下，我们找到了一个唯一的均衡，并对许可溢价进行了清晰的比较静态分析。本文的关键理论结果是，对于面临更高许可成本的群体成员来说，许可溢价更高。这一结果的直觉是，更高的许可成本使得许可成为更具信息量的劳动力市场信号。该模型的预测可以解释，例如，文献中的实证发现：禁止重罪犯的职业许可通过给予黑人男性比白人男性更高的溢价，缩小了男性间的种族工资差距。此外，我们表明，一般而言，最优的许可成本不为零：无限高的许可成本会筛选掉所有工人，而零成本的许可则根本无法起到筛选作用。

papers.title: Climate Finance
papers.authors: Stefano Giglio, Bryan T. Kelly, Johannes Stroebel
papers.abstract: We review the literature studying interactions between climate change and financial markets. We first discuss various approaches to incorporating climate risk in macro-finance models. We then review the empirical literature that explores the pricing of climate risks across a large number of asset classes including real estate, equities, and fixed income securities. In this context, we also discuss how investors can use these assets to construct portfolios that hedge against climate risk. We conclude by proposing several promising directions for future research in climate finance.
papers.zh_title: 气候金融
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了研究气候变化与金融市场相互作用的文献。我们首先讨论了将气候风险纳入宏观金融模型的各种方法。然后，我们回顾了探索气候风险在包括房地产、股票和固定收益证券在内的多种资产类别中定价的实证文献。在此背景下，我们还讨论了投资者如何利用这些资产构建对冲气候风险的投资组合。最后，我们提出了气候金融未来研究的几个有前景的方向。

papers.title: The Story of the Real Exchange Rate
papers.authors: Oleg Itskhoki
papers.abstract: The real exchange rate (RER) measures relative price levels across countries, capturing deviations from purchasing power parity (PPP). RER is a key variable in international macroeconomic models as it is central to equilibrium conditions in both goods and asset markets. It is also one of the most starkly-behaved variables empirically, tightly co-moving with the nominal exchange rate and virtually uncorrelated with most other macroeconomic variables, nominal or real. This survey lays out an equilibrium framework of RER determination, focusing separately on each building block and discussing corresponding empirical evidence. We emphasize home bias and incomplete pass-through into prices with expenditure switching and goods market clearing, imperfect international risk sharing, country budget constraint and monetary policy regime. We show that RER is inherently a general-equilibrium variable, which depends on the full model structure and policy regime, and therefore partial theories like PPP are insufficient to explain it. We also discuss issues of stationarity and predictability of exchange rates.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E31, F31, F41, G15
papers.zh_title: 实际汇率的故事
papers.zh_abstract: 实际汇率衡量了各国之间的相对价格水平，反映了对购买力平价的偏离。实际汇率是国际宏观经济模型中的一个关键变量，因为它对商品市场和资产市场的均衡条件都至关重要。在实证上，它也是最表现鲜明的变量之一，与名义汇率紧密联动，并且与大多数其他宏观经济变量（无论是名义的还是实际的）几乎不相关。本综述构建了一个实际汇率决定的均衡框架，分别聚焦于每个组成部分并讨论相应的实证证据。我们强调了国内偏好、包含支出转换和商品市场出清的不完全汇率传递、不完美的国际风险分担、国家预算约束以及货币政策制度。我们表明，实际汇率本质上是一个一般均衡变量，它依赖于完整的模型结构和政策制度，因此像购买力平价这样的局部理论不足以解释它。我们还讨论了汇率平稳性和可预测性的问题。

papers.title: World War I and the Restructuring of International Business
papers.authors: Ted Fertik, Naomi R. Lamoreaux
papers.abstract: This paper considers the effect of the First World War on large-scale businesses in Second-Industrial-Revolution industries like steel, electricity, and chemicals. For firms in the nations of the Entente, we argue, the war mainly interrupted long-term trends that resumed in the aftermath of the conflict. For Germany, however, the war and its subsequent territorial settlements had a disruptive impact on the economic geography of key industries. The global restructuring that resulted from the collapse of the Habsburg, Romanov, and Ottoman empires and Germany’s loss of its colonial possessions set up a new kind of international rivalry as German firms sought to regain their dominance by contracting with emerging nations in the European periphery and the Global South to build industrial capacity, forcing Britain and the now capital-rich United States to compete for this business or see their influence in these areas decline. The end result of this rivalry was the construction of massive steel works in Brazil and other industrializing countries around the world. These investments would provide the foundation for the import-substituting policies of the post-World War II era.
papers.zh_title: 第一次世界大战与国际商业的重组
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考虑了第一次世界大战对第二次工业革命中如钢铁、电力和化工等行业的大型企业的影响。我们认为，对于协约国国家的企业而言，战争主要中断了长期趋势，这些趋势在冲突结束后得以恢复。然而，对于德国来说，战争及其后续的领土解决方案对关键产业的经济地理产生了破坏性影响。哈布斯堡、罗曼诺夫和奥斯曼帝国的崩溃以及德国失去其殖民地所导致的全球重组，引发了一种新型的国际竞争，德国企业试图通过与欧洲边缘地区和全球南方的新兴国家签订合同来建设工业能力，从而重新获得其主导地位，这迫使英国和现在资本充裕的美国为这项业务展开竞争，否则它们在这些地区的影响力就会下降。这种竞争的最终结果是，在巴西和世界各地其他工业化国家建设了大型钢铁厂。这些投资将为二战后进口替代政策奠定基础。

papers.title: Does Eye-Tracking Have an Effect on Economic Behavior?
papers.authors: Jennifer Kee, Melinda Knuth, Joanna Lahey, Marco A. Palma
papers.abstract: Eye-tracking is becoming an increasingly popular tool for understanding the underlying behavior driving economic decisions. However, an important unanswered methodological question is whether the use of an eye-tracking device itself induces changes in the behavior of experiment participants. We study this question using eight popular games in experimental economics. We implement a simple design where participants are randomly assigned to either a control or an eye-tracking treatment condition. In seven of the eight games, eye-tracking did not produce different outcomes. In the Holt and Laury risk assessment (HL), subjects with multiple calibration attempts behave like outliers under eye-tracking conditions, skewing the overall results. Further exploration shows that poor calibrators also show marginally higher levels of negative emotion, which is correlated with higher risk aversion in both HL and in the Eckel and Grossman gambling tasks. Because difficulty calibrating is correlated with eye-tracking data quality, the standard practice of removing participants who did not have good eye-tracking data quality resulted in no difference between the treatment and control groups in HL. Our results suggest that experiments may incorporate eye-tracking equipment without inducing changes in the economic behavior of participants, particularly after observations with low eye-tracking quality are removed.
papers.zh_title: 眼动追踪对经济行为有影响吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 眼动追踪正成为一种越来越流行的工具，用于理解驱动经济决策的潜在行为。然而，一个重要的未解决的方法论问题是，使用眼动追踪设备本身是否会导致实验参与者行为的变化。我们使用实验经济学中的八个流行博弈来研究这个问题。我们实施了一个简单的设计，参与者被随机分配到对照组或眼动追踪处理条件。在八个博弈中的七个中，眼动追踪没有产生不同的结果。在Holt和Laury风险评估中，经过多次校准尝试的受试者在眼动追踪条件下表现得像异常值，从而扭曲了整体结果。进一步探索表明，校准不佳的受试者也表现出略高的负面情绪水平，这与在Holt和Laury以及Eckel和Grossman赌博任务中更高的风险厌恶相关。由于校准困难与眼动追踪数据质量相关，移除没有良好眼动追踪数据质量的参与者的标准做法导致在Holt和Laury中处理组和对照组之间没有差异。我们的结果表明，实验可以纳入眼动追踪设备而不会引起参与者经济行为的变化，特别是在移除眼动追踪质量低的观测值之后。

papers.title: Measuring Racial Discrimination in Algorithms
papers.authors: David Arnold, Will S. Dobbie, Peter Hull
papers.abstract: There is growing concern that the rise of algorithmic decision-making can lead to discrimination against legally protected groups, but measuring such algorithmic discrimination is often hampered by a fundamental selection challenge. We develop new quasi-experimental tools to overcome this challenge and measure algorithmic discrimination in the setting of pretrial bail decisions. We first show that the selection challenge reduces to the challenge of measuring four moments: the mean latent qualification of white and Black individuals and the race-specific covariance between qualification and the algorithm’s treatment recommendation. We then show how these four moments can be estimated by extrapolating quasi-experimental variation across as-good-as-randomly assigned decision-makers. Estimates from New York City show that a sophisticated machine learning algorithm discriminates against Black defendants, even though defendant race and ethnicity are not included in the training data. The algorithm recommends releasing white defendants before trial at an 8 percentage point (11 percent) higher rate than Black defendants with identical potential for pretrial misconduct, with this unwarranted disparity explaining 77 percent of the observed racial disparity in algorithmic recommendations. We find a similar level of algorithmic discrimination with regression-based recommendations, using a model inspired by a widely used pretrial risk assessment tool.
papers.zh_title: 衡量算法中的种族歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 人们越来越担心算法决策的兴起可能导致对受法律保护群体的歧视，但衡量这种算法歧视常常受到一个基本的选择性挑战的阻碍。我们开发了新的准实验工具来克服这一挑战，并在审前保释决策的背景下衡量算法歧视。我们首先表明，选择性挑战简化为衡量四个矩的挑战：白人和黑人个体的平均潜在资格，以及资格与算法处理建议之间的种族特定协方差。然后，我们展示了如何通过外推跨准随机分配决策者的准实验变化来估计这四个矩。来自纽约市的估计显示，一个复杂的机器学习算法歧视黑人被告，尽管被告的种族和族裔并未包含在训练数据中。该算法建议在审前释放白人被告的比率比具有相同审前不当行为潜力的黑人被告高出8个百分点（11%），这种无根据的差异解释了算法建议中观察到的种族差异的77%。我们使用受广泛使用的审前风险评估工具启发的模型，在基于回归的建议中发现了类似水平的算法歧视。

papers.title: Issuance and Incidence: SNAP Benefit Cycles and Grocery Prices
papers.authors: Jacob Goldin, Tatiana Homonoff, Katherine Meckel
papers.abstract: Many safety-net programs issue benefits as monthly lump-sum payments. We investigate how the timing of Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefit issuance affects food purchases and the incidence of the transfer. Using retail scanner data from a large sample of grocery stores and state and time variation in SNAP issuance schedules, we document large, SNAP-induced intra-month cycles in food expenditures. However, we find that retailers do not adjust prices based on these predictable patterns of demand. Our results therefore suggest that reforming issuance schedules reduce costs from SNAP-induced demand surges but are unlikely to affect the incidence of SNAP benefits.
papers.zh_title: 发放与归宿：SNAP福利周期与食品杂货价格
papers.zh_abstract: 许多安全网项目以每月一次性支付的形式发放福利。我们调查了补充营养援助计划福利发放的时间安排如何影响食品购买和转移支付的归宿。使用来自大量食品杂货店样本的零售扫描数据以及各州和时间的SNAP发放计划差异，我们记录了由SNAP引起的、在月度内食品支出的大幅周期波动。然而，我们发现零售商并未根据这些可预测的需求模式调整价格。因此，我们的结果表明，改革发放计划可以减少由SNAP引起的需求激增带来的成本，但不太可能影响SNAP福利的归宿。

papers.title: Maternal Mortality Risk and Spousal Differences in the Demand for Children
papers.authors: Nava Ashraf, Erica M. Field, Alessandra Voena, Roberta Ziparo
papers.abstract: Fertility decisions are often made by partners who may disagree. We develop a model in which conflicting interests prevent effective communication between spouses about the costs of child-bearing incurred by women. This mechanism is likely to further widen the spousal disagreement over fertility in environments where maternal health risk is high and imperfectly observed. We design an intervention to experimentally vary exposure to information about maternal health costs to either the husband or the wife among approximately 500 couples in Lusaka, Zambia. At baseline, husbands exhibit lower knowledge of maternal health risk compared to their wives. One year after the intervention, husbands significantly update their beliefs about maternal risk but only if the information is delivered directly to them, whereas wives update their beliefs about risk regardless of who in the household is treated. The intra-household asymmetry in information spillovers is strongest among men with more urgent demand for children. Households treated with information on maternal risk experience a sizable reduction in the probability of pregnancy - an effect which is strongest when the woman faces a higher risk of complications - but only when the information is delivered to wives rather than husbands is this decline in fertility accompanied by a significant reduction in transfers to the wife. These patterns are consistent with differences in initial beliefs and demand for children generating a barrier to credible communication between spouses.
papers.zh_title: 孕产妇死亡风险与配偶在子女需求上的差异
papers.zh_abstract: 生育决策通常由可能存在分歧的伴侣共同做出。我们构建了一个模型，其中利益冲突阻碍了配偶之间就女性承担的生育成本进行有效沟通。在孕产妇健康风险高且未被完美观察的环境中，这种机制可能进一步扩大配偶在生育问题上的分歧。我们在赞比亚卢萨卡的大约500对夫妇中设计了一项干预措施，通过实验改变丈夫或妻子接触孕产妇健康成本信息的情况。在基线时，与妻子相比，丈夫对孕产妇健康风险的了解较少。干预一年后，丈夫显著更新了他们对孕产妇风险的信念，但前提是信息直接传达给他们；而无论家庭中谁接受了处理，妻子都会更新她们对风险的信念。在子女需求更迫切的男性中，信息溢出的家庭内不对称性最强。接受孕产妇风险信息处理的家庭，怀孕概率显著降低——当女性面临更高的并发症风险时，这种效应最强——但只有当信息传达给妻子而非丈夫时，这种生育率的下降才伴随着向妻子转移支付的显著减少。这些模式与初始信念和子女需求的差异在配偶之间造成可信沟通障碍的情况一致。

papers.title: Who Values Future Energy Savings? Evidence from American Drivers
papers.authors: Arik Levinson, Lutz Sager
papers.abstract: Regulators attest that tightened energy efficiency standards save consumers money. Efficient light bulbs, appliances, and vehicles cost more upfront but reduce energy expenses by more than enough to compensate. We use survey data on American cars and their drivers to examine whether individual drivers have indeed underinvested in fuel economy, given the gas prices they face and the miles they drive. We find that may be true, but only on average. Some drivers could likely have saved money by spending more upfront for efficient cars. But many others could have saved money purchasing less expensive, less fuel-efficient cars. In fact we find little correlation between individual drivers’ annual fuel expenditures and their fuel economy choices: a driver’s income, sex, age, and education are far more closely associated with their vehicle’s fuel economy. We can rule out several explanations for the disconnect. Rich car purchasers do not seem to consider fuel expenses any more than poorer ones, undermining arguments that borrowing constraints prevent low-income consumers from investing in fuel efficiency. And the disconnect between fuel expenses and vehicle choice holds whether we examine anticipated or realized mileage, ruling out mistaken expectations about future driving as an explanation.
papers.zh_title: 谁看重未来的能源节省？来自美国驾驶员的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 监管机构声称，更严格的能效标准能为消费者省钱。节能灯泡、电器和车辆的前期成本更高，但减少的能源支出足以弥补这一成本。我们使用美国汽车及其驾驶员的调查数据，考察个体驾驶员是否确实在燃油经济性方面投资不足，考虑到他们面临的气油价格和驾驶里程。我们发现这可能是真的，但仅限于平均水平。一些驾驶员可能通过为高效汽车支付更多前期费用来省钱。但许多其他驾驶员可能通过购买更便宜、燃油效率较低的汽车来省钱。事实上，我们发现个体驾驶员的年度燃油支出与其燃油经济性选择之间几乎没有相关性：驾驶员的收入、性别、年龄和教育程度与其车辆的燃油经济性关联更为密切。我们可以排除几种关于这种脱节的解释。富裕的购车者似乎并不比贫穷的购车者更考虑燃油费用，这削弱了借贷约束阻止低收入消费者投资燃油效率的论点。而且，无论我们考察预期里程还是实际里程，燃油支出与车辆选择之间的脱节都存在，排除了对未来驾驶的错误预期作为解释。

papers.title: Exporting from China: The Determinants of Trade Status
papers.authors: Russell Cooper, Guan Gong, Guanliang Hu, Ping Yan
papers.abstract: This paper studies the exporting decision of Chinese manufacturing firms. The economic framework stresses the dynamic decision by both state controlled and private entities to export in a model with labor adjustment costs. In this complex environment, a simple decision rule whereby export status depends only on current productivity does not hold. Nor does this rule match data patterns. The estimated model is used to understand the factors that influence export status. The analysis highlights the economic significance of labor adjustment costs in shaping both employment and trade dynamics.
papers.zh_title: 中国出口：贸易状态的决定因素
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中国制造业企业的出口决策。经济框架强调了在存在劳动力调整成本的模型中，国有和私营实体进行出口的动态决策。在这种复杂环境下，简单的决策规则——即出口状态仅取决于当前生产率——并不成立。这一规则也不符合数据模式。我们利用估计的模型来理解影响出口状态的因素。分析凸显了劳动力调整成本在塑造就业和贸易动态方面的经济重要性。

papers.title: Detecting Drivers of Behavior at an Early Age: Evidence from a Longitudinal Field Experiment
papers.authors: Marco Castillo, John A. List, Ragan Petrie, Anya Samek
papers.abstract: We use field experiments with nearly 900 children to investigate how skills developed at ages 3-5 drive later-life outcomes. We find that skills map onto three distinct factors - cognitive skills, executive functions, and economic preferences. Returning to the children up to 7 years later, we find that executive functions, but not cognitive skills, predict the likelihood of receiving disciplinary referrals. Economic preferences have an independent effect: children who displayed impatience at ages 3-5 were more likely to receive disciplinary referrals. Random assignment to a parenting program reduced disciplinary referrals. This effect was not mediated by skills or preferences.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：C91, C93, D12, D81, I21, I26
papers.zh_title: 早期行为驱动因素的检测：来自纵向现场实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用涉及近900名儿童的现场实验，研究3-5岁期间发展的技能如何影响后期生活结果。我们发现这些技能映射到三个不同的因素：认知技能、执行功能和经济偏好。在长达7年后对这些儿童进行回访时，我们发现执行功能（而非认知技能）能预测受到纪律处分的可能性。经济偏好具有独立影响：在3-5岁时表现出不耐烦的儿童更有可能受到纪律处分。随机分配参加育儿项目减少了纪律处分。这一效应并非由技能或偏好所中介。

papers.title: Infrastructure and Urban Form
papers.authors: Edward L. Glaeser
papers.abstract: Cities are shaped by transportation infrastructure. Older cities were anchored by waterways. Nineteenth century cities followed the path of streetcars and subways. The 20th century city rebuilt itself around the car. The close connection between transportation and urban form is natural, since cities are defined by their density. Physical proximity and transportation investments serve the common cause of reducing the transportation costs for goods, people and ideas. The close connection between transportation and urban form suggests the need for spatial equilibrium models that embed a full set of equilibrium effects into any evaluation of transportation spending. Their connection implies that restrictions on land use will change, and often reduce, the value of investing in transportation infrastructure. Future transportation innovations, including autonomous vehicles and telecommuting, are likely to also change urban form, although cities often take decades to adapt to new forms of mobility.
papers.zh_title: 基础设施与城市形态
papers.zh_abstract: 城市由交通基础设施塑造。较老的城市以水道为锚点。19世纪的城市沿着有轨电车和地铁的路径发展。20世纪的城市围绕汽车重建自身。交通与城市形态之间的紧密联系是自然的，因为城市由其密度定义。物理邻近性和交通投资服务于共同目标，即降低商品、人员和思想的运输成本。交通与城市形态之间的紧密联系表明，需要空间均衡模型，将全套均衡效应嵌入任何交通支出的评估中。它们的联系意味着对土地利用的限制将改变并通常降低交通基础设施投资的价值。未来的交通创新，包括自动驾驶汽车和远程办公，也可能改变城市形态，尽管城市通常需要数十年才能适应新的出行方式。

papers.title: Who Supplies PPP Loans (And Does it Matter)? Banks, Relationships and the COVID Crisis
papers.authors: Lei Li, Philip Strahan
papers.abstract: We analyze bank supply of credit under the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP). The literature emphasizes relationships as a means to improve lender information, which helps banks manage credit risk. Despite imposing no risk, however, PPP supply reflects traditional measures of relationship lending: decreasing in bank size; increasing in prior experience, in commitment lending, and in core deposits. Our results suggest a new benefit of bank relationships, as they help firms access government-subsidized lending. Consistent with this benefit, we show that bank PPP supply, based on the structure of the local banking sector, alleviates increases in unemployment.
papers.zh_title: 谁提供PPP贷款（这重要吗）？银行、关系与新冠疫情危机
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了银行在薪资保护计划（PPP）下的信贷供给。文献强调关系是改善贷款人信息的手段，有助于银行管理信用风险。然而，尽管PPP不施加风险，其供给仍反映了传统的关系贷款衡量指标：随银行规模增大而减少；随先前经验、承诺贷款和核心存款的增加而增加。我们的结果表明银行关系的一个新益处，即它们帮助企业获得政府补贴贷款。与此益处一致，我们表明基于当地银行部门结构的银行PPP供给缓解了失业率的上升。

papers.title: Digital Capital and Superstar Firms
papers.authors: Prasanna Tambe, Lorin Hitt, Daniel Rock, Erik Brynjolfsson
papers.abstract: General purpose technologies like information technology typically require complementary firm-specific investments to create value. These complementary investments produce a form of capital, which is typically intangible and which we call digital capital. We create an extended firm-level panel on IT labor investments (1990-2016) using data from LinkedIn. We then apply Hall’s Quantity Revelation Theorem to compute both prices and quantities of digital capital over recent decades. We find that 1) digital capital prices vary significantly over time, peaking around the dot-com boom in 2000, 2) significant digital capital quantities have accumulated since the 1990s, with digital capital accounting for at least 25% of firms’ assets by the end of our panel, 3) that digital capital has disproportionately accumulated in a small subset of “superstar” firms and its concentration is much greater than the concentration of other assets, and 4) that digital capital accumulation predicts firm-level productivity about three years in the future.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：D24, D25, M21, O32, O33
papers.zh_title: 数字资本与超级明星企业
papers.zh_abstract: 像信息技术这样的通用技术通常需要互补的企业特定投资来创造价值。这些互补投资产生一种资本形式，通常是无形的，我们称之为数字资本。我们利用LinkedIn的数据创建了一个关于IT劳动力投资的扩展企业层面面板（1990-2016年）。然后，我们应用霍尔的量揭示定理来计算近几十年来数字资本的价格和数量。我们发现：1）数字资本价格随时间显著变化，在2000年互联网泡沫期间达到峰值；2）自1990年代以来积累了大量的数字资本，到我们面板数据末期，数字资本至少占企业资产的25%；3）数字资本不成比例地积累在一小部分“超级明星”企业中，其集中度远高于其他资产的集中度；4）数字资本积累可预测大约三年后的企业层面生产率。

papers.title: Self-Fulfilling Risk Panics: An Expected Utility Framework
papers.authors: Jess Benhabib, Xuewen Liu, Pengfei Wang
papers.abstract: Even if an asset has no fundamental uncertainty with a constant dividend process, a stochastic sentiment-driven equilibrium for the asset price exists besides the well-known fundamental equilibrium. Our paper constructs such sentiment-driven equilibria under general utility functions within an OLG structure. Our paper further shows that the existence of sentiment-driven equilibria is robust in a standard infinite-period model as long as the pricing kernel is affected by the asset price.
papers.zh_title: 自我实现的恐慌：一个期望效用框架
papers.zh_abstract: 即使一项资产没有基本面不确定性且具有恒定的股息过程，除了众所周知的基本面均衡外，还存在一个由情绪驱动的随机资产价格均衡。本文在代际交叠结构下，在一般效用函数下构建了这种情绪驱动均衡。本文进一步表明，只要定价核受资产价格影响，情绪驱动均衡的存在在标准无限期模型中就是稳健的。

papers.title: The Social Side of Early Human Capital Formation: Using a Field Experiment to Estimate the Causal Impact of Neighborhoods
papers.authors: John A. List, Fatemeh Momeni, Yves Zenou
papers.abstract: The behavioral revolution within economics has been largely driven by psychological insights, with the sister sciences playing a lesser role. This study leverages insights from sociology to explore the role of neighborhoods on human capital formation at an early age. We do so by estimating the spillover effects from a large-scale early childhood intervention on the educational attainment of over 2,000 disadvantaged children in the United States. We document large spillover effects on both treatment and control children who live near treated children. Interestingly, the spillover effects are localized, decreasing with the spatial distance to treated neighbors. Perhaps our most novel insight is the underlying mechanisms at work: the spillover effect on non-cognitive scores operate through the child's social network while parental investment is an important channel through which cognitive spillover effects operate.
